Going into my third month with wakana and wouldn’t want to stay anywhere else, her home is perfect.

Just moved into my own apartment in Tokyo after staying with Wakana for over three months. She's an angel and my favorite person in this country, and one of my favorite people in the world. I'm so grateful for her friendship and all the help she's given me over the years. Her home is by far the best Airbnb I've experienced in Japan - if you're on the fence, this is the sign you're looking for to just book her room. It'll be great, promise.
遇到wakana姐姐真是无比的幸运！第一天很晚才到住所，本来姐姐要去车站接我，后来因为我迷路直接打车了，姐姐不但在门口等我，还帮我搬超重的行李。并且那么晚了还给我准备了晚餐。之后的两天也一直对我多加照顾，早上送我去地铁站，帮助我买票，带我去吃饭，去散步…让我的东京之行充满温暖。还有姐姐的民宿也是超级棒！干净整洁，并且东西都很有品味。总之非常值得入住！

This is by far the best airbnb experience I've ever had. To be traveling alone as a woman can be anxious and Wakana's Airbnb was the perfect spot- safe, accessible, extremely clean, many amenities (welcome basket with water, snacks, toiletries etc), an extremely beautiful and modern home with the most comfortable bed I've stayed in for awhile.
Wakana as a host goes above and beyond with helping assist in check in, communicating with drivers should they get lost, to even helping me find and translate an emergency dentist visit.
My trip would have been nowhere near as enjoyable if i didn't stay with Wakana, I cant wait to come back!

A super friendly host with an easygoing personality and knowledge of the area! She grew up in the neighborhood and has a ton of tips and recommendations. She came to the nearest train station to make sure I won't get lost trying to get to her home. Very kind lady.
The neighborhood itself is quiet and residential with a bunch of unique local stores and restaurants. You can experience Tokyo as if you lived there. And big Shibuya (party district) is only a few stations away.
The private room is clean, roomy, and comfy with a (almost?) walk-in closet and a study with dedicated workspace. Sunny, modern, wonderful, and beautiful home!
Highly recommend!

今回は新宿にイベントがあるため、泊まらせて頂きました。
家は賑やかな下北沢駅から徒歩10分ぐらいですが、とても静かなところで、朝3、4分散歩したら、鳥の声がとても美しく、清々しい神社があり、晴れの日には富士山も見えます。
また、新宿まで電車で10分以内着けるので、交通もとても便利です。
家に着いたら、とても落ち着く雰囲気で旅の疲れが癒されます。2匹の猫ちゃんはそれぞれ個性がありながら、フレンドリーで可愛くて、猫好きな方ならたまらないです。
ホストの若菜さんは下北沢の地元おすすめのお店を案内して頂き、地元の方々と触れ合いながら、グルメを堪能しました。
また、下北沢ならではの個性的なお店や古着屋の特徴など色々教えて頂き、気に入りの古着を購入できて、大満足でした。
色々おもてなしして頂き、本当にありがとうございました！機会があれば、ぜひまた泊まらせてください^ ^
It’s a quiet area nearby the center in Tokyo.

Wakana (and her two lovely cats) is one of the friendliest hosts I’ve encountered on Airbnb! The room is spacious by Japanese standards and overall the house is the welcoming and cosy space. Shimokitazawa is itself quite fascinating to explore, and it is only three stops from Shibuya. A great place to stay for both first-time and repeat visitors to Tokyo.

Amazing experience! Before booking, I read all the positive comments on Airbnb regarding the quality of the hosting, and I was somehow expecting to be disappointed… and in reality: I can only agree with them! Wakana is such a nice, friendly and interesting person - she made me feel at home directly, was extremely reactive to any question, lent so naturally her bike so that I could go have a run in yoyogi park, and cooked for me as I checked in late… in addition to her warm hosting, her house is very well designed, clean, and the bed and sheets were of very good quality - so I slept very well. Her lovely cats and green plants are just adding to the special character of this Airbnb that I highly recommend! Will definitely book there when I’m back :) thank you Wakana!

Wakana is an excellent host, the house is beautiful, and the room is spotless. Every amenity in the home is first-class — I stayed in the winter and the room, blanket, floor, and shower were heated, the restroom was spotlessly clean, and the shared space with Wakana-san was open, sunny, and a great place to relax. Wakana knows tons of local restaurants and was happy to share recommendations, and also took me to a local dinner restaurant. Check-in was easy because she met me at the station and we walked — it took less than five minutes.
The room itself has a dedicated workspace and a separate closet, so it was easy to unpack my things and very private. She has two cats which are both very cute and almost an Airbnb experience on their own. Like a cat cafe, except way better. However, it is easy to be private and work separately if you need to.
Highly recommend this place for short- or long-term stays. The neighborhood is beautiful and Wakana is a great host!!

한국인 관광객들이 주로 머무는 신주쿠나 시부야는 숙소 가격대비 너무 좁아서 캐리어도 완전히 못 펼 정도인데, 시부야에서 전철로 딱 8-10분만 투자하면 와카나 상의 멋지고 넓은 집에서 머무를 수 있어요! 역에서 와카니상 집까지는 도보로 5분이면 갑니다. 접근성 최고예요
1층 전체를 다 쓸 수 있고, 한 방에 침실, 분리된 사무공간(거울, 테이블이 있음), 그리고 워크인 클로젯의 3개 공간이 있어서 너무 편하고 넓게 잘 썼습니다
욕실도 엄청 깔끔하고 욕조와 샤워시설 수압 모두 훌륭했고, 이솝제품이 비치되어있어서 웬만한 호텔 어메니티보다 훨씬 나았어요.
그리고 2층은 거실 겸 응접실 같은 곳인데 통창에 무인양품 카달로그에서 나온것같은 인테리어가 정말 좋았습니다. 햇살 받으면서 고양이 두 마리에게 츄르를 줬는데 진짜 행복했어요(고양이들은 진짜 너무너무 순하고 귀여워요. 사람 좋아하는 개냥이에요!🐱🐱). 여기서 사진 많이 찍었어요
와카나상은 다양한 국가에 살아보고, 영어를 너무 잘하시기때문에 의사소통에 전혀 문제가 없었어요. 숙소에 도착하기 전에 공항~숙소까지 오는 방법을 엄청 친절하고 자세하게 설명해줬어요. 도쿄 지하철이 복잡하다해서 살짝 걱정했는데, 와카나상 팁 덕분에 수월하게 올 수 있었습니다. 물론 역에 도착하고 나서 와카나상이 직접 숙소까지 에스코트도 해주셨어요.
그리고 시간 여유가 되신다면 와카나상과 아침식사를 하며 동네 투어를 해보시길 꼭 권해드려요. 와카나상이 사는 지역은 예전 철도가 다니던 길을 개조한 마을이라 우리나라로 치면 연남동 같은 곳인데, 깨끗하고 분위기있고 감성넘치고 힙한 가게들이 많아서 와카나상 설명 들으며 동네를 같이 산책했던 시간이 너무 좋았습니다.
숙소에서 도보로 10분정도 걸으면 시모키타자와인데 빈티지샵 좋아하시는 분들은 만족하실거예요. 구경할 곳과 식당도 많아요
마지막으로 와카나상, 하루뿐이라 아쉬웠지만 친절하고 따뜻한 시간 너무 감사합니다. 아침먹으면서 나눈 얘기들 큰 힘이 됐고, 한국 오면 꼭 연락주세요!💗
Absolutely fantastic place and host. Love to stay again!
The best Airbnb experience I’ve ever had, Wakana-San is an amazing host and made my experience in Tokyo the best! She went out of her way to make sure that I was comfortable I can’t wait to be back!

I loved meeting and staying with Wakana. Her place is lovely and light-filled, with a comfy bed, spaces to work, and two cute cats. Wakana is a delightful person who goes out of her way to make sure people are comfortable and have what they need to have a great stay in Tokyo.

Wakana’s place is perfect. She is so friendly and goes out of her way to make sure you’re comfortable. She even prepared udon as well as breakfast and tea during my short stay. Her two sweet cats are adorable, and the house is lovely. Everything I needed for my first trip to Japan. Thank you, Wakana!

I was so very fortunate to have discovered Wakana’s listing from an blogger’s recommendation. I had the most wonderful stay with Wakana. She is such a beautiful host. She made me feel right at home and was very helpful with lots of things, especially for solo female travellers! And her home is amazing which she also provide a amazing and well thought through range of amenities.
You’ll also fall in love to Gin & Sumire, her two adorable cats! I know who to look up if I’m travel back to Tokyo in the future!
I had anunforgettable stay at Wakana's place ! She is an amazing host and made me feel  totally  welcome and at home !!
호스트가 매우 친절합니다. 방은 흠잡을 데 없이 청결하고, 주변 맛집과 이자카야도 소개시켜 주셔서 도쿄에서 머무는 동안 정말 편안하고 즐겁게 생활할 수 있었습니다. 특히 호스트와 차를 마시며 다양한 이야기를 나눌 수 있어서 좋았습니다. 다음에 꼭 다시 올게요!
Wakana is amazing! Such a friendly host. She really made me feel welcome, helped me make plans, gave me advice, and spent some time with me. She and the cats are so sweet :) thank you!

We had the most wonderful stay with Wakana. She is such an amazing host and now friend. She made us feel at home and was very kind and welcoming. We had many conversations with Wakana and she gave us plenty of recommendations. She also took us to get Ramen for lunch and made us delicious breakfasts. Her home is very clean and comfortable and we loved the company of Wakana and her beautiful cats! The location is also perfect, quiet neighbourhood with a short walk to busy Shimo Kitazawa and the train station.
We could not recommend staying with Wakana more, she is delightful and the best host! We hope to return!

Wakana's home set the bar extremely high for airbnb bookings. The neighborhood is sweet and local which made daily walks to the train station all the more memorable. With a less than 10 minute walk to the station and the close proximity to Shibuya, the location is hard to beat. It is a nice break from the hustle of the city. Wakana's house is beautifully furnished and lit. I loved spending time just relaxing during slow mornings. Her home is so welcoming as well as Wakana herself. She is such a warm person; I felt that I was visiting a friend rather than staying with a host! She always checked in to make sure I was comfortable and had so many good recommendations for restaurants and places to visit. Her cats were a top highlight of this trip! They are both so so so CUTE! No need for cat cafes, please book this place instead. You will have two cats to wake up to and to come home to everyday!
I look forward to my next booking with Wakana. I will definitely be back!

Very good taste of interior design and living selection!
Always have flowers and lovely 2 cats around you while the time you are staying.
The host Wakana is a super elegant, active and hospitality lady, she will give you all information you need to help you spend your best time in Tokyo.
Highly recommend with no doubt!

AMAZING stay. Wakana is such a kind soul and a wonderful host, especially for solo female travelers!
This was my first stop in Japan, and Wakana made me feel right at home. She greeted me with tea, gave recommendations, and even treated me to her favorite ramen shop - SO delicious. Couldn't have asked for a better experience!!

I was doing a solo trip, so I wanted a place to unwind
I really enjoyed Wakana's place, it was lovely and spacious for an individual (including the closet for my things!). The cats were adorable and very friendly, they added a lot of fun to getting back from a tiring day
Bonus of course was getting to chat with Wakana, she was such a lovely host and I really appreciated getting to chat with her over breakfast.
If you want to be more central within Tokyo, the location might not be the best, but if you want to be exploring Shibuya and Shimokitazawa while living within a neighborhood, it's definitely perfect for that!

A great experience. Wakana is an extremely welcoming person and thanks to her I have the feeling to understand a bit better Japanese culture. I could only recommend.
The house is super sunny and you’ll meet two adorable cats. Situated in the “hipster neighborhood” of Tokyo (Shimokitazawa station is a few minutes by foot away) while super close to the center (10 minutes from shibuya).
Overall a great stay !
A wonderful stay, Wakana was very friendly, helpful and accommodating! However, her two cute cats were definitely the highlight of the stay. Would recommend to anyone coming to Tokyo!

Wakana really goes above & beyond to make you feel welcome to her home. She even picked me up from the train station & made sure I felt comfortable throughout my stay. Visiting Japan can be a bit overwhelming, but I felt at peace whenever I was here. I loved talking over breakfast with Wakana in the mornings and felt very safe and cared for. I would definitely stay with Wakana again next time I come to Tokyo. I had such a wonderful time. She is truly a super host. Considerate, kind and helpful.
Location: 6 min walk from Ikenoue Station + 5min train to Shibuya, very convenient!
Neighborhood: lots of vintage shopping, cool cafes & a temple
Space: spotless, fresh, lots of room to unwind, a closet for storage, a comfty bed, automated washer/dryer, fully equipped bathroom amenities, friendly cats ^^
Communication: 10 stars above the board! 💫Wakana made sure to check-in with me & was ready to offer any assistance if I had any questions or trouble.
ありがとう ございました!!

Wakana is sooooo nice! Staying at this place made our trip in Japan just so beautiful and relaxing. The house is clean and cozy, with two lovely cats. The place is very close to center Tokyo, Shibuya, which is really convenient and also the community is so quiet. Wakana is really friendly and helpful, we hanged out together and she indeed helped us a lot throughout our trip. Everything in the house shows her good taste. If girls ever want to travel to Japan but with concerns of foreign atmosphere, plz no hesitate to choose it! I think I will definitely recommend it to all my friends and will come back in near future.

I had such a great time during my stay here at Wakana’s!
Wakana herself is amazing! She is an extremely hospitable and friendly host and made sure I felt right at home during my stay. I was able to experience many things I wouldn’t have otherwise experienced if I did not stay with her! She provided many local recommendations from food to attractions and even went out of her way to cook for me often! I really enjoyed our talks and the time we spent together :) Even prior to my trip, she was proactive in reaching out to establish communication which was especially reassuring as a first time solo traveller.
As for the accommodation itself, the house is gorgeous, from the many plants to her adorable cats who I miss so so much. The amenities provided are plentiful and the room is spacious and clean! The listing matches irl to a T!
Genuinely a 10/10 experience! It’s also really near to places like Shibuya and Omotesando so it’s very convenient to get around Tokyo from her place! :)

Wakana is a wonderful host and if you’re thinking of booking this Airbnb — just do it!
The Airbnb itself is located in a quiet neighborhood and gives you more of a local feel as opposed to the neighboring Shibuya and Shimokitazawa. It’s perfect if you want to remove yourself from the noise, but not so far away that you can still get to those trendier areas quickly.
Wakana’s place is wonderful and the room was nice and clean and came with many snacks, coffee, other personal care goodies, and two cats who like to wander in from time to time! (Ghin and Sumire are sooo cute and cuddly and we miss them dearly). You can definitely maintain a good sense of privacy if that’s what you’d prefer, but we loved talking to Wakana and getting to know her!
The only thing we regret about our trip to Tokyo is not spending more time with Wakana! We would definitely book this Airbnb again if we’re back :)

I'm usually wary/shy of staying with a host but decided to take a chance while in Tokyo. I'm *so* glad I did — Wakana is warm and open, and her apartment is beautiful and spotless. She went above and beyond as a host and I can't wait to stay with her again on my next visit. Thank you for everything, Wakana!

This was the best airbnb experience that I have ever had. To start off, she picked us up from the station which was close to her home and easily accessible. She made us dinner the first night that we got there and even took us out for breakfast one morning with a tour of the neighborhood as well. Her house felt like a peaceful retreat. Wakana is incredibly kind and helpful during our stay and even after we weren't staying with her anymore. She had the cutest cats which made our trip infinitely better. We miss them dearly! Thank you for everything, Wakana. We would definitely stay here again and highly recommend this place.

Most amazing air bnb! The area was super nice and close to Shimokitazawa, with good restaurants and shops and metro stations close by. Wakana is just amazing, kind and very helpful, I really enjoyed my stay there. And her two cats are just the cutest! I would definitely recommend! :)

I absolutely loved Wakana’s home. This was my first time in Tokyo and I’m so glad I had her as a host to help with my stay. Wakanda was very proactive in her outreach before I arrived to make sure I had no trouble finding her place — she even met me at the train station! The first night we had dinner together and she told me about the area. The place she chose was absolutely delicious. She also had helpful travel tips, like recommending an e-sim card company and she loaned me her portable charger for my phone because I forgot to bring mine. The best way I know how to describe her neighborhood is a suburban area outside of Tokyo city center. It’s extremely quiet and peaceful with delicious restaurants. About a 10 min walk away is a fun area with vintage clothing shops, restaurants, bars, and more. Her place is about a 5 min walk from the train. Wakana made herself easily available throughout my entire stay and was quick to respond to my messages. I would stay here again!

Incredibly wise charming lady with her clean, cozy, well-organized house and 2 lovely cats!!
Wakana-san is so kind that picked me up from the station. The neighborhood is very local, close to Shibuya, with good bakeries, small restaurants and nice shops.
She is so open-minded person and she really inspired me a lot during the conversation. The most memorable night in Tokyo with Wakana-san! I really had a great time!!! Just highly recommend!!!

I absolutely loved staying at her home. Wakana was a great host. Her home is very comforting and peaceful. I absolutely loved her cats. They were my favorite roommates! I would definitely come back here. Thanks Wakana for having me in your wonderful home. ☺️
wakana is very friendly and easy to communicate. I really enjoy to stay on her house and really good experience for my airbnb. Hopefully i can come back again
Amazing stay. The flat is beautiful in a peaceful part of Tokyo. Wakana was so kind and welcoming and went beyond any expectations. The cats are adorable and the room is perfect!

Absolutely pristine flat, looks just like the photos but even nicer. The room was so lovely, I felt right at home and Wakana's hospitality is unmatched she was so kind! Also the cats are adorable! You feel so at peace in this flat and the area is very quiet and residential but there's also lots of restaurants and shops around and things to do.

I enjoyed my stay with Wakana-san very much! She was so helpful and friendly, and such an interesting person with lots of life experience. I really appreciated our conversations over tea and dinner and that she took time out of her day to get to know me.
Her home was beautiful, with a comfortable space to rest in and lots of thoughtful amenities. The local area is peaceful and well-connected, and Wakana-san shared lots of food recommendations which were spot on.
Her two cats were also a particular highlight! They are both very calm and friendly, and I enjoyed playing with them and feeding them, as well as their occasional night-time visits.
I'd highly recommend Wakana-san's place for those visiting Tokyo.

We had a great time staying with Wakana and her cute cats! She was very friendly and easy to talk to! She even let us check in early which was very kind of her. Her place is a 5 min walk to the train station and that was so convenient. The whole house was spotless and her two cats were so friendly! I would definitely stay again whenever I’m back!

Wakana was a great host, she made me feel right at home. Her place is an oasis after a long day of shopping and sight seeing. I enjoyed relaxing in the house and talking to her. She even show me around the neighborhood, took me to a festival in the temple and treated me to a delicious soba dinner. I am glad I stayed in her Airbnb so I was able to appreciate Japanese culture a bit more. It was a great stay! One more thing, she accommodated my late flight schedule and let me checked out late. Thank you so much Wakana!

What a gem! Wakana and her lovely home made my time in Tokyo. If you stay here, you’re really lucky. The place is incredibly comfortable. Quite, great bed, incredible location(!). and Wakana is fantastic, helpful, personable, and full of great recommendations. One of my best air bnb experiences ever.

Wakana hat uns sehr herzlich in ihrem Zuhause empfangen und wir fühlten uns direkt sehr wohl. Das lag auch ihren beiden wunderbaren Katzen, die sehr zutraulich auf uns zugingen und wir konnten so unsere Zeit dort richtig genießen. Wakana hat uns darüberhinaus noch viele Empfehlungen für Restaurants mitgegeben und sie war sehr hilfsbereit. Ihr Haus bietet mehr als genug Platz und liegt gut gelegen um schnell und bequem nach Tokyo reinzufahren.
Definitiv eine Empfehlung!! Vor allem wenn man Katzen mag ;) Wir kommen gerne wieder.

Wakana’s place is beautiful and cosy, the bedroom is so comfortable and clean with tatami mats and a fluffy bed. Wakana’s care in her set up for us was seen in everything - from the beautiful body wash and shampoos she provided down to the lovely bouquet she bought us and welcome note she wrote! She is accompanied with two other superhosts: her very adorable cats who greet you at the door when you’re home each night. I think what you’re paying for really isn’t just an accommodation, but Wakana’s hosting itself as she would chat with us and share stories, provide many well curated and easy to find local food spots to check out (this alone was priceless!) and her care for you as guests was next level. Highly recommended for any solo travellers or a couple who’d love some local guidance on Tokyo. Thank you again Wakana ❤️

I loved my stay with Wakana! She gave me clear instructions on how to get to her place from the airport. I also arrived with a small issue- since physical IC cards aren’t being given out at the moment, she provided me with hers to borrow for the rest of my trip! She even let me use it after checking out for my trip to Kyoto and provided me with an envelope to send back before I leave. Such a life saver!
The location is great. Close to the train stations, and walkable to shops/cafes. Her home is very clean and cozy. She provided toiletries and the bed was comfy! Wakana took me out to dinner for my first and last night and they were such amazing places (ramen and katsu). She gave me local recs and provided a simple breakfast one of my days.
I enjoyed getting to know her and LOVED having her cats as company! I miss them already. Highly recommend Wakana’s Airbnb!

Wakana’s home was a unique and rare experience that you do not usually find on airbnb. For our first time traveling to Japan, Wakana gave us a warm welcome by collecting us from the local station and showing us to her home, where her two cats Ghin and Sumire waited to greet us. We had tea together and she even treated us one of her favorite local ramen places. She also showed us to a great soba restaurant where we otherwise may not have been able to order since there was no English menu. Her home is located in a beautiful and quiet neighborhood, but still very close to Shimokitazawa shopping and restaurants. We stayed with Wakana for a week and loved it. She is eager to help her guests have the best experience possible. I encourage any future guests to spend time with her, she is great company and wants to get to know you. As cat lovers who are missing our own cats while on vacation, Sumire and Ghin were the cherry on top. We miss them already. Thank you so much Wakana. ❤️

We had the most amazing week in Tokyo staying at Wakana’s place. Her house is really nice and we fell in love with her two cats. She was a very generous host and now a friend. We were able to walk to the train station and to Shimokatazawa  where there is lots to do. Would highly recommend!!! Thank you Wakana
真的是非常愉快的入住体验。房东Wakana非常热情，到车站接我们，沿路介绍附近好吃的餐厅，我们尝试了bakery和炸猪扒店，真的很美味！房东有两只很可爱亲人的蓝猫，每天早上和晚上都会过来打招呼，回来的时候猫咪也来迎接。住宿卫生非常好，干净整洁，房东品味也很好，提供的沐浴液都是很好的品牌。非常物超所值的一次住宿体验！
Great location and beautiful apartment. Wakana made everything possible to make us feel comfortable.

Staying at Wakana’s lovely place has been a very wise and nice decision on my part as a solo traveler. She has been so kind and helpful to me that I was very reluctant to leave. She made me feel so at home and helped me out a lot which made everything go more smoothly. The neighborhood is very calm and so charming. I don’t think I would have discovered this area if it wasn’t for this Airbnb. The cats were the ultimate cherry on top! I miss them so much. Sumire is very  cuddly and way too cute, Ghin on the other hand is very chill, laid back and visits you in the morning. I loved my stay and you will too. Don’t think too much and book this Airbnb if you want experience a more local and laidback Tokyo 🥰🥰🥰

若菜さん宅は、最寄り駅からも近く、閑静な住宅街の一角にあります。本当に静かで朝は鳥のさえずりが聞こえます。渋谷からたった3駅先で、こんな静かな家に泊まれるなんて最高です。小さいですが公園も近く、朝の散歩に最適です。お部屋や備品、お花、アメニティなどこだわりの品々があり、センスの良さに驚きです。ネコが二匹いるのに、お部屋をきれいに保ってらっしゃいます。
また、ぜひ伺いたいです。

Wakana is an absolutely lovely host who welcomes her guests with really authentic care.
We had a meal with her which made us feel right at home. She’s relaxed and calm and it was a really beautiful stay.
Thank you again Wakana and wise old Ging the cat!
도쿄 세타가야 주거지역에서 현지인처럼 지낼 수 있는 멋진 공간이었습니다!

Beautiful, comfortable space in quiet lovely location. Close enough to town but not right in the middle of the action of Shimokitazawa. Perfect for my needs! I’m a very private person so I was reluctant to do a share type of Airbnb. My very first time after staying at many of them. Wakana is such a kind person. She was very welcoming and made me feel relaxed and right at home. She was so helpful with my laundry and making sure I had everything I needed. She even took me to a doctor’s office when I was having an emergency health issue. The gorgeous cats both came into my room to check on my well being. I would be happy to stay with Wakana sometime in the future, when I’m lucky enough to get to visit Tokyo again!

Staying with Wakanasan was such a great experience. Her home is beautiful and only a few minutes from the station which made finding it super easy as I explored the area.
Communication was easy, and there are many amazing spots to eat, drink and see live music at nearby. Would honestly love to stay there again, hope you’ll have me! 🙏🏼

Wakana’s place was excellent. She was so accommodating and helpful. The neighborhood is nice and quiet but still just a quick train ride from all the sites of the city. I really enjoyed the local vibe and Wakana’s cafe and restaurant recommendations were great. I would definitely stay here again!

Where do I start about my stay with Wakana & her two darling cats in her beautiful, peaceful home? From the very start I felt welcome, relaxed & safe. I can honestly say it’s been one of the best places I’ve stayed in over many years using Airbnb around the world. Not just for the fact it is within walking distance to Shimokita which has all you need, but nearby restaurants, local shops, coffee spots & the train station is right down the road. There is a cosy, relaxing vibe not just in the house with the company of the cats & Wakana when she is in, along the streets towards the house but also the general area is so lovely, just what you need for a chill time in a residential area of Tokyo. I was incredibly lucky to spend time with Wakana, we talked a lot & became friends. I felt accepted by her & the kitties who I loved very much & enjoyed them greeting me morning and night in my room. I miss my own cats at home so it was perfect! If you are anything like me you will love her home!

Wakana was such a gracious host! She had tons of restaurant recommendations, and it was a treat to chat and spend time with her. The apartment is centrally located, but still on a quiet street. We would love to visit again!
wakana小姐真的很温柔开朗，她的房子位置非常方便理新宿涉谷都很近，走路就能到下北泽。重点是她的房子非常干净温馨，房间有种非常舒服温暖的味道，床睡着很舒服，在wakana小姐家住每天都休息的很好。两只猫猫也很可爱！非常喜欢wanaka的家。希望wakana小姐越来越好。

Wakana is an incredible host—kind, generous, and full of amazing recommendations for both the neighborhood and Japan as a whole. From the moment I arrived, she made me feel completely at home. Her two adorable cats added so much charm and comfort, making the stay even more special.
The bed was super comfy, and the space was peaceful and quiet, yet conveniently close to everything I needed, including the metro station. It was the perfect balance of relaxation and accessibility.
Honestly, this might just be the only place I stay whenever I visit Tokyo again. It’s easily one of my favorite Airbnb stays ever. Thank you, Wakana, for such a wonderful experience! 💕🏡✨
我非常享受这次东京在Wakana家的住宿，她非常热情和Open Mind，是很好的交谈对象，我们和她的朋友一起在家里聚会，她带我去附近好吃的早餐店。房子所在位置静谧，房间温馨，离附近两个地铁站店都很近，有很多好吃的餐厅，非常的便利。非常感谢。

Had the best time at Wakana’s Airbnb! Fantastic location at a very peaceful and quiet neighborhood. Stayed in a cozy room and everything was very clean. Met 2 lovely cats as well! Definitely will visit again!

Wakana was hands-down the best Airbnb host we’ve ever had. From the moment she met us at the station, to the final day when she waved goodbye, she went above and beyond in every aspect of our stay. We delighted in her incredible recommendations around the neighborhood, and truly felt the hospitality she provided in her beautiful home. We had no complaints about our room, which even included a little side room with a table to write and organize while packing. The neighborhood is a charming and peaceful reprieve from the bustle of busier places like Ginza, but it’s still minutes away from the hip Shimokitazawa which we loved visiting during our stay. The benefit of staying with Wakana was getting to see a bunch of her favorite spots in hidden corners of the neighborhood that we otherwise would have overlooked. Wakana has years of experience in hospitality, and it shows! We’ll be forever grateful for our stay in her wonderful home.

Wakana transformed my Setagaya stay into a genuine local experience. She guided me to neighborhood cafes and took beautiful photos during Sakura season. The highlight was joining her hanami picnic under cherry blossoms with her friends—a cultural immersion I’ll always treasure. She patiently taught me basic Japanese phrases that enhanced my daily interactions. Her comfortable home with two friendly cats (especially sweet Sumire-chan!) became my Tokyo sanctuary. Thank you for sharing authentic Japanese life and creating memories beyond typical tourism, Ando-san!

I had a great stay at this place and really enjoyed communicating with Wakana. I truly appreciated the additional context and thoughtful advice I’ve got. The room itself was spacious and very comfortable.

Our stay at Wakana’s was absolutely perfect. Certainly one of my best experiences after 50+ airbnbs over the last 10+ years. Wakana personally met us at the nearby station, welcomed us with sweets and tea, and was all around a rockstar host. Her home was an amazing sanctuary after busy days in Tokyo, and her cats were so sweet and welcoming
She provided a local guide with lots of restaurants, and was very easy to contact with requests or advice. It was my mom’s very first visit to Japan, or Asia at all, and Wakana was such a perfect guide and host. She was a delight to talk with, and even took time out of her busy life to join my mom and I for lunch, and invited us to her favorite neighborhood izakaya. We arrived as travelers and felt that we left as friends.
Wakana’s hosting embodied the Japanese spirit of omotenashi, and highlighted the absolute best aspects of the airbnb experience. I’d recommend being her guest to anyone wanting a personal experience in Tokyo. ありがとう ございます, Wakana

Wakana and her home are truly incredible! I could not have imagined a better introduction to Japan. Wakana is extremely friendly, intelligent, helpful, and relaxed. She offered a truly local experience, even taking me to a local izakaya! Her place is adorable and very cozy, and she has such cute cats! Wakana’s home is also a 10 minute walk from Shimokitazawa, which is one of the coolest neighborhoods I’ve ever been in any city.

Wakana's accommodation was the best choice I made during my trip to Japan. Wakana is very traveler-friendly, and I didn't have any inconveniences while staying at home. The very comfortable bed and cozy space made me feel like I was staying at a relative's house, and it was a perfect trip to walk around the peaceful residential area, explore nearby restaurants, and enjoy the liveliness of Shimokitazawa. Especially the time spent with Wakana was a very special opportunity. Wakana is a wonderful person full of life energy. Just staying in the space with Wakana gives us new energy. I already miss that place and her lovely cats.

It is a comfortable room in a beautiful, pristine house. The location is great because it is so peaceful and quiet, but lively areas with lots to see, do and eat are just a few minutes walk away, and it is close to the station. Wakana is such a kind and thoughtful host, she provided everything we needed, lots of helpful tips and even brought our luggage to the station for us.
很好的入住体验！Wakana超级友好，不仅去车站亲自接我们，还热情跟我们聊天，给我们洗水果吃、泡茶喝！真的感觉超级温暖～ 还有Wakana的家真的太干净了！非常漂亮且干净！可以说是一尘不染！Wakana给了我们很大的自由度，真的住的很舒服～临走还送了我们小礼物，真的很抱歉没有给她准备小礼物，希望Wakana下次来上海一定要联系我，想带Wakana吃好吃的！！！

Yukiko was a great host, she picked us up from the station, even though we were late and gave us some nice tips on the neighborhood. The room was nice, clean and it even had AC, which saved our lives! And for this price it's an absolute steal! Thank you again!

I stayed 10 nights at Yukiko's place and it was great.
You just feel at home.
Yukiko came to pick me up at the station nearby, 5 minute walk.
To go to Shibuya by subway, it will take you 40 mns with a change at Nippori.
The room was spacious and clean , just like the toilet and bathroom downstairs.
You can store some things in a private little fridge, downstairs, very convenient.
You enter the house by using a code, easy to remember.
You have several shops around as well as restaurants.
I will definitely go back to Yukiko's next time I go back to Tokyo .
A great place.
Had a nice stay with yukiko. Great value if you are wanting to stay on this side of Tokyo

That was our first time in Japan. For our first night in a Japanese house, we've been very happy. Nice room, good beds, good location with small a streets all around we we bought food are other stuff. Unfortunately, enough time to share with Yukiko. But she came to pick us up at the train station and that was very helpfull.

Staying at Yukiko and Maki´s place was great and relaxed. Nice people, clean, quiet and very convenient - a scoop for such a price. 5 min walk to the senjuohashi station and change once to get the connecting lines around Tokyo. Yukiko picked me up the night I arrived which were very appreciated, I stongly recommend their place.
tres bon sejour, je recommande vivement cet endroit

Yukiko and her husband were excellent hosts and were very accommodating. The area of senju has everything and was conveniently located for the purposes of my visit. The place was perfect for my needs.

We enjoyed the stay in Yukiko＇s apartment.
Very clean and tidy house with warm shower and AC in winter time!
close to metro station, and there is supermarket and restaurant near the station.
recommanded!

Good location with quiet surroundings.
Great host. Fast wifi too :)

Yukiko was a tremendous host! She and her husband were very friendly and were even kind of enough to pick me up at the subway station. The room was very clean and spacious, and the area surrounding the house had plenty of shops and convenient stores. I had little to no complaints at all.
I had a very good time at Yukiko's home. The room is nice and big, the house is cozy and the hosts are extremely kind. I would definitely be happy to go back there!

Ms Yukiko was a gracious, attentive host with a warm smile, providing quality accommodation in the heart of Tokyo and a place not too far from the train station. The room was clean and quite spacious, providing me with a place to rest and rejuvenate from the day's travels as I catch up with the news on a fast and secure WiFi. I have greatly enjoyed the stay in Ms Yukiko's house, looking forward to future stays with this host again.

The room is spacious, there are a table, mirrors, cabinet, a table lamp in it! Miss Yukiko is super nice,she pick me up at the station ! In addition to this, I buy some nutrients from website , but it's too late to receive . I'm appreciated that Miss Yukiko send my parcel to Taiwan for me !
I'm highly recommend this room to all your guys! Thank you so much ,Yukiko!

On est bien accueilli. L'hôte est très souriante, la maison montre une belle fusion du Japon et des pays où l'hôte a voyagé et le quartier est assez sympathique et assez pratique pour visiter Tokyo et ses environnements. On a passé de bons moments à Tokyo. Merci, Yukiko !

It is a very sweet house, with unique decorations, clean living environment, convenient traffic and shopping stores. Yukiko and her family are very friendly. The little baby is so adorable! :P She picked me up at the train station which is very considerate for a Tokyo stranger. I will be very glad to live in Yukiko's house when I come back to Tokyo again :)

Yukiko is a great host. She picked me up at the station and bring me to the apartment. The room has everything you need, mirror,table,chair,bed etc. She also has a guest area to chill out.

Overall, I had a great stay there and would not mind staying back there if I were to go to japan again. Well worth it for the price as well.

The stay at Yukiko's house made my trip in Japan so much easier. Her house is 3-minute walking from the nearest station and an hour away from Narita airport, which is super convenient for me since I had very heavy luggages (I stopped at Japan on a temporary visa, my final destination is another country).
The room is very clean, cozy, and comfortable, and even has an air-conditioner and free wifi, all included within such a reasonable rent fee in Tokyo.
Yukiko is definitely a lovely host, she picked me up at the station on time and tried to be very helpful during my stay.

We stayed 4 nights at Yukiko's place, and we really liked it! Yukiko was super friendly and helpful, she even came to pick us up at the bus station very late in the evening. The location is reachable with the JR line, and the neighborhood is really nice and quite, full of small charming cafe and restaurants. We would definitely recommend this place ;)

This is a great listing. The private room is well positioned, on the same line from Narita airport. There are a number of shops within easy walking distance and the major city destinations are 20 mins by train. For the price this place is well worth it. Yukiko met me at the station and also took me to the accommodation. She was also willing to offer any help possible. In short a great host. I thoroughly recommend the room to any stopping in Tokyo.

Had a great time staying at Yukiko's place! Kita-Senju is a delightful residential area. The area around the station is real happening and fun to walk around. The nearby river is also great for going to relax or exercise.

It was a homey, clean and comfortable room. It has a good neighborhood, lots of eateries and small supermarket. The house is close to train station and stone's throw from Ueno, Tokyo station.
Highly recommended!

The house is new and very clean, and has a 'high-tech' feel to it. Our room, blankets, sheets were clean and the floor mattress was comfortable despite it is not a western style "raised bed". We stayed in a guest room next to the front entrance on the first floor. We were given keys to the back-door of the house because the host did not have spare keys for the front door, the only inconvenience with the back door is the tiny alley we had to walk through when it is raining.

There is a toilet on the first floor with no shower. The shower is on the 2nd floor in the main living area (living room/kitchen); we did feel a little shy about using shower while the hosts are in the living area (dining/watching tv). If you shower late (~11pm) make sure you learn the light switches. The hosts are energy-conscious (which is good for the planet) and we often find ourselves trying to navigate to the staircase in complete darkness.

The house is a couple min walk to the Senju-ohashi train station, we found it fairly convenient as there are many metro and JR lines accessible from Ueno (which is also on Keisei line).

The hosts were friendly but we did not interaction much.

Yukiko is a really nice host. She picked me up at the train station. The room was very clean. Yukiko is a really hard working person. So we did not meet much. But she always offered to her help to get around town.

All the things were fine and nice!! The room is big and comfortable. Yukiko san is very nice!!!! Even I changed my schedule usually she still kindly to match it. And her baby is cute!! The place is near to senjyuohashi and kitasenjyu those are convenience to go anywhere.
The most pity thing is that due to my schedule in Tokyo is busy, we cannot talk more :(

I stayed at Yukiko's place for 6 nights. The house is really nice and clean. The place is really close to Nippori, just three stops with the Kesei Line. I felt very welcome and I enjoyed the time there. I just recommended this place if you go to Tokyo.
it was a nice experience and stay.........

The hosts were friendly. Good location!  Close to train station and JR line is just 10 min walk away. Sometimes you have to queue in the morning to shower,but it doesn't bother me anyway. Place is clean.

Very nice couple with a super cute baby and a beautiful new house. We had a nice chat with them and a couple of their friends over tennis and they're very friendly. They were willing to accommodate us even though we had to come in very late due to train delays. Location was very close to the train station.

Yukiko and her husband were very welcoming and accommodating. Very helpful with questions I had. Directions to the place were very easy from Narita Airport. House within walking distance to train station and supermarket. Travel to other areas in Tokyo is easy and fast as well. Room fairly comfortable. I had a great stay with Yukiko and her husband.
房子离地铁站很近，走路三四分钟，有不明白的房东都会耐心解答～

Clean and comfortable, outside of main parts of city so further to travel to a more local area. Quite a busy household in the mornings with a shared bathroom/ kitchen but if you aren't leaving the house too early then it works out fine
Yukiko helped me find tour operators , picked me up from the train station and ensured that my stay was comfortable .
Very comfortable, clean. The building is new and the design is great. Really feel like home becau of Maki-san's hospility :") wonderful bnb experience undoubtedly.

Amazing stay at Yukiko's place, its a lovely family, very nice talking to them, they are caring and respectful.
The house is very modern and comfortable, everything is very clean and you can make use of the appliances: fridge, microwave, washer, etc...
The location is good, its at a 10 minute walk from a main station where you have 2 metro lines and a JR line, 3 minute walk from the place you have a shopping center, and in a 5 minute walk radius you have pretty much everything you need: ATM, restaurants, markets, etc...
I would love to stay at Yukiko's place again if I have the chance!

YUKIKO est venue nous chercher a la station de métro comme prévu ce qui est un plus quand on arrive a tokyo pour la première fois . La chambre correspond exactement aux photos . Elle est au rez de chaussée  et on peut profiter de sanitaires . la cuisine et la salle de bain ainsi qu un deuxième sanitaire sont  au 1 er étage .  Nous avons pu nous préparer nos petits déjeuner et diners ce qui a été l'occasion de socialiser avec avec YUKI , son mari et d'autres voyageurs .  Le logement est a quelques minutes de la station de métro Senjuihashi qui ensuite nippori ou on trouve la JR YAMANOTE menant aux principales attractions . Yuki et sa famille sont très cool  et je les recommande sans hésitation.
Good location

My stay in Tokyo was great. Tokyo portraits a very interesting culture and incredible infrastructure thus there is nothing like the japanese etiquette. Yukiko's place is located in a quiet and residential place. Not touristic so very good to relax at the end of the day and experience life near locals, yet there are many service providers nearby such as 24h convenient stores, different kinds of japanese restaurants, shops, health care etc. It feels like a very cozy neighbourhood. Senju is like "downtown Tokyo" however, but accessible to the most populous areas of the city by metro (the nearest metro station is 8min walk and there you find 2 metro lines and a JR line), very convenient.
Yukiko quickly answered any questions regarding the accomodation and the local area and was waiting for me at the train station upon my arrival, before the chek-out she gave me precise information of how to reach the airport (very easy BTW). As long as you stick to Yukiko's house rules your stay in this place can be very good. Defintely recommended.

Location is great, very close to senjuohashi station and 10 minutes walk to Kita-senju Station. During my 5 days stay, I managed to travel whole tokyo with 3 days subway metro pass and 1 day tokunai pass. The kitasenju neighbourhood itself has everything - supermarket, 100 yen shop, shopping street/mall, fast-food restaurant....
Yukiko Maki is friendly and easy-going, and the house is new and quiet. Overall, It is a great place to stay.
We enjoy the room in maki's house. It's small but very nice. The house is a common modern Japanese house. It's near the station. Everything is convenient.

Yukiko's place is exactly like she described: very cozy, clean, and brand new and convenient. The location is very close to the train station, so it's easy to go everywhere from there. The day I arrived was very late, but she still came to the train station to pick me up and patiently explained to me the things that I need to know about my stay. She is very kind and respectful. It's a pleasant airbnb experience.

Ms Yukiko was a great and warm host that graciously took me to her house from the train station, and had prepared a cozy room that matched the picture descriptions. To a worn-out, jet-lagged arriving passenger this was really welcoming and displayed the great hospitality of the hosts.

Yukikos place was my first stop in Japan and I couldn't have chosen a better place to take my time to arrive... Senjuôhashi is a beautiful shitamachi (suburb) area, very close to the 'actual' Tokyo, but still very different - peaceful and releaxed, but at the same time it has beautiful izakaya (drinking bar) passages and little restaurants. Just walking around Kitasenju a while is worth it! I felt like the only foreigner who ever went there (and I met no others), which is definitely different from, say, already the Nippori area only a few stops away.
Yukiko and her family are great hosts and very friendly. I had all the space I ever needed in my clean, quiet room, even a little table to work from and a seperate entrance. I was always glad when I met someone of the family to have a little chat. I would definitely come back to this place and can highly recommend it, especially if you are looking for something a little bit more "authentic" than a backpackers hostel.
Amazing and warm couple. very friendly and excellent location.

My wife and I had a very pleasant experience when we stayed at Yukiko & Maki's house. The location is relatively close to city center and it's Yukiko's house is very close to Senjuohashi Station that can easily access big stations in Tokyo.
From Haneda Airport, luckily there were an airport limousine bus that made stop at Senjuohashi station. This made my trip very convenient because we can avoid Tokyo's train system that is not convenient for taking 2 big suitcases (30') and 2 carry-on :)
Yukiko and Maki were a helpful host and understand our situation that always leave early and coming home very late. Even though there is a baby, we hardly hear the baby's cry. The neighborhood is very quiet but convenient. Definitely will stay again at Yukiko & Maki's house when visiting Tokyo in the future.
good
ไม่ค่อยส่วนตัวนัก ห้องไม่มีกลอนล็อกประตู ห่างจากรถไฟ JR พอสมควร มี pocket wifi ทำให้สะดวก แต่การใช้งานยากเล็กน้อย สามารถทำอาหารได้ โฮสต์อัธยาศัยดี

The room looked like the one in the picture- cozy and private. Good space for solo travellers to stay in. Located about 3 mins walk from Senjuohashi station, and around 15 mins from Kitasenju station it was easy to travel to hub stations. However, the house itself is in a nice quiet neighbourhood. Also there were plenty of coin laundrys and food places.
Key was provided, making it easy to come and go as I pleased. Wifi was also fast and reliable.
Hosts were nice and helpful and although they had a baby i hardly noticed because it was so quiet.
Would 10/10 recommend this listing.

The hosts are very welcoming, and the place is clean, modern, just renovated. It's a bit of a trek out from the hotspots of the city, which means you'll have to head back earlier each night--the trains stop running at midnight, I think. Other than that, I'd highly recommend staying here.

My stay at Yukiko-san house was very pleasant. The room was spacious enough. and have the basic necessities needed(heater/towel etc).
The host was very accommodating, helpful and friendly.
The big plus point is the location. It is very convenient. Nearby Metro station, Kita-senjyu which is easy to access to Main city Tokyo. And other tourist attraction such as Tsukiji, Asakusa, Tokyo sky tree. I would recommend people buying the Metro1day pass if you are on a sightseeing trip to Tokyo. it would be much value for your money.
Would definitely recommend to anyone who would want to visit Tokyo. There is a direct bus from Senjuohashi station to the airport, which is very convenient since I need to go to airport directly from the house.
My Overall experience was a very good experience^^ would definitely book again if I were to go to Tokyo in the future.
So happy to meet Yukiko and her lovely family. Their baby is so cute,and I will miss them so much. Thanks them for hosting me.

Thank you to Yukiko san and Maki san for a really wonderful stay in their beautiful home. I felt really welcome, the're a very friendly couple and their friend too:) The home is brand new so, modern warm and quiet and fast internet. The neighbourhood is also quiet and safe feeling with convenient stores, mall and two train stations close by. o(^◇^)o welcome to convenient Tokyo:) So thank you for your hospitality I wish to stay again.

Fue muy amable, nos fue a buscar a unas estación de trenes cercana nos presentó a  su esposo e hijo. ellos hacian su vida normal mientras hospedamos ahi, no conversamos mucho porque llegabamos prácticamente solo a descansar. Pero el espacio común invita a compartir, muy agradable y ordenado el lugar. El barrio tranquilo.

Great place to stay in Tokyo. A little far from the city, but Yukiko takes you from the subway to her place so you don't have to find it yourself. Very nice family and provided everything that was stated. They even gave me an umbrella when I was in need of one. I also used their washing machine without problem. The main floor is a little messy but of course since they have a 2 year old with them. Overall I am happy to stay at this place and would recommend it.
Lovely room, and lovely hosts. I had a great time talking with them. They went out of their way to accommodate for my late departure.

I  think it was really lucky that my first station in Japan was at Yukiko's home.This is a comfortable and convenience place ，and Yukiko's family is kind and warm-hearted，which makes me  feel safe and relax.As I walked around I found the neighborhood was also a lot of fun.Thank you for receieving me.Best wishes for you and your family.
Wonderful stay. Super friendly people and a cozy location! Very close to the train station, so nothing is ever too far away.

The room is super great and clean, everyone was super nice. I had a sprain on my foot and Yukiko-san gifted me some compresses; and Tomo-san recommended me some manga and let me read from his collection.
The place is near the station for the keisei line so getting to Ueno and Nippori to change lines is super easy.
It was super great.
왠만한곳은 30분 안으로 다 갈수있어여

Great place to stay in Tokyo! Near two different subway stations so getting around is no problem. I took a bus directly from Haneda airport and Yukiko met me at the nearby subway station for check-in. The space is very clean and comfortable! I definitely enjoyed my first vist to Tokyo and I would recommend staying here.

Yukiko is a fantastic host and her house is gorgeous. It has all the modern amenities and is quite spacious.
It's close to the train (not metro) station and there is a private entrance for guests. It's easy to get into the city, but it's worth remembering that the last train is at 12.30.
The room is spacious and the bed is comfortable. The house is clean and I enjoyed my interactions with the family.
I'd happily stay here again
Yukiko was a fantastic host! Unlike many hosts, she personally showed me around and told me everything I needed to know. Next time i’m in Tokyo, it would be nice to stay at her place again!
Yukiko is an amazing host. The room and place is much better than what I expect. Yukiko even took time to personally pick me up from the station.
Very cozy chambre, with everything you need. Easy to get transports and quiet neighborhood. Yukiko is very helpful, just recommend this place!
We communicated via the AirBnB application most of the time, and Yukiko-san was very responsive. I must say she is a helpful host who pays attention to her guests' needs. It was a great stay!

한국인 후기가 별로 없어서 걱정했는데 3박 4일 잘 묵다 갑니다. 첫날 호스트가 센주오하시역에 픽업 나와서 체크인도 걱정 없었고 집에 좁은 계단이 두개나 있는데 짐도 직접 올려다주셨어요. 1층은 호스트가 쓰는 방이 있는것 같았고 2층은 주방겸 거실 및 샤워실, 3층은 화장실과 저희가 쓰는 방이 있었어요. 방은 두명이 쓰기 딱 좋았습니다. 그리고 현관문은 따로 뒷마당 문을 썼고요. 무엇보다 체크아웃시간이 낮 12신줄 알았는데 밤 12시라 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 마지막날까지 짐걱정없이 실컷 놀다갔어요. 집근처에 스시집하고 작은이자카야도 있어서 한끼 해결하기에 좋습니다. 뒷편에는 라이프라고 큰 마트도 있어요! 지하철역하고도 가깝고(5분컷) 가성비가 내려오는 숙소지만 신주쿠나 시부야까지 가는데 한번 갈아타고 40분정도 걸려서 그쪽에서 노실분들은 생각해주세요. 저는 호스트도 친절하고 (전화로 레스토랑 예약도 도와주심) 만족스러운 숙소였습니다!  :-)
房間讓人感覺很溫暖，周圍的環境單純，交通也很便利，會想再去住。😊
very clean place. host was very friendly and accommodating. house is conveniently located near the station and convenience stores
附近有两个地铁站，到成田机场大约一小时多一点点。Yukiko很友好，到地铁口接我，很日本很居家的感觉，可以非常有效的体验日本当地人的生活，Yukiko的老公也很友好，宝宝非常可爱不认生。房间里一应俱全很干净。推荐哦～

유키코님의 집은 가정집으로 3층으로 구성돼있습니다. 계단이 좁아서 캐리어를 들고 올라가거나 내려갈때 불편한 점이 있긴하지만 그부분을 모두 감수할만큼 다른 부분들이 좋았어요! 귀여운 아들과 남편분은 아래층에서 계시고, 저희가 묵을때는 여성 친구분이 저희와 같은층에 계셨는데 모두 따뜻하게 대해주셔서 우선 안전에 있어서 굉장히 만족했습니다. 또한 방이나 샤워실 등 가정집이기때문에 매우 깨끗해서 좋았어요!! :) 다음에 기회가된다면 꼭 다시가고싶습니다!
The place is great, really clean and comfortable. It's easy to get anywhere in Tokyo from there and the area is also good for shopping or getting something to eat.

Yukiko and her family where very nice hosts. Friendly, helpful - can’t say anything bad about my stay!
Location was as it was stated, Room was clean and private!
Would come back again in the future :)
It was a good place worthy of the price. Near to station and can easily navigate to train links. Neighborhood is good. 👌🏼
흇짓텅을 븨워쥬지 않아소 쓸애기가 쌓욧슴니더.3충지비지만 욕시리하놔라소 씻끼 힘둡니더.
숙소는 신주쿠 시부야 같은 중심에서 30~40분 걸려서 멀지도 않고 가깝지도 않아요 7월 20일에 아다치구 불꽃축제가 완전 가까이서 해서 좋았구요 조금 불편하다면 집이 조금 작아서 남자들은 좀 불편할수도 있어요 남의 집이라서 살짝 눈치보이는데 다 신경써주셔서 다 괜찮습니당~

距离浅草非常近，在千住大桥站的站台上能看见天空树。房东非常热情也非常热心，也完全不用担心交流的问题，不会日语的话用英语加肢体动作也完全okk。不过记得晚上要早点回去，因为太晚的话洗澡和洗衣服都会有噪声影响到房东家的小朋友们。我入住的前两天玩的都很迟再次抱歉啦哈哈哈。家庭的氛围很好，小朋友很可爱噢！我入住的时候太太来接我时正好也接儿子放学，我和太太聊天的时候用的英语，小男孩听不懂于是向太太问nani nani的时候太可爱了！

Yukiko's house is a great place to stay when visiting Tokyo.
Room is clean and big enough, bathroom and toilets are also very clean. Senjouashi station is really close and Kita Senju station at around 15 min by foot.
She answers inmediately and her family is also very kind.
I recommend this place!
ありがとうございました
Yukiko was great, responsive, helpful and provided everything I needed. If you are looking to stay somewhere more local a bit removed from central Tokyo this is a good place to be.
very clean. the host is nice. but the room is small.

Yukiko-san was particularly enthusiastic. The room was well equipped.
Very nice

A very accessible place near to the metro station. The toilet is clean and is pretty private. The room look exactly the same as the  pictures. Do take note that the room is on the third floor of the house and there are no lift, so if your luggage are as huge as mine you might need some effort to bring it up the room. Host are friendly and Yukiko picked me up at the metro for check in and she helped me with moving my luggage to the room. Thank you for the good 3 nights stay!
Good
お世話になりました。親切にして頂いて、ありがとうございました。
Very comfortable stay,  just like home. We are allowed to use the laundry machine, which is very thoughtful and convenient.

房东非常的热情，我到了车站后还来接我，交通也十分便利，到车站只需要5分钟不到，房间非常的整洁。因为自己在学习日语尝试和房东交流房东也愿意和我交流，体验感十分的好，有机会一定会再在这里入住(等我日语能力再上手点)
本当にありがとうございました!
近くにコンビニがあり便利でした。夜も静かで落ち着いて寝ることができました。

Yukiko's unit is clean, cozy and have great amenities. She provide toiletries such as tooth paste, tooth brush,towel and tea's too. Her home is just 10-13 minutes away from tokyo metro/subway line via walk. It was a brief transaction checking in and going out of her unit. Staying with her place is highly recommended! Thank you Yukiko for having us! :)
The place is nice and quiet, clean, close to the station. Definitely great for the price
Nice place, I would like to there again.
The house is close to the subway station. The transportation is convenient, clean and warm. The  family is very friendly！
Lovely place, lovely family. Yukiko-san was responsive and friendly, Room is clean and warm, highly recommended.

Yukiko is very clear in her description . The place is a bit further away from Tokyo center yet still very accessible in terms of public transport. I went to Nikko and Kawaguchiko at the time I was there, even these places are quite do-able from Yukiko’s airbnb. The bed is quite comfortable and the room provides everything you need. I would recommend every traveler that doesn’t like to stay at a hostel or capsule hotel to book Yukiko’s airbnb.
Just spent a wonderful week living in Yukiko’s house. The host family is very friendly and helpful. The room is clean and tidy. Anyway, recommend to all travelers traveling to Tokyo area!

I had a great time. The room is up 2 flights of narrow stairs, so don't bring bulky luggage. The room is fine for one person but, would be very tight for 2 people. There are 2 young children with toys about the living room but, that didn't bother me. Yukiko speaks English and I don't speak Japanese. We didn't have any problems communicating.  I would stay here again.

This  house is near the train station and they offer us the three places, including one bedroom, one bathroom and  one living room on the third floor.  We can wash clothes  and cook food in the kitchen of the second floor.  It is very convenient for us.
The family was very nice and the rooms house was very clean and comfortable.
非常好的房东，孩子也很可爱，可以用洗衣机及时清洗衣物，民宿离车站非常近 ，非常推荐，这次行程比较紧张，所以没和房东一家进行进一步的交流，下一次还选择这家民宿

My second home in Tokyo. Peaceful area, near to restaurants and Senjuohashi station, very clean toilet and free laundry. Will definitely stay here again whenever I'm in Tokyo. 100% Superhost approved!

아이들과 함께하는 여행이다보니 침대보다 이불인 곳을 찾았었는데, 방에 꽉차게 이불이 깔리니 아이들이 뒹굴면서 자기 딱 좋았습니다. 이불도 두꺼운 것을 2겹으로 깔아주시기 때문에 아주 푹신하고 침대같아 좋았어요!
3층의 침실과 거실용 방과 화장실이 있고,
작은 냉장고와 전자렌지까지 구비되어 있어, 왠만한 생활은 3층에서 다 해결되기때문에 생활하기 편리했습니다.
자녀분들의 장난감도 빌려주셔서 저희 아이들이 숙소에 있는 동안도 지루할 틈없이 잘 놀았어요^^
체크인 하는 날은 가까운 센주오하시역까지 마중나와주셔서 골목을 헤멜 일 없이 체크인 할 수 있었고, 중간중간 이야기하거나 문의할 때에도 항상 친절하게 응해주셨어요^^
아이들도 친근하게 말 걸어주고 해서 너무 귀여웠습니다. 더 같이 놀고 싶었는데... 아이들 디리고 여행하다보니 제가 너무 힘들어서 씻고 자기 바빴던게 조금 아쉬웠어요;; 하핫.
집 주변도 조용하고 깨끗하고.
센주오하시 역 바로 옆에 쇼핑몰이 있어, 식사나 쇼핑 등 편리했습니다.
1주일동안 감사했어요^-^
駅から近く、北に歩くと北千住商店街があり、多くのものがあり、独立したトイレ、ベッドルーム1室、リビングルーム1室、バルコニーがあり、非常に快適な生活ができます。オーナーさんはとても親切です。おすすめ！
Appartement très agréable, quartier résidentiel très calme et typique. Jolie maison récente, chambre + bureau + wc  en privé. Hôtes friendly, je recommande 😇 et je reviendrai

位置：房源位于居民区，安静舒适；离千住大桥站、北千住站都非常近，来往成田机场和市区都很便利。
设施：旅客独享整个三楼，有一个卧室、一个客厅、一个小的洗手间、一个阳台，都十分干净。房间有微波炉冰箱电视，还有一个书桌。只有洗漱和洗澡需要到二楼。
沟通：房东夫妇非常友善，他们还有两个孩子，也都很可爱。
总的来说五星推荐，不过要注意，三个人以上的话住起来可能会比较拥挤。
Yukiko and her family makes me feels like home. Not only she helps me to get comfortable but even helps me to collect my package that was sent to delivered.

Highly recommended! The host and her family are very nice. She's very quick to reply to my queries. Also she makes sure that you're comfortable. The airbnb is situated in a quiet neighboorhood near senju-ohashi station which is a direct line from Narita airport so you don't have to worry about lugging your luggage a lot and changing train lines. The place is complete with refrigerator, microwave, washing machine, etc. You got the 3rd floor all to yourself. There's a toilet, a living room with a workstation and a room. The bed is very comfortable, also there's a heater if the weather is cold. There's also a nearby 7/11 and local grocery store if you want to buy foods and necessities. All in all 10 out of 10 stars for me. Easily one of the best airbnb I've ever stayed at.

Very pleasant stay in Japan. Near the Senju-obashi Station. This is a very warm family and will have a very happy time with Yukiko couple and their cute children. The rooms are big enough. The whole 3rd floor is private place, and has own living room, toilet, and bedroom. There are also TV, AC, microwave, refragerator... Thank you for your room! Have a nice time with your family!

3階を丸ごと使わせていただき、快適に過ごさせていただきました。
ご家族で住んでいらっしゃり、お子さま含めとてもフレンドリーで素敵な皆さまでした。
チェックイン時間も遅くなってしまったのですが、受け入れていただきましてありがとうございました。
とにかくコスパが高い！予想以上よかったです。
为我的东京之旅增添了特别的印记。

謝謝房東一家提供的住房！小孩子非常可愛，房東夫婦很親切，房間住起來很舒適，我喜歡千住大橋車站附近的銀杏樹，充滿日常的感覺，從車站到住所的路段是一般的日本民居，安靜的感覺非常好！
浴室配備暖氣冬天洗澡非常舒適！謝謝房東夫婦願意開放房子Airbnb 出租，非常舒適的日本生活體驗！
친절하게 대해주셔서 좋았습니다. 편히 쉬다갑니다. 감사합니다!
The experience was delightful , Tomo, Yukiko and their sons are a suppirtive bunch. I would return to stay with them.

Yukiko and her family are wonderful host. You get the entire third floor to yourself and can come and go as you please. Yukiko is also extremely helpful and extremely generous, it was wonderful staying with them.
Very nice family! Yukiko was very helpful and responsive. I was picked up from the Senjuohashi station without a problem. The location is also great. Would definitely recommend!

Environnement pratique et confortable, avec les commodités nécessaires, dans lequel on peut se sentir rassuré (voyageur seul, femme). Yukiko est réactive et met en confiance. On peut profiter de son séjour avec tranquillité et indépendance. La gare, les endroits pour se restaurer et ATM sont très proches à pied. Même si j’aurais bien aimé partager plus de moments avec les hôtes, séjourner à proximité d’une famille japonaise au quotidien est une expérience enrichissante.
Conveniently located near a station. The room was as described. Yukio was also accommodating of my late arrival. Would recommend.
离电车站近交通方便，周围也很安静；入住后可以使用房子的整层空间，房东还提供了很多生活必需品，住的很舒服。非常推荐这个地方！感谢房东这几天的照顾

Yukiko est une hôte très gentille et généreuse. Elle est venue en personne me guider depuis la station. Le logement colle parfaitement aux photos, tout est propre et l'hôte est très généreuse en fournitures utiles. Le lit est confortable la zone calme et il est possible d'utiliser le micro onde, même si de nombreux restaurants sont a proximité. Je recommande très fortement si vous voulez séjourner à Tokyo !

Yukiko and family are nice host. We were welcomed and picked up by Yukiko from the nearest station to the room.
The location is in residence area where easily to access to the city center and Narita international airport. The room is near to the train station by walking within 5 mins which making us easy to access the town.
We got whole 3rd floor for us during our stay. The room is very large, clean and comfortable for us who staying more longer time and had stuff to pack.
I recommended to stay at Yukiko’s place during visiting Tokyo.
Yukiko的房源位于安静的社区，交通方便。房间空间大、整洁、舒服，基本生活用品齐全。房东回应速度很快，提供了很多帮助，也在我们入住当天来车站接我们。非常感谢Yukiko的帮助！我们非常推荐这个房源！！！
第一天入住的时候，Yukikoさん在雨天到车站接我，帮我搬了几个很沉很沉的行李箱到三楼。以及后来各种各样的帮助，非常感谢她和可爱的一家人这段时间的温暖接纳。除此之外，房间优良的采光、通风、居民区的安静、距离车站及超市的便利性，家中设备的完善会让你喜欢上这里。我想即使是三个人也不会觉得拥挤。我住的时间比较长，已经习惯了这里，并且随着时间的推移感觉到越来越舒适、安心和便利。
I had a very pleasant stay at Yukiko's place. I'd love to stay there again.
There was a little problem, but thank you for taking care of it as if nothing had happened and providing a good room.
第二次入住依然非常好。生活所需物品齐全，一个人住的话很宽敞，推荐
很舒適的一次入住體驗，有詳細的交通指引，房間寬敞整潔，設備齊全，一個人居住也很安心，感謝提供這麼好的旅居。

Excellent séjour chez Yukiko. Le logement était très propre et spacieux et Yukiko et son mari ont été très aimables et accueillants.
Le quartier est très calme et il y a quelques cafés et restaurants sympas autour. Bien que le logement soit un peu éloigné des attractions touristiques, les deux gares/station de métro sont à deux pas.
Je recommande pour voyageur/se seul/e. 😌

Yukiko m a très bien reçu. il propose un bel espace de vie, c est parfait pour découvrir ce quartier de Tokyo où les alentours.
il est à côté d'une station et des bus pour les aéroports.

Excelente para quedarse y disfrutar un buen tiempo en Japón, yukiko es muy amable habla inglés y muy poquito español. Los puntos para visitar están fáciles tiene muy cerca varias tiendas de conveniencia y restaurantes por si no quieres ir tan lejos. Me encanto 10/10

Ich hatte einen sehr tollen Aufenthalt bei Yukiko. Man hat eine eigene Etage mit Wohnzimmer, Schlafzimmer und Toilette für sich, in einem typisch japanischen Haus.  Küche und Badezimmer teilt man sich mit Yukikos Familie. Es ist eine tolle Erfahrung, wenn man mal etwas anderes als ein steriles Hotelzimmer haben möchte. Ich habe auch tolle Empfehlungen bekommen - ich kann Einzelpersonen oder Paaren diese Unterkunft wärmstens empfehlen!
The place was great, you have a whole floor for yourself! Yukiko’s family is very friendly and nice, I felt good in theirs home 🙌🏼❤️
Very kind host and nice accommodation. Located in a peaceful neighborhood, very clean and we got everything we need. Yukiko came to the station for check in, very nice:)
整层楼的房间都可以随意使用，居家布置很温馨，住在这儿很自在安心。

Hôte très accueillante, elle est venue me chercher en vélo à la gare. Comme dit dans les commentaires précédents, on a l’étage pour nous tout seul avec une chambre et un coin salon avec frigo/micro-ondes
Il ont également un chiot trop mignon qui adore les caresses !
Parfait <3
很好的住宿体验，你可以使用一整层，包括客厅和卧室以及厕所。房东家有一条很友好活泼的小狗，你可以和它玩，但它不会打扰你休息。推荐入住。
Yukiko was a pleasant host. I wholeheartedly recommend this place for anyone wanting to stay in Tokyo.
홈 스테이 느낌의 최고의 숙소
房东在电车站来接我，避免了找不到路的问题。家里有一只小狗，它很热情很可爱。一开始我有些害怕，后来尝试和它进行了一些互动，但是它没有领会我的意思。房间周围很安静，最近的电车站也有便利店，购买零食很方便。

너무 편안하게 잘있다가요 강아지도 너무 귀엽고
전철도 도보로 멀지않은곳에 있어서 편안해요!
un grand plaisir,d’avoir été chez Yukiko, je conseille vivement aux voyageurs(euses) ce logement ,j’espère y revenir.
I really like the place. The house is very nice. The family is so welcoming. The puppy is so cute!
良かったです。ありがとうございました。

Had a great stay at this place.  Yukiko is very friendly and responsive.  She does her best to make sure you have a good stay.  She was very helpful with directions and recommendations.  I highly reccomend Yukiko if you want a pleasant stay in Kyoto!
Reasonable price and easy access to two train stations. The host is very accommodating. Impressive. Recommended to all travellers to Tokyo.

wonderful and friendly family home to stay in for a solo traveller. there is a puppy eager to socialise with new people, and guests who enjoy privacy and space will find that they have the third floor almost all to themselves with a fridge and microwave which will allow one to store and make food late at night without worrying too greatly about disturbing the hosts. it is very close to the train station and the convenience is appreciated since I travel into the city everyday and return later at night. will recommend!
Yukiko est très accueillante. La famille est très souriante. Potchi le petit chien est adorable
Very nice house and independent penthouse for the guest.

Première expérience de vacance de ma vie et je suis ravis. Yukikosan et sa petite famille sont formidable. Mon d'arriver à pris du retard et Yukikosan attendait, il m'a suffit de la prévenir pour se mettre d'accord sur les changements.
en deux jours j'ai pris l'habitude sur faire le chemin en train depuis l'appartement et c'était amusant.
Une bonne expérience avec des gens formidable, c'était parfait.
je reviendrai vers Yukikosan pour mon prochain voyage !
房东会提前到车站等我，然后带我去住的地方。床垫和被子都超级柔软，很舒服，从住的地方去东京的各个景点也非常方便。有一天的行程是去看花火大会，房东还送了他的地垫给我们使用。

If you ever visit Tokyo but don't want to be smack right in the middle of the hustle and bustle then you gotta stay at Maki-san's place.
Family was welcoming and friendly, their dog was also eager to greet you when you return home after the a long day of exploring.
I would say this place is perfect for solo travellers; the room is huge and clean, you are near the railway station and convenience stores. Area is very quiet too and feels safe.
If I ever come back Tokyo again, I would definitely stay with them again!
My floor was perfect for 1 person, with private toilets, living room, tables and air conditioning. The house is a bit noisy because of the dog. The area is quite with a lot of restaurants nearby.
Great location as described in the listing! Definitely worth the stay if you’re intending to explore north or central Tokyo.

This was my first time using AirBnB and I was so glad to have found Koji and Nami's posting. They were such sweet hosts, Koji answered all my questions and made some great recommendations of things to do in Tokyo (Studio Ghibli Museum was my favourite). The apartment was clean, convenient and affordable. It was simple to get there by subway from Narita Airport and the map Koji sent made it easy to find the place once I got to Tateishi. I loved the neighbourhood, lots of places near the subway to get food. I picked up a few groceries for breakfast and didn't run into any problems cooking in the place, the fridge seemed brand new, the gas stovetop was simple to use and fast plus they had all the dishes I needed.
It was such a relief having a nice air conditioned place in the summer heat after a long day out.
I loved staying in such a traditional-style apartment. I was alone but the room would work just as well for a couple. I had two friends come over to hang out and it was very comfy (especially with the air conditioning).
The apartment has a private toilet, but doesn't have a shower, Koji showed me to a shower next door which was nice and clean.
Even though the place faced the street the noise was negligible.
I had such a great time in Japan and I am so happy I found this place.

Koji & Nami were fantastic hosts. I stayed for 5 nights and loved it. The accommodation is pretty much your own separate apartment, it has a kitchen, bedroom and toilet. it was much nicer than any hotel or hostel I stayed in during my month in Japan. Very close to the train station and with a few transfers you can get anywhere. I felt so at home during my stay and got to hang out with Koji, Nami and their friends. They were so helpful with directions and offering advice on sights and places to eat and drink. Got to see 'deep Japan' as they put it. It was so much fun they are super cool, super friendly people! If you get a chance to stay with them - definitely take it. Super cheap as well for how great it is!

Koji and Nami are cute, helpful and warm host, thoughtful space, with everything a traveler needs to start living like a local. Many good (local) food are just within a walk + fantastic curry. The 3rd Mos Burger brunch in Japan, is just walking distance. This little town they live in have much authentic experiences to offer. We had a great time staying here.

Koji, Nami and Gon chan were great hosts and provided everything we needed for our stay!! They have a beautiful room for you to stay in and has a fully equipped kitchen!! The quality of the room is fabulous for the amount you're paying and the hosts have been very helpful with all the questions that we had!! The location is very accessible to the train station and doesn't take too long to get to the rest of Tokyo. The community is very homey and there are an abundance of markets and small restaurants around the area!! I really recommend this for anyone on a budget or would like to experience the culture of the Japanese in a more local area! I will probably back here again to see Koji!

This apartment was just lovely. The place was clean, the beds were soft, the shower was hot (although it was a shared bathroom, we never had any problems waiting on it to be available). They also thought of lots of little necessities that made it feel like home: there were fresh towels, shampoo and body soap, and tea!

As for Koji & Nami, they were AMAZING hosts. We had a last minute change in travel plans and they were able to find us a place to stay when all hotels we could find were booked--while they were in Canada, no less! They were eager to give us all sorts of tips on where to go in Tokyo and in Japan writ large, and the next time we are in Tokyo, we will definitely be staying here again!

Thank you so much for your kindness.it was really great to stay at your place: it was really clean and welcoming, there was everything we needed.
Thanks again for helping us during our time in Tokyo until we were leaving, we had our train on time thanks to you Nami!!!
Best wishes!!!
Ayano&charlotte

Koji and Nami were just very kind and fun host, they know how to welcome guests !
Thanks Nami for the free laundry service and drive us by car to subway station.
Thanks Koji for the welcome and all informations we asked you during our trip with you.

We recommand to everyone booking appartment with Koji and Nami, great services and very cheap price !

Koji and Nami's place is highly recommended even for solo travelers. It is walking distance to Tateishi station and the neighborhood is quiet, safe and clean. The lodge itself is very clean and comfortable to stay in. There are laminated instructions pinned on the walls which made life easier for me. Koji and Nami are a cute and fun couple :) Too cool and helpful which made my stay in Tokyo a memorable one. I would definitely stay here again given the chance to go back to Japan.

Koji and Nami are the best! Their place is in a quiet neighbourhood not too far from the city - (around 450 Yen and about 45 minutes for a trip into the city centre). The neighbourhood has a large supermarket, a small shopping 'mall' and lots of places you could pick up food or any supplies you'd need and plenty of take-away also.

Both Koji and Nami both welcomed me upon arrival and attended to every request I had in the coming days, and yet totally gave me my privacy and own space. Koji loaned me his laptop to transfer files of my iPad and his personal wifi (for my departure day) after having one included with the room. They even gave me some rice!

They had lovingly prepared the space so that I would feel welcomed such that everything was clean and organised with aircon switched on when I got there, which was very much appreciated after a long, hot and tiring trip to Tokyo.

Included was everything I needed to cook for myself, toiletries and towels, and they had provided maps of places to eat / shop in the neighborhood as well as assisted with booking onward accommodation and tickets to the baseball and so on. They have even labeled all of the appliances in English and asked me for feedback on how they could improve things for future guests.

I wish every host was as gracious and generous as this young couple were because it would make my traveling life so much easier. Thanks guys, there's nowhere else I'd rather stay in Tokyo.

Koji and Nami are so friendly and helpful to me and my travel neighbour. The Japanese-style plus modern lodge is very nice with more than everything we needed. We regret that we just stay in Tokyo for 3 nights in a rush and have not enough time to chat with them. Everything more than expected! Real many thanks!!

My stay could have not been any better, such wonderful hosts!! Koji & Nami provided easy, clear directions to their apartment from Natita and came to meet me when I arrived in Tateishi. Koji invited me to dinner with Nami and some of their friends which was awesome, it was such a great way to be welcomed into Japan! It was very helpful that Koji spoke amazing English and could help guide me around the city and make recommendations of stuff to do in Tokyo. I fell in love with Tateishi where the apartment is located. It is removed from the busyness of Tokyo and a nice escape after a long day of being out and about. It is still very close to so many great sites....shibuya, harajuku, asakusa, and so many more! The actual apartment is very charming and comfortable, just the right amount of space . The pocket wi-fi was a life-saver, and made moving around the city so easy! I would not hesitate about staying with them again, and look forward to returning maybe in the winter time.
Thank you Koji & Nami!
We've had a great stay at Koji and Nami's place ! They were really friendly and helpful, always there if we needed anything. They also invited us to go out and it was really fun !

Koji and Nami are great hosts. Their place is in a very quiet neighborhood,  but a short walk to the train. It is a wonderful home base for exploring Tokyo. When we got to the apartment they brought us some fresh fruit too. They live close to the apartment and they invited us to see their 22 year old cat! Very cute! The apartment is a good size Japanese standards and looks just like the pictures. We want to go back soon!

I had a wonderful experience with Koji and Nami! It  was very surprised for me how quickly I could find the home. Everything, the apartment, the room and the service were excellent. It is a wonderful place for exploring Tokyo. Koji also told me the best way to reach the local attractions. I enjoyed it very much to be in this clean, modern and well equipped Japanese apartment. Thank you!

I really loved staying here, even though it was only for two nights. Koji was incredibly helpful in helping me get to the apartment after I got a little bit lost trying to get there. He's also a really nice and funny guy who was very helpful whenever I had questions or needed a hand with something. He even let me keep my luggage in his place after I checked out so I didn't have to lug it around on my final day before flying out in the evening.

The apartment itself is wonderful. The kitchen has everything you need to be self-sufficient should you be looking to save a bit of money by cooking for yourself. It has plenty of cups/bowls etc so you'll certainly be set. The bedroom and kitchen were both very clean and the bedroom has good a/c as well as a remote controlled light should want to be lazy and lie in bed reading without having to get up to turn out the lights. The bed and bedding were clean and comfortable as well.

The shower in the house next door was up to the same standards as the rest of the apartment as it was clean and convenient to use.

All in all, this apartment represents incredible value. You may be a little further out of the city than some places but what you get for the price more than compensates. Unless you desperately need to be closer in I would recommend this place as one of the best in Tokyo if you're looking for a solo/share with a friend apartment.

We enjoyed this stay very much and everything was so smooth from the beginning to the end. Koji & Nami, they were nice hosts and very organized couple, sent me a detailed information with directions right after the reservation.
