Perfect place to stay and come back to after a busy day exploring Tokyo. We loved it. Easy acces, clean, super friendly hosts. Could not ask for anything more.
Koji, Nami and Mr T are fantastic hosts, very helpful and friendly! We had such a great time in Tateishi and Tokyo and would recommend this Air B&B to everyone 😁

My family and I stayed at the Pine House for 4 nights and enjoyed every single minute of it. Everything was exactly as described from the location to what was included in the property. Everything was clean, organized and I believe the place was a recent remodel. Loved it!

K&N and Mr T are fantastic hosts, and Pine House is a great place to stay while visiting Tokyo. It is a short walk to the train station, and there are several shops and restaurants nearby. The house is very well-appointed, with heating/air conditioning, comfortable beds and linens, and fresh towels daily. Mr T even drove us to the train station at checkout so we didn't have to hassle with our luggage. Highly recommended!!!
房主人很热情，入住第二天一早就送来了一大瓶苹果汁，味道很好！房间每天有人来打扫，更换浴巾。我们一家住的的独栋的房子，很有特色！楼上楼下各一间，卫生间有俩个，非常适合全家旅行居住。最后一天去机场老板送我们到JR站，解决了我们行李多，份量重的困难。房主是土豪，有很多房源，来东京来玩住他家是
地址很好找 不偏僻很安静 房主超级热情 大热天的还去接我们 感动..(｡•ˇ‸ˇ•｡) … 房间准备好了还让我们提前入住简直了 送了我们极为好喝的苹果汁 还告诉我们怎么去附近的景点 房间温馨整洁 应有尽有 离开的那天房主还自己开车送我们去车站 太感谢了希望有机会再来！
这次东京Airb&b住处是很棒的感受！房间很干净和精致，入住、出行指南都很清晰，房东还很热心地送地铁站～Thank you! Koji, Nami and Mr.T(^-^)
一個很溫馨的地方，附近有超市，便利商店、還有一些餐廳，很方便。

Thank you for hosting us！
K & T are very warm and helpful in providing us with very detailed info about the firework festivals and driving us to the Auto station twice.
The apartment is nice and clean with everything you may need during a trip
The neighborhood is quiet and convenient with easy acess to other places by train.
We would definitely recommend it to our friends！
Koji與他的兄弟Mr.T是很專業的房東。我們在此住了四晚，Mr.T每天早上都會來關照我們，詢問是否有需要協助之處並換上乾淨的毛巾。 我們住的是獨棟2層的"Pine"松之間，房間色系溫暖，設備齊全，樓層面積不大約21M2(6.5坪）左右上下2層各1間雙人房，四人入住剛好。京成立石站雖然不在市中心，但是交通方便，生活機能完整，是體驗當地生活的好地點。
great！
房子在立石站附近，是个很安静的小区。出了车站就能看到全家便利店，还有几条小的商业街，很方便。再走五分钟就到房子，房子再往前一点点是一条河。房东夫妇都很好，送我们一大瓶梨汁，中途帮我们打扫卫生，走的时候还送我们去车站。不错的体验。

We stayed at the Pine house. It is a 2 story apartment.  4 people fits in comfortably. What impress me the most is the cleanliness of the place. Everyday, they make it a point to clean the place and make out our room and leave fresh clean towels everyday. The house is so comfortable that it feels like home.  Mr. T also check in on us everyday if there is anything we need and help us on how to go to places we plan to visit. There is also a Binder Folder with all the information you wanted like where the nearest grocery is and places to eat around the area. Just dissapointed because when we went to the grocery (big one) early in the morning, it is still close, it opens at 9am and closes at 9pm I think. and we were only able to go to Family mart (smaller shop) which is open 24 hours. Wifi is fast. Train station is walking distance..around 5-7 minutes I think. but the place is safe to walk and very quiet neighborhood. Oshiage- where the skytree is located is only 2 stations away, but if you plan to go to tokyo area.. you have to travel longer distance. But aside from that, I would recommend K&N's place. You would not be dissappointed. Thanks Mr. T for your personal service.

Absolutely amazing hosts!!! K, N, and Mr. T went out of their way at every turn to make us feel comfortable and safe on our first visit to Japan from the USA. From the immaculate cleanliness of every aspect of their homes (we stayed at the Pine house and Wahoo house, both in Katsushika) to the bottles of apple juice personally delivered at each stay, we couldn't imagine a better host. They even offered to drive us to various train stations after checking out to make getting to our next adventure easier! The homes have been completely remodeled and are incredibly beautiful examples of traditional Japanese styles. The town of Katsushika is only 30 mins by trains from the center of Tokyo, and is vibrant, friendly, fun, and quiet. If you are looking to immerse yourself in the local culture, this is an awesome way to do that! The communication is spot on, and their directions and  travel tips could not have been more detailed and accurate either. It may sound like I am exaggerating, but they truly deserve every one of their stars! Highly recommend!!!
非常棒的房东，房子和照片一摸一样，上下楼很宽敞，离车站很近，到哪里都蛮方便的，房东送了我们很好喝的苹果汁，最后一天还送我们去车站，棒棒哒👍

We absolutely loved Pine House.  It was clean, well organised and fitted out with everything a travelling family could need.  K & N were easily contactable and nothing was too much trouble.  It was easy walking distance to the train station and shops, including supermarkets, restaurants etc. The whole area had a small village feel, and we would definitely book this place for our return trip to Japan.

我们一家人住在pine house一共10天，4个大人加一个4岁的小盆友，房子很好找离车站很近，我们凌晨1点左右到的，自行check in，如果我们早些到，房东会去车站接我们。房间楼上楼下各有一个卫生间，楼上一个客卧加厨房，楼下是一个主卧加洗澡间，周围有很多好吃的小店包括居酒屋、烤肉店、寿司店，还有一个大型超市，公婆年纪大了，我和我老公出去新宿购物的时候他们就待在pine house里做饭看电视，好不自在的:-D 他们有夸附近超市里的东西好便宜的
pine house离浅草很近，去天空树和浅草寺很方便，去成田和羽田有直达特快，不需要换乘，去新宿大概1小时不到
房东人很好，每次送一大瓶苹果汁，喝完了还给换，每天都有换浴巾和毛巾，我们方便的时候还会来整理房间和清扫，每天早上会跟我们确定行程，并告诉我们要哪辆车或是哪条线路最好，房东的英文和日文都棒棒的，最后一天赶飞机还帮我们送到大的车站（我们行李特别多，好在房东的车子塞的下:-D）
最后，如果明年还有去东京，非常希望能够再住到pine house
房东nice 热情的接待我们 每天打扫房间 给我们送当地的特产苹果汁 最后一天亲自开车送我们去地铁站 非常不错 房间布局合理 电器干净 床铺舒适 周边有很多小吃 便利店 有几个是24小时的 我们在这住了5天 可以用完美形容！

非常棒的入住体验。独栋的房屋，干净整洁，装修非常有特色，设施齐全，我们两家一共4个人，复式楼上下两个卧室，各自活动区域分开了很方便，朋友进屋后高兴坏了。房东又帅又nice，地主哦，那条街上好多都是他家滴，哈哈哈。第一天就送给偶们超级好喝的苹果汁，最后一天赶早班的飞机，还特意开车送偶们去最近的直达地铁口，那么多行李还抢着帮偶们搬，好感动。房屋的位子不在市中心，很安静的住宅区，好在离地铁站近，到涉谷地区大概半个小时车程，最后一天购物到很晚，在车站旁边的小市场里面还有药妆店，价格便宜，补了不少货，隔壁还有一家牛肉饭馆，推荐，性价比很高。

This was my first trip to Japan and Tokyo. I rented 7 air bnb places this 18 day trip and this was my favorite place. I was alone without a family or partner so the place was probably bigger then I needed with extra bedroom and two beds and extra toilet however that is what made it feel like a home. It was clean, new, remodeled feel to it like someone did put some thought into the layout and details. I loved the kitchen, dining room table, bedroom and toilet being upstairs. It came with coffee, tea, coffee filters, etc and everything you need to cook at home however with all the places to eat within 10 min of the place I would recommend eating out. The place was very quiet and residential I never heard any traffic or cars or noise. The other thing is even though it is out away from Tokyo you had the best of two world Tokyo like the 40's and 50's but as with the train going into Tokyo was very easy and within in most cases 30 to 40 minutes on the train.
I loved this place... I plan to come back and recommend it to anyone!

Mr T was the ultimate host. He would check in on us everyday while delivering a bottle of the best apple juice. The space was very modern and we felt comfortable and cozy right away. Would highly recommend!!

K & N's place is very nice! Its located in a quiet neighborhood east of central Tokyo. The train is conveniently located nearby. Great hospitality too! I enjoyed my stay considerably. I wish I had stayed a little longer.

民宿很讚，四個人住的很舒服！
每天晚上回去都穿著睡衣在二樓的客廳裡吃吃喝喝，如果住酒店是絕對沒辦法辦到的，這種體會真的是旅行時美好的回憶！
而且房東好熱情的，第二天早上還來給我們送蘋果汁，最後一天還開車送我們去一個地鐵大站好像是叫青底站，因為這樣去機場就很方便了，真的太感謝了！大大大推薦呀！
現在再看到房子的照片都好懷念住在裡面的這三天！
I like the house very much and host is very nice ! Everyday the house will be cleaned up. I will absolutely choose the house next time if I go to Tokyo again!
Thank you so much!

Maraming Salamat...!!!
Our stay at your place was a very, very, very nice experience; especially to me and my son who are first timers in Japan.
You and the rest of your family are very accommodating.
Again, thank you for sharing your house and the lovely experience. And definitely, your place I will recommend to anybody and everybody.
- Aline

The Pine house was easy to find thanks to great directions from our hosts. It was so comfortable, with both a tatami room upstairs and more western beds downstairs. Both were lovely to sleep on. The neighborhood is so charming, quiet, and the place was accessible easily by a very close train stop. The hosts were warm and welcoming and we enjoyed meeting MrT. If you’re around for the weekend, definitely plan to go out bar hopping in the neighborhood.
房子不错，房东很热情还送了一瓶苹果汁给我们，民宿距离地铁站也很近，但是想去热门景点玩的话要坐地铁很久，民宿地铁旁边有很多地道的美食，味道很不错。

Awesome & Cozy apartment! We added an additional person at the very last minute and K&N catered to our needs inmediately! Towels were provided and the house was, surprisingly, cleaned / rearranged everyday! 100/10 Airbnb and Host!
P.S. The Japanese Apple Juice the host gave us was really soothing.
P.P.S. He also drove us to the station when we were checking out. Stayed at 7 Airbnbs on our Japan Trip from Hokkaido to Tokyo but this was far by the best. Thank you!
Clean. Tidy. Great location.  No problem with food and transportation.  Host was able to communicate very well in English.
屋子和图片中一样 设备和用品都很新和干净  交通方便 车站距离这里不远 旁边河道很适合晨跑夜跑 周边商店一应俱全 环境十分安静 床的尺寸很合适（很多酒店都是小号双人床） 淋浴水压温度刚好 房东非常好 很快回应我们的需求 最后一天还送我们去了车站 下次来真的还想住这里 完美

La estancia en tokyo con K & N, fue perfecta, desde el inicio cuando los contactamos fue estupendo, respondían rápido y eran muy amigables, cada duda que teníamos nos ayudaban, ya estando allí fue aún mejor, la casa PINE es muy bonita, moderna, de buen tamaño, todo esta perfecto. Entre otras cosas, siempre están al pendiente de ti, te dan consejos guías, etc. Recomendado ir a un bar con ellos o hacer algo, ya que se la van a pasar genial. En conclusión de verdad no se van a arrepentir si van con ellos, la próxima vez que vaya (espero sea pronto) me tendrán ahí de nuevo! :)

Stylish place just outside of Tokyo. The train station is an easy walk with quick access to all the sights. It's a non JR line though but fares are cheap and you could probably easily transfer to a JR line. The hosts are awesome. Super friendly and flexible and will go out of their way to help. Would easily recommend this place.

Очень чистый и уютный дом! Оптимально для 3-4 человек. Хозяин очень приветливый человек. Все время беспокоился о нашем удобстве, помогал во всем, встречал и провожал, утром довозил до станции.
Мы останавливались в этом доме на 3 ночи, каждый вечер по возвращении домой нас ждали чистые полотенца, чистые корзины для мусора и тд. За всю свою практику аренд квартир такого я ещё не встречал. Этот хозяин достоин звания «лучший хозяин airbnb»
Мы рекомендуем всем эту квартиру!

K & N & Mr T,
First and foremost, we thank you for offering your home and the hospitality. Traveling to another country brings uncertainties and we felt safe and was treated as a family by you and your community. We will never forget this experience.
To all those traveling to Tokyo, we stayed at Tateishi during the second week. From apple juice, fresh towels, cleaning services, printing vouchers, offering a ride to the train station.... you name it - the host go way above and beyond.
Everything listed on the airbnb is on point and much more. Pine House was spacious, super clean, and had everything we needed.
Go and enjoy some time out with Mr T to dine and visit local bars. We had our greatest meals here in this town. The locals love practicing their english and welcomes you with much excitement.
The train is a quick walk to all the typical Tokyo tourist locations so please do yourself a favor and visit what a real Japanese community feels like with all the restaurants and business owned by families.
Stand up sushi bar is to DIE for!
I could go on... I'm thankful to have met such wonderful people and hope we see each other again.
Arigatou gozaimashita,
Cat, Matt, Jax
We really loved our little cosy apartment.Since we entered the house we felt very comfortable and everything was great.Mr T was very friendly and helped us during our stay.
这个房子非常棒，小巧舒适，在旁边就是一条街可以吃到很多美味的食物，还有一家居酒屋是一个很热情的中国阿姨开的，非常方便！离车站也很近，老板也非常好会送你到附近的车站！很棒的一次旅行！
房间和预期的一样，非常喜欢！性价比也很高，整洁干净时尚，房东很认真负责！很满意^_^
周边生活设施齐全，有很多很好的餐馆，价美物廉，部分提供24小时服务。交通便利，去东京各个景点在30分钟以内。街道宁静，可以充分体验日本人的日常生活。房东服务周到细致，回复及时，还提供送车服务。总之，性价比高，一次好的体验。
刚刚退房去羽田机场路上，两天小住非常棒的居住环境！周边本地居民区非常安静，去周边新宿，银座，晴空塔等都非常方便！房东时刻来关心我们的需要也提供很好的建议！还送我们到车站！祝福房东及其家人健康快乐，生意兴隆，新年快乐！

It was a pleasure staying in K&N's apartment, which was clean, comfortable and characterful. Although we didn't interact with K&N directly, Mr T did meet with us a couple of times on their behalf.
Our hosts were very quick to respond to any concerns: for example, we found that the provided wifi hotspot had a fairly short battery life, so Mr T came by within a couple of hours to provide a replacement (along with a welcoming gift).
The local train station was only a few minutes' walk away, and we found getting to most attractions required no more than one transfer. On our last day, Mr T was kind enough to drop us directly to a larger station, with a direct line to the airport.
住的地方虽然离中心比较远，但还好地铁直达 还算方便。房东很热情，也很贴心，每天都会忙帮打扫，因为是冬天去的，所以房东还会帮忙提前开好暖气！而且房东还会送自家制的果汁很特别 也会在离开的时候送我们到附近的地铁！一次很棒的住宿体验！

Tolles Appartement und toller Service. Die Lage ist gut und man kommt innerhalb von 30 Minuten in die meisten Stadtteile von Tokyo. In der Umgebung gibt es viele Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten.
Very lovely and feels like home, really recommended to stay here!

Very homely and cozy as well as convenient, as it is near multiple convenience stores, 24 hour food stores as well as other pharmacies and stores that sells basic necessities. The lodging is also very near the train station for easy access. The host is very gracious and caring! The lodging resides in a very peaceful neighbourhood and is easy to find. The host is very thoughtful, offering and driving us to the train station on the last day, knowing we have a lot of luggage. We'll definitely be staying here again if we go back to Tokyo.

We had a great stay here! Loved the local neighborhood which was very quite.  Plenty of options for dining within walking distance.  The space is impeccably clean and equipped with everything you need during your stay.  Mr. T is the best!  He offered us a ride to the train station on our departure day which was supper helpful.  Highly recommend this accommodation for a family of 3-5.  Incredible value in Tokyo.

We had a fantastic stay in this house - the location was great in a small town with good possibilities  of local eating and shopping - and the transport to other parts of Tokyo was smooth. The hosts were great and the house was exactly what we hoped for with all the necessary features - super clean when we arrived, and besides nice gestures brining us juice and eggs for our breakfast, our wonderful  hosts also brought fresh towels everyday. We were a family of 4 staying in the house - and we all recommend this place warmly!

Pine house is a must recommendation, here comes the reasons:
- 5 minutes walk away from Tateishi station where you can easily access to the heart of Tokyo
- Tateishi is a quite town but has all tourists necessities around. There is a shopping street just beside Tateishi station where you can find all kinds of restaurants and convenient stores. If you want to experience local person’s food style, trust me, some restaurants and bars will not let you down.
- There is a river near Pine house, if you like me is a running lover, you definitely will enjoy the morning run alongside the river bank
- It’s only one stop from Tateishi station to Aoto station. At Aoto station you can take Narita Sky Access Line to Narita airport terminal 1 at 57 minutes. Here what I have to mention is that the landlord will give you a bottle of fruit juice as welcome drink on the day you arrive. And on the day you leave, landlord will drive car by himself to send you with your heavy luggages to Aoto station. It really saves your time and strengths.
In general, if you want to give yourself several days quite and leisure time after tired site-seeing and crowded shopping in downtown Tokyo, then Pine house in Tateishi is all what you want and it will make you remember this place for sure!

Much more akin to a hotel than your standard stays, in a good way. You can tell that the host(s) are experienced and went the extra miles to provide quality amenities and excellent services, which our family greatly appreciates!
We have coworkers visiting Japan this summer and will definitely recommend them and anyone else reading this review to check out this place.
地区很好的，闹中取静！去市区也比较方便！房东人很不错！还送了特色苹果汁！
Mr T是一位热情的房东。房子的地点和状况和描述相符。虽然不在市中心，但是步行5分钟就可到达京成立石站，离车站很近就有各种餐厅和便利店药妆店，相对来说很方便。我们两个人带着两个孩子分别住楼上和楼下很合适。房屋每天都有人清洁打扫这点非常好，烹饪物品适合做简单的早餐。英语沟通无障碍，相处4天很愉快。对了，还有Mr T送的果汁，哈哈，非常感谢，会考虑再次入住。

The location may not be in Central Tokyo, but the closet station is a 5 minute walk and in 10-15 minutes you can be in Asakusa, Ueno or Oshiage Skytree. Katsushika itself has a lot to offer and shops and restaurants are just a walk away. We regret not staying longer to explore the nearby shops.
Hospitality is top notch. Mr. T visited us a couple of times and made sure we were ok. He also helps you if you have any questions on any places you want to visit. In addition, you can join him for dinner and try out local spots just like a local. You will not regret it.
The place was very clean. Mr. T. made sure it was clean everyday stocked with new towels. It has everything you need to cook. The place has two toilets and one shower. A washer and dryer is located just outside the door.
Overall it was a pleasant stay. We are sure to come back to Tokyo and will definitely come back to this place.

We would definitely consider coming back to Tateishi if and when we return to Tokyo.  The place is at a great location close to amenities, train stations and is very well maintained apartment.  Our host Mr. T was more than gracious and hospitable during our week stay.
非常棒，想订的尽早吧，不会后悔的

This Airbnb was absolutely perfect. My friends and I were super impressed with the location, all the amenities offered and the most generous hospitality shown to us during our stay. There is so much to do and see in just a few short blocks from the Airbnb. The train station is close by and it doesn’t take long to get into the city. There are at least three different convenient stores opened late. We saw tons of local eateries and lines of stores to shop at. There’s even a two-story arcade, with crane games, pachinko machines and a purikura (photo sticker booth)! The shops we went into were all English friendly. One of our favorite highlights during our stay at this Airbnb was being able to have drinks with Mr. T and getting the full local izakaya feel. We’ll definitely book this place again the next time we visit Japan. The Pine House is definitely worth referring to all of our friends.

房子住起來很舒適也很漂亮
主人很貼心有問題會馬上處理
回程的時後行李很多還會載我們到青砥車站幫我們上下車搬運行李

Our family of four (two adults, two older children) had such a comfortable and nice experience during our one week stay at the Pine House! It was larger than we expected for Tokyo lodging, and very clean and nice! We loved that the neighborhood was convenient with plenty of shops and restaurants and train station a short walk away, but not so crowded and busy like some other parts of Tokyo and we were able to have what felt like a very authentic Japan experience. We appreciated K & N's quick communication, portable wi-fi, the delicious apple juice that Mr. T brought us, clean towels every day, access to the washer/dryer, comfortable beds, and even the porch lights that were left on for us at night! Visiting the bars with Mr. T was a great experience as well, with very delicious food. We are so happy we stayed at Pine House and would absolutely recommend it!
Tuan rumahnya baik, rumah Dibersihkan setiap hari dan di beri ganti handuk bersih setiap hari. Seputar lokasi banyak penjual makanan, swalayan dan family mart. Sangat direkomendasikan

出乎意料的干净整洁
周边设施也非常的齐全
地铁非常方便，从地铁口走到住的地方就几f分钟的时间！
房东也非常的热情周到，最后怕我们不方便h还送我们去地铁站，非常的nice！

Our family of four stayed a week at the Pine House. The hosts, Koji, Nami and Mr T were just fantastic! Instructions and tips were detailed and thoughtful. The property was beautifully designed and in tip-top condition. There was daily housekeeping and fresh towels. And the most friendly Mr T brought us delicious fresh apple juice frequently. We also had a great yakitori dinner with him in a local restaurant. That was how hospitable he was.
My family members have stayed in numerous airbnb properties in various countries but none could compare with K&N and Mr T. We would gladly give them a rating of 6 out of 5. All airbnb hosts should be like them!
干净整洁，两层住起来很方便。位置离景点比较远，是一个当地人的住宿区，可以体验当地人的生活。老板们都很热情。

I loved staying with k+n they were the most amazing and helpful hosts. When we arrived at their beautiful house there was a welcome note. They gave advice on all the places to eat near by and visited us once a day. They gave us directions when we needed them. when we checked out Mr. T who had been so kind and helpful the whole trip gave us a ride to the local train station.

The house is very clean and cozy, which is the same with photo advised, host is also helpful and nice, even drive us to the subway station. Just a bit far from central so will take some time if u want to go shopping to Ginza or shibuya or other places, but also within one hour. The infomation guide from host got everything needed, also there is a direct train from the house to Haneda airport, very convenient.
I will definately recommend this place if u want to experience the local life style here with your family.
非常满意，房东人也非常热情友好，^_^^_^
东京的地铁四通八达，不过有点复杂，第一天转了3个小时才搞清楚怎么坐，房东也及时给了建议！

The house is located in a lovely neibourhood, with lots to explore around. It was very suitable for a group of four like ours. The space was neatly designed, and very clean. The host was also very friendly and welcoming. We truly enjoy our experience living here and would definitely recommand this place to all my friends!
房子里京成立石站很近，离浅草寺也很近，房东真的超热情亲自去车站接我们，还告诉我们最近有花火大会，送了一瓶很好喝的果汁！房子很干净，每天都会来打扫和收垃圾！附近有一条河，晚上可以过去逛逛，特别舒服！房子住的很开心！

在这里住了四晚，非常难忘的经历。房子所在的位置非常安静，是远离闹市和喧嚣的居民区。距离最近的地铁站步行5分钟，房子周围也有不少超市、好吃的居酒屋、和东西齐全的药妆店。
房子是装修和设计很精致的二层小楼，一楼是床，二楼是榻榻米，住着非常舒服惬意。我们也很享受厨房和小饭厅，每天晚上在超市买点食材，自己开火做吃的非常安逸。步行十分钟的另一个地铁站旁边有大超市，能买到很棒的生牛肉，回来自己煎牛排的体验简直太棒了。
谢谢接送我们和每天“嘘寒问暖”的小哥，朴实热情心细。下次如果是多人出行东京，很大概率还会选择这里。

A great, atmospheric home to enjoy anytime of the year, where both the venue and its host exceed all expectations with such expert facile, the experience that came with it granted desire for a longer stay(For both my wife and I). Mr T. Is the proud owner of seven locations here in Tokyo, and his hospitality, personality, and geniality is the embodiment of the “Japanese way”. We were welcomed with a gift and several recommendations as to the restaurant locale. He even invited us to join him at his favorite restaurant where we had the opportunity to eat like Japanese. His knowledge of the area will set you on the right path to find what you’re looking for, as well as hidden gems you won’t want to miss; it will definitely make your experience a memorable one.
great！
First time using air bnb and Made this process so simple and easy!
和图片完全一致，房东很热情，还接送我们到附近的地铁站以及给我们带了苹果汁，离地铁站也很近，就是离东京市中心有点远，很开心能在这边度过几天东京之旅
很热情的房东，房子也很干净整洁！车站下来就是一个市场，吃东西也很方便，不远的地方也有超级市场。房东提供车站的接送服务，很贴心大箱子拖着总归不方便。值得推荐给朋友

We had a wonderful stay in the housing. The residential area is very pleasant and exactly as described. The apartment was very well furnished and very nice. Mr.T was very friendly and always helped us. We can only recommend it and would love to come back again.
일단 도심이랑 멀어서 기본 1시간씩은 잡고 나가야한다는 점을 고려하시고 숙소가 정말 그리 크지 않고 1,2층을 오가는게 힘들다는 점이 있습니다. 그리고 수건은 매일 갈아주시나 다른 청소는 따로 해준 것 같지는 않았습니다. 그렇지만 체크인과 체크아웃 할 때 배려를 많이 해주셔서 좋았습니다.
房子位於地鐵站附近，要到淺草的話很方便。房東很熱情，還招待了我們一瓶蘋果醋，也提供了很多東京旅遊的攻略，很受用。房間漂亮、乾淨也很舒適，是一個非常棒的居住經驗!非常推薦!

We absolutely enjoyed our stay at the place. Mr T was very friendly, offering us help and taking us to the local restaurant for dinner. We chatted and laughed; there seemed no language barrier. If we were to return or our friends would ever visit Japan, we would stay there again and highly recommend the place to our friends.

Mr T’s house is very tidy and lovely loft and he treated us so well and drived us to the station if we needed. Moreover, you can enjoy his town which is very quiet and special local Tokyo. We hope to stay again!

This place is outstanding. Very spacious by Japanese standards and well equipped. It is in a quiet neighbourhood four stops and a five minute walk from the station to  Oshiage (Skytree) - which makes for very peaceful sleeping and a great experience to experience a local area. The beds were made every day along with a clean up and fresh towels. Mr T took us to a local restaurant on our last night and it was fantastic!! Thank you for the awesome stay!

Highly recommended for accommodation in Tokyo! Close to train station, only 3 minutes walk.  The house fits our expectations for Japanese style. The house is also equipped with auto lights which is very cool.  We really appreciate all the kindness of T the host for helping us have a wonderful stay in the house!

Nos encanto hospedarnos aqui, la casa es ideal para conocer un barrio mas local y tranquilo pero muy bien ubicado para explorar la cuidad, cerca del metro, la estacion esta llena de pequeños restaurantes y tiendas. La casa en si es grande, buena para una familia o dos parejas es comoda y limpia. Regresaria a quedarme aqui!
非常感谢房东在下雨天的夜晚，当我们被困在地铁站时，及时告诉我们更换路线，并特意开车来接我们送到旅舍，如果下次再来会优先选择住在这里。

Karun:
This has to be one of the best experience I've had staying with Air BnB. The house is very clean and organized. There are English labels to indicate instructions every where in the house. This makes it very easy to navigate. Mr.T is a fantastic host. He always check in on us (daily) to see if we need anything. His apple juice is delicious!
(I mixed it with Sake) :)
I'd recommend this place to anyone, if you come to Tokyo; it's a must!
Nicole:
This has to be the best experience I have had when using Airbnb. Our host Mr. T was very attentive to our needs and engaging while visiting us in the mornings. He would ask about our plans for the day and help out how to get there. There was an booking mistake that we lost a day but he arranged for us to stay an extra day at the Airbnb. I really enjoyed his company when we went out to eat dinner with him, fed us the best of the best in the local area while drinking some sake. Definitely recommend him for booking!
Michael:
Can't really think of what else I would want. The host (Mr. T) brought us drinks and fresh towels and also showed us the best local restaurant (and its secret menu). The house was quiet, clean, and close to the train station.
雖然立石並非市中心，但生活機能相當好。附近有商店街、超市、便利商店、車站…等，非常方便。房間完全符合照片裡的樣子，建議行李可以放樓下就好，樓梯不是那麼好走，若是提著行李廂上下樓有點危險，但除此之外整個公寓都非常棒。房東人很好，提供了許多可以觀光的地點、帶了蘋果汁給我們喝，也詢問是否需要送我們到青砥車站轉搭直達機場的專線。總得來說住在這裡的經驗很棒，若還有機會去還是會想住在這！

We enjoyed our stay at K & N's house. They met us there at check in and were accomodating with the time. The house was spotless which was nice, given that the neighbourhood was a bit grittier than we had been used to! Still very interesting to see.  Good lay out of the house with our 4 year old son.

離車站大約走路五分鐘左右就到，車站附近有許多店家都很方便
房東人也很好!很熱情很關心房客，只是上下樓梯比較窄，所以搬運行李上樓要注意
房東也有送我們蘋果汁，很熱情的房東，最後一天我們總共有11件行李，房東也很讚的幫我們把行李送到青砥車站，讓我們剩下不少力氣 :)

Apartment was cosy but beautiful. Absolutely spotlessly clean and in a great out-of-the-way area with easy train access and plenty to do locally. Bedrooms lovely and stylish, although it could do with some curtains in the downstairs bedroom.
It’s not right in central Tokyo but trust me that’s a good thing. Access to the city is super quick and easy if you use Google Maps and get a Pasmo card.
Hosts were exceptional and went above and beyond our expectations. It was halfway between an Airbnb and a hotel, with fresh towels being brought round every day.
Mr T even came round on our second day to say hello and give us some delicious apple juice. There was also great tea and coffee in the house.
The apartment had both unlimited WiFi with decent speeds and a separate pocket WiFi which you can take around the city with you which is amazing. Has a 7GB limit (presumably per month?) We used about 0.5GB over our four nights.
No train noise inside the apartment whatsoever even though it’s fairly close to a track.
No traffic, although the occasional moped going past at various times and single glazing means you can hear passers by, although it’s not problematic.
Vending machine right outside with hot and cold coffees so great in the morning if you’re the one who got up late!
Great info provided by the hosts, and when Mr T dropped round he gave us a handy map of stuff to do in the local area.
On checkout Mr T turned up and insisted on giving us a lift to the station which was really nice of him!
Oh it has two toilets which was great and the shower is extremely nice!
If you’re looking for a residential area Airbnb then I would absolutely recommended this one. It was a really really enjoyable first experience of Japan for us.
Highly recommend this property to all the travelers

You will not regret to spend your time in Tokyo and rest in Pine House that will giving you Japanese semi modern style. The Host Mr.T is very humble and very kind. He pick up us on station and giving fresh apple juice as welcome drink and give recommendation about food, nice place on nearest place arround house. I can promise you that you will spend good time if you stay in Pine House ;)

My husband and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Pine House.   The place was exactly as advertised, clean, and easy to find thanks to the very thorough directions from the hosts.  Hosts were exceedingly gracious and accommodating.  We recommend!
Great location & hospitality! Would certaiinly book again when next time in Tokyo!

The town is very quaint. Mr. T picked us up and dropped us off at the station which really is a help when you have luggage. I would 100% stay again! Access to Tokyo is easy once you know the station names.

The Pine House is a great accommodation. Very roomy for Japan. The location is very close to the train station and local places to eat. It is in a very quiet neighborhood which is great for getting a good night's sleep. Both rooms are very spacious and it is great to have 2 toilets. The only thing that was amiss is the fact that the house internet was not working due to a previous guest that used a illegal download service. This cancelled the internet service for the room as the Japanese take illegal downloading very serious. It will also cost you a $1000 usd fine. I am happy there was also a pocket wifi to use which we did use and everything was fine.
Super clean and incredibly quiet in a neighborhood approx 30 minutes into the center of Tokyo, with a close train station. Very helpful host.

If you want to discover Tokyo in couple, in family, or with friends you are in the right place ! The house is perfect, with space and perfectly clean. It’s also decorated in a japanese way which is really nice for us. Last but not least, the host have offered us a quality of service that I’ve never seen in a Air b and B. Arigato !

The hosts were friendly and accommodating,they communicated well with us.  They offered to pick us up and drop us off and their instructions were very clear and helpful.  The neighbourhood was pleasant and very quiet.

Koji y su familia son fantásticos. Nos han tratado “súper” bien, hablan castellano, se ofrecieron para recogernos y llevarnos a la estación... la verdad que nos hemos sentido muy a gusto. La casa además esta lo bastante cerca del centro de Tokyo en metro y lo suficientemente lejos como para hacer vida de barrio. Una visita de 10.

Pine House is a great little hideaway in the back streets of Tateishi. We were chauffeured from Aoto station by Mr T and transported to Pine House. The neighbourhood around the station is quiet but well serviced by traditional restaurants and bars and a nice change from the chaos of the tourist spots of Tokyo. The house can easily accommodate up to four people and is well serviced and has pretty much everything you need for a night in or a breakfast before heading out. There is a terrific supermarket under Aoto station. Highly recommended.

The first of our airbnb's for this apac trip and we were extremely pleased with this selection. They set the bar high and some of the others we stayed at didn't measure up. K&N were super fantastic hosts.

Highly recommended!非常推荐！
每天都会更换洗澡的浴巾并帮忙扔掉垃圾，而且这个区域很安全，我们忘记锁门也没有遗失物品。
如果有需要房东先生会在check out的那天送到青砥站，很热心也很耐心！

K & N's place is awesome! Highly recommended as it is very close to the train station and amenities.
The host cleaned up the place everyday while we were out, and warm bed lights were always welcoming us when we come back at night. It is truly a home away from home.
Also the free pick up service @ Aoto Station has made our trip to and from the airport much easier.
Thank you so much for the thoughfulness! Will certainly come back in our future visit to Tokyo!

This was the perfect place for our family of four. Mr. T met us at the train station and drove us to the apartment, which was so wonderful after the long flight. The apartment is in a safe lovely neighborhood that is right near the river. I enjoyed running on the river walk and doing yoga in the park in the mornings. It is only a 3-5 min walk from the train station. It was easy to get around.
There are 4 beds. Two bedrooms. Very comfortable and plenty of room. Two great bathrooms and one shower. All modern and sparkling. I also appreciated the washer and dryer. They worked even faster than the US machines (which is not a surprise as all technology here is just simply better).
The kitchen has everything you need. It was stocked with tea and coffee. And K&N brought nice gifts both when we arrived and when we left.
I would definitely recommend!

An outstanding place to stay! Starting off with arriving at the station, to avoid any transfers, the host offered us a ride from the local train station to the Airbnb (where we were personally checked-in). We loved meeting our hosts and Mr. T who were all very friendly and helpful throughout our stay which included exchanging towels, taking out our garbage, and addressing any of our concerns. They provided very clear instructions, directions, and local recommendations that our family enjoyed during our visit. A very clean house with a traditional feel and the neighborhood was very quiet! The location was also conveniently nearby convenience stores and the train station (less than a 5 min. walk). To Tokyo, Ginza, Tsukiji Market, and Tokyo Disneyland/Sea the train ride was about or within 45 minutes (as many lines brought us directly to our locations). Great service, location, and place -we hope to visit Tokyo and stay here again!

Nice little home. The cleanliness was second to none! Located in a quiet neighborhood and a conveniently short walk to the metro. Mr. T’s hospitality made our stay feel welcoming. He would show up every day only to drop off fresh towels and make sure the toiletries are stocked and trash bags/recycling are empty. Would stay again and highly recommend this to anyone!

We stayed a week in K & N's place and loved it. Cozy, convenient and peaceful. K & N are great hosts who helped with getting us to and from the train station, offered helpful suggestions on traveling around Tokyo, and were always available for questions. We loved staying at the Pine House!
房间很干净，很有日本的味道！！感谢房东的招待！！！

Very quiet neighborhood, many shops, and near stations. They clean the house everyday and change the towels. It’s so refreshing, we love coming home to a clean place. I’d recommend this place to anyone traveling to Tokyo.

The Tateishi station is very near to the accommodation and there are some nice shops and  restaurants next to the station. Very convenient location and very nice place to stay in Tokyo. The host will change towels and the dustbin every day. Kawano San is very helpful and I felt very warmly welcomed. Thank you very much!
Great place away from the main city. Stayed here with my wife and two boys. Fantastic local tips and very close to the supermarket, combini, and station.

We had a great time in Tokyo. The place was perfect for 4 people. Everything you need for a few days is there, and the place was very clean. High speed internet in the appartment, portable WiFi hotspot to take with you, clean up and new towels everyday: 5 stars for that.
The area has enough food shops and small restaurants, but is very quiet at night. It is only a few minutes walk to the Kesei Tateishi station, which gives access to most areas in Tokyo in 15-35 minutes. Our host gives great service. He picked us up at the Aoto station by car, which is accessible by a direct train from Narita airport.
I highly recommended this place for anyone who wants to explore Tokyo.

We had an amazing stay in Pine House! The place was very neat and the service was very well. We really appreciated the transfer from and to Aoto Station. The location was a bit out of the city, but it was a nice experience to stay in a local neighborhood far away from Tokyo's craziness. And besides that, trains run very often so access to the city is not that bad!

The appartement is just as described. Very well equipped, the wodden design looks luxurious but still cosy,  everything is very clean. The surrounding is charming and quiet, but still close to lots of sightseeing spots. Perfect place to relax after a day in Tokyo!
Very good

Was a great place to stay while visiting Tokyo. It is a 25-45 min from most places in the heart of the city but it was nice to come back to a super quiet and real neighborhood.  Slept great and very nice place. Just a few min walk from the train to go anywhere you needed and lots of restaurants and grocery stores within 5 min walk from the house. They picked us up and dropped us off from station with our bags so was super nice and no work.

We had a great stay. The host was lovely and spoke good English. Everything was smooth and easy. New towels each day. The place is nice. This is well positioned just next to the station and easy to access. We loved this place it is easy to go in and out of centre . We had 4 days so the place was perfect. And we loved having our own place and something bigger. If you have only one day I would suggest staying more central as you do spend some time travelling into the center. It was not an issue for us as it was easy and we found it was nice to discover a real neighbourhood. First night we went into a small restaurant and spend the evening laughing with some locals... don t get that anywhere else. I definitely recommend if you are staying 4 days like us, for one day only stay more central.

Mr. Landlord, a very enthusiastic person, came to the station to pick us up, and also sent a large bottle of good drinks. The only regret is that there is less communication because of language barriers.
Highly recommend this place! Very thoughtful host! We had a very comfortable stay.

The house is lovely, very clean, comfortable, great for a family. The host Mr T is very helpful and welcoming, he communicates straightaway . The house is in a quiet town but with easy access to Tokyo and the airports. The town has a lot of great restaurants, bars, supermarkets and family marts. Highly recommended.

The town has a certain nostalgic touch, walking distance to the station, market, restaurants and SEGA arcade. Also walking distance to the waterfront where you can walk around the river. The house is comfortable and clean, it is being cleaned and towels are changed everyday.

I cannot recommend or rate K&N’s place highly enough. They were incredible hosts and extremely hospitable throughout our entire trip. Mr. T picked us up from the train station and presented us with a delicious bottle of apple juice that we consumed instantly. The home was cleaned and towels replaced daily. The neighborhood is lovely and quaint with lots of restaurants and convenient stores and grocery stores. Everything you could possibly need is within a 10 minute walk. Central Tokyo is easily a 45-60 minute train ride away but it was so nice to come back to a quiet neighborhood after a long and exhausting day in the city. Please consider staying here if you want to experience local charm and easy access to the rest of the city.
Excellent, professional and efficient hosts. Great area - out of the craziness of Tokyo. House was clean, well looked after and all needs provided for.

Location is a bit out of the city but good value and a nice quiet place to stay. Hosts were very accommodating with providing transport to and from the local train station.
Unit as described and clean and tidy. Close to transport and shops.

This was the most hospitable Airbnb experience I’ve ever had. The host offered transportation to the Airbnb upon arrival, as well as to the station on check out. We ended up arriving quite a bit before our check in time, but they were so accommodating and allowed us to hang out while they finished cleaning.
The house was spacious and super clean, and even though we were only there for a few days, the host came by daily to take out trash and change out the used towels. Unfortunately we were here during the super-typhoon Hagibis, but the host came by the day of in the pouring rain to check all the windows, change out towels, and bring us extra water.
Although the location is a little ways outside of the main city, it was nice to stay in a quiet neighborhood, with the city still being very accessible. Would definitely recommend.

Mister T came to pick up and drop off us at the station, tins really noce from him. We have had an Apple juice, it was really good. There are two bedrooms, you can choose wich one you want, a normal bed or a futon. The area is really quiet, you have a station at 5mins and a supermarket just on feint of the station.
Really good place to be when you come in Tokyo.

Pasamos un buen tiempo en Casa de Pino.
Hay much restaurantes y tiendas cerca de la casa.
K&N fue muy responsable, y servicial desde el momento en que preguntamos sobre la propiedad hasta el momento del check out. Todos los días Sr.Koyi venía a proporcionarnos cosas para nuestro viaje del día. Muy facil para viajar al lugar turista con el tren.
La ayuda que el anfitrión nos proporcionó fue excelente
K&N muchas gracias por su hospitalidad durante nuestra estadía.
Lo recomiendo bastante y estaría encantado de regresar a la casa de pino.
the house was cozy and clean. Near enough to walk to 3 different train stations and with plenty of night life and dining only minutes away.

The host’s hospitality is amazing. They offered us a pickup and drop off at the station. If it’s your first time in Japan or in Tokyo, they’ll tell you everything you need to know and where to go. The house was immaculate in every detail. My husband enjoyed jogging along the river every morning. A very quiet neighbourhood. Good for family.
Second time staying with them. Really incredible host :) place got many thing to eat. And really easy to access 👌
SÚPER RECOMENDABLE!!!! Anfitriones muy cálidos y amables
老板热情，车站接送，进屋当天送了瓶当地的饮料，很好喝，周边很方便，下次还会选择这边入住
Mr T is very kind to bring a bottle of apple juice as a welcome gift and has offered to drive us to the nearest station upon departure

K & N's place was great for our family of 4. It was close to Sky Tree and has awesome supermarkets and restaurants nearby. It's just 5 mins walk to Tateishi station but far enough away not the hear the warning bells from the crossing when trains approach. We did find that many of our trains trips to see the attractions we wanted to go to took us the the western side of Toyko, so with four people the train fares were around 4,000 yen per day which you should factor in. Cannot fault the house itself though. Perfect hosts and a really nice property.
An incredible place to stay with a website guide provided that shows the nearby shops, food places, bars, activities, train line and many more. Better than what I expected

Absolutely Fabulous!
Far beyond expectations and if AirBnB ever have a grade higher than SuperHost, it should be with K&N.
I will highly recommend K&N’s apartment. They told me there are seven, we stayed in Pine and they take such good care of the hospitality, quality and happiness of their guests.
Mobile WiFi device is super useful and it’s literally only 5mins from Tateishi Station, shops and some great local restaurants.
We will definitely be booking here for all our future trips to Tokyo!!
房东一家都太好了吧，首先，房子非常干净舒服，东西特别特别齐全，甚至有移动WIFI。其次，房子很大很干净，每天有清洁人员更换厨房垃圾桶。最后就是房东一家回复信息很及时，对人也非常热情，送果汁不说，第一次见面就确认了我们的行程，离开那天很早开车来载我们去车站，真的非常感谢！去日本很多次也住了很多家民宿了，这家是我迄今为止最满意最喜欢的。如果是一家人住，性价比简直超高。

The Pine House is a cozy stay with a great location. Close enough to main Tokyo but far enough that you’re sleeping peacefully - very easy access to public transport. The owners are very lovely and accommodating and the train station transfer with our bags were much appreciated. The pocket wifi was also a great help - we recommend bringing a portable charger to charge it if you’re doing a big day trip so you can use it to help you find your way home! All in all, my two friends and I had a fantastic stay here and recommend the Pine House to anyone wanting to see what Japan has to offer! Thanks again K and N!
住起來超級舒服的！

Mr. T is an amazing host and the Pine House is a beautiful apartment in a wonderful location. I would highly recommend staying here if your ever  traveling to the Tokyo area. Mr. T is very helpful and easy to communicate with!

駅から近くて定期的に利用させてもらってます。
キッチンが使いやすく料理しやすかったです！
木材の香りがして快適でした＾＾。

I had a great time in Tokyo. The place was perfect for what I was wanting. Everything you might need for a comfortable stay is there, and the place was very clean. High-speed internet in the apartment, and a portable WiFi hotspot to take with you when you go out sight-seeing, the cleanliness and new towels, got to give 5 stars for that.
The area has a lot of food shops, convenience stores, and small restaurants and bars, but is also very quiet at night. The building is only a few minutes walk to the Kesei-Tateishi Station, which gives access to most areas in Tokyo in 15-35 minutes. The host gives great personal service. He picked me up at Aoto station by car, Aoto Station was accessible by a direct train from Narita airport, so there was no need to change trains. That was a big relief.
I highly recommended this place for anyone looking for a clean, comfortable stay in Tokyo.

The rooms were clean and comfortable, and the apartment provided for all of the daily necessities (microwave, shower, washing machine, etc). I had no trouble finding the place, and Koji even picked me up at Aoto station when I arrived and provided me with directions to the local station, and then directions from the house to the station. It was a very easy neighborhood to navigate. I really enjoyed my stay. Koji was a gracious host, and introduced me to a great local ramen restaurant where I think we had some of the best ramen in my life. The area around Tateishi Station has a completely different feel from central Tokyo, and I really enjoyed staying in this quiet, historical neighborhood. It was nice I could get away from the noise of the city and rest after a long day of walking and exploring central Tokyo, while still only being four train stops away from Tokyo SkyTree. Absolutely recommend!!

Thank you K Family for being such a Super Host!!   I had a wonderful time during my stay at this apartment, it was clean and lovely and perfect for my needs.  It was a great homey location as it wasn't so touristy, I really  enjoyed the neighborhood. Everything is easily accessible, food (lots of local restaurant around), supermarket, convenience store and train station. Thank You Mr.K for your quick responses, Thank You Mr.T for being such a great Host, for always checking on your guest's, and for all your recommendation.  This apartment is good place for family with ample space for big luggage.  I will definitely be back and recommend this place to everyone. Thank You once again.

The family is extremely helpful, generous and friendly. They live nearby, so are available immediately for any needs that ma arise. The house is clean, and very cozy. Having two toilets is a definite plus!  It is in a very quiet neighborhood. It’s only a few minutes’ walk to the train station from where it connects well to Asakusa, Oshiage (Sky Tree) and other areas in the northeastern part of Tokyo. Highly recommendable!

A wonderful experience staying here. We were made to feel very welcome from the moment we arrived all the way through to the end of our stay. Our kind hosts went above and beyond to help organise transport both when we arrived and left and were always available to answer tips and questions about tourism in Tokyo. The location is nice and quiet and was easy to commute to lots of the central spots in Tokyo using the train. The house was very clean and a comfortable place to rest after long days of tourism. A much more personable and friendly experience than I'm used to with Airbnb and I'd definitely stay again.
One of the best hosts you can imagine.
Probably the best decision if you want to be in Tokyo, but still in a quiet place. Everything was Perfect!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Pine House. Mr T was an excellent communicator who not only made fantastic recommendations, but also proactively helped us when we booked a flight that departed early in the morning while trains weren't running. The accommodation had everything we needed and was a short walk to shops/the train station/plenty of food options. We will definitely be back!

K&N’s place was great and Koji was extremely friendly and picked us up from the station and showed us around, as well as recommending some local restaurants. The place was spotless and exactly like the listing. The location is a 5 minute walk from the train station and close to coffee shops and restaurants. Very quiet as well. I highly recommend staying here!

Nami, Koji and Mr T are great hosts! Mr T met us at the station and gave us a ride to Pine House. After a long trip, it was so nice to be driven right to our door (and not have to roam around searching for the house with our luggage in tow).
Nami met us there and together they provided us with all the information we needed and showed us around. The house is great! And there are two toilets!—Very rare for an Airbnb in Japan! Super helpful for a family! :)
Nami and Mr T had excellent restaurant recommendations and were of great help. They had yummy unexpected refreshments in the refrigerator and went above and beyond to make our week comfortable and memorable.
It was nice staying in Katsushika—away from the hustle and bustle of the city, but just a quick train ride away. We enjoyed exploring the area thanks to some great information provided by K & N.
Thanks Nami, Koji, Mr T and Pine House for a wonderful week in Tateishi/Katsushika!
Highly recommend!

We had such a good time with Nami and Koji! they were really helpful! They helped us making calls for restaurants since most places we were looking for needed reservation.
The place was like the pictures and even more!
They picked us up at the station and took us back too at the end which was a big help with our suitcases. They are really friendly people and I would recommend their place to anyone staying in Tokyo!
호스트분들도 정말 친절하셨고, 숙소도 일본 느낌이 나서 정말 좋았어요. 주위에 먹거리도 많고 전철도 예쁘고 모든 것이 완벽했습니다!!

Hosts were very responsive, kind, and helpful. We immediately felt at home as they gave us a comprehensive overview of the area, including the best places to eat, drink, and relax. They even gave us some delicious apple juice. The neighborhood is quaint and quiet at night, the perfect place to come back to after a day in downtown Tokyo. We hope to come back again! - Mr. V

The K family were great hosts. They were attentive, kind, and friendly.
The picked us up from the train station, and took us to train station on our departure.
We would have loved to get to know them better, but we were always on the go.
We hope to see them again on our next trip to Japan.

K and N are fabulous hosts.  Unlike most Airbnbs where you never actually meet the host(s) K and N live and work nearby and are incredibly personable and helpful.  The place was immaculate.  We loved the pine interior and unique design.  Well supplied, too. Not only did we have at our disposal all the gadgets one needs, but they supplied us with coffee and coffee, too.  Conveniently, the washer and dryer were right outside the door.  The river is nearby and the Tateishi Station is a short and fun walk away.  I almost forgot the added bonus. K or N  or Mr. T or someone else in this delightful family will pick you up from the bigger Aoto station and take you back when you depart.  My wife and I were sorry to leave.  Great hosts, excellent Airbnb.
第一天到到時候有來接我們，真的讓我覺得很貼心～房東們推薦了很多當地美食，還做了交通指引，是我遇過最親切的房東，走路三到五分可以到車站，附近也很多商店，房間十分乾淨整齊，和照片一樣，入住的期間我們十分開心和幸福，若是來到東京，我真心的推薦K&N的房源❤️
Absolutely the best hosts we have ever had! Thoughtful, kind and helpful, near 2 stations, we will be back!

5 stars recommend!
Mr. T from landlord group will pick you form Aoto station to B&B and give the best city tour when driving :)
Then depends the flight time to take you to Aoto station on last day too, it's really sweet and convenience service!
The house is clean, quiet, took 6-7mins walk to 京成立石 station.
We really appreciated how helpful and responsive they were during our stay. We never had any issues and the location is great for taking the train. Thank you Pine House for a great first visit :)

We arrived later than planned and when contacted about the delay Koji adjusted pickup time. Mr. T , a brother met us at the train station at 9 in the evening and then even toured us a bit before arriving at the house. We were met by Koji and his wife Nami, and before even going in were given a tour of the family business close by. They then spent half an hour explaining many things about the house, the area, the train system and local attractions.
Throughout our stay we were contacted to ensure all was well. They recommended going to a Koto concert in a teahouse on a Sunday afternoon in Shibamata which was very special.
We didn't lack for anything, even coffee when we were running low was delivered straight away. Accommodation was superb in every way in a spotless house.
They clearly love having guests and have two other homes close by that they manage. On our departure day we were taken to the train station at 8:00 with a farewell sendoff from the family. HIGHLY recommended

We very much enjoyed our stay! It was so convenient to be picked up at Aoto Station after a long day and night of travel, and the beds were comfortable. Once we felt human again, we were able to fully appreciate how lovely Pine House is and how great the hosts. I’m sure I had silly questions, but they all were answered promptly. The home was clean, in a quiet neighborhood, and close to the train station. This was our first trip to Japan and finding this AirBNB made a memorable vacation even better. Thank you! 😊

10/10 would stay again. They were so welcoming and helpful! Always replied within a good time frame and gave great recommendations on where to go and how to get there. The house was so charming, I miss it already lol. The neighborhood is a calm, quiet one so be sure to keep that in mind when booking. Also the train station really is 5 mins away as well as the local convenient stores. Thank you so much for having me and Gisamy, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay!

What a gem! The hosts were wonderful - very responsive and friendly. They picked us up from the local train station and drove us to the house. The house itself is small but very well laid-out, clean, and has everything you need. We were a group of three and were very comfortable.
The neighborhood itself is outside of the main part of Tokyo, but for us that was a plus, because it wasn't so packed with people and felt really authentic. You can definitely find good places to eat and drink in the neighborhood - the hosts' ramen shop recommendation was excellent! The station is only a few minutes walk away so you can easily take a train into central Tokyo.
Overall we were 100% happy with our stay!

- Sehr freundliche Gastgeber
- Super ausgestattet
- Alles wie auf den Bildern
- Alles fußläufig erreichbar
Jeder Zeit wieder gerne! :-)

I have stayed with this lovely family 5 years ago and this experience was even more special as I brought my dear husband, they are very accommodating and always responded immediately. Pine House is very comfortable and felt like home during a short stay. It was also nice to chat with them and to speak a little Spanish with them. They provided a ride to the station to head to airport. Overall, we had a wonderful time, and the area is very authentic and a place where locals live and have great markets and restaurants and bars. I would stay again!

We loved staying here! Mr T and his family were very helpful and always went the extra mile to make sure our stay was comfortable and we had everything we needed. They were the nicest hosts I’ve had on Airbnb! The house was beautiful and we couldn’t have asked for more.
K & N we’re incredible hosts, and their place was perfect, the neighbourhood is lovely and the train is walkable and makes it easy to get where you need to go! Loved every minute of it!

We were treated very well, we were given a lot of local recommendations that we got from the hosts, many of which were well worth our time!
The place was clean and comfortable. We had a pretty stormy day on our visit but had a very pleasant day inside the accomodation.
Whenever we needed help we were treated very kindly by one of the hosts in a matter of minutes.
Thank you so much for your hospitality when staying at your accomodation Kawa and company! 😁

We thoroughly enjoyed our week- long stay. The hosts were wonderful, very helpful, responsive and friendly. It was so nice to leave the crazy part of Tokyo at the end of the day and come back to our peaceful, relaxing house in Katsushika. It was also conveniently located close to a train station. I highly recommend staying here if you're coming to Tokyo.
Beautiful stay, a nice calm area with a lot of great food, right by a train station. Would 1000% stay here again!
근처대도시와의 거리도 멀지않고 역이 가까이있어 이동이 수월했습니다. 호스트에게 무엇이든 물어보면 항상 친절하게 답해주셔서 매우 편안한 여행이었던것 같습니다
Service was beyond customer expectations. Best Airbnb host for us so far!
The host families are proactive and professional. And the house is quite clean.

Quiet neighborhood, 5 minute walk from metro that reaches everywhere
Good food recommendations and very nice hosts

Wonderful, authentic home in a quiet, safe neighborhood. Very clean home, nice to have two bedrooms and two bathrooms. Easy to get around. Near train station. Great restaurants and shoppes with delicious food in area. Very nice hosts.

Amazing and friendly from start to finish. We were picked up from the train station on time, and brought straight to the house. We were giving a handmade binder of recommendations for food and things to do. They really took time to make the stay very special. I greatly appreciate it and if I come back to Japan I would stay here again.

Mr Koji very kindly picked us up from Aoto station and gave us a good tour of the house which was clean and beautiful and even gave a couple of good recommendations of what we can eat and do around the vicinity.
Hosts are so friendly and responsive whenever we had questions and made sure we were staying comfortably. We greatly appreciate the fresh change of towels and helping us take out the garbage whenever we were out.
We had a very convenient and pleasant stay thanks to Mr Koji, Mr T and family!

One of the best accommodation and highly recommended! I am glad that I booked with K Family. Koji, Nami and Mr. T really helped alot during our stay in Tokyo. They stayed nearby so we often met along the street and they would always greet us.
From before we arrived in Tokyo and until we checked out, the hosts are always responsive.
When we arrived, they picked us up from the train station which was very helpful as we have big luggages. They gave very clear instructions to the pick up point. They also gave us a tour of the house, which looks exactly like the pictures. They also gave us good recommendation of places to visit in the nearby area.
The area is quiet and family friendly. It is also near to a train station and convenience store.
We truly enjoyed our time here and would definitely stay longer if we visit Tokyo again. We really appreciate the great hospitality!
Greatly enjoyed the home, very well kept and comfortable! Host was proactive and provided local recommandations! I would for sure stay once again!

The K Family was absolutely wonderful! The place was immaculate and was exactly what was described. LOTS of information and recommendations! They were so nice and went above and beyond all of our expectations. This family is the real deal and would HIGHLY recommend them!! Can’t thank them enough for the memories made while in Tokyo!

We were a group of 4 staying at Koji-san’s Pine house and the K family went above and beyond in every measure. We were picked up from a nearby station so that we didn’t have to walk with our luggage very far, and once checked in, the K family stocked the fridge with water and drinks for us. They also gave us recommendations where to eat nearby, and things to do. Housekeeping was done regularly and diligently, and the hosts were very responsive if we had questions. The house was comfortable and cozy, especially for groups of 4 or smaller. While checking out, the hosts helped us arrange luggage forwarding to move our bags to our next Airbnb, going as far as filling out part of the forms for which we only had information in Japanese. Overall, it comes highly recommended if you’re looking for a quieter place to stay in Tokyo that is also roomier for a bigger group. The only consideration is that if you want to travel to central Tokyo often, you will need to take the subway.
To be quite honest this is the best rental I Hve ever stayed at never met someone more helpful and respectful as this family that helped me with all my  questions and concerns

에어비앤비로 할 수 있는 최고의 선택입니다. 숙소 주변에 편의점, 지하철역, 산책로와 맛집이 도보 10분 내로 있습니다.교통이 굉장히 편리하여 화려한 도쿄 도심도 들를 수 있으며, 동시에 숙소 주변 고즈넉한 도쿄 도시의 정취를 느끼고 싶다면 추천합니다.
도보 5분내에 전철역이 있어 도쿄를 둘러보기에 좋습니다. 숙소 안은 호텔만큼 청결하고 3박 4일동안 지낼 수 있는 각종 가전제품, 휴지등이 충분히 구비되어 있습니다.(주변 시장이 상당히 가까워 부족하다면 구매하는 것도 용이)
또한 일본식 다다미 방이 있고 가구배치도 일본식이라 문화를 체험하기에 좋습니다.
무엇보다 호스트분이 너무나도 친절하시고, 한국인이 묵어도 영어를 할 줄 안다면 소통도 원활하여 좋습니다. 가장 좋았던 것은 주변 맛있는 음식점과 각종 관광지로의 교통편을 안내하는 책자가 있어 숙소가 있는 도시를 돌아다니며 관광할 수 있었던 것입니다. 다만, 숙소가 있는 타테이시는 관광객을 위한 영어표지판을 제공하지 않는 경우도 있기에 이 점은 조심해야합니다.
호스트분들의 친절한 응대와 숙소의 청결과 시설이 가격대비 할 수 있는 가장 완벽한 선택이었습니다.
Very friendly hosts, great recommendations for food and things to do. Would definitely recommend this place!

很安静的居民区，房屋整洁舒适。机场可以搭乘公共交通直达，走路3分钟就可以到达最近车站，车站旁边有一条功能齐全的商业街，街区附近也有很多美食。
房东是一个大家庭，他们都十分热情好客，开车接送我们到车站搭乘火车，并为我们推荐了很多美食和游玩的地方。
房东很好，到地铁站接送我们。房子在安静的住宅区域，离地铁站约五分钟的步行距离，距离银座等地，稍微有点距离。

We felt right at home staying the house. Very clean, all amenities provided. We love that the house is in a quiet neighborhood and not touristy area.
The host especially Mr. T is amazing. He went above and beyond to service me and my family. Mr. T picked us up at the train station and check us in the house. He provided us with clear information regarding the house. Mr. T also had arranged a taxi for us when we check out. Mr. T and his family host are very friendly and made us feel at home. Thank you for this.

Warm hospitality, great local recs, refreshing apple juice, very thoughtful hosts. If we really have to be super picky: maybe they can equip a cutting knife in the kitchen to cut vegetables and fruits.
Don’t forget to visit Shimabata!

The K Family and Mr. T were awesome hosts! They responded quickly to any questions that we had from beginning to end. The Pine House met all of our needs for the 4 of us. It's located in a quiet local neighborhood within a short walk to the nearest train station. There's lots of good food in walking distance. Perfect spot to unwind after exploring the busy streets of Tokyo.

K’s family was very welcoming and helpful, it was probably the best way to start our trip in Japan! They even helped us ship a package back to France.
The house is confortable, it is located in a quiet neighborhood, lots of nice places to eat around.
Many thanks for your kindness and all the great tips.
Warm wishes to the whole family.
Pauline, Yvon, Elie, Romane

Der Aufenthalt im Pine House war wirklich fabelhaft! Der Host und seine Familie waren sehr freundlich und haben und viele gute Tipps für Erlebnisse, Restaurants usw. gegeben. Wir haben uns sehr gut versorgt gefühlt und waren von allen Empfehlungen die wir wahrgenommen haben ganz begeistert. Die Kommunikation hat super funktioniert und wir konnten immer alles schnell klären. Das Haus selbst war sehr gemütlich und sauber. Wir haben uns hier sehr gut aufgehoben und wohl gefühlt. Ich würde diese Unterkunft jederzeit weiterempfehlen. Auch die Anbindung an die öffentlichen Verkehrsmittel sowie Supermarkt etc. war super. Alles in allem war der Aufenthalt super und wie würden bei einem weiteren Besuch in Tokyo gern wieder dort übernachten. Die K-Family ist nicht umsonst ein Superhost, diesen Titel haben sie wirklich verdient.

Koji-san is probably one of the most hospitable and helpful host you’ll ever come across. Him and his wife, also not forgetting his brother put in great efforts to make sure that our stay was a comfortable one from check-in till the end. Definitely well-deserving of the near 5-star review he currently has and more, (should be 5-star, hope my review inches him closer to it :)).

Really fantastic stay, the hosts were so wonderful. Picked us up from the station (even though we were very late due to a delayed flight), gave us local recommendations, we're really sweet and even sent us off with little gifts when we left. The area is quiet and the home was perfect for what  we needed. A little bit further out and the trains stop at midnight, but as we were on a work trip that was no problem at all. Would highly recommend.
This was one of best experiences I have! I will stay here when I come to Tokyo again!

We loved the space and the neighborhood. It was the perfect place to retreat to after spending a day in the bustle of Tokyo. Katsushika is quiet and friendly and we loved being by the water and visiting nearby Shibamata.

Best hosts ever, were really kind and generous, they were the nicest people you could want to meet and I would recommend them to anyone who was going to japan genuinely wouldn’t ask for more or complain thanking them isnt enough for what they do for you ☺️

We would highly recommend staying here! Koji and Nami were so welcoming and helpful and the house was lovely. It was great to stay out of the hustle and bustle of Tokyo, but close enough to be able to hop on a nearby train to easily navigate our way around.
We plan to return!

This was a great stay for me and my family.. It was cozy, extremely clean and comfortable. The hosts were very nice, welcoming and helpful. The area is in a convenient location and not too far away from anything. We all really enjoyed our stay here and would definitely recommend.

We were really grateful for K-Family Koji,Nami's place. It was located on a nice quiet street, but only 4 minutes from great restaurants and the metro. They were so helpful and kind. Our 2 year old also loved being there. Thank you!
Such an amazing stay. Beautiful home and lovely family that made us feel at home. Would highly recommend.
房东热情好客，房间非常干净舒适温馨，第一天房东准备了可口的当地饮料，临走时又送了小食物让我们分享，热情介绍了当地的特色美食，让我们感觉很亲切，下次还会再来的！

Being Koji and Nami San guest’s was incredible! They came to pick up us at the station and we felt immediately at home! They were always there for us, giving us advices, helping us, answering to all my questions and doubts😊!
The apartment was super comfy.
The neighbors were quite. The position is a little far from center but after the frenetic days in Tokyo,
We were grateful to ho back there e and relax. And the Tateishi Station is few minutes walking from the location!
Nearby there shops, food restaurants!
Everything was super! We miss our days there and then! Hope to go back soon.

Es war toll, Koji ist ein super Typ. Ich würde sofort wieder in eine Unterkunft von ihm einchecken. Er hat uns vom Bahnhof abgeholt und wieder zurückgebracht. Unterkunft sah wie auf den Bildern aus und war sehr sauber. Müll wirde regelmässig abgeholt und es wird alle 2 Tage auf Wunsch gereinigt. Alles top 👍🙌

Koji and Nami were amazing hosts. They had picked us up at a local station and drove us and our luggage to the home. They have such a beautiful family! They welcomed us in and gave us a detailed description of the space and neighborhood. Koji himself even showed us where he worked and lived which was 2 mins away. They even gifted us a special treat for our stay.
They communicated very well and definitely gave amazing recommendations of places to eat and visit. We highly recommend checking out the nearby neighborhood of Shimbata.
My family and I loved the neighborhood this home was located in. It is quaint quiet and has every thing you would need in easy walking distance. We would stay here again in a heartbeat on any future trips back to Tokyo.
Arigato gozaimasu Koji & Nami!

Koji and Naomi were absolutely amazing!! They picked us up at the station, gave us s very warm welcome and great recommendations!! It's an easy location to plan trips from with 2 stations that are walking distance from the station. They were very helpful throughout our stay and a beautiful send off, wouldn't stay anywhere else if I were to return to Japan.

The three of us wanted to get a taste of living in a Japanese home, away from the bustle of the typical tourist locations. We were looking for a place that we could feel at home in for our week long stay in Tokyo. We absolutely loved Pine House. Koji and Nami were warm, friendly, welcoming and so so helpful! Could not have asked for better hosts, a great home and a quintessential Japanese neighbourhood!

Koji and Nami went above and beyond. They met us at the Aoto train station and drove us to the rental house. They explained everything and provided a hand made booklet of the area and Tokyo generally. They let us book out late and drove us to the train station with directions on the train to take to the  Narita airport. Wonderful hosts and a faultless stay.

The K-Family were great and friendly hosts. They went above and beyond and they helped made our stay better. The airbnb was very cozy in a quiet neighborhood. It’s in a nice area with quick access to the other parts of Tokyo by train. Would book with them again! 😄

Vous recherchez une maison accueillante, avec tout le nécessaire pour y passer un merveilleux séjour, des hôtes fort sympathiques et disponibles en cas de besoin… et une oasis de calme pas trop éloignée de la frénésie, du tumulte et des néons de la grande ville, alors la Pine House est exactement ce qu’il vous faut. A 5 minutes à pied de la station de métro la plus proche, elle vous permet de rejoindre tous les points d’interêt très rapidement. Au sortir du métro, quelques commerces dont un FamilyMart et surtout un Kitchen Origin (qui propose de très bons plats à réchauffer). Nous y avons passé une merveilleuse semaine et remercions chaleureusement Koji et Nami, des hôtes comme on en souhaiterait plus souvent. Un grand merci à vous! André & Catherine
Great little spot to stay away from it all. Super clean and friendly hosts.

Koji and Nami's Pine House was very comfortable and in a great location. They met us as we were checking in and we got to meet their delightful children. As host's they were very helpful with information about the area and whenever we messaged them for help, they were always there with a prompt answer.
The house itself was adorable and very comfortable. It amazed both my husband and myself how peaceful it was even though in a very urban area. Also the train station was very close by and easy to walk to. There were enough variety restaurants that kept us well fed.
I would highly recommend this rental for your stay in Tokyo.

We wish we could give this place 10 stars out of 5! if you're considering this location- do yourself a favor and book it right away! The K-family were absolutely wonderful from picking us up at the train station for checkin to offering recommendations for our group. Our hosts were amazingly responsive and always so happy to help out. After staying here we all decided that whenever we get the chance to return to Japan we will ABSOLUTELY stay here again. I cant express enough gratitude for the hospitality we were lucky to receive.
We'll miss Japan once we leave but we'll always remember the care and helpful nature of the K-family. Thank you all so much! Hopefully we get a chance to see y'all again!
Koji and Nami were great hosts. Very responsive with good recommendations. Koji speaks very good English and the accommodations were exactly as we expected.
This is a quite street in a quite neighborhood close to the train station.  Perfect place to enjoy Tokyo without being in the chaos. Very cute clean place to stay.

A wonderful host that not only picked us up from the train station and dropped us off at the accommodation but also took us to the local restaurant that was recommended. The house was clean with everything you need including USB chargers, bottled water, and all the items that makes for a wonderful stay.
Our host also picked us up and took us back to the train station at the end of our stay!
Highly recommended to everyone
Super logement ! Très agréable et parfaitement équipé ! Koji était très disponible, gentil et réactif !

Koji and Nami went above and beyond to accommodate us - especially as I had a bad knee, they were very flexible with making sure I was okay. They had great recommendations of where to eat and shop and were extremely responsive. The house was spotless and very comfortable in a convenient location. if i come back to tokyo, i will definitely stay here. Koji and Nami are sincere, genuine, and kind people. The perfect hosts.

This stay was a truly incredible find! Koji and Nami were above and beyond the best hosts I’ve ever encountered at an Airbnb. As it was me and my wife’s first time in Japan, having them as our hosts left us feeling truly welcome as guests. The space is very nice and located very conveniently near Aoto Station which will get you in and out of downtown Tokyo quickly. Additionally Koji and Nami had so many amazing recommendations for things to do and places to eat during our stay. The next time I find myself in Japan, I will be looking up this place for another stay!

I have stayed in Airbnbs all over the world. Koji and family were the best hosts I’ve had, thus far. Kind, helpful, attentive, and proactive are just a few of the words that I would use to describe Koji as a host! The house was clean and comfortable. The neighborhood was quiet and convenient. There’s access to groceries, restaurants, and public transportation within a short walk. If his place is available during your time in Tokyo, stay there!

This accommodation was absolutely perfect for our trip. I would definitely recommend this too close friends and family. I can’t thank the hosts enough for all the information fast response and collection from the station. They truly helped make our trip memorable and unforgettable. 100% book this place.
Thank you.
房東真的非常非常好，拿了非常多的東西給我們吃，離開的時候也招待了我很多，房東一家非常熱情且友善，小朋友們也都很可愛

To start the house was great! We really appreciated the 2 bathrooms. The rooms each had their own mini split so after the hot days we were able come home to a fresh house. The water pressure in the shower was amazing and the distance to the train was like 5 minutes. Not only was the house great but the k-family was amazing! They were so friendly and hospitable. They picked us up from the train station when we arrived and gave us such amazing recommendations. They also checked in on us multiple times and offered their help so many times. I would definitely stay here again and would recommend anyone to stay here as well!

PERFECT !!!

even though this apartment didn't have any comment so far - the pics were so thrilling to me that I took the chance and booked the place for one week in october 2013.

I travelled with a friend to do both, business and tourism in tokyo.

the whole communication ahead of the stay was perfect. we got perfect travel and meeting instructions from mas, our host.
we even got event tickets for a rare to find traditional japanese geisha performance as a welcome gift (were we were the only foreigners) !!

we arrived very early in the morning. no problem: we were picked up at 7 a.m. from the metro station close to the apt. by superfriendly mas. it was superb to be able to have the apt. this early in the morning - right after a longhaul flight from europe.

the place was spotless clean and is located in a very nice neighbourhood with loads of charming (also european) restaurants and coffe shops with almost no tourists. we liked it a lot - found our favorite restaurant hang out and loved it to come back to this peaceful place after strolling around in the more crowded areas of shinjuku and shibuya.

the apt. itself was exactly like in the pics. everything was brandnew - we were the first guests. everything perfect: fantastic bed, furniture, interior design, shower towels, shampoo and and and ...

our host mas gave us detailed infos about bars, clubs, taxis, etc. whenever we asked by mail - perfect.

PERFECT ! PERFECT PERFECT !!!

thank you mas for everything, we had a fantastic time in STUDIO D ;-)

I booked this room not knowing Tokyo at all, hoping that it might be in a good spot. I really wasn't disappointed.

From the pictures you can see the room is immaculate with fantastic amenities. The Internet is high-speed, sound system awesome, bathroom luxurious and decor cool.

What I wasn't expecting was its perfect spot, just one row back from the coolest little street I've found in the city. It's a little French inspired district oozing with character. Full of restaurants (I urge you to go to the one down the hill with the plastic doors and buckets of seafood outside for the tuna cheek, just 1200 and enough for 2 people) and bars. You instantly feel at home.

There are very few tourists but you don't feel out of place. Plus it is close to the transport links at Iidabashi to get anywhere in the city within 20 minutes.

I honestly can't speak highly enough of the place. I'm in Tokyo for a month, yet only booked it for a week. Somebody else booked the following week before I decided to stay, meaning I had to move to a hotel for a week... before returning once again.

Mas is a great host who will tell you anything you need to know, then leave you to it with his number in case you need him. Exactly the way it should be

I enjoyed everything about the stay and would definitely come back. I was greeted by Mas at the train station who took me to the apt. Apt was very clean and all the furnishings were high end. The area is highly unique and still close to major tourist points. All in all an excellent stay.

Just Wow !!
Mas is a great host, with fast and clear communication, providing advices to get to the apartment from the airport and waiting for us at the subway exit. He was available for any questions we had during our stay, and he was very nice to us.
