The apartment itself was just perfect : Brand new, with touches of technology and design everywhere. The bed is crazy large and confortable, the bathroom is well equiped and ultra convenient with the bath that becomes a shower with a built-in curtain. Thanks for the bath products and towels as well ! The balcony is very pleasant. The TV and sound system is awesome. The attention to details is everywhere !
The location is just perfect : Iidabashi is the perfect place to get around in the city : JR and metro a few steps away. The apartment is located in a small walking street, very quiet, surrounded with many restaurants, shops and bars.
We were so happy to come back at "our" place and chill at the end of the day after walking in this beautiful city.
Once again, thanks to Mas and his amazing apartment, we had a wonderful time in Tokyo.
We are looking forward to come again, for a longer stay in Japan and for sure, studio-d will be a part of it.
great stay and wonderful host !
Great place.  Massaharu was a great host.

This place if great studio apartment off quiet street yet steps away from scores of fantastic bars, restaurants, shops, bakeries, you name it. Our host, Mas, met us at the train station to guide us to this hidden treasure and gave us pointers on what to do, where to eat, etc. I've been to Tokyo half a dozen times in the last 3 years and this neighborhood and this apartment are the best I've found yet.

What's not to like? It is a single space, so great for couples, single visitor, as while bathroom and kitchen are nice, its all pretty open and cozy (frosted glass between bathroom and main space; kitchen table pulls out when needed). With that in mind, it can't be beat.

Apartment is beautifully appointed and a very cool place to stay. We had no trouble getting there as our host met us at the station. Mas is a wonderful host, very helpful. We had everything we needed. Just perfect. One of the best locations in Tokyo. Kagurazaka is a beautiful area with a wonderful feel and has great restaurants and bars and even has good coffee and you really don't need to leave the area to enjoy the best of Tokyo.

Mas is amazing, the house/room is amazing, the neighborhood is fantastic.
If you have the chance please book it for a unique & relaxed Tokyo experience!
Thank you Mas for a special stay!

What can I say about Mas’ Kagurazaka apartment? The apartment was immaculate and well appointed. When you walk into the apartment you’ll be struck by how attractive it is. However, you’ll gradually see all of the details and thought that has gone into the apartment. Carefully curated furniture, linens, plates, and accessories, gave it a home away from home feel. It was really like having my own pied-à-terre in Tokyo!

The location was fantastic. In very chic Kagurazaka, you’ll get a taste for old and new Tokyo. You’ll find the most charming winding alleys that lead to exclusive Japanese invitation only restaurants (ryotei) as well as a healthy number of French (really good French) restaurants in the neighborhood as well. It is definitely like “staying at your cool friend’s pad in Tokyo.”

Kagurazaka is a conveniently located place. Only about 5 minutes by foot to the JR Train Station (even less to the subway station) and located in central Tokyo, you’ll be able to get just about anywhere easily. Or if you want to take a taxi, there are a ton in the area in the evening that can wisk you away to your desired location. (Not really as expensive as you’d think.)

Mas is a fantastic host. He was so accommodating and went above and beyond to make my stay memorable. He made an extensive list of options for a party I wanted to throw at a restaurant in Kagurazaka. With his help, I was able to host a party for 12 of my friends in a charming restaurant (that my Japanese friends even were impressed with). I’m so grateful for his help with making my party a success.

Mas’ Kagurazaka apartment was just lovely. It makes me want to pick up and move to Tokyo just to live in Kagurazaka. I highly recommend for anyone who wants a quiet place outside of the bustling tourist spots where they can get a taste for a higher echelon of Tokyo.

How happy we are to have chosen this appartment for our week in Tokyo!
The area is really well located with three stations in less than 200m from Studio-D and with loooooots of restaurants and bars right next to it.
The appartment was perfectly clean, well designed, fully equiped and super cozy.
Masaharu is such a helpfull housemaster, well organized and attentive for ANYthing that can serve you better.
Gracias Mas!

Mas was one of the most well organized host's I have had the pleasure of staying with. The apartment came with a detailed instruction manual as well as maps and suggestions for the local area.

Mas stayed in regular contact with us before and during our stay, and nothing we ever too much trouble, from helping us organize sim cards to reserving our transportation back to the airport.

In previous visits to Tokyo I have stayed in small but expensive hotel rooms in busy areas, staying in Kagurazaka was a totally different and altogether far more pleasant way to enjoy Tokyo. The nearby station has connections all over the city which make it a great base for exploring, however I would recommend spending significant in the local area, it has fantastic restaurants, cafes, bars and many friendly people.

You can stop searching and book this apartment: It is a gem.  Masaharu was so incredibly kind, caring and helpful- he went above and beyond for us.  The apartment is so chic and cute (not to mention spacious, clean, comfortable, well equipped, etc.)! Much, much much better than any hotel room at this rate.  AND the neighborhood is incredible.  Just stunning.  The alleys off the main street boast an endless number of the most charming restaurants, bars, coffee shops, stores, etc.  And it is so conveniently located next to so many trains.  I will definitely return to this apartment many, many times.

Beautifully appointed apartment, managed to the the highest degree by fantastic host Mas Suzuki.
Exceptionally comfortable bed, first class toiletries and amenities.
The apartment is in a small side street, so very quiet. The balcony is a lovely place to enjoy your morning coffee whilst watching the local people passing by and the restaurant owners setting up, especially on a laid back Sunday.
Iidebashi is one of the best areas in Tokyo, especially for foodies. You are literally surrounded by some of the best restaurants in the city. Make lunch or dinner plans locally and then head off on your adventures.
Take time for a stroll along the canal running through the heart of Iideabashi.
Transport connections are fantastic- you're very close to the station which connects extremely quickly with Harajuku and Shinjuku, as well as Ueno, Tokyo and Ryugoku.
Perfect apartment in an amazing area of Tokyo.
Will stay again 100% on our next visit to Tokyo.
Amazing apartment and amazing host. Do not look further if you're looking for a wonderful stay in Tokyo!

We couldn't expect more from this fabulous loft for our stay in Tokyo. The place is exactly as described on airbnb, with a big comfortable bed, nice furniture and everything you need to spend a very nice moment (hairdryer, washingmachine, fridge etc.) . We would have loved staying longer!! Moreover, the location is perfect and was easy to find since somebody came to pick us up at the JR station (which is always a good thing in Japan !)
Thanks for everything, we wish we could back !

What a great place to stay for a week! We try to visit Tokyo every year and we found this to be one of the best accommodations we've had yet. It's one big room, plus a deck and bathroom. The quality and design of everything is superb. The bed is huge and the bathroom is modern.
The location is perfect, tons of shops and restaurants are just outside but it's off the Main Street so there is no noise. And best of all it is very close to the station.
Mas met us late in the evening when we arrived and showed us to the studio, he was courteous and professional and explained everything we needed to know.
Thanks Mas!

Studio-D is indeed your cool friend's apartment in Tokyo! We highly recommend it as a comfortable, convenient, and beautiful place to stay for anyone visiting Tokyo.

Your cool friend, Mas, is a great host. Thank you, Mas, for answering all our questions about Tokyo, and coming to meet us at the station. During our stay, Mas kept in contact via email / Airbnb for bits and pieces, which was very helpful.

Mas has lovingly made the apartment very comfortable with everything that is needed for some rest and relaxation. The kitchen and bathroom are modern, and the living area and bedroom are well-furnished and decorated.

Kagurazaka is a very nice area, with a busy central street. You could almost spend all your time there! Restaurants and cafés, izakaya, convenience shops, tea shops, a shrine, a temple, shopping, and lovely stone-paved streets. The street even shuts down to cars during lunchtimes and for most of Sunday.

If you do want to explore (of course you do!) transport is very convenient; Iidabashi Stationi is 5 minutes walk away. The Tokyo Metro and JR East Line make it easy to get to Shinjuku, Akihabara, Shibuya, and Ginza for example. We bought a Suica and used it for getting everywhere.

Thank you, Mas! We loved it.

Lovely place. Masaharu went to JR station to meet us, took us to the apartment, gave us very helpful guidance.We had some troubles with the wifi and safety box, he responded quickly,came quickly to solve the problem.I highly recommand this place.

Studio-D is the most fabulous apartment in Kagurazaka, , the apartment is immaculate and Mas was an amazingly gracious host. If you are looking to stay in Tokyo look no further! The space is close to many wonderful restaurants and bars, And is easily accessible by Tokyo metro and Japan Rail. Studio-D feels like a home away from home. We hope you make it yours. Cheers!

Mas was just perfect.
We ask him to help us to book different restaurants with very strictly policy, and he was successful.
The house is as you can see in the pictures and now looking the ad I've a lot of nostalgia.
The house is in a strategic location and a lot of metro line are only 4 minutes away, even going there from the Tokyo station is very simple.

Mas is a very friendly and helpful host. We needed a last minute help with luggage delivery, and he helped us immediately.  The room is very nicely designed and clean. We will definitely stay here again on our next trip!

Die Unterkunft war super! Eine schöne Einzimmerwohnung in super Lage! Wir konnten von dort aus alles super erreichen.
Die Kommunikation lief prima und wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
Kurzum-empfehlenswert!

Mas was very helpful with our taxi to Kakurazaga,and checked us in swiftly. The apartment is in a great central location of Tokyo,with a plethora of restaurants to chose from. If you are not into traditional Japanese cuisine,there are many amazing Italian and French restaurants to chose from within a few minutes walk. A very calm and peaceful location  to enjoy your time in Tokyo. Close to trains,subways and taxis.

This is a stunning studio in a popular area of Tokyo. Mas and the area / restaurant information were both very well organised and helpful.
The bathroom is a bit transparent for my taste - but very stylish nontheless.

Très bien situé à deux pas de la station Iidabashi (en plein quartier Kagurazaka), le studio proposé par Masaharu remplit toutes les conditions pour un bon séjour: spacieux, design, propre, tout équipé et jouissant d'un balcon agréable.
Je recommande vivement.
Nous remercions par ailleurs l'hôte qui s'est montré d'une extrême gentillesse et disponibilité, avant le voyage (par mail et par téléphone) et une fois sur place.

This was a great place to start our introduction to Tokyo . With Mas waiting for us with beautiful
Umbrellas. The room has everything that is necessary for a comfortable stay and the area is alive and convenient with transport. Would suggest this place enthusiastically . Thank you Mas for being a great host.
Great apartment in a fantastic part of Tokyo. Mas was a great host and was very helpful from meeting us at the station, making restaurant reservations and even supplying an electrical converter.

I stayed a work-week in Mas' apartment in Tokyo. I'm always happy to find places to be WYSISYG and Mas' place was 1:1 as the images online.
Mas was awaiting me at my arrival (with a huge bike suitcase and other luggage from the airport). It was a precise and short hand over - just as you want, tired it after a long flight.
The apartment is small and functional with nice aesthetics. Cool design and great functional features.
The neighbourhood was a positive surprise. I have traveled to Tokyo more than 50 times but never seen this area full of small eateries and waterholes.

My husband and I stayed at Mas's apartment during our honeymoon and we enjoyed every minute of it. The location could not be beat – it was conveniently located just a short 5 minute walk from Iidebashi Metro Station and surrounded by lots of great locals-only restaurants. The apartment itself was the perfect, quiet retreat after a day of exploration. On top of all this, Mas was an excellent host. He was there to check us in and walk us through the apartment to make sure we had everything we needed. He even offered to refund our first night when our plans were derailed by an unexpected typhoon! Thank you for everything!

Incredibly well prepared with a lovely and precise written guide to the apartment, the surroundings, shopping etc. Couldn´t be better.
The apartment itself: for Tokio relatively spacious bedroom and bathroom, a small attached terrace in an area that´s famous for French and Italian restaurants. Iiidabashi with 4 helpful Metro lines 3 minutes walk away. It´s not cheap, and price wise on the level of a 4 or 5-star hotel. If you prefer privacy, know the city a bit and don´t need a reception, this is the better option.
The last 2 days WiFi crashed, which in Tokyo is a bit of a drama, since there are hardly any open WiFi spots for foreigners. You´re literally disconnected, and for me, being on a business trip, this was a bit of a desaster. Not the hosts fault, probably, but still pretty unpleasant.
Masa himself is incredibly helpful and proactive.

Mas was extremely friendly and professional. He reached out a couple of days prior to my arrival and helped plan a smooth move-in. The place was clean and comfortable, amazingly well situated. The stay was a breeze. I'll be back, Mas! Thank you!

Amazing neighbourhood to stay in and experience the authentic old school Tokyo feel! Having lived several years in Tokyo, I must say I missed out until I stayed here! Can't be replaced by a hotel. Lively area with lots of gastronomical choices and night action but tucked away in a side street that allows total privacy.
The simple modern interior design allows an at home feel as soon as you walk in. The bright room is filled with nice wooden furniture mixing European style with Japan. If there are any drawbacks at all (and this is total nitpicking), it's the few narrow stairs up which may be difficult with a lot of luggage and the fact that the toilet door is transparent (not ideal for shy couples). But that's rather something to know than any reason not to stay here.
Masa replied to any questions I had beforehand quickly and was ready when I got there. He was a very pleasant host!
For the Tokyo first-timer or connoisseur, a perfect place to stay.
Mas's loft located in the heart of kagurazaka and surrounded by various kinds of restaurants, it's best place I can't find in such a wonderful location. Thanks Mas!
Amazing place!

The apartment is architecturally stunning, bright, airy, and modern with some traditional Japanese features. It is well equipped with everything we needed for our stay (including laundry facilities). Kagurazaka is one of our favourite areas in Tokyo with Edo period buildings, narrow interesting laneways that are packed with fine restaurants, including Michelin Star. The apartment is also located within walking distance to two subway/metro stations. Mas is a helpful and gracious host, helping us with restaurant reservations during our stay, especially considering that we required vegetarian dining.  The Michelin Star vegetarian restaurant he recommended to us was one of the best experiences we had travelling throughout Japan. We will definitely stay here again (if available).

Mas was an incredible host -- with an incredible apartment! He met us warmly with great directions to meet him from Narita airport, gave us a tour of the place and quickly was on his way. He was the perfect balance of accessible and giving us space, throwing a few suggestions our way (that always hit the mark) and being easy to contact when we needed a thing or two. He also had a great book of clear instructions for all the amenities in the apartment, and nearby great restaurants.

The apartment itself is incredibly cozy and warm, and we did indeed feel like we had a real home in Tokyo, buying little breakfast things to keep in the fridge and drinks to keep cool and take with us on our travels during the day -- and listening to the awesome sound system or watching great Japanese TV. I would tell anyone to stay here for a short or longer term visit (the neighborhood is both home-y and well traveled, with a mix of bustle and calm), and will hopefully return myself again some day. Thank you, Mas!!

Oh -- just one thing on the gorgeous bathroom that is encased in almost clear glass -- let me just say my boyfriend and I became even closer on this trip! We found it fun and charming to be so intimate (with a pretty clear view of one another while we were in the bathroom), so probably best to take this place with someone you are very close to, or want to be closer with, as there isn't much privacy in the beautiful, and well appointed space!

Thank you again for a great six days, Mas!!!
其实十分感谢铃木先生对我的照顾，来到日本很高兴认识你，家里的环境很不错，我觉得适合情侣一起来东京玩然后住在这里，屋子逼格很高，很惬意，哈哈，下次来一定还去拜访您。谢谢

Staying at Studio D was a superb experience for us. Our Host - Suzuki San was very helpful. He is great with communications and made our trip planning so much easier! He gave precise instructions for our JR trip from Airport, came pick us up at the Idabashi Station, and showed us around the neighbourhood. He also suggested great restaruants and made reservations for us. During our stay, he emailed to check on us every now and then making sure we are well taken care of - couldn't have asked for more!! The apartment is exactly as described, it is located in a cute, hip neighbourhood, close to a lot of restaurants and convenience stores. You'd feel relax and safe staying at Studio D. I would definitely come back!;) Thank you for everything Mas! Really Appreciate it! Take care.

One of the most thoughtful places I've stayed. Not particularly large but has everything needed and then some. Neighborhood was lively but we typically ended up taking the metro to other parts of the city.

Large clean and modern studio in a really great neighborhood in Tokyo. Very big comfortable bed, some outdoor space, easy keypad access to the apartment (so you don't need to carry around keys), and just a few minutes from the subway. (Note that while the bathroom is gorgeous, super-updated, and big, the other reviews are completely right about the see-through door. You have to be comfortable with that if you're staying there with more than one person.) It is up a flight or two of narrow stairs so keep that in mind for anyone with difficulties walking. Masaharu is also a great host in general. His tips are spot-on, he was super-responsive, and very nice in person. With that said, I have to admit that our trip was marred by the construction going on in the apartment directly below us. While I assume this is temporary and won't affect others necessarily, it was extremely disruptive: starting early (8:00), ending very late (11:00 at night-ish), continuing on the weekends, and even occurring above the skylight in the bathroom, which felt invasive. Masaharu was sympathetic, responded immediately to our concerns, and did instruct the contractor to stop drilling first thing in the morning, but it was still pretty loud and we wish we had known about it beforehand. So not as relaxing of an experience in the apartment as we were hoping.  All that said, assuming construction is complete, this was a great spot to stay in Tokyo and we'd love to stay here again.

Masharu was a very welcoming, polite and respectful host. The room was actually depicted. A spacious, extremely tasteful, well designed and clean studio, bathroom and balcony. The area is a lively yet quiet non touristic area, lined with cozy restaurants and a short walk from the metro station. Would highly recommend to anyone appreciate of good design and wanted a comfortable authentic experience.

Mas met us at the nearby train station and showed us to the apartment.
The apartment was beautifully decorated with ample facilities. It's ideally located for travelling to the various districts of Tokyo or visiting local bars and restaurants.
Mas was an attentive host and helped us on several occasions when booking restaurants. His
communication from start to finish helped make this a fantastic stay and I would recommend his place to anyone.
Mas was a perfect host. I will be staying at his place on all my business trips to Tokyo.

Masa's place was perfect. The location was great; surrounded by lots of great cafes and restaurants, but very quiet as it is on a small street. The apartment itself is very stylish and has everything you need. We loved the roof terrace. Masa was a great host and we would recommend his place to others.

Lovely little penthouse studio with a sunny balcony in a charming neighbourhood. Huge bed. Super clean bathroom with a great shower - I'm 6'3 and the shower was high up enough for me! Not a given in Japan :-). Nice toiletries too. The neighbourhood is awesome - lots of little restaurants and bars all around, a matter of steps from the apartment. Our favourite - Sen - turn right on the main road through Kagurazaka - Waseda - and it's about 20 yards up on the right.
Mas is a great host - speaks perfect English and met us outside the MUFG bank across the road to take us to the apartment, and reappeared in a trice when I messed up with the door code - thanks Mas, my fault!
We are pretty self sufficient but I sure Mas would help with more local eating recommendations if you need it, but just venture out and point and shoot, you can't go wrong...!
We'll definitely be back and will definitely stay here.
Mas is a phenomenal host and the place will make you feel right at home! It's amazing how convenient it is and how spacious. Always would return!
Can not be better! Thanks Mas, this apartment is amazing!

Oh, this is a really fantastic place for my family to have a vocation in Tokyo. It is located in a traditional Japanese neighborhood and surrounded by good restaurants and bars so you will never feel lonely when you come back to the place after daytime tour.  Compared with hotels this place make you feel more close to local people and easier to taste the Japanese culture.  The host is a real gentleman and easy going. He let me feel easy when my kid brought some troubles to the beddings.  So thanks to Mas and hope to visit this place once more in the next trip to Tokyo.

This small but perfectly-formed room is exactly what ones needs in Tokyo:  Convenient, stylish, comfortable and in a great neighbourhood (Restaurents of all descriptions within walking distance).  Mas is a very considerate and efficient host.  Although just above a restaurant, we had no noise at all.  Only thing to be aware of is cars can't drive up the small street, so you need to wheel your suitcase a short distance (and carry it up two flights).  All round a very suitably cool Tokyo pad...

You can't get a better Airbnb experience than this! Nice and cozy neighbourhood, spacious room - mordern and fancy design, comfortable bed, clean toilets - with nice shampoo and soft towels, and most importantly a super nice host. Mas was very responsive and a semi tour guide for our  3 nights stay in Tokyo. He provided me very detailed information on dinning and restaurants, he can even book restaurants for you in advance, considering it's actually hard to communicate in Japan because of the language. Mas does it all for you! If you are a foodie like me, you will absolutely love the neighborhood, so many nice restaurants and also easy to travel to shopping areas such as harajuku and shinjuku. The only downside to the room is the stairs, if you have a large suitcase like me, it'll take a bit strength to take it down with all the shoppings inside. But I guess it's not a big issue considering all the other benefits. 5 stars experience overall!

My 10 year old son and I had a wonderful time staying in Mas Suzuki's apartment for 3 nights. The description of his apartment is spot on: clean, well decorated and with everything one traveller needs. The location of the place is perfect as to the main attractions, subway, restaurants and the like. All within walking distance or easily reachable. Mas Suziki is unbelievable friendly and a wonderful host. When we arrived, he explained how everything worked. Furthermore, he was very helpful so that we did not have any problem to getting around. In addition, he was very responsive, both to our concerns and to requests for information. He offered an extra umbrella when it rained all day.
In sum, we felt privileged to staying in his apartment and cannot wait to come back in the near future.

We chose Japan as our honeymoon destination and opted for a cosy apartment instead of a hotel room. Our stay in Tokyo has been an amazing experience largely due to Mas who has been a wonderful host and helped us plan our visit, even before we got there. My husband is a chef and eager to try some Michelin star restaurants which can be notoriously difficult to book. Mas not only managed to get us in but also gave us a long list of additional recommendations. He also answered any of our questions within minutes whilst we were in Japan and picked us up from the closest tube station. The flat itself is in a beautiful quiet area surrounded by restaurants with a beautiful decor, accurately depicted in the pictures. Overall, I cannot recommend this place highly enough. Thank you Mas for making us feel at home and ensuring our honeymoon trip was a success!!!

I'm so sorry. I'm so late to write the comments.The house is amazing and it is on the street of kagurazaka that full-bodied amorous feelings of Japan in Tokyo.There is subway in 5 minutes and a lot of foods downstairs.But the most important is Suzuki San.He is so nice and give us a so perfect Journey.

Masaharu is a wonderful host and this place is so well organised and appointed. It is a wonderful experience and I would definitely stay there again.

The area is excellent and whilst its not one of the obvious places to stay in Tokyo I liked it as I have visited the city many times. The area around the apartment is very good and well worth exploring.
Suzuki桑的房子非常的漂亮,大,並且舒適!我和我的朋友在這裡度過了很開心的四天,浴室非常棒,洗衣機超級好評,幾乎完全沒有噪音!!Suzuki桑也很細心耐心的接待了我們,是個非常好的主人!

We had such a lovely stay in Mas' stunning studio. Everything was laid out for our comfort, and we slept like babies in the large bed following long days of exploring Tokyo. The studio is in a very interesting neighborhood, close to both trains and subways, and near tons of good restaurants and bars.

You would think that with such an interesting location, it would also be a noisy place, but we were stunned by just how quiet it got at night.

Mas also helped us sort out reservations for restaurants and was so helpful overall. I can't recommend this AirBnB highly enough!

It is a nicely decorated flat. Cozy, stylish, new and clean. Very close to what the photos show. Its space is good for two persons and is much bigger than the usual hotel room in Tokyo.
It's located at Kagurazaka, which is a place with lots of good restaurants! It however needs change train twice when going to and from airport. I suggest to take a cab to or from Tokyo station especially if you carry large luggages.
Mas is kind and he provided well organised information for transportation, restaurant recommendations etc.
非常喜欢的房子，床超级大，应该有两米宽吧，对比日本动辄一米四的双人床简直感觉太爽了！楼下就是各种吃的，还有陶器店等等各种好逛的！房东人很好，回复及时，还帮我搬行李，很棒的住宿体验：）

We really made an inspired choice with this Penthouse apartment managed by Masaharu. It was presented immaculately and as pictured. It has such a sophisticated interior and was such a retreat to come home to each day. It was so quiet we slept peacefully each night ready for the new day Tokyo had to offer. The area was well above our expectations in terms of history, character, level of quality venues for dining and access to transport.
Masaharu was a supreme host, giving clear and easy direction from the airport right up to personally walking us to the apartment and getting us acquainted with the amenities.
We recommend staying at this location if you want value, beauty, comfort, and style in your visit to Tokyo. We intend to return at our next possible chance.

Masa's place is very clean and well designed. Located in Kagurazaka, an unique district with lots of good restaurants and shops. Masa is extremely nice, gentle and thoughtful. Would love to stay in this apartment in our next visit to Tokyo.

Superduper!
Mas was so kind and a wonderful owner.
The apartment was perfect: wonderful position (full of restaurants and services), full optional room, very clean, close to metro station... but first of all Mas was so kind and perfect!
Very nice staying in Mas' house！He's so nice in every way to help us and did reservation good resteraunt for us！The place was clean and big in such centre Tokyo，thank you Mas！

We had a wonderful time in this room in Kagurazaka. Masaharu is an excellent host eho tought of even the tiniest detail. The neighboor is also amazing with lots of restaurants. I would definitely like to stay there again.

Mas is the perfect host, and his apartment is a wonderful place to stay.  The neighborhood Kagurazaka is extremely cool, very historic, and contains two 3-star Michelin restaurants.  Mas was very responsive, made sure the meet-up went smoothly and was available had anything been needed during our stay.  Thanks Mas for helping make our first trip to Tokyo a truly great one!
Masa Fantastic! fantastic host and fantastic hospitality
It was a great experience at rare accommodation in the center of Kagurazaka. Everything is clean and cheerful amenities are also well prepared. Definitely recommend!

One of the best AirBnb I've visited. Mas really is a super host. He helped us with restaurant bookings even months before we arrived. He was always prompt to reply and gave lots of helpful recommendations on attractions and eateries. While the studio was a decent walk from the JR or Metro station, Mas gave clear directions and even met us at the station and helped with luggages. The studio was beautiful, especially the bathroom- you will love it ! We highly recommend this place!

great location, great host, great room. We felt home.
We discovered the neighbourhood thanks to the recommendations of Mas and it's full of great restaurants.
We didn't want to leave anymore,
.

Mas is a wonderful host. The appartement was very well located in a very cute neighborhood. Tons of convenient stores, local restaurants and shops at a walking distance. Metro was very close too.
The appartement is very well designed and furnished. Bathroom was amazing. All in all, if we were to come back to Tokyo, this will definitely be the place we would go for!!

Masaharu's apartment is a superb base in Tokyo. Communication was friendly, easy and efficient and Mas even came to meet us at the station on arrival.
The apartment is stylish, spacious, comfortable, well-equipped and clean. (The bed in particular is exceptionally good!). It was a new area for us in Tokyo and we loved it. Still quite centrally located but with a local neighbourhood character and full of restaurants and grocery stores. We wouldn't hesitate to recommend Mas's apartment and plan to be back. Thanks Mas.

Wow — I can't say enough great things about this Airbnb and the host, Mas. Mas was the best Airbnb host I have stayed with, and I have visited many locations throughout the world. Beyond making sure the place was perfect, he helped me locate and send back my lost iPhone. I am very grateful for all of his help.

The actual penthouse is amazing. When visiting Tokyo, location is KEY. Tokyo is such a big place, so having a home base in such a low key and central neighborhood like Kagurazaka was spectacular. You can literally walk out the door and through these amazing little alleys and find amazing coffee, cocktails, shopping, and restaurants. Not to mention a 24/7 7-11 location which is where you're going to find a no fee ATM and the small things for your trip. The subway is down the street, and taxis are somewhat east to find as well. The penthouse is luxurious, from the bed to bathroom, stereo to the patio. It's one of my favorite airbnbs anywhere!

If you're browsing Airbnb locations in Tokyo - stop now and book this place if it's available!

Great apartment in a great neighborhood.
We stayed for five nights -- Mas met us at the tube station and escorted us the (short) walk to the apartment. It was perfect for us.
Very clean and modern with everything you'd need for your stay, including a washing machine / dryer.
We opted to not stay at a hotel because we wanted to get a real feel for the city and this place fit the bill. It's on a secluded street behind a busy street, so you get the best of both worlds -- it's quiet, but one block from every kind of restaurant or supermarket.
Also -- a great part of the city, very easy to get anywhere within about 20 minutes on the metro.

Definitely recommend! The place is absolutely amazing, very comfortable and super clean. Located in a convenient neighborhood which has a lot of amazing restaurants, local shops and very close to metro station lidabashi. Our host Masaharu was very helpful, gave us a lot of information and kindly offered us to check in a little bit earlier and check out later because of our flight, also, Mr Masaharu was checking on us everyday see if everything goes well. My boyfriend and I love the decoration and furniture, the balcony is amazing, all the equipment are provided, we feel like at home. So happy to stay in this place.

We had a wonderful stay in this apartment. Masaharu-san provided us with detailed direction from Narita a few days before arrival, met us at the train station and walked us to the apartment. The apartment is in Kagurazaka, a lovely neighbourhood full of restaurants (a few with Michelin stars) and bars. We had a terrific time exploring the narrow side streets lined with tiny French restaurants and cafes. There are two subway stations and the JR within a five minute walk and is only 20 - 30 minutes to Tokyo Station, Shinjuku, Shibuya, Ginza, Roppongi, etc. We are looking forward to our next trip back to Tokyo and will definitely be staying here again.
Top notch experience. Guest was available at all time. Checked on us during stay. Place is super well designed. Area full of great restaurants and bars..will come back !

Masaharu's place was amazing. It was the perfect apartment for our trip to Tokyo. It was clean, super cool and in a great area that gave us access to the whole city and a great local area when we wanted to chill. To top it off, Masaharu couldn't have been more helpful. He gave us the best information, directions and even met us at the station when we first arrived. I highly recommend this place.

Perfect apartment in lovely kagurazaka. All you need for a week on Tokyo: a wonderful bed, good shower, nice ambience and lighting, heater, fantastic neighborhood and a good host that can help you with alll the arrangements. I wanted to live at Mas flat forever!
amazing house and good taste of everything. i like it more than my house!
一次美好的旅程

We enjoyed this apartment very much, as well as the neighbourhood. Full of life spirit and fascinating street view.
Mas is thoughtful and very friendly, he meet us at JR station and make sure we understand the use of all facilities in the room.
I think we will back to this place again 🙂

This was our second stay at Mas' place. Based in Kagurazaka, the French Quarter of Tokyo this wonderful studio has everything a couple needs during their stay. Well designed, everything has its place.
Mas is a great host and stayed in contact throughout our trip. Thanks Mas!
Masaharu is a very good man.We like him very much.He is very nice.
It's near the lidabashi station and super convenient 'cause so many restaurants, shops and club around. The room is cozy and has a nice sight. The audio is amazing!

Mas truly is the best host I've ever had. His communication is excellent, he always goes out of his way to help you (without even being asked!) and his house is to die for.
We stayed for four nights and loved that it was in a less touristy area of Tokyo. Before too long you feel like a local and are treated like one too. The area is 20 mins from everywhere in Tokyo and just a moments walk from the subway.
It's filled with great restaurants and wine bars with a cute little coffee shop (Mojo) just a few hundred meters away.
When I next return to Tokyo, I'll definitely stay here again.
The Apartment was absolutely excellent. I would choose Mas' apartment whenever I will be back in Tokyo. It's conveniently located and Mas is such an incredible host. Thanks again

I had a great experience in Mr. Mas Suzuki's house, the room is near to any where which eat,shopping and subway.The host Mr. Suzuki is the best host i've ever met of airbnb, he is kindly and carefully and gave the guest a full welcome in tokyo. i will comeback again.
位于新宿神楽坂的一间屋子，能很好的感受到日本当地的文化。出门就是一条各种饭店和小吃的街，地铁交通很便利。房东Mas是一位非常nice的人，会为你提供你想了解的各种信息。房间的布置也很温馨。

This is a really nice place to stay if you want to experience a lively part of Tokyo, be in the middle of all the buzz but still have a comfortable and quiet sleep! Public transportation is also a 5min walk, and takes you to all parts of the city.  I must say Mas was a great host who provided A high level of service, including picking us up from the station.

Excellent, clean and spacious apartment in a great location close to a subway station with very fast connections to everywhere! The owner Masaharu was perfect, he gave us very clear directions and met us outside on the street when we arrived.  He also helped us to make some restaurants reservations in Tokyo which was very helpful!  Highly recommended!

Absolutely loved everything about this place, it is so beautifully decorated and so cozy. It's situated above two restaurants but it was noisy. The area is so hip with plenty of restaurants. Mas was so accommodating, he made it very comfortable for us. Mas also recommended an amazing sushi restaurant "sushi kokoro" which is just a two minute walk away. It was so good that it may very well be one of the highlights of our trip. Everything was provided in the appartment, and it was also very clean. Mas speaks good English and it was very easy and comfortable to talk to. Especially when we needed help for directions he always offered as much help as he could which we really appreciate! If i go back to Tokyo, I'd love to stay Innside again ;)

We loved this apartment. It was very clean and modern. It was equipped with everything we needed. Everything from great audio, adapter, guide books to washing machine, microwave and a fridge.
The area was really nice. Lots of exiting restaurants and bars. Very calm and quit during the night. Close to the subway station.
Mas speaks very good english and is always very helpful. His communication is excellent. Always answered quickly to our questions. Mas was a great host and provided a high level of service.
We would love to come back here next time we are visiting Tokyo!

Mas was an excellent host. He even picked us up at the railway station and gave us good advice for best ramen in town. The apartement is perfectly located, clean and we especially adored the available organic shampoo (marks & web). We enjoyed our stay in tokyo. Thank you!

We are grateful because this house help us found such a beautiful place！神楽坂is really amazing!！
We like the room in a quiet alley！Every street around is so beautiful！The landlord gave us a detailed map to find the room，The logo of the room is also very cute！
The bathtub in the room was very comfortable，the little yellow duck is very cute！We really love the toilet's skylight！Light will come in and shine on the ground，its so beautiful！Especially the mirror，You can see the plants at the same time as you look in the mirror.We really love this part.
And we love the plants on the balcony！Every morning I woke up and saw the sun shining on the green plants then I have a good mood all day long！By the way the bed is too soft，We had good deep sleep every night.
And there was a lot of beautiful things in the room，especially the slippers，I like it and want to buy one but there is no shop in Tokyo. Surprise is the landlord even helped us to bought on the web！
The room is beautiful.The food around is so delicious，and we love the music on the street. It was a wonderful experience！We will choose this room when we come to Tokyo next time！At last thank you again for everything you’ve done！

perhaps the best possible location from which to explore Tokyo. Kagurazaka is incredibly charming and super convenient. perfectly situated. not touristy at all, and filled primarily with a stunning variety of amazing restaurants. none of the mass retailing of downtown shinjuku and shibuya (which is easily accessible via 15min taxi or 20min subway).
Mas is an extraordinary host... helpful, accommodating, and thoughtful. ever-present but not intrusive.
i almost immediately extended my stay by two weeks (for total of 1.5mos), and would have stayed longer had it been available. once Mas adds a sunshade for the terrace, it will be a truly perfect tokyo apartment, and i will be moving-in permanently. so enjoy while you still can.

Definitely the best airbnb we have stayed in so far! Mas was an excellent host who looked after us from start to finish and recommended so many amazing places in detail in Tokyo.
The apartment was very clean and stunning, filled with beautiful touches. Also the location couldn't be better with so many choices of restaurants and bars, it was very safe and characteristic, also very close to the Metro station.
We can't wait to return to his apartment next time when we are in Tokyo!
Thank you again for our great experience in your apartment!

A beautiful room in Tokyo. Located in a much quieter neighborhood but still very central and only a few stops from Shinjuku/Shibuya. A tranquil getaway from the hustle and bustle, much more luxurious then some of the more costly hotels on offer. Mas our host was extremely hospitable and helped us out massively letting us have a later check when we had an evening flight. Wouldn't hesitate to stay here again if we return to Tokyo!
Lovely place and central to everything! Lots of food joint and Mas was so helpful and polite! Highly recommend!
The place is lovely and in a really cute part of town. Lots and lots of local restaurants within walking  distance. Also an easy walk to the public transportation.

Mas' studio is truly exceptional. It's been created with love, with every detail - materials, amenities, lighting, local recommendations - thoughtfully provided and nothing superfluous. Kagurazaka is one of the best Tokyo neighbourhoods to soak up Japanese style, architecture and cuisine. You couldn't find a cosier, more welcoming sanctuary to adventure from and come home to, a more comfortable bed, nor a kinder, more considerate host than Mas. Although I stayed by myself, his special cocoon made me feel safe, warm and totally spoilt. Mas, you've set the bar very high. Hontoo ni arigatoo gozaimasita!

Wonderful address. great location in a small alley without cars. nice restaurants, cafes, just 1 min away . nicely furnished flat with very comfortable bed!
Mas was super helpful , thanks so much for a great stay!!
Great host. Great apartment. Coming back soon!

There is no way I can sum up exactly how great my stay was in this review. The space is well decorated, clean and far exceeded my expectations overall. Additionally, Mas’s hospitality is the reason why I have already booked two more future reservations with him. He’s a Superhost for a reason.
Kagurazaka is perfect if you want to be close to everything but feel like your escaping to a neighborhood. It is very lively and is full of bars, restaurants, and cute little shops.
I feel so fortunate that I had this experience for my first month in Tokyo and can’t wait to go back.

We stayed at Masaharu’s place for about ten days and had an absolutely fantastic time. The home was sizeable, had a really nice balcony and was in a very very quiet street (no cars and few people). Bed was super comfortable and we had lots of light with the huge windows. Mas was fantastically responsive and went out of his way to help us around Tokyo.

This was my second stay at 3rd floor penthouse @ heart of TKO and it was great to be back. The home is very comfortable, clean, and full of special touches and amenities that made my visit so special.
Thanks again, Mas!

This was the most perfect apartment I could have chosen in Tokyo. I lived here for two months. The room is beautifully designed, and the light is cool and soft in the mornings. It’s incredibly peaceful and quiet. The shower is very luxurious. Air conditioning always perfect. The bed is very comfortable. The neighborhood looks like Kyoto mixed with Paris. There are endless amounts of incredible restaurants of every genre of Japanese food. There are a few French restaurants too. There are also many artisanal boutiques where you can buy beautiful gifts to bring back home. Kagurazaka dori is the embodiment of old time elegance, the canopy of trees lining the street, the beautiful zenkokuji temple, the winding cobblestoned paths ways behind the main road, where you can find tiny zen gardens, koi fish ponds and beautiful traditional restaurants. It’s also very well served with the subway and JR trains. There’s Iidabashi 5 min walking and Toei line maybe 7 min walking. It makes me feel something remembering how perfect it was by writing this review, and how lucky I was to experience Tokyo in this way. Thank you, Suzuki san.
My friend and I had such great at Masaharu’s place. The apartment is clean, stylish and well located.

Great place! The comfort we experienced was no different from a hotel - Masaharu even offered us to get rid of the garbage and wash the towels. Highlight for us was Kaguraka, a -while very stylish and modern - also conveniently located

It was really good place and it’s pretty much everything around here, so me and my husband enjoyed stay so much! The place looks pretty much same as pictures. The location is perfect to go to everywhere in Tokyo.
Host Masaharu was really easy communication and super care whiling we were stay. Definitely want to come back to stay again!
Thank you so much!

We had a wonderful time in Mas’ beautiful apartment. The space is very nicely decorated, and is equipped with everything you’ll need for a short trip (comfortable bed, spacious bathroom) or a long stay (functional kitchen, washing machine). We enjoyed all the amenities provided - including laundry detergent, and fresh ground coffee and pour-over coffee maker.
We loved the location! Kagurazaka is super-walkable, and has tons of restaurants, bakeries and local shops. We really enjoyed the opportunity to have a more intimate Tokyo experience, away from the crowd and close to local residents going about their everyday lives.
Mas was a great host, very responsive, kind to accommodate our requests and quick to provide assistance with logistics and other practical matters.
Thanks again for a great stay! We hope to visit lovely Kagurazaga again in the future!

요즘 핫하다는 가구라자카에 위치해 있습니다. 지하철도 도보로 5분 정도 위치해 있고 왠만한 관광지는 지하철로 20~30분내에 갈 수 있습니다!
숙소 주변이 매우 깨끗하고 이뻐서 걸어서 구경하기에도 좋습니다.
주변에 음식점도 많이 있고 도보로 2,3분 거리에 훼밀리마트와 세븐일레븐이 있습니다.
숙소내에 에어컨도 잘 되고 매트리스가 엄청 크고 푹신해서 8일동안 편안하게 잤습니다.
크롬캐스트와 TV를 연결해서 한국방송도 보고 전자렌지와 커피포트, 전기렌지가 있어서 편의점에서 사온 음식을 편하게 먹을 수 있었습니다.
마지막날 호스트의 배려로 체크아웃시간을 늘려주셔서 짐을 숙소에 두고 식사 후 여유있게 공항까지 갈 수 있었습니다!
자세한 후기는 제 블로그에 포스팅 하겠습니다. 너무나 소중한 시간이였습니다 감사합니다 :)

We had an amazing time  in Mas San's apartment in Kagurazaka. The location is beautiful and quiet, and the apartment is very stylish and offers a lot of amenities. Kagurazaka is the perfect neighborhood to explore Tokyo. If you are a couple, you should have no problem with the glass door to the bathroom, otherwise this feature might be a bit indiscreet. All in all, we had a perfect time and would absolutely recommend the apartment.

Masaharus loft space is ideally located in a quieter area of Tokyo.There are many excellent local restaurants and bars to enjoy.Shibuya, Shinjuku and other ares are easily accessed by cab, or the excellent Tokyo train system.The apartment itself is stylish and comfortable, with all the amenities you could ask for.Highly recommended.

Masaharu's place is set out quite nicely!
bed is king size and comfortable
bathroom is large with basic commodities.
Although one of the best parts was the location. You're surronded by heaps of restaurants and convenience stores many of the resturants even have Michelin stars.
The train station isnt super close compared to other places ive stayed at in tokyo before but iant horribly far away.
even though the room wasnt as large as i thought it would be, if you want to be extremly comfortable with 2 people (or maybe just yourself) and have the cash to splurge.
this place is pretty good!

Had a fantastic stay at Masaharu’s place. Huge apartment, especially for Tokyo. The area around the apartment is gorgeous and has a lot of great restaurants. Very centrally located and very close to both the subway and JR train. Would absolutely stay here again!!

A beautiful and stylish place in a great part of Tokyo. It was great to both walk around that area and be so close to a metro station to go anywhere else. Mas was very accomodating and quick to answer any questions we had during our stay.
Top place!

Absolutely loved our stay at Mas’ apartment and would 100% stay again! Extremely well equipped, we even got to do some washing! The location is spot on, so easy to get to all the main spots in Tokyo. I think the biggest plus is the size. We’re currently in a “large” hotel in Kyoto, which is less than half the size of Mas’ apartment!

This is a great location to stay in Tokyo. It is only a 5 minute walk to the nearest train station where you can access just about every area of Tokyo. The surrounding area has many shops and restaurants. It felt very safe. The apartment itself was very clean and had modern furnishings. Coffee and TV were provided which was also very nice.  Masaharu is very friendly and helpful in making sure you arrived safely at the apartment. We had no troubles finding and entering the place. The apartment is located above a restaurant but you did not hear noises from downstairs or smelled the food. Overall, I would highly recommend you stay here.
We loved our stay in Mas’s place. The location was great - it had a real local feel but with so much to do. Mas was a great host, very responsive and helpful.

We had a wonderful stay at Mas’ penthouse. Very close to the subway and easy to get around. Lots of great restaurants to eat and explore in the immediate area. We would highly recommend this penthouse for anyone looking to stay in a neighbourhood of Shinjuku where locals live, work and play
Thank you Mas for your hospitality and amazing penthouse!!

I stayed at Masa-san's apartment for 3 nights in Dec 2018. The place is clean, stylish, near TONS of great food and drink, and centrally located for anything you want to do in Tokyo. For the location, I was initially worried about street noise, and the apartment being cold in the winter (as some of the ones in Tokyo are)... but I was pleasantly surprised. The place was warm, quiet, and very dark at night.
Masa-san was very responsive and thoughtful, giving very easy and accurate instructions for check in, and transfer from Narita.
Recommend to anybody looking for a great spot to see Tokyo.

Mas was a very helpful host and checks in with us during our stay to make sure everything was ok.
He recommended a nice restaurant and booked for us even it’s after our booked staying period.
The apartment is very stylish, well designed and clean - definitely a hidden jewel in the area. We are so glad we chose this place because 神乐坂 is a very cool and nice area with lots of restaurants and shops and convenient transportations around. It’s really easy to get anywhere from the closest station (Iidabashi).
The only unfortunate thing is, there are actually 2 flights of stairs to get to the room and the stairs are quite narrow (imagine having to carry a baby stroller up and down the stairs like we have to).
All the rest are great, will definitely recommend!

We enjoyed our stay very much. The apartment is small (one room) but stylish and well designed and had everything we needed. The bed is very comfortable and big, we also liked the bathtub. We didn’t use the balcony because it was winter but would be nice in warmer months. It’s worth noting there is no view of the street from the apartment. The location is great. It’s a quiet street with lots of restaurants to choose from and a quick walk to the train station. We didn’t meet the host but self check-in was very  easy. The only issue, and others have also pointed this out, is the fact that the bathroom has a glass wall right beside the bed. It’s not very private but we got used to it. Really it was the location we came for and it didn’t disappoint. We would stay here again

Mas-san and the Studio were both 110/100!
I would recommend this place to all my friends!
Location is superb if you love food! There's a ton of restaurants everywhere around the Studio and a family mart around the corner, you'll never go hungry. There's so much to see around the Studio, we couldn't do it all!
The studio it self is such a treat to stay in, I honestly wanted to just stay home instead of exploring at times :p
If anyone stays here and reads this, please please check out La Kagu shop+cafe. AMAZING egg sandwiches and great shopping :) Coffee is pretty good too!
Great space and amazing host!
Great place to stay! Very convenient location with great food places close-by,  and the host is very responsive too!
Was a wonder experience staying at this location.

This is our third stay in Mas’ place in Kagurazaka. We love this part of Tokyo, and the open space and design of the studio. Close proximity to Iidabashi station and our favourite nikuman (steamed bun) shop. This time we were also lucky to be here for Setsubun and the festivities at the local temple.

很有格调的BNB 住得真的很爽 房东回应及时
除了贵没有别的问题
후기와 인테리어디자인을 보고 예약을 했는데, 역시나 옳은 선택이였습니다. 호스트분은 정말 친절하셨고 배려심이 많으신분이였습니다. 지내는동안 만족하면서 머물렀습니다. 위치는 번화가와 가까우면서도 조용해서 좋았습니다.다음에 또 머물고 싶었습니다.

Great studio apartment that is well located in Tokyo (near Iidabashi metro).  Nice neighbourhood and comfortable apartment.  To note that it is on the 3rd floor without an elevator but the stairs weren't problematic for us.  The bathroom has limited privacy if that is an issue for you, however the shower/bath is absolutely divine (as are the soaps furnished by Masaharu).  Enjoy!!

This place is excellent in its location to good food, supermarket, close to metro and JR trains. The room is very clean, and most important thing is the queen size bed which u seldom find in other Airbnb in Tokyo. There is a washing machine / dryer which is useful if you do not want to bring so many clothes. It is worth the money to me!
This place was simply spectacular. Every detail has been considered, both in terms of comfort and style. Couldn't recommend more highly.

I really enjoyed my stay at Mas-san apartment. Mas provided really easy directions from the airport right to his apartment so you will not get lost.
His home is located in a cute little alley way which is super quiet for a good nights sleep. The room is really clean and modern inside with just a bed, dresser, and a little sitting area. Bathroom is large, and the shower had a lot of water pressure. It’s a perfect place to sleep and relax after a long day of sightseeing.
The neighborhood is great with tons of bars and restaurant right outside the door. You will not find any tourist here, but the locals are super friendly as they always are in Japan.
Mas -San is a great communicator and stays in touch throughout your stay. He is at your disposal and really helpful. He helped us by making a dinner reservation on our behalf since the restaurant did not speak very good English. Thank you Mas!

This apartment is fantastic. It’s a studio but that doesn’t mean it lacks amenities: cooktop, washer/dryer, smart toilet, etc. Everything was impeccably clean and Mas gave us great directions to get there via both cab and train. If you’re new to Japan, as we were, this was incredibly helpful.
More importantly, though, the location can’t be beat. Don’t let the Shinjuku address fool you— this neighborhood is full of sophisticated restaurants, bars and bakeries but lacks the insane crowds of other Shinjuku areas. And even better, the apt itself is on a quiet side street so you have access to nightlife but don’t have to sleep in the midst of it. It’s within easy walking distance of 3 train lines too. Don’t be afraid to wander off the main drag—there are a ton of great restaurants in little alleyways and on one-lane streets.
神乐坂是一条热闹便利有风情的街道 房间不是很大 也没有街景可看 和想象有出入 不过很干净 设施合理便利
Gorgeous space, convenient location, excellent host. Stay here if you are looking for a calmer oasis away from the noise but close to it all. Would stay again in a heartbeat.
Nice location and great space for those who those who enjoy design and details.

Perfectly clean, relaxing, well-designed apartment in an amazingly quiet, historic area with easy access to trains and taxis. Additionally, Masaharu was always available for anything we needed help with. A great experience overall!

This is a lovely loft space in a fun yet peaceful neighborhood. Just don't bring too much heavy luggage, since it's all uphill from the train station and then two flights of stairs up! The bed is comfortable, the bathroom easy to use, and the balcony a nice place to walk out on in the morning to check the weather.

This was our first trip to Japan & Mas`apartment was the perfect base to explore Tokyo being close to Iidabashi station. There are so many amazing places to eat all within walking distance & a mini-mart/pharmacy is just around the corner. Mas is a great host with very clear & prompt communication - Thanks again Mas!

Mas’s place is really outstanding. Think of it as a very stylish and well equipped hotel room, with a few extra facilities to provide more independence and homeliness. Everything about the place (quality of bed linens, bathroom amenities etc) were as you would expect from a very, very good hotel room. And Mas left plenty of easy to understand instructions and helpful restaurant recommendations. The small balcony space is nice, and the windows left in lots of natural light.
The area itself is great. Everything is literally on the doorstep - outstanding restaurants (small and local to Michelin starred), great coffee shops, supermarkets and train stations. We loved it here. A nice change from the more central areas. But the apartment is quiet.
Mas was great to communicate with. Check in and and out was very easy (keypad) and Mas again provided some very easy to understand directions.
Fully recommend.

This is our second time staying at Mas’ place. We stayed for 5 nights and absolutely loved it once again. Although a little pricey we find it worth it based on the location, stylish and spacious apartment and the extra touches that Mas has provided to make the experience extra special. We will absolutely stay here again.

Mas was a wonderful host who was extremely friendly and detailed in his communication. He left us such helpful instructions from the train station complete with photos (it can be tricky to navigate Tokyo even with Google maps otherwise) and overall was eager to help make our stay in Tokyo as pleasant as possible.
We loved the details of his apartment that made it feel like home away from home, from lovely bathroom amenities to the beautiful hardwood floors and impeccable cleanliness. The bathroom has a lot of character with glass doors and skylight (bring an eye mask if you’re super sensitive to light in the morning since the sun comes up early). We would definitely stay here again with Kagurazaka being a quaint neighborhood a bit removed but an easy subway ride away from the main points of interest in Tokyo.
Thank you Mas for an excellent stay!
Masaharu's place is wonderful and stylish. Lots of natural light through the bathroom. Any issues we had, Mas was very quick to reply.
Great space in cool neighborhood!

This is a very elegant and comfortable apartment in an upscale but youthful neighborhood with the old-temples and shrines- and the new- La Kagu a very trendy shopping complex- all at hand. Excellent supermarket and other food shops on Kagurazaka-dori, the main street of the district. The apartment is readily accessible with the JR and other subway lines close at hand.
The apartment itself is compact and efficiently laid out. We were grateful for the washer/dryer but inadvertently set the child lock and could not figure out the Japanese directions. However help was at hand as we found directions for the brand on the internet and were able to fix the problem. Masaharu would have come to help but fortunately we were able to figure it out. As others have mentioned, the apartment is above a restaurant and around 8-9 PM there was some slight noise but it stopped after that. I would certainly stay at Masaharu's place again.
An excellent choice! Brutalist meets Japanese eclectic decoration. The host is gracious and very attentive.  The Apartment is fully equipped and I enjoyed my stay.

We really loved staying at Studio D, the penthouse was lovely and very cosy . We loved  the location and the stylish space! But what we loved the most was that it felt like our own home away from home.  The bed was so confortable and every detail had been thought of even down to the lovely bath wash and the built in table within the cabinetry! We loved  exploring the local neighbourhood including the nearby Koishikawa Korakuen Gardens and we loved the tea shop around the corner!  The location is nice and quiet (just behind  the main street) and is easy to get around to the attractions with a short stroll to both the metro subway and JR line. There is also an abundance of restaurants and eateries within walking distance! Thank you again and we will definately be looking at booking this place next time we are in Tokyo and telling our freinds about the cool friends place we stayed at!
Amazing place! Amazing host!  Highly recommend!
Mas place makes for a quiet stay in central Tokyo. It is well located near train station and there are lots of great restaurant options within walking distance. Would recommend and stay again!

Suzuki-san's place was truly prefect. The studio is appointed in the best possible way. We loved all the little touches, from the tube amplifier to the outstanding mattress and linens. The location in Kagurazaka is excellent. It's a wonderful neighborhood that is quiet, filled with great shops and restaurants, and quite close to many points of interest and transport hubs.
Suzuki-san was extremely helpful and the communication was first rate. We will be back as soon as possible.

A lovely studio apartment that is surprisingly well-equipped. We were particularly impressed by the comfortable king-sized bed, the spacious drawers so that we could unpack everything and put away our suitcases, the big bathroom, lots of power points for charging devices, and the lovely wall-to-wall windows. For us the midcentury styling and furniture was a highlight that gave the apartment character. Mas provided excellent clear instructions on how to find and access the apartment, and was very communicative. Kagurazaka was a great home base in Tokyo, fun to wander its little local streets, shops and restaurants, but with Iidabashi station being very handy to jump on the subway to explore Tokyo.

If you are looking for a spacious, stylish, and super comfortable space to stay in whilst in Tokyo, then this apartment is perfect.Located in a small local area, almost village like, the area has excellent restaurants, bars, and all other conveniences right at your door.The subway is very a short walk, and only a few stops from Shinjuku, Shibuya, and other main centres of Tokyo.i couldn’t recommend Mas more as a thoughtful, attentive and friendly host.Our second visit; and we will be back!
Wonderful and understanding host who went out of their way to make my stay easy and enjoyable, great location and yet very peaceful room!

Wow, what an incredible listing!
The listing is modern, high-tech, and has all of the amenities you would need. It's also enormous compared with other listings in Tokyo, and its location is amazing. It's tucked away on a quiet block, one street away from the main strip of Kagurazawa (where all the shops & dining are located), and a 4-5 minute walk to Iidabashi Station.
You're a short ride away from Shibuya, Shinjuku, Ikebukuro, and Ginza -- this was our first time in Japan and we were surprised at the listing's central location.
Masaharu-san was extremely responsive and regularly checked in on us to see if we needed anything. We would love to stay at his place again the next time we're in Tokyo!

It was a great stay in a great apartment. Everything was as described by Masaharu. The area is indescribably enchanting, with a wide range of restaurants and small shops. The exit B3 of Lidabashi Station is only a few steps away. Masaharu was always available and gave answers/help to our questions. It was a perfect stay with a perfect host! We will be happy to come back again!
Stylish space in a great location. Mas is easy to communicate with and has a lot of great recommendations for the area. Would definitely recommend
Location is good
An absolutely beautiful apartment in one of Tokyo’s most charming neighborhoods, with a super helpful host to boot. Perfect for 1-2 people.

Masaharu’s apartment is a wonderful oasis in the middle of busy Tokyo. And just outside your doorstep are a million great restaurants and shops in the Kagurazaka. A perfect place to stay, and a very generous host.
Masaharu's place was lovely.  He is very helpful as well.  Highly recommend!

隅々まで行き届いた素晴らしいインテリア。小物、アメニティ。日本にいるのに海外にいるような気分になれます。
天窓のついたバスは、美術館のような心地よさ。
周りには沢山の飲食店もあり、朝食を近くのパン屋さんで買ってきたり、ケーキを買ってきてテラス席で食べたり、真空管アンプを携帯に繋いで好みの音楽をきいたり、
自分好みの空間をつくることができます。

まず写真と実際の建物の様子が違います。写真だと落ち着いた綺麗な建物に見えますが、実際には同じビルの１、２階に飲食店が入居されてますので、建物の周囲には早朝から夜遅くまで人の出入りが絶えないのと、2階の飲食店や建物の外から早朝から夜遅くまで大きな人の声や物音が部屋まで聞こえてきます。また2階の飲食店からの料理の煙やタバコで度々、部屋の中が臭くなります。
水回りも建物の経年劣化に合わせてところどころ傷んでおり、あまり清潔感はありません。
シャワーも水圧が弱く、
シャワーフックの立て付けも悪く、
シャワーヘッドうまくハマりませんでした。
真空管アンプの利用にiPhoneやiPodが必要なことも事前に知らされておらず、
そうした説明不足な点も残念でした。
スムーズに滞在出来ました！ありがとうございました！

Wow - simply an amazing stay! The apartment is thoughtfully designed and well decorated. It felt so spacious, which is quite rare in a Tokyo apartment. The windows and king size bed were my favorite part. And of course the neighborhood is charming! I’ll be back here when I’m in Tokyo again!

Super centrally located, cozy apartment. Bed is comfy, and AC is cold.
Note that there’s some noise and outdoor lights at night because it’s right above a yakiniku restaurant. Also can be tricky to find, but once you find it it’s easy to get to next time.

Masaharu's studio is great for 1-2 people traveling together. The area is very local with tons of restaurants and cafes to explore. The apartment is tucked away in a cool alley where Masaharu provides incredibly detailed instructions on how to reach. Masaharu is also super communicative and was helpful with any questions we had!
The apartment is easy to get to from the airport and ~15-20 min on the train from various sites to see in Tokyo. It was definitely nice to come back to after long days of walking and sightseeing in sometimes very busy (and touristy) areas.
If you want to feel like a local and have a quiet sanctuary to come back to, this is the place!
Also, the bed was extremely comfortable and a great size!

Great place and excellent location with lots of restaurants steps away.
Quite some steps to the penthouse. Other than that, highly recommended.
Will stay again.
Beautiful place, so modern but cosey. Would love to stay again

I can't recommend Masaharu's place more highly. Great location, beautiful apartment, and incredible host. We experienced significant travel delays and missed our first night in Tokyo, and he graciously allowed us to extend our stay at no additional charge. We were so grateful for the amazing customer service.

This was a terrific, well located apartment in a quiet(er) part of Tokyo, while still feeling very central. Very accessible to transit and sites, a peaceful base to come home to at the end of the day, with many amazing restaurants nearby. Also a huge space by the city’s standards, with an enormous, comfortable bed and great amenities.
Masaharu was a fabulous communicator - very helpful, welcoming, and offered unexpected and much-appreciated flexibility around our check out time.
I would only note for others that the bathroom has very limited privacy (a semi-transparent glass wall, right next the the bed) - this was not a major issue for us, but is definitely worth being aware of.
Thank you for your kind hospitality and we would happily stay again on our next visit to Tokyo!

Although many restaurants around the apartment, it’s very convenient for food, but the apartment located above the two BBQ restaurants, all the smoke came into the room, the smoke normally end until 1am when the restaurant closed. From time to time, the customers smoke outside the restaurant, then u can smell them too.
Since the lower floor are restaurants, u can hear the noise starting in the morning about 9am. U can hear them clearly pulling something from downstairs.
Overall the room is a bit dusty, the floor is old. I would rather prefer to spend the same amount of money on hotel.
Great place.

Don’t walk RUN to this Airbnb! This place was a dream! The bed was pure comfort, the amenities were outstanding (we loved the personal outside terrace!), and the bathroom was fantastic! No tricky water heater to deal with as it’s built in! We had an issue with the washer while we were here and our host was amazing with helping us! The area is calm and relaxing, and it’s very close to transport as well! We did not want to leave! Seriously, it’s perfect for a couple as the bathroom is see-through ;) Also it was very close to great Michelin star restaurants! The place had a microwave, fridge, hotpot and dishes, so you could enjoy food however you like! The lighting coming through the huge windows is so nice both day and night! Highly recommend!
Great location, beautiful space.

My wife and I stayed here for 6 days during Sakura season and we had a blast. If you stayed here for 6 months you still would not be able to visit every restaurant or bar or cute shop in that time. The neighborhood was BUSTLING!  I loved running every morning by the canal and there are nearby parks to visit as well. The train station was close and connected with lots of other stations. The balcony with plants was a beautiful space to have coffee. Best of all is the GREAT shower that had good pressure and lots of hot water.

This place is really great. Modern, clean, close to public transportation and excellent restaurants. Host was responsive and accommodating. Short train ride and easy transfer to Yamanote line. Loved our stay and would definitely recommend.
This place was great! Would absolutely stay again :)

This was our third time staying at Mas’s place and we absolutely love it. Such a great central area to make your base in Tokyo and extremely spacious apartment with very comfortable bed. We’ll definitely be staying here again.

This was the perfect introduction to Tokyo for us. The location can’t be beat and some of the best dining in the city is within a 2 minute walk. Every night I looked forward to coming back and roaming the back alleys of Kagurazaka - which quickly become my favorite neighborhood in all of Tokyo. Our host even helped us with a last minute dinner reservation! I would stay again in a heartbeat.
Such a gem and very well located! Also love the super late night ramen spots nearby

A lovely gem tucked away in Shinjuku! My friend and I stayed here for 4 nights and we enjoyed it. Lots of amazing restaurants and cafes in this area of Shinjuku. After a very long day in Tokyo, it was wonderful to come home and unwind in the very comfy penthouse. Masaharu was super responsive and even accomodated for a later check out time because of our flight. Definitely recommend this stay if you are visiting Tokyo!
We loved it! Great location, 5 min walk to the metro. Lots of restaurants in the area. Veryyy spacious, good for two people! We’ll definitely book it on our next visit.

This studio apartment was perfect for our 3 night stay in Tokyo. Located off a really quaint alley with restaurants and other businesses, but a quieter environment that was more peaceful than many of the busier main streets nearby in the district. The apartment was well-appointed and had everything we needed — great design (modern with some traditional elements) and use of space.  The apartment really is not near the main Shinjuku area (different metro stop), but it’s only a short walk to the metro and is centrally located to see Tokyo. We were very pleased with our experience at this Airbnb and with this host!
It was a good stay and beautiful room. Size of a large hotel room and in a fairly nice area. Close to a train station and many restaurants but the area was quiet in the morning and late at night

Definitely worth for staying! The location is great, close to trolly station and restaurants that open till 11 pm. The room is big and comfortable for staying. Will live here next time visiting Tokyo.
Masaharu was an excellent host! Very clear directions and the room was very comfortable and clean.

Perfect studio for a few weeks in Tokyo. Nice bed, bathroom and kitchen for its size and the balcony was a nice bonus. It was easy to feel at peace even in the bustling neighborhood. Also lots of good food options all around the apartment.

Masaharu’s place was beautiful and so close to many delicious places to eat and shops to go to. Being very close to the subway made it very convenient to get around, even though the Kagurazaka neighborhood had so much close by.
We loved his sense of design and interior decoration and highly recommend staying here in this wonderful apartment!

We really enjoyed our stay - the studio is located in the ‘French’ district of Tokyo as we’ve later figured out. It’s off the main road so very quiet, although a minute walk from some great cafes and restaurants. Only 3 min walk to the station. We didn’t get a chance to use the terrace because of the august heat, but enjoyed the apartment still. Would recommend, thank you!

We had a great stay here. Tucked away on a quiet street in really lovely location.
I would definitely recommend. Masahuru was also very helpful and flexible regarding check in and check out times and responsive to questions. There's a restaurant downstairs that caused the apt to have a smell and Masahuru was able to come in and clean and resolve the issue promptly.
Wonderful stay and Mas was a dream to communicate with! He really went above and beyond to take care of us and help with bookings. Amazing area too.
I loved staying here! Very cute street, and super comfortable, pretty, modern yet charming apartment. Thank you Masaharu for your kind hospitality.
Great place to stay if you want to be central Tokyo but in a quieter area. Would definitely stay here again. Everything was great
Nice place, a little expensive but clean and comfortable, and in a great area. The bathroom is not private enough and is awkward with two people staying there. The glass should be properly frosted.

Mas Suzuki’s  place is in a great location- close to a major subway line is all you need in Tokyo  - Not far from Shinjuku station - where you will be overwhelmed - but easy to get too - learn the subways - get a subway card  - load onto an iPhone  -  the apartment is classy - better than a hotel imo - very comfortable bed - and bath is inviting - carne restaurant  downstairs - does create some food prep drifts up-  only thing to consider - loved it !
Great location. Close to a few subway stations and lots within walking distance.

Mama was very flexible with our check in and check out times. His place is very cute just like in the pictures . Would definelty recommend for a couple. Only minor thing is the bathroom is see through including the toilet area…so you have to be aware of that even for couples. Other than that it was a perfect stay in a cute locality
Had a great stay. Super convenient location and very comfortable.

A beautiful, well appointed and located loft style apartment.Situated in  a small ‘village’ style area.Every amenity and detail is considered by MAs, making your stay extra comfortable. To any travelers visiting for the first time, or returning, we can highly recommend.

Mas was great and his space was nice for the first half of our trip! We had an issue with the laundry machine door locking and handle coming off and Mas got it fixed within in a day and even folded the clothes inside, which was an unexpected, very kind gesture.
Definitely a pretty chill vibe in the back off a pretty busy street with lots of places to eat, shop, and very close to the subway and JR stations.
Much mahalo Mas!
Great neighbourhood with lots of nice local restaurants and shops! The airbnb was clean and nicely decorated. Mas-san was helpful with local tips and instructions to/from the airport.
Very neat little studio apartment in Shinjuku. Loved the neighborhood with a ton of options to eat. Would definitely stay again.

Pros - walkable neighborhood, comfortable bed and easy check out process. The host is also very kind.
Cons - the flat is very hard to find with the address provided and the directions are unclear (especially if you arrive by car vs train). It is also located just above a restaurant so you catch quite a bit of airborne smells, including cigarettes from people smoking in the stairwell just outside the door. As others have mentioned, glass walls for the bathroom in such a small space is less than ideal.

I booked this Airbnb 2 months in advance for a 5 night stay. The reservation was cancelled a couple hours before check in due to a water boiler issue.
