Mas offered a hotel to us but in a completely different location. We ended up having to find other accomodations on our own in a short amount of time.

Only pros and no cons on this property.  Would stay here again no problem.  Felt like a local.  And learned the area quickly:) learn the trains but an easy cab ride can get you anywhere you want to go.  Everything about this listing is perfect.  Great Job.
For a person travelling alone, who appreciates design and is familiar with Japan, this apartment is just perfect.
The space is very good for a single or couple. Convenient to everything!
Nice location and lovely home. It’s very close to the station and in walking distance to wonderful areas!

Very good location - trendy neighborhood - food for a couple - I would stay there again
Thank you
Superbe airbnb !
Loved the place and the location is incredible, we ate downstairs twice! This was by far our favorite stay and would happily come back.

We appreciate Mas’ easy check in, strong communication, and help during the stay. The place looks great and the area is lovely. However, it is overpriced for what it is, especially due to the constant BBQ smell coming from the restaurant below and the bathroom being next to the bed with a transparent door. Furthermore, there was maintenance during our stay (painting on the outside staircase) which further contributed to a strong smell. I was confused as to why there had to be maintenance during our stay over New Year’s Eve, when the city shuts down, and why it couldn’t have waited. While the location is great, the room is truly well designed and beautiful, Mas communicated and helped supply deodorizing products, $500+ a night is not appropriate for this spot given the issues we faced. Especially since we found out right before check in this was above a restaurant.

We had a good time at the house. Masaharu was a fantastic host. I really appreciated being able to check in at 8am after getting off a long haul international flight, the responsiveness to questions and the instructions. The place is stylish and spacious!!! It is clean and tidy. It is close to loads of restaurants and a short walk to JR and subway lines.

Masaharu's place was perfect for the 2 of us during our stay in Tokyo. The apartment is located a 10 minute walk from the train station on a quiet side street, with shops and restaurants nearby. We chose this apartment mainly for its location and accessibility from the trains, and would stay here again if we had the same needs. Thank you Mas!
Loved it, nice design, lots of light, very comfortable. Very fun area too.
Wonderful stay, great location and bed.
A lovely space in a great, lively neighbourhood. Spacious for Tokyo and a great host!

I loved staying in Kagurazaka. My partner and I felt like we lived in a chic part of Tokyo in a swanky apartment. The bathroom was perfect and the whole time Mas was helpful and friendly when we needed it! We even arrived early and he made the air bnb available for an earlier checkin time! I highly recommend staying here!
Masaharu was an excellent host - the apartment was very cool, very modern, in a great area, and was incredibly accommodating to our various needs.
Great stay

Another Amazing Stay in Kagurazaka
This was my second time staying at Masaharu’s beautiful Airbnb, and once again, it exceeded expectations. The mid-century modern aesthetic is perfectly curated—every detail feels intentional and calming. One of the unexpected highlights was the vintage tube amp stereo. I brought my old iPod 4th gen on a whim, and pairing it with the system was pure magic. The warmth of the sound filled the space in a way that felt nostalgic yet timeless.
Kagurazaka itself is a charming neighborhood with just the right mix of tradition and modern flair, and Masaharu’s place is the perfect home base. I’m already looking forward to my next stay. Highly recommended.
Amazing place for a short or long stay. Right above a bbq place which we loved and ate frequently. Space was beautiful and lovely, matching the description.

I felt so comfortable staying at Grapehouse Koenji. The staff was very friendly and the accommodation is so clean and cozy.
I got everything I needed on their list. It was more than I expected.
The neighborhood is safe and easy for shopping.

I couldn't have found a better place than Koenji 's Grapehouse !
And although I had booked only 3 nights at first , I felt so much comfortable that I cancelled my other booking and staid the rest of for the entire week.
It is situated in a lively and lovely neighbourhood , with easy connection to the centre of Tokyo and other one day trip destination .
But most of all, the atmosphere is really cozy and homy which was perfect when coming back from a long day exploring.
The tow sisters hosting the place were really helpful and would stay around to teach us origami or have small chats which was really nice .
I would definitely come back should I be in Tokyo again.
Thank you for this lovely week.
Marion

I had a fantastic experience staying at the guesthouse. There was a really lovely atmosphere and I felt very welcome. The location is incredible too, very close to a lot of beautiful stores and places to eat. I would highly recommend a stay here!

Grapehouse koenji was definitely one of the best places I've stayed in Tokyo, if not THE best :-) the interior of the house is lovely, the room (including bed) is super comfy and the hosts are so kind!! It's a really personal atmosphere in this house which makes it feel really homelike. So all in all I would have loved to stay longer but unfortunately it was already fully booked. If I ever come back to Tokyo, I'll definitely come here again!

Grapehouse was the most cozy, friendly, tidy home away from home. I felt very safe and had the best vacation sleep. Mutually respectful atmosphere amongst hosts and guests alike. I would not hesitate to return to Grapehouse on my next adventure to Tokyo. Good things come in small packages!
I only stayed for a day but I really really wish I stayed longer. The house has such lovely vibes, all the ladies are so nice, and Koenji is a great neighborhood. (My favorite in Tokyo actually)
10 mins walk across shipping street to apartment, since there are few shops only at night, it is safe for girls to back at night. A good place for backpackers and one person traveller.

The hosts were really friendly, kind, clear and understanding. The place is clean and as shown on the page. It was easy to get there from the JR station Koenji and the neighbourhood is nice to walk in. I stayed only two days but that was enough to have the feeling of the place. I would recommend this place to people looking for a nice and safe girl dormitory.

Grapehouse Koenji is located in a really cute area of Tokyo.  Easy to get to with clean rooms and bathrooms.  The other guests were very considerate and gracious.  Woukd definitely stay longer to explore more of the neighborhood.  Good facilities.

I'd say t's such a nice and warm place for travelers, even I stayed for only one night. I guess everyone who enters Grapehouse Koenji will feel the same warm and relaxing feeling as I did from the host and her cute poodle. Highly recommend. :)
Nothing but good things to say about Grapehouse! Will definitely be back again.

I had a really nice stay here. The place was clean and cosy and most of all the host was very welcoming and kind. I hope to stay here again if I have a chance.
とても心地よい場所でした。ホストの方もとても優しい方でお話ができて楽しい時間を過ごすことができました。また機会があれば泊まりに行きたいです。

完璧です。ありがとうございました。

房子设计非常科学合理。无论是床的宽度还是床垫的硬度都让人很舒适。
很好，离市中心比较方便，自动退房无需告知。
とても過ごしやすく、安心して宿泊することができました！

The host was very well organized and friendly! No problems finding the place or checking in, and it is in a very cute neighborhood. Only a few stops from Shinjuku Station too which is huge and gives access to almost anywhere in Tokyo very quickly including airport express shuttles. All the amenities you could need are available, including laundry, rental towels, great clean showers and toilets, spacious common bathroom area with supplies and a hair dryer, a perfect little kitchen for cooking if you want, and TV area with origami supplies :). WiFi was fast and the bunks are very cozy. It was my first airbnb experience and let me tell you it has set the bar very high. I LOVED my stay here and would have spent more time there if I had the chance.
I had a very nice experience at the Grapehouse. The room is comfy, everything is clean and people are really nice. I would definitively recommend staying there.

I really love this place !!! Grapehouse koenji was one of the best house. I’ve ever stayed. feel like stay at home. It’s very good Location near JR station , quite and near local market street a lots of food and cafe. Grapehouse was very clean, safe, comfortable and also have kitchen and common area (that’s too cute area!!), very nice helpful stuffs. will come back again !!

Sehr tolle zentrale Unterkunft.Die Gegend ist ruhig,aber trotzdem viele Restaurants usw.
Unbedingt zum Chinesen da und zum Second Hand Shop!

Nice little place to stay at,very clean, close to the train station, lots of convenient stores nearby.Kazuko gives very good and clear directions to get to the hostel and she also gives good tips about places to visit.
The place is lovely and clean. It is suitable for those who are solo travellers. The location is also close to a nearby station and with interesting neighborhood.
Neigbourhood was good , pleasant people, clean facilities,  walking distance to station with wheeled suitcase ! As expected.

ホスピタリティーに溢れた最高のお宿でした。次回、東京出張時ににも利用させて頂きます。
大変、お世話になりました。ありがとうございました。
干净，房东房客的素质都很高，晚上也不吵闹，能有很好的睡眠。

This is a copy of my review of Grapehouse from Facebook:

Grapehouse is located in a quiet part of the Koenji neighborhood in Tokyo. It was quite easy to navigate to, though I recommend using the access map located on their website if you're having trouble finding it.

I was warmly greeted by Kazuko upon arrival. Her English is excellent, an asset I couldn't be more thankful for. The check-in process was quick and simple, fantastic for the jetlagged foreigner.

I was amazed at how clean Grapehouse was kept. The garbage was changed every day, if not multiple times a day, and the bathroom facilities were kept immaculate. Sidenote: unlike the US where all your trash goes into one bin, Japan has an incredibly organized rubbish sorting system. Expect to sort your trash by paper, plastic, combustibles, etc.

Shampoo, conditioner, and body wash are provided in the showers for free of charge, however towels run an additional cost of ¥100. There's also a washer/dryer available at an additional cost of ¥100 for wash or ¥200 wash and dry.

The beds provided are tatami style AND SO COMFY! Holy cow, getting out of bed was the hardest part of the morning, I never wanted to leave. There are simple accommodations to the beds including a small light, charging station (3 outlets available), and a cubby to place your belongings.

Other accommodations in the hostel include a fridge/freezer, various dishware, a toaster, coffeemaker, TV, computer, a myriad of travel guides, and Kazuko and Sanae who provided me with plenty of suggestions of things to do in Tokyo, but also offer classes in sushi making, yoga, and calligraphy.

All in all, Grapehouse is a outstanding establishment that elevated my visit from just a trip, to an experience. Thank you for a wonderful time. :)

I like Koenji why i choose here. it was so clean and comfortable to access shinjuku.
but when i went to the grape house alone after 12am, being little scary. execpt that, you can feel japanese house.
staff are available to speak english and japanese and easy to talk.

숙소 주변의 소박한 동네들이
좋았다.
挺干静的,也比较方便,日语英语渣的我住的很愉快,有机会下次再来!
Awesome place to stay,  highly recommended.

Easy walking distance from Koenji station, hosts lovely and spoke English fluently - close to everything one would need and other bits of Tokyo on the Chuo line from Koenji - I'll definitely be staying here again when I'm back in Tokyo!
Cozy and warm little place, would recommend for lone/solo travellers. Apologies if I have ever inconvenienced staff & travellers.

I enjoyed my stay at Grapehouse Koenji; it was a short walk to the train station and located near the main shopping streets, but was still a quiet space to come back to. The neighborhood itself has a variety of stores and restaurants (vegan, too), along with many charming residential streets. The hosts were friendly and welcoming, asking about our days, and the other guests were just as kind and respectful. It is a great choice for women traveling on their own, and I'd certainly recommend Grapehouse to anyone visiting Tokyo.

Grapehouse Koenji is a fantastic place to stay! It's a little outside of Tokyo proper, but that makes the neighboorhood much easier to explore in my opinion hahaha! But seriously, everything was always clean and tidy, the beds were comfortable, and there was even a washer/dryer if you needed it. Grapehouse Koenji is also super easy to find (yay quieter neighborhoods!!). After a day or two you won't even have to think about it! I highly recommend Grapehouse Koenji to any solo female travelers, it's pretty wonderful!
근처에 가게도 많고 숙소자체도 깔끔하고 시설도 좋아서 굉장히 만족했습니다. 매일매일 청소해주시고 친절하게 대해주셔서 감사했습니다.

The hosts were very friendly and always came around to chat with us. They welcome you immediately at the door, and show you around. They also kept in contact with me leading up to that day I arrived to make sure I didn't have any questions and find out what time I'd be checking in, so they could be there when I arrived.  The people there were also really nice. Everyone wanted to share things about their culture and learn about the culture of others. The hostel itself was very nice. The interior design was well done, and made me feel very at home. My only complaint is I wish there was a locker to put things in. It's not that I didn't trust a single one of the people I was rooming with, is just that I feel this is a basic amenity most hostels have, and a lot of people would feel comfortable having that option. The neighbourhood had a lot of restaurants that looked really tasty. It was a little creepy to walk back alone late at night, but I never had any issues.

Warm welcome, cleanliness, convenient location, newly constructed modern and very functional design... list just a few things I really liked about Grape House Koenji. I enjoyed walking through very unique arcade shopping streets of Koenji. This place is a great hub to enjoy one of a kind town of Koenji on foot.
I definitely will come back for a longer term stay at this Very economically priced, comfortable place.

2度目、利用させていただきました。
とても快適でした。
また、機会があれば、利用したいです。
주요 역에 빠르게 갈 수 있는 좋은 위치에 자리잡고 있습니다. 주변 음식점도 맛있었어요. 도미토리 형식이고, 혼자 여행하는 사람들이 머무르기 편합니다.
Wondetful little hostel. On a quiet residential street but still close to the bustle of Koenji shops. Clean and quiet.
지내는 동안 불편없이 너무 좋았습니다. 숙소도 깨끗하고 신주쿠에서 가까운 곳에 위치해서 다니기도 수월했습니다.

綺麗で設備も整っていて、1日のみの滞在でしたがとても過ごしやすかったです！
また機会があればよろしくお願いいたします。
高円寺の駅からのアクセスもよく、閑静な住宅街にあるのでとてもリラックスできました。部屋はごくシンプルですが過剰なものがないので良かったです。
Comfortable!!clean!!

코엔지역 북쪽 출구 상점가 근처라 정말 이쁘고 활기차서 도착하자마자 동네가 정말 맘에 들었습니다. 조금 일찍 체크아웃을 했는데 친절하게 맞아주시고, 숙소 사용 설명도 해주셔서 감사했어요. 여성전용에 매우 깨끗하고 모든 시설이 만족스러웠습니다. 위치도 신주쿠에서 가깝고, 키치죠지나 나카노도 금방이라 너무 좋았습니다. 다음에 또 묵고 싶은 마음 1000%입니다^^bbb

My stay at Grapehouse Koenji was not good, was excellent! Sonae and Kazuko were great hosts, very helpfull and kind. The place is very clean and well-organised. The location is perfect, Koenji is a JR station and it's easy to go to one of the main stations (Shinjuku - hub for several JR and metro lines). I trully recommend Grapehouse Koenji! Arigatou gozaimashita!

Grapehouse Koenji is perfect for a single traveler! The location was pretty central as it was close to major stations such as Shinjuku, Shibuya and Harajuku. There were many shops and restaurants to explore near the hostel as well. I have a really good time and I would defininely come again!

The hostel is close by to the station and a lot of restaurants. I recommend walking around in the morning as everything is beautiful and quiet.
The stay was pleasent and I meet a lot of other travellers which was fun.
Hope to go there again 😁

Very nice runners and stay ! It's a truly lovely japanese house very well located. Very cool and animated neighbourhood with a lot of restaurants and shops : you've a lot of choice to eat ! I recommend ;-)

位置很好，闹中取静，jr几站就到新宿。周边还有很多好吃的店和可逛的古着店，安静又方便。
房子很温馨，也很干净，客厅和厕所都挺宽敞的。房间住起来很舒服。
性价比很高啊。

Very nice runners and stay ! It's a truly lovely japanese house very well located. Very cool and animated neighbourhood with a lot of restaurants and shops : you've a lot of choice to eat ! Highly recommend ;-)

An excellent place! Very clean! The location was perfect (close to the main wards of Tokyo and a short walk from the station). There are many restaurants and shops nearby and there's a convenience store less than a minute away! The atmosphere was very welcoming and the hosts were always accommodating. I would definitely come back!
nice operater and great buget

The guest house is very nice, it is very clean and very well equipped. It is 8-10 min walk from station and close to restaurants and convinience store. The hosts are very nice and let me check in a bit late than the usual time.
The room is upstairs, and the host help me carry my XXXL luggage!! Very helpful!
Highly Recommended for woman solo traveller

This was my first time staying at a hostel in Japan; however, compared to other hostels that I have been at, this was one of the cleanest and most well-thought out hostel. I had the pleasure of staying there, and I felt quite comfortable, relaxed, and at home. The location was great that it was close to everything yet the area felt much less busy and crowded compared to the rest of Tokyo. Everyone was extremely friendly and welcoming. Please note that the cubby space has no lock and may not accommodate very large suitcases.
very clean and comfortable place :)
とても綺麗な部屋です

I love Grapehouse Koenji! The house is nice with good people. Quiet area with locals. Can get to the train station easily, full of restaurants and also near the shopping area. Will recommend to others for sure!!! Thanks for everything :)
요청에 빠르게 응답해주시고 숙소 자체 시설도 좋고 청결해서 정말 잘 지냈습니다. 교통도 평하고 주위에 싱점가가 많아서 산책하기도 좋았습니다. 또 여성 전용 게스트하우스라서 언어는 달라도 서로 대화도 즐겁게 나누고 좋았습니다. 다음번에도 다시 오고싶은 곳이였어요 :)
駅からのアクセスもわかりやすく、建物、設備も綺麗でした。オーナーの方も気さくに話しかけてくださりアットホームで居心地が良かったです。
アットホームなホステルです。
小小的很温馨 干净舒适 非常适合独自出行的女孩子
女性のみのゲストハウスなので、気疲れもなくゆっくりぐっすり眠れました。また利用したいです。

Staying here was really great. There were some super nice girls staying at the same time as me and the bed was very comfortable. Everything worked perfectly in the hostel and our host was super super nice, she even cooked me dinner on my last night and it was so delicious!!! I loved it, I would definitely stay here again!
Few station to Shinjuku station and the guest house is easy to find. Guest house is exactly same as per described. Bed is soft and comfortable. Clean and cosy envinronment. Surely recommended.

그레이프하우스에 다녀간 후로 도쿄방문시에 이곳에만 묵고 있습니다. 여성전용이라 안심이 되고 호스트분들이 친절하며, 언제나 깨끗하고 정돈이 잘 되어 있습니다. 침구류도 포근하고 2층 침대에 도미토리지만 편안히 쉴 수 있었습니다. 신주쿠, 나카노, 키치죠지 등 좋아하는 장소에 접근이 편리해 앞으로도 계속 이곳을 이용할 예정입니다^^ 혼자 여행하시는분, 일행이 있으신 분 모두 추천드려요~
H

You will not find a better place to stay than Grape House. The host, Sanae, is the kindest, most thoughtful person who will go out of her way to help you.  Because she's so organized, she has everything you need to be comfortable and secure. Everything is labeled, directions are clear. It's always super clean. It's such a comfortable and comforting place that I wished I could have stayed longer.

東京滞在の際には、必ずこちらにお世話になっております。
いつお邪魔しても、快く迎えて下さり、私にとっては無くてはならないお宿です。お掃除も行き届いており、快適に過ごさせて頂いてます。又、アクセスも良く皆さんにオススメしたいお宿ナンバーワンです。

지내는동안 너무 행복했습니다. 시설은 방같이 꾸며놓은 2층침대로 정말정말정말 너무 아늑하고 좋아서 하루 더 있고싶은데 예약이 꽉차서 1박밖에 예약을 못했네요ㅠㅠ주인분들이 모녀이신 것 같은데 너무 친절하시고 따님으로 보이시는 젊은분이 영어를 하셔서 의사소통이 그렇게 힘들진 않을거에요! 청소를 정말 열심히 하시는 게 느껴질 정도로 정말 깨끗합니다. 공용공간도 취향저격으로 너무 예뻤습니다. 제가 여태까지 가본 게스트하우스 중에 가장 좋은 것 같아요(한국까지 통틀어서요!정말좋아요) 물론 여성전용 도미토리구요 단점을 꼽자면 시내와 조금 거리가있고 역에서 좀 걸어야한다는 점...? 그래도 주변에 편의점도 많고 이정도면 가까운 편이에요. 체크아웃 시간도 여유롭고 모든 것이 훌륭해요! 제 후기가 조금이나마 도움이 됬길 바랍니다 :-]
キレイなお部屋です！ 細かい気配りがされていて、過ごしやすいです。
오는길에 큰 시장이 있어서 찾기도 쉽고 맛집에 완전 많았어요! 시장 끝쪽에 카레전문점은 줄 서서 먹구요 바로 옆에 있는 서양가정식? 집에 오므라이스도 진짜 맛있었습니당! 무엇보다 호스트님이 너무 친절하셔서 좋았어요ㅎㅎ 다시 일본 놀러오면 꼭 여기 갈 겁니다!!ㅎㅎ

駅まで徒歩で行けますし、
居心地が良い素敵な場所でした:)
역까지 걸어서 갈 수 있고,
지내기 편안한 멋진 숙소였습니다:)

Grapehouse koenji can be simply described as, "Your home in Tokyo". Sanae, was a wonderful host. Also the group of girls with whom I shared my one week were exceptionally cool and good hearted. Really loved my stay there.
駅からのアクセスも分かり易く、迷わずにたどり着けました。ドミトリー形式のbnb利用は初めてでしたが、女性限定なので安心してゆっくり出来ましたし、お部屋もとても綺麗でした。ホストの方も丁寧に対応してくださり、女性の一人旅にもおすすめです。
A local, charming place to stay suring your trip to Tokyo. Very close to stations and to get around. Clean rooms and bathrooms :) thank u!

This is the best hostel I've stayed for my Japan trip.  Equipped with a lot of facilities. First, the location isn't so far from the station. I am a person who always gets lost but the direction from a station to the hostel is so easy to remember. Second, I do check-in in late morning but the host is still welcome me and I like the point that the host let us choose the bed by ourselves. Lastly, for the facilities, there are many things for the traveller like extra blankets, washing machine, a little locker in your bed that you can keep some value stuff, living room space that so comfy. I would definitely recommend to others and will come back to stay here again for my future Japan trip.
Grape house provides everything you need for a cozy comfy home in Tokyo. I had an amazing stay there for 4 night. Everything was perfect. I definitely recommend this place .
乾淨舒適的小旅館，很多細節處都有貼心的設施，單人旅行推薦
Goog
ホストの方もロケーションも、とてもいいです。
처음 이 숙소에 도착했을때는 아주 가파른 계단에 당황하고 놀랐는데 지내다보니 이렇게 아늑하고 편안한 곳이 또있을까 싶네요.  정말 떠나기 싫었어요. 개인적으로 도쿄라는 도시보다 이 숙소와 코엔지가 맘에들어 또한번 오고싶습니다. 친절한 사나에에게 정말 감사합니다.

Thank you very much for your hosting!!! Sorry, I was too busy to write the comment before.
Very cozy room and nice host. I definitely recommend here and wanna back here again if possible. Very clean and convenient also. Really recommend!!!
ロケーションよく、ステキなところです。
This is a great place to stay. It is clean, nicely decorated, and in a very good area of Tokyo. The stairs are a bit steep, so keep that in mind if you have heavy luggage.
기숙사형식의 여성만 묵을 수 있는 숙소라서 혼자 짧게 여행하는 사람에게 좋은 숙소였어요. 깨끗하고 간단히 요리도 해서 먹을 수도 있고 주인분의 배려심을 느낄 수 있었어요. 다만 계단이 가팔라서 짐이 무거우면 불편할 수도 있어요..!

I had an amazing experience at Grapehouse! I found the location to be great (close to some shops and the train station), and everything was so clean! Everyday the Grapehouse staff works really hard to make sure everything is clean and organized. Bathroom/Kitchen/Living ammenities were more than I could've asked for, and laundry is available at a very low cost. Sanae was very accomodating and helpful with all of the laundry and luggage issues that I had, oftentimes saying that she wanted Grapehouse to feel like home to me. Plus, she has the most adorable dogs!! Both of whom she will keep far, far away from you if you're not a fan of animals, (there are some guests who never even saw the dogs), but if you love dogs like me then you can pet and cuddle with them! Overall my trip was perfect. I couldn't have asked for a better place to stay.
Grapehouse Koenji was great! It's small but super cute and in a great neighbourhood. Everyone there was very nice. It was super clean. I would definitely stay there again!

Grapehouse koenji was amazing! I've heard some horror stories about hostels but I have never felt safer and more comfortable staying here. Definitely great for solo travelers!! Staff and other guests were very nice and helpful. The place was very clean and in a good area with shops and restaurants in close proximity! Would 100% recommend staying here if traveling to Tokyo.

I really enjoyed my stay here! The mood was really relaxed, there were lots of great travel tips and the house could not have been cleaner. Our host Sanae was super nice and helpful, and even prepared a tree for the Tanabata festival! Definitely would stay here again!

A short walk from the station and only a stop/walkable distance from Nakano Broadway. A very ideal location for me because I love shopping in Nakano Broadway. The host is also very kind and welcoming. Keep in mind that the stairs inside a little steep so keep that in mind if you have luggage to carry. Everything’s very clean  and you even get your own cubby with a key for your valuables. Lovely stay, I highly recommend it.
The environment is very good. Recommended for female solo traveler.

この度お世話になりました。
ご丁寧な対応ありがとうございました。
ハウスがとても清潔で大満足でした。今回東京に行きましたらぜひまたお邪魔させていただきます。

房东非常干净讲究，我当时晚到了但ha还是笑脸迎接了我。同住的很多外国人都很友好，晚上回去的早还可以一起坐着聊天。氛围很好。一个人旅行可以考虑呀，尤其真的太干净了我觉得。离新宿比较近，坐train就可以到，位置在高恩寺站附近～
A very nice place！If you travel alone, you can choose this dormitory！

Grapehouse is a perfect retreat for exploring Koenji and the surrounding neighborhoods. I stayed four nights, and really enjoyed my time there. Would recommend checking out the nearby sentos (public bath houses), of which Sanae has drawn a map with four closeby. The bed was comfy and private. The shared room was a little loud, but that was only due to a group of guests who had little consideration for the other guests. They likely won't be there when you stay! Other than that it's a perfect spot, great value, overall recommend and hope to be back when solo again in Tokyo.
とてもいいです
숙소가 깨끗하고 관리가 잘돼서 정말 편하고 즐겁게 묵다 왔습니다. 역에서 살짝 거리가 있지만 무난한 거리고, 역에서 숙소에 가는 길에 상점이 많아 오히려 즐거웠어요. 계단이 조금 높은 걸 빼고는 더할나위 없이 좋았습니다. 세심한 배려가 곳곳에 보이고, 여름인데도 쾌적하게 잘 지냈어요. 다음에 일본에 방문하면 반드시 다시 오고 싶을 정도입니다.
Grapehouse Koenji was very cozy, great location and overall perfect for my needs. I highly recommend it. Sanae was very friendly and helpful throughout my stay.
非常棒的入住体验！地理位置也很好！去新宿什么的逛街很方便！

The hosts at Grapehouse Koenji were incredibly helpful and welcoming. The space was very clean and comfortable, and the other guests that I met there were also all very nice! It's all a shared space, but you're free to come and go throughout the day for personal sightseeing and such. The location is just a short walk away from the train station, which has access to one of the main lines for places like Tokyo, Shibuya, Shinjuku, and other popular areas.
I loved my stay here, and would absolutely consider booking again the next time I visit the Tokyo area!
I had a good stay here

I got there late but she stayed up to make sure I got in safely. I only showered and slept here so I can't write the best review, however, it was nice and I enjoyed my stay.
ありがとうございました♪
房子很干净很舒服，比预想中好很多^_^下次会再来
距离高园寺站很近，去新宿坐JR只要两站，旁边还有高园寺商店街，晚上回来吃饭很方便也很实惠。房东推荐了商店街里的小杉汤，好多年没泡过公共浴池了，日本的公共浴池超干净，住在这儿的几天每天都去泡澡，开心，谢谢房东~

Mind if you carry a huge luggage. it will be quite a challenge to get it to the top of second level. The premises requires you to have shoe off and to clean the luggage caster roller ( which i really like as i do it in my own place as well , because you never know what germs you bring home ) There are 2 toilets, 2 bathrooms, 1 sink 2 to share, its pretty decent place for women stay only. So you won't be hearing any SNORE.
The location was good, you may check the yakitori along the way to Grapehouse, it was affordable and GOOD ! The public bath, Kinoyou is nearby ! which was awesome, the milk in glass bottle was seriously good. Nice people around.
This is a cute little place to stay, especially if you're wanting to explore Tokyo! The neighborhood is interesting, but quiet, and exploring is highly recommended. The host is very sweet!
立地もよく、便利です。ホストの対応も迅速で丁寧でした！コスパもよくおすすめです！
高圆寺站走过去挺近，走过商业街很快就到，商业街也很有乐趣～个人觉得出行挺方便的，走走逛逛都不错。住宿挺不错，应有尽有，我喜欢，下次有机会再订这！
highly recommended. sparkling clean and superb comfortable bedding. everything is as shown in photo plus two friendly puppets. great location and choices of local stores

清潔でこざっぱりとしたホステルでした。女性のみの受け入れという点でも安心感があり、気兼ねなく過ごすことができました。立地も駅から数分ですし、商店街を抜けた場所にある為、夜ひとりで歩いても賑やかで怖い思いをしませんでした。
ホストは迅速で親切です。近所のオススメを教えていただき、銭湯に行ってきましたがとてもいいお風呂で遊び疲れたカラダが休まり満足でした。ちなみに銭湯からの帰り道にジェラートを販売するお店があり、たいへん美味でした。
東京にいった際には都心より少し距離がありますが、ぜひまた宿泊したいと思える場所です。
Wonderful spot in a great neighborhood. The space is a little small but everything was tidy and well kept.

What a wonderful place to stay! It’s a short walk to the train station, the beds were all clean and felt airy and open, and there were lots of books and brochures around if you wanted to find things to do. I would love to come back!

너무 친절하시고 정말 깨끗하게 잘관리하는 게스트하우스 인것 같습니다. 역에서 9분거리인데 금방가는 것 같고
세심하게 신경써주셔서 정말 감사합니다
또 일본에 가면 여기서 자고싶어요

The place is really sparkling clean and neat. It’s very conveniently located near the Koenji train station. To me, it is perfect for female travelers and great for the value. Sanae will prompt to help all the time. She is genuinely friendly and very thoughtful. The area nearby it is a great area for vintage shop browsing and the typical petite restaurants on the shopping street just two minutes from the dormitory has really good Japanese food, most things are in Japanese only and you will be sitting next to the locals. It was so much fun and great food !
駅からは8分ほど歩きますが、商店街なので、明るく女性1人でも安心です。設備も共有スペースもおしゃれで過ごしやすかったです。東京のアクセスも便利な土地でこの宿泊代はコスパも最高。また、泊まりたいと思います。
清潔で居心地のよいゲストハウスです。

This is a fantastic guest house. Out of all the hostels I’ve stayed in on this trip it was the most comfortable bed. The house is filled with many thoughtful touches and a great selection on maps and brochures of the area to help you plan your day. It was very safe and convenient.

Not only is the hospitality at Grapehouse Koenji a five star rating, the neighbourhood is awesome too! Granted I had very big days and did not get to take full advantage of it, but there were so many neat bars, second hand stores and even a bakery! If you want to travel alone and feel safe, this place is for you.
とても親切な方でした！高円寺駅から少しだけ歩きますが商店街なので夜でも全く平気でした。新宿駅にとても近いので便利です。ベッドも洗面台もトイレも全てとても清潔でまた東京に行く時に利用したいと思います！ありがとうございました。
The host is really kind. There is not only good communication between guests and host, but also guests and guests. I wanna visit here again:)
チェックイン時間の変更に対応してくださりありがとうございました。かわいいワンちゃんがいて癒されました。湯たんぽがあたたかくてぐっすり眠れました。おすすめです。
Good & safe place to stay while travel alone in Tokyo~~
Nice stay and beautiful house!
房东人很好，很值得一住，和式的公共空间很漂亮，有很多东京的攻略，附近有一条商业街可以买东西，但是不会影响到休息，离地铁站不远，有机会再来会继续选择在这里住宿

This is a great place to stay in Koenji! The host is very friendly and very helpful. The space is very clean and I felt safe and welcome during my stay here. The common area had lots of pamphlets to read about Tokyo/Japan sightseeing (I definitely recommend taking time to explore Koenji and Shimokita). There were also small touches that I appreciated like nail polish and remover available, lots of kitchen items to use. Would definitely stay again if I were to come back to Tokyo!

For all individual travellers, u would love to come to this place. This place might seems small but it is very convenient. All convenient stores are close by. They have their own town which had alot of things too. U would want to go there. Im kind of miss it bcause i didnt get enough time. Hmm i shud tho. 🙂
Ohh as for muslim traveller is a bit hard for u to find restaurant near there. But they have convenient store like Lawson, Family Mart n 7Eleven which u can but a lot of food to eat. My advise bring the instant food(we got a lot of instant food in Msia. So ya..which i just need hot water). Then done.
Hope it helps u out. 🤗

Fantastic women-only hostel! Grapehouse Koenji provides a clean, safe, and mindful stay about a half hour outside of downtown Tokyo on the JR Chuo line. They provide helpful amenities (coffee/tea, cook/dishware, lockbox, towels, WiFi, Tokyo guidebooks) and efficient facilities that still provide you with privacy for yourself & your belongings. I would definitely recommend staying at Grapehouse Koenji & look forward to returning in the future!

I chose the right place to stay in Tokyo!
The place was sparking clean, you can get everything you need, (some amenities needs extra money but it doesn't cost that much), and also you can get continuous Wi-Fi connection.
And of course, the host was really a helpful, and easy to communicate so you can ask anything you need!
There's a convinience store(Famliy mart,1min walk),and it accepts credit card.
It takes about 10mins from Koenji sta to this place, so if you are having the pretty heavy stuff with you, it's gonna be quite a walk but all the way to this place is so flat, so there's no problem with suitcase.
In overall, HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!!

Grapehouse Koenji is very cozy and homelike place to stay. I travelled solo and got all help I needed from the nice staff regardless what the problem was. The transportation from guesthouse to all over the Tokyo is great and easy to use. I would definetly stay here again! :)
lovely room in Tokyo.lovely grape， lovely dog，lovely trip.

東京はどこも高すぎて気が滅入っていました。こちらは全てにおいて、最高としか言い様がなかったです！！
新宿まで中央線10分程度でいける高円寺の商店街を抜けてすぐだし、コンビニも飲み屋もスーパーもなんでもあります。
人気の銭湯が近くにあるらしかったですが、私は滞在時間が短かったので残念ながら今回は見送りました。
敢えて言うなら…と考えますが、こうして欲しいなと思う事はありませんでしたし、あったらいいなと思うものが全てクリアでした。
次の東京滞在も絶対に利用します。

Voyageant seule, j’ai cherché un lieu où dormir sans me ruiner. C’était exactement ce qu’il fallait. L’emplacement est parfait : le quartier est plein de restaurants, boutiques, friperies, cafés originaux. Les transports sont à moins de 10mn et même en rentrant tard, on ne craint rien.
À mon arrivée, j’ai été très bien accueillie par Sanae, alors que j’arrivais en dehors des horaires prévus ; j’ai même eu le plaisir de manger au restaurant du rez-de-chaussée que je conseille. La literie est confortable, la salle de bain propre et bien équipée. Quant à la pièce commune, on y trouve à disposition café, plans de la ville, guides pratiques en plusieurs langues et équipement de secours (prise pour chargeurs de smartphone).
Le seul bémol est certainement celui de toute chambre partagée, si on a le sommeil léger, et qu’on est réveillée dès que quelqu’un fait du bruit, ce qui fut mon cas une nuit...
Je garde tout de même un très bon souvenir de mon séjour!
Très bien situé dans un vrai quartier japonais à l’abris des touristes. Tout simplement super!
Very homely and welcoming and in a great location, I can’t recommend it enough.

Nice and friendly place to stay. Both host and other guest are so friendly and helpful.
A very warm and homie atmosphere - perfect place to stay if you are travelling alone.
Also very clean and with all you need for a comfy stay.
You Can even cook your own food in the kitchen and hang out in the nice commen area/livingroom.
It’s in this really cool area - Koenji, wich has so much charm and cool vintage stores, ramen shops and a station near bye..
I highly recommend this cosy place..

일단 숙소에 강아지가 있습니다. 정말 귀엽습니다. 강아지를 좋아하시는분이라면 대 강추입니다. 성격도 너무너무 좋습니다. 그리고 시설은 공용공간/침실/화장실 및 샤워실 등인데요, 전체적으로 깨끗하고 환하고 귀엽습니다.
전 너무 좋았어서 크게 할말이 없습니다. 여자분들만 있어서 불편하지도 않았고 숙소자체 시설과 물품들고 너무 아기자기하고 센스가 넘쳤어요 ...! 세탁기(세탁건조 둘 다 가능), 토스트기, 커피, 차, 간단한 조리기구 등을 사용할 수 있다는 것도 장점이고, 공용공간에서 놀거나 TV시청도 가능합니다. 그리고 개인실이 아니라서 불편할 것이라고 생각할 수 있지만, 침실에 커튼을치고나면 굉장히 아늑합니다 ! 특히 작은 조명도 있어서 조용히 책을읽거나 혼자만의 공간에서 하루를 마무리하기도 좋아요. 아무튼 흠잡을 데 없이 정말 너무 좋은 숙소였습니다. 저는 언젠가 도쿄에 다시 오게되면 꼭 또 머무르고싶어요 !!!
民宿的狗狗超可爱！

If Grapehouse Koenji is available, book it now! I had an amazing stay here. I was a little nervous solo travelling for the first time but being able to rest here made me feel at home. All the other women staying were very nice too. The space is spotless, cozy, and packed with any amenities you might need. The highlight of the dorm is the location..the surrounding streets are filled with charming local stores, great food, and many thrift stores. (I especially loved the donuts nearby.) I highly recommend staying here. You won’t regret it:)

It was my first time in Japan and I’m more than happy to have stayed in Grapehouse Koenji. I looked forward to coming home everyday because the space was so welcoming, clean, and comfortable. The host was also very very helpful and always available! Koenji is also a great area with many small restaurants, thrift stores, cafes, and even a cat cafe. Could not have asked for a better experience! I miss it already!
离高円寺站不远，走过来会路过两个全家。有一只很可爱很听话的小狗狗！
这是一家非常温馨的民宿，地理位置也很棒！非常干净、整洁，沟通也很流畅～非常欢迎大家来入住！

I loved staying at Grapehouse Koenji. I recommend it to any ladies looking to stay in a hip, exciting and artistic part of Tokyo. The caretakers are friendly and helpful. I would love to come back to the hostel on my next ladies only trip to Tokyo !

Grapehouse Koenji is a very safe and homey place to stay. The hostel has all the amenities you’d need and Koenji is a fun neighbourhood for second hand shopping/street food. I loved staying here and was sad to leave.

Located in the dynamic, local and traditionnal neighbourhood of Koenji, the GrapeHouse is a really cute and typical house with a dormitory, a super clean bathroom and a living room really cozy. There, you will be welcomed as you are part of the GrapeHouse family. A place like home.
This place is great! Excellent location, very clean guest house, kind host and fellow guests :)

I really, really enjoyed my stay at Grapejouse Koenji, and I cannot fault it in the slightest! I stayed for 4 nights and felt warm and welcomed throughout my stay. Sanae greeted me and showed my how everything worked, and introduced me to her dog! There were plenty of amenities, and I’m pretty sure I had my best nights sleep this entire holiday here! The place was so cosy and lovely, and I had a great time chatting with all of the guests staying there. We even had a sushi party one night! It was easy to find, and located within a short, easy walking distance of the train station and bus stops. It’s located in a lovely area; plenty of secondhand clothing stores, local shops, restaurants and cafes; I just wish I’d had longer to explore! I felt safe, welcomed, and I highly recommend staying here! I’ll be back for sure next time I’m in Tokyo!
第二次住这里了。依然是很舒适。每房主还每天帮忙灌暖水袋，非常贴心！

This is such a lovely place away from the busy areas of Tokyo, but it's still easy to get to places like Shinjuku and Shibuya. If you're looking for a homey vibe during your travels, I suggest this place. Everyone was also very cordial towards one another so it was easy to make new friends here. It was extremely clean, which I didn't expect since it's a shared space. The bed was comfortable and that's coming from someone with scoliosis. The place is exactly how it was in the photos. There are a lot of restaurants, cafes, and bars nearby. You have to try the Udonya Tenteko (うどん屋 てんてこ). It's probably just a 5-minute walk and you won't miss it if you're going or coming from the station that's a 10-minute walk away. If you like going to live music bars, I suggest the Penguin House because they have a discounted entrance fee for foreigners, cheap drinks, and talented musicians! If you need a drink and you want to go somewhere really nearby, go to this bar and grill called "Red Lights", if I remember correctly. You can find it before you cross the street.
Cons would be the water in the shower because it doesn't stay hot for too long. After a few seconds, it would turn ice cold. I don't know why that is, but it really bothered me especially during times I was in a hurry. There's also a flight of stairs to go to the rooms, so if you have a heavy luggage with you, you're going to have a rough time. If these things won't bother you, you won't regret booking this place. The owner was also very nice and they have a dog named Rin-kun!

素晴らしいホストです！
猫を連れての滞在できるところがなく、困っていたところグレープハウス高円寺に巡り会いました。
猫のためのお部屋にわざわざ空調をいれてくださった他に、ペットシーツやキャリーバッグも親切に提供してくれました。
シャワー室や洗面台はとても清潔で、女性専用なのでキッチンやリビングなどの共有スペースも気楽に出入りできます。
同日に開催していた人たちとも、束の間のコミュニケーションを楽しむことができました。
まるで実家に帰ったかのようにほっとする空間です。
とっても楽しかったです！みんなさんもありがとうございました！
很温馨的环境，房东人很好收拾的也很干净，同住的大家也都很温柔，很棒，价格也很合理，有需要下次还会去住

코엔지역에서 보통걸음으로 걸어서 10분~15분 정도 거리였는데 상점가를 구경하며 걷다보면 금방이어서 그리 멀게 느껴지지 않았습니다. 호스트님이 매일 공용공간 관리해주셔서 깨끗하고 아늑한 느낌이었습니다. 간단한 조미료도 있어서 요리도 해먹을 수 있을 것 같습니다. 여성전용 도미토리 처음 숙박해봤는데 가성비 대비 만족합니다. 여행자들이 많아 피곤하면 코 고는 분이 계실 수 있으니 귀마개 지참 추천드립니다:-) 혼자 일본 올 때 또 이용할 것 같습니다.
最寄り駅からも分かりやすく、とても良いところでした。
숙소가 깔끔하고 위치도 좋았습니다! 체크인 전에 짐을 맡길 수 있어서 편하게 주변을 구경할 수 있었습니다. 함께 머물었던 다른 여행객들도 친절했고, 좋은 추억 많이 만들었네요 :)
그레이프하우스에 있는동안 너무 편하고 좋았어요. 혼자 여행하시는 분들에게 추천드려요. 숙소근처 동네도 너무 평화롭고 좋았습니다! 호스트분도 너무 부담스럽지 않게 잘 챙겨주셨어요.

위치도 찾기 싶고 깨끗하고 조용해요.
도미토리 숙박은 처음이었자만 가성비가 아주 좋았어요. 도쿄에 갈때마다 가고 싶어요.
호스트도 친절하고 도움을 요청하면 바로 알려주셨어요.
very friendly host and roommates. having enjoyed the short stay there in the xmas time. ☺️
また行きたいHOUSEです。すごいいい記憶が残りました。
Quite good!!! Everything and I will back in April 😉😉😉

If you're still thinking about it, just book it. First of all, Koenji as an area is lovely and walkable, lots of good places to eat, cool shops, and unique cafes, (I recommen cafe Nagatsuki, and AIMU). I doubt you can find a better place to stay than Grapehouse, it might be the best value for money in Tokyo. Even for me who usually prefers privacy, staying in the dorm felt really comfortable. The entire house is perfectly neat and clean, the kitchen was great for cooking, and the common space and other guests were lovely. Sanae san is also one of the most hospitable people I have met. I stayed here for 10 days and in the end it felt like home. Also the numerous sentos nearby were great and cheap. If I come to Tokyo again I will definitely stay here again. Oh and there is also the cutest dog stealing everybody's hearts <3

Me sentí como en casa , nunca había estado en un Sharehouse pero , sin duda , cuando vuelva a Japón quiero repetir ❤️
Tienen un perro super lindo , y la dueña es super amable , en todo momento me ayudó y nos comunicamos muy bien , le agradezco mucho la estancia , fue muy agradable
호스트분이 무척 친절하고 동네가 조용해서 편히 쉴 수 있었습니다. 전철역까지도 꽤 걸어다닐만해서 편하게 중심가랑 오갈 수 있었어요:) 이층침대도 아늑하고 어릴적 아지트같은 느낌이라 다음에도 다시 방문하고싶어요!
とても居心地の良い場所でした。

初めてAirbnbを利用した宿泊だったので、少し緊張していましたが、快適に過ごすことがでました。宿泊当日の午後に予約したにも関わらず、ご対応いただきありがとうございました。
寝る時には、湯たんぽんを準備してくれました。
ホストから教えていただいた銭湯も、とてもいい場所でした。
宿泊されていた方との、おしゃべりも楽しかったです。とてもアットホームで、ぜひまた宿泊したいゲストハウスです。

싼가격에 혼자 여행하기 딱 좋은 곳 이였습니다! 여성 전용이라 너무 좋았구요! 같이 지낸 게스트분들도 너무 친절하고 따뜻했어요! 짐이 무거웠는데 호스트분께서 도와주셔서 너무 감사했습니다!! 다음에 또 갈려구요! 3박 4일이라는 너무 짧은 시간이라 아쉬웠지만 덕분에 좋은 추억들 많이 쌓고 갑니다! ( 진짜 귀여운 강아지도 있으니까 꼭 와보세요!) 주변 마을도 조용하고 쾌적했습니다! ㅎㅎ ありがとうございます😊

It was a nice stay in Grapehouse. There's everything you need in the house à d the welcome was great. The location is very cute when you walk a bit in the near street. Kōenji is very accessible and not that far from Tokyo.
Very nice, glad I could stay with my dog.
Place is worth the place. You will be staying with 7-8 other female ladies in the room  -so manage expectations on the noise.
Affordable yet quiet and nice stay. Not far from the station, convenience stores and restaurants.
Excelente opción para mujeres que viajamos solas, buena compañía de mujeres de diferentes partes del mundo.🙂

過ごしやすかったです。
ありがとうございました。
素敵なゲストハウスで、同室の皆さんもルールやマナーを守ってくださりとても良い空間でした。近くの商店街も活気があり、とても楽しい時間を過ごしました。
Great place in a cute, laid-back part of Tokyo! Very homey and the host is very accommodating. I recommend trying the traditional breakfast!!
共有スペースをこまめに清掃・整頓してくださり、その合間に挨拶やお話ができる機会がたくさんあるので、安心して滞在できました。他の宿泊客の方々とも自然に会話することができました。手作りの朝食も健康的で、とても美味しかったです。
とても綺麗でおしゃれなゲストハウスです。付かず離れずの距離感も心地よく、リラックスして過ごすことが出来ました。ありがとうございました！
perfect ❤️❤️❤️
非常に素敵なところでした。また機会がありましたら、宿泊したいです。

지내는 동안 행복했습니다. 저는 한국인 여성으로 훌륭한 영어와 간단한 일본어로 소통할 수 있었습니다. 귀여운 강아지 린 군이 있었고 언제나 친절한 호스트 분이 저를 맞이해주셨습니다. 화장실이나 숙소, 공동공간이 늘 무척 청결했고, 좋은 향기가 났고, 공간 인테리어도 훌륭했습니다. 또 도쿄에 온다면 잔잔한 코엔지의 이 곳에 머무르고 싶습니다. 덕분에 정말 즐거운 여행이었습니다.
这次日本之行值得一生去回忆   Minami 酱和阿姨的认真负责让我很感动。 房屋主人是我见过最会经营民宿的房东，设施好用齐全，主要是太干净了！她们会随时打扫房屋，保持整洁，高润寺是我最喜欢东京的一个地方，总之就是完美！

It was my first time staying at a women’s guesthouse and it was a lot of fun! I got to meet a lot of people coming in and out during my stay and being able to chat to them while having dinner was really nice, and it was very nice coming back after a long day and someone greeting me when I went upstairs. The area Grapehouse is has a lot of restaurants and vintage shops which is great way to spend your day! The nearest train station will get you to some of the most popular Tokyo suburbs for tourists which is very convenient!! I’ll definitely recommend Grapehouse if you want to meet new people, thank you for hosting me!!
가격대비 정말 좋았던 게스트 하우스입니다. 여성 전용이라 편안하며, 게스트들끼리 매우 프렌들리한 분위기가 형성되어있습니다. 호스트는 숙소 설명이 매우 친절 했으며, 숙소에는 필요한 모든것이 갖춰져있습니다. 비싸지 않은 가격에 비해 정말 잘 갖춰진 숙소입니다. 동네도 너무 아름답습니다!

Falls du eine entspannte Unterkunft im Großraum Tokio suchst bist du hier genau richtig.
Mit der etwa 7-minütig entfernten JR-Station bist du in wenigen Minuten in Shinjuku und erreichst von dort aus alle möglichen Stadtteile Tokios.
Allerdings musst du gar nicht weit fahren, denn auf dem Weg zur Bahnstation findest du unmengen an Restaurants, Cafés und anderen Geschäften, die bis zum Abend hin sehr belebt sind. Dabei liegt das Hostel auf der anderen Seite der Hauptstraße, weshalb es dort auch abends sehr ruhig ist.
Das Kennenlernen und Zusammenleben mit den anderen Reisenden war extrem entspannt, angenehm und unproblematisch. Du knüpfst schnell Kontakt (wenn du das möchtest), hast aber auch deine Ruhe bei Bedarf.
Gemeinschaftsraum und Küche sind gemütlich und laden zum Zusammensitzen ein. Duschen und Toiletten sind sehr modern und sauber.
Bei meinem nächsten Besuch in Tokio würde ich jederzeit wieder im Grapehouse Koenji übernachten!

Un lugar muy agradable. La anfitriona es súper amable. Nos invitó a Warabimochi una vez. Un bonito detalle. El ambiente es  acogedor. He estado en otros lugares pero en éste ocurre algo que hace que las personas quieran charlar contigo. Muy limpio y confortable.Lo recomiendo!!!

とても清潔で綺麗いな空間でした。
高円寺に来たらまた泊まりたい所です。
The location; Koenji, is nice place to stay. The house is very clean. Also, the price is reasonable for me. You can meet various people and make friends. It’s worth to stay. Thanks~!
게스트하우스가 고엔지 거리를 지나 바로 나오는 주택가에 위치해있기에 즐길거리와 조용함을 둘 다 누릴 수 있다는 장점이 있어요. 숙소로 가는 골목길이 밝아서 밤에도 안전합니다 :) 그리고 깨끗해요. 도미토리여서 욕실이 좁지만 언제나 청결했어요. 덕분에 잘 쉬었습니다.

I loved my stay at GrapeHouse! The hostess was very responsive, friendly, and helpful. The guesthouse was comfortable and extremely clean. Shampoo, conditioner, face wash, tea, and coffee were among the things provided, which was a great touch that made me feel at home. I would definitely stay here again and recommend GrapeHouse to others!
挺好，比想象中好很多，住宿的小伙伴都挺好。

很安静的住宅区，去最近的车站穿过纯情商店街约10分钟脚程，房东很热情，住宿氛围也很好，有来自世界各地的房客，但行程比较匆忙没有太多交流，因为空间不大，夜晚和清晨收拾行李很担心打扰大家休息（建议携带耳塞）
以后有机会还会考虑入住 :)

I’ve never been to a hostel as clean as this one! It’s so easy to make new friends here and you’ll get to meet interesting women from all walks of life. Sanae and her dog were amazing hosts. Shout out to Komei, the cleaning staff, for being such a sweetheart. I stayed here for three weeks and would 100% come back again.

Quartier très sympa. il y a de la place pour les valises. la ligne jr est vraiment proche ainsi que un quartier de friperies que je recommande. l'hôte est bienveillante et très présentes dans la maison. Les autres pensionnaires ont été très amicaux.
Etape très agréable, l'équipe est accueillante et le lieu est calme.

遇到的房客都很热情，房东也很好！🥰
位置距离地铁站不是特别近，需要走大概10分钟，但是可以经过一条有很多餐厅和有意思的小店的街道，想要体验不一样的风土人情的旅客可以选择住在这里！👍
因为这是我第一次使用airbnb所以有一些住宿规则我没有弄懂，给房东和其他房客添麻烦了，不好意思🙇‍♀️

The owner was a sweet lady who even made a New Year Eve's soba for me! Everything was comfy and I felt like at home. The atmosphere is really safe and warm, I highly recommend this place for stay. Thank you!

Grapehouse Koenji is a lovely hostal. The staffs and other travellers are all very nice. The bed and the living room is clean and tidy. They even have a dog which is so cute and friendly. This hostal is close to a commercial street and the JR station Koenji. There is family mart within 1min walking distance. Highly recommended for female travelers!
Gooddd
高円寺を歩いて回るのにすごく助かりました！ゆたんぽまでありがとうございました！
너무 좋았어요! 다음에 또 도쿄 올 일 있으면 여기서 묵고 싶어요! 제가 여기서 이틀만 있다 귀국하게 돼서 너무 아쉬웠어요.  ㅠㅠ 주변에 빈티지 거리 있어서 구경하기도 좋고 역이랑 가까워서 이동하기 좋았어요! 잊지못할 추억 만들어주셔서 감사합니다~
Coziest hostel in a peaceful neighborhood, great place to decompress
可愛舒適的地方～
环境干净整洁，氛围很温馨，认识了来自世界各地的朋友，周边交通方便

非常舒服的一次体验，沟通及时，卫生也很好，下楼就有便利店，很方便。同时也有公共区域供晚归的人处理自己的事情。临走时房东还帮我抬了行李箱，非常感谢！
下次还会再来！
環境乾淨房東人也很好，如果再有下次一人旅行也會選擇這裡！
I had a lovely 2 night stay at Grapehouse Koenji and if I need to stay in Tokyo again I will certainly be returning.
첫 게스트하우스 였음에도 큰 불편없이 지낼 수 있었습니다

I enjoyed my stay, but there was a lot of noise amongst other girls and since there is only 2 toilet and 2 showers and one sink you would have to share with multiple girls that stayed. Also when moving your things around and luggage it was hard since a lot of girls were doing the same things at the same time. It seemed very clutter and it was just a good one time experience but I wouldn't rent again.

i have nothing bad to say about the place. the host is lovely, the house is lovely, the area is lovely, everyone in the dorm was lovely. if you do not mind sleeping in a dorm, or if you are solo travelling and do not want to feel lonely, you will not find a better place.

I enjoyed my stay at the Grapehouse, it's just a shame I wasn't there for when the grapes were in season.  I liked this area, I felt safe and there were heaps of second hand stores which is why I chose to stay here.   Public transport is close and there are a lot of restaurants nearby too.  My host let me leave my luggage all day, which was very helpful!  I definately would stay again.
Very cozy and lovely little hostel in one of my favorite Tokyo neighborhoods. It was good to be back somewhere familiar after 8 years!
非常nice的住宿体验～感谢grape house～

毎回中野に行くのは絶対住んでいたguest houseです。
ホストさんすごく親切し、英語も素晴らしいしです。私たちに毎日おいしい食べ物をくれてありがとうございます！
みんなに大推薦！
超级喜欢这里呀！🥰特别干净整洁，小屋子可漂亮了，布置得很温馨很舒适～房东妈妈可好啦！張也特别好！住在这里的姑娘们都很友好，并且会自觉遵守到点安静的规矩。交通也很便利噢～度过了很快乐的十天，还认识了新朋友～以后有机会还会来的！ここ大好き😍
友達もできてとっても暮らしやすい宿でした！

離高圓寺車站大概10分鐘步行距離，經過的商店街很有日式風情，每天走商店街都覺得氛圍很好，商店街裡面的小杉湯請至少去過1次，非常喜歡！住宿有提供洗衣機可以用，但是沒有烘乾機，可以利用巷口的洗衣房或是去小杉湯時一起洗烘，住宿最多會有12位女生共用一間，這幾天遇到的房客都很友善，公共空間備有小廚房跟冰箱，但是冰箱在住房客滿時會比較擁擠，衛浴設備也很齊全，很貼心還有離子夾。房間在2樓所以行李箱需要搬上去，我的行李箱是29寸的，入住時房東幫忙扛上去，退房時房東外出所以是自己搬下來的，樓梯有點高度所以搬行李箱真的比較辛苦，但是住宿提供免費的行李寄放服務，讓我可以在最後一天好好活動，還有行李秤可以用！最重要的是，房東真的很友善，她很親切並盡可能的提供我協助，非常感謝她提供這麼好的居住空間，白色小狗リンちゃん也很可愛，可惜沒有機會常跟他玩，下次來東京還是會選擇這裡！

I really enjoyed my time at Grapehouse Koenji. our host, Sanae-san, was super kind and even organised a sushi party during the time I was there. The hostel is kept really clean and has overall a homely feeling to it^^ The surrounding area is definitely worth exploring with cute, little shops and good restaurants. I met a lot of amazing people here, so, even though I was travelling on my own, I didn't feel lonely:)
The next time I am going to Tokyo (whenever that may be), I would consider staying at that hostel for sure^^
Everything was excellent. Clean space and very kind host! The stairs are very narrow, so for me it was hard to take my luggage since I had a big one. If you have medium luggage, it is much better.

マスタ非常之優しい
ありがとうごさいました！！！
這裏 乾净、安静
有來自各國的朋友 大家都很友好
推薦我的女性朋友獨自旅行也來這體驗一下🥰
Lovely place, highly recommended
房间干净，周围环境很方便

Es war immer schön sauber und ruihig. Die Gastgeberin hat gut geschaut und immer zurück geschrieben. Alles war so schön eingerichtet. Ich bin zum ersten Mal solo unterwegs und habe mich wie zuhause gefühlt. Sehr empfehlenswert. Es ist such nahe an der Bahn aber trotzdem an einem ruigem Ecken
女性だけのドミトリーで安心して過ごせました。わんちゃんも可愛く癒されました。

I had a great time staying at Grape house in Koenji! While it might not be the most touristic area there are many cafes, bars and vintage shops. I also recommend the breakfast that you can get at the Grape house! And they have the cutest dog🥺 Thank you so much for this beautiful experience!

Der Aufenthalt im Grapehouse war wunderschön! Ich habe mich wie zuhause gefühlt und habe dort tolle Menschen kennenlernen dürfen. Das Haus an sich war sehr süß eingerichtet, es war alles sehr sauber und Sanae-San war eine tolle Gastgeberin. Das Frühstück von ihr kann ich nur empfehlen! Die Lage in Koenji ist ebenfalls toll, weil es kaum Touristen gibt und trotzdem sehr viele Restaurants, Cafés und Geschäfte zum bummeln. Es wäre die Unterkunft die ich jederzeit wählen würde, wenn ich nach Tokyo komme. Danke an Sanae-San für die schöne Zeit 🫶🏼

The host is extremely kind and helpful, even assisting me with carrying my luggage to the second floor🙌 Another host kindly lent me a vacuum to help save space in my luggage😊 I felt very safe here, making it a perfect choice for solo female travelers. All the guests were respectful and friendly🥰and there’s also an adorable, fluffy dog you can play with🐶The location is very convenient, just a 10-15 minute walk to Koenji Station, with plenty of shops, food options, and other things to buy nearby. Unfortunately, I didn’t have much time to meet other travelers or explore the local shops due to my short stay and packed itinerary.

벌써 세 번째 방문입니다! 항상 도쿄에 올 때는 사나에씨의 그레이프 하우스 코엔지에서 묵고 있어요. 친절하시고, 숙소의 위치도 훌륭해서 정말 합리적인 숙소입니다, 추천해요!
이번 여행 때 새해에 복을 많이 받을 예정인지 이런 저런 작은 트러블이 있었는데 그 때 마다 정말 감사하게도 사나에씨께서 도움주셔서 그 점도 정말 감사했습니다ㅎㅎ!
다음에 기회가 있다면 또 그레이프 하우스로 묵으러 올거예요🍀
很舒服的體驗，女性限定的住宿相對安全許多！
とても安全に快適な滞在でした。夜遅くのチェックインになってしまったにも関わらず、ホストがとても優しく対応してくれました。清潔でとても快適に東京滞在できました。ありがとうございます！

This is the coziest Airbnb I have ever stayed in. The space is spacious, and the bed is set up very warmly and is extremely clean. The host even brought hot water bottles in the evening to warm our feet, which was truly thoughtful and touching. There are also two bathrooms, which are more than enough, and the kitchen is available for use. This is a perfect 10/10 stay. I slept really well at night and hope to come again if I have the chance. Thank you!
우선 친절하게 알려주셔서 잘 생활했고 깨끗하고 편했습니다!!

One of the best experiences! The place is spacious, comfortable and very nice, and it is cleaned daily. Everything is very tidy and complete at all times. The service was also excellent, very warm and knowledgeable in giving advice on places to see in Tokyo. I speak little English and Japanese and understanding each other was not a problem at all. The Koenji neighborhood is also amazing, there are shops, cafes and onsen, perfect for walking around, and the nearby train station makes it easy to get to the center. Highly recommended and I plan to return soon!
とても清潔で、快適に過ごすことができました。また、宿泊してる方も素敵で楽しく過ごせました。また泊まりたいです！有難うございました。
I’m definitely coming back… 100% recommend. Such an amazing host, very friendly and speaks English fluently. This being my first time in Tokyo, it felt right at home. 😃

Grapehouse has a great location! It is close to train stations and buses. The owner is very welcoming and every day they make sure it is clean and there is everything the guests need. I had a good experience with the place but the only thing that might make your stay nice or not very nice is sharing the place with other ladies. If you are lucky and they are respectful and conscious all of you are sharing a room then resting will be great but sometimes some girls are not aware or care about it and they open and close the door very hard multiple times past midnight, jump from the bunk bed in the middle of the night to get down instead of using the stairs the bunk bed has, or leave the door open late in the night when others are already sleeping meanwhile they keep chatting with the lights on just 2 meters from the beds. If you are not picky about sleeping with noise, movement, or light then it is gonna be ok.

Honestly quite possibly my favorite stay in Japan. I was hesitant about the hostel type environment, as I’m used to solo travel and lots of alone time, but grapehouse koenji is really special. The location is perfect, the women were wonderful, respectful and quiet. The dormitory was cozy, and there was common space to stretch, do yoga and have breakfast. The owner is lovely and kind, and the resident dog was adorable. I will absolutely be staying again.
リッチも雰囲気も最高でした！
很棒
A great stay, location was well connected and had plenty to do around, the hostel was clean, the hosts were great, and it was always extremely clean.
这是我第一次住青旅，很幸运碰到了非常亲切的房东和干净整洁又温馨的房子，交通便利并且环境很安静～非常满意，我已经计划下一次来东京的时候再次入住这里❤️❤️
とても清潔で明るい雰囲気で、洗面所やシャワー室なども共用ですが使いやすかったです。商店街まで近いロケーションも良かったです。また機会あれば利用したいと思います！
房主很温柔也很照顾我，另外住宿方面也很干净卫生。推荐推荐
第二次入住了，已经把这里当成了在东京得第二个家，也因为这里爱上了东京，koenji 是日本最喜欢的地方，在这里也是一生中美好得时光🥰🥰安静整洁，遇到了最会经营民宿的房东，一切井然有序

事前チェックインを忘れてしまったのですが、分かりやすく説明して下さいましたし、チェックアウトも好きなタイミングで出ていけるし、駅からほぼ直進分かりやすい立地や直ぐにコンビニやドラッグストアも選べて、ゲストに対するホスピタリティーも大満足でした。
私は日本人ですが、国、年齢、職業、それぞれ違いますがステキな笑顔が繋がる空間でした！1人旅に不安がある方にも年齢問わずオススメです！

This was my best find in Tokyo. Peaceful and safe neighbourhood and walkable distance from the koenji station ~ 8 minutes and koenji pal shopping street. I thought I would go for just an hour and didn’t realise it’s been 3 hours and I wasn’t even halfway through the street.
The hostel was amazing—just perfect. The host was super friendly and helped me get my suitcase upstairs and explained EVERYTHING. The place was super clean and you could come back anytime. They had umbrellas you could borrow, prepare dishes there and whatever you could image. 10/10 would recommend.

I stayed 4 nights with 3 friends of mine in Shinjuku guesthouse this August-September. Min and his brother were one of the greatest hosts we've ever met. They helped us with every question we had and also helped to take care of one of us who unfortunately got sick during the trip. The rooms are spacious and clean. We loved sleeping on futons and tatami. The apartment is brand new and is located close to Shinjuku station which is basically the centre. It has free and fast wifi, a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine and also a terrace. If you stay there, don't forget to use the fire escape stairs and go to the rooftop. We enjoyed many talks up there. :) If I would go back to Tokyo I would definetely love to stay there again and would recommend this place for any traveler.

Min was for me the best host I ever had. I consider him like a friend now.
He came to pick me at the subway station when I arrived and give me a lot of advice about what to do in Japon. We speak a lot together. He is really interesting guy and he is really present during and after my stay by his appartement.
I have actually faced some big allergical reaction during the end of my trip in Japan, outside of tokyo.Despite I found no help or medical care in Nagoya I decided to go to ER in Tokyo. I had no reservation anywhere so he has let me come to his place and have take care of me after my hospitalisation without asking anything.
Min is a great host and such a good person. I'm realy happy and lucky to have meet him.
thanks again for everythings

Bonjour à tous !
Nous sommes resté 7 jours au sein de "Shinjuku Guesthouse" avec mon groupe de musique et nous avons passé un très bonne semaine.
L'appartement est bien placé (pas loin du centre ville de Shinjuku avec beaucoup de commerces à proximité), propre et plutôt fonctionnel... Nous avons également cohabité avec d'autres personnes et l'ambiance était très bonne !
Mention spéciale à Min (l'hôte) qui a été formidable, toujours là pour nous conseiller, discuter et nous faire rencontrer du monde en fonction de nos affinités.

Un très bon rapport qualité/prix que je vous conseille vivement !

Eric

Min was such a wonderful and gracious host! He accomodated me and my friend in every way and I can now consider him a friend. I can definitely say that if I ever return to Japan, I'll be staying with Min.
It was very nice to stay at this guest house. Great location, great view. Min, the host is the best of all! He made this guest house feels like one big happy family!

A great place to stay!  The nearest metro station is just one minute away.  Tons of restaurants and grocery stores nearby.  The place is clean, full of light and very pleasant!  I am not sure if it was purposeful or luck, but my room-mates were all same-gender.  The kitchen / living room was a nice place to gather with other guests in the evening and Min was a very generous host.  A really pleasant experience!  I would stay there again for sure!

We stayed 2 nights at Min's place and really appreciated. The location is perfect, close to the subway and the main JR line.
We were with many other people in the appartment and that was really interesting to talk with them over a drink or a dinner at night.
I highly recommend this place.
very nice and gentle host. had a very nice and talkative evening together with some fellow koreans, fun it was!

Min is very kind and easy going.
Location is perfect, very near to supermarkets.
Looking forward to visit again, without brining children. :)

신주쿠 게스트 하우스에서 정말 즐거운 시간 보내고 갑니다. 좋은 사람들도 많이 만나고 아져씨가 잘 해주셔서 정말 감사했습니다. 잊지못할 몇가지 에피소드가 있었지만 대체적으로 만족합니다. 기회가 된다면 꼭 다시 방문하고 싶습니다.

I had great time in Shinjuku guesthouse. I mat other country guys and spand time with them. If I will visit again in tokyo, I want to stay here ond more time. Thank you min and bless you.

Love the room in the house! The view from the 8th floor is amazing! Min is a very nice host. We love talking with him. He is also very helpful, we were once need his help at 10pm and he came right away! Would certainly recommend him to everyone! The apartment is very close to metro station, convenience store, lots of little shops for us to find food!

新宿区 was a great place to stay an Min was an excellent host.  The location was great also, right by Shinjuku and Shibuya.  Min was there to help with any questions we had and also to give us some recommendations.  Would recommend this lodge to anyone traveling through Tokyo on a budget

Staying at Min's guesthouse was a nice experience. Min is a great host that's checks up on things personally making sure all is according to your wishes. I would definitely stay again at his place when I return to Tokyo. Samuel
cool
Min was a great host, very accommodating.  He also responds very quickly to inquiries.

Min takes a personal interest in everyone who visits, and so it has a homely feel, even though there are a few visitors. At night, Min's hospitality makes everyone feel comfortable to sit around and chat. The location is great. Very close to the nearest Tokyo subway, and lots of supermarkets around 24/7. And a nice view from the 10th floor. Highly recommended.

I'm really glad that i stayed at Min's Guesthouse, the location is great, 15~min. walking from Shinjuku station, many restaurants, markets you can have anything you need, and Koreatown is just a few blocks.
The Guesthouse is really clean, and you have the feel that you are in your own place, as a guesthouse you also can make a lot of friends.
Min is an awesome host, he will help you in all your needs, and also a great company for drinking hehe
i'm sure to stay here again, See you next time Min !!!

We had a really great time staying at Min's place! Its perfectly located,it has easy access to train stations and main attractions in the city. Min is a great host too! Will definitely come back here on my future trips to Shinjuku
Very friendly and very helpful! Really enjoyed my stay!
Min you are a great host, I enjoyed my time staying at your place.  I would recommend to friends and hopefully be back soon.

We were a group of 18 people. Min arranged the locations in order for all to be together, which is not an easy thing in Tokyo. All along our stay, Min was very kind, friendly and very helpful with us. He was present on a daily basis to clean the flat. The flat is very well placed in Tokyo, near Shinjuku JR station and 2 metro lines stations (Line E and F). To summarize, you will be very well welcomed by Min in his Guest House. You can plan to book his guest house without any apprehension.

I was in Tokyo to visit the city and practice Aikido.
The position of the ShareHouse was ideal for me: 3 min walk from a metro station and 15 min walk from the Hombu Dojo to practice Aikido. No problem to find food: a lot of restaurants and markets in the street. A 7 eleven is useful to withdraw cash.
A lot of young people were sharing a large triplex: you can meet a lot of nationality and cultures! Of course you are sharing space too. Sometimes sleeping is more difficult because of Sharehouse activities and of the noisy street.
I recommend this room if you are young, do not come to sleep and/or if you are a group (from 2 to 10 or more...).
The Guest Min is very helpful and friendly. Washmachine is available as well as everything to cook.

Min was a fantastic host and has a skill bringing people together. I stayed for several days at his guesthouse and met a dozen interesting and lovely people. The place is clean and the view gorgeous. Especially the rooftop is an eyecandy. The area is convenient and interesting as well.
Whenever I get back to Tokyo, this will be the place to stay.

Great location! Only 3mins walk to higashi shinjuku station. There is 2 Japanese supermarket below the apartment. 24ht sushi restaurant just nearby as well. Very suitable for BACKPACKERs.
One thing not very good is that there is only 1 bathroom, so you got wait awhile if someone is using it. Other than that, all is good!
I stayed in the share house for two nights and had a great time. All of the things that were needed were met. I also had the opportunity to meet other people from around the globe which is great.

I had a good time at the Shinjuku guesthouse. It's centrally located, a close walk to Shinjuku station. There is a good 24 hour supermarket downstairs and the view is cool. Min is a good host with some good tips about the neighborhood.
Estupendo lugar en Shinjuku. Cerca de toda la diversión de la zona. Excelente anfitrión y otros huéspedes amables. Lo pasé muy bien.

I like to separate my review into categories so here goes

A) About the apartment
1) The location is very convenient. Just 200 meters from the Higashi-Shinjuku subway station.
2) The rooms are reasonably sized and good enough for 2-3 people.
3) There are some excellent places to eat in a 200 meters radius like an amazing sushi place, very good curry soup joint (a Hokkaido speciality) and a very good japanese style barbecue place.

B) About the host (Ming)
1) Very nice and helpful
2) Tries to accommodate requests
3) He gave us a special discount as my friend was leaving early and so that I don't have to pay for the entire room for 1 day
4) The room we got initially was quite small for 2 people and so he shifted us to another room as soon as it was available
5) He will also be happy to take you around and tries to keep guests informed about events around the area.

Things to be careful about
1) Tokyo is very hot. Try to make sure that during summers you do NOT get a room on the top floor (pent house)
2) The things that upset me most was the inadequate number of bathrooms and toilets. There was just 1 bathroom between 9+ people and 2 toilets.
3) Because of the high number of people using these spaces sometimes they are not clean (especially the bathroom)

Overall the place is good if you are on a tight budget. The location is very convenient.
I give this place 3.8 stars (I had to give 4)

Min is a very nice and friendly guy. His appartment is very clean and very nice place, especially the location, just 5-10mins walk to the Shinjuku station.
It is just a pity that we only stayed in there for 1 night. Next time to Tokyo, I must go back again and stay longer.

Shinjuku Sharehouse honestly made my experience in Tokyo. The Sharehouse itself is easily accessible and a 2 minute walk from Higashi-Shinjuku station which makes it convenient to travel to the main sites of Tokyo. My tatami room was clean, spacious, and comfortable. Bathrooms were clean. The kitchen serves as the lounge area, where it's impossible not to meet everybody and make friends. This is the to-go place if you're looking to meet new global friends, stay at a conveniently-located place, and have an amazing host!!! Min, we love you.

I had a wonderful experience staying at Min's guesthouse. He was so friendly and i feel so safe staying on his place. Ive met interesting people, had a drink and it was fun! Room is clean, place is accessible. Lots of restaurants and stores nearby. I just love the friendly environment there.
Will definitely stay there if i ever i visit Tokyo again. Kampai!!

Min is a super guy and really made my trip to Japan. I stayed in the private room for a few nights because it was the first time I had stayed in a share house and felt like I wanted privacy, but after a few days switched to the shred rooms because I felt so comfortable. It really is a great place and so close to everything. Min went out of his way to make my stay comfortable and answered any questions I had about the area or even life in Japan. I feel like Min is the perfect example of an AirBnB host... there enough to make your feel welcome and even invite you for dinner, but still give you all the privacy you want to enjoy your time. I will definitely be back to Tokyo and plan on spending more time at Shinjuku Sharehouse.

Everything said here before was true. Min is an amazing host. He'll take you out to eat, drink (more than you can imagine :) ), will show you around if you need anything else. You can't ask for a better location than that. Tons of places walking distance (especially Golden Gai!), and only few stations from other major areas of the cities.

Place is very clean, you can cook if you'd like, use the fridge, washer is available. It was the perfect place for me during my trip. Will definitely stay there again the next time I'm in Tokyo.

Min was a great a host. he gave me all the information to easily find the place and waited for me to explain everything about the house. he was helpfull and very communicative. even more he often goes out to drink/have dinner with the guests! The house is in a convenient location, just couple of minutes from the metro. the apartament was really clean and had everything you could need (towels, hair drier, wifi, ..). my room was great (big, sunny and with balcony). I definitely recommend you to stay at the Shinjuku Sharehouse! it's a great place where you can meet cool people from all over the world.
Great host who is very accommodating. Amazing location with easy access to food, transport and entertainment. Nice and clean rooms with fresh linen.

The location of the guesthouse is extremely convenient, as I soon realised how easy is to access multiple Tokyo metro lines from the place. The room itself was clean and well-lit with an access to a small balcony. I came off season so there were not many guests staying. Thus, there were not any issues accessing the only shower in the guesthouse.

Min is an extremely responsive host with a really cheerful personality. He gave me some useful tips and I only wished we worked our schedules out to grab a drink together. Perhaps next time!

My stay with Min Min was a great experience and I would highly recommend it to anyone staying in Tokyo.  He was very welcoming and had great suggestions on places to see and where to eat.  The location was perfect for me and it was a great start to my trip.  Next time I am in Tokyo this is where I will be staying.
Clean, good neighbourhood, good price, Min is great to be around. Perfect!

Min was an excellent host. The place was in a convenient location close to the metro line and the core area of Shinjuku. Min was extremely helpful in making me feel at home. I wish I could've stayed longer and explored the local area!
Min was super helpful and friendly, and his apartment was clean and in a very central location. A great way to start our journey in Japan!

We had a great stay at Shinjuku Sharehouse. Min is a wonderful host. We didn't get the directions quite right and it was raining and he contacted us by txt and met us with an umbrella! (he has since improved the directions) That is service!

The accommodations are very much Ryokan/Japanse style -- small room with futon and shared bath -- very comfortable, if you are used to this style. There is a shared lounge/kitchen space that overlooks the city. Lovely sun comes in in the morning. We got lucky and were the only ones staying at the time, so it was like our own place. But usually you will find other guests which is nice and social.

Min is an interersting guy to talk to and you should spend an hour or two if you get the chance.

The location is convenient to lots of restaurants and the Higashi-Shinjuku train stop.
Awesome , easy going and friendly host, nice place as well. All will like it. Will definitely be returning!

Tokyo is amazing，of course including the place where I live! Min's apartment is traditional Japanese designed style. Not very big but everything included in there. If you like Tatami thing, this is the right place for you to choose: ) Convient for you to go to Shinjuku Station central shopping place.

In a nutshell: Awesome! I can recommend it without any doubts.
This is what every AirBnb experience should be like.

*The sharehouse:
Great location, 2-3 min walk from Higashi shinjuku metro station which is beside a nice coffee shop to get your morning started. There are several 24/7 stores on the same street. I rented a private room with a balcony on the 10th floor, the room was clean and Min made sure I had everything I needed. There is also a very nice common area, with a kitchen, tv, table, balcony - a pleasant place to hang out and meet other guests.

*The host:
In my opinion the best part of this experience. Min is the perfect Airbnb host you could only imagine. He really looks after his guests, and he's simply a really cool guy.

A couple of examples from my stay:

-First of all, my flight was delayed. Min waited for me at the sharehouse till 01:00 at night and greeted me with a smile and explained everything I needed to know.

-When Tokyo unexpectedly got cold in the beginning of April, Min came in and gave everybody remote controls for personolized heaters, just in case we are cold.

-I didn't expect bad weather so I didn't have any warm jacket with me. When I got really cold during a walk, I came back to the house and asked Min what is a good place to buy a jacket. What did Min do? His first response was - "Take my jacket". Yes, he lent me his own jacket, although he didn't have another one for himself!

-The last day he invited me to lunch and we had a good talk and laugh.

To summarize - It was the perfect choice to book this guesthouse. If I'm in Tokyo again, this is where I'm staying.

The shinjuku guesthouse is a terrific place to stay in Tokyo. It's location is very convenient and the place is clean. You are just a short walk to both the shinjuku station and the golden gai.
There are always guests to meet, which makes the guesthouse a great place to stay.
Min is terrific host. He was incredibly helpful and even took us to a few great places.
Min Min was very helpful, and gave many good suggestions for where to go in the Shinjuku area. Great view!

At this place I felt like at home. Really. Clean, simple and comfortable rooms, good background, perfect location (I like Shinjuku very much) and marvelous night views. Good restaurants, bars and shops are just around a corner...
At this guesthouse I have met lonely nomads like me as well as groups of 9 tourists. And everything was handled smooth and everyone satisfied.
The place is run by Min, who is such a great host! Easygoing, helpful and charming. If you are a traveler and Shinjuku is your destination, consider staying in his guesthouse.
정말 친절하시고 편안한 출장이였습니다. 다음 출장 때 또 뵙겠습니다.
We had a great stay at Min's b&b! The location is perfect, near to the metro and to the Tokyo nightlife! Min is a perfect host, the place is clean and he help us for everything we need!

I really enjoyed staying here. The location was great, walking distance to shinjuiki. The place was very clean and well kept. We had a blast hanging out with other people who stayed here. I found the place quiet enough to sleep. Min was great very friendly person. He helped me send my luggage ahead through a service and I very appreciated that. For the combination of location, amenities you really can't beat it at this price.

Min's place is an example of people who take their Airbnb hosting seriously. Occupying the top 3 floors of a very conveniently located building in Shinjuku, the large expanse of glass windows gives the place an open feel and a a nice view of the city streets.  Min lives elsewhere, but comes in to clean every morning and to meet new arrivals.  He's a great guy, friendly, personable, and with excellent command of English (and, I would assume, Japanese and Korean, though I didn't try those).  The unit is well stocked with guest essentials (and more towels than one could easily count), the wifi connection is great, and the in-room A/C was strong (and a welcome retreat from the hot Tokyo summer).  I'm glad I stayed there, and would do so again next time I visit the city.

Min's the best! Was more than accommodating. Gave specific directions from Narita and even met us at Shin-Okubo Station to help us back to the sharehouse. Showed us the area and we had a great time. Everyone else staying there was super cool too and we made lots of friends. Not only was it my first time in Japan, it was my first time out of country and I couldn't have felt more at home. There's a lot to do in the area and it is extremely easy to get around to any of the major areas in Tokyo. This place was so much fun I'm actually only on the airbnb website right now to book it again! Highly recommend!

I would like to say with all the positive reviews about this host is ALL TRUE because it was a fantastic experience. It was my first time visiting Japan and also my first time visiting japan by myself. Min provided me with FULL directions and CLEAR instructions on how to get to the "Shinjuku share house" by public transport from the central of Tokyo which was clear and simple (one route takes about 10 mins from central Shinjuku by train). As i was not great with directions and it being my first time, Min had kept in contact with me all the way and made sure i found my way to the right area. As i walked into the apartment complex i was greeted by the lovely Min which not long after a nice introduction, i felt very comfortable. After a quick rest, Min then showed me around the complex, where everything was, bathrooms, toilets etc. then showed me to the rooms i was staying in (Shared a room for  3 nights - then a private room for 4 nights) which was all clear and simple - Nothing much to it at all! :). The location is very close to anything and everything in Shinjuku and everything is a walk-able distance - you could walk for about 15 mins and end up in the next city, it was amazing. Train stations were very close too, one which is about 5-10 min walk and another in central Shinjuku which will take no longer than 15 mins walk but time flies when you're observing the area and exploring that you would not even notice the time. You will never get bored with this city. Over the 7 nights in total i have stayed at the "Shinjuku Share house" i felt at the end it was like my second home. Min was very friendly and he took a couple of us for a night out just to get to know us as he likes to discover different cultures around the world. Min is very good at taking care of his guests; including myself - always a guy that is has a happy "HELLO" in the morning which was pleasing. The Shinjuku share house is well maintained.
