Min comes in every morning to clean - as reviews have stated on here but will not intrude in your personal area. The cleaning is done in the main kitchen, bathroom and toilet area. Overall, i could not ask for a better host. It is a great way for solo travelers that come to Japan to get to know other internationals travelling and maybe happy to share their Japan experiences together as i have. I came to Japan by myself, not knowing anyone and had left Japan back home with a bunch of great friends i met from around the world, including Min. I will definitely come back soon and stay here again!!! Thanks again Min!!

Stayed for 4 days and had a great time in tokyo. Apartment great location for shinjuku nitelife/station and for Aikido hombu dojo if you train..met some good guys and gals who celebrated my birthday with me in local golden gai bars...
Min and Haru great hosts- very welcoming! They even got me a gift!
Would stay there again !

Cheers(kampai!)
Jason

Excellent location and nice tatami room. Min's wife let me after a late flight, showed me how everything worked and where everything was. Convenient having a kitchen and washing machine and good value for money. Good having various ways to contact Min and easy directions.

For independent travellers to Japan this is an excellent way to meet with fellow travellers & enjoy Tokyo ...
Clean. We'll run. Good value for money.
G8 location with JR train & subway close by & all Shinjuku @ doorstep
The flavour of guesthouse changes daily with the arrival & departures of new travellers so expect some raucous nights but overall a Great vibe & one I look forward to return visit
clean place. nice host. convenient location. no complaints!

Min is a great Host & excellent location!  Close to metro and wonderful lifely neighbourhood, lots of delicious restaurants close by and shopping area not far. The room is quiet and very zen - we loved it and will come back!

Min gave me a very nice welcome and he even waited 45 minutes longer than our original appointment, because I kind of got a bit lost in Tokyos big subway system. His place and everything that comes with it is highly recommendable. Thanks Min! :-)

What a great time I had! the host was fantastic he went above and beyond to provide me with more than just a room he provides a great atmosphere for those who wish to be social. Just a great experience. The host speaks great English.the host also multilingual and embraced the diverse nationalities that were staying everyone that I spoke to said they will return.... I know I will!!! Also very close to the best eateries around and the host knows the city very well and will help point you in the right direction when you explain your interests. One last thing it's very clean and has all the facilities needed!!!
Min was amazing and the place is very comfy. I stayed in a private room and had no issues at all and would totally stay again! Very well located.

I loved staying at Min's! The location is great (as a female solo traveller, it's safe, and it leads to the heart of Shinjuku within 10 mins) and he's been nothing but kind and helpful :) I really felt like home - it had everything (including soju which he offered).

He provided me with tons of photos of the room and the house (pretty cool place!) way before I arrived. Would definitely recommend the place to my friends :)

Min (the host) did his utmost to help me get to the location by sending me photos on whatsapp and being available around the clock to respond. The address was very well described and easy to reach.
Not the fanciest of the buildings, but the house is on the 6th or 9th floor thus offering some view on Shinjuku. You directly feel the warm welcome of Min when you step in and you connect with other fellow travelers. A cosy, clean place with shared living room and dining table and bathroom/showers. Whether you are traveling solo or with friends, this is a great option since you will be located in one the most buzzing areas of Tokyo. Need to know more, ping Min! :)

This was my second stay at min's Shinjuku guesthouse and as expected i had a fantastic time. There are truly many things to like about staying at Min's guesthouse including the option of a single room in a Tokyo style flat, meeting fellow travellers from all over the world, great location, clean flats, etc.... Most of all, Min truly makes staying in Tokyo a welcoming experience. Thanks Min!

Highly recommended!!!

The sharehouse was easy to find with the instruction sent beforehand. I got the tatami room, which is really spacious. The rest of the flat is clean, convenient, the bathroom is not a problem (I never had to wait, as other guests used it at various times of the day), Min - a very nice and interesting man - is here to check if everything is going well. I could meet some cool people, in a relaxed atmosphere. The closeness to Shinjuku makes the sharehouse a very convenient place if you want to wander in or around Tokyo.

Highly recommended, very comfortable large private rooms. All the guests were friendly, it was great to meet people from all around the world. Close to all the action in Shinjuku to. Min is a great host.
fuss free and near shinjuku city centre

My stay at Min's shinjuku guesthouse was amazing! The guesthouse is perfectly located, with a great view from the roof top, very good accommodations and a welcoming living room. Moreover Min is an awesome host, very friendly, kind and open-minded, it was great to spend time with him. If you ever come to Tokyo that's the place you have to stay!

Great stay at Min's guesthouse. He's super nice, very responsive and makes you feel at home. The place is very clean, heaters in the room and shared toilets (one downstairs one upstairs) and shared shower room. Common area is great for cooking or socializing with other guests. Very Japanese style house with pretty much no furniture in the room and thin futon on the floor.  I found it comfortable. Very minimalist which is what you should probably expect in Japan. Location is great, only 10-20 mins to main Shinjuku area. Few minutes to subway. Grocery stores nearby within few minutes. Overall great stay, lots of fun and interesting people to meet.

Staying with Min was amazing. Such a great, lovely and helpful guy in an awesome location. I would absolutely recommend staying with him if you get the opportunity. We shared beers and an awesome dinner too. He's always on hand for questions and tips. There are always cool other people in his place too. Thanks Min. See you again for sure ☺️
clean and the place is in the best location of tokyo near subway and walk only 15 min to shopping area. Min is very nice guy, quick responded to my question, and is very open to everyone

2nd time staying was s blast as usual. Best of all, Min is busy revamping the house , constantly improving it to give his guests the most comfortable experience. There will definitely be a third time for me when I am in Tokyo

Min sent me all the information on how to get there before I arrived. We kept in contact as my visit came nearer and he was there to greet me when I finally arrived. I stayed in one of the downstairs tatami rooms and it was big and clean. Bathroom, shower and laundry facilities all worked fine. It's a 10 minute walk from Shin Okubo station which is handy, remember that Tokyo is very, very big! Close proximity to Kabukicho (robot restaurant, Golden Gai, shops, restaurants, etc).

I had such a great time with Min and some other guests. Min is an amazing host very helpful and accommodating.
I will definitely come back to Mins place.
Min I will miss you.

Min is a great host!! His place is very convenient to higashu Shinjuku subway station. The room was clean, tidy and cosy. Min gave us some great tips, and it was nice to sit, have a chat and share a beer at the end of the day. Highly recommend to anyone visiting Tokyo!!

Min's Shared house can easily be located, it is very near the Shinjuku station, Oedo Line and very near to shops, supermarket and restaurants.

Min is very helpful and kind, he welcomed me on the day that I arrived on his place. He provided me 2 futons even I didn't ask for it. He just want to make sure that I am comfortable during my stay.

The place is very neat, simple, clean and cute. All basic needs are provided.

I will also recommend this place for solo female travelers.

Min and his sharehouse is a perfect setting close enough to the bustling Shinjuku, yet a calm space overlooking a mostly locals neighborhood. Everything a traveler could ever want.
Clean, comfortable and with friendly faces. Will definitely miss decompressing over tea on the balcony.
A convenient travelers stay with large basic rooms in Shinjuku. Thanks for helping me keep calm (ish) during the earthquake Min.

Min, is awesome all ways care about you the place clean and nice ;-).
Thanks for all

I had a great stay at Shinjuku Sharehouse. The guesthouse was clean and a great mix between traditional and modern in the midst of Shinjuku. The common area made it easy to meet other travelers as well. Min was friendly and spent time getting to know his guests. He was responsive to all questions as well. The location was great too- close to many subway lines and close to the main Shinjuku area (restaurants and entertainment) but still quiet. Also, the rooftop was incredible! Thank you Min!

Min's place is what airbnb experience stands for: Fun-loving host who loves to meet people all around the world, No frills accommodation but has everything you need and an Out-of-the-world rooftop that allows us (guests) to mingle & chilled out after a long day of walking.

I realized many of the guests are repeated "customer" who have stayed multiple times with Min, which explains the wonderful experience.

As a host, Min is also very responsive to your questions over whatsapp and feel free to ask him for gudiance on moving around the city.

Location is just 5 mins walk from Higashi-shinjuku station with marts around.

It is indeed a nice place to stay, I found the room cozy and the bed comfortable. The hosts and the people were very nice and I am satisfied with the decision I made to choose this hostel.
Despite it was a bit difficult for me to find the entrance probably it was because the heavy rain. Other than that the location is convenient.

Min is welcoming and takes an active interest in the well being of his  guests. He provided helpful tips to visiting Tokyo, and often organized evenings on the roof terrace, which was a definite bonus.
Loved the location and how clean the place was! Amazing view too! Would stay there again!
Very handy and central location, the tatami mats are a bit thin but after a big night in Tokyo you won't notice. I had a lovely time here and would return again

Min is a good keeper and this is my 5 time in his hostel, Min is friendly and treat everyone so nice. I highly recommend Min to my friends and everyone. Wish all of you have a good experience in Min's hostel. Cheer.

I'm a big fan of Min's Shinjuku Sharehouse! This was my third stag there in the last 3 years. Min is an incredible host providing a welcoming and highly enjoyable environment.   Also the share house is very well situated on two key metro lines. It is very close to golden gai and shinjuku with a fantastic sushi restaurant just a couple doors away! Highly recommended! !!

I had a fantastic time at Min's place. He made me feel very welcome and I enjoyed interacting with him and the other guests. Min makes a huge effort with all of the guests, which I was grateful for. The rooms are clean and comfortable with all mentioned amenities available. The location is exceptional and everything you need is available at all hours. If you want a real taste of Tokyo I would recommend Min's place to anyone.
호스트분 엄청 친절하세요 숙소도 깔끔해서 좋았습니다. 나중에 또 가야겠네요. 잘 쉬다 갑니다~!

I had a fantastic second half to my stay in Japan at Min's place. Min and Haru made me feel very welcome on both of my stays. The area is fantastic, as it is close-by to so many things and there's lots to do at any time of day. The share house is exactly as listed, if not better. I enjoyed my time at Min's place and will definitely be back again.
It was a fantastic experience. I would definitely stay here again.
Great place to stay. Host is awsome and very helpful. Great place to stay if visting tokyo.

Min is so nice and really helpful when you have any queries. The location is so convenient for guest. Min also link up other guest to hold a party. It was unforgettable experience. I will come back again if I go to Tokyo
Min's place is very close to the town, modern, clean, private with a very reasonable price. I normally hardly recommend any residences but Min's place! Come come!

It is my first airbnb experience and I love it.
Min is a very helpful and socialable host, we had a party on the day I arrived with the food he made .. and of cause beer and chips.

Min's place in shinjuku is fantastic. Perfect location, and very affordable for the quality. I had the private room and was very happy with the whole experience. Would highly recommend it to anyone looking to stay in the area.

Fabulous location! Min and Haru are fantastic hosts. They speak fabulous English, are very easy to approach and talk with, and have been very hospitable. The building is located closest to the Tokyo Metro station Higashi-Shinjuku, and is also within a short walking distance to the Yamanote line Shin-Ōkubo Station. Amazing place in shinjuku, highly recommended!
The apartment is situated between shin-okubo Station and shinjuku Station, so you get to see places in Tokyo pretty easily. Room was clean, comfortable and very spacious. All facilities were in good and clean condition. It was even possible to wash your laundry and shampoo/ soap were included with the shower room - nice!
Min gave me a warm welcome and told me some personal recommendations about things to do around Tokyo. Also, he invited me for barbecue on the rooftop, which was amazing. Min is very friendly, helpful and open-minded, I enjoyed talking with him about various topics.
Without a doubt, one of the best places to stay for exploring Tokyo. Thanks Min!

Min was a great host during my entire stay. Very friendly and funny guy. He's available if ever you need to ask him something, he's gonna reply fast. I had a great stay among the roommates I had the pleasure to meet. The location is also very convenient and central, which makes travelling around easier. I recommend to stay at Min's place to anyone looking for a great place in Tokyo.
房东是韩国人，太太是日本人。所以交流的话英文日文都没问题。很热情，有机会再来东京的话还住这里

Min's Sharehouse in Shinjuku is the best airbnb I could imahe in Tokyo! I was there  already three times and everytime it was just perfect. It has the perfect location to visit the most important spots in Tokyo and everything is very easy and fast to reach from there. The Sharehouse is the perfect place to meet many new friends - travellers as well as locals! Moreover, in this place you can have the perfectly authentic japan experience with tatami bed and very nice art pieces and decoration. Min is always very helpfull and very interactive to his guests and I could not image a better place to stay in Tokyo no matter if it is your first visit of Japan or you just return because you felt in love with Japan (just like I did!). Thank you Min and I'll see you as soon as possible my friend!
My 3rd time staying with Min. Great value, and great combination of private room plus friendliness and camaraderie of a guest house. Will definitely be back again.

This is my 3rd time staying at Min and Haru place. Min really goes the extra mile to make sure he is there for check-in to greet you. Both him and Haru are lovely and lots of fun to hang out with! The place is very clean and there are lots of nice touches to make you feel at home!

Min was an amazing host - there to help check in, very friendly and hospitable. The location in Shinjuku was perfect, and the room spacious, comfortable and clean. Would stay again when in Tokyo, Highly recommend!

Min is a very nice guy and the sharing house gave me a brand new experience!It is convenient  to go anywhere you want in Tokyo.Last night 's party was so wonderful .If I have a chance I will be back again!

Min and Haru are great and friendly hosts! It was also great to be able to hang out in the common area (or on the rooftop) with the hosts and other guests. It was very convenient to be able to wash my clothes at the place as well. One thing other travellers should consider is that there is only one shower, so it can potentially get congested in the morning. I was usually up before everyone else so it was never a problem for me.

As someone who's phone is wifi based, I was really appreciative that Min came to my location and walked with me to the sharehouse apartment. I couldn't find the place so I stopped at a free wifi spot near the location and he contacted me very quickly. They communicate really well! That means a lot to me. The other guests that stayed there, were very nice as well. We had a small get together on Friday. That was fun. I had no problems staying there with my girlfriend. The location is very close to a local train station. It was easy getting around to other major spots around Tokyo. Also, Golden Gai is walking distance (10 minutes). I will stay here the next time I head to Shinjuku. They were great Hosts.

숙소는 여러층으로 되어있습니다. 합하면 은근히 방이 많은 편이라 전 세계의 다양한 게스트를 볼 수 있었어요. 숙소는 게스트하우스의 역사가 느껴지는 아기자기한 인테리어에 햇빛이 잘들고 아주 청결하며 라운지공간에서는 맥주 한 잔 하거나 간단한 식사를 챙기기 매우 좋았어요. 운좋게 4인실숙소를 혼자 예약하여 넓은 다다미방에서 아주 잘 잤습니다. 기타로는... 치약, 수건, 드라이기 등이 구비되어 있었고 사용하지는 않았지만 욕조도 있습니다. 건물의 위치는 찾기 편리하고 주변은 한인타운이 인접해있습니다.

I really enjoyed staying here, it was very close to the subway and i could walk to the main Shinjuku area. The room was very clean, spacious, and comfortable. The hosts were very attentive and i would certainly recommend it.
도심속인데도 조용해요
非常感谢房主的招待，全程很舒适像是在自己的家里！下次还会再来！
Min & Haru are really nice people, the communication with Min was always fast and easy. The guesthouse is clean and not far from Shinjuku station, so perfect location. We would stay there again!
Min was a great host and he was very down to earth! Wouldn’t mind staying here again. The place is clean with an artistic touch.

For me everything was perfect about Shinjuku Sharehouse: The directions were accurate, I had no problems finding it and Min waited for me to check in. My room was spacious, everything is clean, the common area is great and the rooftop is just awesome. The location itself is very convenient. There are shops and restaurants super close by and it's a 5-10 minutes walk to Kabukicho and Shinjuku Station.
Travelling alone for the first time, I surely came to the right guesthouse. Min was a great host and I met a lot of other great people from around the world. I had the best time at Min & Haru's place! I will definitely come back!!

We had a great stay at Min and Haru's. Everything about our stay went off without a hitch and we enjoyed having a few beers with Min and some other guests on the fantastic rooftop. Location is a 5 minute walk from the bars of Golden Gai and 10-15 min walk from Shinjuku itself. A great spot.

I think it’s the best place in Tokyo!
Always clean and comfortable!
Min & Haru are so kind and helpful, it’s like being at home no matter the distance from your country, truly recommended!

Had a lovely stay at Min & Haru's sharehouse. It's very well located (5 min walk from subway stations, 10 min walk from JR station, right next to all the action in Shinjuku). The house is clean, well decorated and cute with a fun common area and even rooftop access. Our room was a lot bigger than we expected, especially for Shinjuku/Tokyo standards. Min was friendly, helpful, and a great host. Definitely recommend!

2 semaines impeccables !
Très proche de la gare de Shinjuku, permet d’accéder à de nombreuses lignes de métro. Supermarchés à proximité avec tous à disposition.
Min est super accueillant, conseils pratiques.
L’appartement est très propre.
Je ne regrette absolument pas, et je suis très satisfait de mon premier voyage au Japon.
Merci !

Room was neat and tidy with ample space for one. The location is great, easy access to multiple stations around the area! Convenience store just barely a minute away and Japan’s famous Don Quijote is around 5 minutes away :) the hosts are kind and helpful with the situation I was in.  They are prompt with answering my questions through a messaging platform! They will guide you around the house when you first checked in to make sure you know how everything works :) overall, it was a great stay!

Min and Haru’s place is humble but provides everything anyone staying could need. The atomsphere from walking in to leaving was very welcoming, clean and got you in the mood to go explore Toyko. Min himself is there to help and an all round nice bloke, he also ensures that whoever is staying meets his standard to be there. The location itself is very central but also just out of the hustle and bustle enough to get a good night sleep. I would highly recommend Min and Harus place to anyone that would ask where to stay in toyko. I’ll be back again myself one day.
離地鐵站很近 房東很熱情 真的很推薦住這裡！
Well-located, great, clean space in the heart of Tokyo! Min and Haru were both very welcoming, and the guesthouse itself is warm and friendly without being too hostel-y. A great value!

fantastic hosts in Min and Haru! very kind and helpful from the original booking process to making sure I felt comfortable during my stay. Would absolutely stay again!

Min’s place was outstanding. I stayed in Tokyo for two weeks and moved to different places around the city and honestly this was my favorite spot. My only regret is that I did not stay long enough. It was clean and quiet and best of all it was in a very good location. I will definitely be staying here again when I come back.

Haru & Min sont très accueillants et attentionnés. Nous avons passé un très bon séjour. Le quartier est vivant, les transports proches et le coin de Shinjuku le plus animé à quelques minutes à pied. Si nous revenons un jour, nous y retournerons volontiers !

Definitely the best Airbnb I have ever stayed in. Everything was always clean, the room was spacious and it was in a perfect spot for transport and walking distance to Shinjuku! Plus the hosts cooked for us on our first time which was an unexpected bonus. 10/10 would come back again

Shinjuku sharehouse is nice, friendly, lively, and cheap. You will always meet interesting and various people. The rooftop is a must to have a sunny breakfast, or bbq party with Min and Haru !

Very well located with easy access to the trains and some of the happening places In town. Min and Haru are generous hosts and the evening chats with co-travellers while enjoying the city views from the terrace is priceless.
房间离地铁很近，房东夫妻很热情，其他的房客也很友善，生活体验良好

Très bonne adresse au cœur de Tokyo, accueil chaleureux, gentillesse et disponibilité de Min & Haru. Appartement confortable et joliment décoré.

The flat was great! The hosts were very helpful and clean, and the other guests were great people as well. You can even cook your own food and do your own laundry in the flat. There was a balcony with many plants. The hosts live nearby and are dedicated to the flat.
There are a few MRT stations in Shinjuku and it’s not very easy to travel between them. Be prepared to spend some time transferring between different lines.
Great value for the money , Central and typical Japanese

A great place with lovely comfortable, clean rooms. We had a tatami room which was really nice and spacious with everything we needed. I enjoyed my stay so much I ended up extending for another week. Min and Haru are great hosts and very welcoming and helpful. The house itself is lovely, with lots of great and unique decorations, adding to the homely feel. The other guests were all incredibly friendly too, making it overall a great atmosphere. Would definitely recommend.
Old school japanesse room

Had a lovely stay and start to Japan because of Min & Haru’s Guest house! It felt like home to us being very cosy and safe while being located in a cool area in Tokyo. We appreciated their great recommendations for the neighborhood and Tokyo in general which made our stay even more worthwile.
Super friendly host and lovely room in a nice area. I can definitely recommend staying here!

Absolutely loved this place. It's right in the Shin-Ōkubo area, not far away from the JR Station and even closer to the subway station. Also it's in a walkable distance to Kabukicho (a few blocks and you're in the rustle and bustle of Tokyo's nightlife capital).
Min & Haru were super friendly and had no issue with my delayed arrival from Narita. The tatani room itself was spacious and cozy, there also was an air conditioner. And the roof! Great for late-night snacking and chilling. Overal I had really good experience and can't recommend it enough!

The tatami mat for sleeping was surprisingly comfortable, and the room has AC/heating you can adjust to your liking. Min & Haru have a beautiful house with many cool decorations and figurines. Bring a coin from your home country to put in the currency display on the table :) thank you so much for a great time, it was a short but sweet stay! I really appreciate it! Ashe!

Probably the coolest and most fun place I stayed at during my whole trip. Min & Haru were very hospitable and made you feel very welcome along with the other guests.

BOOK NOW!

As mentioned in some reviews before, the apartment only has one shower for all bedrooms. When I stayed there, there was a total of ten guests and sometimes I had to wait a very long time. Because there’s so much rotation in the shower it is often dirty, but the host and his wife do the best they can to maintain it clean. The bedroom is spacious but unfortunately very noisy at night because it faces a busy street so I didn’t sleep very well. If you enjoy meeting people and stay in a hostel like place, this is a good place for you and don’t expect nothing fancy but for the same price you can also find a central good hotel with privacy and a bathroom for yourself, like the one I stayed before staying here. The host is a good person and will try to help you in anything you need and the room was clean.

Schöne Unterkunft mit netten Gastgäbern und eine gute Lage um Tokyo zu entdecken. Es ist jedoch ein wenig laut dort, aber das ist ein Kompromiss, den man eingehen muss, wenn man in Shinjuku wohnen möchte. Würde ich sofort weiterempfehlen.

Min and Haru have a unique spot that allowed me to get my first taste of Japan. Min speaks excellent English and is funny and responsive for all my worries. Min was extremely responsive, and super helpful. He provided us with his number to allow us to make reservations which was above and beyond. The room was fantastic and had fantastic sleep every night. It was a wonderful location and close to the busiest districts in Shinjuku and the station.
Fantastic location in the heart of Shinjuku with great opportunities to meet new friends in the shared space. Highly recommend.

An absolutely amazing BNB. It was my first ever trip to Japan and I went for a 2 week solo trip. I had booked one of the private tatami rooms and it was super comfy and nice. Having never slept on a futon & tatami combo, I was a bit nervous if I would have issues sleeping for 2 weeks on it, but i can safely say it was super comfortable every night. The BNB is conveniently located between 3 train lines that were at most a 5-10 walk away so my everyday travels to other locations around Tokyo and Japan were easy to get to. It is in the area of Okubo (Korea town of Tokyo) so you can indulge in Korean cuisine as well and it’s a 10 minute walk away from the main area of Shinjuku if you’re into nightlife activities. Overall, a spectacular BNB. Super clean and nice, Min & Haru were super welcoming and helpful hosts. I had no issues what so ever staying here. I couldn’t have picked a better BNB, would definitely stay here again for my next trip.
Min and Haru are the friendliest hosts I’ve met until now! I can only recommend their place
Great stay, very homey, traditional rooms with tatami mats. Amenities were pretty convenient and everything super clean!

Great conversations, laidback enviroment, perfect location and new friends. What I just described are just a small handful of things you can expect to experience here at the Shinjuku Share-house! This was my first time in Japan and on top of it solo and it felt great to be able to still do the things I want on my own schedule but also have the ability to tag along with whatever activities were going on at the share house with other people . It was a without a doubt a great place to stay and the vibes were great. My room was as pictured and described and had a cool blowing AC unit that helped keep me rested from Septembers heat while inside it. The rooftop area is definitely a little gem of this spot, a place to eat, drink and chat with a lot of interesting and cool people. The hosts Min and Haru are just absolutely amazing and are available to help you out with any tips or questions you might have. I will definitely be coming back the next time I come back to Tokyo!!!

그럼 그때 또 잘 부탁드릴게요!

So where to begin...I'll start with the host.
Mr Sun Ki Min is about as cool, caring and helpful a host as you could possibly wish for. If you have a problem of some sort or would just like an idea for where to go eat something, he will gladly assist you. And when he's there, he's always up for an interesting chat.
The apartement itself, three stories and a lot of space (by japanese standards), reflects his positive attitude in every way. It is clean, tidy and offers almost every utility you could ask for.
Free and fast wifi, great bathroom, ample equipped kitchen and a spacious living room adjoining. There is also a washing machine to be used for free as well, and every floor has it's own balcony.
You are really not left wanting for anything.
Oh did I mention that you can go onto the roof as well, there's a fantastic view just waiting for you up there.

So now you might be thinking, that's too much positivity, where is the big BUT?
Well, it's entirely up to you, if you come there with the right mindset, then you will leave happy as can be.

I already know I'll come back to Tokyo one day. Guess where I'll be staying...

Thanks again Sun Ki - senpai !

Min is an awesome host, always there when you need help and he knows (almost) everything :) The guesthouse is very good located, close to the Shinjuku station and the heart of the nightlife. It's very clean and comfy and the view from the rooftop is really nice. I would definitely stay here again!

Min was a really good host - both welcoming and helpful.
The apartment is big, with bright rooms. It's situated very close to many stations and is a really good temporary home for your stay in Tokyo.

Ming has a fun place. The weekend I was there was especially busy - a lot of travelers coming in and out. It was cool to come back after a long day of solo exploring to find people hanging out in the common area. If you are flexible and like staying with other people this is a great place. Ming is a friendly guy always up for conversation and his place is very close to the metro.

It was my first airbnb experience and I do not regret it! I spent 2 weeks there.
The location is perfect, only 5 min walking to Shinjuku station. The district is very exciting and vibrant, a lot of restaurants, bars and shops...
The guesthouse is a lively and convivial place and Min is really awesome! Friendly, so nice and so fun, I really enjoyed my stay there.
I highly recommend this guesthouse!!!

Had a really nice stay. Nothing to complain about. Great location and owner. Min is a fantastic person that helps you with everything you need. This is the first time I used air bnb, and its not going to be the last!

Staying at Min's place was a lot of fun. Tons of interesting people, a place smack in the middle of Shinjuku, perfect for exploring the city.
I bet the rooftop is great during the spring/autumn, even in the winter it provided a nice view of Tokyo.
If you enjoy having a drink in the evening with a bunch of people then Min's guesthouse is right for you.
We had a great stay with Min. his apartment is well located and his communication when planning our stay was fast and helpful. would recommend
Min is a very helpful and friendly host. He knows just what travellers need. We were a group of 5 visiting Tokyo and definitely had a great experience staying at Min's guest house. Thank you Min.
Fun guesthouse, very happy to stay here. Met some interesting folks, and it was nice to come back here after a long day, and just chill out in the main area with everyone else.
Min is a great host. Great location, and at a reasonable price. Wish I had known about this place sooner. Would definitely stay again.

Great place to meet people from all around world. That is due to the host's great hospitality and receptiveness. Always welcome you with open arms.

Pretty good location with nice view from the rooftop. Overall, great value for travellers.

Looking forward to stay here again.

Hello hello,

Min and his place is a great one full of modern amenities all in a comfortable setting. It can house quite a lot which is fun to interact and meet people from various places. The Higashi-Shinjuku stop is around the corner with many restaurants and convenience store options around as well.

Min himself is a pleasure; very nice and accommodating with an actual curiosity to engage with you. Overall, definite recommendation.
Min is a very friendly host very helpful . Great location, and a great price. Would definitely stay again.

Min was great - super friendly and happy to recommend restaurants.

Great location - 2 minutes from restaurants, shops and bars (including the Golden Gai - six alleys filled with tiny bars).

Our room was bigger than expected and the lounge/kitchen area was great for meeting other travellers.

Will stay again when we're next in Japan!

Min is a great guy. Helping everyone to find their interest. He is a wondeful host as well. Highly recommended place, near heart of Shinjuku. Nearest subway station is Higashi-Shinjuku but main Sinjuku station is not far also

My best-friend and I stayed at the Shinjuku Shared House for just over two weeks while visiting Japan for the first time and exploring Tokyo and I have to say it was one of the best experiences of our lives.
Min, the owner, is an incredibly helpful and friendly guy always a phone call, text or email away if anything goes wrong.
The immediate area has everything you need, from supermarkets and bars to local temples so no matter your reason for visiting you can find a taste of it within walking distance.
Higashi-Shinjuku Station is also less than a minute away making all of Tokyo accessible. The most time we ever spent on the subway was 35 minutes and that was getting to Odaiba. Make sure to pick up a Pasmo card for the subway system if you think you'll be using the subway to explore! We also used the "Tokyo Subway Navigation" App which is free on Android and iphone, shows you which stops to get on/off at, how much it will cost and how long each trip takes.
The apartment itself is always clean and full of interesting people. On the nights we weren't out exploring Tokyo's nightlife we'd always be able to find a handful of people in the living space ready to share a drink, food or stories.
Min does a wonderful job of making this place a relaxing and friendly environment for everyone. When I get the chance to return to Tokyo, I will also return here, brilliant fun, brilliant people, brilliant place.
If you do decide to stay here, make sure you take yourselves to the rooftop (and then up the ladder) and get a picture of the sunrise/sunset, it is absolutely stunning.

Had a great stay at Min's place. Min is a great person, always helpful on every occasions. The place is clean and if you love making new friends from other countries, this is the place for you. The location is very strategic as there are many restaurants and grocery stores around that area. If you don't like asian foods, there is McDonald just around the corner. Taking subway is fairly convenient too. His place is just situated behind Kabukicho, you will love this place if you want to have fun at night time. If you're coming in a big bunch of people, you should aware there is only one shower room as of now. I was told another 2 shower rooms will be built in the future. Proper planning on showering time should solve the problem.
Overall, it is a great place with great people.
It was great. It is in a nice neighborhood.

I had a real good time in the Sharehouse !
Min was a great host, si nice !
The common space is real plus to meet people, there is always someone, you'll never be alone (but of course you can also have privacy).
I met great people who becam friends, we had really nice moments!
About the location ... Perfect !
Close to the station, nightlife, restaurants, convenience stores etc ...
If i am going to Tokyo I'll stay there again ! Highly recommended!
It was a great stay at Min's place. We were group of 17. Min was very accomodating. He's hands on in everything. Location was perfect. See you on our next visit!
Min is an excellent host, very hepful and even offered to meet me at the train station to make sure I didnt get lost finding the place. The room was clean and very convenient for the Shinjuku area.

Minh is absolutely amazing. He not only had suggestions on places to go and see, but he also helped us meet other people staying in the sharehouse. This is not just a place to stay. It is an experience. It is a way to meet some great people and have an epic adventure. Oh and did I mention that it is literally a block from the metro in the downtown area? Well, it is.  If you're looking for a place to stay in Tokyo, this is where you should be.

Min has a very nice set of apartments in Central Tokyo. It conveniently located right next to a subway stop, and walking distance from Shinjuku and Kobukicho. Combined with the very reasonable price, you really can't beat this place. It's way better then anything else I saw on Airbnb in the same area and price range.

Staying at the Shinjuku Sharehouse was an awesome experience. The place is very conveniently located, with key areas such as Shinjuku and Shibuya being a few minutes away by subway. The room itself was clean, and all the promised amenities were in order. But the best part about the place was meeting fun people from all over the world, who were also staying there. Min is a fabulous host, and he makes everything super easy. He gives guidance on how to get quickly settled into Tokyo, and even throws mini parties at the Sharehouse common area! Overall, I had a great time, and I strongly recommend Min's place. Arigatou Gozaimasu Min :)

This place's location is great, only 100-200m from a subway station. which easily links you to all the entertainment that Tokyo has to offer. In addition the view from top of the building allows you to view a vast area of Tokyo.
Instructions were clear enough to find the house and the owner waited at the house himself to ensure that you are settled into the room that you purchased and he also provided a quick introduction to other housemates, if they were in the living area of the house. Being social was encouraged but not forced, providing a relaxed atmosphere.

Overall, very happy with the place.

Min is a excellent host, not only does he provide very good living accommodation to a very good standard, he's always up for socialising, taking us to great restaurants and bars, giving us info on locations to tourist spots and places around the city... honestly would recommend Min and his house share any day.. its in the shinjuku area which is already is a great area in its own right and metro / JR lines are very close by

A really good host and really fun shared house experience. Was there only two nights, but wished I could stay longer. Guests are very friendly, around late 20s and early 30s and very relaxed attitude. Not much privacy in the 6th floor apartment (just open space) but I did not find it to be an issue.
Min was very helpful and was there to greet me when I arrived. Very communicative and told me about all the other guests. He often goes out and drinks with the other guests, but i unfortunately didn't get to experience that due to my short stay and busy schedule. He keeps the apartments clean.
Fairly convenient location, next to subway and couple blocks from JR station. In Korean neighborhood, with lots of restaurants and some grocery stores. A bit near the red light district which is a bit annoying, but still sufficiently out of the way.
Would definitely recommend and would come back in the future. Good way to meet friendly new people.

Booked this place last minute and was really glad. Cheap, clean, safe and really well located. Min's was.a great host - full local knowledge and always up for a laugh. All the other guests were respectful of privacy but still happy to help each other out or grab a drink. Well worth a stay.

Loved my stay at Min's share house.

The apartment was great, with balconies overlooking the city and a nice common area for meeting other travelers. Min, himself was a fantastic host. He invited us travelers out to dinner with his friends, showed us some special places he loves and made a really fun night for us in Tokyo. Min is a real people-person. He loves getting to know people from other cultures and offering all the advice he can. There is no question in my mind, that the next time I'm in Tokyo I'm staying with Min.

Not to mention, a fabulous location, that's walking distance to all the best nightlight and restaurants in the city at an unbeatable price. The Share House helped make my time traveling alone in Tokyo great!
Super nice area for visiting Tokyo. The flat has everything you may need and Min is very helpful.
Min was very communicative and helpful. We enjoyed our stay in his share house, and meeting other travelers. At times you might have to queue a bit for the bathroom.
Min is a very friendly and welcoming host. Very easy to communicate with and always available to answer our questions requests. Thanks for a great stay!
숙소 위치에 대한 설명은 사진까지 같이 보내주시면서 자세히 해주셨고, 정말 반갑게 맞이해주셨어요! 숙소에 머무를 때도 볼때마다 친절하고 친근하게 맞아주셔서 덕분에 더욱 즐거운 여행이 되었습니다^^ 만족스러운 숙소와 여행이었어요~

Min is very kind and helpful person.
confortable place, close to "Higashi Shinjyuku Station", there are good people.

Thank you.
It was a pleasant shared room for 4 people. The location in Shinjuku was good. The view from the balcony was great.

I really enjoyed the place I stayed. It was clean, had a kitchen and fridge where we can store food, and the other guests were really nice. I stayed in a room with three other guys, two of them which I became close friends with.  It was close to Higashi Shinjuku and a ten minute walk from Shinjuku were all the shopping and partying takes place. It was also near supermarkets, a bank and a Don Quijote which is a discount store opened 24 hours. Not to mention bunch of drink vending machines on every corner.

Shinjuku Sharehouse was a wonderful place to stay at. Min is so friendly, easy going, and happy to help. The place is kept very clean and tidy. It was fun to meet all the different people passing through but nice to also have my own space. I  recommend this place with absolutely no hesitation. It's a short walk to shin okubo station and near some fun places.

I used the airport shuttle from Narita to Shinjuku Station. Min's place was less than 10 mins away by taxi from where I got off, and with his help I was able to locate his place very quickly. His place is about 5 mins walk from Higashi-Shinjuku station where you can get around pretty much anywhere in Tokyo with ease. Not only that, I was fortunate enough to befriend some great folks all around the world. Will definitely choose Min's place the next time I come to Tokyo. Thanks Min. xx

Min is the best host ever! The place was super clean and quiet. Min provided all information that i needed. I'll definitely come back!

Cheers.

I enjoyed my stay here very much. Although I was sharing the space with 6 other people, everyone was considerate and I still felt as though I had my own space. The place was also very clean and homely and felt very safe. It was also really nice to meet people from all around the world. I made some really good friends while I was staying there!
The location of this place is fantastic; right in the heart of Shinjuku. It makes getting around Tokyo so easy!
I cannot speak more highly of Min! Firstly, he managed to squeeze me in very last minute. He is extremely helpful, giving everyone suggestions as to where to go during your stay, where to eat, how to get places. He's very easy going and welcoming and SUPER prompt with replying to messages.
I would recommend to anyone to stay here, and I would come back in a heart beat!

I'm already coming to Min's place in two weeks! Doesn't that say alot? Near to stations and in the city. Many shops and restaurants around the hostel. But the best think is the people you meet and Min of course :)

We stayed 6 days at Min´s House and we had a great time. Min is super friendly and helpful like always.  (Stayed at this place 2 years ago and had a great time as well). You can also meet a lot of nice people in this sharehouse. I recommend this place to everyone who is travelling alone or with friends. Best Host ever!
Very friendly + easy going host. Min made our tokyo trip truly enjoyable.  We had a pleasant stay with other guests in the shared apt. Highly recommend for ones who look for a diverse traveling exp

Thank you Mr. Min and Ken. I really enjoyed my stay.  I met many new friends and fellow travels. You guys were very helpful with any and all infortion I may have needed while on holiday. Thank you again and have a great day. I will be happy to recommend your accommodation to Friends and travelers while in Japan.

일본을 처음 방문했고 일본말을 전혀 못해서 많이 걱정했는데 자세한 설명을 문자와 카톡으로 안내를 해 주셔서 쉽게 찾아 갔습니다.
아기자기한 실내장식과 깨끗한 방에서 3박4일간 내집처럼 편안하게 지내다 왔습니다.
한국에서 여행 가시는 분들에게는 강추입니다.
민상이 제일동포라 언어소통이 원활하고 영어나 일어도 잘하십니다.

That was my first visit in Japan and every time when I needed any information about for example where is the post office, where can I buy fridge magnets, where is good ramen, etc I asked my host and he was really helpfull. Also localisation of that place was great for me because there is near to shinokubo station or maybe 10-15 minutes on foot to shinjuku east station and subway even closer... And most important for me 15 minutes on foot to hombu dojo without rushing :) 3-5 minutes to don qijote store and similiar to seven eleven. Great evenings on the roof where you can enjoy nightly view of Tokyo and dining with new friends :) It is a place with good vibes. You can enjoy your staying alone in private room or meet awesome people in dormitory. Washing machine, microwave, fridge, aircondition, ..., evrything what I needed was there :) Thank you Min and best regards!  A dla ziomali z Polski - po prostu polecam.
房东很早就加了微信，准确告之了地址，并且保持沟通。房东一直在客厅，陪我聊天，引导客人聚会交流，这个非常好。当我退房后，房东提前告诉我，可以在退房后把行李放在客厅，为我们考虑得非常周到。该房源非常好找，临街，非常干净，价有所值。周边有很多好吃而且价格实惠的餐厅，药妆店也很多，购物非常方便。最近的地铁站只需要做5分钟。离伊思丹步行只有15分钟。是享受和体验东京生活非常好的房子。

Min was very welcoming and helpful! He made my stay in Tokyo easy and very welcoming. I felt at home and almost felt like a local! His weekly gatherings over the weekend were a great way to immerse yourself into the community. I went to Japan to learn Japanese Cuisine at a school near by and he made it easy for me to understand on how to reach the destination! The location was great. You are so close to many train stations and restaurants. Overall, 10/10 will come back if I visit Tokyo again.

I highly recommend this place if you are travelling for sightseeing or business purposes. The host Min is very friendly and help you to feel at home.The location is 4 min waking from metro. Shinjiku main station is also not very far.You can meet other travellers in 9th floor living room.You can also can have dinner party at rooftop expirencing nice breeze and Tokyo skyline.You can walk to supermarkets or any other needs and is available  24×7.

Min is a friendly host, very helpful and making me sure to find the place. The Tatami room is clean and have a good view. The location is great, close to the center of Shinjuku but also unbelievable quiet. Don Quijote (ドン．キホーテ) is 2 minutes walk away so it is very easy to get basically everything you need.  Definitely recommend for backpackers.

Min was a great host. The sharehouse is in a extremely convenient location that is right next to the higashi shinjuku station and walkable to many top restaurants, night life destinations and shopping. The room and facilities were very clean and the setup offers as much or as little interaction with other guests as you would like. High marks for Shinjuku Sharehouse!
Best place to explore Shinjuku and the rest of Tokyo! Easy to reach and easy to go out! Super friendly people, great room, very clean and quiet, awesome company, only the best about Min's place!

훌륭합니다
편하게 잘있다 가요!!
Min is a great host, definitely made this trip awesome. Couldn't imagine it going as well if I I stayed elsewhere. I will definitely be back

Great location close to the shin-okubo station on the yamanote line. The space is great, lots of light, super clean and has a nice little balcony.
Min is a great host - super communicative with directions and was always available via text. He fosters a nice small hostel environment, and even cooked dinner for all the guests on the rooftop deck

Min kindly offered me one of his tatami rooms. This sunny room is located right in the heart of Shinjuku and surprisingly includes a small balcony. I certainly enjoyed chatting with Min and other tenants who have helped me a lot with understanding the public transportation systems and arranging my trip. I would definitely recommend a stay here.

The Shinjuku Sharehouse is a very lovely place! It is a 3 minute walk from a train station, and 13 minutes from central Shinjuku. Min is a great host! He quickly responds to any questions, helps out with anything you need, and is a very friendly, even hosting some dinner parties with all of the travellers. It's a great way to meet new friends too! Sitting around and chatting with him and other travellers will be something I will miss, as the stories and experiences everyone shares is enjoyable.

The room itself was awesome, the best I've stayed in Tokyo. I had a great view from my window and shared balcony. It was very clean, spacious with two closets, and a small table. Min provides all the amenities, from a Japanese toilet to a shower and bath. The common space/kitchen is a lovely area. A board of travellers shows the memories everyone has made there and their friendships.

Overall, definitely a recommend place to stay! Looking forward to the next time I visit Tokyo.
good place. Nice host.
everything was good. Mr. Min was very kind and ready to help.
가까운 대중교통, 걸어서 신주쿠시내 이동, 가까운 편의시설 및 멋진 야경까지 정말 좋았습니다.^^

This place is great. It is located right in Shinjuku, near all the cool nightlife (Golden Gai, Kabukichou, etc). Also is right in the middle of Shin-Okubo, so if you like Korean culture as well, you get the best of both worlds.
Min, the host, is a really great guy. He waited for me even though I checked-in late in the night and welcomed me with drinks, snacks and good humor.
Also, while staying there, I met a swedish guy who was its third or fourth time staying there, which goes to say how nice this place really is.
I would definitely stay here again!

Nous avons passé un magnifique séjour chez Min, qui est très disponible pour ses hôtes. La chambre est très bien située et très propre avec, en prime, sur le toit une magnifique terrasse avec une vue imprenable sur Shinjuku.
Merci pour tous

It is just an amazing and magical place!
The view is awesome and the people you meet too! It is easy to get there and there are many restaurants and bars nearby.
I enjoyed my stay very much.
And drinking with people all over the world is just so funny :D

Min is extremely patient and helpful! Had some things that needed to be clarified and Min actually called me to make sure everything was sorted out without any misunderstandings. Thank you very very much for that, Min!
I was late for check in because i got lost (first time in Tokyo) and he kept checking in with me and sent me instructions on how to get there.
I had a good time at this place. Perfect location with a ton of eateries around the area. Don quixote is also just around the corner. Something to take note of tho there is only one shower and if youre on another level you have to take the lift up to use the shower. Wasnt a problem for me at all in fact i have never had to wait for the shower at all, even tho the place was fully booked.
My room was nice and cozy and the balcony was a nice touch! My room was facing the street and due to the location it was still a little bright at night so light sleepers please take note! I personally enjoyed that little bit of light filtering in. Makes it very "city like"
Overall, LOVELY stay! Thank you so much, Min!
He was the most personable host I've had the pleasure of staying with! We had many drinks and all the nights I spent there was fun and lively with the rest of the guests!

Min is a super host! He is warm, friendly and hospitable. Always happy to help and if you have any questions. The place is in an amazing location, central, well-connected and comfortable. Would definitely stay again.

Min's place is fantastic. He's a seasoned traveller and has sorted out all the little things to make your stay more comfortable. Having drinks and chatting with the other guests on a Shinjuku rooftop is a rare experience which I hope I can enjoy again soon!

The apartment is located in the East of Shinjuku, which is very convenient for taking any transport. When I was hungry at night, I could find many restaurants nearby. Besides, the design of the apartment is spacious and beautiful, which I love it. Moreover, I could make friends around the world in the apartment that other apartments may not provide this experience.

Min的房间真的很好
可以认识到各国朋友 离东新宿站 新大久保站都很近 min的指示非常清楚

The other 5 star reviews are absolutely spot on. A fantastic host and a stunning location with a rooftop of Tokyo skyline that will make your stay, sightseeing and overall Tokyo experience amazing! The rooms are spacious, clean and you will feel like at home. The location was perfect for me, as it was right next to the JR yamanote line as well as multiple 24/7 supermarkets, restaurants and of course in Shinjuku. Will visit again!!!
Really nice host. The house is quite comfortable and near to the subway station. I will visit there next time definitely!

在我租房子期间，除了点差错，敏和住在这里的朋友很热心的帮助了我订购Wi-Fi，真的非常感谢他们，这里的交通很发达，东新宿站和大久保站蛮近的，新宿站相比这两个站远一点点，换jr可以在新宿站换，这里离歌舞伎町很近，离松本清和比酷也超近超方便，在阳台上，还会有聚会，这次我没好好学习日语和英语，交流有点障碍，下次来我一定要用日语和他们交流，因为东京是我在日本的旅程的第一站，所以有好多遗憾错过的景点，如果机会允许我会再来东京，再次入住敏的房子

非常好的房间，房东是已经移居日本的韩国人，房东人非常好。会英语韩语日语。  每个房间都有独立的密码锁，房间内有空调。 房子周边的交通购物很方便。 有很多24小时的店。 还有一个360度无死角天台。 可以看到东京市区的夜景。 天台上也有桌椅，晚上买上几瓶鸡尾酒和吃的在天台听听音乐和朋友喝喝酒感觉很好。  房东不会中文，我本身会一些日语，所以和房东交流完全没问题。  客厅的桌子下面收集了很多世界各地的钱币，墙上也有来自世界各地的各种语言的留言，每个房间的书架上也有不同语言的书籍，看的出房东是一个很热心很爱交朋友的人。 下次去东京还会再去

Great stay!  Comfortable, clean place.  Communication with Min was exceptional.  Location convenient to numerous restaurants, train stations, the Robot Restaurant, and the building that Godzilla stares down from.

Very impressed. I came in on a late flight and Min stayed at the sharehouse late to greet me.  He and his wife also helped toast my birthday when I arrived!  Everything was very clean.  There were toilets on two floors that were separate from the shower area. It's a very short stroll from the attractions in Shinjuku, and their is also a convenient subway stop nearby.

Stayed again at the place and it was amazing this time too! Very fun times and very good rooms. Could rest very well in the tatami room and enjoy breakfast and dinner in the shared kitched! Could meet very nice guests from other countries!
Thank you for the fantastic time Min!

깨끗하고, 교통이 편리하며, 전망 좋고, 주변에 편의점과 음식점 등이 가까운 최적의 숙소입니다.. 숙소 사장님의 활기찬 기운과 情도 듬뿍 느낄수있어요..
신주쿠 여행이라면 강추입니다..

Min was a wonderful host! He sent me accurate directions to his house, and Greeted me with a guide book and subway map of Tokyo, which I carried around with me everyday and helped me plan my day. I Enjoyed the steamy hot showers and warm room, which I truly appreciated since I went in the winter.  The location was perfect since I was able to walk to a few train lines which took me everywhere I needed to go, and I also liked that everything I needed was within walking distance.

Best Airbnb I've ever stayed at. Min is the BEST host. He's very responsive, considerate and provides travel tips. The tatami private room is very spacious and has a balcony with a good view. The shared house is well decorated and has a rooftop patio as well. I'm definitely staying here again in the future!!
Min is a really cool and genuine guy. The house is clean and everything you need is there. Awesome location with tons to do nearby.

地位位置超级棒，新宿商圈，旁边就是歌舞伎町，500米就有地铁，1000米左右就到新宿站，药妆百货应有尽有。房东很可爱，一路告诉你怎么到他的房子，介绍房间设施。性价比高，非常适合自由行。

I was booked this accomodation for about one month. Host Min is very kind and gentle as well as helpful. While i stay here, I relly enjoy my time with many global friends. If I come to Japan again, My choise must be with Min.

Since i stayed here, everything was good. Nice view, easy taransportation, so many restraunt nearby. If u r finding share house, here is one of the best one in Shinjuku area. Especially, u r enjoying meeitng new peaple, u can do it as well as so many party at night. If I have chance to visit Tokyo again, I will be here and enjoy my time with new guys.
私がこの宿に泊まっていたうちに本当楽しい時間でした。部屋は綺麗だし、交通も便利だし、ミンさんとハルさんも本当に優しいでした。もし私が東京に戻ったらまたこの宿に行きたいです。私は本当にこの宿をお薦めしたいです。
房间的位置很便利，到新宿站和大久保站都可以步行到达。入住的时候房东对房屋设施一一详细介绍，热情又耐心。这次住的是一个独立房间，在新宿可以算是性价比很高了。由于位于闹市区，夜里不算特别安静，为图交通方便也是没法避免的事，睡眠浅的小伙伴可以备付耳塞什么的。总的来说，是一次美好难忘的入住体验，会推荐给朋友，下次去东京也愿意住在这里。

Killer location.
Clean, approachable, and friendly. Quick responses - troubleshooting was a piece of cake. Min knows how to connect to people. He’s a natural people person and we appreciated every minute of our stay.

I had an absolutely fantastic time at this place. Min is such a great host, and he’s really put together a sharehouse that’s great for travelers. I’d absolutely stay here again if I’m looking to stay near Kabukicho, and would highly recommend this place to other travelers.
This is a private traditional Japanese tatami style room. You’ll have a Japanese style futon (it is quite firm!) and a private balcony with a nice view overlooking the street. The room isn’t super soundproof and the street tends to be noisy with ambulances and fire trucks, and the occasional drunkard, so I’d recommend bringing earplugs.
The main floor has a shared kitchen and living room area, where you’ll often find Min, other travelers, or occasionally a visiting local hanging out. This place was so homey and inviting that I often found myself hanging out in the living room and meeting others. There’s also a shared shower, laundry machine, and toilets. There’s also a rooftop with a great view of the surrounding area. Absolutely awesome!
The room was big and it was nice to have balcony. We had a really nice time thanks to Min hospitality.

My stay with Min & Haru was perfect. The experience was like how I wish all my Airbnb experiences could be. The home is absolutely how it looks in the pictures. It's clean and smells good. Min and Haru are so friendly, down to earth and easy to talk to. They spend time trying to get to know their guests and making sure the guests get to know each other. They really try to establish a community within the shared space. I enjoyed their company so much that spending an afternoon in their company was well worth the time. The location is excellent. They help you understand how to get around and use public transportation. And it's clean and super organized. I loved it. I definitely recommend this place. It's affordable and the place is awesome. I'm going to miss those two, but I'll be back!
Min的房间非常漂亮美好，地理位置优越，离地铁站非常近，周围有便利的超市，使我们在东京的日子非常快乐。我很推荐您来这里住。
地方太方便了！就在市中心，地铁chu l出来走3分钟，对面就是大国药妆，位置没话说，真的很方便！房东夫妇人很好，热情好客，尤其最后天领走时女主人主动为我们称了箱子，怕我们行李超重，非常感谢。唯一有点遗憾的是，可能淋浴间是公用的关系，有点不太干净，还有洗漱盆会有污迹，但总体感觉不错，胜在位置好！

Great location, spacious room, Min & Haru are extremely friendly.  There is a social place Where every guest can get together and meet each other. Every night even when I come back to the place with my exhausted body,  I’m still looking forward to have a little chat with the other guest. They provided a massage chair, a TV and dessert for the guests in the living room. It makes us feel very comfortable and very homely. I highly recommend this share house to anyone who wants to meet People from different countries.
房东和夫人非常的热情，位置也很好，房间出乎意外的干净和舒适，非常喜欢这里，希望可以有机会再去。

Read the reviews before I booked and once I stayed here, it exceeded all expectations. Min is a great host and the place is awesome. Great location, very clean and comfortable and Min is very attentative to his guests’ needs. Would definetly recommend.

Staying at Min and Haru's place was an amazing way to experience Tokyo. The location is great and they were kind and thoughtful hosts the few times I saw them since I was always out. The room was as expected and the shower and bathroom were always clean. Would love to come back and stay here in the future!
挺方便的。房东很好，挺多外国人在一起聊天很开心。附近很多药妆店还有一个大超市里面东西挺便宜的。旁边的烤肉店也好吃。下次还会住这。

The sharehouse is conveniently placed near Shinjuku, you can go by foot ( or subway if you don't want to walk ). Min and Haru are friendly, they speak english and answer to your questions very quickly. The room was big, with small terrace, and quiet ( with windows closed - the street can be noisy! ). Common spaces are cozy, shared bathroom is ok. Nice place to stay in Tokyo !
Tokyo was amazing, and Min and Haru made our stay even better. Min is super friendly and we really enjoyed the drinks and laughs. Next time in Tokyo we wouldn't hesitate to book at Mins' place again.

This place is very cool!
It's located in one of Tokyo's nicest places, with a lot of life, restaurants and business.
Min and Haru are so very kind, and invite you for joining them drinking a beer on the roof top (great spot).
The place itself is very quite, tidy and clean, and our room at least had a private balcony!
Our room was on the main street side, which can be a little bit noisy during the night.
I'll be returning to this place in my next trip to Japan for sure 😊
Min and Haru were fantastic hosts and we had an amazing time drinking on the roof with them
Always the best house in shinjuku! Min and Haru are nice and kind hosts! The house in so nice and always clean!
Such a special place! Much needed break from the city. Come and get some fresh air and enjoy this great little Ibsen town.

Min & Haru are great hosts! They are very responsive and accurate and made sure we had all the information we needed! The shared house is located conveniently, and is quite stylish. The shower room is shared among 3/4 bedrooms I believe, which can make things a bit complicated. Overall we had a very pleasant stay and I would recommend this place!
Un lugar con mucho estilo y excelente ubicación, trato amable y atento, instalaciones muy comodas, muy recomendable.

Beaucoup de chambres par rapport à la taille des espaces communs.
Boulevard très bruyant.
A very convenient location. Easy check in. Come and go as easy as you please. Convenience store just downstairs and a 24 shop nearby. Clean and nice room with traditional looking tatami floor.
The place and location both amazing! I highly recommend this place

Min & Haru's rooms are great. Great location close to everything you'd need, great decorations and friendly atmosphere. Min & Haru are super friendly and always ready for a chat or a drink or a small party with the other guests. Thanks to them I made a lot of new friends. Next time I'm in Tokyo I'm definitely gonna try to book here again!

This share house is conveniently located close to the subway station, very close to many restaurants and shops (even in the same building). Good for those willing to meet new people and to be in the centre of the city. I wouldn't recommend it though for families with small kids, as the partying in the common space lasts late at night sometimes (as it did the first two nights we stayed there and couldn't sleep till after midnight). 'Tatami rooms ok for those who don't mind sleeping on the floor. Great communication with the owners, were always there to answer any questions.
Awesome.min's place is one of the best air b&b that i have ever stayed

Awesome stay at Min and Haru’s!! Location is perfect, super friendly hosts, and a cool way to meet other travelers from around the world. A really relaxed and cool place, but still with excellent security measures for the rooms. Loved the rooftop, such a good bonus. Everything else was great!!!
民宿老板人非常好客 因为我是韩国留学生所以交流不成问题 房子位置也很好 房间也蛮干净的 如果有和我一样有点洁癖的 可以自带床上用品三件套 其他都很方便 下次还会再来

This is a good place for those on a tight budget and for social, solo/couple travelers. It has a nice, comfortable hostel feel to it, with a lot of people chatting in the lounge area. During my stay the water did not work in the mornings. We went to a local onsen to get ready for the days, which ended up being a nice touch to our time in Tokyo, but took some time from our limited time in the city. It was a plumbing issue that they had fixed so it was just bad timing for us. A good place to stay otherwise!!
Also, the rooftop is available 24/7 which was nice in the mornings and late at night to enjoy.

One of my favourite rooms I've stayed in in all of my airbnb experiences. Big, with tons of natural light and nice views, with a little balcony. The  location was good too, close to a couple stations and many options for food/grocery etc. Stay here!

the location of the place is great, 10-15 min walking distance to shinjuku station, round the corner there is a bunch of small restaurants. 2 metro lines are also in a 5 min walking distance.
the communication was great from the beginning. when i arrived everything was explained and i really liked the pin code locks on the main and roomdoor, no chance to loose a key.
the hospitality was awesome, unfortunately i was not that much around, but when we had some minutes to talk it was always great.
the tatami room was spacious and had a small balcony and everything was clean.
i totally recommend to stay at this place

Wow. Get ready to get cozy. Not only is it convenient, not only is it affordable, clean and comfortable, not only are Min and Haru the kinds of hosts you pray to receive you on your first night in Tokyo (ever)...Tatami!! Wonderful, nearly new tatami mat floors and shoji screens over windows and the glass sliding balcony doors. Yaaass. Get a view of the masses below from said balcony, chill with other travelers in the adorable common area upstairs, or set out on your journey with Golden Gai a short walk and Shibiya crossing or the Meiji shrine just a 20 min train ride away. And everything in between! Will be coming back the next time I’m in Tokyo! Thank you both for being wonderful hosts! Was great chatting Min! All the best!

It is very convenient living area. Close to Karen area in Tokyo and walking distance to Shinjuku shopping center. There are also two different stations which like walk in 10 minutes about or less. Very nice landlord, talkative and kind. Because of the quest control the house is very safe.

I stayed for 3 nights in Min& Haru' s house and it was pretty nice there. You have your own room with a balcony, a shared kitchen and 2 shared bathroom with everything you need. Everything is really organized and clean. The housekeeper is really friendly and helpful. It was pretty nice to be in the kitchen meeting different people living there and also meeting Min& his friends there. Thanks for all Min& Haru :-)

It's so awesome at Min and Haru's place I came back for the second time and brought my cousin along. It really has everything you need, wifi, washer, ect. Food and train stations are close by. And the bonus is you will meet different people from all over the world.

Min & Haru have a great place - I stayed 4 nights in one of the private rooms. They cooked me and the other guests dinner (entirely optional, they asked at the start of the day) so that we could get you know each other. They're very welcoming and their place is immaculate.

I had a really nice stay here! A quirky house with great amenities, and you also meet some interesting travellers. Very nice hosts who were quick to communicate. Next to a big Don Quijote and various convenience stores. Thanks!
Fantastic sharehouse very close to the Shinjuku station. The host was very kind and quick to respond. The rooms are clean and the overall atmosphere is great for solo travelers.
Min and Haru's place is amazing.  The room and common spaces were clean (and very stylish).  The hospitality I experienced is worth at least six stars.  Would highly recommend their place.
This is a great little hostel run by a kind and welcoming host. I especially loved the tatami bedroom. Definitely recommend it if you’re on a budget!

My Private Tatame Room with Balcony was awesome. The entire place is very clean and location is superb which is very close to Shinjuku Station. I would definitely recommend Min and Haru’s place to every travellers who wants a cheaper place but quality is excellent. Thank you again Min and Haru for making my trip memorable because of your warm welcome and sincere gestures in helping out travellers like me in discovering Tokyo.
I enjoyed staying here. Min and Haru are very friendly and welcoming. I think you will enjoy staying here too.

It was a beautifull room with a balcony. There where really nice people living there (but not too many) and all practical issues worked really well. Location is also good but take earplugs with you as there is some noice at night time. I could have stayed there longer than a weekend!
Min and Haru were great host. The location was perfect for the price. Would stay again.

Min & Haru quickly become like family. They are unobtrusive but extremely helpful and hospitable. The tatami room was fabulously comfy and flexible (I stayed for 2 months), WiFi was great for remote work and never lagged on me, the neighborhood is fun/bustling. Always something to do anytime of day or night

Min & Haru’s share-house feel like a real home. They speak English and Japanese and are very fun to talk to. The rooms and beds are very clean and were private. Great location near Shinjuku with fantastic views of the city. Free laundry!
Lovely tatami room and balcony with a well equipped kitchen that acts as a social space. Was a great opportunity to meet other holidayers and chat with Min
Min & Haru are great host. They warmly welcome me to their share house. Everything is clean and there are lots of figurines & bandai plamo to appreciate.
Guesthouse excellente, je ne peux que recommander ! L'ambiance est top,la localisation est top ! Merci 😁
Great host and room! It is a share house so private locked room and public kitchen, bathroom, etc. Everything is super clean and organized. Easy to access the house and room.

This place is in the heart of Shinjuku, which is where all the best food, drinks and nightlife is located. There are various subway stations around to get around the main attractions. Min and Haru are very sweet and lovely and it’s so wholesome watching them work on their hobbies. As a solo female traveler, I felt very safe and the other guests were very respectful of nighttime hours as well.

Stayed here twice and both times were great. Lots of nearby restaurants and close to multiple subway stations. Min and Haru were lovely as always. This place is great especially if you’re traveling alone and want to meet other solo travelers

Had a really nice stay at the shinjuku share house, super cozy atmosphere, perfectly centered location right in the heart of Tokyo. Min is super friendly and can give some great local recommendations.
Looking forward to visit the shinjuku share house in the future.
Only thing missing is a Eva robot in his already huge gundam collection :)

Min & Haru's place was full of character! Cute and quirky art, figurines, posters, and books all around the common spaces brought a homely and comforting feel to the place. The room itself was spacious and super clean. I really enjoyed my stay here and will recommend it to other people!

Min and Haru’s place was great !
The room and toilet is very cozy and private, amazing view and AC!
Always had great conversations with Min or other guests in the kitchen and everything went smoothly!
またね！
Very convenient place and helpful hosts! I recommend!

I had the experience of a share house with the privacy of my own tatami room - loved it. I met the other guests in the shared kitchen and had nice conversations. Place was very clean and orderly. Everyone was courteous when it came to taking turns with the shared bathroom. But there were two shared toilets which was great.
Area is full of restaurants and shopping. Train is just a few minutes of walk. Great place overall if you travel solo, couple or with friends.

If I could give 6 stars instead of 5 I would. Min and Haru are the sweetest, kindest. It was my second stay here, and I’ll never stay anywhere else in Tokyo ever again :D Shinjuku Sharehouse forever ! ❤️
Thank you so again,
Séréna and Justine
As usual, I highly recommend staying there when you visit Tokyo, it’s all you could ever ask for :)

Min and Haru’s Airbnb was great! I was arriving through Haneda and was running late and the hosts were very responsive and explain the process to me before my arrival very clearly. I had the private room. It was clean, the futon was comfortable and the small balcony that over looked the street. The toilet was just outside of my room and the shower was on the main level which was always clean. I met some great people who were also staying at the share house. So if you’re a solo traveler like myself, still want your own room but have a chance to meet people this stay is really great. Highly recommend. Min and Haru were around and times and were always nice and friendly. I hope our paths cross again!
Great spot, close to the stations so it’s easy to get around. The place is comfortable and the roof terrace is a great place to enjoy a rice ball. Cheers
호스트가 친절하고 설명이 정확해서 찾아가기 수월했다
Nice room with character.  Very clean.  Close to Waseda U.  Kitchen facility was useful.  Min and Hari are great.

Everything was flawless. It's my first solo travel, and I love the place. I felt secure and welcomed. Min is super nice and outgoing, and the place is exactly or even better than the description. It's really close to the station and the perfect spot in Shinjuku. I'll totally recommend it, and in the future, I'll reserve this Airbnb again for sure.
Great stay, super nice hosts, perfect location. Highly recommend!
Amazing stay in great location!
Second time staying at Min and Haru’s.  I’m glad to say that things are clean and consistent. The hosts are very friendly and take care of their guests.
Min was extremely welcoming, made us feel right at home. Would definitely stay with Min and Haru again!!!!!
Great vibe. casual, relaxing w interesting guests and hosts. Min is a great conversationalist and a great resource for those new to Japan

多谢Min&Haru提供的房源，距离歌舞伎町仅一条街，周围有很多便利店及韩国餐厅，距离大久保站，新宿站都不太远，交通非常方便。房间内有一张榻榻米，一个衣柜，以及一个小阳台，卫生间和浴室是与其他房客共享的，居住环境让人感觉非常惬意。Min对我非常的热情友好，由于我的航班时间较晚，错过了办理入住的时间，我在App上与Min进行了沟通，他很爽快的告诉我不用担心，会等我前来办理入住，非常感谢Min的理解。闲暇之余我与Min也会闲聊，跟他聊天非常有意思。总之，此处房源物美价廉，值得一试。

房间宽敞舒适，采光很好，很有日式风格 ，房子整体也很有家的感觉。房东热情友好有趣。附近就有很多好吃的，步行去新宿、歌舞伎町都挺方便。
我在东京一共住了三处民宿，这里是我最喜欢的一处。因为很舒适，我几乎有两整天没出去就在室内休息。另外两处民宿为我提供了旅游时的住处，而这里确实让我不禁想象如果以后来东京生活该多美好。

The room is spacious and comfortable with great lighting and a strong Japanese style. The house overall feels very homey. The landlord is warm, friendly, and interesting. There are many delicious eateries nearby, and it’s quite convenient to walk to Shinjuku and Kabukicho.
During my stay in Tokyo, I stayed in three different homestays, and this one was my favorite. It was so comfortable that I spent almost two whole days just relaxing indoors. The other two homestays provided me with a place to stay while traveling, but this one truly made me imagine how wonderful it would be to live in Tokyo.
I loved all of the house decor and Min was very kind. Easy access to tons of amenities and super friendly host.
Awesoome people:)

Min and Haru were great hosts! Their share house was comfortable and it was perfect for several reasons: I stayed in a private room that was spacious and had nice views, the other guests were lovely which created an organic community during my stay, finally the share house is in a prime location—walkable to many shops and restaurants and easy access to many subway lines to go anywhere in Tokyo!
좋은 위치에 친절하신 사장님이 있는 숙소입니다. 사장님이 한국어를 잘하시니 한국사람은 불편함 없이 이용 가능합니다.
Host was great and friendly, would come back again

This was our second stay at Min and Haru’s place, and it continues to be the perfect location for exploring the city. Min was incredibly helpful, always ready to assist with any questions we had. The area is surrounded by amazing restaurants and multiple convenience stores, making it easy to grab late-night meals.
Amazing host. Room was spacious and better than I imagined. Good vibes😊
