房间本身很好、但是在歌舞伎町附近，晚上频繁的有警车和120经过，警笛声音巨大，日本的警车、急救车声音不是一般的扰民，第一天入住晚上10:00到凌晨6:00断断续续一共响了6次，后面两天少了点…会不会被吵到完全看运气了
It’s my third time coming here and as always it’s perfect, thanks Min and Haru ! ❤️ See you next time

I really enjoyed my stay in Min and Haru's airbnb. The room and shared spaces were very clean and stocked with anything you might need. Best of all was the location, it is great for tourists. There is a super convenient bus stop nearby that loops through many major neighborhoods. The hosts were very kind and easy to communicate with. I would absolutely stay here again!

Min was very helpful when giving recommendation and have everything that you need on hand possible to help. It was a great and welcoming place! Will definitely recommend to anyone that wants to stay in a lively place!
Wonderful stay as always, one of my go to places whenever I stay in Tokyo.

They're lovely and the place is amazing. I loved my stay. Will be staying there for sure if in Tokyo
Recommended!
Perfect location for staying near Shinjuku / Kabukicho with walkable distance to Golden Gai. Great stay, would stay again!

Very nice host, the place is clea, big and comfortable place to sleep (if you’re a solo traveler)
Take a note that the place is a bit noisy u can hear lots of ambulance and cars beacuse the building is on a main road .
Thank u thank u

Min & Haru made me feel right at home from check-in onwards! The room was spacious and spotless, the bed was comfortable too. The location is right in shinjuku and very easy to walk around or take public transport. It is also close to the nightlife area so be sure to have ear plugs if you’re sensitive to sound at night. Everyone was so friendly, I would gladly stay here again next time i’m in Tokyo. Thank you!
Incredible location, hosts were really sweet! Great place to stay if you’re solo travelling, you’ll meet great people here🙏🏼
foi uma estadia muito feliz! A localização é ótima, o quarto com chão de tatame tem seu charme! Quero voltar!
Great place to stay in Shinjuku/Korea town area. Min is a great host!

It was a really nice stay! Hopefully not the last time. The only negative is the noise from the street which was almost unbearable sometimes. Other then that it was a really good experience I am looking forward to come back!
Min is lovely and hospitable, the room was really perfect for my needs and conveniently located. I’m so glad I chose this as my base for Tokyo
Great location, easy to find and a good air conditioning unit in the room.

Min welcomed me with opened and the place felt like home. Min has over 12 years of experience, having people of different types of cultures come through and live in their lovely Sharehouse. The place was clean and orderly. Loved the tatami bedroom. The whole place was also filled with mini figures, trinkets and history galore. Location wise, its close to Shinjuku so thats nice. Min & Haru lives off-site but nearby, so they are just a text away if you need anything. Everyone has their own individually locked doors for your own privacy. If you're lucky, you get to meet people you vibe with at your stay there.
Make sure to bring your own big towel! They only provide cute small ones daily for your use, but they surely provide you with every other amenity you need.
I would surely live here again when I come back to Tokyo. Min is a lovely man with lots of experience in the industry.

Min is a greatly caring host and fun guy. I had a great time talking to him and the other guests! Everybody was really considerate of the shared spaces (bathroom, living room/ kitchen were always clean). I stayed in the Tatami room that was very spacious and has its own little balcony. The room faces a main road and it can be noisy at night (e.g. ambulance sirene). As the other guest recommended, I used some ear plugs and then slept very well.
Thank you for your hospitality!!! I am looking forward to stay here again!

For my first trip to this part of the world as an American, I couldn't have asked for a better host than Min and Haru. Every instruction was explained clearly, the entire house had labels on how to operate things, and Min was always around to answer questions or just to chat. He even had specific recommendations on medical clinics when that was needed for a small injury.
The whole place really felt like a home with other residents about, but still a very clean and organized home. When I come back to Tokyo, this is the place I will be staying again, because it felt like /the/ way to best experience the city.
Min and other residents were really patient at explaining things we weren't familiar with (regarding Japanese customs, etc.)
If you want an authentic Japanese living experience, with a warm lived-in atmosphere, this is the place to be.

Min and Haru were awesome, super friendly and very helpful, the place is nice and clean, it was close to Kabukicho so many things to do by night, also close to the cinema and to the stations, I definitely recommend this place!

Very good communication and friendly host
Exactly what you see on the pictures
Good spot for exploring Tokyo

2박으로 예약한게 아쉬울 정도로 정말 만족스러운 숙소였습니다. 숙소도 깔끔하고 쾌적했지만, 무엇보다도 사장님 두 분이 정말 친절하시고 따뜻하게 맞아주셔서 더 기분 좋은 시간을 보낼 수 있었어요. 사장님이 한국인이라는 것만으로도 여행하는 동안 안심하고 즐겼던 것 같습니다. 다음에는 꼭 더 길게 머무르며 여유롭게 즐기고 싶은 곳이에요. 좋은 기억 만들어주셔서 감사합니다!

Such a special home and shared space - the location is absolutely amazing if you’re in the mood for an energetic part of the city. I felt right at home and had a hard time leaving. I will be back though! Can’t wait!

The place was really cool and the hosts were welcoming. The only downside is there could have been an extra washbasin as it didn't feel like there was enough space for this for the amount of people staying and the price. Apart from that it was a great stay and would recommend.

Min is a very dedicated host! Thank you for everything! The flat is very well located in centric Shinjuku and easy to reach. The flat is very clean, quite and well organized. For sure when I go back to To Tokyo I will stay there again. I recommend it to everyone .

This is a GREAT newly renovated apartment with everything you need for a short or longer stay. Being in the 9th floor the apartment offers great views over Shinjuku. Dont miss out to go to the rooftop terrace to take in the nightlights of the city!

Very centrally located it offers the perfect base to explore Tokio. The nightlife, shopping and great restaurants for all budgets are just around the corner.

Min as a host is very friendly and helpful. Communication was very fast and accommodating and during the stay he always kept in touch to ensure we have all we need.

There are also other fellow travellers sharing this apartment with whom you can socialise in the comfortable common kitchen area.

EVERYBODY WHO WANTS TO STAY IN TOKYO HAS TO STAY HERE!!!!

Min is one of the greatest guys i've ever met.
He is always around and helps you with everything and he knows a lot of good stories about Tokyo and the surrounding area.
The guesthouse is super clean, you have a private room and can also wash your clothes.
There is a balcony where you can smoke and the best is the roof.
Just go up there and have a beer over tokyo by night.
For me this is the best place in Tokyo and when i'm coming back to the city this will always be my first choice.

Greetings to you Min and thank you so much for all!
Best Man in Tokyo!!!
ITS SOOOOOO LOVELY ROOM WITH LOVELY MIN~~
For my first expérience with airbnb I couldn't dream better ! Very good place, in a good aera and min is very kindly!

Good location (Korean town in Shinjuku), only 10 minutes walk from Shinjuku Station & 5 minutes from Oedo Line Subway.

Place is clean & neat. Free wifi available as well.

Host is very friendly and stayed up late to wait for me because my flight was midnight.

I needed to a place to stay last min in Tokyo and Min's was a great choice. Very close to Shinjuku station area and a nice, clean guest house. Fun fellow travelers you can meet and get to know. Min is a super nice guy and a great host :)

Stay here while you're in Tokyo! Min was there to greet, meet, chat and befriend us. The place was clean, spacious and very well-positioned. My friend and I wanted to stay in the same room for our trip and Min was very happy to arrange that, we were so pleased. Min, if I come back to Tokyo again, I'll stay at yours no doubt!
Min is the best host I've had in Japan. Nothing more to say except go to his place!

La guesthouse di Min è un posto davvero accogliente, pulita, attrezzata, spaziosa. Si incontrano altri viaggiatori.
Min è molto disponibile e sa dare degli ottimi consigli rispetto alla zona o quello che c'è da fare.
La zona è davvero comoda.
Like him a lot. Better experience than staying in a hostel.
The place is comfortable to stay in and its situated very near to the main cities in Tokyo. Min was cool and sucha nice person to be with. Looking forward for my next visit in Tokyo! =)

Min is a great guy and very friendly. He responds quickly and is easy to communicate with. The place has a great location just outside the party area in a quieter neighbourhood and close to the metro. Not much heat in the bedrooms and the sleeping mats are a little thin but overall a great place to use a home base to explore Tokyo. Good value for the money.

Min说我们是第一个从中国来的客人，旅舍的地段就在东新宿站，很方便，其实是在韩国城里。楼下就是超市，咖啡馆。房间干净，热水充分，除了杯子和枕头稍微旧了些，你需要自助套上被套和枕套，另外最好自备毛巾和浴巾。楼下有个客厅加厨房，可以自制咖啡，和其他的旅客喝酒聊天，有个小阳台可以抽烟，附近就是著名的酒吧区和红灯区，红灯区里的治安得稍微注意，半夜回旅馆最好还是从东新宿站出。住的时间太短，没来得及和Min多交流，他人不错，韩国人在东京，娶了位日本太太。
Thanks for having us at your place! Awesome company and excellent location!

there are many great reviews of Min place and I agree with everyone, he realy is a great host, makes lots of efforts to make your stay comfortable and his flat is very convenient. Pour les français désireux de découvrir Tôkyô ce point de chute est parfait que vous soyez seul ou plusieurs. Pour un premier voyage cet appartement à plusieurs bon points, comme le fait que Min parle couramment anglais, qu'il soit dévoué (par ex ma valise s'était égarée à Zurich et il à passé tout les coups de tél nécessaires pour que mon bagage soit livré devant sa porte). Un autre bon avantage est l'emplacement, il est dans un quartier vivant et sympa, juste à côté de la plus grande station de train/métro de la ville, ce qui est pratique pour tout visiter. il y a tout ce que vous voulez à une poignée de minutes et un très bon sushi juste en bas vraiment abordable! Le seul inconvénient est un de ses atouts aussi. vous serez proche de Shinjuku station, pratique pour tous vos déplacements, même en province car beaucoup de lignes partent de là mais elle est vraiment ENORME (3,6 millons de passagers /jour, deuxième plus grande gare du monde, plus de deux cents sorties...) alors si vous ne la connaissez pas déjà un peu, s'y retrouver peut être une gageure. Si vous débarquez de France, ce sera le terminus naturel du train qui vous ramène de Narita.  Se rendre ensuite chez votre hôte n'est pas facile, surtout avec une grosse valise. Je vous propose donc quelques instructions pour arriver plus facilement chez lui. Le truc pour marcher moins et pas se perdre c'est d'aller à la station suivante.En descendant du quai, vous tomberez vite sur la yamanote line de la compagnie JR east, code couleur vert. Vous devrez acheter un ticket dans un des automates. Au dessus, une carte, trouvez en une en caractères latins. Vous allez à shin-ôkubo, juste après. Les chiffres écrits à côté, c'est le prix, 130yens soit 1 euro en ce moment. Après, prenez votre métro (direction ikkebukuro,ueno...) et là; à shin-ôkubo, tout est simple, une seule sortie. Devant la bouche, vous passez sous les rails à votre droite puis vous  reprenez la première à droite, juste après et vous suivez les rails sur une petite route/allée sur 500m environ. vous allez croiser une rue plus importante que vous ne pouvez pas traverser directement, tournez à gauche (càd ne repassez pas sous les rails) et restez sur ce trottoir, vous êtes sur le bon, plus que 600m pour arriver chez Min. restez attentifs, il y plein d'enseignes, c'est assez confus mais regardez bien toutes les devantures de votre côté, vous allez passer devant une supérette un peu grande k-mart (en bleu), c'est la seule de la rue.L'imeuble est le précédant, l'entrée est dans la ruelle qui part sur votre gauche, assenceur, 9m étage, youpi! vous êtes arrivé!

Min is a great host - he went out of his way to arrange early morning (4am) transportation for me to the airport and for my friends to Tsukiji fish market. The space was a little tight for the 6 of us, but Min responded to our concerns quickly. Thank you for having us!

Without Min, my trip to Tokyo would have fallen flat. His knowledge of Shinjuku and the surrounding areas is unlimited and he's not shy about having a drink either. His place is three floors with plenty of options for accommodations. All the bedrooms were very clean. The wifi is great. There's a stove and small oven (suitable for grilling fish.) I really couldn't have asked for more.
Seriously : the best place to go in Tokyo !

Its a nice and clean place. The room as advertised. The toilets and hot water all working well. Clean Towels provided. Location quite close from shinjuku station. But becareful, airbnb map is not trustful. You must really contact min for the actual location in google maps. Min is really helpful, Cheerful personality and sometimes he bought you breakfast. Hehe. Otsukare samadesta.
Great location, really nice host. Good for the money.

Warm welcome, excellent location, met a lot of good people, so amazing experience. It was by far the best home stay I did. Thanks a lot min, and sure I gonna go again to your place if I come back to Tokyo.
I had a good time at Shinjuku Guesthouse! Min is a great host. If I ever come back to Tokyo I would make another booking. Thank you for giving me accommodation, Min!

Min was a great host.! I got lost in Shinjuku when finding Min`s place, but Min got on his bike, found me and directed me to the apartment. If you had any questions Min would gladly help you. The rooms a great, and social. If you travel alone as I did, this is a good place to get to know new people from around the world, and have a great time.! I will stay at Min`s place on my next trip to Tokyo.! Thanks for all Min.

Je suis très satisfaite de mon séjour chez M. Min ; la chambre est minimaliste, bien propre,l'ambiance internationale et sympathique.
Quartier très central, pratique pour rayonner partout dans Tokyo.

I stayed for one week in this spacious appartment. Sometimes it gets crowded but when theres few people around its really an amazing place where you can meet other travelers easily.
Min is really kind and interested in people and also always easily reachable when in need of help and he occasionally comes to the appartment to check things out which i thought was really convenient.
Theres lots of convenient stores and places to eat close by and a don quijote store (where they sell everything) as well. The subway is only a few minutes away.
I definitely recommend this place!
A nice place to stay, clean and comfortable, with a welcoming and friendly host. Min's sharehouse is near the Shinjuku station, in a perfect position to visit the city!

I had a great stay with Min at Sharehouse. Min was a friendly host and the accommodations were clean and comfortable. Location seemed to be good as well, with a subway stop close by. I would definitely recommend Min's place to any friends visiting Tokyo.

Min was a very pleasant host to deal with! Even went out to look for me when I couldn't find the guest house! (my bad). Lovely man to chat with! The location is so close to Shin Okubo station, so going to places was ease! lots of eateries around the guest house, not a single dull moment!!

Sunki was a superb host. He greeted me by inviting along with other guests to an Izakaya. If you are looking to meet other travelers and locals, Sunki's place is where to go. The accomodation is simple and on the budget side, but this place is really about the atmosphere. I really enjoyed my stay.
Min is a really kind and helpful host! I've already stayed at Min's guest house before! Room is clean and the necessities are provided at the guest house!
Nice place! Great way to explore Shinjuku.
Nice house with great views and vibe. Very helpful host!

Min tok kontakt med meg rett etter at jeg hadde booket for å ønske meg velkommen og forklare veien, og sendte meg e-post noen dager før jeg skulle bo der for å spørre om tidspunkt. Da jeg ikke fant frem (selv om det egentlig er veldig lett) kom han og hentet meg. Det er et veldig sosialt sted, og på kvelden gikk alle ut og spiste med Min. Min er innom hver dag selv om han ikke bor der, og det føltes trygt at han sjekker ut forholdene. Shinjuku guesthouse føles som et minihostel, med tilhørende deling av bad og toalett som fungerte fint. Du sover på madrass på gulvet i noen av rommene som var helt OK for 1 natt. Alt i alt et fint besøk, og det ligger veldig sentralt til men samtidig litt utenfor senteret av Shinjuku som kan være ganske masete til tider.

Min was an excellent host: friendly, helpful and good fun to talk to. The room was clean and as described and the overall ambiance of the place was great for someone travelling alone. It was a great way to meet other people to go out with. The location was perfect as I could easily access the north of the city and busier areas such as Shinjuku station (on foot). The immediate area had plenty of places and Min happily pointed out the best to go to.　I would definitely go back. In fact I have already booked up!

The place is so well located within Shinjuku and the rooms are very clean and tidy. The Landlord, Min, is such a nice person. He helped me when I most needed and made my stay much easier. The environment is brilliant as there are people from all around the world and that makes it easy to find a plan when you did not expect it. It is probably the best guesthouse in Tokyo.

Very well located at Shinjuku, lots of shops and stores around.
Host Min was very nice and also invited me and an another guest to dinner
which was so hidden I would never find it by myself. Through that I get to know Tokyo through an another perspective which couldn't if I stayed in an anonymous hotel which I did in the beginning.
Thanks, Min!
Hope to see you soon...

I only got to stay one night at Min's, but Min was very welcoming and friendly. I wish we'd had more time to chat and I could check out the area more which was in the heart of "korean town". His place is very convenient for Shinjuku, just a few minutes walk from several stations, Metro and JR, and an easy walk to Shinjuku station itself.
I had a private room, which was fine. Clean and tidy. It was one of the wooden floor ones, so a bit hard, though Min provided plenty of futon bases so ok for me. Others may prefer a tatami room.
There were several other people staying and it was quite lively, but didn't disturb me.
I'd stay again!

Min was extremely lovely and helpful. The room was basic as described but everything was clean and comfortable. A lovely welcoming place that felt more like a friendly apartment than a guest house. Min was around during the day and more than happy to offer advice or just have a down to earth chat.
The location is perfect for exploring Shinjuku and about a five minute walk to a train station, 12 minut walk to main Shinjuku station.
I will definitely be staying here again next time.
Thanks so much Min.

Min is an awesome guy who keeps a super tidy house and loves Korean BBQ (which everyone should!). I stayed for about a week and Min, other guests and I went out to a close by All you can eat and drink Korean place which is a favourite of his (twice actually it's that good). I defiantly recommend doing this if you get the chance.

The place is really convenient for all your Tokyo needs with the closest station being Shin-Okubo which has the Yamanote Line which runs through almost every destination you could want to go. There are tons of places to eat nearby but this being Japan that is true almost anywhere however there are still loads of great places nearby.

I would definitely stay with Min again when I come back to Tokyo, and would especially recommend him for people traveling alone as you will get to meet loads of cool people.

I had a very positive experience staying at Min's Shinjuku Sharehouse. Min was a great host who was very friendly and was fun to hang out with. He shares his past travel experiences and life wisdom.

The sharehouse was a great place to meet fellow travelers. I really enjoyed all the people I met there. I don't think I would have enjoyed my visit to Tokyo as much if I had stayed in a private hotel.

I will book Min's sharehouse again the next time I'm in Tokyo.

The accommodation was effortless. A+ location and accommodating host. Min was generous with his time and gave me space to explore the city. I didn't use the kitchen facilities, but the toilet/s and shower was clean and well stocked. Thanks Min!

Good location!

Min is very kind, he make arrangement to my request of leaving my bag at the place before time stated.

As my stay in Tokyo is short, I am out most of the time. Manage to chat with others guest in the night, a nice experience.

Overall, is a nice stay.

Shinjuku Sharhouse was an awesome place to get to know Tokyo from. The location is right in the middle of real Tokyo center, with everything you coild need steps away. Min was an amazing host, relaxed and easy going. He explained everything, answered lots of questions I had, introduced me to some other nice travellers and made me feel at home. The room was sunny and clean, just as it looks in the pictures. I highly recomend this as a great budget option for singles or groups, I felt safe and comfortable. Thanks so much!!!
As from previous, it was still a great stay. Min will make you feel like its your own home. Until next time. ;))

Min was a fantastic host. Communication with him was easy, and he personally arrived on the day I checked-in to ensure the process was as smooth as possible. The guesthouse itself is clean, and has all the amenities that one needs. It is located in Shinjuku, and close to access to public transport.

I would definitely recommend this guesthouse for travelers looking for a centralised, cheap and clean guesthouse .
Great place to stay in a beautiful area. Would visit again. Thanks min.
Very clean place. Close to subway station. Good experience~

Very good and clean place to stay. Min is very friendly and nice host. Managed to get dinner together with other guest. Really having a good time. Will come again if I would like to visit Tokyo again.
Min is a really nice guy.The room is neat and tidy.Very good!
우리가 간 날은 숙박객들이 없어서 아쉬웠는데 친구와 둘이서 그 큰집을 이용할수있는것이 매우 좋았다. Min은 굉장히 숙박객들을 편하게 지낼수있도록 해주어서 꼭 다음에 다시가고싶다.

Min was a great host, very helpful and friendly. Whenever i asked Min for help, whether it was when i got lost and needed to find my way, or to find a good place to eat or shop, he was very quick to reply and help me find what i needed.
Min's place is very cosy and clean, has nice views on Shinjuku from the rooms as well as everyting needed for a comfotable stay. The guesthouse is close to lots of cafes and restaurants with delicios food, shops of all kinds and several stations, so the location is perfect.
Traveling on my own, the guesthlouse was a perfect place to stay and make new friends. Overall, great Airbnb experience.

Perfect! 2nd stay at Min's place; chose to return because it was perfect the 1st round too! Very comfortable, perfectly clean and hygienic, has all the facilities I need and more just for added comfort. Plenty of people to meet and have interesting conversations with - and simultaneously enough space and peace and quiet to relax on my own time and get a good night's sleep. Great location - close to metro, convenience stores, supermarkets, restaurants, parks, tourist attractions. definitely will return.
Good stay - efficient, comfortable, clean and hygienic. 3rd time staying - will definitely return.

Realy good time in Tokyo,
the room is perfect, close to everthing.
If I came back, it will be here.
thanks so much.

Had a great time staying here. Min was very accommodating and the rooms were terrific. The location is probably the best part, as you are only a 10 minute walk at most from near anything you could ever need (convenience stores, supermarkets, shopping outlets, metro lines, restaurants, etc.). If/when I come back to Tokyo I would absolutely stay again

Min is awesome. He is a great and caring host. He wants you to have a pleasant stay and he will give you good inside tips and take you out for dinner and beers. Good clean place close to all attractions. Recommended.

The location is very good, right in the shopping centre of Tokyo/Shijuku. Few minutes fr subway station. Very convenient. However it's a hostel so it's a little too crowd. The room is small and its noisy since the walls are very thin. Also we need to take turns to take shower during rush hours. I couldn't sleep very well because I can hear everyone talking and walking after mid night. So if u r a sound sleeper, it should be fine w u.
Very clean and comfortable apartment as described. Excellent location. Min was fantastic; helpful and friendly in all respects. Thanks a lot.

Min was wonderful, present, useful, and always in a good mood. He send very specific instructions which made the place ease to find even for a first timer. The guest house is well situated, minutes from all Shinjuku has to offer on one side, and delicious Korean food on the other.  The place was great, bedrooms upstairs or downstairs and a great common area in between, with tv, kitchen, laundry room and bathrooms. The wifi was perfect and the view most inspiring.
Min is very nice and supportive. Very well located guesthouse. It can get crowded but overly satisfied.

Min was a fun host. He made time for small talk and made me feel very welcomed at his place. The apartment was clean and tidy. If you're looking more for a communal vibe and would like to meet some fellow travelers, I'd highly recommend staying at Min's.
Min was a great host, even took us for drinks! The place was busy but the atmosphere was good. Thank you Min!

Min was a very nice host, not complicated at all, very fast with replying and providing the right information. Good situated in Shinjjuku and as described in the profile. Very professional.

Would definitely go back there.

Thank you, Min!
Cozy place, recommend all on all

Min is the man ! The place is nice, near shinjuku and you ll probably meet cool people from around the world! Min gives you fines adresses for food and he is very helpfull in every kind! I ll come back :)
Thank you!

Highly recommend. 3rd time staying at Min's place. Wouldn't stay anywhere else if I was in Tokyo. His place is clean, welcoming, and efficiently set up for short and  long term guests. Min is flexible and friendly, and the location is perfect for exploring Tokyo with easy access to the overground and underground trains. Min's place is also full of interesting people from all over the world so I have made good friends every time I've stayed there. Will definitely return. Thanks Min.
Great place for those, who are looking for a bed and shower. If you're in Tokyo for exploration, this will be more than enough.

It's my first backpacking experience and Min's been really helpful and provided me with all information I need. The place itself is clean and tidy. The location is also very convenient, 5 mins walk to the closest train station. It's been a great experience to live in the shared house and meet other travellers, will definitely stay there again if I went to Tokyo again :)
It's my second time here.. The location and the place just perfect for me

Min is a really good host and fun to talk with. I really enjoy my stay there and it's a really cozy place :)
Best part is that you can meet people from different countries and have a really good chat with them (or drink haha)
Highly recommend anyone who travels alone to stay here!

This is my first Airbnb experience in Min's sharehouse, the feeling is totally different with living in a hotel or hostel, but like living in your home or in the university hall with friends. Min is very kind and helpful. As soon as I finish my booking, Min contacted me and send me necessary information.
The location of sharehouse is great, really near the Higashi Shinjuku metro station, and only take few minutes to walk to Shinjuku JR station, so you can easily go to other places of Tokyo, but also can fully enjoy yourself in the exciting Shinjuku without worry about the traffic.
The sharehouse is very clean, necessary facilities are all ready. Min made a lot of decorations by himself, very sweet. There is a lounge in the 9th floor. After a day of trip, guests would gathering there at the evening, talking with each other, eating some snacks, watching TV or listening the music, the atmosphere is relax and sweet, most impotently, making you want to come back in the future. At last, Min is really a good talker.

The host was very friendly and made me feel very welcome. The place was very clean and the facilities were more than adequate. Min is very helpful and provided alot of information. He also had quite alot of interesting stories to share and it was fun talking with him.

The location is also very convenient and I met alot of interesting travellers at this place. Highly recommended
這是我第一次到日本東京，感覺很好，房東很好人

Min was the sweetest host I've ever had, I felt like he was actually interested in getting to know me and help me out on my travels, which is admirable considering how many travellers must go through the place. This place is so cute and super clean on the inside, I was kind of shocked walking in. Great location, if I'm ever back in town I will definitely pop by.

Very friendly bloody Japanese Min, i like the hospitality and ease to communicate.
Clean place and good vibe due to different people come in every day.
I didn't get to enjoy the drinking on the rooftop this time.. will do next for sure.
Min was an extremely warm host. He takes the time to understand who you are as a person and truly enjoys having people around. He was also very flexible with booking. Definitely recommend!

Min is really reachable, and you understand it as soon as you arrive.
He explained how everything worked to me in the flat, even the basics one. He can give you some advices of places you should visit and try to make connection with other gu0sy of the sharehouse which is pretty cool for people coming alone in Tokyo.
He really likes doing airbnb, and the bonus of the flat is the rooftop where we had drinks and barbecues all together.
i clearly recommand this flat, clean, well located with everything you need!

Min is the most amazing host I had ever meet. He is very kind, nice and so funny !
Also his Airbnb is very clean and very good located. I had such a amazing time here thanks to Min & his wife & packpackers & OMG THERE IS A ROOFTOP!
Thank you !!!
Min is a very chill and nice guy. The room was great and clean. Location is very convenient.
Min is very helpful and friendly. The bnb was very nice and clean and always filled with interesting new people. Couldn't have asked for any more.

I can say nothing but extremely positive things about Min and his accommodation. Location is amazing, extremely convenient and offers nice views of the busy Higashi-Shinjuku area. Room was perfectly clean and the dual-floor and rooftop access was amazing. For convenience I don't think it can be beaten, you literally have about 5 convenience stores within 2 minutes walk around the location. Subway station is about a 5minute walk with good and versatile transport links.

Min himself is a really great guy, extremely funny, warm and is great at trying to engage with everyone and get people interacting with each other which is great when you're looking to meet new people, especially when travelling solo for the first time as I was.

Whenever I plan on coming back to Tokyo this will be my go-to accommodation, I could not recommend it more.

Je n'est qu'une chose à dire: EXCELLENT :) :) :)
Min était vraiment génial et très gentil avec nous avec se gros avantage de pouvoir faire des soirées en terrasse :D. Au niveau de la chambres c'est propre, le quartier est très vivant et assez bruyant mais on si habitue très vite ;) et puis il est bien desservie par les transports en commun
Si je retourne au Japon c'est sûr que je retournerai chez Min ;)
Min is very kind and happy. He was always helping me and making sure everything was fine. Thanks, Min!!! : )

I had a great time here! Min is a great guy! He is very friendly, helpful and fun to hang out with. Staying at his place really felt like staying with family. You can sit down on the roof with people and have fun after coming back in the evening. The place is clean and the location is very convenient. Would definitely stay here again when I come back to Tokyo!!

Asian female travel solo. Experience was amazing. Location is awesome. Lots of convenient stores and restaurant nearby.
Easy to navigate upon arrival. Amenities are simple but sufficient.
The place is immaculate and cozy. Co-ad room but you still have your own privacy. Will definitely be back again!
Thanks min-san once again!

I can't really say a lot but one thing for sure the pictures of the place are real without any editing at all (which is very great because it's really clean, neat, cozy, etc). Basically you won't feel being deceived by the pictures and the reviews if you come here. Min is very hospitable!

One word PERFECT PERFECT PERFECT for the simple share house....clean,frendly,...
È stata una bella esperienza l appartamento per una share house e veramnete bella pulita,organizzata, e min e una perosona gentilissima,disponibile,e molto amichevole.
i reccommend min and thi place is in the center,you have restaurant,market,night life,etc

11박12일동안 머물렀는데 사장님이 굉장히 많이 신경써주셨어요!
일단 방이랑 화장실이 깔끔해요! 사장님이 직접 청소를 다 하셔서 쾌적하게 이용 할 수 있습니다
제가 묵는 동안 외국인 여행객도 많이 있어서 다같이 맥주마시고 파티도 하면서 재밌게 즐기다 왔네요 ㅎㅎ
파티할 땐 사장님과 사모님이 직접 요리도 해주셔서 좋았습니다
한국어,일본어,영어로 모두 의사소통이 가능하신 분이라 굉장히 편했어요
위치는 신주쿠역에서는 조금 걸어야하지만 히가시신주쿠역에서 도보로 2분거리라서 다른 지역으로 이동할때 좋아요!
다음에 도쿄에 또 가게되면 이곳에서 다시 묵고싶습니다 ㅎㅎㅎ
여기에서 머무는 동안 정말 편하게 지낸거같아요. 시설도 깔끔해서 좋았고 호스트님도 성격 좋으시고 정말 마음에 들었어요!

접근성도 좋고, 상권가가 근접해있어서 쇼핑하고 밥 먹기에도 좋아요. 또 근처에 노래방도 있더라구요.
사진이랑 방이 똑같아요. 침대나 화장실, 샤워실도 깔끔합니다.
제일 좋은 건 호스트님이예요.
뭐 물어보면 친절하게 다 가르쳐주세요.
또 한국말로 편하게 대화할 수 있었어요. 영어랑 일본어도 굉장히 잘 하시구요.

It was awesome time i spent in this house and especially the host was very kind and friendly and people who met there were good we could talk each other friendly and drink together i like to stronly recommend u this house

한국인들에게 : 도쿄의 번화가를 돌아볼수있는데에 있어서 최적화된 위치, 사장님 영어 한국어 일본어 모두능통하심, 화장실쾌적, 인테리어에서보이는 미적감각 모든 부분이 완벽하고 다음에 올때에도 이 곳에 머무를 예정.
To Foreigners: First of all the location of this place is just perfect (main streets:Harajuku Meijijingumae,Sibuya,Asakusa ..etc dont need to transfer).You could also just walk to Kabukicho and Sin Okubo.
interior of this place is pretty artistic which makes you very comfortable feelings. I was shocked that hostage made all the beds' frames by himself(we can see how he pay attentions to his customers.)Bathroom was clean+toilet flushes freaken great..all of it was very comfortable . If i have another plan to visit Japan , hell yeah i ll stay in this place.
Great location and easy check in. Min was welcoming and helpful. I recommend staying here if your visiting Tokyo!

Min is a very friendly host and his sharehouse is pretty comfortable. It's located in a really convenient place to explore Tokyo. It has access to all the amenities one could ask for. All in all, I can recommend Min's place to anyone who's looking to stay in the heart of Tokyo's night life and still be within a budget.

Min est une personne très accueillante et très serviable. Nous avons pu échanger de bon moment ensemble. Son auberge de jeunesse dispose de tout le nécessaire pour s'y sentir bien et l'emplacement est idéal.
Je recommande ce logement.

There is a reason Min is a superhost.  of all the hostels/sharedspaces, i've stayed in Tokyo, this was the cleanest, most comfortable, and most well managed.  In addition to the accommodations being, clean, comfortable, and as described, Min was incredibly friendly and interested in getting to know the people staying with him.  He routinely invited us up to the common space to have drinks and dinner with his wife the rest of the occupants.  Unfortunately i was only able to drop by momentarily but it was nice to meet everybody.  Also great location if you are interested in some late fun filled nights in Shinjuku.  Its in walking distance from all of the neighborhood's famous nightlife.  also pleasant view from our room's small balcony as well as the roof. hope to stay here again.

Very walkable, just next to Kabukicho! Close to metro as well! Place is clean and safe! It's time to plan for your trip and meet some new friends here! Min is a so helpful and friendly host too, Thanks Min anyway!
Great host. Min is the man. Awesome location close to everything.
If you want to experience night life in Tokyo, you should choose here.

If you want somewhere to stay that is centrally located this is it. Everything is just about a 3 to 4 stop away by metro. (Shinjuku, Harajuku, Shibuya). Just get on the metro and ride. Metro is right down the sidewalk. We had a wonderful time staying at Mins place. He even did a guest meet up on the rooftop with food and good conversation. Don't think twice about booking this place, just do it.
Joe & Melaney San Diego (Leucadia)California
신주쿠에서 얼마 멀지도 않은 히가시 신주쿠에 위치해서 일본지리를 잘 몰라도 정말 찾아가기 쉬웠습니다 또 사장님께서 일본어 영어 한국어를 모두 잘 사용하셔서 한국어로 체크인하는데 아무 문제가없었습니다 방도 정말 좋았구요 4박5일 친절한사장님과 좋은 게스트하우스 그리고 멋진 친구들덕분에 잊지못할 여행이 된거 같습니다

This was one of the greatest airbnb stays of my life! Great host, place , location and excellent vibe!
Min was great! Very nice and chill, always answered my question quickly and the little barbies he threw on the roof were some of the highlights of my trip.
The place was really nice. Very clean, nice vibe, all the necessary resources for a comfortable stay. The roof was great and had a nice view.
The area was perfect to get acquainted with the hustle and bustle of Shinjuku life. Right next to Kabukicho you can walk 5 minutes for golden Gai, 5 minutes for the main nightlife areas and a short 10 minutes from Shinjuku station. The subway station is right on the corner of the block and if utilised right, can get you everywhere fairly quick!
I had a great time here and definitely recommend to any solo or group travellers looking for a place to stay!

This place is extremely nice, very clean and cosy, location is excellent, with metro station just 2 minutes away, full of bars, restaurants, supermarkets, shops, and the whole Shinjuku area jut 5 minutes away. It's a perfect place to explore Tokyo since all districts are ~30-45 mins away by metro/train from it. Min is an excellent host, he always is ready and happy to help with anything you need, and no wonder how awesome it is to enjoy the rooftop in the evening with some drinks and barbecue!. I really recommend this place!

Had a pleasant stay at the sharehouse in the 6F. Min is easy to communicate to, and responds almost instantly! He was clear with directions, and very helpful. I arrived a few hours later at night when I landed, and he was so gracious to wait for my arrival to help with my luggage up the stairs (elevator was down at the time), and to check in. Location is very central, about a 12 min walk to shinjuku station, and lots of restaurants and the heart of shinjuku accessible within minutes. The only con is that there is only one shower shared by everyone. However, the hot water was made up for it. Would highly recommend if wanting to stay in the heart of shinjuku.

너무 친절하시고 편리하고 좋았어요. 걸어서 6~7분 정도 걸리는
일본 〒160-0022 Tōkyō-to, Shinjuku-ku, Shinjuku, 5 Chome−１８−21 쪽에 가면 대여 자전거가 있는데 비자, 마스터카드가 있으시다면 하루 1620엔에 이용하실 수 있어요.
전기자전거라 힘들지 않고 저는 공항 왔다갔다할 때 제외하고 도쿄 전역 자전거로 잘 다녔습니다.
일본어 영어 한국어 모두 너무 잘하셔서 소통하기 편했고, 다른 게스트분들이랑 소개도해주시고 편하게 지낼수있게 해주셨어요.위치도 신주쿠에 가까워서 밤늦게 놀다가 들어와도 좋으며 근처에 큰 돈키호테가 있습니다. 다음에 일본여행을 가더라도 꼭 여기서 지낼거같아요.
All is awesome

운 좋게 혼자서 여자 3인실을 사용하게 되어서 6인 도미토리가 어떤지는 모르지만 공동으로 사용했던 공간은 매우 좋음. 냉장고와 부엌도 사용 가능하고 무엇보다 발다리 마사지 기계에 감동 ㅠ

가성비 좋은 숙소. 추천.

Mr. Min is very kindly and friendly person.

I strongly recommend this house who travels alone. Because you can hang out with another foreigner friends even though you are awkward first.

Don’t be hesitate.

Honestly I enjoyed my stay so much at Min's place! If you are keen on interacting and meeting new people, this is definitely the place for you. Everything is just as described and there's occasionally a small party with everyone in the common room or the rooftop. Absolutely great stay and experience!

This is my second time here... what does it mean? Everything is super.
Place, host, guests. It's a must in Tokyo

Min is a great host, he helped me with settling into the place, suggesting spots to go around the area and even had BBQ parties on his rooftop! Definitely will visit Min's place again if I'm coming to Tokyo :)

히가시 신주쿠 역이 바로 앞에 있고, 교통비가 아깝다면 신주쿠역 까지 도보로 한 15분 정도 걸으셔도 무방합니다. 번화가 까지는 도보로 10분 내로 갈 수 있어서 편리했습니다. 한국 분이시라면, 사장님이 한국인이시기 때문에 의사소통애 대한 걱정도 안하셔도 됩니다. 샤워실이 하나라는 점 말고는 청결도와 위치 모두 좋았습니다. 저녁에는 숙박중인 사람둘과 맥주도 마시면서 이야기도 할 수 있어 즐겁게 지냈습니다.
Very friendly and sociable host, Min - thank you so much for making my Tokyo trip so enjoyable and pleasant!
사장님이 너무 친절하시고 비오는 날 우산도 챙겨주시는 세심한 배려에 숙소 위치는 또 말할 것도 없습니다 샤워실이 한개라 걱정되긴 했지만 쓰는데 전혀 불편하진 않았습니다 그리고 무엇보다 뷰가 너무 좋아용 ㅠㅠ
Min is really friendly! Will come back soon!

호스트님이 일단 너무 친절하셔서 좋으셔요. 체크인할때 주위에 먹을거리나 교통같은거도 잘 알려주시고 친근하게 대해주십니다. 밤에 마음맞는분들끼리 맥주도 먹을 수 있고, 방도 청결합니당. 위치도 일단 히가시 신주쿠역과 굉장히 가깝고, jr선 타기 위한 신주쿠역이나 신오쿠보역도 걸어가기 부담스러운 거리는 아니라서 좋아용. 바로 주위에 편의점, 스시집, 게다가 돈키호테까지 있어서 금상첨화 입니다. 굳이 단점을 꼽자면 샤워실이 하나밖에 없구, 7인실을 쓰게되면 물론 감안하실점이지만 수면에 예민하신 분들은 불편하실수도 있을것 같아용 제가 갔을땐 코 골던 분도 계시긴 했었어성ㅠㅠ 그래도! 이 점을 충분히 감안하더라도 지금까지 해외여행 다니면서 묵었던 숙소중에 가장 만족스러웠습니다. 다시 도쿄에 와도 이 숙소에 묵을것 같네요ㅎㅎ 고민하시지 말구 예약!

Min&Haru are Welcoming, open and friendly hosts.  I Shared a room and the common space with nice people! Everything is clean and the place is well located with a nice view on the rooftop! I recommend this place and Will come back for sure if around Tokyo once
Nice place and people ! Thanks

Shinjuku Sharehouse was a great stay and I enjoyed my time there very much. Min was very attentive and answered any questions I had. Also he was very friendly which made it easy to communicate. Would absolutely stay there again if I go to Tokyo in the future.

This was my first time coming to Tokyo and I was traveling by myself, but luckily the Min-san and Haru-san were very helpful and recommended so many places to go. Moreover, the location was very near the station and easy to spot, so no worries! There are lots of shops and restaurants as well in the neighborhood.
The rooms were very neat and tidy, but there is only one bathroom for every guests, so if the rooms are fully booked you might consider waking up early to prevent queuing for a shower.
신주쿠 시내 가깝구 펀의점이 많구 돈키호테가 바로 옆에 있습니다! 전철역이 정말 가가워요!! 깔끔하고 쾌적하고 밤에 야경이 죽여줍니다:) 원래 다 그러는지는 모르겠으나 다음날 방에 오실 손님들이 어던 분들인지 기본적 인걸 알려 주십니다 ! 정말 멋진곳 이고 다시 찾으러 올 아쉬움만 남겨두고 잊지못할 추억 만들고 왔습니다 ;)

분위기 정말 좋습니다, 히가시 신주쿠역에서 가까워서 교통편도 괜찮구요. 사장님이 진짜 친절하셔서 하나하나 관심 다 써주십니다. 샤워하는공간은 한개밖에 없는데 그렇게 불편한점 못 느꼈고요. 게스트하우스 치고는 정말 편하게 쉬다가 갔습니다.
One of the best places to stay in tokyo. Had a great time and will go again if I am ever back in japan
Min and Hari were great hosts. The location is amazing and the rooms are too cool.

Excellent accueil dans de la part de Min et Haru qui parlent bien anglais. Auberge bien située dans le quartier de Shinjuku. Prestation basique mais tout est prévu, bien pensé et tout à fait satisfaisant pour le prix.

The place was amazing, Min is a great host, He helped with all the information and made stay easy. Location was perfect and in the middle of town, did not face any problem through out my stay, Would love to stay again for sure. Thank you very much Min for being such a good host.

Shinjuku Share House is a really great place to stay in Tokyo, Min was a perfect host. It is well situated, next to the subway and all facilities. The house is very cute, cosy, and decorated with good taste. I really enjoyed my stay here so, go for it !
Min was very kind and very helpful. I will stay again next time i go to tokyo.

Min and Haru their place was and will always be my solid Tokyo base.  The location is really good and everything in the sharehouse is just so incredibly chill that it pretty much feels like a second home. For this second trip, Min and Haru helped me out a lot which I am super thankful for. And last but not least, I had a fantastic time in Shinjuku with the other guests :)

If you’re planning to stay in Japan, look no further! Min and Haru’s share-house is an amazing location to explore all of Tokyo Japan! Their place is clean, safe, quirky, and all of their other guests were all very friendly. I even made a couple of good friends while staying there! Min was full of suggestions on what to do during my stay and very helpful. I can’t wait to go back to Japan just for the simple fact that I’ll be staying at this place again! Thank you for making my first trip out of the country safe, memorable, and fun! ✨❤️

The place ideal to go around shinjuku and ikebukuro. Never worry bout foods as a lot food surroundings. Host really helpful especially be my friend translator when went to clinic.
Stay place is clean.

Min and Haru’s place is very clean stylish and in a great location. The hospitality revived here was great, with Min even cooking food and having drinks for New Years. They were always able to be contacted and ensured you had a great stay. Right up the road from the train station and around the corner from central Shinjuku. Great spot!
Min and Haru's place is so great I went back again!

The sharehouse is on a very convenient train line, it’s very easy to get around with less than 10mins walk in either direction. Everything was spotless and our housemates were great. Min was very helpful with hints and tips about the area, and lovely to talk to in general. There’s access to WiFi, a restaurant in the same building, a common room for cooking and hanging out, tea and coffee and small fridge in the dorm, and convenience stores nearby. Great place, we’re actually dropping in again tonight on the end of our holiday as a last stopover before the flight home. Definitely would recommend.

사장님도 친절하시고 시설도 너무 좋네요

We absolutely loved staying here. Min and Haru were very kind and getting to hang out with some of the other people staying at the sharehouse was a nice surprise. Can’t wait to be back one day!
The place was clean and comfortable. Min was very friendly and accommodating. Would be coming back again if I have the chance.

게하는 처음이라 사실 걱정 많이했는데 호스트분이 한국말도 잘하시고 친절하셔서 좋았어요.!
침대도 편하고 화장실도 편했는데 숙소 앞이 바로 도로여서 그런지 새벽에 사이렌소리가 많이 들렸어요! 'ㅅ' 그거 빼고는 다 좋았습니다~ 주변에 편의점도 많고 바로 근처에 돈키호테도 있어서 편리했습니다! 다음에 여행오면 또 지내고싶어요!

This is my second time in Tokyo and min and harus Airbnb is by far the best place I have stayed not only in Tokyo but ever. not only is the place extremely accommodating and  in a great location but min and Haru will host events to bring guests together like bbqs. As a solo traveler I made many great friends and would HIGHLY recommended any person coming to japan stays here
Convenient location to travel around. Good dorms as shown in photos. Min was a great host - super friendly and welcoming.
My stay at Min’s and Haru place was great, and I got to enjoy an easy checkin, friendly people, and a nice dinner on a rooftop in a very convenient area in Tokyo!

This is a great place to stay in Tokyo if you're looking for somewhere fairly central. The hosts were both very helpful and accommodating.

Min & Haru’s Sharehouse is outstanding. It’s extremely clean and the hospitality is incredible. 非常具CP值的青旅，房東不僅好客友善，更將我們當成家人相互扶持，更重要的是頂樓還有一個小空間可以看東京的夜景，提供給來自世界各地的旅友交流。

Was a great place to stay for my first trip to Tokyo. Really nice space for guests to get to know each other and make plans. Hosts were very knowledgeable about the area and had plenty of recommendations. I highly recommend this place for anyone looking to visit Japan.

Min & Haru’s place is amazing, i had such a great stay! They were super welcoming and helpful, and so fun and easy to chat with. I will definitely be back and i really recommend staying there if you want to have a good time!

This place is just awesome and a good way for group of friends or lone travelers to mingle with other people and enjoy Tokyo together. Min and Haru are great, the hostel is clean, in a very good position to explore Shinjuku and with very chill vibes.
도쿄여행 3번 전부 여기에서 숙박할 정도로 최고입니다.사장님이 너무 좋으시고 다양한 외국친구들도 만나고 위치좋고 모든게 완벽한 곳입니다.!! 또 갈거에요

I was intitally worried about sleeping at a hostel but Min was very welcoming and it my room ended up only having a few people who weren't loud and so I slept soundly! The rooftop also provided a brilliant view of Shinjuku, thanks again!
Highly recommend! This is in a fantastic location, is super clean and a great opportunity to meet other travellers. Min was an excellent host, super friendly and helpful with any questions I had :)

기본적인것도 구비되있고 저는 또 놀러갈 생각이있습니다

Good place for a short stay in Tokyo, about 10-15 minutes from Shinjuku station, and 7-10 minutes from Higashi-Shinjuku and Okubo stations. Convenience stores are very close by.
I visited in summer, so if you happen to get a bed next to the window the sunlight streaming in in the early morning (6am) can be disruptive to sleep. There is also only one shower room, although I never had to wait to use it during my stay.
The sleeping area is compact but spacious enough to feel like you have your personal space (even if the rest of the beds are occupied). Min and Haru also provide all guests with one small towel a day.

Would absolutely recommend staying here! The space itself is really cool and clean, and well situated for the metro or walking in to Shinjuku. The hosts - these are the highlight of the place! So friendly and welcoming. The last night of my trip was spent having dinner and drinks with them and the other guests and it was one of the highlights of my trip! I have already recommended them to friends and when I’m even back in Tokyo, this will be my place to stay. Thank you Min and Haru!!
Min & Haru's airbnb is always a great place to stay at. Great hosts, great place with good beds and a lot of fun. :)

If you want to stay in Shinjuku, than this is the place for it! I can't recommend it highly enough. The room was beautifully furnished and you feel the love and thought that went into it. Check in and finding the place was very easy and I felt at home immediately.
Thank you Min&Haru and all the best for your future!
한글로 대화하니 너무 편했습니다
Min and Haru’s place is by far the best place to stay in Tokyo! Both are extremely kind, helpful and will make you fee right at home. みんとはるさんありがとございました！

Min & Haru are the BEST hosts one can ever have. Hospitable, friendly, and knowledgeable. Haru made us a home cooked birthday meal even, and Min took some of us guests on a tour of the city. Be sure to check their youtube channel as well! This was my first time staying in a sharehouse, and they run it so well! I have stayed in other airbnbs across Europe and the US and none came close! The location is within walking distance to all major public transportation, not to mention a ton of nightlife.
5 minute walk to Golden Gai Alley... 8/8 incredible!

The place is very well located and you can walk to train stations or Shinjuku. The hosts are very kind and helpful, facilities in the place are good. 위치 정말 좋아요. 근데 욕실이 좀 춥고 전반적으로 수압이 약해요
amazing people and loved the space, I certainly plan on going back

숙소 자체가 분위기부터 편리함까지 모든걸 갖췄고 호스트께서 정말 친절하고 친근하게 대해 주셔서 하루 일정을 마치고 내 집 같이 쉴 수 있었습니다.  호스트께서 영어 일어 그리고 한국어에도 능하셔서  타국에서 의사소통이 두려우신 게스트분들께 적극 추천 드립니다. 숙소 위치가 도쿄 전역을 이동하기 유리한 신주쿠역과 도보로 이동하기 가까운 자리에 위치해서 처음 도쿄에 오신 게스트분들도 도쿄 전역을 관광하는데 어려움이 없을겁니다. 쉐어룸의 장점을 살려 여러 사람들과 만나볼 수 있고, 쉐어룸 개인 침대마다 커튼이 달려있어서 자신만의 공간도 보장 받을 수 있었습니다. 제가 다시 신주쿠를 가게 되면 망설임 없이 신주쿠 쉐어하우스를 예약 하고싶습니다.
I love this place!
일본 감성 제대로 느끼며 편하게 쉴 수 있는 곳 입니다
숙소가 역 주변에 있어서 이동이 편했고 바로옆에 골든가이가 있어서 굉장히 좋았습니다 한국인이면 무조건 강추합니다

I stayed here for a week in the room with the bunk beds. The living room and shower are on a different floor. There is only 1 shower in the whole sharehouse. the whole place felt very homey and was comfortable. Don't expect it to be spotlessly clean like a hotel. The place is cleaned and managed by the host couple Min and Haru. I think the nicest part of staying here is all the people u will meet. The hosts themselves are very friendly and welcoming. The other guests I met during my time there were really nice as well. It is very near kabukicho area so if u like the night life, it's very convenient. It can get a little noisy at times sleeping in bunk beds especially since everyone gets up at different times. I would love to stay again, but I'll probably book the private room next time.

Min and Haru were fantastic! Min is easily the most personable host you will ever meet and he does a great job of including everyone in activities. He even invited me over for a home-cooked dinner after I had moved out but jet lag got the best of me. In the grand scheme of things, it is a hostel so if you are in a shared room and not in a private room, you can only hope for quiet roommates. There is one restroom in the shared room and a shower as well as another restroom in the floor with the living room so I recommend taking a shower first thing in the morning or late at night. Overall, I loved everyone I met, Haru and Min were great and I’ve already made plans to stay there again. PS. Location is walking distance to the Subway and close to all things Shinjuku.
Muy buen alojamiento, los host son increibles
This is Shinjuku's best guesthouse. The owner is very kind. I'm a regular here. This guesthouse has a lot of regular customers. Because there is a reason for that.
The room was as expected and was clean. I appreciated the accommodation for late arrival, and he was very friendly

비교적 장기간 지내는데에도 쾌적하고 편안한 숙소입니다.
걷기 부담스럽지 않은 정도의 거리에 역도 많고 번화가 근처라 편의성도 뛰어납니다.

Min's place was great, fantastic location in the middle of shin-okubo, very close to the station, major shinjuku shopping areas, golden gai, kabukicho, etc. He kept it very clean and was friendly with the guests, was a great place to stay. The only thing I'd say to keep in mind is that there's only 1 shower for all guests so you may have to wait in line depending on time of day.
nice place to stay! host was very friendly and told me all the necessary things i needed to know
좋았습니다

Staying at this Airbnb was amazing ! The room's decor was cozy and inviting, creating a wonderful atmosphere. The host was incredibly  cool and welcoming, which made my stay even more enjoyable. I also had the pleasure of meeting some wonderful people during my time here. Overall, it was a fantastic experience that I would highly recommend to others.
Best hostel in Tokyo!
Great place to stay!
Todo impecable
Lovely environment. Good deal. Nice and clean.
Great host, excellent location, friendly environment
Really great hostile environment in a accessible location of tomyo

min and haru, thank you for being great hosts! this was a great stay. everything was as shown and described. location was awesome with public transport and walkable. sharing a space with other travellers can also allow you to meet new people. all in all, good experience and good value :)
Great place and host

Haru and min are amazing. I was lucky enough to get to talk and hang out with the them for a few. They definitely make you feel at home. Also the area is very good. Close to Korea town, to shinjuku main area, but not noisy enough that it’s a disturbance. Everything is walking distance from here.
Overall 10 out of 10. Would recommend this to anyone. :)

Very nice, clean, comfortable hostel.  Hosts were helpful, kind and made things easy. Very friendly people at the hostel and location was perfect for walking around Shinjuku! Close to transit so easy to explore other parts of Tokyo as well. Very good place to stay if wanting to meet others and be central while having a quiet place to rest and sleep.

Was a great experience!
Would definitely book with ‘em again
Had a great stay at the Sharehouse. Really enjoyed my time there!

Min è un ottimo host, la camera condivisa è stata un'esperienza divertente, anche grazie agli altri ospiti che erano lì. C'è solo una doccia, ma solo una volta ho dovuto aspettare giusto 10 minuti. Lo consiglio.
Min is a great host, he is communicative and helpful. The space is shared with many other travelers who are friendly and looking for adventure.
Hostel trés chouette et accueillant avec une bonne ambiance. Emplacement trés centrale.

Min and Haru are amazing hosts! The vibe of this place was incredible and I met some amazing people I am happy to now call friends. The setup is geared towards being interactive with others and enjoying the nightlife I believe more than anything. I will definitely be staying here again when I come back to Tokyo. Great experience and memories!
I had a great experience at the Sharehouse. Location was perfect, while Min and Haru were very welcoming, while making it an easy space to meet other travellers
Super responsive and helpful hosts, excellent location in Tokyo.
If I stay in the Shinjuku area again, I'll definitely be returning
완전 로컬 느낌 팍팍 나서 너무 좋았어요. 사장님도 엄청 친절하시고 ~ 한국어로 의사소통 가능하니까 일본어 모르는 한국분들께도 추천하고 싶네요. Also Min's English pronounciation is great, so never worry about the communication problem.
지금껏 여러 게스트하우스를 다녔지만 가장 시설이 좋고 정돈된 공간이었습니다.  사장님께서도 친절해서 아무런 불편함이 없었습니다. 공용공간도 모두가 친해지기 좋을 정도로 훌륭했습니다.

I had a fantastic experience! Min was incredibly helpful and attentive throughout my stay. The place was spotless and well-maintained, and the other guests were friendly and respectful. I would definitely stay here again!
Great spot!
Min & Haru were very friendly and helpful! Met a lot of nice people staying together as well, thank you for the pleasant stay☺️
Muy contento de haberme hospedado en este sitio lo recomiendo cerca de shinjuku en donde esta gran parte de la vida de la ciudad
Good location and friendly and accommodating hosts with quick communication.
The flat was nice and even if there were a few guests sharing it  did not feel overcrowded. The metro was very close, reachable within minutes walking.

Min was a great host. He was very prompt in replying to my inquires over airbnb and he came and met me at the station. He was personable and easy to talk to. Nothing to complain about the room either; it was clean and had a nice view. If you don't like sleeping on the floor, then it might not be for you. Internet worked like a charm and was accessible throughout the house. There is a washing machine for you to use if you require. I would definitely stay here again.
Min is very hospitality and amiable owner

Min is an exceptional host and the whole guesthouse experience compared to hotels or hostels is definitely worth it! Great price, comfortable and located in great neighbourhood. I made some friends while there, although because of the smaller number of guests compared to a hostel, for example, you might not have the same luck I did.

Min and I shared many discussions about the world and he has a wealth of knowledge about Tokyo and about Japanese/Eastern culture.
Thank you very much to Min! We had a great time with a great host and the location was ideal! Would recommend to anybody who is wanting to stay for a good price in Tokyo. Thank you Min!

It's only 1 minute's walk from Higashi-shinjuku subway station. There are many shops and restaurant around his house. Min is very friendly and kind.
Highly recommended!

Excellent stay, Min was very helpful in giving directions, meeting me and suggesting things to do and places to see.  Very clean and cool location on the ninth floor.  Nice view of the Shinjuku area.  Highly recommended!

Thank you!! I had the best time in Tokyo, min was extremely helpful during the stay and incredibly welcoming. The house was very clean and had many useful facilities that were utilized during the stay. Thank you again. Highly recommended

Min Mingakorea er en glimrende vært. Svarer hurtigt på spørgsmål. Hjælpsom. Stedet ligger centralt i Shinsjuku. Masser af restauranter og barer i området. Desuden er der gode transportmuligheder.

Selve lejligheden er i fin stand. Der kan godt være rimelig mange gæster, så hvis du søger et stille sted, er det her nok ikke noget for dig.

Man sover på nogle meget tynde futoner - ja man ligger sådan set på gulvet. Det kan godt være lidt hårdt efter et par dage.

Place is clean and well maintained. It's well located, very central. A bit tricky to find if you're not used to the way addresses are in Tokyo. We were a bit surprised because we had to share the room with 4 other people, but Min was very nice and moved us to a private room as soon as he could. Min is a very good host, nice and friendly, always available for a chat and a beer.

Esperienza molto positiva! L'appartamento a 5 min a piedi dalla fermata di metro, non ci sono stati problemi per trovarlo; abbastanza grande, la cucina e il bagno condivisi con altri viaggiatori che si raccontano le proprie esperienze di viaggio! La camera staziosa per due persone con piena esposizione a sud! Assolutamente da consigliare se veri backpackers!
Min's place is centrally located at Shinjuku with easy access to Tokyo metro/JR lines.The room is clean and spacious. I would recommend it to any budget traveler.

Min is running a nice small hostel-like apartment.  It was very clean and tidy, good amenities (although only one shower for four rooms) and a great location.  I would recommend to anyone looking for somewhere cheap to stay in Tokyo near Shinjuku.

Min is friendly, helpful and kind. His place is clean and comfortable with everything in working order. The area is perfect for those who like to explore and want to really experience Tokyo; it is in a great location to go for a wonder or use the transport links.

There are an abundance of authentic Japanese restaurants and bars and it's easy to reach the city's main attractions from Min's place.

Highly recommend it. I will definitely return.

the flat is perfect located and offert good opportunity to know new people from different part of the world.
great hoster, very friendly and funny. it was a great pleasure spend my stay in Tokyo in this flat

The flat is easy to access and well located.
Min is very gentle and helpful

Min is very friendly and very helpful: he found me a spot to sleep even if his guesthouse was full and later let me stay another night when I had no place else to stay.
That being said, you should not be afraid of being packed in a room (with friendly travelers): The place can be quite busy on weekends and there is only one shower.

We had great time staying with min! Was good to chat about our activities and his recommendations. Meeting some new people from over the globe was nice also. Would recommend over the usual hostel/hotel stay. Thanks Pat & Jess

Our stay at Min's excellent and beyond our expectations. Everything is like in the pictures. Shinjuku is very central and we got to everywhere we wanted very quickly. Most importantly, Min is a very kind host. He helped us out in every way he could and always with a smile.

Mr. Min is very nice and friendly host. The apartment is quite neat and located in a most exciting district, which is Shinjuku. We were accomidated on the top floor and could enjoy the great sight. The apartment has a common kitchen where you can meet and have a nice talk with people from other rooms. All in all, we are happy with everything there and would totally recommend this apartment.
We stayed over one week in the guesthouse and it was really nice. Good location, great Area and everything was clean. I would definetly come here again. Thank you Min!

Min was very friendly and helpful. He accepted me in his house even if i stayed in for two nights. Very nice environment and atmosphere! Met really nice people from other countries~ Shared room isn't as bas as I thought! It was a new experience~
I would come back again for sure! It's very close to subway stations for traveling! :) i recommend to people who don't mind sharing rooms~
Merci beaucoup Min!
Min was waiting for me at midnight. Great host. Would do again! Convenient location a well!

This place has a great location, a marvelous roof top from where you can have a nice view over Tokyo and it's very clean. The owner Min is a great person, very very friendly and always there to help you or to make you smile :) no better place in Tokyo to stay, If I would come back in Tokyo, I would go there again!

Shinjuku Sharehouse is a perfect place for the budget stay in Tokio! Especially for the single traveler who delights in casual talks over the coffee in the morning, hanging out during the nights or sharing the sightseeing tips with other guests, literally from all over the world! During my short stay I managed to meet 6 smart and open-minded people from Italy, Korea, Australia, Netherlands and Germany. Great boost for inspirations and good vibes!

Ps. Remember to bring some of your country change - Min is collecting the coins from diverse corners of the Earth.
Excellent room, as described.  Min was a perfect host with excellent communication.

Nice flat close to Kabukicho and well communicated to Shibuya and Tokyo centre. The place is clean and has an equipped kitchen. As a sharehouse is a good place to meet people if you travel alone. It has a rooftop where you can bring some beers and drink during sunset.

Min was very nice. He explained very well how everything worked in the flat and gave some advices for shopping. Fully recommended.

Min was very helpful with my check in- coming to meet me v early in the morning due to an early flight.
He was very helpful and friendly showing me around the place that is a great base right in the heart of Tokyo. Everything was like the photos and my room was spacious and quite.
It was ace place to meet other travellers to and the rooftop view is a fantastic place to have a beer and watch the sun go down.
Highly recommended.

Min is a reliable, friendly and responsible host, he spending effort to linkup and provide good service to the guest.  Nice place and good view on the top floor. I will come again if I go Tokyo again. :)

Min is a really nice n kind host! No just give u the key n leave, he also will tell u the info about the place n guide u for this areal. If u need any help u can ask him. I think he will love to help u!
The house clean n the location is nearly for the station or supermarket. Also u can walk like 5~10mins to Shinjuku. Its really convenient! In those day I live in Mins house, the people who I met are really friendly. So don't be shy or afraid If u want to try a different way of ur trip!
Great base in Tokyo. Min is a fascinating guy.
This is my 2nd time and I return to Mr Min's Guesthouse. And my 3rd time will be coming by this year. Mr Min is friendly, responsible keeper and you will like him. :)

Travel to Tokyo has twice lived in Min's house, my family and I are very fond of here, Min is a good friendly people, large windows of the room you can see the street, is a rare good place, another from the subway close nearby supermarket, there are many, life is very convenient function. Next time you go to Tokyo, or will choose Min's house. We highly recommend !

I stayed in four different locations during my stay in Tokyo (unfortunately I waited until the last minute to book accommodation) and Min's Shinjuku Sharehouse is easily my favorite. Min is a really warm and hospitable host. While his reservation confirmation provides detailed directions (useful on the intricate streets of Tokyo), when I returned to the city after a brief stay in Kyoto, he was gracious enough to meet me at the station and guide me to the apartment. For rainy days, he has extra umbrellas for guests to use (on the day I left, he generously gave me one of them). Apparently, he and the other guests go out on Friday nights, which sounds like tons of fun, although I missed out because I was staying less than a week and had to leave the previous day.

As indicated by the name, the apartment is located in Shinjuku, which is one of the central hubs of Tokyo. Using the metro system, it's easy to get to other parts of the city without having to do dozens of transfers. The surrounding neighborhood is packed with Korean restaurants, though you can easily find other cuisines.

The apartment has a nice little common room in the kitchen area with a couch and sound system. Like all the rooms, there's a balcony that looks out onto a great view of Shinjuku. At night especially, you can feel the pulse of the city.

I stayed in the single room, which allows for some privacy. My advice would be to make a reservation request ASAP, as the rooms book out quickly!

Staying at Min's place was a pleasure.  He took me out in Shinjuku and introduced me to others staying at the sharehouse.  The location was exellent.  30 minutes from anywhere you would want to go in Tokyo!

Min is the best host and the coolest guy i met in Tokyo. Always helping and perfect instructions for a stay without problems. Also great view from the guesthouse lots of nice guests and perfectly central location close to shinjuku station. I recommend!!

Min is very nice，and the position of the house is quite near higashi shinjuku station.But it's a little inconvenience that there's only one bathroom with all these 4 floors of rooms.And rooms are a little different from my imagination.
Nice and warm sharehouse although I haven't enough time to share my experience in this trip. Hope to see you soon, Min!

This was my first experience with Airbnb, so everything was new for me. To be honest, I am really happy about my choice! The apartment is used only by travelers, which make the experience very social! There is a kitchen in common where you can meet anytime all the other people and organize some good party! Everything is clean and comfortable.
The queue for the shower can be sometimes a little long, but if you are smart and organized you'll find it free with no problem (I never waited more than 10 minutes).

The area is nice and close to many bars; you can walk to shinjuku station in 10/15 minutes or just take the Metro for 2 stops. Good connections with the all city through that station.

Min is a great host, he waits for you when you check in and he will party with you until late night! Very welcoming and warm guy (and fun!).

In the end, I totally advise to stay here especially if you travel alone or with friends and you want to meet people and party together! I will definitely come back to this place if I am in Tokyo again.

Min was such a great host! He was waiting when I arrived, and made sure to send clear directions in advanced. The sharehouse is located in Shinjuku within walking distance of plenty of nightlife, but the residence itself was calm and quiet.
I was in a private room, and the other rooms in this apartment I think were all either private, or shared for two people, so it was easy to get to know and meet other people, but also have your own space if needed.
I was traveling solo, and it was a great for my needs--highly recommend, and would love to stay again the next time I'm in Tokyo!
I stayed in a great private room in Shinjuku. Everyone else in the share house was extremely welcoming and fun! I had many Soju drinks with some Canadian and Korean pals. Hope to be back!
재밌었습니다. 내 집같은 편안함.

A nice place and convenient house.
It's easy to go Shinjuku and near metro.
Min is a nice guy.
非常友好健谈的房东，位置也很中心，房间也挺宽敞。
Min was a kind and helpful host, always ready to help when he was there.

Min was at the hostel when I arrived and a super nice guy. He gave me a thorough tour of the place, from where the towels were, how the shower worked, to where I would be staying, and how to use the AC. He was helpful in pointing out the subway and a nearby sushi place. His wife was there toward the end of my stay, and she was absolutely lovely. The place was SUPER clean and guests really fun. This is in an awesome location closed to lots of bars, the robot show, and the red light district. Highly recommend.

Shinjuku Sharehouse was a great place to stay. The owner, Min, made it a very welcoming place, and took the effort to help me out when I fell sick. Facilities were very good, with a working hot shower and towels, and the location was just a little north of the night life districts of Shinjuku, which means that you can easily walk over to most of the attractions and yet have some peace and quiet at the end of the day. It's also very near Shin-Okubo JR Station and Higashi Shinjuku Station (Oedo Line), making it an ideal base for exploring the rest of Tokyo. Overall, thumbs up!

This was my first time to stay in a Hostel and I was lucky that i stayed in a private room in Shinjuku. The room is so nice and clean with a balcony.
Min is a nice host and he is so kind and helpful to answer any of my question. He is also working hard to keep the place clean.
Also, i feel very satisfied with the facilities here, especially the hot shower! The location here is also very convenience.
I met funny lady and guys here and we shared great journey at the Halloween days in Japan and had made my special experiences here.
HEY BROS, THANKS!!!
Hope to come back!! Highly recommended.

Cosy and spotless share house in a very convenient location: just a 10 minutes foot-walk to Shinjuku station, right next to Korea town with heaps of eating options, many (!) convenience stores around. But what makes this place very special are two things. First, there`s a nice common area, which makes it very easy to socialize. But most of all Min, the owner of this place is an awesome  guy. He was around when I arrived and introduced me to the place and the other travelers. You can contact him if you need any assistance and its very fun to have a few beers or soju with him. I`d always come back to this place when back in Tokyo. Highly recommended!

Min made me feel extremely welcomed. Everything was exactly as expected, friendly guests and host, clean, and organized. I would recommend staying at his place! He organized a night out for all the residents that were staying at his place.
Great location, clean, comfortable

I had a really great time staying at min's place and would highly reccomend it. Excellent location, easy to find and the apartment was great! Very clean and comftable, great social space to hang out in and min is a really great guy and even let me store my big backpack for 2 days while i went to kyoto. Thank you again for a great stay and i will be booking here again when i come back to japan :)

Nice place! Min is very kind and lot of patient to brief me about the share house facilities and shops which are helpful.
Easily to find and go out for shopping, sightseeing!
Excelent place to stay! And very practices area!! I will stay there in another ocation. Thanks Min for all! I have spend a wonderfull time

Min was honestly a really cool guy, he spent a good time talking to us just having fun. He could tell you all about Tokyo, even useful tiny details you wouldn't think about asking. I also met other interesting people in the shared house and made good new friends. I very thoroughly enjoyed my time there and it's sad that I had to leave.

I am really sure that this place is the most awesome one to stay for travelers who wants to make friend from all over the world.
The host Mr Min is super open-minded person and I am sure you will have great time with him.
The room is never cold or hot and everything was perfect. I really liked the night view from the balcony.
The host Min always tried to make his place better, and he always waited for his guests to come whenever it was even until late night, and since his english is almost perfect he really liked communicating with guests.
The location was also perfect.
Have nothing to complain about this place and I strongly recommend this place.
You will never regret.

I stayed at Min's place together with 6 friends, for two weeks in February/March. I really like the host, Min, and his sharehouse. This is the second time I'm staying here, the last time being in 2014.

For this trip he had done some redecoration. We had a big room for ourselves for 7 people, with new furniture and new air condition. Anyone who has stayed in Japan for the winter knows that it can get pretty damn cold in the Winter indoors. The new AC managed to cope with this though, and we had a very cozy feeling in the room.

I would say that the size of the room is perfect for 6 people, but it could handle us 7 with no problem. The location is great, walking distance from Shinjuku station, which means walking distance to other stations and most central train-lines. The other guests at the different floors have always been nice and interesting, this time being no exception. The kitchen-area of the sharehouse becomes a natural place to kick it back for a while to hang out.

Min, the host, is very helpful and positive. He gladly comes with suggestions on where to go etc, just great. This is pretty much the perfect place to stay in Tokyo, unless you have a hard time with a hostel-kind of place.

Min was very friendly when I arrived to the share house and I felt very welcome. The place is pretty tidy, has lots of nice decorations, and a great balcony view.
Room is a bit drafty at times but there are heaters and if the shared room is full of people, the collective body heat keeps it very warm.
It is also in a convenient location for the subway and JR lines as well as proximity to convenience stores and late night restaurants.
ホストの方は日本語が上手なお方でした。滞在中、私の事情ですがあまりお話する機会がなかったのでまた色々お話してみたいです。
방도 깨끗하고 집주인께서도 친절하셔서 좋았습니다

Min è veramente un super host, amichevole e ti mette subito a tuo agio. La camera è esattamente come da foto ed il quartiere è a due passi dal cuore di Shinjuku. Sì trovano negozi e ristoranti a tutte le ore, metro e stazione JR sono a pochi minuti a piedi.
Esattamente come descritto.
Grande Min!

Min was an awesome host! He was friendly, easy to communicate with, and even threw small roof-top parties for the guests. The place was a rough 10 minutes walk away from the Shinjuku area, so it was a great location to go around all over Tokyo. I liked how the rooms were very clean and had an outside terrace. Also the common room had a large fridge and a TV so the guests could comfortably spend time. I would definitely re-visit the place on my next trip to Tokyo!
친구3명과 지낼 숙소를 찾던중 Min의 backpackers에서 묶었는데 무엇보다고 편안한 분위기에서 여러나라의 게스트들과 교류하며 즐거운 여행을 할 수 있었습니다. 또한 탁트힌 옥상에서 맥주를 마시며 여독을 풀 수 있어 그 또한 큰 여행의 즐거움 이였습니다. 자유로운 여행을 즐기는 배낭여행객이라면 이 숙소를 적극 추천드립니다.

Had so much fun at Min's place! I stayed on the 6th floor with 5 other people I didn't know. We all became friends and hung out during the days/evenings. The room is nice and has all the regular accommodations you'd expect. The 9th floor is where you can do your laundry, take a bath, cook, or hang out with others. Min brought us to the rooftop to celebrate the departure of me and another person. There we had a pleasant evening grilling meat and having some drinks.
