This room is easy to find using Min's directions and pictures, but if you get lost just contact him as he responds quickly. You leave your luggage out in the room, but people will respect your stuff. Min's a fun guy and you'll definitely have a good stay.
신주쿠 하라주쿠 시부야 오모테산도 등 유명한 곳의 이동이 편리하였고 가까워서 무척이나 좋았습니다. 숙소는 매우 청결하였고 아기자기하여 잠들기에도 편했고 아침 저녁으로 옥상에 올라가 시원한 바람을 맞으며 누워있기도 하였습니다. 한동안 그 곳이 계속 생각 날 것 같네요!

에어비앤비로써 서비스, 위치, 청결함 등 아주 좋았습니다.
기회가 된다면 다시 꼭 갈게요!^^

Min was very welcoming and amicable - as soon as I arrived, he showed me around the sharehouse and explained where everything was, then we sat in the common area talking for a while.
The sharehouse is clean and well-kept, and the bed was really comfortable. It's also great to go out and explore with the other people staying there if your schedules match up.
The rooftop view should be great for seeing the sunrise or sunset - it's a shame I was only staying in Tokyo during a typhoon, hopefully I'll get better weather next time!
Train lines are close, so you can easily visit the rest of Tokyo from the sharehouse - it's in a great location.
I wish I had explored the nearby Shinjuku area more as well, but that will have to wait until next time!

Thanks, Min!
Min was a great host - funny, welcoming, and went out of his way to help us find his place and feel at home. Would definitely recommend staying with him.

Min was a wonderful host! he went out of his way to make everyone feel welcome and create a really fun, chill social vibe and got to know his guests. the room was clean and felt very safe. two air conditioners made it very comfortable. the lower bunk beds have a curtain, which I loved for that little bit of privacy. I didn't see any storage space (that being said, I only had a backpack and didn't inquire about it so maybe I just missed it) but there was plenty of floor space for everyone's bags and it didn't feel cramped at all.
walking distance to Shinjuku, Shibouya, and Golden Gai. lots of public transportation near by.
the directions to the house were confusing when coming from the airport, especially for an English speaker visiting Japan for the first time. I would recommend ensuring you have data to use Google maps or other GPS systems with, familiarize yourself with the different train systems in Tokyo, and pay attention to the pictures Min sends of the enterance, they're a huge help.
I had the best time staying here and can't wait to come back.

Min was a great host, he gave clear instructions to get to his place from where I was and his place is within 5 min walk to the Higashi Shinjuku train station. He also gave me a nice single bed that is cute and cosy. His place is also near convienience stores, restaurants and even 15 mins walk to Shinjuku! I was travelling alone so it is perfect for solo female travelers too. Min was also helpful to guide me to places of interest and he speaks good English. And i made new friends since it was a shared room. Highly recommend it if you travel on a budget and wants a strategic location!
Had a great time at Min's place. He's a funny guy, helpful and informative, and always keen for a beer! The rooftop was a cool hangout after a long day, and a good start to a night out.
Like staying with family, always a great time and fun meeting new people there also.
I love this place. So clean and tidy and in a great location. Thank you so much Min. See you again!

HIGHLY RECOMMEND - Shinjuku Sharehouse!!!
This was my first airbnb in Japan, and it was absolutely perfect! Location is

Great place. Love the decor and the room I stayed in was nice. The place has a nice honey cozy feel to it. I would live in a place like this.
The host was welcoming too. His English was great. Nice and friendly guy that engages in conversation. We talked about real estate prices in Tokyo versus other parts of the world.
One complaint I do have is that at night, the sirens get loud. They stop after a certain point (not too too late) but they happened every night for the two nights I was there. Not sure if it wad we were next to a police station or if there was a festival nearby.
There is a part where stairs are pretty steep to some of the rooms, but you can get around without stairs. so if you have a bad knee, I would suggest contacting the host to make sure that you can avoid them.

Min & his wife made me feel very welcomed upon arrival at the Sharehouse. We immediately started drinking beers and sake and I got to meet some of the travelers staying there as well. The sharehouse was very clean, walking distance to restaurants, shops, bars, clubs & subways in Shinjuku. Thank you Min for your hospitality! I highly recommend staying here versus a hotel. Save a lot $$$!!! Overall amazing experience! :)

This was my first & last airbnb in Tokyo, and it was absolutely perfect! Location is great, easy access to a JR station and subway! A good spot for Shinjuku nightlife! It's also in the heart of Koreatown! Min does an excellent job communicating, quickly responds to any questions and is very helpful in every aspect! Min & his wife up keep the sharehouse daily, so it's always clean! It's also a great place to meet other travelers, especially for solo travelers! Loved it so much I booked again! Thank you Min!!
Our stay was very comfortable and Min was beyond friendly and helpful! Definitely recommend!
Great location . Easily access to shinjuku and rest of the place by metro :)
房東很好....而且附近有很多餐廳, 十分方便

The location is great, near the Higashi-Shinjuku Station. Min was very nice and kind host, he explain everything clearly and introduce me to everyone who already stayed there. He even upgrade my room for free. I'll definitely will come back there when I visiting Tokyo again!

Min is a very nice host! I have stay at different hostels in tokyo before, and I can sure that this is the best shared room that I ever had. The room is big, there are many common spaces which you can easily find someone to chat with.
Great location, great host, very nice room. No regret at all.

3박4일동안 너무 재밌는시간 보내고 갑니다.
청결 위치 안전 사람들 모두 다좋았어요ㅋㅋ
도쿄를 다시온다면 당연히 여기로 다시올거같아요

Jag bodde här i ca två veckor och jag har inget dåligt att säga. Tvärtemot så har mina två veckor här varit väldigt bra. Vilket är glädjande för alltid lite nervöst när man ska bo med människor man aldrig träffat tidigare.
Läget är bra, priset är bra, flertal olika stationer inom gångavstånd, finns restauranger och barer nästintill överallt.
Men vad som för mig har gjort det så glädjande att bo här är Min(airbnb hosten). Han pratar bra engelska, trevlig och väldigt välkomnande.
Varvaranan dag lagade vi mat med ett gäng från boendet och Min såklart på taket där han har både bord och stolar. (Om man inte vill eller är upptagen med annat skippar man såklart bara detta men möjligheten finns om vädret tillåter.)
Och utsikten på taket är fantastisk, speciellt under kvällen.
Då jag behövde resa hem väldigt tidigt på morgonen bestämde jag mig för att sova på dagen för att sedan orka vara vaken hela natten, blev då erbjuden att spendera sista dagen i ett privat rum som för en kort tid var ledigt (gratis), vilket var oerhört uppskattat!
Thank you for these two weeks Min, hope to see you again!

호스트님도 너무 친절하시고 위치도 너무 좋았어요!
다양한 외국인도 만나고 짧은 여행이었지만
즐거운 시간을 보냈습니다.
Very Nice Boss! I like the BBQ party at Rooftop
Perfect location and easy to find. Very clean and comfortable. Highly recommend this hostel.

This place is really nice. Rooms and beds are comfortable and everything is very clean! The location is perfect, nearby the subway station or 10 minutes walking from Shinjuku station.
All these things are nothing compared to the host's special skills!!! Min is simply an amazing person and he's doing everything to make you feel home. Together with other guests we had great time in there. Party if you want to, or just chill in your room. This place is simply a must.
very clean, very friendly, very easy to find, overall an awesome guesthouse! :)

Staying at Shinjuku sharehouse was a great experience, well located, really close to metro station. I really enjoy my stay, Min is very helpful with all I needed. Thanks Min, next time in Tokyo I'll stay there for sure :)
잘 쉬고 갑니다. 다만 샤워시설이 별로였습니다.

It’s all been said before but really Min’s Shinjuku Sharehouse is all form of awesome. I was initially skeptic of hostel dorm style living but the people I shared with were great and Min has designed the large open plan room in such a cool way.
신주쿠 도보 10분 거리에 위치해 있고 전철역과 가까워서 좋습니다. 쉐어룸에서 묵었는데 너무 깨끗하고 잘 이용했어요.

People! I think you will NOT find any better place than this. Haru and Min are so so friendly, you can walk directly to the main street of Shinjuku from there. The shared places are so clean, Min is always caring about how clean the place is. I really felt like I was with my family. I could say that I was with "my Japanese family". Thank you Haru and Min, I will go back :)

I stayed at a lot of places during my travels in Japan and this was my favorite. Very clean, all the amenities you need, and you get to meet new people (and have a few drinks with them). You are about a 7 minute walk from Golden gai (tiny bars) and 10 minutes from the main city/shopping area. Also about a 15 minute walk to Shinjuku train station. I would definitely stay here again if I am ever back in Shinjuku.

Min and Haru were such awesome people. Hospitality was top notch and they also taught me about the place during my stay. Not to mention the decoration of the place was SUPERB! Definitely would recommend this place for everyone.
Min is a five star airbnb host. This was the second time I stayed at his airbnb and it's always a pleasure.  Thanks for this trip and letting me stay! Hope to see you again one day!

Min and Hart were amazing hosts, we felt very welcome at the place! The location is perfect for checking out the Korean town in Tokyo, and especially if you want to check out the nightlife in Tokyo. The place is cute, decorated with good taste and thanks to the nice common room and rooftop terrace, it’s absolutely no problem that the rooms are small✨😃👌🎊

My best friend and I really enjoyed our stay with Min and Haru! They are very kind and accommodating hosts! We liked the last night a lot when the house got together and ate on the roof it was fun getting to know people from different places. They had a lot of amenities there that we didn't think we needed but ended up using, like when we borrowed the umbrellas to go out. They had tea and towels and laundry you could use as well which was nice, it was very clean and everyone was super nice.

房东特别友好！能够及时的解决问题，什么时候问都会及时回答，交通很方便，位置不错！周围也有便利店，药妆店和寿司店，都很近，走到新宿歌舞伎町也不远～
因为定的时候比较晚，所以只剩下混合住的，但也是一个不错的体验，和来自不同的人交流，很好～
这里的设施也很全～可能你如果住混合的话在六楼，得去九楼洗澡，就这一点不是很方便，但也电梯，也还好～
关键房东很好，他的太太更是很温柔～很贴心，来这住是个不错的决定～

Unsere Ansprechperson Min war sehr nett, hilfsbereit und offen. Das Hostel ist gut gelegen und liebevoll "nerdy" dekoriert ;)
Tolles Preis/Leistungsvehältnis stimmt. Wirklich sehr angenehm, jederzeit wieder!
다음에 일본 또 가면 가고싶은 곳이에요

Nice, clean, stylish place with great view. Loved the balchony. It was a bit too light and noisy for sleeping, even with sleeping mask and ear plugs. The room is quite small for 4-7 people and the bathroom/ kitchen sink is right next to the sleeping area. I stored my luggage under the bed because there was so little room.
Second time i am staying at Min's Guesthouse. It was as perfect as the first time. See you again Min !

C'était la deuxième fois que j'allais dormir chez Min et Haru et, ça me plaît toujours autant :). L'endroit est très bien situé car il se trouve au centre de Shinjuku. Vous pouvez aussi profiter d'une terrasse tout en haut de l'immeuble. Min et Haru sont vraiment des personnes admirables. D'autres part, si vous souhaiter discuter avec des personnes venant des quatre coins du globe, c'est endroit est alors fait pour vous.
If you are looking a place to stay, don't hesitate because this place is really nice and Min is TOP! Great time there! For sure I go back!
Great place in near Shinjuku station, feels like a hostel
Second time staying with Min and Haru. Always great hosts and always a good collection of people that stay in the shared house. Easy check-in, good directions and easy communication!

Min & Haru's place was amazing. When you first step in you know you are in a place that has been built with care and attention. Min was an amazing host offering tips for things to do and the best ramen spot. He is happy to have a chat, a drink or two or four, or just a polite wave. Check in and out were easy - the instructions on how to get there were great and easy to follow. We stayed in the dormitory and even though it can fit 7 people, it doesn't feel squishy. There's even a couch to chill out on! Will definitely be staying here again.

Had a great time at Min & Harus place - central location, friendly atmosphere, and comfy beds. Min was very helpful in giving me tips for things to do around Tokyo, and they were very accommodating in terms of late check-in and letting me store my luggage during the day before I left for the airport. Would definitely stay here again!

Min & Haru's place is amazing. The location is incredible, with Shinjuku connected to all of Tokyo, the place was clean and tidy, the host waited for me for a late check in. And gave some great recommendations for food in the area.
Thanks again, see you guys next time.
Comfy clean place, where Min& Haru are helpful with suggestions on what to do on my stay.
시설이랑 인테리어도 좋고 히가시신주큐역과 접근성이좋았어요. 주인분이 한국어가 능통하셔서 여러모로 편했습니다^^ 침구와 베개도 매우 편했어요!! 또 가고싶은 숙소

Absolutely amazing place and couldn't recommend it more!
Min and Haru were wicked fun and stayed up drinking and chatting with me and other guests each night. The place was perfectly located right in Shinjuku's best bits, a short walk from the nearby JR Yamanote line station and had everything you needed for a comfy stay. Met some great people and will definitely be coming back!
If this is your first or seventh time in Japan definitely check them out :)
Had a wonderful stay here. 👌🏻

Min and Haru are very sweet and respectful. I had such a good experience being a guest there and I wouldn't mind returning again for a stay at their hostel. I had a great time and enjoyed everything they had to offer. The location is very close to everything in Shinjuku and also if you need advice or tips for your travel the hosts are there to help you and guide you in the proper direction and with honest advice.

If you are looking for a base in Shinjuku to explore the city this is the place. Min & Haru are amazing hosts and the sharehouse is perfect.
A great place to meet other travellers and enjoy all the area has to offer.
Will be staying here again on our next visit.
Was a great place, I just was unaware that I would be staying with other guests in my room. That was the only thing that threw me off

We had a great time at Min and Haru’s place. The hosts provided detailed instructions on how to get to their place and they were excellent about communicating before we arrived. The rooms were exactly as we expected based on the pictures. Nice, spacious and comfortable. It was really nice to get to know Min! We would stay here again

Highly recommend Min and Haru's place! Great location and a great space. Easy check in and out. Rooftop BBQ and drinks with the hosts was so fun and met some wonderful other guests. Note there is only one shower for all the guests - I didn't find it to be an issue however. Definitely will book again next time I'm in Japan!
신주쿠에 가깝고 이정도 가격이면 엄청 싸고 좋습니다. 침대도 편하고 호스트님이 한국어 잘하셔서 다시 방문하고 싶은 숙소입니다.

깨끗하고 친절하시고
그리고 사장님이 너무 유쾌해서 재미있는
여행이였습니다 ~^^
I had an excellent stay! The location is amazing, Min is a great host, and the space is very inviting. Will definitely stay again when I'm back in Tokyo.

用中文写咯，房东夫妇是韩国人，都挺热情好客的。密码锁出入，地址离东新宿新大久保都不是很远。
房间看下详情就好。
楼顶早上晚上坐一会挺好的。
入住愉快。
I would absolutely recommend to stay here, you will meet with nice people enjoy your time at terrace and walk to fancy places easily.
コミュニケーションと気遣いが行き届いた場所でした。海外からのお客さんとも壁なく接することの出来る方、お薦めです。
Greatest place for stay while traveling! :)
Le logement est bien conforme aux photos et a la description. Il correspondait totalement a l'expérience que je recherchais. J'ai fait de super rencontres dans cette auberge de jeunesse :)
Great place! Great location. You will not regret this stay!!!!
I was very impressed by the cleanness, quick response of the host, and the overall value. Thank you Min & Haru!
all good

Min was an excellent and very helpful host, who interacts a lot with his guests and takes a genuine interest in the plans for your trip. The guesthouse is well laid out and clean. The accommodation has a great location as it’s a five minute walk from either Shinjuku Station or Shin-Okubo station.
The guesthouse is also only a five minute walk from Golden Gai for those who enjoy a drink.
I would definitely stay here again. 👌🏻

At Min’s (and Haru’s) place you’ve got it all.
A wonderful host, a common space, kitchen, clean shower (and towels!) and bathroom as well as an amazing rooftop chill-out area!
This is the first Sharehouse/AirBnB place that has 5* for me and absolutely nothing I would change about it.
Guests who visit Min and Haru’s place quickly become regular and/or frequent guests to their place, so I’d say you’d definitely have to go and see why that is for yourself!
I know I will always be back here when I go to Tokyo!
Excellent !

J’ai passé un super moment dans cette guest house. J’ai par ailleurs eu la chance d’avoir la chambre pour moi seul ! Gros + ! Cela ne m’a pas empêché de pouvoir discuter avec les autres personnes sur place ainsi qu’avec mon hôte.
Tout est fait pour se sentir à l’aise. Je n’ai pas profité à fond de tout mais je pense qu’à mon prochain passage au Japon je passerai à nouveau dans cette guest house !
Really lovely and confy place to stay in tokyo, gladly to cpme stay again one day 👌
게스트하우스치고 약간 비싼게 아닌가 하는 생각이 들 수 있지만 절대 후회할일 없을거에요! 혼자 조용히 보내는 것보단 게스트하우스만의 새로운 만남이 있는 곳입니다

Fantastic host! Gave a complete walk-through of the space on arrival which made me feel very comfortable in knowing how to get in and out as well as to turn the hot water on. Cannot recommend enough!!

Amazing! Everything about this experience was as top notch as it could get.
Location is 10/10
Host is 10/10
You’ll usually find other cool people also in this share house so that’s another plus 10/10
Clean and cozy
Cannot recommend it enough to the next person. Can’t wait to be back soon!!

Comfortable room, clean toilet and bathroom. Just like home. Nice location with good public transportation. It takes only around 3 mins walk to 東新宿駅 of 都営大江戸線. You can meet people from other country here and even make friends! Best choice to stay in Tokyo.

房东互动：热情亲切的房东
独特亮点：来自世界各地的朋友！🔥

I could not have had a better time in Shinjuku, and Tokyo in general! Min and Haru's place is located practically in the heart of Shinjuku, only a 6-7 minute walk from Golden Gai and Kabukicho. There are a bunch of great restaurants nearby (obviously) and plenty of ways to get to other parts of Tokyo.
The shared room is very nicely laid out, where each bunk had its own space in the room and you had a level of privacy not offered at many other guesthouses. The guests themselves were super awesome! A lot of Korean and European guests frequent Min and Haru's place, as well as returning guests. Typically there will be hangouts/parties in the lounge/kitchen area where you can meet the other guests as well as get to chat with Min and Haru.
The free laundry was a nice addition, and I was fine having to airdry my stuff outside in the fire escape.
There's so much character to their place, so I'd definitely recommend you stay here! Maybe you'll see me during me next time there!

Min was a great host to us. Very friendly and knowledgeable. I enjoyed chatting to him when he had free time. Place was awesome! Very cool place to stay and easy to get to. Very close to public transport. Would come again for sure. Thank you Min for hosting us!

Very cool place to stay in heart of the area. Min is a great and friendly host and I had some cool conversations with him! The only complaint is that after I checked out of my bed, I stayed in the main area/lobby with my bag for an extra hour as I was waiting for my train, and Min walked in and sternly and quite rudely kicked me out explaining that "this isn't a hotel" and that I can't just stay around. I do understand that it was an hour past check out, and I suppose he has had trouble with past guests staying hours after check out in the lobby, but I was the only one there. I've never had a hotel/hostel kick out a guest from the lobby. I don't hold it against him but it seemed like a really negative and poor last few moments at the place when we had such positive and family like bond the week I stayed. Overall, great place. Just didn't like how it ended.

Min and Haru’s place was great! They have adduce a passion for hosting, many long term residents were people who were coming back to stay with them a 2nd time, and I understand why. Their hostel feels like a community

다음에도 꼭 재방문하고 싶습니다 :)))
감사했어요

Minさん is a really nice host, can speak English well to help you with your journey, and the vibe of the house was chill and fun, if you don’t mind sharing a room with other quests, this will be the best hostel in shinjuku!
Had an awesome few days at Min's place! Everyone was super nice and it was very cozy. Fun décor if you love gundam, starwars, or other :)
great location, great vibes!
Host is very friendly. The place is very comfortable too. Will definitely come back if i have a chance

Staying at the Shinjuku Sharehouse was great! I enjoyed meeting Min and Haru when I checked in. Min was friendly and helpful and kept the Sharehouse well. The dorm style room is small but homey and the bunk beds feel private with the curtains closed. Don’t forget your earplugs in case one of your fellow guests snores.
It was very easy to find and the location is very convenient to exploring the city. Loved it!
지난번에 만족해서 재방문 했는데 다음이도 또 방문 할 예정!!
호스트님이 정말 친절하시고 한국어를 매우 잘하십니당 안전하게 잘 지내다 왔고 옥상에서 하는 작은 파티? 에도 초대해 주셔서 술 마시고 마음 편하게 잘 놀다 왔어요! 다만 혼자 여행하는 여성분이시면 숙소가 혼성인 게 조금 걸릴 수도 있다고 생각하지만, 저는 매우 편하게 잘 지내다 왔습니다.

Excellent location, comfy space, and warm, helpful, and responsive hosts. It has a social atmosphere without being a party hostel which is perfect for experiencing Tokyo while also being able to rest and recharge. I highly recommend this stay.
Great place, met lots of people (lots of Koreans, but others as well. Everyone is friendly. Location is highly accessible.

Min was a great host, and it is clear that he genuinely cares about his guests; he even checked in just to ask if I was having a good time in Shinjuku (and of course the answer was YES 😃)! The other guests were very friendly as well. Each bed had a power outlet and curtains to ensure privacy and comfort, and overall the space was as clean as a hostel-like environment can reasonably be. The location is awesome especially if you'd like to spend time near Shinjuku, which is directly across the street.
Finally, a quick note for when you are staying here: after using the provided washing machine (detergent pods cost 100¥ each, but that's the only thing here that you need to pay extra for), outdoor clothes hangers are available for use– but the Coin Laundry 「コインランドリー」 is only a minute away and 200¥ buys 8 minutes in a fairly large dryer, so I would recommend doing that if you are in a hurry.
Très bon accueil et logement impeccable merci de ta gentillesse !
붐비는 욕실
지하철과 인접한 위치와 인근 마트, 편의점 등이 가까웟고 엘레베이터를 통해서 편하게 다닐수 있었습니다
Great host and a nice, comfortable place.

Great spot to stay! The hosts are so kind and the place is very welcoming. It is in a very convenient location too so you are spoiled for choice on things to do. The amenities were great and I slept well each night. Thank you Min and Haru!!
Fantastic stay!

amazing location right in the heart of the city, host was friendly and had good knowledge of the area. everyone in the shared room were friendly and nice to talk to. would definitely stay again next time i go to japan.
Man fühlt sich direkt wohl und es ist perfekt um neue Kontakte bzw. Freunde zu finden.
A great place to stay and meet new people. I would highly recommend this place 😄
Great as always

This is the perfect place for solo travellerals who want to make some friends on their yourney.
The Host is very friendly and helpful. He is there every day he and speaks english so it's easy get to know him.
The living space is very homely and has all the amenities you need.
The location is easy to reach by train from anywhere in Tokyo and close to Golden Gai.
Great location, great view. Min and Haru really made sure the atmosphere is friendly!
jai passer un excellent séjour c’était vraiment incroyable merci a vous ☺️

Staying with Mari was great. She makes a nice breakfast in the morning that ranges from Japanese to Western. You get your own room with a very comfy bed... Yes, very comfortable eventhough it is a pull out sofa. The place is about 15 minute nice walk to the station or a quick bus ride. Get a Passmo prepaid card as it can be used on all buses and trains, no trying to figure out how much or what ticket to buy..and makes using the bus that much easier. The room is small but not by. Japanese standards and two people would be able to manage as long as you like to be close...:). As a solo traveler, I highly recommend staying with Mari, she even had her son pick me up at the station upon arrival. For those of you coming to Japan, Google Maps works perfectly for car and public transportation directions, so get a data plan set up before you arrive or better yet, if your phone is unlocked, get a SIM card when you get here.
awesome warmness welcome.

I really liked the design of the house!  The room I stayed in had a really really comfortable sofa bed as mentioned.  I felt safe walking back from the station, and it's quite easy to find the way to the station and back.  Mari san makes interesting breakfasts!  I enjoyed them.  She and her son are very nice and interesting people to talk to.  Very kind people too!

Mari was a very sweet host and gave me a very warm welcome , the room while modest in size was very comfortable . It's a shame I did not get to interact more with her as my schedule in Tokyo was tight but it's a lovely place to stay at and I hope I will get to return .

As a first time Airbnb'er, I didn't know what to expect, but
when I arrived I felt very welcomed and comfortable.
The house is beautifuly designed, and the bed was the most
coziest bed I've ever slept in!

Mari is a kind, sweet and thoughtful person with a lot of patience.
Her company was a delight, and I'd hope to see her again in the future!

I had a very comfortable stay at Mari's house. Mari and her son are very friendly, her breakfast is delicious and the very cozy bed made me sleep like a baby. Besides that the architecture of the house is pretty unique. I would come back if I'll ever visit this city again. highly recommended, thank you Mari.

Mari is a very friendly and welcomed me.
The room was comfortable, breakfast is very delicious.
I would like to stay again.
추천 ^오^

Mary and her son were very friendly and the room I stayed was very cozy and cute. She made breakfast for me. いIt was delicious and a good experience. We talked of one thing and another. Her house is close to Shinjuku and around karasuyama station was busy in spite of bed town. I want to stay again If I go to Tokyo. Thank you very much

It was an awesome experience for stay in Mari's home, the architecture of the house is pretty unique, and there's a french window in the room, specially I love when the warm sunlight shines me up, it made me fell energetic in the morning! Mari trade me so nice, she is friendly and kind, we had a great conversation about dif culture experience. I miss the breakfast terribly she made! Love it!;) 謝謝
Mari is a wonderful host! The area is quite and easy to reach Shinjuku or Shibuya using Keio Line from there. I definitely know where to stay next time in Tokyo. Thank you Mari!!

Mari and her son are so sweet and helpful, it was a pleasure to stay at their cozy house! And yes, Mari's breakfasts are great…
The trains are smooth if you don't mind the distance, the area's nice, and I can truly recommend staying with Mari! I will next time in Tokyo :)
A very nice cute room, Mari and her son were both really nice and hospitable. I enjoyed my stay with them.

I really enjoyed my stay at Mari's place! Mari is absolut great and so friendly. The room is super sweet and the breakfast she made me was great to start the day with. So if you don't mind the distance, I totally recommend staying here.

I stayed at Mari's place for 4 days and enjoyed every moment of it. The location is tough to call; it's close enough but there's probably other places that are more centrally located, so if it's your first time in Tokyo it might be a bit tough (for example, it's a 20 mins train ride from Shinjuku and then a 20 mins walk to her house or 10 by bus). But for me I wanted to stay at a nice quiet place, somewhere that felt like home and Mari's place fit the bill. Just like in her photos, the place is unique, charming and easy to find. Mari was super kind to make me breakfast each day which was delicious (did western style and Japanese style which the latter I found better). She also dropped me off at the train station which I appreciated very much. Bedroom has a sofa bed that's more than comfortable and bathroom does the job. Would stay again when back in Tokyo because of the peace and quiet and the friendliness and hospitality of Mari.

始めの日に真理さんが車で迎えてくれて、助かりました。そして真理さんは優しくて朝ご飯でも作ってくれて、感動しました。部屋はなんとかゲストハウスな感じますけど、実は息子と住んでいます。最初はいろんなものを自分でやらなきゃちょっと不自由な感じと思いますけど、でもやっぱり自分は普通のビジネスホテルを好きじゃないだから、ここですこし自分の家っぽいを感じられて、いろんなことで自分でやってもいいじゃないか。後地下鉄から歩いて２０分かかりますが、バスもあるし、自分は旅行の時に町で散策することが好きだから、あまり気にしないんです。来年東京へ就職の時まだ使うかもしれません（笑）

from a 16 hour journey door to door I had to clean my room because it was absolutely disgustingly dirty.....Mari words were I hate cleaning and sorry, and giggled, she shared I only clean where she can see!!! Obviously Mari is blind!!
I tried the bed and all the springs were sticking through it, and I shared there is no way I can sleep on this either. So she found a thin matress with a pillow that was full of beads!! And it smelt awful, hence I could not sleep. they also have a pet dog that sleeps below the house and scratches the floor all night.
after two nights of no sleep on the floor,she gave me her matress from her bedroom but still could not sleep I was at my wits end,I could still smell and see dust, and the Hoover never worked. she told me a damp cloth was best....again it was me who cleaned never her.
The bathroom was so mouldy around the edges that I cringed at the sight of it, and paint peeling off the walls. I took photographs and sent them on. there was no place to put your clothes. So they got wet....I put my jeans on the back of the door, and two screws fell out of the hollow door.
Mari screamed at me and said YOU FIX IT NOW!!!!!!! This was my host talking to me???? .I read the reviews again and thought have I got the right place? Screws out of the door? Makes sense " She has got a screw loose" !!
The kitchen was also very dirty and the extractor was full grime and made me feel ill, and the fridge was covered in dust. I truly was appalled by what I saw.
Mari said she would clean.....but never did-my breakfast. I through most of them down the toilet as it made me vomit they were very weird.
Mari as a host is the worst I have ever come across, and I have backpacked around the world.
she is rude, up and down with mood swings and you can never know what she will be like.....It was miserable as hell, and ruined the trip.
I was looking for a host for my complete five week stay as I was studying, and want one place only.
I called out too air bnb for help after two weeks as it was so bad living there.
it came to an end when.My mum had cancer my wife shared if I skype you tomorrow I will put the phone agains the computer and you can chat....my mum is 78 and deaf....after a loud bang and Mari screaming I went to find out? I shared with her why I had to talk loudly.Half way through explains, she slammed the door in my face ......the rest is history I moved out before time. She should be banned...cut room! safe area??? In a asylum.

I had a good stay at Mari's place although it is a little bit far from the center of Tokyo. On sunny days with good weather the walk from the house to the train station is actually nice though it is far. The room was clean overall. It was small as expected but the couch bed was warm. The breakfasts were fairly tasty and Mari and Riku are nice enough to chat with.

こんにちは。
４日間泊まったがマリさんが気楽にしてくれてよく過ごしました。
家もまるでジブリアニメイションのなかで出る家みたかったです。それでインテリアもすごく気に入れました。
朝ごはんもおいしくてよく食べました。
マリさんと話をすると明るいエナジーが私にも伝えられました。
マリさん、配慮してくださて本当にありがとうございました。
マリさんのお幸せをいつも祈ります。
お元気で。また、会いたいです∧_∧

안녕하세요.
사흘간 묵었지만 마리상이 편하게 해주어서 잘 지냈습니다.
집도 마치 지브리애니메이션에 나온 집 같았습니다. 그래서 인테리어도 너무 맘에 들었습니다.
아침밥도 맛있어서 잘 먹었습니다.
마리상이랑 이야기를 하면 밝은 에너지가 저에게도 전해집니다.
마리상. 배려해주셔서 정말 감사합니다.
마리상의 행복을 늘 바라겠습니다.
건강하세요. 다시 만나고 싶어요.

Mari is very kind and considerate.
She made an effort to tell me how to travel in tokyo.
Especially, the breakfast she made was good. It was japanese and western style.
Mari and her son lived together happily , I could feel comfortable
and experience peaceful japanese daily lives, even though I stayed for
a short time.
Mari's house is cozy, unique and fresh. Guest room is equipped well for guest. From her house to the station , I could enjoy calm atmosphere of community.
I could make a happy and peaceful tokyo memories in mari's home.
Thank you.
wonderful experience! Ms. Mari is very nice the house very clean and friendly hotel in a great spot near tokyo.

I just had a wonderful 8-day journey in Mari's. The things below might be your reference.
First you should know that you are going to live with a mom and a son.
And you are going to share most things with them. Of course it will not be as free as in hotel, but it's more alive than living alone. Mari is nice and helped me a lot when I'm in trouble.She cooked me delicious breakfast for 8 days(never the same).
The house is quite and cute. There's a park about 2' from the house which is a good place to have a walk or do some running.
But the house is a little bit far from the subway.(about 17' on foot) And the room is small. If you don't care these, considered the prize, it's really good place to stay in Tokyo.

I am grateful to Mari and her family for another enjoyable airbnb experience and being so kind to open their home and hearts to me! My room was quite comfortable for sleeping and had ample space to hang my clothes on hangers and even had a little place to sit. She and her family also allowed me to use the common area (kitchen/dining/living room) downstairs and there was a nice balance between respecting each other's privacy and taking the advantage of companionship of being together in the same house.

I stayed with Mari and her family for two nights while attending a conference at a nearby university. Her place was a convenient 10 minute bus ride from the venue in a quiet residential neighborhood with a wonderful park nearby.

Mari went out of her way to help me get myself oriented to the neighborhood quickly, picking me up at the station, explaining where things were in her house and how navigate (light switches, kitchen, use of the bath/toilet, opening windows, and locking the front door). She also did a wonderful job helping me to quickly orient myself to an unfamiliar neighborhood (bus stop/schedule, supermarket, park, convenience stores).

I really enjoy the stay in Mari's place. The house is cute, well design, in a peaceful residential area. Mari is very nice. She offered fabulous breakfasts and picked me up at the station by her car. Very home-like experience!

Mariさんは本当にすごくいい人ですよ！この間にずっと世話になりましたよ！
初めて会ったときにMariさんは車で駅で迎えてくれましたね！それに最後の日にMariさんの息子さんも車で駅まで私を送ってくれましたね！すごく助けてくれました！
毎日帰って、Mariさんと色々な話を喋って、楽しかったんですよ！
私の日本語先生になって、本当にありがとうございました！！
特にMariさんがすごく美味しい朝ご飯作ってくれたのを忘れないんです！
本当にいい経験でしたよ！またMariさんのところに行きたいんです！

宿泊するのがワクワクするとても可愛らしいお家でした。マリさんはとても親切で、気さくで素敵な方でした。用意してくださった朝ごはんがとても美味しかったです。
予約内容の変更にも柔軟に対応してくださり助かりました。
最寄り駅からお家の近くへはバスで２駅ですが、駅から家までを車で送迎してくださりとても感謝しています。

I greatly enjoyed my time at Mari's place. My place of stay was clean and well kept. Mari and Riku were both informative in the areas I wanted to visit. Mari also gave me some guide books, which would serve as a foundation for my travels in Tokyo, to that I'm truly grateful. I could not have asked for a better host.

Mari was the perfect host!
Kind, caring and very welcoming.
Thank you Mari for the wonderful experience, rides to town and wonderful food.
I highly recommend Mari's house.
とても住みやすいところでした､なかなか気に入ります､ｵｰﾅｰもとても優しい人でした､ 朝よく車で駅まで送ってくれますし､朝飯も作ってくれますし､ここに住んで 自家みたいな感じて､ここに来て日本の生活体験して本当良かったと思います､次回また mariさんのところ頼みますよ~ 本当いろいろ ありがとうございした｡
Mariさんはこちらの緊張もすぐにほぐしてくれるような、とても親切な方でした。また家は、ユニークな空間で、まるで森の中にいるようなとても暖かい雰囲気に満ち溢れ、凄く心地良く落ち着ける環境でした。とにかく色々なお気遣いもして頂けて、とても満足のいく非日常体験をさせて頂けました。朝食も美味しかったです。ありがとうございました。
무엇보다 숙소 참 이쁩니다. 이 동네를 돌아다니는 것도 재밌어요! 저는 겨울에 가서 그런지 난방이 잘 안되서 좀..약간..추웠습니다.... 역도 접근성이 낮았습니다.
A great place to stay and Mari was a nice host, with tasty breakfast made every day.

Very nice stay at Mari's place!
Mari is very nice and caring and makes sure her guests are comfortable and enjoy their stay at her house.
The house is quite big, and so is the room. Everything is very clean, and it is a pleasure to stay there. It is also worth mentionning that Mari cooks amazing breakfasts :-)
I recommend!

If you are lucky enough to stay at Mari’s place, you will not be disappointed. It is a dream, a beautifully built, thoughtful home. Mari is most wonderful and helpful in every way. I couldn’t have hoped for a better stay. There is a beautiful park nearby and the house itself is in a very quiet area about at 10 minute walk from the neighborhood high street. The room is large and comfortable. The largest room I’ve stayed in Tokyo. The house is also spacious and beautiful whimsical. Thank you Mari.
Even better the second time around ! Mari is a wonderful host.
いいところ、ナイスホスト～お部屋はめっちゃきれいです

Mari-san was an amazing host and her place was absolutely lovely! Her house is beautiful and conveniently located, a 20 minute walk from the nearest station in a quiet residential neighbourhood. I got delicious breakfast every morning and when I had to leave early in the morning to catch my flight, Mari-san kindly offered to drive me there. I would love to stay here again!
何から何まで行き届いたもてなしをしていただきました。話題も豊富で、教えていただけることも多く、あっという間に時間が過ぎた感じです。日本が初めての方にもとてもお勧めします。
私は荷物が多かったんですけど,車で迎えに来て,最後の日まで送ってくれました。 家もインテリアがとてもきれいです 毎朝,ご馳走になるご飯も美味しかったです。 マリさんはとても親切でよかったです。  おかげで,日本についていい思い出を作っていきます。ありがとうございました。
Great hospitality, great breakfast and the best room for this price. Awesome smile, she was really helping !

Best place in tokyo !  Mari-San is a wonderful host and her place felt like home immediatly. Plus setagaya is not full of tourists at all so if you wish to have a glimpse of a normal tokyo life this is the place. And yet it's not far away from the city center at all if you get the right trains! If I have the chance to go back to Tokyo I'll ask mari-San again.

Mari's apartment is the definition of cute. Very spacious room and lots of interesting items all around. I like the Setagaya area a lot and hanging out in the small park nearby. Mari was an amazing host and constantly helped me out with anything. Thank you so much Mari!

It was such a pleasure staying in Maris home. The room and apartment is spacious, bright and clean. Mari was so nice to pick me up from the station and she cooked me delicious breakfast every day. She also has a bike that I borrowed which was a great way to experience the neighbourhood.
In general, Mari was the most helpful and thoughtful host you could wish for and I enjoyed my stay very much.

Mari 상은 그냥 '무척 친절합니다'라고 하기에 부족할 만큼 친절하십니다. I swear you will just love her.
방 또한 아기자기하고 예뻐서 인형놀이 하시는 분들이나 인스타를 좋아하시는 분들은 좋아하실겁니다.
세타가야구는 굉장히 조용하기 때문에 정말로 아무 생각 없이 픅 쉬고 싶은 사람들에게 추천합니다.
머무는 내내 편의를 많이 봐주셨고 정말 제 집처럼 편하게 지낼수 있었습니다. 떠나는 것이 아쉬웠던 적은 정말로 이번이 처음입니다.

무척 청결하고 조용한 일본 주택가에 있습니다.
방은 굉장히 아기자기하고 예쁘기 때문에 인스타그램을 하시는 분들, 인형 등을 플레이 하시는 분들께는 무척 좋은 경험이 될것 같습니다.
깔끔하고 좋은 것도 있지만, 주인인 Mari상의 상냥함과 친절함이 무엇보다도 최고였습니다.
또한 자전거, 우산 등. 숙박 중에 최대한 불편함이 없이 지낼수 있도록 빌려주시고 도와주셨습니다.

Mariさんは明るく素敵な方で、宿泊滞在に関しても、とても細やかに気を配ってくださいました。
お部屋も広く清潔です。
快適に過ごすことができました。
She was  great!

I had a great time with Mari San. She is an excellent host, very caring and kind, and easy to talk to.
I will definitely visit her again when I stay in Tokyo. Thank you Mari San!

とても楽しく快適に過ごせました！！
毎日美味しい朝ごはんも作っていただきありがとうございました^_^
また、機会があれば是非よろしくお願い申し上げます。

Mari was the perfect host, kind and friendly. The perfect beginning to my trip in Tokyo!
Very much recommend! :)
Mariさんの家は素敵です。30年になったそうですが、信じられないぐらいです。Mariさんがあれこれ気を使ってくれる姿に優しさを感じました。朝食は本当にありがたくも毎日用意してくださいました。栄養もちゃんと気を遣ってくださった美味しい朝食でした。最後には忘れ物がないか確認してくれましたが、パスポートを見つけていただいて助かりました。ありがとうございました。

この度も大変お世話になりました。早朝チェックアウトにも関わらず朝食を用意くださり感謝です。
部屋も相変わらず素敵で細やかな心遣いを感じました。
ありがとうございました！

Mari-san est super gentille et cuisine incroyablement bien ! Elle m'a recommandé pleins de lieux et de repas ! Elle a aussi toujours été là quand j'ai eu besoin d'aide.
J'ai passé un super séjour grâce à elle!

I had a wonderful time staying with Mari. Her house was a perfect, welcoming, homely base for a first-time solo traveller in Japan. Mari herself was very friendly and helpful both in the run-up to my trip and while I was there. Not to mention the consistently delicious breakfasts she cooked, which were different every day! I tried a wide range of Japanese food thanks to her. The area is very peaceful and safe, just be aware that you have to take public transport to get into the central parts of Tokyo but I didn’t find that a problem at all, especially with the IC card - very easy to use. It’s also closer to attractions in West Tokyo like the Ghibli museum. I’d highly recommend a stay with Mari. She’s a fantastic host. Arigato gozaimashita Mari!

I’m a solo traveler and got to stay with Mari for about a week. She’s super sweet and even came all the way to the station to show me to her place.
Every day she whipped up these bomb, healthy breakfasts with so much care. The area’s pretty chill, mostly a quiet residential spot except for the occasional siren.
Her house is straight out of a Ghibli movie (like Howl’s Moving Castle). Turns out it was originally designed with an airplane theme, which is kinda cool.
The room was super spacious, and she had towels and a hairdryer you can use. The key was a bit tricky at first, but Mari-san will totally help you get the hang of it.
It’s between two stations, and if you’re down to walk, it’s about a 20-minute stroll. Or, you can hop on a bus. There’s also a Yamato Delivery nearby, so I’d recommend using that to send your luggage.
All in all, I’d definitely recommend this spot to solo travelers looking for a unique experience.

I had a fantastic time with Mari.
She picked me up at the station and we had breakfast together. It was delicious!
I would love to come back again :)

A quiet and peaceful place, perfect design, only just the door is a bit hard to open, but won't be too hard once you did it.
A well-balanced breakfast every morning, feels like home.
Only just the bathwater is a bit cool in winter, not a big issue though.
Feels so peaceeful and safe for a female traveller, highly recommonded.

It’s absolutely an amazing experience to stay at Mari-san’s house. She is helpful and caring. The interior design of the house is absolutely cute and I feels like I am living at an anime world XD
It’s quite a distance from the metro station, Mari-san picked me up at the metro station and we took the bus to her location together at the first day I check-in.
But I am fine with a little walk so I don’t see it as a problem. If you are fine with that I would strongly recommend to have a stay here ^^
The breakfast was amazing either, I’m having a great time chatting with her when we are having meals together.
If there’s a chance I would love to stay at her place again!

I loved my stay at Mari's, it was a really authentic experience! Mari was really communicative and friendly throughout my stay, she even came to collect me at the local train station. Mari prepares a traditional breakfast for you each day, which was a lovely touch and very interesting to try. I found her place to be very homely and comfortable, it truly is an experience of sharing her place with her. The room is really nice, great size, aircon if needed, snacks and hot drinks available. I really liked the area, it was calm and fascinating to see a suburb of Toyko, the local train station is around 20 minutes walk away and there are lots of places to eat around there too. Really great experience at an affordable price for Tokyo!
J’ai passé un séjour incroyable chez Mari, qui est une personne très gentille et sympa. Merci beaucoup pour ce beau séjour j’aurais aimé rester plus longtemps
Amazing! Late review though, three years late!

We, a couple from Switzerland, stayed in a room of Koji and Nami for 4 nights!
Everything was very well organized (easy to find, getting the keys...) and the room was very cosy, clean and in a cool Japanese style!
They recommended us some places to go in this huge city and provided us with a very useful pocket wifi! This is amazing and helps a lot to find your way and the good spots in Tokyo!
Would definitely recommend to stay there!
Very accommodating host nice and clean room.

Unforgettable staying at this place..as some incident happen during that housing area but dont get me wrong, it is not cause by koji & Nami. This house is cool, the room is clean,tidy and cozy. We love it. The location of the house is ok, not too far from town, but walking is definitely a must. Around the housing area, there is a market, very convenient.
There are 2 japanese ladies staying in the hosue and 1 indian guy, we met 1 of the ladies and the guy, they are all very frdly!
Koji and Nami are very easy going and funky.
We enjoy the stay very much.

Koji and Nami are amazing! Directions to their place was very clear and it was easy to find. The room was spotless clean and comfortable. I bought a data sim before coming to Japan but there is a pocket wifi that you can borrow for free! I used it for my trips in Tokyo to plan out train routes. Highly recommended

Koji, Nami and Mr. T, are extremely nice!
They will make you feel at home and do all they can to support you.
The location is extremely quiet, secure, and near to Tateishi train station; Asakusa station is just a few minutes from Tateishi, making it a perfect place to stay if you want to stay away from the noise and the crowd of the city.

Supermarkets, restaurants, pachinkos, donuts, are all near the area, so don't need to walk to long for groceries~

Be sure to check out on time, since the rooms are cleaned 5 minutes after you check out!

Share your stories too~

I can't describe enough with words the satisfaction that I have with this place. The location, assistance from Koji , Mr T and friends, and ammendities were awesome. It thruly makes you feel at home. And for the price you just can bit that. We even had enough money left to go to Hakone and onsens. The portable WiFi was a blessing, without that I don't know what we would have done. It helped a lot! Mr.T and his gf took us for some drinks and local food shops around the neighborhood. After a week you feel like a local. I love Tateishi. Everything is labeled and so prepare for you. Make sure to pack light with the washer and dryer it makes it so easy to pack light. Thank you all!

When we booked our room with Koji Nami and mr T we had no idea that we had booked with the nicest people on airbnb! Their help regarding getting tickets in advance for the ghibli museum and all sorts of other things was exceptional! The room itself was perfectly suited to our needs and is really close by a train station but not that close that you would have any issues regarding noise. The neighborhood itself is very friendly with lots of izakayas close by and only a 10 minute ride to the tokyo skytree.
The next time we'll go to tokyo we will book again with them!

I had really good time here!
Nice room,Nice area and so nice host!!
I could sleep so deeply,feels like my real house.

Absolutely I will stay here again!
I recommend this room to all my friends.

Thanks for your hospitality,Nami,Koji and Mr.T ;)

K

Our stay here was really great during our time in Tokyo. The room was really clean and organized. Koji, Nami and Mr. T are all very nice people and they provided us with a handbook that had a lot of information about where to go and how to get to places. We definitely had a comfortable stay and would be more than happy to stay here again on our next trip to Tokyo!

The house was very nice and clean in a relaxing neighbourhood! All was perfect!  Unlucky we were out all day visiting the city so we didn't have a chance to meet Koji and Nami. We just met Mr.T while we were checking out and he seemed a very good and nice guy! Hope we can get back soon and hanging out togheter! Thanks!

We have a nice three night stay easy to find from Narita Airport and go to haneda airport. Quied neighborhood good connection to the center. The Portable WiFi very helpfully.Koji and Mr. T are two nice guys we can recommended to stay with them. Thanks for hosting us

very very lovely room!
me and my friend were stunning for a while, we never wanna leave the room to other places T-T
we even think we'd love to rest here again if we could go back to Japan!

the place near station, lots of food there, lovely house around too :)
we really wanna stay more than 2 nights.

I also met Nami :)
so cute!


and here's message from my friend!

really really nice and lovely room. :)
see you next year (for sure lol)

Zilver

Wonderful place and owners. Koji, Nami & Mr.T are all very friendly and definitely show a lot of consideration for their guests.
They invited us for the first night to share some drinks and homemade food and this was a great moment together.
The portable Wi-Fi provided was a big help to access internet anywhere in tokyo.
Koji was also very reactive to help us and to answer our questions and even helped us to reserve a restaurant for our last day.
We will definitely visit Koji's place again if coming back to Tokyo!

Five of us stayed at Koji, Nami and Mr. T's place for 3 nights. In fact we stayed in 2 houses curry house and Bamboo. It was a wonderful experience and we wish we had stayed longer. The houses were clean and very comfortable with every essential facilities needed for a stay. The hosts were all very friendly and helpful and extremely efficient without being intrusive. You had your own private space and the hosts who lived nearby were always available. They also provided all the informations about the house, the neighborhood, and the travel. The neighborhood is also wonderful. We had a chance to glimp into ordinary Japanese people's life. The stores and restaurants were numerous and very very reasonable. We all feel that this is the place we will choose to be anytime we come to Tokyo again. It is so good that I almost feel reluctant to write this review - in order to keep the secret of this hidden gems for the few lucky ones.

Tana an friends

We only stayed 2 nights as this was the end of our stay in Japan but we enjoyed staying at Koji and Nami's place! We actually met Mr T first but were then welcomed by the whole family :)
The house is located approx. 40min from Shibuya or 50min from Shinjuku so it's a bit far from some main districts in Tokyo but it's a lovely neighborhood.
The room was big and very clean, we shared the bathroom with 2 other people but there weren't any issues at all! The portable wifi is so convenient we wish we could have one in our country but it doesn't exist here yet :(
If you are not on a tight schedule and can waste some time on public transportations then you won't find a better place for this price!

During our stay in japan, we really had a great time. One of the reasons is because of the curry house we had stayed back then. The house was exactly the same as the photo. The room, living room, toilet are all clean. The bathroom is also very accomodating with all the shower and bath tub thing. There is also a living room + kitchen that we could use. This is very helpful to us bcs we could cook there (minimizing the food cost). And the pocket wifi and the tokyo guide book were REALLY helpful especially when we got lost.
There are another 3 rooms beside the room we stayed in. Liz, the Indian guy, and the Australian guy were really friendly!
Katsushika is a really quiant neighborhood. We fell in love with katsushika right after we arrived there. The house was surrounded by MANY restaurants (CHEAP ONE, you guys should try the yakiniku restaurant), convinience stores, bar, arcade places and the 100 yen shop! The only problem is katsushika station is not on the japan rail pass route, so we have to pay 330 yen everytime we want to get into JRP route.
Koji, Nami, and Mr. T are all great hosts. They really welcome us and we keep contacting each other during our stay in tokyo. They live nearby and if there is any problem with the house they will come to fix it. Koji also asked us if we could join the okonomiyaki party with his friends. But unfortunately we couldnt go bcs of our tight schedule. And finally on our last day in tokyo, we got to meet koji nami and mr t! They were reallyreally friendly and they even helped us to get to the station with a car and help us with our luggage.
It's definitely the first and best airbnb experience ever!

Thanks Koji, Nami, and Mr. T for a wonderful set up with some even better times drinking and eating together. I got in to Tateishi a little late for a BBQ my first day, but the night continued and everyone was very friendly. Koji was great about responding to my emails with helpful answers and advice. Mr. T showed me incredible local eateries that aren't on any tourist map. Even the housemates in Curry house were welcoming and helped me discover more of Japan. I had to leave early, but they were all understanding and the check out process went smoothly. When I return to Japan, I'd definitely want to visit them again, if not stay in Curry house. PS: the pocket wifi was indispensable, best idea I've seen on Airbnb yet.

Koji,Nami and Mr.T Kawano's were great hosts. Communication before and during my stay was super easy and they help me out a lot with directions and places to visit as it was my first time in Tokyo.  The the room was really clean and well organized when I arrived. The entire house was also clean and the location is just perfect. Koji,Nami and Mr.T Kawano's took me out to a local bar and I really enjoy spending time with them, sharing stories, and learning about places to visit in Tokyo. I really enjoyed staying here and I will recommed this place 100%. Next time I visit Tokyo I won't bother looking for another place. I'm going directly to Koji,Nami and Mr.T Kawano.

Koji, Nami and Mr.T are the nicest guys we can have
Very helpfully.
Also we can hang out some night we us and their friends in a small but cool bar next the room.
Tateishi is a quiet place to stay in Tokyo, not so far for every district of tokyo.
Also you have some markets and drugstore for the necessary.
Curry house is definitively the to be !!! Tateishi style '!

We had a great time with Koji and the gang! Everything we could need was available. Good beds, closet-space, towels and shampoo and everything! There even are umbrella's available! Awesome group of people as well (the housemates etc)! Located in the more traditional Tateishi neighbourhood, Curry-House is a great place to start exploring Tokyo from! It was easy to find and it is pretty close to the Tateishi metro station. Also, Koji gave us a nice little tour-booklet of Tokyo, with a nice map of the metrolines, which we used all the time. Our first airbnb experience could not have gone any better!

So like I said, I spend 10 days in Tateishi with koji Nami and Mr.T.
There are super people.
And now friends
With us you can discover the Japanese way of life
There are so helpfully,..
The place is really quiet,...
I definitely come back again when I will return in Japan
I don't know what I can say more.
Thanks for everything !

It is suit a Great Japanese style house with nice atmosphere and facilities. If you want to have a relaxing journey and private room, and wanna try Japanese style tatama/ room. You should try this valuable room. With nice housemates. The host lives near and have very good recommendations about the food and spots to visit!

My aunt and I stayed at Curry House for 10 days and it was a wonderful experience. The house was very clean and cozy. The room was very comfortable and our house mates were incredibly friendly and helpful. Koji and Mr. T were wonderful hosts!
This place is just tooo cool to get experience to live with locals. House is clean, quiet, and Koji, Nami and Mr.T are so nice. If we are going to Tokyo again, probably we will stay here.

Spending 2 nights in curry house.its a great choice to pick there. Its a small community,u can experience the real Japanese life. The house clean and comfortable.  and the host are helpful and patience. Even I have many questions about the transportation or ask for help on.buying ticket. Really can feel their kindness.
Both  koji and  namj are very kind person and provide such a good place for me to stay in tokyo for 4nights. Place living is quite and the curry mate is very nice to us too.

We spend 4 nights in Curry House, everything is good, nice house, and the housemates are very nice. The host is very helpful.
We enjoy all the time in Curry House and will be back to Curry House again.
Thanks so much!!
Had such a lovely time! Excellent hosts, even had drinks with them. Kind people who want you to have a fun time.
excellent place for stay, facility is good, cozy environment, will book here again when travel to Tokyo next time.

This place is perfectly organised and conveniently located! Easy to reach all the hot spots and the airports of Tokyo. 7min walk from the station. Easy self check in, quiet sleep, convenient portable wifi hotspot. Check the website they did with the restaurants in the vicinity. The traditional sushibar across the station is a must!!!

I was staying in Curry-house for 4 nights. The communication from the host was superb and the house was easy to find. The room was awesome, real Japanese style! The common spaces were also good and clean. I met Koji and Mr.T and they were very nice and kind people. They even let me check in couple hours before the actual checkin time. This was the lifesaver after my long flight from Finland. I could take a shower and grab the free pocket-wifi before going to explore Tokyo. The pocket-wifi was a lifesaver in Tokyo!
Curry-house was a great base for my adventures in Tokyo. Thank you so much for everything and maybe we will meet again when i return to Tokyo!
Regards Joonas (Jonas ;D)

Although we never met our hosts who lived down the road, we did meet two of the three roommates living at the home. They were very friendly! Our hosts provided tons of information and made it so easy to get to the house. The room was clean and had all the elements we needed. I also needed my flight itinerary printed out, and our host willing offered to print and bring it over later that morning while we were out. So nice!!! The location is quiet and pretty far (approx 45 mins) away from downtown, but it is very close to the train and easy to get around, so it wasn't an issue.

We never meet the hosts, however, they are very helpful and nice. The room is just like what it described. We live in 2nd floor, it a bit hard to put our luggages upstairs. There was a bit noisy while neighborhood talk in common room at night.

Great guys! Had an amazing stay, I travel around a lot and this has been one of the best places I've stayed in. Super relaxed atmosphere, really clean and well presented and in a quiet neighbourhood. Felt like I was in a fancy home away from home, loved it! Thanks Koji, mr.T and all the lovely housemates :)
住宅地段很好，从立石站走过去5min左右。立石站周围有很多居酒屋，可惜我们每晚都10点多回到家，没有机会去…房主很热情地邀请我们一起喝酒…可惜那天我们在横滨玩，也没机会一起喝酒…房间很干净，是我们在日本玩的10天以来住到的最干净整洁的民宿！

徒歩５分の地元に住みながら過去３回利用させて頂いています。
決め手はやはり低価格で駅から近いこと、そして清潔で畳の香りがする和室が大好きだからです！オーナーの３名もとてもフレンドリーで親切な方々ですよ！

I have stayed at Zen house and Curry house. The Japanese-style rooms were very cozy, clean and equipped with bottled water, coffee machine, fridge, wifi and other amenities. Also the location is advantage, as you can reach from Keisei Tateishi Station (where you can reach to both Narita and Haneda around 1 hour) by walk.

There are many classic-retro places around the neighborhood as well!!

We didn't meet the hosts in the end (although they kindly invited us for a drink) but they were extremely friendly and responsive via email and allowed us to check in early to avoid getting caught in a typhoon! It was fun to stay in a proper Japanese style room and there was loads of storage space; the kitchen was also really well equipped and the lounge area was always clean and tidy. We met the other room mates during our stay and they were all friendly and welcoming. We really enjoyed the few days we spent in this neighbourhood, it has a lovely relaxed atmosphere and provides a welcome escape from the hustle and bustle of the centre. Tateishi station is a short walk away and from there it's pretty easy to get into the centre, even if it takes a while. We would definitely stay here again if we ever come back to Tokyo!

I had a great time at Koji and Nami's. They were friendly and helpful, so were my roommates. On top of that Tateishi is a great place to live in: quiet and peaceful, but with many shops and restaurants on the main street, and less than 20mn away from Tokyo's center.

Very good place! Perfect Moment here! We come to Tokyo and stay here all trip. We choose pine and curry house. Houses make us feel like at home, very comfortable, Japanese feeling. Koji Nami &Mr.T are very nice and kind, They help us sincerely. very lucky to stay here.

My experience @ kojis curry house was legendary, everything was just as pictured and the room was very nice and clean, i had no issues what so ever, close to everything by train and plenty of restaurants and shops to check out near the station. Koji is a great host i got in and went to have some beer with koji and his friends who were awesome, in all i felt really welcomed, thanks koji and i will def be back soon! Delta Marc

We had an absolutely wonderful time in Tateishi staying at Curry House. Everything was beautifully organised with thoughtful signs in English - thank you! It was tough to leave as our room was so lovely and the neighbourhood so delightful. If you are staying in Tokyo, don't think of staying anywhere else - it HAS to be here!

Very nice guest house! The room is clean and the location is good!
Enjoy the guest house so much!

In one word: Amazing!
Very nice place. Everything as described and very nice people! Koji and Mr T. are just so nice and adorable! Sadly I did not meet Nami tho. Very calm place and close to Everything. I recommend this place if you stay in Tokyo!
I have a pleasant stay at Curry House. The room is very clean and location is good to travel around in Tokyo too. Koji, Nami and Mr T are very friendly and have played a good host for my trip.

The Curry House was perfect in many ways. Although a bit far from the city's core, it was super easy to get to and from using the train system. The self check-in/out was also awesome and super efficient! We would go back and stay with Nami any time.
Your room was nice and clean. We enjoyed our stay at your place. It was also very near to all sights.

We had a great stay at Curry House!! The room is lovely, really warm and comfortable. The shared kitchen, bathroom and laundry are super clean, sometimes it seemed like no one else was using them! The neighborhood is nice, very quiet but a short walk to lots of bars and restaurants, and the train station. Very easy to get around the city from here.
The hosts are really wonderful people! We were there at Christmas and they kindly invited us to a party with their friends, so we got to spend a great evening with them. They are so friendly and welcoming. Thankyou for everything guys!!! We would love to stay again if we come to Tokyo in the future!

There were signs with my name on it with very clear instructions about everything!! On New Year's Eve they held a party and took us to the temple to ring in the new year. I had a really great time staying at the Curry House!

Very happy living here. So comfortable and clean. Hosts are very kind and helpful.
Feel like staying home.
Thanks so much guys!!!

This place is marvellous. The room is very cozy and all the amenities worked perfectly. I especially loved the dryer and the portable WiFi ;-) But what I liked most were the people! This is an amazing gang that makes you feel like you've been living and partying with them all along. I was actually quite sad when I had to leave and I'm definitely meeting them again.
I am travelling for fieldwork and the room was very convenient for working but also for relaxing. Very quiet area but many bars and restaurants are nearby. The hosts have taken care of everything, even running a website in English with restaurant recommendations and other useful info. Access is easy from both major airports as well as the rest of Tokyo and the price is reasonable.
I'd definitely recommend this place to anyone travelling to Tokyo. Please, everyone stay with the Koji family.
房东人超好，被我和我同学无数次麻烦都耐心解答并保持100%的回复率，令人感动! 房源也超赞，跟描述一模一样，房间很干净，生活用品也准备的很齐，交通也很方便，每早的步行都让人兴奋因为环境非常舒服。十分美好的一次入住经历!万分感谢(๑‾ ꇴ ‾๑)

Everything was as per the description, even better.
The direction given to the house was easy, and it's very near to the train station.
The neighbourhood area was very quiet, perfect for a good rest after a long day exploring Tokyo.
Everything was clearly labelled and we love the Japanese environment of the house.
Just bear in mind that there are other people staying in the same house, but that didn't bother us anyway.

This is the second time I stay in Curry House, same as last time, I have a great moment here. Koji, Nami, Mr. T and housemates are very nice and helpful. Enjoy all the time staying in Curry House.
Thanks so much^^
Looking forward to stay here again.
房東在訂購完房型後，積極的聯繫並將如何到達的方式，以及額外的配套措施有清楚的說明，所以可以輕鬆的抵達，讓人很開心。此外，整個房間內的擺設和氣氛讓人覺得有種現代日式的風味，可以在日本體驗日本的踏踏咪香味外，還可以感受時尚的巧思。
非常干净的房间。冬天去的，房主已经提前将空调打开了，很暖和。房间还免费提供移动wifi

Koji,Nami,Mr.T Kawano place is super hearthy. It's located at a super nice, quite, clean and urban part of Tokyo. It's authentic with AMAZINGLY FRIENDLY & helpful people all over the place. The private room is neathly japanese style and excactly what i was looking for for my short stay in japan. The heather/air con worked fantasically. All roomates are very friendly even tho I wasn't able to talk much to them since the worked to conflict of time management. I felt very welcome. The WIFI Device was a SUPER UPGRADE on my trip aswell and wish I had it at every place i go. Out of 10 points i will give an overall of 9! Last but not least Koji is such a wonderful and outgoing host. He speaks very good english and you can tell he's passion lies in making you as comfortable as possible. I'd highly recommend meeting up with him, if you he/you got the time to do so. Thank you for such a wonderful stay.

It was lovely to be introduced into Tokyo by entering a smaller village like experience in the outer area, this made it not so overwhelming! Even though the home was a bit of distance from the centre, it made the subway challenge exciting and adventurous! local food and drink is always a treat too! Thank you :-)

Everything was wonderful! We absolutely loved our whole stay with Kojji, Nami, and Mr. T!

The room is super nice with extra comfy futons and pillows (warning: it may be too difficult to get out of bed in the morning because it is really comfortable). The hosts also gave us fresh towels everyday. The whole house was really clean (which is super important to me).

Location is about 40mins away from central Tokyo. But if you don't mind the commute, then it's totally worth it. The Tokyo transit system is super efficient, so there's never really any wait time for the trains (about 5-6mins max). Cause the location is bit farther away, the neighborhood was really nice and quiet. There's lots of good restaurants (extensive list of recommendations by the wonderful hosts) and lots of really friendly people around.

I truly enjoyed Koji's place. It is as described, clean, neat and five minutes walk from the train station. The neighborhood is fairly quiet, there are couple of restaurants and a convenient store near the station. Koji wrote my name on a paper and posted it on the mailbox which made it easy to find the place. The portable 3G router was a nice addition, very useful in our journey around Tokyo. I would recommend this place to my friend and family. Thank you for hosting.

It was so nice to stay in this place! All apartment was really nice organize and i could easy find all stuff. Also the bed was so comfortable :) if I could stay there on my way back to Tokyo I would definitely do this again. Thank u one more time for perfect hosting. Best Aga

The hosts were extremely welcoming and thoughtful, and the place is just lovely. We enjoyed the Tateishi neighbourhood with all the local shops and restaurants. It is very close to the train station, just takes a pleasant short walk to get there (The sakura was blossoming too!). It is highly recommended and we would love to stay in the Curry House again when we visit Tokyo again!

It was a very nice japanese house in a nice local neighbourhood and the hosts were helpful and welcoming. The room gets a bit cold at night but there is a heater/air conditioning! The room was cozy and the subway station is 3 minutes away as well as a shopping street.

This place was perfect for us! Was close to the station and in a cute neighbourhood with charm.
House was great and room very comfortable.
Hosts made sure to have absolutely every detail covered. With international adaptor on hand, portable wifi, and every thing you need as a traveler.
Didn't get a chance to hang out with housemates (who seemed very friendly) as we were busy sightseeing and out of the house mostly but they were kind and welcoming when we met them.
I wouldn't hesitate in recommending this place. It's perfectly setup for travellers visiting Tokyo.
Very good room in a great area with lots of eating places. Communication was very easy and relaxed.

The neighborhood was interesting to walk around and had decent places to eat.  Home had a narrow staircase so was quite dangerous with our suitcases. At the point of our stay, we could hear our neighbors doors and activities past midnight. Room was decent and clean.

很棒的房子，離車站走路3分鐘就到，住宿地點相當方便且安靜。
房間也很乾淨、溫馨，住起來相當舒服。
房東很貼心地給了地圖、介紹餐廳的指引，加上免費的wifi，對於自助旅行者相當便利。

房間內提供的衛浴也很乾淨，使用起來很輕鬆、安心，
在這裡住了多天，每天也還會幫忙清垃圾、換毛巾，有賓至如歸之感。
Great host, location, and extremely friendly!

Nuestra experiencia fue maravillosa. Nos sentimos como en casa! Koji y los demás fueron excelentes personas que desde el primer momento nos ayudaron en todo y estuvieron atentos de nosotros. La habitación tradicional hermosa, con todas las comodidades. Tateishi es un hermoso barrio de Tokyo, nos sentimos muy felices de haber pasado el tiempo allí. Gracias por todo! volveremos! :)

I enjoyed staying at Kogis place in Tokyo. Although I didn't have the chance to meet the owners, instructions were very clear and it was easy to reach. The room is clean and the neighborhood is very quiet and peaceful, and the place is close to the train station. I had a flight the next morning and there is easy access to get to Narita airport. I would definitely recommend staying here.

My experience was great! Koji and everyone in the house are awesome! In fact this is my first experience in Airbnb and it exceeded my expectations.

Koji and Mr T were very friendly, they even invited us to the local pub and also introduced us to some of his friends! We now have new friends from Tokyo!

Walking 5 minutes from the house its the Keiseitateishi station. Most attractions are 30 minutes average using train or subway, and that is awesome in a city this big.

The room is very confi. Its decoration is typical japanese with its Tatami rug, all very clean and new. You´ll feel like in your own home but with this japanese style. The laundry in the house is a big plus. Also in the house are available umbrellas for your use, and believe me you´ll need them. That´s a big plus because you don´t need to buy one. Also you´ll find some Lonely Planet books... very useful to plan your vacations.

The killer amenity is the portable Wifi. You and your party will have internet everywhere you go. A service like this in Japan will cost you at least $20 USD per week, but none will help you with the setup. Here you´ll have the service and hassle free!!

I am photography freak. I needed to order a lens from Ebay. I asked Koji if can receive the package in the house. He gave me all the instructions and even received it for me during the day while we were out.

I am very grateful with Koji and his dad. The day we departed we were late to the airport. Koji helped us and even gave us ride to a station where the express train was departing. Without his help we would have lost our plain.

My experience was awesome. If you are planning to visit Tokyo this Airbnb property is a no brainer. Great house, great location, great people, great amenities. You won´t be disappointed. Highly recommended.

What a wonderful way to start my holiday in Japan! Travelling by myself, I was keen to stay in a home, rather than a soulless hotel room, and Curry House did not disappoint. The housemates were really friendly, the room was spacious and light, and I really enjoyed staying in a cute neighbourhood that I otherwise would never have seen.
Koji, who lives a few doors down, is an excellent host. He left loads of information on Tokyo and instructions on how to get to the main sights. He also provided a portable Wifi, which was a godsend. I would have been totally lost without it!
One of the highlights of my stay in Tokyo was going out with Koji, his wife Nami and the Curry housemates on my last night there. They were so welcoming and I really enjoyed myself. Unfortunately I had to get up early and go to my next destination.... otherwise I could have carried on partying!
If you're looking for a fun Tokyo experience, where you can meet some lovely people, staying at the Curry House or any of Koji's other listings is HIGHLY RECOMMENDED.

We had the most amazing time staying at the Curry House in Tateishi. The Curry House is a three storey house with three other residents staying there who were very welcoming. There's a toilet on each floor and one community bathroom and kitchen/living area that everyone shares with no problems at all. We stayed 5 nights and then 2 nights at separate times of the week, and in between our stays, Koji let us keep some of our bags safe at his factory. The room is really comfortable and the portable wifi is a lifesaver!! While we were there we only had a chance to go out for drinks with Koji and Mr. T once but we were able to meet some of their friends and another Airbnb guest and we had an awesome time (the Brazil Bar's coconut cocktail really nice... and cheap!). I wish we could have met with Nami too and gone out for a few more nights. The neighbourhood is so peaceful and there are nice restaurants, convenience stores and the train station just 2 minutes away from the house (even an arcade). It was actually pretty difficult to leave Tateishi most days because it was so lovely. The station is on a private rail line so a lot of locals don't always know where it is, but that also means it's away from the hustle and bustle of the inner city areas. The Skytree tower and Asakusa are also really close and easy to get to. I would definitely stay with Koji, Nami and Mr. T again. 10/10 would recommend!!

We spent 4 nights in Koji's Curry house and after traveling around Japan using airbnb stays and all we need to say is that this room was the most perfect one with caring owner Koji & his brother MrT and superb&every friendly and communicative residents Ambar and Mamiko. Relaxed outskirts but easy to commute into downtown with couple of great sightseeing in the less than 15 min by local train. Convenient kitchen&olivine room with all you can need for cooking&making tea, and residents keeps it clean. We strongly recommend Koji's airbnb offers and are glad to announce he is renovating a new one just in the next street! Wifi walker worked perfect, Koji provide even a plug reduction (basically this is your perfect host). We wish all Japanese hosts would be such a great pleasure! Thank you Koji & Ambar & Amiko!
Laco&father

The room was clean and comfortable, and the house provided all the necessities (shower, washing machine, etc). We had no trouble finding the place, and Koji even provided us with directions to the station, and then directions from the house to the station. It was very easy to find. We really enjoyed our stay. Koji was a gracious host, and showed us a great local ramen restaurant where we think we had some of the best ramen in our lives. The area around Tateishi station has a completely different feel from central Tokyo, and we really enjoyed staying in this quiet, historical neighborhood. We could get away from the noise of the city and rest after a long day of walking and exploring central Tokyo, while still only being four train stops away from Tokyo SkyTree.

The Curry House is clean and comfortable and the hosts are very welcoming and accommodating!  I definitely recommend staying here.  Directions to the house were very clear and it is close to the subway station.  Bonus: use of a portable Wi-Fi device that you can take with you while out sightseeing.  Very convenient and thoughtful!

Wonderful experience. Out of all the airbnb places I've stayed, I have NEVER had a host be so organized, thorough/clear with directions. This nice couple had everything you'd need.
It's a very quiet place, and but just outside of downtown tokyo. It's impossibly easy to access from the airports.

this is really a good experience.the room isnot as big as it looks like ,but the host is really willing to help us,and the station is very close .very convenient.we do have a beautiful trip  in the Tokyo.
房子离立石站很近，我们很顺利地就找到了房源。房间很干净，很日式，虽然没有见到房主，但是能在细节处感受到他们的贴心。房主一直很耐心，很及时地对我们的各种问题进行回复。这是我们在airbnb上找的第一个民宿，很难忘。

Had a great time at the Curry House! Nice room with comfortable furnishings + the laundry was a big plus. Met Koji, other friends and AirBnB guests for drinks on our final night and that was a great experience in the Tateishi area.

Koji and Nami were very kind and helpful to us, they answered all of our questions and even let us know about some of the local fireworks events! The stay in Tateishi was great and it is close to Asakusa and Oshiage (where the Tokyo Skytree is). The other members of the Curry house were friendly, it was a shame that our stay was so short! It is very clean and they provide cleaning services and unlimited portable and house wifi. Would definitely recommend, and would also come back again!
