房东很热心，很早就把注意事项发邮件给我了。包括怎么过去，怎么认路，也有地图，只要耐心看看就能找到。而且还提供温馨小贴士，告诉我们去日本玩的一些注意事项。房间很漂亮、很舒适，到处都能见到房东的小贴士，还有一些景点的介绍和换乘方式，可以看出房东花了很大心思。周边的环境也不错。就是在搬行李的时候稍稍困难，因为楼梯有些窄，我的大箱子搬起来很困难...总体来说很满意哦！:-D

Curry house is a very traditional and relaxing house for my first backpacking host:) The wooden style of the house is pretty and unique to me, it has a strong Japanese feeling when I live inside. The roommates are nice and friendly to help us too:D The location of the house is near the main shopping street of the town, and the town is small but comfortable and soothing to travel around, and the traffic is easy:) If I have another chance go to Japan again, I would be glad to stay there again:)

It was a wonderful experience. People who lived in this house are helpful and lovely. The room was clean. We just felt free in this house. And if we come to Tokyo next time, we will choose this house again. (o^^o)
在房子里住了两天见到了热情的房客们，并没有见到房主。主人给了我们充分的信任和自由空间，住的十分放松，有家的感觉^_^

The room was great. We didn't end up really getting to meet the other members of the house (just saw a couple in passing), but that was probably due to the fact that we did not spend much of the day at the apartment.

The room is definitely on the outskirts of Tokyo, but it is near a subway stop that can get you anywhere you want to go (it just might take a little longer than if you were staying elsewhere).

We had a great time staying at the Curry House. It was cozy, located in an interesting neighbourhood and very comfortable. We were also able to meet with one of the long-term residents, Liz, who helped us out of a rather confusing situation when we first arrived - my friend and i had arrived earlier than expected and the room wasn't ready so she went checked with people at the factory who cleared up the place very quickly. Really appreciated it :)

Our hosts were so helpful and nice during our stay. The location is great and the neighbourhood is really interesting, however it must be noted that it takes around 50 minutes to get to Shinjuku. The house and room were very nice and clean. Would definitely stay here again. Thanks very much!
雖然在最後一天才看到房東,但是我覺得這裡很棒很安靜,可以體驗到日式住宅生活,早上起床看出窗外,日本住宅街道一切都很好,而且離地鐵站沒有很遠,總之一切都很棒
非常好的一个房东，很喜欢你写的欢迎纸条，也超级喜欢房间的榻榻米 。很遗憾的是我们与房东一直错过，没有碰上面，希望下次来日本，可以继续住您的家

We had a wonderfull experience while staying at Koji's Curry House and later on Wahuu House. Koji really went out of his way to help us getting tickets for attractions in Tokyo. His accomodations are perfectly situated, since they are between the international airports and Tokyo's center. Koji turned out to be a great host with attention to detail and was very pleasant and fast in his communication. Would certainly recommend to anyone and go there again!

部屋は綺麗だった、清潔はもいいです。立石はいいな場所だと思います、たくさんレストランがある、コンビニも、小さな店も、その界隈はきっと面白いかった !
こじさんはかっこいいホストだ ! いいな地元のバーに連れて来てくれた、本当に楽しかったんです !
もし東京にまた行ったら、カレーハウスに戻ってきて嬉しいです !
いい経験だと思っていますよ !

Koji and Nami immediately made us feel very welcome they are a great fun couple :) It was easy to find with the map and it  is really chilled  area to come back to after the busyness of tokyo. Great local shops, resterants and bars all close by. They provide free wifi to your mobiule which makes exploring tokyo really easy :)
交通很方便，京成立石站，房东很热情，因到店比较晚，一切都帮我们准备好了，房间很大，榻榻米很舒服，附近很多居酒屋和24小时快餐店，味道也不错。值得推荐

We stayed just one night here but could have happily stayed more. Met Koji briefly as we were checking out and he seemed like a cool guy. The map and instructions he provided were really clear and made checking in a breeze. Everything in the house was labelled as well which made things easier.
It's a great base from which to explore Asakusa with bags of Shitamachi charm.

We had the best time at Koji and Nami's place! Everyone living there was so welcoming and inclusive. We all went out on our first night and had a great time getting to know one another. The place itself was spacious, clean and had everything we needed. Tateishi is a really nice little town, the place is only a 5 min walk from the station and grocery store. Not to mention some great bars and sushi restaraunts. If you're going to Tokyo and want to experience life off the beaten track, Koji and Nami are the people to stay with!!! Couln't reccommend them any more!
Location is very easy to travel to. The room is very clean and comfortable. The host gave us total privacy during our stay.

Ha sido un placer alojarse aquí. La habitación estaba muy limpia y era bastante amplia y cómoda.
La casa era tranquila y tenía todo lo necesario.
Los anfitriones fueron muy atentos en todo momento.
La casa no está situada en el centro de los puntos más turísticos de Tokyo, pero tiene una estación muy cerca que permite llegar rápidamente a todos los lugares.
Si algún día tengo la suerte de volver a Tokyo, seguramente repetiré alojamiento!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
It has been a pleasure to stay here. The room was very clean, quite spacious and comfortable.
The house was quiet and had all you need.
The hosts were very attentive at all times.
The house is not located in the center of the tourist spots in Tokyo, but has a station nearby that allows quick access to all places.
If some day I have the luck to return to Tokyo, I certainly will repeat accommodations!

The location is as mention in the description, near to train station.
Few blocks you able to find restaurant or convenience stores. The housemate are friendly too. Amenities are more than enough. Good place for backpackers traveler. All the details are given and the host very helpful.

I think the map is fine for those traveling by train to the house but not clear enough for those who drive. The postal code doesn't show the exact address on GPS. The room is basic and simple without TV and working desk etc.  however the host is kind enough to offer portable wifi and parking space as indicated. The price should be justifiable to be cheaper for youngsters.
很好的房间，就是地方略有些难找。房东虽然老是不在，但是很热情。
outstanding service. No complain at all. 100%recommended

Our experience at the Curry House was a wonderful one. Although our flight landed very late and we missed the last train, Our hosts had given us very clear directions on how to get to the house and which was the best option for train tickets etc. The house had every thing we needed and the portable wi-fi was a huge plus when we were sight-seeing. They also had a list of popular sight-seeing spots in Tokyo with clear directions on how to get to them and we made very good use of this list and visited all the spots they suggested. Thank you to Koji, Nami and Mr T for a great stay, we will definitely be coming back there when we visit Tokyo again.

The room is neat n tidy, the apartment is located in a little bit away the urban but the environment is very peaceful n can experience the local Japanese culture . The ppl there are very helpful, n nice

The location of koji apartment is quite good to travel spot view in tokyo , such as "SKY TREE" , Disneyland .and it's only 48 Minutes between airport and Koji apartment ,it's a fast way to airport when you leave tokyo.

Koji & Nami is a nice couple ,they makes me a warm and comfort style in this journey.I 'm still remember taht we are have breakfast in (松屋).

I hope we can meet again in the furture, drink a lot and eat a lot ,see you soon!

Really feel like home! Very comfortable and the room is so clean!!!!! Before we arrive, the host give us the instructions about the train information, really helpful! We got there easily. We had a great in Curry house~~ Thank you, Koji& Nami. :)

I had a very pleasant stay at the Curry-House and here's why you should do the same;
1) Location is easy to locate and is conveniently near to Narita Airport and serves as a reasonably good base to explore Tokyo and side trips from Tokyo for its price.
2) Local restaurants in the neighborhood are delicious, and there's a family mart nearby
3) Housemates in the house are welcoming and non-intruding
4) Room, toilets and shower are tidy and clean! Not to mention that the room's decor are quaint and beautiful.
5) Abundance of useful amenities provided such as fridge, washing machine, daily fresh towels, hair dryer etc and not to mention the extremely useful PORTABLE WiFi!
6) Koji, Nami and and Mr. T ar extremely responsive plus friendly, you can be assured that they are always ready to help!
7) Last but not least the check-in and check-out procedures are simple and easy to understand.
I will be back when I visit Tokyo next time! :)
Here is an excellent choice for tourism, it is so clean and comfortable. If you have any questions,they will be very happy to assist.
第一次用Airbnb ，很庆幸选择了Koji的住所，交通去市区都非常方便，晚上回到住所附近还有很热闹的商业街和餐厅，能更好地体会当地人的日常生活。期待下次旅行，谢谢。

今日本で留学してる韓国人です。駅から家までは遠くない距離で探すのも簡単でした。部屋の雰囲気もとても静かです。ホストの親切と部屋にあるいろんな地図は有用でした。

해당 역에서 가깝고 근처에 친구들과 술마실 곳도 많았습니다. (좋은 음식점도 많았습니다.) 중심가까지의 거리가 40~50분걸린다는 것이 한가지 흠이지만 숙소에 대해서는 너무나도 만족스러웠습니다.

It was a good experience, place are clean and comfortable.
Helpful and nice people make the trip better!
Lovely room in a very clean and organised house. You'll find everything you need and Kojisan and Namisan very very helpful and nice.

It was such nice room with nice location.
It was the first time to go overseas for my nephew(13years).
So, I think he had a great experience, of course he fully statisfied every single monent in the room and other destination.

And Everytime I visited Japan, I only stayed a Hotel caused me of spending much money. But at this time, I could save heaps money and have a real Japanese life in Curry House.

Moreover, I highly recommend any of you to visit Sushi Restaurant and Chichen Skewers(やきとり) bar near the Curry House. If you have a no idea where it is, you can ask Mr.T(host).
He'll be willing to let you know.

At last, as I said it was really great night at nice やきとり bar and local bar with you, Mr.T. Once again, I really appreciate your hospitality and My nephew'd like to say "Thank you, Mr.T" as well.
我们到得很晚～但是房间里的一切都准备齐全了～空调开着灯也亮着，让人感觉十分温暖～非常干净舒适，一切日用品都很齐全，在东京这几天睡得昏天黑地，hiahiahia。这一片区域有很多居酒屋，还有一条商店街，生活十分方便。离立石站很近，从机场过来很方便。下次来还会住这里～
Everything was perfect! Very clean and a lot of light in the room. They helped us with everything we needed at any time! And we had all that we need in a perfect neighborhood with lovely people.
住了两个晚上都没有见到房东，但是沟通还是顺畅的，有问题都会回复，房子里有指示牌欢迎你，自己拿钥匙开门上楼，相当于自助式的，但是很干净，虽然不在市中心，但交通相对便利，如果没有最佳的房子，这里还是值得选择的

Really great experience at Koji's place. Highly recommend this stay to anyone looking for a quiet and comfortable stay in Tokyo. The room was exactly as described, clean, and had a great bathroom and shower setup.

Our baggage missed our flight, and when it was delivered to the apartment Koji came out from work and even paid the delivery fee! Great service from a great guy (and we paid him back, of course!)

能住在這裡真的太好了！
附近就有超市,商店街跟車站，而且房東人真的很好也很風趣，很樂意幫你解決困難。
房間住起來很舒適。
下次再到東京還是會來這裡。
Staying at Koji's place is the best decision we make for our tokyo trip. The room is clean. Neighbourhood is friendly. And of course, Koji san is a spectacular host! Highly recommend!

The Curry House is a little bit outside of the city, but the amenities are just what you need to have a comfy stay in Tokyo. The directions to the house were absolutely clear and helpful. By convenience, there is a Family Mart in case you have the munchies, and the station is right there. I would highly recommend this spot if you're looking for a comfy bare minimum. :)
Really nice hospitality of K&N!!! And it's so kind of my roommates! Totally self check-in and I feel free these days. The room is clean and comfortable, and the style is soooo cool!

Our experience with the curry house was great! We really had a great time in the house. The house has everything that you need for your trip to Tokyo Japan. Koji and Nami were a great host! Their hospitality is awesome! No wonder they're a superhost in airbnb. The housemates that you're going to have in the house were pretty awesome as well! Overall 5 stars thumbs up!

We had a great stay at Curry's house. It was comfortable and convenient and clean. They were very kind and helpful and Having the possibility to borrow the portable wifi from them was also very great. I liked the fact that we could reach the airports without changing lines.

My host put up a welcome sign at the frontdoor and at the door of my room.
They send me an itinerary, so their airbnb was very easy to find.

Accoglienza fantastica, K & N sono molto gioviale e simpatici.
La casa è un po' un periferia ma si raggiunge bene con la metro, il quartiere è tipicamente giapponese e molto diverso dal c'è troppa di Tokyo, cosa che ci ha attratto. Casa pulita e con tutti i servizi necessari!!
The appartement is pretty and clean and K & N are funny and ready to help always!!
We loved the apartment and the neighbors, it is a little bit far away from the center but with the metro no problem. It is a characteristic Tokyo neighbors!!
The host sent me a map and detailed how-to-access-there email, , everything went smoothly. The room was nice as described.

Thanks for K&N. The room was celan and you need share bathroom and shower room with 3 roommates, who are from different country. It's really cool. The last day, they private luggage keeping and K's brother drove us to the metro station, which impressed me a lot. Many Thanks.

房间的位置有点偏，位于立石，押上过去还要10分钟地铁。如果选择住这里，在交通费用上可能话费有点多。 房间整体干净，也算便利。 房东人超级热情。但没有包括早餐的（可能是之前主页介绍没有更新）。很感谢他们 最后一天还开车把我们送到地铁站。
Warm welcome, hospitality and so kind

Koji and Nami were wonderful hosts. The room was just as described in the listing, and the neighborhood was quaint and charming. It is a little farther out, but well worth it to get the experience of living in a residential area. We were very impressed by how clean the room and bathroom were, and also by the convenience of the location and amenities. Koji and Nami even provided a portable wi-fi for us to take around Tokyo with us, and they let us check out a little late/dropped us off at the subway station so we wouldn't have to walk with our heavy suitcases. The roommates we met were welcoming, and while we didn't see Koji and Nami much they were very quick to respond to any requests we had. We would certainly stay here again if we were to return to Tokyo, and highly recommend them as hosts!
The welcome was perfect, the host was very friendly. The room was clean and neat. Perfect if you want to stay a couple of days in Tokyo. It is approximately half an hour from Ueno station.

We had a great time in Koji and Nami's house. Living there made our trip fascinating. Their house is in an old traditional Japanese community, quiet, clean and convenient. We also visited Koji's printing factory. It's just in the neighborhood, not very big, but lovely and interesting. Cause I am doing printing job too, we had a good talk about printing. Thanks for driving us to the train station!! We recommend their house, you will not be disappointed at all!!

Best Air B&B I have ever had the pleasure to stay at! Kogi and Nami were excellent hosts. The room, kitchen, and bathroom were always clean.  They supplied us with fresh bathing towels everyday. They were also very helpful with navigating us around Tokyo. Their place is close to Aoto and Keisei Tateishi station which is extremely convenient. Also the portable WiFi was a life saver since we did not want to do an international plan with our phones. The hosts were also extremely responsive prior to our arrival and during our stay with any questions we had.

神奇的Keisei Line京成线异常方便可靠的，房子所在的葛饰区Tateishi 立石站充满浓浓的生活气息，商店街和美食店应有尽有，房间简单、干净且很安静，让累了一天的我们可以好好休息。
房东的贴心贴士让我们在整个旅行中都有体会：交通便条，天气提示，冰镇饮料......即使不见面也能感受到他们的热情和周到。
Really nice and considerate!
Enjoy Keisei Tateishi station!
Enjoy curry house!
thank you guys Koji, Nami & Mr.T .
we were happy here.

Koji is awesome, and the room was exactly what I wanted out of my first stop in Japan. Quaint and traditional, but with every amenity you'd need. The neighborhood is nice and provides a nice respite from the madness of Tokyo's more famous neighborhoods.
很愉快的入住！去之前提前问了到达时间，房间已开好空调，虽说是郊区，但去银座新宿基本30分钟可以到达，很安静的社区，周围还有很多有意思的居酒屋。下次来还想住这儿！
I only ended up staying one night 'cause I got sick in Manila. K&N were very responsive and helpful. They provided great instructions to get to the place. Nice old school Tokyo vibe.
房子位處於安靜的住宅區內，距離最近的車站慢慢走約5分鐘可到，車站一出來就有商店街和便利商店，而且有些是24小時營業，完全不用擔心晚上肚子餓沒東西吃。房間與照片相差無幾，所以入住時不會有落差產生。其實周圍有些不錯的餐廳，只是這次沒有安排到，下次有機會也會再去入住。

The place was very convenient and super easy to find.  The hosts were friendly and even helped us book a bus to Mount Fuji. There was tourist information about the neighborhood in the room and we got fresh towels every day. Such a great place to stay for the price!! Would highly recommend to anyone!

Koji was very welcoming and helpful. He was very responsive to all of my requests and questions. He went above and beyond what I was expecting.

Would highly recommend this place! Thank you Koji!

This was a great stay. The hosts made everything very easy and convenient to find. The house is very clean and comfortable. The neighborhood was great also, plenty if good restaurants nearby and easy train access to Narita & Tokyo.
Our stay was very nice !! We loved the traditionnal style of the room and it was very comfortable. Koji and Nami are smiley and helpful people, thank you so much to them ! :)

The trip into K&N's was so smooth and everything was exactly as described. The air conditioning was such a blessing on a blazing August night in Tokyo! If i were to explore Tokyo for a full week this is definitely where I would stay. All of the amenities, guidebooks, and quick responses from the hosts make for such easy exploring. Highly highly recommend.

Curry house離京成立石站很近，到各個商圈景點都很方便。小屋座落在一個乾淨的巷子中，非常具有日式特色，舒適方便，每天遊玩早出晚歸感覺就像回到自己的家一樣。重點感謝一下房主K&N,還有T和德國房客Robert，都是樂於幫忙，樂於分享的人，為我們的自由行增添了濃厚的人的色彩，這一點是住在高級旅店獲取不到的精彩。遺憾沒能與房主一起小酌一次，也沒能來得及仔細參觀他們的工作坊，希望有機會能再來這個地方，也在此給大家做特別的推薦！

駅からも近く、清潔なお部屋です
管理がしっかりしていて安心して休めます

Very short but very nice stay! We stayed at Koji and Nami for our last night in Japan and our stay could not have given us a better last taste of Japan's hospitality that we have been experiencing for 2 weeks. Even though we did not actually have the chance to meet each other, everything was done in a very thoughtful and charming way! All the info to get to the place was sent well before our arrival and everything was perfectly indicated for us to get to the place. There were sign posts awaiting our arrival with our name on it, and also we got a very nice little gift that, all in all, helped us feel like if we were visiting some friends or family! Excellent!
Also, the room was exactly as shown on the photos and was also very clean and gave a very nice Japanese style to the end of our long trip to Japan! Thanks for everything! I will definitely recommend anyone willing to stay in Tokyo to stay at Koji and Nami's place!
房子离市中心比较远，不过交通便利，房东人超级好，室友也很nice，我们要走还问要不要开车送我们到地铁站。
The place was clean and very accommodating. The hosts were very responsive and even greeted us upon arrival. You can feel what it was like to live in Japan. Overall great place to stay.

That's been my very first time in Japan and I have started my journey just in a Mega city like Tokyo. So, I'm really happy to have found excellent, helpful and organized hosts and to have booked this very nice room in a neighbourhood, that is not an anonymous business or hotel area but a real life environment. Finding the location was easy. They send you "step-by-step" instructions marked on a map and this was really helpful. Check-in/Check-out was easy and uncomplicated. The house, the room, the facilities, ... everything was as described. They provide you information on the nearby locations (restaurants, bars, supermarket etc). From the very first moment on I felt welcomed. Whenever I return to Tokyo I will try to book here again.

My sister and I stayed at the Curry house for 4 nights. It was a lovely experience! Mr. T and Nami were wonderful hosts. Very kind and so helpful! Mr. T even drove us to the station when we left. The room itself was very cozy and very clean. The other roommates were all very friendly people. The neighborhood is exactly what we're looking for, if you stay here you'll be living like the locals. The house itself is just a short distance away from the train station, mini marts and local restaurants. Ps: the pocket wifi was a great bonus! Traveling around Tokyo was so much easier with it. We miss Curry House and the Kawano family already!

Spent 3nights there,super quiet and very clean.I didn't meet the host,but his brother was very friendly and nice to me.Also gave some juice for small present.Make me warm stay.Would like to go back again.

Staying at K&N was a great time for us. The place is nice, clean, and full of really nice people from around the world. We had the chance to have an evening dinner in the neigborhood with everybody, and it was really fun! The subway station is just a little walk away, and there are lots of good an cheap restaurants around. K&J, and of course Mr T where so nice and considerate with us, we can't wait to go back to their place. Thank you so much guys !

It's our pleasure to live in your house and we are so like the environment. It's very quiet, very Japanese-style, very nostalgic, and roommate is also very polite, so that we stayed comfortable, and no pressure. Unfortunately, this trip was too rush, we had no chance to meet you guys. I hope the next time we go to Tokyo, there are opportunities to hang out with you.
房东人超级超级nice，房子也特别温馨～所有生活用品一应俱全，离车站很近，住所附近 超市饭店都有。还遇到中国室友，人也非常非常好，聊天很愉快～总之推荐给每个想来东京的伙伴儿

It's really a nice place. The house is near to the station only 5mins, the area is very quiet. The check-in and check-out was very convenient. I like the decoration and the room was clean & tidy. Also the shower was good~
The host also offered a hair dryer for us~ it's really nice~The roommate Amber was kind to me either. The communication with host was very effective~ any questions were answered quickly.
感觉周围很多地方都是airbnb～ 找地方不是很难～ 邮箱上还贴着我的名字 哈哈哈 很可爱 房子里车站很近 交通还算比较便捷 小区很安静 而且 房子也很干净 整洁 住起来很舒服 洗澡也很棒～ 吹风机什么的都有～ 一次很棒的住宿体验吧～
Très bon séjour , quartier calme à 20 min des highlights de tokyo , les hôtes sont prévenants , chambre clean .. bref on y été bien !

I stayed with my mother. We felt cozy and pleased. And any tourist attractions in Tokyo are near the house. Mr.T & Curry mate're very kind, they help us to plan the trip routes.
If you stay here, feel the warmth in Tokyo. :)
房間很乾淨很舒服, 位置跟車站很近附近也有便利店. 房主跟室友都好好人, 我還有跟Mr.T去吃串燒, 我離開的時候還開車送我去車站.
Worth for price,the host is quite helpful!!! Will come to stay here again.

まず、到着してから部屋を探すのは難しいです。ホストさんに１０回電話して、出ませんでした。
また、ホストさんのお兄さんは酔っ払って私の部屋に来て、何度も握手して、嫌な感じです。私の部屋を見ることを女性の私にとって安心で住む場所ではないと思います。危ないを感じた私はそこから出ました。

第一次用民宿，感觉很不错。我们到成田的时候已经晚上8点半了，出关都已经9点多了，不过还是很顺利坐到了地铁到K&N的house。从成田过去大概1个半小时的样子。
房子离京成立石站很近很近，也很容易就可以找到，因为门外挂着住宿人的标签。
房子附近不远（京成立石站附近）有很多便利店和小吃店，蛮不错的。很晚都在营业…
房东人也很好，送了好喝的果汁给我们。虽然我们英语不太好所以沟通有点障碍哈哈。
总之真的很不错。下次还愿意入住。
Easily accessible.  Quiet place.  A large supermarket nearby which has a lot of things.  Hosts are friendly and give us a free drive at the end of stay to the station.  Excellent stay
房子位于葛饰区的居民区内，周围非常安静，晚上能睡的很好。交通非常方便，就在京成线的立石站附近，周围也有很多便利店、日式料理店，但离市区还是有点远的。还有非常好相处的三个室友，不过只见到了中国和德国小哥，人都很nice！和房东在Airbnb上的沟通非常顺利和愉快。
Thank for K&N&T' s helping and we spent nice three days in tokyo. The room is quite clean and quiet.

I lived in share house by Koji&Nami for 5 days . They're very friendly and accommodating. Just like your relatives to care for you. They are prepared everything for the guests. Portable-Wi-Fi is really useful. Including the route of Tokyo transportation. Thank you for Nami help us look for the tour route. She is warmheartedly serve the guests.
Tateishi is a wonderful place- real Tokyo. If you want to have an experience of the local customs. Don't hesitate, coming here, it's a best choice for you. And keisei tateishi station transfer convenience to the sky tree and Haneda& Narita Airport.
Tips: bring your slipper if you want to keep yourself warm!

Nice place to stay and conveniently close to Oshiage - Skytree and Ueno.  The village is lovely and you get a real Japanese experience.  The train station is conveniently close and about a 5 min walk but is not on the JR line or subway line.   You will need to obtain a pasmo pass.  So if you are getting a JR pass only get if for the days that you are actually travelling around Japan as i didn't find it useful around the city.
这几天非常感谢Mr T和在这里的几位住客！期间麻烦他们太多事情了！Tateshi这边住真的很舒服！各方面都很方便！性价比高！下次过来有机会还会住这边！
숙소가 정말 깨끗하고 숙소주변도 조용하고 좋아요!!

The host is very communicative and helpful , replying fast to your questions. The bedroom is cozy clean but the bathroom is cold, have to wear warm clothes to brush my teeth. The location is decent . I would recommend this place to stay while in Tokyo
동네가 예쁘고 진짜 일본스러운 분위기여서 마음에 들었어요. 조용하고 아기자기한 동네에요. 숙소도 굉장히 조용하고 깨끗했습니다. 아침마다 K씨가 수건을 가져다주셨어요 ㅜㅜ 화장실도 굉장히 깨끗하고 같이쓰는 주방과 욕실마저도 깨끗했습니다. 무엇보다 주인분들이 너무 착하시고 상냥하셔서 너무 좋았습니다. 기회가 된다면 꼭 다시오고싶어요,,ㅜㅠ

We had a very nice stay at Koji, Nami & Mr.T's place. People were very welcoming and the room was comfortable and clean. Mr.T regularly checked in on us and even offered us a ride to one of the neighboring train stations when we left.
레알 개꿀 야키토리 먹으세요

The house is clean and the position is not so far from the station. Roommates are really friendly and kind. We met Mr. T in the house, he is enthusiastic to give us directions and drive us to the station. The room is in a Japanese style, I like it so much. I definitely will stay here for my next trip to Tokyo.
Quaint area, everything you need around the corner, abundance of food options, house was quiet, room was large and neat & roommates were friendly and helpful; 5 stars! Thanks again :-)
Awesome place and awesome hosts! Quiet and comfortable. They can get your Ghibli tickets. My flight was delayed and they offered me to stay more days for free. I really recommend this place.

값 싼 가격에 안락한 시설이 아주 인상 깊었습니다. 호스트는 제가 일본 여행 중 만났던 사람 중에 가장 친절하였습니다!!
모든 시설이 깨끗하고 편리했습니다
강력하게 추천합니다

M.T. And his team are excellent host.
Everything is easy with them, the communication is friendly and they take care of all your needs. In the Curry House the people are nice and the neighborhood is authentic. You feel in the real Japan with the workers, students and cyclists. The subway is close to. So it's why we decide to rent 2 mores nights at the end of our trip. Danny.

This was a great Airbnb for experiencing life in Japan! I loved the simple tatami mat style room with a big closet for putting our things. There are 2 very comfy futons that you pull out for sleeping. The room is very tidy and clean. I loved the 2 big squishy Muji bean bag chairs. There is a shared kitchen and bathroom downstairs which we never had to wait for because the roommates had different schedules from us. There is also a washer/dryer which was great because it meant we did not have to pack a 3-week supply of socks. The housemates are all very friendly, though we did not get to see them much. Mr T dropped by at some point with a big bottle of very tasty Japanese apple juice. The neighborhood is quiet and cute; the house is a little tucked away but not too far from the train station. Finally the pocket wifi was very useful. It was way faster than the SIM card we bought at the airport. Great experience, would stay again!
房间很干净！比之前在大阪住的干净许多！离地铁立石站很近！离大战青砥稍远一些，不过不影响方便！周围有一条街都是好吃的！有药妆店！离新宿会有些远，但是街道很干净，每家门口都有很多花！房主人非常友善，很热情，会帮我们拎箱子，走时候又送到青砥站！必须点赞！还带我们去了赏花！点赞点赞
Host is always reachable and trying their best to fulfill reasonable needs whenever necessary
Great hosts. We had an amazing time there. They were so helpful and friendly that we chose to spend our last days of our trip again with them.

We had an amazing travel experience with K & N serving as our hosts. What you see is what you get on the advertisement placed, and to our delight, so much more.
It was Mr. T welcoming us to the place to go along with a gift, a bottle of apple juice. From our arrival, we felt very much at home as they mentioned in the ad. The hosts, Koji and Nami, were always a message away if we ever needed anything and it was very kind of them to make way from their busy schedules for us to personally meet. Communication wasn't really much of an issue as they laid everything out in place, from directions, to using the place, and a neighborhood guide, you pretty much have an idea of the ins and outs of the Tateishi Station area.
You can also enjoy the common area, their living room, as it comes with what you pay for. We were able to meet the other people who stay in the place, including a kababayan from the Philippines.
In addition to the place, the Pocket WiFi was a big help as we, first-timers in Japan, as our navigation and our "what to do" guide.
The community is great as well. It has everything you need from the great food selection, and, if ever you need them, a convenience store and a pharmacy strategically located just beside the train station. The people are just as nice and warm as our hosts.
Overall, K & N's place is definitely one of the best deals you can ever have! It was such a joyous stay and we're glad to have experienced what it's like to be a Katsushika local.
We can't wait to get back!

This home is perfectly located for those who want to escape the din & bustle of the downtown suburbs of Tokyo. The entire apartment & my room was immaculately clean. Mr. T was also kind enough to check on me every morning & brought along a bottle of apple juice on the first morning. He also invited me to drinks at a local Izakaya place one evening. The day I checked out, he also very kindly offered to drop me at the closest station. It was japanese hospitality at its best.
Very nice experience! The house is so comfortable, quiet, clean and tidy, just near the station. There are some restaurants and family mart nearby.

Saying I was positively surprised would be a huge understatement. Not only the house and room were perfect, clean and equipped with more than we could think of (mobile hotspot saved our lives!), but K&N were so nice and helpful with >every little thing< you had problem with.
Why are you still reading this? Seriously, just book a room, it's not only cheaper, but nicer than a five-star hotel.
Great hosts. Everything was well organized and arranged. The pocket wifi was a very helpful bonus.

The directions the house were very clear. The house was clean and big. I was provided with clean towels every day. Mr. T was really friendly, and the entire staff was very responsive. The train station close to the house was able to take us to Asakusa, Tsukuji Fish Market, and Ginza without any transfers. I highly recommend this place!

My husband and I had a great stay at the Curry-House. We lived in comfortable and very clean japanese style room. The house is located close to train station as well as to local bars, restaurands and shops. The hosts (especiall Mr. T.) were very helpful and they gave us many useful tips and fantastic suggestions. We really felt like home. During our staying we had pleasure to spend fantastic time with Mr. T. and his friends. We really enjoyed our stay in Tokyo. Highly recommendable to everyone.

The stay with K & N was great! I didn't meet them. But Mr. T took good care of me. The place is a little outside - but I loved it! It's a residencial neighbourhood were you can enjoy some great Japanese food just around the corner near the station. The free portable wifi was a great help. On the last day I was able to leave my luggage a little longer at the house - which helped a lot! And Mr. T even gave me a ride to the next station where I could take a direkt train to NRT. I highly recommend staying with K, N and Mr. T ! Thank you for the great time!

My stay went very well! I was introduced to the place by Mr. T and he was incredibly welcoming! The housemates were friendly and everyone made my stay eventful and comfortable. The neighborhood is quiet but a quick walk from the train station. I felt it was a place of solace from the busy atmosphere of Tokyo. Mr. T also went out of his way to drop me off at the station on my last day. I would definitely stay here again!!
超级棒！房东退房时还送我们去地铁站 房子超级棒！房东人也很nice！房子周边十分安静 但也有很多居酒屋 超市什么的都有 位置很棒
Good instructions, Good Owner, Polite and responsible

コジ、ナミとTさんの部屋も綺麗だし、駅からも近いし、たくさんお店もあるし、とても便利です。 成田空港から、１時間ぐらいかかります。 コジ、ナミとTさんは親切ですから、会話をしやすいです。
家にPocket Wifiや、テレビなどもあり、立石の旅行情報も付きました。 関東の旅行は楽しみました。 また機会があれば、コジ、ナミとTさんの部屋で泊まりたいですよ。
色々な事をありがとうございます！
Koji, Nami and T-san's home is neat, nearby Tateishi station and there are a lot of shops around the station. It's very convenient and travel-friendly! Koji, Nami and T-san are very friendly people and it makes communication easy!
The home has television, pocket wifi and so forth. Koji, Nami and T-san are very thoughtful too. They even attached the travel information around Tateishi in my room. I enjoyed my Kanto trip! If there is a chance in the future where I visit Tokyo, I would like to stay at Koji, Nami and T-san place again!
Thanks for everything, dear friends! Let's meet up for lunch or dinner next year! :)
Cheers!

Thank you do much K & N for a wonderful stay at your place. Our room was spotless clean with a well functioning and quiet AC, possibility for portable Wifi, nice kitchen with necessary ammenities. K & N also met us, when we had a little difficulty to locate ourselves. To top it off they were so kind to drive us to the station early in the morning when we departed. Fantastic! I will highly recommend this place to my fellow travellers at AirBnB! Love from 2 Norwegian Travellers :)))
超级棒的体验！房间干净温馨，房东给的地图非常详细非常好找！房东也很热情，第一次见面就送了一份礼物，还热心送我们去地铁站两次！简直太棒了！推荐入住！

We loved staying here. The room was really nice and it was an interesting area to explore a bit. Great communication and bonus apple juice :)
The only advice we have is to bring eye masks for sleeping as it was pretty bright at night time in the room.
Thanks for having us!
房东真是非常非常的棒！制作了非常可爱的小册子 基本在东京旅行需要的东西都有写 交流英语没问题 房间很干净 什么都有 非常便利 房东很热情 临走时送了礼物还把我们送到附近的车站 可惜呆的时间太短了 非常不错的体验
非常干净舒适的小房子 交通很方便 房东和我们沟通也很及时
根据提供的信息位置很好找，房间也很干净，房东很好还开车送我们去地铁站，告诉我们应该怎么做地铁，来的时候正好赶上花火大会，还发给我们邮件提醒我们去看
住得非常开心，房东人也很好，推荐来住，交通很方便离地铁站步行就可以到，即使第一次来东京玩也会是一个很好的选择！

Tさん的家非常的靠近地鐵 地理位置很好 房間也很舒服 每晚還會幫我們亮起燈 跟家一樣 主要是人很熱情！送了我們兩次到地鐵站 太謝謝了。
英語交流也沒有大問題 總之一切都很好 推薦入住！
房东非常热情，沟通很方便。小区安静，房间干净，榻榻米很舒适，设施齐全，住一起的外国朋友们也很安静。房子靠近京成立石站，去浅草寺和sky tree很方便，车站旁边还有一条街，很多好吃的。临走还送了礼物，非常感谢。
The house is clean and is convenient to get there. More importantly, the host is really kind and helpful! I'll come back soon!
哪里都很好~
尽管你听到那个地方一千次好,都不及你亲身游历和体验一次来得深刻。很喜欢那里的宁静，很舒服^_^

The room was really nice and made our stay comfortable. It is a very good quality for price. Though we did not see the hosts much, they were attentive and thoughtful. I definitely recommend and will come again!

The Curry House is a fantastic home to stay in. It was a clean, quiet and beautiful traditional room. We were impressed by the quaint neighborhood and the hidden izakaya gems in the area. Mr. T was incredibly friendly, a great host, helpful with directions and gave us a ride to the subway!

저는 6박 7일간 머물렀습니다.
1. 장점: 숙소의 분위기나 시설은 위의 사진과 동일합니다. 과장한 부분없이, 실제로도 정말 안락하고 편안한 분위기를 가지고 있다는 점에서 상당히 맘에 들었습니다. (잠이 엄청 잘옵니다...) 화장실, 샤워시설도 공동시설인데 비해 굉장히 깨끗한 상태를 유지하고 있었습니다. 관리인분께서 매일 아침마다 크고 뽀송한 수건을 가져다주시니 수건은 따로 챙기실 필요는 없어요! 그리고 기본적으로 관리인 분들이 극극극 친절하십니다. //
2. 단점: 교통이 조금 애매합니다. 우선 숙소에서 가장 가까운 역은 걸어서 5-6분정도 소요되며, 아사쿠사와 우에노쪽을 좋아하시는 분들이라면 괜찮은 교통편을 가지고있지만...시부야, 신주쿠, 다이칸야마 등등 그 외의 시내 혹은 숨은 명소들을 찾아다니기엔 교통이 불편해요. 대부분 한시간 넘게 걸립니다. 교통편빼고는 달리 단점은 없네요! (+편의점이 숙소에서 좀 멀어요...) // 쨋든 일주일동안 편하게 머물다 왔습니다 ^^*
Everything was good.
Loved the place so much we came back for a second stay when we were back in Tokyo! We enjoyed the bar hop with Mr. T and found some hip spots for drinks!

This place is fantastic! The room is the perfect size for up to two guests, and smells pleasantly of tatami, as you might expect. I take two showers a day and didn’t experience any issues with the shower being unavailable for any extended period of time.
The hosts are incredibly friendly and helpful. Mr. T, who you’ll be interacting with the most, is a super friendly and really fun guy who is more than happy to give you advice and take you out for eats and drinks at local haunts. He even gave me free gifts of yogurt and local artisanal apple juice. I can’t say enough things about these guys! Also, the roommates who live there are also very friendly (a French couple and an Indian man lived there when I stayed, all very friendly and spoke English). Tateishi isn’t exactly in the middle of downtown Tokyo, but I found it in close enough proximity to all the major areas of the cities as to not be a terrible inconvenience. Additionally, it’s a quiet neighborhood, and most of the time the public spaces in the house are unoccupied (the kitchen/living room). All of this combined made for a warm and comforting welcoming to the big and exciting city that is Tokyo. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking to hang out with some fun and friendly locals!
門匙可以直接放在房間的小鐵籃內

Kind and systematic. Instruction to the house was precise so that you can't miss it. Nami was very helpful with the advice on the first visitors questions and printed out those e-vouchers for Tokyo tower and Onsen-monogatary.
("Thank you again..") Mr. T's apple juice which he brought the first morning was really fresh. As is same with almost all Japanese dadami, the room and toilet were quite small, in our standard, and noise from the neighboring rooms was to be tolerated when you consider the price....

My friend and I couldn't have asked for a better set of hosts and accommodations for the price. The room is clean, complete with pleasant-smelling tatami floors and comfortable futon, and the pillows were much better than most places. There are storm doors outside of the glass windows facing the street that allow you to block out sunlight so you can comfortably sleep past sunrise. The pocket WiFi works very well, but slows down considerably past a certain daily limit (3GB I believe, but this is normal however). The downstairs living room/kitchen area was vacant most of the time I was there (a total of 22 nights), relaxing in the evenings in front of the TV (if you’re so inclined) was rarely a problem. Similarly, the shower/bath was always available, even though I take two a day! The washer works perfectly, and the dryer was truly a treat, as it actually manages to dry your clothes in one (or maybe 1.5) cycle! Most Japanese dryers take a good four hours (this from personal experience, correspondence with residents, and online articles/forums), and line drying either inside or out is extremely commonplace.
While the location is slightly out of the way for much of the city (e.g. 45 mins by train to Shinjuku), it's certainly not a deal-breaker, especially considering everything else. It's only a short walk and a few train stops away from Tokyo Skytree and Asakusa (you might have to switch lines sometimes for the latter), and Akihabara only a short distance thereafter. There’s a Family Mart and 711 nearby the station (both excellent convenience stores with more than adequate hot and heatable meals and snacks, the latter being the better of the two), as well as a delicious beef bowl fast food joint called Matsuya that is great for takeout.
Mr. T and Koji-san, the two primary hosts you’ll be interacting with, are awesome! Mr. T is a really fun and personable guy who loves to take his guests out for drinks and local eats, and knows all the best places and days to go there! Koji-san is the better English-speaker of the two of them, and can help you with anything you need, even emergency medical services (I myself had to visit a local ear/nose/throat clinic for wax buildup in my ear from using ear plugs nightly… it was painless and all things considered, inexpensive, about ¥7,000 for two appointments and prescription eye drops).
So if you’re considering staying in Tokyo on a budget, you can’t ask for a better place! Be sure to check out their other properties as well, as I’m sure knowing them that they’re all very nice. I was given brief tour of Bamboo House, and it’s really new, clean and stylish, great if you don’t mind staying in a shared Airbnb. Thank you again Mr. T and K-san, as you made my friend and I’s trip many times more enriching and enjoyable!!!
非常棒的一次入住体验，位置比较合适，离市区和成田机场都不远。房东很热情，准备克许多实用的建议，包括周边的美食游玩建议。我们回国的飞机很早，房东六点准时开车送我们去车站坐机场快线，非常贴心！
干净卫生，安静舒适，出行首选

とても良いお部屋と立地でした。住宅街なので静かですし、お部屋もキレイで清潔で安心して過ごす事が出来ました。
また、利用させて頂きたいです！
美味しいリンゴジュースの差し入れ嬉しかったです！
房东非常热情，刚到房子就送了礼物，还开车送我们去车站。房子周围很安静，而且很干净，下次来日本还会选择住这里。
K&N的房子是京成立石站附近的一栋一户建，两间开放的和式房间在二楼，房间非常整洁还有方便晾晒的小阳台，设施非常齐全，每天MR T都会在我们回来之前打开房间空调，更换浴巾及需要清洗的床单，第一次遇到如此贴心服务的BNB。立石15分钟电车就可以到浅草，虽然不在东京中心但是周边商业街、药妆店、便利店、超市齐布，非常方便，还有安静的街区和美丽的江户川，是在东京旅行的绝佳选择。

We had a great time in Tokyo! Thanks to our hosts who made our stay pleasant and memorable. Special shout out to Mr. T who took us out for yakitori and karaoke night. We had a lot of fun! I would recommend this place; the hosts are very helpful and the house is very clean.
Wonderful host, clean place. Stay here.

Als je gastvrijheid wilt ervaren moet je op dit adres zijn. Voorzieningen zijn heel erg goed, prima accommodatie, fijn schoon, maar hun gastvrijheid en behulpzaamheid spant de kroon. Zonder te zeggen staan ze met paraplu op station en bij weggaan brengen ze ons naar groot metrostation om veel tijd te besparen. Goede tips over wat te gaan zien, ook in de nabije omgeving. We gaan zeker terug bij volgend bezoek!

We had a really good time during our trip in Tokyo.
The house was really nice and Mr T. too !
He took us for a local food experience and then to the karaoke !!!
Really funny experience :)
Thank you !
David
동네가 깨끗하고 조용하고 드라마에서보는 일본느낌 나서 정말 좋았습니다 다만 시부야나 하라주쿠 이런 번화가에서는 좀 멀기때문에 그건 고려하셔야될것같아요 저는 엄마랑 놀라와서 이틀동안 안나가고 있었거든요 그래서 잘 쉬고 왔습니다!
完美的入住体验，住了5天，很干净很舒服。mr t的关怀恰到好处，不打扰你，也不让你感觉孤立无援。出了京城立石右转有家烤肉店也很好吃。强烈推荐！
k的房子很棒！对于我们两个女生完全是足够大大大啦！日本寸土寸金的地方，有这样好的民宿真的超级棒！有独立卫生间厨房冰箱房间～榻榻米非常有feel，睡的很舒服！而且房东非常热情帮助，送的苹果汁也好棒～喝光光了～下次来日本还会继续住！Thanks～～～
A great place to stay in outer Tokyo. Close to trains and spacious for our family of 3. Highly recommend.
房东十分热情，入住后还邀请我们一起吃饭，由于日程的安排没去，感觉十分遗憾。房间十分整洁，每天都会来更换毛巾。入住后，和退房是时都有送我们礼物。离开时还开车送我们到车站。
超出预期的住宿体验！Mr.T还帮我们打印了迪士尼的入场凭证，送了guo zh🍹给我们。房子的位置距离shi zhon市中心有些距离，但相对安静，zh周围都是居民，可以感受当地sheng生活氛围。唯一的建议是如果yo有窗帘会更好，早上太亮会bi jiao r o比较容易早醒。

Mr. T is a friendly and nice host. He is warm heart and humous. T toke us to local restaurant and Game Center. Although we didn’t get the prize we get a lot fun! If I have a chance to visit Tokyo again I will define stay in T’s house again!
房子到京城立石站步行五分钟，所在街区非常安静，两间卧室可以住四个人，而且并不拥挤。有两个卫生间，一楼有小客厅与浴室，非常方便而且干净。房东很热情，送的饮料很好喝，走的时候还开车送我们到车站。每天会有人打扫卫生，周围有便利店药妆店和小餐馆，性价比很高，距离银座大概四十分钟的车程。

几番考虑后选了这家房子，干净整洁，居住感觉的确超级棒！房东非常热情贴心，每天早上都会来打招呼问好，而且每天都会打扫和整理房子。所在的小镇外国人很少，可以享受到地道的日本美食以及感受当地的民俗民风，慢节奏的生活让整个人都放松下来。美中不足的是房子处于东京比较外围的地带，到银座新宿之类景点需要乘半小时以上的地铁。旅程最后，房东还询问我们要去哪个机场，把我们送到可以直达机场的地铁站。非常感谢款待，让我们的旅程变得更闲适自在。
这个房子真的非常棒，住家人很好，然后很热情，还送我们到车站。

Our family of 4 enjoyed and loved our stay at the Curry house. Mr T was particularly very kind and such a hospitable guy! He allowed us to check in early as we arrived early from Kyoto and even took the trouble to take us to the train station and advised us which was the time where we caught the direct train to Haneda Airport. This saved us from carrying our luggage to the nearby station which was so helpful to us .
He even dropped by to give us complimentary bottle of apple juice as well as make sure we had fresh towels everyday .
The place is very conveniently located with lots of shops and eating places around. The house itself is super comfortable and so cosy. After each day of touring in different parts of Tokyo , it’s so nice to come back home to a delightful place to rest .
As it’s in the suburbs , we enjoyed living like a local, watching the locals go about thier daily living, shopping drinking and eating . It’s a place to stay to appreciate the Japanese daily living . We would love to come back to stay if we come back to Tokyo!

首先非常感谢Kawanos一家的热情招待！这家bnb虽不在市中心，但离立石车站近，到浅草银座都很方便。住处设施齐全，干净整洁，煮食用具一应俱全，其他生活用品也是准备充分。住家非常贴心，第二天早上特意送来一瓶新鲜的苹果汁，非常美味，还提供了很多交通意见给我们！开启元气满满一天！唯一感到有挑战地方就是垃圾分类，住家标注各个垃圾桶的分类，深深感受到日本环境美好真的离不开良好的习惯！用英文与住家交流挺流畅，加上我几句蹩脚日文完全没问题了！再次感谢Kawanos带给我们一次美好的bnb体验！        Huge thanks to Kawanos! For the Excellent Bnb experience we had!  Though the house is not at the center of Tokyo,  it is closed to the train station. Around 10mins to senso ji, 15mins to Ginza. The house is clean and tidy, cooking devices are provided. And the host even provided a movable WiFi! So thoughtful!  The host is so friendly brought us a tasty apple juice on the second day’s morning! There are family mart, restaurants and a traditional food market nearby! Once again, thank you the Kawanos! We really enjoy it and will choose it next time!
这是我这次选的名宿中最最最满意的地方！第一交通非常非常方便！第二这虽然地处繁华地带但住下来是非常安静！第三就是房东大哥非常非常非常的好，在国内就打过电话给我联系入住人数和时间，还有大哥给的案内换乘相当好用，给我们的地图也非常详细！复杂的交通我们一次也没坐错方向和走错地方！所以以后有需要的一定介绍给朋友，如果我再次来也一定会再住这里的！

選擇Curry house 是因為租金便宜，兩間獨立房可讓大人小孩分開睡，不會干擾對方，還有離地鐵站近，只走五分鐘就到家。入住七天的感想是十分滿意，管家Mr. T熱情幽默，有問題反應都回覆迅速而且馬上處理，第一天入住原本check in是16：00但是我們班機是中午到成田，管家立刻調整給我們提前入住放行李，十分貼心！每天都有專人整理垃圾，房間也會把床鋪重舖換上乾淨毛巾，廚房擦手毛巾每天更換非常乾淨，晚上回家時客廳已經開燈開了冷氣等待疲憊的旅人歸來，服務到位。另外還有五星級的自動給湯浴缸，恆溫蓮蓬頭，非常高級也很受用，因為每天回來雙腳都麻木不已，確實需要這樣高檔設備來去除一天的疲憊。最後要謝謝Mr. T的服務盡責，還介紹一家當地的雞肉串燒讓我們飽餐一頓，讓這趟東京行畫下完美句點，下次有機會來東京會再來入住，推薦給帶小孩同行的家長。

It was clean and cozy
It's inside a narrow road which is really nice and quite

The house is very clean and comfortable. Though it is a little far from the center of Tokyo, the traffic is quite convenient. The landlord is very nice and no difficulty in communication. It’s a good choice for traveling with friends or family.

This is a small, neat three-story house, very compact in Japanese style. If  you want to feel the Japanese spirit, then you here. The house is very clean, every day they change towels, clean the toilet. In  the guest room you can relax, an excellent speaker system. If you need you can use the bike, the place is quiet, next to the river. The  owner of this house is very hospitable, friendly, answers questions quickly. Defenetely I recommend this wonderful house to everyone.
Kind host. Nice location. Room is very clean. Hope to come again!

We are 5 traveler from Jakarta. Mr T very welcomed us from arrival to Tokyo til we left. He drove us to Aoto Station every morning. The Apple Juice is very delicious, and the home are what we are looking for! Surrounded by local residence, and there are so many market, cheap restaurant, and mart near our home. What make it extra, Mr T throw dinner party for our last day in Japan at his friend’s yakitori restaurant. We miss you already! Really recommend this place. Will come back again for sure! thanks a lot Mr T! see you another time.
房东非常热情，贴心，亲自到地铁站接我们，结束旅程仍把我们送到地铁站，服务周到，必须点赞。房子刚刚翻新，干净舒适，每天坚持打扫房间，给我们非常棒的入住体验。

1. 위치아주만족.
아사쿠사선(게이세이선) 게이세이타테이시역에서 걸어서 3분거리에 있습니다. 도쿄에서 꼭 가봐야하는 도쿄타워, 스카이트리, 아사쿠사, 오다이바, 시부야, 신주쿠, 아키하바라 등등 아주 무리없이 다녔고 여행 2일차 부터는 구글 안돌리고 역까지 걸어다녔습니다. 그리고 조용한 진짜 일본사람들을 느낄수 있었어요 아 맞다 역근처에 시장같이 생긴곳이 있는데 텐동맛집이 있더라구요 완전 짱!! 그리고 오코노미야끼집은 어디를 가도 없으니 다른곳에서 먹고 오세요
저희는 운좋게도 한국인현지인을 만나서 진짜 동네 맛집에 갔습니다. 동구리 라고 여기 정말 짱!!
2. 깔끔하고 청결한 숙소
에어비엔비를 처음 이용해봐서 호텔처럼 오전중에 수건이나 쓰레기들을 청소해주시는지 몰랐는데 다 해주셔서 가지고온 수건 안쓰고 정말 쾌적하게 여행했습니다. (마약 매트리스가 있어서 정말 꿀잠잡니다!! 한국에 가지고 오고 싶었어요ㅋㅋ)
3. 친절하고 또 친절한 호스팅분
4명이서 3박 4일간 묵었는데 첫날 도쿄 도착했을때 (오후2시) 아오토역까지 픽업서비스를 와주셨어요. 저희가 미리 말씀드린 시간보다 1시간을 오바하게되어서 넘 죄송한맘에 걸어가려 했는데 다시 와서 픽업해주셨습니다. 친절함에 감사드려요
非常棒的房子。交通很便利，五分钟不到就能走到立石车站。车站下就是便利店，很方便了。房子很安静，而且挺干净的，应该是房东刚刚翻新过。房东非常热情，第二天还给我们送了苹果汁。给我们提了一些旅行的建议，再次感谢他。与房东用英语交流基本不成问题，不用太担心讲不清楚的问题。

The apartment is just a few minutes away from the station, and Kawano-san gave us very clear instructions so it was easy to find. There are restaurants, convenience stores and shopping places around the area. There is even a game center near the place.
The apartment itself is very spacious for three people and it's also very clean. The hosts see to it that we are comfortable in the apartment. They even gave us a lot of tips about the places we were going to visit and recommended us other areas that we might enjoy during our stay. It was very convenient for us that they lent us their pocket wi-fi while travelling. After our stay, Kawano-san drove us to the station so it was easier for us.
We surely recommend this place to people who would like to have a peaceful stay in Tokyo.
房子超大～而且真的很漂亮，房東超好，還給我們送了果汁，可能是我在東京最喜歡的民宿了。很喜歡下次有機會還能再次入住，原本其實想多訂幾天的，不過好搶手，只搶到了旅途的最後幾天
호스트가 매우 친절하고, 위치도 역이랑 가까워요. 조용하고 주변에 시장이 있어서 먹을 것도 많았어요. 로컬 느낌을 많이 받을 수 있어서 좋았어요! 숙소도 깨끗하고 4명이서 지냈는데 넓고 좋았어요. 매일 수건 따로 주시고, 침구 정리도 해주셔서 깨끗히 지낼 수 있었습니다!

Super clean, convenience, cosy house in old residential area in Tokyo. Definitely you can touch and enjoy ordinary life of Japan.
Friendly and helpful owner. Highly recommended!!
很干净舒服的日式小屋，房东很贴心的提供建议还送我们去车站，强烈推荐。
大家都选这家民宿吧，所有的一切都是超乎预期的好！

The host was very nice and friendly. The communication happened flawlessly. The place was constantly kept clean and we didn't lack any utensils. Also, the house is for Japanese standards very spacious.
When booking, one should simply be aware of the location of the accommodation.
非常好的房东。很热情，第一天送了一大瓶果汁过来，然后跟我们确认离开的时间，因为他要送我们去最近的可以直达机场的车站。整体住宿体验也很好，房东写了一个手册，里面把各种事情交代得很清楚。房子一楼客厅，二层两间卧室，干净舒服。位置虽然不是城里热闹繁华的地方，但地铁也方便。推荐大家选择。

Curry house was a wonderful stay. If you are looking for a cozy, retro-chic style stay in Tokyo, this is a great location.
All amenities are as listed, and you will have no trouble figuring out where or how to use everything, as there are translations posted. Some great additions that we appreciated were mosquito repellent machines (non toxic) located in our bedroom and also umbrellas... as it was raining and we were not prepared :) . Koji, Nami, and Mr.T definitely made sure we were comfortable, and checked in periodically, Mr. T welcomed us with refreshments and offered to drive us to a station at the close of our stay!
Location was very convenient, within walking distance a family mart that was open late (delicious quick meals and supplies ) and Tateishi station, for 30 minute trips to larger wards. Tateishi itself is a quaint, retro-downtown neighborhood that has its own selection of memorable restaurants and shops, and required its own day to walk around and experience and enjoy.
Host was great all time!
房东很好  接送我们  也很热情

一早从京都往东京，在aoto地铁站有电梯可上，热情的房东来接了我们，一刷卡出站就看到了他，不用担心怎么对接！
房间是我住过的最干净整洁的，很温馨的感觉！一楼客厅也比较大，适合坐着聊天喝茶。平日里都很安静，关起门几乎听不到外面的声音。
距离京成立石站真的非常近，三五分钟可以到达，而且走的都是小路，很安静便捷。地铁站附近有便利店，有药妆店，还有餐饮店，很方便。虽然我们没有来得及逛。
如果有下次东京之旅，我还会选择这家民宿。真想再住多几天。感谢koji的热情招待。
Top

Superhost with super hospitality! The house is well equipped (there are two toilets on 1F&2F) and the host will change our towels and clean the house everyday. The host picked us up at the station on the 1st day and he also drove us to the station from which we could go to Disneyland more conveniently. The host also took us to a local restaurant to have delicious meals, drink beers and talk about lots of things. It was great chance to know about the local culture, making it a great Airbnb Experience! The house is not near from the city but it only takes 5min to walk to the nearest station.
Top
房屋大而整洁明亮，房东人非常亲切和善，车车站和超市也很方便，步行几分钟就能到。总体来说是相当愉快的居住体验。
Very clean house, the host was very friendly and helpful. Friendly and nice neighborhood.
一切都很好！Mr T 先生很热情
This is a fabulous house in a great location with hosts who are willing to go the extra mile to make your stay the best it can be.  Very highly recommended!!

This place is wonderful and clean. There are everything we needed. The location is not in the center of Tokyo but you can travel there in just 15-30mins by trains. Host is very friendly and helpful. He thoughtfully prepared us Tokyo guide pamphlet and other necessary information. Moreover, he offered to pick us up to the nearest station in the last day because we have many heavy bags. You are so kind. Thank you!
sincere consideration for the guest

Ms T is a very kind and generous host. He welcomed us warmly and gave us great tips around tokyo. He's very friendly, sociable and can speak english well. Our apartment was decorated nicely, beds & pillows are very comfortable. The place will be cleaned up regularly. he response to our queries promptly and fast. He even fetched and sent us to station without us asking fr transportation. Very highly recommended!
This was a fantastic place to stay with great hosts who couldn’t do enough.  Communication was fantastic and I would highly recommend for a stay in Tokyo.
很好的房子，下次来还会选择这里

Mr. T's house is conveniently located only a few minutes away from a train station when walking. The place has everything you can need and many restaurants/stores nearby. Mr. T himself went above and beyond to make us comfortable during our stay in Tokyo - taking us to/from the train station on check-in/check-out, recommending good places to eat each day we travelled, and taking us out to a local spot for dinner. A big thanks to Nami and Keji as well for arranging this for us too. I had an amazing time.

Mr. T is an outstanding host and really offered an amazing experience! The place was charming and had every amenity one would need including a portable wifi router which made exploring a foreign country really easy. I couldn't recommend this place higher, and during my next trip to Japan, I will be booking a stay with Mr. T!
民宿离地铁站很近，周边也有小的商店街和便利店，房东还提供了周围吃的建议还有樱花祭的信息，让我们的行程更加愉快，而且还接送我们到火车站和民宿，非常感谢~

We met MR.T and he is such an amazing host. He brought apple juice for us on the first day which was amazing, and every morning, our place would be freshly clean. Will definitely recommend this place to everyone. I'll be looking forward to stay here again when i return to Tokyo.
房東非常熱情好客, 房間很大很舒服, 環境清潔寧靜, 附近有地道食店及超市, 距離車站步行5分鐘, 非常適合想放鬆心情的旅客

Amazing place to stay,  very comfortable. Very quick responses. Mr.T was very hospitable, also providing really good apple juice. Also showed us some amazing local places to eat. Definitely recommend!

Koji was an excellent host. They were communicative and were very accommodating. They also provided daily cleaning services which was a surprise to me as most places just clean on the last day. Thanks again for hosting us!
大家請放心的選擇這間房子，即使不是鄰近主要幹道的地鐵；住家附近的機能就超棒的！
很棒，住得很好！谢谢房东的贴心服务！

It was nice expriences in Tokyo.
Host is very energitic and recommand many nice local places.
Rooms are clean and enough for 4 people.
It is littlebit far from main of Tokyo but quite and nice.
Thanks to nice airbnb :)
房子很好，干净舒适，房东特地到车站接送，非常感谢！房东在周边还有好几套房子可供出租，到车站步行只需几分钟。虽然离东京市区有些距离，但是可以很安静。

Great host with a great deal of helpful information about the town and how to get around Tōkyō. Only thing I didn’t like was the shower and sink downstairs and the bedrooms upstairs. Also didn’t like M. T showing up everyday and coming into the house with his own key.
何先生相当热情，最后担心我们找不到飞机场，还送我们一段。
Wonderful place near town and the train station. Our host was very communitative throughout our stay making sure we had everything we needed.

非常棒的体验
先说房子 干净 整洁 舒适 有洋房和榻榻米两种选择 孩子们都喜欢榻榻米
再说房子所处地段 非常非常方便 出门就有很多便利店 地铁站 百货公司更是走路五分钟都不到 周边餐馆更是多的数不过来
房东人超级热情 帮我们解答各种问题 非常感动
以后若要来 还会继续选择住在这里
房東親切和氣
松川先生非常非常热心周到，出行前就多次给予建议并提前安排约车接送，当天很晚到达一直等到我们入住。所处位置非常好，旁边就有好多家便利店，地铁步行十分钟即到，各种购物场所一应俱全。
干净整洁的房子，最重要的是离地铁站真的是比较近了，而且直线距离，不用拐来拐去，门口就有生活超市，还有全家便利店，还有堂吉诃德，都可以在5分钟内到达。
设施齐全，同价位面积最大。厨房设备完善，位置便利。池袋地区有一个游客所需要的所有购物场所。民宿距离车站步行4分钟内。民宿很安静。感谢房东为我们准备的一切
很周到，房子很干净，功能齐全
位置比较方便，房东很热情
位置不错 在池袋附近 去周边交通很方便 购物也很方便 房子稍微有点老了 但设备齐全 住的很舒适
とても親切なホストでまた機会があったら利用したいと思います
Good

Absolutely amazing stay with K&N. It was simply our best ABnB experience so far. Apartment is spacious, well located in the Tateishi area with public transportation to all Tokyo main spots. The home is so comfortable! Beds were very cozy and house is very quiet! We slept great helping us to quickly adjust to Japan time.

If you are a runner, or want to take a beautiful walk, there is an amazing path along the river with great views of the Skytree lit up at night. We’d definitely go back!

K & N’s place was perfect for a family stay in Tokyo. We had three people in our family, but this home can easily accommodate a family of 4-6 people. K & N are friendly and great with communication. They picked us up from Aoto station, made us feel welcome, gave us a quick and simple explanation of the home and how to get around, gave us great info and recommendations during our stay, helped us to the train on our way out, and even shipped us medication to our next accommodation after our departure. The home itself is comfortable, clean, and fully equipped. The only “downside” is that the home is not centrally located and it takes about 45-50 min to get to Shibuya and Shinjuku. However, it is closer to east side hubs like Ueno and Tokyo station. But this was a minor inconvenience and being slightly outside the city and experiencing the less busy neighborhoods was an enjoyable experience too. I would highly recommend this accommodation and would stay here again when back in Tokyo. 😊
