The place is clean & is complete with amenities. Umbrellas were also provided which was of use to us since it rained all day on our third day of stay. The toilet & bath is clean with hot & cold water. The place is cleaned & fresh towels were provided everyday. The place is located near the train station, convenience stores, restaurants, grocery store & a market.
I will definitely be coming back for another stay & would highly recommend the place for future guests giving it a 5 star rating.

Can't say enough about how accommodating our host and their team was. Met us at the train from the airport to personally take us to the home and streamline getting settled in. Very quiet place and close to shopping and transportation. They recommended restaurants and activities that were spot-on! Was very pleased with all aspects of our stay.

The hosts were the best people I've ever met in Japan. They gave us so much information regarding the restaurants and place to visit.
They helped us get to the house and the nearest station for our convenience !
I was totally satisfied with everything with this accommodation :)
ありがとうございます！！

If you are coming to Tokyo, you have to stay at this amazing home!
The hosts are the sweetest couple you will ever meet. They were so kind and thoughtful! Such sweethearts.
The house was perfect for my family and I. It was close to everything.
100000/10.

I can’t say enough good things about this place. Mr T and family were super friendly and it felt like you were staying at a friends house. The area is perfect for not being directly in the city but close by. Numerous nearby places to eat and Mr T gave some amazing food recommendations nearby. House was beautiful! Next time I visit Tokyo I will 100% be staying with K&N again!

K&N and Mr.T have welcomed us like a family since day one. All the member and staff are so kind and responsive. During our stay, they have helped us many times even when it’s late at night. We really grateful for that.
The place was spacious and clean. The bed is super comfortable and the kitchen is fully equipped. The neighborhood is peaceful and the nearest station is only few minutes walk. Plus this town is famous for ramen shop. Must check it out!
Overall we had a wonderful stay. You won’t regret it😉
整体入住感受很不错并且房间非常的有日本特色。不过感觉最多只能入住四个人因为所提供的床位是三张单人床和一张感觉并无法睡下两个身高175以上的成年人的双人床，因为认为四人及以下入住比较合适

We absolutely had an amazing time at the Airbnb. We were picked up at the nearest station and clear directions were given to us. Everyone was so friendly and they took their time to sit down with us to discuss recommendations and transportation options. Our hosts welcomed us with drinks and they were so happy to introduce us to their town. The rooms were so cute and included all listed amenities including a small refrigerator and a Tv. Would highly recommend staying at this Airbnb. Thank you so much for everything!
The hosts were very friendly and always helpful.  Sweet family that made us feel at home.

All previous positive reviews are spot on - this is a wonderful house hosted by a wonderful family. Wish we'd had more time to explore the local surroundings and interesting recommendations from the host. We are a family of five with 2 teenagers and tween. This home worked perfectly for us. It was so nice to come home from a busy day in the city center to this relaxed neighborhood.

We had the pleasure of staying at this amazing Airbnb and meeting Mr. T and his family.
The house was stunning. It was spacious, aesthetically Japanese, and had all the amenities one could possibly need. The three floors provided ample living space for the seven people we had. It was spotlessly clean and well-maintained, which made our stay enjoyable.
The location was also perfect. It was situated in a quiet and peaceful neighborhood, yet close enough to shops and train stations.
Overall, I highly recommend this Airbnb. The hosts went above and beyond in making our stay extremely memorable and the house itself was perfect. I would stay here again in a heartbeat if I had the chance and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a comfortable stay. If you are looking for an amazing place to stay in Tokyo, this is the one.
To Mr. T - Thanks for treating us the No. 1 apple juice in Japan and the cokes! ありがとうございます !! ;->
非常非常好的一次住宿回忆！！房东一家人非常的热情慷慨，让我们非常惊喜，也非常快乐！！！无论是地理位置还是安全性都是超好的地段！！你如果有机会，下次也一定会选择房东的房源！！！大家都一定要来呀！！！

Great place, and great family to help with the stay.
My only note is; there isn’t any spot to lounge together. The wooden bench in the dining room is hard and gets uncomfortable after a bit.
Everything else was amazing!

Mr. T hat uns vom Bahnhof abgeholt und am Ende auch wieder zum Bahnhof gefahren - sehr freundlich und praktisch!
Uns wurde regelmässig der Abfall geleert sowie Wasser und Cola offeriert. Wir haben uns im Haus sehr wohl gefühlt.
Um an den Flughafen zu kommen ist der Bahnhof sehr praktisch. Andere Sehenswürdigkeiten sind gut erreichbar, man muss aber umsteigen. Sehr empfehlenswert! :)

Koji and the team were very hospitable and my friends and I highly recommend staying at this AirBnB. Great area and good walking distance to a lot of restaurants, convenience stores, and a train station.

My friends and I loved the location and service that we received. The house was not too far from the city and we were able to easily navigate throughout Japan. Would definitely recommend this to anyone who is visiting Japan
positioned in a nice quiet area, this stay was very cozy, quiet, and traditional. very good experience, the owners were kind and thoughtful. would like to return again
Hands down the best airbnb experience I've had so far. the home was beautiful, and the hosts were amazing and made us feel at home. I would definitely sta again.

The place is modern, clean, close to the train station and very peaceful.  Everything is provided for and has many great local restaurants with reasonable pricing.  Hostess is very responsive and helpful.  Mr. T took very good care of us with the transportation and luggages.  He is a very strong man !!!!  It was a very pleasant stay.
後悔なく素晴らしい滞在でした！
Beautiful home very spacious and true k family were great hosts

Great location, near two stations which makes getting around super easy. The hosts picked us up from a nearby station which was super helpful with our luggage. The house was kept clean daily as well as the trash was taken out for us regularly. Day of check out host met us at the home and helped us carry our luggage and dropped us off at a nearby station, and was super helpful with directions to help us get to our next destination. We had a wonderful stay, and would definitely recommend this house to anyone looking to explore the Tokyo area.

5 stars are too few for this place and these wonderful people!  Exceeded all expectations!  Very nice accommodations, restful sleep in great beds and sound proofed rooms, picked us up at the station then dropped us off, and lots of local information including a Ramen shop that our party agreed served the best Ramen of our lives!  Highly recommend!
great for groups that are willing to walk. house and bedroom were fantastic
我們一行人（4大3小）入住K Family的房源，空間相當足夠，Mr. T不但給予車站的來回接送，讓我們不用拖行李走這麼遠的路，入住期間還給予非常多的驚喜禮物，真的太棒了，下次到東京一定會再選擇此房源，非常溫馨的住宿體驗。

Wow! K and his family were beyond friendly, hospitable, and accommodating. They went well above and beyond our expectations making us feel right at home. They were extremely considerate of every detail and need. They picked us up from the train station to make transporting our bags easier, gave us great local recommendations, and made us feel so comfortable. We feel like we have made friends in Tokyo now. The location is very residential and peaceful. Great for the very long, active days we had - to come back to rest in a quiet area. We will be coming back K's Family has multiple locations in the area so there is accommodation for every size group. Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!

The K family was super nice. They offered to drive us from and to Aoto Station when we first arrived and when we were leaving. They gave great recommendations and were super responsive to help out in any way. The home is beautiful and they just renovated it. There are 3 floors and 4 bedrooms in total. This place is great, and they were all such amazing hosts. This was my 2nd time booking this home when visiting Japan and I will 1000% book here again whenever I visit Japan again.
저 포함 친척 6명과 함께 지낼 수 있는 숙소를 찾다가 예약하게 되었습니다. 체크인부터 친근하고 친절하게 대해주셔서 머무는 내내 마음 편히 있을 수 있었고, 위급한 상황에 도움 주셔서 정말 감사했습니다.
This was the best place I’ve ever stayed at in Japan. The hosts were amazing people and the place was clean, quiet, and luxurious.

By far the best Air BnB we have stayed in.  From the moment we landed in Japan the K family were available for guidance.  They were very flexible with check in due to our delayed flight from Australia.  We were pleasantly surprised to find some snacks waiting for us and my son still talks about the delicious apple juice! The information provided in booklets was amazing and when I asked about going to the snow the K family printed directions for the Shinkansen.  Nothing was too much trouble and it was so nice to return to a peaceful home after such busy days! The house is so clean and I am grateful that my teenage boys could retreat to their rooms with a TV each to relax and rejuvenate.  Thoroughly enjoyed staying here and definitely added special memories to our time in Japan!  Thank you K family!!

Wonderful family host first time in Tokyo Japan and we had the good luck to find this wonderful place to stay and meet this beautiful family who helped us with everything we needed until the end If we return to Japan we will definitely stay here again. If you look at my review, I really recommend it.
My family and I are immensely grateful.
Thank you K. Family from the bottom of our hearts ❤️

We had a wonderful stay at the K Family's place. They helped us from picking us up from the train station to even helping us get a taxi to the airport as we had a lot of stuff to lug at the train station. When we discovered we needed an extra luggage the day of our flight, Mr. T helped us by driving us to the nearby Don Quijote and even going inside to make the process quicker. I highly recommend staying at their beautiful Airbnb. It's as gorgeous as the picture. Thank you K Family!

The house is very clean and nice, it is spacious for the 6 of us. The host is super nice and accommodating, we were picked up at Aoto Station by car and the host drive us to the house so we don’t need to carry our luggages. We are very happy to choose this AirBNB and will definitely recommend this place to our friends 😊💯
K Family는 처음부터 끝까지 친절하게 설명을 해주고 비행기 시간에 맞추어서 체크인 시간을 조절해주기도 하고 매일매일 나가고 나면 자리가 정리 되어 있어서 청결하게 쓰기 좋았습니다 다음에도 방문 하고 싶습니다!!

We loved our stay here. The house was perfect for our family of 5 we didn’t even use 2 of the bedrooms! The bathrooms are great with good shower water pressure.  The kitchen has everything you would need. Hosts were incredible and really made us feel at home.  We are so grateful to the K Family for helping us in the middle of the night to get us to a local hospital for my son’s croup. If you want to feel at home in Japan, the K Family and this home is the right choice.  We loved our daily walks to the train station and we navigated the train system easily. Nearby is Shibamata and Oshiage with great tourist activities. The house has a lot of available information, maps and local restaurant selections that you can read when you’re there.  The train station has a grocery store, convenience store, restaurants and more. It was nice to be out in the heart of Tokyo and come home to the quieter suburbs and see life in outside of the hustle and bustle of Shibuya. Thank you to the K Family!

We had 8 people stay and it was absolutely incredible. The host met us on arrival, they were flexible with our check in due to our flight being a bit delayed, they provided recommendations to some of the best places we ate during our stay. We could not rave about this place more, we absolutely loved staying here and loved our host. Thank you!!!!
Amazing place! Fast to get to everywhere. Perfect location. Home itself looks and feels MUCH better than you'd expect based on the photos. Beds super comfortable. Great shower.

Had an amazing stay in Ikebukuro with Mr. Matsukawa. He was always in contact to ensure we were able to find the place easily enough, and was very warm and welcoming. The place is perfectly situated in Ikebukuro, only a short 10 mins walk from Ikebukuro Station (West Exit). Also close to restaurants, bars and supermarkets, and a short walk to Sunshine city. An amazing stay.
駅から非常に近くてよかった
房子位置非常好，池袋西口出来走一会就到了，周边交通购物餐饮都非常方便，应有尽有，房子空间布局都非常好，我是2个人住，目测住4-5个人没问题，最让我感动的是房东大哥，满满的热情和温暖，我和我爸一直认定，不管以后什么时候来东京，这就是我们的根据地了，在东京找到了家一般的感觉，祝大哥生意兴隆，阖家幸福。

My second time staying with Matsukawa-san. Very convenient location about 5 min walk from major metro station and a conbini basically next door. Excellent pricing at the time we went. Host was very responsive - we communicated in JP and CN. Host included directions, which is helpful because map apps struggle with Japanese addresses. Host was extremely accomodating and flexible, and helped us solve various travel-related issues we encountered. Had all amenities described as well as local recommendations. Good for 5 people or fewer. Ikebukuro is an entertainment district so this location is best suited for adults. I highly recommend staying with Matsukawa-san.

The host is very responsive and helpful. He went out of his way to assist us.
The pace has two big rooms, I would describe it as a bedroom plus a living room with its own door. The bath, sink, and toilet are separate - this may be common in Japan.
The location is very good. It’s not too far from the Ikekuburro station yet the street itself is quiet. It’s also steps from an Aeon market. There are many restaurants between this place and the station and there is a Donki about three blocks from here.
좋아요
部屋も良いし、とても親切でありがとうございました😊　駅まで遠くないし、近くにコンビニもあって便利でした。次も泊まりたいです！

The K Family’s place was absolutely amazing! We really couldn’t be happier, and we’re so glad to have stayed here. The house had everything the four of us needed, beds were very comfortable, and the shower was really nice! What stood out the most was how accommodating Koji, Nami, and Mr. T were. They gave us wonderful recommendations, tips for navigating the trains, picked us up at the train station upon arrival, and dropped us off when it was time to leave. We would absolutely stay here again!
宿主十分友善熱情， 附近有特別活動時亦會主動告知及給予提醒， 又主動由車站接送到民宿， 更會清情款待， 十分推薦入住， 民宿環境內外均十分優美舒服， 下次絕對要再入住

The place was extremely clean and felt warm. Koji was very accommodating and answered all of our questions. He was kind enough to pick up and provide rides to the train stations. 100% would stay here again the next time I visit Japan :)!

We were on a family vacation with 7 adults and the K Family home was perfect for us! Each room was spacious enough for us to spread our belongings out. The table and seating in the dining room allowed for great times for our family to chill and chat and the 2 toilets were more than adequate for our needs. The washing machine/dryer was a definite plus!
The location was easy walking distance to the local train station and it was refreshing to get away from the crowds and to come back to this wonderful retreat.
Koji responded quickly to all of our requests and was a delight to get to know...we can't speak highly enough of the interaction we had with him (btw, his local ramen restaurant suggestion was outstanding)! The pickup from the Aoto station and then the drive back to the station at our departure was a real plus. I would not hesitate re-booking at the K Family home at our next visit to Tokyo...definitely the best AirBnb experience I've had!!!

Our family of six stayed at the K Family's Airbnb for a week, and it was superb.
Our hosts were exceptional, ensuring our stay was comfortable from start to finish.
The house itself is incredible - spotlessly clean, beautifully decorated, and exceptionally well-located, just a 5-minute walk from Tateishi station. The neighborhood is quiet and pleasant, offering a tranquil retreat after a day of exploring Tokyo. The home was equipped with all the necessary utensils, making our stay convenient and hassle-free.
The K Family’s attention to detail was noteworthy. They provided clear instructions and kindly picked us up and dropped us off at the station. Their recommendations, like visiting Shibamata, were highlights of our Tokyo exploration.
I would recommend the K Family to anyone without hesitation. Their hospitality and the quality of their Airbnb contributed immensely to the enjoyment of Tokyo!

Koji and his family were the absolute BEST! I’ve never been to an Airbnb that was so helpful and on top of things. They come and clean the house everyday, gave us good advice and we’re always responsive. I recommend 10 out of 10! Would definitely book if ever back in Japan. Thank you so much Koji and Family.

K family was great! The home was wonderful and seemed new to us. Very clean and very nice. We were very happy. K Family was very nice and extremely helpful with lots of local recommendations. Felt like we had a local friend!
Loved our stay here! They were very accommodating and we felt right at home. Loved all the recommendations and directions they had for us, made it easier to get around. Will definitely return!

Merci beaucoup - la maison était idéale pour 4 adultes et 1 bébé. L'emplacement était idéal car proche d'une station très bien desservie. L'insonorisation est parfaite (surtout avec un bébé). La flexibilité était superbe, merci encore pour ce beau séjour !

I've stayed all over Japan -- in luxury hotels, private rooms, apartments, ryokans, even century-old samurai houses! None of those places compared to the level of hospitality that K Family provided.
They took me to and from the station, showed me the neighbourhood, invited me to their home, made local recommendations, left fresh apple juice and water in the kitchen, bought me groceries ... the list goes on. This family is incredible -- I would encourage you to stay here just to feel their warmth.
The house was luxurious for Tokyo -- in this quiet residential neighbourhood I felt like a king! Top floor spots a good view for the sunset. A tatami room on the second floor. All the amenities you need, including dryer, laundry and soaking tub with automatic water temperature control. Gotta have my baths!
Staying with K Family, you purchase something money can't buy.
房东很热情，英文说得很好，房间也很干净，房东很负责，会提前沟通好所有的事情，准备好所有我们需要的东西，并且还有接送服务，很暖心
Amazing stay and extremely hospitable hosts, never been at an Airbnb like it!

This is a place great for a group of six people to stay which we found spacious, clean and easily access to the city centre. The hosts were responsive and helpful. He even picked us up from the train station and introduced us the surrounding area for foods and entertainment. Even more, Koji and Naomi San prepared us juices and drinks and even regular cleaning during stay that more than Airbnb service commitment. We highly recommend this property to anyone who wants to experience a warm personal touch with the hosts and local culture.

This had to be the best air bnb experience I have had in any city and any Country! They exceeded any expectations in anyway possible! Cleaned daily super friendly and helpful! Great advice from a locals point of view! Very responsive! More than you can expect from any host! They’re above and beyond a super host! Highly highly recommend!

K family are great hosts and very accommodating. They picked us up and dropped us off at Aoto train station when we arrived/departed. They also provided clear instructions and were responsive in messages, as well as providing multiple recommendations for food and sightseeing in Tokyo. The place is located in a quiet neighborhood and about a 5 minute walk from Keisei Tateishi station. It comfortably fit a group of four and would definitely recommend others to stay here !

Me and my family were very happy in koji family house experience, we felt at home with a very warm welcoming.
From check-in the host picked up from the station and explained to us the place with the top activities, shops, restaurants and coffee shops.
The house was clean and everything we need is their.
It is a suitable place for the family, Also the host very kind dealing with kids.
Thank you koji and your great family for making our stay unforgettable.
房東服務很好

This place was perfect for what we needed. Plenty of room for the 5 people in our group. They thought of everything stocking this house with what you might need. We stayed in 4 Airbnb’s and one hotel all over Japan during our trip. This place by far was our favorite as far as service & amenities go.    Washer & dryer plus so many extras that these other Airbnb do not do. Koji & Nami are incredible hosts and truly care about making your trip a memorable one and as stress free as possible. They went above and beyond to make our vacation the trip of a lifetime. Definitely recommend this place!

Extraordinary hosts, absolute attention and care for details, always willing to help, we had a very pleasant stay for the 7 members of our family, they even speak Spanish! The house is very well equipped with everything, absolutely recommendable, thank you very much Koji and Nami, we will definitely be back.

A must for anyone that needs multiple rooms and beds. Plenty of rooms and beds for our family of 6 and room to spare. Beds were so comfortable and rooms were a great size. The home is spotless and has everything you need. The cherry on top was our host Koji and his family. Very helpful and accommodating. Highly recommend this stay for anyone wanting to enjoy Tokyo and escape at night to a more peaceful surrounding.

Koji and Nami are the sweetest and most helpful hosts! They were incredibly responsive and helpful throughout our trip - absolutely going above and beyond. The house was exactly as advertised - perfectly clean and a great fit for our family of 5. The beds were all so comfortable and they have pull down shades on every window. It’s a very cute and comfortable spot!
The house is located in East Tokyo, and they were very upfront about the travel time to some of the central spots (Shibuya, Shinjuku, etc.). The neighborhood is quiet and local. The house is located about a 10 minute walk to the train station, which is very easy to navigate once you figure it out. All in all, a great experience!

Sincerely being super thankful to the host! Not just me, but also my friends had shared the same feeling.
They are super nice, responsive, with clean and tidy house. Nice beds and pillows. Location is very accessible to JR stations and supermarkets.
Friends and I had a super wonderful time being together cooking and chit-chatting at the place. Very peaceful. Highly recommended!
nice place and nice host

숙소 정말 청결하고 너무 예뻐요 사진 그대로에요 그리고 사장님이 너무 친절하시고 유쾌하세요 처음에 약속시간보다 늦었는데도 불구하고 너무 친절하게 맞아주셨어요.
일본분들이 친절하다고 하지만 진짜 너무 감동을 많이 먹었습니다 한국분들 가시는거 정말 매우매우 추천드립니다!!

My family and I had an amazing experience traveling abroad from Hawaii, we have no regrets staying in the Riverview House! Our hosts were so kind and accommodating. The home was clean, comfortable and as my 7yr old said “PERFECT!!”. We were given fun local recommendations such as “Aloha Pizza” and the sweetest card at the end of our trip. Highly recommend!! ❤️
Koji and Nami were wonderful hosts! They picked us up and dropped us off at the station when we were checking in and leaving. The hosts are incredibly responsive and helpful!

This was a wonderful stay! It is a bit further from the main city areas, but after staying directly in the center of Tokyo the first half of the trip, this little town was perfect. So beautiful and peaceful and rare that you find an air bnb in Tokyo with your own room. The family who hosted are very kind and sweet. I would definitely recommend and come back! My friends and I had a great stay!

We were a party of 4 and we had a perfect stay at Koji and Nami’s place. They are extremely accommodating hosts who truly take care of their guests. We found the accommodation and amenities super convenient, it had everything you may need when traveling including personal essentials. The location is perfect as there direct trains to both Narita and Haneda airports from Aoto station. 10/10

I cannot recommend enough Koji’s place. From the very beginning they made us feel welcome to their place. Their house is beautiful and very spacious. It has all the amenities you may need during your stay in Tokyo. Koji and his family also made sure we had everything we needed. The location is also very convenient. Metro station is 5 min away walking. We’ll definitely book their house when we get back to Japan and recommend it to everyone going there.

Beautiful home provided by Koji & Nami, really happy with my stay there with 6 others able to accommodate and rectify problems or requests promptly as well, going above and beyond to make us feel comfortable during our stay there!
When asking if there were any bikes for rental there, Koji told us he would be getting 2 bikes which was a wow factor on top of their top notch hospitality!
They provided fresh fruits and apple juice for us as well.
Ending the trip with Koji & Nami giving us their favourite snacks they had as kids to enjoy as well as a heart felt hand written letter from them, it was the best experience I've had from Airbnb, really cozy and lovely family!
Shoutout to Koji & Nami for being such great host to us, we really enjoyed our stay, thank you for making Japan memorable with your hospitality!

A group of us, family and friends, stayed here for about 6 days and really enjoyed our experience. Koji-san was an amazing host and  really went above and beyond to making our Japan trip efficient and memorable. He was very receptive to all of our needs and travels plans. Highly recommend staying here if you want to experience a traditional house with a great host.

Nice place, thank you koji and family for your hospitality, we feel like at home
Next time If I go to Japan especially in tokyo city, I will stay at Koji's house

If you are looking for an authentic view on how the day to day life of the Japanese citizen is, this AirBNB will be everything you want plus more. Koji had personally came to the station to make sure we would find the location of the residence without issue and also gave us a guide of some the local hot spots for food and entertainment. The neighborhood itself was beautiful as it is a residential area filled with people always up to their everyday activities. Every corner had me enthralled as it was something different from the everyday hustle and bustle of Tokyo. If you wanted to have a leisurely walk and just enjoy the sounds of people working on their households, the everyday conversation of the residents in the area, or the sounds of the water waves at the nearby river, then you would be nothing short of captivated at how peaceful it is. If I ever in the near future decide to stay in Japan, I will make sure to make this my first option. Nothing will ever beat the memories made here

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at Koji and Nami’s home! They are excellent hosts who went above and beyond to cater to their guests' every need. From the moment we arrived, we felt at home and welcomed. They thoughtfully fetched us to and from the train station, sparing us the hassle of managing our heavy luggage or navigating unfamiliar streets.
The house itself is a gem. The kitchen is spacious and well-equipped, complete with thoughtful touches like two big bottles of apple juice, mineral water, and Coke to welcome us. The coffee machine provided, alongside coffee powder, creamer, and sugar, made mornings a delight. We loved preparing simple meals in the well-equipped kitchen and enjoying them in the cozy dining area.
The large Smart TV and Netflix, placed strategically in the dining area helped us to relax after a long day of exploring. The washing machine and dryer were user-friendly, making laundry hassle-free. We definitely recommend this beautiful home for a local feel.

Host is super friendly, responsive and accommodating!! Booked a whole week of stay in Tokyo and Mr松 is always ready to answer any questions. He made sure we felt like home. Love the surrounding with supermarket, transport and many restaurants right at the doorstep. Many train lines and airport limousine bus all at one place. Will definitely stay in Ikebukuro again whenever I visit Tokyo!
Great place, great host! Went out of his way to help us with a last minute booking. Super nice man!

This place was really nice. The owner was very responsive, let us check in early. Even greated us and offered assistance. it's located in one of the more active parts of Ikebukuro so if you're planning to out a lot this is perfect. It's 5-10 min walk to the station, it's a straight shot to it so really easy. This was one of the most unique places I've stayed in. if you're looking to stay somewhere with a bit of quirkiness or charm, this is it.

great host! friendly and open. the location was ideal for us, since we love the Ikebukuro area! lot's of shops and good restaurants nearby.
the rooms are quite spacious. we managed to comfortabley stay with 4 adults.
The host is friendly, helpful and polite. The place is very convenient, just a short walk to the train station and shopping areas. Very easy to get around.
整个5天的住宿体验非常良好！房东热情负责，入住前提前确认信息，回复非常及时，沟通无障碍！民宿距离池袋站出来步行七八分钟，整体属于比较传统的装修风格，我们四人住，空间绰绰有余。一应设施也比较齐全，周边有全家、罗森和永旺超市，购物方便。我家人也都很满意，下次来还会选择这里！

距離鐵路站只有5分鐘路程 附近非常多美食
房東也會介紹附近的餐廳及玩樂 下次必定會再入住
很好的入住体验，大男孩们很喜欢！在池袋站特别方便，孩子们在池袋那边吃中华料理，离民宿特别近！本来定的是4个人入住，结果孩子们去了比较喜欢就都住在那了，一共住了6个大小伙子，特别开心！房子很干净，房东贴心！有点下次来东京玩就住这里了！
awesome stay and host! the place had everything you need and it's location is great, very easy to get to and from the station and alot of things to do nearby!

松川 is such a lovely, friendly host who always made sure we had everything we needed. The place is very spacious and clean, and is close to Ikebukuro Station making it the perfect base for exploring. Would highly recommend staying here - we all loved it and would happily stay again!
房东很热情 距离车站也很近 也很好找 旁边就有便利店 卫生整洁干净舒适
편안하게 잘 지내고 갑니다!
Great host and a fantastic location! Very close to the ikebukuro station with lots of things to do.

My family really enjoyed our stay at 松川’s place. Located at a very convenient location in Ikebukuro, with lots of shopping and restaurants nearby.
松川was a great host, answered all my questions before arrival, and came to meet me at checkin to make sure we are settled well, gave us pointers on nearby shops.
Thank you again for hosting my family at your lovely place!

일본 가정집으로 여러명이 숙박하기 아주 좋습니다.
역에서 가깝고 호스트가 매우 빠르게 답변 해 줍니다.
다음번에 또 이용 하고 싶습니다
非常棒的住宿體驗，松川也非常親切

The accommodation is great and comfortable for 3 pax stay. Host is able to communicate in our common luggage which save us a lot trouble during the check in process.
The host welcome us during the check in and visited us during the check out.
The listing is located at level 1 so it saves us the energy to climb up the stairs. The only thing to highlight is that the sound proof for the room near the street needed to improve. As we can still hear neighbors, pedestrians or cars around at midnight.
Nevertheless, the listing is clean and comfortable! Recommend for groups of 3 to 4 to stay :)

일단 역이랑 가까운곳에 숙소가있어서 너무 좋았어요.  난방작동을 못해서 늦은시간에 연락했는데 한걸음에 달려와 해결해주셔서 좋았어요.다만 와이파이가  포켓와이파이 같은거라 조금 불편했고,  외풍이 좀 심해서 아쉬운 부분이였습니다. 주변에 맛집도많고 돈키호테도 바로 앞에있고  교통도 편하고 집앞 마트까지 모두 만족했습니다. 다음에도 도쿄를 간다면 또 이용하고 싶어요

都很滿意，房子與網路照片相符
房子是老屋但打掃的很乾淨
房东很好，很开心可以和同学一起自己做料理过年

ホストの方の心遣いが素晴らしいです。
快適な滞在でした。
Great airbnb to stay in.   Lots of charm and very responsive host.  Very nice location close to Ikebukuro station.  Would recommend this location for your stay in Tokyo.
잘 쉬다가 갑니다~ 다음에도 기회가 된다면 방문하겠습니다. 감사합니다.

Koji-san and Nami-san were great hosts that were very accommodating. They were willing to help us with any problems we had and were always friendly. They messaged us throughout the trip to ensure everything was smooth and easy. They also recommended many restaurants that were delicious. The house was clean, cozy and near many eateries, confidence stores and a train. Would highly recommend this house.

Koji and family were extremely kind, welcoming, and friendly. They made us very comfortable and went out of their way to be accommodating as possible. The area is very walkable even in the cold and it’s a 1-2 min walk from a gorgeous view of the sunrise on a city/river skyline. These style and space of the home is incredible. We had some issues in terms of our landing times and Koji was insanely flexible and understanding and work with us to make sure we arrived safely. He left a binder full of recommendations for stuff in the area which was a life saver on the slow/recovery days. If you want the big city/partying experience this isn’t exactly that, it’s much more of a peaceful small town vibe but you are pretty close to the main city stuff; a 20-30 min train ride. Being close enough to walk to the train in 7-10 min and then have a peaceful sleep? I couldn’t ask for a better visiting experience in Japan and I’d be honored to have Koji allow us to stay there again next time I come!

Die Gastfreundschaft der K-Family Koji, Nami ist herausragend. Sie haben uns vom Bahnhof Aoto abgeholt, es gab gute Empfehlungen für Restaurants und Unternehmungen, auf Fragen haben sie schnell reagiert - sie waren so hilfsbereit! Wir fühlten uns von ihnen regelrecht verwöhnt.
Das Haus ist schön, die Betten sehr gemütlich. Tokio ist eine spannende Stadt, aber auch anstrengend. So war es immer angenehm, am Abend in diese entspannte Unterkunft zurückzukehren.
Im Haus war an alles gedacht, Aufladestationen, Fernseher, die man mit dem Smartphone verbinden konnte, Zahnbürsten und einiges mehr.
Das Haus liegt in einer ruhigen Wohngegend, die gar nicht touristisch ist. So konnten wir erfahren, wie man als ganz normaler Bürger in dieser Stadt lebt. Die nächste Metrostation ist sehr nah, 5 Minuten zu Fuß. Von dort kommt man problemlos in die Stadtmitte. Man braucht, je nach Ziel zwischen 30 und 50 Minuten. Das war sehr gut machbar.
100 Prozent Empfehlung - mindestens!

Koji and Nami were both wonderful host.
They were very responsive and the home was very clean and quiet. They even went out of their way to wish me a happy birthday and made my day just a little more special.
I highly recommend staying with them in any of their properties and we hope to stay with them again when we come back to Japan.

Excellent logement avec un excellent hôte.
Le logement se situe près d'une gare donc c'est extrêmement accessible. Entouré de beaux paysages. Photos fidèles au logement.

Koji and his family are amazing people. They welcomed us at the train station and gave us a tour of the neighborhood and house. The house is beautiful. We had a family of 5 stay and had plenty of space. It’s about an 45 min train ride to the main Tokyo area. Lots of good food spots near by. Highly recommend!

Koji and Nami were amazing host! They made our family feel welcomed and comfortable on our vacation. They took the time to recommend places to eat and attractions to visit in the area. All household appliances were labeled with clear instructions on how to use them. They provided us with snacks in the fridge and all rooms were spotless clean! Plenty of space for our family of 4.
Koji was nice enough to pick us up and drop us off at the train station to catch our flight to the airport. His family sent us off with a gift bag filled with snacks and a lovely farewell note.
Will definitely stay again ! Thank you !!

Wonderful Stay with Exceptional Hosts – Highly Recommended!
We had an amazing stay in Japan, and a huge part of that was thanks to our wonderful hosts, Koji and Nami. From the moment we arrived, they made us feel incredibly welcome with their warm hospitality and thoughtful gestures.
The accommodation was spotless, comfortable, and well-equipped with everything we needed. It was clear that Koji and Nami put great effort into maintaining a cozy and inviting space. They also provided excellent local recommendations, making our experience even more enjoyable.
What truly stood out was their kindness and attentiveness. They went above and beyond to ensure we had a smooth and enjoyable stay, which we deeply appreciated—especially while traveling with a young child.
Koji and Nami's property is beautiful and they are amazing hosts. Was the best experience in airbnb I’ve had, they are incredibly kind and helpful. Highly recommend this place.

Koji and Nami were incredible hosts—kind, thoughtful, and truly welcoming. They went above and beyond to ensure we had the best stay, even picking us up from the train station. Their local and city recommendations were fantastic, making our experience even more special. They genuinely make you feel at home, and I can’t recommend staying here enough!
房東夫婦人非常的好，入住的一天晚上 我們自己都不知道瓦斯沒電池，房東太太還跑來幫我們換電池 真的很貼心也很用心！房子非常的漂亮溫暖 給我們在外面旅遊的時候還有家的感覺，這次的體驗真的非常好，下次有去日本一定還會選擇她們家的airbnb!

Koji, Nami, and their team  made our experience here one to remember! We felt so welcomed and we're very thankful for their hospitality. If you are in Tokyo, this is the place to stay! From picking us up at the train station, providing us with drinks for our stay, and helping us navigate the city, we couldn't be more thankful for them!
Very responsive, helpful, and accommodating host. Great place to stay for a group and Koji gave great recommendations for the area.

The space was lovely and close to train stations. Koji, Nami, and family were wonderful hosts. They gave great recommendations and were very helpful! They picked us up from the train station and helped us with luggage delivery.
We would be happy to stay with them again!

Once we booked this location, Koji reached out through Airbnb messenger and let us know what was required from us before arriving to Japan and the house. He gave us instructions on how to get to the location of the home with pictures and a YouTube video. He communicated with me through out our entire trip asking if we needed new towels or our place cleaned. Koji and his family were very helpful, kind, communicated well and made our stay very pleasant. When we left, he gave us a note and some snacks for our trip home. Their hospitality enhanced our positive experience in Japan.
If you're looking for a nice comfortable home that can accommodate medium to larger group, I highly recommend booking with Koji. Koji and his family went above and beyond any hosts of I ever encountered through my time traveling and staying at Airbnbs. I highly recommend booking with them if the location fits your plans.

We spent four weeks in Japan, staying in four different apartments - and this house was the best. It exceeded all our expectations. Everything was perfect: spotlessly clean, modern, spacious, and incredibly convenient. It truly felt like home.
We were so fortunate to have Koji-san and Nami-san as our hosts. Their warmth and hospitality made our stay unforgettable. They’ve set a new standard for what we hope for in future accommodations.
We would absolutely love to stay here again.

非常好的房源！！！房东一家也非常亲切，屋子十分整洁。距离附近的电车站也很近。房东真的帮助了我们非常多，十分感谢k-family的大家！！！😊🫶💫💫💫💫💫💫
祝愿大家将来越来越好！

Koji and Nami are a great host. They are very friendly and response to all our needs. They have made us feel right at home away from home. The house location is 5 min walk to the train station and is accessible to get to the Tokyo city center. We love our stay here and happy to made new friends in Koji and Nami.

The perfect place to stay when visiting Tokyo! Koji and his family were very accommodating, even being flexible with our check in time.
They gave us plenty of recommendations for things to do, places to eat, and things to avoid for our trip.
I have not met a better host when using Airbnb, I highly recommend booking this Airbnb when visiting Japan :)
Great place to stay, welcoming hosts, location, though a little far from some things, was also very nice.

Our stay in Tokyo was truly special thanks to this wonderful family. They were incredibly communicative, helpful, and thoughtful-when they heard we were celebrating a birthday, they went out of their way to celebrate with us. The house is in a peaceful, convenient neighborhood with plenty of amenities nearby. Honestly, I'd recommend staying here just for the hosts alone-the comfort of the home and the charm of the area are just added bonuses.
Were so helpful they even picked me up from the station! Any question I had was met with an immediate and useful response. 12/10 I would definitely come back to Koji-San & Nami-San
满分的入住体验，Koji和Nami非常贴心，从接送、惊喜的小礼物到周边的介绍攻略都很赞，房间体验也很棒，推荐！下次还来！

Our family had a very enjoyable stay at this home in Katsushika. The house is clean, updated, and comfortable. It’s conveniently located near a train station—perfect for exploring just about anywhere in Tokyo.
The hosts, Koji and Kami, are exceptional: friendly, helpful, and flexible. Tokyo can feel like a big and intimidating city, but they make you feel immediately welcome. If you’re considering a stay in Tokyo, I don’t think you can go wrong here.
Bonus tip: there’s a local coffee roaster about a five-minute walk from the house who makes some of the best coffee we’ve ever had—and we’re from the Pacific Northwest, where you can’t walk a block without tripping over a coffee kiosk. Don’t miss it

We had a wonderful stay in Tokyo! Koji-san was incredibly supportive and went above and beyond to make our visit comfortable. The place itself was cozy and welcoming. What really stood out was his kindness—he personally provided pick-up and drop-off service from the station, which was extremely helpful, especially with our luggage. We truly appreciated his hospitality and highly recommend staying here!
The place is awesome especially for a large group. We had 5 adults and 1 child and had plenty of room. The place itself was immaculate and well maintained. I would stay here again.

What a wonderful stay! The house is beautiful and worked perfectly for our family of five - two adults and three teenage children. Koji and Nami were wonderful - from clear, thorough communications from the point of booking through to their flexibility when we arrived earlier than planned. They also helped us navigate the luggage forwarding service. A pleasure to meet their children too. The area worked well for us -quieter than central Tokyo yet a quick 20 minute ride in on the subway. Would definitely stay here again - recommend 100%.

Koji was an amazing host. He met us upon check in and explained how everything in the house works. A special binder created by Koji and family was available to us containing all the information needed: train stations nearby, restaurant suggestions, tourist locations nearby, etc.
We let him know what our plans were and he provided tips and suggestions that made our stay smoother, like what trains to take, when the least busiest times for the use of the roads with our rental car were.
The house is absolutely beautiful with traditional Japanese decor and structure. All pictures shown on Airbnb are 100% accurate.
It is about a 30 minute drive to Disney, Shibuya, Shinjuku, Akihabara…. Not far by car and less stress on the train!
I recommend 100% and will have this property on my roster for future travels!
Thank you Koji and family for making us feel safe and supported on our first trip to Japan!

We had such a wonderful stay at Koji-san and Nami-san’s place! The house was spotless, very comfortable, and located in a peaceful neighborhood with just a short and easy walk to the train station.
But what truly made our stay special were Koji-san and Nami-san themselves. From the moment they kindly picked us up at the station, we felt so warmly welcomed. They were always happy to share helpful tips and recommendations that made exploring the area even better. On top of that, they even surprised us with a delicious parting gift that we will always remember.
Koji-san and Nami-san are some of the kindest and most thoughtful hosts we’ve ever met, and we would love to stay with them again. Highly recommended! 🌟
위치 및 숙소가 좋아 훌륭한 여행이 되었습니다. 호스트님도 좋고 숙소도 아주 맘에 들었습니다.

이케부쿠로역 서쪽 출구(N) 방향으로 가서 20a 출구로 나가시면 찾기 쉬워요
옛느낌 나는 레트로풍 인테리어가 이뻐서 좋았어요. 방도 두가지 타입인데

체크인할 때도 직접 나오셔서 편하게 체크인할 수 있었어요.

조용하고 이것저것 좋았어요.
잘 놀다 갑니다! 감사합니다.
很不错的住宿体验，我们从机场过去已经很晚了，没想到松川先生一直在房子等着我们，好像是华人，非常和蔼，像家一样的感觉。民宿各种设施齐全，附近有许多便利店和吃饭的地方，房子旺中带静，完全不用担心会吵闹，而且离池袋站很近。房间环境跟图片一样，大家安心入住。
房源步行即可到達，房東回覆訊息迅速又友善👍房源乾淨，四周皆有超商又便利，平常可從西口（北）出口坐車，如有行李，建議從西口（中央）出口搭乘電梯，希望下次有機會遊玩東京時再預定這裡😊
Location is superb!! A short walk from the station with many JR trains and subways. The apartment is comfortably large enough for 4 of us. The place is a little old but well worth the money.

가격대비 만족도 너무너무 좋아요! 숙소도 너무 깨끗했구 일본의 가정집을 느껴보고싶으신 분들 추천! 호스트님도 답변이 무척 빠르시고 너무 친절하십니다ㅎㅎ 길을 잘못들어서 집을 못찾고 있었는데 호스트님께서 직접 찾아오셔서 알려주셨어요!!! 최고입니당 이케부쿠로역이랑 가까워서 좋았구 이케부쿠로 선샤인시티 등.. 도보로 이동 가능한 거리라 참 좋았네용~ 편안히 잘 있다가 갑니다~
Thanks for accommodating our family for our stay.

房東很熱心
回覆速度很快
有問題馬上處理
房源很有日式風格
空間很大
住起來舒服
good
5명이서 이케부쿠로역에서 가까운 숙소에 머무를수있어 좋았습니다! 귀여운 일본의 집입니다
池袋西口出站走路很快就到了，附近有超市、便利商店非常方便！房東會中文而且回覆非常快速。

Love the old rustic vintage Japanese feel. Spacious bathroom, kitchen well stocked and clean easily 10 minute walk to station and main shopping area. I would definitely come back again really enjoyed my stay.
Great place great location.  Super Wonderful host.  We were delayed and met us late night at train station.   Lent us pocket wifi to use.

great location with lots to do around the area. 6 min walk from ikebukuro station & many great restaurants nearby. was enough space for my family of 5. easy to find & supermarket across the street & nearby conbini as well.

Matsukawa-san was een geweldige host. Hij hielp ons onze koffers terug te krijgen nadat deze vertraagd waren tijdens de vlucht. Altijd vriendelijk en snel beschikbaar als we vragen hadden. Het appartement is heerlijk authentiek en gelegen in een gezellige buurt met vele winkels en restaurants. Het station is 10 minuten lopen en je stapt zo op de Yamanote Line. Absoluut aan te raden!

One of my best airbnb experience!
Can't wait. To meet the family again.
The share house is tasteful and lovely, perfect place to stay!

This is my second time stay in this share room, because the whole environment was so perfect, warm and lovely in this wooden house. Takashi's wife Yang is so helpful and considering, don't miss the opportunity to join this big family!

Takashi and his family were great hosts. His wife Li was very friendly, came to pick us up at the closest subway station so we wouldn't get lost, and gave us many suggestions to help us find our way around Tokyo. Their daughter is super cute and it was fun to spend time with their family. They were very open, but not at all intrusive. We had a few meals with them in the home (a dinner and a couple breakfasts), which Li prepared, and it was always delicious - a good view into what Japanese home cooking might be like :) Their home is very unique - design-oriented - and clean. Besides their family, there are a few other long-term stays, but I they seem to work hard, and I never saw them while I was there. All the accommodations you need are there - Wifi works great, heat and a/c in the room if you need to adjust for yourself, laundry if you need, and the awesome warmed toilet seat with bidet, if you're into that. There's also a hot tub on the roof that you're free to use too. You sleep on a Japanese futon type bed, which is super comfortable, and the room comes with its own key in case you're sensitive about privacy and security. The neighborhood is quiet, but very conveniently connected to the JR Yamanote line with just a short walk. On your walk to the station, you'll pass by a little Japanese elementary school too, which is cute to see all the little kids going to school in the morning. I definitely recommend staying here if you're interested in seeing how a modern Japanese family lives. Staying here was one of the highlights of my trip and I hope to return soon!
在這裡度過的一星期真的是太棒了！房東夫妻很親切，對我們非常好，還請我們一起吃年菜，超感謝的！小女兒超級可愛有活力的，小狗也是熱情無比啊～為這趟日本新年之行增添了美麗難忘的記憶。我和朋友都很喜歡這個乾淨清爽、令人放鬆的空間，尤其是吊椅，窩進去就不想移動了呢～以後有機會到日本玩的話，會想要再住在這裡呢！

I had a great stay in the Miraie share house. This place is a super cool, warm and friendly second home in Tokyo, with unique architecture, a nice big kitchen where you can prepare your own food or enjoy Li's tasty cooking – and with a hot tub on the roof top! The host family is very open minded, helpful and welcoming, while at the same time always respecting your privacy. I was lucky enough to be there for the Miraie new years celebration party, where we enjoyed Swedish food and Japanese traditional games together. The location is convenient in a quiet residential area with low-rise buildings, shops and restaurants, and with the hip and cozy neighbourhood Ebisu only a few stops away with the JR Yamanote line. Ten minutes from Shibuya. Everything is clean and new, the room is lovely and the bed is very comfortable. I really enjoyed staying at the Miraie house. Thank you both!

We had a great experience! Takashi and his wife were so helpful. They gave us information on places to go and help with directions. The accomodations were wonderful--very warm, clean, accessible. The bed was very comfortable and they have a nice system worked out for food and drinks! We will stay again if we have the opportunity. Thank you so much!

Takashi and Lee are incredibly hospitable hosts. They were both warm and welcoming. There home is a lot fun and has great energy.
If you enjoy being part of the Airbnb community, I strongly recommend their home!

Takashi and Li made me feel very welcome when I stayed with them for a few days, while extending a work trip in Tokyo. Li is a wonderful chef; I was lucky to taste her wonderful home-cooked Japanese meals. Both Takashi and Li were very forthcoming on places to visit that would be fun. Takashi was also very helpful with my bags when we were walking to and from the station; he came to pick me up and drop me off. They were a very thoughtful family. I look forward to staying with them next time I am in Tokyo :)

I thought I had already left a review, but it seems it wasn't saved for some reason... I'll try again. I would recommend Takashi & Li's room to anybody wishing to explore Tokyo - especially the southern central areas (although, with Osaki being on the Yamanote line, most central places are conveniently close). In fact the time went too quickly and I would have liked to have a longer stay - maybe next time! The design of the house is enough on its own for a visit and I found the room very comfortable; not as drafty as normal Japanese wooden walls in an Apato or traditional building. The immediate area is worth checking out as there is an old shopping street a couple minutes to the south and a couple of Sentos within walking distance.

エアロホームと言われる建物とAirbnbに興味があり、share house 'Miraie' を選びました。小さなお子さんもペットも人懐っこくて安心しました。駅周辺の近代的なビルとは逆に、少し歩いただけで閑静な住宅街、そして繁華街へのアクセスの良いです。
　使用した個室は、寝るには十分な広さで快適に過ごすことが出来ました。どうもありがとうございました。

We had a truly wonderful time in Tokyo, and our hosts at Miraie added so much to our stay. The location is convenient for transport and other essentials such as an international ATM and a handy convenience store, but is also lovely, with many roads to explore; there's a beautiful shrine on the way to the station. In the opposite direction is daily life far removed from Ginza. The house is as awesome and comfortable as it looks in the photos, and Li's food system is fantastic: she's an amazing cook. The shower has good pressure, and the heated loo seat is the best thing ever. Li, Takashi, sweet Princess Eri, and Joy, thank you so much for giving us such a warm welcome, and for making our stay so special!

We had a truly wonderful time in Tokyo, and our hosts at Miraie added so much to our stay. The location is convenient for transport and other essentials such as an international ATM and a handy convenience store, but is also lovely, with many roads to explore; there's a beautiful shrine on the way to the station. In the opposite direction is daily life far removed from Ginza.

The house is as awesome and comfortable as it looks in the photos, and Li's food system is fantastic: she's an amazing cook. The shower has good pressure, and the heated loo seat is the best thing ever. Li, Takashi, sweet Princess Eri, and Joy, thank you so much for giving us such a warm welcome, and for making our stay so special!

We had a wonderful stay at Takashi's place. Although very short and rushed due to our schedule, he happily took us in. It was also a pleasure chatting with his wife and she kindly cooked us some breakfast. The house is also very unique. Highly recommended.

Takashi and his wife, Li, are excellent hosts. They were very friendly, accommodating and easygoing. The house is a short walk from the JR station and staying there is an experience in itself because it could have easily been in an IKEA catalogue. It's a quiet neighbourhood they live in that's safe at night and it's very accessible: half an hour from the Haneda airport and mere stops away from the hip Shibuya, Shinjuku and Harajuku. They have a washing machine with a dryer you can use at anytime, fast wi-fi and the room itself was very comfortable and cosy. I miss it! Thank you so much Takashi and Li, I will definitely book a stay at your wonderful home the next time I am in Tokyo.

The location was in a nice neighborhood and good area, it was within walking distance of the train station. The accommodations were very lovely, and clean. All updated and unique. We were located in a separate area from the upstairs, which was nice for privacy. I very much enjoyed my stay there. A must see if you travel into Tokyo!

The host family is very friendly and helpful, and the house is unique and beautiful, it really makes you feel like home.
I wish i could have spent more time with them and the place, and i am really looking forward to come back and stay in Miraie again!

It was such a pleasure to stay here. Thank you for having us!
If you are looking to stay with a busy, fun and energetic family, this is the place for you. They are warm, friendly and welcoming - we loved to chat in the evenings. The house is in a great location to explore Tokyo and they made sure we had everything we needed at all times.
Thanks again!

Takashi and Li were great! I just needed a room for a couple nights and their place was unique and very very clean. The room and futon were comfortable. It was also helpful that they were flexible with check-in/check-out times. Their home is about a 10 minute walk from the JR Osaki station and was easy to find. Li showed me a cool shopping street nearby and mentioned a sento, which I unfortunately didn't have time to check out.

If I needed a place to stay in the shinagawa area in the future, I'd definitely stay with them again. They are well-prepared for guests.

During my stay at "Miraie" I saw the future. A future where weary travellers don't stay in huge impersonal and overpriced hotels in unattractive touristy neighbourhoods. Instead, they stay with a wonderful and friendly family in a beautiful, cozy house, in a lovely residential area.  The guest room area had everything anyone would need and was very comfortable. The best part was the common area, where you can interact with the family and eat a delicious home cooked meal. The Sabetto family are very warm people, very helpful and sociable.  If anyone is worried about the neighbourhood being away from the centre: the public transport in Tokyo is excellent, and you can get from Osaki area to anywhere in central Tokyo in minutes. But the best part is that you can stay in a real Japanese neighbourhood that has so much to offer (the shop street just around the corner has tons of excellent restaurants). I really hope I get the chance to come back and stay with at Miraie!

This is a fabulous house with well-decorated and artistic furniture. The house is filled with interesting and joyous little items contributed by both the hosts and the past visitors who were generous and enjoyed their stays thoroughly! You can thus expect the hosts to be awesome people who treat their guests with respect and friendliness :) The hosts are super warm and they are helpful in whatever requests and information you need for travelling around Tokyo! Their super cute daughter will make you really excited to wake up in the morning to hear her laughter and see her smiles! Li is a young pretty mum who offers a free home-cooked meal to the visitors :) She knows how to speak in many languages so there is no communication barrier, haha! You will love to interact and speak with them and learn about the cultures if the Japanese in Tokyo! The location of the house is also  convenient to travelers who want to sight-see, shop or relax in the nearby small restaurants which serve delicious authentic Japanese food! Really grateful for their hospitality and would love to come back to stay with them if there is a next visit to Tokyo as this time it was a short trip, heartfelt sincere thanks :)

Miraie is a incredible living space, it's so creative and out of the ordinary. We had an very lovely time staying there, it was for a very short while. Even though we didn't have much time to interact with Li and Takashi, we still feel very welcomed as they are very hospitable. And it is very heartwarming to see them living together so happily.
Very friendly hosts. location is good and the room is spacious and clean.
Takashi and Lee were great hosts, friendly and informative - felt right at home.
Li and Takashi were very helpful and hospitable. We loved their place, and it does look as amazing as it is in the profile pic ;)

Takashi and Li's house is an excellent living space - a testament to modern design and architecture. Clean and well-equipped, it has everything you need for a short or prolonged stay. Both Takashi and Li are friendly and amiable and more than willing to offer tips or suggestions. The place is about 30 minutes away from Haneda airport, a station away from a major train interchange (Shinagawa) and about 7 stations away from Shinjuku station.

This was the best experience of my stay in Tokyo, everything was fantastic, it was faultless. First the Hosts are some of the nicest people you are ever likely to encounter - So helpful and accommodating, i was made to really feel at home - one of the family. Li's cooking was first class, and her knowledge and help were invaluable, she really goes that extra mile.
The house is as good as the pictures look, a really cool modern space that i wish i could live in. The house is within easy distance to the main transport hubs in Tokyo, and close to supermarkets, shops etc. A must stay in Tokyo - I would not hesitate to go back.

Unfortunately i had not enough time to get to know the hosts as i was very busy but they were very welcoming, helpfull and accommodating. Lovely and relaxed atmosphere. I do not have even a slightest complaint.

Très belle accueil dans une superbe maison en bois. Le couple parle très bien l'anglais. Ils ont un enfant adorable ainsi qu'un mignon petit chien. Si vous avez une soirée de libre, profitez pour diner avec vos hôtes. L'accès est très pratique, une dizaine de minutes à pied de la gare d'Osaki (Yamanote Line), ils vivent dans un petit quartier paisible. Un kombini à seulement 1 minute et un grand magasin à 5 minutes à pied.

Takashi, Li and Eri are a wonderful family to host travelers, without forgetting their dog Joy.
The room is clean and simple with a futon for two on the ground and useful shelves, the area is really nice, with a great shopping street at 5 minutes and the Osaki station at 10 which is on a very useful JR line to visit all Tokyo.
We had a cooking evening with the family and neighbors at the end of our trip, it was a lot of fun and deliciousness. Li knows a lot about ingredients, cooking and best places to buy food!
The only thing is that you should be prepare for some early wake-up in this dynamic environment and wood house, which is still good because Tokyo as a lot to offer at every time ;)
Definitely a great place to stay with the AirBnb spirit.

Welcoming and considerate, Takashi and Li are excellent hosts. The home is situated along the JR Yamanote Line which connects directly to some of the most enjoyable sites in Tokyo. I also received plenty of useful suggestions about where to travel. I strongly recommend Share House 'Miraie'.

Li, Takashi and Eri are great hosts. It's a very cool, arty and fun house in a nice and well-connected suburb of Tokyo. Li gave us lots of tips on where to go and what to see nearby - different from what you might read about elsewhere - and also cooked us a delicious breakfast on one of the mornings. Thank you for having us in your amazing house!

I've lived at 5 airbnb home stays in different parts of Japan and Miraiie is the one that feels most at home, probably because Mrs. Li and their daughter can speak Chinese with me. :)

The house is clean and comfortable, its design is very interesting and inspiring. The guest bedroom is in the (elevated) basement, very small but feels complete and new. (The shower head is the nicest among the places I've lived at.)

Miraiie is conveniently hidden in a cute neighbourhood. Not too far nor too close to the Yamanote sen. A convenience store is right around the corner.

I wish I had more time interacting with the family as they are really kind and interesting people . They get up pretty early in the morning and do some cleaning and cooking which will definitely wake you up, but I consider this a good thing for travellers.

All in all, next time when I'm in Tokyo I'll definitely spend my nights at Miraiie again.

I had a very nice stay at Miraie.  Both Takashi and his wife Li were hospitable and kind. Their place is very well kept and clean.  The location of the place is perfect because Osaki is a stop on JR Yamanote Line and you can easily get to most important locations in Tokyo at ease. I would especially like to thank Li with whom I had most of the contact as she was home most of the time, she was very friendly and helpful. Takashi and Li's little daughter Ali is a charm and their dog Joy makes the scene quite joyful!  I can recommend anybody to stay in Miraie with no hesitation at all. I would definitely want to stay there in my next visit to Tokyo.

I could not have hoped for a better experience at Takashi, Li, Eri and their adorable dog Joy's beautiful house Miraie! From the beginning we were in love with the unique space and cultural ethos. The neighbourhood is lovely, the location convenient and we simply had the best hosts. Thank you for everything!

This was my first airbnb experience, and I think I got pretty spoiled. They were super warm, welcoming, and helpful. The house is new and very clean. Designed and built well. They have a 3 year old daughter that was a pleasure to talk to and play with.

There were a couple other people renting rooms when I was there. They were cool to talk to and helpful as well. One of them gave me the exact info I needed to do a Fuji climb while there.

I arrived very late, and had special timing needs at my departure- no sweat for them:)

The house a 10 minute walk from the Osaki station, which seemed like a pretty significant hub on the JR -Yamanote Line. It was easy getting everywhere, and I had a great time just hanging out in the neighborhood.

I would definitely stay here again, and am grateful for the time spent there.

Miraie house is a great base to explore Tokyo, in a pleasant residential area close to Osaki station, where you can catch the handy JR Yamanote line.  Li and Takashi are welcoming hosts who have thought of many details to make people's stay enjoyable, such as having drinks and snacks available, access to wifi and a washer/dryer.  The house itself is really cool!  I had a good time here and would recommend it.
We had a great time at Takashi's place. He and his family made our stay very pleasant and they were very kind and helpful! Their house is very beautiful and clean, although our room was very small.

Staying with Takashi, Li was a fantastic experience. Their home is beautiful, and they're both extremely kind and welcoming. They also have an adorable daughter who is equally nice! The room was clean and comfortable and Li and Takashi made me feel at home right away. This neighborhood is quiet but easily accessible, Osaki station is just short walk away (and the walk is really pleasant). I really enjoyed staying at Miraie house and I look forward to staying here again if I get the chance.

Accueil très sympathique dans une maison de bois. Une façon de partager un peu la vie d'une famille taiwano japonaise. Réveil matinal et coucher avec le soleil. Quartier à hauteur d'homme où Li vous donnera qq adresses de petits restos . Assez central sur une ligne qui dessert pas mal de coins importants sur Tokyo.

The neighborhood was great! It's a very residential and quiet area but the house is located near the JR line, which you can take to go pretty much everywhere in 15 minutes. Takashi, her husband and her daughter made us feel like home! They were all very nice and answered every question we had about the city.

We had a marvelous experience at the Miraie house. The hosts were nice and accomodating. There is food available at the house for a very reasonable cost. The house is clean and beautiful. 5 minutes walk from the Osaki station. I totally recommend it.

We stayed at Miraie for 2 nights. Li and Takashi were very welcoming and helpful, giving us lots of advice. The house is warm and inviting and has a nice communal atmosphere, like having an instant family. It's in a quiet part of Tokyo, not super close to the nightlife, etc, but it's close enough to the train and it was nice to get a view of a typical residential neighborhood. Would definitely stay again and hope we will!

Loved our stay with Takishi and Li. On the first day it was bucketing down and we got a little lost finding it. Takishi came out, found us and walked us to their house. During our stay we loved chatting with little Ari and Li even cooked us a meal! It's a really great area that they live in especially compared to some other areas we visited. It's walking distance to a station that is on one of the main lines. Highly recommended!

Staying at takashi and li's house was great! They are really friendly and their house is very pleasant! Good location quite close to osaki station, from where you can easily reach all mayor parts like shinjuku, harajuku, shibuya... They provide you with everything necessary and help you if you need somerhing! I enjoyed it very much!

My husband and I really enjoyed our 3 night stay at the Miraie house. The home is really charming and creative which is a direct reflection of the family. Takashi and Li were very friendly and helpful. They have an adorable young daughter and a playful little puppy. They are a very sweet family.  We felt very comfortable staying here. The kitchen is stocked with snacks and other foods, coffee and tea is available for reasonable prices. They also cleared a space for us in the fridge before we arrived. The guest bedrooms are located below the main living space along with a bathroom, shower, and laundry machine. Our room was small but comfortable but we didn’t spend that much time in the house as first time visitors to Tokyo. The neighborhood is in a quiet residential neighborhood which we liked as a contrast to the busier parts of the city. Osaki station is a leisurely 5-10 minute walk away and it is along the JR Yamanote Line (green circle line) which took us directly to most of the places we wanted to go to in Tokyo. The directions to the house were very detailed and helpful  and we had no trouble finding it even at night. I would definitely stay here again if I get the chance to visit Tokyo again. I highly recommend staying here. Thank you Takashi and Li!

여행 첫날 우리를 반갑게 맞이해준 Li의 친절함이 기억이 남습니다. 그녀가 알려준 오코노미야키집은 제가 가본 오코노미야중 최고였습니다. 고맙습니다. 항상 1년에 두번정도 도쿄에 가지만 Airbnb 이용은 처음이었습니다만, Miraie 에서의 좋은 기억덕에 다음번 도쿄 방문때도 Airbnb를 이용할 예정입니다. 기회가 된다면 Miraie 에도 다시 방문하고 싶습니다. 고마웠습니다. 또 뵙겠습니다!

Der Aufenthalt bei Takashi & Li war perfekt! Wir sind unheimlich nett begrüßt worden und Li hat uns gleich mit auf einen Street Market genommen und uns super Essens-Tipps gegeben. Wir konnten sozusagen direkt ins "echte" Tokio eintauchen.

Die Wohnung ist inheimluch schön, so dass man sich sehr wohl fühlt! Das Zimmer ist klein, aber völlig ausreichend. Die Dusche (und insbesondere die Toilette mit beheiztem Sitz:) sind super!

Wir würden jederzeit wieder bei Takashi&Li wohnen, es war ein toller Aufenthalt!!!

Miraie is a charming house with welcoming hosts. Li was really nice, welcoming and helpful with explaining how things work in the house. It's such a joy to meet adorable Eri too! It is a real pity I haven't got to spend more time with them. The room is really comfy and equipped with an electrical blanket which was blissful. I'd definitely recommend their share house on Airbnb.

First BNB.. To be honest, we are a little bit disappointed after seeing all those fancy photos from the website... The house itself is beautiful and the same as the photos, but the guest room was too small... I don't know if that is the typical style in Japan.. We are 2 girls and we had quite a lot of stuff, 4 baggages, so the room was way too crowded for us.. We had to put all our stuff out of the room, in the corridor, which made the public space crowded as well...
Anyway, the hosts showed us warm hospitality and prepared a nice meal, which really saved us from our tight itinerary.
I am now planning my next trip with BNB, hope the room would be bigger^_^

Takashi & Li and their family are truly exceptional hosts and wonderful people! They are so welcoming -- we really felt like we were old friends and it made us feel like we were a part of life in Tokyo, not just foreign travelers; that's not something that you can get just anywhere.  They are always going out of their way to accommodate us, from providing recommendations to giving us food to try! The house is gorgeous, very comfortable, clean, and the location couldn't be better. Right next to a supermarket and convenience store as well as Togoshi-Ginza, a really quaint and unique street full of shops and restaurants (try the karaage place!). The neighborhood is very safe and peaceful. You're so close to Osaki station which will get you to Shibuya, Harajuku, etc all within 10-15 minutes!  Honestly couldn't recommend Takashi and Li's place more!!
It's a great place to stay! Hosts were super nice and caring, I felt warm although I dint spend enough time with them. Highly recommended!

We have been guests at Miraie house for 10 days and we thoroughly enjoyed their special hospitality, with Takashi and Li you feel at home! The room is very cozy, it's located downstairs in an environment that allows your privacy. Li and her husband are always available for any needs and they also gave us many informations about what to see, about shopping and how to move in town. The location of the house is perfect, very comfortable and near one of the main lines, in a quiet neighborhood but full of restaurants and supermarkets. It was an unforgettable experience and we will definitely come back to them. :)

We had a wonderful time with Li and Takashi! They are super helpful and welcoming people. The house is near Osaki station which is ideal to explore Tokyo. I would recommend this place to anyone who's going to visit this exciting city!

Takashi and Li and their little daughter as well as their dog are very lovely, interesting and easygoing people. We felt like at home and had many nice conversations. The room has a good size for 2, the house has a great architecture and is very clean. I guess when you can use the rooftop bathtub in the summer it's even more amazing. Being made from wood, you can hear people getting up in the morning etc. So for very sensitive, long sleeping guest it might not be perfect, but everyone is very considerate so for us it was fine. The AC kept it warm in wintertime and I guess cool in summer. Location is pretty good, in a quiet Japanese neighborhood but good via JR ring line to reach everything. Highly recommended.

Had a great time at Takashi and Li's place! Such a beautiful house, amazingly designed. Wish it was my own! Takashi and Li were great hosts, always helping us with info about the area and how to get to specific places, and they have the cutest dog ever which is ALWAYS a plus. Very welcoming, cool and helpful hosts- Li even gave us a present! Couldn't have been happier with our experience. Hopefully we will cross paths again soon! Will definitely stay here when we come back. Thanks Takashi and Li!
It was my pleasure to stay with  such a loving family for 3 nights. Great location+kind hospitality. Thank you Mr. Takashi& Li.

I had a great experience staying at Miraie. The space is very inviting and I didn't feel uncomfortable at all. The room is sufficient and allows great privacy while the communal space creates a friendly atmosphere to converse and relax. The location also is very convenient. Overall, I had an excellent experience! Li, thank you so much for the gift as well!

Great experience living in Takashi&Li's guest house, would certainly recommend anyone visiting Tokyo . The location is excellent just a short walk 10mins to the subway and close to the stores and restaurants. The house is very stylish and well equipped. Takashi&Li were very kind in all communications . Will stay there again if I can return.
房东非常好 沟通起来很舒服 房间略挤 但是住起来很舒服 有配备的毛巾擦脸巾 热水也能一直供应 很好的住宿体验

도쿄에서 했던 경험들 중 가장 마음에 들었던 경험입니다.
가격대비 만족도가 높고, 무엇보다 교통의 이점이 탁월하며 현지 가정집의 따뜻한 분위기를 느낄 수 있습니다.

The host was very attentive and helpful. He’s very kind and a super host!
The neighborhood is located near the bustling nightlife of Ikebukuro.
Supermarket is 1 min walk distance away. Opposite of the wonderful apartment is a fantastic izakaya with a passionate host!
We loved our stay!

We are very happy that we got to stay here.
Everything was clean and as described. The accomodation is also well located.
Mr. Matsukawa is very friendly and happy to help.
We would definitely recommend staying here!!
整個房子空間大，設備齊全，位置方便，周邊有很多餐廳超級市場。唯一是兩張單人床的睡房面向馬路，晚上人聲車聲很大，影響睡眠，建議裝隔音玻璃及窗簾作改善。
5일간 편하게 쉬다 갔습니다 감사합니다

Location was very convenient to restaurants but may be a bit of a walk with luggage to train station so we hired a car. Owner was very nice and flexible with check in/out times and helped lift our luggage inside.
The house was so convenient to everything and comfortable. Mr Matsukawa greeted us on arrival and departure and communicated everything we needed well.
不错
I had an amazing stay at 松川‘s place! The home was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. The location was perfect, close to everything I needed, and the neighborhood felt safe and welcoming.
Good!

The apartment was a great place to stay at in Ikebukuro, only a short walk from the train station and tons of attractions.  There's also a few nice parks nearby and a Family Mart and drug store just down the street.  The apartment itself is very cute with two good-sized rooms as well as a kitchen, bathroom, and toilet room.  There's even a washer/dryer, just make sure you give your clothes plenty of time to dry, or just hang them out to dry (a hanging rack is provided).  A great place to stay for anyone visiting Ikebukuro!
NICE OWNER ❤️
Very close to Ikebukoro station and also to some night life. All walkable distance. Great for a group of 4. Host is very responsive. Would definitely recommend again!
like visiting Japanese relatives home. lived in but had everything that's needed.  straight line from ikeburuko station but in quiet residential part.
Place was lovely, location was great. The host/managers were communicating very well.

We enjoyed our short stay in Ikebukuro. We loved sleeping on the tatami. It’s small and cozy, great for a small group.
The location is very convenient, a very quick walk to Ikebukuro station. We were nervous about getting lost but it was very easy to navigate, even when we did get turned around. We loved living like locals for our short stay.

It’s a convenient place and responsible person we met.
It was great experience for us!!

마츠카와씨는 매우 친절했어요.
체크인부터 체크아웃까지 편안함을 느낄 수 있었습니다.
숙소는 연식이 느껴지는 레트로한 건물이었으나 숙박에 필요한 물건이 준비되어 있고 잘 청소되어 있었습니다. 뜨거운 물도 빨리 나오고 침구가 깨끗해서 만족했습니다.
이케부쿠로 역에서 도보로 이동할 수 있는 거리로, 아주 가까운 곳에 마트와 편의점, 돈키호테가 있어 위치도 최고였습니다. 함께 묵은 친구들도 만족해했고 덕분에 즐거운 여행이 되었습니다.

Perfect location surrounding with convenience stores and restaurants. Quite close to shopping street and metro.  Our room is a bit small due to L shape layout but not a big issue. Sage is very helpful and quick response.
Great place for family to stay. Spacious but expect hotel standards for the price. Every penny worth the stay here.
Clean and convenient. We found it a little noisy as ground floor and a lot of passing scooters. Very easy distance from supermarket and convenience store.
Great place to stay. Was very clean and amazing location. Spacious and beautiful accomodation
Buena comunicación, nos ayudó con el check in y estuvo a disposición para resolver nuestras dudas. Muy agradable, volveré pronto
池袋西口から一直線に5分。隣りにスーパーもあり、非常に便利で楽しいロケーションです。宿は広い部屋が２部屋あり、設備も充実しており、長期滞在にも対応しています。繁華街に近いですが、やどの周辺は閑静で心地よく過ごせます。

位置十分方便，池袋站直走就到。
附近有多間居酒屋，便利店及Aeon。
房東十分友善，願意解決任何困難，晚上十時後還能幫我解決wi-fi問題。
房屋基本配到齊全並且乾淨。
若有下次必定再次光臨。
住宿的地方挺容易就找到了，发过来的说明也很清晰。住这个商圈还是很方便的，唯一不好的就是有天早上估计楼上的住户要赶车或者飞机，下楼的楼梯有点声音 其余都很不错。
松川先生的房间位于池袋核心地带，地理位置非常方便，从池袋西口出来步行5分钟左右即可到达，一路上有2家FamilyMart，1家7-11，1家Lawson，房源边上还有一个AEON超市，非常的方便，去往池袋东边的核心区也方便，有个地下通道直接到达Parco边上。房间也非常的干净，我们住在一层，入住很顺利，如果带有行李箱，推荐预订1层的房间。
很棒的房東和房子

Very clean and nice woody house. The family members including the dog are gentle and softly fragrant, staying there as if was at home. Strongly recommend it to individual travelers who like family party or family atmosphere.

Staying at Takeshi &  Li's was a great experience - they have a unique space that is welcoming and cozy. Definitely a good start to my trip to Japan! It's a quiet but safe neighborhood, and I enjoyed the walks to the train station each morning. My flight was delayed by hours, and Li was understanding; she even immediately fixed me a quick dinner when I arrived. Definitely cheered me up :) Their dog is so sweet, and I'll miss her too!

We had a warm welcome, after we arrived in the evening around 8.30pm. This late check-in was no problem at all for Li&Takashi. Just 10 minutes (to walk) away from the Osaki station (Yamanote Line), this house is located in a nice and quiet area, with a convenience store nearby and a small park down the road. If you like to exercise or go for a run just ask your friendly hosts for details and they can show you a route on the map. The house is beautiful and everything is very clean. The wooden design creates a cozy and friendly atmosphere. If you are interested in architecture - you will simply love this place!
Everything was well prepared for our arrival and Li cooked a nice meal for us after the long journey.
Absolutely recommendable for travelers who would like to experience a more familiar atmosphere in Tokyo.
Takashi and Li are very friendly and nice hosts and we would love to stay there again one day. Thank you so much for your hospitality!
