Our 5 nights at Miraie were our first Airbnb experience: we liked it!
The house is very nice, particular and comfortable, full of light, near the Osaki JR station, in an area full of good restaurants. The guest room is very small but we didn't need more than this. The bed (futon) is very comfortable. The only complain is about noises, being the house made of wood, so everything from the upper floors can be heard from the guest room. The toilet is amazing: the seat is warm (best ever) and everything is clean.
Li, Takashi and the little Eri are so nice and kind, they were very helpful, making us feeling at home! We chatted a lot with Li about Japan and Tokyo, and she prepared a WONDERFUL dinner for us, with a lot of different tastes: we really appreciated her effort, she is a talented cook (with the help of Eri).
Li also helped us with our laundry: this was very useful!
The neighborhood is very pictoresque, little streets full of cherry blossom to discover, there is a beautiful shrine hidden 2 streets above.
We would definitely come back to Miraie: we had a great time there!

The house was original : a great living space and our room was downstairs, small but convenient. Only problem was the noise early in the morning. Li was really nice and gave us some advices about where to eat around and we had some interesting talks during our stay.

Wonderful people, very friendly and original. Li is so outgoing to make sure everything is ok and takes really good care. the room is fine, comfortable and so is the bath, everything is made of wood in this very original house. 10 minutes from Osaka train station, easy to find. These people are active, very lively and the house is open-space, so at times it is not really quiet, but you always feel in very good hands.

This is my first Air bnb experience and Li made it perfect! The room is clean and tidy, the mattress and linen is very comfortable. But I would like to highlight Li-the host. She introduced local life style, destination information, restaurants..almost everything u need to know. Thanks Li, make our stay special and memorable.

Thank you for everything ! Your house is Beautiful and you are a perfect  family! Thank  you for kindness ! Think you to havé Share Your Life with us, we were to shy to Tell you how much Your smile and Your family Will miss us! Your Will be more than welcom in France ! Thank you thank you thank you! We recommande Your place, and we Will come back without  hesitation !

I had a wonderful stay at Miraie. Takeshi and Li are such warm hosts, it's pleasant to return by the end of the day. The house is quite special, located at a nice neighborhood and is very convenient. I highly recommend this place.
房东人超好，很热心，家里布置很温馨，很干净。这里离JR线也很近，很方便，在这里住的非常开心。

So wonderful! Such a cosy and welcoming house. The host was so kind. She gave me directions and cooked an amazing breakfast that I ate on the rooftop. Best place that I stayed in tokyo. Shinagawa was actually much more convenient than staying off the hibiya line in Asakusa, which is where I stayed next.

"Miraie" is an absolute fantastic place to stay in Tokyo. Takashi and Li are very friendly hosts who made us very welcome in their unique house. It was really nice to come back to their place after a full day of sight-seeing in Tokyo and then hang out with them and their family and friends at night. I had some very interesting conversations with Takashi, Li, and a friend of theirs who likes to dress up in kimonos. They also have a very friendly dog who is adorable. The location of the house is incredibly convenient - very close to a Lawson Convenient Store and a short walk from Osaki Station. We stayed for four nights and were sad to leave because we had such a nice time at their place. We would recommend staying at "Miraie" to anyone!!

This is beautiful wood structural house in quiet residential area. It's constantly surprising how clear and well-organized it is. By staying here you can experience the sympathic daily life of a tokyo family. And you can also easily reach the popular tourist spots by Yamanote line nearby.
The room is clean and comfortable. Takashi and Li are both great host. We had a great 3 night stay, would definitely recommend.

excellent，超级棒的房子超级棒的一家，狗狗很可爱（虽然我很怕狗哈哈哈 但还是觉得可爱）Li为我介绍了他们住所后面的一条商业街，居民区里的那种，超级棒！很多很有特色的小店和餐厅。而且在他们家里很Free，感觉就像在家里一样。棒棒嗒！下次还要带小伙伴们一起来！
excellent location, close to matro station. communicative and made u feel just at home. They will introduce and recommend some good restaurants,shops, famous streets to u and all good! Recommend to everyone!

It was actually my first time visiting Japan. Takashi and Li is a very welcoming couple, always helpful if needed anything. Unfortunately I was very busy all the time, so I had very little chances to sit and get to know them well. However, concerning the room and the house, both are very clean and neat all the time, the location is perfect, very close to the station, which leads to all touristic areas! I wont hesitate to come again one day! I surely recommend everyone to choose this room! The house is pretty special :)
Thank you again! Very happy to meet you two! It was really a pleasure!
-Christopher Chouchani-
My daughter and I had a fantastic stay in Miraie. The house, room and location are super, but most of all the hosts were very friendly and helpfull.
向所有人推荐这个房间，房东太太非常热情友好，最重要的是使用中文，为我们的行程提供了很多帮助。这里交通方便，五分钟到JR环线地铁站，直接到达各大景点，到羽田机场只需要三十分钟。周围有大型商业，也有很特色的商业街，晚上吃宵夜也方便。房子里各种设施齐备，特别是客厅，温暖光亮，是我最喜欢待的地方，如果有机会，我会回来的 。

Great home, great place, great host!
From this Jr station you can go easily everywhere in Tokyo, we were given a very warm welcome in a lovely home.
Higly recommanded !

They are so nice! We arrived late and Li woke up and prepared the supper for us! She can also speak Chinese, is very convenient for us. The house is very comfortable, her daughter is also very cute! In my opinion, she treats her guests as friends!

3박4일동안 친구와 도쿄여행을 갔다온 한국인입니다! 호스트께서 보내주신 메시지를 통해 숙소를 쉽게 찾아갈 수 있었고, 역과 가깝다보니 도쿄 주요도시로 이동하기가 수월했습니다. 저희와 호스트와의 스케줄 상 첫째날 오후에 숙소에 도착했을때는 마주칠 수 없었지만 여러가지를 배려해 주셔서 편히 쉬다 관광을 할 수 있었고, 그날 저희가 밤 늦게 들어갔는데도 불구하고 기다리셔서 숙소에 대해 간단한 설명을 해주시고, 저희가 원할 땐 아침밥도 챙겨주셨습니다!
상냥해...♡ 근처에 좋은 카페도 소개해주셨는데 저희 일정상 들를 수 없어서 아쉬웠습니다ㅠㅠ 다음에 도쿄여행을 또 가게 된다면 '미라이'에서 또 머물고 싶습니다!

Takashi and Li's place was really great. The place was so clean and their daughter is super cute. The bed is comfortable and their place is so close to the JR Osaki station. The neighborhood is quiet but it is close to neighborhoods such as Ginza and Shibuya on the JR.

Our stay at Takashi & Li's was short but I really enjoyed staying there. They are so nice! I had a few interesting talks with Li. The house is very nice, clean and the neighborhood is very well located.

I would definitively recommend Miraie and I won't hesitate to come again one day.

Takeshi and Li were wonderful hosts. They were extremely friendly and helpful and made our stay very comfortable. The house has a lovely family feel to it and we had many interesting talks with Li about her involvement with the artistic community. If you are ever in Tokyo we would definitely recommend you stay with these guys!

It is the first time for me to book Airbnb and travel to Tokyo. I really appreciate that I can contact with Takashi & Li before the trip and let them know I want to go to their place in early morning.  As I have booked the overnight flight and arrive to Tokyo at around 6am, I can place my baggage and take a shower in their house at 8am. The flexibility is really great compare with hotel. Takashi & Li are very nice and helpful. They give some suggestion on my schedule, everything are very smooth and we have fun in different places. Also there is a roommate called Wakaba who is a very friendly local girl and she can speak fluent English. She also gives me some hits on my trip and we can share our culture with each other. At the last night, I am very lucky that I can play with 2 new born kitty which are the new members of Takashi & Li's family. Having great experience and unforgettable memories in these 5 days. I definitely will come back if I visit Tokyo again.

Staying at Takashi & Li's place was an unique and super nice experience. They have a very relaxed attitude and made us feel very welcome. We loved the design of the house, featuring all sorts of cool details. For us the cute spaniel Joy was an extra bonus.

Great place that Takashi and Li have here. Extremely friendly and welcoming, Li made a great breakfast one morning. Very convenient location and easy to get around by JR line. Nice to go running in the local area. I would highly recommend it.

We had a lovely stay with Takashi and Li. They are very special people who are kind and caring and have a unique home in an easy to reach neighborhood. The directions from the JR station to their house were spot on - especially as this was our first time in Tokyo and the streets can be a bit confusing (we had no trouble finding it).
I would stay here again in a heartbeat! Wonderful people, relaxing and well appointed accommodations, and a great location. Couldn't ask for more.
Thanks L,T, and especially E!

I had a really pleasant stay at Takashi & Li's house "Miraie".
Unfortunately I couldn't spend much time with Takashi as he was off to Osaka most of my stay, but Li has been of great help and is a wonderful host.
Both have made their best for me to be able to check in early in the morning.
The house is within a short 10min walk to Osaki station which is well located in the "middle" between Shinjuku on the left hand side" of Yamanote Circle Line and Asakusa on the right side. It's has also a direct line to Odaiba, a popular location for leisure time.
i definitly recommend, and would not hesitate to book again if the occasion arises.

Takashi and Li showed us a lot of trust by leaving the keys to the house and the room in the mailbox since they couldn't be home at the time of our arrival. They're super kind and made us breakfast one day. They even offered to make dinner or lunch at some point, but unfortunately we didn't spend much time at the house during the day. The house itself was very cool and just as depicted in the pictures. Everything was clean and orderly. It's just a 10 min walk from Osaki station and there are plenty of little shops not too far away.

Takashi and Li was very helpful and welcoming upon our arrival and through our stay.
They showed us some local streets and gave some great tips on restaurants, where to go etc.
We even got the tastiest Cuban(!) sandwich for breakfast one morning.
You have your own keys and can
come and go as you want of course.
Will truly recommend Takashi and Li as host , we had a great stay.

Notre séjour chez Takashi et Li était tout simplement parfait. Nous avons adoré l'expérience de vie dans une charmante famille tokyoiste. La maison est tout simplement superbe et nous avons disposé de tout ce dont nous avions besoin. L'emplacement à 10min de la gare d'Osaki est parfait et Li et Takashi sont toujours disposés à partager des adresses de restaurants de de quartiers sympas. Un grand merci à nos hôtes !!

Takashi and Li were very nice hosts! Takashi walked us to a nearby shopping street for breakfast, and Li gave us some tips for Tokyo and even cooked for us on our last evening :) The house design is very cool and they regularly organise workshops and events with artists and kids. Our stay was an interesting Japanese/Chinese/German/Spanish cultural exchange :) Be prepared to get up early though, at 7.30-8ish everybody in the house is up and running!
住宿很好找，距離池袋駅不遠，去那都方便
房东回复及时，在入住前解答疑问沟通很愉快。机场大巴下来后用GOOGLE MAP导航650米，很容易找到。房屋干净整洁，一家三口或五人都可以住。有洗衣机，微波炉和冰箱。就是冬天洗澡有点冷。十字路口有家生活超市买东西很方便。
住宿地點方便, 池袋站出來直走一小段路可到, 附近有便利商店, 房東回覆快速
好
Logement calme dans un quartier très vivant. Très facile d’accès . Confortable et bien aménagé.
A small apartment located right in the heart of Ikebukuro and only 10min from the JR station. The apartment is small but very functional and exactly what a family would need for a trip to Tokyo.

Our stay here was perfect! Host was very kind to us and made us feel very well accommodated for. He met us on our arrival and showed us around the Airbnb. Also, he was able to help us get our baseball tickets stress free since we needed to ship them here. Host is very friendly and I would definitely stay here again!
The location is very convenient, close to Ikebukuro station (400m) which is a centre for shopping. The room is comfortable for 4 persons,  the communications is very quick, highly recommended
very helpful host and great location.  Its only  around 10 minutes walk to ikebukuro train station. The host is very helpful and fast in response to our queries. i really recommend this place.

The place was very practical for a visit of Tokyo, the metro was very close and the place was just what we were looking for. The tatami floors in one of the bedrooms were a nice detail and also the rest of the flat gave the feel of living in a typical Tokyo flat. The only issue was the party people at night passing by the flat which is located on the ground floor just next to a small alley but with earplugs things improved 😉
This was a wonderful location, less than 10 minutes' walk from Ikebukuro Station, but in a quiet street. The apartment gave us (three adults) everything we needed as a base.

This place was not only great, it provided a traditional feeling experience. The management was very accommodating and beyond outstanding with making sure we were doing OK! I have been traveling Japan for a little bit, and this place is the best experience we’ve had BY FAR!
Worth every penny, will be going here again!
Also, the toilet is beyond AWESOME!!!
Near the train station and easy to get around in tokyo

늦은  시간에 도착했지만 친절하게 안내 받고 체크인 할 수 있었습니다. 일본어를 할 줄 몰랐으나 주인분께서 중국말이 가능하여 소통하는데 지장이 없었습니다. 방이 깨끗했으나 도로에 인접한 집이라 오토바이 소리나 자동차 소리가 조금 아쉬웠습니다. 역하고 가까워 도보로 이동이 가능하고, 주변에 맛집 뿐만 아니라 돈키호테점, 편의점 등 다양한 편의시설이 많아 생활하기 아주 편리하였습니다.
非常好的房东，耐心的等待我们并且热心给我们讲解房屋设施的使用方法！离池袋站也很近,非常推荐

오래된 집인데도 관리를 엄청 잘하신게 느껴졌어요
일본 친구집에 놀러온 느낌이었습니다
서쪽 출구 돈키호테랑 5분거리라 좋았어요
아쉬웠던 건 방음이 잘 안된 부분이네요
그것 빼곤 세면대도 2개라 동시에 사용하기 좋았습니다
这个房子的位置真的是非常好，就在池袋站，吃饭，逛街，交通都非常方便，还有房东先生也是非常nice，中文说的非常好，有问必答，并且提供相关的资讯，下次再来，还要继续入住。

외할머니댁에 놀러온 느낌의 집
살짝 오래된 느낌도 있는데
오히려 영화 속 집 같아서 좋았음
수압도 세고, 온냉수 잘 나옴
포켓와이파이를 주시는데
전원을 켰는지, 안 켰는지 애매해서
이틀동안 사용을 못 함...
수시로 체크를 해야할 듯
그 외에는 다 좋았다

We stayed in Takashi & Li Sabetto’s house at the end of October 2015; they were kind and precious hosts, the house is very pretty and matches the description. The surroundings are safe, beautiful, the metro station is about 7 minute walk from the house. There is only one thing one should consider if planning to stay at Miraie’s, though – with thin walls and floors and three guests living in the house at the same time (besides the family) there is the risk of another guest using the washing machine at 3 am or being woken up by noises early in the morning. All in all it was a very pleasant stay, Li offered us cookies and fruit in the morning, wanted to offer us a lunch or a dinner (we were sorry we did not find the time to do that) and gave us advice about the surroundings.

One of the best places to stay right near the heart of tokyo city and also one of the unique houses i've seen. The host made you feel welcome like you've known them personally and as my third stay at their place it felt like i will keep coming back every single trip to tokyo. I was more than welcomed to teach Li some recipes as i was a chef from my country and also made a dessert which was a hit. The services they provided was equal to a hotel staff and better. I will easily be back again to their house to stay again in the near future.

初 airbnb だが、本当に素晴らしい体験でした。
素敵なハウス、優しい旦那と熱心な奥様、とっても満足できる4泊でした。
今回は出張であまりのんびりできなかったが、また機会があれば、家族を連れておとまりにいきたいと思います。
この度、本当にありがとうございました。可愛い娘さんとネコのしずかちゃん、のび太君、後わんちゃん(名前聞き忘れた)にもどうぞよろしく <3

超级喜欢房东一家的木屋房子很有设计感。第一天来的时候女主人出门了留给了我钥匙和关于使用房间等的说明非常贴心。一共在这里住了四晚 很喜欢房东家养的狗Joy其实我本来很怕狗的 见到Joy以后发现这么多年怕狗的想法竟然消失了 感谢Joy 哈哈。女主人Li超级能干 我每天回到家 她都在忙着做各种好吃的 很热情一直招待我吃 第一晚吃了她煮的很好吃的火锅嘻嘻，也给了我很多关于东京旅游的建议。房东家的女儿长得很是我的菜啊 好可爱 每天精力超级旺盛能量满满。希望下次还有机会住！Nice house, wonderful host!Li is very warm-hearted . I love the food she cooked!So  delicious! I still remember the taste!She helped me to carry the heavy luggage and gave me suggestions about my trip.When I left their house Li gave me a gift which is made by her and her lovely daughter!I was touched very much!I hope that I can stay here again!!

I spent 3 nights with my boyfriend at Takashi & Li's.
The house is very very nice and located in a residential area. We were given a spare copy of the keys which gave us a lot of flexibility and allowed us to leave/arrive at our own schedule.
The house was clean, and we even used the bath tub in the terrace upstairs our last day. The room was small, and the matress was not very confortable, but still we felt like home.
We were also able to wash our clothes, for which we are very grateful.

We received great advice for making the most of our visit to Tokio.
Hopefully we will come back soon. We would surely recommend staying with them.

We had the most lovely time at Takashi and Li's place! The warm Welcome was followed by unnoumerous advices on what to see, what to try, where to go and how to get there. We enjoyed the family atmosphere and getting to know so much about a foreign culture to us - which now doesn't feel so foreign any more! We are grateful for this experience and recommend a stay at Takashi and Li's place any time!

It's the most special experience in living Airbnb in li's family, not only living in a warm and cozy house but also share the local living experience with them, it makes our trip more fruitful. I'm sure will visit them when we go to Tokyo next time :) we are truly blessed to meet such people and have the opportunity to share our holiday with them! Also.. Their cooking is simply delicious!

Staying with Takashi and Li was one of the best decisions we made for our trip. Not only is their custom-made home just the coolest home you'll find and conveniently located by a great metro and train stop, they are so welcoming and nice. We stayed during the New Year holiday—Li and her roommate cooked us traditional Japanese New Year food and we all sat around watching the annual New Year's TV performances and talking and laughing. Li has such a great energy. She's very interested in learning about cultures around the world and loves sharing her own stories as well. She's also very funny and lively and I'm just so happy to have met her.

I had a great stay at Li and Takashi's beautiful house. The two and their roommate Mina are really nice, communicative and helpful. Upon arrival Li gave me detailed directions on how to get to the house. When I got there she made me a sandwich which was exactly what I needed, very sweet of her.
It felt very much like a home. I guess that's what air bnb is all about. Thank you! Hope to see you again someday

My experience at "Miraie" was amazing.
Now they already have tons of best rated comments so I would answer a question that I was wondering myself a lot: is it well situated?
First it's true that there is not a perfect spot in Tokyo but I would say that they are very close to a subway that is very helpful and bring you everywhere you need to go to visit the city directly and it's working with the JR pass.
Beside that, they were really friendly, the place is great and all the good things that you can read about them are accurate

tres heureux de mon sejour.
accueil, maison, famille, animaux, tres agreable

Very warm and welcoming hosts, in a fun and cozy home (love the hammocks).  It's warm in winter (not to be taken for granted in Japan), the amenities are all there, the pets are friendly, and the location is fairly near a train station (about a ten minute walk) and right around the corner from a 24-hour convenience store.  I think you'd be hard pressed not to get along with the host family, who go out of their way to make you feel welcome.  The room is small by North American standards, but perfectly normal for Japan.  The only possible objection I can see is that between the child, the dog, and possible other guests, you can forget about sleeping in.  But what did you go to Japan for if you plan on sleeping all morning? :)  I'm looking forward to returning some day.  Highly recommended!

miraie的设计非常独特，房子也靠近大路非常容易找到，加上离osaki站（山手线）和togoshi站都不远，出行十分方便。并且出门不远便是戸越銀座商业街，是东京最长的商业街，常去逛逛也绝对不会让人失望。
还有！房东Takashiさん和Liさん十分友好，他们给了我很多关于东京游玩的建议并且陪我去找居酒屋，在Liさん的帮助下我还交到了日本的朋友，真的十分感激！Liさん是台湾人交流没有问题，Takashiさん是日本人，在我强行用断断续续的日语的交流下仍然耐心的听下去并且一字一句的回答真的很温柔：）
东京是一个非常美丽而且绚丽多彩的城市，但是Miraie是我对东京最难以忘怀的地方之一。真心向大家推荐这里！ 另外，小狗joy和猫咪大雄静香都非常的可爱并且老实，不擅长应付小狗的我也非常愉快的和他们相处了。
The design of MIRAIE is unique. You can easily get to MIRAIE because it's near the road and easy to find. Besides, the house is near to osaki station (YAMANOTE line） and togoshi station that will make your sightseeing in Tokyo very convenience.
There is a shopping street named 'togoshi ginza' near the MIRAIE and it's the longest shopping street in Tokyo.
Mr.takashi and Mrs.Li is very friendly. They gave me a lot of advice for sightseeing. With Mrs.Li's help,I made a Japanese friend!
MIRAIE is the one of most unforgettable place of Tokyo for me.Welcome to MIRAIE！

We just love the Mirarie so much! Takashi & Li are super friendly! Li recommend some place just right for family with kid and we enjoyed so much!
The house is comfortable as well, especially in the share space, it's big enough that you can hardly find in Tokyo.
在这里你会觉得像在自己家里一样放松，尤其是房东太太Li会说中文，可以告诉你很多周围有趣的场所，她给我们推荐的几个适合带孩子去的地方都很棒，甚至还帮我们预约了一个超赞的爵士演出，演出只有三个成员，但每个人的表现都是国际顶尖的水准，大开眼界！
房子的构造很实用且舒适，公共空间很大，这在日本这样拥挤的地方尤其少见，可惜没能多住几日，下次还会来拜访！

Takashi and Li were so amazing and welcoming. Their house is truly a house of the future - a cozy private space / bedroom, but inside what feels like a contemporary Swiss Family Robinson tree house. An easy walk to the train station (the JR Yamanote line, the main artery of the Tokyo metro), and just beyond the hustle and bustle (but still in reach!) of nearby Shibuya and Shinjuku. For those of you who want a communal atmosphere, a quiet space with all the comforts of your own home, but still want to be a quick metro ride away from the action of the city. Thanks again to T&L for being accommodating and welcoming me into their home.

Takashi and Li are wonderful hosts, you really get a feel of their family life and they are so welcoming. Their daughter is an angel and they have the cuuuuuuuttteeeesssssttttt little puppy called Joy.. Recommended!

the place is a wonderful experience for those who are interested to
live in a good residential neighbourhood with good connection to the center and who like to share their stay with a lovely japanese-taiwanese family who knows a lot about cool places and who knows excellent cooking (possibly you could cook with them together). so it's not the ülace for those who want to stay in an intimate isolated place and who are picky about everything (family life is family life). i really appreciate the luck i had to stay there in their modern nice house!

房东很好，女主人会中文所以交流无障碍，非常热情，提供地址的时候非常详细，还给我们介绍附近有什么好吃的，房间虽较小，但是公共设施都不错，距离山手线大崎车站800米左右距离，可以我们每次回来都挺晚了，没能有更多的交流机会，向大家推荐这里！
Nice house and warmhearted host! About 800 meters away from Osaki JR station. A little bit far away from the station, but worth it! I recommend this house for visitors traveling in Tokyo.

房子總是乾淨且歡樂，與可愛的女主人一家以及好吃的家常菜！中間也得到非常多的豐富資訊，來不及一一體驗，已經在計畫下一次了呢！
而且居住地點的週遭也非常舒適且交通方便，如果在鬧區待累了回到住宿附近還有到凌晨2點的咖啡書痶可稍做休息，下次來東京也是要來這裡呢！
獨樹一格的居家環境 讓我們在進入民宿後感到十分驚豔 女主人也好熱情健談 日本室友也很親切 還有可愛的小狗狗和喵兒 整體的氛圍舒適自在 走路往返車站的途中也有種寧靜愜意的感覺 雖然只停留了三晚 卻十分愉快 非常推薦Miraie!!!

Takashi and Li are very kind and have a wonderful home. It's beautifully designed and it has been a pleasure to spend time there. You can use the well equipped kitchen and there are also a lot of nice places to eat nearby. The greatest value though was experiencing an authentic Japanese family life. Takeshi and Li are very helpful and do their best to make you feel welcome and provide you with all the information you need to roam around Tokyo. The room itself is quite small, but since you can move around the house freely (including the kitchen, living room and the awesome rooftop) it doesn't make a big difference. I definitely recommend to go there.
Amazing space good for sharing experiences and space with good people.

This Japan trip was the first time I tried Airbnb, and I had a great experience with Takashi & Li. They are great hosts with a love family. One thing the keeping telling us when we stay with them is: Just treat our house as your own home. Also, I can tell that they are trying the best to make us feel that way too. It was hot in Japan when we were there, but the AC works perfectly well. So I would definitely recommend their place to my friends in the future!!
It was a great stay at Takashi & Li. Very beautiful house in a nice neighbourhood of tokyo. Very helpful and nice. We even got some vietnamese food from the cooking lessons in the morning!

Staying with Takashi and Li was an absolute pleasure. What a great way to wrap up a 2-week trip to Japan! We immediately felt right at home. The room itself is comfortable and the house is amazing! It's also  great place for dog lovers, the spaniel (Joy) was a lot of fun. Our hosts were also really great recommending things to do in Tokyo, where to eat, etc. Takashi & Li are actively involved in the sharing community and we felt that during our stay, from the warm welcome to sharing meals and a kitchen - we got some great home-cooked food and we baked bread for hour hosts. I would stay here again without hesitation, and would welcome Takashi & Li into my own home if they were ever traveling to my city.
超棒的好嘛！房东Li真的超優しい！一大早起来教我烤三明治还给我留了日式点心～お世話になりました！また来ます！
A real home. Welcoming, fun and a bath on the roof! This was definitely the live like a local mantra. Li & Takashi (and even Joy the dog) made you feel right at home.

Takashi, Li, their daughter & pets were all a bundle of fun to live with for a few days. I arrived to Li hosting a cooking class and was encouraged to join in and eat Taiwanese street food, delicious!

If you are interested in learning about and experiencing a contemporary take on 'sharing' in Tokyo, please visit this wonderful family, ask questions and take their advice. I thoroughly enjoyed running up and down the stairs during my stay, bathing on the roof, checking in with the cats and taking time out in my room. I look forward to visiting the next version of Miraie!
Great location, good food in the area, and easily walkable to the station.

깔끔하고 호스트분도 친절하시며 설명을 잘 해주십니다. 다른 호스트분들과의 경험과는 다르게 약간의 편의도 봐주시며 전체적으로 만족도가 매우 높은 숙소였습니다. 굳이 굳이 단점을 꼽자면 바깥쪽 침대방에서 숙면을 취할 시, 외부 도로부터의 소음이 거의 차음효과 없이 들린다는 점 정도입니다. 다만 도로가 보통 조용하고 예민하신 분이 아니라면 크게 신경쓰이진 않을 정도라고 생각합니다.
다음에 도쿄 방문 시에도 가능하다면 재방문 하고 싶습니다!
Very friendly host. Very responsive to question. Caring and loves to offer help

도쿄 내에서 좀처럼 찾기 어려운 다다미방이 있는 가정집 형태의 숙소입니다. 일본의 다다미방을 이케부쿠로 번화가와 접근성이 좋은 거리에서 저렴한 가격에 체험해 보고 싶다면 추천합니다.
다소 연식이 있는 집으로 보이지만 오히려 완전 현대식 건물에선 볼 수 없는 레트로한 인테리어가 매력적입니다. 설비도 잘 관리되어 있어 불편함이 없으며, 청소도 완벽하여 구석구석까지 깨끗합니다.
전자레인지, 가스레인지, 전기포트, 식기, 수저, 헤어드라이어, 다리미, 에어컨, 선풍기, 공기청정기, 와이파이 완비. 방에 비치된 에어컨 덕에 장마 초입의 일본 날씨에도 쾌적하게 지낼 수 있었습니다.
다음에 또 일본에 온다면 재방문할 의향이 있습니다.

It was a lovely stay from England ☺️
would recommend to anyone wanting to visit Japan!

離池袋北口步行約5~10分，會經過兩間東橫INN，可以當作步行方向來標示
門口轉角有家AEON開到2400 相當方便 房子後面就有一家大型藥妝店可退稅
人潮也不會很多，逛起來很舒適，附近餐廳也很多很方便
房間五個人住，空間很足夠，唯一就是整理行李的共用空間不太夠，木質地點不耐行李箱的輪子刮，需要在指定區域擺放行李箱。
有簡單的廚房可以開伙，配合外面超市可以買一些簡單的食物回來自己料理
沒有固定線路的網路，有提供5G WIFI分享器 收訊不是很好 ，建議是使用自己的SIM卡網路比較穩定。
洗衣機有洗脫烘三合一功能非常方便，房間是比較舊式的屋子，很有日本的氣息
Very convenient location with lots of restaurants, malls and fun shops to go to. The host is very helpful and the tatami is very comfortable.
Great location near lots of good restaurants, supermarket, and shopping center! Very responsive and friendly host.

appartement bien placé près de la gare de Ikebukoro, tout en étant relativement au calme. L'entrée dans les lieux a été tres facile. Nous avons pu déposer nos valises avant l'heure prévue pour le check-in. Un bon plan.
Notre hôte nous a accueilli avec une très grande gentillesse. L'emplacement est au top. Je vous le recommande

Logement très propre et fonctionnel, dans une rue paisible à proximité immédiate de la grande gare d'Ikebukuro et de tous les commerces. Le propriétaire est très sympathique et n'a pas hésité à nous aider pour appeler une agence de location de voitures.
房源离地铁很近，房东先生也很热情，住的很舒适
距離車站10分鐘地點極佳，沿途用餐採購都方便，入住像回到舊時的記憶，充滿溫馨的家庭感覺，推薦入住。

從車站出口步行10分鐘即可到達且鄰近有AEON、Familymart等超市
不論是早上出發或是晚上返回都能輕鬆買到食物
入住很顺利，房东非常好，服务周到。旁边便利店就走路1分钟，非常方便。2分钟走到餐厅很多的商业街，离池袋地下铁5分钟路程，太方便了，下次会再来这里入住。
这家民宿离羽田机场很近，但是我们第一次来日本自由行来的时候不清楚选择了成田机场到达，半夜很晚了，房东很耐心的给我们查路线指路。入住温馨舒适的房东家，给人一种安全感。房东精通国语台语英语日语，可想而知素质有多高了。而且非常好相处，当我们有什么不明白的地方都会帮我们解答，这次的日本之行真的很棒，和有一个百晓通的房东作指引离不开关系。感恩感谢，会推荐给朋友来的

Li and Takashi are literally superhosts. We stayed 5 days in Tokyo and couldn't have chosen better. The whole family, including daughter, roommates, dog and cats are very very lovely and helpful. The house is really beautyful, very clean and has all the facilities you wish, including everything you need and more - even interesting books you can lend. The room is small but definitly big enough for two people and their luggage. Osaki Station itself is a few minutes walk away, very easy to reach and perfect for discovering the worlds biggest city and its hinterlands. Li provides you all the Information you wish for, she is really helpful and a wonderful person. She invited us even to a cooking class for taiwanese streetfood, showed us their wonderful quarter and best places to eat and discover the local culture and helped us plan our trip to our Mount Fujisan hike to the summit. Thanks for Takashi & Li, it has been great and we definitly recommend staying with them. We wish we would have had more time to spend with them.
Claudia & Stefano from Germany
Very nice and warm welcome in the family, lively house, close to everything in Tokyo thanks to Osaki station

L'appartement se trouve dans le quartier Osaki, endroit très calme et tres peu de touristes! Proche de la JR Line ( yamanote) à environ 10 min à pied, donc rapidement accès à tous les différents quartiers de Tokyo.
Li et son mari sont super accueillants. Ils nous ont fait découvrir de nombreux plats typique japonais et nous ont toujours fait de superbes recommandations pour divers restaurants.
L'endroit est atypique et très charmant.
Nous retournerions avec plaisir:)

Takashi and Li are amazing hosts, their house is very welcoming and friendly. We had a great time staying with them while in Tokyo. The room is great and the facilities all you need - the rooftop bath is the best. Nothing like a hot bath on the roof after a long day of sightseeing.
The house is located in a quiet neighbourhood and has good access to public transportation. Definitely an awesome place to stay, when you visit Tokyo!

Takashi and Li are wonderful hosts. The house is really warm and living, which is a quite great thing when you travel alone. I wish I could spend more time with them.
Also, you have a massive shopping street just next to it ( longest one in Tokyo), so If you need anything, it's all good.
The place is really easy to fine and Takashi and Li are so helpfull.
A great family for a great stay. I recommand !

Cette adresse est encore mieux que ce que l on imaginait! La maison est très caractéristique d une famille japonnaise contemporaine, si vous aimez l architecture et le design vous serez comblé. Nous avons aussi adoré le quartier. Il n est qu à quelques stations de shibuya par la yamanote line et il y a pleins de petites adresses cools autour.
Mais surtout surtout Li et Takashi sont adorables, ils se sont mis en 4 pour que nous passions un agréable séjour! Li est débordante d énergie et de joie qu elle ne demande qu à partager! merci milles fois!

I stayed with Takashi and Li for three nights in their beautiful home. They made me feel right at home the moment I set foot into their beautiful house. Though it was my first time staying alone while overseas, I felt right at ease and comfortable. The room was cosy and clean. Li was extremely hospitable - she made me breakfast and even gave me a tour of the neighbourhood. I would love to stay with the family again when I visit Japan.

Fantastic and warm airbnb experience! We enjoyed the family's company very much during our stay and were treated like their personal guests at home. The house is extremely cosy! Just a small note of caution for light sleepers - the wooden structure is not very sound proof! Otherwise everything is perfect in this residential & very local neighbourhood.

李女士可爱的家在JR山手线大崎车站走路10分钟的安静住宅区，出租的房间在半地下一层，房间虽小但很温馨很干净、像度假小木屋的感觉。李女士非常热情好客，见我早上吃不惯冷食，专门为我热了她自己做的荷叶鸡饭、萝卜糕等。非常感谢！家附近还有著名的“户越银座”商店街，不远处有LIVE超市，出行购物都十分方便。推荐！（另外，如果你有大行李箱，从大崎车站走过来虽只有700多米，但是有很大一段上坡路，建议打车过来只要起步价730日元。从家去车站则一路下坡、路也平整，推大行李箱去车站完全没有问题）

Very cool home that the family designed with an architect. The family is wonderful. Stay in a local neighborhood to get a real feel for Japanese life. I shopped at the grocery store a block away and went to local restaurants. Li is very knowledgeable and helpful.

Takashi & Li are great hosts, Li gave me a warm welcoming with her big smile and great cocking after my long traveling.
The house is beautifully designed and full of uplifting spirits!
It's a family oriented neighborhood where you can find your piece of mind in this busy metropolitan.
I want to take this opportunity to thanks Takashi and Li for their inspiring lifestyle and great hospitality.
-B

If you want to live like a local or you are looking for a lovely family with a beautiful home, you have to stay at Takashi's & Ly's place! They helped me with everything. I felt like a long time friend who is always welcome :)

I have a great stay with this lovely family. JR Osaki is very convenient to the main stations in tokyo metro. This home is also connected to 成田空港 via direct bus Willer express! Highly recommended to all of you ✨

Li and family are great host. Not only we got great advise on places to check out around the area, Li is also a great cook and we got to try out some of her dishes. Highly recommended for someone with family and If you want experience live living as a local.
房东人很好，很热情，做了早餐一起分享，还带我走了一遍地铁来帮助我熟悉路线。大崎站去其它地方都不会太远，房东提供了有用的信息，给东京行带来了美好的回忆。
Thanks for sharing your sweetest home to me! 寫中文你應該也看得懂吼？喜歡家裡的一切：給Joe洗澡的天台、敲可愛的Eli、天天都很忙的媽媽、工作一直很忙的爸爸、一起住的住客、還有樓上兩隻貓⋯⋯更喜歡家裡周邊的一切：安靜的居民區，超級舒服。下次來Joe和Eli應該都長大了吼！

目前遇到过最好的airbnb房东。
房东Li很热情，做菜很好吃，房子很赞，狗狗和猫猫都很可爱…很温馨的家…超赞的旅程
地理位置还不错~坐地铁一下子就到啦！！！房东很热情！！！还有小狗和小朋友，可能我身上常常沾染食物的味道，所以小狗看到我就会有反应。。😓但是住的挺舒服搭！！
The space is quite pretty
Li is superb with her cooking and she is also very accommodating with our plans by receiving us early in the morning. Love the house and the pets. Feels truly at home.

Good choice if you want to experience new trend of share house in Tokyo. Takashi and Li's family is very open, independent and interesting. Not mention the room is nicely clean and the location is convenient.
最高のホスト。一軒まるごとシェアリングを体現したようなおうちでした。ベッドの寝心地が最高で疲れがすぐにとれました。東京でビジネスにも観光にも便利な場所で、超絶おすすめ！
很棒的一次体验，好喜欢这种家的氛围，但是也有自己的生活空间，一切都很美好…谢谢招待，超级感动姐姐给我做的好吃的

They are remarkable beyond words. If you are after a cosy and intimate nest, this is the one for you. With a hospitable host like Takeshi and Li, rest assured you're well taken care of. Thank you for giving me an awesome experience in Tokyo!

Takashi and Li live in a very unique and cool house in a neighborhood convenient to getting around. There is always something going on at their house. Our only regret was staying there too short of a time
I chose Takeshi and Li's place for my teenage kids and they were very well looked after.  I would definitely stay with them next time I go to Tokyo.

I have only good and happy memories of the time spent in this fun and vibrant home of Takashi and Li. The house is quite interesting and full of energy. It's a few minutes walk from a couple of train stations so getting around Tokyo was easy. It's also only a short walk from the Togoshi Ginza Shopping District. The design of the house was what initially captured my attention but it's their family's hospitality that made me fall in love with my stay there. They were very accommodating and those meals by Li san were simply delicious. I truly felt at home and comfortable here and it was quiet a memorable experience with their lovely family. I highly recommend staying here when you're in Tokyo.
女房主是台灣人，溝通起來完全沒有問題，房間很舒適，環境太棒了，女兒えりちゃん也很可愛，中文棒棒的，狗狗貓貓們也非常可愛，大家記得去哦。
It's really an unforgettable experience to stay with Takashi, Li and their daughter, Eri. It's a happy family :)

Takashi and Li's place is incredible. It is one of the original share houses in Tokyo and their hospitality is amazing. We really enjoyed talking to them and their inspiration behind the share house. Their daughter is so precocious and dog was really cute. The place is exactly as shown in the photos, and it's within walking distance to Osaki station. Very central while feeling like you're in a neighborhood. Will definitely stay again the next time in Tokyo and will recommend to all our friends.

Li is a gem!  Every aspect of our reservation went smoothly from the minute I booked until check out. You can definitely feel the warmth in this household, which is a bit like controlled chaos. Even though there is so much going on at "Miraie" Li still made time to visit with us and even made us breakfast when we were a bit hungover on our second day. The boring details (which were less important) were that our room was clean, the shower was hot, and that the house was well located. However the real reason you should stay here for the experience of meeting this lovely family and participating in their world for a while. Thank you for the amazing hospitality! We'll visit again soon :-)

We had a perfect stay! Takashi and Li are very friendly and helpful with all of our questions we had, also we had the opportunity to join a little Party with so good Friends of them, which made the Trip to Tokio Unforgettable.
The House is very unique and comfortable, also the area around is perfect for a Trip to Tokio. You should stay there!!!!

If you're looking for a place that'll make you feel right at home, then stay here with Li and Takashi! Li helped us with our bus booking, gave us suggestions and even offered to make us a meal (which sadly we had no time to accept. Next time!) They have an adorable daughter and a dog too!
The room itself was quite small for the two of us though. If you have a lot of luggage or need some private space to walk around then this might not be the best spot for you. But if you're looking to experience living with a friendly Japanese family, just click the Book Now button!
amazing house with amaxing people. full of projects welcoming. i want to come back !
房東姊姊人超級好！從入住到離開 整個過程都讓人非常舒心，房東的女兒非常漂亮 ，喜歡畫畫 ，房子位置很好 大崎站有直達機場的班車 think park下有許多居酒屋 ，如果下次我來東京一定會再來拜訪的～

Where do I start? If you truly, Truly, want a formidable Airbnb experience book this immediately!
I had one of the best experiences with Takashi, Li, Eri-chan and Joy-chan! They are most welcoming you with open arms. I felt part of the household as a family and quite miss this experience already!
Thanks for the enjoyable memory and see you again soon!

Amazingly warm and friendly family, which left a great impression on our first trip to Tokyo. The house has so much character, and has everything you need. Osaki is only a few stops to Shibuya but has a local charm to it. You'd be silly to choose to stay anywhere other than here in Tokyo!

We had a really great time with Takashi & Li and their family, this is a typical tokyoite experience, modern shared house with really interesting design! Taking a bath on the rooftop was a really magical experience at sunset and we felt at home and at ease. Our little boy loved to play with Takashi&Li's daughter, their dog and two cats, he definitely had the best time! The only down side for us was the noise, this is a shared house so roomates could come back late, cook and shower past midnight..just don't forget your earplugs if you are sleep sensitive! Thank you for everything! We would definitely recommend this house for anybody wanted to discover Tokyo and have a glance at Japanese way of life in the big city!

We had a pleasure stay at T&L. The House is awesome, clean and cosy. The roof with the bathtub is incredible! Communication is very good, Li speaks very good english and is a funny and nice person. Always helpful. We've been here with our 21 month year old daughter. T&L's daughter shared all of her toys and our daughter enjoyed it a lot. One evening we were invited to a dinner with there friends and spend a nice evening together. Thanks for the nice time, we'll come back next time.

Where to start.... this place is A.MA.ZING. Wonderful space, amazing hosts, great area...truly felt like a second home and we could have stayed here forever.  If this is place is free don't even think about it....JUST BOOK! In fact, find when it is available and plan your trip around those dates....you will not be disappointed.
Ravi d'avoir connu Takashi et Li et leur fille! Ils sont des hotes d'exception! Je recommande
房东会流利的中文，我们每天早上出门前都会问她一些关于行程的问题。她还会向我们推荐一些好吃好玩的地方。记忆最深刻的是那碗多汁的台湾卤肉饭。真的是很好吃。最后一天我们晚上的飞机，我行李箱存放在JR站点非常方便。住了一周沟通非常愉快。

I loved staying here so much. I never met takashi, but li and her daughter and pets are all extremely sweet and accommodating. I was only there for a day, but they made me feel like family. Li provides everything you could possibly need, such as shampoo and all of your toiletry needs. I will definitely stay here when I return to Japan. My time in Japan wouldn't have been the same had I stayed somewhere else. Thank you li for being so nice and accommodating even though I wasn't around much :-)

If you're like me, you are attracted to this listing because it comes with an experience, and I will confirm that it is lovely. Li is a lively spirit full of interesting stories and bursting with creativity. Takashi was much more reserved, but always kind and respectful. Their daughter, Eri (pronounced Elly) is so much fun and never shied away from conversation. Their dogs, Joy and Meruru (sp?) were adorable. This family makes the this listing a home, not a hotel. The only negative thing worth mentioning is the uphill walk when you first arrive with heavy bags, but like hiking up a mountain to a lake vista, the struggle was worth it. The location is quick walk from Togoshi Ginza short ride to Shibuya/Odaiba. Li will tell you the best places to eat nearby, or if you're lucky, let you join them for a meal. I would most definitely stay in their home again, and I hope I get the chance to.

Takashiさん、Liさん2泊3日の間もてなして頂きありがとうございました。
今回、Miraieというシェアハウスのコンセプトを将来の自分の家庭に取り入れたくてお邪魔しました。
Liさんのホスピタリティと、Takashiさんの様々なお気遣いによって快適に過ごすことができました。
また、お子さんやシェアメイトさんとの交流だったり、ワンちゃん2匹とネコちゃん2匹との交流で、終始楽しく時間を過ごすことができました。
観光先の宿泊場所という目的だけでなく、未来の家のあり方を体験する為に宿泊するのもオススメです。

路很好找, 雖然屋子在寧靜的小區, 但離JR車站一點也不遠.  附近有Lawson, 也很方便.  原本還擔心短期間民宿會不夠時間融入生活, 但Li 的熱情在開門的一刻就立即感受得到, 讓我跟友人本來十分緊張的心情立刻就放鬆下來, 瞬間融入了miraie的家中, 讓我知道原來短期民宿也能如此輕鬆..  屋子裡有兩條可愛乖巧的小狗, 還有兩匹漂亮美麗的貓貓, 為家裡生活增添了不少動感.   此次逗留較短, 希望下次能住長一點!

We where so happy to stay at takashi&li's place. There are so cool and intresting people.
If you travel alone or as couple-
Go meet and live there!
The area is .
The room is a bit small but defenetly enough. And buttum line- its all about the , and they are more then awsome.
Go stay at there place!
很喜欢……他们家喜欢的好多好多，丽，妹妹，joy，milulu～很美好的回忆……和他们在一起特别快乐～嘿嘿。期待你们早点来成都玩哟^ - ^

Amazing house in a great location. My room was adorable and I felt very comfortable there, could have easily stayed way longer! Easy walking distance to train station to get into the city. Quiet street and neighbourhood but still so central! Thank you takashi and li!
Best Airbnb experience EVER! This is what Airbnb is about - meeting new people and becoming a part of their home. Miru the dog is really cute. Joy is not so cute but he’s smart 😏 Highly recommend!

What a lovely stay! Takashi & Li (and their daughter and two puppies) were wonderful hosts. I felt so welcomed, like staying with a friend. Close to the metro and Jr for easy traveling around Tokyo. Great shops and restaurants nearby.
I cannot recommend this stay enough. Will be back
I had a great time and felt like part of the family. The location is in a relaxed residential neighborhood. Osaki station, which gets you to all points of interest, is just a 5 to 10 min walk away.
木构造的房子对我来说很有魅力，还有国际化的家庭我也觉得很有趣
Great place!!! Warm and homey feel in a really great location for exploring the city! The whole family was wonderful and I guarantee you will have a pleasant stay if you choose this home!!! :)
위치최고! 도심보다 한적하고 정말 집다운 집이었어요! 요리잘하는 호스트만나서 살찌고 갑니다! 강아지 두마리도 귀엽고 이 집 딸도 너무 귀여워요! ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 짧게 머문다면 이보다 좋은숙소가 없습니다 따뜻한물도 잘나와요(수압 빵빵) 정말 잘 지내다가 갑니다 ㅋㅋ 내년에 이사가신다는데 그전에 어서 가세요!!

Very good stay in the house of Takashi & Li, a few minutes walk from Osaki station, ideal to reach all the important places of Tokyo.
Very clean and nice house, very helpful hosts, adorable little girl. I simply regret the untimely barking of the two cute dogs.

It was my 4th time staying at their place and its still the best airbnb place i've ever stayed. We became good friends and i love how they take care of me everytime during my stay in Tokyo. Will never forget my last night there as we had dinner together and just enjoy the night. Wish i could stay longer because it felt like home and not a random airbnb place i just chose. Hopefully i could visit again! :)
女主人人很好，很热情:)

Truly one of the best airbnb experiences we've ever had. The home was amazingly cosy, with a cute daughter and two cute dogs to boot. The host also treated us like family. We will definitely be back to stay here the next time we come back to Tokyo!
Third time staying here. Best Airbnb hands down. If you can stay here, book it.
非常热情好客的家庭，愉快的两日借宿，实在是不想离开^^姐姐实在是太有亲和力了，真是很像自己家的大姐姐，给我们准备早饭，帮忙收衣服，了解我们的喜好来推荐游玩地点之类，超级不好意思的！两只狗狗很粘人&活泼，两只猫猫也很亲人，小动物和小朋友都可爱极了，家里装饰也非常温馨漂亮、又很有开放的艺术氛围，是很理想的生活环境。有机会希望再会^^

It was my first time to Japan and it was really convenient to choose a place where I can speak English and mandarin. They were more than just a airbnb I felt like I was part of the family they are the sweetest bunch and I got so many local tips and their home isn’t too far from the station really easy to memorize the route to their house. I was mostly impressed on how the hospitality is the most outstanding where it’s just always communication I really recommend coming to this stay if you want to communicate well and have a great conversation on how your day has been in japan. If I would come back to japan I would love to stay with them again. I hope to see them soon~

Der Aufenthalt in dieser Villa Kunterbunt war einfach super. Das Haus ist voller Leben und man fühlt sich wie zu Hause.
Der in 5 Gehminuten zu erreichende Bahnhof Osaki liegt zwar nicht zentral, eignet sich aber dennoch sehr gut um alle wesentlichen Attraktionen der Stadt gut zu erreichen.

家裡的貓貓狗狗都超級可愛～
房東人也非常好！
因為我行李很多很不好意思！
民宿附近有很多野貓～～很開心
民宿漂亮舒服～～
很棒的體驗

I would 100% stay here again!! Takashi and Li are some of the best hosts I've interacted with via Airbnb. They are so friendly and also very creative. Their home has everything you need and is comfortable. It's also about a 7 min walk from the subway station as well as the bus that goes directly to and from the airport. Everything in the Airbnb was clean and tidy, too. Overall, I definitely recommend this stay!

Here you can feel like a part of the local family. Most importantly, it's a shared house with total privacy that's not impersonal like many new 'AirBnB-as-investment' types of deals where you would never meet the owner, or find a personal connection. Loved it.
Li is a very friendly and nice host. The place is really unique. I had a great time staying at their place.
シェアハウスの真の良さがここには全てある。次はもっと長く滞在します！
A wonderful stay at a cosy family home in a nice residential neighborhood with good connections. Would recommend!
This place is absolutely wonderful. They make you feel like you are part of the family! Grab this place if you can!

This is our first trip to Japan and staying at Takashi&Li's place was great! It was literally a 8-10 minute walk from Osaki station and in a very convenient location with a local feel. It was a very unique home that they built and Ellie their daughter was so cute! Her daughter spoke 3 languages and we were so surprised how smart she was. We didn't see Takashi much but he was a very nice guy and even bought us a breakfast sandwich one morning! Li speaks Japanese, fluent English and Chinese which made it even better. Our only thing is that the home has little sound insulation and even the smallest sound can be projected into your room. Just in case you were a light sleeper. Otherwise, we would certainly stay here again if we ever come back and recommend their place to others!

What a great 3 days! Aside from the fact that Takashi and Li have built a unique, beautiful home, situated in a great and well-connected area, we were bowled over by the warm welcome and generous hosting we received at Miraie. We enjoyed a very comfortable stay, great conversation and lots of top tips for exploring Tokyo and the local streets - we would wholeheartedly recommend staying with Takashi and Li! Thanks so much guys! X
The home and hosts exceeded our expectations.  Wonderful place.  Incredible immersion.  Thank you.

Excellente adresse ! Li et Takashi sont d'une extrême gentillesse !
La propreté est irréprochable !
Nous recommandons vivement !

If you're not a dog person this place might not be for you, but apart from that everything was amazing - we truly felt like a part of the family during our stay. Li's hospitality far exceeded any expectations. We didn't use the rooftop bath, but it was there if we needed it. The premises were clean and surprisingly spacious, and we were provided with both the essentials for our stay and advice for our journey. Would love to visit again!
Des hôtes exceptionnels dans une petite maison d'un quartier calme. Bon point de chute pour visiter tokyo.
Best Airbnb experience so far. We want to live here.

We had a lovely stay with Takashi and Li. Fantastic communication all the way through and very accommodating. Li took the time to show us round whilst walking their yappy dogs and gave us some great recommendations on places to eat. Only 10min walk from Osaki station (which you can get to by bus from the airport, takes about an hour) which was perfect as we had massive bags to carry. Bedding was confortable and room cosy.

What an amazing stay.
She was very helpful and did everything to make us feel at home.
Our son really loved this family and didn't wanted to leave!
Thanks again

The place is amazing. Takashi and Li are great hosts, taking the time to help me get used to the place, as well as helping me know the area around the place. The space of the Airbnb is amazing, and I would recommend it for anyone looking for something cosy and different.
They are the best!❤️such an amazing space and beautiful family
大崎駅から徒歩7分と都心にあります。家は木の温もりのある素敵なログハウスで、都心にいることを忘れる空間です。また、戸越銀座商店街というローカルスポットも徒歩圏内です。わんちゃんねこちゃんと幸せな家族に囲まれて幸せな時間を過ごせました。
房東人非常好，寵物非常可愛，位置也很好找，推薦給在品川附近或想從品川出發旅行的朋友～

The house was beautiful and the hostess was so nice! Everything was perfect. Their two dogs were so cute.
Right next to Osaki station in a quiet neighborhood!

Takashi and Li’s home was just as lovely as we expected. Li goes the extra mile to make you feel welcome and provide local tips on where to eat and how to get around.
The space was perfect for the two of us, beautifully designed and very clean.
Shinagawa is a great location - easy to access central Tokyo thanks to the public transport nearby.

Greatest family we've ever met!
We stayed here only 2 nights but felt "just like real family" with them.
They are really friendly and welcomed us.
素晴らしいホストでした。まるで家族のようにもてなしてくださり、たった３日間でしたが、とても楽しい時間を過ごすことができました。到着の数日前にアクセス情報を事前にくださったり、連絡も早くて助かりました。娘さんも犬も猫も、私たちの息子と遊んでくれて、息子はとても楽しかったようです。本当にいい旅行になりました。また会いたいです！
A wonderful welcoming and animal friendly family. Very nice accommodation and the location is quite central as well. We would always book again.
Nice couple run this place. Extremely helpful and kind. Room very simple in the basement but ok.

We loved everything about our stay at Takashi & Li’s home. The place is exactly as it is shown in the pictures - a fun, clean, comfortable and warm space. The proximity to Osaki Station made it quick and easy to get around Tokyo. The walk to the station took about 10 minutes.
Li was incredibly helpful in every possible way, yet gave us as much space as we needed.
We fully recommend their place, and would stay there again.
Thanks Li!!
Such a great place to stay!
房东很热情，中文沟通完全无障碍！而且非常热情！房子很温馨温暖，就是住的房间有一点点小，但是不影响居住！居住周围设施很完善，推荐入住哈！

This was our first shared house experience and it was wonderful! The house is kept extremely clean and exactly as pictured. We enjoyed spending some time with Li and her daughter - and also Li was nice enough to walk us to a nearby ramen shop on the first night we arrived.  Definitely recommend!

한마디로 너무 만족스러웠어요!
1.소통이 잘 되었어요! 호스트분이 영어와 일본어 모두 가능하셔서 의사소통 문제도 없었구요! 메시지에 응답도 빨랐어요. 그리고 친화력까지 갑!
2.편안한 분위기에서 힐링 가능해요! 마치 가까운 친척집에 놀러온듯한 느낌을 많이 받았어요. 게다가 개냥이 2마리와 강아지 2마리가 있어서 그것도 너무 좋았습니다.
3.청결도 굿! 완전 깔끔합니다.
4.방 크기는 문의해보셔야 할 듯 해요. 저는 두명이서 썼는데 방이 하나밖에 안 남아서 생각보다 좁긴했어요.
저는 다음에 일본갈 때 또 이곳으로 올 겁니다^^

The place is really unique and awesome! It can be called not just shared, but vertical living, since there are several floors, but it is pretty open, so you can chat while someone is upstairs and you are in the kitchen. I met Li, Yuka and Eri, they are super nice. Li is the mom and landlord. We cooked Niuroumian together, and talked a lot about her very inspiring experiences from living in Japan, Taiwan and the USA. We picked up her daughter Eri from school; she can play the guitar like a virtuoso ;) Yuka used to study in Berlin for a bit and could speak some German - very impressed! There is a definite artist/creative touch, and for the 3 year celebration, the flat was decorated. There are 2 cats and 2 dogs waiting for you to play with :]

What a wonderful stay! We really enjoyed staying at this colorful and open house, Li is the nicest host and made us feel at home the moment we arrived. The location is great - A very quiet neighborhood with everything you need and public transportation near by. We hope to come back one day!!

We had a fantastic stay in this great house full of life!
Li was a great host and she was present for us all the time. We had the chance to try her favorite miso soup 🍜 - it was a perfect breakfast!
This house is well located and it is easy to access public transport (10min walk from the station).
The room we had was clean and the bed very comfortable! (A must when travelling!).
We definitely recommend anyone to visit Li’s place!

We felt very welcomed to japan thanks to Li and her daughter! We also felt very inspired by their unconventional way of living. The home is a good escape from the buzzling city, and although a bit far from the nearest station, it is very well connected (JR line). We enjoyed our stay!
Family was amazing and so welcoming. Gave great directions and gave great recommendations.
Everything is wonderful: house, location, Li and her family. We will stay again at Miraie when coming back to Japan.

We really enjoyed our stay with Li! After staying in hotels for the first part of our Tokyo trip, it was refreshing to be welcomed into their family home. Li is a fun, generous, and experienced host, and made us feel right at home while giving us space to do our thing. She directed us to a very local, neighborhood shopping street a short walk from her house, with great supermarkets, bakeries, cafes, and delicious street food, and no other tourists in sight. If you're looking for a local experience, Li's home is a treasure. Thank you, Li! We look forward to seeing you again someday.
收藏了很久这次东京之行终于订到了，真的是一间梦想之家，简单舒适处处用心，充满温馨有趣的成长记忆，谢谢Li这个周末的照顾：）回到家还很想念「未来之家」的气息，真希望有机会再住一阵子。

人柄よく、駅からもそう遠くはない良い場所です。
人なっこい犬と猫がいるので、好きな人は楽しく過ごせると思います。

Cosy house, very nice people, cats and dogs :-)
Perfect stay!

The stay at Miraie was wonderful. Li is a warmful host and all the family are very nice.
You feel like going back home when coming back at night as if you were in your family.
Many discussion subjects.
In fact, I would have like to spend a few more time with them because there was a neighborghood party the day I left. That is a great way to be in contact with a real japanese neighborghood, compared to a cold classic hotel.
By the way : excellent location : 5' foot to Yamanote line, which is a wonderful line in Tokyo.
Amazing place and great hospitality!
超级温馨可爱的家！房东非常热情！希望下次还可以住～

５歳の息子と２人で宿泊しました。
娘さんのパーティーに飛び入り参加させていただいて楽しい時間を過ごしました。奥様の手づくりパスタやケーキもごちそうになりました。
おうちはユニークな造りになっていて、部屋中にアートが散りばめられた素敵な空間です。かわいいワンちゃん２匹と猫ちゃん２匹もいます。こまめに掃除されていて清潔でした。お願いしなくても洗面台に子ども用に踏み台を準備してくださったりと心配りもうれしかったです。
お世話になりました。

楽しい滞在でした。
のび太君😸可愛すぎ💕
Liさん親子はもちろん、ワンちゃんネコちゃん、屋上のお風呂もサイコーでした。
機会があればまた滞在したいです。
Very friendly share house. Li is a very lively and hospitable person, the other share mates and her daughter are all very nice, and the 2 dogs and cats are very cute! Great location and value👍

I stayed at Miraie for 3/4 weeks while looking for an apartment in Tokyo. Li was a wonderful host and will do everything she can to make you feel welcome!
Her home is in a quiet area in Nishishinagawa, which is very convenient for getting into central Tokyo through Shibuya. There’s a Lawson just around the corner and plenty of local shops and restaurants in Togoshi-Ginza (15 minute walk).
Miraie is a sharehouse with two other tenants, which you share a bathroom and toilet with. All the shared spaces are kept very clean and soaps/towels are provided if you don’t have your own. Li lives with her daughter, two dogs and two cats so it’s very much a family home with plenty of music, art and conversation.
You must try the rooftop bath on a warm evening, it’s amazing!
とても素敵な滞在時間になりました。
Incredible hosts, offered to help me with anything I would do. Great company which will never let you get bored, and two incredible people who will listen to how your day making you feel at home.

Li is very friendly and passionate. Very helpful to suggest places to visit and foods to eat. Really feels at home!
The location is perfect, considering the transport and safety. It's located at the residentail area and within 10 mins walk to the Osaki station, where you don't need any transfer to go to Shibuya(澀谷), Shinjuku(新宿), Harajuku(原宿) Tokyo(東京車站) and Ikebukuro(池袋).
Also, if u wanna visit some spots outside the city. A direct train to Yokohama(橫濱), Enoshima(江之島), Zushi(逗子), and Kawagoe(川越) are all available at Osaki.
Although the room size is not really big, but everything Li offers is definitely the top choice when anyone visits Tokyo! Highly recoomended!

Could not have dreamt of a better place to stay! Li was so kind and welcoming and made me feel right at home. The house, and people inside, had so much warmth and character. The location itself is perfect for Tokyo too- a cute and quiet neighborhood but less than 10 min walk from Osaki station and from there you can get anywhere. Would recommend and I will be back 😁 - Thank you Li & Ellie ❤️

It was like stars aligned for me to decide to stay in Li‘s wonderful interesting house. She’s very friendly, sympathetic and warm-hearted strong lady who I personally learned many life lessons.
She often gave valuable info about the worthy-visit places in Tokyo with fluent English. It was very helpful for the tourist with lots of time.
Li takes care about the hygiene so the house will be cleaned daily.
Her daughter Eli is talented little one with versatility. I wish bright future for her. I’m sure with right guidance she will achieve it.
Housemates Yuka San is very kind and with hospitality to guest. Cheerful voice and stories of her easily make one’s day. She’s good at English so it was so funny to chat with her.
Neighbor Ojawa San is a bookshop owner with comfortable air, so also enjoyed hanging out with him very much. Thanks for the coffee!
Neighbor Yu San is a passionate artist with great sense and eyes I could appreciate some of his artworks.

Li was an amazing host that ultimately turned into a friendship. She’d always go the extra mile to make sure I was comfortable and happily helped whenever I needed assistance with anything. She'd offer some of her home-cooked meals and coffee/tea when it was freezing. Music is a big part of the household, so it was a nice experience sharing the genres we enjoyed.
Location - The nearest station (Osaki) is about a 10-15 minute walk. It’s in a residential area, so it’s very peaceful and quiet.
If you’re a solo traveler that wants a homey environment after a day of exploring, I 100% recommend Li’s place. It really did feel like a second home. Next time I’m in Japan, I hope I’ll be able to stay with Li again. Thank you for everything again!

I visited this place for New Years Eve/New Year and everywhere was closed when I arrived. The host went above and beyond for me; cooked me a welcome dinner and even took me out on New year day. Staying here was so refreshing, the host is so welcoming. It felt like I was having a sleepover with a childhood friend. And the space itself is so well designed and modern. I felt really at home my entire stay, as a bonus this place is very accessible by train to all major areas for tourists. I highly recommend staying here if you are considering it. 10/10

Honestly had such a lovely time staying here! I forgot it was an air BnB 😂 Li made me feel right at home 😁🏠
So sad I've left and will definitely be rebooking in the future. The location is fantastic, super close to Osaki station which connects you to Shinjuku, Shibuya, Ebisu, Ueno, etc PLUS Shinagawa station is 1 stop away if you want to get the 🚅 to Kyoto/Osaka/Nara areas (which I did)
all the amenities you need are there. Clean bathroom, washing machine outside the bedroom, own section in the fridge to store your groceries...As an animal lover it was so nice to come home and have the kitties and dogs there waiting for lots of attention 🥰 plus being creative, doing some drawing, painting is encouraged 🎨
Li is super lovely, helpful and caring. Thank you again for making my stay in Tokyo so fun, unique and unforgettable!! ☀️ if this place is not available next year, I will be booking her new place (Lab8) down the road as it's looking amazing!! ⭐ 😁
Can’t say enough great things about this place! So conveniently walkable to multiple train stations that go anywhere. Li is so helpful and friendly, and I had an absolutely amazing time staying here.
Li was a wonderful host. Thank you so much!

The host as well as the living environment are both great and very welcoming. She was very friendly, knowledgeable and always had recommendations for events or places to visit around the area. Regarding the location of the Airbnb, the area was very good because it provided fast access to major tourist destinations and restaurants, whilst remaining calm and quiet.
Overall, i had a fantastic time there and would truly recommend staying either here or in the hosts other Airbnbs, as it is quite the unique experience!

Li is such a welcoming and cheerful host. She runs a clean and welcoming bnb that is the perfect place for a long term stay. I was here for 6 weeks and it felt like I was part of the socially well adapted and loving family I've always wanted. Li actually hosts several places in different areas, so be sure to check out the other ones as well!

Li est une bonne personne, gentille, avec qui on peut bien communiquer mais malheureusement le logement (salle de bain, toilettes et chambre) étaient très sales, impossible de rester, je ne sais pas comment les locataires précédents ont fait.
Thank you Li for a lovely stay.

Li's home is an aesthetic of beautiful design and warmth that matches her personality and needs. Architecturally this ticks off so much that I think of Japanese design and materiality.
The bed was so comfortable and firm and the room was great! Location and walkability to surrounding areas is insanely convenient and will definitely come back! I already miss the warmth and presence of company in this home. Privacy is respected during my stay as I was doing some remote work.

We just feel so lucky that we got to stay at Ryan's apartment! When we arrived it was raining.. Ryan was waiting for us at the station and he picked us up to the his apartment! When we left Tokio it was raining also... and Ryan picked us up to the station again! The location of the apartment was great; the neighborhood was extremely quiet and safe and it was only a few steps from the subway station from which going to the heart of Tokyo. The apartment itself was super clean and well stocked. The place was cozy and had everything we needed ( the washing machine was very useful!). Ryan's place was perfect for us!
Overall I would definitely recommend Ryan and his apartment to any traveler looking for a clean, comfortable and well stocked space in Tokyo.

Ryan is a very hospitable host. He always make sure that we have a good stay at the apartment. The apartment is really convenient, clean and organized. We felt that we were staying at home not just some empty apartment. Thank you very much Ryan. We really appreciate your hospitality and please come to our country (^_^)!!

Ryan has been a really great host! He's a very kind and correct guy, and was available at every time to answer our needs, and he took us home from the subway station, by car. The house is extremely nice and located in a very kindly neighbourhood, near to different subway stations and every facility you will need. I absolutely recommend Ryan and his house! Thanks mate!

Ryan really was the perfect host- extremely kind, helpful and hospitable. He made us feel very welcome from the moment we arrived- after being driven to the apartment in his car, we were greeted with delicious local cakes and tea. The apartment itself was spotlessly clean, and fully equipped with everything we might need. We would definitely stay at Ryan's place again and highly recommend it to others!

Everything was perfect , Ryan is a welcoming and friendly host. , he doesn't hesitate to spend his free time for me in tokyo.
The apartment is very clean , good location in tokyo and has a quiet neighbourhood .
To finish , thanks you again ryan for all that , i hope to see you soon !

Ryan was a brilliant host. Very kind and friendly. He has picked us ip from the station and took us back. He has answered every query and was very helpful. His flat is well presented and cosy. Location is also very good, in a quiet neighbourhood  and close to Shibuya by train. I would recommend him any time!  Ryan, thank you very much, it was great!

L'appartement de Ryan est super. Il y a tout ce qu'il faut pour se faire à manger et il est très propre. (Ordinateur, machine à laver, pocket Wifi...même quelques ramen au cas ou nous aurions faim à notre arrivé)
Très bien placé dans un quartier très calme avec tout ce qu'il faut à moins de 5mn. Idéalement situé au calme et à juste quelques stations de l'animation de Shibuya :)
Idéal pour visiter Tokyo.
L'accueil de Ryan est parfait! Il est très sympa et nous a donné pleins de conseils et de plus il est très serviable. Un vrai bonheur.
Vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermés, vous ne serez pas déçu! :)

Ryan is a grestest and friendliest host ever. He had gave us warm welcome and comfy place in Japan.

The place was very clean and quiet. Ryan gave us everything needed for tourist; kitchen, bed, refrigerator, hair dryer and pocket wifi. Perfect location that not too far from Subway, only 10-15 mins which you can see the Japanese lifestyle while walking there. The apartment was located near supermarkets and some good restaurants so you can easily find something to eat at night.

If you want somewhere to stay in tokyo, Ryan place would be the reccommended choice :)) and absolutely we will choose Ryan place when we go back to Japan again.
The place was good and Ryan was a very helpful host. I would be happy to stay at one of his properties again in the future.

Ryan was a really great host. He was always ready to answer any question about getting around tokyo and places to visit. His place was cosy and very comfortable for the two of us staying. It was a great place with everything we needed for our stay. He gave us a pocket wi -fi to use and public wi-fi account to use when away from our accomodation. Setagaya was a quiet place place to head back after visiting the busy areas around tokyo. Being our first time in japan, ryan made us feel welcome and made our stay a very enjoyable.

Ryan is a very friendly and attentive host who answers all your queries and provides everything you need and request for. He offered to send us to the apartment on the first day with his Mini Cooper and having traveled overnight on bus from Osaka to Tokyo, it was definitely a comfortable ride and furthermore, he prepared green tea and some snacks when we stepped into the apartment. Although the apartment is small, it is very cosy for the two of us. All in all, it was a great stay with Ryan as our host!

Ryan very kindly offered to pick us up at the station with his car, which was appreciated, because we had a little trouble with orientation in Tokyo ( few street names etc).
Then he took 15 mn of his time to have a tea, and explain what we could do. I wish i had stayed longer in his apartement, that was well organized and very well equipped.
It's not far from Shibuya, and conveniences stores are nearby.
and Ryan is really kind and helpful!

The accommodation is everything that we (my son, Steven, and I) have been looking for in a backpacker's. It is prettily, and neatly, and also functionally put together that I could not stop taking picture of them all, at first.
And we both still think that we were very fortunate to have Ryan N. as our first guest house host, in Japan. Since he had provided many helpful info and welcoming offers before and during our stay for seeing and touring Japan. Moreover, that friendly and helpful helps continue up until the day that he was taking and seeing us off at the train station at the very early morning hour, it was very early in the morning even for the people in this "Land of the Rising Sun" Japan, because we wanted to make the gorgeous Gorge tour in the same day. And we made it while snacking the pleasantly surprised snacks that Ryan again has made it available for as as an seeing us off gift. Ah! he must also be very busy restocking all snacks that he has made them available for his next guest. Btw, thank Ryan for those delious snacks!
With Japan extensive transportation network and amazing Shinkansen, bullet train, we were able to see and tour Japan's many famous sightseeing sites, that are in the vicinity of Tokyo and also loved the feeling of coing back to our backpacker home base after our long, long day of exploring/sightseeing.
We (my son and I) both must have been meeting one of Japan future biggest backpacking base community's owner who are very busily and happily running/building a fast growing backpacker community.
Agian, thank Ryan, itt has been giving us a great and fresh start of our Japan's tour!
Regards,
Amy & Steven Truong

Ryan is very kind and helped us get settled in and  discover the Setagaya area! The place and comfortable. It is located in a quiet area which makes a nice change from the bustling streets of central Tokyo. We had a great time thanks to Ryan and his place!

Ryan's place was just awesome. He was a great host , who offered to send us to certain places that he was going to and even loaned us his bikes! ^^ thanks to Ryan, it's been a great stay in Tokyo. The residence was easily accessible to popular areas such as shibuya, shinjuku and tsukiji fish market. Thanks for the stay Ryan!
Ryan的公寓非常舒適，所有的東西幾乎應有盡有，甚至連牙刷也提供給需要的人。Ryan在我到達的當天晚上還特地到車站接送我，因為飛機誤點，他等了我很久。接送我到達公寓後還跟我聊了一下天，準備了小饅頭和茶水，真的相當體貼。Check out當天也是接送我到車站。總而言之，我推薦Ryan的房子，個人獨間，衛浴廚房都有，也很乾淨，適合獨自或家族自由行的人。如果電視能再大一點就完美了。我給95分。

I stayed at Ryan's place for a night with my friend. The room was spacious, extremely clean, neat and comfortable. Ryan had provided a lot of assistance such as a free home wifi including an additional pocket wifi where I could take it outside while sight-seeing. There were two bikes available downstairs that we could use to go buy some groceries around the station (near the station there were many shops). In the room there were brochures about Tokyo's places of attraction and house's manual in English (my friend is from Australia so it was extremely convenient for her)

Ryan's hospitality was excellent. He replies messages very promptly and he also lives really close to this place that he was always available for help. I would definitely come back again.

My friend and I wanted to visit Tokyo on a budget, so we searched around and eventually found this little place. We contacted Ryan, booked the dates we wanted, and next thing we knew we were on our way.

As a location, this is well-placed. The train journey (about half an hour to an hour on most days) was very reasonable, and there is a convenience store just around the corner where you can get all your food item needs on short notice. The immediate local area isn't very exciting, but that isn't a bad thing - after a long day in the city, it was nice to return to somewhere a little more peaceful. Meanwhile, the room itself is well-sized with everything you'll need, including minor essentials such as washing up liquid, cutlery and towels. Everything was clean and in good working condition with instructions for use. It's absolutely perfect if you're looking for a crash pad at the end of a busy day.

However, what really made this place stand out for me was how friendly and helpful Ryan was. He came to collect us from the station, offered to help us in any way he could, and was the most attentive host I've ever known. For example, when we asked if there was a way to plug up the sink, the very next day we found a washing up tub on the door handle! He left us to our own devices, but still checked in regularly to make sure that we were okay. He even offered to take our bags to us on the last day out so we wouldn't have to take them round with us. You'll get better treatment here than you would at most hotels.

If I ever make a visit to Tokyo again (and I hope that I do), I would absolutely choose to stay here again, and in fact this would probably be the first place I'd look. Thank you, Ryan, for letting us stay in your lovely apartment!

Ryan is a very nice and friendly host. He drove us from the nearby station to his house and recommended us several places to go. The apartment is very comfortable, with everything that we need. Ryan also offered to drive us back to the station when we are leaving. Very pleased with Ryan's hospitality.

From the moment I stepped foot in Japan, Ryan was a very accommodating host. He had business at the airport that day, so he offered to pick me up from the airport and take me to the apartment. Once there, the great hospitality continued. He showed me how to use the various items in the apartment, left a few snacks and drinks in the refrigerator, and had a nice reference booklet containing further information on the place. He even left a bunch of travel guides for assistance in figuring out what to do while there; I already had a packed schedule, but it was still a very nice touch.

The room was just about everything I expected; it was plenty big enough for one person, and Ryan made sure all the necessities were at my fingertips. The neighborhood was very residential and peaceful, perfect for just relaxing after my very busy days. The closest convenience store was just a bit more than a block away, and he provided a bike for even easier travel to and from anything in the neighborhood. The closest station was about a 10-minute walk away, which at times seemed like a lot but only because of the oppressive heat at the time; it really wasn't a long distance. Speaking of the heat, the air conditioner was more than sufficient in dealing with the high temperatures.

The pocket Wi-Fi device was a lifesaver. I could have Google Maps take me to my various destinations, and even talk to relatives back home via Skype, without paying a ton to rent a phone or get a Japanese SIM card. The connection wasn't always intact, but it worked a lot more often than not. You just need an external battery to recharge it if you plan on using it for an entire day without returning to the apartment.

Overall, I was highly satisfied with my stay at Ryan's apartment and would certainly stay again if given the chance. There wasn't anything in particular I needed to ask of Ryan, because he clearly thought ahead of time and provided almost everything I'd need. That is the sign of a extremely accommodating host.

Квартира расположена недалеко от Сибуя. Цена соответствует качеству. Это было очень удобно. Тихий район. Продуктовый магазин и аптека в доступной близости. Квартира чистая. Для троих  гостей  все-таки тесная.  Райан нас встретил возле метро на машине и помог с багажом и проводил рано утром в 5 часов довез нас до метро. Спасибо ему большое за это. Райан  позитивный отзывчивый человек.

Setagaya is a really quiet and charming area at only 4 station of Shibuya. The station is at only 10 mn by walking. There are also many convenient store nearby like 7/11, Family mart and Lawsons.

The appartment was clean, with nice tatamis that made the experience authentic, quiet and equiped with everything you need to feel like home. The wifi portable device provided was also very handy during our Tokyo trips.

Ryan is a wonderful host, very helpful and always kind. He came to pick us up at the station the evening we arrived, found for us the only place we could find the special sake we've been looking for and even drove us there. We spent some really nice and special moments with him and we are really glad that we met someone like him.

If I had to go back to Tokyo, I would definitely stay there again.

Chers amis français, si vous hésitez pour une location vous permettant à la fois de visiter Tokyo et de vous reposer le soir loin de son agitation, je vous recommande vivement cette location.
Vous serez accueillis avec toute la gentillesse et la prévenance dignes de l'image d'Epinal qu'on donne à l'accueil japonais.

I really loved and enjoyed my stay here! Ryan is an amazing host! He made me feel welcomed, and was always willing and ready to help! I have told all my friends if they are ever in Japan visiting to not go to a hotel, but to visit Ryan's apartment and book it, because it is way better service than any hotel, and also, he is a really nice guy! Everything you need, you have in the apartment! you get Tv, Wifi, bathroom, and sink, kitchent and washer ! saves money from purchasing food outside a lot especially if you are craving something home cooked. I really have to say, next time i am visiting again i am really going to book here! Best service and he is an amazing person! always ready and willing to give a helping hand!

Chambre très simple à bon prix pour ceux qui sont de passage. L’endroit est un peu caché et l’hôte m’a offert de bonnes directives afin de le trouver. Les informations étaient claires. J’ai aimé la flexibilité et l’autonomie de l’arrivée et du départ.  Un bon emplacement, tout juste deux minutes de la station de métro.
좋았어요!

房東和房客都很友善。
環境乾淨整潔，
動線也很分明。
