除了隔音有些一般之外都很好  房东很好帮忙拿了很重的行李  距离电车站3-5分钟路程很方便
I would stay here again.
非常好！下次来东京还会考虑住这里滴
とてもやさしいホストです！
房屋和各个区域都很整洁干净，性价比很高，周围街区也是安静的居民区，离 JR 车站很近。入住时也受到了热情友好的接待，是我愿意推荐给他人的民宿。
very clean and great location 谢谢！
对于需要房间睡觉的人来说是个不错的选择.而且也提供简单的生活用品与洗澡设备.性价比高.
Great place
Très bon séjours.

급하게 잡은 숙소였는데 가격 대비 완전히 만족입니다
쉐어하우스 형태라 화장실 욕실 쓰는 건 조금 번거로움이 있으나 금방 익숙해졌어요 ((기숙사 생황 하는 느낌))
저 말고도 다른 숙박객분들이 많았는데 씻는 시간이 겹쳐서 기다리거나 한 적은 없습니다
저 말고도 다른 숙박객분들이 많았는데 씻는 시간이 겹쳐서 기다리거나 한적은 없습니다
방도 깨끗하고 넓어서 지내는 동안 편했습니다 (캐리어 놓고 움직일 공간 충분)
다만 방이 좀 추워서 난방을 틀어두니 조금 건조했어요 (젖은 수건 걸어두고 지냄)
책상도 있도 옷걸이도 있고 탁상 거울도 있어서 너무 편하게 생활했어요
감사합니다
Train station is pretty accessible and the place is clean and silent neighborhood
很好
干净卫生舒适，房东人很好，还邀请我一起吃午饭，可惜时间比较紧没来得及，下次再来叨扰！
太棒的bnb~已推薦給想要來東京旅遊的朋友

留学生来东京的第一天过渡找到了这家房子，房间足够宽敞，干净整洁。门口黑板上的文字也很温馨。最重要的是房东姐姐人实在太yasashii了，都很晚了听我说没吃饭就带我去了池袋吃饭，独自在异国他乡的第一晚感受到如此善意，真的特别感激！
A really wonderful experience.
Sino is very responsive and helpful! I really enjoyed my time and glad I was able to find a place to stay in a wonderful environment. 😊

located close to the train station, this airbnb is the perfect accomodation for when you want to explore tokyo without breaking the bank. the host is very lovely and responsive too, overall great stay. thank you!
The host is really responsive and friendly. The place is nice with necessities included.
离地铁站很近
很好
Quick response and affordable
整體是明亮整潔的，但此房源隔音似乎不太好，而且晚上附近沒有什麼餐廳，優點是交通比較方便，就在火車站旁邊。
ご返信もすぐにいただけて安心して宿泊することができました！

Ryan was super awesome! He picked us up from the station in his car and drove us to the flat. Also took us to his favourite local restaurant and helped us with the Japanese-only menu! The flat was just as pictured, super clean with towels and all the utilities you'd need. We grew quite attached to the flat!

Ryan was already awesome before we met him as he helped us get tickets to Studio Ghibli in advance. He also picked us up from the train station and drove us to the apartment, which was a great relief as we brought a little too much luggage. The apartment was equally awesome: clean and had all the necessary facilities (washing machine, microwave, air-con), and Ryan was very accommodating as well. In fact, he offered to store our luggage until we returned to Tokyo. My friends and I are super glad to meet him, and we definitely recommend his place to fellow travellers. :)

The flat was located in a quiet area but very convenient to the city centre (Shibuya). The room is clean and well furnished. Plus, the room provider, Ryan gave me the right instruction before and during my stay in Tokyo. You'll enjoy the "daily life in Tokyo" if you choose this room. I also strongly recommend the authentic German bakery nearby. You can get fresh breads every day!
都心（渋谷）にもとても便利で、しかもとてもキレイで静かなお部屋でした。滞在前も滞在中も、的確な案内をいただけ、バーチャル東京人生活が楽しめました！また近所のドイツパン屋さんもオススメです。かなり本格的な味でしたよ。

The orange room is very clean, cosy and sunny. In my initial booking, Ryan offered a futon when I mentioned difficulties in using a double decker. However, he went beyond that and actually put out an extra bed for us. We are extremely thankful for his gesture.

The environment is quiet, yet it is full of life. Lots of school children, mums cycling with their kids, dads teaching their kids how to play baseball & frisbees.

We are so lucky we found such a great place with an even greater host who attended to all our queries without batting an eye even when it was for baseball caps and uniforms

We had a great time at Ryan's place! He was a perfect host and prepared for all our needs! Besides the spacious room i personally loved the wi-fi to go in case we would have any trouble to get around! Thank you Ryan for a great time!

Ryan's flat was a great base for a couple of days in Tokyo. The location was great - just a 5 minute walk away from the station that gets you into central Tokyo (Shibuya) in only about 10 minutes. The neighbourhood was also lovely, with plenty of shops.

Ryan was really helpful, both before we arrived (sending through maps and instructions) and once we got to Japan (picking us up in his car from the station when we arrived with all our luggage). He then lent us his pocket wifi for the rest of the trip, which was great.

The flat was bright, clean and simple - just what we needed!

Ryan-san

この度は、滞在させて下さりありがとうございました！

深夜のチェックインでしたが,近くまで車で迎えに来て下さいました。部屋はとてもキレイで使いやすかったです。また近くのおいしいお店を教えて頂きましたので、今度いかせて頂きます。Ryan-sanは素晴らしいホストの方でした。

Matz
离车站步行大概六分，离涉谷很近。房间很干净，各种东西都有。去的时候房主还去接我们 人特别好

A very cozy apartment, with all the necessary amenities for a comfortable stay. The large window provides ample light, and opens out into a small terrace. The kitchen includes a gas stove, and tucked in a corner you'll find the washing machine.

Ryan is a great host; he's incredibly friendly and helpful. He has a lot of experience in hosting people and is internationally-minded. He ensured that our arrival and stay in Japan went very smoothly.

The neighbourhood in which the listing is located, Setagaya, is a highly sought after residential area in the 23 wards. There are many shops, restaurants, and grocery stores nearby, and twice a year it hosts a well-known festival, about 3 min walking distance from the apartment. Setagaya is well connected to the rest of Tokyo, including quick access to Shibuya: the massive crossing that is often used to depict Tokyo.

Overall, we had a very nice time and would highly recommend both Ryan and his listings to anyone.

Ryan uses text or email to communicate and he replied all messages almost immediately. He offers help as and when we requested e.g car pick up services from the nearby train stations upon arrival and during rainy days and he also drove us to the nearby bus  terminal when we check-out. When we ran out of local currency for bus fares for airport, he gave us the small yen in exchange for our currency.  Very thoughtful gentleman indeed.
The apartment was in a perfect location for just about everything. Very clean and quite. Had everything you need. Would love to stay here again!!

Ryan is a very helpful host and will always make sure you are comfortable staying at his apartment.  It is a fairly small place, which is understandable because it is in Tokyo.  The futons were a little thin, but if you don't sleep on your side, it is fine.  We mentioned this to Ryan, and he brought an extra futon for us.  Ryan helped us with directions and planning, and is very friendly.  He also drove us to the station and gave us an extra day for free when we missed our first day that we booked !
お世話になってありがとうございます。最初からいろいろ紹介してくれてとても親切な方です。メールの返事も早くてありがとうございます。すごくいい旅でした。

My wife and I spent four nights in the apartment. Before our arrival, Ryan sent a very helpful file with recommendation for restaurants, direction to the apartment and other tips.
The apartment was clean and looks exactly as the pictures. We met Ryan only once, just so he could show us how to operate the stove. He was very responsive and very nice.
The neighborhood is very quite and relaxed. We really enjoyed coming back to this quite place after an hectic day in all the busy places in Tokyo. The Apartment is about a ten minute walk from the metro station.
The place was exactly what we were looking for and expected. Ryan was very helpful and responsive. Overall a great experience which we highly recommend.

Ryan was such a helpful host! We ended up booking a second of Ryan's apartments for an extra night and he went above and beyond by dropping us at the station when needed and moving our luggage in his car. This particular flat is in a great location and was exactly what we needed for our stay in Tokyo.

We had a comfortable stay in this apartment. The place is big enough for two adults, and has all the necessity that you might need (toiletries, wifi, utensils, etc). The neighborhood is quite peaceful and quiet. And it is about 15-20 mins walk to the nearest station, and just few stops away from shibuya. Manual and guide provided by the host is really useful!
Though I only met Ryan once when i checked out, Ryan & Aska have been very helpful and amazing host, and they are fast in replying to our messages. They even helped me checked the availability of studio ghibli tix, which i had trouble getting (it was sold out. Side Note: please try to get them in advance! :) ). Overall, we had wonderful time in tokyo, and of course a nice apartment to get back to, to rest our tired bodies, and away from the busy city life.
Thanks again ryan & aska.

Stayed here when we first arrived in Tokyo and we loved the place. Really spacious apartment considering most apartments in Japan are tiny. We really loved this place and felt right at home :-) Thank you Ryan for your help throughout!

We stayed in Ryan’s place for a second time when we came back to Tokyo because we felt so at home here — excellent WiFi (plus portable WiFi), subway is really close, convenience stores/supermarkets nearby and best of all Ryan was a really friendly and responsive host.
It was really nice place. Everything was clean and awesome. Especially, The Host was really nice. If i have another chance for come Tokyo, i will definitely come here again !

Perfect for experiencing suburban Tokyo. The location is very peaceful and it is not too hard to find as Ryan gives good instructions. The place looks exactly like the photos and everything is provided, Ryan even gave us some cup noodles. Also he lives upstairs so if there are any problems, you can just ask him.

I would consider staying here for my next visit.
ありがとうございました。必要なものは全て揃っていて、清潔なお部屋で快適に過ごせました。また機会がありましたらよろしくお願いします！
The apartment is as described in a wonderful residential neighborhood. Ryan was very responsive in communication during the reservation process and accommodating as well.
정말 좋은 호스트를 만나 편하게 여행하고 왔습니다. 사쿠라신마치 역에서 내려 숙소를 찾아갈 때 설명이 매우 잘 되있어서 하나도 헤매지 않고 바로 찾아갈 수 있었습니다. 피드백도 매우 빠르고 여행 마지막 날 까지 저희를 신경써주었습니다. 다음에 또 도쿄로 여행갈 계획이 생간다면 꼭 Ryan & Aska 의 집에 머물고 싶습니다.

The host is very kind. We met in the room and have a shot conversation.
The room is very clean. It has everything that a traveler needs.
The place is very quiet.
非常に親切な管理人さんで、とても感謝しています。おもてなしの心が様々なところにあって嬉しくなりました。駅からの途中にカフェなどの食事処もあり、場所的にも良かったです。
今回初めての利用でしたが、確実にリピートします！至れり尽くせりでした。本当に、ありがとうございます。今後もどうぞ、よろしくお願いします。

일단 먼저 너무 친절하세요! 제가 길을 잃었는데 사쿠라신마치 역에서 집까지 차로 태워주셨어요 !! 조금 추웠지만 이불이 두꺼워서 괜찮았고 필요한
물건도 다 있었어요 그래서 2박3일 동안 아주 편안하게 지냈습니다!!! 집 구조도 너무 좋아요 ^^ 다음에도 꼭 Ryan&Aska씨의 집에서 지내고 싶어요!!! 마지막으로 영어를 엄청 잘하셔서 의사소통에 문제가 없었어요 ㅎㅎ

We stayed at Ryan and Aska's place for 9 nights. Had no trouble trying to find the house as detailed instructions were given to us prior arriving in Japan. The apartment is located in a very nice area, about 5-10 mins away from the station. Which is only a few stops away from shibuya. The apartment was very cosy and clean. It had everything we needed! We loved how the apartment was away from the busy streets. Ryan has been an extremely hospitable host. He had offered to take us out for dinner and even took us to the pharmacy to get some medication when one of us was ill. Ryan also went an extra mile to send us to the station early in the morning on our departure day.
We felt very at home here in Tokyo. A big thank you to Ryan for being such an amazing host!
很愉快的一次住宿體驗，總共住了三個晚上，房間很整潔，任何日常所需的東西房東都給準備了。房東是個很熱心的人，退房時還送我們去車站，知道我們要去藥房買東西就在門口等我們了。房子在櫻新町，離涉谷幾分鐘地鐵。交通還算方便

Ryan was a wonderful host. I arrived very late to Tokyo and Ryan was very responsive throughout. His place was neat and clean. Exactly how it was described on airbnb. He was very responsive to all my questions and even offered to drive me to the subway station at the last day. I would recommend his place to anyone who is interested in visiting Tokyo.

今回もありがとうございました！
マメな連絡に感謝しています。
また、お願いします！

My friend and I booked this apartment for 11 days. The apartment was clean and just as pictured, in terms of size it was comfortable for the two of us.
The neighbourhood is very peaceful with many restaurants/cafes and 7elevens which was very convenient. Also its a short walk from Sakura-shimmachi Station which is four stops away from Shibuya.

We were very lucky to have such an amazing host like Ryan, he literally went above and beyond in helping us out with any queries we had. Ryan also kindly planned our route to Narita airport, booked seats on the bus and woke up in the early AM hours to drop us off in his car.

It was our first time visiting Japan and we couldn't of asked for a more incredible experience and host. I highly recommend this listing.
Thank you Ryan for everything! wish you all the best.

很愉快的住宿體驗，屋主十分親切
房子也很溫馨乾淨；下次來東京旅行會想回來。

Ryan met us at the station and helped us do our first food shop. Both of these were things that I did not expect and were very helpful. Then he consistently went well beyond the call of duty helping us with our queries.
The apartment is very compact and set in a lovely block in a quiet suburb. We enjoyed being able to live among families and watch daily life rather than be in the touristy hotel and shopping zones. The kitchen is set up with everything you need to cook, which we took advantage of. But then we found lots of local eateries and dined out. The area is very safe with lots of people cycling and walking around at night so you have no concerns coming back from the train station. It's four stops to Shibuya station and all the hustle of the city.
心優しい素晴らしいホストさんでした

The host is super nice, he is the only one host that offered to pick us up at station when we arrive and drop us off when we leave. This really helped us a lot!
The location is OK, about 10 mins walk to station. This area is very safe and pretty. I rented all three rooms, it's very convenient for us traveling as group.
I recommend to rent all three rooms. Since if you just rent two rooms, one of those two rooms is basement. The basement is big. But the bathroom in basement is actually not inside the basement, not even on the same floor which is not very convince. Beside no kitchen in it.
first of all, Ryan and Aska very helpful. We in big group of student very welcome by them. the house very clean, easy, cozy and describe in picture. We love to stay there. highly recommended!!
オーナーさんが非常に優しかったです。コンビニもすぐ近くにあり、最寄駅にも10分程度で着きます。非常に過ごしやすかったです。
I love how helpful the host is. He goes beyond his way to help.

Our group booked 2 rooms in Ryan's apartment from 05-13 Dec 2016. The apartment is located in a quiet and peaceful neighbourhood. It takes about 10mins by train to reach the bustling Shibuya station

Overall, Ryan is a fantastic and thoughtful host. Knowing that we have kids and elderly parent, Ryan picked us up from Sakura-shimmachi train station.

He also offered to safe-keep our luggage while we travelled to Yuzawa and delivered these to us when we returned to Tokyo.

Things to note:
1. It takes about 15-20 mins walk from Ryan's apartment to Sakura-shimmachi train station. So it can be tiring for kids and the elderly, especially returning late at night.

2. Alternatively, you can take a taxi from outside Sakura-shimmachi station. Fare was ¥730. However, be sure to show Ryan's address to the driver because not all taxis ply the same route, so some will not take you.

3. When travelling by train to Sakura-shimmachi station on the Den-en-Toshi line, be sure to take the local train and not the express train. Express train will skip this station.

Rooms clean and big, enough for big group, quite far to the nearest station actually, but its oke for young adult group. Its a super host.. thank you for your great help for us. Miss tokyo already.. happy to be there. See you for the next trip.hopefully we will come back later 😬

Ryan was very friendly and helpful. Dia bnyk juga tolong kami 19 org semasa ada di sana. Ryan sanggup ambil all of our luggage from the station to his house. Dia provide kn all the equipments, sabun, pinggan, seperate tools for muslims, also halal meat for cooking he can help find for us. I would recommend all my friends to stay at his accommodation. Great host!
ryan has been really helpful every step of the way. highly recommended and will stay again when i am back in tokyo
Ryan was incredibly communicative and accommodative to our needs and the place was really clean and in a quaint neighborhood.

The apartment is quite a walk from Sakura-Shimmachi station, abt 20 mins with luggages and 15 mins without (you can do it in 10 if you walk fast!). There's a nearer train station but it will require changing of lines to get to Shibuya so we preferred to use the DT line (the DT line also connects to Hanzomon line which is very useful!)
We got the basement for the first 2 nights and personally, we didn't like it as the toilet was separated from the apartment and we only realised later how troublesome this could be, especially as there's no sink in the basement. The wifi connection also isn't very good down there and the water heater was rather inconsistent (we had to wait for it to turn warm again a few times). We also found it colder than we'd like but it was okay.
The other rooms (301, 201) were very nice and spacious (we had about 2-3 people per room) and well equipped. Loads of space for our things and it had a kitchen and washing machine as well, all very useful.
Each room also had a pocket wifi. The one we got from the basement worked brilliantly, brought it everywhere we went and it would last the whole day. But the pocket wifis from the other rooms were not working well, tends to die even when the battery is fully charged.
We met Ryan a few times, he was kind enough to help us with the heating as we felt it was too cold in the rooms. Can always message him if you have any enquiries. It's a good place to stay at if you are a large group, but might want to consider the walk to the train station.
Thanks!
Были группой. Все было четко. Организована доставка с аэропорта, все удобно и качественно!
この度は急な申込みだったにも関わらず、細やかな気配りで素晴らしい対応をいただき、ありがとうございました！交通の便がよいだけでなく、閑静な住宅街で環境もとても良いところです。また機会がありましたら是非よろしくお願いします！

Ryan is a super host! 😊 from the day na nagpabook kami napaka supportive nya sa lahat ng inquiry namin. pati itinerary namin tinulungan nya kami. and the best part is sinundo nya kami sa train station pra hindi na kme mahirapan sa pagbuhat ng maleta namin. we were 12 pax kaya kailangn 2 trip pa sya ng pagsundo kasi hndi kami kasya sa car. it was so convenient for us. nakatira din sya sa same bldg kaya lahat ng question namin mabilis nyang nsasagot. palagi din syang nkaonline so big help tlga sya lalo na pag naliligaw kame.sobrang clear lahat ng instructions niya hindi talaga mahihirapan ang guest sa pagstay sa place niya.
About his place... sulit at comfortable tlga. kumpleto ang mga gamit... comforter,heater, toiletries, kitchen appliances, cooking and eating utensils, blower, hair iron... and the best part sa 3 unit na kinuha namin sa knya meron kameng house wifi plus 3 pocket wifi na puedeng dalhin kahit saan.
Meron pang incident na nawala ang bag ng kasama namin. Ryan went out of his way to help us report it and look for it. He even offered us na samahan kami sa police station kung sakaling hindi tlaga namin malita yung bag.
If there is an option of more tha 5 star rating... we want to give it to ryan and to his place!
Thank you ryan for being a superhost! 😊

Ryan was a very good host. He picked us up from the nearest station because we had luggages and he also dropped us off when we had to leave. He had everything that we needed for our stay. It was comfortable. He answered all our queries.

We had a great time in Tokyo. Ryan was not only helpful towards us during our stay, but also really friendly. If there was anything we needed, he came to help as soon as possible. The neighbourhood was nice, very quiet. There are lots of convenience stores closeby. The apartments are very nice, but the beds were a little uncomfortable. The private bathroom for the basement room could use some air conditioning, it was uncomfortable to be in the bathroom after someone had showered. In the basement room, there is a fan that is constantly running and making some noise, not too bad, but some may think that it's annoying. Good place, amazing host.

Super accueil de Ryan.
Il est très réactif aux messages et nous accueille avec grand plaisir.
Les appartements sont propres et fonctionnels (frigo, machine à laver, clim...).
Parfait pour un séjour à Tokyo !

We had stayed here for week and 13 people.
Owner was so kind and quickly responded our requirements.

Ryan is a very accommodating and helpful host. He made sure that we were always okay and all our needs were met. The location is in a quiet and peaceful neighborhood and is around a 10 - 15 minute walk to the nearest train station. If you don’t mind walking, then this is not a problem. You get to pass some local restaurants and stores on the way there. Ryan is so helpful he even goes out of his way to drive us to and from the train station from time to time because my dad is 78 years old and can’t walk too far. If you are traveling in a big group like we did, this is also ideal, as we were able to stay in several rooms in the same building. You are in very good hands with Ryan and Aska.
こちらからの要望に対して迅速に対応してくださり､宿泊前も宿泊中もとてもスムーズに連絡を取り合う事ができ､とても丁寧にお部屋の準備などもして下さいました。

The house is very clean. The facilities are excellent. Ryan has been very helpful during our stay and even managed to find a cab for us to the airport as the uber was not available due to new year eve. Sure we will come back again.

Ryan was the best airbnb host I have ever had the pleasure of meeting!
From the very day I booked his apartment(s) , he stayed in communication with me regarding location, suggested routes to take, discounted tickets, restaurants to eat at, and just very responsive to my inquiries.
I rented out 5 units from him because I was traveling with a large group for a school trip. Every unit was very clean and as seen in the photos. Even the basement unit was able to fit 10 big teenage boys and they enjoyed it!
Ryan, being the amazing host he is, found a bus for us to travel from Narita airport to his apartment. He met us at the airport himself to guide us to the bus. He also brought along the pocket wifi’s so that we could have wifi immediately. That sealed the deal in terms of a host going out of his way.
The distance from the apartment to Sakura Shinmachi station is a bit of a walk, but not too bad. As we walked in a large group, we didn’t feel the walk too difficult. There is a Lawsons and Family Mart on the way, so that was a plus.
In the very end of our stay, Ryan was able to help me as I struggled with the thought of taking 24 people through the station with luggages. He drove our luggages to the station so we didn’t have to worry about it. He also found a bus for us to take back to the airport. He was amazing!
I highly recommend his place to anyone looking for somewhere to stay that is safe, quiet & not too far from a station.
The DT line is also just 4 stops to Shibuya & from there, you can get on the JR line to go to all the other famous spots.
Thank you Ryan!

Great house. Amazing host. He was there for whatever we needed. There to give tips of where to eat and get around. Was there to help if there was any problems. Made our trip enjoyable and stress-free. There is no better host to have than Ryan.

Dear reader,
We’re a group of 20 students who went on a study trip to Tokyo. When looking for accommodation we quickly stumbled upon Ryan’s apartments. Setagaya is a quiet and safe neighbourhood. It’s just a 10 min walk from the apartment building to the train station and from there you can easily reach other parts of the city. The apartments are quite small, but they have everything you need. We had a very nice stay and it would never have been the same without Ryan. He really is the best host we could wish for. He even waited for us at the train station when we arrived, so that he could help us with our luggage, and he brought us to our first appointment because it was difficult to find. I would definitely recommend renting one of Ryan’s apartments to anyone.
Thank you so much Ryan, we really had a wonderful stay
とっても親切なホストさんです^ ^！
とっても親切なホストさんなので安心です！

Ryan was one of the best hosts we have yet to encounter. He has constant communication with us and made sure everything went smoothly. He was very accommodating with our needs and even went the extra mile to drop us off at the station. The room was clean, and they were spacious (as far as it could be in Japan, atleast). It’s about 20 minutes away from Shibuya, which was very convenient. The next time we plan to visit we will be sure to stay here!
駅からは少し離れていますが、その分閑静な住宅街です。今回8名で利用させていただきましたが、リビングスペースがとても広くてゆったり過ごすことができました。屋上のテラスもすごく広いので、次回はバーベキューをさせていただきたいと思います。オーナーさんが近くに滞在されているので、連絡はマメに取ることがてきますし、安心して宿泊できました。
対応が早くて助かりました！
Good services! Nice host! Clean!
Good services! Nice host! Clean!

Ryan is a very accommodating host. He always takes us to the nearest train station. His place is complete, everything that a traveler needs are available. He let us borrowed his pocket wifi even were in Osaka. He also helped us when we need to send a package. Definitely will recommend his place to my friends. The next time we plan to visit Tokyo, we'll surely book his place.

対応も早く、チェックイン、アウトも簡単で、気軽に利用することができました。
今回は、大人数で1泊のみの利用でしたが、立地が良いため、少人数や長期間での滞在もしてみたいと思いました！
寝具、スペースに余裕があり、各部屋四人でゆとりをもって過ごせました。
Highly recommendable👍

Ryan was a great host and responded to all our needs quickly. We were lucky in that we came in and left when he was off work so he offered to give our big group a ride to and from the station! Can’t tell you how nice that was with all of our luggage and how hot it was in July. He probably described it accurately in the description and I just missed it, but I didn’t realize the basement bathroom and washer was so detached from the room, and there is no kitchen sink available on the basement floor. But he was so kind and offered to let us use another room that wasn’t being occupied for showers (I had nine male high school students staying in the basement). I love being close to Shibuya Station, as it is one of my favorites. Meanwhile, our neighborhood was so quiet and nice. Thank you Ryan!
Ryan is nice person and quickly response.
入住的房子很干净，还有小阳台。位置也很好，里面家居齐全。房东人特别好，给我们提供很多帮助。走的时候还接送我们。特别好的入住，感谢房东的照顾！

Ryan’s such a gracious host. Very good communication. He went over and beyond in accommodating all of us, he even took time to drive us to the train station and the airport also. He also shared his phone with WiFi. Gave us good tips and where to go and what to do. Gave us going away gifts also.
I highly recommend his place, place is clean and neat. Amenities are complete. Very cozy place to stay. Plus, it’s not too far from the train station. A lot of stores and restaurants around the area.
所在社区很安静，离最近的地铁站走走10分钟左右。附近也有便利店和一些大超市、小餐厅。两个卧室适合跟多个朋友一起出行时或者一家多口带父母。房子里什么都有，很适合居住。Ryusuke亲自来地铁站接我们，回邮件也是很快。虽然我住的十天里他后来不在日本，我们也是通过邮件沟通及时。希望来东京时还能住这。

Fantastic place - spaceous, very well furnished, great kitchen, cool rooftop.
Neighborhood is pretty and quiet, subway is about 10 minutes away, there are convenient busses for local travel too.
Our host was super helpful, with prompt confirmation and responses. He also picked us up and dropped us off at the station, and recommended local cuisine. Many thanks!
開発合宿で使用しました。ネット回線にも不自由なく、スペースも十分で特に困ることはありませんでした。バーベキューなどのアクティビティも、わざわざ出かけることなくその場でできるのも良かったです。また、キッチンが大きく、多人数の調理も楽だったところも助かりました。
お部屋はとても清潔で、大人数でしたがゆったり過ごせました。今回は滞在中に料理をしなかったのですが、調味料などもとても揃っていて普通に家にいるように料理もできると思いました。ホストの方とチェックインの時のみ顔を合わせ、お部屋の説明をして頂きましたが、距離感もちょうど良かったです。
The place is nice, Ryan is always checking with us if we are okay and if we need help.

大人数でしたが特に困ることもなくアットホームに過ごせました。ホストさんにはとても親切にしていただきました。
桜新町駅からは少し離れていますが、バス停が近くにあり渋谷まで出るのに便利でした。
広くて備品や設備が充実していました。ホストのRyusukeさんは親切で快適な滞在でした。ありがとうございました！
地处一个安静的社区，周边有小超市，步行至地铁站大约10分钟路程。房间宽敞、舒适，配备物品齐全。房东人很好，邮件回复及时，入住当天亲自到门口迎接我们，并开车送我们去地铁站。非常友善的房东，希望有机会还能住这里

My family had a great stay at Ryan’s apartment. We enjoyed a quiet and relaxing vacation in the neighborhood, which is very kids friendly. The city is also not that far away.
The apartment was comfortable and spacious. There are plenty of kitchen equipment so if you enjoy cooking, it is a great benefit. We really used this opportunity to make some japanese food with local ingredients.
Ryan is a great host. Friendly and always there to help. He really made us feel at home. We hope to come back again!
夫婦と子ども3人で海外から帰国後の自主待機期間を過ごしました。十分な広さと必要な機材を備えた素晴らしい部屋です。とても快適に過ごせました。帰国前も帰国後も、コミュニケーションを円滑にとることができました。

This is my favorite place to stay in Tokyo! the apartment is very clean and cozy, and equipped with anything needed for a comfortable stay. The bathtub is very spacious and perfect for a soak each night when settling in. I must say though, my favorite part is absolutely the rooftop. The neighborhood is quiet, so it's easy to enjoy a cup of coffee on the roof in the morning, or have a barbecue in the evening. Spectacular area to enjoy some fresh air. Highly recommend, and definitely will stay here again and again.

I've stayed here twice now, and definitely my favorite place to stay in Tokyo! The location is great, very close to the train station so was easy to explore the city.
The rooftop is absolutely my favorite feature. I love to relax up there and enjoy fresh air and city view! The pictures don't do it justice-- it's a must see!
The whole apartment is always perfectly clean and comfortable, and I always find all the amenities I could ever need there. It's very clear that it's managed with much care. It's lovely not to worry about anything! This place is truly like a home away from home. I'll always recommend it to anyone I know staying in the area for any reason.

My wife and two children spent three weeks at Ryusuke’s apartment and had a great holiday.
The apartment was spacious, clean and had all the things we needed (air conditioning in every room, great bath area, big kitchen with appliances and comfortable bedroom). The rooftop terrace was a wonderful feature with a wonderful view for our evening aperitifs.
The apartment was only 10 minutes walk from the metro station and the area around the apartment is full of nice cafés and restaurants but the street is nice and quite.
Ryusuke himself was extremely kind and helpful. Always replying to any question we had and always willing to help out. He brought us to the supermarket as soon as we arrived, drove us to the airport when we left and was always polite and with a smile! Communication with him in English was always easy and he always replied quickly.
I would really recommend this place to anyone visiting Tokyo and the surrounding area.

Great attentive host, really got out of his way to help us with anything.
Very spacious apartment.

Located in West Tokyo, this airbnb occupies the top floor of an apartment building. Its spacious, comfortable, and has everything one would need for a short, medium or long term stay.
The neighborhood is very quiet and safe. Particularly if you’re looking for a spacious apartment away from the hustle and bustle of the downtown areas, this is your spot.
The host was also very helpful and communicative.
Would stay here again 10/10

Awesome place for our family of four. Ryusuke went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable. Spacious, cosy, the roof top was great for sunsets. Super happy with the local Ogawa laboratory cafe that ryusuke recommended too, we went every day. We had a brilliant time, wouldn’t hesitate to book again! Thank you.
super. thank you

One of my favorite homes in Tokyo! Ryusuke’s home is much bigger than the pictures show which was a nice surprise. The rooftop is huge and a great space to get together or view the skyline. Good access to major stations in west Tokyo. 10 mins walking to either kamimachi station for access to shinjuku or Sakura shimmachi for shibuya. I recommend going on a run to the Komazawa Olympic park from ryusuke’s place!

Ryusuke was very responsive and explained how to use everything in the house during our check in. The bedrooms were on opposite ends of the unit so no one disturbed one another. The location was good and a short walk to the bus stop or train station. It was a very quiet and quaint local neighborhood but still close by to the major cities in tokyo, we really enjoyed our stay.
Ryusuke is an excellent host who was extremely helpful and kind. The apartment is near a well-connected metro station that made it easy to access the rest of Tokyo. I would absolutely stay again.

Ryan was extremely helpful in getting us settled in -- picked us up from another location with a ton of stuff, completely unexpected but definitely appreciated. The location is classic Tokyo residential with charming commercial clusters around nearby stations (for both the Setagaya tram and the Dentoshi subway line). Apartment is light and airy. We were pretty self-sufficient after four months in town, so we didn't really need any guidance, but for short-term visitors I imagine Ryan would be very helpful. Thanks for hosting us.

Very spacious apartment in quiet area. Very clean and well equipped. Easy acces to train, maybe a bit far from station, but areas like Shibuya and Shinjuku can be quickly reached. We really enjoyed our one week stay in this place!
Very large yet cozy place! I felt right at home and Ryusuke was super helpful and attentive!

We were very happy with the accommodation. It felt like home, a lot easier and more space compared to any hotel room. We knew the neighbourhood already, so everything was easy.
The two bed rooms are separated enough, so that our teenagers had a bit of privacy in their room.
Eating out, little grocery shopping and having a drink - all possible in walking distance! Access to other sections of Tokyo is absolutely ok.
We would love to come back soon again!

Ryusuke’s apartment was exactly as pictured and perfect for me and my husband for our stay. We spent 15 days in Tokyo at the location and neighbourhood was perfect for what we wanted. The location was ideal for getting around and accessing all areas.
The apartment was clean and had a lot of amenities that we loved. It was spacious and we enjoyed the rooftop patio as we had some hot days.
We would definable stay here again and would recommend Ryusuke’s place to everyone.
Thank you again for being such a gracious host!

ゲストハウスは、十分なスペースがあり、5人家族で滞在しましたがとても寛ぐ事が出来ました。お風呂場には、湯船があり、滞在中の疲れを癒してくれました。
Ryusukeさんには滞在前から移動手段などの事も答えて頂き、安心して旅行に出発する事が出来ました。
旅行中も何か質問があれば、すぐに返答して頂いたのでとても快適な滞在になりました。
また家族で日本に行く時に利用したいです。楽しい旅行になりました。ありがとうございました。
Great place to stay 🤩

Private and beautiful in a quiet suburban neighborhood.  Very well equipped with appliances and he made the effort to show you how to use them in English.  Wonderful roof top deck.  Grocery store 3 min away.  It’s a 10 min walk and a few train stops away from Shibuya.  Takes 1/2 hr to be in central Tokyo.  Left us ramen and exceedingly responsive and hospitable.  Thank you for sharing your space.
令人惊艳的体验！房屋与描述完全一致，干净整洁，非常便利。让我们一家在东京有了一个美好的回忆！期间恰好经过中国新年，我们在这里为自己准备了一桌丰盛的年夜饭，完全有了家的感觉。

Ryusuke is one of the best hosts I have had on Airbnb. He is super friendly and helpful and was very accommodating. The place was amazing. It’s a bit of a walk to the station but the station is a very good one with access directly to Shibuya in 10 minutes. Ryusuke went above and beyond to make sure we were ok and his place is really nice and spacious. I’d definitely stay here again.

Ryusuke’s place is in a lovely quiet neighborhood. While the weather did not lend to use of the roof, I would imagine it’s lovely in warmer weather. Walk to the subway is about 13-15min which for some might be far but is normal for Tokyo. The apartment is sparsely decorated but clean, futon was comfy, nice tub. Well worth it!
Saubere Unterkunft. Mit Dachterrasse. Gut für drei Personen.

We have a wonderful time staying here with our family of four (two adults, five year old, and infant). Ryusuke was a very responsive host and we would definitely stay again if we’re in the area.
Pros: Quiet and charming residential area, about 14 minute walk to Sakura Shin-Machi station. There are lots of small parks with playgrounds nearby and the Peacock Store grocery has all you need for cooking plus a wide array of prepared bentos. Spacious apartment (for Tokyo) with an eat-in kitchen plus two additional rooms that can be bedrooms.
Con: Our only feedback would be that there was a lot of broken furniture on the roof; we found enough working chairs and tables but the area could use a clean out. Fortunately the roof is huge and has a very nice view. We used it a lot especially in the evening to unwind.
Again, lovely place to stay if you’re looking for a home base in Setagaya! We hope to return someday!

We stayed two weeks at Ryusuke's place my wife, our 7-month-old baby, and me. Here are the pros and cons:
Cons
No dark blinds or curtains. We stayed in the Japanese room as there was no crib. However, light came in at 4 am, making naps difficult. We ordered blackout curtains from Amazon the day we arrived, which solved the problem.
Small and old features. Everyting works but feels old and small: fridge, microwave, stove, pots, ...
Distance from attractions. It takes 40-60 minutes by walk and subway to reach most attractions, so we usually went out once a day.
Pros
Space. The flat has three separate areas, allowing for baby's naps and work calls simultaneously. It feels spacious.
AC in every room
Neighborhood. The 12-15 minute walk to the station is pleasant through a charming Japanese neighborhood.
Ryusuke’s care. He was communicative, offered to pick us up from the station, and the place had everything needed for cooking and cleaning.
Overall, a great place to stay in Tokyo!
Fint opphold i fin leilighet. Verten var hele tiden på tilbudssiden, og fleksibel. Hjalp oss også med noen småting.

Es war schon das zweite Mal in dieser Wohnung, wir haben uns dort sehr wohl gefühlt, und werden bei unserer nächsten Reise hoffentlich wieder dort übernachten.
Die Entfernung zur Bahn ist etwas groß, aber die Bushaltestelle ist nicht weit.
Ryusuke ist super freundlich und hilfsbereit.
Quiet neighbourhood, well-equipped and spacious appartment ideal with children. Note that it takes a bit to get to the center, main tourist attractions and Narita Airport.
Sehr ruhig gelegen und ich habe im japanischen Zimmer unglaublich gut geschlafen- trotz Jetlag! Funktioniert alles großartig und man wohnt dort wie ein Einheimischer! Tolle Dachterrasse!

Appartement spacieux,
Idéal pour une famille.
Un peu loin du métro mais quartier très paisible et parfait après une journée de visite dans le centre de Tokyo.
Ryusuke and her place were awesome! Spotlessly clean, super comfy. Will stay again next time I'm in Tokyo!
メッセージを通じて親身に対応してくれた。

The host will contact you and will personally meet you and took the time to explain to you on how to use the stuffs in the house, he is very fluent on his English too so don’t worry if you can’t speak Japanese. The distance is quite far from the house to nearest station but it’s walkable and at the station there’s quite a number of restaurants to look at. If I am ever coming to visit Tokyo again I would choose this place.
何でも揃っていて、快適に過ごせました。非常に満足しました！

This was a very nice place for me and my husband and two adult children. Our kids stayed in the room with two floor beds and my husband and I stayed in the room with one bed for a couple (queen sized and perfectly comfortable for us). The neighborhood is quiet, peaceful and gorgeous. The only thing about this lovely home is that it is a bit of a hike from the metro and we did spend quite a lot of time commuting. That said, after the bustle of a day spent in Tokyo, it became a relief to commute home to this lovely, quiet neighborhood!  We really enjoyed our stay there, thank you Ryusuke!

子供たちのフェンシング大会で宿泊しました。駒沢オリンピック公園までタクシーですぐでしたし、ゴールデンウィークなのに料金も安く泊まれて色んな点で大変助かりました！
エアビーの利用が初めてだったので不安でしたが大家さんの対応が柔らく安心できました！忘れ物してましたが柔軟に対応してくれました、嬉しかったです！
家のように過ごせて一緒に宿泊した友達家族もすごく気楽だったと話しています！
また機会があればお願いします^_^

We had a lovely stay at Ryusuke’s place. We chose the location because it was in the neighborhood of our friends. We easily took the bus and train from close to his place. The flat was very spacious and met all our needs. There’s a delicious bakery close and some nice restaurants. We would stay again. Thank you!
2 nette Schlafzimmer und gute Air Condition, ruhige Umgebung, gute Erreichbarkeit Shibuya, Shinjuku, Roppongi und Zentrum; außerdem sehr schnelle Reaktion des Vermieters
This is a Japanese-style room very comfortable home, a very amiable mother and handsome host,the door has a very beautiful sakura,but also visitors from different countries and exchange

Memz and his mother is so friendly and take care us very well!we like to share about everything with his mother,she is so nice! Hope we can keep in touch!and Memz is a nice man to give me more information about the trip in Tokyo !next time ,I'll like to long stay there, cause they are so nice person,and make we like Tokyo !

典型日式的房子，我们住了8个晚上，对于日常来说，榻榻米不容易，坐立行都很累，整个木质结构的房子，房间多，进出住的客人也多，说话行走都注意别吵到人，压抑啊，很难得的体验。房东MEMZ人特别好，土耳其和日本的混血儿，日语好，英语也好，方便沟通。
离JR大森站几分钟路，出站口有商场和超市，我们买了很多次刺身和寿司回家吃，还有一个很大的药妆店。都很方便。
去羽田机场很近，15分钟的士，说大概3000日元左右。我们坐地铁两个站去转专线到成田机场，也是很方便快捷，没人大概3100日元。

This is a wonderful traditional room with a super nice balcony in a Showa-period mansion. The house is full of oriental antiques and carpets, and everything screams that you are staying in the prominent family. Bathroom, WC, dining room are big and awesome. I recommend this property to everyone! It's a rare case when one can experience truly Japanese yet spacious living. Both owner and his mother are very nice and speak good English. House manager is responsive and fluent English speaker as well. Property is easy to find and conveniently located. 5 out of 5!

Very conveniently located place - easily accessible by local train and yet very quiet with no noise.  Memz is a wonderful host and very helpful with suggestions and tips on what to do and see in and around Tokyo.  Overall, a fabulous experience.

Memz is a fantastic host and I've brought multiple groups to his house over the past few years. He has a lot of local knowledge of the area, his English is excellent, and he really knows how to make people feel welcome. He's almost always open to taking your group to lunch (and paying for it). I've stayed at a number of places through AirBnb, but I think Memz best captures the spirit of the service as an attentive and helpful host - you're not just getting a room, you're getting local insight.

In my times being here, we've had a very diverse collection of fellow tenants, including Japanese business travelers visiting Tokyo, students back-packing through the country, families on vacation... There's also a lot of variety in the rooms available, with plenty of traditional "washitsu" rooms, western-style rooms with beds, and a newly renovated basement with private bath and kitchen (great for larger groups). So whether you want to interact with other travelers or stick to yourself, Memz's house has space for you. On top of all that, the price for two people is better than you'll find at a hotel.

The location itself is also great: You're only a handful of train stations from "downtown", the house is a block from a major street with great food and convenience stores, and only a few more blocks from the local mall. If you're into games, Omori has two large arcades with great selections.
Memz is an excellent host with a genuine interest towards people and cultures. I'm happy we met and stayed at his place
Host人超级nice！人也跟照片里一样帅！！我们问了好多问题他都会耐心回答：）我们说要去吃烤肉，他还帮我们找了discount coupons～～这边的交通也很方便，出门2min就是Omori sta. 好棒
Great place - check it out

Cody and his house was absolutely wonderful! 💯 it's a great place. The main street is packed with places to go to resturants, shopping and the train station is about 4 mins away from the house.
The house! it's so pretty! a traditional Japanese house. Very cozy and warm. We slept like a log! the common area is very welcoming too! overall, we'll definitely be back here and would recommend this place to my friends! We loved it there!

It was an unexpected great memo staying in this elegant beautiful house and thanks Memo for the warm welcome and the knowledge of the neighborhood which brought us great experiences. Highly recommended!

Had a lovely time staying here! The rooms were nicely decorated and clean. Had the best sleeps on the tatami. Very spacious house. Lots of room to relax in a very quiet and peaceful area. Near to the train station and lots of yummy food spots. The host is very friendly and gave great recommendations. Would recommend staying here!

We felt like at home. Memo is a great host and it feels like you are staying in an old friend house rather than rented. He shared with us a story of the neigbourhood, the house and and even some of Japanese history and culture.
The house is a mix of western and Japanese style and we stayed in the classical Japanese room with tatami. The room is big, it’s on the first floor and just next to the shared bathroom which I think only was used by us. The bathroom has a shower or bath whichever you prefer. The kitchen has all the needed amenities, but we didn’t have a chance to use it as much. The house is beautiful and decorated with western and Japanese details. We loved a small separated balcony/terrace behind the sliding Japanese doors.
The neighbourhood is really nice too, lots of common stores. Lots of nice places to eat or drink. And the JR line is just in 5 mins walk. Close to the airport and to the city connections.
I certainly would stay again if it’s available!
Sehr netter höflicher und zuvorkommender Mann hat uns sehr gut aufgenommen und viele Tips gegeben.

Beautiful home! The host is very friendly and accommodating, he gave us many recommendations for food in the nearby area and was very welcoming. The house was spotless and the room was very cozy. The house is a 5 minute walk to a train station and surrounded by different cafes, restaurants and stores — great location. Thank you for letting us stay!

We love Tokyo and Tokyo! The house is extremely clean and beautiful and please never let the ppl cut the tree outside. Me and my friends we have a really incredible stay at the house and thank you Tokyo for the super welcoming gestures and all the  lessons on the history of the place and the family and so on. Can’t wait to stay for a second time. 再见👋
如果你喜歡乾淨的房子，有家的溫暖，這是個很棒的選擇

These home was really beautiful. The room felt super comfortable. There was a beautiful cherry blossom tree at the entrance and the host was super kind and really nice to talk to.  We would stay here again. ❤️

Super séjour pour les 10 ans de ma fille !
Quoi de plus beau qu’un voyage à tokyo dans un environnement paisible et conforme à la tradition locale ! Facilement accessible en transport !
Notre hôte a été super !
Je recommande !

We stayed in a traditional Japanese room, which was very clean and atmospheric. The toilet and bathroom were clean and nice.
The house itself is very beautiful and interesting, with vintage vibes.
There are plenty of places to eat in the nearby area.
The host is very friendly, hospitable and proactive. We quickly found common topics with him. He allowed us to drop off our luggage and recommended a flea market where we found many historical items.
We wish we had more time to enjoy this beautiful place!

Gorgeous and special house in a lovely, quiet neighborhood of residential Tokyo. Very close to city-wide rail, making it a great place to escape the bustle of downtown. Meme and Cody were incredibly friendly, natural tour guides and hosts, wish we could’ve spent more time together! Home away from home for a full week.
Traditional tea room was picturesque and cozy. A bit small, and I needed two futons to be comfortable, but you have access to the whole house for laundry, cooking, television, etc. Only thing we’d have appreciated is a few more towels!
Highly recommend for a very special stay in Tokyo. Be sure to listen to Meme’s recommendations and stories! Fascinating gentleman, and all the other staff were charming and kind. Hope to make it more than a once in a lifetime stay. どうもありがとうございます!
卧室很宽敞，离大森站很近但周围很安静。起居室也很宽敞。唯一不足的是楼上的人下楼会有点吵闹，但总体很好。
Everything was perfect!

Nice and at home feeling accommodation.
Living room, kitchen and restrooms are western-style and easy to use. The location of house is near ōmori station with many facilities/shops/restaurants. We’ll probably choose here again when we’re visiting Tokyō next time.
Aucun soucis. Petite chambre, mais grande maison à utilisation commune. Personnel tres agréable
Great room , in a quiet and nice neighborhood !
Second time and still amazing we will come back for sure. Thanks for everything DeepTokyo. You are the nicest host ever
二日間泊まりました。全体的に良かったのは返信がすぐにあり安心できました。案内も丁寧でした。ロケーションも駅から近く飲食には困りませんでした。1番気になったのは建物の劣化によるカビ臭さ、埃っぽさです。子供は喘息気味になり眠れませんでした。バスルームのブラインドの劣化のせいで、外からの音と気配が気になります。改善したほうがよいと思います。ありがとうございました。

Absolutely beautiful traditional Japanese home, in a safe, clean and quiet area of Tokyo. If you are looking for an old-world feel within the greater area of Tokyo, i highly recommend staying here. I stay for four nights and enjoyed watching the cherry blossoms bloom from my window. The home itself is beautiful and easy to access all major areas of Tokyo. We were able to be in Harajuku in around 25 minutes. Plus a great thrift store nearby. Highly recommend!

We loved staying here - a lovely home with a beautiful tree in full blossom out in front. We slept so well on the tatami mats, the local area had great places to eat, and the train station was close and easy to get places.
A great place to stay when in Tokyo.

Memo’s place was great! Was looking for a more traditional looking Japanese room for my time in Tokyo and his tatami room was perfect for that. Also would like to mention it was very easy getting to and from the city from his home, as well as Haneda airport. He has other guests staying in the other rooms of the house but  the house was large enough for me to feel like I had my own privacy and intimate enough in the shared rooms where I could communicate with Memo and the other guests when I wanted. Wouldn’t mind staying here again, it was perfect!
第一次住民宿，体验总体上很满意，房子很大，周边交通也方便，商店也很多，吃饭和购物都方便，很喜欢这个房子。有两点不方便的地方是：我们这次住的房间不能反锁，晾衣服不是很方便。总之还是谢谢房东。

너무 좋은 숙소였습니다
다음에 재방문 의사 있음
这个一户建体验非常舒适，且进东京城内也方便，其他住户和房东都很好聊天，适合短期常住的那种！

근처에 살고 있는 동생을 방문하기 위해 오모리역에서 숙소를 찾았는데 너무 좋은 위치와 환경에 아주 좋은 숙소를 발견하여 매우 좋았습니다. 방안은 매우 넓고 쾌적했으며 무엇보다 창밖으로 비치는 나무 그림자, 작은 테라스 너머로 보이는 커다란 벚나무가 머무는 동안 마음을 차분하게 해주었습니다. 화장실 또한 넓고 쾌적했으며, 무엇보다 친절한 호스트의 세심한 배려 덕분에 감기와 기침에 좋은 일본 전통약도 제공받아 기침이 많이 나았습니다. 러닝과 등산, 가족식사 등으로 객실과 화장실 외에 2층의 공용공간을 이용할 시간은 거의 없었으나, 일본도쿄 안에서 이만한 개방감과 평화로움을 동시에 즐길 수 있는 숙소는 매우 드물다고 여겨집니다.
도보로 1시간 내에 있는 헤이와노모리공원과 해안공원은 산책코스로 적합했고, JR오모리역 뒷편의 이자카야거리(지옥계곡)은 일본 소시민의 문화를 즐기는데 아주 좋은 경험이었습니다. 숙소는 호스트가 얘기한대로 역까지의 도보거리가 매우 가까웠고 근처에 다이소, 메가돈키, 고코로화인 등 쇼핑을 하기에도 더할나위 없이 좋았습니다.
일본 요요기 우에하라역에서 가깝습니다. 시부야 하라주쿠는 100엔 하치코 버스로 이동이 가능하고 걸어서 가도 괜찮을 거리 입니다. 걸어 가는길 멋진 가게가 있어 재미가 있습니다. 방은 깨끗하고 넓고 친철하게 잘 대해 주셨고 안전하고 편안한 숙소 였습니다. 덕분에 즐거운 여행 잘하고 한국으로 잘 돌아 왔습니다.

Great room with own bathroom, in a beautiful house. The family was very welcoming and friendly, and we even extended our stay with them.

Walking distance from Yoyogi-Uehara Station (Chiyoda and Odakyu lines), which was very convenient. Also many good restaurants around the station.

Japanese-style room means futons on a tatami floor, which may not be for everyone, but it worked out great for us.

Such a great place to stay close to everything, the hosts were amazing!, the house was beautiful, the room was very spacious could not fault this place.
I would definitely recommend this accommodation to anyone and will try and stay here if I come back to Tokyo

Kako and her mom were really amazing! I had a very nice stay (but short) in a quite huge room with a bathroom for myself. Kako's mom invited me for breakfast, which was amazingly good. Both, Kako and her mom, speak perfectly English.
I wish I would have stayed a bit longer.

Their house is near the station, the super big house, there is a big garden, house decorate very warm.Kako's mom likes to do cooking, and do very delicious.
Kako san and Kako's mom is very kind, especially her mother, have life interest very much,She tell the story of her home with us, we also want to listen to her story, hope to hear to Tokyo next time.

Quick response and contact. Everything was as the listing, but better. Got picked up at the station by car, even though it's not far to walk. The room is big, clean and I slept like a baby on the futon. The private bathroom with shower and toilet is a big plus. The hosts speak perfect English and are so welcoming, can teach you a lot about Japanese culture. Home made miso soup in the morning is like being in heaven as well. The mobile wifi is also a big plus. I was sad to go home.

This is actually my first time using Airbnb and it proves to be a perfect start with Kako. Kako and her mom are superb in many ways: they picked me up at the station, drove me home, provided excellent communications with great patience, and made me feel myself at home. The house is amazing: it is located in a quiet neighborhood which you can hardly imagine especially after you find out how close it is to Harajuku. The Chiyoda line (5~7 minutes walk) can take you to several main tourism attractions such as Yoyogi Park and Ginza. I would definitely come back to visit Kako's and strongly recommend this place to anyone. =)

I loved my time in Tokyo staying at Kako and Keiko's beautiful home. They made me incredibly welcome and were very generous with their time. I would stay here again in a heart beat. Very close to public transport. The local area has a very cool vibe with lots of interesting restaurants and shops.

This is the best stay we had with Airbnb. Kako San and mum looked after us. We really enjoyed our stay with Kako and getting to know Tokyo. We had such q great time with our hosts that we even went to dinner together.

Thank you Very Much and we will come back again soon

Best bnb experience ever!!! Kako and her mom are so nice and helpful that they picked us up at the station at a rainy night and drove us to the station when we left.
The house is very cozy with beautiful garden and cute cats. Every morning we enjoyed Kako's mom's homemade breakfast and had great time chatting with them. By the way both Kako and her mom speak perfect English.
We will definitely come back and I'd like to recommend this bnb to everyone!

My mother and I had a fantastic time staying with Kako and her mom! Their house is gorgeous, the accommodations were excellent (own bathroom, shower & TV, plus house-wide wifi) and the garden provided a wonderful green environment that filtered out any suggestion of city living (no neighbor or street noises). The cats were no problem for me, but my mother is slightly allergic and as such became a little itchy after our week-long stay.

Every morning we had a delicious breakfast with Kako's mom, and she had great recommendations of places to eat and things to see and do. As many other reviewers have said, Kako and her mother are fluent in English.

On the short walk through the neighborhood to the Chiyoda line station we passed so many small bakeries and izakayas, as well as an organic vegetable store. Again, this location is ideal for anyone visiting Tokyo but not willing to deal with the hustle-and-bustle of staying in downtown. I would 100% recommend this place to any and all, and I plan to stay here again in the future.

行く前は正直ちょっと値段高いかなと思ったけど、結果的に満足。今回、渋谷での早朝からの仕事のために宿泊。以下詳細を書きます。
まず、この家を選んだのは仕事先である渋谷へのアクセスの良さ。家のドアから渋谷駅まで約15〜20分でアクセスできます。
家は誰だったか名前を忘れてしまいましたが、建築家が建てたもので、リビングの吹き抜けや庭に出っ張ったダイニング、そして広い庭がとても気持ちのいい空間。泊まる部屋は和室で、部屋・布団ともに清潔でした。宿泊者専用のバスがついていて、ホストに気兼ねなく入れるのもgood。
泊まる部屋にはデスクがないですが、自由にダイニングのテーブルを使っていいと言ってくれたので、甘えてダイニングで仕事をさせていただきました。WiFiもあるし、白黒ですがレーザープリンタもあるので、仕事をするには支障なし。
ホストのkakoさんとその母親はふたりとも明るい性格で、こちらは変な気を使わずに済んでよかったです。ホストから家の近くにいくつか美味しい飲食店があることを教えてもらい、私はその中の"ふく"という串焼き屋で夕食をいただきました。この店、つくねがすごい美味しかった。
ちなみに、ホストもその母親も、アメリカ滞在経験があり英語は得意みたいなので、外国人にもおすすめできます。ネコは4匹いるので、ネコアレルギーの人はやめたほうがいいけど、ネコ好きにはたまらないはず。(うち1匹は若い女性好きなので、私には愛想が悪かった…)
また渋谷で仕事があれば利用たいと思います。

Probably the best stays I ever had so far during my travelling experience. The price is reasonable. Both Kako and her Mom was very friendly and helpful. Her Mom made a customized breakfast for me and my wife during our stays there and it was delicious. Plus, both of them speaks English very well.

The facilities, i.e. the room, private bathroom, portable wifi, etc, are all nice. The location is a very strategic place to stay, near Shibuya, Shinjuku, and Shimokitazawa. Also, Yoyogi-uehara neighborhood is very nice, you can find a lot of interesting food-stalls near the station and shops around the block.

Overall, staying at Kako's place has been a great experience!

What a beautiful house with a charming garden and such lovely hosts! I highly recommend this place and would stay with Kako and Keiko-san again. The futon in the tatami room was very comfortable and perfect for a good night's sleep. The house is located in a residential district with easy access to Shinjuku. We were picked up and dropped off at the station, and breakfast was great. But be sure to remember the way back to the house from Yoyogiuehara station, as we got lost on our walk back from our adventure in the city :) Thank you, Kako and Keiko-san, look forward to staying with you again!

Kako and her mother were wonderful hosts. They were incredibly accommodating during my stay. Kako's mother was even kind enough to walk with me to places when I was confused. They provided directions, suggestions, and great conversation. I would highly recommend staying with them for a great experience. I will definitely rebook the next time I come to Tokyo. They have a very spacious and clean house in a great/quiet neighborhood.

Highly recommended. Special-designed house surprised me. More importantly, Kako and her mother are really kind and talktive (positive meaning). They speak good English and both of them are well-educated people. It's great fun to talk to them. To be honest, I personally think they do Airbnb is mainly because they want to talk to people and help international tourists. Definitely will stay with them again.

She was excelent in the house and looking for us at the station when we arrived and left. She always was taking care of us using the beautiful living and kitchen. Was very confortable and polite. Her daughter the same. Always a very good breakfast and nice talkings about japonese customs. Actually is vrry well recomended.

We have a very nice stay with Kako and her Mum! Kako's mum is very kind and helpful and she makes excellent salad of many kinds. We get to known more about Japan through her introduction. Hope to see them again and we wish all the best for them.
We booked another two night's stay in Kako's house. What a wonderful experience!
Great place to stay! Kako and her mom were very welcoming hosts that went above and beyond. The home is beautiful in a nice, centrally located area near a train station. Definitely recommended.

Kako and Keiko were extremely welcoming, both before we arrived and during our stay. Although our stay was short we really enjoyed our conversations with them. The house was cozy and the surrounding area really unique.

We had a warm & welcoming stay with Kako & her mum. We had some lovely walks in the local area, plenty of restaurants & cafes but also easy to get to everything in Tokyo. Their tips & suggestions for a few places to go to were great. The house & area is lovely, spacious & we valued our stay with them. Loved the breakfasts & the cats that live upstairs.
host is very friendly，the location is convenient，and the breakfast is tasty！

Great location, close to Shibuya, in a very cute neighborhood, very walkable, tons of cute restaurants/bakery/flower shops, etc. Keiko and Kako are such great hosts and make us feel very comfortable. We have our own room and bathroom which are spotless, have our own keys so we can come and go anytime we want, and Keiko makes us salad and bread for breakfast everyday! She also told us about places in the neighborhood to explore! What a great stay, can't wait to go back!

I had a lovely time staying with Kako and her mom. :) The house was exactly as advertised, spacious and airy - seems rare for Tokyo! The neighbourhood is cute and just a short convenient walk to the subway, or nice stroll to Shibuya. Kako and her mom were also great hosts - super friendly and helpful. I would definitely stay again!

It is definitely a wonderful place to stay and nice hospitality from Kako's mom. They also gave us some useful information so that we really enjoyed our trip in Tokyo. Moreover, at the last day, Kako's mom drove us around Tokyo and led us to some interesting places and then took us to the station where we could take JR line. Love everything in Japan, wish I could live here :D

Kako and Keko San are wonderful host, they will make you feel so at home. They both love the arts such as drama, musicals, opera and classical music, they are more than happy for you to play their Steinway piano as well. And I am thinking to stay there again with my husband. If you want to stay somewhere close to shinjuku but off the beaten path, this is a place for you. Their house is only 5 mins walk from yoyogiuehara station and one stop away from shinjuku or harajuku. You can also explore shimoshitazawa 下北沢which is just one stop away where you can find a lot of small shops and interesting gifts.

両親が上京する際の宿泊に利用させていただきました。

チェックイン時には私も一緒に伺わせてもらったのですが、
両親ともども、温かく歓迎していただきました。
写真で拝見した通り、とっても素敵なお家でした！

予約の際、宿泊する部屋でテレビが見れるかどうかの質問していたのですが、
通常はリビングに配置されているテレビを、わざわざ部屋の方へ移動していただけてました。
テレビ好きの両親だったのでありがたかったです。

手作りの朝食も、とても美味しく頂戴したと感激しておりました。

このようなサービスを利用する事が初めての両親だったのですが、オーナー家族の皆様には色々とお気遣いいただき、また色々とお話しもさせていただき、とても楽しく過ごせたと喜んでおりました。

また機会があれば、ぜひ利用させていただきたいと思っています。
ありがとうございました！！

Kako and her mother are very nice, as well as her brother! The room is clean, the breakfast is tasty, the house is located near the subway station! It's nice to chat with kako and her mother! I personally like Japanese culture a lot, after talking to Kako's mother, I know more about Japan and its culture! Kako's mother is so nice that she drove us to the train station this morning! And my friend once made a mistake with the coffee machine, Kako's mother even didn't blame her, although we feel very sorry about this. So I will highly recommend Kako's house!

I feel like stayed at home!kako and keko r really good host to make us free.They r both good english speaking.And provided a lot of help we need!Every morning keko prepared nice breakfast for us.Because we bring the baby,keko told don't worry about the baby crying because she's the mom of 3children.We spent a wonderful time stay with them.Next time I will be back.

My friend and I had a great time in this sweet home! Kako and her mom Keiko san are such great host that made us feel like stay at home. They both are artistic and hospitable. Keiko san made us light breakfast everyday in the morning and it's delicious. We love the house which is spacious, comfortable, clean and tidy. The garden is beautiful and sometimes can see cats in the garden. A lot of sunshine makes the house warm.  It's only 5mins walk to the nearest subway station. The neighborhood is cute and peaceful with plenty great restaurants and shops.  100% recommended.

Excellent place! Highly recommended!
I will definitely return and stay at Kako's place!

Excellent place! Highly recommended!
I will definitely return and stay at Kako's place!

We were so happy we staid here for our first nights in Tokyo and Japan- we so enjoyed these ladies' kind, easy, fun information and suggestions.  Comfy, clean, private.  We were most surprised at what a hip, fun, walkable neighborhood this is! Bistros, bars, people out walking, public transit, walkable to Harajuku & Shibuya.  Safe, interesting, and cosmopolitan.

What can I say.....Kako and Keiko have exceed our expectation in many aspects. They are very nice host and helpful (Keiko helped us locating restaurant , accompany us to train station).
Do not worry about the communication, they speak English very well
Great stay!!!

Cannot speak highly enough of Kako and especially her mother, who were charmingly hospitable and went above and beyond for any questions or requests we had! Hope to see both of you in Melbourne in the foreseeable future, if not in Tokyo! All the best, Rashiq
Fantastic people, very kind, dynamic, fluent in English combined with a house full of sun and joy made our stay extremely pleasant. We felt at home and would have liked to stay longer

Kako and Keiko are wonderful hosts, not only did they provided a wonderful home during our short stay, but also accommodated our irregular schedule caused by jet lag.
We loved everything of the house, enjoyed every moment chatting with the welcoming family, not to mention the tasty and health home made breakfast Keiko prepared for us every morning.
My only regret is that the trip was too short, but it was already unforgettable because of Keiko and Kako. Thank you!

Keiko has such a warm and friendly personality.  Both daughter(Kako) and mother(Keiko) really go out of their way to help us. Home made breakfast is a nice touch.  Thank you Keiko for the delicious tofu salads and omelettes you made for us.  We also love the spaciousness of our accommodation. The unplanned outing to Mt Fuji was the highlight of the stay.  We love the beautiful scenery that Keiko showed us and the cold soba lunch was unforgettably refreshing.
房子超美 女主人母女超nice 住的又舒服 英语交流无障碍 交通方便的不行 五星好评 prefect hosting！The cats r amazing cute btw

If you're travelling to Tokyo in the hopes of experiencing the same sense of beauty, warmth and comfort you would find in your own home - Kako & her wonderful mom Keiko are the perfect hosts. I cannot think of a way to fault such a lovely stay in a beautiful (almost meditative!) area of Tokyo; nor can I imagine a way Kako or Keiko could have been more welcoming and accommodating as they were to us. I wish our stay was longer! I definitely hope to return , and would love so much to stay here again.

I truly enjoyed my stay with Keiko and Kako. The hosts were so nice and kind to me, breakfast was so delicious, and the house is located in a convenient location. I really enjoyed the conversations i had with Keiko each morning and i would definitely want to stay with them again when i visit Tokyo next time!
Both Kako and Keiko are warm and friendly hosts. Thanks for welcoming us into your lovely home.
Lovely house. Lovely cats. Lovely breakfast. And of course our lovely host Keiko & Kako, thank you both of you!
I have had pleasant stay. Thanks for Keiko's hospitality. Breakfast is great! I will recommend your place.
We had a great stay and found them to be very nice and openly shared their wonderful tokyo home

Incredibly enjoyable stay at Kako and Keiko's place. Really lovely hosts and beautiful house. Kako and Keiko are very welcoming and we're very lucky to explore the neighbourhood with Keiko. So thankful for the stay and we highly recommend it without a doubt.

We had a great time! Kano and Keiko were so very welcoming, such wonderful hosts! Everything was as the description said. Even better, the neighbourhood was really lovely, lots of little interesting shops and places to eat. It was a haven in the fantastic chaos that is Tokyo.
What a beautiful house to stay in! Keiko went out of her way to make sure we were comfortable. And her cooked breakfasts were amazing. Perfect location for exploring Tokyo. Highly recommend.
非常好的房东，非常大的房子，每天沐浴着阳光吃着Mrs Keiko精心准备的日式早餐，美好的一天就开始了。 地理位置比较方便，共有两个轨道交通。 从房子去这两个轨道的路上都会遇到非常可爱，可口的小店。 离代代木上原小田急线站走路会有五到十分钟的步行距离，离新宿只有两站轨道交通。第一次，Keido会带着去熟悉周边环境和，去轨道交通的路线。
Nice,friendly,helpful,I feel really lucky that I can stay in their house.highly recommend.

This is the first family trip to Japan with 5 travelers..So chose to rent a house so maybe we can feel like we are home!! And we chose Kako-Keko house, spacious shibuya house!!

Here is a beautiful and comfortable place wiz 4 pretty cats and all great facilities. I really impress wiz the owners, Keko and Kako. They are so nice and kindly seems we are family!! Good helpness, even I made many questions and troubles!! hahaha..I love the easily traffic from home to the town. We can walk to the stations. You made me feel home as we are Japanese. I love the way you cooked us breakfast. One more think..thx to let me stay in ur son's bedroom coz we are 5pp, which made me so exited, climbed up to sleep!! Thx for ur kindness and I promise I'll be there again everytime my family go to Tokyo.

See you later surely!!

Kungfu-Kandy-Banyen Rakkaen and the family!!!
房东的整栋房子超大，这片区域应该也属于富人区了。出租的房间在一楼靠近大门口的地方，比较小，基本上除了睡睡觉也就不能干啥了。主要是一楼的公共区域很大，阳光房的餐厅，超大的厨房和有四只猫猫的客厅。房东住在二楼，人非常nice，还会准备简单的早餐，英文沟通毫无问题！

We really enjoyed staying at Kakos and Keikos house, which is really spacious and flowing with light from the big windows facing the garden - just as shown on the pictures.
Since Kako was travelling we only got to meet Keiko - who really made us feel comfortable and at home. She welcomed us on arrival, showed us the way around the area and cooked breakfast for us in the morning. We had a spacious bedroom and our own bathroom.
Thank you! We would love to come back!

Wonderful stay in Keiko's beautiful house. She made us feel at home, and was the most delightful host. Keiko helped us find the best restaurants in the neighbourhood and the best routes to our destinations.  The Japanese style breakfast were delicious and copious and we had lovely conversations. A true Airbnb spirit! We'd love to come back.

emplacement parfait, très proche du metro et de shibuya, avec un tas de restos excellents
maison super design
dejeuner japonais excellent
très bonne maîtrise de l'anglais
gentillesse incroyable
c'est de loin le meilleur airbnb que j'ai fait
difficile de quitter Kako et Keiko
merci à vous, vous avez contribué à ce que notre voyage puisse à jamais être gravé dans notre mémoire

Staying at Kako and Keiko's place in Japan made our trip even more memorable. Their incredibly warm hospitality, to the delicious breakfast and mischevious cats. The neighborhood is extremely safe and quiet, 5mins walk to Yoyogi Uehara station. Overall I really enjoyed my stay and would totally recommend to anyone else out there.
Regards,
Jason & Chooi Yee

Unforgettable days in Tokyo. Keiko! What can I say? She is not a host, she is best friend of us. Lovely house, beatiful garden,
very delicious breakfasts, memorable conversations about her and Japanese culture. We were privileged. In fact, living her house is to be privileged.

This was our first experience of Airbnb. We booked to stay with Kako and Keiko in Tokyo. We had an amazing time at their lovely home made all the more special by our wonderful, English speaking hosts who went out of their way make our visit an experience not to be forgotten.Kako is very knowledgeable about her home city and gave us all the help and guidance we needed. Her large and comfortable house was perfectly situated for all our needs.We would not hesitate to recommend staying wth Kako!

The epitome of Airbnb experience! Perfect base for us during our Tokyo stay. Felt like we were visiting a friend. Thanks for sharing your spacious house. Forget about cat cafe there's 4 cats here! Will miss you all. Sorry for all the screaming from our 3y/o! (P/s: he keeps asking to go back there!)
Casa meravigliosa in un bel quartiere residenziale a 20 min a piedi da shibuya. L'accoglienza e' stata fantastica: grazie a tutta la famiglia, spero di rivedervi presto

Our family of 4 had a great time! It was an unforgettable experience staying at Kako & Keiko's house. Keiko is a very gracious and hospitable host. She helped us plan our day to day itinerary and gave us her personal recommendations on where to go. It was like staying at a good friend's house, they both made us feel very much at home. Highly recommended!

We couldn't have asked for more when staying with Kako and Keiko. We felt welcomed into their home from the moment we walked through the door and got along with them so well. We were treated to a lovely home-cooked breakfast each day, had great conversations and were told so many great stories about their family history. They're a family of genuinely lovely people and great hosts. We'll miss them.

Many of us know that getting a solid night's rest can be difficult when traveling abroad but all of us agreed that we probably had some of our deepest sleeps staying in this house! Very comfortable. The house itself is spacious with a beautiful garden. Bright and airy with plenty of sunlight flooding in through the windows.

The surrounding neighbourhood is quiet but filled with plenty of eateries, cafes and quirky little shops to give it character. Such a convenient location too – you're able to get anywhere you really need to be by taking the train just one stop to Shinjuku, where all major trains interconnect. It's a lovely stroll to Yoyogi Park too and walking through to the other side brings you straight to Harajuku!

Truly great place to stay with generous, kind Kako as host. Charming, small scale, neighbourhood, perfect for families. With Kakos homemade breakfasts and an abundance of good restaurants down the street this is the place to stay for food lovers.

Our stay with Keiko and Kako was straight up the best experience I've had with a host thus far! Keiko was fantastic and always helpful, the space was lovely and comfortable. And the house itself? Amazing. The neighborhood was super fun to explore, and close to a metro station that we used every day to get to Meijijingumae. I would stay with Keiko again in a heartbeat - I hope to come back one day!

If you are new to Airbnb, like me, do not hesitate to spend your nights here. No regrets!
Firstly, the Kishimoto family speaks good English. Secondly, nutritious breakfast is prepared by Keiko-san every morning and amenities are also provided. Thirdly, location is really convenient - there are many eateries around the lovely neighbourhood (from bakeries to bars; you name it, they have it). Fourthly, it is less than 10mins walk to her home from train station (the only downside is the upslope). Lastly, it is one station away from Shinjuku (via Odakyu line) and Yoyogi-koen (via Chiyoda line), and chiyoda line gets you to almost every places in your itinerary easily.
My parents and I were warmly welcomed by Keiko-san at the door. She was amiable, enthusiastic, outgoing, generous, kind, helpful, selfless and understanding. She gave us a tour of the places in the house we could access during our stay and she made us feel at home. I couldn't emphasise enough how comfortable we were during our 7 nights stay.
To top it off, we had nutritious breakfast prepared by Keiko-san before getting our days started. She would check on us if the food suits our appetite and if we had a good sleep the night before. She also shared with us her past experiences and local culture. Conversations with her were really knowledgable.
We met her daughter Kako-san and her son, they were both friendly and well-mannered. Like their mother, they were very welcoming.
On our last day, Keiko-san kindly offered to drive us to our hotel. We couldn't be more blessed and grateful to have such wonderful host. I highly recommend this humble Airbnb abode as I will definitely book this place when I travel to Tokyo again!

Keiko est une hôte hors pair. Chaleureuse, accueillante, disponible, anglais parfait, adorables petits déjeuners et explications pour toutes les questions possibles...on s'est senti chez elle comme à la maison. Une maison exceptionnelle au cœur d'un coin calme de Shibuya, à 25 minutes à pied de son centre névralgique, deux stations de métro à proximité. On ne peut rêver mieux à Tokyo. Un havre de paix. Nuits calmes dans une grande chambre à tatamis, sauf lorsque les chats (qui vivent en cage...) s'agitent et miaulent pour réclamer leur nourriture vers 5h du matin. Malgré ce petit bémol, une excellente adresse où nous avons pu laisser une partie de nos bagages jusqu'à la fin de notre séjour.
Merci Keiko pour votre accueil!

Pour notre deuxième séjour chez Keiko, au terme de notre voyage, il a été très agréable de revenir "chez nous", toujours aussi chaleureusement accueillis par Keiko et ses enfants. Keiko nous a même amenée en voiture le lendemain à Shinjuku au terminal des bus pour Haneda.
Une excellente adresse que mes enfants et moi recommandons vivement.
Merci pour tout Keiko et peut-être à une prochaine fois!

Our stay at Kako & Keiko's house was very pleasant.
They were very sweet and always helped us with questions and planning our trips around Tokyo. When we came home Keiko always had a cool drink for us and we could calm down in the peaceful house and garden.
We also loved the fresh salad and fruits for breakfast.
We would recomment a stay at their house anytime!

Esperienza eccezionale a casa di Keiko&Kako. La posizione è comodissima per i trasporti, è una zona tranquilla di Tokyo con tantissimi ristorantini caratteristici e di livello nelle immediate vicinanze
Abbiamo viaggiato con i nostri 3 bimbi (7,5 e 1 anno) e ci siamo sentiti a nostro agio fin da subito grazie alla squisita gentilezza e ospitalità dei nostri ospiti. E' stato per noi fondamentale avere il supporto di Keiko il primo giorno per immergerci subito nella città (con indicazioni sui traporti, ristoranti) e per avere delle interessanti chiavi di lettura sugli usi e costumi giapponesi. Consigliatissimo

I've been to Tokyo for so many times. But, I really have to say that it was the best experience to stay in Keiko's house! We lived with Keiko and the family. All of them are so nice and like the old friends that made us just feel like at home. Keiko woke up so early and prepared us delicious breakfast and home-made yogurt everyday. The house is located in a nice and trendy area. Just five minutes walking to the metro. Stores and nice restaurants are around 2~5 minutes. We will come back again next time!

Pour notre premier séjour au Japon, la rencontre avec Keiko et Kako a été la meilleure chose qui puisse nous arriver. Keiko est une hôte formidable qui se plie en quatre pour ses visiteurs. En deux mots : "gochisosama deshita" tant son traditionnel petit déjeuner est un enchantement (soupes miso à tomber !). Merci aussi pour les conversations intéressantes sur la culture japonaise ! Belle demeure, idéalement située dans un quartier calme mais très central, à proximité de deux gares. Merci à Keiko pour avoir facilité notre départ en nous conduisant à la gare. Nous recommandons cette maison (surtout aux amis des chats). Stella & Norbert et leurs enfants

한국인이니 한국어로 작성할께요 ㅋㅋ
프라이버시와 보안상의 이유로 위치는 자세히 말하지 않겠습니다.
대략적인 위치는 요요기우에하라역(代々木上原駅)과 요요기하치만역(代々木八幡駅)의 중간쯤에 위치 하고 있습니다.
두 역 모두 주변에 마을 상점가가 있으므로 자잘한 먹거리 쇼핑 및 다양한 생활용품, 의약품의 구매가 매우 편합니다.
저녁시간대에는 자그마한 디너바, 술집들이 문을 엽니다.
그 외에도 솜씨좋은 개인 레스토랑들이 많아 식사 겸 힐링을 위해 가게에 들르는것도 추천 드립니다. 셀카 사진 찍기 딱 좋은 분위기의 가게 많아요!
숙소는 시부야역과 가깝기 때문에 10분 안으로 도쿄 중심가로 진입하는것이 용이하며, 반대로 공항(나리타 또는 하네다)에서 리무진 버스를 이용했을시, 환승의 귀찮음을 피하며 시부야역으로 한번에 들어오는게 가능합니다.
다음은 숙소에 관한 리뷰 입니다.
해당 숙소는 민박이라기보단 홈 스테이에 가까운 숙소입니다.
기본적으로 집주인께서 이것저것 보살펴 주십니다.
아침은 간단하지만 깔끔하고 부담없는 메뉴로, 가벼운 샐러드와 토스트(와 머핀), 네스까페 캡슐 커피, 우유, 쥬스등이 제공됩니다.
시설은 큰 방 하나와 그에 인접한 높은 천장의 거실, 에어컨이 기본 설치 되어있으며, 1인용 샤워부스와 양변기가 설치된 작은 욕실이 있습니다.
또한 칫솔, 치약, 비누, 샴푸, 트리트먼트, 바디 타월이 기본 제공이 됩니다.
청소의 경우 프라이버시를 위해 숙박중에는 되도록이면 요청에 따라 당일 청소가 이루어 집니다.
다음은 숙박시설의 일부(?)인지 아닌지 확실치 않은 고양이입니다.
총 4마리로, 고령의 고양이(13살) 한마리와 2-3살의 고양이 3마리로 이루어 집니다.
