13살 할아버지 고양이는 조용하고 얌전하지만 손님에게는 그렇게 관심은 없습니다.
나머지 3마리는 굉장히 활발하고 호기심이 많지만 곧잘 다가오지 않고 경계를 합니다
친해지면 쓰다듬을수 있습니다만......전 엉덩이 만졌다고 깨물림 당했습니다 -ㅅ-;
엉덩이 만지지 마세요....
이어폰 줄, 폰 충전케이블 보이지 마세요. 고양이 껌으로 전락합니다.
케이지에 들어가있는게 불쌍하다고 함부로 문 열어주지 마세요. 집주인분들만 통제 가능한 무서운 아이들이에요.......
집주인분들께서 매우 친절하니 외국어가 잘 안된다 할 지라도 많은것을 알려주실려고 합니다. 기본적으로 가능하신 언어로는 영어, 일본어 그리고 프랑스어도 가능하십니다.
집주인분들 모두 여성분들이시니 여성들의 숙박지로도 최적입니다.
참고로 주변 맛집들을 엄청 잘 알고 있으시므로 꼭 추천받아서 가시길 바랍니다 ㅎㅎ
케이코상! 케이코상 덕분에 안락하게 지내다 귀국했습니다 감사합니다!

Keiko and Kako were both fabulous hosts. We mainly saw Keiko because she was there more. She went out of her way to help us  find our way round Tokyo and make us feel at home in the house, which is clean and comfortable. It is near to the station and quick to get to various parts of Tokyo. Because both Kato and Keiko spoke excellent English (and our Japanese is almost non-existent) our communication was very easy. Also, a big plus for us was being able to ask about some aspects of Japanese culture. It is a very special AirB&B.

Keiko-san is one of the best hosts we have ever experienced through Airbnb. She warmly welcomed us into her home and made feel very comfortable. She helped us with train travel directions, restaurant reservations, and she even drove us to train stations. Her home is beautiful, with great windows and a peaceful yard. The neighborhood is one of Tokyo's finest, with quaint lanes to stroll and excellent restaurants.

Kako and Keiko were the most amazing hosts: kind, attentive, communicative and caring. Keiko took care of every wish we ever had, starting from a wonderful breakfast, excellent coffee throughout the day (Nespresso), useful tips (our first time in Japan), recommendations for where to go (including green tea festival that she saw in the paper on that morning), and much more. Kako and Keiko were really able to create for us home away from home.
The neighborhood - Shibuya, is also amazing: quite central, lots of places to hang out and see, close to the subway and to Meiji shrine and yoyogi park - simply perfect!
The flat itself was amazing, we had a large bedroom that fit all 4 of us, living room and dining room all for ourselves, as well as access to the beautiful garden. Keiko was always around taking care of every need (Kako and Keiko live upstairs, so they were always close by).
For us, vising Japan for the first time, this was the perfect way to begin our vacation.
One thing worth mentioning is that there are 3 cats living on the premises. This was great for us as a cat-loving family, but please bear this in mind in case someone in your party is allergic to cats.

We loved our stay with Keiko-san and Kako-san. They did a wonderful job at making us feel welcome and at home in our 4 night stay. Kako took us to a local restaurant and helped us pick out some items when they didn't have an English menu, and Keiko greeted us every day and had a perfect and simple breakfast ready on the table. The room was perfect for the three of us! The neighborhood couldn't be any nicer - it was great just for walking around, and has super convenient access to the Chou and Odakyu lines.  This was definitely our favorite part of our long trip through Japan :)
Lovely place. Our host was very helpfull and adorable.

The Air BNB host of this house was unbelievably welcoming and an absolute pleasure to deal with. The house is stunning and has a fantastic and peaceful garden (even complete with a Yuzu tree)! The photos and information provided was accurate and I would recommend this to any person visiting Tokyo.

Keiko and Kako were great hosts. We were mainly communicating with Keiko on our trip. Both of them spoke fluent english so communication was not a problem.

The place was lovely and spacious and every morning, Keiko would prepare a simple but wonderful breakfast for us.

Two things to note though was that the house has 3 cats. As we were cat lovers, we did not mind and had lots of fun playing with them on and off. The other thing is that while the location is great with plenty of nice restaurants around the area, you may need to walk one or two slopes to get to the house, which may be daunting for elderly people.

Other than that, the stay was almost perfect and Keiko really went out of her way to make us feel at home and to accommodate our requests. Highly recommended.

A wonderful place to stay in Tokyo. Very well located, about 500m from the Yoyogi-uehara metro station. A must have is a PASMO card. Very easy to travel in the City. Never needed a taxi. Only the metro and our legs.
The room (just like the rest of the house) is very spacious and the tatami mats give a authentic feeling to the bedroom. But the most important plus of this place are Kako & Keiko. They helped to make our one week stay, one that we will never forget. Reservations, guidance, the (Japanese) breakfast,... it all made our stay unforgettable. They made us feel at home, and even treated us as family/friends (Even inviting us for diner with other family friends, giving us an inside of the Japanese life).
Also the 4 cats, it was a joy to play with them.
For sure, if we travel back to Japan, this will be the place we stay again. Without a doubt!

Kako and Keiko were amazing hosts who displayed a lot of hospitality. They gave us restaurant and shopping recommendations. Kako even offered to make miso soup for us for breakfast. During checkout, we weren't rushed out but was instead told to take our time and even enjoy a cup of coffee before going.
Their house is spacious, which is a surprise for the Shibuya location. They even have a backyard. I enjoyed the fact that there are many large windows, which lets in a lot of natural light.

Staying in Kako and Keiko's residence is like staying at a great aunt's place.
The communication prior to stay was easy and prompt. The location was quaint and within a comfortable, leisurely and enjoyable 5-7min walk to the train station Yoyogi-Uehara.
The hospitality was AMAZING. They have 4 adorable cats as housemates and with 2 young children in tow this provided endless hours of fun and play.
Keiko provided not only golden nuggets of informational exchange but her breakfast was very yummy.
She was very tolerant of our very noisy children and for that we were truly grateful for.
On our last day Keiko was so kind as to drive us to Shinjuku station to catch our train to Hakone. With 4 huge luggage in tow and 2 young children, this was the icing on the cake of an extremely enjoyable and wonderful stay.
Highly recommend without a doubt!

Kaki and keikos home was perfect for our family. Our daughter is mad about cats so she was able to play with the cats to her hearts content.
Keiko was a wonderful host who assisted us in many ways. A great conversationalist with a great knowledge of the local area and of Japanese history.
We had a beautiful breakfast and very dad before setting out on our adventures in Tokyo.
Thanks Keiko!
We loved Keiko's house and her wonderful hospitality. The cats were a great a novelty for the kids. Keiko made us feel very relaxed and at home. If we return to Tokyo we will definitely stay again.

Kako and Keiko's house was a warm, comfortable and spacious trendy Japanese home. We loved learning more about Japanese culture from our lovely chats and the restaurants within walking distance from the house were amazing. The train station was extremely close. We would stay there again!

Keiko was so kind and helpful on our trip. I had an allergy flare up and she personally drove me to the dr and a pharmacy, which would have been very hard to navigate without help. Keiko to the rescue, above and beyond! We felt like one of the family by the time we left. The location is quiet and the space is very big for Tokyo. Highly recommended!
Wonderful hospitality, lovely house. Space is shared with cats and breakfast was given by our kind host. Fantastic to have some outdoor space too. We really appreciated Keiko's kind help and advice .

We had an absolute great time at Kako & Keiko's place. This lovely house is in a great location, close enough to the busy and famous area, like shinjuku, shibuya and omotesendo. The room provided was spacious for 4 people and was well maintained and clean. Kako San and Keiko San are very nice host. We are so grateful to them and to their help in making our trip to Tokyo such a great one!
Thanks so much for the yummy breakfast, directions on our trip, drive to the bus terminal! Much appreciated!
We would love to visit Kako and Keiko again in the future and would love to meet up with them in Beijing one day!

Our family of three stayed for 11 days with Keiko and Kako.  Hard to say enough good things about the experience and, particular, our wonderful host, Keiko.  It's a real home stay with a gracious and engaging host in a terrific neighbourhood.  We loved it - just loved it.

Keiko was a fantastic host - she is funny, caring, thoughtful and insightful. We learned so much about her family and the Japanese culture whilst staying in her home. The house is central, with many good restaurants and cafes nearby. Keiko has four very cute cats for you to play with whilst staying in her home. Thank you for such a memorable stay!

We had a great stay at Kako and Keiko's house.
The house is located in a charming area, in a very calm street at the top of a little hill. There are a lot of nice restaurants around and it is very convenient to visit Tokyo.
Keiko was a perfect host, the breakfast were delicious and she did all her efforts to make us feel home. We highly recommend the place.

We stayed 10 days in her house.
The house is good, the host is nice and she makes good breakfast, she made our laundry which was very nice of her.
The place is close to everything by subway or on walk. The area is very calm which good when you walk the whole day on busy streets. The area is very safe.
It is better to walk because you can see much more things.
The only inconvenient I can say is that you share the house with the host. So yes you have the first floor but you really share your house with the host so for us it was a bit disturbing because we did not feel we were in our house. But that not that bad because Kaiko and Kako are very nice and they make you feel at home.
Thanks Kaiko for everything

If you're looking to experience a 'tatami room' in a spacious home with a great location and a great hostess and don't mind cats, this is definitely the best place to stay.
Keiko is such a gracious hostess and very helpful as she speaks very good English. There's definitely lots of room and we are so grateful for the gardens as my husband likes to smoke a cigar in the evenings and enjoyed the gardens. There is a lovely sun room with lots of light and feels like you're sitting outside and enjoying breakfast.
Fantastic location as we had access to two stations that lead us directly to other parts of Tokyo very easily. It's also walking distance to the Yoyogi park and unfortunately we arrived too late to see the Sakura trees but I'm sure it must have been beautiful. There are lots of local Japanese and fusion restaurants nearby for meals.
I highly recommend the Fuku restaurant nearby for exceptional 'yakitori'. We were lucky to get a seat as we were told they are usually very fully booked but I sure Keiko can help make the reservation for you when you decide to go.
Keiko was very kind to take us to see Mt. Fuji and we were lucky it was a clear day so that the view was just perfect.
Keiko was full of information and we got to understand more about the Japanese culture and the region. She also took us to the shrine near Mt Fuji and explained so much more which made the visit so much more interesting.
Wifi is also available at the house and as long as you have google maps on your mobile device, you can't go wrong finding the house.
We had a very early flight and Keiko was so kind to wake up early and take us to the bus shuttle to catch the bus to the airport.
We wish we could have stayed longer.

If you are looking to experience upscale Japanses at home atmosphere, this is a place for you. There are 4 cats who will welcome you as well. For my stay, breakfast were provided. very nice host! thank you!!

Keiko is a superhost, and she deserves it!
She is nice and very helpfull. The house is big and the neighborhood is amazing. Quiet and trendy in the same time.
A lovely part of Tokyo, very near shibuya crossing.
She speaks very good English and communication is easy.
The cats are very nice and quiet.
We had a little baby, 20 months, and the house is perfectly adapted. We could make a loundry, and this is really useful!
We would recommend keiko and come back for sure !

Beautiful house and garden
Very decent neighborhood
Kako&Keiko are very friendly and thoughtful. We felt at home while staying there.

It was really a great one month stay for 3 of us, Japanese dad, Polish mom and 5 year old daughter who was going to a kindergarten near Shibuya. The house is spacious, conveniently located for anything, subway, bus and many small nice restaurants. Keiko san's breakfast was amazing and further more, she was kind enough to prepared lunch box for our daughter everyday. We totally recommend it to anyone.

The place is quiet and very relaxing. We enjoyed having the very good breakfast surrounded by the garden. In the evening, after the whole day in the crowd and heat, it was a pleasure to come back home, enjoying the living room.
The place is quiet and yet charming with many restaurants and shops around.
Public transportation (metro) is at 5 minutes walking distance. The walk to Shibuya is pleasant (30 minutes to get to the famous cross).
Keiko with her kindness and availability made our trip special and once again we warmly thank her

代々木上原の坂上の素敵な邸宅です。
ガーデンビューがとても綺麗で、ご用意してくださった朝食を食べながら眺めると、心がリフレッシュします。
猫ちゃんを4匹飼われていて、とても愛らしいです。同じフロアにゲージがありますが、ステイするお部屋は個室なので音はそこまで気になりません。
ホストの上品で朗らかな奥様と素敵なお嬢様が、近くの美味しいお店を教えてくださりました。
日本人の宿泊者は私達で2組目だったそうです。
keiko很nice。猫老大很酷。距离代代木上原站不远。居住氛围很自由不压抑。航班比较晚，行李放到了下午。

这是一个极其美好的房子。房东热情好客，英语交流无压力。地段好，房间床铺舒适，客厅也很大。This is a most wonderful house. The landlord is hospitable and free of charge in English communication. Lots, rooms, beds comfortable, living room is also very large.

Wonderful space surrounded by a quiet, relaxing neighborhood! Only a few stops away from major tourist spots like Meiji Shrine and Harajuku. Keiko and Kako are super sweet and we'd love to stay with them again!

After a long and tiring trip fm abroad i first did not realize how lucky i was being a guest of keiko and kako. i enjoyed a patient first hand introduction, lots of support and an adorable hospitality, all in english.
the house is located in a quiet area but close to public transport and even shibuya square is in walking distance of abt 20min.
the house is lovely, tidy and clean.
i will come back :)

We love the house. The mother (Keito) is very kind and gave meticulous care to us. We checked in in the midnight, so she woke up to open the gate. My wife is pregnant, she drove us to the railway station. Next time we go to Tokyo, we will be back!

This was our first trip to Japan and Kako made us feel right at home in her lovely home. Great location close to the shopping area's and the fantastic train system!
Thank you again Kako and Keiko for the awesome breakfasts and warm home!
Would stay again!

This was our first trip to Japan and Kako made us feel right at home in her lovely home. Great location close to the shopping area's and the fantastic train system!
Thank you again Kako and Keiko for the awesome breakfasts and warm home!
Would recommend and would stay again!

We love the place very much. Conveniently located 10mins away from train station. Plenty of eateries nearby. The place is within walking distance to Yoyogi Park, Harajuku and Shibuya.
Keiko speaks English fluently and she is an excellent host. She makes extra effort to make our stay comfortable and enjoyable.
Although they live just upstairs, we had our privacy and space. The place is as the pictures and is very cosy. The cats are very cute and friendly! We will definitely choose to stay there if we visit Tokyo again.

Most welcoming and accommodating hosts. Kayko’s breakfasts are amazing. She is incredibly warm and hospitable. The location is amazing and close to all the major landmarks. We’ll definitely stay here again.
非常美丽热情的主人，穿了漂亮的和服迎接我们，健康美味可口的早餐，干净舒适的床。房子更加漂亮，阳光花园更加温馨美好。喜欢这里，儿子很喜欢奶奶。每天早晨醒来后的问候就在自己家里一样。非常感谢，孩子期待下次见面。

Staying at Keiko and Kako's place in their beautiful, spacious house in a delightful and quiet part of Shibuya was a wonderful experience.  Keiko was cheerful, generous, attentive and friendly and she speaks English fluently.  She showed us around our part of the house, which had everything we could need, and a wonderful sun lit breakfast area, which was a real treat, as it was a beautiful spot to enjoy her lovely cooked breakfast.  Keiko helped us to find places to eat locally and even drove us to the bus station on our departure.  She was a wealth of knowledge too, on any things we were curious about.  We were very grateful to have had the opportunity to stay here.
Kako&Keiko is kind，The beds is comfortable.

This place is a definite winner.   Keiko has a beautiful, spacious house with a garden.  She is a delightful hostess.   Her breakfasts were delicious and sustained us well into the afternoon.  She is a life long Tokyo resident and has a wealth of local knowledge.  My son and I stayed with her on our first 4 nights in Japan and couldn't have had a warmer welcome to the country.

This is guaranteed to be one of the best, if not the best airbnb experience you’ve ever had. Keiko and Kako were so generous and welcoming, within a day or two we felt like we’ve lived there our whole lives. The perfect balance between hospitality and privacy. The house itself is beautiful and our room and private area were super comfortable. We will recommend Keiko and Kako’s place to everyone we know. And then will surely feel a tad jealous whenever we’ll hear about anyone else staying in “our” room. Can’t wait to go back....

Keiko and Kako were so easy to be around. The neighborhood is peaceful and quiet yet a very short walk to lots of shops and restaurants. There is "mud park" nearby if you have a kiddo who needs some free play with tools. And a kids bicycle rental and track at Yoyogi park. The living arrangements are slightly different that pictured, there is a privacy screen across the middle of the living room, giving you a private space outside of the room and the cats cages are in the kitchen. You do have to like cats as there are four, one free and the other three live in cages:) They were a little noisy in the mornings but we were up early anyways. Having Kaiko make breakfast is very nice if you're up early. The neighborhood gets a late startout a lot of food options or coffee before 9. Kaiko was very often around if we needed anything and so warm and generous. It was a great start to our travels.
Beautiful modern house in a great location.  Thanks for the excellent breakfasts Keiko!   We enjoyed our stay.

Outstanding hospitality. Keiko and kako-san are really warm in their welcome and took care of our needs well. They also navigated us around the quiet but convenient neighbourhood. Sleep was comfortable and spacious. Would love to return.

Keiko's hospitality is absolutely amazing. The coffee machine is great. If you have children traveling with you, they would love the four cats that inhabit the household. Located in a great neighborhood. Lots of sunshine.

Kako & Keiko have a lovely home- I had a short, but delightful stay. The location is unbeatable and I was able to walk to so many great attractions. I needed some help transporting to my next homestay and they were nice enough to offer me a ride to the train station. I really appreciate such kind hospitality. Would love to stay here again!

So much of our stay in Tokyo was special because of Keiko.
She helped us in myriad ways.
There was always so much to talk about.Laugh about too!
We even got used to sleeping on the floor!
We loved loved loved Keiko’s hospitality. Felt like being in a real home.  Garden view lovely. Very quite neighborhood.

The house is on a very secluded street and you have your own space away from the owners. Keiko was an outstanding host. She walked us to the dinner location she recommended so we wouldn’t get lost and many other things that were just lovely. It was a lovely placer to come home to after being out sightseeing in the busy city. Highly recommend

A very nice place to stay at!
Host incredible nice and helpful

my family and I had a wonderful first ever Airbnb experience staying at Keiko and Keko's lovely house in Shibuya. The hospitality and kindness shown by our host Keiko was amazing and hugely appreciated and we loved every minute of our stay. I would highly recommend anyone considering staying at an Airbnb in central Tokyo to stay here!.

very good house and kindhearted host ，and the host can speak English very well， so the language is not problem，and the traffic is ok too near the subway station，although we have problem with check in (the google map lead us the wrong way，can not blame to the host)，but we really，have good day during our vaction in Tokyo ，so thank to the host!
ps:the cat in the house is really cute.

This was the my first stay in an AirBnB and I can't imagine it being any better: what friendly, generous and helpful hosts; what a large, modern, airy house (a rarity in Tokyo!); what delicious food; and what a perfect location. And you have cats and a beautiful garden (another rarity in Tokyo, a real luxury). I will stay here every time I return to Tokyo.

Abbiamo soggiornato da Kako & Keiko per cinque notti, ci siamo sentiti come a casa nostra.
Anche a nostra figlia di sette anni è piaciuta molto la casa e soprattutto i gattini di Kako.
La casa è vicino alla metropolitana ed al centro ed è in un luogo tranquillo.

We are a family of three (mother and two teens) and we stayed at Kako and Keiko’s house for a week. We arrived very late at night and Keiko was still up to greet us. The location is amazing and it’s a cute neighbourhood, close to many cafes, restaurants and Yoyogi Park. We actually walked through the park to get to Harajuku and it didn’t take long at all! Yoyogi Uehara station is v close to the house and from there, you can get to Shinjuku in a matter of a few minutes too. It’s also a super-easy trip straight to Shimokitazawa where we spent a full day thrift/ second hand clothes shopping :)
The house itself is large, clean and has a lovely garden - rare for Tokyo and it provided quite a restful sanctuary after each full day of exploring the city. Keiko’s breakfasts were also appreciated. We are ‘cat people’ so we loved Keiko’s cats. Most of all, Keiko’s company made our stay in Tokyo a delightful one. Thank you!

Keiko and Kako made our stay in Tokyo extra special with their friendly hospitality and helpful tips on what to see and how to best get around this wonderful and at times bewildering city. Their house is lovely and is in a great neighborhood close to many transport options. We can't imagine how our stay could have been any more enjoyable anywhere else. We will always have fond memories of our stay.

We (3) stayed with Keiko for 3 days. Her daughter Kako handled all correspondence which was always prompt.
Keiko’s home is welcoming, and we had everything needed for a VERY comfortable stay. Her cooked breakfasts were delicious, her recommendations were helpful and I would not hesitate to stay here again.
Beautiful, local neighbourhood with great selection of eateries. An easy walk from the station.
Thank you Keiko! We will be back xx
A beautiful house in the most wonderful location for local restaurants, cafes and shops - it is a joy to explore the neighbourhood and our hosts were extremely kind and helpful.

The apartment is well located in a quiet and posh area very close to Yoyogi Uehara Station ！The apartment is surrounded by nice shops and restaurants! The hostess is friendly and helpful and knowledgeable who can answer all questions that you have ! We shared spacious living and dining room with the host family who kindly prepared breakfast in the morning! The only drawback is that. the bedroom is just too tight for three big guys and we guess there is little  that Keiko could do ! In any case this apartment is highly recommended to friends and family in future visits  who wish to stay in a quiet but nice area in the centre of Tokyo !

We are so happy we stayed at Kako & Keiko's place. Keiko was very kind and helped us with suggestions on places to go. She made us breakfast in the morning. The best heart shape  fried eggs we have eaten. Unfortunately my husband became sick with a cold. Keiko was so helpful giving him some local medicine and vitamins. And made us Miso soup. And that helped my husband to feel better. Keiko also provided us with lots of knowledge and history of Japan. She made it feel like home. Also loved her cats. We have two so it was nice to have them there.  We would definitely stay here again.

This was hands down one of my best Airbnb Experiences. A beautiful home, in a great location with a very charming and generous host. Plus a very comfortable bed and delicious breakfasts. Not only did they let me checkin at 6:15am after a red eye flight, but also drove me to the station on the day I checked out. If this home is available during your stay in Tokyo, don’t hesitate to book. You will be sure to find it’ll be a highlight of your trip.
Pleasant and helpful English speaking host, very well equipped kitchen.

This will be gushing but we can’t express enough how grateful we are for being able to stay with Keiko and Kako. We loved our daily breakfasts, the company of the cats and the beautiful home. It’s a funky area (the local Fuku Yakitori was amazing) and convenient for getting around. I liked walking to Shibuya instead of catching the train. We stayed with our young family. Bless you Keiko for making us feel at home even if our kids were unruly! You truly went above and beyond in hosting us and so much enhanced our Tokyo experience. We highly recommend a stay here!

房东是一位特别上品的日本老太太，很随意也很体贴，你可以用英语跟她进行很好的交流，如果你懂日语，那会交流得更多。
房东是一位有爱心的日本老太太，她养了四只猫，都是曾经被遗弃的猫。如果你也喜欢猫，你们能交流得更好。房间里还有一架三角钢琴，如果你会弹琴，你可以随意弹奏，因为房间的空间很大，不会影响到邻居。
说是老太太，其实房东并没有那么老，看上去还很年青。我住过几次民宿，能和房东说上这么多话的这是第一次。

Kako is an amazing host and her place is beautiful  (and the location is great if you are looking for a quiet refuge in the city).  It was like staying with a friend or family member. She was incredibly helpful, with good advice not only in where to go, eat, etc;  but how to get there.  She helped make restaurant reservations,  drove us to the train station when we left, among other things. Her English is great.  If you go to Tokyo, stay here!  Best air bnb experience ever!

Staying with Keiko has been one of our best Airbnb experiences ever. She is an absolute gem of a host, and helped us have a new perspective of Tokyo and Japan. Our trip wouldn’t have nearly as good if it wasn’t for her.
Her house is incredible beautiful as well, combining modern Japanese architecture, a room with classic Japanese decoration, and a gorgeous garden.
If you have the chance to book Keiko’s place do it, you won’t regret it!

Great room in a perfect location! Keiko was the perfect host giving us wonderful tips and insider info.
She made an excellent breakfast every morning and even drove us to a place (Don Quixote) so I could pick up another piece of luggage for all my souvenirs.
The room and bathroom was private, clean and worked well for us (2 adults). The neighborhood is very quiet and it’s only a 5 minute walk to the subway/train station.
I am a cat person, so I loved her cats, too.
It made our visit so much easier since we don’t speak/read Japanese or know anyone in Japan. We would definitely stay again!
Very nice and cozy house in Shibuya. Keiko is a great host, her English is very good, and she even made us delicious toasts for breakfast. Thank you!

Keiko was a friendly and service minded host to us all week, and also helped us to get to our excursion by her car. It was nice to get to know Keiko, her inmate Allison and Keikos family a little, and it gave an extra dimension to the trip. Even though the lower part of the house that we rented was not an area we could use entirely by ourselves, Keiko’s way of caring for us made it seem like no problem at all.

Kako's residence is a perfect location to visit Shibuya and Tokyo in general.   Situated in a very quiet residential neighborhood, the house is just a few minutes away on foot from small shops,  restaurants, trendy cafés and grocery stores.    It's also very near Yoyogi Park and Meiji Jingu, landmarks in the city.  For farther away visits, there is ample access to various train and metro stations.  The house itself is very well designed with ample surfaces and a nice garden.  The space for guests is comfortable, from a large bedroom Japanese style to a spacious  living-room with easy access to a kitchen and dining space. The host's hospitality is outstanding,  from the  easiness to check in to the ease of communication (Kako is fluent in English) and the willingness to share information and help guests to make the best of their visit.   Overall a wonderful stay and highly recommended.

Kako was a great host. We enjoyed our stay very much. The location is brilliant, located in a quit and stylish area. There are a lot nice little shops and restaurants in the neighbourhood. Thanks Kako and Keikos for the hospitality.

We were so fortunate to have the chance to stay in Keiko and Kako’s lovely home. It is the perfect place to stay in Tokyo, a beautiful modern Japanese house in a quiet residential neighbourhood, still convenient to all the hustle and bustle of the city. They were exceptionally warm and welcoming hosts. Highly recommended!
Really nice place & host. The garden is beautiful and the cats are very cute!

Kako & Keiko’s home is lovely, and so are they as hosts.
Their place is much bigger than the usual Tokyo home, offering beautiful light with a perfect guest room for our privacy when we needed it. Everything was convenient to walk to, from the 7-Eleven’s for last-minute necessities, charming bars and restaurants, to main train lines which helped us cover a lot of the city in a short amount of time. Keiko also cooked us a delicious breakfast every morning to fuel us for our adventures each day.
Best yet, they’re upgrading their home, making it even better for future guests. I can’t wait to come back.
Kako & Keiko are both wonderful. I can't shower them with enough praise for their hospitality!

Fabulous location close to Yoyogi. The house is beautiful. But the most enjoyable part of the stay is the hospitality of Kako and Keiko.
I have been traveling to japan for 30 years but really enjoyed discovering the family.
Very good English speakers and helpful.
Really a great place to stay!
Kako and Keiko's house is very special, and they are very special hosts themselves. Their hospitality is outstanding. I can only wish them the guests that they deserve!

Love Tokyo? Love cats? Fancy a taste of what it would be like to have access to a stylish home in a bijou part of Shibuya? Then this is the place for you. Flexible, friendly and interesting hosts. An experience that is far more like staying with friends in Tokyo than just apartment/hotel living. I’d be delighted to go back again.

Amazing location, great sunny lovely home that is an easy walk to trains, shops and fantastic dining. Beautiful hosts, who are super helpful and have great local suggestions! Definitely would stay again.
Fantastic location and lovely hosts. The house is gorgeous and the room and amenities are very comfortable.

This was a great experience, we have never stayed in a shared space like this before.  Keiko and Kako are so friendly and helpful, it was really wonderful having locals to talk to and to be in a house.  The neighborhood was great and we had easy access to the subway to get all over Tokyo.
Very sweet & easy going family, and their house is amazing! I would recommend staying here if you’re ever in Tokyo.

It was a wonderful experience, Kako and Keiko are wonderful hosts, the whole family is very welcoming and open. The house is extremely well located in Tokyo centre, with beautiful daylight beaming through the house every morning. We would recommend the stay very much!!!

I had a great time during my stay here! The house is stunning and spacious with so much sunlight. The hosts are friendly and I had fun chatting with them over breakfast - I've learned so much more about the history and culture which made this trip more meaningful to me.
We were so lucky to stay in Kako and Keiko’s home. The place was amazing and they were the best hosts. The room, location, breakfast every morning, everything was perfect. Thank you so much!!

We had a wonderful stay with a very beautiful host family who provided good tips and everything needed to make us comfortable.
Location is fantastic and stylish with so much to do nearby as well as quick access to public transport.
Kako and keiko communicated really well prior to checkin and getting there which meant it all ran smoothly.
We will definitely stay again!
10/10 thank you for your hospitality! Perfect location!  easy and close to everywhere in Tokyo. Get a real Japanese experience feel like you are staying with family or friends’s house!

Absolutely loved our stay. A warm and engaging family. Keiko was so helpful with all my foreigner questions. She even got us to our tour and dropped us off at the train station which I thought was above and beyond
Highly recommend if you are interested in sharing space with a local family. Very convenient location for local attractions as well

We returned to Kako & Keiko 7 years after our previous stay. They were just as amazing as we remembered, extremely welcoming and let us feel at home! Their home is so quiet with a garden but still very central. Can't wait to come again :-)

There are only 5 stars on Airbnb to evaluate things about this stay, but I would rather fill in one hundred stars if I could.
Keiko and her daughter Kako are two very special people.
The house is not only beautiful, but it has this “homey” vibe to it, where I could interact with the family, who is always trying to make me feel comfortable. For the first time I feel that I really had the experience of feeling home away from home.
Keiko is extremely generous, having always invited me for lunch and dinner, and even preparing breakfast for me. Also we had interesting conversations about Japanese culture in general. Kako is also very sweet, interesting and interested in other people. She has now her lovely daughter that brings so much shine to the stay. I briefly met Hiroshi San, Kako’s husband, who was very warming too!
I didn’t feel like only a guest at their house, but they made me feel like part of the family.
Thank you so much for all your generosity and kindness.
I am sure it is not easy to get such a host who care and treat you really as a guest instead of customer. Very noce and kind family. Thanks for all your help and beatiful breakfast.

We just cannot thank Kako & Keiko’s family enough for their warm hospitality! We travelled with two young kids and they made us feel just like home, they took time to communicate with us and provided us with more than just an Airbnb. Hope to see you all again in Tokyo 😊
Kako and Keiko’s house is a truly magnificent stay! They are some of the most accomodating people we have ever met and would have absolutely no hesitation is recommending this to everyone and anyone!

A beautiful stay at Tokyo.Keiko san's home is a cozy house with modern design.Just in case someone is wondering I must mention the bed is comfortable.
This place is so convenient to go to the Omotesando,Shinjuku and Shibuya.The block here is quite,safe,clean and stylish.We enjoyed our road when walking through the Yoyogi hachiman station to theYoyogi park from here.
Keiko San is such a elegant、beautiful and thoughtful lady.We stayed here for 3 nights.Everyday she prepared breakfast for us.She was always smiling while talking with us.Even the day we leaved she drived her car and droped us at the Shinjuku station.I feeled so many love and being talking care of. So many thanks I want to 届け to her.Keiko さん，まぁことにありがとうございます！

A wonderful place to stay! Kako and Keiko were gracious hosts in a nice, walkable neighborhood! Please be sure to note that the living space outside the bedroom is a shared space where family life is busy. Worked for us! The only thing we didn’t love was the cats waking up a lot earlier than us—loud meowing before sunrise.

This was a huge disappointment for us. The listing describes that in addition to our small room and miniature bathroom the bottom floor of the house “was all our to use”. It was not. It was actively used by the host family of 5 including a small child and by visitors that kept coming every day. We had no privacy nor freedom to move around and were confined to our room. Conversations, music, children playing, small child crying and cats mewing at any time day or night, did not make for an environment we hoped for. It is true that the hosts are very kind and communicate in English very well, it is true that the house is beautiful and large by local standards and that the Shibuya neighborhood is great, but this could not compensate for all the hassle we had to endure without feeling that we can complain about it to the hosts, because it is theirs home after all. We left after 4 days instead of staying the 14 we booked. If you are allergic to cats, be aware that this is not a place to be.
Great place to stay. Located very close to a subway station. The hosts were very accommodating. They went out of their way to make sure we were comfortable. They even made us breakfast.

Kako and Keiko’s family has gone above and beyond to make us feel comfortable. The district is a couple station away from shibuya center while being exceptionally calm day and night. If you’re looking for a more personal experience than a hotel, I would highly recommend you consider this location. Thanks again for this memorable week.

We had a very nice and relaxing time at Keiko and Kako's place. In many ways, it felt like we were visiting friends or relatives. Their place is very beautiful and spacious, and the atmosphere is extremely cozy. We were lucky enough to share breakfast and dinner with them a couple of times. The location is also amazing, in a residential, relaxed but well connected area, very close to the train station.
Our hosts were very helpful and provided us with all the information we needed and gave us a very nice introduction to Japanese culture and cuisine.
After a long journey, our jet-lagged family couldn't have chosen a better place to start our visit. We look forward to a future stay.

The Kako & Keiko family was warm, thoughtful, and welcoming.
Even though I only stayed for a few days, I felt completely at ease and taken care of.
They always left a light on for me when I came back at night, and the breakfast every morning was so comforting. Their home has a calm, peaceful atmosphere, and their cats are so adorable!
The two little girls were sweet and friendly, and even though we didn’t speak the same language, we somehow understood each other through gestures and shared smiles.
It was such a heartwarming experience. Thank you for making this stay feel like more than just a place to sleep. It really felt like a little home in Tokyo.

Min was fantastic. The location of his place cannot be beat! the only thing i can warn about is make sure you know where youre going before you get off the metro is is NOT an easy place to find, even though its only a few minutes from the station.

Min was a fantastic host! There were a few places available for a couple dollars cheaper per night but I chose Min's place because of all the great reviews and I definitely made the right decision. Great location, met great people. Highly recommended! Thanks, Min.

Not too easy to find, but once you're there, you wonder what had been difficult ;)
Nice spot to hang out and meet other travellers, because it's always crowded with people to share your japan-experience.

We had an exceptional experience staying at Min's. It was our first time in Japan and the place in easily accessible to 2 JR stations and it's near the subway. Min is caring and extremely helpful. It's also near one of the biggest super markets you'll find. It has pretty much everything. I would love to stay there again when I go back to Japan.
A very comfortable shared house, very well located in Tokyo, like a neat youth hostel. Thank you Minh for warm welcome !
we slept 7 person on the ground in a room and paid 150 TL=50 euro per night. comfort/price ratio =1/5
Nice place that will male you feel like home , thanks Min for your friendly welcome

Stayed at Min's place for two days, had a great time. Perfectly positioned near train station, a short walk from the main Shinjuku strips, restaurants nearby which were cheap and delicious. Quiet space, friendly other travellers and aircon in room. I had a bunk bed, which was comfortable. Met Min on the last day, he was warm and friendly. It was raining heavy on the day I was to check out, so we just chatted in the lounge until the rain cleared. He gave me an umbrella, which has already come in handy in Japan! Thanks again Min!

Min's place is clean, located in a strategic area and complete with facilities. We traveled a family of 8, and the room was big enough for us, unfortunately the bathroom is shared in different level.
While Min himself is a very welcoming person, very responsive and helpful for directions. He also helped us to manage the room issue.
I'm surely recommend to stay at Min's for those who traveling to Tokyo.

Shinjuku Sharehouse is in a modern multistorey building in a great location. I stayed three nights in a japanese style room. Everything is clean, well-working, well maintained and very comfortable. Min is a very nice, welcoming person and always helpful and always good for a talk. :-)

Had a wonderful time at Sunki's place. The room was in a perfect location to visit the thriving kabukicho area. I recommend visiting the robot restaurant in that area. Sunki showed me around and really helped you settle in. Get location and price, A+

Min (the owner of the unit) was very welcoming and took us out for dinner and drinks a couple times! The other people staying at this house were very friendly and I really enjoyed meeting them and staying here!

Min was a super host! He helped me with many things on my first hours in japan whichcan be overwelming :)
The house is really good with everything you need and the location is also helpfull. Dorms and bathrooms are clean and tiddy.
Would stay again!

I found Min to be an excellent host. He was welcoming and more than happy to give recommendations about what to see and do around the area.

I thought Min's sharehouse was more homey than an ordinary hostel because it's not too big and Min runs everything by himself. I stayed in a Japanese-style shared room which was quite comfortable (if you don't mind sleeping on a futon).

The house is conveniently located about 300 metres from the A1 exit of Higashi-Shinjuku station. It is walking distance to Shinjuku station and night life hotspots (great if you stay out after the last train).

Min was the best host ever! A really friendly and funny guy; He brought us out for food and around the area.
The share house is okay; very clean and cosy but nothing spectacular in terms of facilities. BUT the best part of it was all the great people I met over just 1 day of staying there. If you are in the Shinjuku area you really have to stay here.
Highly recommended.

Sunki is a great host, everything was excellent, helped me a lot in my trip and the room was the best. the location is very good close to metro stations. I had no trouble moving me into the city, 100% recommended.
Great place!!!

Min is patient, replies instantly. The house is very clean that feel like hotel level. Min is very nice and patient where he will answer any kind of question you have about Toyko. I strongly recommend this place.

Min was a great host, very responsive and sociable. There were several other guests when I was there and he kindly showed us around the neighborhood. The room itself is clean and there is a nice little living room area that guests can use to socialize or cook. If you are looking for a clean, affordable spot near Shinjuku, this is the place.

I had a phenomenal time at the Shinjuku Sharehouse.  I only wish that I could've stayed longer.  Min was an excellent host. He was very accommodating and knowledgeable of the area.  The apartment itself was in the heart of Shinjuku.  It was super easy to get to Shinjuku Station and the Higashi Shinjuku Metro station.  An added bonus is that it's only a couple blocks away from robot restaurant!

Min is a great host!  He is friendly, always available to help and will also share a beer with you. The sharehouse is very well located to enjoy shinjuku nightlife and get train/metro to other places in tokyo.

Min是一個非常友善，體貼的房東，住宿期間一切非常自在。住的地方雖然不大，但是對於獨自旅行的我已經非常足夠，有小廚房可以煮食物，就像一個溫暖的家。交通方面也是非常便捷，離地鐵站步行只需要3-5分鐘。
我很喜歡日本，這是個非常迷人國家，下次再到東京的話，我仍然會選擇Min的地方。

Min was very welcoming and flexible. We met the first day and he showed me around the place and how everything worked.

It's a short convenient walk to the Shin-Okubu station and also to some very fun areas of Shinjuku.

Meeting fellow travelers at the Sharehouse was such a great experience and I hope to keep in touch with as many of them as possible. I sincerely hope to be back.

Min was a great and accommodating host! You definitely get what you paid for and even more. His help and the quality of my stay surpassed my expectations. The rooms are in a convenient location and Its very trustworthy. I definitely recommend you come visit and stay at the Shinjuku Sharehouse! It was definitely an experience to remember. Getting to know other people from different backgrounds are a value added service. Ended up making good friends with the people I shared a room with and the other guest from the private rooms. We had great conversations with Min and he was very fun and informative on the culture and how things work in Tokyo. Not like other hosts, he makes it a point to try and get to know you on a different level.

So come and stay in the Shinjuku Sharehouse, It was an experience worth coming back to!

*Be sure to rent out a mobile Wifi when you arrive at the airport, It helped a lot with getting into contact with Min while I was over in Japan*
The best!!!!!!!  I'll be going back.
Min was a great host! It was my first time in Japan, so it was nice to meet other travelers in the house. The place was clean. I would stay here again.

Min made a good effort to bring everyone together for a meal and night out which was great. The house was good and living space for four people had plenty of room. There is only one bathroom but I never had any issues with having to wait!

I am very satisfied this house. Very close at shinjuku station and there are many stores near house . Host is kind and friendly, good at korean speaking.
I'd like to visit again next time
This was my second time staying at the Sharehouse this year. Clean, convenient, and enjoyable as always. Both Min and the other guests really make this a worthwhile place.
Min was very welcoming, he was able to guide me to the hostel and gave me a full tour even though I was only staying for the night. The house was in great condition and very comfortable

Tokyo is a great and very large city. Min is great at communication, he responded within minutes and he lives a few minutes away. The apartment is very nice and located near the Shinjuku area, there are 3 floors. I would recommend it to anyone looking for a cheaper alternative near everything you need

Amazing place! So close to everything, and amazing features. I had such a great sleep as well. Min is so friendly and so welcoming. If I were to plan another trip to Japan I think it would be wise to plan to stay solely with Min in his beautiful sharehouse. Literally every waking moment I spent here, I contemplated a life living in the sharehouse, and every moment I wasn't awake, I was sound asleep on the most comfortable futon in existence. Thankyou Min for a comfortable and relaxing start to my Holiday in Japan

Min was a fantastic host, very welcoming and friendly! I arrived in Tokyo a day early and allowed me to add extra days at very short notice. The house share is perfect, everything you need is provided and it is all very clean. The location is perfect, 10 min walk to shinkuju station! Couldn't have asked for a better place to stay or host. If I'm ever in Tokyo again I will be staying here and recommending it to any friends who visit.

Min is a fine person. Already on the first contact he was responding gently and calm to all my questions I had when booking the room.
He was even more welcoming and helpful one I arrived at his place.
He defenetly is very ambicious to make one stay comfortable. I will defenetly come back to his place.
It is perfectly located close to 3 public train station. He offers Tee and all cooking facilities. Provides you with towel and shampoo ecc. No complains. Thank you Min. Cu again.

This is a great affordable shared apartment. The location is the best part. I would not want to be living anywhere else in Tokyo than Shinjuku/Kabukicho area. Min is a solid funny guy and he'll treat you right, always good for a laugh or a drink.

It seemed no matter who came and left the atmosphere of the shared house was always positive. I usually travel alone and it was nice to link up with other solo travelers to sightsee with. You couldn't have asked for a better location for the price.
Excellent location, close to metro and walking distance to many good attractions. Very clean and welcoming environment, would definitely recommend to anyone visiting Tokyo.
Room was very clean and decent! Very pleasant stay!

As soon as I arrived I got welcomed by Min and he showed me around the place. He also explained where to find the convenience stores, restaurants, and metro stations in the neighborhood. the place was very nice and clean and with air-conditioning, which is nice in the Japanese summer. The rest of the share-house is also very clean as Min goes to the share-house to clean it very often. Sometimes you do have to wait to wait to get a shower as there is just one shower but that is no problem as you can socialize and have fun with the other guests in common area as you wait to get a shower. The neighborhood is very lively 24/7 so there is always something to do in Shinjuku. Being just a 10 minute walk to Shinjuku station, you can get to anywhere in Tokyo very quickly by train or metro. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone coming to Tokyo

Quedamos muy contentos con nuestra estancia en casa de Min. El lugar nos vino perfecto para donde queríamos ir y el anfitrión se nota que tiene larga experiencia: sabe cuidar la casa y tratarnos muy bien.

Recomiendo el lugar y a Min como anfitrión, sin duda.
wonderful place with very friendly people. Min is a great host, we'll always come back when in Tokio.

I stayed in the sharehouse for 10 days. Min is super nice and friendly. he was waiting for me when I got there.
The place is clean. you have everything around you. 24h shops, 2 subway stations and a JR line. (The bathroom wasnt an issue until the last day when there was kinda of line up).

I've got to meet a lot of nice people and Min manage to gather everyone around him. I'm glad I did choose the sharehouse ( I had a room for myself there)

Min's Place is just great, very convenient in the city center, not far from the Shinjuku rail station. I was here the second time, together with a friend and stayed for 14 days in one of the tatami rooms. Everything is clean and well maintained. In the kitchen living room one can find often other travellers for a talk. Min is also often good for a talk. :-) We felt very welcome.

Super cool.
Everything as described in ad.. Host is very helpful and profesional. Goodbpoint to explore Tokyo!
The atmosphere was just Perfect :) recomend it 100%
Lukas.

Where do I start? Firstly, Min is a fantastic host who is relaxed and makes you feel at home. All the amenities are fantastic and he goes out of his way to ensure you have a great time. Secondly, the location is central and close to the subway and JR line. Central Shinjuku is only a 10 min walk and close to areas such as Golden Gai. A truly memorable experience and I will definitely be back for my next visit to Tokyo.
Fantastic place, great location, host was very friendly and met many great people at the hostel. Highly recommended.

Thank you Min..!
Your place was just great for me. Perfect location so easy ! I was having so much fun I forgot to drink the beer you gave me as a welcome present !
I would defiantly recommend this place.
Hope to come back some day !
Liz
The place is really nice, neat and clean. Location is good, close to shinjuku. Mr. Min is also very friendly and helpful. Listing is accurate. Would recommend if u are planning to stay near shinjuku.

It was a great pleasure to stay at Min's place. He is awesome host that makes you feel very welcomed and is always willing to help you. He is always available on WhatsUp in case you have any questions, and replies very fast. The place is amazing too, very nice and clean rooms in Japanese style. Common area has everything you might need to stay there even for longer periods of time. It's in a great location just few minutes walk from metro and JR station. I have no doubts that every time I will be visiting Tokyo I will be staying at Min's place. Thank you again for this amazing week!
Great place to meet new people, specially if you are a single traveler. Everything went smoothly.
Min is the man. Very cool guy to talk to and he keeps the place spectacularly clean. Very helpful on arrival as well. A true professional.

I am thankful I was able to find a room here. Min was very helpful in sending me all information before my arrival and ensuring I had everything I needed during my stay. The room is very clean, nice and simple decoration, and the balcony/windows are great. The location is amazing, many restaurants and entertainment in walking distance or the subway which is just a two minute walk. Min is very friendly and very professional.
Great stay experience! I couldnt select the 5 star button on the rating, must be because if my old phone! Highly recommended.

This place is a great place - clean, tidy and of a good location. The host Min is a very nice guy who provides immediate assistance. We shared a lot about culture and life. Highly recommended.
ここは最高！綺麗で、清潔で、便利だ。主人のミンさんはとてもやさしくて、問題があれば、すぐに手伝いてくれる。文化とか人生とか交流した。おすすめ！
여긴 최고! 깨끗하고 편리해요. 민 씨는 너무 친절하세요. 문제가 있으면 바로 도와주세요. 문화나 인생을 ㄴㅏ눴어요. 추천해요!

My 2nd stay at Min's Shinjuku Share House. The only Airbnb I've used twice so far! In addition to my previous comments, the neighborhood is very conveniently located, near Higashi Shinjuku station. Also there's a 24 hour Sushizanmai location right around the corner. Can't recommend enough.

I had a great time at Min's place! The vibe and the people was really good. And Min and her wife were always extremely helpful.

Arriving to the place was very clear, and Min always contacted me through email, whatsapp, ... no chance to get lost! The room was lovely, basic, but all what I needed. The kitchen and facilities were also quite good; Min's place feeling is more like a travellers hostel, where you can meet different people from around the world visiting Tokyo; Also Min did arranged a couple of gatherings (drinks and korean bqq) at the rooftop, and that was really good.

Thanks Min for the great experience at your place and for all your help!

The room was as per the photos. My private room is actually bigger than i expected, more than enough space for one person. It also has a balcony which provided plenty of natural sunlight. The room itself is simple and clean. The common areas are clean and tidy as well. Min and his wife were very friendly and helpful. Overall, it was a good airbnb experience. Thanks Min!

Second visit to Min's and just as and if not, better than the first visit. Min is a great host who makes you feel welcome, comfortable and the atmosphere of the hostel is relaxed and fun. Highly recommended.
Second half of my stay with Min. Please see review below.

I've stayed at Min's place for a week in December 2016 and enjoyed it very much! There is a specious kitchen with a great view, several clean and modern bathrooms/toilets and cosy clean rooms.
The location is perfect - few minutes walking from the metro station, surrounded by all kinds of restaurants & shops.
Min and his wife are wonderful hosts, very helpful and friendly.
I will definitely like to stay at their place again!

This is my third stay at Min's sharehouse. The location is perfect, and the sharehouse has had a nice bunch of people staying there every time I've been there.
Min's a great host, and he keeps on improving the place in various ways.

I stayed in a pretty room at Min's for my first nights in Tokyo. Min was a perfect host straight away and very welcoming. The place is just a little noisy during the nights on weekends. Great place to also meet other travellers !
非常不错
房子的位置非常方便，屋子里有你能需要的一切东西，房东人很好，环境感觉很舒适

Min and his wife made my start of my journey very easy. Min was very responsive and answered some open questions from my side already before my trip to Japan/Tokyo. I felt from the first minute very welcome.
The place is very clean and the kitchen/living room very cosy.
Also the general location of the apartment is perfect and right away in the center of Tokyo. Shibuja station is a short distance walk away (from where you have good connections with the public transport system to the other areas/sightseeing spots of Tokyo).
I had a great time with Min, his wife and the rest of the people which were at Min's place. I highly recommend this place to stay when you visit Tokyo.

Min & Haru’s place is a great location and Haru is very nice. He goes out of his way to meet you and tries to get to know you. It was great staying there wish we had more time to hang out.
My only issue was that it is hard to tell when someone is in the shower. There was one morning it was very busy for the shower and someone wiggled the door just right and the lock opened. I was already dressed so wasn’t a big deal. I’m sure I didn’t have the lock perfectly latched but I wish it was easier to tell when it is occupied.

very good and clean place. didn't really research the surroundings prior to my visit, but turns out that place is right beside Little Korea, so lots of food variety to be had. Donki being a 5 min walk away makes it really convenient for last min shopping as well!

the room is spacious for a solo traveller like me, and the host Min also introduced me to other guests so that we can hang out and drink.

I was completely satisfied with my stay at Min & Haru's sharehouse. The communication before my arrival was just perfect. What's more, they were willing to wait for me late in the evening because of my relatively late landing. They were eager to help with getting around in Tokyo, and also great tips to see. The sharehouse is fully equipped, you can wash your laundry, you can cook... And apart from anything else, Min & Haru are very nice and welcoming people. Enjoy your stay!

Amazing place to stay. Great location. Very close to a lot of food, night life and fashion/shopping. Min and Haru are very friendly and very understanding. The space is clean, beautiful and worth staying in. Definitely looking to stay here again during my next trip to Japan.

Min & Haru's place is everything you would want if you're staying in Tokyo. A cozy and welcoming sharehouse were you end up meeting people from all over the world, share a meal or a drink and meet Min & Haru, two lovely people with loads of advise to get around the bustling Tokyo. The room is spacious and clean with all the amenities you can desire. A highly recommended place to stay in Tokyo. Thank you Min & Haru for the wonderful time!

Staying again at this placed this year too and it is just amazing! Really comfortable place where you can enjoy company or be by yourself. Feels more like home than an Airbnb!
Thank you!
The place to stay at when staying in Tokyo! Every visit has been amazing and fun!
Very good , will recommend to friends and family. Fantastic location wrapped in great hospitality.

Min and Haru's place is 100% great. Absolutely as described and I really enjoyed the tatami and futon experience. All the private rooms are spacious and have heating and air conditioning you can flip on as and when needed .
The public areas are super cool with personal touches everywhere left by previous guests, it has character and history to it!
As for location, brilliant. You're never more than 30 min max from anything of relevant interest in Tokyo with a lot of cool flashy stuff a short walk away. Plus there's a bunch of konbini on the same road that open 24hrs.
Min and Haru are brilliant hosts. Funny and friendly and always able to answer any questions you could have. I had a great time hanging out with them including picnics and a BBQ! Plus you can also meet people in the house depending on who is there.
Hands down the best Airbnb experience so far and I'm going to definitely come again. 5 stars everything!!

Clean, spacious , great location to food, entertainment. Metro station is within walking distance. A cool place to meet new people :)
Min and Haru are excellent hosts, extremely kind. They made me feel comfortable and welcomed to Tokyo as a solo traveler. Thank you so much!

Appartement idéalement situé, Haru et Min sont des hôtes attentifs et très sympatiques. Les lieux ont du charme et d'une propreté irréprochable.
Je recommande chaudement cette adresse
Anne
Best overall hostel in japan. Great location with great hosts. Super clean and comfortable. Min and Haru do a great job facilitating the social interaction within the hostel

Very good room in a good district,
I recommend it if you’re looking for a traditional room.

Min and Haru's place was awesome. Great location and easy to find. The room was comfortable and the amenities were clean and in good nick. The best part was definitely having a few bevs with them and the other travellers on the rooftop. They were such good company and made you feel really welcome. They've very quick to respond to any questions you might have about the area or issues you've come across. Highly recommend!
We loved the experience of staying in a japanese tradicional room. Really well located spot and nice host.

Firstly, a very clean and spacious bed room, which could give gust a comfortable place to arrange the luggage and clothes. The design of the whole apartment is very clever, since there is no bed rooms in the same level of the living room. Thus the normal actions of some gusts in living room will not have an influence on others. What's more, facilities are reliable, and all the heater can bring a  satisfied temperature both water and air(importantly in winter). Host is quite warm-hearted and professional and we had a nice conversation before leaving. Thanks a lot!

평점이 좋아서 여기로 예약을 했었는데
도쿄여행 처음하는 사람들은 무조건 여기로 오는것을
추천하고요 다음에 도쿄에 놀러간다면 다시 여기로 올것같습니다
좋음

It was my first time doing solo traveling to Japan and experiencing stay at a Hostel. Min & Haru are really friendly and everything described like as its written!
The most unique about this place is the host themselves, Min & Haru, they connect people around the world together.
Definitely gonna come back to their place. Thank you Min & Haru!
외국인 친구들이랑 밤까지 술겜하고 놀았어요

Premier Airbnb booké de ma vie et j'ai été agréablement surpris de leur gentillesse.
On se sent très bien chez eux et ils n'hésitent pas à vous conseiller ou partager leur plan. Je parle même pas de l'atmosphère "famille" avec les autres personnes que j'ai rencontré. Je reviendrai avec grand plaisir chez eux à mon retour au Japon et je conseille n'importe quelle personne qui cherche une expérience dans un vrai ShareHouse ou même quelqu'un qui se fait chier dans son Hôtel.
bref ! je pourrais vous en parler pendant une heure de leur petit nid . Juste BOOKEZ sans réfléchir chez eux !
Min & Haru vous êtes des personnes merveilleuses.
Valérick
주인분이 매우 친절하시고 분위기도 좋았습니다. 잘 놀다갑니다~!

Stay with Min & Heru’s place for a few days and it was great experience.
The entrance is in the side of the building and it might be hard to see because the sign is small.
Min greeted me with a smile and fun energy.
The first thing you’ll notice is the decor throughout the living spaces which were awesome.
Location was great. 10min walk to the heart of all the beautiful chaos like Golden Gai and 20min to Omoide Yokochō. 20min train ride to Shibuya.
A lot of things to do around the area and I would recommend everyone to book with Min & Haru.
Wonderful place to stay! I made some new international friends as well. If you are looking to explore Tokyo, this a perfect spot as it is in the middle of everything.
C’est un lieu sympa et pratique pour poser quelques jours ses valises à Tokyo. Idéalement situé , c’est aussi un endroit parfait pour rencontrer d’autres voyageurs

the Shinjuku share house has been on of the best stays I've been at while Japan . As this was my 2nd time staying there min and haru have been more than amazing host they felt so welcoming like a family . we had an amazing stay and would likely stay again next time . Thank you min and haru for the welcoming invite !!

I really enjoyed my stay here. Min was a great host, responsive, thoughtful and nice to talk to. The room had everything I needed, and the terrace was a great spot to unwind from exploring the city. The location is great, with lots of things to do within walking distance. Also it’s easily accessible by public transport (metro) to visit other Tokyo districts. I would definitely come back next time I’m in Tokyo.

Min & Haru's place is located in the heart of Shinjuku. Excellent location for those new to Tokyo.
The place was clean and comfortable. Min was very friendly and took time to show me around the place as soon as I checked in.

Min & Haru have been, till now, the best host I had the luck to meet
They've always kind and available for every need and in their sharehouse they are able to create a very chill and enjoyable mood: that way is supereasy to meet new people and make new friends, just like it happened to me
When I'll come back to Tokyo (and I'll be back for sure), I'm going to stay at their sharehouse again, I don't want to go anywhere else

Min and Haru were lovely hosts. Whether it spending the night in chatting and playing games with other guests or going out on the town this place set us up to get the most out of our time in Tokyo. They have many repeat visitors and it made it feel really homey and comfortable to chat with others. Can be a little loud/noisy with other guests given it is a shared living space but nothing too unreasonable. I definitely would return in the future if given the chance.
첫 쉐어하우스 방문이라 조금 걱정했는데 하루상이 너무 반갑게 맞아주어 기분좋게 여행할수 있었습니다. 카부키쵸,신오쿠보 와 가까워 즐길거리가많고 침구도 깔끔합니다. 옥상에는 분위기좋은 테라스도 있어 밤에 친구들과 술한잔 하기 좋습니다. 언어가된다면 좋은친구들도 만날수있어 적극추천합니다!!
Min is a lovely host, I had a great time there and was provided with everything I needed :)
非常喜歡

What a great location and awesome set up. It's a building with rooms shared by other guests. My fellow guests were very cool and friendly. We often met in the lounge room to talk and have some drinks. There's about a million options close by in regards to food and there are 2 convenience stores about 1 minute by foot. Worth every oenny. Next time I'm in Tokyo I will definitely stay here again.

Haru is very friendly and passionate, he explained all the amenities and rules of the house clearly upon my arrival, and also  introducing all the nearby location which can be useful to traveller, e.g. metro and convenience store location. The house is very clean, and the location is very convenience as well, it's very close to multiple metro station and it's walkable to the busiest location of Shinjuku area.

This is by far my favourite hostel I have stayed in.
Min has worked hard to create a space that is both unique and comfortable.
Min is also very helpful in providing useful advice and recommendations.
Min is also a very funny and friendly guy too!
The location is perfectly situated to explore Shinjuku and is also a perfect base to launch day trips throughout most of Tokyo.
I liked this place so much that I immediately booked in a further 2 nights stay at the end of my trip.

perfect little spot with great atmosphere and character. easy check in/out and very clear instructions on how to find it. twas a pleasure and would recommend for solo travellers !! thank you for having me :D
Great host, he’s super friendly
min is a good guy. plenty of local advice and a great atmosphere at the guesthouse.
The host is really nice, friendly. It´ s a good place to meet people.
I stayed at Shinjuku guest house the first day I landed in japan, and it was a very nice place. Min was very nice and overall had a very positive experience!

Shinjuku share-house is a clean, minimal and excellently located. Min was very swift at responding/communicating and was kind and helpful during my stay. The room did get busy at one point but then very quiet at others, but generally had a very good community atmosphere. I would stay here again.

This place is certainly what you want if you are trying to make some friends and have some fun during travel. I went there and got both of the goals reached, not disappointed at all.

Talking about the host, Min is very nice and helpful. He doesn't live at the apartment but he usually comes at the daytime in case somebody needs help and to clean the apartment.

The place is very nice even though it is a shared area. To be honest, I don't understand why some people think that's a problem if he/she's travelling alone. I stayed at Min's place for 8 days and everyday was a lot of fun. I noticed somebody has mentioned that air-conditioner was turned off by Min. That sounds crap to me. The controller of the AC is always reachable by the guest. If he turns it off when you are not present, turns it back on by yourself when you are!


Overall, I was not disappointed and very satisfied. Whoever considers travelling alone with Airbnb and wants to stay at Shinjuku, this should be your top choice. Would definitely going back again.
Min is an awesome host and his place is best for a solo traveler trying to meet people in Tokyo. I would stay here again.

First time in Tokyo/Japan, and staying at the Shinjuku Sharehouse was also a great experience. It is located in a Korean neighborhood in Tokyo, not far from the Higashi-Shinjuku subway station and a 10-minute walk from Shinjuku Station. Sleeping in the tatami room was comfortable and I enjoyed getting a taste of a Japanese-style home. Min is a great host; during my check-in day we were in constant contact on Kakao Talk and he took time to answer all my questions. When I arrived, he personally came over to show me around the place and talk to me about places to go and eat.

There are many restaurants and other nightlife activites nearby, as well as a supermarket. Be warned, though, that if you are walking from the JR Shinjuku Station (since I used the JR Pass) at night, on a couple of the possible routes back to the sharehouse, people may follow/harass you to go to their bar/"massage" parlor or whatnot. That was the only time I felt unsafe in my Japan travels, and the next time I simply took a different route back.

Other than that, I had no problem, and would definitely stay again!

Host was very accommodating on check-in times and is very friendly. He speaks great English and will let you know on the Shinjuku area and how to go to where from his apartment. Great location for its pricing in Shinjuku which is walking distance to nightlife area as well as the subway. He even let me know that Dengue was spreading in Yoyogi park and warned me to stay away from that area. Neighborhood is decent with lots of Korean food. Will definitely stay here again.
The place was just like how the host advertise in Airbnb, the direction given was clear and the place was easy to find as well.
Really couldn't ask for a better experience. Great location, clean spacious flat, friendly people and the host, Min, is an absolute legend! Fully recommended!

It was a great stay with Min at the sharehouse! Great location and awesome people there! Min is always helpful and available; and he give great tips on travel and food too! If I have the chance to visit Tokyo again, I will be back!
Yes! the place was great. people are friendly and nice. easy to find, love the stay!

Things that made me enjoy my 2 nights at Shinjuku Sharehouse:
- Min (the host) was super fast to respond to my request.
- Immediately after accepting I received a detailed description on how to get there, which is nice if you're new in Tokyo.
- Min is a really nice and welcoming person! Upon arrivel we spoke for an hour about all kinds of things, and he showed me how to use all the facilities of the sharehouse.
- The place itself is really nice! It's clean and comfy, and all the facilities work (shower, toilet, washing machine, internet, etc.). My room was at the 9th floor and had a nice view of the streets below.
- The location is great! Tons of restaurants and fairly close to 2 big train stations.

Things I didn't enjoy about staying at the sharehouse:
- NONE!
At the price this place is an absolute steal! I would definitely stay here again :)

Min is a very welcoming person, the instructions to go to his flat were very clear, I had no difficulties to find it. The room was fine and clean but you have to be aware that there can be many other people in the flat as there are several rooms and I was unlucky to be one night whith some noisy people making party until late. However the last night was very nice because Min organized a diner outside where we had a lot of fun and good corean barbecue.
Min's sharehouse was a lot of fun! Definitely recommend!
不錯!

The Host...Min is very friendly. He Shows You around and explain everything! You can use the fridge, washingmashine etc. He offers tea and coffee for free. You can also smoke on the balkony if you want! A really nice Place to stay!

Great location in Shinjuku - walking distance to bustling areas for shopping, eating, going out at night (Golden Gai, Kabuki-cho, etc). Min was very friendly; check-in and check-out was smooth and easy. Really easy to meet people in your room and common room. Bed was clean, room was busy but not uncomfortable (6 people that night). Toilets and shower were private and soap /towels were conveniently available. Cheap and easy place to meet others! Would recommend to others.

Min is a great host! It was a breeze locating his place as he provided very detailed maps and directions, and was very quick in replying. Was extended a very warm welcome by him upon arrival and he was really friendly and fun to talk to. Location is easily accessible and lots of food outlets around. His rooftop view was amazing too as said!
Simple but cosy accommodation and I love the common area. Definitely recommended!

The place is clean and Min will be at your service throughout your stay. Even if he is not around he is still contactable via mobile and very prompt with it. Clean place, great vibes, awesome location (walking distance to Golden Gai, Metro, JR  and Shinjuku). What more can you ask for!

Good location for Shinjuku and great if you want to meet other travelers. No portable wifi which can make it hard to get around if you're not so good with directions. Is not a private room as described but still a fine place to rest your head while enjoying Tokyo! We shared with 6 people. Our host Min met us as soon as we messaged, despite being later than expected. Very helpful and friendly.

I had a really good stay in Shinjuku Guesthouse. Good location within walking distance from train stations, food and shopping. The guesthouse is well taken care and clean. I got to make new friends there as well. Good experience and I'll def come back.
Min is a great host, easy going and helpful. The room is clean and the apartment is well furnished. If I should be back in Tokyo Min would be my choice once again.
Great location. Great price.
It is a wonderful place to mingle with other people around the world and everything you needed under the roof.  Min is a great host who gave good recommendations on food and places of interest.
Stayed here for a third time and everything was just as great as the other two times with an addition of a cute bunny=)

Min is a great host! He was really friendly and fun to talk to. The maps in the common area is really helpful. The location is convenient and there are many restaurants close by. The rooftop view was amazing as well.
Overall a nice experience!

Min is a really experienced host. You will find everything you need at his. from maps to soap, he is also a really kind person.
The place is really centric and if you like to meet nice people this is the kind of place :)

Shinjuku Sharehouse is the liveliest guesthouse I've stayed in during my trip in Japan! People of all nationalities were mixing with each other and it really is like a mini united nations over there! Min is super friendly and a very sociable guy. Ask for help, and he'll give it too you. Very flexible rules, as long as you know the few important ones, the rest are pretty much up to you. I thoroughly enjoyed myself there! Thanks min!
I have nothing but excellent things to say about Min. He keeps his rooms very neat and is an amazing host. I will definitely be coming back :)

Min is a soooooo nice host and help us to solve some trouble. The common room is comfortable for us to exchange ideas and we met some interesting people here. It is a wonderful experience in Tokyo. Thank u so much Min:)
離大江戶線的東新宿車站步行不到3分鐘，位置好找，附近就有大超市各種便利店，步行至jr新宿也不過十分鐘不到！在這裡遇到許多不同國籍的朋友，可以互相聊天交流。如果不是訂私人房間，因為是共用一件寢室，室友作息難免不同，且早上如果天亮比較快，整個房間會很亮，對極度注重睡眠品質的人推薦private room，歡迎來信私下詢問居住感想和建議。房東人超棒！

Min was an excellent host anda good friend, he was very welcoming and stood up late till i arrived at the place. The detailed instructions given by him helped a lot to reach the place. The sharehouse is well maintained and I would love to visit his place once again I come to tokyo!.

I love the place! Clean! Easily accessible to the major cities! Min was friendly for the get-go! Each only approachable and fun to talk to! Highly recommended! Will definitely be back in the near future!

Thanks to Min I had wonderful time in TOKYO! He let me use his bike to travel around and gave me good advice. His place set a good atmosphere to talk to traveller from everywhere. Location is very good also.
I love staying at Min Place.
The stay was great, Min is the man! Hospitality was great and close to the train and fun. Will stay again.

Staying at Min's place was great! I was traveling alone so it was nice to meet some fellow travelers. There were people from all over the world and it was fun to learn about them. Min's place is decently within walking distance of the train station which gives access to other parts of Tokyo quite easily.
So good that I came back, and that's saying something.
