Min was very quick to reply, provided thorough details and utilizes multiple methods of communication to ensure initial reception of information. Though my visit was short I felt welcomed and appreciated a nice vantage point from his location and the building where this accommodation is contained. The rabbits are a nice addition to make it a bit more lively instead of just a shell for a place to stay.
Thanks again Min!
room is clear and u can meet peoples comes from different country.

Min is a great host, very friendly, helpful and funny. We loved staying at the share house for it's wonderful atmosphere, the nice other guests and great location.
Thank you Min, we'll come back ;)

This was my first time in Japan, so I wasn't quite sure where to stay, aside from a few suggested neighbourhoods. Definitely picked a winner here! I knew right away, as I was approved almost instantly, with Min adding me on WhatsApp, sending a helpful description of how get to the apartment once I'd arrived. I picked this listing mostly because of the social aspect being that it's a backpackers. The people really made this place, and it started with Min. He was a friendly, gracious host with lots of helpful tips, who didn't mind drinking with us. He even bought us beers one night and offered us sake. The location was a close walk to the heart of Shinjuku, and it being Tokyo, your choice of metro and dining options can leave you feeling spoiled. The utilities were all well maintained – even going above and beyond providing laundry detergent and towels. The bedroom was clean and spacious with excellent views of the city. Sure, the bed itself wasn't great, but I barely slept so it didn't matter much. Unlike some hostels I've stayed in, I always felt like my personal items were safe and secure. The house has a good vibe about it. Stay there and you'll see. The group of friends I made were all really fun people from various countries who all were keen on exploring the best Tokyo has to offer. If you want to do the same, I highly recommend staying at Shinjuku for Backpackers.

I enjoyed my stay in the Shinjuku Sharehouse. The space was very clean and it's a great place to connect with other travelers! I was quite busy meeting up w/ friends during my stay, so my only regret is that I didn't get to spend as much time with the other guests. Min was very responsive. He sent me a text with details as soon I made the reservation and met me in front of the guesthouse upon my arrival. He was very helpful with directions and information about the Tokyo area as well. I highly recommend this space and look forward to returning next time I'm in the Tokyo area.

Min's place is great place if you are looking for a hostel. Well located and easy access to sub-ways and not very far from the Shinjuku hub. Min's also a great host and took care of most of my needs. A good fun place if you are there for a few days!

I love love LOVED staying here ! Location is great in Shinjuku, close to a lot of cool things (Robot Restaurant) and great food! Min is more than helpful, he is so friendly and hospitable. I loved learning about Japanese culture and politics from him, he was always inviting me to hang out with the other guests, and even when I accidentally lost all my money at Tokyo Station he told me I could transfer funds to his PayPal account and he would withdraw some Yen for me. Stuff like that is what makes Min an extraordinary host! The place was clean and cozy, SO close to metro, and I can guarantee I will be back when I return to Tokyo.
it is a nice place for live.min is very nice.maybe I'll come to Tokyo again in june 2016 then I'll book your house again.

Good amenities and well located in Shinjuku. Directions on how to arrive were very clear and Min and his wife were great hosts. Really good opportunity to meet new people in Japan. Would recommend for those who are travelling alone.

Min was a wonderful host, he was willing to stay at the share house till we arrived even though it was late at night. The house was everything we could ask for. Very comfortable and very cosy. Min is very helpful and nice! Awesome place for an awesome price
Le séjour chez Min fut formidable ! La sharehouse est idéalement placée près du métro et du train. Min et son mari sont charmants.

It is a good place. Release and safe.
You can ask the holds any time. He are always here to give suggestions and support.

I really enjoyed my stay at Min's share house. The share house was as described and with more to offer; free tee, free towels, free washing machine + detergent and more. Min was always friendly and eager to help if I had any question. Although I got there very late in the evening, he was there to greet me and show me around. The area which the share house is situated, Shinjuku, is a vibrant area and close to different parks, subway stations, Golden Gai and more - which makes it a perfect place to stay. Also, after I told Min that I was a ceramic student, he gave me two traditional Japanese bowls. Thank you!! In other words, a very sweet guy with a very nice share house! If I go back to Tokyo, I would like to stay there again and will recommend it to friends. Arrigato!
This's very nice!

The sharehouse was nice and clean. Min explained everything to me about the place when I got there and made me feel comfortable. The place is near Korea Town, some bars, and a little walk from the Shinjuku station area. It was nice staying here and meeting other people in the sharehouse with my short stay
The place is great, and accessible area to the train station too. You can have variety of food around the area and it's in a korea town! Nice place to stay!

Perfect Location. Great Host. Friendly patrons.
I'd youre looking for an affordable place to stay in the perfect convenient location. then shinjuku sharehouse is the place to be.
Min was an amazing, friendly send helpful host.
I would recommend this place for both solo and group travellers. Would definately book again

Again, a great place! Was there the second time.
Really good to meet other people and everything is really near (restaurants, shops, train/metro, bar, etc).
Min, the host, is also very friendly and good organized. When I came back 3 weeks later, already some thinks where new *thumps up*

Min is awesome! He is very welcoming from the beginning until I leave, speaks great English, makes great coffee. He makes his guests feel at home! When I first arrived, he explained every single thing in the house so I won't be confused; and also he provides guests with a lot of free amenities such as towels, soap, tea, coffee, etc. The house was also very comfortable to stay in. Thank you so much for the hospitality, Min, looking forward to see you again!

By far my best airbnb experience. Minh was super nice, fun and outgoing. We went out for a Korean dinner and beers on my first night. The place is really well located, super clean and the room I stayed in was actually very spacious. Cosy living room too. Minh let me use his bike for my entire stay and that was awesome too! Keep the great vibe!

My friend recommended this apartment, and I'm really glad she did. Min was a great host, super accommodating, welcoming and friendly. Fantastic location and a really comfortable place to stay. I had a brilliant stay in Tokyo. I can't wait to come back.

This is our second time back to Min's and definitely not the last. Min is a wonderful host and has put a lot of work into making this place the perfect place to stay. The place itself is super clean and comfortable, has great views and is in an amazing location. There is a fully set up kitchen that we enjoyed cooking in and there is also a ton of restaurants just nearby. Shinjuku is a great place to explore and there are a number of train stations right nearby to explore the rest of the city from. The first time we came we were in a large group of 23 and this time it was just the two of us. We absolutely loved it both times. Would recommend this place to everyone! Can't wait to come back!!

Min's shinjuku sharehouse has been nothing but amazing. This is my second time back here and i can not explain how amazing it is. This time again, i bonded with most of the people staying there where to the point we would take adventures out together. I came to Japan bymyself and left japan with forever lasting friendships and memories. Min is a kind man and he takes care of his guests the best as he can. I became his personal assistant for a bit because he forgets a lot of things lol but he pays me back in alcohol and food which i accept! Come to Shinjuku sharehouse if you are travelling alone so you to might make some good travel buddies!

Min is very easy to reach and will drop by when needed. He is constantly improving the guesthouse and will be around daily to clean, always eager to answer questions.

The sharehouse itself looks amazing and has everything you will need (and more, like a foot massage device and a rooftop terrace). There is also a shared living room, that functions well as a place to meet new people.

The location is really convenient as well. The station is close by and the neighboorhood is packed with stuff to do, both at day and night (for example golden gai). At night the area (kabukicho) can feel a bit unsafe, but it's easy to avoid if you want.

Min is a wonderful host and I highly recommend the Shinjuku sharehouse for first time and regular travellers to Tokyo. The share house is very prettily put together and extremely clean. Min has thought of everything from having towels, to coffee to toiletries. The location is also close to some of the most happening places in Tokyo. There are tons of 24 hour places and shops to eat around the share house.
Min is a wonderful host who hosts impromptu parties for his guests on the terrace patio. I had the opportunity to go to two of his small gatherings in the 4 days I spent in Tokyo. It was a very good experience since I got to meet other fellow travelers and share experiences and stories and even travel around in Japan. I fully recommend the guest house. I fully intend to stay there even on my next visit. Thank you for everything Min!

I'm very lucky to find such a nice place staying in Tokyo for the first foreign trip in my life. Its location is near the subway station where I can visit any other places in Tokyo. And the host, Min, is a really nice person with good communication in English. I also made some foreign friends here. This hosting experience means to me a wonderful memories and I think in the future I'll come back again.

Je suis allé dans beaucoup d'auberge de jeunesse et hotel durant mon voyage à travers la Corée et le Japon et je pense que chez Min à était le meilleur lieu de rencontre, de convivialité et surtout de confort. Il est toujours là pour nous aider, nous conseiller et organise même des barbecue sur son toit presque tous les soirs avec tous le monde pour façilité les rencontres, Je lui ai deja dit que je reviendrai pour la coupe du monde de rugby ou pour les prochains jeux Olympiques. La gare de métro est à 2min a pieds. Très bon rapport qaulité/prix.
I love the people in there, and they provide everything for us to make us easier to travel!
Very good location

I was in the Shinjuku Sharehouse for the second time and again it was very pleasant and smooth experience. Min is constantly improving his place and the important things are still perfect: location, view, social room, cleaningness and of course his great hospitality.
I warmly recommend to all travelers who like things simple and working and search also for good company of other people.

Our stay at Min's appartment was great. Min is very welcomming person and same goes for his wife. They took care of us a gave us some good tips where to go. There are usualy a lot of people in the house, but do not worry about it. Everybody is nice and you may take a part in rooftop's parties and have a chat with many people from all around the world. You'll get to love this place.

Min was an extremely welcoming and kind host, well deserving of the "Super host" title. Easily contactable to answer any an all questions, and provides a thorough rundown of the place and the general vicinity.
He's very personable and easy to just chat with.
The place, or as it's called the Sharehouse, is far more comfortable than you'd expect even while having to share the room with other ppl. The beds and toilet were extremely clean and comfortable. There's adequate space to store luggage and belongings. Your mileage may vary with the people you share with, but mine were fantastic and that made the experience so much better.
The common area was well equipped with a washing machine, small cooking and dining area and the shower was well stocked with any necessities you'd need. Towels were also provided, should you forget your own. A really nice touch, makes it feel more like home than anything else.
The common area is very cosy and a lively place for guests to gather, though I'd say the rooftop space is really the highlight if you're looking to meet the other guests.
The ever important WiFi is blazing fast and was more than capable of handling multiple devices connected at once, and could stream Netflix at its highest quality.
The Sharehouse is well situated, being very close to the train station as well as multiple convenience stores, though I did notice on several nights a much more rowdier crowd on the streets. So that's something to note, but like they say, it's Japan you'll be fine.
Overall, I had a blast and would most definitely recommend it as place to stay if you're in Tokyo and I'm looking forward to coming back.

Min sends you information from the minute you book and communicates unbelievably well to make sure you get to his place and enjoy your time. He has thought of everything you could possibly need when staying at his place. It's very centrally located and you get get to shibuya, roppongi, akihabara within 20-30 min by subway. Shinjuku main station is a 10 min walk away. I can't wait to see what the rooftop patio looks like when it's done.  There is no doubt in my mind i'll be back. Met some fantastic people and there is a very cozy feel to the place.

Min is such a great host! After I booked, I immediately received a detailed information from him on how to go this house from the airport. He always reply promptly to all my messages whenever I have inquiries. The house is very clean and organize. I hope that I still had more time in Japan. I will definitely go back to the place on my next visit! Thank care, man!

Staying at Min’s place was an absolute pleasure. All aspects of the stay from arrival through to departure were superbly organised by Min. The place itself could not be better given the price: centrally located, comfortable, clean and with all the necessary amenities, made the trip a breeze. To top it off, Min and his wife went out of their way to show hospitality to me during the trip by giving insights into Japanese life and culture over an interesting and lively get together one evening. Highly recommended for a hassle-free stay in Tokyo. Thanks Min and hope to see you soon again! Take care.
Great location! Great way to meet people. Min is very helpful and accommodating to your requests.

It was a great stay! Changed to a private room but still had chance to meet some other guests and was shared with tips for exploring around. People are so lovely here! Min is very nice and helpful. Unfortunately I missed the Friday barbecue which sounds a lot of fun!
Thank you Min for being such a great host!

Min is one of the best host I ever had! Two thumbs up for him. He was very kind enough to pick me up when I got lost at wrong building on my first day. He replied to all my queries promptly and orientate me well to the facilities. I definitely enjoy my last few days in staying at his place. ☺️☺️
It was a great place with a fantastic location. I will definitely stay here again if I'm back in Tokyo

As my first experience with Airbnb/share house, Min's place could not be any more fulfilling and pleasant. The apartment was always clean and fresh, and has all the necessities and more. Min is a incredible host, he is very friendly and will accomodate you to the best of his abilities. More so, my stay at the sharehouse allowed me to socialise with the guests from all over the world, enriching the experience even more.
Min was an excellent host! Very welcoming and happy to share his local knowledge of the area! Would definitely recommend to anybody travelling to Tokyo!
Awesome place and awesome host. Thanks Min

This is one of the best places to stay in Shinjuku if you're looking to be close to the night light and late night food. Also there is a really good sushi place that is within 2 minutes away. Min is really nice and helpful and the place is amazing! Great value for your money!
The shared room is great for those with limited money to spend on a place to stay. However, Min's place is great, had everything thing you would need and more.

Min is a cool and friendly guy. The hostel was clean and comfortable. Our first night, Min and his friend offered us drinks and a spicy pork dish. Our fellow guests at the hostel were also fun to hang out with. Overall a great experience and would definitely recommend.
Had a great stay!

Min's place is awesome. Firstly, the host is very friendly and speaks English so it immediately makes you feel comfortable. The place has a nice location because it's near higashi-shinjuku subway and a 10 minute walk to the main shinjuku station, no worries about going home when you're trying to experience the nightlife in shinjuku. I'll definitely come back if I stay in Tokyo again!
I totally loved this place! Min is a very good guy and I have met some nice people there! Definitely recommend! :)

Min's place is amazing. Location is easy to find. I love the rooftop very much. We are singing and dancing. It's the happiest experience of my trip in Tokyo. Min is such a nice guand so happy to met Kim ,Roser ,Harry and Alex . I'll back to this place when i come tokyo.For sure!

Min's place was advised by a friend of mine and I have to thank him. It's clean, within walking distance from transports and Shinjuku, or whatever you look for around, but the difference is the host... and Min is great one.
He was always available and I really enjoyed talking to him and the other guests during my stay, so thumbs up, highly recommended.

This place is nothing but awesome. Location was central and very accessible to almost every place. Staying in the sharehouse was also one of the highlights of my trip where I got to meet people from all over the world. Min organised drinking parties on some of the nights and it was always a great time spent chilling and relaxing at the rooftop. Besides an awesome place, you also get an awesome host. I arrived late night in Tokyo but Min told me not to worry as he would be waiting for me for my check-in. He also shared a lot about Tokyo and many other things with us. He was more like a friend than your usual Airbnb host. I'm really glad to have found this place to stay in for my trip in Tokyo  :)

Min was the perfect host. Meticulous cleaning and maintenance ensured a most enjoyable stay. Min goes out of his way to provide everything a traveller would require to be comfortable. Highly recommended.

From the very first minute I walked through the door Min made the house feel very homely. The room I was in was very spacious and clean. I would really recommend this backpackers house. There is even a roof top where you can drink into the evening! Also very good location in Shinjuku
It's a very nice place to stay. The hosts are very nice.

Min is an absolute professional in facilitating the check in and introduction of the shared room and surrounding area. Communication following up to our meet was also fast and accurate. The decorations of the rooms are FANTASTIC and you will be left in awe at the effort put into designing the space. Room is rather small and cozy, so it's best you travel light. Great for people who love meeting new international friends as socializing with others is expected. You won't get much privacy since there's only 1 shared bathroom. But I had the best experience talking with friends from Australia, America, Britain and Korea all in just two nights. Come with a fun-loving attitude and you will be rewarded!

호스트분께서 너무 친절하게 잘해주시고 주위 맛집이나 위치등을 너무 상세하게 알려주셨어요.
처음 게스트하우스 갔지만 또 가고싶게 만드는 곳이랍니다. 다양한 사람을 만나는게 매력적이에요. 또 도쿄를 가게 된다면 무조건 다시 찾을 숙소입니다. 또 방문할게요! 엄지척!
-JAE HO-

4월13일~4월17일 4박5일간 머물렀습니다!
해외 게스트하우스를, 그것도 Airbnb로 예약한 건 처음이었는데, 진짜 이 숙소를 이용하지 않았으면 도쿄여행이 덜 즐거웠을 거라고 확신했습니다ㅎㅎㅎ
정말 즐거운 경험을 만들었던 이 게스트하우스에 대해서 3가지 정도만이라도 말씀드리자면
1. 교통과 여러 가지를 따져서 위치가 너무 좋습니다!
일본도 해외인 만큼 언어적 장벽이 없을 수 없지만, 일단 숙소가 위치해 있는 신오쿠보역은 한인타운 지역이므로 도쿄 속의 한국이라고 볼 수 있습니다! 그래서 여러 가지 한국어 간판이 있는 상점, 식당도 많이 보입니다. 한국어가 있는 것은 둘째 치더라도, 인근에 편의점과 돈키호테가 있고 식당들도 엄청 많습니다 :) 그리고 무엇보다 교통이 여행 중에 중요하지요? 신오쿠보역과 히가시신주쿠역 등과도 매우 가깝고, 신주쿠 자체와도 매우 가깝기 때문에 교통 면에서도 충분히 좋았습니다!
2. 호스트, 즉 사장님의 친절이 최고입니다 :-)
제가 사장님이 잠시 숙소에 안 계실 때 들어왔는데, 알려주신 비밀번호를 누르고 로비에서 기다리니 곧 오셨습니다. 사장님께서 9층 시설에 대해 모든 것을 소개해주신 뒤 제가 머문 6층 방을 소개시켜 주셨는데, 일일이 하나하나 빠짐없이 세심하게 가르쳐주셨습니다! 덕분에 어느 하나도 어려움이 없었고, 더욱이 언제 한 번은 게스트분들과 함께 파티를 여십니다. 저는 일본인 친구들과 놀다가 뒤늦게 합류했는데, 사장님의 재밌는 입담도 파티에서 빠질 수 없는 중요한 요소였습니다 :-) 비록 얼마 못 있었지만 파티날을 잊을 수가 없습니다ㅎㅎㅎ
3. 마지막으로, 국제적으로 여러 사람과 교류하고 싶다고 생각하는 분들께도 이 숙소를 추천드리고자 합니다 :)
숙소의 로비 탁자를 잠깐 보았는데, 정말 많은 나라의 각국 지폐를 보았습니다. 그만큼 투숙객의 국적이 굉장히 다양하다는 것을 의미하는데요, 제가 머물렀을 때도 이야기해본 사람만 해도 중국인, 호주인, 미국인, 네덜란드인 등 매우 다양했습니다. 인생에 있어 다시 오기는 힘든 기회라고 생각하는 만큼, 다양한 국적의 사람들을 만나보고 싶은 분이라면 여기를 추천하고 싶습니다! 물론 한국인들도 엄청 많이 거쳐갔습니다! 그만큼 이런 저런 이야기를 할 수 있어서 너무나 재밌었고요 ㅎㅎㅎ
전체적으로 정말 추천드립니다. 이것 외에도 숙소 청결도 면에서도 엄청 깔끔했고, 웬만한 것들이 구비가 되어 있으므로, 불편하지 않게 머무를 수 있다고 말씀드릴 수 있습니다!

신주쿠 역에서 도보로 10분도 걸리지 않는 위치에 있습니다. 가부키초에도 5분이면 갈 수 있는 거리에 있습니다. 바로 옆에 돈키호테 매장도 있어서 위치는 정말 최고입니다. 방에서 2층침대 위에. 앉으면 바깥 야경이 훤히 보이는게 너무 좋습니다. 3박4일 짧은 일정 계획이 빠듯해서 숙소에서의 추억은 많이 쌓지 못했지만 다양한 국적의 사람들을 만나는 것을 좋아하시는 분들에게는 정말 좋은 곳입니다. !
all good！

This is my third time staying at Min’s place, and I have loved it every time. His place is a great value, he really cares about his guests, and he also keeps it very clean and tidy. The location is perfect, very close to public transportation. If you are staying in Tokyo, I highly recommend you stay at Min’s place.

MinさんとHaruさんはとても素晴らしいホストです。
チェックインの際にはお2人揃って出迎えてくれて会話も弾み、Airbnb初めての方も安心して宿泊出来るのではないでしょうか。
場所も分かりやすく東新宿駅から徒歩5分程の所に位置しています。
近所にはコンビニエンスストアや屋台、遅くまで開いているレストランやスーパーもあり非常に利便性の高いエリアです。
お部屋はとても明るいオシャレなドミトリータイプです。お2人でDIYされたルームインテリアも温かみを感じます。
ミニキッチン・冷蔵庫も完備されていますので、簡単な料理なら作ることが出来ます。
ベッドにはカーテンも付いているのでプライバシーも守られて快適に過ごすことができました。
中でも屋上テラスは本当に素晴らしいです！
スカイツリーや新宿ビル群を眺めながら宿泊中のゲスト達とグラスを傾けたり、モーニングを食べることも出来ます。
MinさんとHaruさんのお人柄が伝わるお部屋作りと異文化交流で、私にとって東京滞在は忘れられない思い出になりました。
Airbnbを利用する全ての人にオススメします。あなたもMinさんとHaruさんに是非会いに行って、私のように感動的な滞在を楽しんでください！

Min is very good host. There is no problem to communicate. And you can go anywhere because this house is very close from Higashi-shinjuku station. You can go to shinjuku station about 10-15min. by walk as well.
This house is clean also.
Have a good and comfortable time in this house.

I was really nervous about doing my first international solo trip and to Japan of all places, but Min and Haru have put my mind at ease. Min is so welcoming and the time and effort he takes to go out of his way to make your stay memorable goes to show you should never underestimate a great host. He showed us around Shinjuku, pointed out the must see/ try areas, and was our tour guide for an entire evening. I absolutely loved every minute I spent there. The roof is an absolute haven and I'm so grateful to have met the people I did staying at his place. Also, Shinjuku doesn't sleep and he subway stations are really close by. If I come back to Japan I will definitely stay with them again!

Min and Haru were great hosts. the place was always clean and had everything you need. host responded straight away. location was good, there were many Korean returants around and it's about a 5 min walk to the JR station.
일본여행에 있어 위치, 가격, 친구사귀기 등 많은 부분에서 매우 좋은 숙소라고 생각합니다. 호스트 분께서 한국어, 일본어, 영어 모두 잘하시고 친절하셔서 숙박하는 동안 편했습니다. 다음에 동경에 올일이 있으면 또 묵고 싶습니다. 2박3일동안 스페인 친구도 사귀고 재미있게 잘 놀아갑니다~!

This has been one of the most amazing places I’ve ever stayed. It is not just conveniently close to the metro station but also super clean and with very good help and conversation Min San and Haru San are amazing hosts, very helpful and super fun! The location is perfect, just 5 mins walk from the Subway. The cleanliness is great as Min and Haru are always there to make sure it’s clean. The whole place is very comfortable but the host made it more extra comfortable because of their warm hospitality and kindness. Thank you again..

Min and Haru are very welcoming hosts. Their generosity and hospitality amazed me, as this was my first time staying in an air bnb. I can't wait to return in the future for some more bbq on the rooftop. 11/10.

This place was great for a short weekend trip. The location is extremely convenient to train stations and subway stations. It’s a short walk to Golden Gai too which was a plus. Min was extremely responsive and accommodating. I highly recommend.

Staying here is an experience not worth missing. The rooms are a vibe and everyone is here to have a good time. Try to make friends and see where it leads!
Incredibly convenient location and very kind hosts. Definitely recommend this spot!
The room was comfortable and clean. Small goods were provided and Min and Haru were very nice hosts. I recommend it to everyone.

This well-connected and very walkable location is home to fantastic hosts and a space where you can meet travelers from all over!
* Check-in was easy, there are helpful videos to help you find the place, my phone's GPS/Maps app navigated me just fine.
* Its proximity to the Yamanote line (circular line) was a huge plus for me. It is also close to several other lines.
* There are about 8 vending machines right when you walk out of the building.
* Beds are comfy and the wi-fi was reliable.
I would love to stay again someday!

Great stay with Min and Haru in the sharehouse. I stayed a total of 30 days in Tokyo and hope to return and stay here again sometime soon, after splitting up my trip in 3 different hostels/airbnb, this was a highlight. I had a shared room with about 4 bunk beds and it was really comfortable, on 6th floor, keyless entry. Great Air conditioning and a toilet in the room, but shower is on 9th floor with laundry. Cool rooftop. The location is close to at least two trainlines and Kabukicho (red light district-type area)! walk up thru Hakone-yama to the Ana-hachimangu shrine and then the Waseda area and the Garden Lounge near the Kanda River. for example. Also booking the nearby Yayoi Kusama museum (have to do months in advance if possible, if it's even open!). I highly recommend also Shimokitazawa area near the Setaya-Daita metro, and Ebisu / Naka-meguro areas for a great chill outside of busy Shibuya and Shinjuku.
素晴らしい
Nice accommodation to stay in. Great location with quick access to multiple train lines.
很喜欢这里的房间，认识了很好的朋友，下次还会再来

I think everything about this spot is great! I really loved the rooftop that we were allowed to spend time on. The beds were comfy, everything was clean, Min was communicative and kind and when another guest got locked out I messaged him and he got back to me quickly. The location is also phenomenal , so close to the most popular spots of shinjuku.
Great place to stay
insanely well decorated with a unique vibe. balconies and rooftop access, photographers dream
Min is a super cool guy. Great stay, very clean.

The location of this hostel is unbearable. Meeting new people is a BIG bonus. The decorations and everything around you are fascinating. I couldn't recommend staying here more if I tried, especially if you're trying to meet new people or if you want to stay in the heart of the action in Kabukicho.
Awesome host. I would definitely recommend them plus area is very close to the station and also near the tourist attractions and restaurants. Thank you so much!
Buena ubicación y los anfitriones son muy amables.
Had everything listed and more. The people were super friendly and the location is pretty much unbeatable. Will definitely stay again when coming back to Tokyo!

Here I met the most beautiful people. Min & Haru are so kind and very interesting people. I felt like home when I stayed there. I will never forget my stay at shinjuku house. This place is the best and I will come back for sure.
Excellent location, great hosts, and a hospitable environment
친절하고 좋아요 이모저모 사람들과 이야기도 할 수 있고 추천도 받을 수 있고 다시 오면 또 방문할거같아요!

First time trying a share house. Great location and private bunkbeds. Great for solo travelers who want to meet people. Would have liked to see the house dusted and wiped down with attention to the shower room. Min was super friendly and recommended place to go and how to get around which was super helpful.
Really an above and beyond experience. Min & Haru are fantastic hosts that provide a welcoming a cozy experience where you feel right at home.

Really nice sharehouse with a lot of personality. It location is perfect as it close to the shinjuku station where you can travel anywhere in tokyo by rail. The host is very kind and easy going and really puts in an effort to make everybody enjoy their stay. A great place to stay as a solo traveler.
Nice space. Good location and very friendly hosts

Min and Haru are wonderful hosts! Well kept and very cute space! I had a room by the window and the view of the street was nice. Bring earplugs for the noise from the street and you will have a good nights sleep.
Read the description for the type of place you’ll be staying at, as this is all shared bathroom, sleeping area, and you’ll need to take an elevator to the shower if you’re staying on a different floor. All of this considered, it is amazing to stay here to be able to meet people and chat with Min and Haru. They take very good care of this place, including the bathrooms so I was very happy with my stay.
Great hostel located at a short walk from the heart of Shinjuku.
Great location ! Incredible host ! Would come again

Had a wonderful time staying at this gem. Very convenient location to stay if you plan on taking the subways around Tokyo. Host was very responsive and for a hostel this is pretty much the best you can get. You can get somewhere a little cleaner and private but it’ll be less fun and more expensive. Thank you for a great stay.
친절하십니다 미리 이야기 잘 하시면 편의도 많이 봐주십니다
Min et Haru sont d’excellentes personnes, accueillantes et à l’écoute, allez y sans hésitation!!
La chambre donne sur une rue bruyante, mais emplacement parfait, accueil parfait, l'auberge est confortable et les hotes aimables. Pas d'hésitation à avoir !
Min and Haru are always super nice and create a grate atmosphere at the guesthouse. Great place to meet other travellers or get recommendations for places to go and things to do.

Wow, my first time in a share house, and what a great experience it was! Min made every effort to make my stay as accommodating as possible. From a very flexible check in a check out time, to offering me a different bunk if I wanted, it was all there!
I had reservations about sharing a room with others but wanted to try the experience. Our hosts Min and Haru make sure each bunk in the shared room I'd as private as can be, with curtains to power outlets built in for convenience.
Min also made a great host just by being present everyday after lunch for a few hours. On more than one occasion I would eat and chat with both our host and others staying at the reservation. Being in the heart of Shinjuku, you also have access to everything.
I would 100% recommend Min and Haru's residence to anyone on the fence. I will certainly be keeping my eyes open for availability if I ever return to Japan in future.
Thanks Min and Haru for making my sharehouse experience the best it could be.
Min and Haru are a lovely couple! We had a great time in Tokyo staying here and loved the atmosphere inside the hostel and outside in the location.
Had a wonderful stay at Min & Haru's place, both of which are great hosts! The place really felt like a home away from home and I will definitely come back the next time I visit Shinjuku!
The best hostel I’ve stayed in, Min and Haru are the most lovely people I’ve met but also so many people come through this hostel you’ll always be meeting someone new and having fun hanging out.
Super fun hostel, great location in Shinjuku, min is an amazing host and interesting person. Could not recommend more
Muy lindo lugar en excelente ubicación. Siempre atentos para darme asistencia o recomendaciones.
이 숙소의 최대 장점은 숙소 사장님
Wonderful stay! The location is great. The bunk had very good privacy. Check in and check out was very smooth.
Very nice and friendly host, great place to stay travelling alone

The sharehouse is on the border between Koreatown and central Shinjuku. There are lots of restaurants, nightlife, and things happening. Using public transport, it is well-connected to all parts of Greater Tokyo. I had an awesome stay, and the other people were super nice and inclusive. Would highly recommend to other solo travelers!
沟通很顺畅而且房客们很热情也很友好

Very pleasant experience. Toshi introduced me to Airbnb, and we are lucky to have met him during this visit. His apartment is close to Todai and Ueno, both are places I enjoy the most in Tokyo. His house is pretty sizable and elegantly decorated.

Toshi was very helpful throughout. We loved the room and his facilities. Absolutely great place to stay at in Tokyo.

Wonderful experience staying at Toshi's house. The room was spacious and confortable with air conditioning (a must with Tokyo's hot and humid summer). Toshi was always helpful in helping us plan our activities. I would definitely recommend staying at his place. Thank you very much Toshi.

I lived at toshi's house for 4 nights. His house is in such a nice area with down town atomosphare, very enjoyable for taking a walk around the area. also easy to access from Ueno by bus or you can walk from some metro or train stations easily. Toshi san is such a great host who can explain everything I needed and I felt at home in his house. I definately come back again to have more time there next time.

It's near to the 根津station, and 20-min from Ueno Park on foot.  The living room is comfortable to relax after a crazy-shopping day. Of coz, Toshi is very nice. When we found one bedroom is not enough for us(2 adults n 2 kids) and requested for an additional bedroom, he offered special discounted price.

Toshiyuki was a wonderful host and shared his great house in a very quite neighbourhood with our littlr family of three.

I want to thank him for his suggestions about walks, his kind help if we had questions or werew trying to find something and the interesting chats about Japan, Tokyo, the area and himself.

Toshiyuki is a friendly and warmhearted person. We hope to stay at his house, when we're in Tokyo again.
nice host, nice neighborhood, good and clean rooms and very easy access to metro station.

Toshi was more than just a host, he showed us places that we wouldn't have found ourselves and ordered food we couldn't have ordered by ourselves. His house is very spacious and set in a quiet and cosy residential area with lots of cute shops. We could make use of the livingroom and kitchen as if they were our own. We would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Tokyo. Toshi is a superhost!

Toshi was very available before and during the stay. He gave clear directions to reach his place and also gave several tips about the neighborhood. One arrived, we were very well received and felt really welcome.

Toshi was a great host and we absolutely loved the Bunkyo-ku neighborhood. Toshi has clear instructions for guests in a welcome book and he lent us a great map of the neighborhood when we went out exploring. We also got a real intro to the neighborhood when Toshi brought us to an amazing local restaurant, followed by a visit to a local bar we'd never have gotten to experience on our own. Thanks for an awesome visit, Toshi!

Toshi gave us very helpful suggestions and very patient even I keep asking questions. The house is very clean and tidy. You can get whatever you need in this house even have a relax onsen. The house locate in a traditional living area of Bunkyo-ku. We love the atmosphere here and the local market. It in the center of Tokyo so you can get to everywhere very easily.

The only pity is we can't meet Toshi as he happen to be in US. But he is also available before and during our stay. And his house mate, Asako, also is very nice. As our stay is during the new year holiday, she waited for our arrival and make sure we have everything we need before she head back home for the new year.

When the day we left Tokyo, my daughter asked me when we can stay in this house again.

Toshi and Asako, thank you very much for your help and suggestions, and the very nice house! This is a very nice experience for my family first visit to Tokyo.

Toshi was a perfect host. He is a true airbnb host. His house is a hub for young urban professionals (living room) and so you meet nice people. He helped us around because Tokyo can get you lost in translation easiky but with his help we could easy discover the city. He even cooked a meal for us, a traditional Japanese hotpot. So much better than a hotel.
The neighborhood is great. A nice mix of traditional and hip shops, bars and restaurants.

We had a very nice stay at Toshi's.  Our room was comfortable. The location is fantastic, full of excellent restaurants nearby and close to a multitude of temples and shrines in an area of low rise buildings. Toshi dealt with check in very efficiently and welcomed us. It is a  large busy house as three rooms are available e as well as the two residents. We enjoyed meeting three others staying at the same time. If that suits you, we do recommend it.

One of my first AirBnB experiences and certainly, traveling will never be the same again. Toshi sent me detailed instructions on how to get to his home in Bunkyo, which is a quaint, older and quiet part of Tokyo that I have never explored before. While it is a bit of a commute to the Roppongi/Shinjuku side of Tokyo, I actually preferred staying in this area because it feels like you're living as a local and the nearby area has some gorgeous temples, shrines, proximity to the beautiful Yanaka cemetery and Ueno Park. The house itself is modern and clean, and my room was extremely spacious with a very comfortable bed. Toshi speaks great English, was extremely welcoming and helpful from the start with home brewed tea and lovely chat when I arrived and he was even nice enough to take me and another couple he was hosting to dinner one night! I often travel alone and I have to say, this has been one of my favourite travel experiences to date.  I would without any hesitation stay here again the next time I come to Tokyo.

We stayed a week at Toshis house and really appreciated the stay. It is very well located in a quite and very traditionnal area of Tokyo and the rooms are all very nice. Toshi also likes to exchange with his guests and the other guests and his roommate were all very friendy. I recommen to stay at his place!
Very comfortable stay at Toshi's home. The neighbourhood is wonderful, and his house is a stone's throw from lots of great eateries and little shops.
우에노까지 도보 20분정도 거리이고, 야마노테선 닛포리역까지도 약 20분정도 거리입니다. 숙소 근처가 조용하고 집이 깨끗합니다.

I came to Toshi's place last March. I'm so happy and even a little touched to see the familar neighbourhood. Even the scent in the air is still the same, warm and peaceful. I'm glad I contacted Toshi before came to Japan and have the chance to join the Fuji Mountain Climbing. We successfully get to the top of Fuji after trekking night. It's the first time in my life I saw meteor. The sun rise and the broad view is breathtaking and the beauty of nature can hardly be described by words. I also feel so lucky to know some new friends, very indepandent, considerate and brave girls from Australia and Japan. Thank you Toshi, for this amazing and unforgetable experience!

This is my first booking on Airbnb and I have to say it is a really wonderful and unforgettable experience. I stayed for two weeks in order to find a long-term stay in Tokyo during my study. It is a quite big house and all the facilities are quite nice and well maintained. I love the big open kitchen and dinning room. Room space is quite big which will also be suitable for families. Bathroom is alway clean and tidy with necessary stuff provided. Basically you do not have to bring anything, it's very convenient. There are a lot of attractions nearby.  And if the wether is not too hot, you could take a walk to Ueno Zoo or Tokyo university. Also, there are a lot of shrine and temples around, looks like this is a blessed place. Besides, Toshi himself is a very interesting and enthusiastic person. Very international and open-minded. I always enjoyed talking to him and share our daily experience and opinions on a lot of topics. During my stay, I also met many other guest from all over the world, we sit together, chatting, sharing and really had a good time. It may be another advantage to stay in such a big house. Strongly recommended !!!

I had a great stay in Toshi's home. The room is very spacious and comfortable. The house was very clean and well kept. Although Toshi was away on business when I arrived, check in was made simple. He kept in contact throughout the experience and provided maps to get to the house and clear instructions for checking in and out. When Toshi returned from his trip, we were able to chat a bit and he was friendly and seemed genuinely interested in his guests. Staying in this home was a nice experience and I would do it again.

Toshi was a truly fantastic Airbnb host — staying with him felt more like staying with an old friend. His home is clean, well located, and unusually spacious by Japanese standards, with great amenities. The Nezu neighborhood and surrounding areas are among Tokyo's more laid-back and traditional parts, but really intriguing, and their quieter feel made for a nice break after a day of exploring. And Toshi himself was great to talk with and extremely helpful with everything from restaurant recommendations to laundry. I wouldn't hesitate to stay with Toshi again, and hope to come back soon!

Toshi is the best AirBnB host! he is so communicative and helpful.
His apartment is located in a special neighborhood where the streets are great to wonder with small shops and alleys. amazing!
also not to far from the metro and the train to the airport. PERFECT!
Super clean, comfortable and has all you need and more!
Thank you Toshi so much for everything!

This is a very good find for people who are looking to experience a more laidback setting than the usual Tokyo. The neighborhood itself is quaint and very safe. The residence is as listed; very clean and very comfortable. The host was also welcoming and kept in touch, even inviting the guests for dinner so we could get to know each other. He also gave guests enough space so that we could do our own thing, which I appreciated. The remote controller for the light and also for the air conditioner may need to be fixed, but it wasn't a problem during my stay.

We really enjoyed our stay at Toshis  home in a very peaceful area and slept very well. The communication with Toshi before our arrival was very good and it was nice to discuss with him during our stay. We would come back to Toshi's home.
Toshi's house is good to live. it is clean  and house environment is quite calm.

My stay on Toshi's place was great. I loved the neighbourhood and the location is perfect. The area is good to feel the real Tokyo, with lots of smal restaurants and local stores. Toshi is a great guest and the house is very confortable. If I come back to the city, I'll totaly stay there again.
非常有文化底蕴的区域，安静，每栋房子都设计的很用心，房东非常细心为每一处做使用说明，干净，洗手间干湿分区，设施齐全。靠近东京大学，东京艺术大学和上野公园，如果有较多的时间停留在东京看展览馆，感受文化氛围，居住在这里是个很好的选择。

Mr. Toshi's house is very clean and comfortable to live, and I especially love the inner wooden structures. The house is located at a place with very quite neighborhoods, which I enjoyed very much. It is very close to subway stations, the university of Tokyo, and the Ueno park. There are also quite a few very high quality Japanese traditional restaurants nearby. The days living with Mr. Toshi are enjoyable. He speaks very good English, and we talked very often during our stay. We learned much about Japanese culture from him. Before we leave, we had a dinner together at a Japanese traditional restaurant. Without him, we would definitely not be able to enjoy the local saki, sea food, and sashimi in a restaurant where nobody speaks English. If we come back to visit Tokyo again, Mr. Toshi's place will definitely be our first choice.
Comfortable bed, good shower, friendly host

Toshi has been a great host, giving us detailled and personalized instructions to reach his place, travel around, restaurants, etc. We just didn't have enough time to get to know each others more. But that was due to our trip that was too short. We are definitely planning to come back at Toshi's and hope we can spend more time with him.
I loved the place. Easy to reach by means of transport, quiet location, but not too far from the center. Toshi is a very friendly host, I felt very comfortable. I highly recommend it!

This house is great for long term stay, with luxury space and equipments, big kitchen, dining room and living room.  And it located in a quiet neighborhood near university and Ueno park (with zoo, meseums & art galleries), is ideal for family trip with kids.

Toshi is a very friendly, easygoing and reliable host. Without him, I would never be able to find the most comforting and relaxing hot spring in Tokyo or small, economic local restaurants only known by local people but serve the most delicious food. Even as a Chinese having tasty food everywhere, I have to admit the food Toshi introduced was unforgettable.
My business also went well since I stayed at Toshi’s place. As the house located near Museum and University area, the neighborhood is so safe, quiet and intelligent. Service such as printing and mailing is just within minutes distance and easy to use. Transportation is so time saving and efficient, as I had a tight schedule and need to visit several business area and sightseeing spots in 5 days.
I also enjoyed the time with Asako and other guests. I really appreciate the chance get to know so many interesting people. So I highly recommend Toshi's place! And hope to see everyone again.
Toshi was friendly and the accommodation was lovely and clean.

We stayed 6 nights at Toshi's appartment and we enjoyed it.
Communication with Toshi was quick and clear.
The area is quite and really nice. There are convenience stores, restaurants, metro stop close by and also sento bath.
All in all, Toshi is a great host and we can only recommend his appartment.

Hébergement confortable situé dans un quartier très plaisant, constituant un très bon rapport qualité prix pour Tokyo. L'entretien des lieux n'est pas à la hauteur de ce qu'on pourrait attendre à la lecture des nombreuses consignes qui nous sont données. Accueil très sympathique de Toshi, pas tout à fait au niveau toutefois de ce qu'on peut trouver ailleurs au Japon.

Toshi is a very friendly and open minded host. The house and room itself is very cozy & comfy with everything you need, even better than the pictures. It is located closed to Nezu metro station; a very nice quiet & local Japanese area full of typical restaurants. Toshi explained in very details how to get to his house from the airport and the communication (arrival time, open questions, check out, etc.. ) was just perfect! During my stay, Toshi cooked a homemade yummy miso soup :) and bring us to a very enjoyable evening discussion with his friends after his « Renovation craft workshop »
Thank you very much Toshi for made my stay wonderful at your house and I hope to see you again! 有難う 御座います.

La maison de Toshi est parfaite. Notre chambre était très grande, confortable, lumineuse...l'emplacement de sa charmante maison est idéalement située près du Parc Ueno et du zoo. Vous pouvez aller à Asakusa à pied sans problème et marcher jusqu'à Akihabara.
C'est génial ! Je recommande fortement

Toshiyuki home is calm and quiet, closed to the subway and train station. In other word well situated.
The room and the other pieces were very clean.
Toshiyuki was here when we arrived and was very helpful.
I recommend this place !

The house of Toshi is a big house, very confortable and so convenient!!! My room was great, with queen bed, desk and balcony. The place is very quiet and the neighborhood is so adorable, with old houses, commercial streets very close for shopping and lots of small traditional shops and restaurants.
The best is the warm welcoming of Toshi, speaking perfectly english and ready to give lots of tips and advices to his guests!!!

considering the average offer of a big and restless borough like Ueno, the flat exceeded my expectations: a very nice and well furnished dining/living environment on the ground floor, a big room with air con system, and a very clean and functional bath. all of this in a really quiet and walkable neighbourhood, with lots of shops, restaurants, and very kind inhabitants of all ages.
if you decide to stay here, please consider to have a chat with the other guests for a really enjoyable moment.

Wonderful place in a fantastic location, with a great host! We stayed in the double room, which was very spacious with an extremely comfortable bed. The house is large, which is unusual in Tokyo, so we had plenty of space to stretch out after our 7 weeks in Japan. Communication with Toshi was excellent, and we were glad that we had the chance on our final night to grab a beer with him in a local Izakaya. Totally recommended and we will stay again next time in Tokyo.

Toshi's place is the perfect to stay. Toshi is a very kind host.
The area is very peacefull and near from the C line, Ueno park and the nice district of Yanaka.
We enjoy a lot spending time the and we hope to come back

Toshi's house is exceptionally big for Airbnb house in Japan, and my room was as well. The location is great, in an historic area called Yanaka, a must visit in Tokyo, where you can see historic houses and shops and live like a local!
Toshi is one of the greatest hosts I met in Japan (and I traveled around for 4 months, living in Aibnb rooms all the time...!), he speaks a perfect english and is eager to make you discover Japanese way of life and culture.
I was a long term host, as I spent 3 weeks in May 17 and 2 weeks in June 17. I ended calling this house my home and Toshi a friend!!!!

Toshi was a very helpful host. He even gave us the correct hint on where to find very specific souvenirs (plastic fake food items as displayed by restaurants) :-)
The location is really nice, but a little far from the JR line.
Thank you, Toshi!
房东人非常好 虽然只住短短两天但是感受到了房东非常的热情好客并且能够提供很多帮助 房子晚上非常安静 内部环境也特别棒 下次如果有机会还会选择这里！（╹◡╹）♡

You cannot find a best place to stay in Tokyo. The room is very confortable, the neighborhood is quiet but hype, and Toshi is a wonderful host, attentive, welcoming and well-organized. We will definitely come back!

第一次选择民宿，非常棒的一次旅行。感谢Toshi的热情款待，每次都主动与你沟通。房子在文京区，周围是上野公园以及便利的铁道交通系统，完全不用担心。
另外下次去东京，我还选这便利安静的房子！再次感谢房东Toshi，祝工作顺利生活幸福！

10 days guest. Travel for Entrance Examination
House situation: Desk, shower, Wi-Fi, Kitchen, Air- conditioning， E-Checkin（with app）.Close to U-Tokyo.
Close to Ueno good place for shopping.
Room is clean, comfortable and spacious. My room has a desk. Perfect place for study.
Toshi is a very nice person. And also Maiko~Toshi would always send you greetings. It's very important for a foreigner because it would make you feel like being at home. It's very relaxed to prepare examination in his house.
Maiko is considerate and could always offer you useful local information.
If you are the one like me who have to prepare for the Entrance Examination. Or you want to experience how Japanese live their life . Please no hesitate to choose his house.
Important! it's cheaper than hotel and could make you experience more about local life.
Chinese version：
房子干净宽敞性价比高。可以使用厨房做菜。交通便利去各种地方都很方便（尤其是机场）。文京区近东大。十分安静且安全。
电子化程度高。 Checkin什么的都是App完成。
店主Toshi和Maiko是非常友好的人。可以提供各种当地信息包括哪里好玩儿路怎么走。英语日语均可。
特别是想考试的同学推荐选用。放松安静是个学习的好选择。
十分点赞～
日式风格的小阁楼我很喜欢，Toshi的房子干净整洁舒适，位于一个很安静的小区，靠近地铁，交通便利。如果下次再去日本，一定还会选择这里。另外，Toshi人很好，容易交流，沟通无障碍，对来东京的朋友们，强烈推荐这家民宿。Toshi，非常感谢~

Great!
Great!!
Great!!!
Don’t change a thing.

I would 100% recommend this place!
The place and people are so welcoming, the room and common spaces are all clean and very well equipped and organized, Toshi-san is an amazing host and very interesting person. And I love the neighborhood! It’s a quiet area having an old and nice ‘Japanese’ atmosphere, but lots of interesting places around to visit, great cafes, bars, stores.... I would love to come back here again!
としさん、ゆかこさん、ありがとうございました！ Miyuki
地方其实很容易找到，附近会有小店，非常安静，吃饭的地方也很多选择，房子很干净整洁，这次虽然没有见到房东，但是入住很便捷，推荐~

Toshi-San is a very interesting and inspiring host. We stayed in the double-bed room. The work desk and chair are handmade by him. The house is clean and well organised. On the third floor, there is a room currently being redesigned and done as a traditional Japanese bedroom. We look forward to staying in that room next time we visit Tokyo.
位置比较好找，周围挺安静的，都市挺热情的，入住前会详细说明，卧室挺大的，就是公共区域冬季会有一点冷，比较推荐
Very comfortable room in nn excellent house in a beautiful area. A wonderful host. Highly recommended
It's more a home stay..

Toshi's house was great, located in a beautiful neighbourhood, with small streets and family businesses. Here you can experience  a different face of the sparkling Tokyo, being very close to the downtown and to all the touristics areas. Toshi was a great host, offering us insights regarding what to visit in Japan. Thank you, Toshi!

Everything you could want for a great Tokyo experience.  A comfortable bed in a beautiful, modern and spotlessly clean home.  My room also featured lots of closet space and a small desk with a small chair.  Located on a quiet street in a charming, older residential neighborhood full of interesting shops and restaurants.  Close to a main road and an easy walk to Sendagi and Nezu metro stations on the Chiyoda line.  Toshi is a charming and friendly host.  His instructions are clear and his description of his home is very accurate.  The house was very quiet, almost soundproof.  Even though there were two people living there and two other guest rooms which were occupied most of the time I was there, I rarely every heard anyone.

I liked the location very much since I do not like turistic places and here I could see local, modest life. Very cosy and near metro and many small eating places( all attended by locals, almost no turists!) The house has western style and it is pleasent to be in. Toshi deserve all positive comments! I am very glad I found this place.
Toshi is great host & his place is in an awesome location

Toshi’s place is a gem! Its location is unique in that it’s located in the older and more residential side of Tokyo, which gives it a more laidback feeling than living in Shinjuku and Shibuya. The house is about 9 minutes walk from Nezu train station. I like the family-run shops and restaurants in the neighbourhood!
Bedroom was on second floor and is spacious, homey and comfortable. Because the bedroom is facing a road, you may hear passing vehicle noises once or twice at night. Also, air conditioner is rather warm and can be cooler.
Toshi is a super-friendly host and gives good tips on places to visit in the neighbourhood. He was prompt in communication, and checking into the house was easy with only smartphone required.
All things considered, I hope to stay again in Toshi’s place in future visits!

Toshi is a very enthusiastic and friendly host. The house is surrounded by typical Japanese streets which are quiet and beautiful. Toshi will provide a lot of travel advice and I have spent a great time here. These days I communicated with him a lot. We have similar values also have different opinions, as the old saying goes: "君子は和して同ぜず". He is a brave man who loves thinking independently and will try his best to achieve his goals with enthusiasm.
Wish Toshi good luck in the future.

I saw Tomomi-chan cleaning all the time. She cleans even the places I could never imagine someone would clean ie the bottom of sink plug. She also scrubbed it with toothbrush and disinfect it with 2 different kinds of sprays.
Toshi drove us to Soba and Onsen. Parties and gatherings are normal for this house. You can choose whether to join or not.
Lisa-chan is the cutest thing you will ever see, the lil sister everyone wish they could have. She cooked for us her Spanish specialty. She spent some time in Spain and her English is fluent.
The room is big and the bathroom is bigger. The bathtub is unusually big for a house in Tokyo. The house is really big, especially the common shared space. You will never feel cluttered.
Many cute small shops are nearby. I walked around and enjoyed every day and I stayed 12 days.
Shops recommended: Le Bage, Sincerite, Kamachiku
Toshi's place was perfect for my stay in Tokyo, located in a very quiet but amazing area of Tokyo and he is such a wonderful host ! So kind and so helpful. I would highly recommend this place !
Toshi is really friendly and considerate.He can speak fluent English and provides useful information about traveling and the local culture.A very nice experience in Japan.
Toshi is a welcoming and communicative host, and his neighborhood is cute and easily navigable. We would gladly stay again!
部屋は広くてとても綺麗でした。生活設備も整っているのでしばらく滞在するのにもいいと思いました。東京の下町感もとてもよいです。

Toshi's home is the perfect place to stay in Tokyo. The neighbourhood is fantastic, his flat mates are lovely, and Toshi has the best tipps for things to do in Tokyo. I am very grateful to have had the opportunity to stay at his house!

Toshi is a very reactive and responsible host. Although he’s in a business trip, he answered very quickly all my questions. His housemates are also very nice! The area Nezu has many delicious local restaurants with a reasonable price. You could experience Tokyo’s local life there. Je recommande les yeux fermés !

This was a very special Airbnb stay for me. I stayed for a month with Toshi and fellow household members and I now consider them my Japan family. I learned so much about Japanese culture and shared many wonderful, memorable experiences with them. The location was great too. It's far enough from the hectic areas to provide a peaceful neighborhood, yet there's a lot of really interesting stuff nearby and the train station is a short walk - a quick trip will get you to Shinjuku, etc. when you're in the mood for a flashier afternoon or evening. I could go on and on about how great my experience was - if I could give more than 5 stars, I wouldn't hesitate.

Great host and great location. Toshi-San was very accommodating and helpful. Toshi and his housemates are very friendly and provide the typical Japanese hospitality with a more honest authenticity. They are caring and want to ensure that you are prepared for all aspects of your trip to japan. The place was very clean and the stay was very comfortable. The location is a very quiet and quaint neighborhood and gives off a more community vibe than other areas in tokyo. Very accessible to all areas of Tokyo and nippori station (to get to Narita and Tokyo station for Shinkansen). Highly recommended!
非常棒的房东

It’s a really nice experience to live in Toshi’s cute house. Toshi will introduce you some interesting Japanese culture, places and anything if you want hear from him. Every one is very kind in this house. You can feel warm during your stay!

What a smart home! Well, this was the first Japanese home I stayed in, and the room is much warmer than it appears in photos. It's right next to Toshi's and his other roommate, but this time he was away on business. Still, he checked in with me at least once a day during my stay. This spot is immaculate, also nicely designed, with massive, extremely clean sinks, super smart washing machine, spacious kitchen. Only thing is I had to cover my shadeless window with a throw b/c of bright street lights at night and blazing sun in the morning. Toshi might've been gone, but his roommates constantly kept the place so clean! Extra linen, towels, and blankets were right on hand.
広くて清潔です。居住者の方は親切で、フレンドリーな方々なのでシェアハウス生活を楽しむことができました。
The room is so big and tidy. Everything is perfectly suits for me. Toshi-San is a good friend and guider of me and definitely helped me a lot. Thank you. Recommend him and his room to everyone.

Toshiyukiさんのお家は落ち着いた雰囲気の住宅街にある一軒家です。昔ながらの風情も残っており、近くの商店街へは歩いてすぐなので、買い物に困ることはありません。個人的に谷中霊園から谷根千の商店街を案内してもらいましたが、本当に魅力的な街だと思いました。東京は狭い住宅が多いですが、この一軒家は大きいですね。水回りは清潔で、コロナ対策も十分取れていると感じました。部屋が複数あるので、他のゲストと交流が出来るのも魅力です。
As new comers to Japan, it’s really one of the best choices. The host is really kind and nice. He helped us a lot with daily stuff. 🤗

This is probably the best stay I ever had in airbnb! People, coziness, cleanliness, location and people again - everything is so good! Bed was so comfy - I wish i can bring it home hahah (I did asked where they got pillows and bring same home for myself tho), but yes, next time I go to Tokyo - if this room still available - I’m going back here 100%. It’s more than airbnb really. Wonderful stay ❤️
Toshi桑的房子坐落于一个非常古色古香的位置，属于日本老牌的文化街区，有很多日本神社但同时生活交通也很便利去到东京其他地方，晚上睡觉的时候非常安静。主人可以讲流利的英语且非常热情，给我们提供了很多旅行建议和帮助，住了一周之后我们也成为了好朋友。下次我们再来东京的话还会首选toshi桑的房源。

Toshi’s place was great! It was exactly what I was looking for my 3 week trip to Japan. I had a desk in my room which was perfect. The bed was comfortable! The room had a heater which was absolutely necessary in the winter. The toilets were shared but felt private since they were detached from the bathroom. Toshi was very friendly and helped me practice my japanese. The neighborhood was residential and very quiet. But it had great food and Ueno was a 20 min walk away which has everything you’ll need.

We really enjoyed our stay at Toshi’s place. The neighbourhood is nice, calm and very charming with many small interesting shops and restaurants — close to central locations too. It was easy to get around :—)
Toshi and Yumiko are easy to communicate with; friendly and accomodating — welcomed us with a cup of tea.
We felt very lucky that we found such a place to begin our journey!

Toshi est un hôte attentif et amical qui aime partager des moments avec ses voyageurs. Sa maison est agréable et très propre. L’emplacement est idéal pour sillonner Tokyo grâce à la proximité du métro.

This our second time staying with Toshi. We love the neighborhood - lots of little bendy streets, charming shops and houses, a zillion temples. We loved walking from his place to Ueno Park and beyond. The feeling at Toshi's place is very peaceful - it's kind of amazing how close in it is.
Toshi lives in the house, so you will almost certainly get to interact with him. He is relaxed and sweet. Also his English is very good.
Toshi was very friendly and helpful and his English is very good. I enjoyed the restaurants he recommended and I really loved the area the place is in.
I throughly enjoyed my 8 days stay there. The place is spacious and clean. Toshi is a great host and I would like to stay there again.

I had the most amazing time at Toshiyuki-san’s place. It’s located in a super cute and lovely area, the place was spacious, clean and the people very welcoming! I spent my birthday there and was able to have a little gathering with the other shared-house people. Very grateful for the new friends I’ve made from my stay, they made my Japan trip incredibly special. Yumiko-San was also very helpful throughout! It’s truly a stay unlike any other.
Had a fun time here! Toshi is really friendly and an interesting guy to talk to. Thanks Toshi!

Toshi is very friendly and simple, i really appreciate how warm he is to my children and help me holding her. This is the kind of experience a hotel can’t offer!
The place is very clean and quiet, with a comfortable mattress, we had great sleep.
There is a nearby playground and many restaurants around and it’s also walkable to the zoo!
We would love to stay here again. Highly recommend !

C’était vraiment super de séjourner dans la maison de Toshi durant ces quelques jours à Tokyo.
Le quartier est super , avec une vue très locale. Des vendeurs de miso , tofu etc.
Encore merci Toshi pour ton aide.
Nous sommes ravi d’avoir fais ta connaissance ainsi que celle des autres habitants de la maison.
Merci !

지금까지 머물러봤던 숙소 중 최고입니다. 호스트 Toshi님은 굉장히 친절하고, 나이스한 최고의 호스트였습니다. 집도 굉장히 깔끔하고 조용했으며 일본에서 지내는 동안 전혀 불편함이 없을 정도 였습니다. 다음에 다시 일본에 올 때, 다시 이 숙소를 이용할 계획입니다.
トシさん、本当にありがとうございました。 お元気で、また来ます！ ✋

I had such a relaxing stay (in Tokyo, yes!) and it was just so refreshing coming back there after a long day exploring, instead of to a busy area like Shibuya or Shinjuku. I would’ve gone crazy otherwise. The house is around Nezu/Yanaka, a very cute area with a strong community vibe. Walking through in the morning was a bless, you can see kids going to school, the grannies catching up about their day.. all very chill and down to Earth, just exactly what I was looking for the first leg of my trip.
The place is exactly like in the pictures, a very nice cross between Japanese and Nordic style. No complaints whatsoever re bathroom etc.
The place is advertised as a share house, but there’s no pressure to stay around. This was one of my main concerns but it quickly went away. Toshi’s very approachable and quite chill, very easy to talk to. I got to make gyoza with Asako and had some very long conversations, she was lovely. Throughout a very memorable stay for me, I’ll definitely be back!

We absolutely loved Toshi's place! The room was incredibly comfortable - spacious, the bed was very comfortable, lots of closet space, and the blinds made it so dark in the morning it was easy to sleep in. The neighbourhood was also very nice and quiet with lots of things nearby like a cute little coffee shop, a soba noodle restaurant, a bagel shop, etc. The place is also not a far walk to train stations or a busier street. Toshi and Yumiko were incredibly easy to communicate with and very accommodating. We feel that they went out of their way to make us feel welcomed and comfortable. We would absolutely recommend their place to anyone staying in Tokyo!
Kristen and Chris

It's a shared house close to Ueno.
As the area is a bit off most common locations, it still has a lot of restaurants, which can be enjoyed.
If needed you can cook in the house, but I didn't really use it, as I got recommendations for local shops and restaurants.

Pro: 1. Helpful and friendly host.
2. Spacious room & living room.
3. No problems to communicate with host in English.
4. Very quiet neighborhood.
Pro/Con: host lives in the same house.
Con:
1. A bit dent in the middle of bed.
2. Need a eye cover for sleeping, there is no window shade to block the light totally.
3. Guests need to clear the water of bathroom walls, door and floor after each shower, that’s one of the house rules.
4. My bedroom can’t be locked from outside, so I locked my luggage every time I left the house. That was very annoying.
5. The front door lock is not very reliable, I had trouble to get in on my arrival. The main door could be locked from outside once, I waited 20 minutes for Host to get back from his activities.

Me siento feliz de haber escogido este hospedaje, Toshi es un gran host y siempre me sentí como en casa. La zona es muy tranquila y está muy cerca de tiendas de conveniencia, restaurantes y la estación del metro.
El cuarto es bastante amplio y muy limpio, el baño es compartido pero se siente todo muy privado. Sin duda volvería a quedarme en este hospedaje, sentí como estar en casa junto a amigos. Gracias por todo Toshi! 🍣🇯🇵

Toshi and Kumiyo were great hosts and they know how to make you feel at home ! The communication with the other housemates was also very smooth and friendly. The house is located in a very nice neighborhood with mostly small houses and many small restaurants and cafés. Despite the really hot weather we enjoyed exploring it mostly on foot. The room is large (much larger in fact that any other we got in standard hotels in Japan big cities) and simply but nicely furnished, just as the rest of the house.
Great location, clean n comfortable room but the best part was the people! So friendly and lots of meaningful conversations.
Great host. Great location. Had good interactions with the host. Felt like home. Very close to the Tokyo University and very pleasant residential location.

합리적인 가격과 훌륭한 호스트.
호스트께서 영어 유창하셔서 일본어 못해도 소통에 문제 없습니다.
지하철역은 도보 6~7분, 버스정류장은 3분거리.
5분거리에 세븐일레븐 있고 숙소 바로옆에 존맛 커피, 베이글 집 있습니다.
한적한 주택가라서 밤에도 조용하고 우리가 생각하는 일본 골목길 그 자체에요.
화장실, 욕실, 주방 공용입니다만 깔끔하게 관리되어 있어서 오히려 좋습니다.

Had the most wonderful stay. Met amazing people in the house and neighborhood, truly felt so welcomed throughout my trip. Was nice to get away from the noisy streets, and felt good to be able to center myself before or after a long day of exploring. If you're looking for a unique, more local experience, highly recommend staying here! Really made my trip so memorable :)

根津に泊まることもシェアハウスに泊まることも初めてでしたが共にすごくいい経験でした。トシさんはもちろん家に住んでいる他の住人さんもすごく優しく接していただき快適な時間を過ごせました。
Nezu was a beautiful calming city not far from central Tokyo. The stay was very comfortable and I had a good time here!
非常好！一段难忘的旅途回忆，我们每天都会聊天，感受到了另一种生活模式。希望Toshi能够保持这个场所，有缘再会。

Unser Aufenthalt bei Toshi und Yumiko war das Highlight unserer Japanreise. Toshi ist ein charmanter Gastgeber, der aufmerksam, offen und neugierig ist. Yumiko war im Vorfeld sehr hilfreich und hat für unsere Ankunft alles Wichtige besprochen. Unser Zimmer lag im ersten Stock des Hauses. Die WG hat noch drei weitere Mitbewohner:innen, die auch sehr aufgeschlossen und gastreundlich sind. Die Simmung im Haus ist rücksichtsvoll und ruhig. Trotzdem haben wir viele Abende gemeinsam schwatzend am Küchentisch verbracht. Und dabei viel Spaß gehabt, Japanische Ausdrücke gelernt, Spezialitäten probiert und fantastische auf unsere Interessen abgestimmte Tipps für Unternehmungen und Restaurants in der Nachbarschaft erhalten. Die Nachbarschaft ist aber genaus so neugierig und offen, wie die Hausbewohner:innen. Wir wurden in den zahlreichen Cafes oft angesprochen und hatten tolle Begegenungen. Wie haben einen kleinen Einblick in das Leben in Tokyo  bekommen! Es ist wirklich zu empfehlen! Danke Toshi

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez Toshi, il a été d’une grande gentillesse, on a bien échangé.
Le quartier est calme, bien situé

If I can give more stars than five, I’ll provide Toshi's place five more stars because he deserves it.
His place is spotless, everything is in order, and very accommodating to any guest.
His house is strategic, located near some of the best sushi places in town, and reachable by any public transport such as trains and buses. And one more thing, his spot is near Nippori Station, the first gate of Skyliner that departs from Narita Airport.
Toshi is very friendly towards his guests and me. He is always helpful, not hesitant to offer and gives valuable advice. He is willing to help me find a taxi early because it's not easy to find one at 5 a.m. Huge thanks to you, Toshi. The other residents of his place are amiable; the last night I was there, they even invited me to the middle of the night talk after the meal.
If there is one place I will stay when I return to Japan, It's Toshi’s. Once again, a big thank you for your assistance during my stay, Arigatou Gozaimasu; see you again sometime

Very nice place to stay. Central location. Beautiful architecture and finished inside the house. The doors are solid wood. People were friendly and respectful. Loved the layout and design of the bathroom. The room is heated by an oil heater—you might nice a smell after using it but it didn’t bother me. loved the black out shades.

Toshi's a great host! he's very friendly and always willing to help us and he gave us very useful recommendations.
the place is beautiful like in the photos and comfortable. I have to add that the room had a very powerful heater so we spent very warm nights and the bed was super comfortable. I say this because the heating system in some of the other places we have been to in Japan has not been this good. we are definitely coming back! thank you Toshi for everything.

Beautiful area to stay in close to public transport, spacious room and a really homely feel. Toshi’s place is a great to place to stay in Tokyo. Toshi and the other housemates are very friendly and welcoming. Highly recommended.

Such a nice guy. Very patient and amiable.
Definitely staying there again if I make it back to Tokyo.

Séjour très agréable dans la maison de Toshi, où on se sent vraiment chez soi. Belle maison, tout en bois, à la japonaise. Et on est au coeur du quartier adorable de Yanaka, avec ses petites ruelles, cafés, boutiques, et multitude de temples.

Very happy with my stay here. Toshi is a very friendly, talkative and helpful host and the neighborhood has a wonderful community feel to it. I felt like i got to see a different side of Tokyo and would love to come back some time! (Also, make sure to visit Aoyama Cafe!)

Great place that is filled with the local charms. Lots of small shop houses along the way to the airbnb and there are various amenities nearby too (supermarket, 7-11 etc).
Our host is friendly and accommodating and it is truly a great place to feel the local spirit and live as the local does.

후기가 좋아서, 호텔을 안가고 예약했는데, 정말 제 일본 여행의 기분 좋은 시작이였습니다. 숙소는 일본의 조용한 주택가에 위치에 있습니다. 매일 아침 우에노 공원에서 조깅을 할 수 있고, 주변에 맛집도 다양합니다. 또한 주인인 토시는 일본문화를 잘 안내해줍니다. 저는 일본 스타일로 머리도 잘랐습니다! 일본 사람들이 어떻게 사는지 궁금한 사람들, 여행은 살아보는거라고 생각하는 사람들에게 최고의 숙소입니다.
A great AirBnB due to its location and close proximity to train stations and restaurants. Toshi-San is a very nice guy and shows great hospitality 👍😊
Everything was perfect!

If you don't mind sharing space with a few individuals this place is perfect. Cheap for Tokyo and around some of the best places to have a relaxing time. It's a historic area with lots of shops and shrines to see. Toshi was a great host providing recommendations and not hesitating to ask us if we needed anything. If you tell him about any area you're going to in Tokyo, he has some piece of advice or a place to recommend. Book this place if you're traveling to Japan!

It's located in a very nice spot, close to the Chiyoda Metro Line, a 7/11, multiple good restaurants, and attractions like the Nezu Shrine and Ueno Park. Places like Akihabara and Asakusa are also relatively close.
The accommodation itself was quite satisfactory, it was very clean, and convenient for washing clothes or taking a bath or cooking.
Would recommend for anyone who is looking for accommodation in the region.

Toshi was an absolutely wonderful and welcoming host! Both he and Yumiko were incredibly helpful and always quick to respond. The house has a warm, inviting atmosphere that instantly makes you feel at home. The neighborhood is perfect—quiet, with charming shops and cafes nearby. Plus, there are some fantastic spots for dinner!"

We had the best time at Toshi‘s place! Whilst the room and the whole house is spacious and well equipped, Toshi is an absolutely friendly and open host and we enjoyed our little chats between coming and going a lot. He gave us great recommendations for the neighbourhood and even invited us to have some tea and sake with his friends. In general, we adored this part of Tokio. We explored a lot of the city during our stay and we both agreed that the area around Toshi‘s place has been our favourite!! We would definitely recommend staying with Toshi, spending some time in the beautiful surroundings and, by that, experience the local life in Tokio!

This was by far, the highlight of my trip in terms of accommodation in Japan, even though I stayed in beautiful ryokans. This is because the neighborhood is amazing, with friendly people, nice local boutiques, restaurants, cafés, and an overall charming vibe. It made me want to look up the housing market.
Toshi-san is also a nice host as well, very interesting person and friendly. House was clean and it felt like I was doing a homestay more so than an Airbnb. If you have the chance to stay here, I strongly recommend it. I'll be back in the neighborhood, if not for my next stay in Tokyo, to visit at least!

Really enjoyed staying with Toshi. really quiet surroundings and a great place to unwind if the bustle of the city gets too much. surrounded by good restaurants and easily accessible via the Skytrain if you land at Narata airport.
Toshi is a great host and the place was amazing! Close to everything and in a good area.

Na de hectiek van andere wijken is het zalig bijkomen in de wijk Yanaka en Toshi’s huis. Toshi is een fijne gastheer, gezellig gepraat, gratis koffiebonen voor het tentje tegenover het huis, attent.
Fijne sfeer in deze buurt en ook in het huis. Kamer was ruim (voor Tokyo) en een kacheltje zorgde in december (4 tot 14 graden buiten) voor een aangename temperatuur. Goede windscreens, lekker donker te maken. Badkamer is oud en schimmelig, maar de douche is zalig. ‘s nachts kun je wakker worden van lawaai (aan de overkant zit een bedrijfje), dus doe oorplugs in.
Van harte aanbevolen!

Fantastic Airbnb -- Toshi's flat is very clean and well-maintained and has all the amenities for a longer stay. The location is quite central (10 minute away from the station) and the neighborhood has great cafés. Toshi's hospitality is the real highlight - he goes out of his way to make your stay more comfortable, he makes suggestions for itineraries and is kind, and accommodating. Highly recommended!

Amazing location with an amazing host. Toshi is kind and friendly. He met me on check in and made my whole stay comfortable and pleasant. The rooms are spacious, functional and comfortable, photos capture it well. The neighborhood is so peaceful, so many small shops and little traffic, perfect for walking around. Aoyama coffee is a must, honestly the best cup of coffee I've had. I hope to return!

We loved our stay at Toshi’s place. Toshi is a very welcoming, helpful and warm host. The location is very charming,with calm, small streets with almost no cars and people on bicycles, small shops and a beautiful active shrine and many historical buddhist temples nearby.
Our room was very clean and comfortable, with ample closet space, shelves and floorspace for suitcases. There is a big kitchen and living space with couches and low wide table made by Toshi.
They use a digital key so you can arrive at any time and come and go if you are comfortable using apps. It was quite easy once installed.
We enjoyed getting to know Toshi, and being in a house where guests and permanent residents live together. It did feel like being part of local life.
Safe neighborhood, walkable to restaurants and the train station. The bathroom was shared, but it wasn't a big issue for us. Overall a comfortable stay.

It was a really nice stay at Toshi's place. The description of the house is accurate, instructions are clear, and the hosts and housemates are all really welcoming.
