Good place to live

Great value and walkable location to transit.  A nice and simple place to rest your head not too far from airport and other points of interest.  Amenities match description and so do photos.  Great value for my last minute booking!

Thank you very much for everything. Location , house, etc
Everything was really wonderful
,especially the garden.
I luckily could see beautiful cherry blossoms from the window of the room I stayed.
I strongly recommend
아담하고 예쁜 숙소였습니다

Très bon rapport qualité prix. Hôte chaleureux et attentionné.
Anglophone et intéressant.

It was my first time visiting Japan. This place made it even easier for me to go around. Super affordable and very friendly host. I enjoyed my stay here and would highly recommend anyone visiting Tokyo. Train station is literally 5mins walk from here and is easy to locate. House is very clean and very peaceful away from all the noises.

I highly recommend this place as I had an amazing stay. The house herself is stunning. Lots of historical details, beautiful garden and home interior, quiet and peaceful vibes. Plus Omori is an amazing place full of history and local dinners, shops. 5 mins to get to the train station too which is super convenient.

Lovely place, and very friendly staff. Responded quickly and provided anything that was available. Description matched well with the lodging. Only wish there was more storage such as bedside table rather than a second chair.
I had a wonderful experience and I would recommend the place. The host is great, highly welcoming and helpful, with a lot of tips about Tokyo and neighbourhood. Smooth&easy

I stayed here for two weeks and it is simply a best place!
The first week, I stayed in a small room with a balcony. Be careful if you have a lot of luggage, as there is not much space to store it. But if you are traveling light, it is a great place. It is very cozy, and you can spend your evenings on the balcony :) The second week, I stayed in another room downstairs. There was much more space for things there.
The host of this house is a wonderful person! You will always have something to talk about with him or with other guests of the house.
The house itself is large, cozy, and the living room has plenty of space to relax. There is a convenient kitchen.
It is only half an hour to Shibuya Station. I met guests who have come back to this house more than once :)
I definitely recommend this place for a stay in Tokyo! 💛
오오모리 역에서 아주 가깝고, 처음에 찾아갈 때 쉽지는 않지만 위치를 알고 나면 쉽게 기억할 수 있어요. 현관 출입이 간단하고, 화장실이 깨끗해요. 호스트가 실제로 거주하고 있는 집이어서 대응이 빠른 편이에요. 집의 구조가 재밌다고 느꼈어요. 오오모리라는 동네도 좋았어요.

Memo was an incredible host and the house is a perfect home in Tokyo. Really convenient for the train, beautiful walkable and green neighborhood and cozy homey house to come back to. I hope to return again soon!

Fabulous host with an incredible, cozy and perfect to crash in easily after long days around Tokyo. Easy 3 mins walk from Omori station, very quiet and peaceful neighborhood, you can get anything you need down the street. Loved grabbing mouth watering pastry and strong coffee from the cafes down the street once you go left out of the vicinity. Can’t wait to go back again. Mehmet is so responsive, supportive and clearly communicated everything. We enjoyed a cup of coffee before my departure where I got to learn so much about Japan history and the old times forward to the economy and business. Exciting discussion only had to end to catch my train to Osaka.
Mehmet, thank you. You made me appreciate the country even way more after meeting you.

Positive: My overall experience was great! The house is wonderfully decorated and has nice, spacious common areas + amenities. Easy check in/out. The location is within a very short walking distance from Omori Station and all its surrounding restaurants. The property's owner is also extremely helpful and accommodating, helping out when needed and fielding any questions I had. He also offered suggestions for the area and even invited guests to see a local festival.
Negative: I was a bit disappointed in my room size. It was the cheapest/smallest, so I was expecting something small, but it was mostly just a mattress with barely enough room for my suitcase. I was also surprised to see multiple other guests, as the AirBnB description doesn't mention how many rooms. There can be a lot of noise and only 2 shared bathrooms. My shared balcony was beautiful but let the room next door see through my window when the blinds were open.
But despite those few complaints I had a great time overall!

My stay here was exactly what I needed. The host is very nice and helpful. The house is peaceful and you can a meet couple of other people which can be really nice if you are travelling on your own. I will definitely come back here for my next stay in Tokyo.

the house of Memo is located nearby of the train station with many restaurants and shops .
with the general information i was given, it was easy to find the house. its a silent place but i had a tiny room. i received a friendly welcome and when i had any questions the owner answered quickly.

It was a great pleasure to stay at this house and see a beautiful cherry tree. I had a nice educative conversation about history of Japan from ancient  to today's times with a host. A very good location with a convenient way to reach central areas of Tokyo
房东总能及时处理问题 我很喜欢二楼的小阳台
Loved the stay here. I just missed cherry blossoms but there was still some left on the balcony trees when I arrived. Highly recommend, I will definitely be coming back here if I return to Japan
駅から近いし、駅から歩く間にコンビニやドラッグストアも複数あってとても便利でした。駅から近いのに閑静で居心地が良かったです。問い合わせたいことがあり連絡した際にはすぐに丁寧にご返信いただけました。素晴らしい日々でした。ありがとうございました。

A quite small but a perfect location for visiting Tokyo. The next station is very near and there are different shops and restaurants.
The Host is very friendly and helps you with everything you need for your stay.
Great place! Would recommend.

Dom znajduje się w świetnej lokalizacji- 3 min od stacji, dom jest na Górce pomiędzy innymi domami co daje mu prywatność i ciszę. Dom jest bardzo czysty i przytulny. Komunikacja z Gospodarzem przebiegła bezproblemowo, świetnie mówi po angielsku! Łóżko w moim pokoju było tak wygodne, że spałam jak dziecko! Piękne i bezpieczne miejsce. Na pewno tam jeszcze wrócę jeśli będę w Tokio! Polecam z całego serca! 🫶🏻

Memo was a great host, had nice chats, he gave me lots of recommendations and would always help if there were questions. Felt a lot like actually living there, the room, as shown on the pictures, was small but had a big balcony, also a big shared livingroom downstairs. Really close to the station, good restaurants and cafés nearby. The house has a great atmosphere and I can totally recommend!
很开心的一次旅行，房源离地铁站近。房东十个热情，和我聊了很多以及介绍了很多东京的好地方。

Beautiful clean, cozy and comfortable apartment in Tokyo.
The apartment is beautifully decorated with Kimono !
I had a wonderful sleep and had a deep relax time at this place.
Onsen, Hot spring spa was a also nice. I could release my traveling fatigue.
Masa is a very helpful and friendly host. Thank you for everything!
Highly recommended !!

Masakatsu is a very kind person and an amazing host! He gave us souvenirs, took us out to dinner, and printed out information for us about things we wanted to do in Tokyo. His office is downstairs which is handy if you need anything. The apartment is well set up, and there are very nice Japanese details - not just the kimono and other textiles but also lovely cups and other utensils. The coffee machine and fresh ground coffee beans was great too. We went to the onsen every night :) We also bought cheap and yummy bento box dinners from the local supermarket. The area is not central but the journey is very easy and the train service is regular.

The only real downside was the internet connection (a portable 'pocket wifi' which you can take out with you anywhere) – it was very slow and sometimes not working at all. Masakatsu invited us to use the wifi in his office, unfortunately it didn't reach the apartment. Maybe this will be fixed for the next guests. Otherwise everything was perfect! Thank you!

There is a lot to like about this place. It's quiet, it's close to a subway station, and it's close to an Onsen (which we didn't use).

We had problems with the portable WiFi device, but Mr. Nakajima went above and beyond our expectations to fix the problem.

Highly recommended.

Masakatsu was incredible nice: always cheerful, always helpful. He even warned us about an incoming typhoon and discuss our options in case we couldn't take our plane. Everything over a fantastic dinner (typhoon dinner!) in a near restaurant.

The place is really nice, maybe a little far from the city center but in exchange you get a really wonderful suburban Japanese experience and the Funabori subway station is only a less than 5 minutes walk from the apartment.

Also, you get access to the near onsen (one ticket per person per day free) which I can't recommend enough. Just go.

I would recommend it to anybody wanting to visit Tokyo.

I had 5 nights say at the 'Kimono room' in Funabori. The accommodation was very beautiful and clean also excellent facilities. Host Nakajima was very friendly and tried to assist us for everything. He also gave us good information about his home town and suggested us the very good restaurant, where we had a fabulous dinner (real Japanese). Also it was very nice to try Japanese traditional public bath onsen. Hopefully, next time to Japan i can visit this place again.

Masakatsu-san is a great guy and an awesome host.  The hotel was clean and as described.  It had all of the things in it that you would expect an apartment to have.  It's located in a quieter area of Tokyo, so it's easy to sleep and it's safe.  Walking to the subway takes 5 minutes.  Masakatsu-san took us out to dinner and karaoke.  We had a blast.  I would definitely recommend staying here and would stay here again for sure.

We stayed for a week in this very comfortable apartment. Very close from subway in quiet neighborhood. Onsen in the the same block was a nice addition. Masakatsu-san was very caring host making sure that we know where we going, even printing out some directions for us. His recommendation on restaurants were excellent.
I would highly recommend this place and its host.
Masakatsu is like your dorm proctor. The unit is not far from the Toei Funabori station and the hot spring is an added bonus. The room is clean and has all the necessary amenities.

We enjoyed our stay at Nakajima-san's apartment in Edogawa, a genuine Japanese community, where you get to see how people live.  We enjoyed very much the onsen next door, which is a great bonus.   The place is 20-30min drive from Tokyo Disneyland which is perfect for families visiting Disney.   Nakajima-san is friendly and responsive.  He kindly recommended a number of restaurants near the apartment.   We tried one which is very friendly but we felt that we were overcharged for the food offered (it was omakase).   That aside, we'd highly recommend Nakajima-san's apartment, especially for families visiting Disney.   Being able to soak in hot spring after a long-day in Disney is a great bonus.

Our host felt us very welcome and the studio is very nice. The only downside would be the lack of many dining options in the area but if you speak a bit of Japanese there are some great local restaurants bearby. Finally the onsen is fantastic! Domo arigato.

We had a very nice experience by Masa at the Funabori Apartments. The location is near to the Funabori Metro Station and you can reach every place in Tokyo with metro. It was very clean and quiet. I recommend to stay at the Funabori Aparments very much!

Masa met me very late at night to check me in. He brought me to a room, quickly realized it was not the right room, and then brought me to the room I had booked. The listing was accurate in a good neighborhood, albeit a bit out of the way. We didn't try the sento although it got rave reviews - we were merely looking for a place to stay and this met our needs. The wifi, however, did not work very well and I constantly had to disconnect and reconnect.

The host was really nice and friendly. He gave us a couple of bottles of wine as welcome gifts. Instructions were clear to get around the area and even to attractions like Disneyland. Onsen tickets are free and just around the corner. At the end of our trip, he gave us scented pouches as farewell gifts. The room might be small, but it's cozy. However, it gets a bit awkward if you need to do something personal. The location is quite near to the train station and the neighborhood is quiet. Overall it was a good experience and I highly recommend this listing!

We had a fantastic experience staying in the kimono art room. Masakatsu is a very helpful host, sending detailed information on the room and how to find it. We also found the people and the food in the nearby restaurants fantastic. If you want to be centrally located this is not the place for you, but if you're happy being a bit further out then I highly recommend it. Tokyo's incredibly extensive and efficient rail network makes it a breeze to get around from almost anywhere.

The arrival was very nice. We had a nice talk with Masakatsu about the apartment and the surrounding area. The recommended restaurant was very good and an authentic experience. Furthermore, we got many tips on visiting Tokyo and Japan. Masakatsu was very helpful in planning our trip.

The room was very good with nice Japanese touches. Thank you Masakatsu for the amazing stay in Tokyo. It showed us the other side of Tokyo, where real people live.

Everything about this place is great. The area, although a bit far from central Tokyo, is lovely with a very friendly vibe. Masakatsu is an extremely welcoming, warm and positive person who showed us genuine hospitality and made us feel at home -- thanks for the shochu!

The next door onsen was a wonderful experience and is highly recommendable.

The room was clean and spacious and had everything we needed.

Good quality accommodation. Well appointed and as described. Well located. Very comfortable bedding with beautiful kimono and obi featured. Generous host. Masakatsu is a warm man who made us feel very welcome. He gave us top tips for sights and transport and took us to lunch at a local restaurant. The onsen experience was authentic and recommended. It is fed by a 400yr old natural spring water - fabulous! High recommendation to stay.

As someome who came to Japan not for travel but for 5 year long term work, my first temp home before finding an apt was crucial because.  And my choice was perfect.  Location is close to what you need, convini, restaurants, funabori station and as a bonus free onsen everyday to relax.  For both short term traveler and long term hire, i recommend this place.  Also, nakajima san is very friendly and very responsive to what i request. I will never forget restaurants he took me.  한국 여행객들에게는 바로 옆에 한국 음식점이 있다는 것도 알려 드리고 싶네요 ~ 친절하고 께끗한 이곳 믾이 찾아 주세요 ~

とても雰囲気のいいところで、駅からも近く、コンビニも近くにあり、また温泉も利用できるので、非常にいいと思います。新宿にもいけるので、交通の便もいいと思います。あともう少し時間があれば、もっと駅周辺、近くの川を散歩したかったです。短い期間でしたが、ありがとうございました！また機会があれば利用したいです！

I will recommend this place to all person. There is convenience store near house and it is quit place, also you can go to Onsen（Owner will give us ticket） . Thanks so much!

The apartment overall was a great accommodation for the price. From the bedding to the kitchen utensils and towels, everything was clean and new. We stayed in the kimono room and the futons-type beds were very comfortable.  I would definitely recommend this place to friends or family. Masakatsu is a very nice man who speaks English well and was just downstairs in his office or a phone call away if we needed help. He also provides a guest handbook with maps, things to do and travel tips. This was a great help. Lastly, the location is perfect and right on the Sinjuku line which can take you to most parts of Tokyo. You will not be disappointed with this place. We didn't get to try the natural hotspring because we traveled with a 10 Month old but it right downstairs!

Masakatsu's apartment was amazing: close to metro station, great neighborhood, very close to a big supermarket that is open till almost midnight, lots of convenience stores, restaurants nearby. The apartment was super clean and equipped with all the amenities you would ever need.
Onsen was an interesting experience as well: very soothing.
Masakutsa was himself very friendly and helpful. Everytime we needed help or his guidance, he was there.
We'll never stay in a hotel anymore.
Everything ok. Not far From major turist Sites. Host was Very Kind, Also Help me reaching a pharmacy.
Masakatsu very nice, lovely and clean rooms near the station.Thank you

This was perfect  !  We could not have chosen a better place to stay, the apartment was well equipped and clean , the neighbourhood is quiet and charming, with  stores, supermarkets and plenty of restaurants nearby. Masakatsu provided plenty of helpful information in advance including directions to different areas and sights as well as great restaurants which we may otherwise would have missed out on .  The local Metro station is only a short walk away,  and  we were able to reach anything we wanted to see and do around Tokyo by train in reasonable time, Funabori never felt  too remote.  The free tickets for the Onsen bath house next door were highyl appreciated ,  after a long day out around town the best thing to do is a relaxing soak in the hot spring water ! We hope to come back to Tokyo before too long, and if we do we will certainly choose Masaktsu's place again . Many thanks for the great stay !

下町観光のために泊まりました。どこへ行くにもとても便利でしたし 部屋もとてもくつろげました。そして 一日中歩き回って帰ってきた後の温泉が最高でした。次の機会にも利用したいです。We enjoyed our stay at Masakats's place. Location was great and room was comfortable. Masakats was very friendly and helpful. Thank you! I recommend this place.

Close to station and shops. Room had almost everything we needed except adding a microwave would be a great idea. Probably more a 3 person than a 4 person room but if you have 2 small kids then the couch works fine for one of them. Host was excellent and even went to the shop and bought us something to eat and drink at no charge when we arrived really late. It's a really safe area and would thoroughly recommend anyone staying there and if I am in Tokyo again I will look for this place first. Thanks for a great 3 days.

A small, fully equipped apartment in a quiet suburb only 5mins walk from beautiful scenery, restaurants, shopping and the Shinjuku Line subway. Such an awesome place to base ourselves in Tokyo - it was so nice to come home to such a quiet, safe space after spending the day in such a huge city.
Masakatsu-san was super friendly and helpful and always accessible, and the stay came with free access to a foreigner and tattoo friendly onsen next door.
When we coffee back to Tokyo, we will stay here again!!

This room is close to train station and is well-equipped with everything we need, the owner even prepare an electric rice cooker specially for us upon request. The pocket wifi is very good to use. Although it takes around 30 minutes of train to get to most of the tourists attractions, it is a nice place to stay if you are looking for some escape from city. The hot spring is very recommended to have a try.

Our second stay here was just as good as the first one ! The apartment is squeaky clean and has all the amenities stated in the description. It is located in a quiet residential area a few minutes wall from the subway  station. Maskatsu provided pletnoy of suggestions for nearby restaurants  and information on how to best reach other areas of Tokyo.  The free tickets for the Onsen next door were highly appreciated, too, a definite must do if you are staying here.  A great base , again , for our exploration of Tokyo, hope to be back before too long !

Wow what a truly magnificent experience I had here at the Funabori apartments. Everything ran very smoothly from the moment I entered Masa's front door! Very easy to find things and getting into Tokyo was quite the easy adventure!  I recommend anyone who wants to find a homey place to stay to visit here. It was nice to feel like I came "home". Masa is a great host and even took time out of his schedule to treat me to a few authentic Japanese events. Anyone who is looking to find a home away from home, than this is the place for you :)

We stayed there for our honeymoon and found it to be a perfect central location.  Masakatsu-san is extrememly friendly and responsive.  He replied to our reservation with several emails containing lots of helpful information.  The apartment is clean and comfortable.  We will return.

Excellent séjour chez Masakatsu. Le logement est certes un peu excentré (45min de métro en direct pour aller jusqu'à Shinjuku, ce n'est pas non plus la mort :) ) mais cela est grandement compensé par l'hospitalité de Masakatsu. J'y reviendrai avec grand plaisir.
Excellent stay at Masakatsu apartment. Even if a little far from Tokyo center (45 min of train to go to Shinjuku, that's not a really big deal :) ) but it is compensate by the great hospitality of Masakatsu. I'll come back with great pleasure.

Great location! Mr Masa free us onsen tickets! But that's ashamed we can't able to enjoy the facilities as I fallen sick and our itinerary is quite tight.
Me and my family enjoyed staying in the fully equipped house!
Thanks so much for Mr. Masakatsu's hospitality, he is very nice and kind.  We shall definitely come back again.  Thank you.
Great place to stay for our family of four. nice, clean and only about a 5 minute walk from Funabori Station.

This is a great location. It is next to a subway station, so you won't be able to use the JR Pass, but it is definitely enough to get you into the city itself. The host also has a visual guide for where to visit and what to eat (though I did not use it).
Not to mention, free entry to the bath house (per day). Very nice. That alone is worth the stay.
The host, Masa, is really helpful. The place is nice and near the Onsen. The Onsen itself is really good.

Great place and location, walking distance to the Shinjuku line. The local restaurants and stores are great as well.
Masakastu was very accommodating, and my stay in Japan was very pleasant!

船堀駅に近くとても便利
食べ物屋さんが目の前にありとても便利
質問などに素早く対応してもらえた

The best place to relax from a long day in Tokyo.
The location is great, the shinjuku line connects with every other line and you are just a few blocks away from the station. The apartment is big, sparkling clean and full of appliances to make your stay easier. There's a map of the surrounding area with local restaurants and stores. There's no noise at all from the streets. And if you ever need help, Masakatsu is an experienced host.
In my stay, everything was so easy I didn't have to ask for anything.
If you are traveling solo or a small group, definitely consider this place.

Funabori Apartment is a comfortable place for one to two persons. If your group comprises three or more travellers, you may find the space too small for comfort. The property is located in a friendly and quiet neighbourhood. It is not far from the train station and many buses serve this area. The room is sparkling clean and it has all the basic amenities and stuff you need for a long stay. During the day, lovely spring sunshine floods into the room and makes the room warm and cozy. We found the bed comfortable and slept soundly every night. There are huge malls, convenient stores and even a sports centre (for those who want to use the gym) near the train station. You can hop on a train and travel directly to Shinjuku. However, we enjoyed living among the locals and contributed to the local economy so we spent many afternoons in the cafes, bookshops, malls and even game centre. It is a home away from home.
It was a wonderful Stay, the place ls very convenient and masakatsu a great host

Our apartment was located on the second floor. No elevator however, easy to carry luggage up and down if it isn’t very huge. The place is as described. Our host waited for us till late to check in and was very polite.

The place was a bit far from the nearest train station (Funabori) so I suggest you hail a cab instead if you have a lot of stuff with you (we had 2 weeks in Japan). It just cost ¥400-¥500. If travelling lightly, then it's not really a bother and really just a leisurely walk. Via taxi, Tokyo Station is around ¥4000-¥5000.
A convenience store is right inside Funabori station called Seikatsu Saika; moreover, both Family Mart and 7-Eleven are nearby.
Mr. Masakatsu is a great guy. He can speak better English than most Japanese guys his age. He's a jolly character, a very accomodating fellow. He gave us free tickets to the onsen he also owns nearby, sadly we didn't have time to use it. He also helped my mom carry her luggage upstairs.
His place had the basics. WiFi was via a portable router. The place was clean. No microwave though and just the regular toilet (not the fancy Japanese ones) which was good. Water pressure was good. Towels were big and the bed provided was really comfortable and literally spring-y. I would recommend this place for the cost and comfort.

Funabori Apartment is fully equipped apartment in a quiet area. Masakatsu is a very helpful host, sending detailed information on the room and how to find it. Recommendations on restaurants  are great too.

Great suburban Tokyo location. 35 mins to Shibuya station. 6 mins from Funabori station. Safe, quite and central location. Great for families, close enough too take a taxi to Disney resorts as well. Will be back for sure. Aloha.
Host is very friendly and the apartment is cozy. The onsen is just next door and super convenient. Great place to stay!
Not bad

Great location, a simple five minute walk from the train station. Lots of places to eat within two minutes if you don't feel like walking. The host was extremely friendly and the place was very clean. Would highly recommend staying here!

Had a lovely time staying at this apartment!! Masakatsu was a wonderful host, he made us feel so welcome and was very knowledgeable of the area. His office is located next to the apartments which was reassuring incase we needed anything during our stay!
The decor inside was lovely, and the rooms felt spacious especially compared to other places we have stayed whilst in Japan. There was also lots of travel guides for any new travellers to Tokyo!
Location wise it felt a little out of the way but still super easy to travel into central Tokyo! The subway station (Toei line) is only a few minutes walk, and as a foreigner you can buy a 3 day pass for all Toei and Metro lines for ¥1500 which was fantastic
In the area there is a large supermarket and a few convenience stores, and also a large arcades and pachinko. There are also restaurants very close to the apartments too. Masakatu also owns the Onsen next door so definitely take along a towel and bathing suit to make use of it!
Myself and my partner both agree we would stay here again and would also recommend to others needing a place to stay whilst in Tokyo!

Masa and his place is great.  It is located in a quite neighborhood just 5 Mins away from train station, there are a bunch of convenience stores and a large supermarket between the station and Masa's place.  It is easily accessible to and from HND by the airport bus at the next station.    Unfortunately I didn't have time to visit the free onsen during my short visit, but it looks like it will be a wondering experience.  Place can easily fit 2 people, and has all the basic appliances needed (pocket wifi provided as well).  Will definitely book Masa's place again when I come back to Japan.

駅からもインターからも近く、立地はよかったです。
いろいろありましたが、すぐに対応していただき、不便なく過ごせました。
事前の質問にもすぐに回答して頂いて、安心できました。

This place was exceedingly quiet.  I usually sleep with ear plugs but did not use them at all in this room.  It was relatively near the train station which was quite helpful.  The air conditioner was a game changer and made the room so much more comfortable.

The apartment is very cozy and the environment is nice and quiet if you're looking to get away from the loud city, but it's very easy to get back to via the train.
Masakatsu's apartment was very clean and had all the necessities! Highly recommend :)
Very nice room, good amenities, good location, very responsive host. Would definitely stay again

This may be a bit of a train ride out from the center of Tokyo but it is well worth it if you're looking for a quiet place to stay for the night, not to mention affordable! Masa was super nice and made sure I knew how to take care of the apartment along with making my way around town.
The surrounding neighborhood is a wonderful walk and the station is only minutes away. The portable wifi included in the price is a definite plus too. It lasts on its own for maybe half a day so make sure to have a battery on hand.
I really enjoyed staying at Masakatsu's place and appreciated having the onsen nearby!
I've used AirBNB a few times and Masa is without a doubt my favorite host.

This room, while not particularly close to any of the main sightseeing areas of Tokyo, was close to a subway station from which the rest of Tokyo could be accessed. The room was very clean and had all the amenities we could’ve needed. We especially appreciated the pocket WiFi that we were given for the duration of the stay. The onsen next to the room was also very nice, though be sure to research the proper etiquette before attempting a visit. Masa was a great host who even waited for us after we were late getting there from the airport. Overall a great home base from which to explore Tokyo at a great price!
Great apartment for the value and location. Highly recommended!
Bon emplacement si on souhaite découvrir un côté plus authentique de Tokyo. Bons équipements et prestations !

This space is an amazing gem hidden amongst a quiet and subdued neighborhood. The stay is extremely clean, convenient and cozy. The neighborhood is extremely clean and the supermarket, 7/11 and Lawson are all within walking distance. The subway station is extremely close as well, which made transiting into the city centre very easy.
The manuals that Matsu provides gives extremely detailed and good information about the stay and options for possible day trips. Definitely suggest embarking on a day trip to one of the amazing prefectures out in rural Japan.
Overall it was a delight to stay here, as we often found ourselves calling it "home".
We loved staying here. Spacious room. Friendly and helpful host. Close to metro station. Visiting the onsen was a great experience also.
The location was very clean, great amenities, and check in was painless. The host recommended local restaurants and access to the nearby onsen was nice.
Everything was perfect with the apartment, we would return anything! Arrigato Masa!
We had a lovely stay at Masakatsu's place, giving us a lovely welcome on arrival and was able to give us tips prior to arrival.

This location is perfect if you want to see everything Tokyo has to offer, but come back to rest your head in a quiet environment. The neighborhood is very peaceful with many conveniences within a few feet. The residents are also kind and helpful, and the train station and bus stops aren't far away. I think the part I enjoyed most were the comfortable futon beds! Such a great sleep! Don't forget to try the onsen. It's only awkward for a few minutes
Great apartment in a quiet neighbourhood location. Everything you need is nearby and having the onsen right there on the doorstep is great.

We very much enjoyed our stay at Masakatsu's apartment. It has plenty of space, which is a luxury in Tokyo and is well set up with useful appliances and utensils. It is nicely decorated and there are all sorts of charming bits and pieces to be found in the cupboards. While Funabori is quite a distance from the centre of Tokyo, it is only a 6 minute walk away from the subway station on a line that goes straight to Shinjuku. Funabori is a great area to stay in with a lively town centre. There are often activities going on around the station like the local market, music performances etc. The street immediately around the apartment has it's own restaurants, a laundromat and of course the onsen. Masakatsu provides excellent information about all of these. Masakatsu is a friendly and helpful host.

Near with subway station, and 20+ mins trip to Tokyo station.
There are coffee, snacks for you to consume. But there is no TV in the room.

After a week of travelling around Japan, this place was perfect to recover and relax. The Onsen just a bit down the road was a welcoming sight, and I was happy to be allowed inn, even with a lot of tattoos. (Note if you are going to the Onsen, you also have to pay a tiny additional fee to use the sauna. This I did not know, but now you do!)
The apartment was clean, functional, good space and a very comfortable bed. The interior was well thought through and traditionally stylish, which I loved.
Location wise, it is a quick walk to Funabori station, which can take you straight to Shibuya, Shinjuku, Harajuku. It is a metro line, so the JR pass will not work there. There was a vegetarian restaurant close by as well, several convenience stores and a super market.
I highly recommend this place, if you want to stay a bit away from noisier parts of Tokyo, and need a place where you can come back to after a long day and unwind. Also if you have tattoos and want a proper onsen experience!

This is a very nice suburban neighbourhood just outside of central Tokyo. As such the whole neighbourhood feels very cozy and homely. You see families around during their evening shopping and going to work in the morning. Feels very safe.
The beds are comfortable, the heated toilet seat was very welcome.
There are kitchen utensils if you wish to cook inside. No microwave though.
And the free tickets to the public bath are a very nice touch. You don't feel awkward there and it is nice to experience the neighbourhood feeling in the bath with all the old friends enjoying this activity together.
There is a washing machine in the apartment and you can hang your clothes out to dry. We went out to use the public gas dryer as it was winter and damp.
Oh try the restaurant recommendations they are good! The Italian restaurant makes delicious cream sauce based pasta (different from the kind I get at home) and the soba restaurant has some of the nicest Oden and curry rice we have ever eaten in addition to their great Soba.

Masa's house was located at and amazing spot where you can easily access to the cities via the train. It also has restaurants and a supermarket nearby his house.
The check in was surprisingly quick and simple, easy to find since it was right below the house.
It is also a good for value place as it has everything you would need in there, such as cooking utensils.
I would highly recommend this place if you are visiting Tokyo!
Brilliant place, with a kind and attentive host.
Average, not worth it's price. Beds are very uncomfortable and neighborhood is noisy.
We had a really nice stay at Masa’s apartment. It was pur second trip to this host and we really recommand him: nice places to stay and the sweetest host!
Very accommodating with an easy check in.

笑顔で出迎えてくださってありがとうございました！
部屋もとても綺麗で快適に過ごせました︎☺︎
満足です！

A great value place to stay, especially if you want to visit a local Onsen and you're a visitor with tattoos! Masa is a great host and the appartments are easy to access from the central city. Highly recommended!

Masakatsu is a very kind and friendly host. He gave us a memorable trip within our stay in Funabori. He provided everything we need and gave us free tickets for onsen. We felt sorry to him that we lost the room keys during our trip But he never got annoying or fined us but comforted us as well. He is truly the best host I have ever met！Sure I will recommend my friends and family to him if they wanna be in Japan.

This spot is very close to funabori station and is next to family mart and 7-11! Masa and others are available for questions and have many suggestions for local highlights. It was a very peaceful stay :)

One of the best host's I've had the pleasure of renting from. Masakatsu was very responsive and kept a very clean apartment.
The neighborhood was also very nice and too far out from central Tokyo. absolutely loved it. Thank you for everything!
Quiet location. Great host

Masa san’s warm hospitality, direct availability and efficient response to any lodging issues is definitely a perk in choosing this place.
The apartment is also easily accessible from Funabori station with smooth level paving all the way great for wheeling luggage around.
Being within half to an hour’s journey via train to most bustling tourist attraction hot spots, while having a quieter place to return to at the end of the day , makes the place a great choice !
I personally liked exploring the tranquil canal promenade in the neighborhood, just 3mins walk away, with Tokyo SkyTree as a distant backdrop.
The host is great. He invited us to dinner and help looking for transportation
很好

Masakatsu was a wonderful host, and the accommodation is very close to the train station, with shops and restaurants nearby. The apartment came with a lot of amenities and it was a perfect stay, just what we were looking for! Thank you 😊

The apartment was quiet, cozy, and somewhat close to the station. The host will provide you every information about the shops and restaurants near the apartments which was rly helpful. No onsen ticket due to the covid, but i would love to come back and try it in the future
Cozy studio for 2. Close to Funabori station. Practical, clean and friendly, helpful host. Perfect for us as our family previously lived close by and we are familiar with the area.
Masa旅居去新宿，池袋大概30mins，很方便。去機場也是很快。Masa很熱情，也很幫助旅客。附近有很好的hair salon ，值得一試。今次經歷很好！

The apartment has all the comforts of a home and is thoughtfully equipped with the essentials for your convenience. What really stands out is Masa’s proactive responsiveness that is very reassuring. He will go out of his way to extend his welcome to you :)

The host was very friendly and accommodating. Sent recommendations on how to go to tourist places and how to locate the apartment easily. Location was great - walking distance to Funabori station, convenience stores, and restaurants. The place was big and has complete amenities. They also gave discount to their onsen. Thank you.

Masakatsu was an amazing host - friendly, helpful and always had great energy when we would speak with him. It was nice being in a quiet area and we felt right at home in the Japanese culture. We would love to be back again!
The place is cleaned and tidy. The neighbourhood is quiet and peaceful. A river is just around 10 minutes walkable distance. I had a wonderful stay here. Masakatsu is a friendly host.

easily the best Airbnb i’ve stayed in so far. Masakatsu’s place is spotless and cocooned in a quiet neighborhood – the walk to the train gives you a glimpse of everyday life in Japan. The host is also so friendly and helpful – local restaurant recommendations were given, and small snacks as a parting gift. i’d return again for sure (and maybe give the onsen a try next time)!

Masa-san was a very responsive host who gave alot of good recommendations. Unfortunately we weren't able to try as much as we like due to our short time in Tokyo. The neighbourhood is a distance away from the main city areas but we like the peaceful surroundings. There's plenty of food and amenities close by the station.
I have stayed here repeatedly , it is always a pleasure to stay at Masakatsu‘s place, will for sure stay here again when I come back to Tokyo !
Masa is very kind and responsive! The location is so quiet and relaxing. Great sento!
Thank you so much for your kindness. I will recommend your apartment to anyone who wants to visit Tokyo.

Booking this airbnb away from the main city was the best decision I have ever made on this trip. The room felt so at home. It was extremely clean and included everything you could ever need (especially pocket wifi). My only problem was finding the location, but Masakatsu responded right away and went the extra mile to pick me up with his car and dropped me off to the airbnb. Not to mention it was 11pm, he was able to quickly respond when I was lost. During my stay, I had no issue. As stated in the description, don’t expect a hotel experience since this is an airbnb at a residential location. Regardless, it was easy to reach out to Masakatsu for everything that you need. He was helpful and accommodating. The highlight of this airbnb is its location: great restaurants, grocery shops, vending machine right outside (for water and drinks), onsen, and the Funabori station. I highly recommend this airbnb, experiencing Japan in a local neighborhood, than staying in the main city.

Masa is the best host. He is on site almost everyday and responds quickly to any correspondence. He helped us find my wife's phone which she forgot in a taxi within 30 minutes and always greets us with a warm, genuine smile. Masa-san, arigatoo gozimasu!!!

Masa’s place was super homey and the neighborhood was peaceful and quiet, just what we needed after traveling around the bustle of the center of Tokyo. It’s close to a main subway line, near delicious food, and the unit had everything we needed. Thank you so much for everything!

The location was perfect – nestled in a quiet neighborhood yet conveniently close to all the attractions I wanted to explore. The host's communication was exceptional, providing me with all the information I needed for a seamless check-in. Thank you!

Good location, easy to go to visiting areas of Tokyo, especially to Disneyland. The room is super clean, comfortable and with almost everything I need. Feel like staying at my own home. The house host is friendly and considerate, giving helpful suggestions to my trip. I’d like to come back next time.

Masa is the No. 1 host in Japan!!!
The suite is such a great value and the neighbourhood was fantastic. It’s about a 30 - 40 minute train ride to Shibuya or Ginza but it’s easily accessible and we loved the peace and quite; not to mention the close proximity to grocery stores and affordable restaurants.
Such an authentic feel for local Japanese life. Near a station so traveling all around Tokyo was never a problem. Quiet area, with so many choices of delicious food close by.

The place was great and accurate to the description. We chose it mainly because we wanted to experience a more local neighbourhood, and because of the onsen next door. However it is about 40-60 minutes from the main parts of the city, so it might be inconvenient if you want to do more sightseeing.
Masakatsu was a jovial and helpful host who cares very much for his guests’ safety and well-being. Would love to stay here again next time.

沟通：当天入住的时间比预定的稍微迟到了一点，房东一直在等候，接待也非常热情。
房东互动：房东主动向房客介绍屋子里的设施，非常耐心细心
位置：在居民区中，非常安静整洁，距离交通线步行10分钟，去往东京都内也只要30分钟
非常棒的一次体验，房东非常热情好客。房子整洁如新，宽敞舒适。交通非常便利。很想一直住在这里！
有机会还会来的，期待与您的下次见面！
Everything from the hospitality to location to surroundings was incredible. The owners are super helpful and are there for any advice you could ask for

Masa was one of the greatest hosts we have experienced with Airbnb. He was generous with his time and went above and beyond when helping us to book transport and find local places. The apartment was wonderful; clean, spacious, homely and peaceful. The location is perfect for those who want to experience areas away from the main centre, whilst still being very close to public transport and great food options. Thank you again Masa, we hope to reconnect again soon!
いつ連絡しても即レスがあり、終始スムーズにコンタクトが取れました。もろもろの案内が丁寧なだけではなく、こちらが無理を言ってお願いした以上の対応をいただけ本当に助かりました。

駅からも近くとても便利な所です。
ホストの方も親切。是非おすすめします。

If you're considering this place, definitely go for it. Not only is it conveniently close to the train, but the neighborhood is also wonderfully quiet and peaceful, offering an authentic glimpse into living in Japan. The house combines modern amenities with traditional Japanese decor, making for a comfortable yet culturally rich stay. Our host was exceptional, reminiscent of a warm, welcoming uncle meeting us for the first time. He shared invaluable local tips, including a nearby sushi spot that was a culinary delight. Perfect for anyone from solo travelers to families, Masakatsu elevates your travel experience, making you feel right at home.
とても親切なホストの方でした！！
Everything was perfect!

I cannot overstate how much I appreciate Masa-san and his hospitality; he was extremely understanding to people like me who didn't know how to navigate around the area, and he guided me each step of the way to get to his site safely.  Everything was clean, cozy, and VERY comfortable--best night of sleep we had in Japan!  Those mattresses gave us the best night of sleep we've had in days.  The site is located in a quiet neighborhood where it's a short walk away from the THE best ramen we've had in all of Tokyo, thanks to his recommendations!  I would definitely stay here again because of the centrality of location, the great food nearby, but most of all for the warm and caring welcome and help provided by our great host.  I teared up when we had to leave because it felt so close to home even when we were so far away from home.  I'll miss this place for so many good memories in such a short time, thanks in part to such a well-prepared setup from this host.

Merci beaucoup pour cet accueil chaleureux ! L’hôte a été d’une grande gentillesse le lieu est très agréable et plusieurs restaurants sont dispo au alentours
Merci à eux !

Thank you so much to Masaru san for being such a good host and so informative! The neighborhood is lovely and there is lots to enjoy. Very close to a train station and convenient for my work commute. I felt very lucky to have stayed.

Masa's apartment is a great change of pace from busier Tokyo areas. you feel like a local with neighborhood restaurants and an ancient hot spring next door. I hope to stay again on my next trip, for vacation or work!
Thanks for your help and so many details with good foods & hot spring just next door . Very convenient 👍

Masakatsu is an amazing host! Very friendly and always made sure to help us out. He was very responsive and gave a lot of directions with trains and local eateries. The room was clean and had everything we needed! He truly makes you feel at home! I would definitely come back!
So Welcoming and felt safe with our young daughter.  Location is close to transport also.
very nice place! host was very nice and easy to work with
Masa is an amazing host. We loved staying at his place in Edogawa and hope to be able to return someday.

Masakatsu was such a kind host! He greeted us very warmly and even got us drinks as a refreshment after a tiring flight. The place itself looked just like the photos and was a suitable size for 2-3 people. It’s close to a station and there was some great food nearby. Would definitely recommend!
Love the hot spring

Masa was an incredible host,
He helped us with any troubles we had regarding food, transportation, the local and so many other things.
The flat has everything you need for 2 people, we were comfortable and didn't need any extra.
information about the local city was provided before we arrived, which was very helpful with planing.there was everything writen regarding Restaurants, convince stores, supermarkets, clinics, popular destinations and ect.
Once again, thank you Masa for all you have done for us.
If we are back in Tokyo we will definitely choose your place again:).
Good for those that are looking for places a bit away from the city center. Located in a quiet neighborhood. A great host that very responsive and helpful and fully recommend it

Nous étions sur Tokyo pour voir notre fils qui habite à 3 à 400m du logement proposé par Masakatsu et celui-ci était suffisamment spacieux pour les moments ou notre fils n'était pas disponible. Le logement est situé non loin à pied d'une rivière avec longue promenade, à la saison des cerisiers (debut avril) cela doit être encore plus joli). Proximité magasins , métro et restaurants.
Très joli logement : fonctionnel, proche de la gare de Funabori ( 35 min environ de Shinjuku) et quartier tranquille.

A simple yet very spacious apartment. It is quite removed from the central Tokyo, so do take that into consideration when reserving. Room was clean and well equipped. Masakatsu is a great host, super communicative. Strongly recommend this offering if you can work a bit more travel time into your schedule.
This place is beautiful, very quiet. Our host was very nice and friendly. 10/10 would stay here again !

Masakatsu was a friendly host and the area was beautiful. Since it is more residential than touristy, it was very peaceful and althoughany places did not speak English, we got wonderful service and food everywhere we went.

Masa-San's place was nice in a private neighbourhood, his guide was helpful to find the place easily. It was near some entertainment as well like GIGO and Convinece stores, a mall and also a bookstore etc. The area is peaceful and nice after a day of travel

check in went so smoothly and the host was so responsive and kind! he welcomed us with drinks and gave us tips for traveling around tokyo! definitely would love to come back and stay here again next time!

Masakatu, he is a very kind person. We enjoyed his introduction of the apartment we were staying in. He handed a binder of instructions and recommendations for nearby restaurants. The apartment is very cute and homey, we really loved it and being able to see lots of local, non touristy locations nearby.

It is was perfect for my husband and I. We got lost trying to figure out the trains but once we got that done, it was easy to find. The bathhouse was nice and people there were very nice too. Train station is a short walk. I would recommend it.

Masakatsu was a really generous and nice person, he showed us the Appartment and explained us everything. He also gave us tips for the area and told us some good Restaurants nearby! the beds were comfortable and the bathroom big enough for a bear ;)
If you wish there is execelent lightning in the Appartment and the AC works really well, The center is reachable by train and everything works easy. Spotlight would be the Onsen which really great after a Long day on foot.
I can highly recommend it!
Great spot close to a station son the rest of Tokyo is easily accessible. Lots of restaurants nearby and the host was super friendly.

地點距船堀站約六分鐘,而船堀站去新宿約三十五分鐘（非繁忙）,去東京站亦很方便.
附近有兩間便利店,亦有很多餐廳,超市亦不過十分鐘路程,民宿位於民宅區,所以不會很吵鬧；樓下有乾洗店及溫泉（大浴場）,至晚上十二點關門,時間很好.
除麥當勞外,另有一間餐廳開廿四小時,宵夜亦不用擔心
最重要的是,車站是有電梯的,不用抬行李
民宿負責人很有心,他會親自帶你上居住點,並簡單介紹屋内的設施,他亦會在確認住宿後,send email介紹附近的景點及由車站到民宿的路徑指示（圖片及文字）
Good
Great place and good location to commute!
Masakatsu was a very accommodating host! He provided a binder with many restaurant recommendations and things to do around the area. Amazing experience staying at Masakatsu’s!

Masa's unit was very clean and clutter free upon check-in. While there was no TV, there was still lots to do around the area including a very relaxing Onsen and some nice restaurants nextdoor. It was lovely getting to know Masa and Soki at a local sushi restaurant (Senzushinishikasaiten
千寿司西葛西店) in Nishi-Kasai. Thank you, and I hope to meet again soon!

Would stay again! Close to public transportation and Disneyland. We ended up going to the sento (not an onsen) right by the house and it was a unique experience to attend a local bath house. Host was very friendly and attentive from start to finish.

excellent séjour, l'hôte était d'une grande gentillesse. simple et rapide pour arriver dans le logement, restauration et supermarché au top et a 5 mins tout comme le métro. le logement était impeccable, nous avons adoré notre séjour. Merci Masakatsu 😁✌️

Amazing host, super helpful and kind, very responsive and gives great recommendations and lots of helpful information. The location is outside of the main part of Tokyo, but it’s only a 5 minute walk to the station. The area is very peaceful which is a refreshing change of pace.
Consigliatissimo!!!

Masakatsu was so friendly and made us feel right at home. We had a late check-in and he responded to our messages super fast.
Can only recommend his place. :)
Masa's great.
Great accommodation, close to the station, friendly and helpful host.
房间干净卫生整洁无任何异味，房东非常热情，第一次来日本给了我很多很好的建议，有机会还会回来，期待下次见面，谢谢啦

The river walk was only a few blocks away, and the wooden look out tower was a great place to climb up.  We could see the whole Edogowa.  This neighbourhood is family oriented and well designed for all ages.  Funabori is a special place, and this little apartment has everything you need.  I sat by the window in the morning with my coffee and watched the neighbourhood wake up.  Thank you for proving this place, Masa.

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez Masa et Nanako. Le logement etait propre et bien équipé, proche de la gare et les indications avec les photos étaient très utiles et faciles pour le trouver!
Merci pour votre gentillesse et votre aide pour porter nos bagages!
Nous recommandons à 100% ! A bientôt !

Let's start by saying that Masakatsu-San is a very kind and friendly host! He immediately welcomed us with extreme sweetness and made us feel at home. The apartment is equipped with everything needed as a base for a stay in the city, a few minutes walk away is the Funabori train station where you can access the subway and in a very short time reach any area of ​​Tokyo! The neighborhood is very quiet, well-stocked with spas run by his family, restaurants, and konbini. For any doubts you will always be helped. Highly recommended!
amazing place and amazing host! took me to lunch and showed me around the area. very welcoming and fun host, will defiantly return soon.

Die Wohnung war sehr sauber & liegt in einer ruhigen, wenig touristischen Wohngegend. Es gibt wenig Platz, aber für einen kurzen Aufenthalt kann man zu zweit gut dort wohnen; es war alles Nötige für die Selbstversorgung vorhanden. U-Bahn und Supermärkte sind in unmittelbarer Nähe. Der Gastgeber hat uns sehr freundlich empfangen und uns alles Notwendige erklärt. Wenn man viel Zeit im Stadtzentrum verbringen möchte, sollte man beachten, dass man entsprechend viel Fahrzeit einberechnen muss. Unser Geheimtipp ist, den Sonnenuntergang über Tokio am nahegelegenen Flussufer zu bewundern. Wir waren sehr zufrieden & würden wieder hier wohnen. Vielen Dank!

Masakatsu was very friendly and I loved the onsen. I didn't mind it but if you don't know the onsen is completely no clothing so be prepared. The place was in a convenient spot with good places to eat nearby.

Nous avons passé un super séjour chez Masakatsu ! Tout a été parfait. Il n’a pas hésité à nous faire le Check in avant l’heure car il faisait froid. Nous a offert à boire et nous sommes reparti avec un petit cadeau de sa part ! De jolies attentions qui font plaisir.
Avec un petit plus, le Onsen de la famille à côté et un super restaurant de ramen en bas de l’appartement.
À 5-6mjn de la gare, kombini à côté. Rien à dire vraiment !

距离最近的地铁站约有7分钟的步行距离，附近环境很不错。只可惜在就寝前发生了一些不愉快的经历，导致不得不在凌晨重新定酒店提前离开。
Masa先生是一个有条理、负责的人，能设身处地地换位思考，并给出较为合理的解决方案。
这次的经历也让我解到了Airbnb在东京的冰山一角，我也会更审慎地计划自己未来的住宿方式。
Masakatsu is friendly and super responsive in answering my questions. The place is super clean and close to the station and lots of restaurants.
这是我第二次入住了。先生的房子给我一种家的安心感。入住很便利交通也很方便，如果有入住需求的朋友一定要来入住这家。
Beautifully decorated room with an onsen amenity that was only 300 yen to use! Walkable distance from the station in a quiet part of Tokyo.
Great accomodation in a quiet part of Tokyo and very nice host.

Masa ! Thank you so much for the Airbnb, we couldn’t have been happier, it was the best way to start our trip in Japan !
Everything was super convenient, the subway is not too far away (5min walk) the neighborhood is also really calm and charming !
The onsen was also amazing !
A 10/10, thank you again !

We loved our stay at Masakatsu's apartment! It looked exactly like the pictures and is conveniently located near the train station for easy access to other parts of Tokyo! Masakatsu was warm, friendly, and communicative. We especially appreciated the book of local information and attractions he has prepared for his guests. This super cozy spot is in a peaceful and very safe area, so no matter what time of day or night we felt perfectly safe. It was awesome living like a local at Masakatsu's apartment! Our only regret is not checking out the onsen, but we'll keep that on the list for next time. Thank you for a fantastic stay, Masakatsu!
Amazing accommodation in a peaceful area but still close to supermarket and restaurants. I have no complains and can recommend Masakatsu’s airbnb
Would return
Quiet area, I enjoyed my peace and quiet. Thank you for the hospitality.

Masakatsu very friendly and polite. we were check in at the late night arround 22.30pm. But Masakatsu still help us to carry on our lugagges to upstair.  Really recomended. Surely will coming back. But there is no lift.  Just make sure you guys have enough power to carry the lugagges to level 2. Or Masakatsu will help you :)
amazing place for the price, got 4 coupon for Sento/onsen included, the amenities and furniture are beyond the regular airbnb for the same price, its close to the station albeit far from the airport

Mir hat es dort gut gefallen,  es ist zwar etwas außerhalb, dafür aber ruhiger mit weniger Action,  es gibt gute Möglichkeiten zum Essen in direkter Nachbarschaft und den Onsen nebenan konnte ich vergünstigt mit nutzen, unvergesslich bleiben die Metrofahrten, aber die gehören ja zu Tokio, eine sehr gute Unterkunft die ich weiterempfehlen kann

Our stay with Madakatsu was absolutely wonderful! He helped us so much during our stay and was so friendly and always waved when he saw us walk by! When we tried to find a place to eat nearby since the ramen shop in the building was closed, he took us there & showed us the ropes! We enjoyed getting to know him and hope to stay there again on our next trip!
Masakatsu-san is an exceptional host—attentive, thoughtful, and dedicated to making every moment unforgettable. Highly recommend
Great place, will stay at again next time we're in Japan.
非常感谢 Masakatsu 君，非常热情的人，我们感觉宾至如归！Masa 君向我们介绍了附近好吃的餐厅，并且还帮我们提了行李，房间很大，设施齐全非常干净！地理位置方便，走十分钟差不多就是地铁站，下次来东京还会定这里的，下次见 Masa 君😄

Great spot to stay in Tokyo if you want affordable space with kitchen and laundry facilities and easy access transport options. Big local supermarket nearby if you want to save some cash on meals too! I’d highly recommend staying here if you’re keen to navigate the subway, have more room than central hotels and a slower pace contrast to days exploring central Tokyo.

Loved my stay, It was exactly what I was looking for and the amount of suggestions for things to do or eat that is supplied was great. Definitely led me to some new places as I’ve been to Japan before. Would 100% recommend this location.
Beau séjour à Tokyo
It was a nice stay and accurate to the description. I liked it and recommend it
I loved the place. It's very roomy which I loved! I definitely recommend this location.

While this spot is a ways out from the center of Tokyo, it is a great place to rest and recuperate from the bustle of the city. conveniently located a short walk from the Shinkuku line, the studio is well appointed, clean, and close to any needed conveniences. it is affordable and Masakatsu provided a great stay on my first leg of my trip to Japan. arigato!!!

Gimmicky. I want to get that out of the way right now.
This property is capitalizing off of having an onsen nearby with traditional looking Japanese bedding and decor. That's what got me, and it might be what's getting you...I would say that's probably not worth it.
The place itself is fine. The bedding is fine, but in the end I chose this place over other cheaper options for the novelty, I feel I could have gotten a little bit better value elsewhere, but still overall happy with what I got and what I paid.
I used the onsen once during my two week stay. I really like onsens, but this one is small, busy, and I just wasn't a fan.
Service was awesome. He spoke great English, and helped me bring my heavy luggage up the stairs to my room.
Overall, despite starting out critical here, this place is really nice and I like the quiet area next to nice walking paths.
Lastly, I wish the place had a small dining table and chairs. You basically have to eat at a small low table on the floor.

Had an amazing stay with Masa. Wanted something a little farther from the main city for my trip next to a train and this location was perfect. Very nice and peaceful and Masa was very responsive as a host. Highly recommend thank you!!!
masakatsu先生在雨季时让我们提前入住，十分感激。房屋干净并且有令人舒适的香味。房屋偏小，有很棒的日式美学风格，在船堀站附近，出行较为方便，夜晚十分宁静，。

Loved staying here!  The beds were very comfy, and the room had all the essentials you could ever need! Mr.Masakatsu was incredibly friendly and welcoming,  he carried my stuff to my room and showed me all the amenities of my room. The room itself is a 6 min walk to the train station which is super nice!   I would love to be able to come back here on my next trip!

Two words: STAY HERE.  It's an amazing place, easy to get to, easy to catch the metro from, and Masakatsu is just an amazing host.  Super friendly, hospitable, helpful, and outgoing.  His place is cozy and a great place to crash after long days exploring Tokyo/Japan.  The ramen place downstairs as well is awesome.  Try thr minced chicken rice and fried dumplings with your ramen...it will become your go-to.  Thanks again for a wonderful stay.

Flott sted i et litt mindre sentralt område i Tokyo. Ligger derimot veldig nært togstasjon, med direkte forbindelse til Shinjuku linjen. Veldig bra valuta for pengene, og verten var svært hyggelig og hjelpsom. Selve leiligheten hadde alt du trenger, og var romslig og bra. Anbefales.
It is a small but really nice apartment. The area is really beautiful and quiet.

We had an excellent stay in Matsuoko’s place this August.  It was located in a very quiet neighbourhood and was exactly as described.  It was spotless and Masa was friendly and easy to communicate with.  We also enjoyed the onsen!  Highly recommended!

Masa-san's place is as shown in the photos, and it's located in a very quiet and safe neighbourhood. The onsen is also a perfect way to relax after a long day! Masa-san has also been very helpful to me, thank you very much! :)

Was very clean and tidy, and lots of simple amenities. I felt like I was in a slice of life anime with an easily accessible little private apartment and cool surroundings. Very walkable to the station and convenience/grocery stores. I wish I had the confidence to try the onsen because it looked cool and I booked it specifically for that reason, but as a foreigner I'm not used to it yet. Maybe next time!

Amazing with directions to the location! Gave great recommendations on what to do around town and super friendly. The lodging itself was fantastic and had everything you could possibly need as if you permanently lived there.
Personally, Masakatsu helped make my trip unforgettable in many ways. I hope someday to return.
２泊お世話になりました。とても静かな近所でぐっすり眠れましたし、ホストのお二人がいろいろ用意して温かく迎えてくれました。また機会があれば今度も泊まらせていただきたいと思います！

Thanks Hisao. This room is the best and incredible choice for me in Tokyo . The host, the room. The location, the bathroom are all great. Just a little bit cold in bathing but you can warming the bathroom in advance . It's very convenient to ueno . Hisao lend my his bike. Thanks

Very nice experience staying Hisao san's place. It is unfortunate that we cannot watch the practice. The place seems a bit far away from city but it is very peaceful and quiet. I love the lawson 100 nearby. :P

That was an excellent stay. We were so happy to stay. We've been invited for a dinner and spent a great time together. The house is more traditional japanese which is also very nice. We enjoyed it so much, definitely we would come back for a stay.

The place was easy to find and the house is clean and organized. Host was also friendly. The entire process went smoothly and without any issues. The neighborhood is calm but still close to a train station.

Hisao and his wife were so kind and offered breakfast for me for the two nights I was there! They even waited up for me, even though my flight was delayed and I arrrived quite late. They were the perfect hosts! The room is private and can be locked. At night, the whole floor was empty. Everything was great and I had no problems. The room is really close to the station and is really close to Ueno. I really enjoyed my stay!

I had a wonderful time at Imadu-san's place. He waited for me at checkin, the room is spacious, I got a towel and the amenities are great. He even gave me a breakfast sandwich and a bag of Japanese treats! :) I guess there is a kendo school downstairs so the students come upstairs to change and get ready for class, but no one ever bothered me and he gives you a lock for the room door and a safety deposit box. Loved staying here and it was only a short walk to Uguisudani Station or Nippori Station, and the neighborhood is quiet and peaceful. どもありがとうございます‼
Hisao Imadu先生的房子應有盡有，離車站也很近。他們夫婦也非常好客，還為我準備紀念品，真的很感謝Hisao Imadu先生！有機會到東京去一定會再拜訪^^

Imadu-sensei's place is one of the most spacious that I've stayed in Tokyo ever. It's the traditional tatami rooms but yet you get the bed. The house is really clean and organised. The room is lockable and the entire neighbourhood is really safe. 7-11 is about 2 minutes walk away. I use the Uguisudani JR and it takes about 10 minutes to get to the house.

The kendo school downstairs open for certain days of the week and the training takes place about 7-9pm. You can hear the duelling but by the time you go to bed, it's already done, so no worries for the noise. The people who does kendo comes up for the toilet and to change but they are really nice people (people whom I had the honours of meeting and joined them for a dinner) so it's really safe.

Even though Imadu-sensei doesn't speak too much English, he and his wife do their best to accomodate me and explain to me about the house. I really like the place and next time I'm back in Tokyo, I want to be back there!

とても快適な和室でリラックス出来ました。
ホストの方も暖かく迎えてくださいました。

Mr. Hisao and his wife were exceptional hosts.The room is very clean, well equiped, but the hospitality was the best part. I even practiced kendo in his dojo, we had a welcome party after and we exchanged gifts. He also drove me to the station when I left... thank you Imadu sensei for a great experience in Tokyo!
Hisaoさん人超好的，我們要離開的那天下了雨，他開車子送我們到車站，還送了我們日本的巧克力給我們當禮物，不然拖著行李走應該要走個20分鐘才會到吧～

Imaduさんは素敵なホスト様で最初のやり取りから丁寧に対応していただけました！
宿泊当日も丁寧に説明していただき、安心して宿泊することができました。
室内も素敵な和室で快適でした！ありがとうございまいた。
すごくいいところだと思います。hosaoさんと奥さんはとても優しいです。お手数おかけしても、優しくて助けてくれます。本当にいい経験だと思います。細かいところも気づかて、旅行ガイドも用意しました、助かった！最後プレゼントをもらった時、感動します。ありがとうございます。犬かわいいいい^_^

Ce fût une très belle expérience et notre séjour a malheureusement été trop court. Hisao est un hôte très accueillant. Je recommande vivement cet endroit un peu excentré qui offre une image spécifique de Tokyo.

Hisao-san and Naomi-san were great hosts! They even attended to my muslim dietary needs when they invited me for dinner and prepared breakfasts. The room was spacious and it had high level of privacy as well because bathrooms and the room I stayed were gender-separated. When I left, the host even offered to send me to the nearest station. This place is 10-12 minutes away from Uguisudani stn, if you have your gmap on, it is easy to find.

Hisao and his wife Naomi were the best hosts in the world. Everything was explained and organised very well, I felt like home straight away. I had my own room and bathroom. Hisao has been in my home country twice and shared this experience with me. I got very tasty egg and tuna sandwich for breakfast made by Naomi.  Hisao and Naomi are very kind and sweet people and now they have raised the bar so high for me, in the future I will compare everyone with them because I have higher expectations for others. They introduced some local customs over there and gave me special Japanese products as gifts.  Neighborhood was very quiet, safe and clean. I can recommend their home for staying in Tokyo to all of my friends for sure. They are very lovely people :)

We enjoyed our stay with Hisao. He was very friendly, generous & accommodating. He & his wife made us tea on our arrival. Next morning, they provided us with breakfast. They even gave us umbrellas as gifts because it was raining & we wanted to buy umbrellas for ourselves. He offered to take us to the train station but we insisted on walking because we wanted to explore the neighborhood.
It was a lovely walk. We got to see a lot of Nippori, old houses, gardens, etc.

My stay with Imadu-sensei was unbelievable.  At the price listed, and everything he provides, I think he simply wants to meet people from around the world!  So, here's the rundown of my experience: cool traditional room, listening to kendo practice downstairs was absolutely fascinating, 7 kendo sensei and myself having food and lots of alcohol together (really got to know several of them, it was great), Imadu-sensei providing breakfast for me to take with me, and providing a bag of 5 or so different kinds of Japanese candies and snacks when I checked out.

Hisao is a very nice and welcoming host. When my brother and I stayed at his place, he prepared breakfast for us every morning!!
The room we stayed in was pretty comfortable and the amenity was very convenient as well.
You can also walk to subway or JR station within 10 mins from Hisao's place, very convenient.
An awesome place to stay, and you can also experience traditional Japanese Dojo!!
到着した初日に、歓迎会を開いてくださり、とても嬉しかったです。お部屋もきれいで、とても満足でした！ありがとうございました！
部屋もきれいで、とても快適に使わせていただきました。ありがとうございました！

Hisao and his wife are the best hosts.  They welcomed  us with an amazing dinner upon arrival and offered us a variety of drinks. Every morning, they were even kind enough to leave some food for us. They took their time to interact with us and showed genuine interest in our plans and culture.  The second floor where we were was cool because we were above dojo!! We recommend this place!
房東先生是個隨和的男子漢，像在跟爸爸對話一樣，使用空間對東京而言算是很大，房間是全塌塌米地板還有落地窗，外面可以有晾衣服空間，很棒！距離上野或日暮里也只有一站距離，走路去地鐵站約10~20分，公車站5分以內，推薦給不怕走路的背包客！

My friend and me had a good time at Hisao's place. The neighbourhood is quiet and nice, and we felt very welcomed and we relaxed a lot while big there. We had a good time eventhough we didn't have much time to spend at home.
短期之內入住的第二次，房東先生還熱情的邀約我們加入武道館的賽後party，雖然我們很抱歉因為太少的時間而沒有加入，但還是覺得感激房東先生的邀請（他甚至還幫我們準備了可愛的早餐，人超好）

Hisao and his wife were a very warm and nice host! Eventhough they don't speak English, they tried hard to explain all the amenities in the house. They always prepared breakfast for us every morning and bought us a bento for dinner. The place was also easy to find, for us (family with 2 young children) it took 15 minutes walk from Uguisudani station. At the end of our stay, they gave us a lot of cute souvenirs for our children (children LOVE it so much!) and a small ice in a small towel pouch to ease the hot temperature.

It was a unique experience to try live in real Japanese house where we felt very welcomed and homey.

Hisao and his wife are great hosts. This was a truly unique place to stay. It's a traditional style Japanese house and you will sleep on tatami mats. The apartment has a large shared kitchen and occasionally separate bathrooms. Hisao is a Kendo instructor and his dojo is downstairs. When there is a class they will go upstairs where the men and women will separate, but this only happened once during my stay.
My girlfriend and I were allowed to attend his class and the food and beer party that followed. That was a very authentic Japanese experience. Everyone was great and Hisao's wife even made us breakfast every morning. Highly recommended.

Hisao Imadu and his wife took great care of us. We felt that we were hosted at a friend's place. A kitchen was available for our use and we enjoyed the tasty sandwiches on the table every mornings for breakfast.

The neighbourhood is very quiet and friendly. By walk, the place is 10-15min from a train station. Buses are available 5min away from the place – allows you to get to other train stations as well.

We warmly thank Hisao Imadu and his wife for their patience and their kindness. We will be back! :-)

一週間お世話になりました、もう無事に家に帰った、おかげさまで今回の旅はとても楽しかったです。
Hisaoさんはほんとに優しい方です、到着したあの日いろいろな原因でチェックインが遅くなったが、Hisaoさんはずっとわしたを待っていった、そして、丁寧に鍵と電気の使い方など教えていただきました、でも、やっぱりわたしにとってもっとも感謝したいのは受験所まで車でお送りいただきましたことでした、残念ながら、今回受からなかったが、でもこれから受かるために一生懸命頑張ります。
感謝の気持ちは一言でちゃんと伝えられなくて、来月私は留学生として東京にいきますから、あの時またお宅に伺いにまいります。

We had a good time staying at Hisao's place. Warm welcome, every day breakfast and once we were invited for dinner. Subway and train are in walkable distance. And a big plus was the immediate response on Airbnb messages. All in all exactly what you wish for, when you book through Airbnb..

Les chambres sont typiquement japonaises et spacieuses. Tous les équipements nécessaires sont présents.
Bien que Hisao ne parle pas anglais, il n'y a pas eut de problème de compréhension. Tous les matins nous avons eu une collation de la part de la femme d'Hisao.
On conseille l'initiation au Kendo, qui a été complète et ludique.

The room is located within walkable distance from stations of metro, JR and the Keisei line. There is also a 7-11 nearby. The neighbourhood is nice and quiet. The room is also very nice, with all the basic equipment I needed. There is a balcony, but it was raining everyday when I was there, so I didn't really go out on it. Hisao-san is very nice. Although I do not speak Japanese and he does not really speak English, he tried to communicate with me and made me feel welcomed. His wife prepared some very delicious breakfast for me as well, though I did not have the chance to meet her.

I had an amazing stay at Hisao's, definitely felt at home !!
The location is quite convenient yet quiet and the monday evening kendo teachers drinking party is a must do ;)
Hisao's wife prepared delicious sandwiches for me every morning, catering for my vegetarian diet !

ヒサオ先生、素晴らしい滞在、ありがとうございました。次回もよろしくお願い致します＾＾

I really had great time there. Hisao-san and his wife were really nice and friendly. They prepared me breakfast every day. The place was really cheap, but everything was available for me. i like that place and would like to go there again. Thank to Hisao-san and his wife.

Our stay was very nice. Hisao and his wife were very welcoming. They brought us candies and gifts.  On our last day, Hisao was nice enough to drive us to the train station when it was raining. Overall, it was a good experience.

Meeting Hisao-San and his wife Naomi-San was the best part during my 4-day trip in Tokyo. It started with an early check-in (very very early in the morning). They welcomed us warmly and prepared the room for us upon our arrival. Also they made us breakfast and left a post-it with lovely wishes every morning. Hisao-San invited me to the party after kendo training and I got the chance to meet and talk to some local people. By the way, I really appreciated the unique opportunity to have my first kendo hour in my life provided by Hisao-San. Naomi-San gave us a Japanese style curtain and mirror as gifts before we left. History-San drove me to the JR station upon my check-out. So much nice and lovely memories, I will definitive stay there again when I go to Tokyo next time.
The location is 10 minutes walking from JR station Uguisudani. The neighborhood is quite during the night. Like in all, perfect place for backpackers and budget travelers.

房东先生和太太极其的友善、客气和体贴，临别还赠送了小礼物，让我们真的非常感动！楼下就是房东家的剑道馆，有兴趣的朋友可以体验一下，非常特别的日本文化体验， 强烈推荐。

Hisao-san and his wife are wonderful and really kind hosts! They were very very nice to us, and we can’t express enough gratitude to them for offering us such a pleasant time staying in their place and enjoying short time in Tokyo.

We chose to stay in a traditional Japanese room, and had access to kitchen and independent bathroom. The apartment was very clean and all the facilities work well. We also attended a kendo class downstairs in the club which Hisao-san operates. It was the most unique experience for us in Japan and has definitely made our trip even more memorable.

The neighborhood is very quiet. It’s about 15 minutes’ walk to the metro station. There is a 7-11 convenience store near the street and quite a few local Japanese restaurants as well. We love the place very much and would definitely recommend it!

Zdecydowanie polecam osobom szukającym prawdziwego japońskiego doświadczenia! Poznanie Hisao i jego żony było jedną z najlepszych rzeczy jakie przytrafiły nam się w Tokio.
Byli bardzo pomocni w każdej kwestii, której potrzebowaliśmy - odnośnie transportu czy miejsc, które chcieliśmy zwiedzić (mimo, że nie mówimy po japońsku- byliśmy w stanie się komunikować). Wydrukowali nam sporo informacji, codziennie przygotowywali nam śniadanie, pozwolili na bardzo późny check-out. Zostaliśmy zaproszeni na trening kendo. Na pożegnanie dostaliśmy japońskie upominki.
Ich dom jest tradycyjny z tatami na podłodze i możliwością spania na futonie (lub normalnym łóżku). W zasadzie mieliśmy dla siebie całe mieszkanie. Gospodarze mieszkają piętro wyżej.
Lokalizacja jest świetna - ok 40 min z lotniska Haneda: Monorail +JR Yamanote Line do stacji Uguisuani oddalonej niecałe 10 min od mieszkania. Do metra Iriya również ok 10 min. Okolica jest bardzo ładna, spokojna, jednocześnie blisko 7eleven, bary, restauracje.
Zdjęcia oddają dobrze mieszkanie.
Dziękujemy raz jeszcze naszym gospodarzom za wszystko!

We definitely recommend staying in Hisao and his wife's place!! Especially for travellers looking for an unique japanese experience. Meeting them was one of the best thing that happened to us in Tokyo. Our hosts were very very helpful. Although we don't speak japanese, we were able to communicate with them with simple words in english. They provided us with a lot of tourism or transportation information we needed, prepared us breakfast everyday and let us check-out late. Before leaving we received japanese gifts from them.
I will stay in their place when coming back to Japan for sure!

A few details: 30-40 min from Haneda airport (Monorail+JR yamanote line), 10 min walking to JR and metro stations. Very nice area, close to bars and restaurants, 7eleven.

Thank you Hisao once again for this perfect stay!

Hôte discret, serviable et attentionné. Sa femme également qui nous a préparé un sandwich tous les matins. Chambre très correcte pour le prix. Lits séparés.
Lieux de l'hébergement bien situé proche de la jr ligne mais un peu difficile à trouver la 1ere fois.

We really enjoyed our stay and Hisao was very welcoming and friendly.
We woke up to sandwiches in the early morning for us to take during our day out. A great way to start our day!
The location is good, only 10 minutes’ walk to the nearest JR station situated a quite area and road.
Hisao introduced us to Kendo and invited us to join the dinner afterwards with all participants. It was a great experience.
We appreciated his hospitality and friendliness and recommend this to anyone looking for a local experience!
