本当に楽しい滞在でした。ヒサオさんがとてもフレンドリーに出迎えてくださいました。
朝早く起きると、お出かけ用にとサンドイッチが用意されており、素晴らしい１日のスタートになりました！
立地も良く、最寄のＪＲ駅までは徒歩１０分、静かなエリアと道路に面しています。
ヒサオさんは私たちに剣道を紹介してくださって、その後には参加者の皆さんとの夕食にも誘ってくださいました。素晴らしい体験でした。
彼のホスピタリティと親切さに感謝し、地元ならではの体験を求める人たちに、この場所をお勧めします！
屋主2公婆的人都很好、很亲切！还为我们准备早餐！大多数的疑问和问题都帮我们解决！住宿地方是非常传统的日式睡房，我很喜欢！环境幽静，只是要走去mrt站是大概需要1km这样… 很喜欢这个住宿地方，楼下就是剑道馆… 时间关系没有机会看他们舞剑，下次有机会一定会再过去！^^

I really like that I had a chance to experience a genuine japanese style accommodation. Hisao san gave us a warm welcome. Even though we cannot speak Japanese, he patiently tried to communicate with us. He also made a breakfast for us. In short, I strongly rocommend to anyone who wants to stay in a local style accom.

집위치가 어떤관광지던 접근성이좋습니다. 주위에 메트로선과 jr선역 모두 가까이에있어 패스사용도용이합니다. 무엇보다 히사오씨와 아내분께서 너무친절하게 맞아주시고 아침마다 만들어주신 샌드위치가 너무감사했습니다. 떠나는길에도 따뜻하게배웅해주셨습니다.
어느하나빠질게없는숙소라 강력추천합니다^^

Many many thanks to Hisao and his wife for giving me such a good time at their home in Arakawa-ku, Tokyo! I will write more in German language, so it's easier for me to describe my stay.
ありがとうござい！
Der Aufenthalt über Hisaos Kendo Dojo war super - Hisao ist nicht der strenge Lehrmeister, wie man anhand seines Fotos vielleicht vermuten könnte, sondern vielmehr ein ganz netter, freundlicher und unkomplizierter Typ - eher so der "zerstreute Professor" mit wirrem Haar - und seine Frau ist eine ganz liebe ...
Ich fand die Lage super, es ist ein ruhiges Wohngebiet, aber man ist zu Fuß in 10 Minuten an der yamanote line und auch gleich am ueno koen. Asakusa, ueno, Akihabara, marunouchi Gegend sehr schnell zu erreichen. Einmal per Google Street view erkundet, findet sich der Weg ganz leicht.
Die Wohnung bietet alles, was man braucht (Internet ist leider lahm) und ist super günstig.
Wer montags dort ist, kann in den Genuss der "Beer party" mit den kendo Leuten kommen - sehr witzig!
Ich kann einen Aufenthalt dort nur empfehlen!
Über Mitbringsel aus Deutschland (Bier, Schokolade, Pralinen ...) freuen sich die beiden ;-)

I had a great day at Hisao−san's place. The place is cozy, Hisao−san's wife is really nice and has a lot of stories to tell. They are very helpful with anything. I would love to stay there again some time.

Hisao and Naomi's home was lovely, they were both extremely welcoming and invited us to their party. Naomi was nice enough to make us breakfast in the morning which was delicious, and Hisao even drove us to the train station the morning we left. It's a great place to stay in a fantastic location. highly  recommended.

This place is very clean.  A bit of walking distant from station. But Mr Hisao's couple was extremely friendly .  Made us feel very much like home. The day that I took my children to Disney sea, because we had to leave very early,he and his wife prepared us delicious Japanese rice balls and sandwiches to bring along.  I would definitely recommend this place to anyone.

Our second stay.  The host was kind to allow us to leave all our luggage during our first stay to spend 2 days at Disney resort.  Thank you very much Mr and Mrs Hisao.  If we were to come again definitely will come back here.  Thank you.

두명이 지내기엔 좋았습니다. 욕실과 화장실이 따로 되어있어 편리했ㅇ으며, 아저씨는 영어를 아주머니는 일어를 하시더라구요. 일어가 더 편해서 아주머니랑 대화를 할 수 있었으며 아침에 샌드위치와 감기약도 얻어먹었어요. 정말 감사했구요. 아저씨께서 도쿄역까지 데려다 주셔서 정말 정말 감사했습니다. 다으메 도쿄에 간다면 다시 이용하고 싶습니다. 방이 독립된 느낌이라 더 편리하게 이용할 수 있었습니다.
잘 지내다왔습니다. 감사합니다^^

Hisao was extremely accommodating, and he made us feel right at home. He went above and beyond to make sure that all of our needs were met, including helping me navigate the city and taking me to the international ATM when I ran out of cash. Watching Hisao's Kendo practice was a very special experience that I will never forget.

The location was quiet and peaceful, but still central to destinations such as Asakusa and the Tokyo Skytree.

I'm extremely grateful for Hisao's hospitality, and I recommend this experience to anyone looking for true Japanese hospitality. Thanks Hisao!

ไกลไปนิด แต่ที่พักโอเคมากๆ เจ้าของใจดี
สถานีรถไฟที่ใกล้ๆน่าจะเป็น nippori station เดินอีกราวๆ 900m
Place is very near to the train station which connects to the green circle line to many cities. I was so thankful that he provided breakfast and his sandwich taste good.

It was only for one night but I enjoyed staying at Hisao's place a lot. He and his wife are so nice, helpfull and friendly. Hisao was even so nice to bring me to the nearest train station because I had so many luggage. And his wife was so nice to make me some lunch for the train. Thank you soooo much!
The room was very nice as well. Clean and had everything I needed.

Thank you again!

Hisao is an amazing host! Even though we arrived really early in the morning, he still managed to accommodate us and prepared the place perfectly even though previous guests checked out not too long ago. He and his wife even prepared breakfast for us the next day! It's also a really nice house, with an authentic Japanese-style experience.
今津さんのお宅に４泊させて頂きました。谷中や上野の美術館や博物館へ歩いて行ける距離なので、とても楽しく過ごせました。奥様のサンドイッチがとても美味しくて、とても素晴らしい宿です。是非また訪れたいと思います。有難う御座いました。

Highly recommend! Mr Hisao and his wife were so nice! They prepared me breakfast and asked me to join their party. The room and the bathroom were clean and neat. It takes 10-15mins walk to JR station and only takes 7mins train to Akihabara which is quite convenient. I wish I could spend more time talking with Mr Hisao, but my schedule was a bit tight... I would surely choose here again next time when I travel to Tokyo!
今津さんのお宅に3泊させていただきました。今津さんと奥さんはとても親切で、朝サンドイッチを準備してくれました。JR鶯谷駅まで歩いて10分程度、秋葉原まで電車で7分ですからとても便利で、楽しく過ごせました。機会があれば、また訪れたいと思います。ありがとうございました。

Hisao e sua moglie sono veramente due persone splendide, siamo stati accolti in maniera calorosa e durante il soggiorno non ci hanno fatto mancare niente. Ogni mattina trovavamo anche la colazione.
Una sera abbiamo avuto pure il piacere di cenare con lui e i sui alievi di spade, è stata una esperienza molto bella.
La casa è in una posizione comoda per raggiungere la metropolitana e potersi così muovere per Tokyo. Più volte ci hanno anche accompagnato in macchina.
In casa habbiamo trovato tutto il necessario e anche più,pulita e confortevole.
Spero col cuore di tornare a soggiorare da loro.... GRAZIE

A great way to start our visit to Japan. We had an entire floor to ourselves with a kitchen, two bedrooms, and a bathroom. The owners went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable. They checked in after we returned from touring the city to see how we were doing, and in the morning they made us sandwiches. Before we left they even gave us some cute gifts as souvenirs of our time in Tokyo! Both of the owners were very friendly and provided a thoroughly enjoyable experience.

I stayed here for only one night. Hisao San and his wife Naomi San are very kind. Naomi San had made me a delicious sandwich for breakfast. I had joined the kendo lesson which was really interesting. Hisao San and People in the dojo were willing to teach even I just take a single lesson. Hisao San's technique is really impressive! It was a great experience.

Hisao-san and Naomi-san are really hospitable and kind hosts! The place is well-furbished with various amenities and the breakfasts are great. Easily accessible from Iriya (subway) and Uguisudani (JR) if you do your homework on the walking routes.
どうも ありがとう ございます。とても しんせつな 人です。おいし サンドイッチ どうも ありがとう! Excelente anfitrión, el lugar es perfecto.
很愉快的幾天，房東人很好，房間也很舒適。唯一遺憾是這次沒有時間參加劍道體驗，下次有機會的話想試試看。
Really thank you for our stay it was really a nice place and nice people! Also very sweet for the  breakfast every morning. My family and me we all have a good memory in Japan Thank you !

Absolutely wonderful. Took care of me unbelievably well and most importantly allowed me to train in his dojo. Since I came to Japan to improve my Kendo this was a blessing and I hope to visit again soon!
それでは、再び稽古しましょう。お願いします！
どうもありがとうございます！

再回到東京久雄さん住處,
*交通十分方便,從日暮里駅到誠道館,步行大約15分鐘,可以搭乘公車"都08",步行大約兩分鐘就可以到住處.
*枕頭套,棉被到浴室,整個空間十分乾淨.由於位於巷弄間,也非常寧靜.是到日本半個月睡得最好的幾個晚上.
*貼心的久雄太太每天早上都會親手製作三明治或漢堡,還會附上可愛小餅乾.屋內還因為怕太過乾燥,放了水氧機,相當貼心.
*屋內有個迷你小廚房,以及小冰箱.可以簡單地煮麵或是其他簡易餐點.Hisaoさん還會附上非常好喝的日本茶或是咖啡.
非常喜歡這裡,期望下次還有機會入住.感謝Hisaoさん以及太太的照顧.

とても優しいでした！
位置もいいし、奥様も親切ですし、日本の優しさを分かるんです

Hisao was very nice. He was teaching a class when we arrived and let us observe and take some pictures. The space was very accommodating and he had provided a different egg sandwich for us each morning. The location was off of the Nippori train stop (Yamanote line) and it was very convenient to get to the other popular neighborhoods as they all used that line as well (Ginza, Harashuku, Shinjuku, etc). The home was about a 15 min walk from the train station though, so it may be good to get a taxi if you have a lot of luggage. The house was also just a few miles from the Sensoji Temple and a couple blocks from a 7 eleven that had an atm.
Prior to the classes starting, some of the individuals taking the class would use the common spaces on our level to change or take a shower. This was a little bit of a surprise but everyone was very nice. We were provided locks for our rooms and access to a small safe. The space was clean and the beds were comfortable. After 8pm, the neighborhood is pretty quiet but never felt unsafe.
Hisao kindly dropped us off at the Ueno train stop so we could activate our JR rail pass tickets before heading to Nagano. Would definitely recommend staying here.

Absolutely perfect time ! Hisao was a very kind host, we can't find better ! He will give or explain you all you need. His wife made me some sandwiches and he drives me to the train station the last day. Plus the district is peacefully and really beautiful. My favourite part of the city. Thank you for all !

It was a lovely 8 days staying at Hisao san's place! 15 mins from Uguisudani station and 2/3 stations within the vicinity (and a bit of walking) you can easily travel within Tokyo via train! His room was a cosy place to relax when needed after a whole day of walking, and Hisao san was always helpful when you needed to ask him for anything. I'll like to thank his wife for breakfast for all the days I've stayed over and really enjoyed everything the neighbourhood has to offer!!

Same great experience . I returned from China on the 23rd and stayed there until the 26th. Hisao and his wife as helpful as before and gave directions to places . Hisao drove me to Nippori for the Skyliner and it was of great help because I had 2 suitcases and a backpack.
I recommend his place to those traveler who want to have direct access to Narita and who want to share the experience of living with a real Japanese family.

This is precisely the kind of experience that makes AirBNB great, to stay somewhere that provides a true cultural experience.  We got to observe the Kendo practice from 9:30am to Noon.  One note is that if you plan on sleeping after 9:30am, the Kendo practice is quite loud, so I could imaging it would be difficult to sleep, but fortunately we were up by that time.  Hisao was a gracious host.
距离JR莺谷站和日暮里站都非常近，房东和房东太太人特别好，第二天我们离开的时候，早上房东太太给我们做了三明治！房东还开车送我们到地铁站，非常感谢！

At first we have a hard time seeing his place, but thanks to their friendly neighbors, they help us find the exact place. We take the Uguisudani station and around 20mins walk to his place. Neighbors know it as Seido Hall or kendo school. Locating in Google Maps will be a help.
Mr. Hisao is very very nice and kind, he toured us to his home and our room. And become comfortable. The room is spacious, clean, and quiet. In the morning, there is a delicious sandwich and chocolates (oishi!) for us. More than that, when we leave, he offered to drive us to Nippori station. Overall, it is convenient. I will recommend your place to my friends too. Thank you!

Since the very first moment I arrived at Hisao's place he treated me as you treat your best friends. Extremely respectful and very helpful all the time. He gave me instructions on how to get to the different places , his help was extremely valuable. Hisao's wife, Naomi is also an excellent host, both of them make you feel at home as soon as you enter their home. Extremely glad to have know him and his wife.
Hisao's place is perfect because the Skyliner from Narita goes to Nippori. Thanks again to Hisao for all of his help and warm welcome. He even drove me to the station when I was going to Haneda airport. I appreciated that a lot.

Clan room, great location. Very close to uguisudani station. We wanted to take a kendo class but unfortunately there was a misunderstanding because Hisao is not fluent in English yet. nevertheless Hisao was a very kind host. He even offered to drive us to tokyo station early in the morning to catch our train.
The room was ok, we only stayed one night but bathrom and shower was not very clean. Overall the location was good so it was a nice option for one night.

thank you so much to you. my son love the room so much.  sorry for broken the shower head and hisao San didn't asked to pay the money and he even fetch us to station when we checked out separate in different time. just the bathroom for man is very cold.

The room was clean and tidy, just like the rest of the house. The location matched the description perfectly.

What was not included in the advert was the warm and generous hospitality that mr Hisao reserved to us. He invited us to join his kendo group twice in three days, offering us dinner and a chance to meet local people in an authentic and friendly environment. This is an experience we'll hardly forget.

Definitely recommended!

What a pleasant 3 night stay at Hisao-san place. The room is clean, cozy, and warm. Bathroom, toilet, and kitchen are great. We did laundry and cook without any problem. We arrive really late and Hisao-san was waiting for us till we came and even drop us to the station when we were going. ps: his wife sandwich is really delicious.

I had a wonderful stay at Hisao San's place. The moment I arrived, Hisao San made me feel right at home. His wife made me a delicious sandwich every morning with sweet treats too!! The room is spacious and very comfortable. The location is located in a quiet area, but super convenient. If you are travelling with a JR Pass, the JR train station is only 10 minutes away on foot. It will take you to Tokyo station in another 10 minutes.
I will definitely stay there again next time I'm in Tokyo! Highly recommended!

Hisao and his wife are very friendly and our 3 days stay in Tokyo a great experience.The house is not far from the JR train station and the rooms are very spacious and clean.They were very kind to provide us with morning  home made sandwiches and snacks.We would definitely stay here again when we are in Tokyo.

Very nice stay, Mr himadu and his wife are very nice people and very welcoming.
Especially for kendo player this is the place to be, dojo is on first floor, and accommodations on 2nd floor, very practical.
Amazing stay.

It's our first time using Airbnb and we found it is a good experience staying here. We were very thankful for the warm welcoming of Hisao-san and his lovely wife. The location isn't likely close to the station but it's walkable and there were many restaurants and convenient stores along the way.

We're ages 67 and 62, not too fussy, but not willing to put up with just anything. It was just a little funky here, but we loved this place, and our two hosts.

It was an easy walk from Nippori Station, not hard to find. Get off at Nippori if you're coming from Narita, then walk up "Fabric Street," about 8 traffic lights. Take a right between Lawson & 7/11. And there are other stations even closer, but this way is easiest when you first get there. The neighborhood is somewhat unremarkable, but neat, safe and quiet. There's a friendly liquor store 2 doors down (try it, instead of Lawson), a few minor shrines, 2 parks, a grocery, and a dog cafe.

There are two rooms, both tatami, both above the kendo studio (you should remember that kendo is not a quiet activity). We were the only guests, so we had the whole floor to ourselves, usually. We had the room with the western beds. We probably slept better as a result, and that room has a TV. There's a full kitchen you can use, and there's always a pot of hot water. The photos give an accurate idea.

There's a good library of Tokyo travel literature.

Before and after kendo, the baths and showers are shared. It's over quickly. I asked to attend kendo practice and was very, very glad that I did. I attended alone. I think two persons would be intrusive. There may have been fewer practices because it was Golden Week. After Monday's practice, there was a party and we were invited. You could almost say we were honored guests. It was one of those experiences that you just don't get in a hotel or even a hostel. There was food, drink conversation and friendship. All genuine. We are immensely thankful to have had this experience, and to our hosts and new friends.

The host was waiting for us when we arrived. His English is limited, but good enough to give us an orientation, and later a valuable tip on taking the bus instead of the train. He always asked how we would spend our day. One day he drove us in his car. His wife was a sweetheart and had some English, too. She made us substantial breakfast sandwiches every day, accompanied by fruit or a KitKat. We even met the family dog, and shared family photos on the smartphone.

We stayed a week and could not have been happier with our choice. Arigato, Hisao & Naomi.

C'est la seconde fois que nous allions chez Hisao, donc nous étions en terrain connu, et ça c'est très bien passé comme la première fois.
Bien que nous soyons arrivé un peu tard, nous avons été bien accueilli.
Je vous souhaite de tomber sur une "Beer Party" du Kendo, c'est l'occasion de passer un moment convivial.

Hisao and his wife were incredible hosts. We had gotten lost on our way to his place, so we arrived later than expected. To our surprise, we found that he had been out waiting for us! Hisao's wife made delicious sandwiches for us and greeted us during the first morning as well, which we left us feeling very touched. As for the room, we were pleasantly surprised by the ample amount of space. :) Great listing at an affordable price!!

Hisao and his wife were great hosts.
His wife made us feel welcome, especially making us delicious sandwiches every morning. Hisao made our further trip much easier accepting to keep our big rucksack while we visited other cities in Japan. Thank you very much for this!
The location is very good, near the main train stations (Ueno/Nippori) for arriving from Narita. The nearest subway station is Iriya (Hibiya line), a 10min walk from the accomodation.

We had a wonderful time in Tokyo, thank you!

La estancia en casa de Hisao y su mujer fue perfecta. Me encantó estar en su casa. Fueron muy amables y hospitalarios en todo momento. La casa me pareció preciosa y tradicional .La habitación muy relajante y bonita. Por la mañana nos dejaban delciosos bocadillos. Si vuelvo a Tokyo volveré a quedarme en casa de Hisao y se lo recomendaré a mis amigos!
Muchas gracias Hisao!! Ha sido todo perfecto
Hisao和他的夫人都特别友善，除了每天早晨的三明治，Hisao最后一天还把我送到了地铁站。他们家里有一只小泰迪，他的夫人还担心泰迪在家走路会吵到我。房间特别干净，一层只住了我一个人。我在Hisao的剑道馆上了一节体验课，他很耐心的教我，还帮我拍照。其他学员也很热心，陪着我练习也不烦。感谢Hisao一家人，真是特别棒的一次经历。

I had a really comfortable and relaxing experience with Hisao san. He was extremely hospitable and accommodating. The station can feel a little far in the rain or summer heat but it's an enjoyable walk!

Hisao's place was fantastic. He was too. If you're interested in staying in old Tokyo, this is the place to stay. Convenient location, essentially a private place to yourself, and a kind and nonintrusive host.

Hisao-san was so helpful even before my friend and I arrived at his place. He let us send our luggage ahead of time from another city so that we didn't have to carry them. His wife made sandwiches and gave us snacks and fruit in the morning. He also gave us a postcards and a souvenir when we left. We had the second floor to ourselves so we had plenty of privacy since we were out all day anyways. The laundry machine was super useful - as was the double shower. The room was simple and comfortable. It was a great experience to meet our hosts and chat with Hisao-san. I wish we had a chance to take a kendo lesson! Also - there are two bento places and a Lawson by the North exit of JR Uguisudani Station.

Hisao is very nice and helpful！ His wife will prepare delicious sandwiches for us at 8:00 in the morning. And he always keep the room tidy and clean! The experience of kendo is also very wonderful! It's really worth to live in his house!
何処へ行くのにも、とても便利な場所にあり、快適に過ごせました。下町にあるので、買い食いするのが楽しかったです。朝食と小さなスナック菓子を毎朝出していただきました。また泊まりたいです。
Hisao's place was great. Very comfortable and well equipped. It is in a good location which is well connected. we had the place to ourselves mostly and hisao's wife made us very delicious sandwiches.
the best airbnb I've been, just awesome

Aojamiento familiar sencillo, independiente y muy cómodo para visitar Tokyo al estar situado en Uguisudani  línea JR yamanote. Hisao nos ofreció mapas y guías y su mujer nos preparó sándwiches por las mañanas. También nos acercó al tren al marcharnos. Gracias Hisao
Très authentique. Délicieux sandwichs le matin. Nous avons aussi assisté à un cours kendo.

Hisao's family and his house are wonderful! He explained everything in the house for us and his charming wife prepared a tasty breakfast for us every morning,and the direction of their house is great!it's convenient to the place we want to go,i highly recommend their house!!
Hisao一家和他的房子真的特别棒！东西齐全位置方便，他的妻子还每天早上给我们准备很好吃的早餐！超级推荐～

Hisao took a very good care of us. The house provided everything we needed as we saw in the photos. His wife made us a lovely sandwich every morning. He also invited us to see the kendo match, which was a great experience for us. Hisao is the perfect host. I surely stay here, if I come back to Tokyo.

Super glad we stayed here at Hisao sans place. We came a little bit earlier than the time agreed upon to check in, but Hisao San was already waiting outside for us to help guide us to his home. The rooms were very nice, with extra security for our personal belongings. He is also prompt in responding back to any concerns. His wife also made us delicious sandwiches every morning! When checking out, Hisao San offered to drive us to Nippori station! We had a ton of luggage so it was very helpful. He even made two trips to the station for us because the luggage didn't all fit in one trip. Although it is quite a walk from Nippori station, I highly recommend this place! Thank you Hisao-San for a wonderful stay!

Hisao-san was a great host.

I only stayed one night but he provided everything I needed. Room was neat and clean.

He drove me to Nippori station in the morning so I didn't have to walk in order to catch my train to the Airport. His wife also prepare breakfast for me (sandwich, biscuits and fruit).

Would recommend Hisao's place to all travelers.
很棒的住宿体验，因为是在东京的最后一个晚上，就随便找的…但房主人很好，狗狗也很可爱，第二天早上还为我们准备了美味的三明治早餐！很棒！推荐！
房东叔叔真的超级好！！告诉我们去哪里吃饭，还在早上六点半起来把我和弟弟送到车站ᶘ ᵒᴥᵒᶅ太感谢啦！！！房间也很棒！干净整洁！可使用的空间也很大！坐公交下来只用走三分钟！总之超推荐哦( ´ ▽ ` )ﾉ
房東很友善，房東太太也會弄早餐給我們吃，雖然離地鐵站比較遠，但是整體還是很滿意

Hisao was very responsible and the location was very clean and conveniently located only 10 minute walk from a JR station. It was a very nice house and we enjoyed Hisao's hospitality. I recommend this AirBNB

我們一開始看头像以为是一个严肃的老爷爷，沒想到见了面发现是个很可爱、友善的老爷爷。不仅帮助我们铺床，而且每天早上有太太做的美味的三明治和小饼干！虽然离Jr入谷和鶯谷站都有些距離，但是公交車站很便捷，周圍有便利店，走到上野公園約半小時左右，周圍人也不多，我們很喜歡！最後，還送我們到日暮里站，並且告訴我們怎樣去機場，下次一定還會再來的！
私たちは、会った発見が非常に美しい、非常にフレンドリーな祖父であるとは思いませんでした、それは深刻な祖父だと思いました。ベッドに私たちを助け、毎朝彼の妻はおいしいサンドイッチやクッキーをしなければならないだけでなく！渓谷や鶯谷駅ある程度の距離が、バスステーション、アウェイジュニアは、コンビニエンスストアの周りに、非常に便利ですが、周りの多くの人々が、我々はそれを愛し、約30分上野公園を行ってきました！最後に、我々は日暮里駅に与え、どのように空港に行くことを教えて、次回は再び来ます！

Hisao was very kind and helpful. The house is located in a charming local district. It was nice to experience different part of Tokyo via this stay. Also, the breakfast sandwich made by Hisao's wife was delicious. :)

Actually, I stayed in Room 203 during these days. I used to stay in Room 203. But Room 203 had been booked by other travellers when I want to extend my staying time. Since it is quite troublesome to move out and then move in again, I asked Hisao-san if I can stay in Room 203. After Hisao-san's help, the other travellers agreed to exchange the room with me. How nice were they. Also, I think Hisao-san is a very flexible and considerate host. Thank you!
房东人很好，地点离鶯谷车站，上野公园，浅草寺，每天准备好早餐，时间很自由，离开时还会开车送站，第一次体验传统民宿，great feeling

Mr. Hisao is a very friendly and welcoming host, we felt very at home in the flat. It is about 5-7 min walk to the metro, and is located in a nice and quiet area. Every morning we were greeted with delicious sandwiches:)
very recommended place to stay!!
房东人很好，答应让我们存放两天行李，后来因为回东京晚了没有按约定时间到，也没有事先跟房东发邮件，让房东不高兴了。再次表示真的很抱歉，添麻烦了，是我们不应该，希望房东原谅我们。房间很干净，早餐有三明治和水果，在一个很安静的区域，头一天上午就到了，房东还让我提前入住了。感谢，抱歉。

The house is nice and the location is convenient.It's not far from the JR Nippori station,especially convenient to go to the Narita Airport by Keisei.Mr Hisao and his wife Naomi are so nice,we like them very much.They made sandwiches for us every morning,and drove us to the JR station when we left.We already miss them now,wish we can meet them next time.At last,sorry to Naomi again for the bedsheets.
Great stay! Highly recommend on the east side of Tokyo.
房东Hisao-san人很好，房东太太每天给我们准备不同味道的三文治和小小零食。房子位置处于居民区，晚上非常安静，去各个车站也不是很远，比较方便。日式的房间很干净很有风情，推荐各位小伙伴都去体验一下。这次来忘记了给房东和太太带お土産。下次去一定会补上，谢谢两位的照顾啦～
Thank you for the great hospitality and the yummy sandwiches :-)
第一次来东京，住在hisao先生的家里实在是一件非常幸运的事情。家里非常整洁干净，日式的房间也很古朴舒适。最重要的是Hisao太太每天早上为我们准备三明治早餐，真的有一种家的感觉。另外，我们在中国也练习剑道，Hisao先生家里也是剑道馆，最后一天晚上我们参观了稽古练习，而且遇到一位七段的前辈，真是太幸运了。极力推荐大家去东京的时候到这里来住宿。
J'ai beaucoup aimé mon séjour chez Hisao, la maison et le quartier sont très agréable. Hisao m'a invité  à diner avec ses compagnons du Ken Do, un moment chaleureux et mémorable, merci encore!
房东从照片上看很严肃，但是见面后人超级好，而且很幽默可爱，房屋非常干净，每天有可口的早餐，交通便利，都挺好的，推荐！

Nice, spacious, and perfectly clean room and facilities, and Hisao is a friendly and helpful host. It may be an advantage to speak a bit of Japanese, but even if you don't, it will probably work out fine.

We loved Hisao-sans house! A very clean and spacious room (by Tokyo standards!) with comfortable beds and privacy.  The best part were the delicious breakfast sandwiches and sharing a beer with the kendo club members - a really lovely cultural experience.  Highly recommended.  Also,  this location is perfect if you are interested in exploring Nippori and neighbouring Yanaka. Thank you Hisao!

The host was really nice an the room was clean. When we checked out, he even drove us to the metro. That was really thoughtful and saved lots of time for us. In the morning, they made home-made sandwiches as breakfast for us. If we visit Japan again, we would consider staying here again.

Choosing to stay in Hisao's place is one of the best choice for our trip in Tokyo. It is strategically located to be close to the Yamanote line (10-15 min walk from xxx station), which is a loop line that connects the important parts of Tokyo together (e.g. Shinjuku, Shibuya, Ikebukuro etc).
In addition, Hisao san and his wife's hospitality is impeccable! Every morning, we are served handmade sandwiches (made by his wife) that were truly delicious.
During our stay, we were invited to join a beer party that was held to celebrate the birthday of one of his students.
Lastly, on our check out day, we had to leave for Narita airport early in the morning (leave his place at 6.30am). To our (very pleasant) surprise, Hisao san offered to send us to the train station, making our trip to the airport a lot easier!
Hisao's place is definitely recommended! Do stay here if you have a chance :)
Great Place. Great host

Had a great stay at Hisao, his place is about 13min walk to the nearest JR line station. We enjoy the breakfast that was provided by his wife and the nice comfortable bed to sleep after an exhausting day. Hisao was also nice enough to drive us to a station during the check out. I highly recommend this place.
本来想体验一下剑道、可惜行程满了没有时间。入住时只有我们三个人，很宽敞。而且每天早上住家都会悄悄在桌上放上三明治早饭、田螺姑娘的感觉。最后要去机场、住家也开车送我们到了地铁站。
싸고 편리합니다. 아침에 샌드위치와 초콜릿을 제공해주셔서 밥값 아낄 수 있었네요!

Hisao and Naomi were such nice, warm hosts! I arrived pretty late and Hisao waited for me at the front window. I could use the entire second floor, including a neat kitchen, a clean bathroom, a warm and spacious bedroom and dining area. Naomi cooked delicious breakfast for me every day. The day I checked out Hisao kindly drove me to the Skyliner station. Thank you for everything!! It was a lovely stay!!

房东比照片看起来亲切很多～
位置：房子在一个非常安静的小区，周边有很多寺庙和神社，我好几天都是晚上12点才回去，感觉非常安全！
交通：房子在两个地铁站中间，走到最近的地铁站大约10分钟。另一个地铁站稍微远一些，但是是连接的机场快线！步行去地铁站要15分钟，但是可以坐巴士去，巴士站距离房子步行3分钟就到了。我觉得还是很方便的。
房子是日式的，住着很有感觉。这次体验了房东的剑道课，相当赞，建议有时间的朋友们一定要尝试！

It is such a fantastic experience to live here.The host is very nice (He waited me until 23:00 the first night I arrived)and we could communicate well with simple English, the room is clean ,warm and comfortable.The hostess makes a sandwich (and give me some snacks）for me every morning, it is delicious! The host also drive me to the Nappori train station the day I leave.( around 10 minutes walk) I feel well to stay here.
非常棒的民宿！住处很有日本特色，宽敞，用具齐全，像家一样。房东非常好！

We stayed at Hisao's place for 3 nights and everything was wonderful. The room was spacious and beautiful with tatami mats and rice paper walls, and Hisao couldn't have been a more gracious host. The place is clean, walkable to transit, and every morning there were sandwiches waiting for us.
很幸运能够入住Hisao先生的房屋，HISAO先生的英语很不错，沟通没问题，房屋的地段很安静，离JR莺谷站和METRO入谷站大概步行10分钟的时间，CHECK IN和CHECK OUT的时间都很自由，每天早上HISAO先生的太太都会做贴心的三明治早餐给我们吃，非常感谢HISAO先生和他太太对我和妈妈这一周的照顾，这次住宿体验也是本次东京之行的一个美好的回忆

What you can expect:
- quiet and walkable neighborhood
- proximity to Yamanote line
- clean traditional tatami room with air-con and tv
- basic washing/shower amenities
- toilet
- except of kendo training sessions (two times a week) you will not share the toilet and kitchen with anybody else
- Mr. Hisao will communicate with you in English
- you can watch the actual kendo training (and take basic lesson for 2000 yen!)
- last but not least: freshly made sandwiches will be awaiting you every morning!

We stayed one week at Hisao's place and everything was great. Every morning Hisao's wife made sandwiches for us and they were delicious! The kitchen had everything we need. Shower and toilet were always clean and tidy. The room was comfortable. Hisao is very kind and willing to make us feel like home. Totally recommended.

Excellent!! Mr hisao was always helpful and nice! Despite not being able to communicate fluently in English.
He always provided a simple breakfast comprising of sandwiches, fruits and tibits to munch on.
Also was able to drop me off at nippori station on check out which saved the hassle of dragging my luggage to the train station..
Fantastic! Super close to transportation of all kinds. Hisao was super responsive and got us in early. The morning sandwiches from his wife were awesome! Do yourself a favor and stay here...
老板人很好，是个好地方！

I love the house!
The owner is very kind and easy to commnunicate.
The area is 20 minutes walk from 上野 Jr station. It is a quiet residential area for stay.
We enjoy the yummy breakfast made by owner's wife.
comfortable house, delicious breakfast, quiet district

Hisao-san is a great host. His place is clean, close to the station and traditionally Japanese. His wife was also very kind and prepared me sandwiches in the morning. I am glad I had the chance to meet Hisao-san and to stay in his house.

Hisao and his wife were great hosts, very courteous and helpful. Lovely sandwiches every day and even a lift to the train station. We also had a fantastic Kendo lesson too. Would definitely recommend.

Hisao's apartment was a wonderful Airbnb experience in Tokyo. It's in a quiet, residential neighbourhood with easy walking to two or three metro lines (including Yamanote at JR Nippori Station). There is a good ramen restaurant and convenient grocery stores nearby.
The space was comfortable for three adults, good value for any city, and exceptional for Tokyo.
Best of all is the slice of Japanese life you get staying here. Having a Kendo studio downstairs was a lot of fun, listening to the shouts during practice, and even watching some workouts.
One thing to know is that Hisao and his Kendo students come and go in the apartment sometimes, but we enjoyed the chance to say hi.
Hisao is a thoughtful host, providing hearty sandwiches every morning and even driving us to Nippori Station when we checked out.
I highly recommend this Airbnb accommodation, and only hope it's still available if I come back to Tokyo!

I honestly couldn't be
happier with the place. Strongly recommended.

Homely and clean place that is worth staying at. As a female solo traveler, I thought that the neighborhood was safe for one to walk home (15 mins walk) from the nearest JR station. The host is very hospitable and I will definitely recommend you to stay at his place!
只是把它当作一个睡觉&&落脚的地方，觉得还挺好的，第一天飞机晚点，去的时候已经晚上11点半了，辛苦房东等候，最后一天麻烦房东送地铁站，总之是一个愉快的旅途
Hisao is a so nice host ，the house is rather local ，his wife is beautiful and young and provide sandwich every morning

The room I got was next to the seidokan changing room and I found it bigger than what it looks like on the photos! Super nice place, next to yamanote line,  Ueno Park, yanaka ( the old Tokyo, with the best croquettes Ever).if you can,watch the training! Wish I could speak Japanese to talk longer with Hisao-san and his adorable wife who makes the bret sandwiches! Plus, Hisao drove me very early in the morning to the train station which was so nice of him. Great people, great place, good vibes. Good location :) Arigato !

很抱歉地check in 時遲大到...又唔知係邊check in 最後房東落左樓搵我...
好友善既房東 同埋比預期好既房同設施
希望有下一次既入住機會
Very welcoming, very friendly, and very central! I really recomend staying here! :)

I had one of the best experience in my life at Hisao's Place because it wasn't only a place where to sleep but I also had the pleasure and the opportunity to be one of his kendo pupil although for a day. Unfortunately I slept only two days in his house because it was already booked for the rest of June and July, quite normal for a superhost. I was been in a traditional house like his at Kyoto Westin hotel some years ago so my mind led me to a nice night spent with my parents when my mother was still alive, infact I feel her presence when a beautiful butterfly greet me in the outside balcony on a creeper's leaf. So I thought that I was in the right place in the right moment. He take cares of me and it was tender like a father, from the beginning at check-in time, during my stay and at check-out when his wife prepared me a pocket lunch with a sandwich and some choko sweeties. You will feel at home at Hisao's place and feel, although for a short time, like a real Japanese, breathing the wooden tatami smell, the lightness of traditional furnitures and everything at your disposal. A neat and huge space for Japanese standards and the plus of attending one of his lesson, if you want. I hope to come back again one day

在居民区里
走几分钟就能到商店街之类的地方
买东西和吃饭都很方便
离车站也不远
时间合适还能一起上剑道课
非常不错
這次能住在Hisao房源是很好的經驗。房源地點靠近鶯谷站很方便。設備簡單齊全。房東和太太慷慨友善，提供了愛心早餐。我們很幸運接觸了劍道文化，看到嚴謹認真的劍道訓練實況。
平时外出住宿都是选择宾馆，这次选择这个地方是想体验一下传统日本的家庭居住氛围，总体感觉不错。感谢房东太太每天早上的美味三明治和离开时房东开车送到地铁站。
Hisao is an excellent host and the room is good to stay for a while! I totally recommend Hisao's place!!!
房东非常好，自制的早餐也很可口，我们退房的时候，房东不但送了一份小礼物，还把我们送到日暮里站，方便我们的出行，这真是一个非常满意的民宿，值得推荐，谢谢房东！

Vraiment super. Notre séjour ici a été génial! Hisao & Naomi sont très accueillants et attentionnés, l'appartement est très bien situé, dans un quartier calme, à quelques minutes à pied de la ligne Yamanote. Si on retourne à Tokyo, on reviendra ici c'est sûr!

Nous avons vraiment passé un agréable séjour...  Comme indiqué un sandwich est servi au matin bien pratique pour commencer la journée.  Nous avons suivi un cours de kendo avec Hisao et c est vraiment une bonne expérience à vivre. La gare de nippori est vraiment bien placée...A 15min à pied de l'appartement... Nous avons pris un taxi pour se repérer la 1er fois env 5e. Super séjour merci à nos hôtes ;)

Estar en casa de Hisao fue la mejlr experiencia! Está cerca de estaciones JR, y el parque Ueno, Asakusa y Akihabara están a la vuelta de la esquina. Estuve durante un mes con Hisao porque estudié en la universidad de Tokyo y hasta me prestaba una de sus bicicletas para ir!      Hisao siempre fue amable y su esposa era un amor, preparaba desayunos por la mañana que desgraciadamente no podía tomar diario porque tenía que salir temprano. Incluso me invitaron a cenar un par de veces con sus amigos y siempre fue interesante. Escuchar y ver las clases de Kendo también fue divertido. Hisao me llevó a la estación más cercana el día de mi salida. Han sido los mejores, sin duda volveré!
我们入住的时候有一天是去镰仓，所以我们下了两个订单。在我们中间没入住的那一天，房东为我们保留了房间以及保管了行李，并退了我们一次清洁费用。非常感谢！
房子距离日暮里站或莺谷站步行需要20分钟左右。我们住的二楼的房间，厨房和厕所都很干净。设施设备都很全，有提供吹风机，洗头洗澡用品。房东太太每天7:30-8:00会准备早餐和零食在厨房的餐桌上，在出发行程前，记得享用，味道非常好。第一天入住的时候，房东特别问了有没有忌口，我们中正好有不吃猪肉的，所以房东太太准备了鸡肉的三明治。

We loved how quiet and accessible the location is. Wonderful sandwiches and treats for breakfast given to us each day of our stay made it really great. I love the variety as well. Arakawa is an old part of the town so if you like a peaceful and quiet neighborhood, then this is the place. Easy to navigate from the airport and accessible to a number of train lines. The Kendo school is a plus. We are greatly grateful that he accommodated our check-in and check-out times as well. Over-all we really enjoyed our stay and can not wait to be back again. Highly recommended.

완전 일본 스타일의 숙소입니다. 1층엔 검도장이고 2층이 숙소입니다. 겨울엔 약간 추을 것 같습니다. 히터를 켜고 생활했는데 따뜻했어요. 조식은 맛있고 푸짐한 샌드위치를 주셔서 너무 감사했습니다. 체크아웃때는 역까지 차로 바래다 주셨습니다. 호스트분은 짧은 영어로 대화했습니다. 숙소 위치는 니포리,우구이스다니, 이리야 역과 걸어서 10-15분 정도에 있어, 다양한 지하철을 이용할 수 있었습니다.

L'appartement d'Hisao est assez spacieux, bien équipé. Son épouse m'a préparé de bons sandwiches chaque matin. Hisao est un gentleman qui m'a conduit en voiture à la gare de Nippori le matin de mon départ. Merci !

很棒的入住體驗,,每天都有美味的早餐及有小甜點,今津夫人知道我們要去輕井澤怕我們冷，還送上暖暖包給我，非常感謝今津先生與其夫人的照顧。
離開的時候今津先生還主動開車送我們到JR日暮里車站,非常感謝!很棒的房主!

Hisao San’s place is in a quiet neighborhood and about 10-15 minuets walk from the train station. I stayed in a Japanese style room, which was very clean and big enough for a family of three. There were all the facilities you need and Hisao San’s wife prepared breakfast for me every morning, which was very nice.
I participated in a Kendo class there and it was an amazing experience. After the class I was even invited to their beer party and had a nice talk with some local people who were all very kind and helpful.
I highly recommend Hisao San’s place if you are visiting Tokyo.
La segunda vez que me quedé ahí. Una maravilla como la primera vez; Hisao siempre atento y todo de maravilla!

Really great place to stay. The host and his wife were wonderful and very helpful. The wife surprised us with homemade sandwiches for breakfast and before we checked out the Hisao offered to drive us to the subway. He also gave us souvenirs!!! How nice of him!! The amenities were all there. The aesthetics of the flat was nice as well.

This is my 3rd time staying with Mr hisao. Place is reasonably priced with good access to most areas of central tokyo.. despite checking out at 6am.. he offered to drive me to the nearest train station. This was really helpful due to the luggage and the cold weather.

Decently located in a quiet neighbourhood 10 to 15 minutes from Nippori, Uguisudani stations and Iriya metro. Stayed for three nights in late December. Heater works and that matters the most. Breakfast is provided.

Hisaos place was really great. Its located north of Ueno, about 10 minutes walk from Iriya Station (Hibiya Line) and Uguisudani Station (JR Yamanote Line). The room was clean and as described. I was even offered sandwiches and a ride to the train station.
Really great experience.

Hisao and his wife were great hosts. The children enjoyed the Kendo lesson.  All the family enjoyed the breakfast rolls provided.  The location is great and within walking distance to visit Ueno Park, the National Museum and Art Gallery and Museum of Nature and Sciences and also to visit Senso-ji Temple and Kappabashi Street for kitchenware.

The sandwiches provided were a delight and surprise. And the place felt calm, that was a nice contrast  to the busyness  of the city. Also surprising closer to the station then I expect after looking on the map.

我们全家5口人在Hisao-san 的房子里住了9天。每天早上房东都会给我们准备美味的三明治和小零食。每天早上的三明治都是变着花样来做的，有火腿，鸡肉，鱼肉搭配蔬菜，土豆鸡蛋泥。所以我家小朋友每天早上都很期待当天是什么馅的三明治。交通方便，到JR莺谷站步行10分钟，从住处步行去上野公园也不算远，步行20分钟左右。沿路会看到很多神社，顺便就走进去参观了。去浅草寺步行的话需要30分钟左右，但是方便在住处100米附近有个“都08”bus 210日元就到浅草寺门口了。

So I stayed at Sedio-kan, which was clean, quiet, and geographically in an amazing place. My flight was delayed and Hisao kept communicating with me to make sure everything was alright. When I arrived immediately as I arrived I was greeted by Hisao, and he gave me the quick run down. I speak more Japanese than I understand, and Hisao took the time to make sure everything was clear. Free WiFi. Free Breakfast Sandwiches which were so tasty!
I traveled alone and had enough space to do everything I wanted. I was a 5-10 minute walk from both Uguisandi and Nippori station which allowed me see Tokyo with ease. Whenever I needed to lay down after a long day of exploring I would just ride the train back and was able to rest with ease.
Hisao really wants to make sure your experience is delightful. He makes sure that you know it’s raining and also offers you one of his umbrellas. His hospitality knows no bounds. I hope to stay with him again in my next visit to Tokyo, because the experience was unparalleled to anything I’ve ever experienced!

It is really an enjoyable experience! The room is really big and comfortable to stay after a whole day of walking. Sandwich was made daily and small snacks were given as well. The location is near station thus going everywhere else like Tokyo, Ikebukuro, Shinjuku, Shibuya etc is really convinient! There are 7-11, family mart and Lawson nearby thus you dont need to worry that you will be hungry! Also, it is a quiet and safe neighbourhood. During check out, Hisao-san offered to drive me to the station, despite the heavy luggage I had. Thus, if you are going Tokyo, please stay here ! : D

We stayed in a traditional room for two people with futon beds, tatami mats and sliding doors. It was really good value for money and a great location for getting into the Yamanote line and seeing a lot of the main sights in Tokyo. Hisao was very hospitable, he came to meet us as our taxi arrived late at night and gave us a lift to the station after we checked out. It's a good base for getting out and about in Tokyo.

Stayed 3 nights and had a great time. We were lucky as our stay coincided with one of Hisao's "beer parties", where his fellow Kendo martial artists stay for dinner and drinks - great way to meet local and super friendly people. We also tried a kendo lesson where Hisao taught us basic moves - definitely a highlight for us as it was a real cultural immersion.
The room itself is according to pictures and other reviews. Not fancy but comfortable enough, with Wi-Fi and a good shower. Very clean and quiet (apart from kendo times 10-12 and 6-8pm).
Hisao is a great host - he was accommodating with our check in time.
Location was good for us as it's a walking distance to Ueno Park and the JR train line. Easy access from Narita airport as well.
Overall very good value and a very enjoyable experience. Thanks very much Hisao!

A great stay at Hisao place! Hisao is a very kind and nice host full of attentions. From the postcard he made on a homemade paper with a picture of us to the sandwiches his wife was preparing every morning, we really had a great moment.
The apartment is located in a quite residential area but only ten minutes walking from the yamanote which is very convenient.
It's an old house but the room was clean. If we had to name one improvement that is needed to our opinion, it would be the cleanliness of the bathroom and the toilets. Not the best of this place.
But we definitely recommend this place to stay in Tokyo! :-)

이리야 역과 걸어서 10분거리 도쿄 서브웨이 티켓을 사용하는 사람들에게 매우 적절합니다. 방은 깨끗하고 아늑하며 다다미 방이어서 일본느낌이 물씬납니다. 주변동네가 조용하고 한적해서 무척 좋았습니다. 근처에 편의점도 있어서 야식 사먹기에도 적절합니다. 호스트 분이 아침마다 샌드위치를 만들어 주셔서 아침 굶을 일도 없었네요. 도쿄에 게스트 하우스를 3번 써봤는데 그 중에 가장 좋았습니다.
Excelente lugar, el anfitrión muy amable. 100% recomendable.

좋습니다.
다음 기회에 도쿄에
다시 간다면 방문할 것입니다
큰 방 전통식 가옥 특유의
다다미 아침 샌드위치
근처 역 픽업 고맙습니다!

La casa de Hisao está situada a unos 15 minutos de la estación de Nippori, en un barrio muy tranquilo y residencial. La habitación es de tatami, amplia y con un estilo muy tradicional. Y Hisao es un anfitrión increíble. Muy atento, me explicó todo cuando llegué e incluso me acercó en coche a la estación el día que me iba. Recomendadísimo.

the place is perfect
the owner is very kind person
every thing is clean
every thing you need you will find it in your room
the place is near the metro station
also if you want to practice KENDO he is a very good trainer
hope for all to enjoy for the same moment which i find it
居家式的住宿体验，设施跟家里的差不多，感到很温暖方便，房东先生及家人好像不跟我们住在同一层，只是每天早上下来给我们送早餐，或者很晚下来看一下，只有一间房间，周围环境也很安静，去地铁站约10分钟，去周围景点很方便，赞！

Hisao sensei is an amazing host. He does his best to make sure you understand the area, the house rules, and the available amenities. He's super easy to get into contact with and is flexible with his check-in/out times. He will gladly pick you up or drop you off for your trip. You pretty much get an entire floor of the house to yourself. The only thing is, at certain times of day 830-10 am and 6 pm to.9 pm you're sharing the kitchen, bathroom, and shower with his dojo. They can be pretty energetic with their practice so if you're a light sleeper or a late waker you might have some trouble there. For someone who's interested in kendo, Hisao sensei is an amazing teacher and is very patient. He'll teach you the basics and takes the time to teach you the fine etiquettes in kendo. I highly recommend trying the kendo experience if you're staying with the sensei. Otherwise, the wifi is great, his wife makes you sandwiches in the morning, and the shower is perfect. The unit is clean and spacious. Overall a great stay for a great price.
Très bon accueil, petite pièce traditionnelle avec de la place pr les valises. Calme.
Hisao is so friendly! I love his place and its so near for the station! Thanks for the help :)

Gracias al alojamiento de Hisao tuvimos la oportunidad de sumergirnos en un ambiente netamente Japones.
De fácil acceso y a pocos minutos del tren el cual te permite llegar a todas partes en Tokio.
Al llegar en la noche despues del bullicioso Tokio se aprecia la tranquilidad del apartamento.
Gracias a tu señora por los delicioso sandwiches que nos preparaba.
Muchas gracias por todo
Tita y Riccardo

We loved staying at Hisao’s place! The room was lovely and we slept so well on the futons and tatami mats. The apartment had everything we needed and was in a quiet location but very well-connected. The handmade paper with my photo on was a very charming surprise, and it was so sweet of Hisao’s wife to make us sandwiches every day! We felt very privileged to be able to watch part of a kendo session although we didn’t participate, and Hisao even drove us to the station when we left. I couldn’t have hoped for a better first three days in Japan!

安心感がある空間です。
剣道道場に併設された
改装されたばかりのアパートの一室の方を貸していただけました。
アパートの一室で、完全なプライベートを守ることができます。
この宿泊代金で、この安心感とプライベートを確保でき、
さらに鶯谷駅から１５分程度のロケーションを考えると、
本当にオススメです。
Hisaoさんのお人柄と配慮、奥様のサンドイッチに心温まりました。
ぜひ再訪したいです。
房子在居民区里，非常有生活气。房间类似于单身公寓，不会被别人打扰，这一点非常美妙，还有小厨房可以自己做饭。房东人很好，太太还会每天早上做三明治挂在门上。在附近卖东西吃饭也非常方便，是一个适合居住的地方。

首先地点:离地铁站有十几分钟步行路程，所以晚上居住会很安静。但是实际居住地离景点，比方秋叶原和上野并不远，都可以步行过去.20到30分钟样子，这样可以顺便看看东京的居民房子造型，很不错。                                                   其次，房东先生人很nice，我们一大早就过去了，房东先生让我们先把东西寄存在住处，几乎相当于一早八点多就让我们check in了，这点很感谢，而且还送了我们一份早餐，要知道这并不算我们的正规入住时间，另外房东太太每天都会准备不同的三明治早餐加几块饼干，房东也会是先问过，有没有忌口，非常赞。                                                               再次，关于房子，房东白天会在他的工作室里工作，工作室是和要居住的房间在同一个房子里头的，但是晚上房东会离开，所以晚上整间房子，客厅浴室卧室都是房客自己使用的，白天房东即便在工作时，但是并不会打扰。而且有求必应。                                                                   提点小建议: 希望wifi速度能快些，因为有时候图片也打不开，另外房间是榻榻米，希望被子的触感会好些，可能用很久了，起球有些严重。浴室的水流不是很大，但是基本可以。                                   最后非常感谢房东最后一天早上开车送我们去车站，还送了小礼物。房东的拖鞋都断了了，好想送他一双。。。

호스트님과 간단한 영어로 소통할 수 있었고, 무엇보다 혼자 2박 하는 동안 매우 안전하다고 느꼈어요. 호스트님이 타타미방과 침대방 중 선택권을 주셔서 저는 타타미방을 선택했고요. 2층에 머무르면서 혼자 공용부억, 화장실, 욕실을 사용했어요. 방 안에 티비와 에어컨, 좌식 탁상이 있었어요. 저녁시간에 1층에서 수련하시는 분이 제가 쓰는 방 옆 여자탈의실에 잠깐 출입하셨지만, 같은 여성분이라 괜찮았고 오전 10시 이후에도 출입할 수 있다고 호스트님이 미리 알려주셨어요. 조식으로 샌드위치를 만들어준다고 하셨는데, 채식을 한다고 말씀드리니 대신 오니기리와 미소국을 준비해주셔서 참 감사했어요. 우에노공원까지 도보로 이동할 수 있어서 산책하기에 좋고, 박물관 관람하기에도 편리해요.
房东太太热情好客，每天准备早餐，还特地给孩子准备小零食。看到了房东先生的日本剑道，离开时，房东太太还特别贴心的为我们准备了小礼物，在陌生的异国他乡，倍感温暖，房东先生最后一天特地开车送我和女儿到地铁站，非常棒的入住体验。
전통가옥 멋졌습니다
房东先生人很好，每天早晨都为我们准备早餐。中间卫生间出现了一点小问题，房东先生也立刻解决了。走的时候因为航班很早，房东先生六点多就起床送我们去机场，非常感谢！
房间比我想象中好多了，房东性格很直爽，还送我去地铁站，告诉我坐哪一班车，而且每天早上还有三明治，特别好吃，在房间也很自由，总之，特别满意。

Hisao is a very kind host who showed me everything from my own refrigerator shelf to how to use the washing machine and hot water dispenser. The place is just huge, like having a whole apartment to yourself. I loved staying in the traditional tatami mat room. And, the breakfast sandwiches were incredible. I would love to go back and stay there again.

推荐～很方便，五分钟有一个711，距莺谷口12分钟，距入谷口12分钟。在居民区可以感受当地生活气息，房间很干净，麻雀虽小，五脏俱全。
房东每天早上还在门口放了老板娘自制的三明治，超级贴心。 最后退房垃圾分类花了一个多小时，有点费解，希望没有分类错误哈哈哈。
唯一不适应的是枕头，很硬很硌不舒服，可能是不习惯睡这个样子的枕头。

This little appartment was clean, close to a subway station that goes straight to Shibuya, Shinjuku,... Hisao-san kindly helped me once to call my airline. Thank you to Hisao-san's wife for the delicious sandwiches she made  every morning!
房子不错，房东人也很好。

If I could give the value category 6 stars I would as this place is a great price for location, size, and comfort in Tokyo. Solo female traveler felt very safe walking around the neighborhood any time of day or night. Guesthouse has several "apartments" with bathroom, kitchenette, desk space, large closet, sofa, TV, bed, and balcony. Compared to hotels in central Tokyo this is a palace (exaggerating but you get the point). Everything was clean and Hisao's wife made me breakfast sandwiches every morning with little snacks as well. Two train stations about 10-13 min walk, and these trains get you lots of places throughout Tokyo. It was over 90 degrees when I was there and the walk didn't bother me. Hisao also took me to train station after I checked out. I slept peacefully with no noise and air conditioning. Lots of conveniences stores and restaurants nearby. Wifi in apartment was also good. Great for 1 person, but will also work for a couple or close friends. If I find myself needing a place to stay in Tokyo, I'm heading back to Hisao's place- highly recommend.
真的比照片上要好更多呢，价格也很合适，房间在日本这种寸土寸金的地方来说真的不算小，可以打开同时放下两个26寸的箱子，地方也很干净和安静，房东人也很好，他的太太每天早上会给我们送三明治和小零食饼干，最后一天房东先生还开车送我们去车站，总体来说还是物超所值的。

Petit appartement sympa. Hisao répond vite et sa femme prépare des sandwich qu'elle dépose dans une petite boite devant la porte. C'est une petite attention très agréable.
Hisao nous a déposé en voiture à la station de métro de notre choix lors du check out, ce qui est très sympa !
Were nice place
位于JR莺谷站附近去池袋很方便哒，内部设施蛮齐，冰箱微波炉标配雨伞有，出入时间自由，赶终电回房的时候也不用担心打扰别人，房东人很好w退房后HISAO桑还给开车送车站

Hisao-san's place is near-perfect. Amazing sandwiches every morning, just about every amenity you could need, and a great location (about 10 minutes from Uguisudani and 15 from Nippori station). He even took me to the station when I checked out! A few things to note: His English is not the best, so you might have some difficulty communicating in person. However, he was very friendly and responded quickly to my messages. The water in the shower is often a bit too warm or cold. It's difficult to maintain a consistent temperature, but with a little effort you can do it. The pillow was tatami-style and a bit stiff for my liking. I nevertheless slept very well. Minimal noise from the neighbors! I would stay here again.
ホストはすごく優しくていろんな情報(空港行きの方法とか)を教えてくれました。朝にサンドイッチをサービスとしていただきまして、最高だと思います。
房東大叔挺耐心的，就是離地鐵站大概900米左右需要走
Amazing host
非常好的体验，开始找的时候被地图骗了绕了点路，后期自己走也就10几分钟，房东太太每天会放三明治，とてもおいしい，本当にありがとうございます。来东京室内玩挺适合的，性价比超高，房间非常干净❤❤❤

Room is great and has everything needed for a stay: comfortable beds, small balcony, private bathroom and fridge. Location is perfect - 10 minutes from Iriya Metro Station and close to stunning Ueno. Hisao is very nice and welcoming. His wife makes delicious sandwiches every morning. Highly recommend!
Very good apartment, also Hisao gave me a ride to the station, very kind
あらゆる面で満足です。また是非泊まりたいと思います。
Hisaoさんの部屋は電子レンジとかテレビとか揃えているすごく便利です、そして部屋の位置は鶯谷駅より10分ほどの場所でそんなに遠くない。

Muy bien comunicado por estaciones de tren y con supermercados cerca.Tambien hay cerca lugares de interés a los que puedes ir andando como asakusa o el parque ueno.El piso muy limpio y con todos los servicios.La cama es un tatami asi que si no estas acostumbrado es algo dura pero por lo demas lo recomiendo

Hisao’s place is nice, clean and very spacious for a tokyo apartment! They also made breakfast for me and sent me to the nearest station on my last day. This is my second time staying with them and if the chance arises I would stay with them again.
很好的地方，房东人很亲切，很干净的房间，推荐入住！！
很好的屋主，每一樣事都很清晰地說出來，有機會還會再住
Nice, affordable place if you're willing to walk a little ways to the train station! Hisao's wife made us sandwiches every morning which was appreciated.

Endroit très bien situé, à 10 minutes di métro Uguisudani, qui rejoint Tokyo station en passant par Ueno station.
L'endroit propose une chambre simple avec douche, toilette et petit coin cuisine.
Je recommande vivement.
N'étant pas dans le centre quartier agréable.
Petit soucis de communication abec le propriétaire, je pense que c'c'est un soucis de langues et peut être un peu rude avec les étrangers de part la difficulté d'échanger.
Sa femme fait des sandwichs le matin qui son les meilleurs que j'ai mangé.
Un grand merci à elle.

怎么说呢，我是不愿意说别人坏话的，所以先来说说优点吧：进出时间随意，房间还算大，有阳台。最好的还是hisao桑太太制作的三明治，真的很美味量很大，足够顶一顿饭。
缺点其实也不算缺点，比如住的地方离两个jr站都挺远，卫生间太小了，房间在三层搬行李很费劲。但这些都是住民宿早就应该想到的。
令我最失望和伤心的事情是，我在退房前两次和老板沟通确认是否能寄存行李，老板都同意寄存了，结果12点退房时老板突然和我们说不能寄存了，也没有评论里说的送到地铁站。我当然知道送站是老板的帮助而不是义务，但是为什么突然就不让我们寄存行李了呢？因为沟通不畅通，所以我们也没有争辩什么，拉着沉重的行李走向地铁站，还多花了储物柜的钱。我们按时退房，也没有把房间搞乱，尽力做了垃圾分类，但是约定好的事情突然不答应了，我们非常伤心。
J'ai bien aimer ce logement le propriétaire en lui-même est assez exigeant peut-être à cause de problème passé avec des locataires je pense, mais bien dans l'ensemble !
住宿地在道馆隔壁的三层楼内，房子很大~两个人住还能平摊开行李箱收拾，离银座是有点距离，但价格优惠，每日早上还有三文治早餐，真的是个不错的住宿休憩地！注意，住在这儿，垃圾要好好分类哦~办理入住时，房东会教你怎么分类的~
很东京

Très bon hébergement, conforme à mes attentes. Propre, confortable et spacieux. Situé dans un quartier calme avec tout ce qu'il faut autour de la station Uguisudani. A 20 min à pied du parc Ueno.
Les bentos sont très bons.
Le cours de Kendo avec Hisao est une super expérience.

The room is a studio room and it's super clean and spacious. Close to Nippori station (Airport trains), Yamanote line, a few stations away from Ueno, Akihabara and Ginza. The AC's heating mode is weak but the hot water is very good.
Everything was perfect!
ずっと住んでもいいかな、と思えるくらいの快適さがあるアパートです。
もう５回目の滞在です。もはや、東京滞在時のアパートと言って良いかもです。それくらい日常的な佇まいで、長期滞在をする方にはコストパフォーマンス的にも優れています。ホストの方がフランクでかつ誠実であるので、臨機応変な対応をしていただけることも助かります。
Super Unterkunft und volle Empfehlung. Zentral und ruhig, netter Host, und mit allem was man braucht in der Nähe. Ich komme gerne wieder.
毎朝いただけるサンドウィッチが嬉しいです。

I would NOT recommend this place due to the below reasons.
Finger weg - Nie Wieder.
Ce n'est pas de tout bonne idèe d'y rester.
メリット (Advantage, Vorteil)
-　サンドイッチが美味しい　Leckere hausgemachte Sandwich, Home-made sandwich was delicious, Délicieux sandwich fait-maison
-　安定した固定Wifi Fixed- Wifi Wifi-fixé WLAN mit sehr guter Verbindung
デメリット (Disadvantage, Nachteil)
- 初日にゴキブリが出た。ワンルームで出ると逃げ場がないので、気持ちが悪い。
You have to live with cockroaches. It was a nightmare.
J'ai trouvé un cafard dans la chambre. C'était ddégoûtant.
Ich habe eine Schabe im Schafzimmer gefunden, einfach fürchterlich..
- 掛けしき、布団、シーツ、無数の血や食べかすなどがついていて風呂も冷蔵庫もほ
　こりだらけ。枕は飾りのようなめちゃくちゃ硬くて小さい畳素材の枕しかない上に
　誰が寝たか分からないシーツの上に血痕や食べかすが散らばっているは、布団は固い　は快眠できなかった
- ゴミ袋、バスタオルがなくて、お風呂に入った後、ないことに気づき探し回ったところ、小さなハンドタオルが一つ布団の上に置いてあったが、めくってみたら下に食べかす等があってびっくりした。
Il n`ya pas de serviette de bains, seulement une serviette taché. Le drap de lit était trop sale avec particule d'aliment et des traces de sang un peu partout. L'oreiller était un trop petit et dur comme pierre.
Plein de poussière au frigo et dans la salle de bains.
Kein Badetuch verfügbar, nur ein ein schmutziges Handtuch. Das Kopfkissen war zu klein und hart wie Stein. Es sind Blutspuren und Lebensmittelteilchen überall auf das Bettlaken, die Decke und die Matratze waren.
- 掃除機がない No vacuum cleaner, Kein Staubsauger, il n'y pas d'aspirateur
- フライパン等を含め調理器具は皆無。小さなお湯を沸かす鍋のみ
No cooking utensil, il n'ya pas d'utensile de cuisine, Kochgerät nicht verfügbar
- カーテンが薄すぎて、西日や西日がカバーできない
Cartain was too shin and too shiny in the early morning, Der Vorhang war viel zu dünn für das Schalfzimmer. Le rideau a été un peu trop fin pour la chambre.
- ゴミ袋がない
一週間の滞在中に買い足したもの
枕
シーツ
タオル
For the above reasons , I had to additionally buy a pillow, bed sheet and bath towel.
J'ai du acheter de l'oreiller, des serviette de bains et un drap de lit.
Ich musste daher un Kopfkissen, Badetücher, Bettlaken noch kaufen.
上記の理由から普段の民泊やホテル滞在ではない想定外の出費があったため結果的に高くついた。不潔でも気にせず滞在できる人にしかお勧めできない。一方、好ポイントは安定した固定Wifiと美味しいサンドイッチ
If you expect a typical tidy clean Japanese room, you would get definately DISAPPOINTED.
Si vous pensez à rester un apartment propre, bien rangé, vous serez bien déçu !

勝手な予定変更でもご親切な対応やゲストに対して安心出来る確認を負いながらやって下さるなど、とてもありがたいでした。
朝サンドイッチも美味しいです。

The Seidoukan is a fantastic value stay. A/C, Wifi, private bathroom, etc. are all great, and I found myself looking forward to the fantastic breakfast sandwiches every morning. Location-wise, Uguisudani station is a slightly longer ride on the Yamanote line from popular spots such as Shibuya, but is close to Ueno which is still very nice and convenient! While a 10-15 minute walk from the station is considered on the longer side for Japan, I found it to be very manageable without heavy baggage. Additionally, the streets felt quite safe (coming from an American), and I would definitely stay here again. Thank you!

ホストの方はとても親切で、毎朝サンドイッチを差し入れしてくださり、アメニティの追加などの要望にも素早く応えていただけました。
ベッドはやや硬いと感じましたが、部屋は総じて清潔で掃除機もあり、快適に過ごすことができました。
洗濯は1階の洗濯機で200円で行うことができ、すぐ近くのコインランドリーで300円30分で乾燥できます。
手持ち鍋や食器類は一通り揃っており自炊も可能ですが、フライパンや冷凍庫がないので自炊の幅は限られるかもしれません。(3週間の滞在で結局自炊は行いませんでした)
日中どこかに出かける前提であれば、十分快適に過ごすことができる宿だと感じました。

長い滞在でしたが、心地よく過ごすことができました。
朝食のサンドイッチもとてもおいしかったです！
ありがとうございました♪
また、東京に行く際は是非利用したいです＾＾
毎日サンドイッチが食べられてとてもよかった

大変お世話になりました。チェックインも柔軟に対応していただき助かりました。また、毎朝のサンドイッチがおいしかったです。とても親切な大家さんでした。
鶯谷駅から行くときは、荷物が多い場合、南口しかエレベーターが無いため注意が必要です。タクシー乗り場は駅の目の前にあるので便利です。
어느역이든 10분 정도 걸으면 나오는 숙소입니다!
良い滞在になりました！

This was a decent place. A bit of a walk to the nearest station, but not a dealbreaker. It’s a quiet location at night. You get a small apartment unit to yourself. The people in surrounding units were quiet and respectful. The bed was quite stiff though. Fixed that by laying on the normal comforter as extra cushion, and covering up with a extra blanket in the closet. Pillow also made of bamboo. Used a fleece jacket as a pillow instead. But the price was more than acceptable, and you can come and go as you please. I’d consider staying here again. Hisao is very respectful, and every morning his wife made these amazing sandwiches for me. This is a good option if you’re trying to stay in Tokyo on a small budget.

Great value for long stay. It’s a fairly standard “one room” with unit bath, but it’s close to multiple good stations and a bunch of nice local restaurants. Bring or buy a pillow though: the included ones are too small if you’re a side sleeper.
Very nice gentleman, extremely friendly. I recommend the location.

A lovely accomodation in a peaceful area. The flat was very clean and handy. The host was flexible (I arrived a bit late due to the airport security) and gave me advices about transport and laundry.
The hosts also provided me with a delicious sandwich and the thought was much appreciated! Thank you!
I definitely recommend.
Anais
Great place, conveniently located between two stations, Nippori and Uguisudani.

The location is very good, you can access any area of Tokyo using the Yanonote line, less than 10 minutes walk, the Hibiya line is less than 10 minutes walk. The place is perfect for long stays for one person. You have everything you need and the host gives you sandwiches every day made by his wife, which are incredible, thank you very much. I highly recommend it.

Hisao’s place is indeed one of the best way to stay in Tokyo, good priced and clean. Hisao himself was super responsive and fast to communicate. The nearest JR station is Uguisudani at just 8min walk. His wife makes great sandwiches which Hisao leave to your door every morning,  and just this particular is worth the stay! Definitely will stay again.
Highly recommended for solo travellers.

This is a good bnb residence, only shortcoming is little bit far from subway station,but ok for us.
owner's breakfast sandwich is quite enough for morning energy.
supermarkets and conv.stores are in walking distance, also restaurants.
good option for budget long stay travellers, will visit again next time.
Amazing value for what you pay for, the egg sandwiches are really really delish and many convenience stores nearby

W niewielkiej odległości od kwatery znajduje się sklep, w okolicy jest również przystanek kolejowy i wiele restauracji. Do dzielnic takich jak Shibuya i Shinjuku itp. trzeba dojeżdżać, ale na Asakuse, Akihabare czy Tokio Skytree można dojść spokojnie na piechotę.
Pokoje miały wszystko czego potrzeba.
Clean, walking distance to train and Ueno Park, and a very nice host who prepared a nice breakfast sandwich.  Recommended!

깔끔하고 침구에서 좋은 냄새가 납니다.
호스트분은 너무 친절하시고 저의 무거운 캐리어를 3층까지 옮겨주셨습니다. ㅠㅠ
쓰레기 버리는법 등등 설명해주시고
숙소 위치도 아사쿠사 걸어서 25분
우에노 20분 닛포리 20분 정도면 갈수있습니다.
그리고 아침마다 만들어주시는 샌드위치가 너무 맛있어요 맨날 속재료가 조금씩 바뀌어서 질리지도않음… 최고 !!!!!

nice host
5-10mins to station
quiet street
Great place! lots of restaurants nearby and near the station :)
Bel endroit propre et bien situé pour découvrir la ville
The owner is really kind. He provides breakfast everyday and it is really tasty.
Always a pleasure staying at hisao’s place
This place is for budget travelers. The room is a bit of a walk from the station. It can be a positive if you like living in a quiet neighborhood. The owners do give a light breakfast in the morning.
Great place and a quick walk to the train station. Really appreciated the sandwich and snack in the morning

이번이 두번째 묵는건데
숙소위치가 JR과 메트로 사이에 있어서 여행동안에 이동하기가 아주 편하고 가까운 거리에 편의점들도 있습니다
그리고 아침마다 챙겨주시는 샌드위치도 엄청 맛있어요!
The location worked great for us, the room was clean, and the host was wonderful!

Очень понравился район - было полное погружение: город просыпается, родители провожают детей в садик. Много маленьких семейных едален с безумно вкусной едой.
Сама квартира тоже аутентична. Максимально эффективно использован каждый метр. Есть все необходимое. При желании можно готовить. Есть кондиционер, фен.
Из минусов:
Плохая звукоизоляция, слышно соседей. И (хоть мне и было не актуально) - было ощущение не очень чистой кухни.
P.s. признаков кэндо не обнаружила. Если кому важно.

Malgré la barrière de la langue, tout s'est bien déroulé.
La chambre est parfaite pour une personne.
Le petit déjeuner inclut est très bienvenu.
Great place!

Très bon qualité prix.
De plus l’hôte est très réactif. Ce dernier a même proposé de me déposer à la gare la plus proche.
En 1 mois, j’ai séjourné deux fois et les deux fois étaient géniales.
Je reviendrai à l’avenir.

Hisao is very strict about his check in policy. Based on other reviews, he was more lenient to others, of Caucasian backgrounds. I don’t understand why he requested us to check in the next day when we were only going to be 5 minutes late (due to our flight). Needless to say, we had to scramble for a last minute accommodation and felt unwelcome and flustered on our first day in Japan. Hisao told us breakfast would be provided in the foam box outside our room everyday at 8am, but for our 4 night stay, in which we only stayed for 3 (no refund for the first night), breakfast sandwiches were received on only 1 day, so don’t count on it. Upon checkout, I found out a Caucasian guest received breakfast, but we didn’t. I thought it was strange and wonder if the inconsistency towards treatment of guests was based on race. On a side note, the water temperature was hard to control and the AC made rattling noises. I will find another place to stay the next time I visit Japan.
Very good place to stay.
It was amazing
Great!
Other than it’s 12 minutes away from the closest station, it is good for the price

This is my second stay at Hisao’s place. Same as before, Hisao-san is a very friendly host, and provided me delicious sandwich every morning. Speaking about the location, the place is great for those who want to visit Tokyo. It take about 10 minutes from his place to the train station. Most importantly, the price is extremely affordable for budget traveller. Thank you Hisao-san!

在東京這樣的價格是CP值很高的房間，這房間很有體驗日本人居住的感覺，雖然沒有電梯但我很喜歡。房東先生很幫忙配合入住時間Check in ，退房是大清早還願意幫忙載我去車站。非常感謝。房間簡約但該有的都有，微波爐、簡單的開伙設施、浴室水很大很熱但大小一如既往就是偏小。隔音稍稍差一點，隔壁聊天的話會聽得到。床架會稍微沒這麼結實，但我自己是睡得還可以。早上還有房東太太的早餐，可選擇要跟不要，但如果會很早出門的話會拿不到的早餐要記得跟房東取消。
オーナー様のお人柄が最高です！朝食のサンドイッチご馳走様でした！また伺いたいです！
旅居主人太太的三文治實在太美味了，還附有小食。房間很大，性價比很高，房東親切有禮，指示清晰，如再到訪東京會再選擇此旅居。
今の都心でこの料金はとてもありがたいです。しかもまさかの奥様手作りのサンドイッチまでいただいてしまい、下町の人情味を感じて幸せな滞在してでした。高級ホテルでは味わえない感動です。プライバシーもしっかり守られて快適な滞在でした。旅慣れた人におすすめします。朝は鳥の声で目覚めました…  カラスでしたが（笑）

The sandwiches were awesome. It was nice having different varieties throughout my stay, never the same sandwich.
Also, the place was really good. Next to a major area and well connected train line.

Thank you Hisao San. I enjoyed my stay at your place very much. It’s great for solo traveler. A few-minute walk from station. Thank you and your wife for the breakfast as well.  I will visit again next time when I come to Tokyo. : ) Cheers.

Nice place to stay.
I slept very well, I like the place.
Price is affordable 👌

La habitación tiene un precio justo, es un precio accesible. La habitación es pequeña, varios de los muebles necesitan remodelación. La comunicación con el anfitrión es buena, responde con rapidez los mensajes.
La habitación es excelente si tu idea es pasar todo el día fuera y llegar a descansar al lugar.
Los sándwiches de la anfitriona son riquísimos.
Thank you. Enjoyed my stay as always.

이리야,우구이스다니역에서 걸어서 약 10분정도 걸립니다.
처음엔 멀어보여도 적응되면 그렇게 멀지 않습니다.
방크기도 두명정도면 크게 문제 없을 듯합니다.
가성비가 좋아서 추천합니다
Thank you for the stay and hospitality
色々と迷惑かけましたのにいつもご丁寧に対応してくれた
Mr. Hisao was a very nice gentleman, his place was very clean and comfortable. His wife makes you breakfast and they ensure you have a good rest after having a busy day in Tokyo.

Really good place! We really enjoyed our stay at Hisao's place, and the breakfast that was provided. There were sandwiches for both of us, as well as crackers and chocolate. We felt like little children with packed lunch for the whole duration we were there. The house's location is a little further away from all the station so it was a bit tiring to walk, but nonetheless was a good deal as it was on relatively flat grounds that was easy for us to lug our luggage around. There were onsens & coin laundry around the area, along with great restaurants which we ate at and really enjoyed.
Would totally come back just so I can enjoy the breakfast provided! Thank you so much Hisao :)
Un lugar muy cómodo en un vecindaro bastante tranquilo. Hisao fue muy amable y su esposa dejo sándwiches muy buenos.
性价比非常高的住处，房东每天早上提供的三明治很好吃，感谢这段时间的照顾，谢谢
Excellent place to stay, worth the price
overall i think this place is worth the money, i just need one night layover place before my next flight to chicago and the place offer a good rest, convenience and all the needs!
I recommend this place for all
séjour parfait, hôte agréable et réactif je recommande

Very happy with my stay.
I stayed alone here but the hosts leave me 2 homemade sandwiches and sweets daily. I was very nice of them.
The apartment is clean and minimalist in style. It’s way bigger and more spacious than I thought.
Room has big closet where I stored my big luggage and hanged my clothes. There’s also a balcony where one can dry their laundry. (Coin washing machine at the first floor is wash & spin only, no dryer). There is also a cloakroom beside the main door.
Own tv, wifi, kitchen, cooking & dining utensils, fridge, electric stove all provided.
Aside from the main bed, there is also a sofa bed in the room.
Bathroom is also clean, toiletries and towel were provided.
There is a bus stop about 4mins walk away. Train station is a 15-minute walk.
Neighborhood is quiet as it is a residential area.
No elevator though, you need to carry luggage going up/down.
Strict check in time, they don’t accept after 11pm, i had to stay somewhere else the first night.

도쿄 시내에서 이 가격에 이 정도 서비스를 제공하는 것은 없을 거라 생각됩니다.
건물은 생각보다 오래됐지만, 안에는 곰팡이 핀 곳 없이 깔끔했습니다.
침구 역시 깨끗했고, 화장실 역시 그러했습니다.
매일 아침마다 주시는 샌드위치와 작은 초콜릿 덕에 식비를 아낄 수 있어서 좋았고, 샌드위치도 다 같은 샌드위치가 아니어서 좋았습니다.
전자렌지도 방에 있었고, 냉장고는 왠만한 호텔 냉장고 보다는 냉장기능이 잘되어 있어서 좋았습니다.
다만, 위에서 언급했던 바와 같이 오래된 건물이기에 감안하지 못하겠다면, 숙박하지 않는 걸 권장드립니다.
7년전에 도쿄에 처음 방문했을 때와 변함없이 친절했고, 아늑했습니다.
또 방문할 생각입니다. 감사했습니다!
喜欢这个地方，没有市中心的吵闹，富有生活气息的区域，虽然安静，但不会偏远，距离各个著名景点坐几站电车就到了，上野公园和东京大学都可以走路到达。房东妻子每天早晨会在门前送提前做好的三明治，很好吃，谢谢你们😭屋内设施也很齐全，微波炉帮助了我很多，下次来东京玩我还会选择这里的🥹
Mr. Hisao is very proactive in responding to questions and reaching out to me when the day that I arrived in Tokyo.
Hisao san was a good host and very responsive. His wife made sandwich each morning and it was very nice :))

Super place to stay with a Super Host!
Host Hisao went beyond the call of duty to accommodate me.
Also- the reviews about the breakfast sandwich are true. Amazingly delicious!!!
Thank you so kindly Host Hisao.
Thank you again for having me and for the sandwiches 🥪😋
Le logement était très bien et très propre. Idéal pour étudiant en transit.
Logement très bien situé dans un quartier proche d'endroits réputés. Secteur  très calme. Petits sandwichs bien agréables offerts tous les matins.
いろいろ便宜を図っていただき、どうもありがとうございました。是非また泊まらせていただきます。
Great place for great price. Kind of far from the station ~10-15 mins but for the price you pay it’s worth it. Place was as described. Hisao’s wife also made sandwiches which were very delicious.
丁寧にご対応頂きありがとうございました。
You definitively get what you pay for here, its a clean room, kitchen and bathroom. The airconditioning helped a lot on hot days. And you get sandwiches every morning, which is extremely toughtful!
コストパフォーマンスが超高い
Great value for a great price. Great and clean place in a quiet neighbourhood in a walking distance from Ueono Park. Sandwiches for breakfast were amazing!

- It is a bit far away from the station but there's a lot of convenience stores, a Donki, and Sukiya + Matsuya while walking to the place making it easy to buy things I need.
- My room had 2 umbrellas that I borrowed since it was drizzling when I went
- There is a bathtub in the restroom. Although it was small, it was still usable. The hot water also worked perfectly.
- The bed and beddings were soft but I did not like the pillow provided since it eas full of beads, so I did not use it.
- There is also a balcony to dry your clothes.
- There is also extra bedding.
- No potable / drinkable water was provided.
Overall, I would highly recommend this place. It is worth your money for what it is.
Great place to stay, very close to Uguisudani station

Overall recommend base on value. It’s a great stay if you are looking for a place to sleep and shower. Very quiet even though the units are rented out- which was awesome after a long day of sightseeing. Also, Hisao’s wife makes the most delicious DELUXE egg sandos for breakfast. I waited every morning to hear her very quietly leave one in my box along with a snack.
recomendo muito bom

Unfortunately, my stay in Tokyo was a layover of 15 hour layover I had.
I was able to book Hisao’s place and he was very flexible with my check-in as I was arriving very early. The host was incredible. He was always responsive. Had no issues there. His place was nice and cozy very private very relaxing. This is an incredible place to book if you’re ever in Japan and need some thing simple yet cozy.
The neighborhood was friendly, very wonderful helpful people there’s tons of 7-Elevens walkable restaurants so many things to do. I can’t wait to go back and when I do, I am booking again with Hisao.

Hisao's place is value for money, close to places such as Asakusa, JR lines to both Uguisudani and Nippori stations, and also for shopping, with at least 3 convenience stores and the LIFE supermarket. Hisao's kind wife provides us with yummy sandwiches every morning.
房东非常慈祥的老人，每天送给我们早餐，三明治每天不一样，非常好吃，这次住8天，周边环境安静，非常感谢房东。
房间麻雀虽小但五脏俱全，住起来非常舒适。周围是居民区，非常适合步行，离车站也只有10分钟的步行距离。房东人很好，三明治也非常好吃，我们都赞不绝口。感谢hisaoさん让我们在东京度过了愉快的时光！

가격적으로 아주 메리트가 있습니다.
위치도 역에서 14분내외라 여행 접근성이 좋습니다.

Hisao’s place was perfect for what I needed: budget-friendly and a place to rest my head after a long day of travel. The place was exactly as described. Hisao graciously showed me around the apartment and carried my luggage up the stairs. Highly recommend this place if you’re on a budget!
很安靜, 房東主動回覆訊息
地理位置非常优越，地铁步行需要10分钟但路很好找且路途平坦。房子坐落于居民区，周围很静谧，有很多平价餐厅以及数家便利店供选择。房东很亲切友善，主动询问是否需要三明治并提供了很多帮助。综合来说性价比很高，麻雀虽小五脏俱全，下次有背包客旅行安排还会选择入住。
睡的很舒服
저렴한 가격에 웬만한 비즈호 보다 방이 커요. 역에서 거리는 1 5분 정도. 주변에 마트도 있고 호스트께서 아침으로 직접 만드신 샌드위치를 제공해주시는데 맛있어요!

The apartment is amazing. Well worth the money. The location is great too and there are supermarkets around the area and not far from the station. I would love to go back there again in the future. Also his wife makes very tasty sandwiches. I love it
Great location and great sandwiches 🥪 for breakfast! Thank you Mr Hasao

Best place in Tokyo
kind Host and he offer you sandwiches 🥪 in the morning which were delicious
And location is perfect
You have your private apartment
I highly recommend it
Ease of access to many tourist attractions.

Wer gerne etwas Geld spart und wenig Ansprüche hat, ist hier genau richtig.
Das Bad und der Fußboden sind schon recht alt und die Klimaanlage macht regelmäßig laute Geräusche, aber ansonsten wohnt es sich dort sehr gut und sehr privat. Und sie Sandwiches, die wir jeden Tag bekommen haben, waren wirklich etwas ganz besonderen!

It’s a walkable distance about 10-15 mins walk.
Room is clean and comfortable. Host is friendly and helpful. Thank you so much Hisao San, will come back soon
非常棒
我想提醒大家，如果你的入住时间超过23:00，房东是拒绝接待的。虽然我在出发前已经和他确认，可能会出现延误，他当时回答模凌两可。结果晚上我在成田机场买了最近的票，告知他将在22:40左右到达日暮里时，他却让我睡机场，拒绝接待我。截图如下，请大家不要贪图便宜谨慎选择该房源。

Hisao’s place is located within an easy walking distance from the train station and restaurants. Super easy to get around the city from nippori station. Fresh home made sandwiches in the morning was a great little extra. I would definitely stay again.
ありがとうございます!
非常好的地方，来东京一定会再次入住

It's a nice quiet spot a bit far from train stations ~15 minutes but If you like to walk it really isn't that bad. The host is really kind and really flexible on check-in time (I checked in 4 hours early). His wife also makes delicious sandwiches for the guests in the morning! Overall great experience even tho I only stayed for 1 night.
Hisao-san is a friendly host and provided a good room for a great price. I was also quite grateful for the daily sandwiches!

It was great! Location is minutes away from lots of train station. Fast wifi as well. We love the sandwiches, it was delicious and filling. He even gave us a keychain as a souvenir.
Thanks so much, Mr. Hisao. We hope to see you again.

내집같은 편안함 혼자왔거나 일주일정도 묵을 예정이면 좋은 것 같아요
다음에 또 이용할게요 ~!

Angesichts des niedrigen Preises bestes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis, das man in Tokyo wahrscheinlich bekommen kann, und dann darf man sich nicht über ein bisschen mangelnde Sauberkeit oder Kommunikation beklagen. Jeden Morgen gab es ein Sandwich umsonst mit einer kleinen Süßigkeit und beim Check-Out, wobei der Gastgeber genauso kurz angebunden war wie beim Check-In, hat er mir noch einen Fuji-Schlüsselanhänger in die Hand gedrückt. :) Tokyo ist von dort super zu erreichen, da man zwei verschiedene Bahn-Haltestellen, die einen quasi nach ganz Tokyo bringen, in etwa 15 Minuten zu Fuß erreicht
음... 우선 가격이 정말 저렴해서 정말 좋은 숙소라고 생각해요 다만 저렴한 가격과 맞먹게 욕조라던지 정말 작습니다! 하지만 호스트 분이 너무너무 친절하셔서 정말 좋아요... 저희는 수건을 하나만 주셨어서 하나로 2박 일을 버티느라 그게 너무 힘들었어요ㅠ
Great place! Hi Sao was very kind and patient! Thank you so much :)

Excelente ubicación, todo tal cual las fotos.
El señor Hisao fue muy amable y flexible con el check in, incluso nos ayudó con las maletas.
Su esposa nos preparó sanguches deliciosos cada mañana.
Muchas gracias por todo y hasta la próxima!
Everything ok!

Had a great stay during my time in Tokyo. Great location with a big and clean room for a great price. Also got sandwiches in the mornings, which I appreciated very much! Would stay here again next time I visit
great place. the sandwiches every morning were amazing.

7박8일중 6박을 머물렀습니다.
맞았다면 7박까지 머물렀지 싶습니다.
가격 생각하면 최고의 숙소...
잠만 자실 분들은 베스트 초이스.

We needed to stay for just 1 night in Tokyo and Hisao-san's place was perfect! Our host made sure to welcome us and the room was very cosy and clean. Hisao-san's wife provided us with such a delicious and nutritious breakfast :) We will hopefully stay for a longer period in the future!

いつもありがとうございます！
またよろしくお願いします！

This was my second time staying at Hisao-san's place. The first time was five years ago.
Hisao-san was a great host, just as I remembered. His wife's sandwiches every morning are still delicious and such a great deal for the price.
The only downside is that the place is showing its age, and some amenities lack proper maintenance. The AC in my room was dusty and noisy. I couldn't sleep without earplugs, Fortunately i had them, so I didn't ask him to change the room or fix the AC.
But this place is still worth the price. You get your own private room and free sandwiches for a cheaper price than some hostel bunk beds. The quiet and safe neighborhood makes you feel like you're living like a local. Hisao-san is a nice and responsive host. I recommend this place if you're on a tight budget.

快適に過ごすことができました。
洗濯用洗剤おいて貰えて滞在中助かりました。
My time here was excellent. I truly recommend it! arigatō gozaimasu.

Hisao is a very discret and respectfull guy , the place was near from JR Line to all the place and also the sandwich that he give everymorning was delicious ! Will come back in this place for sûr if i had the occasion
房东很好

Hisao is very kind, the appartment is located just 10 minutes from the Uguisudani station so it is very convenient ! You also get a sandwich every morning ! It is a really good place if you want your own space and well worth the (low) price !

Absolutely wonderful, not just the place but the hosts as well!
The place is bigger than what most of the hotels offer and yes those sandwiches are lovely. Thank you Hisao and Naomi 🙏🏽
