chaque matin un sandwiche maison nous attend et est très apprécié ! un belle endroit bien entretenue et a 10 minute de deux station de train . ce marche très bien vers d’autre beua secteur . bref un endroit pratique et propre avec un hote gentil et serviable. et a très bon prix !
Amazing value, great location a short walk from two stations, and a very friendly host. The breakfast sandwiches were great.
とってもいい住まいですよ！おすすめです！

For the price this can't really be beat. Like the listing says is about a 10-15 minute walk to the train stations. There is a also a bus stop right around the corner that will take you to Nippori station for 210 yen if you don't feel like walking.
The area was peaceful and quiet. Convenience stores were also close by. The host also provided sandwiches in the morning which was very nice.
The washing machine is only 200 yen to use and there is a clotheslines out on the balcony to dry your clothes after.
The bed is actually a futon. I'm a little over 200 pounds so it was a bit uncomfortable, might be okay for lighter people. I'm sure I could have asked for another layer of cushions or something but I didn't want to be a bother.
This is a very budget friendly option if you want to save some money and not break the bank to explore Japan.

The room had two beds, a small kitchen sink, and a tiny bathroom. It was a good value for the price.
The beds were very hard, especially for people used to sleeping on soft mattresses, like we are. And the pillows were inadequate. Luckily I had my own pillow.
Hisao tried to keep in touch through email. We were slow to respond sometimes because we were traveling. He offered us breakfast at 8:00 am, and we decided to leave early, so we emailed that we wouldn't need breakfast. Unfortunately, the message didn't get communicated, and he made breakfast for us anyway.
If you don't mind a hard bed and a small space, you will enjoy your stay. It really was a great price.
Great place. affordable. recommend to others.

很抱歉因為在旅途過程中沒有一直使用airbnb的訊息，所以經常錯過訊息，沒有即時回覆可能造成困擾。
房東太太的三明治真的非常好吃！！！足以賣台幣150元的程度，每天早晨我們都非常滿足。
雖然浴室空間很小，但房間簡單舒適，離上野僅有一站，是一個適合旅人短宿的空間：）
很好的民宿，交通便利。
comfortable and convenient
Great place to stay in a quiet location. Easy access to the train stations. I would recommend this place

Great value for the price, and the place has everything you need! The sandwiches were such a sweet and delicious touch – really appreciated it. There was a bit of confusion around the check-in/check-out times due to the language barrier, but the host was very responsive and did their best to help. I felt totally safe walking around at night, even on my own. Highly recommend!
가격 대비 좋은 위치에 숙소 역까지 10~15분 아침마다 제공되는 샌드위치도 너무 좋습니다 추천드려요
good apato
This is my third stay here, and it’s still just as convenient and comfortable. The host is as friendly as ever.

Een praktisch gelegen appartement. ideaal als uitvalsbasis als je de regio Tokio wil verkennen.
Netjes schoongehouden en voor een zeer redelijke prijs.
Hisao reageert altijd snel.
房东很好呢，也有美味的早餐
가성비 갑.. 다음에 도쿄 오래 있다 올 일 생기면 또 들르고 싶어요!
舒適安靜的好地方，值得再次造訪

this was my second time staying at this stay! very good deal for the area, with all the essentials and air conditioning. you definitely get what you pay for, and i personally think it’s very worth it.
CP值高，簡單便宜，附近生活機能也方便!

logement très fonctionnel avec petite cuisine. très lumineux car grande fenêtre. petit balcon. bien localisé car à proximité de plusieurs stations de train et métro. quartier très calme. 2 machines à laver à disposition pour 200 yens. propriétaire gentil et réactif mais un peu brute a notre arrivée. je recommande ce logement. bon rapport qualité prix.
いい場所
安い料金にもかかわらず、一日が終わった後、リラックスできる良い宿でした^_^
Very nice place to stay! I would come back again:)

Logement très bien situé, avec tout ce qu'il faut dedans pour profiter en toute sérénité. La rapport qualité-prix est indéniable.
Le quartier est très bien, non loin de Yanaka et très calme.
Je recommande !

La estancia fue excelente. El alojamiento estaba impecable, limpio y cuidado, tal como se mostraba en las fotos. La ubicación resultó perfecta, con todo lo necesario cerca. Hisao san fue atento y respondió rápido a cualquier consulta, lo que hizo todo fácil. Sin duda recomendaría este lugar.

This was my second time staying at Hisao’s place (though in a different room) and it was even better than the first!
Uguisudani is a busy area, but Hisao’s street is super quiet and calm. The apartment itself is more than comfortable enough for a long-term stay and is exactly as described (basic but perfectly sufficient). Hisao is a very responsive host and I was really touched by the generosity of his wife who left sandwiches every morning.
This is exactly the type of place I look for when in Japan and I really hope to stay again next time I’m in Tokyo! It’s probably the best value you can find in the city. Cannot recommend enough!
Hisao is a great host! He is really proactive to make sure the check in is smooth. Daily sandwich is a great cherry on top! 💯 recommend!

Ken's place is really fantastic."Thank you" is not enough to express my feelings for ken.Ken,i want to tell you that perhaps it's all meant to be for us to meet each other.U r really a very nice guy,we have everything we need at your tidy and coCharlesouse and we really enjoy staying at your place for every minute. At first, i just booked for 8days,but when i found your place and you are both so nice, i prolonged the staying. Then i booked for another 4 days.But u know what, me and my friend want to stay even longer if the latter days were still available for booking, so actually it's a pity for us,we should have booked earlier before it was booked by other guys. However, whenever me and my friends who will come to japan next time,we will absolutely choose your place to stay!
Ken,thank u very much for all the helps we got from u,and thank u so much for introducing your families to us,you guys are all very nice people.Hope one day you can go to our place and we will try to make you feel at home.
All the best!
Charles

Hi ken,sorry for the late comments. This is the second time for us to book your cozy place.
As we said before, your place is really very nice,we really loved staying at your cozy place.What's more matters is that you guys(you and your families) are very nice people,you are so kind and have helped us a lot,especially when you drove all the way to help us with so many luggages to yokohama,that means a lot to us,and we will always bear in mind to take you as a very good friend of us...When we come to japan next time, we will absolutely contact you and go to live at your lovely place again. And when you come to our place one day,we will show our warm welcome to you. Keep in touch,friend,and may you and your families all the best.
Charles and Allen

Ken's apartment was extremely nice and clean. It had more than enough amenities for us.

The location is also extremely convenient, making it easy for us to go to Enoshima, Tokyo, and Yokohama during our short stay (with minimal train transfers).

The bikes were a wonderful addition, making it easy for us to bike to the train station, restaurants, and the market; honestly one of the best ways to explore Tokyo.

We would stay here again!

-Le logement est identique ,a ceux qui a été décrit sur le site internet.
-Le logement est vraiment bien équipé,on ne manque de rien.
-Le logement est situé dans une zone résidentiel,très au calme,non loin delà se trouve des supermarché et des restaurant.

I really enjoyed staying at Ken's.  He makes an extra effort to make you feel comfortable.  The one bedroom + kitchen seemed like a luxury so close to Tokyo.  There were no tatami which is good because tatami can get very dusty and have a peculiar smell.  The neighborhood was suburban with winding creeks/rivers crisscrossing under the streets so I was able to go for nice long bike rides, you can even bike to Yokohama if you're feeling ambitious.  To the nearest station (Tsurukawa) it's about a 10 minute bikeride.  Then to Tokyo it's about 45 minutes if you catch the right train/transfers.  I loved this place, Ken's a great guy.

Ken is very nice and provide all info around his area. Wifi is in good speed.
Nice cafe nearby.

Dear Ken-san, thank you for hosting us for a month. We enjoyed staying your place and missing it already.

His place is very clean, furnitured nicely, and since one of my purpose of visit was cooking (I am a Japanese living Overseas), I appreciated the high-quality appliances.

As he writes, his parents are keeping really nice place -nature friendly with sound of natural water - just nearby the room. You don't have to travel far to see the traditional Japanese atomosphere if you stay his place :)

Thank you again Ken-san, we want to say at your place next time. See you again!

一時帰国でおじゃましました。また行きたいと思っています。

Emi

Japan is our honeymoon destination. We enjoyed our stay over at Ken's apartment. The apartment is equiped with all basic needs. We were fortunate to undersatnd and be part of the community. The apartment location is convienent as there are plenty of commodities nearby like the supermarket,eateries and uniqlo. The surroundings is peaceful and quiet. We truly recommend this apartment if you want to step away from the hustle and bustle of citylife. Thumbs up Ken!!

We stayed at Ken's house for 4 nights in Feb 2015.

His place is clean and perfectly fit for my trip. We felt like home. Everything is provided as mentioned.

His place locates between tokyo and Yokohama, approximately 30 minutes from shinkuku station and 10-15 minutes walk to Tsuragawa station.

We met Ken's parents on check out day. They are so lovely and showed us their typical Japaneses home which was very interested


We would like to thank you Ken for hosting us, thank you for picked up and drop us off and thank you for special gift for our good memory. We would be here again if we have chance to visit tokyo in future.

Would highly recommend everyone who wants to stay like local but still easy transport to towns.

It was a very nice experience staying in Ken's apartment. Clean and cozy, you have everything you need. Ken will help you find out everything when you need. And in the neighbors, there is a beautiful old Japanese style house that you can also enjoy beautiful flowers and trees over the seasons. I will fully recomend this place for long and short stayings. Thank you:)
不便もなく、とても良い滞在でした。ありがとうございます。

I had a very good time staying at Ken's place. It was comfortable and had all the necessities for my stay in Tokyo. Ken himself was an exemplary Airbnb host. When I had some questions on where I could buy some items he promptly responded with spot on suggestions. I would not hesitate to stay at Ken's place on my next trip to Tokyo.

Ken's apartment was the closest thing to a home for our stay in Tokyo. The apartment is new, spotlessly clean and its location was superb for our purpose, which was to move around Tokyo, experience the supermarket offerings, eat Ramen (noodles) and to go to some public hotsprings. There were indeed many good eating joints in the vicinity, all within walking distance from the Tsurukawa Station.
His apartment had one bedroom and a separate eat - in well equipped kitchen. There was a table for seating two comfortably in the kitchen. This was great as it meant as an early riser, I could use my laptop on the dining table while my husband could continue using the other room (which incidentally also contains a writing table).
The bedroom allows plenty of light and had sliding doors and a flyscreen, great for letting in fresh air. Laundry dries quickly too. The air conditioning runs well and with no noise at all.
Ken is a thoughtful and responsive host. We appreciate his initiative to check whether we had used up the mobile Wifi data that he had provided. This was a surprise as we didn't expect to have used it up after 5 days of our stay.
We appreciate Ken's thoughtfulness in getting the data replenished that very day even though he was rushing off to a family trip that weekend. We really needed data as we had lots to research via the Internet for our trip.
In all, we highly recommend Ken and his apartment and endorse all the positive reviews made by other guests here.

Ken is a really nice guy. He waited for my arrival for an hour to welcome me and drive to the house.
The house itself is so nice and homy. Ken also very helpful, he explained how to use facilities very clear. Ken is generous person, he brought a bicycle for my friend and I the day after since firstly we has only 1 bicycle. The neighborhood is really quiet and peaceful since it is residential area. There are many shops and convenience stores close to the house.
It might take too long walking distance to train station, but the walk path is really safe even late at night.
Overall, Ken's house is really good if you stay 2 person (3 person is top crowed), very clean and convenience.

We had a great time staying at Ken's apartment. It's a short walk from the Tsurukawa station which had plenty of dining options. Ken was an awesome host - he even provided us with a list of famous ramen places to try. Thanks for everything Ken!

We stayed at Ken's house for one month. Ken-san was very nice. He replied to email promptly. We liked his apartment very much. It's very clean. There are 2 rooms and a bathroom. We were 2 adults and one baby (13 months). The apartment was a perfect size for us. The apartment features a laundry machine.
His apartment is well located: 10-13 minutes from nearest station (Tsurukawa on the Odakyu line) on foot or 5 minutes by bus. There are a grocery store, a convenience store (seven eleven), coin laundry, restaurants, and UNIQLO (closing store) within 5 minutes.

屋主人非常好，入住當天開車來車站幫忙載行李(雖然要看當天屋主是否有事)有狀況的話門房有緊急聯絡電話。
附近居住環境：走路離車站大約15分鐘、房東有提供一台腳踏車、附近有摩斯跟超市還有UNIQLO 、星乃咖啡屋、拉麵店、跟一間藥妝店等等、還算方便。

屋內狀況：屋內有本介紹住處附近的旅遊攻略小筆記，該有的日常生活用品都有（除了牙刷牙膏要自備）廚房設備齊全（微波爐、煮飯鍋、瓦斯、餐盤、冰箱等等）房間也有提供電視可以看免費頻道、還有吸塵器及熨斗等等小東西可使用、都是免費的、唯一的小缺點是衛浴設施小了一點。

給想來的房客一些小建議：入門旁邊貼有每日垃圾處理的時間表、走之前不要留一堆垃圾啊做個好房客吧！水電瓦斯等費用都不另外收費、所以希望使用這裏的人能發揮公德心、不要太浪費而讓房東對外國人有不好的印象！

Ken was very easy to contact and helpful with guiding us through the attractions in the area. We enjoyed our stay in the quiet neighborhood! It was a different type of experience from the busy city of Tokyo. It is around 13 minutes from the Tsurukawa Station and it is a nice and safe walk to and from the house. What made it so special was also the free bikes that came with the accommodation. You can really experience how it's like to be a local in the area. We biked around town and to the grocery.
Also, electricity, water and wifi are all part of your payment which makes the package very convenient (as other airbnbs might charge extra for those things)
The house itself is also very comfortable. Compact and complete with all the tools you need to prepare food at home. All in all it was a nice, relaxing and cozy place to stay.

The apartment was exactly as advertised. There is a kitchen and a living/sleeping room, 2 people can live here without any trouble. Everything is provided: kitchen equipment (rice cooker, microwave,..), a laundry machine and even two bikes are included. It's a 15 min walk to the train station, from there it's around 30 mins to Shinjuku (380 yen). A supermarket and many dining options are close to the apartment.
Ken is a nice host. He met me at tsurukawa station and his mother drove us to the apartment. He explained everything in detail and has much helpful written material for you. During my stay he asked if everything is alright. The best aurbnb experience so far! Thank you!

Ken kindly arranged for us the rooms earlier than we planned by two hours. We were greeted at the station and got a lift to the place we'd be calling home. Everything was perfect!
Our place was equipped with everything you'd need to cook at home (if you're on a budget). You'd just need groceries which you can find at the local Co-op supermarket just nearby. We made use of the washer and cooking facilities, no complaints there!
The travel time into Tokyo was good! The Odakyu line was convenient for connecting with Metro/Toei lines at Shinjuku or Yoyogi-Uehara. The trains may be confusing at first, but two stops from the most important station, Shin-yurigaoka for transfer on rapid/express lines into the city.
Ken is very kind, excellent and friendly! He had an excellent list of suggestions of places to go and restaurants in the area. And definitely a very delicious ramen place nearby! Recommended!
I'd definitely come back and stay with Ken if we were back in Tokyo again. He made our stay quite enjoyable!

There's nothing much i can say other then ken being the perfect host. We have caused ken so much trouble and yet he is so kind. He even brought us out one day for lunch. He replies to my questions and helps me almost immediately. Ken is awesome.

As this is our first trip abroad and our first time using AirBnB, I must say I'm really satisfied. Ken is very helpful, easy to contact and talk to. He even allowed us to check in early and waited for us in the station to pick up us!

He explained how stuffs work in the apartment clearly, everything is provided. And the room was very comfortable for us - 2 travelers - often time it was hard for us to wake up because the beds and blankets were to comfortable to shoo away the cold :)

The apartment's location is also very convenient, lays in the road with convenience stores, drugstore, restaurants, and supermarket, you can bet we wouldn't be hungry even we were going out/home very late. The walk to the station was also delightful, located in the quiet neighborhood we can rest easily and walked at night without worry.

Ken also gave us some suggestions about where to go, considering I can't eat pork. He's very thoughtful about that. Thank you so much Ken, we hope we can see you and stay at your place again if we visit Tokyo again in the future! Sampai jumpa!
チェックイン、チェックアウトの時間は柔軟に対応頂き、部屋の設備や周辺のお店なども一通り説明して貰えました。メールの返信も早く、丁寧な対応で助かりました。周りは閑静な住宅街という感じでしたが、スーパーや喫茶店があるのと、白洲次郎の旧居（武相邸）がすぐ近くだったり、オーナーのご実家？の茅葺屋根の家が見学できたりと面白みがありました。駅からも歩いて10分程度なので気になる距離ではなかったです。

今回も色々親切にありがとうございました。リピートで泊まらせていただいているので、夜中のチェックインに対応いただいたり、ネットの使用量が多くてルーターを貸していただいたり助かりました。
またよろしくお願いします。

Staying in his place for 3 weeks was really comfortable and satisfying! I enjoyed my stay a lot since everything was clean, it was very close to the station (also easy to reach by the bicycle he provides). In the vicinity you can find a supermarket, some restaurants and convenience stores.
We also played some soccer together with a few of his friends.

We felt very comfortable while living in this apartment. We've been staying for 11 days. It's close to the station, has several food markets around, curry cafe with the multilanguage menu (even russian) and a clothes shop. Ken is a great host, he was giving fast and detailed reply on our questions, recommended interesting places to visit, also explaind how to use the machines in apartment, gave us a lift on the first day. thank you Ken! We recommend this apartment for future travelers, because it has everything for a comfort staying, the location and price is also good. thank you.

One of the best air Bnb listing I had the chance to rent. It is rather large, very clean, well furnished, not too far from the station and very close to a lot of restaurants and other shop, making it very convenient.

Ken is a very nice and talkative person and always ready to help. I really enjoyed my stay thanks to him.

We booked a flat for 5 weeks and he also was realy kind to take us from the trainstation in tsurukawa to the flat by car, so we didn't needto carry our luggage to the flat.
The flat itself was more than enough for 2 people and has well equipped kitchen ( gas stove with a oven and grill function, electric kettle, rice cooker etc. ) but you don't have to cook by yourself, you can easily walk about 2-5 min and reach many restaurants like curry, shushi, burger, ramen and so on, their's even a supermarket, a drug store and other stuff.
So about the trainstation, you only have to walk about 10-15 min. and can reach Tokio and the different districts quite easily.
If you have any problems you can rely on Ken, he gave us tips where you can find good spots for the sakura or some local spots for eating, buying souvenirs etc. also his english is very good so you won't have any problems to communicate with him.
So we can just highly recommend this flat for anyone who wants to go to japan.
Ken is definitely one of the best hosts on airbnb!

We had a fantastic stay at Ken's place! He really went above and beyond to accommodate us and his house manual/guidebook was fantastic! His mother met us and let us into the apartment and then later brought us some cakes - so lovely! The apartment itself was great, it had everything we needed, was very affordable and was close to some great shops as well as the local Tsurukawa station. Thank-you so much Ken!

I visited Ken's house with my husband for a week. Ken picked up for us at the station first day also when we leaved his house. The room was very comfortable and clean, also the area is very nice and quiet. There is 2 bicycles which visitor can use and My husband and I used it for go to the park which Ken recommended and when we go to the station, was very convenience. At last day, He invited us to show his father house near the guest house.There is very old agriculture tools and his father's farm. It was good experience for us to see the old tools. He is so nice person and kind. I highly recommend his guest house and I would like to visit to his guest house next time again :)

True to the positive reviews he has already received, Ken was not only our Japan Superhost, but our trip's SUPERHERO!
He made one of my dreams, which was to watch a Takarazuka play (and a sold-out one, at that!) come true!! My mom and I can't express how much we appreciate his patience and kindness in answering our inquiries, and for his helpfulness all-throughout our trip.
My mom and I stayed for two weeks in his Machida apartment, which was a great immersion experience -- we ended up even more pictures of our daily village walk because the greeneries made it look so picturesque, just like it would've probably looked like in an anime!
To add, his apartment had all the amenities we needed. It also had a kitchenette. It was clean, comfortable, and complete!
After we were fetched from Shin-yurigaoka station, Ken gave us a really helpful tour of the place and his neighborhood. (He also dropped us off Shin-yurigaoka station when the day of our departure from Japan came.)
Also, the location was perfect. Our favorite stops were Uniqlo and Ohsho (restaurant near Tsurukawa station with DELICIOUS gyoza, at a very reasonable price!!)
Definitely would RECOMMEND!!! :)
Thank you so much, Ken!!! ^__^ Mata ne!

10日間お世話になりました。
家に着くとティーセットが用意されていて、とても嬉しかったです。全て揃っており、何一つ不便はありませんでした。
更に東京、神奈川の観光情報や英語版のロンプラやメールでも情報を頂けたのがケンさんの心遣いを感じました。
家の近くにはスーパーやモスバーガー、すき家、コメダ珈琲等もありますし、駅までも近かったです。お部屋も二人で過ごすには申し分ありません。
1つワガママを言いますと、パートナーの足が大きくて用意して頂いたスリッパが入りませんでした（笑）
またパートナーが来日した際には宜しくお願い致します。
ありがとうございました。
Great host and great place to stay. quiet area.

二週間ほどお世話になりました。
当日の到着、出発日の時間帯がうまく合わずご本人様とお会いすることはできませんでしたが、時々連絡が来て安心しました。
駅から徒歩十分というところ、近くにスーパーや飲食店があるため利便性はあるかと思います。ただし、時期によっては虫が出ます。周囲が自然豊かであるため仕方がないのかもしれませんが、虫嫌いな私には少し苦手な場所…秋冬になれば大丈夫だと信じたいです。ただし、家の中に害虫対策はされているので、それでも出てきてしまったかという感じです。配慮は十分にされていたかと思います。
調理器具、シャンプーやボディーソープ、洗剤などは置いてあるので調味料を買えば自炊はできます。あとは、お部屋が駐車場のすぐ隣で、外干しは女性の方には厳しい。お部屋の中で干せる環境はあるので気にならなければ大丈夫です。洗濯洗剤も部屋干し用のが置いてあったのでありがたく使わせてもらいました。
しかし、Ken様には様々な気遣いをしていただきました。
私は勉学のため利用させていただいたためあまり観光はできませんでしたが、夏祭りの情報など教えていただき、厚木でやっていた花火大会を見に行くことができました。
また機会があれば利用させていただければと思います！
ありがとうございました！

brilliant! the host is generous and kind.
Everything essential is installed/organised, nothing bothered me at all.
even when you find sth unsure, he frequently responds questions promptly i can be sure ill gravitate when i need stay around there.
非常に快適に過ごさせて頂きました。時折連絡を頂き、問題、疑問等があれば即座に返答していただき何のストレスもなく過ごせたと思います。また駅まで重い荷物を運んでくださり非常に助かりました！ありがとうございました！

初めてのairbnbの利用でしたが、大変素晴らしい経験となりました。
ホストのKenさんがとても親切な方で、アパートまでの送迎、滞在中の細やかなケア、そしてお部屋の中に揃っている調理器具や生活用品などの多さ、本当にありとあらゆるところまで気を配って下さいました。
お部屋も写真通り清潔なお部屋で、最寄りの駅まで少し遠いのですが、自転車も貸して下さるので、全く気になりませんでした。
２週間半ほどに滞在でしたが、全く不自由なく快適に過ごすことができました。本当にホストのKenさんに感謝です。
また一時帰国で利用することがあるかと思いますので、その時は是非よろしくお願いします。
ホストのKenさんはとても穏やかで気さくな人です。長期滞在でしたので調理器具の品揃えが大変有り難かったです。その他の備品も豊富に揃っているので本当に何も困らず快適なお部屋でした。駅から少し遠いですが、自転車を自由に使えるので全く問題なく、歩いてもいい散歩になります。長期の方には特にオススメの部屋です！
Un excelente anfitrión

チェックイン時雨が降っていたのですが傘を2本持ってきていただいたり車で荷物を運んでいただいたりと本当に助かりました。11月にしては異常な寒波に襲われ、エアコンが止まってしまった時もお電話で相談させていただくとすぐさまKenさんのご家族の方が駆けつけてくださり対処してくださいました。ほんとうに快適な３週間を過ごすことができました。また機会があれば利用させていただきたく思います。ありがとうございました！

Ken was a great host and very welcoming.
The flat was in a perfect location for us and very comfortable.

Ken was a great host who offered a pick-up from the nearest bus stop regardless my arrival time was late at night. On a cold Winter's night in late January, Ken was so considerate to have bought a bottle of warm lemonade for me beforehand. When I checked in, Ken found out the igniter of the gas stove was out of battery, which he replaced new first thing the next morning; he also brought along extra blanket and an electric heater.
Ken showed his genuine interests in knowing the guest and try to do his best to help the guest meeting his/ her expectations. Once, Ken kindly informed and invited me to an "emergency food tasting event" which could be an interesting topic for the column I write. (However, I was unable to attend due to prior arrangement.) Towards the end of my stay, Ken even brought some Soba noodle his father has made as a surprising gift; it was delicious indeed. Although I had no use for Ken's tour guides or other assistance, I am sure he would have helped with his honesty and friendliness. Ken and his family has certainly made this place a home away from home for me.
Ken's apartment in Machida was a small cozy place. With its convenient location, it not only offered easy access to central Tokyo, but also provided a connecting gateway to beautiful get-aways such as Enoshima, Hakone Hot Spring, Kamakura and Yokohama. It suits my purpose of travel perfectly with its location and I enjoyed the short stroll to and from the nearby Odakyu Tsurukawa train station even though two bikes were freely provided for. I also enjoyed the cooking facilities at Ken's place; shopping and eating like a local was awesome. I felt safe and peaceful throughout my stay so I'd recommend this place to any women travelling alone by themselves.
If any drawbacks could be said about this place, it would be some sound audible from next doors and above randomly. Other than this, It's in a quiet and lovely residential area with shops and restaurants to satisfy your daily needs.

The apartment was clean and comfortable. Location wise, this would be a perfect spot if you are looking to stay in a quiet residential area. I quite like that the supermarket, restaurant, and post office are nearby. Just have to walk quite a bit to get to the nearest train station (Tsurukawa on the Odakyu Line), but finding your way there is easy. There is always the bus, or Ken's bicycle if you are lazy to walk though.
As a host, Ken was very helpful. He came to pick us up on the first day, and sent us to the station on our last.
He even allowed a late check-out considering our flight time back to Malaysia. He is also reliable with directions and recommendations with what and where to eat. Check out his guide book that he placed in the apartment, it's going to help to plan your trips. Will definitely stay here if I were to visit Tokyo again!

First of all Ken is a very helpful host. On the day of arrival, he picked us up at the Tsurukawa station, eventhough its already 9 pm. He also explained to us about the house (washing machine, cooking stove, etc).
The house is exactly as per in the picture. Very cozy and nice. The distance to Tsurukawa station is about 15 minutes and bicycles are provided.
Overall we have a pleasant stay at Ken's house.
A definite recommend,

Ken is not a super host for nothing. He come to get me at the station when I arrived and he explain and show to me a lot of useful information about The neighborhood and Tokyo. The place was basically perfect with everything you need for your travel and ken is a really nice guy ! If I come in Tokyo I will definitely come back here

The place is at a rather quiet and peaceful area of Tokyo with easy travel options to downtown Tokyo (the Odakyu Line from the Tsurukawa Station goes straight to Shinjuku) and Yokohama. Ken was really helpful and through LINE answered my many questions. It was thanks to him that I was also able to not only be part of the Japanese Obon festival and also partake in other fun and interesting pastimes. The house was well equipped and the kitchen was surprisingly large (good news if one is looking to make their own food). Overall, I highly recommend the place to anyone looking to for a base to explore Tokyo from.

小田急線鶴川駅からバスで2停留所、歩いても良く、近くにはスーパーもあり、便利でした。
お部屋も充分な広さで、疲れて帰ってきてもゆったりくつろげます。自炊もできるので、長期滞在にも向いてると思います。炊飯器はもちろん、家にある炊飯土鍋まであって嬉しくなりました。
緑豊かな静かな住宅街に面してるので、落ち着けます。今回5日滞在でしたが、次回は武相荘にも行って見たいと思います。
ご実家の歴史を感じさせる民家も趣があって素晴らしいですね。
細やかなお気遣いで、とても快適に過ごすことができました。
ありがとうございました。

Ken is really one of the best hosts I have ever met throughout my stays with AirBnB. He picked up and drove us to the house and station on our arrival and departure day, despite the rain, so it was very helpful and kind of him!
There is convenient shop and many food stores just 5minutes walk from the house, some are 24hours opened. Although the walk to the station is about 10minutes, it is a very relaxing walk!
The house is just nice for 2 person, and is kept very clean and neat. It is also situated in a very quiet neighborhood. Bicycles are also provided, although we did not use them as it was rainy quite a bit when we went.
Overall, it is very recommended! I wish to be back next time :)

i highly recommend this place for those people who wants to visit japan. kensan pick us up at the station and he also drop us off to the station. lots of shops also. my favourite place to shop is the family mart. mose burger is also very delicious 😋..We had a wonderful stay at kensan’s guest house. will definitely go back here and stay for my next visit to japan. there is also onsen two stops away..and its really nice..
対応も素早く、信頼できる方です。アメニティー等も充実しており、快適に過ごせることができました。

It's a good place if you decide to travel Kamakura and Enoshima.
A very peaceful place.

Ken’s place got everything what you need. You can cook or just heat up simply meal whatever you like in his apartment. The location is so  convenient that you can walk to several  restaurants or shopping for grocery. It takes only 12 or 13 minutes to Tsurukawa station by walk. Ken is a super nice host. He responds quickly when I need.
Kenさんはとても丁寧で親切な方です。安心して滞在できました。

Ken is the best host in the world! He picked us up from the station even though we arrived at 11PM! It was a very welcome gesture since we are travelling with a 10 month old Bub. It was an awesome introduction to a world-class Japanese hospitality.
We were given a tour of the surrounding area so we know where are the best places to eat or buy stuff. And we received an awesome flower (tsubaki) when we came back one night! The highlight of our stay in Tokyo is touring his parents’ gorgeous home! Is was a wonderful experience!
His place is Bub-friendly as it was all in one level and has a bath tub.

Ken is a great host and the place is exactly as described. Ken was generous enough to let me stay here for 3 months and it eventually felt like a second home to me.  I love the neighborhood, family oriented and quiet. It is also close to a grocery store and a few restaurants. If you are wanting to stay long term, note that it will be a little exhausting if you plan to go to Tokyo everyday, but for the value you can't beat it. If there is a problem just let Ken know, he will take care of it promptly. Thanks Ken~ ありがとうございました
Ken was very helpful and he picked us up from the train station. we used the rental bikes a lot.
nice room!房间非常大。地方非常便利.性价比很高，安静舒适的住宅。下次还会利用。房主非常亲切！

Ken is a great host! He replies quickly to all the doubts and is very helpful. In the apartment everything was as in the offer, it was clean and everything worked properly. The flat is located in a quiet district - allows having a rest after all the buzz of Tokyo. I can definitely recommend!

Quiet and cleanliness place
The owner is very kind

nice clean central location.  very easy to get around close to train station and super markets. Ken picked us up from the train and met us to give us a ride back on our last day. wonderful stay we will be back

Ken's apartment is a great place to stay, especially if you want to see the more day to day side of Japan. It was everything I needed for my stay. Ken himself was always helpful and welcoming. His parents house (over the road) is brilliant and I enjoyed the festival there. I highly recommend this to anyone visiting Tokyo.

Don't pass this place up! Ken is a master host. The place was clean, well kept, well stocked and in a convenient location. Ken was a superb host, giving us rides to and from the train station during check in and check out, a fascinating tour of his parent's beautiful old house and even left us a bag of fresh Kaki (persimmons) for us to enjoy. Communicating with Ken was easy and quick and he made our trip that much more special. Highly recommend!

L'hospitalité de Ken est sans pareil! Mon fils de 3 ans et moi avons passé un merveilleux moment et grâce à Ken nous avons découvert des lieux que nous aurions probablement raté sans lui. Je le conseil vivement et j'y retournerai sans hésiter.

Ken est un excellent hôte ! Il est toujours disponible en cas de besoin, sa famille et lui sont très gentils.
Nous avons pu faire des activités locales et uniques (Jidai Matsuri de Machida, visite d'une maison traditionnelle et cuisine fait-maison avec les parents de Ken) que nous n'aurions jamais eu si nous avions pris un hôtel normal.
Je n'aurais pas rêvé mieux pour mon premier voyage au Japon !
Je recommande totalement cet hôte !

Ken is a great host. He picked us up from the nearby station and also sent us back to station during return, he suggested us where to eat nice udon and there's an onsen nearby this area ( we didn't have the chance to go cause not much time left). Love his place, super clean!

There’s so many wonderful things I can say about the host, Ken, and this place. Ken is an outstanding host who truly went out his way to make sure I was comfortable. The place is clean, everything was neat, it was very organized. Plus, he even drove me to the bus station so I could catch the bus to Narita. As well, I got the opportunity to meet his parents and see their old home. There is obviously a lot of history in the house which was incredibly fascinating, and his parents are very kind. I can go on and on about this place, but I’ll just end with saying that I highly recommend this place, and I hope to stay here again next time I visit. Thank you, again!

Ken is a wonderful host! Prior to booking his place, I contacted Ken and asked tons of questions, and Ken thoroughly answered all my questions in a timely matter.
The apartment is just as described. It is a small apartment from an American standard, but, as a single traveler, it was more than enough. Ken prepared pretty much everything you'd need while on a trip, such as towel, shower gel, shampoo, conditioner, hair dryer, and etc. The apartment also has a full kitchen with pots and pans, etc. in case you feel like cooking. Ken provided a portable wifi with unlimited data so that I was able stay connected with people and navigate myself while I was out. The apartment is about 15 minutes walk from the nearest train station, and it takes about 30 minutes (if you transfer to the rapid express train at Shinyurigaoka) to Shinjuku station. The train does operate past midnight, so I was able to take my time sightseeing and shopping before returning to the apartment. There's a 7-11 and a groceries store (closes at 1:00am) by the train station, and a 7-11 and a groceries store (closes at 9:30pm) by the apartment.
Ken picked me up from and dropped me off at the train station. Upon checking in, Ken explained everything thoroughly and showed me around the place. The next day, I received message from Ken, making sure that everything's alright with the apartment. Ken was able to make recommendations on transportation and places to visit. I appreciate Ken's hospitality and would recommend this place.

Ken is a mega host, he was always aware of if I needed anything, he was very kind and very nice, he went to look for me at the station the first day that I arrived and he left me on my last day, his house is beautiful the surroundings Also, the subway station was very close and you had everything you could need at hand, it was a wonderful stay and I hope to return soon, thank you very much Ken for making my stay in Japan the best
Everything is good. Two people live in only.

Ken's apartment is our first Airbnb experience, and we were more than satisfied. The place is quiet, clean, close to the station, and complete in amenities. Ken was so nice that he picked us at the station despite of our late night arrival; he also dropped us at the station too on our last day! He's also helpful he's so quick in response and was willing to answer every question we had. Thanks, Ken!

Ken's place was excellent clean and we'll organised. Shops were close by and eateries such as Mos burgers and coco curry were just an 6min walk away. Ken also picked us from the airport and took us to the place with was very helpful as we had lots of luggage. Will definitely stay here again when we visit Japan.

It was a really great stay there. Ken is an excellent host and during our Japan-trip, we had nothing to complain about.
10/10, would book again.

This was second time for me to stay at Ken’s place. Just like first time, it was such a pleasant stay for 3 weeks. His apartment has everything you need, a washing machine, Wifi router, a bicycle are nice extra to have.
Ken is a super nice host! He responded me whenever I needed to ask him something and took care of it right away when I had a problem with Wifi router. Defiantly I will come back here next year! Thank you so much, Ken!!

My friend and I stayed here for 10 days. Ken was a gracious host helping us from the start when we got off at the wrong station. He showed us around the suburbs on the first day pointing out key food spots. Walking from the station is 15 mins and catching the right trains will get you to Shinjuku in about 30 mins. I would recommend when traveling from the airport if its not your first time in Japan to take the shuttle bus. Ken was kind enough to send us the link prior. He will truely make you feel welcomed when you arrive and show you a different side of Japan. He offered to show us his family's house which has the traditional architecture as well as the local museum. Additionally. He showed us a local sushi place that was absolutely divine. A wonderful host who will go above and beyond to make any of his guests feel safe and comfortable in a different country. The apparentment is great it has all the amenities and its spacious compared to most apartments and homes in Tokyo. If your looking for a different side of Tokyo where it is authentic and one is able to see a more local perspective this is the place for you. Would definitely recommend this hidden gem.

Ken's place is absolutely lovely, it's clean and filled with everything you could want in your stay in Japan. Only a 15 minute walk from the station, down a river, surrounded by quaint houses and beautiful nature. There are plenty of restaurants and shops nearby so that despite it being just outside of the busy day-to-day of Tokyo, you never feel isolated.
Ken himself was a great host and picked me up from the aforementioned station, giving me a great introduction to the neighbourhood and flat. On top of this, he made great recommendations and offers of things to do nearby. He was always reachable if anything was wrong, which it wasn't, but the reassurance was most appreciated.
I can't recommend this place enough if you're going to Tokyo and want a break from the mental city life at the end of the day.

this place is great! It's clean, practical and the location is great if you want a more relaxed surrounding, without being very far from Tokyo's centre. The bikes where great and Ken very kindly picked us up when we arrived, and dropped us off at the station when we left. Great place and service for a very good price!
Great place to stay, close to the city and great hospitality. Comfy bed and apartment had everything you need for making food etc. Really recommend!

Ken est un très bon hôte, très accueillant et disponible. Ken est venu nous chercher à la gare le jour de notre arrivée et nous a conduit au logement. Il nous a également fait visiter l'ancienne maison de ses parents, maison traditionnelle japonaise, ainsi qu'une autre maison traditionnelle, devenue un musée. Nous sommes ensuite allés manger dans un restaurant japonais où la nourriture était excellente. Lors de notre départ, Ken et son papa nous ont conduit à la gare routière pour prendre la navette qui nous a conduit à l'aéroport. Le seul inconvénient était la taille de l'appartement, très petit pour trois personnes. Mais parfait pour un couple.

Ken a été un super hôte, réactif et surtout très gentil. Il a réussit à nous mettre toutes à l’aise, je recommande Ken à n’importe qui qui voudrait passer un bon moment dans un appartement cozy et pas très loin du centre de tokyo pour une qualité de prix incroyable !

Ken's place is comfortable, spacious and well equipped. There are lots of places to eat nearby, and the station isn't too far of a walk. Communication was excellent and Ken even messaged me with details about a local festival in case I was interested in attending. The nearest station is Tsurukawa on the Odakyu line, so if you're primarily going to be using a JR Pass to get around then be aware you'll have to pay a separate fare to travel on this line.
Ken是一位热情好客的人，不但去车站接了我们，还提供了一些住房的便利条件。比如自行车、周边环境介绍，地铁路线图等等！Ken把自己房屋里的每个细节和便用方法都一一介绍给我们，包括如何垃圾分类和回收的时间，非常有耐心！Ken还邀请我们去参加他的妈妈举办的绘画故事活动，为此非常感谢，Ken的房子很棒，周边有超市和餐厅，很方便，下次东京之行还会选择住在这里，谢谢Ken！

Nothing is too much trouble for Ken. He will help you in every way he can.
He picked us up from the station late at night and took us to 7/11 to buy supplies and checked us in so we did not have to worry about anything.
Communication is prompt throughout. He will answer any questions and give recommendations.
His place is compact with everything thought out and included. Close to amenities so easy to get around.
We were very well looked after and Air BnB is a great community out there. Even other Superhosts were saying how lucky we were to have Ken!
Would definitely stay again and we would say Ken has become a friend!
Our entire experience was enhanced because of Ken’s support, help and advice!
Thank you!
Ken’s place is beautifully kept and in such a lovely location! I highly recommend anyone to stay here :)

Ken is a great host, he picked me up in his car on the first day from Tsurukawa Station which was handy as I had a large suitcase. He was quick to answer any queries and even took me out around the local area one morning to see the traditional houses, we also had a delicious sushi lunch at a local restaurant. He arranged a taxi for me on my last day to take me to the limousine bus at Shin-yurigaoka Station.
The apartment is perfect for a solo traveller or a couple. It has all the essentials, cooker, microwave, toaster oven, iron and ironing board, washing machine etc. Most importantly it has a good bed and shower. The bike and portable WiFi are a great bonus as well. It was a comfortable month long stay for me, much more relaxing (and cheaper) than staying in hotels.
The local area is a nice quiet suburb about a 15 minute walk or 5 minute bike ride from the nearest train station, Tsurukawa on the Odakyu line. You can get to Shinjuku in about 35 minutes if you transfer to the rapid express train at Shin-yurigaoka Station. You can get to Machida city in under 10 minutes as its only 2 stops away, Machida is a great city, it's now one of my favourite places in Japan, I highly recommend you visit.
The immediate area has a 7/11, mos burger, coco curry, uniqlo, coffee shop, coop supermarket, sushi restaurant, ramen restaurant and gyudon restaurant. Nearer the station has lots more shops and places to eat, including 2 supermarkets, 4 convenience stores, a 100 yen shop, a delicious bakery and a great deli.
I will definitely stay at Ken's place again when I return to Japan if it is available, and highly recommend it to anyone looking for a more laid back and genuine Japanese experience.

From check-in to check-out Ken is a great host!! He explains your accommodation in great detail and will answer any queries you have. The place is perfect for a solo traveller who doesn't want to be situated in the bustling city but has convinient access to it!! Definitely recommended!!
(✖╹◡╹✖)♡Ken的地方太好了，走去地铁只需要5-7分钟，去市中心才半小时左右。房东超级好！！接送去车站免去我们拉着沉重的行李～也很热情跟我们解释屋里的设备和周边的商店，还有东京的景点。还有很多很多言语表达不到的好！下次去日本肯定再去Ken的家！！

Hi Ken, thank you so much for your wonderful hospitality. We had a great time in Japan. Can’t wait to be back there, hopefully sooner rather than later! We’ll be sure to pay you a visit when we are there. We wish you and your family good health and prosperity. Merry Christmas and happy holidays! See you soon!

Wow.
Every host should aspire to be like Ken. I cannot think of a single flaw in his hospitality, or his apartment. It is perfect for a solo traveller or a couple. The beds are comfortable, the apartment is well stocked with amenities. He provides you with a handy book that tells you everything you need to know about how to work the electronics, and about the local area, but you are still welcome to contact him for anything. He is incredibly friendly, helpful, and easy to chat to. He offers recommendations of activities and food that I highly suggest you do - because he has great taste!
The location of the apartment is brilliant as a bridge between Machida and the city centre of Tokyo. We were touring Tokyo, so we travelled to Shinjuku primarily, and it was easy and fast (30-40 minutes) to get to. Also, by staying here, you get to experience the day-to-day life in Japan, away from the hustle and bustle of the city centre in Tokyo. It made for a pleasant walk to and from the apartment. Ken also provides a bike, as well. We just really enjoyed walking around!
Ken made our time in Japan a very memorable one. We had a wonderful time together at New Year's, and my partner got to meet his family (I was sick at the time :( ) which I heard was a fun time. If you are looking for a host who is more hands-on with their guests, I would definitely recommend Ken. He has plenty of experience travelling himself, and he enjoys getting to know his guests, so there's lots to talk about!
Whoever is reading this review - there is a reason there are so many other positive glowing reviews about this apartment and host. Take the opportunity to stay here, you will not regret it. What makes travelling great is people like Ken. :)
In short - great apartment, clean, comfortable, easy to use equipment. Host is wonderful, friendly, helpful. Great transport links.

Ken's place was clean and  had everything one needs to cook and stay for a week or so. It may get a little humid when it rains (there is a coin laundry with dryers not far away in case clothes don't get dry). There are restaurants and shops and walking distance. And having a private parking space was nice. Ken is a very good host, and replied promptly and kindly to all messages.
房东人很好 不仅提供接送服务 还会热情的介绍房子周围的环境设施 体验不错
I recommend this place to stay - Ken is very friendly and responds quickly, and the place is just the right size and location! Also very clean and had everything I needed to relax or work.

物件はもちろんですが、ホストのKenさんの細かいおもてなしのおかげでとっても居心地よく過ごすことができました！
都内在住ではあるものの町田については全く知らなかった私に、歴史やグルメなどローカルの方ならではの目線で知識を収集できたことも大満足です。また泊まりにきます！
大変快適に過ごすことができました！お部屋は清潔で、周囲にはスーパーもレストランもお弁当屋さんなどもあります。なによりホストのKenさんのお心遣いが細やかでした。
とても良いホストさんで、安心して宿泊できました。

家から徒歩15-20分程のところに駅があります。
また、食品スーパーやコンビニも近くにあり、非常に便利でした。
ありがとうございました。

リスティングの記載どおりのお家でした。
自転車を借りることができてありがたかったです。

初めてで何もわからない状態で一から全て教えて頂きました！
宿泊期間もフォローしてもらい、終始安心して過ごせました！
またご縁がありましたら、ぜひ宜しくお願い致します！
ありがとうございました！！

連絡のやり取り含めて、スムーズな対応で助かりました。
部屋の設備、清潔さ、近隣の環境においても、非常に満足でした。

Cosy ground floor flat owned by a warm and wonderful host! Easy access to Tsurukawa station. Great to walk/jog along the river! The flat has everything you need from cooking utensils, a washing machine, work desk, iron to vacuum cleaner! Communicating with the owner was super easy and he makes sure you are comfortable and happy.
オーナーのKenさんが素晴らしいです！不安な事がないか時折メールをくださります！エリアに慣れてない方も女性も安心して利用できると思います。台所用品、洗濯機、物干し、掃除用具、デスクなど全て揃っているので長期間の滞在にも向いていると思います。自然もいっぱいなので散歩がとても気持ちよかったです！

お部屋はとても過ごしやすく、ホストのKenさんもチェックインからチェックアウトまで優しく対応してくださいます。
おすすめのお部屋です。
とても良かったです！

閑静な住宅街の中なのですが、近くにはスーパーや食堂もたくさんあり、自炊に必要な器具や食器も全て備え付けてあるので食生活には困りません。決して新しいアパートではありませんが、とても清潔に整えておられ、周囲の音もほとんど響かず、静かに 快適に過ごすことができました。生活に必要なものは全て揃っており、でも余分なものはなく、まるで自分の部屋のように便利に使えます。快適なインターネット環境と、程よいデスクと椅子があり、リモートワークにも最適です。オーナーさんが利用者のことをとてもよく考えて下さっているのだなと感心することばかりでした。機会があれば、また利用したいと思います。

This is a simple, clean, and affordable location. For US visitors it might feel small initially but can fit two good friends or a couple easily. It has everything you need for a long stay. The neighborhood is a very quiet residential area and there is a nearby river that makes for a great running trail, it goes for miles. Tsurukawa station is a little over 10 minutes walking, from there you can go anywhere in Tokyo.
My mother stayed for 11 days. The host is very responsive and accommodating. The place is safe and quiet.
The host is nice and the apartment is clean:)
大変お世話になりました。

I have been to Japan four times by now and am currently staying for a year and I can confidently say that Ken is one of the best hosts you will ever encounter during your time in Japan. Not only was communication always fast, he went above and beyond to make my stay as great as it could be.
He picked me up from the station on a scorching summer day, which was amazing. He constantly kept in touch with me over LINE and invited me to dinner at a friend of his (which is also a host on here) TWICE. Curry, beef, salads, drinks, miso soup - as much as you want! It was incredible and even though I could not communicate too well with the other host due to my broken Japanese, we made it work!
Ken also showed me his parents old traditional Japanese home and another nearby establishment, giving me a tour of them.
The place itself is perfect for one person. The kitchen has everything you need, the living room is big enough to have an open suitcase lie around all the time. The bath might be a bit small but it is perfectly managable.
The location is fantastic. If you want to be outside central Tokyo but not too far away in case you want to take a trip there fast, Tsurukawa is a great place to stay. The apartment is 3-5 minutes away (ON FOOT) from a Uniqlo, CoCo ichibanya, a small supermarket, Mosburger, an Indian curry restaurant and a Sukiya. If you are a curry addict like me, you might end up eating way too much of it!
The area is quiet, yet has everything you need. Parks and some larger reserves are nearby and the station is just ~15 minutes away on foot so you can take trips to Kamakura or Yokohama relatively easy.
Give this place a shot. As I said in the beginning, I have been to Japan a few times before and this was by far my favourite place to stay.

子供の入院の付き添いのために一週間ほど滞在しました
鶴見駅までは歩いて15分くらい平坦な道なので重たい荷物がなければ歩けます。
近くに飲食店、スーパー、郵便局なんでもあるので便利でした
1キロくらい歩きますが　栗平温泉があって滞在中　３回行きました
黒湯という重曹質のとても良いお湯でした。
ここへの道は行きは結構坂道を上ります
途中　林の中を抜けるので夜は女性だけだとこわいと思います
私達は夜はタクシーで帰りました
宿には自炊に必要なものはなんでもありましたのでほとんど自炊で過ごせました
洗濯機もあります
外と中に干場があるので便利でした
ホストのkenさんはとても親切で最後の日は近くにあるご実家の古民家を見せてくれました
駅まで送って頂いてとても助かりました
良い滞在をありがとうございました!
前回に続き、今回もKenさんには大変お世話になりました。とてもご親切でご丁寧な対応で最初から全て完璧でした。お部屋は広くて、必要なものはもちろん、持ってくるのをすっかり忘れていたものまでありました。今後も滞在したいと思いました。
2度目の利用でしたが、とても使いやすくて居心地の良いお部屋でした。ホストのKenさんはゲストをとても大切にしてくださる方で、過ごしやすいようにいつも気遣ってくださいます。さらにKenさんのおかげで、以前知らなかった滞在先付近の素晴らしさを知ることもできました。また利用したいと思います。

お部屋周辺にはミニスーパー、飲食店、ユニクロ、郵便局があり、とても便利です。駅までは徒歩15分もかからず、川沿いの道を歩けば良い運動と散歩になりました。駅前には更にスーパー、ドラッグストア、コンビニ、家電ショップなどがあり、買い物には困りません。6週間滞在し、ここをベースに国内旅行もしました。都内に頻繁に出たい方には少し距離があるかも知れませんが、逆方面の小田原、箱根方面にも行きたい方には便利かと思います。私は、小田原、河口湖(新宿より富士回遊利用)に行き、とても良かったです。Wifiが少し不安定だったので、そこだけ改善の余地があるかも知れません。
Todo perfecto, tanto la limpieza como los servicios del apartamento y Ken fué rápido y amable en la comunicación. he estado muy a gusto, para repetir.

Très agréable séjour en partie grâce à se logement dont Ken-san s'occupe, il reste à votre disposition si besoin et propose même des rassemblements et des évènements locaux si le cœur vous en dit. Zone paisible et proche de toutes les belles choses à voir dans la préfecture de Tokyo et les alentours. Merci encore à lui et bonne continuation !

The room is very tidy and clean as shown in the photos provided by the host. The host, Ken-san, is very helpful to pick me up to the room and station. It helped a lot as I had heavy luggages. I enjoyed the room in a green environment very much. It is so nice to have a walk nearby. I recommend every to go to this accommodation.

Ken was nice and caring, made sure he can reach me and I have arrived safely, the apartment had all the things you can think of and every small detail was thought out.
Thank you Ken for your hospitality.

Det är en trevlig liten lägenhet utrustad med allt man skulle behöva. Lägenheten är ren och rymlig. Sängen är väldigt bra och det är skönt med egen dusch. Ken är en väldigt hjälpsam och bra värd som gör ett fantastiskt jobb för att man ska känna sig välkomnad.
Väldigt prisvärt, jag rekommenderar det😄

Kenさんはもとっも優しいも役に立つhostです。Kenさんの提供しました経験は最高Airbnb経験は全然経験しました。本当に素晴らしいです。アパートは便利も可愛いも駅近いアパートです。近所は静か的と平和的だった。次の日本に旅行時、確かに戻れなければならないです。11/10本当にすごい。Kenさん、全てからどぞありがとございました!
Ken is a very kind and helpful host and the experience he provided was the best Airbnb experience I have had ever. Truly amazing! The apartment is convenient, cute, and close to the train station. The neighborhood was quiet and peaceful. I will certainly have to go back on my next trip to Japan. 11/10 Thanks again Ken for everything!

Ken and Ken’s place were great.  We enjoyed the quiet location.  Shinjuku is easy to access, taking around 40-45 min by taking the local train 2 stations to Shin-Yurigaoka and then changing to an express. We found it worthwhile to pay the ¥500 for reserved seats on these during rush hours.  The nearby Roku-San Sushi shop on the way to the station is excellent value.  There are Japanese chain restaurants nearby and a grocery store as well as 7-11.  The place was clean and had everything we needed.  The beds were comfortable.   I would recommend this place for anyone who doesnt mind walking 10-15 min to/from the station.  It was really clean but there was a vague musty/mildewy/moldy smell in the room.  It didnt bother us much and we would happily stay again, but since we have family members with exteme allergies  to mold I feel obligated to share this observation.  We visited in the rainy season so that might have made it more noticeable.  Overall, we heartily recommend this place.
Ken was really nice, he offered us a ride to the bnb on his day off. The place was as described and felt like a Japanese apartment. Would stay here again and highly recommend!

I had a great 4 weeks stay at Ken's appartment! The area is quiet, and you can easily reach Tokyo and Yokohama by train. There is also a nice countryside to discover by bike. Host is very attentive and helpfull. I hope to come back!

What an amazing little escape from the city!
I stayed at Ken-san’s place for around one month and really loved everything about it. It’s exactly as the pictures look and exactly as described. The walk to Tsurukawa station is very nice and it’s not inconvenient at all to get into some of the more downtown parts of Tokyo. Machida has a lot to offer as well which is only two stops away!
Ken-San is very attentive and kind. He picked me up from an easier station on my arrival and dropped me off at the station when I was leaving. His family is also super kind and made me feel right at home :)
Thank you so much for the stay!!

Staying at Ken’s airbnb was amazing. From the start to the beginning Ken was always so kind, responsive, welcoming, and helpful. He offered to pick me up from the train station upon arrival and was kind enough to take me and my giant heavy luggage to the train station at check out. He also was so kind and invited me to meet his family, show me the classic home, and invited me to an event at their classic house. I also met his sister and father and they were also so kind and helpful!
For the airbnb, it was so clean and had everything I needed. It was perfect for me as a solo traveller! I loved staying there and was really sad to leave. I wish I could stay forever! It also was so close to the bus stop and a walkable way to the train station. Really good restaurants nearby! It was a nice peaceful stay away from the business of the city, but a close train ride into the city when I wanted to go in. Thank you for letting me stay!

念願かなって、Airbnbのホスト仲間であるKenさんの家にやっといけました！
お部屋は日当たりが良くてこじんまりとして、旅行者が必要なものは大きなクローゼットに全て揃っています。全身映る鏡はとても助かりました。
ベッドの寝心地もとっても良かったです。
２日間の滞在でしたが、この街がとても好きになりました。
周りは静かな住宅街。
皆さんお庭をとても綺麗にしていて、
この街に住む人たちがここを愛しているのがよくわかります。
歩けばすぐにスーパーやコンビニ、そして朝食だって早朝から空いているお店が複数あり困りません。
歩いてすぐの、Kenさんのご実家「みんなの古民家」には心から感動しました。
まるでモネの絵画のように美しい家とお庭です。
最寄りの鶴川駅から渋谷から３０分でとても便利でした。
幸福感あふれた滞在になりました。またぜったいきます！

5/5🌟
I stayed at this apartment for about a month and felt very much at home.
Ken was an amazing host! He was always friendly, responsive and communicative!
Staying at this airbnb gives you the great experience of seeing an old styled house (that of Ken’s parents) and being among locals!
It was really nice to meet Ken and his father!
The place itself was clean and had all amenities one would need for a short or long term stay.
I’d love to return some day!
The rooms were very clean and the beds were very nice too. The host is very kinda aswell and it was a great experience! Definitely would recommend if you visit Japan.

This was my second stay at Ken’s place. Ken is a very communicative and kind host whom my husband and I recommend to everyone. The family owns a farmhouse (Kominka) which is 1 minute walk from the Airbnb. We had lunch there as they run a cafe on Tuesday. The curry was delicious, and people working there were very friendly. It’s a nice spot where you forget you are in Tokyo. It was lovely to see you again Ken, thank you.

Ken is an amazing host, very caring and willing to help anytime. I spend one month in the apartment and it was exactly as I expected, the apartment is great and the surroundings provide you of a more quiet and relaxed stay but near from Tokyo center. I really recommend it, I’d defenitely repeat my stay there!
謝謝ken的照顧，最開心是帶我到古民家參觀，非常好的體驗，位置雖然遠，但民宿整潔，日用品非常齊全。
ホストのケンさんはとても親切で、駅まで送迎もしてくださりました。

A great place to stay, easy to go enoshima kamakura with one train and shibuya to, ken is very helpfull if you ask them anything about bus,train,place .. thanks Ken
Till we meet again :)
체크인 날에 ken 님이 도착 시간을 물어본 후 직접 역으로 마중나와 주셨습니다! 숙소는 혼자 지내기에 좋은 크기였어요. 숙소는 주택이 밀집한 조용한 거리에 있으며, 도쿄의 시내에서는 평균 1시간 정도 걸립니다. 지하철로 어디든 갈 수 있어요 :) 숙소에서 가까운 역 주변에도 이런저런 식당이나 드럭스토어가 있어, 지내는 데에 전혀 불편함은 없었습니다.

Another perfect stay at Kens place. We had a great lunch in the mountains one day as well. Apartment was spotlessly clean, check in was easy and simple.
5 stars all the way.

Recomiendo plenamente el dpto de Ken,el realmente es un anfitrión de lujo.El lugar es lo que deseaba y más. Todo excelente, super equipado. Más que completo. Nos fue a buscar y también al final Nos llevó a la Estación lo cual es un plus que se super agradece. Pudimos conocer la casa antigua de sus padres. Una experiencia que amé. Gracias mil Gracias por cada detalle y atención. Es excelente también tener lavarropas rápido.

Good for remote work and long stay. Peaceful surroundings really help to concentrate. And for traveling in Tokyo there is quite fast access to Shinjuku. The walk to the station is around 15 min, but there is a nice option to walk along the river.
The apartment itself is well equipped and clean, felt like home. Also Ken makes you feel welcomed and there is good and fast communication.
Supermarket and conbini nearby are very convenient and there are a lot of shops and restaurants also near the station.
Overall I definitely recommend, especially if you want to stay a bit away from cities noise and bustle in a more local and quiet environment.
일본  소도시의 매력을 맛보았다. 호스트의 친절과 배려도 인상적이었다.

I feel so lucky that I had the opportunity to stay at Ken’s cute little studio for half a month while I was in Tokyo doing an art course. Ken kindly picked me up at the station the day I arrived and invited me to see his family’s beautiful, traditional thatched roof house the following week. What a privilege and something I’ll never forget! The apartment is quiet and cosy and has everything you need for a comfortable stay including cleaning materials, iron, kettle etc. Although I was there during a heatwave the apartment was always cool and fresh but there is an AC if you need an extra boost of cool air. Ken also kindly dropped me off at the station the day that I left and is an all-round kind and generous host and always responsive and happy to help. 5 stars! Would definitely stay here again!

저는 한달이라는 시간동안 이 집에 머물렀습니다! 이 숙소를 선택한 이유는 도쿄 중심가와 떨어져있고 “집”같았기 때문에 현지인처럼 여유롭게 살 수 있을거라는 기대감 때문이었습니다!
숙소에 머무는 동안 저는 정말 저를 제외한 외국인을 못 본 것 같아요! 정말 이곳에 사는 사람처럼 지냈습니다 저와 같은 목적으로 숙소를 찾고 계신 분들이 있다면 잘 맞을거예요!
Ken was very kind and assisted well

We spent 10 days at Tomo's place.We were welcomed by his mon who was very friendly and Tomo was very easy to join by message or by phone whenever we needed and we met him several times. He seems to be very busy but always available to make our stay confortable. He is really very kind. Tomo's place is very spacious. As we were with our two kids, we were happy to have a spacious place where they could move (which is quite difficult to find in Tokyo when you can't spend too much money). It was very convenient to be on the Yamanote-line by which you have an easy access to Shinjuku or Shibuya (in the morning and in the evening, you will experience the very crowded train). There is a portable WIFI available which is very convenient in order to have access to internet wherever you go. I recommend Tomo's place to anyone who need a spacious place and who want to stay in an modernized Japanese style house.

Oour host Tomo contacted us even before we came to Japan. We arived very late in the evening around 11pm and Tomo and his brother came to pick us up, a family of 6, at the airport. We arrivde at his homestay an hour later.

The house was clean and all appliances were in working order. The subway station was about a 10 minute walk and we did our groceries at the supermarket, a 5 minute walk, so very convenient!
素晴らしいホスト。オススメです。
房子照片与实际一样，房间非常好，房价便宜，步行到大塚车站只要8分钟路程，附近餐馆效多，房间还有炉具、餐具、洗衣机可供使用。房东很友善热情，垃圾分类有点复杂。总体上非常满意。

Tomo's house is really big and clean, the location is good with 5 mins walk to Osuka JR station. He is responsible and prepare the clear map to teach us how to go to the house. Tomo prepare all the necessary things to us and kindly introduce the house for us when we arrived. We live happily in the house for these days so I highly recomment Tomo's house for who would like to travel in Tokyo.

Tomo was a very gracious host, always checking up on us to make sure eveything is was okay.
The house was really nice... Spacious and comfortable.. Can easily fit 8 adults comfortably. We love that it looks and feels like a real Japanese home (instead of some typical modern apartment). This is a residential area, so it's very quiet. If you want to party, this is not the place for you.

There's a big supermarket (Life) nearby as well. There are 2 stations near the house - Shin-Otsuka on the Marunouchi line (400m away) and Otsuka on JR Yamanote line (750m away). Since I was travelling with a 3 year old and my parents (70+ yrs old), 750m felt really far.. So we tried as much as we can to use the Marunouchi line instead. This might be a deal breaker for some people. But, it worked fine with us..

Not far from the house there is a sushi place. I highly recommend this place, but be warned.. The people there can't speak english (but they were very helpful). Your best bet is to just point to their window display.

All in all, we had an awesome trip!

tomo는 출발전부터 카카오톡과 이메일을 이용해서 자세히 안내해주었습니다.
