Tomo was very attentive great host.
the house is very spacious and tasteful combinations of Japanese retro style and modern. we stayed there with my family(husband, son and my parents. 5 of us) but it was plenty space.
also Location is great, quiet neighborhood but it's on yamanote line and one more other line. easy to access to many places.
He offered us pocket wifi as well, it was very handy. because i found hard to get public free wifi in Japan compare to other country actually.
I would definitely recommend his place!

เจ้าของที่พักต้อนรับดีมาก เป็นกันเอง มาแนะนำวิธีการใช้บ้านให้อย่างละเอียด ห้องพักกว้างใหญ่ ห้องน้ำสะอาด ห้องอาบน้ำดี มีเครื่องซักผ้าด้วย สะดวกสบาย ใช้งานได้ดีทุกอย่าง ส่วนครัวกว้างใหญ่ทำอาหารได้ ตู้เย็นใหญ่เก็บของได้มาก การเดินทางสะดวกใกล้ทั้งจากสถานีโอสุกะ และ ชินโอสุกะ บ้านตั้งอยู่ใกล้กับร้านสะดวกซื้อ (Daily Yamazaki) ประมาณ 30 เมตร ทำให้สามารถเดินไปซื้อของกินของใช้ได้สะดวก

beautiful house with all amenities , tomo is a very kind person and cares about the guests .
the house is in a quiet, no problems during the stay. easy access to the station near the house.
Congratulations tomo san.

When we arrived to house we got warm welcome and instructions. Tomo had marked with stickers in english some electronic devices. Great help, because we can't read Japanese...

We used Otsuka stations, Yamanote Line.
Very near and good connections to big parts of Tokyo.

We were really happy with kotatsu! After long trips in Tokyo, we came back to house and relaxed under kotatsu and watched tv. Great times!
Tomo has a very big and nice house situated near train stations and supermarkets. Tomo provides basic ammenities and manuals to nearby places. Very nice host and house!

Me.Tomo is a very good host and we had a pleasant trip and stay in Tokyo!
Mr.Tomo's place is 5 mins walking distance to the JR Yamanote train station and there are few convenient stores nearby.
The house is clean and with complete amenities that we'd need. Mr.Tomo also took immediate action when we told him that we need an additional hair dryer as well as solving our problems.
Thank you so much Mr.Tomo and I'd like to stay here again if I'm travelling to Tokyo again!

Tomo-san has been one of the kindest host I've had on airbnb! Prompt replies, patient answers to all your questions and most importantly you can his lovely house all to yourself! We were a family of 5 and found the house to be really cozy and spacious. Very convenient and definitely walking distance to both Tokyo metro and/or JR line which can take you basically to anywhere rather easily! Would definitely stay again if I'm back in Tokyo! :))

Tomo is a friendly and very helpful host ! He even came to greet us and responded to our questions promptly .
His house is large and very enough to a family of six.
The location is good. We took about 8 minutes to JR Otsuka station and there were many good restaurants and a big supermarket nearby .
I definitely would like to stay in Tomo's house again when visiting Tokyo next time !

Beautiful, clean and well facilitated house shown how well Tomo (owner) take care for his guests. It's around 10 mn. walk from Metro line and have convenience stores (LIFE, 7)/restaurants around there so it's very convenience. The neighborhood is quite and safe (we walked back home after 11PM everyday).

Tomo is very nice and try to support his best for us when we were there.

This place will be first choice for next trip in Tokyo.

Tomo nous a gentiment accueilli à notre arrivée et nous a tout expliqué
La maison est spacieuse et très propre
Le pocket wifi est un veritable plus
Le quartier est très calme et à proximité du metro

First of all, Tomo is a nice and gentle host, he came and greeted us in person and responded to questions quickly, it was helpful indeed.

The house is 5min walk to Otsuka Station on Yamanato Line, with easy connections to Shinjuku or Tokyo Station. One will have a few options for restaurants surrounding Otsuka Station. The neighbourhood is quiet and safe.

The house is a mix of modern and traditional rooms, so one has no problem to experience tatami bedroom! Kitchen is easy to use for cooking, one only needs to walk 3min to LIFE supermarket or a couple of other stores for grocery. We did simple cooking during our stay which made us feel like home. Living room is spacious and relaxing. After long walks in the daytime, we were so happy to get back and chill in the sofa.

It was a great first time Airbnb experience!

Tomo's house is very nice n clean,the environment is so quilt,also have a convenience store near the house.Every thing what you need is prepare in the house .We feel very lucky we choosing it,if we travel Tokyo next time we'll visit Tomo's house again !
Great place to stay. Amenities really awesome. Grocery easy to get. Transportation nearby as stated. Recommended for everyone to stay.
Tomo is a nice guy and a good and pleasant host.  He makes you feel secured and comfortable in his place and he can communicate well in english. His house is safe, quiet, very clean and spacious.

Tomo's house is very clean, the environment is quilt. There is a convenience store and a supermarket near the house. It take about 5-10 min to the JR station (Yamanote Line). Almost everything we need is provided in the house.
Everything is perfect,Tomo gave us clear instruction to arrive his house. We can find all we need. Tomo is also friendly and nice.

Tomo was so thoughtful and very thorough from the moment we first arrived at his home, despite our late arrival. We were provided with a fully described manual on how to get there, access to nearby shops and restaurants and his home was very clean, quiet and beautiful. Only a few minutes walk from Otsuka station, we found it extremely handy for trips to nearby areas such as Harajuku, Ikebukuro, Shibuya and half an hours train ride to Tokyo central. Tomo kept in regular contact, including some reassurance when the earthquake hit Kyushu. On our departure we were given a gift as a token of his appreciation. I would recommend anyone who is intending to stay in Japan, they should stay in Otsuka Toshima-ku. Especially if you dont know Japanese all that well, Tomo is very good at his English. Next time we visit Japan, Tomo's house is first on our agenda for our accommodation needs.

We have enjoyed our stay in Tomo's house. Only 10 min away from Otsuka station (Yamanote line), we could access all the main sightseeing spots easily.
The house was clean and big enough to host our family (5 adults and one kid). With Tomo's instructions manual and personnal advises, we spent a good time living in this traditionnal style house.

It was a wonderful stay in Tomo's beautiful house located in Otsuka. The walk from Otsuka Station to Tomo's house is 5mins. The directions Tomo gave before hand were too clear to miss. Just right beside the house, there is a convenient store, less than 1 minute walk. Within 5mins walk, there is a huge 3 storeys supermarket. Out from Otsuka Station  have plenty of nice local restaurants, shops, and the must go drug store! I feel that, after a long day visiting the busy areas like Shinjuku, Shibuya, Harajuku, Asakusa and so on, it is really nice to rest in a place that feels like your own home. Tomo's house gave me the feeling as if I live in Tokyo. It was really comfortable and clean and you really feel like home. It's amazing. Otsuka it's not a very busy area as compare to Shinjuku or Tokyo station area. In additional, there is this very small place that sells bento set @ 550japanese yen(about 5USD). From the house turn left on the way to Otsuka Station. It was so good and we take away the bento set and have it in the house with sake and beer just simply made our last day in Tokyo wonderful. Please consider Tomo's place, he is a great host! I will come back!

Toni's house is well located in between JR station and a metro station. The house is very well kept, clean and spacious with all necessary amenities required by travellers available. Tomo is friendly and always available to assist. The availability of a portable wifi made our travelling so much more easier. Due to language barrier, Tomo made himself available to assist us in communicating with the courier company to on forward our luggage. Tomo is very thoughtful and considerate by providing detailed maps and directions to his house; this was most useful especially when we arrived in evening. I strongly recommend Tomo's house for anyone who plans to stay in Tokyo. I give Tomo's house a 5 star rating.
Tomo's house is well located and close to JR station. It is a big house with plenty space. We enjoyed a lot our stay there.

Tomo's instructions to the house was easy to follow.  He came to meet us shortly after we arrived.  Point out a few things, answered our questions.  All went well with the house and we loved the convenient location and the size of the house.

We loved staying at Tomo's house. He was very helpful and communicated with us before and during the trip. He very kindly offered to book taxis for our trip in the morning and made sure they were at his house in the morning. The house was spacious.There was enough linens/towels for us. The house was about 10-12 minutes walk from the Otsuka station. We highly recommend Tomo's house.

We loved our time at Tomo's house. It is very spacious - more than enough room for the 5 of us. The location was awesome, close to stations and much quieter than other parts of town. Easy to get around and Tomo provided a great map.
Good  place for small  group , quiet ,clean and convenient ，Tomo's father welcomed us  in the  house, he is very nice
Tomo's house was a perfect location for our family in the 4 days spent in Tokyo. Nice house, quite district, everything was available as promised. I recommend it.
A nice place to live with clean and comfortable environment. Daily commodities could be found easily. Extremely worth to visit.

Tomo's house is very nice and confortable. It is very well located. I advice highly Tomo's house.
Tom is a very nice host and very helpful !
Thank you Tomo !

Tomo's house was fabulous in every way. Everything was considered and provided to make our stay easy and comfortable. We were welcomed and everything was explained, lots of english signs to help differentiate products. The house was very clean and spacious for a Japanese house. Would recommend for family as nice quiet neighbourhood but easy walk to shops and transport. loved every minute of our stay.

The house is about 8 minute walk to the jr yamanote line otsuka station, so it is convenient to everywhere. and there are three 24 hr convenient store on the way to the station dont need to worry for being hungry in the midnight. there are three seperate room in the house, two rooms in the first floor and one in the second floor, however the room's temperature on the second floor is a little bit hot but it is very suitable for drying clothes. And the living room is big enough to sleep. Plus,Tomo is so nice that he even  lend us a wifi pocket which is super convenient and essential! In conclusion, no matter you are new to Tokyo new to airbnb or not, this is the best place to stay! thank you so much Tomo!

We loved our stay in Tomo-san's place! It was very conveniently located between two train stations and only 10 steps away from a nice convenience store. The house is clean and quite spacious for the five of us and the shower water was always hot. Most amenities like shampoo and soap are provided by Tomo-san. Another thing that we must mention is Tomo-san's hospitality! A great host, he constantly checked on us whether we need any assistance with anything. He even bought us some Doraemon souvenirs after he found out that we are Doraemon fans! Long story short, we highly recommend his place and Tomo-san's hospitality will make your stay even enjoyable!

It was a great visit, I have been traveling yearly to Japan since 2002, and I would happily refer my friends and relatives to his house. It had to old Japanese taste (settings) garden, sliding doors etc, along with the modern Japanese decor. Loved it

We had a fantastic stay at Tomo's place! It's a beautiful home, very conveniently located near the JR Otsuka station, in a quiet, residential area. Tomo is an exceptional host, and sent us a very helpful area map and house manual the week before we arrived, and his communications were always helpful and prompt. I highly recommend this listing!

We had a great stay in this house, it's exactly like looks from the picture, traditional Japanese style but inside is modern equipped and super clean. It's in a quiet residential area, convenient store, super market and many restaurants in the surrounding The location is very conviennent, few minutes walk to JR Otsuka station, u can reach any places by direct or change to subway. Tomo's instruction to the house is very clear and he is super responsive when I have some questions. With the value for money, I strong recommend this place for staying in Tokyo.

Tomo's house is really well located to explore tokyo, short walk to major transport links. The suburb itself is really worth exploring too. The third bedroom upstairs is a little difficult to use, but the two ground floor rooms are fine. It's just off the main road so quite quiet at night.
The place is very clean. Good location. Host gave very clear instructions for self-check in and check out.
The house is very nice, well equippend and clean. Very suitable for familes who have kids.
We had a good stay at Tomo-san's listing - place was a good walk near Otsuka station, house is spacious enough for several people, you can certainly feel at home.

房東貼心，各各細節都照顧到
房子風格讓人很放鬆
非常適合一家大小居住，地點隱密，安靜
週邊機能也健全，超商，超市步行3分鐘就到

I really enjoyed staying at Tomo's place. It was exactly as advertised, with 3 rooms (2 tatami rooms, and 1 room with 2 twin beds), as well as a dining and living room. One of the tatami rooms is a pretty steep flight of stairs. The location is walking distance from the JR Otsuka station and the Shinn-Otsuka Marunouchi line. The neighborhood itself is a mainly calm and residential, which we appreciated as we were traveling with my boyfriend's family.
The house itself was very quaint. It's mostly hardwood so may be a bit cold for those who aren't accustomed to wearing slippers around the house (we went during the fall/winter). Tomo provided a heater in each of the rooms, as well as additional blankets, so though it was cold outside, we were bundled up at night. One thing to watch out for is potentially tripping the circuit breaker. I think this is common in Japanese houses to not use as much electronics, but we accidentally tripped the circuit a few times (heater on, all the lights, turned on the tv, etc.) so it's best to try to adopt a conservative approach here.
Overall, we enjoyed our stay here and would definitely book Tomo's place again next time we're in Tokyo.

Tomo is very friendly and helpful, because our flight was an evening flight, he let us kept our luggages in his house even after the checkout time.
The house location is very convenient to access to public transport like Yamanote line. The house is very spacious for a family like us 5 adults and 2 children.
Only one thing is the circuit breaker is always tripping when we have to many appliances switch on together.

Very nice place and have a good stay. The check in  instructions given by Tomo is clear and easy to understand. the most important is his place is convenient to all public transport system! Can access by bus, JR or Tokyo Metro. The design of house are 100% same like the photo, overall it is very unique house and convenient for all!
Great place to stay for a family.

1) 700m from Otsuka JR train station.(15 minutes walk)
2) 450m from Shin-Otsuka Metro train station.(10 minutes walk)
3) 1 minute walking to 24 hrs convenience store.
4) 15 minutes walking to supermarket.
5) More than 10 Futon provided.
6) Got fireplace in case heater not functioning or too cold.
7) Late check out (6pm)
8) Got unlimited portable internet wireless.
9) Currently (January 2017) electricity keep shutting down when you switch on all air conditioner and heater. Need to close air conditioner/heater at living room and use fireplace. No air conditioner/heater at 1 of 3 room.
10) Perfectly great if stay during spring or autumn. During winter and summer need to be clever when use air conditioner/heater.
Good House !!
非常棒的地方，適合家庭旅遊，房東提供的資訊都很詳細，是一次非常舒服的體驗！

Tomo's place is great. Everthing is exactly what was described. Near JR Line & Marunouchi Line so its very accesible. There's convenience store near the place as well as a supermarket. I never got a chance to meet Tomo but He would message me to check if everything is fine. Will definitely stay here again on my next visit.

The house look exactly like the picture and well-equipped .We highly recommend this place .The map and manual are well-defined by Tomo.Easy access to all the surrounding tourist sights and attractions cause it's nearby the Otsaka JR station.
it's a great place to stay in tokyo, it's so close to anywhere. it's so clean and so calm place to stay. i wish i can stay again if i come to tokyo.
Tomo San is a lovely individual, great communication before and during trip, Only problem I would say is house is quite cold, but its close to transport and restaurants. Thank you Tomo

Both check in and check out were smooth and did not create any trouble.
The place was spacious and well equipped with all necessary things to stay for four days during early April despite the cold weather.
House is also equipped with gas heathers that helped a lot keeping the place warm.
Overall things were in line with the description and the expectations except the cleanliness of floors and shelves.
Our kids are allergic and the old town house was dusty creating some issues for us.

We spent 5 days at Tomo San place, everything is exactly like what was described, the house is very spacious, more than enough for 7 of us (6 adults and 1 child).
Tomo San Communicated with us before and during the trip, map that given by Tomo San to his house was very accurate and easy. Tomo San want to come to greet us during our stay, but we can't make it on time, very sorry Tomo San.
We enjoyed our stay here and highly recommend his place, Tomo San hospitality were great.
這次我們隨行共6位大人一位幼兒(1歲3個月)入住,房子很乾淨寬敞,附近就有超市和百貨公司,也有好幾間餐廳,大人小孩都住得非常開心,超級推薦!!
房子非常大、乾淨、安靜，從車站走去大約8分鐘很近，以後來東京有機會一定會再來住^_^

We had a great week in Tokyo.
Tomo is a very nice host and his place is in a quiet little street, yet within easy reach of Otsuka station where the Yamanote Line takes you to all places of interest or connecting lines. Little supermarket just around the corner and enough restaurants nearby. Tomo's place is ideal for family and provides ev'rything you wish for.
We will certainly stay here again next time we visit Tokyo.
Tnx.
Great location! Very clean and comfortable house! Definitely recommend.

As a Host Tomo was really helpful giving us plenty of information and help when we required. The location of the Place is a five minute walk for the Yamanote line which enables you to get around the different districts of Tokyo easily.
Night life in Otsuka isn't as busy or loud as other places in Tokyo so its a good place to stay for those who want somewhere to retire to after a busy day and for those who want to go out later than the trains we spent several nights in Ikebukuro which was about a half hour walk from the house.
The house was comfy and a nice blend of modern and traditional. It fit the five of us easily and would have still been comfortable with six if groups are willing to share the three rooms. The hose has a large living room dining area and kitchen with everything required to cook however we didn't use it instead going out for food every day.
Finally the Wifi card supplied was one of the most useful things imaginable and made working our way around Tokyo easy for the first few days until we got our head around places in the city and its public transport. If you are going in a larger group and you all want to do different things i would highly recommend you rent another one in the airport. But for us we managed comfortably with the single one provided by Tomo which was stable and throughout the holiday with fast speeds and great coverage.
Overall It was a pleasure to stay at this location and would use it again if I was going with a group of 3 or larger as the space is better equipped for larger groups. It comes highly recommended from me.

Tomo's place is spacious and relaxing. The decor mostly has a Den-like feel which made our group feel comfortable. The shower/laundry room and kitchen are both updated which is appreciable - the shower's water pressure in particular is really strong which was nice for our group. It is very easy to find and the neighborhood is pretty calm and chilled out. Nearest JR station has a few bakeries too which is always nice :)
地点十分方便，虽然有点旧但屋里打掃的相当干净，如果是家庭入住价钱比起酒店这里是很实惠的

The house was located at a very convenient location, plenty of small restaurants and convenience store nearby. The place fit 6 people very comfortably. The small decorations in the house are very cute. Tomo was super helpful and responsive, he often checked up on us and made us feel very welcoming. I would definitely stay at Tomo's place again.
we really enjoy our stay at tomo's house these days and it's really convenient for us to travel around the city because the house is near to the JR station.

Tomo was a great host. He provided very helpful and detailed instructions for getting to his home as well as a manual for the home so we knew where everything was and how to use it. The home was a short walk away from Otsuka station. Since we had a JR Rail Pass it allowed us to travel most places very easily. A small convenience store is literally around the corner if you need to buy drinks and snacks, and there are many small restaurants within 5 minutes walk. The house provided enough space for us and our three children to have their own space. It was also very clean, which is at the top of our list when we look for a place to stay. We would recommend Tomo's house to others that are looking to explore Tokyo and its surrounding areas. Thank you Tomo for your hospitality.
Sincerely,
Jim and Winnie

This is an exceptional place to stay in Tokyo.  First is the size; while the upstairs room is not air conditioned and therefore problematic to use in summer, the downstairs has two bedrooms and the living room and accommodate more.  We were three adults and two kids (10 and 12) and had a lot of room to spread out.  Second, the apartment was up to date; large fridge, washer, AC in the living room and bedroom.  Third, close to everything; convenience store literally two buildings over, and a short walk (10 minutes or less) to both the local train (covered by the Japan Rail Pass, it will get you everywhere) and the subway (which will get you everywhere else).  You can get around town in a breeze as well as the train station to head out of town.   Fourth, lots of basic shops in walking distance; the Otsuka Station has an adjacent mall with shopping (uniqlo), a bakery, a Starbucks, among other things.  In the opposite direction is the Life grocery store which has just about any food and other goods you might need.  There are various restaurants in the area, from gyoza to Michelin rated ramen.  Fifth, it's quiet; after the noise of Shinjuku or Shibuya, it was an oasis of calm and nice to see small homes and small streets.  Tomo had perfect instructions and rapid responses.  I already miss the place!  If you've been in any of the tiny places in Japan you'll be amazed by the restorative power of this home, to get you ready for another exhausting day of tourism!  Finally, don't miss the Gokokuji Temple, a 15-ish minute walk from the house.  Thank you Tomo!

O lugar é muito simpático e próximo do que é a vida de um cidadão japonês. As fotos refletem a realidade do lugar, e as informações providas pelo anfitrião são precisas e fáceis de entender. A casa provê todos os insumos necessários. Muito boa a experiência!

另外，行程中有一晚上我生病了發高燒，晚上10點多我聯絡 TOMO，想問一下附近醫生資料，得到他馬上回覆，後來 TOMO 還很熱心地過來房子給我提供幫助，要知道當時已經晚上 11:00PM，他還帶我去附近醫院，醫院當晚已經下班了，他還不斷打電話盡力去跟其他醫院聯絡，雖然當晚最後沒辦法見到醫生，但 TOMO 給我的止痛退燒藥發揮作用，我安然渡過了一晚，最後在我們多次感謝下，希望他早點回家休息，他仍堅持送我們回到房子才離開。我們都很感謝他真誠提供的幫助，縱使大家不同語言，那刻的幫忙，萬分感激！^^
第二天我們離開時，他還親自到房子來慰問，而且送上小禮物作為留念！
這次4天3晚的住宿體驗，我感到非常滿意！
*** 關於門外泊車情況，最好徵求屋主意見，因泊車地方不大，未必合適任何車輛。

Excellent location and the home was better than expected. Comfortable stay for my family of 5 adults and 2 kids below 3 years old. Tomo's house was everything that was advertised and more. We stayed at his place for 1 month and he provided all the amenities necessary for our group to stay. Our stay was a smooth trip and I hope we were good enough guests to be invited back! If you want to get a taste of the local Japanese home with a quiet, yet vibrant local neighborhood away from the big hustle and bustle of the city, Tomo's place is a great place to stay. I would recommend this house to anyone from first time Tokyo explorers to frequent visitors.
Good value for renting this house with free parking. But if arranged with curtain and 2 air-conditioner in the 2 bedroom,  owner was very nice man and helpful with response rate very fast.

Would recommend this place for anyone who would like to experience a traditional style Japanese home. Tomo was always quick to reply to any queries. We would love to come back and stay again on the future.

Tomo-san was very quick to respond and thorough with suggestions.
Their home was also very welcoming and helped eliminate any culture shock we could have been experiencing.
Fantastic place to stay for a family. Brilliant house and wonderful host.
Very nice flat. Very good and quiet location.

Tomo is a super host. Fast response. Give a good suggestion.
For the house. Easy to find and good to stay. Comfortable for 6 adult and 1 child. Near both of JR and Metro. Many restaurant and very close to supermarket.
Thank you tomo :)

This house is conveniently located near JR line Otsuka Station which is about 5-7 minutes walk in the quiet residential area.
It’s more suitable to family than friends traveling together since there is only one toilet and the only shower is within the main bedroom. It’s bit inconvenient to say the least if you are traveling with small group of friends.
This is a traditional Japanese house with three bedrooms two rooms with futon arrangement. The other has two single beds.
There is Michelin rated Raman restaurant near the house which is a plus if you love good Raman but you expect to queue at least 1.5 hours.
Tokyo is fun to visit as always.
Nice area and very convenient. Near to train station. Many restaurants around.
we liked the place, near the subway and we moved very easy thanks to the trains, it is a good area and the house is nice
Nice place. Easy access to  train and a range of eating places nearby and a big supermarket. Would be better with a TV with an HDMI port, and faster internet. Overall good.

素敵な庭があり、昔ながらのお家で2週間ほど住みました。TOMOさんが非常に優しいな方で、リクエストにすぐ対応してくれて、大変助かりました。特にチェックインの時、事情があり、結構早めのチェックインをしてくれたことに感謝してます。
暖房がいくつもあって、冬でも非常に快適に過ごせます。広々なリビングでもくつろぎました。
家具が古いけど、すごく昔が味が出ていて、とても好きです。和室があり、洋室のベットもあって、どちらでも体験できます。
地下鉄とJR山手線の駅が二つあり、どれも近くて、どこに行ってみ便利。
ところどころ、気になるところがありますが、全体に清潔感があります。たまにはお2階の歩く音が聞こえてきます、防音効果がちょっと弱いかなぁ。
素敵なお家で過ごせて、嬉しかったです。
Tomoさん、どうもありがとう😊
Tomo's place is incredible, it really gives you a feel of how is a Japanese home, the place is close to a few subway lines, I would stay in Tomo's place in my next visit to Tokyo!
Супер!

とてもオシャレでテンションが高まる空間です。
特に中庭の木がとても綺麗なので、心が安らぎます。
また、ホストTomoさんの対応が迅速かつとても丁寧で、やはり「スーパーホストの方は安心するなぁ」と改めて感じました。

キッチン&冷蔵庫が調理するのに最適なくらいポイントが高いので、料理をする方にとってもかなり良いと思います。
再度東京に来た際にはまたお世話になろうと思います。
友人にもぜひ勧めたい！

インテリアに凝った古民家です。
写真よりも古いイメージの方がいいと思います。
房子位置很好，两个电车线都很方便，附近走路几分钟有Life超市，自己做饭很方便。房子老了点，但内部很整洁温馨。房东Tomo人很友善，热情，很好沟通。
インテリアが凝ってあり、趣深い家でした。またホストさんも丁寧に対応してくださって素晴らしい滞在でした。
スーパーのライフ、大塚駅、新大塚駅へのアクセスが良く、とても便利な場所にあります。オーナーのTomoさんはとても親切な方です。
Tomo is a very nice host. Tomo has been very reactive and helpful with the various request we had.
素晴らしいお部屋でした！
This is a cozy home with good amenities. It has good privacy and is in a quiet area. It is well worth the money.
素晴らしい部屋、ホストの迅速な対応、素晴らしい経験でした。 機会があれば、また来たいと思います。
食器や家電、布団などとても綺麗でした。

A lovely little house close to everything. Just jump on the local JR train and Tokyo is at your fingertips.
The house is comfortable and cute. Well stocked with everything you’d need, plus plenty of room to relax.

The house is located in a quiet and nice place in Tokyo, but you can get everywhere in Tokyo quite fast. The weather was mostly very good and we could enjoy the nice garden, what is a very nice thing to have in Tokyo. The supermarket, restaurants and other shops are very near located. Tomo was a nice host and answered our questions very fast. We would definitely choose this house again. The only thing we missed was a dryer. It was not a problem but on rainy weather it is advantageous. By using the heater while we where in the house we could manage to dry the clothes fast enough before continuing our journey. The portable WLAN was also very practical. Thank you Tomo for the nice stay.

A chic house at a very convenient location. Plenty of amenities. The host responds quickly and was very helpful. It was quite charllenging to drive our 8-seater through the narrow alleys and park in front of the house, but we made it. It's not a good idea to move around Tokyo area with a car anyway, so we just parked there until we departed. Overall a nice place to be recommended.

Tomo is a good host and great communicator whose English is good.   The house is well located and has an old school charm.  It is good value and comfortably sleeps four in the summer and six when the weather is cooler.
Tudo certo, tivemos uma ótima experiência e voltaremos se possível.

Tomo was a great host, he communicated well with us and was very responsive.  The instructions for the house were very easy to understand and we enjoyed our stay. Please rent this home if you want a great expierence visiting Japan.

Tomo was a great host! He was waiting to greet us when we arrived and helped us find our way. The home was in a good location only 10 minutes walk from Otsuka station. A beautiful place with a lovely garden and according to my mom very comfy beds
Would definitely stay again

Our stay at Tomo's house could not have been more perfect. Being a family of three, we found the house to be huge according to Tokyo's standard. It's spacious, clean, well decorated with a traditional japanese feeling. The kitchen is well equiped and the bedrooms very comfortable. Most of all, the house is perfectly situated to explore Tokyo. It's a few minutes walk from Yamanote Otsuka Station and Shin-Ōtsuka metro station. You can get anywhere in Tokyo in 15-20 minutes, yet you are in a very quiet and cozy neighbourhood with small restaurants and groceries store. Pocket Wifi is provided by Tomo. Thank you Tomo for your hospitality!
Great place in a great location. A quiet neighborhood located conveniently near two stations. Tomo was quick to respond to any questions and concerns. Would definitely stay again.
가족모두 만족했던 집이었어요. 너무너무 감사합니다

Great house! Convenient to the train station and lots of restaurants, grocery and shopping nearby. Very nice decoration and everything you need. Highly recommend!
chic and traditional house with good location, thx
Very nice place to stay. I’ve travelled with family
It’s like another home for us to stay, well equipped & comfortable. Easy access to convenient shop by walking distance. Good accommodation for those travel with family.
A really nice stay in a spacious place and easy communication all the way.

Tomo's house was exactly what we were looking for.  It was large enough for a family of 5.  It had every amenity that you would need for a longer stay.  Neighborhood was peaceful and it was a short 8 to 10 minute to the nearest station.   Tomo was responsive to our inquiries.   Overall, deserving of 5 stars.

Perfect place..feel like home..convenience store 24hour nearby..very peaceful..not to far from town..very recomended..
위치도 좋고 주변에 편의점과 음식점이 많아 좋았습니다. 집도 아늑하고 좋습니다

Tomo's place was so awesome to stay at! He is avery welcoming host that is always responsive and helpful, and was even flexible with our check-out times. The house is really cozy and spacious! I am definitely coming back here nxt time I'm in Japan :)

房源位置非常的棒！屋內擺設與圖相當且非常有家的感覺，步行五分鐘左右可到車站/超市/超商，非常值得推薦及再訪！

Tomo was a great host and very responsive. The location was convenient, close to 2 train stations. The only thing you should consider when travelling with friends is that the bathroom is located in the main bedroom.
Perfect place. Extremely spacious and comfortable. Great location with stations easy to walk to. Really strongly recommended
Tolle Unterkunft in der Nähe der Yamanote line. Alles vorhanden uns sauber! Ingesamt eine tolle Unterkunft für die Erkundung von Tokio.
Toro is extremely accommodating, and the house is great. the location is very close to multiple metro stops. great place to stay while visiting Tokyo.
Tomo house was amazing. Loved the location and how inviting it is.

부모님모시고 저희가족과 아이 한명 총 다섯명이 묵었습니다. 공간 넉넉하고 있을 것 더 있고 샤워기도 수압 좋고 좋았습니다. 다만 오래된 일본 집이라
조금 춥고 먼지도 좀 있고 하지만, 일본의 할머니 할아버지
집에 놀러온듯한 기분을 느낄 수 있어서 좋았습니다. 사진보다는 허름한 느낌을 지울 수 없고 윗집에 발소리도 다 들려서 간혹 신경쓰이기도 했지만 괜찮았습니다. 무엇보다 아이가 뛰어 놀 수 있는 일층 집이어서 좋았습니다. 가족단위, 일본의 옛날 집을 저렴하게 체험하고 싶으신 분들께 추천합니다.
Thanks to Tomo for the nice stay!
Great location, spacious house, friendly and helpful host. Really enjoyed our stay.

Tomo's place was very cool. Although it was out of downtw Tokyo, the area was very chill. The house is very close to the tran station which was nice and the house itself was very unique. I would stay again!

Tomo’s house is just as described in the listing and the other reviewers—peaceful and yet close to several metro stations and plenty of restaurants and shops (including a grocery store within a few minutes walk).  The location is good overall for quickly getting to a number of tourist sights in Tokyo.  The house itself has everything you need.  The kitchen is relatively big compared to other houses we’ve rented in Japan, including a full oven/stovetop combo.  Tomo is a great host—very responsive and friendly.

A old, big house in a quite neighborhood. Very good connections with all the main touristic spots in Tokyo, two metro stations few steps away. Much larger house than the japanese standards, the house can easily host a family like our (we were four). Absolutely recommended!
This host truly is the best. We really appreciated everything about the house and the accommodations. Thank you so much for everything!

väldigt trevligt område med mycket och göra samt nära till tåget. Rymligt hus med plats för många. kan dock rekommendera att ta med en Chrome cast eller liknande då vtn inte har något sådant inbyggt.
Värden är trevlig och hjälpsam och svarar snabbt på både frågor och möjliga besvär.

Great place. The location is great if you're planning on staying a lot in Tokyo, but also for going outside of Tokyo. There are 2 stations near the bnb, although we only used Otsuka.
The house itself is in a pretty silent area with plenty of combini and good restaurants near it.
Although I haven't spoken directly to Tomo, she always responded quickly, and also offered different ways of contacting her outside of Airbnb.
Inside are also English instructions on any Japanese appliances you might need.
10/10 would rent again!

I had a wonderful stay at Tomo’s! The comfortable accommodations made me feel right at home, and Tomo's friendliness added a personal touch to my experience. The cleanliness of the house was impeccable, making my stay even more enjoyable. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a cozy and welcoming stay.
Great host, OK place.

Tomo’s place is very nice, very clean. The area feels safe and very private. There is a neighbor, but I never personally saw them.
Within a 5 minute walk to convenience stores, and 5-10 minutes gets you to the nearby station.
Tomo was very accommodating with our check-in. And very responsive if you have any questions.
My friends and I stayed here twice, and the accommodations were great each time.
overall it a good stay. just have some issues as the clothing rack is placed on the upper deck and in the morning.was awoken by vacuum cleaner sound from the upper deck.

Tomo씨의 친절은 최고였습니다. 👍
가깝고도 멀지만 일본과 한국은 예로부터 형제의 나라이지요~~ 친절함에 감동 이었습니다. 잘 쉬고왔어요♡
We had a great stay at Tomo’s place, it was comfortable with plenty of space for the two of us and easy access to public transit made it very convenient. Thank you for hosting us!

Tomo und sein Haus sind wohl das Beste, was uns für unseren Japan Urlaub hätte passieren können.
Ein super zuvorkommender Gastgeber, der jederzeit Erreichbar ist und auch für private Tipps für Sehenswürdigkeiten oder Tipps für Leihwagen ein Ohr hatte.
Die Umgebung ist Nachts, obwohl es in Tokyo liegt super still und alles was man für den alltäglichen Bedarf braucht, liegt in der Nähe. Das Haus hat eine super Anbindung an die Infrastruktur zwei Bahnlinien sind in direkter Nähe. Wir würden uns immer wieder für Tomo und sein Haus entscheiden ❤️

Traditional, renovated house, with awsome little garden. Incredibely clean. As a 6 person group, it was perfect for us.
Everything labeled in English, including the washing machine, which was great for us.
Within walking distance to 2 stations.

Nous avons passé un séjour de 10 jours inoubliable dans cette charmante maison traditionnelle rénovée, où nous nous sommes immédiatement sentis chez nous. La spacieuse disposition, le grand salon et la cuisine bien équipée ont largement contribué à notre confort. Bien que la salle de bain soit située dans la chambre principale, les toilettes séparées à l'entrée étaient très pratiques. Cependant, il est bon de noter pour les futurs voyageurs sensibles à la lumière que des masques pour les yeux pourraient être nécessaires, car il n'y a pas de rideaux.
Nous avons particulièrement apprécié la proximité des stations de métro, notamment Otsuka et Shin-Otsuka, ainsi que la présence d'un grand supermarché ouvert de 9h30 à 24h00 à deux pas de la maison et les nombreux restaurants et commerces.
Tomo a été un hôte toujours disponible et arrangeant. En somme, nous choisirions encore et encore Tomo et sa maison pour nos séjours à Tokyo, et nous espérons avoir l'opportunité d'y revenir très vite.
Logement très bien situé dans un quartier résidentiel (proche du métro et de la Yamanote Line) idéal pour découvrir Tokyo en famille ;)

Tomo's house was a very traditional Japanese style house. futons for 2 bedroom and the 3rd had 2 single beds. very comfortable stay and there was labels and instructions everywhere so you knew what to do.

Le logement être situé dans un quartier calme et bien desservie par la ligne Yamanote et le métro.
Tomo est un hôte très accueillant, qui fournit beaucoup d'informations pour se rendre au logement. De plus il saura vous répondre rapidement en cas de question.
Encore merci pour ce séjour
Enjoyed our stay here. Place was quiet, everything was clean, and the kids enjoyed having Netflix on the Chromecast. Really close to a fantastic supermarket and pretty close to the station.
很多設施都十分整潔和乾淨。

The house is older but is roomy, in a good location on the Yamanote line. Most places take about 30 minutes to get to.  The shower is great-tons of water like a waterfall. The kitchen  is well-equipped and we bought groceries at Life just a couple blocks away. The bedroom upstairs gets hot and only has a fan so it was uncomfortable to sleep in. (you can't open the windows because there are no screens and there are mosquitoes.  I can't imagine how hot it will get in that room in July and August!) There were two rooms with AC but you couldn't run both at the same time. 4 of the 6 beds are on the floor with very thin pads. I had a hard time sleeping on the floor. Overall, it met our needs.

Fabulous place to stay in Tokyo.  Communication prior and during our stay was perfect. House is close to two Tokyo subway lines for easy transport. There is a great supermarket 200 meters from the house which is super convenient. Otsuka station area is a ten minute walk where you will find about 50 fantastic little restaurants. Tomo's traditional authentic family house is also comfy and has everything you need. AC blows cold, beds are great, and kitchen is fully functional. Conclusion, next time I come to Tokyo, I will stay at Tomo's house again if possible.

Although it may be a little bit far away from the train station, it is a nice and wonderful place to rest, and it has a convenient place for you to take a train to everywhere and buy dqily stuff. If you want to choose a place which can take you different tourist sites, it is a good place to take you to ikebukuro and change to every train line that you want.

Het was een comfortabele woning met bijna alles wat we als groep van 6 mensen nodig hadden. De kamers waren mooi en er waren extra matrassen om het slapen nog comfortabeler te maken. Bovendien verbleven we in een gezellige buurt met 2 stations dichtbij ons verblijf, namelijk Otsuka-sta en Shin-Otsuka. Er waren ook een supermarkt en veel kleine en handige winkeltjes dichtbij ons verblijf. Tomo geeft duidelijke instructies en heeft ons goed geholpen toen we hem vragen stelden.
Ik zou hier graag nog een keer willen terugkomen in de toekomst en ik raad andere toeristen aan hier te verblijven.
Logement parfait pour découvrir Tokyo proche du metro et train quartier tres sympa et paisible !!

We enjoyed our stay in Tomo's nice apartment.  it's situated in a nice and quiet neighbourhood,  surrounded by great restaurant and near 2 stations which convenient to reach all the places we wanted to visit.  Even if it was terribly hot ( 38 degrees Celsius) the house stayed cool because of the airco.  Tomo responds very fast and is a great host. We can recommend the apartment!
Tomo went above and beyond to accommodate us, was very understanding and flexible with our requirement, was great to have so much space and still have the convenience of location

Very nice and confortable Japanese style home with a parking space in the middle of Tokyo. The house was super clean and very well organised, and the communication with the host was excellent. There are supermarkets very close to the house so it was easy to get a nice dinner after a long day of sightseeing. There is a washing machine, iron, ironing board, hair dryer, etc. The only two aspects that people need to be aware of are: a) the parking space is very very small so it doesn’t fit a full standard car, but that’s not an issue as you can leave half of the car parked and the other half sticking out into the ramp that leads to the house, b) there is only air conditioning in the two bedrooms downstairs, but not in the top bedroom, which means that this third bedroom is basically unusable in summer when it’s very hot. Overall we had an amazing experience and we would definitely stay here again.

A great central location to many Tokyo must-sees and must-dos.
Cozy spot with a fantastic and attentive host.

If you're staying in central Tokyo, the most popular areas are pretty expensive. Otsuka was a perfect alternative for my family, with Tomo's beautiful house located a short walk from both subway and JR stations. It's a short trip to popular stations on the Yamanote line, and an easy commute to Haneda airport or Shinagawa for the Shinkansen.
The house itself had ample space for our family of 4, the kids with their own room and a living and dining room to spend time in comfort between excursions. nearby restaurants and grocery store made the neighborhood feel perfectly suburban and accessible.
Highly recommend this home for small groups and families! Thank you Tomo-san!
Tomo的房子是一个在安静街区的日式建筑。距离M新大塚和JR大塚线路都在10分钟以内的步行距离。周围有多个便利店也有较大的life商超，品类齐全。房子二层没有空调，目前东京的气温较高，晚上不能作为卧室睡觉。房源的一层有间榻榻米和一个有两个小床的小卧室。Tomo能及时给予回复和帮助。

The place was very attractive. The second and third bedrooms weren’t as nice but luckily our kids aren’t too fussy. Not much in the immediate area but walking distance from the Yamanote line which was very handy. Overall a great stay.

Wow! A great size apartment just 5 mins from Otsuka train station. Tomo kindly let us check in early to drop bags off, the apartment was clean and comfortable and had everything we needed including a fan.
The area itself felt really calm but had plenty of shops and restaurants nearby.
Would definitely recommend
Thanks Tomo

Le logement est très spacieux, parfait pour une famille. les transports en commun sont accessibles à proximité et rend la plupart des quartiers de Tokyo accessibles en moins de 30 minutes.
Le logement est très agréable et Tomo à été un hôte vraiment très agréable et réactif avec lequel il est facile de communiquer.
The Airbnb is good stay for a family .
Très bon séjour chez Tomo qui a été très disponible pour nous accueillir et répondre à nos questions. Le logement est très confortable. Merci pour tout
Great location and great place to stay! The house is much more spacious than the average hotel off the Yamanote and has plenty of creature comforts. We will certainly be back!
Great stay!
5명에서 정말 편안하게 잘 지내다 갑니다. 집앞의 나무가 특히나 예쁘고 오래된 집이지만 무언가 편안함이 느껴지는 곳이었습니다. 따듯한 물도 잘나오고 너무 잘 지내다 갑니다!
tempatnya tenang tapi dekat dengan keramaian...ada dua stasiun dekat dari rumah..kami senang karena rumahnya tradisional jepang...

Le logement de Tomo correspondait parfaitement à la description.
C’est une maison privée, confortable et bien équipée. Nous étions 5 : deux ont dormi dans la chambre occidentale avec deux lits simples, et trois dans la pièce avec tatami, où des matelas et oreillers sont fournis. Le couchage au sol est finalement confortable, on s’y habitue vite. Une troisième pièce peut aussi accueillir des couchages si besoin.
Le quartier est résidentiel, calme, mais avec quelques bons restaurants et plusieurs magasins à proximité.
La maison est à 10 min de deux stations (JR et métro), ce qui en fait un excellent point de départ pour visiter Tokyo et ses environs. Nous y avons séjourné pour explorer Nikko, Hakone, Kamakura/Enoshima, et même Kyoto.
Enfin, un grand merci à Tomo pour son accueil chaleureux et sa grande flexibilité. Je recommande vivement ce logement pour un séjour en famille ou entre amis à Tokyo.

房子較老舊 但家人還能接受
2樓沒有冷氣 但是有風扇
在這個季節晚上還能接受
房東很友善

整体住的很舒适！我们6个人都睡得很好！
虽然是梅雨季但是住在这里的时间只有一天是在下小雨，所以整体温度和阳光都比较好。可能因为是木头房子所以会让人感觉有些潮湿，两间榻榻米的房间都没有空调，不过这些天温度都在15-23度，不开空调刚刚好合适，且晚上在一楼睡觉还有些冷。
阁楼上温度会高很多，阁楼没有窗帘，如果对光线敏感最好戴眼罩。
入住有准备牙刷牙膏，本来以为不会有拖鞋，但实际上准备了6双！对于不适应光脚踩地板的人来说非常惊喜！
我们有问题时房主回复的也非常及时，解决问题非常详细！也非常感谢大晚上房主还能及时回复我们！😄😄

Great house. The house is cozy and nice. All the stuff we need are prepared. I really like the design of the house. Mr.Tomo is a such nice householder and he always responds our messages on time.
非常棒的房子 tomo人很好 回复消息非常快 我非常喜欢这个房子的设计和小细节 非常温馨 我们6个人留下了非常美好的记忆 谢谢Tomo！
Thanks again for hosting us!!

The stay could not be any better. The hospitality and level of service of the host and Japanese people in general is something on another level. We definitely now have a place now to stay in our next trips.
大変丁寧に対応して頂きましてありがとうございました。部屋も綺麗でとても良かったです。ありがとうございました。
Mr Masakatsu is a very nice and warm hearted person!! The location is quite easy to find and the hand books are very useful. You will never lose the way. Good experience here!

I was able to get my family have a good time in their stay in Japan. Their hospitable accommodation and service was very inviting and comfortable. I look forward in booking and staying in their establishment again especially with the relaxing onsen experience I had.

The home was nice and as stated in a nice place. Had access to all necessities and was able to move around easily.
Masakatsu was very welcoming and helped me when I needed. Only the best
The apartment is excellent,  location is very close to the metro station and you get tickets to the onsen, it was a good experience.

We were travelling with our little daughter and stayed at 4 different  Airbnbs during our Japan trip and this was our favourite one. A lovely, comfortable and very clean room with everything a traveller could ask for and lots of additional information provided by Masakatsu. It's not super centrally located, but very well connected (to the train station with very frequent trains it's only a 5-min walk), so location was no problem at all. Would definitely stay here again.
Masakatsu was very quick with responses and even though i had gotten lost and came 2 hours late, he didn't get mad! Great guy!

私は、今回3週間の滞在する計画であった。約2週間は、同じ宿泊先に泊まり、荷物の移動は避けたかった。
今回の宿泊先は、そのニーズに合致していて、とても満足した。
船堀駅と言う位置は、千葉方面か新宿方面に出たい私のニーズに合っていた。
普段バンコクで暮らす私は、日本ではゆっくりと大きな湯船に浸かりたいとの願望があり、本宿泊先は銭湯に無料で入浴できるため、一日おき位に利用した。しかも、天然温泉。箱根に行く計画もあったが、その必要は無かった。十分温泉を楽しめた。
この場所は、東京の観光地から離れているように思われるが、便利な都心は非常に高いので、ある種穴場的な立地だ。

Our host was very accommodating upon our arrival and personally waited for us to arrive even though we had come later than the check-in time because we we're coming straight from Kyoto on the shinkansen. He made us feel very welcomed and had a host of pamphlets and maps to help us get to know the area and even told us which trains to take because we were meeting friends for dinner that night and the closest subway stop's line changes after certain hours. The apartment itself was very clean and warm in the cold winter and exactly what we expected. We had stayed in other areas of Tokyo before (Shinjuku, Ikebukuro), so it was nice to stay in Edogawa, as it seemed older and more traditional. There was also tons of small restaurants around! We went to a small gyoza shop right near the station and made friends with a really nice local originally from Okinawa (even though our Japanese was terrible) who wanted to pay for our meal! If you're looking for a more residential and quieter area that's probably more like how most locals live definitely come here!
Awesome place to stay and Masakatsu is very helpful if you have any questions.
Clean Safe Quiet . A very good base to start to experience Japan /Tokyo!!

I highly recommend Masakatau's place, its close to public transport, supermarket, restaurants etc. Try the onsen before you go to sleep you will have the best sleep ever.This is my 2nd visit hopefully more to come.
Loved the place, thank you so much for having me! Will definitely be back in the future :)

House was very large and cozy and has all perfect amenities. I could sleep well with air heater. Everything was better than I expected. Also, you can enjoy hot spring for free.
Host was really friendly and helpful.
Subway was very close to the house. You can easily to central of Tokyo.
I think I couldnt find other comparable place on this price.
I will book this again if i come to Tokyo again.

This place felt like home. I wish I could have stayed longer!!! Everything you need and more in regards to amenities. It’s also quite large by Japanese standards. Very stylish and clean. I had a wonderful time here!

Super friendly host, cozy appartement, great stay. The onsen next door is great and I've been given tickets for sento for every night. Also a WiFi hotspot was provided, very useful when exploring Tokyo

Good place to stay for a trip, clean and near station, also a supermarket.
they also provide the onsen ticket, very helpful to relax bodies.

We spent our last three days in Tokyo here. We arrived a bit later than expected, but got a very warm welcome and an immediate recommendation for the best Okonomiyaki, just around the corner. Everybody was very helpful with all our questions. Also the Onsen is basically just next door and highly recommended to visit. I definitely recommend staying here.
fantastic place. I will be staying here again
Very good location with every need available at an appropruate price. The host made sure that we were clear on the room and he even added umbrellas in case of rain.

This place was an excellent stay in Tokyo! The apartment was so clean and well-kept. The added bonus of the onsen/sento was a huge plus. The location is a but far from central Tokyo and the various tourist spots, but if you plan right, you can get to where you need to be in about 20-30 minutes by the station close by. All in all, an excellent apartment and I would definitely stay again!

We stayed for 5 nights and it was well worth it. Masa provided us with good directions from Narita airport so it was easy to find. We checked in late in the evening and Masa was so kind, asking us if we were hungry and gave us snacks! The place was spacious and clean. It's in a quiet neighborhood  so it was nice to come to after exploring busy Tokyo all day. I would stay again.
很好的旅行体验，旅行的日期是东京的冬天很寒冷但是房东很温暖，虽然左右check in的时候的一面之缘，房间位置很好，距离地铁站很近，只有第一次去的时候走错了路，周围711居酒屋温泉都很全，很满意，

Masa, the host, is very helpful and informative. Responds to questions very quickly! Funabori is a great area to explore. Very clean area of Tokyo. And the local residents have been very friendly around the surrounding area. Lots of Foodie places to check out as well! You will not regret staying in Funabori!
It was so nice. Everything was perfect.

Masakatsu-san's apartment felt like my Japanese home away from home. Masakatsu-san was excellent, going so far as to buy me dinner on my first night in Japan! Absolutely a wonderful host and human being in general, I would recommend his apartment in a heartbeat. Everything was sparkling clean and well-maintained, and I slept well despite it being my first time sleeping on a traditional Japanese futon. A very comfortable experience overall.

We enjoyed our stay here. The apartment was located very close to a Subway station, which made visiting Tokyo attractions easy. The room was very clean, (with coffee) ! Also, we very much appreciated the portable wifi. Would stay again!
very nice

He's the best host we've ever had. The apartment is really nice and clean, you can easily access every destination. We received many useful informations. Had a comfy vibe. The pocket WLAN is so helpul! Our host helped us with a difficult situation we had during our stay. We are very thankful. We can recommend it  100%, you will have a good time here.
nice place to stay for going Disneyland and disneysea..can take bus there from ichinoe station..
Chose this to be near to Disneyland, and it was quite convenient. Quite neighborhood and comfy unit to stay. The unit is equipped with most of the amenities we need. Highly recommended!

Die Unterkunft war wunderbar man hatte alles was man brauchte!
Ruhig gelegen in einer Nebenstraße, aber sehr nahe zum Bahnhof, von dem man super Tokyo erkunden konnte!
->Man sollte allerdings die "Rushhour" Zeiten meiden, wenn man es nicht mag mit fremden Menschen zu kuscheln ;)
Supermärkte Restaurants und die typischen Getränkeautomaten sind an jeder Ecke zu finden !
Masakatsu ist ein super Gastgeber ! Hat uns gleich bei der Ankunft mit zum Lunch genommen und wir konnten sogar früher ein-checken. Er hat uns auch viele Tipps gegeben was wir in Tokyo machen können .
Wenn es uns noch einmal nach Japan zieht, trotz der vielen schönen Orten die es auf der Welt noch zu erkunden gibt, würden wir 100% wiederkommen!!
Very convenient location. Quite area. Very clean.

Super friendly people, if you need help don’t hesitate to ask them. The apartment was very clean and spacious for two people. The neighbourhood is very beautiful and the apartment is close to the station.
Experiencia excelente. Masakatsu fue muy atento a cualquier pedido o comentario en todo momento. Muy recomendable!

Appartement parfait, très propre, on avais tout à dispositions, le quartier et très calme pour bien se reposer, c’était deux semaine parfaite et Masakatsu nous a très bien accueilli, super gentil et très à l'écoute pendant notre séjour chez lui. Je recommander énormément.

Masakatsu's place is an area of narrow quiet streets, with restaurants and supermarket close by.  The place itself is comfortable and well organised including amenities like washing machine and portable wifi to take with you when exploring, and the very close family historic onsen that is freely available for guests was a highlight. Masakatsu gave us loads of help in untangling the Tokyo metro system, an excellent host.  All round just loved the slice of authentic Japanese life we had for 3 days.

Masakatsu était très serviable, très disponible.
Le lieu était très propre, le quartier très familial, très sympa.
Le métro a 5 minutes a pieds. Tes bonnes adresses de restos autour.
Nous avons adoré notre séjour!
깔끔하고 주인분의 섬세한 케어로 잘 지내다 갑니다. 방도 분위기 있고 기대 이상이였습니다. 온센 티켓도 챙겨주시고 친절하셨습니다! 추천:)
Not in the center of the city but then again a relaxed homebase for exploring Tokyo. Close to local shops and restaurants. The onsen is amazing and rewarding after each day of citytripping!
The onsen is so nice after a long day!!
honestly a gem in edogawa-ku

This was my first time ever  in Japan and abroad .Masakatsu was accommodating to times of check in accordance to my flight after check-in the neighbourhood is a niche of want to experience the life of a local ,the neighbours are friendly as you treat everyone politely and nicely is the best way to go,the Onsen was beautiful truly breathtaking and not too far from the subway station so getting too and from places is so efficient when the metro system is organized. I can’t wait to comeback!!!!
Great place! Easy to get places via the subway, and the Onsen was great after long days of sightseeing!
Close to everything. Easy to maneuver. Host will make necessary accommodations, very kind. Very clean and quiet.  My elderly mom and I felt safe. Thank you for everything.

This AirBnB is a hidden gem. Do not let the “distance” from Tokyo dissuade you from booking here. It is in a wonderful and quiet neighborhood very close to Funabori Station, which runs a line that goes to many places. Purchase a 3 day pass and travel anywhere in the Tokyo metro area for 1500yen. Then come home to your spacious and beautiful quiet apartment in Funabori, gather your bath things, and head down the block to the onsen, where friendly locals give you tips about their home. There are lots of cheap and delicious places to eat and a bunch of supermarkets too!

We loved the traditional decor and access to the onsen facilities. The in-suite kitchen and laundry were a lifesaver. After booking, I was sent a 30 page guide to the area that was very helpful.
I would happily stay at this location again but two things to note before booking are:
1. Location
This apartment is located very close to a train station, but it is not a JR station. If you plan on using a JR Rail pass, you will need to purchase a ticket ( only a few dollars).
2.Beds
As pictured this location has traditional tatami beds. I loved having the opportunity to sleep on a piece of history. But be aware that a tatami bed and a western bad are very different, and I was grateful to have brought a pillow from home.
Neither of these things were bad, but just elements of our stay we didn't expect. Overall we were exceptionally happy with the facilities and Masakatu's attention to detail in both the booking process and area guide.

Masa is every bit as helpful as everyone says. The apartment is not centrally situated, and this suited us. It is really easy to hop into the city or visit any of the destinations and then get back to a nice quiet local suburb. There are good restaurants and many convenience stores nearby. A great place to start a Japanese trip.
Very nice and clean and close to train station
Spacious for two people and very clean. Close to supermarkets and train station to the principal points of the city. Peaceful neighborhood. Enough amenities. Perfect to rest during your holidays.
Fantastic host who did everything to make sure we were comfortable
Host was very welcoming and responded very quickly and accomodated our needs. Place was very clean and spacious.

Masa was a fantastic host. During our stay there was a typhoon, Masa made us feel very safe and was very good at communicating with us - he even invited us down for beers and food (he is a great cook!) Very welcoming and a great location surrounded by lots of local traditional restaurants. Would definitely recommend.
Masa-san was a great host to us and welcomed us heartily. The place was clean, cozy and conveniently located!

Amazing stay from beginning to end. Here are some things that we have about this place
-Location is great its about less than a 10min walk from the station.
-The general atmosphere was very safe and also full of life.
-The area itself has a good amount of things to do. There is a little golf range right outside and a sega world near the station.
-Upon arrival we were treated great and were given amazing hospitality despite the little language barrier
-The onsen that is FREE with your stay by the way, was a great experience that you must try. Whenever we went we left feeling extremely refreshed after a long day of walking. Also its about less than a min walk from the place.
There are many more things that i can list but i will keep it short. 10/10 we would come back here.

A fantastic space with outstanding service in all aspects. The host went above and beyond for us during our stay making everything much easier for non-Japanese speakers. Strongly recommend this area too as it is easy access to all of Tokyo and very close to the train station.

We cannot say enough good things about our stay with Masa and crew. Such lovely people! Very comfortable room with everything we needed and very close to the metro line. Nice neighborhood and also right next to a Japanese hot springs or “onsen” which has been in the family for generations. Wonderful place! We will definitely stay here again on our next trip to Japan!
This is a place I would love to stay at again! It felt like my own home! He was very nice and and it was clean and close to the train station.

I was afraid if this apartment being too far from the city, but Funabori Sta. Is just 5min walk away and Shinjuku Line which will leave you in Shinjuku in 30m or in Akiba in about 20m , so it ended being a total win.
The apartment is bigger than the average you may find listed for Tokyo, it was clean, and having a kitchenette and a washing machine were nice extras.
The Onsen located in the neighborhood is so convenient, and have some cheap prices for the amenities. Masa-san provided free entrance tickets also. What else you may ask for?
Beside all this, the documentation provided was pretty accurate and covered almost anything you need to know about your staying and options in the sorrunding.
In overall I highly recommend this place and I'll try to repeat on my next trip to Tokyo!

A wonderful place to stay.
I enjoyed every bit of it.

Masakatsu’s place in Funabori is great for young couple staying in Tokyo. There are a big super market near by where you can get groceries and cook at home. The apartment is right next to a coin operated laundry place where you can dry your clothes after you finish your laundry inside of the apartment. You can also go to the onsen downstairs after a long day. The location is very convenient to the train/metro station and walking distance to a variety of food and convenient stores! The room is quite spacious compare with other places we have stayed in Tokyo and the owner is super friendly and helpful! Highly recommended!!!!

Masa is without a doubt one of the friendliest hosts I’ve ever come across. We arrived earlier than check in, yet Masa allowed us to check in a few hours earlier and on check out he allowed us to leave our luggage in his office so we could explore one last time before leaving Japan.
Masa’s home is large for a Japanese home, close to the train station and close to a lot of incredible foods - I recommend the gyoza place by the train station!
Masa showed us everything and even took my luggage upstairs for me, which is was beyond lovely.
Thank you again Masa for a great stay, we will be back!
Parfait comme logement ! On à apprécié :)
Highly recommend great place owned by nice people.
あ
最高です😃👍
Great person and enjoyed the stay. Great for the price

Perfect location to get to know the suburbs of Tokyo. The apartment was clean, beds were comfortable and the shower and bath were nice. Masa was very responsive to our questions and even took us on a tour of Funabori. He knows all the best places! Would stay again just to hang out with Masa 5/5.

Great place to stay to explore Tokyo!  Masa-san keeps the place impeccable, and was always available in the office downstairs when I needed assistance.  The onsen next door lives up to the legend; great place to rest your feet and relax after a long day tramping around the city.  The neighborhood feels very clean and safe (close to primary schools, etc).  Good access to the Shinjuku line, which cuts right across the central axis of the city - even though it's a bit out of the way, it feels a lot closer.  Wish I'd had more time in the neighborhood, and I'm looking forward to coming back!

The location is in a nice quiet area, a few minutes to the station. The room was nice, clean, and comfortable. Also Masakatsu is a very kind and wonderful host and very helpful as well! I felt welcomed and would definitely come again.

Overall a good place. Nice interior, but not the best lighting and more miscellaneous items than I needed. It's very close to Funabori Station which is convenient, and the area is peaceful, yet accessible with lots of cherry blossoms.
My one major complaint would be the bed and pillows. The beds were hard as a rock and the pillows were too. It was pretty hard to sleep. I didn't really mind the lack of sitting/workspace, but it would have been nice to have real wifi instead of a pocket WiFi.
Masakatsu is kind and patient, he waited for us till late night because of delay of flight. His place is clean and comfy. Around 10 minutes walk from metro station. Highly recommended

Masa-san was by far the best host I’ve come across.  Great food and drink recommendations. Responsive and although my Japanese is not great he made me feel at home. Thanks for everything , see you again!
Great place and a super nice host!

Masa's place is perfect. he's a super friendly host who introduced me to some of his friends and we all went to dinner! the apartment is great, super clean and a quick walk to the subway which goes right across the city. I didn't get a chance to use his onsen but I'll definitely come back and stay at Masa's! I highly recommend it!

Awesome host, he stayed up super late for us so we could check in when our flight landed and made sure we were well taken care of for the duration of our stay. We will definitely be back! Highly recommended for first time travelers.

The accommodations were excellent just as advertised. It was a nice quiet place to stay, but with excellent transportation nearby.  Our host Masakatsu was kind and attentive. He provided excellent recommendations and a comfortable place to stay for an extended period of time. He provided excellent instructions for the entire experience including traveling to and from the airport. Overall, my experience was enhanced by staying at this listing.
交通便利，干净整洁，老板热情友善，性价比很高

The area is very local but is interesting and has many places to go around. Masa was very responsive and hospitable! A friendly person through and through. The apartment itself is nice and hidden from the roads, but requires stairs to get up to. Nice two beds, a kitchen and tidy bathroom. Feels like a home away from home!
Amazing place. Close to Funabori station, and a just slightly west of the location is a walkway alongside the river.

Masakatsu was a incredible host! Before my departure, he sent me all the informations for a good trip!
The appartement was only a few minutes from the train station and just next to an awesome onsen.
The appartement was equiped with all your supplies that you need and made me feel like home.
I will definitly come back!

El alojamiento se encuentra en un barrio muy tranquilo en la periferia de Tokyo. cerca del apartamento hay unas fantásticas opciones de restaurantes más económicas en comparación con el centro. Además hay un onsen muy tradicional que es una de experiencia que hay que probar. Masakatsu fue un huesped excepcional que nos ayudó siempre que lo necesitamos. Su cariño, amabilidad y entera disponibilidad fueron un factor decisivo, que hacen de este apartamento una muy buena opción para aquellos viajeros que busquen una opción más tranquila.

Loved staying here during my time in Tokyo, Masa was extremely helpful even before we checked in by helping my partner and I acquire some tickets and was there again to save the day by helping us enter the attraction. The place is filled with charm that makes it feel like home after a long day out and about during your travels and had plenty of local recommendations on what to do if it's your first time in Tokyo. The station is just down the road with plenty of local eateries and convenience stores and I would highly recommend this place if you're looking for a place that's peaceful and quiet after a busy day. Will definitely be back the next time!

Masakatsu san was a great host who made me always feel welcome. The area is very walkable and the Toei Shinjuku line station is very close and that gives you access to most places you'll want to go with a single transfer in most cases. The Edogawa area is very beautiful in the parks around the waterways. The rest of your needs as far as groceries, convenience stores, etc are all available close by. There are a couple of restaurants in the same building too! I ate at the ramen shop below the apartment several times and the food and service were both excellent. Also when there are social events going on Masakatsu san doesn't hesitate to extend an invitation. I wasn't able to attend any, but it was nice to get the invitation. This was my third trip to Japan and it's definitely a space and area I would stay again.
Clean place with everything that we need. The host is very responsive and flexible.

Masakatsu is very friendly and provided a detailed guide to exploring Tokyo. The room is larger than expected, and the washer was very handy. There are restaurants next to the place to go if you feel hungry.
Massa os super friendly and helpful. We will stay again.
Host was very friendly and even gave me a free drink when I arrived

The apartment had everything one needs. The location is well connected and quite. The neighborhood seems to be its own little place with everything important really close. The owner was extremely kind and helpful. Due to our delayed flight we were late for our late check in, however he waited and was really positive and even offered food at that late time of the night.
Would totally come again.
Nicely located

Our stay at Masakatsu’s place definitely added value to our trip. It was cozy, and has everything we needed. A good walk from the station which is along shinjuku line, hence easy to get around tokyo.
Masakatsu has also been a very accommodating host, my companions had to do late check in, I appreciate that he waited for us to make sure we’re settled.
I definitely recommend his place, and look forward to staying there again next time!

We stayed at Masa’s place for 4 nights. I visited with my partner and my 1 year old. We really enjoyed the access to the onsen and multiple restaurants nearby. It’s relatively close to the train station and the neighbourhood is pretty quiet which was great for sleep time for the baby.
Masa was very attentive and communicated well.
Overall great stay.

I always feel right at home at Masa’s place. The host is very  responsive and will immediately come to resolve  any issue that might arise. Finally got to try the neighbourhood public bath too and it is the perfect end to an exhausting long day.  Might be useful to note that the microwave oven and kettle cannot be used simultaneously as it short circuits the apartment. Always glad to return for another stay. Thank you Masa-san for your kind hospitality.

We had a lovely time. Masakatsu-san was very kind and even helped bring my bag upstairs for me.
We highly recommend this place. It also came with 50% off vouchers for the Onsen next door but we didn't have time to use them. The Aeon grocery is great, so are the nearby restaurants.

여행 자체를 좋아하기도 하지만 특히나 일본 여행을 좋아해서 전국을 벌써 20번도 넘게 방문했습니다만, 이번 도쿄 여행은 제게 특별한 경험이 되었습니다.
소박하지만 안전한 숙소였고, 세탁기와 우산, 섬유탈취제, 냉장고, 냉동고, 조리시설, 커피머신 등 편의를 위한 용품이 충분하게 제공되었습니다. 숙소 내에 비치된 가이드북도 정성스럽게 준비해주신 마음이 느껴졌습니다.
복잡한 도쿄의 도심과는 달리 완전한 주거지에 위치하고 있어 귀가 후엔 조용하고 차분하게 휴식을 취할 수 있었습니다. 어쩌면 일본의 가장 평범한 이웃들의 삶을 잠시 경험해본 듯해서 너무 좋았습니다. 역과의 거리나 오는 동선의 이온몰(슈퍼마켓)도 늦게까지 영업하고 상품도 다양해서 좋았습니다.
신주쿠선 이용도 편리했고, 막상 여행하다보니 몇 번 갈아타면 도심과 생각보다 멀지 않은 편이었습니다. 디즈니까지 3천엔 정도면 택시로 30분 이내 소요되는 점도 매우 장점이었습니다. 혹시 도쿄메트로패스 1~3일권을 미리 구입해오신다면 후나보리역에서 교환이 되지 않아 불편하실테니 도심역에서 교환해오시거나 현장발매기에서 구매하시는 게 더 편리하실 것 같아요. 신규 구매는 가능한데 예약 QR코드를 통한 교환은 지정된 역이 있어 교환이 어려웠습니다.
호스트인 Masakatsu 씨를 비롯해 방 안내를 도와주신 스탭분도 친절하셨습니다. 소통할 일이 많지는 않았지만 따뜻한 느낌을 받았습니다.
단점이라면 5박동안 수건이 한 세트 제공되는 점, 숙소가 다소 추운 점, 다소 방이 어두운 점, 방음이 거의 되지 않는다는 점이 있었지만 워낙 옆방에 사시는 분이 조용하시고, 저 역시 조심하면 되는 일이었어서 크게 문제가 되는 정도는 아니었고 좋은 경험이었다고 생각합니다. 온천은 일정 상 이용하지 못해서 아쉽습니다.
그리고 지내다보니 후나보리역에서 나섰을 때의 그 집에 온 듯한 반가운 감정이 좋은 기억이 되어서, 또 도쿄에 갈 일이 있다면 꼭 후나보리에 방문하고 싶어요! 벌써 그립습니다!
Good as always

Perfect place to stay for a couple. Very conveniently located near a subway station and restaurants. Masa was so helpful with recommendations and our late check in. We stayed 5 nights and would love to stay there again when we return to Tokyo. Definitely recommend this place. Also it was nice that it was very quiet at night, especially after a full day visiting crowded Tokyo!

Best place for the price! It was everything I could have ever wanted for my first experience in Japan. Masa-san was very helpful and informative, he was a very great host.
Funabori was an amazing neighborhood and I am very glad to have experienced it. I highly recommend this location, you won’t regret it.
Eine nette, einfache Unterkunft. Die Betten waren sehr gut. Obwohl die Unterkunft im Osten liegt, ist sie gut mit der Bahn angebunden und man kommt zügig in die Stadt.

Wonderful stay, and the host Masa was so kind and accommodated our travel schedules when we had delays. The best part is the access to the onsen right down the street. You can enjoy the hot and cold tubs every day for a very reasonable price!

Masakatsu-san was absolutely responsive and amazing to deal with. he was very kind and was always willing to help. The place itself is charming and is decorated very nicely. While I do think that the location is out of the normal path of tourists, I would 100% suggest this place for a nice relaxing experience and to do something very unique that most people don't get to do

Live like a local in a quiet town, do what's local do, relax in the 400 year old Public bath with locals after a tiring day is a great enjoyment. There's a handy guide book in the room for places and foods info around the town and Tokyo area. Masakatsu San is friendly and helpful always around to help if needed. Very clean room and spacious extact as what it shown in the picture, thanks to the host I had a lovely stay during my short visit.

The apartment is in a very safe and quiet neighborhood. it is 5 min from the subway station and grocery stores and it is serviced with a direct line to Shinjuku. connection to Narita and Haneda is convenient.
The best thing is the use of the onsen (at a small charge). A good idea after a long day walk. The beds are real mattress. It also has a Japanese soaker tub for the days that you don't want to go down to the onsen.
I enjoyed staying Masakatsu's place and will stay again when I visit Tokyo in the future.

5 stars all around. I have limited Japanese skills, but I was able to check in just fine and have a great stay. Masakatsu was very helpful and understanding when I arrived very late for check-in.
The location is very peaceful and full of great restaurants.
Once I got the hang of the trains, just about everything I wanted to go see in Tokyo was at most 45 minutes away by train (for cheap).
You can't ask for much more at that price point, highly recommended! Would stay again.
great place to stay and a nice quiet part of town with tons of great places to eat at!
在東京中比較寧靜的小區，住宿附近都是當地居民。車站附近設施齊全，還算方便
Great host as always!!!

Ein wundervoller Gastgeber, welcher uns bei jeder Frage geholfen hat bis wir eine Antwort gefunden hatten - vielen lieben Dank nochmal fuer die Tax-Free Auskunft:)! Weiterhin äußerst hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend, zu jeder Stunde. Das kleine aber feine Apartment hatte alles was wir gebraucht haben und das Onsen nebenan hat den absoluten I-Punkt gegeben. Ich empfehle aus vollem Herzen das Gesamtpaket weiter! TOP! :)

We really enjoyed our stay in Masakatsu’s apartment, it‘s a lovely neighborhood with everything you need and Masakatsu is super helpful when you have questions and very friendly! We’re definitely booking it again!
Will be back next time

Was an amazing host and really gave a crash course on how to use some of the amenities, which was very helpful since they are so different from my own. Had an extremely  detailed  book on good restaurants and where to go.

We landed late and got a little lost on the way in - when I messaged Masakatsu he responded right away and kept in touch to make sure we arrived ok.
The location is great! It’s a calm neighbourhood with great food options nearby and an Onsen next door!
For our first visit to Japan, this place was perfect! We had everything we needed in the room, plus it came with a pretty cool coffee maker 😀
I would recommend this place to anyone!!
a very nice appartment in a lively suburban city. You'll find everything you need. thé Shinjuku Line takes in dontown Tokyo in 40 minutes. Masa-san was a gracious and attentive Host.
Nice host

Great location close to bus stops and trains. Directions lead right to the property when given the name. The apartment was beautifully decorated, plenty of kitchen ware if want to cook at home, plenary of space, comfortable beds. I really enjoyed the view out the window. I love the simple only need just enough of Japanese made apartments. Very minimalist. If wanting to get away from the overcrowd of Tokyo but close enough. This is a great location. I would highly recommend and would be happy to stay again.
화장실, 욕실, 세탁, 식사를 해 먹을 수 있는 모든 시설이 개별적으로 되어 있어 매우 좋았습니다
Masa, my friend, thank you very much.

Loved staying with Masa-san, Edogawa city is a great place, not a huge night life but that's what I like most about it, I highly recommend staying here! Masa-san is a great host! I stayed with him the last time I went to Japan and I will stay with him again when I come back in the future!

Masakatsu was very nice and the place is lovely. Great amount of space and storage for 1-2 people. The toilet and bath are separate which always helps make it feel clean and spacious. The design and art around the room is very thoughtful, cute, and pretty. It’s right above a delicious ramen shop and down the road from the best Korean bbq I’ve had in Japan.
There’s a clear binder with instructions on your stay, how to use appliances, and lovely suggestions and commentary.
Plenty of vending machines and recycling bins nearby which is so useful.
The onsen is not actually the same building, but it’s nearby.
Overall, I enjoyed and was very comfortable. Thank you, Masakatsu-san.

Die Kommunikation im Vorfeld war unkompliziert und ein später check-in (nach Mitternacht) überhaupt kein problem. Masakusa ist ein sehr netter und freundlicher Mensch.
