Das Appartement war wie beschrieben und sauber.
Die u Bahn ist gut zu Fuß erreichbar. Von dort aus waren es ca 30 Minuten bis Innenstadt (je nachdem wo man hin möchte).
Ich kann die Unterkunft nur weiter empfehlen!
It has been a real pleasure for me and my friend to spend few days in this Airbnb. I recommend it

It is very near the train station, we didn't have a problem going to the apartment from the train station even if we have our luggage. It is nearby restaurants and there's even a ramen noodle shop on the same building. There's even a grocery/supermarket nearby, we bought food from there and cooked it at the apartment. There's even a crane arcade and gashapons (we weren't able to go to because of time) that's very close to the apartment. Onsen was just a few steps away from the apartment, a must try :-).
Owner was very friendly and provided clear instructions and even a quick tour inside the apartment. There's even a free portable wifi that you can take out of the apartment.
The toilet doesn't have the automatic wash things (where you have buttons to wash your privates), but the toilet seat is warm. Still a win!
Overall, we had a great stay and will book it again if we ever come back.

We had a wonderful stay at Masakatsu's apartment. It is within walking distance of public transportation and equipped with everything needed for a peaceful and convenient stay. The onsen is just 10 meters away, making the experience even more enjoyable!

I thoroughly enjoyed my stay at Masakatsu's place. The apartment's proximity to the station made it convenient to travel to various popular cities in Tokyo. As an introvert, I appreciated the tranquility of the neighborhood and would highly recommend it to solo travelers and those who love quiet places.
Thanks for a great stay!

Masakatsu is a GEM. What a great host. He provided us with tons of restaurant advice, was eager to help us in any way. He even took us out on the town!! We felt so welcomed in Funabori thanks to him.
The apartment is petite but serviceable. One note: if you are a tourist hoping to spend your time in Shibuya/Shinjuku, Funabori is pretty far away. You’ll feel like you’re in a Tokyo suburb here. We loved having a local experience, from our jogs along the nearby canal to eating delicious ramen around the corner.
Loved visiting the onsen (heads up: it’s closed mornings and also on Wednesdays), and having a washing machine.
Thanks for everything, Masakatsu!!!

My wife and I had an amazing stay/experience here - Masa san welcomed us couple hours before the check in time and let us drop off the baggage at his office, then proceeded to take us out for lunch & show us around the town. We felt so welcomed and taken care of. We loved that the neighborhood is a quiet little town with good restaurants (the ramen place downstairs was the best ramen we ever had) and the train station nearby. We’d come back here in a heartbeat next time we visit Tokyo!

I recommend this place to anyone wanting to visit japan. You’re given thorough instructions for everything you need and the room has everything you need it to have plus host are amazing and nice, I’ll definitely recommend this to friends and try staying here again on my next trip
great as usual

les points positifs :
-Le logement est propre
- facile d'accès
-il y a un onsen juste à côté très agréable
Le super point positif : L'hôte est vraiment très accueillant, à l'écoute et chaleureux.
Le seul point négatif : l'appartement est peu isolé (comme beaucoup d'habitation au japon) dû aux normes anti-sismique. Si vous êtes sensible aux bruits, prévoyez de quoi vous isoler.
bilan: nous avons passez 5 jours très agréables ici et nous reviendrons sans hésiter. Le logement est sûr et propre et très bien situé pour visiter cette capitale.

We returned to Masa's place after visiting last year. Masa and Nanako are wonderful. They are incredibly kind, helpful and accommodating. They invited us to dinner and we had an amazing time.
The apartment is the perfect size with all of the right amenities.
Funabori has many local restaurants and shops that are great to visit and the walks along the river are perfect.
I hope to stay here again in the future!
Thank you, Masa!
非常棒的房间，体验当地人的真实生活，隐藏在一大片居民区中的公寓。交通便利，设施齐全，因为是居民区所以很安静，地铁很方便，到市中心距离不远，既适合旅游观光，也适合短期度假。可惜这两天因为身体原因没有体验温泉，希望下次能补上，没错，下次再来东京还会选择这里！

Highly recommend staying here.
Host was so helpful with anything we asked about.
Room was exactly what we needed.
So close to train to anywhere.

It was our second time at Masakatsu‘s apartment and we really love it! The beds are really comfy and the room is very clean, and spacious and has everything you might need. The onsen was great, too! As he says, it’s no problem being heavily tattooed and the water was really relaxing! We‘re definitely coming back!
Great stay. In a peaceful part of Tokyo and conveniently located close to a station and close to a beautiful park.

We loved the location and the surrounding quiet residential feel, and it was easy figuring out the train/subway system from Funabori station. The place is pretty small, but that's Tokyo I'm sure! The hot water was not on, nor was the heat, but the host was pretty responsive and helped us out. The beds were super comfortable! And definitely go to the Ramen restaurant downstairs, delicious!
My stay here was excellent. The area is very quiet and Funabori station is close by making it easy to get to the shinjuku line!

This place is about 20-30 minutes from downtown locations. Easy walk to train station from apt. Can catch metro and only one transfer if going to Narita. Cheap and easy. Place felt like seedy hotel. Beware if you have heavy luggage or bad back room up steep stairs. Although it is listed as onsen free for guests it is not, it is half price. Well worth it but discrepancy should be corrected. Host seemed pretty annoyed when I pointed that out. On the positive side hot water good, beds ok, quiet at night. Big negatives, no screen on window by bed, if you like air you will get mosquitos. Also bathroom has air freshener stick and toilet bowl cleaner which made the whole place stinky despite wrapping both in plastic bags.

We had a great stay here. It’s about 30 mins from the Tokio city center. There are restaurants and groceries around so you have everything you need. Masakatsu is very kind and communication was seamless. There is a hot bath at the same premises, unfortunately we did not have time to try it. Totally recommend.

We needed an affordable place to stay (single mum and two kids) for our Tokyo adventure and this accommodation ticked all the boxes. Having a supermarket close by was also fabulous as I could save some cash on meals if we felt like a quiet night in from time to time. Great to stay in a local residential neighbourhood for contrast to busy central Tokyo and the subway station is very close by - easy to get wherever you need to go. I would definitely book again.

We had a wonderful stay with Masakatsu-san, who was an incredibly kind and helpful host. The room was cosy, clean and the perfect size for our family. We especially enjoyed relaxing in the onsen 30 seconds away — it was such a treat! The location is fantastic, with lots of amazing restaurants and a train station just a short walk away. There is a river lined with 1000 cherry trees — the blossom is spectacular — and a special highlight was visiting Funabori Tower at sunset — highly recommended for the views.
Most importantly, Masakatsu went above and beyond to help our family during an unexpected situation after a travel accident. His kindness and support made all the difference — we genuinely don’t know what we would have done without him. We can’t recommend this stay enough!
Stayed for two weeks, highly recommend!!!

awesome place and right beside an onsen, but more the so, a chicken specialty ramen bar. if only we could have stayed longer. would consider booking again if we feel the need for an off the city, but connected area

J’ai séjourné environ 2 semaines dans ce logement et j’en garde une excellente impression. Tout était parfaitement conforme à l’annonce, avec une propreté impeccable. Le lit est confortable, l’air climatisé fonctionne bien, la cuisine, bien que simple, est tout à fait adéquate pour un court séjour et si vous cuisinez peu (pas de four et une seule plaque de cuisson). La machine à laver (seulement laveuse, pas sécheuse) est facile à utiliser et la salle de bain est très bien, et ce, avec de l’eau chaude en tout temps.
Le grand atout de cet appartement, c’est sans conteste sa localisation. À seulement 5 minutes de marche de la station Funabori, il est très facile de se rendre partout dans Tokyo. De plus, on trouve à proximité plusieurs konbinis (7-Eleven, FamilyMart, Lawson) ainsi qu’un grand supermarché (Aeon) Le quartier est calme et agréable, on a l'impression de vivre comme les locaux.
En résumé, c’est un excellent pied-à-terre pour explorer Tokyo. Je reviendrais sans hésiter. 10/10!

Die Unterkunft bei Masakatsu, war mehr als ich erwartet habe und bleibt mir somit in einer super Erinnerung. Die Ausstattung war top und die Hilfsbereitschaft von Masakatsu war über aller maßen gut. gerne komme ich bei meinem nächsten Japan Aufenthalt wieder.

Masa is an excellent host! We were warmly greeted upon check-in and he went over the onsen, gave us a quick room tour and food suggestions in the area. The room is super clean and beds were comfy. Cooler kept it nice and cold. Great area, only 5 minute walk from Funabori station. This was a perfect stay. Highly recommend!
Masukatsu san was very gracious and accommodating host. Her apartment was the perfect place for my short stay in Tokyo. it's very close to the station and in a quiet and safe  neighborhood.

Masakatsu was a fantastic host! Very helpful and always answered our questions. The space is clean and is exactly as seen in photos and description. Having a train close by was super convenient and the onsen was perfect to relax after a long day of sight seeing. Would definitely stay again.

for a 1st time solo traveler, my experience at Funabori was beyond great. I would go out in the morning and come back at night without any concerns.
Masa was also extremely helpful. I would definitely stay here again.
I will be back!
Har varit en perfekt plats att varva ner från allt stök i centrum. Masakatsu gjorde allt för att jag skulle trivas. En riktigt bra värd 😄.

L’appartement était impeccable , très bien situé à à peine quelques minutes de la station métro de funabori. Je me suis très bien reposée dans ce logement qui est parfaitement bien équipé, le quartier est très calme avec tout ce qu’il vous faut dans les alentours. Parfait pour un séjour relativement long, on s’y sent comme chez soit !!

I absolutely loved my stay here. If you are looking for a quiet and relaxing stay outside of central Tokyo this is the spot. Amazing restaurants and onsen right outside and everything you could need inside including a washer/dryer! I will be booking again for my next Japan trip!

Mikako was the best host ever! Very responsible, super communication and warm! She made me breakfast, which tasted great!!! It was totally an amazing experience in Tokyo.
This place is a dream. Immaculate in cleanliness, The house is brand new and well-designed with everything you need. I can say it is the best house ever in my life. I have never seen this beautiful one. Especially the kitchen and living room was awesome. It has the stone and glass table, which made the room attractive. The bathroom is huge for Japanese standards, very comfy bed, and a 5 minute walk to the nearest station. Don't miss your chance to stay here!! Thanks Mikako!
Mikako is amazing! Her house is so clean and beautiful, and she often cooks a wonderful dinner for us - such a lovely host!!

Mikako and her family are amazing! I've been staying with them for about a week and a half and its going to be hard to leave! The place is as it is pictured and is kept beautifully clean and comfortable. Mikako has been incredibly kind and hospitable, making my entry moving to Japan smooth. She also is an incredible cook and has invited me to join them for many fun nights! The neighborhood is very quaint with all you need close by including a 5 minute walk to Yoga Station on the Den-en-toshi Line, which 15 minutes to Shibuya. I also like that it is close to a park and a river where you can enjoy being in nature. Definitely recommend staying here!

I can only say wonderful things about Mikako and this house. The apartment is in a very safe neighborhood and very quiet even though it is just 10mins from Shibuya station. The apartment is exactly how it's described and in a very clean. The communication between the host and me was amazing and they answered all of my questions. Mikako was an awesome host and she made me her homemade food, which tasted really good. I would recommend this apartment and these hosts highly!

Mikako was an amazing host, she answered all my questions promptly and made me great food. The apartment was perfect, clean, quiet and had all the amenities I needed. The location was very prime as well, we were walking distance from the train station. Thoroughly enjoyed my airbnb stay here, will definitely visit again if ever the chance.

The house was perfect in a great location, easy 5min walk to the closest station with all the shops and great places to eat. Although small the room itself is perfect for a couple and all the descriptions the hosts gave us were really helpful. Plus Mikako is an amazing host, very kind and funny even though her English is not perfect. We already decided to come back here soon!

Loved my stay. Mikado and her family were very welcoming and my stay was a pleasure . They cooked me several breakfasts and a gorgeous evening meal which was not expected.
Lovely house in a great neighbourhood which made a great contrast to Shinjuku where i stayed for 7 nights.
My only advice if you wished to stay here is the area is quiet and away from the main tourist areas but for myself this was a fantastic contrast.
Thank You for a lovely 3 days.

I stayed here before, but already came back and enjoyed my stay again. Mikako is always nice and wonderful. This house is still beautiful and clean as my last stay. I feel like home when I stay here and will come back again soon definitely.
非常乾淨，住起來算舒服。

Staying with Mikako has been the highlight of my trip.  She is so kind and welcoming,  I felt at home from the moment I arrived.  Her home is beautiful and immaculate, and Mikako is a fantastic cook!  The room is exactly like the pictures;  I was very comfortable there.  Her house is a short walk to the station, a quick ride into Shibuya and is surrounded by many good restaurants and cute shops. I loved getting away from the city center every day and coming back to such a warm home.  I miss being there already!

Mikako was a wonderful host.  Her house is warm and modern and her welcome was very warm too. We had some lovely  discussions and she and her husband were thoughtful and patient hosts. She loved sharing information about traditional food  and places to visit, but also made sure I was happy and comfortable with the food and facilities  she provided for me. She made the first days of my first trip to Japan easy and showed a generosity that was outstanding. I would thoroughly recommend her as  a host.
thank u so much！It's a wonderful experience！Mikako and her family are so so so kind and sweet！My friend and I do like u and wish could meet u again～thanks！

Highly recommend this to everyone that is going to Tokyo!!

Mikako and her husband Yuri make me feel very much at home. Even though i arrived late on the day (after 10pm) they waited for me with smiles and graciously showed me around the house. They were very warm and welcoming.

Mikako is a great cook and they invited me for dinners. During dinner, they will suggest areas to visit in Tokyo and Japan , which was very informative.

The house looks exactly like the pictures shown and it is very clean and tidy.
The distance from the house to the train station is about 5-7 minutes walk and there are lots of shops, supermarket, restaurants along the way.

will definitely stay at her house again if I'm in Tokyo Thank you very much for everything!!

私は2.22-3.7の2週間東京でインターンシップのため利用させていただきました。私は1人で東京に来たのも初めてで、2週間という長期の滞在はすごく不安でしたが、22日の夜最寄りの駅まで迎えに来ていただき、夜はお寿司をご馳走していただきみんなで一緒に食べました。私はすぐにうちとけました。なので初日から夜はゆっくり眠れました。毎日のインターンもすごく充実していて、帰ると毎日私のことを気にかけてくださり、楽しく1日あったことを話しました。
最終日もお昼ごろまでゆっくりさせて頂いて、最後は駅まで送ってもらいました。
お家の場所も商店街をぬけた先にあり駅も近くてすごく良かったです。
お部屋もすごく綺麗で、毎日の生活はほんとに快適でした。
奥さんも旦那さんも息子さんもみんなとても良い方たちです！また東京に行くときは顔を出しに行きたいなと、もちろんまた利用したいと思いました。長期の滞在でしたが、本当にありがとうございました☺︎

Mikako and her family did everything they could to give us the best Tokyo experience. Her husband drove us around. Her sons help us get information about the places in the city. Besides, her younger son has a super beautiful voice ;p  We will miss our "Tokyo Mother", her lovely family and the beautiful house. Hope to see them again in the near future.

숙소는 요가역 (시부야 역에서 덴엔토시선을 타고 5~6정거장이면 갈 수 있습니다) 으로 부터 약간 떨어진 곳에 위치해있습니다.
가기 전 날, 호스트인 Mikako 로 부터 집이 위치해있는 상세 지도와 연락처를 메일로 받아 찾기 수월한 편이었고 구글맵을 통해 찾아가니 제법 수월한 편이었습니다.
시내 중심가와 가까운 곳 이지만, 조용하고 한적한 주택가에 해당 숙소가 위치해있어 편안하고 한적한 여행을 즐길 수 있었습니다.
깨끗하고 쾌적한 집안 환경과, 친절한 호스트가 있어 여행이 더욱 즐거웠으며 함께 한 마지막 날의 저녁식사는 일본문화를 이해 할 수 있는 더없이 좋은 경험이 되었습니다.
게스트 나라의 문화에 대한 이해와 노력이 있어 고마운 마음이 컸으며, 일본 가정의 문화를 저 또한 배울 수 있어 행복한 시간이었습니다.
때문에 일본에 대한 좋은 인식과 이미지를 가지고 여행할 수 있었습니다 :)
Mikako 부부와 그의 가족들은 상냥하고 따뜻한 마음씨를 가진 호스트입니다. 일본에 처음 가는 여행객이라면, 혹은 일본 가정의 문화와 더불어 일본인과의 커뮤니케이션을 희망하는 게스트라면 꼭 이용해보시길 바랍니다.
(5월에 또 만나요 ^^!)

Mikako and Yuji were great hosts! We had such a good time with them. Mikako's cooking was the best Japanese food we tasted on our whole trip. They made us feel at home in their house, but at the same time made us feel like we were staying at a 5 star hotel. The images and description are extremely on point, so we knew exactly what to expect. Having spent a few days prior to this stay in downtown Tokyo, staying in Setagaya was extremely relaxing. Even though the train ride was a bit longer, we throughly enjoyed the relaxed atmosphere of Setagaya. If (or should we say when) we return to Tokyo we would love to come back for a visit!!! Thank you Mikako and Yuji!! See you soon in Iceland :)

Our stay in Tokyo was our first visit to Japan and our first time using Airbnb. We are truly converted.
Firstly Mikako provided us with excellent directions to her perfectly located home. A charming and quiet 5 mins walk to Yoga station passing by quaint little stores. However only 12 mins away from the excitement of Shibuya. I rate the location as very convenient.
Mikako and Yujis home was beautiful and extremely comfortable. Of course the bedroom was small however this is Japan but it was more than adequate for my husbands and my needs. The bedding was clean, warm and fresh. The bathroom facilities were excellent and Yuji washed our clothes and towels everyday which was a pleasant surprise. The remainder of the house was super clean and beautifully outfitted exactly like the photos that are presented on the Airbnb site.
The dinner and breakfasts Mikako and Yuji prepared where phenomenally good. They went above and beyond to truly give us a wonderful Japanese healthy cultural food experience with local beer and Sochu. Their warmth as hosts was much appreciated and their enthusiasm and zest for life made us feel right at home, Mikako is such a beautiful person.
Yuji took us to their local department store and gave us information about foods and prices and he was also very helpful in explaining to us how to travel to different locations around Tokyo. Yuji not only met us at the train station at 12.30 am in the morning he also dropped us off at the Shinkansen on our departure to Nagoya.
Both their adult sons were very friendly and helpful as well.
Mikako and Yuji are wonderful hosts with a beautiful home in a fantastic location. I would recommend them 10/10.

Mikako and Yuji were the perfect hosts and have a beautiful home. They were incredibly courteous and helpful throughout our stay and went out of their way on many occasions to ensure that out trip to Tokyo was the best that it could be.

The house is in a quiet neighbourhood and just a short train journey from Shibuya station. It is a fantastic base to explore Tokyo at your own pace.

We would highly recommend anyone- whether it is your first or hundredth time to Tokyo, to stay with these lovely people.

It was a excellent experience meeting Mikako, Yuji and there family.
They were very kind and welcoming. Mikako is an amazing cooker. We got a chance to eat real home made Japanese cooking and it was better than any restaurant we ate in. We had a Friday dinner together and it was very fun. We even got a decent breakfast every day.

The room was pleasant. We had two separated beds but is was o.k, they were comfortable and clean. In general the house is very clean-we also got new towels every day.

The neighbourhood is quiet and pleasant. The house is close to the Yoga station but Its important to know that its not a centred location. Saying that - for us it was a good place to come back to in the end of a busy day.

We highly recommend to come here.

Excellent place, amazing hosts! I would very highly recommend staying with Mikako and Yuji, they were an amazing couple too meet and very helpful! The fleet is about 15 minutes from Shibuya so very accessible. The room is nice and comfortable. I'd very highly recommend this place!

Mikako and Yuji are fabulous hosts, we stayed with them for almost a week. They have a beautiful house and family. Our room was on the top floor, there was one bed and one mattress, both were comfortable. The room is bright and we had a long desk to put our things on. The location of their home was great for us as the wedding we were attending was 5 minute drive away. The subway is a 7 minute walk away. There are lots of shops and cafés by the Yoga subway station. During our stay, they made us try some vegetarian Japanese food which was so yummy. We had a good breakfast everyday, we really enjoyed the soy muesli. They are very attentive and generous people, helping us discover many local things including a trip to the local supermarket together. Even though we do not speak the same language we managed to have some long and animated conversations. After our experience at the sumo tournament, they even recorded the final match of the season for us to watch at the end of the week. We were so touched by their gestures, when we left we exchanged gifts in the hope that this is not goodbye but see you again.
We wish you all the best and hope you can come visit us! Thank you and best wishes.

Mikako San and Yuji San are fantastic hosts! Words can not express my gratitude and I am so glad to have the opportunity to stay with them and get to know them. Mikako san is a terrific chef, her home cooked meals are not only delicious but also healthy with beautiful presentation. Yuji San welcomed me patiently when I check in as I was late for check in, and both Mikako San and Yuji San sent me off early morning to the airport bus stop and I truly feel they are treating me like friends. Mikako San has cooked many dinners for me for free and I truly appreciate the delicious Japanese home made meals. Koki San is very friendly and speaks perfect English it is great to meet him briefly too.
The place itself is very pretty, just as described as per the photos. The house is clean and tidy, a beautiful place to live. Yoga is very convenient to commute around Tokyo with public transportation, the neighborhood is full of shops, supermarkets and local eatery. I really enjoyed the house and will definitely recommend it to everyone who are visiting Tokyo.

I have had a really great stay, the house is clean, tidy and modern. It makes me feel at home. My room is airy,bright and beautiful, the bed is super comfortable too.
Mikako san, Yuji San and Koki san(Sorry Ryoto san I didn't manage to meet you) were all incredibly friendly and helpful! Yuji san waited for my check in patiently, as I arrived late than expected from Hakone. On the day of my departure both Mikako san and Yuji san drove me to the airport express bus station very early in the morning. They also invited for dinners and Mikako san is such a fantastic chef, cooking delicious and healthy meals. I also had a brief chat with Koki san, who is energetic and very smart, working hard at a big corporation while still doing own startup. I truly feel they are now my friends after this short stay in their beautiful home.
The area is perfect, quiet local residental area but very close to Yoga station, cute shops, supermarkets. Easy access to public transit and public parks. The train from Yoga goes to Otamachi station directly. What a nice spot! I totally recommend staying here :)

My experience of staying in Mikako-san's home was superb. I was truly grateful for Yuji-san and Mikako-san's warm hospitality. They treated me like a family, sincerely, not only providing a very clean and comfortable environment for me to stay but also cooked me some breathtaking Japanese food which was really tasty. They even picked me up at the station upon my arrival and walked me to the station when I left. I kind of felt like being spoiled. I enjoyed talking with them very much, from where Yuji-san and Mikako-san generously shared about many aspects of Japanese culture, covering dining, lifestyle, language and the country's variety. They are also well-traveled people so have positive attitudes towards life. All in all, it was a very exceptional experience on Airbnb! Koki and Ryoto are very nice people too. They should be awarded as the Best Host!

Location:
The house is located in a very peaceful and safe residential area where makes you enjoy the life just as local people do. Nice shops and Setagaya Arts Museum are nearby, just a few minutes' walk. Also Mikako-san's home is closed to the Yoga station, providing easy access to downtown. I would definitely recommend it to everyone.

We had a wonderful stay at Mikako's house. She was a warm and gracious host who made us feel like we were a part of her family. The house is immaculate. We enjoyed staying in a residential area that was not far from the action. Would love to stay again one day.

We arrived at the train station and were picked up by Mikako who led us on the short walk up to her house (about 5 minutes).
We met her husband Yuji and within a few minutes of talking to them it felt like we had already known them for ages. We felt very much at home and Mikako and Yuji could not have been more friendly.
On our first evening Yuji cooked us okonomiyaki, which has been one of the best meals we've had in Japan so far!
They helped suggest places to visit in Tokyo. Yuji gave excellent advice on how to get to places. We arrived during peak holiday season! They knew enough English for us to communicate, but it helped that I knew a bit of Japanese as well.
The town Yoga is about a 10-15 minute subway ride to Shibuya (200¥ for a ticket). The town itself is brilliant! Very quiet and safe. There is a park around the corner from their house which unfortunately we didn't have time to visit.
Everyday Mikako prepared breakfast. On some days it was continental and on others, a traditional Japanese style. Both were very healthy.
On one evening Mikako invited us to a family meal with their son Koki, who spoke very good English. We had some extremely delicious Japanese style food.
Thank you Mikako and Yuji for letting us stay, we couldn't have asked for more! I just received my exam results with an A grade in Japanese at AS level. Maybe I'll end up at Tokyo university. If so, can I come and stay with you? ;)
どうもありがとうござあいます！
Mikakosan's home was perfect. Clean, comfortable, and easy walking distance to Yoga station. They really made me feel at home here. Also, very quiet at night, which is great for Tokyo.
I felt I'm at home literally. I can't mention one negative thing. The neighborhood was too cute and real and very close to the subway which was 12mins away from shibuya.

Makiko and her husband are both very warm and welcoming people, and they made me feel like I am at home in a foreign land. The apartment is very clean and comfortable, albeit the room being on a slightly smaller side. Throughout my stay Makiko and her husband were more than happy to recommend places to go and how to get there. Makiko was kind enough to cook me breakfast and dinner, and trust me she is a wonderful cook at that! On my last day they kindly drove me to the Yoga station even though it would just take me a few minutes for me to walk from their place. Would definitely recommend this place!

大変お世話になりました。
素敵なご夫婦、お部屋で、息子共々気を使わず、ゆっくり休めました。

もっと、美加子様ご夫婦とゆっくりお酒を飲みたかったです。

また馬事公園だけでなく、都内に用事あるときも、お世話になりたいです。ありがとうございました。

Traffic is very convenient, rooms and accommodation very clean.
mikako and her husband very kind ,mikako breakfast very heathy and delicious,mikako cooking very well.
mikako and her husband help arrange travel and planning every day .
I really like living here,I will come back soon.

6泊７日の滞在をパーフェクトなものにしていただきました。一人旅だったのでホテルに泊まるのとは大違いでした。
閑静な住宅街にあるきれいな一軒家で、とても手入れが行き届いた快適なお家です。
Mikakoさんも旦那様もステキな楽しい方で、駅までの出迎えと見送りをしていただき、毎朝いい香りのコーヒーを淹れていただき、友人との外食が無い日には美味しくて健康的な手作りの夕食までごちそうになり、いろんな会話を楽しむことができました。古い友人を訪ねていって歓待を受けたような気持になれました。
アメリカからのビジネス出張で利用させてもらいましたが、滞在中は非常に快適に過ごすことが出来ました。

I had a perfect stay!
Mikako and her family are super nice and their hospitality is outstanding. I really enjoyed chatting with them during and after the delicious and healthy meals (breakfast and even dinner!). They are great ambassadors for their country.

The place itself is just as described. Clean, comfortable, in a nice neighborhood and easily accessible.
I am looking forward to staying there again some day!

Mikako and her husband were very hospitable and welcoming!

THE PLACE:
Clean, modern, all essential amenities provided.

THE LOCATION:
Cute, safe suburb conveniently located near the subway station and just a subway station ride or two away from wherever you need to go in Tokyo.

THE HOSTESS:
We cannot rave enough about Mikako and her husband, who really went out of their way to make us feel welcomed and introduce us to the Japanese culture. Being that it was our first time in Tokyo, they provided great recommendations on where to go for sightseeing and eating, as well as how to get there. Mikako even walked us to the subway station and helped make sure we buy the subway ticket correctly and see that we get on the right subway! As a bonus, she is a superb cook!!

We would definitely recommend anyone visiting Tokyo to Mikako's airbnb and would stay with her again when we visit Tokyo in the future. They really helped enhanced our trip!

Mikako and Yuji were the best host! They are the sweetest couple and I really felt like home staying there for the first time in Japan. Mikako is a great cook, delicious breakfast and dinners (mmm takoyaki!) and they were super helpful in making sure I don't get lost in Tokyo! Almost missed my train to the airport on my last day and Yuji kindly offered a ride to the station. Of course it would not be complete with a bento lunch Mikako prepared in case I was hungry. Thank you Tokyo mommy

Mikako's house is really beautiful and functional. Glad to see your family. Thanks for your daily breakfast and provided many traveling information in Tokyo. We felt warm during this trip.
I very enjoyed talking to you two after dinner and let me know much japanese living and culture. Also I had a chance to talk in japanese. By the way, Ms Mikako's cooking is excellent. Delicious! Thanks a lot!
きれいな部屋、そして美加子ちゃんの日本料理はおいしいです。どもありがとうございます、まだ来年。

정말 최고의 숙소! 아침이면 Mikako엄마께서 맛있는 아침을 차려주시는데 정말 이쁘고 맛있었어요♥ 아빠도 사소한거까지 잘 챙겨주셨구요, 마지막날 알게됐지만 아빠의 칵테일 만드는 솜씨도 완전대박♥ 집도 너무예쁜데 호스트분들 마음씀씀이도 너무나도 아름다웠습니다.
여행마치고 어제 귀국했는데 도쿄의 엄마아빠가 너무 보고싶어요ㅜㅜ 다음에 또 갈께요♥♥♥♥♥♥♥

Mikako and Yuji were wonderful hosts! Their home is warm, inviting, and impeccably clean. They make it one of the best places you'll stay at in both big and small ways, like your bed being made and clean towels in the bathroom daily, offers for home-cooked meals, travel tips -- they'll even do your laundry! And offer an umbrella if it's raining outside! Their home is also equipped with a keypad for entry so you don't have to worry about losing the keys or ringing them up to get into the home.

As far as the location goes, it's in a very safe and quiet neighborhood, and their home is a jaunt from the nearest station.

They drove me to the bus station at the end of the trip to see me off. It was the sweetest thing. Thanks, Mikako and Yuji, for the hospitable experience in Tokyo!

Amazing! C'est le mot. J'ai vécu une fin de séjour à Tokyo des plus géniales grâce à Mikako, son mari et son fils. Je les remercie grandement. Tout d'abord le quartier est top, situé à 15min en train de Shibuya. Quartier résidentiel assez aisé et bien desservi par les transports. L'appartement est superbe, moderne et très bien équipé. La chambre est agréable, très lumineuse et le top du top est l'accueil réservé par Mikako et ses proches.
J'ai adoré partager mes petits déjeuners avec cette agréable famille et échanger avec eux.
Thank you for all you have done for me!

Mikako and her husband were overwhelmingly hospitable. Due to prior constraints, I was not able to check in until after 9pm and she was accommodating.

The house was tidy and well kept. The room was as well. As a courtesy, she prepared breakfast the following morning and her husband drove me to the train station to catch my flight from Narita.

When I return to Tokyo, I will be sure to stay with Mikako and her husband again.

We nailed it by picking this place for our stay in Japan!! From the moment Mikako came running out to the taxi to greet us upon arrival, right up to the tearful farewell on departure day, Mikako and Yuji's commitment to making us feel welcome and at home throughout our 2 week long stay was unwaivering. Their home is beautiful and was always beautifully kept. They provided all the necessities and then some. They shared their love for their country and culture with us through the traditional foods they prepared, the language and traditions they helped us to understand, the guided tours they took us on and, when they couldn't accompany us, the appropriate guide maps and train/metro/walking routes needed to get ourselves to the destinations. Their home is a mere 5 min walk to the nearest train station (which gets you anywhere you want to go) and there are many shops, grocery stores and restaurants, all within walking distance to their place which is situated in a safe and quiet neighborhood. It really made our stay in Japan that much more wonderful knowing we had a comfortable and welcoming place to come "home" to each day with the most gracious hosts to greet us. These are the kind of people I would be happy to host in my own home. I know where I'll be staying on my next visit to Japan!

Mikako's house is just like it was in the photos. Its very clean, tidy and modern. My room was warm and comfy. Mikako and her husband Yuji were very nice. They have done a lot of travelling and speak good English.They made me home made Japanese meals and even taught me how to make sushi and prepare green tea! They really looked after me very well and even helped me buy goodies to take home. Thank you for your hospitality Yuji and Mikako! Xx

I had a lovely stay in Tokyo. Mikako and her husband  went out of their way to help me, recommended me things to do/ see  and made sure I enjoyed my first time on Japan. I was lucky enough to eat some delicious sushi and japanese food that Mikako made for me too. The flat is super clean, beautiful and the location is ideal. Highly recommended!
本次日本旅行住了三家民宿，这家是最棒的，片区位置安静，交通方便。房东夫妇美加子和裕二做的日本料理非常美味，早餐营养又丰富，房间也很舒服，因为我们行李多，房东夫妇开车送我们到羽田机场，我们虽然不会日文，都用英文和汉字交流也很顺畅，下次我们再到东京一定还住这里。谢谢房东的热情招待～

This was my first AirBnB experience, and I was absolutely thrilled! From the moment I arrived in Setagaya to the time of my departure, I felt completely at home with Mikako and Yuji. I arrived at Yōga Station earlier than originally planned, but Mikako kindly adjusted her schedule and met me at the East Exit. Her place was only about a 10-minute walk from the train station, and it's located in a very safe, quiet, family-friendly area on the outskirts of Tokyo center. There are parks/gardens nearby, shops, and quaint streets to stroll down. Mikako and Yuji's home is absolutely stunning - the pictures look exactly how the property is, and they keep it incredibly clean. Mikako made delicious breakfast and dinner for me! The dinner was the most memorable time with this family, as Mikako prepared sushi rolls and we all chatted over this great meal (and tasty sake!). I watched some sumo wrestling on TV with Yuji, met their son the morning I was leaving, and learned more Japanese by speaking to all of them. I had been completely exhausted after six months of work and extensive travel throughout Japan, so my time staying with Mikako and Yuji was a perfect peaceful getaway before my flight back to the States. I had such a lovely time, and I can certainly call these two wonderful people my friends. You will not be disappointed, as this is hospitality at its FINEST.
ありがとうございます, Mikako and Yuji!! Hope to visit you again on my next trip to Tokyo!

Mikako様とご主人様は本当に親切な方々で、常にご配慮頂いたこともあり、とても快適な1日を過ごすことが出来ました。お酒を頂きながら、たくさんの刺激的なお話して下さったこと、とても感謝しております。またMikako様がお作りになるお料理も本当に美味しかったです。お家も朝日が気持ちの良い閑静な住宅街にある落ち着いた環境で、いつまでも過ごしたくなるような心地の良い雰囲気が満ち溢れていました。今後も機会がありましたら、ぜひご利用させて頂きたく思います。ありがとうございました。

Very very good!
I recommed this house
If you visit to this house is that you will appreciate.
진짜 핵좋음 동네가 일본스러워서 좋고 교통도 시부야랑 가깝고 무엇보다 호스트분들이 너무 친절하고 잘해주셔서 힐링되었어요
excellent place & wonderful host !!!
Soooo good place , couples are very very very KIND and FRIENDLY, they give me a really nice trip, nice breakfast, dessert, everyone can have a great time in here!

Mikako and her husband Yuji were the most amazing hosts ever!!! Such a wonderful couple who helped us get around Tokyo easier and made the train system less confusing for us. Their place is in the middle of the cutest and safest neighborhood in Segataya. Their house is very clean and comfortable, perfect for a couple or single person traveling to Japan. They have a perfectly sized bath to soak in after a tiring day of walking. The train station is also walking distance from their home which made commuting a whole lot easier. There are markets and and convenient stores in every corner for any last minute buys. Also, Mikako is the most amazing cook! She makes the best traditional Japanese breakfasts and dinners! We had a blast staying with them, very sweet and helpful couple. We are very sad to leave them. I definitely recommend and will be staying with them again! Their place and hospitality is definitely worth way more than a 5- star hotel!

Our stay at Tokyo was absolutely amazing thanks to Mikako-san and Yuji-san.
They made sure to explain everything to us, helped us with making plans each day to make sure we get to fulfill all our plans, gave us exact directions and explanations for using the train and provided everything we were missing (umbrellas, electronic devices etc.)
Breakfast is great and we were also invited for Japanese dinner which was an amazing experience!
Location is great, close to everything.
The house is very clean and tidy.
We hope to come again!

My stay with Mikako can only be described as "perfect" with "personalized touch".
The communication with Mikako was prompt and clear from the beginning when I first made my inquiry. Mikako provided detailed explanations and instructions which was useful in helping me plan my itinerary.
I met up with Mikako at the train station where she was waiting for me and she walked me to her place, showing me landmarks to look out for to aid me in navigating my way to her place.
Mikako's place is exactly as featured on the description. It was great that the door uses a pin code system which was easy to remember and ideal since there is no fuss with keys etc.
My advice would be to try and not bring huge luggages as it might be quite challenging to maneuver your way up the flight of stairs. Mikako helped me with my bags up and walked me through the house with a detailed tour showing me how everything works. She even offered to cook me dinner.
I met Yuji, her husband, that evening and we had dinner together. I was blown away by Mikako's cooking. The presentation was beautiful, the taste .. delicious and the variety was beyond expectations. Mikako also took the liberty to find out about my allergies and preferences.
The location was in an ideal location where you can get to Shibuya via a short train ride away yet it is in a neighbourhood quiet and safe for you get a good rest after a long day.
I had an amazing time with Mikako. No amount of words can describe how grateful I am for Mikako's hospitality and care throughout my entire stay right up to the very end.
Mikako went beyond to provide me with more than just a perfect air bnb experience. I left with a better knowledge and appreciation for the Japanese culture. And most importantly, I left with a new found friendship.
大変親切に楽しく毎日を過ごしました、推薦します、間違いありません。

My stay with Mikako and Yuji has been one of the best experiences sharing living spaces with hosts. From meeting me at the station, to treating me like their family, this is the pinnacle of omotenashi! If you're looking for that 'home stay' experience, look no further.
非常感谢Mikako以及她的丈夫，他们非常热情好客，住在他们家感觉很温馨。

The location to the subway station was close but far enough not to be busy. It felt safe and comfortable. Mikako and her husband went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and well taken care of.

Wow, what an amazing experience.  Mikako and Yugi are ambassadors to Japan, the perfect hosts that is a rarity in the world today.  I love the breakfasts that she prepares, or sometimes the lunchtime udon noodles, but the dinners are the most engaging and wonderful.  Yugi took me to Tsukiji Fish Market and we selected the fish Mikako prepared for our sushi dinner party.  Mikako and I went to see a movie together and she also set up and went with me to my salon appointment.  Yugi spent almost entire day helping me negotiate the return of some electronics I bought.  I dont have enough space or time to list the countless things and gestures they do.  Their place is short metro to Shibuya.  Their area is very quaint.  I would stay here again in a heartbeat.

The location, facilities, amenities and most importantly the hospitality exceeded my own expectations! If you're looking for a convenient yet more quiet place to stay in Tokyo, then this is the place for you. Highly recommended! By far the best Airbnb host I have ever stayed with. Mikako's place is situated conveniently near Yoga Station, which gives you easy access to Shibuya Station (and all other train lines). Mikako is very responsive to messages and will go out of her way to ensure you have the most comfortable experience at her home. I couldn't ask for much more~ 10/10 :)
They are very kind and could have a nice stay.
Amazing airbnb experience, couldn’t wish for anything better. Very welcoming hosts who cook amazing breakfast and dinner and the house is outstanding.

I had a fantastic stay with Mikako. The hosts are very kind and generous. Mikako made me so many great home cooked meals. Neighbourhood is peaceful. The room is great, modern and comfy. Short walk to the train station and 6 stops to Shibuya
They are very hospitable hosts. They have waited for me patiently at Yoga station. Japanese cuisine was very delicious.

There have been many good reviews about Mikako San and Yuji San’s place so I arrived with high expectations. These expectations were still well exceeded. The experience made me feel like part of their family rather than a guest which even by Japanese standard is special. I’ve stayed in Ryokans that cost around 10 times the money but this experience just proved that there are things that money cannot buy. Did I say I highly recommend this place?

미카코와 유지는 매우 친절하고 상냥했습니다. 다소 비싼 감이 있었지만 비슷한 가격의 호텔과 비교하면 방도 훨씬 넓었고 동네도 편의시설 및 식당이 잘되어있기 때문에 납득할만한 가격이었습니다.
미카코의 요리는 최고였어요.
시부야와 전철이 연결된 위치여서 여행하기 좋은 위치입니다.
추천해요~
Séjour parfait, hôtes attentionnés et qualité de l'accueil exceptionnel!

The reviews were impeccable, and yet staying with Mikako and Yuji was still mind-blowingly amazing!
The hosts are such a kind, engaging couple who open their house up fully and love sharing their country, food and culture; they do an excellent job of translating Japan for the newbies!Their house is beautiful and compact, yet spacious. Extremely clean, fresh towels daily, and the most amazing local dishes prepared which were a treat to navigate.
For a full emersion experience, this is the place to test out Tokyo; their kindness and interest genuine. Absolutely to be recommend! Thank you Mikako and Yuji for a truly memorable experience!

Mikako-san and Yuji-san are probably the nicest people you ever meet. They are also fun to hang out with and they will help you in anyway they can. Also Mikako-san is a great cook! So I can fully recommend a stay at their house!
Best hosts ever! We would recommend them to EVERYONE. They made our trip!

Simply the most at home I have felt in an airbnb and the most taken care of. Mikako and Yuji are wonderful hosts, I enjoyed lovely breakfasts and dinners in their home talking with them; Mikako ran a bath for me more than once and replaced the towels every day and washed, dried and folded my laundry. The both gave me excellent advice for exploring Tokyo solo. I am so happy to have stayed with them.

Mikako and Yuji were both incredibly friendly and helpful. Their house is beautiful and conveniently located near a train station.
I would recommend staying here even though it may not be in the heart of the city just for the sheer kindness and hospitality of Mikako and Yuji. I'm so glad staying and meeting them was part of my trip to Japan.

Mikako and Yuji are fabulous hosts who enjoy showing the pleasures of Japan to visitors.
Mikako is a very good cook and she provides an excellent start to the day with a modern Japanese breakfast, which inspires me to make some changes to my own, and sometimes dinner may be offered too.
Yuji's help navigating Tokyo's notoriously complex subway system was invaluable.
Their home is lovely and comfortable and the guest bedroom on the top floor is bright and airy and has a work desk for plotting out the day's travel plans online. Everything I needed was available (although I admit I ocassionally had a little trouble getting hot water in the bathroom sink but that's probably just my technical inadequacy with the Japanese energy-saving bathroom plumbing system that was new to me.)
Don't be concerned that the location is a residential neighbourhood a little beyond the prime tourist areas, a subway station is just 5 minutes away and you'll be connected to everything in Tokyo.
I had an absolutely wonderful stay with the charming and kind couple and I'm telling those who ask what the highlight of Tokyo was for for me is that it is Mikako and Yuji!

Mikako and her husband Yuji were amazing hosts. They prepared and shared beautiful dinners with us, and breakfast was prepared for us every morning. It was a truly Japanese experience we wouldn't have had otherwise. They were both incredibly willing to share with us, but also respectful of our space and time, acting as the perfect hosts.
Laundry was washed daily for us and the house was incredibly clean. The house is a convenient walk to the train station, and it's a 12 min train ride from Shibuya. It was nice being outside the main city area as we had peace and quiet and a very cute neighborhood to explore. Yuji and Mikako also gave us great recommendations for places to explore.
We would love to stay here again and anyone who chooses to stay here is in for a treat!

Staying with Mikako and Yuji was a highlight of my trip. My stay far exceeded my expectations and I would recommend staying here to anyone.
The home is clean, Mikako and Yuji are quite friendly and give lots of tips about Tokyo and the surrounding area. I loved this stay! Come!

Look no further! What a wonderful place to stay in a quiet suburb with incredibly considerate and thoughtful hosts. Great food, help planning each day of sightseeing, assistance getting to and from the train station, comfortable bed and spotless house!

It was an amazing experience to stay in Mikako and Yuji’s home! They were extremely considerate and kind. For check-in, they picked me up at the station and helped carry my luggage upstairs to my room.
Mikako prepared delicious breakfast every morning. Dinner was also available if needed. I was interested in cooking and Mikako was so kind to teach me making Japanese cuisine!
Communication was clear and prompt. They gave useful information that helped my trip to be fruitful and smooth. I also learnt Japanese language and culture from them.
The house was clean and cozy. Towels were changed and clothes were washed every day for me. It was located near the station with just a few minutes walk, and convenient to the city center.
I had a good time in this home! I would highly recommend this place for travelers to Tokyo!

Mikako's place was like finding a gold mine.  She and her husband are absolutely wonderful hosts.  The superlative is deserved.  To begin with their home - it is clean, orderly, very comfortable, attractive, close to a subway line,  with many stores and restaurants nearby and in a quiet and friendly neighborhood.    In many ways, these hosts went above and beyond general expectations.  I could list many, many things here but just to name a few - both Mikako and her husband are great cooks and breakfasts and sometimes lunch and dinner with them, was a real treat.  I also got very good advice about places to see in Tokyo and Mikako and Yugi helped me both with directions and even helped me get to the bus I needed to take when i left for the next place on my ongoing trip.  A lot noted here.  Basic point - if you get the chance, stay with these fine people.

As others have said, Mikako and her husband are exceptional hosts in every way. Great location—in a quiet residential neighborhood and close to beautiful Kinuta Park and its great art museum, it is also only 20 minutes away from bustling Shibuya. A very comfortable stay.

I have stayed 4 days at Mikako and Yugi place. All the reviews were spot on. These people are welcoming, kind, and well prepared to have a non Japanese speaker like myself. Everything was marked well and explained clearly. More importantly I felt welcomed there and they went out of their way to make me comfortable. Yugi even dropped me off at Yoga station when i couldn't find a taxi on my last day. I highly recommend this place. Mikako and Yugi
どうもありがとうございました
Mikako and her husband were fantastic! I learning so much about Japan and they made some amazing meals for me. I can't wait to visit again soon!

Some of the kindest hosts I've had on Airbnb. This doesn't feel as much as renting a room, more like joining their family for the week. They give recommendations about Tokyo and the surrounding area, offer breakfast and dinner when appropriate and overall made the experience a solid 11/10. I hope to see them again soon!

My husband and I had a wonderful time staying with Mikako and Yuji. They are fabulous hosts, both thoughtful and lots of fun to share time with. We had dinner with them on two occasions, our son who lives in Tokyo was also invited both times. There was interesting conversation and much laughter.  Mikako went out of her way to assist my husband and I with day to day tasks, allowing us more time to explore Tokyo.  She also went out of her way when my husband needed an appointment for medical massage. Yuji and Mikako shared many ideas about things to do around Tokyo and Kamakura, along with advice on navigating the public transport system to get us to our destinations in the best way possible.  The accommodation itself is both quiet and very comfortable, with plenty of room for all of our gear. Breakfast made by Mikako is super delicious. Don't miss out!

みかこさん、ゆうじさんご夫妻は私を家族のように温かく迎え入れてくださり、とても楽しい時間が過ごせました。
こんなに素敵な時間が過ごせるなんて想像もしてませんでした。
お家は清潔でセンスが良くて、ベッドもとても寝心地が良く、窓から気持ちのいい光が入り、ずーっと滞在していたかったです。
お部屋には本も沢山あり、読書の時間も持てました。
夜は大きく綺麗なバスタブで温まり身体をリフレッシュできました。
良質なシャンプー、トリートメント、高級ドライヤーを使わせて頂いたおかげで滞在中の私の髪はサラサラ艶々でした。
ゆうじさんは銭湯に連れて行ってくれたり、ゴルフの練習をさせてくれ、とてもファンタスティックでアメージングな経験をくれました。
みかこさんはいつも私の身の回りを清潔に保ってくれました。雨で汚れてしまった靴を綺麗にして下さったり、みかこさんの気配りのおかげで滞在中に困ることは何もありませんでした。東京の旅のアドバイスも頂き、おかげで大変充実しました。
2人とお話できていい刺激も沢山もらえました。私の東京のお父さんとお母さんです。
出会えたことに本当に感謝してます。

房东夫妇人特别好，非常热情，慷慨。宴请的晚餐食物精美，富有有仪式感，并且美味可口。房东还热心推荐游玩的地方。 语言的隔阂也不妨碍我们的沟通，各种手势比划、翻译软件，相谈甚欢，度过了愉快的3天。这是我在Airbnb最美好的体验。我在想如果人人都像房东夫妇那么可爱、友好，世界会多美好，中日关系会是多和谐、融洽哟 :)    非常感谢Mikako-san Yugi-san，我们有缘再相会！^_^ ^_^

Mikako and Yuji were the kindest hosts I have ever met on Airbnb! Mikako treated me like her own daughter and I had lots of fun having dinner with them. Mikako is also an excellent cook and made me lots of delicious local foods. I highly recommend staying with them if you’re looking to experience not just Japan as a country, but as a local. I will definitely come back to stay at Mikako’s place!

Mikako and her husband were the most open , friendly, warm and welcoming hosts I have ever experienced in my travel.
It was my first visit to Tokyo and I would have been so lost and helpless without their help and considerate assistance. They not just accommodated me but totally made me feel like their own personal friends in every way making me feel so safe and at home especially being a foreign solo female traveler.
I didn’t expect it but Mikako invited me to join her home Japanese cooked dinner and lunch. Took time to pick me up from the train station and also dropped me off to the train station to the airport on the day of departure. They made sure so I would not be lost and be safe checking in on me coming home at night .
The house and it’s neighborhood was tranquil, lovely and safe to walk around , a way from hustle bustle noisy city . Walking distance to Yoga subway . At the end of the trip , I have gained not only a friend and also Tokyo mom , Mikako . I will miss her !
とても楽しいチェックイン体験で、mikakoさんとyojiさんは毎日美味しい朝食を用意してくれて、一緒にお寿司もいただきました。彼らは私にとても気を使ってくれて、迷子にならないように電車の乗り方を丁寧に教えてくれて、とても楽しい1週間を過ごしました🫶
Mikako& Yuji will be our best memories in Tokyo.We talked a lot and they are really like our parents in Tokyo .一期一会！One Chance one meet.See you.Xiaoyu&Peiyu.

Mikako and Yugi were the best hosts I’ve ever had. Extremely friendly and nice. They cooked breakfast and dinner then we ate together. We would either talk about what I was going to do for day in the morning and then spend time in the evening reviewing the day. I would also get a ton of recommendations before the next day. Whether it be about the trains or the sights that are a must see these two help make my trip be even better that I could have hoped. If you are traveling to Japan I suggest you start here to get all the recommendations for the rest of your trip and to experience the local hospitality!!

ご夫婦でとても温かく迎えてくださいました。おうちも至る所、おしゃれでとっても素敵で快適でした。
お食事もご用意くださり、奥様が美味しい本格的なタイ料理を振る舞ってくださいました。その後は、3人でお酒をいただきながらのお話も弾み、とても楽しく素敵な時間をご一緒させていただきました。
今回は、仕事でのステイでした。ご夫婦がとても快くサポートしてくださり、短い時間の中で効率的に仕事ができ、感謝しかありません。本当に素敵なステイでした。
Mikako was a wonderful host, and made us feel at home. She made our time in Tokyo very special.
实在太棒了，像家人一样感觉很温暖，yuji桑和美加子给了我很多帮助，非常感谢！早餐很精美，美加子的晚餐简直太棒了！地板有地暖，屋里非常舒服、干净、安静，去地铁和电车都非常方便，这是一次难忘的体验！他们还带我去看了夜晚的樱花，和去吃了有名的披萨店。非常推荐！
I had a very special experience that I will forever cherish.  I plan to stay again.

我相信我无法找到比Mikako和Yuji更好的房东了。他们把我像家人一样对待，他们准备的房间和设施干净整洁，处处周到，真的像回到家一样的温暖而舒适。Mikako虽然起得比较早，她会安静的等我起床，比我妈妈更理解我。他们还会为我的出行安全感到担心，帮我规划观光线路，非常清晰的写给我，还把IC卡也借给了我，让我的出行更方便。在Yuji非常清晰的指导下，想乘错车都有些难。和他们的相遇是我此次旅行的额外收获，我很感恩，希望下次来还能和他们一起度过一些愉快的时光。爱你们

夫婦2人で滞在しました。
ホストのお二方はとてもフレンドリーで優しく、とても楽しい時間を過ごすことができました。
駅まで迎えにきてくれ、ウェルカムドリンクとお菓子も出してくれました。
夕飯もみんなで楽しむことができて、とても思い出に残る旅になりました。
寝室やお風呂などはとても清潔で過ごしやすかったです。
どんなゲストにもお勧めできる滞在先です。
本当にありがとうございました！
Amazing stay. You’ll feel like you have a new family in Tokyo.

Mikako and her husband treated me as if we were family. They made me 3 eggs & salad for breakfast with toast and butter. Helped me navigate the complicated train lines in Tokyo. Helped me with my laundry. Made sure I was good at all times. Even made me a wonderful dinner!!! They are a beautiful couple and they seem to get genuine joy out of hosting people. 10/10

정신적 회복을 위해 쉬러왔다가 큰 위로와 충전을 하고 갑니다.
미카코상과 오지상과 함께 한 시간동안 나눈 대화와 일본 가정식은 저에게 즐거움을 주었습니다. 다음에도 가고 싶은 공간입니다.

Mikako and Yuji were absolutely lovely. I felt right at home, had some lovely authentic dinners, drinks, and recommendation from them, and everything was completely flexible. Will be booking the same place next time I’m in Tokyo. Thanks for the great stay!
Séjour agréable.Facilites pour se déplacer,le métro étant proche.Des hôtes disponibles malgré les difficultés d’échange dû à nos langues :français - japonais.

I had the best time with Mikako and Yugi. They are such kind and welcoming people, I felt right at home immediately. I had breakfast with them every morning and they helped me with any questions I had, as well as providing great recommendations during my stay.
Their place is beautiful and in a great location to get to places across Tokyo.
They are exceptionally kind people and they helped me out so much during my stay. I feel extremely grateful to have met them. I would recommend this place to anyone and I hope to be back in the future.

From the moment we booked to stay at Mikako's place, the communication was great and very well explained.
Mikako even met us at the train station to walk us back to their place.
Then enter Yuji the tour guide, he has pretty much planned our trip for us and helped us book stuff along the way.
Mikako and Yuji made us feel right at home and interacted with us all the way.
Their kindness was a stand out.
I would recommend staying if you want to experience Japanese living and hospitality.
Can not fault Mikako and Yuji, would stay again if visiting Tokyo.
I feel extremely lucky to have found Mikako’s place on Airbnb! I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and Mikako & Yuji made me feel right at home!

도쿄는 처음이라 일행과 놀기 바빠 숙소 체크인을 정말 늦게 했는데도 불구하고 오히려 많이 놀다 오라며 이해해주셨어요 역으로 나와 마중 나와주신다는 건 리뷰 보고 알았지만 정말 그 늦은 시간에 부부 두분이 직접 오셔서 체크인 도와주시고 정말 감사했습니다.
엄청 친절하게 반겨 주시고 소통도 적극적으로 해주셨어요. 3층 통째로 내어주셔서 편했고 화장실 욕실
기능도 너무 신기했답니다 일본의 자동 목욕 급수와 온도유지기를 사용해서 도쿄에서 머무는 동안 다리아픈 걸 수월하게 풀어줄 수 있었어요!
맥주와 사케 등을 내어주며 안주거리도 먹고 서로 이야기도 정말 많이하고 진짜 어디가선 못 할 경험 한 것 같아요! 아침식사도 언제 나가는지 시간 세심하게 살펴봐주며 차려주셨고 맛있었어요 어디 가는 것도 지하철 루트 다 봐주시고 ㅠ
마지막날 비행기 시간이 촉박한 탓에 아침만 먹고 제대로 인사를 나눌 수 없었는데 역까지 차로 태워다주셨어요 덕분에 한국으로 잘 돌아올 수 있었습니다 정말 여기로 숙소 잡으시면 후회 안하실 거예요! 정말 두 분 다 친절하시고 편의를 많이 봐주세요
2박3일동안 원래 아는 사이처럼 친절하게 대해주시고 살뜰히 살펴봐주셔서 감사했습니다:)

Perfect locaction in pulsating Shinjuku. Min was very nice and explained us where to go for food and other details about Tokyo. We had a basic private room, nothing to complain about. Our room was clean and there were plenty of towels for use. Perfect for a short stay with no frills.

Min is the best host you can ask for, and he runs a guest house that is the friendliest environment I experienced on my trip! The location is great, you are in the middle of Tokyo, and the entire city can be seen easily. Just study your Japanese! Also, I recommend biking through town, it's fast and you get a feel for it instantly!

A great place to stay! Min was a really good host, replied to messages and questions quickly. He even took us out for dinner once! The location was really good - The main Shinjuku station is maybe 10-15m walk away, but closeby you have nice areas like Golden Gai. Closeby is an Oedo line-station too, with which you can go anywhere pretty quickly.

The description of the room was accurate. It's a sharehouse, so there are other people there of course, and you share toilets and kitchen. So surprises, and nothing to complain about. When I stayed here the other people were nice, and I felt I could trust them. I didn't lose any stuff, nor was I worried about doing so.

I had a great stay at Min's place. I had one of the tatami rooms on the 8th floor, the room was large and it was comfortable to sleep on the Japanese futon. The building has lots of restaurants and convenience shops nearby. Min is very helpful, and did his best to make sure guests have a pleasant stay. I would definately stay at this place again.

Tokyo is very overwhelming! Min however puts you at ease and goes beyond. I arrived later than expected because my flight was delayed and Min literally waited out in front of his building for me and welcomed me in ... He also took myself and some others whom I met there, out and showed us some local watering holes. This is a great space to meet other travelers and the price is completely on point. I had a room to myself which was simple but had the storage and amenities that I needed. I would definitely go back. Thank you Min
Thanks a lot Min. The house has a great vibe. It has a great location and is very clean. I enjoyed my stay a lot and would go back. Thanks for helping make my stay in Tokyo great.

From the very first day Min was extremely friendly with us, and talk us about places to go, restaurants where to eat, and show us around. The place was very comfortable, just as describe in the web page. The neighborhood is also ideal to go out to eat and drink, because there are so many restaurants and bares. Also Shinjuku Station is very close, and you can get easily to everywhere. We absolutely recommend this place!!
It was a great time of staying at Min's share house. Nice location and everything is so convenient.

Actually relatively easy to find,  clean,  comfortable and a great place to crash.   Can hang out in common area or go out.   Room is simple to rest and sleep,  quiet.   When you stay in Japan you are out mostly anyway.   Access to roof was nice perk!
Min was the nicest man we've met in Japan. He was very helpful, welcoming, and sincere.

Min has been a wonderful host. Easy to communicate, gives clear instructions and introductions to the place and some of the other guests living there. The listing fits perfectly with the description given by Min. It is very accessible, relatively close to heart of Shinjuku.
It has been a pleasant stay and will definitely recommend Min's place.

Thank you Min.

Min was a wonderful host and made his guests feel welcome. I saw him at the house almost every day, so it made me feel like the guests and the house are looked after. The house is clean and as promised in the description. Also very conveniently located: JR Yamanote Line is quite close for all the JR Pass holders (free transportation) but there are subway stations even closer. And of course it's Shinjuku, so there's lots to do just a walking distance away.

If I had to say something on the negative side, it's that there's a busy street just outside the house, so lots of noise from cars and sirens all through the night. But then, if you want to spend your nights in Tokyo in a convenient location for your trip, that's what you get, so this is not really a complaint, just a comment on how things are :)

Also everyone I met at the house was very nice and even though people had different interests and daily rhythm, everybody was considerate enough not to disturb others at night or morning. Really recommendable!

This guesthouse is so good I am going back for another night on a stopover in Tokyo. My room was great, located on a high floor and very bright with a balcony I have not used but opened all the time to add a nice breeze into the room.
Min's a friendly host and was helpful with check in and directions to his place.
The guesthouse is conveniently located 15 minutes from Shinjuku station and has all amenities including a wash machine.

I had a great time in this shared house! In fact I extended my stay here. Awesome location, cool crowd and everything is clean. Sometimes you can even get free meals if Min happens to be cooking at sharehouse :p at night it is a bit loud but also feels lively. Rooftop is a big plus. Will definitely come back again.
Great place in an excellent location . Min was awesome and it was just as described :)
房子靠近东新宿站，出行很方便。房东太太招待我的，特别的贴心。房子的设施也比较全。不足的是，出门后房间门难以上锁。

It was great to stay at Min's sharehouse. The place was in great location and it was clean and tidy. It is a bit smaller than what it seems in pictures but i dont think anyone who travels to Tokyo needs more than that.
Min was very helpful and answered all questions, he was welcoming and sometimes did some activities with his guests.
Will definitely go back again.
Thanks Min

The place is at the Korean town in shinjuku, and 15min all to Shinjuku main station. However it's also next to the red light district Golden Gai, hence ladies should take note if they are not comfortable to stay in the area. I was a female solo traveller but still felt OK to cut through the area as its still feels painful. Overall, I had a pleasant stay as Min was very friendly and helpful for all my questions. The place doesn't seem new but facilities are adequate and room is clean. I wished there was more shower or toilet room and that the bathroom could be cleaner.

Hi fellow guests, the 'Shinjuku Sharehouse' is just as great as the (100s of positive) reviews are claiming. With the subway so closeby, you can reach all the touristic places within the hour (From Shibuya, through Harajuku, to Shinjuku's appartment is actually only 5km appart, this is walking distance). Min is a real dedicated Airbnb host, so he provides all the info you need. During my 4 night stay, he was there every morning and few nights as well. As an artist, he made some paintings while I was there and even had us participate. Min also took us out for dinner (I missed 1 night).
The other guests during my stay were so much fun and added so much more to the experience as well. I went alone but returned with many new friends.
The private room was just perfect for me, tatami floor, and more than enough space for 1 person (is probably meant for 3).
The appartment I was in basically has the entrance, common livingroom with kitchen, bathroom and toilet. From inside there you have rooms if you go up or down the stairs (3floor appartments). I think Min owns all the top floors, including the roof, and for the daredevils, you can climb onto the roof of a shack on this roof, for a perfect 360° Shinjuku view.
Don't take my word for how great this place is, you can take it from the other 100s of reviews =)

PS: Shinjuku's best sushi place (or #2 restaurant of all of Shinjuku, out of 5500+ restos) according to TripAdvisor is just 15m away from downstairs the appartment.
exactly what its described, reasonable price, clean & tidy, located at heart of shopping area, friendly & easy going host...sure will visit again
Great experience. Min makes sure I get the right direction and shows me all the rooms in the house.

Staying at Min's sharehouse was a pleasant experience. Other than the comfortable room and convienent location the best part of being in a sharehouse is meeting the other guests and making new friends. The area the sharehouse is in is populated with numerous convenience stores and restaurants abd isnt too far from the main shopping malls at shinjuku. I would definitely stay here again for my future trips in Japan. Min is also an excellent host who is always available to answer any questions and help in anyway.
Min was a great host, he even checked on me when I was sick! The place was clean and very convenient. Highly recommended
Min is an excellent host. He is always trying to please everyone with their particular needs. Great atmosphere at the place. I'd definitely recommend this place.

Min was a great host. From the beginning he made it very clear how to reach his place and we felt very welcomed. He took us out to Korean BBQ one night and offered great advice for our stay in Tokyo. We'll definitely be returning to his place!

Min is a very welcoming and generous individual. The apartment is overlooking the street from the 9th floor and is very special. Well located near subway stations and walking distance from Shinjuku shopping district. Highly recommended!

Had an absolutely lovely stay at Min's. Perfect location, and the room had everything I needed, but also was just minimal enough for me to get inspired to go out into Tokyo!
Min was very accommodating and gave me a very thorough tour of the facilities. Though the doors are generally kept unlocked, Min happily offered me a room key when I asked for one.
I wasn't expecting this, but the place feels a lot like a hostel for adults. I met some amazing friends and we will all keep in touch for a while, all thanks to Min!
Min was an excellent host and his place was really nice and convenient. Would definitely stay here again next time!
Tokyo is an incredible place, and Min's hospitality made it even more incredible. The food, the people, the sights were all above my expectations. See you soon, Japan.

The listing is accurate and the location was great. A great place to stay if you're like me and hungry at all different hours of the day--Shinjuku is active 24 hours, it's pretty amazing. There are a whole bunch of convenient stores too making it easy to pick up things that you might have forgotten to pack.

Min was a superb host during my 4 nights stay at his place, the place was very convenient and very safe, lots of 24 hours food options around. Room was simple but very clean! Would recommend to travellers on a trip to tokyo.

This was a great Airbnb experience.

The place was clean and the location was perfect.

And the host, Min, was awesome.
Very nice apartment and very best location. The landlord Mr Min is a very very nice and humorous people. Next time go to Tokyo, I will still live here.

Vice nice place. Extremely clean. Very very well located. Close to the metro. 5 min away from shibuya. A lot of cool place around. Min is a super nice host. Provided very detailed info on how to get there. Highly recommended!

My experience in Tokyo was nothing short of amazing and Min played no small part in that. He is an amazing host, fun and kind, considerate and open-minded. The accommodations are ideally located and, in short, flawless. The is a terrace on the roof where you can sit in the evenings, most rooms have a balcony, washing mashine, drying racks, shower, towels, linen etc all included. There is even a kitchen where you can cook when you desire something homemade. However, that is hardly necessary with the abundance of amazing restaurants that are literally right outside the door. The location is ideally placed with respect to public transport (Shinjuku Station, one of the main hubs of Tokyo's extensive public transport system, is less than 10 minutes on foot and the closest metro is just a two minute walk).
Don't be fooled by reviews on other listings saying you will not have contact with the host in the cheaper Airbnbs. Min is around a lot, he has dinner and drinks with guests and his English is good.
TL;DR: You want to stay at this place.

Min was exceptionally friendly. I was expecting to have minimal contact with my host but he stayed in regular contact with me, offered me plenty of advice for traveling to Tokyo, and regularly offered me help throughout my trip. He was always very easy to reach and easily went above and beyond my expectations. The listing was very accurate. The neighborhood was just as described and the location was perfect. The Metro Subway was on the same street as the room and there were plenty of convenience stores and places to eat nearby. The place was kept very clean and I definitely felt like I got my moneys worth for the location.

Awesome ambiance in this appartment ! Met people from all around the world and it could not have been a better way to arrive in Tokyo and discover this great city! In the super hectic neighborhood Shinjuku , right in the center , you can walk or get the sub very nearby.
Min was a great host , always funny and welcoming, and his rooftop is a top place to have beers with a magic view at night. Totally recommend ;)

Absolutely the best guesthouse experience we've had in Japan! Min is friendly, welcoming, helpful and funny too. Everything about the way the guesthouse is set up is so convenient, and more than that the room was gorgeous! Can't beat the location either, very well situated. Would recommend this place to anyone visiting Tokyo!

min was very helpful in making sure I found the residence, kept things very clean, very nice decor, great location close to the subway, quick wi-fi, the other quests were very nice, the balcony provided a great view, overall great experience.

ロケーション、部屋、屋上など良い所がたくさんありましたが、一番良かったのはHostのMinさんでした！
遅くのチェックインに快く対応してくれ、毎回とてもフレンドリーに話しかけてくれました＾＾屋上で他のゲストと一緒に飲めるのは東京滞在の良い思い出です。
また必ず行きます！
Minさんとのメールのやり取りは英語でやってましたが、流暢な日本語を話しますので、日本人でも全く問題ありません⭐️

I really enjoyed staying at Min's flat, it was more fun than expected. The description of the flat was fully  fulfilled, it's position is great and I enjoyed having a drink with friends on the roof top. I would love to visit this place again.

Min is a very friendly person. Great host. The facilities are very clean. You can relax, you can do laundry, there's a rooftop space. If you want a private room in Tokyo this is a great deal. I used to choose capsule hotels but this is my new go to.

First of all, the place is really well located, with the main aspect being Shinjuku station's closeness, even by foot. Since it's a major hub for Tokyo's train system, a Shinkansen terminal and a Narita Express terminal, you have access to pretty much everywhere. Then the area around the sharehouse is filled with places to eat and is generally quite good for a "base". If I had to sum up the place itself in one word it would be "cozy", basic amenities are covered and pretty much everything that's mentioned on the listing is there.
But I think the best part about the place was the host himself, Mr. Min and how he goes out of his way to make sure all of his guests are comfortable. As many have mentioned he even invites the guests for nice gatherings on the roof, which has an awesome view and enjoyable breeze. I met a lot of people there thanks to how the place is administered and I will no doubt contact Mr. Min again when I go back to Japan in the future.

Excellent!!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
No doubt I will come back again when I'm in Tokyo. Min was great!! helpful, informative and most of all very friendly. His multi language skil, Japanese, Korean and English fluently is amazing. I highly recommend Share House to anyone coming from anywhere in the world.
Easy arriving, comfortable staying. the location is perfect.
Great experience! Really enjoyed getting to know Min and the other guests at the Sharehouse. The location was great.
The place is well situated in the heart of shinjuku area and there is a 24hr sushi bar & duty free just within 2 mins walk!

The sharehouse is quiet, clean, and in an amazing location in the heart of Tokyo. Min clearly has a passion for hosting-- he even held a rooftop bbq for guests on my last night in town. Thanks again, Min!

I stayed in Min's place for 10 nights, the first one in a shared room and then in a private room. Min was very kind and responsive, I booked my stay in his place at the very last minute while I was waiting to board my flight to Tokyo. The directions to the place were very accurate and Min was there waiting for me to show me around. The room and the common areas are very clean and nice and the room was very spacious for Tokyo standards.
The only little down side is that there is only one shower for a shared apartment where then can be up to 20 people at full capacity. So you might have to queue for a few minutes to take a shower in the morning. However this has never been an issue during my stay and I never had to wait more than 10 minutes.
Min is a very friendly and nice person and he was also always available for a chat and a drink in the evening. I would recommend this place to anybody wanting to stay in a central location, in a comfortable room and for a fair price. I have previously been in other apartments and hotels in Tokyo and Min's place is definitely the best I have seen so far.

너무 좋았어요. 일본 처음와봤는데 첫 숙소가 너무 제마음에 쏙 들었어요 다음번에 또 이숙소로 정할거에요! 공항에서 찾아가기 전 쉬웠어요 설명 너무 잘되어있고 경치는 말할것도 없이 훌륭했어요. 10분정도만 천천히 걸어가면 신주쿠역이있구요. 숙소주변에 편의점 ㅅ 시집 등등 많은것들이 있어요^^ 몇달 뒤 또 갈일이있는데 그때도 이곳으로! 참 호스트님도 너무 친절하고 쿨내 풀풀~~ 너무너무 후륭했고 감사했습니다💕

I had an amazing time at Min's place. The location is perfect with many restaurants around. Subway is 2 mins away.

Min is an excellent host! I would definitely stay at this place again when I return to Tokyo.

We loved Min's place. We stayed here for 2 nights. It was warm, cozy, and close to all the nightlife. It had all the amenities we needed. Min was a really great host. If you're hungry, there are restaurants open 24/7 a few steps away. Highly recommend!

Min's house is so great. I love my tatami room, I love the view, I love the rooftops and stairs, and I love the people here. I had an awesome dinner with new friends. I talked a lot with Min and Haru, they are so sweet. I also had an amazing New Year's Eve with new friends. I highly recommend here if you travel alone. Come on and meet new friends! 去Min的house交通很方便，而且这里的房间很舒服，外面的景色也特别棒。来的第一天就和新朋友们吃了一顿Haru做的晚餐，第二天和新朋友们一起去涩谷和明治神宫跨年，很棒的体验！ 还有，屋子里很多东西都是Min自己手工做的哦，超棒！！一个人来东京推荐这里！
Hi min is very nice i love this place ..recommended

Min is one of the greatest host I ever had. The place is in a nice location, the rooms are comfortable and the people are amazing. Finally, I would stay there again if I had the chance to go to Japan.
Fantastic location and such a cool place! The rooms are very nice and have a lot of character
Such a friendly and accommodating host! Would book again if I were to return to Shinjuku. Wonderful view from the bedroom, and all the amenities were very convenient. Excellent location.

회사 동료와 3박 4일 일정으로 다녀왔습니다. 일단
신주쿠역까지 도보로 10분내로 갈 수 있고 (근처의 이치란라멘, 모토무라 규가츠 포함) 바로 옆에 히가시신주쿠역이 있어 지하철 노선 정하는데에 있어 큰 불편함이 없습니다^^ (저는 지하철 노선을 중심으로 됴쿄 여행경로를 짰습니다) 여기까지는 위치의 이점이구요 그 외 사장님이 일본교포시며 영어와 한국어 물론 일본어까지 유창하게 하셔서 친구를 사귈 수 있는 기회를 만들어 주십니다. 하루종일 돌아다니다 밤에 와서 자는 여행은 식상했는데, 저녁부터 새벽까지 한잔(사실 백잔)하며 말이 잘 안통해도 시끌벅적하게 놀았던 기억이 가장 많이 남습니다^^ 가보시면 후회 안하니 걱정말고 get! 하세요!
ps-불고기 정말 감사 했습니다. 다음엔 한국음식 챙겨서 가겠습니다!! Ted가 떠나는 3월 28일 전에 가고 싶지만 어떻게 될지 모르겠네요~ ㅋㅋ Ted~보고있나~일본어 공부 화이팅!! you were so cool 사장님도 cool 사모님은 awesome!

히가시 신주쿠역까지 걸어서 5분?이면 가고 바로 가부키초라서 신주쿠 중심지랑도 가까워요!
정말 친절하시고 숙소도 깨끗하고 꼭꼭 추천합니다:) 아침에 햇살이 진짜 끝내줘요.
편리성, 친절, 다른 관광지 접근성 등이 매우 뛰어납니다. 친절하고 정겹고 재미있는 한국인 사장님 덕분에 잘 지내가다 갑니다. 가성비 매우 좋으며, 시내교통 접근성이 아주 좋습니다. 단, 시내 한 복판이라서 외부 차량 소음이 좀 들리는 건 감안하시는게 좋겠네요.
Great pad! Would stay again

I Stayed at Min's place for 5 nights and it was definitly a great way to start off my time in Japan....the sharehouse is easy to find, perfectly clean and organized, and in a terrific location in central Shinjuku, near public transportation and plenty of shops and resturants...I met some nice people during my stay but most of all Min was a cool, funny guy and terrific host. He provided me with plenty of suggestions for things to see and places to go in tokyo. The private room was comfortable with a great view of the city. I would reccomend this place to anyone but especially if it is your first time in Japan. Cheers Min! See you again some day
-Addam
