Great place to stay. Responsive in any queries. Just a 15 min walk to shinjuku metro station.
As a solo traveler, Min was an awesome host and the furnishing was really nice. It gave a really homely vibe. Will definitely recommend this place to others. Thanks Min!

Min's sharehouse is perfect. It's walking distance to the heart of Shinjuku and there are a ton of shops a restaurants around it. Min is great to talk to and comes by in the evening sometimes. If you get a chance have a beer and a chat with him!

Min's place is great.
All is clean and nice to see. Rooms are well decorated and you have all the necessary things you need.
One of the strong points of the place is the localization, near of the place is the Higashi-Shinjuki station of the Oedo line, this line can be used to get to almost all the must see of Tokyo.

min's place is fantastic, lovely room with a lovely view, and a great location about two minutes walk from a metro station from which you can easily get anywhere in tokyo. the place is quiet and you can definitely have your privacy if you want, but there's also a lively  common area where you can hang with the other guests. it's a great place to meet fellow travelers and a great home base for exploring tokyo, not to mention that min is a wonderful host!  very friendly and helpful, i was sad to say goodbye! good value, and a very picturesque rooftop for your morning coffee. next time i'm in tokyo i will be staying here again for sure! thanks min!

This place was far more than I expected. Not only is it close to countless convenience stores, restaurants, grocery stores, all of kabuki-cho and a few train stations. But it has a really great view of the city from the rooms. Min is also the nicest host I've encountered, he's helpful and tries to make you feel at home and comfortable. Oh did I mention the value? It's super cheap for a location like this. I can see why so many guests return to this place and I'm bound to return one day.
Min is very helpful all the time! I enjoy the stay
Good

This place is a great choice if you want to be right amongst the hustle and bustle of Shinjuku!
Room was very clean, great having a balcony (shared with other room next door), Min was very kind and helpful, location was awesome.
Would definitely stay here again!

Min's place was great! He was very welcoming and hospitable. The room was comfortable and had everything we needed. The facility was easy to find and close to several stations.
Min stayed in touch and was very helpful. We met very nice people and shared travel stories over drinks on the rooftop (weekend activity). Overall a great stay!!

I stayed at Min's place for 3 nights and it was perfect for a sole traveler. The room was on the 9th floor, clean, spacious, and with one heck of a view. He also allowed me to check in early, which was a plus. Unfortunately, I wasn't able to hang out with Min and the other house guests during one of the rooftop parties, but it's a great way to meet other travelers. Will definitely stay here again if I find myself in Shinjuku.

HIGHLY recommend. Especially if you are a solo traveler or want to meet great people. The location is 2 blocks away from the metro station and not too far away from the JR Shinjuku stop. Kabuki cho (redlight district) is a ~7 min walk away. There is also a really good 24 hr sushi spot just down the street. I liked the area because we were close enough to walk to the action but far enough to the point we could sleep through the night. Min has a really nice rooftop view too! If you stay here, PLEASE attend one of Min's gatherings or else you are missing out on the true experience of a shared home. I had SOOOOO much fun hanging out with Min and the other house guests. I will DEFINITELY be back again.

Really a nice place: confy and tidy rooms, very warm-feeling. With lots of clever space to set your belongings into and have a "feel like home" experience, not bumping onto your luggage every time you turn in the room.
I also loved the views from the room's window!
좋았어요 ㅎㅎ 신주쿠역이랑 가깝고 돈키호테랑 가깝구
Min님의 숙소는 굉장히 편리하고 좋은 위치에 있습니다. 걸어서 15분 정도의 거리에 신주쿠 중심가가 있고, 걸어서 5분 정도 거리에 지하철역이 있어서 참 좋았습니다. 3분정도 걸으면 돈키호테도 있구요. 단, 길가라서 아무래도 좀 소음이 있습니다. 특히 사이렌 같은게 생각보다 자주 울렸어요. 그래도 편하게 해주셔서 잘 쉬다 왔습니다. 추천해요~

The location is great and very close to many public transportations and restaurants. My favorite part of the room other than being super clean is that I have my own balcony. The place has a really nice view especially at night and I really enjoyed staying at the place. The host responds really fast and was very friendly. I recommend this place to anyone that wants a decent place to play in Tokyo.
Amazing place with a great view of the city! It is conveniently located and the host is very friendly. I would book again without any hesitation if ever I go back to Tokyo!
Unique city view from cosy room and roof top, helpful and great host, much appreciated for the welcome drinks!

Fantastic location for nightlife and transport connections near Shinjuku, good value and well presented accommodation, and Min is a great host. Min takes great pride in what he does and puts effort into all the details.
숙소 위치, 뷰, 방의 크기와 청결도, 커뮤니케이션 모든 면이 만족스러웠습니다!! 기회가 된다면, 다음 번 도쿄 여행 때도 min님의 숙소를 이용할 계획입니다. 도쿄로 향하는 모든 여행객분들에게 추천하고 싶은 숙소입니다. ^^
這個民宿的位置相當方便。這次已經是第四次住在這裡。屋主而十分樂意幫助我們。thank you very much

I am very happy and confident in this six days, the room is clean and big ,look like a home,min is very kind and helpful person ,I hope that next time I can come to Tokyo this apartment, I  take the plane away now , see you min🤗
님들 꼭 이곳으로 오세요 지내는동안 정말 즐겁게 지냈고 교통편도 좋고 근처에 맛있는 음식점도 많고 방도 좋고 나무향도나고 진짜 하나하나 꼽을수 없을만큼 장점으로 도배된곳입니다 일본 오실분들은 꼭 여기로 오세요

Min's place is a heaven in middle of Shinjuku. Idealy located,the appartment  is very well organized for all the guests. One feel really at a friend's place, with everything one neeeds. The rooms are nice, mine has a great view and one enjoys the rooftop terace for a nice meal or drink with Min and other guests.  At night, the city is at your feet. Min is really a wonderful host, he has good advices and understands travellers needs. A really great place to stay in Tokyo.

Mins place is so lovely! Very close to stations and so many options for food and shopping just by walking. Has everything you need for a great price :)

Centrally located and only a few blocks away from Shinjuku station, Min's place was both extremely convenient and comfortable. Min was the best type of host you could wish for - accommodating, helpful and a great sense of humour.
just book it！

The room is perfect, everything will be fully explained by Min at your arrive. Shower and bathroom clean, nice kitchen, and amazing rooftop. Min is what a traveller desire, everytime ready for what you need and a very kind person.
Looking forward to come back again!!

I loved the stay at Min's sharehouse! It was very clean, and Min was around once every day or so to tidy up and make sure everyone was enjoying their stay. Extremely friendly and helpful host that makes sure you feel at home from the first moment. I ended up staying for an additional 4 nights and he was very flexible to make that work well for me! Highly recommend for backpackers, solo- or couple travelers or just if you want to have a great time getting to know Tokyo from a great location.
Close to all kinds of metro lines and trains, and amazing rooftop with a beautiful view over Tokyo skyline.
Can't wait to revisit!

The room and patio view are really, really beautiful! The location's amazing because it's about 2 blocks to the train and right next to some of the coolest restaurants and things in Shinjuku! The host is also really communicative and welcoming- highly recommend.

I don't normally write reviews because honestly I hate writing but this time I need to make an exception. Next time I'm in Japan, Min's place is the first place I'm going to visit. Min was an amazing host, my room was more spacious than I thought, clean, and (to me) comfortable. He's very welcoming, as well as the great people you will meet there. This was my first time going to Japan and using Airbnb. If you could not tell already I could not have had a better experience. There was never a day/night I felt like I had nothing to do. There's bars, restaurants, games, public transportation close by and of course hanging out with the people visiting the share house. Also plenty of convenient stores that come in handy, especially for long nights and early mornings. By the end of the trip it felt like hanging with family and I dreaded leaving. You will definitely enjoy your stay here.

Staying with Min really enhanced my experience. I can't say enough about the hospitality. There is no other place id rather stay when visiting Tokyo and can't wait to go back. Location is perfect right near many public transport systems, bars, restaurants and a great don quixote market below. It was a great base of operations and also a great place to just hang out with lots of great people!
신주쿠 역까지 걸어갈수도 있고 도보 1분거리에 스시잔마이, 돈키호테 등 편의 시설도 많아 좋아요! 호스트 분이 한국분이라 의사소통도 편하고 가끔 옥상에서 다른 게스트들과 바베큐 파티도 할 수 있어 좋았어요!

Great communication by Min--he was flexible, friendly, and helpful. Place as described.  Close to Golden Gai, Samurai Museum, and Oedo subway line.  Place was clean.  On a busy street, so noise present from the street, but guests were quiet and polite.  Recommended.

I loved the room I stayed in, private room on the 10th floor with an awesome view. Also, as this is a sharehouse, there is so much freedom: no curfew and no set breakfast or cleaning times. As I was on holiday, I wanted to take it easy and never left the house before 11:00 in the morning. I also never got back until later in the evening, Tokyo never gets boring.

Min’s a really fun guy that immediately makes you feel at home. Very friendly, and humorous. He’s good at bringing people together, which is a plus for solo travelers. The room and the bed were very comfortable, and it was a nice bonus that there’s a bath next to the shower. Perfect after a long day of walking through Tokyo.

I would absolutely recommend staying at Min's place to anyone, especially if you're starting your trip. It's a great way to get settled in and Min is very friendly and easy to talk to. I will happily stay there again when I come back to Tokyo.

literally blocks from one of the more popular tokyo neighborhoods. the room is large, the space is stylish, and min and his wife were awesome hosts (they made me lunch on areival). i would return in a second!!!

Great host and property, very clean and organised so you can focus on your trip and have a comfortable place to stay at night.
All ways trust in Min, great host

Nice view!  Room was very clean and I slept well (yes the street below is noisy, but with earplugs even a light sleeper like me was fine).  Loved that there was a common area to meet other guests.  Got a great tip on a night festival at a local shrine from another traveler visiting from Korea. definitely would stay again!

My room had an amazing view of the Shinjuku streets and city lights. The rooftop, which is open access to guests, also offered a beautiful view.
Min was such a friendly host, sharing stories and good times with his guests. It’s amazing that he and his wife built the place with their bare hands!
I will definitely be back!

Min's place is such a nice apartment with such a nice view that even if you don't go out you have the feeling that you are in Tokyo. Location is great to move in all directions of Tokyo area and many highlights of Shinjuku district are within walkable distance, while in the 'back side' of Omori building there is a completely different neighbourhood and feeling, more local and calm.
Min is an excellent host, really professional and on the same time really caring for the best accommodation and experience of the travellers. I had perfect experience both times and I would definitely recommend this place to others. Thank you and Haru so so much for taking care of everything!!!
숙소 깨끗했고 주인분도 친절했었습니다 위치가 신오쿠보역랑 신주쿠역 중간이라 7분 정도 걸어야합니다

店主是一对夫妇，男主人是韩国人，女主人是日本人。男主人很大方，曾经在欧洲留学，所以英文很好。来这里居住的也以韩国和欧洲游客为主。房间很干净，地理位置相当好，离東新宿地铁口较近，去新宿购物也只需步行，这个价位在这个位置能有这样的环境可以说性价比相当高。
Nice place,convenient and clean,high cost performance.
部屋がきれいで、位置が便利で、皆様が親切です。もし機会があれば、ぜひもう一度ここに住んでいると思っています。

정말 좋은 곳입니다.

또 방문할꺼예요!!

Located just behind Kabukicho in Korea town, Min's apartment is a nice space with great communal areas. Min himself is a friendly and interesting man who is happy to help you with any questions you might have. The only small issue I had was that the single bathroom was often busy but the location made up for it.

Min was an excellent host. His apartment has all the facilities needed, and the security was great. The location was super convenient for late nights out in Shinjuku, and Min is very knowledgeable about the area, and advised me on transport to use to get to places I  wanted to go to. Will definitely come back here when I'm in Tokyo again!

Min's house is definitely one of the best Airbnb in Tokyo.
Very convenient location close to supermarket, Korean district as well as Metro station.
Min San and his wife are always caring and warming.
The bedroom is not that big but really clean and comfortable.
Min's house is very clean & tidy with strong characters as most of the wooden furniture were made by Min San himself.
This house is strongly recommended for all open-minded travelers who like meeting new people from different countries.

We slept on the floor and the floor was dirty. Very thin mattress, japanese style.
Nice host, good location.
From the get go, min and Haru are welcoming, helpful and friendly. The place is a charm, well located and has all one needs to enjoy shinjuku and Tokyo. Highly recommended.

I will not stay anywhere else in Tokyo! Min was an excellent host, easy going, cheerful, happy to help. The bedroom was very cozy and the room had the best view. Worth every penny. Couldn’t have asked for a better first time stay in Tokyo.

Min and Haru were wonderful hosts very accomodating and welcoming would definitely stay again

위치; 야마노테센(신주쿠, 하라주쿠, 시부야, 이케부쿠로 역 등 도쿄 시내 주요 번화가를 지나는 순환선)을 지나는 신오쿠보역(한인타운)과 가까워 관광하기에 최적화된 위치이면서도, 중심가와는 떨어져 있어 일정이 없는 날에도 조용하고 편안하게 휴식을 취하기 좋은 곳입니다
시설; 일본의 저렴한 호텔이나 에어비앤비에는 샤워실만 있는 경우들이 많은데, 이 곳에는 넓은 욕조와 강아지를 목욕시켜도 될 정도로 큰 세면대가 있다는 것도 큰 장점이었습니다 주방 겸 라운지에는 조리 도구와 식기가 많아 요리 해먹기에도 편하고, 밖에서 사온 음식을 테이블에서 먹으면서 타 게스트들과 TV 보고 노닥거리기에도 좋습니다 히가시신주쿠 근방의 야경이 한눈에 보이고 앉아있을 곳이 있는 옥상도 이용할 수 있습니다 저는 독방을 이용했는데, 한쪽 벽면이 다 창문이라 아침엔 채광이 풍부하고 낮에는 환기하기에 편하며 밤에는 뷰가 예뻤습니다 혼자 쓸 수 있는 발코니도 있었습니다 난방이 잘 되어 춥지는 않았습니다
호스트; 친절하고 꼼꼼하시고 유쾌하신 분입니다 한국어, 일본어, 영어에 전부 능통하시기 때문에 의사소통하기에 편합니다 오타쿠 기질이 살짝 있으셔서 집안 곳곳에 각종 피규어나 직접 만들고 도색하신 프라모델들이 많다는 점도 또 하나의 볼거리였습니다
전반적으로 몹시 만족스러운 숙박이었습니다! 일주일 동안 잘 머무르다 갑니다

I would like to start by saying that by far this has been my most comfortable stay in Tokyo. Not even considering the location, Min and Haru's place is extremely clean, well stocked, and just nice to be in. There is a reason why that have basically a perfect rating on Airbnb as hosts.
You stay in a perfect location in Shinjuku; it is within a 10 minute walk to Shin-Okubo station, and 15 minutes walk from Shinjuku Station and Nichome. Not to mention the walk to Shin-Okubo is full of places to eat, from korean street food to a proper sitdown meal.
The apartment itself is full of life. From the moment you walk in, you can tell that this isn't some throwaway location from a landlord that has 500 other places in Tokyo. The walls are covered in hinoki wooden panelling, the owner posts their custom painted gundam figurines everywhere. The common room has a great view of the street and is stocked with everything you'll need for your stay. You can even go up to the roof and look around at night to relax. You are on the 9/10th floor, so you won't be woken up by people stumbling around in the street after midnight.
Most rooms you will stay in have a huge window that looks out onto the street, but from high up. It's beautiful in both the morning and at night.
As for amenities, you have access to a washer, a bath/shower, two bathrooms, a fully stocked kitchen with fridge, and balconies to smoke. You share these with the other guests, which I never had a problem with.
I know this is a long review but to conclude: If I have a choice I will try and stay at this place every time I come to Tokyo. The price is reasonable, the location is fantastic, public transport is close-ish and easy to access, and the apartment is comfortable and beautiful. You won't regret staying here.
Min and Haru are incredibly sweet and fun to talk to. They’re full of recommendations if you need them and are incredibly accommodating!

Min and Haru’s place was lovely! Both were so welcoming and helpful. The location is really convenient for getting around Tokyo and the room was comfortable with great aircon and cupboard space :)
Very nice stay with Min & Haru. It was very friendly and it was nice to be able to chat with other foreigners in the evening. The accommodation is well situated. I recommand.

Min and Haru were wonderful hosts! They greeted me when I got there and were always really with great info about the area and how you get about! Made the stay really feel like home away from home. 🙏 The room was spacious - I kept my suitcase open the entire time and still had room to try on my shopping! Transport links were GREAT! I was able to get into the area without needing to transfer from Shin Yokohama and leaving was just as convenient with the Airport Limo Bus a quick 10 minute walk away. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay!!

My stay at Min and Haru was wonderful. I actually wanted to stay one more night , that is how comfortable I felt in that space. But of course these gems sell out quickly. Centrally located, many activities around, easy transportation close-by on top of the very hospitable hosts Min and Haru, made this a home away from home. The home is very clean, quiet and cosy and the contact with other travelers goes very natural in the nice common space. I would recommend it to anyone for sure!!!

A true gem - I stayed for five weeks at a private room and it was an amazing experience!
The private room is very secure and offers a spectacular view of Tokyo at night - it has a huge window and also some balcony space so you don't feel shut-in. Shared bathroom facilities were good and the wait in the mornings weren't that bad - shower facilities are excellent and during the five weeks I never had an issue with water pressure, water temperature, A/C, heating, etc.
Min is a wonderful host - he is fluent in English, Korean and Japanese. He's funny, helpful and open-minded and will go out of his way to make your stay comfortable. If you prefer to stay at a place with a flair, this guesthouse is 10/10. Min & Haru bring a lot of their personality into the space and keeps it lively and fun, but they also completely respect your privacy.
The rooftop space is a MUST - you get an amazing view of the city and it's a perfect space to enjoy a beer outdoors. Location is perfect.

A really great place, close to a lot of train stations and local attractions! Both Min and Haru were really friendly and gladly inform anyone anything of interest or whatever you wanted to know. Would definitely ask them about more local great hot spots next time I’m in Shinjuku!

Min & Haru were lovely as hosts, providing clear instructions (YouTube videos and maps) to the share house. The private room was exactly as described and clean.
Upon arrival Min was quick to show me around the room and amenities of the house. The sharehouse is well decorated with all kinds of Gundams and figurines and super cozy to stay in.
Location-wise it is right in the middle of 'K-town' of Shinjuku, and close to several train lines. Note that it is a bit of a walk from Shinjuku station Yamanote line, but only 5 minute walk from other lines near by.
If you are a solo traveller it is also a great place to meet other fellow travellers.
Well organised, nice host + the place offers probably the best view of Tokyo (or of Shinjuku).
Fantastic place, will definitely hope to stay here again next time I am back in Tokyo

I only stayed there for two days but I felt welcome from the start. The Apartment has a comfy feeling with all the decorations on the shelfs. If you‘re travelling on your own you get enough privacy but at the same time get an opportunity to meet other people. ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

Very cool house
Just a bit crowded toilet wise 🙂

Accueil très agréable, Min et Haru sont très bienveillants. l'appartement est parfaitement situé, la chambre est bien équipée et lumineuse.
les espaces partagés sont agréables.
L'entrée dans l'appartement et la chambre à partir de serrures sécurisées rend les allées et venues autonomes.
je recommande tout à fait ce logement.
Great Place to stay at!
Great place in the heart of Shinjuku.
excelente en todos los aspectos y la ubicación muy bien estás cerca de todo y es una buena opción para llegar por el Narita Expréss e irte sin complicaciones
저는 한국사람이라 사장님께서 일본에 오래 사시는 한국 사람이었는데 친근감 있고 너무 편하게 대해주셔서 엄청 잘 지내다가 갑니당 건강히 잘 지내세요 ㅎ
No clean pillow case when I arrived but otherwise a great stay with a nice view

Enjoyed my stay with Min&Haru at the share house! it’s safe at night because there’s other hotels on the same street, and ~10 min walk away between shinjuku and okubo (ktown) stations. The rooms get a lot of sun on the 9F so the blackout curtains were good for sleeping. If you are a light sleeper, it can be a bit noisy with the police / fire trucks at night since it’s a busy street but I’m a heavy sleeper. Laundry was very handy to have, there’s no dryer so I hung my clothes up in my room & on my window ledge (sun dries it quick!) but there’s also hangers in the outdoor stairway. Fun talking & drinking with others in the living room and nice to know that a few guests staying are regulars actually! Would love to come back again :))))

min and haru immediately felt like family. they were so sweet when checking me in and the private room was great! they frequently host barbecues for everyone staying in the sharehouse to get together and i met the coolest people here. definitely will be back!

A generous check in and out time, handy YouTube videos on directions,  etc make everything easier and comfortable. Stairs are a bit steep and bathroom is on the floor below. Some road noise, so bring ear plugs. Min is fun to talk to as well as the rest of the others staying there. A good vibe throughout.

숙소의 위치는 매우 훌륭합니다. 지하철역과 가깝고 코리아타운과도 인접해있으며, 멋진 식당과 쇼핑할 장소가 가까운 곳에 즐비해있습니다.
방은 매우 깔끔하고, 사장님께서 직접 모든 것을 상세히 안내해주셔서 이용하는데 전혀 문제가 없었습니다. 욕실은 공용이지만 붐비지않아 자유롭게 사용이 가능하고, 따뜻한 물도 매우 잘 나와요.
가장 매력적인 것은 사장님 부부입니다. 너무너무 친절하시고 따뜻하게 대해주셔서 오래오래 기억에 남을 것 같습니다.
도쿄에 방문하는 모든 분들께 강력추천드립니다^^
The location is quite good. It is close to the subway station and Koreatown, and there are many great restaurants and shopping places nearby.
The room is very clean, and the host personally explained everything in detail, so there was no problem using it. The bathroom is shared, but it is not crowded, so you can use it freely, and the hot water comes out very well.
The most attractive thing is the host couple. They are so kind and warm that I think I will remember them for a long time.
I highly recommend this place to everyone who visits Tokyo^^
I enjoyed my short stay here. It was worth it due to the location.
Nice and friendly hosts.  Would stay again!
Min Min is a great host, very friendly  and helpful.

This was the first time I have ever stayed in share accomodation. I was a little nervous what to expect, however, I'm so glad I booked to stay at Min's Sharehouse. Min is an extremely gracious host and goes out of his way to help all his guests. The price you pay is so cheap, and the place is clean, large, spacious, a great way to meet interesting travellers, and full of convenient ammenities (wifi, Apple TV, washing machine, etc). I initially stayed for two nights and quickly extended to two weeks. Perfect location to enjoy Shinjuku, and the train station is just 1minute walk down the road. As a host, Min makes everyone feel at home, and makes you feel like you are joining a share house family. If you are looking for somewhere inexpensive, friendly, convinient, and fun then I don't think there could be better - book now, you won't regret it :)
Don't forget to enjoy a beer on the rooftop, under the Shinjuku sky!

I stayed at Min's place for 2 nights on my own, and then another 3 with my partner, so I'll review my experiences separately.

Staying at Min's as a lone traveler was amazing. I stayed in a private room, but the common areas were very social and I had a great time drinking and talking with some of the other guests. I don't know if I was just lucky, or if Min has good judgement, but all the guests staying were a perfect mix of social and respectful. No one was loud at night, no one ever invaded personal space and everyone was very friendly.

Min was a HUGE help when I was organizing my trip. I had a number of issues which meant me having to change the details of my booking multiple times, but Min was extremely patient, helpful and communicative through the whole thing. He was also just generally a really nice, friendly guy who is great to have a few drinks with!

This place made me feel really safe, at home and welcome in a new city where I didn't speak the language, didn't know anyone and it was my first time traveling by myself. Staying here was a great start to my stay in Japan, thanks so much Min for all your help and patience.

In my other review I talked about Min and my personal experience at the Sharehouse, so in this one I'll talk facts.

I stayed in a private tatami room, which was big, clean and had a nice view. My one word of warning would be that in a tatami room the paper blinds look very nice, but of course do not block the sun very well, so if you're light sensitive maybe bring an eye mask.

There are 2 toilets and a separate shower/bathroom at Min's place, which for us wasn't a problem, but be aware you may have to wait to use the shower. It's simple enough to avoid waiting by just starting earlier/later than the other guests.

The whole place was extremely clean, the kitchen has pretty much everything you could need, and there is a great rooftop you can access with a nice view of Shinjuku.

The neighbourhood itself is absolutely and completely PERFECT!
The Sharehouse is located about a 13~min walk from the big JR Shinjuku station and about a 4~min walk from a smaller subway station, but you may as well walk to JR Shinjuku because the walk itself is great.
The place is walking distance to the Golden Gai - which is definitely worth checking out, especially the great karaoke place with 500yen beers!
There are also LOADS of restaurants, arcades and bars in walking distance. I'd definitely recommend the Robot Restaurant, which is also walking distance, if you want to experience the super weird side of Japan.
We ate our way through this neighbourhood, and even when we moved on to a different area we found ourselves coming back here because it's just a great, busy, cheap, fun place to be!

It's also very safe! Maybe if you're a lone male, you might feel a little confronted by men trying to get you into their Hostess Clubs, but as a girl on my own and later with my partner I felt extremely safe and comfortable in this area.

Overall: this is a clean, well-equipped apartment in a great area and I'd highly recommend it.

Thanks Min!

The host was friendly and accommodating, taking a few of us from the shared house out to experience Shinjuku.  Min provided great information to new visitors and did what he could to help you get settled in.  The place was a bit older, but take it for what it is: a cheap, shared house with a convenient location in Shinjuku.

This location and room in Shinjuku was excellent! The host was also very good at communicating and went out with us on a few occasions. I would definitely recommend this place for anyone looking for a great time in Tokyo!
Great place, great location, and great host! Min provided everything I could have asked for including awesome advice on food and shops. I had a lot of fun staying here.

After searching for places to stay, I'm very happy that I came across this listing! It is located in Tokyo's Koreatown, and is a 13-min walk from Shinjuku station or a 3-min walk from Shinjuku-Hagashi station. There are many restaurants, shopping, people-watching and attractions nearby, including the infamous Kabuki-cho that foreigners ought to know about (google it).
The space itself is great - comfortable and warm bed in the winter, and pleasant common space to socialize and relax. The view from the 9th floor roof is amazing! Min is very welcoming and helpful with recommendations, and is quick to respond to questions. All of the other guests are foreigners who were just as friendly.
Overall, a big plus to anyone looking to stay somewhere central for a good price and with other travelers and the amazing host, Min!
great location near the metro. the room are great and the host if very nice. Min help me to get mail in japan  and i was very thankful. I would stay there again if I have the chance

Awesome place and awesome host! I was traveling alone and Min's place is a great spot to meet new friends! It is comfortable and in a great location..and the people that stay here are very fun including Min too!
Just as great the second time around. Min is a really nice guy who runs a fantastically nice and well located business. This is the place in Shinjuku to stay at.
My stay with Min was my first Airbnb experience and he sure made it really enjoyable! Highly recommended, especially for the convenience of the location and the awesome people staying there!

Min was very friendly and welcoming. I felt very much at home.  I really enjoyed his sharehouse and the location is excellent. The space is really beautiful with an amazing view and very comfortable and spacious. I felt very safe there, and the location was very close to the Metro. I would highly recommend Min's sharehouse to anyone
It's really a good sharehouse in very convinient area, and Mr. Min is such a great man! If you want to meet people around the world, this is the right place!

We stayed at the sharehouse for 3nights; in a group of 7 family members. The bathroom was the drawback for us, as there's only one available. I would recommend this place for solo backpacker whose looking forward to meet new friend.
Min was great. Such a good guy. Location is amazing. Shinjuku is great.

Min is a nice host who is easy to get along with. Tokyo has an earth quake just after I arrive the street around guesthouse, so the elevator didn't work. Min comes down the street to pick me up, and to carry my 20kg package to 9th floor. My friend will go to Japan s well, probably I'll recommend this guesthouse to him.

Min was very welcoming and helpful. My room was just as in the desription and I really enjoyed my stay. The location of his place is also very convient, 5m to the metro station, supermarkets and restaurants right around the corner. I would def. come again.

Min was a great host, he is very kind and helpfull and he speaks english perfectly.

We really enjoyed our stay at his hostel because its location is perfect in order to get around the area of shinjuku by foot as well as heading to all area in tokyo by subway. All the connections are close by and very fast.

Furthermore Mins Place is very clean and comfortable.

We are looking forward to go there again soon

Thank you Min for the great time we had in the heart of Shinjuku.

We hope to see you again soon!!

Min was one of the best host I have ever expirienced. He was always very kind and funny and he even went to dinner and drink with us. I will allways stay at Mins place when I travel to Tokyo again. I highly recommend his hostel. Thanky for everything! (-:

This was the best airbnb experience I had in Japan.
Min is an accommodating and generous host who will go to great extends to feel you comfortable and welcome in his home.
The place is immaculate, warm and well-suited for travellers. It also has access to a rooftop with spectacular view over Tokyo.
The place is perfectly located for easy access to the exciting Shinjuku area.
I recommend this place heartedly!

Spent almost a week at Mins. Had a great time. Made many new awesome friends at his sharehouse. Min went out of his way to help us enjoy the hanami festivities as well as take us to great restaurants. Highly recommended.
Was a great place to stay.  Had a hiccup at a hotel nearby so I had to look for other places to stay that weren't so expensive.  Min was able to accommodate me and he's quick to reply.

私は日本人ですがベトナムに住んでいて、数週間東京に滞在するため、ここに宿泊しました。
ホストのMinさんは最高な人柄で、他のお客さんに聞いてもMinがいい人だからまた来ると言っていました。
私もまた東京に来る時はここに来ます。

お客さんは外国人がほとんどですので、日本人でも英語が話せるととても楽しめると思います。
私もフランス人、アメリカ人、韓国人と一緒に、近所のお店に飲みに行ったりしました。

場所は新宿までは歩いていける距離で、東新宿駅も近いので渋谷まで一本でいけてとても便利です。

Min is a fantastic host and his share house was an incredible way to experience Tokyo. Min is great with communicating with you over your whole trip. He helped introduce me to other backpackers and even bought beers and groceries and cooked for us on the rooftop. Highly recommended - this is how an Airbnb should be run.

The best place to stay in Tokyo. I went back for a second stay with Min at the end of my trip. Min is an incredibly thoughtful and enjoyable person to spend time with and I couldn't recommend his place more highly.

I stayed at Mins place with for 3 nights and it was a very good experience! He is such a kind and funny host. At his home, I met some new friends and we traveled Tokyo together. It was positive experience for me. I feel so comfortable and I would stay there again. Actually, I am looking forward to staying there again in March if possible.  Highly recommended!!

Min was an excellent host! Very welcoming. He sent directions straight to my whatsapp that was clear and helpful to find the location. He even hosted a get together with everyone in the hostel on the roof the first night I arrived.
The room was secure and came with a passcode that made coming and going easy. The bed was comfortable and the location could not be beat. So close to all the nightlife in shinjuku and just a 15 minute ride to shibuya and harajuku. I extended my stay here for all the reasons above!
Thanks Min!

This is the second time I stay at Min's place. It's an awesome experience staying at his place. Min is always super friendly and helpful. I'm definitely coming back again. See you next time in Tokyo my friend.
Min was awesome! Very friendly and helpful. Would definitely stay again.

Min is a great host and the place is perfect for meeting fellow travellers. There's a communal room upstairs which is great for a drink, and a rooftop which would be awesome on the warmer nights in Shinjuku. Will definitely be back!
房東人很好~~
주위에 드러그스토어와 편의점도 있고 신주쿠,신오오쿠보,지하철과 매우 가까워서 교통이 편리한 점이 좋았구요, 주인아저씨가 연락도 잘 되고 친근하게 대해주셔서 좋았어요! 다른분들께도 추천하겠습니다!

Min, the host, made me feel so welcome. He would always make time to have a chat when I saw him, and he's a really friendly and interesting guy. His place is spacious and cozy, well lit and well aired, so not stuffy at all in the dorm room where I stayed. He kept the place very clean too. In short, I'm well happy I chose his place. Definitely you recommended! Thanks min!
ㅎㅎ

신주쿠역에서 걸어서도 별로 안멀고 히가시 신주쿠역은 2분거리에있어요ㅋ 예약하면 위치를 사진으로 주시는데 찾는데 어렵지않아요!! 다인실을 썼었는데 깨끗하고 사장님이 한국어 일본어 영어 다 하셔서 게스트들을 조화?롭게해주셔서 친구도 많이 만들어갑니다!! 정말정말 추천해요 모든게 좋아요 샤워실이 한개라는것만 빼면!!
This place is very wonderful! MIN is friendly and kind. so I recommend this house.
きっとこの家で休んでください。
きれいで良いです。
またMINさんは親切ですからおすすめします。

Min的屋子位置非常好，离新宿几个站都很近，可以说是就在新宿最热闹的区域附近，楼下自然是百货便利店饭店应有尽有，你可以这里去任何地方，找到到绝大多数想买的东西。晚上的聚会很热闹，Min可以说流利的韩语、日语和英语，我们交流起来没有任何问题。在这里也认识了很多朋友，他们都很友善。住在share house里对我来说没有问题，虽然是合住但是房间有足够的空间放我自己的东西，而且还有可以吸烟的阳台。当我下次来新宿我想我还会住在这里。
新宿駅と東新宿と近い、いろんな意味で便利だ。Minさんは明るい人、韓国語と日本語と英語が上手だ。夜にみんなはお酒を飲んだ、ゲストのみんないい人飲み会めっちゃ楽しかった。sharing部屋は広くないけど自分の空間は充分だ、まだ東京行く時新宿share house泊まりたいと思う。

This place is great! Close to everything you would need to experience Tokyo, and allows you to meet other travelers with similar interests. The host- Min, is very helpful and kind. Come see for yourself!
신쥬쿠역에서 나오는 입구를 정확하게 숙지 바랍니다(입구가 많아서)

Quedarme con Min y Haru fue la mejor decisión que pude haber tomado. Desde el día en que llegué la comunicación fue perfecta e incluso me invitaron a pasar tiempo con sus amigos.
Ahora estoy en el Shinkansen camino a Hiroshima y en 3 semanas volveré a quedarme con Min. Estoy seguro que la experiencia será igual de buena.
La ubicación es PERFECTA, a pasos de todo y en un área donde se come muy bien. Tiendas abiertas las 24 horas y otros.
La conexión a otros lugares también es muy fácil, sea vía metro o llegando a la estación JR Shinjuku. También es muy limpio y cómodo, hacen todo lo posible para que tu estadía sea la mejor posible.
No podría recomendarlo lo suficiente todo lo que dicen los comentarios es cierto.
Anímense que no se van a arrepentir.

It was my second time staying at Min's place and I can confirm what I wrote in the previous one... clean place, great location close by Shinjuku with lots of restaurants and amenities, and Min is a great host, who make his guests feel at home... five stars :)

This was my second stay at Min's place, and I loved it as always. His hostel is very clean, and Min himself is an amazing host who has his guests in mind at all times. I can't wait to stay with Min again sometime soon.

A great place to stay during your stay in Tokyo.
The rooms are clean, and the hosts Min and Haru are kind and welcoming to take care of with you.
In short if you want to have a great time and meet great people from all over the world the Share Min Cover is what you need.
For our next stay we will be happy to return
한국인사장님이어서 의사소통이 잘되고 너무나 친절하십니다. 위치도 신주쿠에서 매우가까워서 도쿄여행의 베이스캠프로 활용하기딱좋습니다.그리고 돈키호테 및 맛집들이가까워 너무좋습니다.😆

Thanks for an amazing stay Min! Your hospitality was fantastic and I really enjoyed staying at your place. For all other potential guests, this is a really conveniently located B&B in Shinjuku, 3 minute walk from the Oedo Line (Higashi Shinjuku), and 5-10minute walk into the heart of Shunjuku and Shinjuku station. So if you're coming in from Narita, on the Narita Express it's super convenient. It's a great social space! Min and his wife really take the time to sit and chat with guests, socialize over some drinks or many drinks, and just generally provide a fun environment. The 9th floor has a kitchen for cooking, which I found super handy for breakfasts in the morning, and there are plenty of grocery shops within one block for anything you might need. All the doors have super cool electronic code locks, which is amazing for traveling because you never have to worry about losing a key.  LOVED MY TIME IN TOKYO and this B&B made it even better. Thanks again!

If you are looking for cheap and comfortable central accommodation in Tokyo look no further. We got an excellent and very clean room with aircon and a spectacular view of the area. The price is non-beatable!
The bathroom and toilet are shared and are in the floor below (reached with an internal staircase) and are perfectly clean and appropriate!
The flat is 5 min from the amazing Golden Gai bar area. We ended up spending three nights in that area hanging out in the tiny bars and getting to know all sorts of locals & tourists.
There is a common kitchen where guests hang out at night so this is ideal for getting to know new people.. This does not mean, however, that the place is not quiet at night because it is. There is an amazing roof terrace where we watched the sun rise on one of our late nights out.
Min was a very friendly host and stayed up late to greet us at 23:30 which we appreciated. At checkout we just left the room because there is a code lock.
Min's place is very clean and nice to stay.
언제가도 좋습니다

Min and Haru are great hosts! Their place is clean, walking distance to transport and plenty of food choices. I stayed in one of the private rooms and was very comfortable. I stayed 2 nights but wish I had stayed more. I will definitely be looking to stay here again next time I'm in Tokyo!

The host enforced a "No visitors" policy not mentioned in the listing. He was so strict about this, that he wouldn't even allow my friend to help me check in. He claimed that this was for "safety" in case people left valuables in the common area. This sounds more like an issue of failing to secure one's belongings, rather than a cause for such restrictive rules. Either way, for this rule to be left out of the advertisement, it was unfairly enforced.  The sleeping arrangement was decent and comfortable enough. Location is great with good proximity to the train station.  Towels were small and he only permitted you to use one per day, which was a bit ridiculous. Overall, fair experience.

Min&Haruはとても素敵な夫婦で、
初めて会った日から人見知りの私でも話しやすく色んな会話をして楽しく過ごせました！
東京に来たけど、一番シェアハウスでの時間が楽しかった様に思います！笑
もちろん人柄だけでなく、部屋も快適に過ごせ、こだわりのある部屋それぞれに魅力を感じました！
セキュリティ面もしっかりしている為、安心して過ごせます！

I had a fantastic stay at Min & Haru's.
The room was nice (slightly quirky) and clean, as were the kitchen and bathroom.
There are several rooms, so there were always people around, but the place stretches over several floors, so it never felt crowded.
Min was extremely friendly, stopping for a chat whenever I bumped into him, and he gave me some good tips on local places to eat.
The rooftop terrace was also a plus.
The only tiny drawback were the towels - only hand towels are provided, so bring your on shower towel.

This is probably one of my favorite airbnbs of all time. It’s perfectly located a couple minutes’ walk from the subway in the Shinjuku area (2 lines) and extremely close to the Golden Gai area as well. Min and Haru are fabulous hosts!! Very kind and welcoming. I was a solo traveler so I had the room to myself, and it’s really a ton of space. Very cute decorations and everything was sparkling clean. Plus a great view from the window. Really could not recommend this place enough!!

If I have a chance to be back to Tokyo, I will definitely stay here again. The hosts are very helpful and easy to communicate with. The place is so clean, spacious, and stylish. Not to mention it’s in a great location. Thank you very much for your hospitality. I had a great time staying in your place.

Min & Haru’s place is the perfect place to be if you want to meet new people traveling through Shinjuku.  With many private rooms sharing one common space in the kitchen and dining, you’ll bound to meet other travelers.  We definitely loved the kitchen space as we used it frequently and got to talk story with others.  Min & Haru’s space is also close to transportation, shopping and restaurants.  We will definitely be stay here again when we travel to Japan again in the future.
we had a great stay! Min is very kind and the place was very convenient and comfortable. really recommend it!

Min and Haru's place is in north Shinjuku, super close to the center, more or less 10 minutes by feet.
The thing we valued the most is the hospitality and the tons of tips they gave us, very friendly and useful. You basically don't need to prepare the trip in the surrounding areas, they will give you all the infos on where to eat, shop and visit.
Thank you, hope to see you again!
Awesome place, great location, outstanding host, super friendly and helpful with tips to get around in Tokyo. Everything was great. Recommended.
Met people from around the world thanks to Min and Haru, keep doing the good work!

We had a great experience at Min & Haru's place (Shinkuju Sharehouse). They are such a great hosts, and our room was big enough for the two of us. The view from the room was really beautiful, and the location is just perfect. The only problem I found is that there is only one bathroom for the whole building; one day I waited for one hour to be in, so, I was a little mad because some guests does not respect the 5-10 minutes rules for using.
The place is very nice. Has a great location (it is near a subway station and airport limousine stop). Min & Haru were very nice and responded quickly. Hope to stay here again soon!

Min and Haru’s Airbnb was convivial, comfortable and perfectly located near the subway station. Our hosts were extremely friendly and always there to help us in case we needed anything. We had the pleasure to stay there a few days and highly recommend it to anyone planning on staying in Tokyo!
Min and Haru were great hosts. The location is amazing and it definitely added to my trip. Would highly recommend for anyone traveling solo or with a small group.
wszystko tak jak napisane właściciel bardzo gościny  świetna lokalizacja :)

Min is a super great host, very thoughtful and considerate. He’d invite guests to chitchat over drinks on the top roof. His place is convenient to travel around the city, perfect for backpackers like me to stroll in city parks and get away from work stress.
Great place to stay! Will always stay when there is a room available!
great spot to use a base camp as you explore tokyo. other guests staying at sharehouse are always cool and the hosts min and haru are very helpful if you need any suggestions.

Nice place, the location is convinient to explore Tokyo and is easy to find. You can meet new people at Min & Haru's every single day so it's a new expirience everyday. Min & Haru are very welcoming and nice people so they try to be the best host they can be.

Min & Haru's place is a cute and quiet little spot slightly out of the main hustle & bustle of Shinjuku. Access to the subway and train lines was really easy and it was only a 15min walk to Shinjuku Station. The private room I stayed in was very clean and as described. The bed is a little on the harder side as it is just a thin mattress on a hard base but for the price and location, you really can't complain! My flight arrived quite late but Min was at the airBnB to greet me and show me around which I really appreciated! The communication from the hosts was also excellence and made it very easy to find the airBnB. The room and shared areas were very clean and had everything you would need. The other guests were also very courteous with regards to minimising noise late at night/early in the mornings. Overall, it was an enjoyable stay and had everything I needed for my short stay in Tokyo - would recommend!
真的是装修的很有品位很温馨可爱的房间，整洁干净，客厅还有很多漫画，可以随意做饭等等，比在家还舒服☺️房东和他的太太很温暖，还有住各国来的外国人，经常看到他们一起在客厅聊天（我太自闭就没去哈哈哈）。总之，这个价格可以住到这样的房间真的很幸运！谢谢你们～下次还会带朋友来的！

Min's place is perfect if you want good proximity to main train stations, bars & shops right around the heart of Shinjuku. The triple bunk room we stayed in suited my friends and I perfectly and had a nice view from the window.
Min was super hospitable and runs a tight ship and we'll definitely be staying here next time we are in Japan!
很愉快的入住体验

Best AirBnb in Japan! Great rooms, friendly guests, interesting neighborhood, lots to do, close to the transit stations, excellent location, clean bathrooms and kitchen, and, most importantly, AWESOME hosts! Min and Haru are wonderful people who are have been hosting for many years. They are kind, communicative, understanding, and very happy to share tips and recommendations about Tokyo and Japan for first time visitors have dorm rooms and private rooms available, so make sure to indicate your preference. I would give this place 6 out of 5 stars if possible!  THANK YOU for a wonderful stay in Shinjuku Min and Haru! I have already recommended your sharehouse to many people interested in visiting Japan!

I booked this single bedroom in Min & Haru‘s sharehouse Shinjuku for my first couple of days in Japan and couldn’t be happier with my decision. Great value, good location and the atmosphere is just lovely. It’s not the biggest space but every corner thoughtfully used and decorated with Charme. You get the vibe on the pictures.
The host was super kind and I immediately felt at home.
I can only recommend it and will surely book again if I get the chance.
This was such a cool place, loved the decorations around the apartment. Min was great. Such a central location to Kabukicho and about a 13 min-15 min walk to shinjuku station. Thanks for the stay!

min and haru are the best hosts I have had , they were very lovely and made me feel at home in their home . all instruction of getting there were clear and also the home had amenities as well which was great.  I will definitely come again as I had a the best sleep and such a lovely view from my balcony . thank you for your hospitality  min and haru :))

Manami is an awesome host. Very attentive and thoughtful. The apartment is well equipped with  every thing you could need and in the Japan fashion, was very clean. Koenji is a great spot in Tokyo with a  substantial community vibe. Superb live music scene, over 100 second hand and vintage clothing stores, restaurants and eateries. One of my favourite places in Tokyo. The Chuo Rapid is only about a 7 min ride to Shinjuku station too. Some times, you need to change at one station down for the local line or just walk the extra 5 mins from Nakano Station if you choose. The only downside is the block of the apartments that this one is in it self. However this is typical of Tokyo. Space is tight and people are packed in very closely, walls are pretty thin so if you choose to AIR BNB you need to take this into consideration. If this a problem, stay in an expensive hotel....

Manami was a great host and helped us with everything we needed. She even gave us a lift with her car when it was raining and we had to get to the train station. The apartment is clean, cozy and perfectly spacious for two people. It is located just a few minutes walk from the trains. We slept well and wasn´t disturbed by anything. The neighborhood is amazing with a lot of bars, izakayas and second hand shops. Its easy to get to Shinjuku (about 7-8 minutes) but you can easily spend some of your days and evenings in Koenji - there is a lot to do. I will recommend Manamis place to people going to Tokyo!

Very great house and very nice host!
Everything you need is arranged in the room. And the location is convenient to enjoy many interesting shops, restaurants as well as to other popular places of Tokyo.

I stayed in Koenji my 1st official japan visit. I must say Manami is a great host! She helped with whatever I need help with. Excellent hospitality , she really made me feel at home.
The loft itself is a cozy space, which I can really get use too. You have enough space to do what you need especially if your traveling. The neighborhood is nice and quite. There's a lot of friendly bars all around Koenji. It's so easy to travel to different parts of Tokyo as well. I spent four nights here and wish I spent more to be honest. My trip got off to a good start cause of Manami and her space!
Thanks for everything Manami!
I hope to be back ;)

Manami was fantastic. She met us at the station to personally guide us to the apartment and show a few local spot along the way. Her english is great which made it easy for us to ask advice and she was very approachable. The apartment is small but had everything we needed and was perfect for our time in Tokyo. The apartment is really clean and in a great location, little restaurants round the corner and just a short walk to the center of Koenji. I'd stay here again.
It was an excellent place, Manami is kind and she picked me up from the station. The place is extremely neat and tidy with  convenience stores and nice restaurants near by.

We loved staying in Manami's place. The apartment was very clean, quiet, and well equipped. Manami very kindly helped us with whatever we needed. The location was also very ideal. There's a well-stocked store right around the corner which made grocery shopping very convenient. It was also very easy to get to popular places like Shinjuku/Shibuya/Harajuku from Koenji station and there are some large main streets with tons of restaurants and shops within walking distance. I very highly recommend staying in Manami's apartment if you're coming to Tokyo!
Great location and lovely apartment, clearly a lot of care had gone into making it comfortable and homely. Manami is a very nice host,  totally recommend!

Manami est un hôte formidable, pleine de gentilles attentions.  Elle est très disponible et généreuse. Son appartement est très bien situé, dans un quartier agréable. Il est bien organisé et notre famille de 4 s'y s'est sentie à l'aise.  On y dort bien, c'est très silencieux la nuit et bien chauffé (ce qui n'est pas toujours le cas au Japon).  Je n'ai que des bons mots à dire sur elle et son appartement.  J'espère pouvoir retourner un jour chez elle.  MERCI MANAMISAN!

Manami was a lovely host. She waited for us at the station even though we were late and showed us around the apartment. Koenji is our favourite suburb in Tokyo so it was great to stay there in our own apartment like locals. The apartment itself is cozy but it's light, airy and tidy. Manami has thought about everything you could need from umbrellas at the door to instructions on how to use the washing machine. We'll be back for our next visit.

I had a fantastic stay here! The apartment is clean, well furnished and full of extra touches such as maps, hair dryer, tea etc. Manami and her father were so friendly- her father picked up me from the station when I arrived and dropped me back when I left. Some people leave comments that the apartment is small but I have lived in Japan before and this is an average sized apartment for Japan!
Location wise it is excellent, it's about 3 minute walk in a straight line to koenji JR. But still in a quiet location. Koenji is a really cool area of Tokyo and filled with great independent stores and cheap delicious food. I cannot recommend this place enough! I would definitely stay here again! Thank you Manami!

たまたまManamiさんがご不在の間の滞在となりましたが
ご両親に大変親切にして頂きました。駅まで迎えに来て頂き、部屋には常備していないアイロンまでお借りしました。
お部屋はタイトル通り、大変居心地のよいCOZYな空間でした。
高円寺の駅からもアクセスがよく、通り道にコンビニなどお店もあるので大変便利です。
また次回東京に滞在する際は、お願いしたいです。

I was privileged to stay in Manami's apartment for several weeks and it was simply amazing. Manami and her family were so friendly and hospitable. Manami's father picked me up at Koenji Station even though I was late and couldn't communicate that fact, and he even kindly made time to drive me to the station on my departure even though he was busy. I had some small trouble with the wireless internet which was 100% my own fault, but still Manami and her parents were so quick to call the service provider and did everything they could to help.
The apartment is clean and feels very homely. It has a great charm and living in it was a great experience. Manami and her family paid attention to so many details, as others have mentioned, that even if one forgets to pack some things, it will most likely be provided. So I could immediately settle down after a long and exhausting voyage. The area around the apartment is pretty quiet for Tokyo I would say, so it's no problem to relax after a busy day in Tokyo. As for comments regarding the apartment being small, I would disagree. It is definitely spacious enough to feel comfortable and not feel cramped, especially after having seen some of my friends' apartments in Tokyo.
Koenji itself is also a very charming place. It's not as busy as the more famous areas in Tokyo but that doesn't mean that there's nothing to do. On the contrary, there are many convenience stores close by (the closest to the apartment is only maybe 20-30 meters away), reasonably priced good quality restaurants and other food places, bars and some very unique shops. It's worth planning at least one day for exploring Koenji I would say.
It is also a great location for reaching the famous Tokyo areas since the huge station of Shinjuku is only a few minutes away by train and from there it's very easy to reach almost any place in Tokyo.
Again I'd like to thank Manami and family for being able to stay at their apartment. It made my time in Tokyo so much more enjoyable. I very much hope to be able to visit again!

房間位置很棒，早上跟晚上都很安靜，巷口就有百元店。距離高円寺北口步行約6分鐘，步行也可達中野(約10分鐘)或新高円寺(約20分鐘)。高円寺南北口出來很多店家開很晚，也有24小時的服裝店或開到凌晨1點的書店，晚回來想吃東西或再逛一下都很方便。高円寺在新宿跟吉祥寺中間，但假日快速車不停要注意一下。
Manami非常親切！第一天來車站接我們，最後行李箱壞掉還幫我們處理。她就住在同公寓的隔壁兩間，有事都可以隨時找她，而且她英文很好，溝通無礙。房間跟照片一樣舒適，Manami不但準備了很多小零食，棉花棒跟一些備品也很齊全。
之前來東京有小逛一下高円寺，很喜歡這裡的氣氛，這次特地選在這邊真是太對了！非常棒的經驗，喜歡古著氛圍的人務必考慮。
Very nice experience! Manami is kind and friendly. The room has everything you need and even more. Location is convenient and quiet. Wish to visit again soon : )

Manami apartment is all about location.
If you don’t want to be right in the city center but close enough to it then this is your place. The apartment is located in a nice area, where you can find, besides Konbini stores, supermarkets and all sort of stores. It is really close to the JR train station/subway and just a few stops away from the city center.

The apartment is small, specially kitchen, I found it pretty hard to manage even to do the dishes, but bath, living room, etc are big enough for two people.

All together I recommend this place

Manami has been a great host, communication was great
Manami was a great host,very friendly. She came to meet us at koenji station and showed us the way to the apartment which was 5-6 mins walk from the station.
Manami's place is very well located, cozy and clean. Manama herself is very easy going and supportive. Highly recommend this place!

I had the perfect stay at Manami's. Her apartment was exactly what I was looking for. Convenient and safe location only a short walk from either Nakano or Koenji stations. Convenience stores are just seconds away.

Manami had taken great care to make sure you have everything you need in the apartment. I would consider Manami's apartment to be perfect for any solo or couple travelers.

Check in and Check out was a breeze and Manami was always very quick to respond during any correspondence. Manami was very friendly and welcoming.

This was my fourth trip to Tokyo and I wish I stayed here before... I will definitely come back next year!

Manami was an amazing host! She met us at the train station, showed us some cool spots in Koenji, and was super helpful with any problems we had! The loft was comfortable and cozy! Convenience stores were right around the corner and the neighborhood was nice and quiet.

My stay here was excellent! The apt was perfect; the loft was super cozy and the location great. Manami met me at the station and took me to the apartment. Koenji is super cute and a wonderful respite from chaotic downtown Tokyo. I spent a lot of time wandering the neighborhood which has tons of cafes, bars and vintage clothing shops. I even got my hair cut at one of the many salons. I highly recommend staying here if you are looking to be close to but slightly removed from Tokyo chaos. Nakano, which is a short walk away also has tons of shops and places to eat.

Manami is very kind and friendly who came to pick us up when we arrived. The room is functional having fridge,microwave and a mini kitchen. The bathroom is small but clean. It is a really worthy choice and a wonderful experience. Besides, we really appreciate Manami in helping us dispose the rubbish.

Ms Manami is very friendly & helpful, she even pick us up at the Koenji Station to her apartment. It is really a help, it’s save us the trouble to spent time looking & searching for the location with two luggages on hand, and Manami can speak very fluent English.
The apartment looks exactly like the picture she posted, very comfortable & cozy, feels homely to me. Beside wireless internet, it also comes with washing machine & “cable TV’ which is very important to me.
It’s surrounded with many nice food & people; I even get my hair perm at a nearby salon & their service is excellent. The nearest shop is just around the corner that’s open 24hrs so it’s really convenient, if you need anything last minutes. And you just need a couple of minutes to travel from Koenji Station to Shinjuku or Tokyo Station by Chuo (Rapid Service) Line, it is so convenient.
I will definitely recommend Manami apartment to those who travel to Tokyo, & people who want to experience the local lifestyle. And if there’s a chance, of course I would like to stay in her place again.

The apartment is perfect, rather large for an apartment in Tokyo, very clean, very quiet, true to the pictures, pretty close to the metro and central Tokyo, there is a supermarket just down the apartment open all the time!
I could not talk much with Manami because I don't speak English very well but Manami is really adorable, she offers to pick you up at the metro for you avoid the hassle of Japanese addresses (not easy to understand because it's a numbers system) but the apartment is easy to find, it's still all right!
Manami don't live very far from the apartment, she is available in case of trouble and she can come quickly.
She is a perfect hostess, I recommend her!
I hope to return very soon.

Our host Manami was excellent. She was always there when we needed her and was very gracious.
The apartment was very clean and very, very small. I suppose this is the norm in Tokyo. Climbing up and down the ladder to the sleeping loft was also not our favorite choice. And the mats on the floor were incredibly hard. We asked her for second mats and it did not make much of a difference. We just got used to it.
This was our first stay in Tokyo so not sure what to expect with beds and space really?
Over all the apartment was very clean but way to small for my husband and I. But I am an American, if you know what I mean.

I booked the place for my brother to stay while he was visiting me in Tokyo. Manami and her father were very helpful and accommodating before my brother arrived and during his stay. Checking in and out was smooth and effortless and there were no problems with the apartment. It has everything you need and many nice little touches (welcome beer, water, snacks, and local maps and information in English to name a few) to make your stay feel special. Perfect for one person, a couple or two good friends. It's location in west Tokyo (walking distance to Koenji station and Nakano station) is ideal for those who don't want to stay in the busier city center spots such as Shibuya and Shinjuku, but close enough to get to them quickly and easily. I would definitely recommend this to anyone looking for an affordable and comfortable place to stay in Tokyo.
Manami and her family were so welcoming and helpful. Her apartment is lovely and spacious and Koenji is the best! Thanks Manami!

Staying at Manami's place in Koenji felt as if we were actually living in Tokyo! She was so accommodating, especially with the check in time. She offered to pick my friend and I up at the station, and show us the way to the apartment. However, we were running late to our check in time, but she was very understanding! In the end, her father was so kind as to pick us up from Koenji station and give us a ride with our heavy luggage to the apartment. We are so appreciative of Manami and her father! The apartment is definitely in a very convenient location, as it is close to Koenji station, which is a short ride to Shinjuku, from which you can catch many different train lines. When you arrive at the apartment, you have everything you could need, because Manami has already prepared it for you. I highly recommend Manami's place for a more local feel when staying in Tokyo for a short period of time.

Manami's apartment is the best. It has absolutely everything you need is clean and very attractive.  Manama is a charming host and is very helpful. Lien hi is a great part of Tokyo and is very convenient to many popular places. It really did feel like a home away from home. I would highly recommend Manami's place and definitely would want to stay again on another trip to Tokyo.  Thanks so much Manami.  Annette  & Giv

Really nice apartment in Koenji!! Fully equiped, host even left us food, and very comfortable for two.
Manami was really wonderful coming to pick us up at Koenji station and helping us getting installed! She told us how to get around and left us a map and guide of the area!
Koenji is a great neighbourhood to stay in Tokyo. Great bars and restaurants and with JR Chuo Line you can get everywhere in Tokyo really easy.
We truly recomend it! Great stay at Manami's!!!! :)

Handy neighbourhood. Koenji and also Nakano nearby.
A great little corner of Tokyo.
Manami is very friendly and helpful.
The loft suited me.

I spent 11 days in Tokyo at Manami's lovely apartment in the Koenji district. The area is lovely. It has a youthful vibe - think artists and musicians - good shopping and good food.
Manami was an excellent and thoughtful hostess. When one night the temperature dropped, she got in contact with us and provided my girlfriend and myself with extra (super warm!) blankets.
The apartment itself was spotlessly clean, and obviously well-maintained. In addition, the kitchen area (note to Americans - smaller than you are used to, but super functional) was well stocked with equipment for cooking; I managed to put together several meals quite easily. Included as well is a washer for clothing, which was very useful midway through our trip. Finally, the shower was thoughtfully stocked with soap, shampoo and conditioner.

I think that the best review I can give is simply that I would absolutely not hesitate to stay again!

Manami is a wonderful host! I spent six days at Manami's (traveling solo) and everything was superb. Manami picked me up at the Koenji JR subway stop and we walked a quick 6 minutes to her place. The apartment is well located with easy access to three different subway lines. It is also close to the center of Koenji, but remains a quiet retreat from Tokyo action. The apartment is very clean and comfortable. Manami was very responsive with any question I had and was very helpful with my early flight out of Tokyo. I met Manami's father as well and he was very helpful and welcoming to Tokyo. I would definitely stay here again when I return! Thanks for everything, Manami!

Manami's place is great. Easy walk to Koenji train station, nice sandwich shop around the corner. Nice furnishings, proper house feel with cool loft bed with lots of bedding.
Manami is lovely, fantastic English, lives close by, very helpful. Recommend for a couple for a weekend or a week. I would love to stay again!

There is great place for our vacation.
near koenji/nakano station by walking and just 10min to shinjuku by JR chuo.
and very clean and comfortable room.
especially thanks for her father to help us.
This is our sedond stay at Manami's place. We love her hospitality and the clean cozy place, so decided to stay at hers again. We will definately come back here again.

We had a great stay. Manami was lovely and so kind - she met us at the train station to show us where to go.
The apartment was clean and homely. It has everything you need.
Thank you for having us!

My husband and I had the best time staying at Manami's apartment. It's in a great location easily accessible by three train stations - it only takes 6 minutes to get to Shinjuku on a rapid train which was perfect for exploring. There are loads of cool live music venues, small restaurants and bars in the Koenji area and the apartment is right by a Lawson 100 store for all of your snack & drink needs. The apartment itself was the perfect size and we loved sleeping in the cosy loft bed. It has everything you need and some of the fastest wifi I've ever used! Manami met us at the station when we arrived and was super friendly and helpful during our stay. We've already booked to stay with Manami again on our next visit to Tokyo!

Manami's cozy loft had been a great base for exploring Tokyo. It was japanese style, it was totally comfortable and if we had any questions, Manami or her father helped us immediately. Koenji is a relaxed neighborhood with lovely shops, cafes, izakayas... We also got fantastic recommendations from Manami. Thank you for everything, kind regards

This is a perfect little place in Koenji. Its pretty spacious compared to other places around the Tokyo area, and a very easy walk from the station. The apartment is equipped with everything you could need whether you're staying for a few days or evem a week! Manami herself is incredibly nice and even showed us our way to her place. I absolutely recomend this Airbnb. Five stars.

Overall great spot. Good location, halfway between Nakano and Kouenji, two nice areas on one of the main train lines (Chuo-sen.)
Minami is easy to talk to about any problems, and helpful and friendly. The room is big with everything you'd need. And I don't know why but I love loft beds. My only complaint is the kitchen is really small, but you can make it work. Also a lil dark but again not a big deal.

結構いいところだと思いました。さすがに東京のアパートのキッチンが小さいが、他には文句なし。部屋が大きくて快適で、ホストも話しやすいし近所も楽しいし、お勧めします。

This is not my first Japan Airbnb experience but by far the best. Manami offered to pick me up from the JR Koenji station on the day of arrival. Her directions were clear so I decided to proceed on my own. She allowed me early check-in and later, late check-out. Her place was god-send, comparing it with the other common minuscule Japanese homes. It was fully equipped with basic needs - full-sized fridge, stove, kettle, microwave, oven, washing machine, iron, hairdryer, cable tv etc. The loft was an interesting experience for me too. The home wifi was superfast and the portable one was handy for finding directions. Manami was always responsive when I needed help. When I was taken ill, she inquired about me and offered medication. She also assisted in getting my luggages sent to the airport via TaQbin. I felt safe being in the apartment. Manami's parents were also hospitable towards me. Koenji is the true Tokyo and Manami is a true Superhost.

My husband and I stayed at Manami's place for 2 nights, and we had a positive experience. The location was relatively easy to find (more or less in between two stations, which was about a 6 minute walk). The apartment was equipped with all the amenities for a short stay, including a washer which was great since we ran out of clean clothing at the end of our Japan trip. There're also convenient stores nearby for any general things you need. Manami's instructions were easy to follow for any questions we had during the stay.

The location is near the train tracks, so if you're a light sleeper, you might need to block out the sound. My husband and I were so tired that it didn't affect us much.
The loft bed requires climbing up a ladder, so make sure you're comfortable with that.

Manami's place was the perfect spot to stay in, close to the station and also to lots of cafes bars and shops so you don't even need to travel far at night to get a fantastic meal and a drink. easy to locate with instructions and Manami was fantastic to communicate with, she responded quickly every time we needed to speak and even let us stay in the apartment for late check out. I would highly recommend her place for anyone looking to stay out of the hustle and bustle of shibuya and Shinjuku but also wanting close proximity to great, cool shops and bars. This area also has an amazing collection of vintage clothing stores - probably better than I have seen in one spot anywhere else in the world!! The apartment is on the small side but probably quite large by Japanese standards and very comfortable with everything you need and the neighbourhood felt very safe to walk around at night. Will be staying here again if we come back to Japan!
Great house with many amazing details! Manami is very kind and always answer our questions in time.We are so happy and thankful to live in her house in these days~

Manami's place was perfect for our stay. This was my second time staying at Manami's and will keep coming back. The apartment is clean, comfortable, and quiet. We enjoyed being able to walk to many dining and drinking spots nearby. Manami is a very friendly and attentive host. Looking forward to our next stay.
Minami's place was clean and cozy, Thanks for all details provided which made us a very enjoyable staying.

Notre séjour chez Minami s'est très bien passé. L'appartement est très chaleureux. Bien qu'on ait réservé la veille, l'hôte avait tout préparé, l'appartement était propre et frais à notre arrivée. Minami est restée très à l'écoute durant tout nôtre séjour, elle a su répondre à toutes nos questions. Le logement est bien équipé et très cozy, on a vraiment pu se détendre après de longues heures de marche dans Tokyo.
De plus, c'est un appartement très bien localisé, il est proche de 2 stations JR et à juste quelques minutes de Shinjuku en train.
Le quartier est assez calme, il y a quelques combinis et supermarchés à proximité.
C'est un logement que je recommande si vous voyagez à Tokyo.

Manami's loft apt was super cozy and really closely located between two subway stations. The place was super clean and easy to access. I had fun sleeping up in the loft and it was such a bonus to be able to do my laundry during my stay! The tiny kitchen was a cool unique Japan experience and I made a couple of meals to eat in. The space was very open for the size and it's really easy to get anywhere in Tokyo from her cozy loft. The immediate neighborhood had tons of cool thrift and local designer stores as well as mazes of tiny streets with places to eat buy gifts and just enjoy the locals shooing for their daily needs. Such a great spot to experience Tokyo from!

Manami's place was perfect.
Her instruction to studio was very clear and we found the place without any difficulties. The place was neat and clean. Got everything we need and we could notice that she put lots of thoughts in it. She even turned on the air conditioner before our arrival. Place has a laundry machine and there's laundromat 20 steps away from her place. It was so convenient. If you need a cozy, neat place to stay, her place is highly recommended. :)

Koenji is the best.  Funky and fun, Manami's apartment was the perfect location for a Tokyo adventure.  The cozy loft was exactly as illustrated and had everything for comfort and ease, including proximity to the station and a 24 hour supermarket.  Manami was happily available if required and even dropped by to suggest a local dance festival which was amazing.  I could live in this apartment!  So wonderful, thank you Manami.

Staying at Manami's apartment was a great and beautiful experience. The location is perfect, you can walk to Shinjuku, have a drink in Koenji or Nakano, and come back to your quiet home.
Nakano and Koenji are very nice, you can find everything, restaurant, café, bar, clothes, supermarket, 24/24.
Manami put everything you need in the apartment : tissue, stuff for clean your clothes, some food, tea, coffee, a guide book of Koenji, cutlery, umbrellas, shampoo, conditioner, body soap etc. Everything you need to be relax and enjoying your stay at Tokyo. Also, if you have a question or if you need something, Manami is here, always, and doing her best. She is very nice and helpful.
For sure, we'll come back here !!!!

Manami's place was excellent! So cute but with enough room to not feel closed in. The location is perfect, 5 mins from Koenji Station, and a large vibrant shopping and eating area. Great restaurants, thrift shops, markets, clothing stores, bookshops, basically anything you'd want. The apartment is tucked away around a quiet corner, it's fantastic, you're right in the middle of the action but able to escape at Manami's. Can't wait to go back again.

Really enjoyed staying at Manami's cozy apartment. Her apartment had everything we needed including snacks which were delicious! It was a novel experience living a such a well designed compact room with futon beds up the ladder. Manami was available the whole time through personal message and was pleasant to interact with.

This apartment is a great option when visiting Tokyo. It is well-located, and has everything one could need. It is close to Nakano and Koenji Stations, and both areas have cool bars and restaurants. Perfect for a couple or two friends.

I would also like to thank Manami for being a great host. She responded quickly to all our messages and was very diligent. We were even lucky enough to meet her the first day :)

Had a very good stay at Manami's apartment. Even though I have not met Manami, communication was excellent, and she was very quick and precise in responding to any questions. The place is exactly as described on the website, and a little welcome snack and the offering of mobile Wi-Fi for in the city was great extra service. The mezzanine for sleeping is very cosy and comfortable. The apartment is small but was fine for me as solo traveller. Having a washing machine was very useful. It is well located about 10 minutes walk from the subway, which brings you into the central part of the city within 10 to 15 minutes. Koenji itself has many restaurants, bars and shops without being super busy and you can walk to Nakano in 15 minutes as well for more options. I would warmly recommend Manami's place as a base to explore Tokyo.

We stayed in Manami's apartment for 5 days. Although we did not meet Manami she was super fast with all communication and provided detailed instructions for getting to the apartment. The apartment is located in a quiet street about  5minutes walk from the centre of Koenji and from the train station. This is an awesome place to stay if you want a breather from the craziness and neon of Shinjuku etc, its a bit more relaxed, has great vintage shopping and restaurants and bars. Manami's place was impeccably clean and neat for our arrival. A washing machine is provided which is great. The apartment is compact, and the sleeping loft has a low ceiling so consider this if you get claustrophobic, it can be tricky to get up there if you are very tall. But the futons are very comfortable and its a perfect place for a couple. Recommend staying here.
Very comfortable stay! Had all amenities we need and also good access to station with lots of local eateries nearby.

Manami's place was probably the best AirBnB experience I had during my three months in Tokyo. Manami was great - provided excellent directions and was always responsive to questions I had while there. She really thought of all the little details - liter of water upon arrival, paper towels, tea and coffee, an extra heater (I was there in Nov/Dec), little notes with various instructions - like how to use the washing machine. The place is a great size for one person, probably two as well. The location is excellent, easy to walk to Koenji station as well as Nakano (station/broadway/etc.), which are both super close to Shinjuku, just one stop on a rapid line train. I will definitely look up her place again when I come back to Tokyo.

Manami's place is very easy to find it's more comfortable and so facilitate. I take a long time in her place, you can relax at her place it have many useful things! I highly recommend this lovely room! :)

Manami's place was great and located within a quiet neighbourhood! There were welcome snacks and little instructions around the house.
The music and vintage / unique / household / food shops of koenji are just a quick 5-10min walk away. Convenience store and bread store was just next to us!
We visited in late december and over the new year so it was a pity that most shops were shut for the new year.
