Ceiling of loft was rather low so please take care when you climb up to rest in the bedroom. Bedding was comfortable and we had a great rest after exploring the city.
I recommend this place for young couples as you will need to climb up to reach the bedroom.
Very nice and decent flat! You can get all the things you need! Not very far from JR station, recommend for people who visiting Nagano and Shinjuku. Owner, Ms Manami very helpful and nice!

Manami's place is the ideal space for staying in central Tokyo. I felt at home immediately. It has everything you need, down to the small details. The location was perfect for me, situated between Koenji and Nakano and making a trip to either place a short five minute walk while providing me with enough distance to feel that I wasn't too close to the action after a long day.
Manami is a perfect host that cares about her guests. She gives you space if you want to be left alone and she is there to provide help and support as soon as you need it. She is also a local girl and has a lot of good advice.
You can't go wrong with this one! Highly recommended.
高円寺と中野の間で本当に位地がいいアパートでした。全部必要な設備が整っているのは素晴らしいと思いました。まなみさんは連絡が良く取れて対応も速やかでした。おすすめです！
Manami's place in Koenji was perfect in location. So close to Koenji station. The loft apartment was cozy and had everything we needed. I wish we could have stayed longer! Thank you Manami!

Awesome place by Manami! From check in to the end of our stay everything was smoothly ran. House facilities are all working and fine. Manami even provided some snacks and some basic equipments like travel adapter in the house. Definitely recommend to anyone who like a cozy place to chill with good surrounding Neighbourhood
ゆっくりできますた。
Had a great stay at Kōenji. The apartment has everything you need and is within walking distance of both Kōenji station and Nakano station.

Great location, great value and Manami added lots of nice little touches like a welcome note and having little toiletries such as qtips and bandaids available. Super easy to find as well thanks to her detailed instructions.
It's a wonderful stay during my trip to Japan. The host has prepare whatever we need in the house and some useful information. Will visit next time for sure 🙂

Je suis restée dans l'appartement de Manami deux semaines en Avril 2017. L'appartement de Manami est bien agencé et elle a pensé à tout pour que les personnes y séjournant se sentent à l'aise (notice explicative en anglais pour la machine à laver, adaptateurs, pansements, cotons-tiges, bouteille d'eau, lingettes pour le nettoyage, plusieurs guides, shampooing, gel douche, serviettes, savon pour les mains, snacks de bienvenue,... etc). Bien que j'ai eu l'occasion plusieurs fois de voir son père, je n'ai jamais rencontré Manami. Toutefois, elle a sû être très réactive pour répondre à mes différents messages. Il faut aussi savoir que Manami et ses parents habitent juste à côté de cet appartement, ce qui leur permet d'être réactifs en cas de demande.
Par ailleurs, le futon est confortable mais faites attention à ne pas vous cogner car il faut grimper sur une échelle pour y accéder (mezzanine) et le plafond est assez bas. Aussi, nous pouvons facilement entendre les sons extérieurs, notamment ceux des voisins (douche, chasse d'eau, robinet, trains...Etc) mais le quartier étant calme, cela n'est pas particulièrement dérangeant.
En outre, l'appartement est très bien situé puisque proche des gares de Nakano et surtout de celle de Koenji mais également proche de conbinis où vous pourrez vous procurez ce dont vous aurez besoin lors de votre séjour.
Pour finir, le canapé est confortable et le Wi-Fi de très bonne qualité.

We really enjoyed our 4 days stay in Manami's unique cosy loft. It's not our first time in Koenji so thankfully, locating this stay isn't a big issue for us. It's only 5-10mins walk along the train track of Koenji station. The house from outside looks small but the moment we entered the premise, everything looks so spacious and neat, complete with all of the amenities as mentioned. Manami also provided us welcome goodies which is so sweet of her! We especially love the sleeping area which requires us to climb up a tall ladder...really bringing out the kids in us and the days we love to climb the ladders to our bunk beds. We never get to meet Manami but she is always ready to assist whenever we need help via phonecall or airbnb messaging. Now we are missing that place a lot already. We even leave some goodies for her before we checkout = D Thank you for giving us the opportunity to stay in the lovely loft, Manami! Looking forward to staying there again one day!

I would highly recommend this as a place to stay. It's a really nice, clean, quiet and comfortable apartment in a great area. Koenji has loads going on - plenty of places to eat, drink and sing! The apartment is very near the station which makes it very quick to travel around Tokyo. Manami was an excellent host and everything was very easy.

Manami's place is located in a very convenient location almost exactly between Kōenji and Nakano stations on the Chuo line. The neighborhood is relaxing and lively at the same time: the house is near a school, and there are many cats to be spotted on your walk to either station!
The house itself was perfectly clean. Check in was very easy and the directions Manami provided to the place made finding the house a breeze. It is a first floor apartment in a building with about four units. We didn't see or hear the neighbors at any point, though we wouldn't have minded!
There is a small balcony that is accessible via sliding doors, but it is only big enough for one person to stand on. We only used it for our first breath of fresh air in the morning, and drying our clothes on the provided hangers.
Notes on the beds: I have slept on traditional Japanese futon before but the one at this house were particularly firm to me. I have heard side sleepers like me have trouble with Japanese futons in general, as most of the pressure is on their ribs. Thankfully Manami was able to provide an extra layer of futon when we requested it which helped a lot.
Another thing to be noted: as you can see in her provided pictures, the beds are accessed via a ladder. We are 30 years and in decent shape, but it was still a bit of a chore, especially if you get up a lot in the night like I do.
Overall we would certainly stay at this place again if we found ourselves headed to Kōenji again!

It's the second times that I have been stay with Manami, the place is very good location. It's easy to enjoy around the Tokyo. I highly commend this room to every future guest, Manami is easy to communicate with and she's kind also be a very good host :)
Perfect organization and communication. The flat had everything we needed including a loveley neighbourhood. Thank you.

We had an absolute ball at Manami's place! Very close to the centre of both Nakano and Koenji so there was plenty to do just walking distance from the apartment. The room was clean and quaint, the only downfall was the mattresses were quite thin to sleep on.  Manami was an ace host and had excellent English.
WONDERFUL I LOVED IT!!!
It was worth all the price, as the location is central, nightlife was great, and the neighbourhood is safe. (:

We have a very pleasant stay at Manami's place. Location is excellent, the apartment is very nice and homey.we were at 10 minutes from the train station walking plus the area is very quite . Manami and her family are very care. I definitely recommend Manami's place.
A well designed space as long as you are nimble enough to climb a ladder. We had a great time and the apartment had everything we needed was clean and we felt welcome. Thanks Manami
The location is good. Apartment is clean, quite and cozy. Ms Manami is a accommodating host. Genuinely enjoyed my stay there. Thank you.

Great value in a hip neighborhood with lots of bars and vintage shops. The flat had everthing I needed as a solo traveler and is certainly big enough to host a couple comfortably. Manami was great with communication, even letting me know about a fun, annual festival in koenji. A great time!

急な予約にも関わらず迅速に対応していただきました！
とても快適に過ごさせていただきました！
Manami nous a très bien accueilli. Elle est toujours a l’écoute et a su s'adapter a nos demandes. Très bonne communication. L'emplacement est génial. Proche de Koenji un vrai coup de cœur.
とてもクリーンで居心地の良いお部屋でした。コミュニケーションも取りやすく、安心して滞在できました。
Excellent stay. Great communication and location.
立地が良く、とても便利。部屋はとてもお洒落で、清潔感がある。迅速なメッセージの対応に安心でき、感激しました。ありがとうございました！

駅からのロケーションも良く、お洒落で温かみのあるお部屋です。
コミュニケーションもスムーズで、とても丁寧に対応して頂きました。
It has been a really lovely place to stay, and the communication and thoughtfulness of Manami were perfect. I am looking forward to living there longer term in the coming year.
清潔でおしゃれなお部屋でした。また泊まりたいです。

高円寺から少し歩きますが、とても清潔感のある素敵な空間でした！
チェックインに合わせて暖房をいれてくれる心配りがとてもあるホストさんです

This was my second time staying at Manami's and once again everything was great. A clean and relatively spacious place in my favorite neighborhood. Great value for anyone looking to stay in the Koenji area.
Manami's is a great palce, located comfortably near public transport and in a quiet location. Manami is attentive , hospitable, and easy to communicate with!
The flat is pretty large for Tokyo, and absolutely clean, cozy and comfortable! Highly recommended!!! The area is also lovely and well situated

Manami's place is a rare gem. It is very conveniently located just a few stations from main areas like Shinjuku with very clear and helpful directions from Manami.
The loft style is an added charm and makes it very cosy. It is close to the train stations, and has very many food options from combinis to fast food in within 5mins walk.
Manami is a very warm host and she was absolute awesome in making us feel at home w little touches like complimentary coffee and teas and little post-it notes.
Awesome! 👍🏻

Had a fantastic stay at Manami's place in Koenji. Just a really short walk from koenji Station, and a 10 minute walk to Nakano Station where you can catch the rapid line to Shinjuku.
We absolutely loved the loft beds which felt like we were nestled warm and cozy above the cold.
Everything was sparkling clean. Plenty go amenities to use included a cooking area, fridge and washing machine.
Manami was super responsive to any questions, including when we didn't know what the WiFi password was!
Hoping to be back again. Thanks Manami!

도쿄 숙소는 다 거기서 거기라 별 기대안했는데 진짜좋아용 엄청 깨끗하구 일층이라 왔다갔다하기도 최고구 근처에 편의점이 두개나있어서 뭐사다먹기 편했어요 ㅎㅎ 위치는 코엔지역에서 한 8분정도 걸어야되는게 좀 아쉬웠는데 평지라 캐리어 끌고가는데는 별 문제 없엇습니당 빈티지 가게도 많아서 좋아하시는 분들 쇼핑하기 완전편해요! 아근데 방음이 좀 안됬던게 아쉽긴한데 첫날 말곤 크게 신경쓰이지않앗어요 ㅎㅎ 재방문의사 잇습니당!

5min from Koenji sta on foot. clean room.
Host is very kind and easly connecting with.
Plz be atention go to a bed after drkinking too much.
When I visit Tokyo, I want to stay this room again if it's empty.
連絡もスムーズで、快適な滞在になりました。

Manami’s place is perfect for my stay. It is clean, simple and comfortable and have all the amenities you needed for a very good value. And it has a bedding area on the above floor so its quite warm for the cold months. The location is perfect for me because I’m very familiar with this area, and easy to get to Shinjuku. Manami is fast to response and very helpful. She is a very nice person too. I highly recommend.

Very nice room，I will take this room on my next trip in Tokyo.
非常號好房間，位於高圓寺，鬧中取靜

Staying at Manami's was perfect for our first visit to Tokyo! Koenji is a great neighborhood, just two stops from Shinjuku so it's easy to get around. The space itself was clean and roomy, which is a godsend in Tokyo. It was nice to have the a sitting area and desk, and we quickly got used to the loft stairs. We didn't get to meet Manami, but check in was a breeze, and her communication was always quick and friendly. Finally, make sure you visit the bakery around the corner-- it was our favorite part of our stay. Thank you, Manami!

Manami was a wonderful host. The apartment was just what my husband and I needed. The place was very clean and tidy and we had everything we could need. I also enjoyed the large sleeping area in the loft. There was also a washing machine and plenty of hangers to dry clothes on the balcony which was super helpful. The location was great, just a 5 minute walk to the station. We definitely plan on returning to Japan and Manami's place would be our first choice for the Tokyo area!

Great apartment, was surprised at how spacious it was. Bed was super comfy and had all amenities you could need. In a cool area close to the center of Tokyo with lots of small restaurants and bars, would definitely recommend staying here.

We had a great stay at Manami's place! The location was perfect, right between 2 train stations. The flat was clean and had all the amenities listed in the description. Months before our arrival, we had asked Manami if she would buy our concert tickets for the show we were seeing in Tokyo since we couldn't buy them from the US. She didn't hesitate one bit and had them ready for us upon our arrival. I also strongly encourage guests to explore Koenji. We decided to hang around the area on our last night and regretted not doing it sooner or more often. You will not regret staying here!

Koenji is a fantastic neighborhood to stay in, and Manami's apartment felt like an authentic Japanese stay. The lofted bed is a little awkward, but the listing was totally accurate. It's nice to have the little living room and the place was spotless. We loved the izakaya down the street, and to be able to walk to both Koenji and Nakano.

Had an amazing stay at Manami’s place.
Super clean and tidy on arrival.
The clever layout means you have way more space to live than a lot of flats I have stayed in Tokyo.
Separate toilet from the shower room. Which is a huge plus. I have stayed in many places in Tokyo that have combined and everything gets wet. So that was a great plus.
Perfectly located between my 2 favourite places in Tokyo, Koenji and Nakano. 5-10min walk from each station respectively.
Quiet suburban area away from the busyness of Shibuya and Shinjuku.
I’ll be staying here next time I’m in Tokyo for sure.
Thankyou Manami!!
Great little apartment with everything you need. Great location close to koenji station.
Nice and comfy.  Very helpful and accommodating.

This is a great little flat in a lovely quiey neighborhood to make base. It's conveniently located between the Koenji and Nakano stations,  and there are plenty of shops and restaurants to explore in the neighborhood. Manami left thoughtful notes and instructions to make our stay as seamless as possible and she was incredibly responsive. She also reached out to let us know when a neighboring building started some construction work and offered us options in case it would be a bother. She absolutely did not have to and her candor was very much appreciated! As the pictures show it is a small flat so something to take into consideration if you think you may need more space. This wasn't an issue for the two of us and we enjoyed our stay here.
nice neighbourhood!

The place was great. Location was near to Koenji station and also about 10minutes away to Nakano station. Also there is many convinent stores you can go and buy. Manami always replied fast as she can and helped us a lot. Room was perfectly clean and it’s great size for 2 people. I would love to visit again.

Manami’s place was great and Koenji is a cool neighbourhood and an excellent base to explore the rest of Tokyo. Although a small space it is comfortable and has everything you need and Manami is a very responsive and helpful host. Highly recommended.

This is possibly the best AirBnB flat I have ever stayed in. The location is fantastic, right between Koenji and Nakano, with easy access to the whole of Tokyo.
The flat itself was clean, comfortable and stylish with plenty of space. The washing machine and other amenities were very useful.
Obviously the ladder to the loft bed won't be possible for everyone but I found it no trouble at all.
Manami is a fantastic host and provided all the information I needed to have a great stay.

This apartment was great! More spacious than it looks and perfect for one or two people. The loft was nice to have, although getting up and down the ladder took a bit of getting used to. Great location on a backstreet within walking distance to the train. Manami was very quick to respond to messages and was incredibly kind. We hope to stay here again!

I really enjoyed my stay in the Kōenji area of Tokyo. The location is super convenient, within a walking distance from Kōenji and Nakano stations. The apartment had everything I needed. Manami not only promptly responded to my questions, but also proactively provided me all the useful information.
Highly recommended!
Excellent quiet suburban apartment steps away from one of the nicest neighbourhoods in Tokyo, Koenji. An excellent clean and cozy home base while exploring Tokyo.

I can only recommend this place to every person who stays in Tokyo! It is very close to the train station, clean and you have everything for your daily use. The communication was very fast and Manami was very helpful and responded quickly to my messages. I can't wait to come back!

The location is convenient to everywhere and quiet place at night.
Room is very clean and got everything for daily use.

This place is absolutely fantastic for 1-2 people.  The loft sleeping area is super cozy and stays extra warm in the winter.  More space than I've seen in other Airbnb's in Tokyo as well.  Convenient location as well.  It's a quiet street but still only a 5 minute walk to Koenji Station and just two stops from Shinjuku.  I'll be staying here again.
The communication with Manami was very smooth. The room was what I expected based on the pictures listed. It's located walkable distance between JR Koenji station & Nakano station.
A great place to stay. Highly recommended

This was the best place by airbnb I stayed in Tokyo, ever. Very spacious, with everything you need and more, very clean and tidy. It is nicely located very close to the main area of Tokyo, easily accessed by train. The surrounding area is calm and with many restaurants, convinience stores, supermarkets, etc. The host, Manami, is one of the kindest people I talked to, very responsive, very helpful, and always willing to help with anything you might need. I will definitely visit again!

I had an absolutely fantastic time staying here. The perfect distance from either Koenji or Nakano station means it’s easy to get anywhere in Tokyo and back again. Area was quiet and extremely easy to navigate, would stay again!
Great stay, it was exactly as I expected. It’s nice to be able to do laundry and heat up food! The neighborhood has some great restaurants and friendly people.

Manami's place was perfect, really cool area, super clean, easy check-in and just all around, awesome to stay in. Manami was super friendly, helpful and responsive before and during our stay! Would highly recommend this place to all travelers!

Nice spot between Koenji (closer) and Nakano stations. I would say it's more of an 8-10 min walk from Koenji station, but it's also only a 12-15 min walk from Nakano, which is great because you can catch the rapid train from there. It's kinda in between the two but closer to Koenji station.
Koenji has a lot of live venues, used clothing stores, and bars, where Nakano has a lot of izakayas as well as shops for niche hobbies, so it's a great spot.
So the place is well situated, the size is good, there's a little kitchen and fridge (and the fridge doesn't make much noise!), and a decent desk for working. The air conditioning works great and there's a rotating fan mounted to the ceiling to circulate air, and a laundry machine in the unit so you can wash clothes during a long stay.
I would advise that if you're a slight sleeper, the walls are quite thin, so you'll hear what your neighbors are up to, so bear that in mind. In general, nice place on the residential side of Koenji!
Super petit appartement proche de koenji. Merci

Very quiet and cozy apartment near an interesting, bustling neighborhood which is relatively spared by tourists. Easy to reach from Koenji and Nakano stations.
It does not get much natural light (on the ground floor + "courtyard" situation) so probably not the best option if you intend to stay home a lot (but why would you?).

i was very comfortable at Manami's place, and everything was pretty much as advertised. Manami was very responsive each time i contacted her.
could use improvement:i found it a bit difficult with the kitchen arrangement - there wasn't a clear workspace, nor a good way to dry dishes/utensils after using. If you are depending on using the kitchen for meals (i wasn't), it could be an issue. there also wasn't a good place to hang damp/wet towels, unless you use the outside patio, which i suppose is one option.
very good: the washing machine worked great, and was well set up. also, she had a convenient place & lots of hangers for hanging clothes!! Manami went "above & beyond" with my unusual request to borrow a ukulele, if available, and was able to provide one - it was nicely placed on the bed for my arrival - a very nice touch that i appreciated!
the location was very convenient, and easy to find.
overall, i was very happy at Manami's place and recommend it highly

Would definitely stay again for longer. I made my reservation too late & no more days were available.
Unit has everything you need in great shape. Very lovely. Koenji station easy access to go where you need to go. Manami very friendly.

Apparemment agréable, situé près de la gare de Koenji. Bien pour personne seule ou couple. Bien équipé, dans une maison calme. Manami est très aimable et réactive. Elle a accepté un horaire d'arrivée flexible pour moi. Je recommande.

Manami's place was a really good spot to stay in Tokyo. The Koenji neighborhood is awesome and the apartment was clean and comfortable. It doesn't get too much sunlight, but if you're planning on spending a lot of time out and about exploring the city during the day, it's a great apartment!

Die Wohnung von Manami wurde in meiner Zeit in Tokio zu einem echten Zuhause. Ich habe sechs Wochen hier gewohnt und habe mich sehr wohl gefühlt. Die Wohnung liegt zwischen den Stationen Koenji und Nakano, ist gut angebunden und trotzdem ruhig in einer freundlichen Wohngegend gelegen. Manami hat sich sehr aufmerksam und warmherzig um mich gekümmert. Ich werde weider hierher kommen, wenn ich wieder in Tokio bin!
A very pleasant experience. The host communicated very well. The place is clean and easy to find. The check-in and check-out was smooth.

Warm and welcoming little home in a peaceful and very walkable neighborhood, just a short walk from Koenji station. Nice little restaurants and cafes plus multiple konbinis literally just around the corner. Easy check in and Manami was a wonderful host with great communication.

Great place to stay, with everything you need.  Private bathroom, washer, ground floor unit.  A bit of a walk to the station, but less than 10 minutes to Koenji and 15 to Nakano the location for west-side of Tokyo is convenient.

This was the perfect base for a Tokyo trip! Just a short walk away from Koenji station and only two stops from Shinjuku. Koenji is a really great place to stay with lots of good food and thrift shopping to be had. The apartment had everything we needed and was super cozy and tidy. Would recommend to anyone staying in Tokyo!

Absolutely wonderful both the spot and a host! Loved every minute I've spent there! Apartment placed on a first floor, easy accessible and has everything you need (even a washing machine!)
Manami is the best! Always there for you to answer any questions, and provide care. Fantastic stay!

Nice and cozy apartment in the Koenji area. Great for a solo traveler like myself. Location was also nice and peaceful and was very close to multiple restaurants, coffee shops and Lawson stores for my convenience. Would recommend!

Although small, the apartment had everything we needed for an eight-night stay. Manami provided nice touches, such as labels in English and even a few snacks upon check-in. We knew that he sleeping loft was inaccessible, but the apartment had room for luggage in the entry hallway, and the dresser and clothes rack provided more storage than we have had in most AirBnBs properties we have used in Tokyo.
A seven-minute walk from Kōenji Station and a twelve-minute walk from Nakano Station, the apartment is well-located. We did hear the normal noise of upstairs neighbors (footsteps, sliding doors, etc.), sometimes very early in the morning, but the area was quieter than other places we have stayed in Tokyo.
Like many small Tokyo apartments, the kitchenette comprises just a sink and one burner, with no counter space, so one cannot cook much, but there is a small refrigerator, and many restaurants nearby.
We also appreciated how well Manami communicated. She made everything easy.

Manami is an excellent host! She made sure I was taking the correct train from Narita airport, she checked in regularly, and was exceptionally kind and helpful. I felt like I was staying at a friend’s place. The apartment is in a beautiful quiet neighborhood, great place to relax after the high energy of Tokyo. I enjoyed being able to take a hot bath after walking so much during the day! Very safe area and as a woman traveling alone I felt completely comfortable. Quick walk to Koenji station, convenience stores, and restaurants. Couldn’t ask for anything better!

Merci Manami!
L’appartement était parfait pour une petite semaine à Tokyo. Accessible de la Chūō Line (jaune et orange). Situé dans le côté du Quartier de Koenji calme, avec à côté de la gare un quartier jeune local avec plein d’Izakaya, bar, second hand shop, librairie, café super cool!
On espère pourvoir y revenir.
Nice space and responsive, friendly host.

Manami and her bnb were perfect after spending several days in hotel in busier area of Tokyo. Manamis bnb was very comfortable and the area is awesome. Close to Koenji  and Nakano, I enjoyed walking to both. Manami was very responsive and helpful. I will be returning for sure!👍🏽
Manami was a great help and my stay was fantastic! Highly recommend the neighborhood as well. Thank you!

Cute place, a lot more spacious than many hotel rooms we had on our Japan trip. All was clean and a lot of helpful amenities (eg hair dryer , charging adapter etc) were provided. The apartment has a washer and laundry rack which was awesome after 1.5 weeks of traveling. It’s a bit of a walk to the station , but feels safe at all times of the day due to many kiosks , restaurants etc.
Koenji is a very cozy and local neighborhood and super well connected to the rest of the city. Manami was a lovely and very responsive host. Recommend :-)!

Loved our stay! Great location, about a 5 minute walk to Koenji station and a konbini only a 10 second walk away. Very clean and comfortable, and we found it quite spacious for Tokyo. Manami was a great host, and was easy to reach. Would stay again!
this is a fantastic spot to be in Tokyo. you are only two stops away from Shinjuku and 30 minutes by train to Shibuya. it was a fantastic place and I highly recommend Manami as a host.
Nothing but 5 stars all around for Manami as a host as well as her place. I will be staying here again the next time I’m in Tokyo. Highly recommend!

Clear and quick communication throughout. Made the reservation very easy. Manami was nice enough to allow me to store luggage early and accommodated an early check in. Her place was clean and as described. Conveniently located between Koenji and Nakano, so a walkable distance to both. Having a washing machine inside the room was very nice and convenient. Overall a very great experience! Thank you!
Really nice host, great quiet location near the station if you’re looking to stay in Koenji area, clean and comfortable apartment. Easy and smooth check-in. Couldn’t ask for anything more, thanks!!
Manami was great. Very helpful with directions etc.

La chambre correspond aux photos, elle est pratique et agréable. Jai pu faire des lessives, il y a un petit balcon, le lit est confortable et c'est très calme.
Le quartier de Koenji est agréable et très bien desservi par les lignes JR.
Manami a toujours été très reactive.
J'ai passé 5 nuits sur place, je recommande.
had a great stay here!! perfect quiet neighborhood and not too far from everything. close to train station! would definitely stay again!!
Manami is an extremely kind and responsive host whose space was absolutely amazing. I would highly, HIGHLY recommend staying at this apartment offered by her!
Amazing place, perfect location for a couple staying in Tokyo for a few days to explore from!
Great area, great apartment for a solo traveler or a couple.

For a solo traveler that wants to be close to Tokyo but without the hustle and bustle, this bnb is for sure a great one! Koenji is an underrated spot in Tokyo and you're not that far from what it has to offer. As with the BNB itself, its as described and very comfy and everything is straightforward. Will be staying again!
2nd week at this stay and I still have the same feelings like before. I wil definitely continue staying here whenever I am back in Japan

Great stay! The apartment is spacious, clean and with all the necessary even if you would like to work.
Excellent wifi.
The area is so nice with lots of options for lunch or dinner.
nice stay with all necessary amenities!
적극 추천합니다. 가성비 좋은 훌륭한 숙소였습니다.

We loved our stay! From the outside the place was super cute and inside very cozy and clean.
The host helped us with all our questions!
Both Kōenji and Nakano station are at walking distance and nakano broadway was walkable too ! Great area we would definitely stay here again!
Very nice house and clean! Good location! Yoshi is a helpful and nice person! I love to stay in here! Excellent!

Words can't describe how nice this place was. It was super clean, comfortable and wow was it modern!!! Yoshi was amazing and provided great service. The location was literally 30 SECONDS walk from a beautiful temple and local shopping. The home itself was an experience!!! Thanks for everything Yoshi!

We stayed 2 nights in early October at this lovely traditional, authentic two floor house. We had the most wonderful accomodation stay experience: the house is very clean, full of the newest technic facilieties (like the bathroom, e.g. hot tub with programming)  while at the same time being traditional japanese style with tatami-mat rooms, it's very stylish, cosy and charming! Everything works perfect and you will find everything you need, there is absolutly nothing we missed and the owner was so nice to offer drinks and cookies as well. The location is brilliant, closest to the famous Akusa-Shrine in a very quiet local street. Nearby are stores, metro and a lot of nice restaurants. We had a great time! Thank you so much!

Mr. Yoshi is very helpful and friendly. I am really surprise when step into the house. House is very clean, kitchen and toilet equipment is automated. Yoshi's house just few step away from Senso-ji side entrance and very near to 7-11 convenience shop.
I am really enjoy the Japan lifestyle when stay in Yoshi's house. Worth for the $$$

There are no words to describe how awesome Yoshi's hospitality and home was! The place was immaculate, and if you are after a real Japanese flavour to your stay definitely stay here. Asakusa has immense history, and a million things to see, but if you feel like seeing the hustle and bustle its only a short train ride away.
I would stay here again in a heartbeat, and recommend it to anyone who comes to Japan!!
Thank you Yoshi, you were outstanding as a host, and we hope to see you again soon!

We had a great stay in his awesome house in a perfect location.
Everything was really clean and well equipped kitchen.
Yoshi-san was a great host, his answering queries were very quickly and helpful. I stayed only 1 night but I wanted to stay a few days more.
I'm looking forward to staying his house again.

We stayed at Yoshi's place for 7nights and the house exceeded all expectations. The location is spot on, close to the subway with Senso-jii temple literally 1min walk away. We walked to skytree (20mins) or 5mins on the train. The area has some great bars and restaurants and there are a couple of supermarkets within walking distance.
The house itself is beautiful and completely as pictured. It's much bigger than expected and certainly bigger than any Tokyo hotel.
Dealing with Yoshi was great, he responded really quickly answering queries we had. He was flexible and was allowed us to be flexible with check out times which was great.
The house is a gem and can't fault it at all. I would definitely stay here again and it is a great base to have an awesome time in Tokyo.
The house is very good and clean .I will come here again next time !

Yoshi is a great host! Not only was he responsive, but they displayed great hospitality. The house is really a respite for a long day, and has more than what we expected. The neighbourhood is so quaint, and the location perfect. I would definitely recommend this place to all my friends (and in fact I already did). Will definitely come back here again if I am in Tokyo.
Yoshiさんの部屋はとてもキレイで、設備も全部最新のものです。コタツやお菓子、果物まで用意周到で、本当に家にいるような気分でした。最高の下宿体験で、家族全員大満足でした。ぜひまた利用したいです。

Yoshi was a fantastic host. The apartment was great and in a good location. As there was three of us staying there was plenty of room and we all had our own little space. The internet was fast and reliable. It is a 10 minute was from Asakusa Station and there is a 7/11 just over the name road and some good restaurant to eat at that are quite cheap.
I really enjoyed my stay and I would stay there again. Thank you so much :)

Traditional looking house with a modern touch. There are steps to the bedrooms in the house which may be tricky for the elderly and young kids. Other than that, it is complete. Yoshi was very accommodating and easy to communicate with. We loved our home away from home.

I was very impressed with Yoshi's house.  It's so clean and so comfortable living in his house.  Everything was well prepare before we check-in.  I would recommend anyone who want to visit Tokyo to stay in this house.  You'll feel like you stay in your own house.  Good location, close to Metro station and safe.

I really love the house! It is super clean, modern japanese style, everything is automatic. It is just sad we were only able to stay for one night :( i will definitely recommend this place! The house is very near to sensoji temple and to the asakusa station. Sensoji is a nice temple. There are also cheap shops nearby. 5 stars for this place :)

We loved Yoshi's San house. The house is so nicely built and comfortable, although the stair leading to level 2 is a bit steep and the ceiling at level 2 is low, so for taller and bigger person, it takes a bit of effort of move around at levels but you could stay at ground floor comfortably. The house is stone away from the Senso-Ji temple and about 10-15 minutes from Asakusa station. It is also possible to get a good view of Tokyo skytree while walking to the station. Note that the public transport system in Japan is very mature and in someway, "complicated" to understand, is good to get familiar with system before heading out. There are many eatery and convenient shops around the neighbourhood, as well as vending machines just outside of the house.

I stayed at Yoshi's place for 1 week. The house was so clean, when I check in it didn't seem like someone just check out a couple hours earlier. It's in a walking distance to subway station and just a few steps away from Sensoji temple. The house has plenty space for 5-8 people. Only one drawback (for me) is the house was so cold inside. If you come on winter season and doesn't familiar with the cold weather just like me, you might need to wear sweater inside lol. Maybe because it's a wooden house. However, Yoshi was so nice to me, he was willing to help and answer every questions I asked. I can only conclude that it's a nice place to stay.

Yoshi's place was perfect. The location is very good near to many good restaurants, shops and convenient stores.
Travelling to and from Narita airport is such a breeze as there is a direct Keisei line train. The station is only about 10 minutes walk.
Our family love the place. The place is big enough for four of us and is very cozy.
The kitchen is well equipped. You have everything to whip up a good meal with.
The bathroom is clean and modern.
We definitely will stay again in Yoshi's place if we are back in Tokyo.
Staying so near to Senso-ji also has its own perk. You can enjoy the temple before or after all the tourists are gone!! Very serene and majestic.
Thank you Yoshi for your hospitality!

去過日本很多次，也住過很多的公寓式酒店，但唯獨這一次最令我印象深刻！因大雪原故到達民宿已經是晚上9點多了，但房東Yoshi仍熱情的等候並迎接我們，對於房子內的設施一項一項的詳細說明，還貼心的準備了點心、茶水、水果，不僅如此，各項生活備品皆準備的恰到好處，就和回到自己家一樣的自在！
日式的二層樓建築物，可以看得出房東的用心設計及裝潢，雖然樓梯比較陡，但對於想體驗日本道地生活的旅客，這裡絕對是最好的選擇！擁有日式的純樸風味又擁有科技化的設備。兩者完美的融合在一起！
這間房子位於淺草觀音寺旁，走路不到1分鐘，距離都營線與東京Metro只要3分鐘，進出都能感受到雷門莊嚴的氛圍，路口的便利商店更是方便的好鄰居，生活機能非常便利，晚上不怕肚子餓。而且門口還有一台販賣機，真是太棒了！
如果，下次還要去東京遊玩，一定會再住宿在Yoshi的家，也誠心的向大家推薦這個好地方！

來日本那麼多次，第一次住到讓我感覺賓至如歸的民宿，室內很乾淨又寬敞外，瓦斯爐、微波爐、洗碗機、鍋碗瓢盆杯子樣樣都有，還有許多科技化的設備.還很貼心地準備兩台隨身wifi機供房客出門使用.Yoshi san的英文很好溝通不是問題，我們抵達民宿的時候親自出來接我們，桌上還準備飲料點心和水果給我們享用!而且也很親切地關心我們在日本這幾天生活的狀況，有問題或是遇到困難他都很樂意幫我們!真的讓人很感動!總而言之我來到日本這麼多次，這次住到的民宿可以說是最棒的!下次來的話一定要再住這裡!!!謝謝Yoshi san的招待!讓我們這幾天在日本有非常美好的時光!!

ホストのYoshiさんはものすごく親切で、予約受付から事前の内見、さらに滞在中まで細々とした質問やお願いにも快くかつ迅速に対応して下さり、大変助かりました。みかんやお菓子、更にお土産等も準備して下さっていて、単にお家を貸して頂いているのではなく、親しい友人の家で歓待を受けている様な気持ちになりました。浅草寺のすぐ裏手にあるモダンなおうちは、内装を改装したばかりで大変清潔かつ全ての必要な電化製品等も揃っていて、とても居心地の良いところでした。3人で借りましたが、寝室として利用した二階も広々していて、もっと大人数での利用も全く問題なさそうです。また、駅、観光地、土産物屋、それからスーパーやドラッグストアに酒屋など生活必需品へのアクセスも良く、特にロシアから来た友人達は、日中と夜で雰囲気が変わる浅草寺の美しさに圧倒されたと言っていました。とても良くして頂いたので、是非Yoshiさんと一緒にお酒を飲みたかったのですが、お互いに体調を崩して実現出来なかった事が悔やまれます。次回もまたお世話になりたいと思いますので、その時には是非飲みましょう。ご家族連れや友人同士の旅行に超オススメの物件です！

This place is awesome and so are the hosts!

It is newly renovated and in pristine condition. We loved all the hi-tech appliances like the sensor taps, toilets, lights, induction cook top, motorised cupboards etc. There is a traditional low Japanese table “Kotatsu” that is heated with a doona on top and a heated mat underneath. We loved this so much we bought one! There was a laptop and 2 mobile wifi devices provided which was really handy. Even the damascus kitchen knife was appreciated.

And the hosts are super great! They bought USJ Express passes for us off the Japanese version of the USJ website. On the English version of the site this is not possible and it’s next to impossible to buy one there. It made our USJ visit soooooooo much better than our Disney Sea visit.

I thoroughly recommend this place. I doubt you’ll find better anywhere. We loved it and the hosts. :)

Yoshi provided an amazing house with all the latest Japanese conviences! This in itself was an experience unique to Japan, however located in Asukusa, the house is literally next door to the Sensoji Temple. This is a great place to visit and observe dozens of pilgrims who come to pay their respect. Only 5 minutes away is the Ginza subway line giving you access to all of Tokyo. Yoshi is a kind host who presented us with some cakes before we left. We were sad to leave, but would most certainly consider staying here again if in Tokyo.

The best house
Yoshi is very lovely host and the the house is very comfortable.
值得推薦的好民宿，原本只是待一個晚上，Yoshi熱情招待，讓我們全家人有驚豔感受。感就好像回到家裡一樣，室內很乾淨又寬敞，瓦斯爐、微波爐、洗碗機，每個都是科技化的設備.尤其早餐更是美味，美中不足地方就是只待一晚，下次到訪東京一定會再住宿在Yoshi的家，也誠心的向大家推薦有機會一定要來住這邊！
Yoshi is kind, helpful and made us feel very welcome. The apartment is amazing -- large, fully equipped, comfortable and in a great location. Highly recommended!

這間房子與房東都無可挑剔
地理位置也很好
環境舒適
住起來非常的輕鬆
非常推薦大家來這裡
下次有機會我也還會再去的
超棒的房東!房間非常舒適又乾淨,Yoshi san 很細心的事先準備了一切我們可能需要的東西。超感謝的。我們下次還會來的!謝謝。

Amazing
We had a lot of fun and Yoshi was very helpful and welcoming. The place was very clean and modern with traditional aspects.
It was very close to the asakusa temple and only around a 5-10min walk to the train station
5/5 would recommend

Yoshi's home was the perfect place to stay in Tokyo if you want the complete experience. We were a group of five and we fit perfectly and had space to spare. Just a few minutes away from a train station and many shops, right beside a beautiful shrine and a great combination of modern japanese technology and the traditional bedding. The kotatsu was a fabulous addition to the home that you would not want to miss out on. Everything (and I mean EVERYTHING) that we thought we would need was provided for us by Yoshi. The home was spotless when we arrived. He was a friendly and accomodating host and I would absolutely come back next time I am in Tokyo. I definitely recommend this place to all who are visiting and looking for a place to stay. Living there was an experience itself and you shouldn't even hesitate to book with Yoshi.

The house designed by Yoshi himself is amazing and full of story. Word cannot tell you how much we love this house mixed with both modern and traditional style. We checked in at midnight with fatigue, but forget everything but admiring when we entered in this nice building, thoughtful message and snack food on the table.
We asked Yoshi to teach us making sushi. we were so sorry that we backed to the house too late and Yoshi was still waiting for us. It is unforgettable night for us to make sushi and chat with Yoshi.
Last but not least, it became the best experience of our trip. You will never ever regret booking in this house!!
We had four very nice days at yoshis house. It was very clean, modern furnishes and equipped with everything we needed. The host is very nice and attentive.
非常棒的民宿！ 房东超级无敌好，都是非常新，高科技的家具！整一个房子除了合理～舒适～完美！ 以后如果团队活动，一定会再来这个民宿！房东人也超级好～退房时候还给我 们带了零食，因为都是女生，所以都是草莓味的。 超级可爱！

We had a fantastic time staying at Yoshi's home. Yoshi made us feel very welcome with lovely notes and everything we needed was available to us. And More!!! We had wifi, aircon, heaters. The house was lovely, we all had the best sleeps there on our trip. The house was in a great location, so close to the Sensoji temple and the markets and the train station and to restaurants. The children also enjoyed staying in such welcoming home. We all loved the experience of a traditional Japanese style home but with mod cons. Thank you again Yoshi, we do hope to be back one day!
Very nice apartment to stay and Yoshi is very flexible and friendly

這是個很棒的地方，交通方便(離車站近)、淺草寺就在旁邊、生活機能佳、安靜，房子內設施也很齊全，非常舒適。
我們一共有五個人對這個屋子都讚譽有佳，住了五天大家都不想走了。
另外，房東也非常親切，在我們入住前準備了很多零食、水果，有疑問也都馬上回覆、解決，甚至在留言板上特地用中文留言給我們，是超越五顆星評價的屋子!!!

It was absolutely WONDERFUL!
I'd definitely tell that Yoshi san is one of the best air bnb host I've met. He carefully looks after his place so everywhere in the house is very clean. He provides more than what you need in your trip which means you'll be more comfortable and pleasant.
I stayed there with friends, there were 5 of us and some night, 2 of my friends who study there came to stay with us in Yoshi san's house too. There were no problem at all for 6-7 people. This is Tokyo!! We could get this awesome place for this rate was priceless!
We loved everything there especially Yoshi san thoughtful and care.
I can't find the word to explain how I love this place but only a simple and meaningful word, THANK YOU
ARIGATOGOSAIMATSU

The house is perfect! It is well-located with5-min walk to Senso-ji, subway station and many restaurants nearby. You get whatever you need or even you do not in the house. Pictures shown are exactly what it looks like in real, which is in a modern Jap style but still you can see some old Jap architect being kept. It is very clean. Furnitures, blankets, shampoo and etc in the house are well-chosen by the very considerate host, Yoshi that you really dont want to leave!

Loved the house! Yoshi left us a welcoming note on the fridge and some light snacks which we thoroughly enjoyed. The house exceeded our expectations from the information on the listing. Would definitely recommend this listing to others looking to visit Japan!

Hi Everybody!!!

Living at Yoshi's house was a real pleasure for us. His house has the japanese traditional soul but provide modern and convenient technologies.

The place is very calm and perfect for visiting Asakusa or akibabara area without spending time in transport.

I highly recommend this place and will booking Yoshi's house again if I come back to Tokyo.

My friends and I really enjoyed our stay at Yoshi's house. The house is very clean and well maintained. We were impressed with the modern appliances in the house and the house is a walking distance to Sensoji Temple and the many interesting shops nearby. I will strongly recommend this house for those of you who want to stay in Asakusa.
交通地點好，室內設備先進、溫馨。週邊無論是吃早中晚餐或消夜都非常方便，便利店步行也很近(外頭馬路斜對面就是)。週邊熱鬧但真的能用鬧中取靜來形容。

Yoshi's hospitality and house were perfect!
Three (3) most relevant pros are:
1) Location: Next-door (literally) to Sensoji temple; 10-minute walk to Asakusa subway station and Ginza line which goes directly to Akihabara, Ginza, Shibuya, among other places.
2) House: best kitchen I've ever seen with all modern appliances and fully equipped; full a/c and heating systems; fully equipped modern Japanese bath & toilets; comfortable tatami bedrooms; nice dining & living rooms.
3) Host: besides being able to practice Japanese with Yoshi, he is proficient in English and will answer efficiently to all of your questions. He made excellent dinning recommendations and went as far as providing snacks to us during our trip.
Amazing house! We enjoyed our stay there. Very convenient place! And we will recommend our friends who are going to visit Tokyo! Lovely and helpful host! Thanks for the snacks!

Emplacement idéal à côté du senso ji. La maison de yoshi est fantastique ! Hyper équipée, très grande et parfaitement entretenue. Yoshi est un super hôte, très aidant il nous a aidé à préparer notre visite. En famille à 4 nous étions tout confort. Bref, une adresse à ne pas rater.
Thanx yoshi for your help and kindness. Your house is just perfect !!
非常完美的地点，就在浅草神社的旁边，可以在大批游客来之前享受安静的浅草寺。屋内的装修简单实用，比酒店更舒适自在，厨房的用具用料一应俱全，自己买菜做饭能把房费都省出来，太实惠了！YOSHI甚至还准备了水果和零食，我想不出还能有什么更完美的了。我们因为没有仔细看墙上贴的通知，错过了丢垃圾的时间，YOSHI先生帮我们处理了，真是非常抱歉~

我们一行人大早就到达东京浅草，多亏了房东出来迎接我们并给我们放 了行李。YOSHI先生非常可爱，还会中文，交流基本不成问题。房子就在离浅草寺步行1分钟路程的地方，附近便利店和居酒屋也很多，非常方便。接下来最让我们惊讶的是房子的设施，各种高科技，扫地机，自动马桶盖、感应水龙头等等，尤其是厨房的便利，让我们在房间里自己做饭能享受到快乐。真的非常好。一个值得推荐的好地方。希望下来东京还能住在您的房子里。

非常舒适的房子，各方面都很便捷。非常喜欢。
交通也很方便。每天晚上回家都可以欣赏到浅草寺的夜景。真是太美妙了。
没注意丢垃圾的时间。错过了丢弃生活垃圾的那一天。真是给房东添麻烦了,抱歉。
Fantastic location & great apartment,  clean & spacious. Highly recommended

Yoshi was the perfect host. Helpful but not intrusive. Two separate bedrooms meant it was ideal for our group of two couples. The flat/house was clean, tidy and recently renovated to a high standard.
The gadgets and furnishings were amazing. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here.

We spent 10 wonderful days in Tokyo.
Yoshi's house is an ideal place for a little family like ours. The house is beautiful, comfortable and ultra modern, we have lacked nothing during our stay. The area is also great, right next to the beautiful Senso-ji Temple, with a small kindergarten and all kinds of shops and restaurants. Everything was perfect!
Yoshi is a very friendly and welcoming host. He was very available to us, thanks to him we even had a nice romantic evening in an excellent restaurant, thank you very much!
If one day we have the chance to return to Tokyo, we would return to Asakusa, in the house of Yoshi.
We experienced unforgettable times here.

Hi, Yoshi
Thanks so much for your kindness! We enjoyed so much our staying in Asakusa! This place is amazing! Location, utilities, everything are great! We wanna come back to stay here if we have a chance.
日本人ですが、この一軒家の滞在は本当に素晴らしいものでした。ぜひまた機会があったらお世話になりたいです！

The stay in Yoshi's house is very impressive. The house is just near Asakusa temple. The transportation is also convenient, such as Asakusa line, Ginza Line, Tokyo cruise pier, Tobu line. There are a lot of shopping store nearby. The house is clean and spacious for 4-6 person. I will recommend to my friends.
房子就在浅草寺的旁边，趁着晚上没什么人的时候去逛了一下，好方便。而且房子里面处处是惊喜，有房东贴心准备的水果和零食，各种的高科技，各种的整洁干净。我和我的家人在里面住的舒服极了。如果下次再去东京还会选择YOSHI的房子.
Nous avons été bien reçu par Yoshi. La maison est idéalement située. Bien équipée et spacieuse. Excellent séjour.

All I can say is "wow" our 9 nights at Yoshi's was amazing. The house is modern, clean and the location is the best in Tokyo. Close to restaurants, the subway, attractions you could not ask for more. Add to that the amazing Yoshi. He went far and beyond the call of duty sorting out my mifi that didn't arrive at airport. Answering any questions we had and making sure everything went smoothly. See you next visit to Tokyo!

The house is in a great place, 5 mins walking from Senso-ji Temple.
The house is very comfortable, it has everything you need, and although we couldnt meet Yoshi, she was a great host, explaining everything we needed.
If we come back to tokyo it will be our first option!
房子离浅草寺很近~附近有很多买小东西的可爱的店，还有很多吃的，可惜这次赶时间没吃上，晚上也很安静，完全不吵。房子非常干净，很漂亮，还有很多高科技设施（　^ω^）房东是个帅哥，非常的亲切，因为我看不懂地图还到马路上来找我们♪～(´ε｀　)总之非常开心，很喜欢啦。
The location was great. Close to everthing, but still quiet. The apartment was very clean and high tech. The beds were really comfortable too.
Yoshi has a wonderful lovely house in the heart of Asakusa! It is a perfect place to stay in Tokyo with children. Thanks a lot Yoshi for your fabulous welcome! We come back again as soon as possible!

We were very happy to stay in Yoshi's house in Asakusa, Tokyo. Great, quiet neighbourhood and a perfect house. An amazing combination of tradition and state-of-the-art. Yoshi is very kind and helpful. I would recommend this house to anyone going to Tokyo!

L'emplacement de la maison est extraordinaire car il permet d'accéder rapidement et facilement en métro a tous les quartiers a visiter du centre de Tokyo. De plus, le quartier d'Asakusa et ses temples est vraiment merveilleux et la maison est vraiment à côté.
Nous avons été parfaitement bien accueilli par Yoshi dans sa maison ultra moderne et traditionnelle a la fois, tout étant prévu (vaisselle, draps, accès internet, goodies, apéritifs, clim,..). On se sent comme chez soi car rien ne manque.
L'hospitalité et le sens du service sont de mise chez Yoshi et l'on a juste envie de revenir!
房东人超好，我最开始定了7个人的，后来有不来的直接给我退款了。还让我们把行李早早放进去了十分感谢。屋子很干净，各种高科技 ，还有点心酒水都是免费的好开心。还有电脑可以玩。最最关键的是价钱是我住的几个里面最便宜的，屋子是最满意的了。又干净又漂亮，离浅草寺超近。绝对的推荐。

All i can say is the house, location and his hospitality is excellence.

Thank Yoshi. Definitely i will come back.

Yoshi's place is in a historical part of town, probably within 100 feet of a major city landmark, and still extremely quiet. The place has been meticulously renovated to maintain old-world charm while incorporating the most up-to-date amenities. It is all that we could have asked for in a place and we have already told Yoshi that we hope to visit again in the near future.

Yoshi is a very nice person, an attentive host and has thought of everything that we might need in a stay.

Where do I begin? Well first things first, the location is second to none, excellent transport links to Tokyo's underground network, plus it sits right next to the most magnificent Buddhist and Shinto Temple and Shrine. The small front door belies the Tardis proportions in side, we were a family of 3 tall people and a smaller "tall for a woman" mum! Space was never a problem. The amount of electronic gadgets made for an interesting stay once I had worked out not to squirt myself in the eye after the first visit to the "small room"! Yoshi was a very thoughtful and considerate host who catered for all our needs, and I was confident, should I need to, he would be there to help as best he could. A stress free and relaxing stay in the hurly-burly of modern day Tokyo. Thanks to Yoshi we would fully recommend a stay in this exceptional place in Tokyo.

Very very Nice place. Thank you yoshi for your Nice house .
Très beau souvenir de cette maison situe quasi dans le plus beau temple du Japon. Tous les soirs on rentrait par le temple ouvert et c était magique ! Le quartier asakusa est un vieux quartier calme. C était très bien en famille. On prenait le métro tous les jours , c t très facile.
Bonnes vacances au suivants !

Amazing !!!
It's our first expérience with Airbnb, and for sure, We will use Airbnb again in the future.
First the location of the house is perfect: at the end of Ginza line (so easy to find) and close to the senso-ji.
Everyday, after visiting tokyo, coming back home, we pass trought the senso-ji; and it was a real pleasure with nobody around...
Yoshi was really helpfull. He answer all my questions at anytime with Airbnb chat.
We were able to deposit our suitcases in the descent of the plane and to begin to visit Tokyo from the first day thanks to Yoshi who accepted that we deposit them at home.
It was like if we go to visit familly: some drinks in the fridge, the beds were made, some crackers, selfy cane, one weigh suitcase, towels of bath, washing powder... And of the toilet paper !!!
B-)
Yoshi takes care of u during your stay.
As days come hoter, hé provides us some refreshing spray!!!!
>:D<
The house is really adapted for a familly.
The house is well equiped, everything is modern inside a typical ancient house of tokyo!!
The childs were really happy in this house during this week.
If we come back in Tokyo, for sure we will rent again the house of Yoshi!
Thank you Yoshi.

El apartamento de Yoshi es genial. Éramos un grupo de 8 y estuvimos fenomenal. Es pequeñito pero muy acogedor y moderno con todas las comodidades y facilidades.
Yoshi es muy solícito y está dispuesto a ayudar.
La casa está pegadita al Senso-ji!
Es un barrio precioso y bien ubicado.
Volvería y lo recomiendo 100%

Yoshi 的房子裡面有很多貼心的設施, 例如: 洗衣機, 冰箱 (準備有一些啤酒飲料), 廚具 (可以自己煮飯), 還有全套的杯碗茶具可供入住者使用, 整體來看 Yoshi 的房子就像是一個小家庭那樣, 除了客廳, 餐廳, 廚房, 兩間睡房, 兩間廁所及一間浴室, 甚至還有行李的貯藏室 (提供免費行李寄放). 提供給我們旅行者一個十分溫暖而且方便的住處. 尤其房子鄰近淺草寺, 地鐵站. 加上周圍也有很多的超市跟餐廳, 餐飲十分的方便. 對於 Yoshi 房子最佳的體驗是: 她滿足所有旅行者出門在外對於居住品質的需求, 她也成功的讓入住者感受旅行是一件既輕鬆又愉快的事. 我知道我下一次到東京, 還是會選擇 Yoshi 的房子做為我的住處.

The house was really beautiful! My friends and I (4 people total) had no trouble fitting into the two rooms. As everyone else has said, the amenities are all amazing and high tech! The location is also fantastic! It's literally steps away from Senso-ji so I enjoyed taking early morning/late night walks around the area. Will definitely try to come back the next time I visit Asakusa!

The house is really awesome. Very spacious, clean and Yoshi San prepares everything you can need. He is enough present to help you and not too much to let you feel independent and like at home. Definitively the perfect host. The location is very nice. At 300m of a great shopping street and 5 min walk to the Asakusa Subway Station. I recommend and I'll come back to Yoshi's house.
Yoshi 所經營的民宿可以用五星級形容! 民宿位置非常接近淺草雷門寺，步行往淺草站亦只需數分鐘，附近亦有很多美食店舖; 而單位內部非常整潔並備有多種先進設備，家居應有的日常用品齊全，Yoshi 更為客人準備零食飲品; Yoshi 還替我預約行程，更自發幫忙再次確認行程細節，這些貼心服務，就足以令我下次繼續入住Yoshi的民宿!
真高兴自己选择了yoshi的房子作为东京之旅的首站，高科技现代化。妈妈对里面所有的设备 包括锅碗都赞不绝口！下次一定还来

We had the best time staying at Yoshis apartment.We arrived early hoping to just leave our bags until checkin but Yoshi had finished  with the apartment so we were able to checkin  at 12.00. It is  in one of the best parts of Tokyo.  A quiet area so  close to Senso-Ji Temple, great restaurants & train station. Communication with Yoshi was prompt . Apartment is incredible with everything you need & more. Will definetily stay here again when back in Tokyo.

Yoshi m'a donné toutes les informations nécessaires pour passer un très bon séjour. Sa maison est très confortable, accueillante et parfaitement équipée. Elle est proche du métro et dans un très joli quartier ! J'y retournerai sans hésiter ! Merci pour tout Yoshi !

Très bon séjour. L'équipement de la maison hyper high tech nous a ravis. Tout a été fait pour nous faciliter la vie. Code d'entrée de la maison facilement trouvé malgré notre arrivée tardive, mot de bienvenu sur le réfrigérateur, tutoriels pour utiliser tous les appareils dernier cri. Disponibilité de Yoshi lors d'un petit souci domestique. Le quartier est très vivant et ce mélange de tradition et de modernité nous a complètement dépaysés. Excellent séjour à Tokyo nous espérons que la suite de notre voyage nous réservera d'aussi bonnes surprises.

The house was amazing and Yoshi-san is the perfect host. You have everything you need and if for the first time in Tokyo its a good chance to experience the high tech toilet :) Also right next to the house is the famous Asakusa shrine and if you go early in the morning you can admire it in all its beauty. For me Yoshi-san house will be in my favorite list for whenever i come to Tokyo again.

房間很乾淨舒適，住起來很有家的感覺；有各式的高科技家電，還貼心地錄製說明影片給入住的人；謝謝用心準備的餅乾跟飲料，WIFI分享器也幫了我們很大的忙；民宿位置交通方便，離浅草寺及24小時商店都很近！很可惜這次行程太滿，沒足夠時間使用民宿內的廚房設備。
這裡像是我們在淺草的家，期待下次再與房東相遇!
P.S:Yoshi先生是個體貼親切的型男唷!

本来想订几天的，结果只订到了一天。晚上到达，房子离浅草寺很近，地铁站4号口出来没走多久就走到了很安静但不偏僻不难找，9点多10点一路已经很安静。一进房子，好惊喜，房子很干净，设备出乎意料的齐全，什么餐具都有，要是多住几天在家做饭都可以，连三脚架、移动wifi、拍立得什么都有，冰箱上房东留了小纸条给我们，为我们提供了免费的饮料和零食，床也已经铺好，还在电脑里贴心的制作了视频教怎么使用那些家电，在日本的第一天幸福来的好突然^_^。那么晚出去找吃的，很多店都关门了但还是有些居酒屋、面店、烧烤店。早晨醒来，走出门没几步就来到浅草寺，游客大军还没来到，很是惬意。房东人很好，我那马大哈老公把戒指放在人家浴室，幸好房东发现寄回给我们，十分感谢，而且房东是个帅哥哦，～在日本的第一天，第一次住民宿，很满意的体验，谢谢房东的招待～下次有机会一定还定这里。

Had the most amazing time in Yoshi's house. Yoshi was a fantastic host, communicating well and helping us with an early check in and luggage storage on check out. So hospitable, even going out of his way to teach us Japanese cooking. A real treat. The house was clean and modern but with a traditional Japanese feel. Location is fantastic and close to the train station.  Would definitely come back to Yoshi's house when we return to Tokyo and highly recommend this place to stay. Thank you Yoshi.

I cannot rate this accommodation highly enough. As experienced AIRBNB users I can honestly say this was our best experience yet. Non Japanese speaking tourists will find Tokyo difficult. Yoshi helped us with three major issues- post, USJ, and transport.
The host is amazing, the accommodation incredible, the location incomparable. Asakusa is uniquely placed to give access to Tokyos highlights, and it was our fortune to stay here. Our only regret is the gift we had for Yoshi - we forgot to leave it.
For such a generous host we give our warm thanks and lifelong friendship. I would gladly have Yoshi as a guest in my home, but could never repay his hospitality.
Arigatou gosaimasu, Yoshi San

Loved Yoshi's traditional yet high tech house located so near to the tranquil sensoji . It was comfortable and a new experience to sleep on futons. Yoshi showed us how to use all the electronics   and made us feel at home with snacks and treats that he left for us. Thanks for such a memorable and positive stay. Two thumbs up!
Everything worked great. We highly recommend this place, especially with families with children. We will definitely stay his place again.

Although Yoshi couldn't be there when we checked in from the information provided, along with welcoming snacks, it was all very straightforward from the information provided (and Yoshi's videos helped a lot with managing all the technology!). Everything was just as we expected it from the description; for a Tokyo property it was very spacious and you really couldn't be closer to Senso-ji

Amazing experience in Asakusa, the house is wonderfully located, close to the temples and shops and restaurants and yet in a very quiet street.
The house is top equipped with high-tech. Yoshi is a great host, everyting was perfect!
House was easy to find and everything was well explained.
We loved it all!
Thank you so much.

非常好的民宿，屋主是位帅哥哦。

房间有两层，一楼是客厅餐厅厨房浴室，二楼是两间卧室，屋主非常贴心地准备了零食饮料啤酒，还有立拍得，浴室洗手间设施都是日本标配，很干净很舒服。浴室备有洗衣机，洗干净的毛巾，各类洗浴用品，牙膏牙刷需要住客自备。门口放了足够的伞具，卧室有空调和电暖器。

房子就在浅草寺隔壁，离地铁也不远，交通便利，去浅草寺更是超级方便。

非常好的民宿体验，推荐！
非常好的房子，东西智能，布局合理，非常好的房东，帮助我们预定了大餐，还为朋友送来了蛋糕表示生日祝福，非常感谢，下次有机会还会找您
Yoshi left notes,snacks,drinks and fruits to welcome us...the listing and pictures were very accurate...the neighborhood very convenient and made it easy for foreigners like us to navigate the city.

Staying in a clean, high tech and comfortable house very near Sensoji temple, restaurants and train station was an add on to our great experience in Tokyo. Surely recommendable. Although we didn't have the chance to meet, it was still perfect. Hope to stay with you again... Thank you.
Yoshi left a lot of notes to communicate...he can also be reached very easily on my cell phone..left fruits,snacks n drinks for us on the table too...and the suica cards were great!!!

Really decent house that worth recommend to all Tokyo visitors! Would definitely rate 10 stars if could;)
- Everything's been fully prepared by cute hosts, including a bike n snacks;) Tea cups , plates n bowls they provided are just like arts!
- Convenient location makes it possible to walk 5 min to famous spot: Sensō-ji.
- Perfect host ever! Left us msg on a board, told us how to use everything in the house by videos in PC. Checked if we got any inquiry during stay in person! Anything more we could ask?
It's an incredible experience with his modern traditional house and his care during the time here. Yoshi is the number one host I've met. This experience make me want to return Tokyo right away.

Our host, Yoshi was very welcoming and the description of the accommodation was very accurate. The location was very close to all amenities and within walking distance to shops, markets and the Japanese sensoji.
I would definitely stay at Yoshi's house again and would recommend to anyone

If you do one thing in Tokyo, stay here!!
It was wonderful location. To start the day and end the day with the temple area was wonderful and calming. To be at the end of the Ginza line was great. Beds were wonderful. Train cards fantastic. The area was lovely. It truly made our stay in Tokyo.

Thank you Yoshi-San. We have good experience in your apartment. Location is fantastic with walking distance to all the good food around and attractions. We feel at home with your very clean house. We definitely will come again next time. Cheers

The location is the best, many shops and shotengai around the area, all within walking distance. Toei, Tobu and Tokyo Metro asakusa station also within walking distance. There are also many nice food around the area. The house was very comfortable and equipped with very modern and high-tech equipment/furniture. Yoshi left a lots of note and video on how to use all the facility of the house, he also provide us some drinks and snacks for us. I would highly recommend this place.

Yoshi, thank you for being the perfect host.
We can't thank you enough for your generosity, preparing foods & all necessities for us!
We all had a great time. Will definitely visit again!
Highly recommend to everyone, you really feel like home.
Thank you once again❤️

Yoshi's house is the perfect place to stay in Tokyo. Nestled in Asakusa, the house is surrounded by delicious eateries and within walking distance of Sensoji. The house boasts state of the the art home electronics and feels very cosy. Yoshi welcomed us with delicious snacks and did all he could to make our stay comfortable. Furthermore, he provided us with Suicas and pocket wifi that came very handy. Two thumbs up for Yoshi. Strongly recommended.

The place is superb in term of house facilities, cleanliness of place. A good location nearby Sensoji Temple.  The nearest subway station (Asakusa) is around 500-600 meters away from the house.  We enjoy staying here....JP

We are a family of four staying at Yoshi's house for four nights in January 2016. Yoshi is a nice host, meeting us on our arrival late in the night and introducing various facilities to us. The house is clean and has everything needed for a comfortable holiday at Asakusa.
The house has two levels with two fully-automatic Japanese-style toilets. The kitchen looks very new except that we didn't really have time to cook meals ourselves. We found it more convenient to stay here than a few other one-toilet apartments we also stayed in the same trip. The house is fairly close to Asakusa train station. There are also direct rapid trains running from Asakusa station to Narita airports every 30/40 mins, costing 1290 Yen. Yoshi also allows us to leave the luggages after our check-out at the house entrance, which is very convenient, as our airplanes departed that evening. Yoshi responded to all my enquiries quickly.

Overall, this is a great place to stay if you also want to experience how local people live in Tokyo.

Highly recommended.

후회하지 않을 숙소입니다.
가깝고 코타츠갘은 일본 느낌 물씬 풍기는 집입니다.

Yoshi的房子设备齐全，自动化先进，离浅草寺地铁站较近，每天步行至，可以迅速去任何地方。地铁站对面有一兰拉面，10点开门，附合晚起人的生活习惯，又不用排队，成为我们定点早饭地。
感谢Yoshi的帮助，让日本之行的开端完美！
我和小伙伴给这个房子满分！房子是两层小楼，两间卧室，两个卫生间，四个女生足够使用，客厅还有超赞的被炉，总之房间很温馨，房东也很贴心，还给准备了零食饮料，下次过来还想过来住。

Yoshi is a very welcoming host. He left us snacks for when we arrived and showed us how to make sushi and other Japanese foods for dinner one night.
This home is full of modern electronics in the toilet, bathroom and kitchen which is really cool, yet it still has a traditional style bedroom with futon. The kotatsu(table with heater underneath) was perfect for visiting Japan during winter as the days are cold.
I couldn't read all the kanji on the electrical appliances(eg. heater, washing machine, etc.) but Yoshi has made very helpful instruction videos of how to use these appliances on his laptop which we were able to use during our stay.
It was a convenient location with many restaurants and few subway stations within walking distance. It was awesome staying so close to a large and famous temple and walking through it everyday and night to appreciate its beauty.
Next time I am in Tokyo I would like to stay here again and I would recommend it especially for families or a group of friends. It was very spacious by Japanese standards for our family of 5 adults

大変快適に楽しく過ごさせて頂きました。お気遣いも含め、素晴らしかったです。
また機会がありましたらよろしくお願いいたします。

we had a great time here although we stayed for just one night. the location is very good, it takes within 5 minutes to the back of asakusa temple. yoshi is very considerate. he prepared drink and snacks for us, and we found lots of funny details here especially for the kitchen. we had an amazing day here unexpectedly. if we had another chance,we will return to yoshi's house again without hesitation.

Asakusa is wonderful place in Tokyo, and Yoshi's house recommandable and perfectly cozy house to tourist  especially who has large familly like me.   Yoshi did his best for solving my familly's  problem(like how to turn up hot water. Yoshi's house was made SUPER electronic device lol, so sometimes I confused how to use it) Yoshi always keep solving our matter. He is so nice and house was totally like pictures on the internet. He left some snacks, drink and etc. We ate all of them! These were so good to me. It's so yummy. And my parents love looking around super market, It is located so close near the house :)  I wanna take a rest in yoshi's house again. If time allows me to do.

house is clean.quiet and everything is high tech,easy to cooking,it's very very close to attractions,and thanks for Mr.yoshi prepare some fruit and drink:) and always keep touch with us when we need,very thanks for concern our country's about earthquakes! is so warm,my parents are also feels perfect too,we will choose yoshi's place again!

We had a great stay at Yoshi place, everything in his house is high-tech and nice. He even let us left our luggage at his warehouse for free for three nights, to enable us to travel comfortably to Takayama. He came the morning we're leaving for Takayama and help us booked our returns tickets from Takayama to Tokyo, truly appreciate it. Ever have a chance to come back Tokyo, will definitely stay here again.

Yoshi's house is just next to asakusa temple. And the temple in night with light on is very beautiful. Yoshi's house is the best I have ever seen, which is Japanese style with morden electric equipment. And yoshi provided free drinks and snakes. How to use this house is clearly described in vedio and texts. yoshi's house is amazing and yoshi himself is handsome. I highly recommend this house.
這間是我目前為止住過最好的apartment.。還境清優、設備先進、整全、大部份都是電子化、簡值是理想家居。特別是那開放式㕑房、除了一般的雪櫃、微波爐、煮食爐外、還有IH 磁應飯煲、烤箱、又可以打邊爐。浴室浸浴一流、只能說超值。另業主還備了些小食、飲品、米、煮食用調味、油……。

La maison de Yoshi est une maison très spacieuse, tout est mis en œuvre pour que les voyageurs s'y sentent bien. Tous les équipements sont ultra-modernes, Yoshi a pensé à tous les détails : cartes suica à disposition, snack et boissons, prises électriques compatibles etc.... Nous avons eu la surprise de découvrir que la maison était encore plus grande que sur les photos, Çe qui permet de séjourner en famille ou entre amis en étant très à l'aise (possibilité d'ouvrir plusieurs valises dans les chambres).  Cette maison est idéalement située dans un quartier calme et traditionnel a deux minutes de la station de métro et juste à côté du célèbre temple senso-ji. Nous avons apprécié de rencontrer Yoshi dès le premier jour. Je recommande vivement cette maison.
Yoshiさんの素敵な家のおかげで楽しい旅となりました。冷蔵庫の中やお菓子も準備してくださっていて大満足です。ありがとうございました。

真的很幸運可以入住Yoshi的房子，距離淺草站不遠，生活機能超棒，提供的生活用品一應俱全，入住時貼心的提醒以及乾淨舒適的房間，讓我們一行人根本不想離開。
若有機會再訪東京，一定要載入住Yoshi家，時在是太物超所值了！
祖母とともにいくひさびさの家族旅行でした。隅々まで行き届いたリノベーションと、YOSHIさんの心遣いで本当にステキな時間が過ごせました。ありがとうございました！

Todo correcto y perfecto.

Casa muy acogedora y con todo lo necesario.

Anfitrión muy Atento y amable.Siempre pendiente de que no faltara nada.

Casa justo al lado del templo Sensoji.Ubicación perfecta y cerca del metro.Para repetir.

Gracias por todo!

We really enjoyed our stay at Yoshi's house.  The house is very convenient to the subway station.  Yoshi is a gracious host and supplied us with snacks, drinks and water.   Being so close to Senso-Ji was very convenient and when we came home every evening it was always nice to see the temple all lit up.  The house was spacious for the five of us and had very modern appliances.
房间非常的干净，空间很大，有上下两层。位置也很好，就在浅草寺旁边，房东YOSHI也很周到，我们住的很舒服。谢谢你了^_^

Yoshi was very welcoming and helpful. The house is in a great location, right next to the Asakusa temple and only a short walk from Asakusa station. The house was comfortable, with plenty of consideration given to guests who are travelling - e.g. wifi, computer etc. There were drinks and snacks provided on arrival. The bathroom was stocked with plenty of clean towels and the futons were much more comfortable than the futons I slept on elsewhere in Japan. Yoshi stopped by to welcome us on our first evening, checking we were ok and kept in regular contact, advising us where to eat etc. and made a restaurant booking for a friend. The only issue we had was that the directions on AirBnB for the listing were not accurate and it made the property difficult to find. I suggest using your own google maps location finder rather than the link on AirBnB in order to find this house. Overall, I would 100% recommend this house for a group of friends or a family.

Words can't describe how we love this house and yoshi hospitality, it's truly amazing, we love every detail of this amazing house, the house is so big , clean, cozy, comfort and hi technology house, the bathroom and kitchen is kind of amazing, so clean and have everything on it, you even can cook for your family and doing hi tea in this house,  this is our first experience using airbnb and yoshi make it to the top! Everything is just perfect!! It's really sad today gonna be our last night in japan, we gonna makesure to return to this airbnb whenever we come back to tokyo! We will back for sure!! Hahaha. No wonder most of people really love yoshi place ! We do so! We love it So muchhhh! Once again thankyou for your kind hospitality yoshi!

Nous étions 5 à séjourner dans la magnifique maison de Yoshi. Tout était parfait, une maison traditionnelle très moderne avec tout ce dont on a besoin si ce n'est plus ! J'ai oublié mon appareil photo branché dans le salon et Yoshi me l'a renvoyé par la poste sur Tokyo... c'est quelqu'un de très gentil et serviable, aussi il répond toujours très vite quand on le contacte.

Wow what a location! Literally a stones throw from Asakusa shrine, a perfect location to explore Tokyo, the house is clean and very spacious and with all the mod cons, highly recommended place to stay.
Yoshi ให้การต้อนรับที่ดีมาก  เหมือนเรามาพักบ้านญาติ

This place was amazing. It's very modern, clean, and big. I highly recommend it. If you'd like to stay in a beautiful home by a historical site this is the place. The hosts were fantastic! They respond super fast and are so nice. If you stay here you'll absolutely love it!

Rien à dire de plus sur la maison qui est superbe et hi tech (les enfants ont adoré). Le quartier également est top. Quel plaisir le soir de passer par le senso ji vidé de toute sa foule de la journée. Et Yoshi est très sympa, réactif et toujours à l'écoute.
很高兴这次的日本东京之旅可以住在Yoshi先生的屋子，我的家人都非常喜欢。Yoshi家地点非常好，无论是交通或者是饮食都是非常方便，附近也非常热闹，如果要挑剔的话那么美中不足的就是最靠近的地铁通道很多都是阶梯所以推着大行李的朋友可能会有些麻烦，不过也是有电梯只不过会在另一个出口，需要行走一小段路。
I've been to Tokyo twice, and if say this has to be the most perfect place to stay. Just behind the shrines in Asakusa. Comfortable, quiet, close to the metro. Perfect!

House is really well located in Asakusa. We were there during the golden week and Sanjuri festival which made the trip even better.
As a first Airbnb try, I was surprised. Everything is in there exactly like in a hotel (shampoo, soap and even toothbrush !)
I will definitely come again next time.
Yoshi was kind enough to lend a second bike as well :)

Yoshi was a good host! with good helpful. The house was very confortable, big and clean. You can find everything that you need in this house. Highly recommented!!!! Yoshi' place will be the first place of choices to us in next time travelling in tokyo!

Yoshi is extremely good host since I used Airbnb service. The house is really modern, clean, tidy, convenience and located in a great area (near Sensoji Temple, subway and Tax Free Convenience Store). Yoshi is very helpful, he help me to reserve the seat at King Crab restaurant and call them that I will be there a bit late coz I got lost on subway. I was surprise when I reach his house because there was a welcome note (never got from another host in Airbnb), welcome snack and drink. This will be a first place of my choice and I will recommended to others if travelling to Tokyo. Feel like home if you stay in Yoshi's house ^_^
非常棒的一次入住体验，尤其是对来自中国的客人，因为房子的主人Yoshi会说中文哦！所以交流完全无障碍。房间设施很棒，我们一家五口入住，都很满意。位置也非常好，紧邻浅草寺，根据房主的地图很容易找到。关键是浅草地铁到成田机场有直达特快，省去转车麻烦，太棒了。下次来东京我一定还住这里。

This was a wonderful experience for me and my family. The house is spacious and very comfortable. Yoshi was an excellent host, providing snacks and ample instructions for us. He also accommodated last minute changes and allowed us to store luggage before our flight. He can speak English and Chinese, which made communication very easy for us. We will definitely stay there again.
義さん的房子整洁舒适，房子是昭和年代的建筑，但内部的各种现代化的电器一应俱全，未来感十足。各种我们想到的和想不到的物品都有预备。房间是日式榻榻米风格，美观大方，富有传统韵味。房子的位置也十分便利，走几分钟就是地下铁，2分钟即到浅草寺。房东人很好，还专门等我们到晚上，帮我们入住。总之是我们整趟旅途中的最佳住宿。

I was in Tokyo for a month with my family and Yoshi's home was the perfect place to stay.  We loved it - the location is incredible (closet to trains, river, parks, shopping)  on a very quiet street near the Sensoji temple, the home modern, spacious and well equipped. Yoshi was a lovely host - great communication, clear directions, very welcoming. We can't wait to return. Thanks Yoshi for making your home available and our trip so special.

房东人很好，入住当天特意过来问我们有什么需要帮助的，在我们到之前会详细询问我们的各项信息，帮我们准备好床铺还有一些免费的零食和饮料。房东会中文，沟通顺畅。房子的结构布局也很合理，洗浴设备和卫生设施都很高级。还贴心地为大家准备了打印机和可供充值的地铁卡等小物件。房子的地理位置非常好，走到浅草寺2分钟，门口就有很出名的天妇罗店，走到地铁浅草站也就5、6分钟，一路过去都很热闹，但是晚上睡觉很安静。真是特别好的入住体验，小朋友都不舍离开，下回有机会来东京还想住这里。

We enjoyed our stay with Yoshi very much. It was a perfect place to stay. It is only a few steps to the Sensoji Temple and the Asakusa metro station is a 5 to 10 minutes walk. The area also has plenty of shops and restaurants.
The house has all the electronic gadgets that one would expect from a modern Japanese home. Yoshi is a wonderful and excellent host and even last minute changes are not a problem for him. On our arrival we found the house with a lot of snacks, food and water. Instructions on how to use everything we're very clear including pictures and when something wasn't clear, Yoshi was always ready to help out.
Yoshi's house is definitely a place that I would recommend to everyone staying in Tokyo.

Thank you yoshi for this amazing first stay in Japan!  You made it all so easy. Everything we needed was available. All necessary explanations were there. Good equipment. Space and clean. easy contact and fast response time. We fell in love with Asakusa. Easy to travel from this place to the rest of tokyo. Can't wait to come back! Linn

Excellent location! Very convenient! Easily find this house and Yoshi is a very good host :) she allows flexibilities to travellers.
Her house has got everything we need and actually you just come to this house with few clothes for changing, that's it!
The technology is amazing, you can wash your clothes there and there is water ready for you there too, so you don't really need to bring drinks!

宿泊前のメイルでのコミニュケーションよりとても丁寧でした。
お部屋の説明書は分かり易く、助かりました。各部屋は清潔感があり、更に浅草寺まで徒歩数分と、ロケーションを含め大変気に入りました。
This house is in a fantastic location and was spotlessly clean.  We really enjoyed our stay. Any queries we had were answered very promptly. Thanks very much.

My family of five only stayed at Yoshi's  one night, but we were very impressed by how lovely the house is. Everything in the house looks very new and modern. We also spent some exciting time to explore the high-tech facility settings in the house: the automated bathroom, the remote controlled lighting..etc. We could tell from all the small items that Yoshi has prepared for the guests (the different patterns, shapes of the cups, plates, spoons, the guest photo album,  the instant photo camera, the white board for writing messages.... It's too many to name here!) that he is such a attention-to-detail person and extremely considerate for the convenience of the guest stay.  Yoshi is also very responsive to my messages and very helpful too. I would definitely highly recommend his place!

My husband, daughter and I spent almost three weeks in Japan, travelling around and I have to say that having Yoshi's beautiful house as a base was absolutely perfect. It's a home from home with all the amenities you could require. Modern appliances galore that make your stay that much easier (and fun!). My ten year old daughter didn't want to leave, neither did we! Yoshi is the perfect host. He waited for hours I think on our arrival because the taxi driver got lost (don't worry as this is not normal), yet he was friendly, helpful and quick to answer any questions we had before showing us around his lovely house and explaining the various appliances. The Asakusa area itself is delightful - you are literally about 100 paces from the picturesque Senso-ji temple (one of the most impressive temples we saw during our travels and right on our doorstep, we felt so privileged). It is an extremely safe neighbourhood and you can walk around at all hours without feeling threatened or in danger.
