Japanese people in general are incredibly helpful and will aid you however they can, going above and beyond at least what a European would do.
Yoshi helped me enormously prior to my visit as I wanted to prepare everything in advance to make the most of the time we had. He seems to know just about everything and answered all of my questions in detail, even providing additional info that was very useful. If you want a real Japanese experience that respects tradition, but also allows you to 'be yourself' and have a fun and enjoyable stay, then Yoshi's place is for you. 100% recommendable to anyone. The rental price is also very good, you will not find a cheaper and more delightful abode in Tokyo! Happy holidays. And massive thanks to Yoshi and his lovely family for making our holiday that much more special.

Yoshi has thought of everything that you need. From toothpaste to cereal and snacks, to a high end toilet and remote control lights, the house has it all. The location is great for those who want to be central and away from the crowds. The restaurants nearby are good value for money and the temple is fancinating

距離淺草寺非常的近，有非常舒適的環境，非常適合家庭入住！
若有下次機會，希望還能再到這裡來住上幾晚
這是間很棒的民宿，應有盡有，而且床鋪很軟，一躺下就睡著；房東的回覆速度也很快，有甚麼需要會馬上幫我們解決，很棒的房東
Great. We had a short visit and everything was wonderful and accurately described. This home would be great for 2 couples or a family! Amazing neighbourhood.

Everything about Yoshi's house was exactly right.
The location? A stone's throw from the amazing Senso-ji temple and gardens, 15 minutes' walk from the Skytree and five minutes from great local shopping in Asakusa.
The house itself is everything I'd want in an Airbnb. It's knitted out with hi-tech space saving fixtures and fittings, yet Yoshi's pulled off the feat of integrating them into a traditional looking house. We felt completely at home, which is ultimately the best compliment in my opinion.
Yoshi was really helpful, and kindly arranged a dinner reservation at a wonderful local (Michelin-starred) sushi restaurant as well as booking a minivan to Narita for the four of us.

It is a wonderful experience to stay in Yoshi place during my holiday on 10-14 SEP 2016. The house equipped all the model facilities that can let us enjoy our stay and make things very easily.
And Yoshi is very helpful in helping us to order tickets and provide support and solution on our luggage problem.
Yoshi always reply within half an hour with what we need.
We love Yoshi place, we will be back!

L'appartement de Yoshi est vraiment très accueillant et agréable. Tout équipé et tout confort, proche du métro de Asakusa et du temple de Sensoji, c'est de loin le meilleur logement que nous ayons testé au Japon!
Très bonne experience, je le recommande vivement!
아주 좋았습니다
A great location and a great host. Everything was perfect, the apartment was well fitted out and had everything you could need.
Yoshi's place was perfect for us.  Excellent location.  Exactly as described.  Highly recommended.

This is a fantastic house in an amazing location, right next to Sensoji Temple. Restaurants, shopping, sightseeing, subway all very close. The house is modern, super clean and easy to access and use. We were able to leave our luggage prior to check in and also arrange to leave it late after check out to suit our travel plans.
Yoshi was not able to attend at check in, but made sure someone met us. He even dropped in to see that we were all settled later that night.
Our only regret is not staying longer.

Yoshi的房子more than perfect!
这是我见过最高科技的房子了，虽然是和式结构，但是里面的设施非常自动化，生活用品也很齐全，就像在自己家一样。Yoshi还准备了中文欢迎白板和一堆零食饮料给我们，很暖心~
2丁目很长，Yoshi家是靠近浅草寺东堂二天门附近，真的步行100米就能到浅草寺！旺中带静，绝对是家庭入住的好选择。Yoshi人也超级好，有问必答，有特殊要求也可以满足；临走时还见到了Yoshi的弟弟来收拾房间，也是帅哥一枚~
下次来东京还会选这里~

Yoshi's place was great, excellent location, perfectly required, comfortable and clean.
We totally recommend this place

这个房子特别抢手，要不是提前9个多月预定还真是住不着。因为到达的时间挺晚了，所以没见到房主，但是如何入住以及入住的TIPS房主都详细告知，关键是房主懂中文！这样沟通起来就方便多啦。十一假期的7天在这度过，两家6个人都对这个房子各个细节都赞不绝口，合适的价格，方便的地理位置，富含高科技的厨卫，传统的和式住宅……不光是这些大件，其他小东西房主也是想的非常周到，电脑打印机各种家用电器一一俱全，包括文具抽纸这种小东西都准备充足，还有免费提供的饮料和零食，以及咖啡茶叶柴米油盐！中间有一天房主还来收垃圾，非常感谢，我们把房子弄的有点乱感觉很不好意思，最后一天走的时候肯定要整理干净的。同伴说以后家里装修就要按这个风格来，可惜国内买不到这些高性价比的产品。房子就在浅草寺，走过去一分钟都不要，最爽就是夜间游览浅草寺，安静的美。离地铁站稍稍有点路，但也还好，一路上能逛的小店饭店特别多，周围商场也有好几个，东京真是超级大都市，光是浅草这边都可以玩个好几天了。离晴空塔走过去有点远，但是能很清楚的看到，最后一晚从晴空塔打taxi回来也没超过起步价。想说的太多，对这个房子无穷大个满意，对房主无穷大个感谢，只希望有生之年如果有机会再来东京还能再住这个房子。

A fantastic place to stay to experience traditional Japanese living together with hi-tech. And the little extras that you can't buy.....
Thanks again Yoshi
Perfect intro to Tokyo. Stayed here for two nights and got some great culture from the local temple / markets and restaurants.
What can I add to previous reviews? this place is fantastic with everything you need and so many thoughtful touches. spotlessly clean and tidy. We loved every minute!

Yoshi is a wonderful host and the house has everything. The location is perfect for so many activities. There is plenty of space in the rooms. Yoshi took great care of us and is always helpful when you ask. I would definitely recommend the house and would certainly recommend Yoshi as a great host.

Yoshi was very helpful and spoke excellent English . He very considerately left some snacks and coffee supplies which were very welcome when we arrived .It was very easy to get around And explore Tokyo from Asakusa and we enjoyed the experience v much .it was useful to do some washing and gave the use of the computer

Yoshi's house is fantastic. A sizeable and very comfortable place to stay, and in a very convenient location!
The house has some fantastic and modern utilities. The kitchen is fully fitted for anything you would need during a stay, and the washing machine as ever I'd a very welcome addition.
Yoshi was a spectacular host. He provided clear instructions on finding the house, and left plenty of instructions on using the house and it's utilities. We were also welcomed by snacks and drinks to have during our stay!
Our whole group would stay again without hesitation. Thank you!

房子地點生活機能很方便,附近便利商店超市餐廳一應俱全,再晚也不怕沒東西吃!房子內部很乾淨,設備相當齊全,尤其房東人真的很nice,又帥!!有什麼事情一連絡就會立刻處理,總之就是一個超讚的住宿選擇!!
ヨシさんの家はロケーションがとても便利です。近くにはコンビニーや、スーパーや、レストランなどもあって、どんな時間に食べたくなっても、物を食べられます。家の中にはとてもきれいで、いろいろな設備も揃っています。特にヨシさんはとてもやさしいイケメンです。人がすごくいいです。何の必要を連絡したら、すぐ駆けてくれますので、最高の宿泊の選択です！ありがとうございました。

Everything are great, and like all other feedback, this place are highly recommended. Location are excellent, and just few mins away we have everything we need from food to sightseeing to shopping.
Yoshi's place are very high tech, especially the kitchen, and we love it.
We will definitely re-book his place if we visit Tokyo again.

Yoshi's place is great and everything you want is there. It is clean, modern, full of extras and a personal greeting on the fridge door made us feel very welcome.  We did not meet Yoshi but he obviously takes great pride in offering his place on Airbnb as it was immaculate and we wish we could have stayed longer. We would certainly stay there again - in fact we want to come back to Tokyo in a couple of weeks but it is booked out then. You will love staying here because the ceilings are not low like traditional Japanese homes, but the style is still Japanese.  We are tall so that matters! The kitchen and bathroom are modern - in fact I have never seen such a modern kitchen in my life, everything is at a touch of a button.  Thanks Yoshi!

Great location right near Asakusa station, Sensoji temple and our favourite, Ichiran!
Our stay was brief but very comfortable, enough room for the 4 adults in our group. Very cool traditional house with high tech finishings.

Would definitely stay here again :)

Yoshi house was a great experience in Tokyo! On our arrival there were welcome snacks and even soups! Location is fantastic - just around a corner 20 steps and you are in Asakusa temple! And park around temple is always open and free of charge. House is well equipped with different electronic items, adaptors, selfie-stick and tripod for camera (witch I found unfortunally only on departure day), Suica card for rent, rice cooker - exceptionally useful! At first we did not know what to expect from futons, but in reality they are very comfortable and soft. In cold season it is quite cold during night, but there was a heater in each room. Kotatsu - big enough for 4 persons and very warm and cozy! Steep steps are typical for Japan, but we (2 little women) maneged to carry our big suitcases upstairs! Yoshi answers in 10 min, and we could find house instruction on PC. Thank you YOSHI and FAMILY for great experience in Tokyo!

Yoshi was a great host and super helpful, we never stay in that kind of house before, even in our country, it was a really lovely house and come with advanced home technology, this house is the one memory we remember the most from our traveling in Japan, wish we can come back again :)

It is a very great house! We love the Japanese touch by the tatami & futon, modern & high tech equipment (amazing :D), comfort place and good location :)
Yoshi is a good host, super host indeed! He came to the house and gave us something to wear to make us warm in a very cold evening :)
We recommend to stay at this house.
Thanks Yoshi for your hospitality and great house!
Yoshi's place is cosy for a family trip. It is clean, well maintained and well-equipped. Highly recommended!

お部屋は皆さんもう充分に評価されているので、私は垣間見たYoshiさんの横顔を。
Yoshiさんは数多くの海外経験をされた話題多きホストさんです。
今後も交流させて頂きながら共に有意義な人生を送っていきたい、そう思わせる素敵な方です。
詳細は次回是非皆さんで交流してみてください。
今回はありがとうございました。
Katsushi

浅草寺のすぐ裏手にあり観光には素晴らしいロケーションです。
家族で利用しましたが、Yoshiさんの素晴らしいお心遣いにより、
快適に滞在できました。
また機会がありましたら、是非伺いたいです。
Good and very convenient place. Modern house equipment and friendly abs helpful hoster, Thanks Yoshi San and his brother.

Lovely place with an amazing host. Thanks for the efficient refilling of water and emptying of rubbish as well as the complimentary snacks and drinks during our stay. The place is also homely and spacious and fully modernized but yet leaving touches of the original traditional feel. Wish we could extend our stay there even longer. =)
It's my auntie that stays at Yoshi's house. But she's very happy bc it's wide and good for family and friends. Near to the attractions. Very convenient. Will book here soon
とても快適に過ごすことができました！いろいろな生活用品を揃えてくださっているので、海外からの旅行者の方にもオススメだと思います。

We had a wonderful stay in Yoshi's house with our experience matching every part of the thorough description he provided. We found the neighbourhood lively and interesting with many restaurants and shops to explore, all within easy walking distance to the Metro. We're definitely keen to stay there again the next time we're in Tokyo! Thanks again Yoshi!
This the very good place.  We would definitely come back and stay here next time.
Great location and a comfortable house with modern technology.

每天冒着严寒回到Yoshi的房子时，就像回到了家里，我们喜欢围坐在暖桌边。出发前Yoshi发了详细的路线图，尽管到的时候比较晚，出来的站口和路线图也不一样，但按照路标还是比较顺利地找到房子。房东准备了很多零食饮料，考虑了很多小细节，房子设备使用起来也非常方便。楼梯略陡，如果带老人的家庭上下楼也许会有点不方便。清晨或晚上可以到浅草寺拍到很棒的照片。最后一天退房遇到房东本人。总体而言，是一次很棒的民宿体验！

Yoshis place was in a great location.  Very clean and well presented.  We found the area interesting with many restaurants and shops to explore, all within easy walking distance to the Metro.   Use of wifi and the computer was a great extra we were not expecting.  Perfect place to stay.  We would highly recommend Yoshis place and hope to return for another stay.
我们来自中国，这次来住的地方就在市中心，出行十分方便。房东热情地接待了我们，可以跟我们有简单的沟通，非常感谢房东提供如此条件的住宿，给我们结束日本之行画上圆满的句号。

Yoshi has train cards, portable wifi (might be handy for GPS whiles you're out and about), modern automatic toilets, very clean, snacks... everything you could want! I recommend staying here and focusing on the Asakusa area. Make sure you have enough time (at least three days) in Tokyo!

This place is so nice , handy to the temple and asakusa. Yoshi is lovely and helpful very good value for a house in toyko we had two family's 8 in total and the Space is perfect.
We stayed in 4 others on our tour around Japan and found this to be the best.👍👍😀😀

Our family came to Tokyo to attend my niece's graduation ceremony. Two elderly at their late 80 travel together is really a tough task for the rest of us. Yoshi's place is easy to access to one of the most famous tourist spot that allowed my parents to go for a walk then come back for a nap few times a day. We spent most of our time in Yoshi's place and enjoyed our times here. Just one little concern for those plan to take elderly travel to Tokyo , Tokyo public transportation is not user friendly. You really need to take more steps then other country. That's not easy for elderly not use to Japanese life. And sleep on the floor might be tough too for elderly. That's really more a culture issues than...Overall, highly recommend Yoshi's place for family travel together.

위치는 긴자선에서 도보 10분, 아사쿠사선에서 도보 15분 정도입니다...한적한 주택가이며 센소지가 바로 보이는 곳입니다...사진에서 보는 것과 똑같이 편안하고 안락하며 조용한 곳입니다...가족여행으로는 최적의 장소라고 생각합니다...무엇보다 Yoshi씨의 친절한 소통이 최고의 추천 포인트입니다...한편으로는 감동적일 정도로 좋았습니다...추천합니다...

This was a great place to stay! Free snacks and comfortable floor mattresses along with free mobile wifi. Also quite clean and convenient to a lot of places in Tokyo.

The place is situated in a convenient place near the Sensoji temple in Asakusa. Plenty of eateries within reach. Yoshi is a very meticulous person. He makes a point to ensure his guests are comfortable in his home... everything is provided for... from free snacks to drinks to usage of his laptop, printer, stationery, etc. There was a welcome message on the white board to welcome his guests... There were so many good words written in little note books in his home to thank him... Awesome host. Highly recommended.

Great place. Highly recommended. Spacious and comfortable. High end appliances made it fun too. We also enjoyed the free snacks. Plus, it's amazingly close to the shrine and close to transit. If you're traveling as a large group, this is the place for you.

Great location with clean, stylish, updated facilities. Yoshi san was very accommodating and easy to communicate with. He even provides a video tour to demonstrate how to use various appliances in the apartment. It is in a quiet neighborhood too, which was great as we were all working through jet lag. There is a washing machine but no dryer. But you can hang up your clothes to dry with the hangars provided and a drying line located upstairs in one of the bedrooms. We travelled in late June when it was somewhat humid and our clothes took two days to fully dry. We would definitely stay there again.

来日本旅游最大的惊喜，可惜已是最后一天，但好庆幸有机会入住了如此完美的房子。浅草寺尽在咫尺，地铁口出来还可远观晴空塔，夜里的浅草寺景美人稀，拍照效果一流。此处闹中有静的百年日式小别墅，室内处处高科技，厨具餐具样样精美，细节到纸巾都是让人难以忘怀，柔软到极致，整个房子宽大的空间是我们在日本见到最大的一处。附近餐馆林立，网红一兰拉面相隔不远，松屋百货也在附近。房主还贴心准备了欢迎饮料及品牌零食，沟通回复迅速，未来再去日本，一定想办法提前预订这么美妙的住宿。全五星超级赞！

Yoshi's place was absolutely amazing.  We couldn't believe how close this was to Senso-ji Temple (literally a 2 min walk).  While the house itself is old (it's been in the family for over 100 years), the inside has been completely renovated with home technology that our teenage boys are still raving about.  Touch sensors, motion sensors, you name it, everything that can be automated has been automated.  However, you still very much have the charm of an old Japanese home, especially upstairs, where traditional futons are provided in your bedrooms.  Yoshi was a fantastic host.  Instructions were clear and easy to follow, and responses were always very prompt.  In addition, Yoshi left us complimentary snacks and drinks, which was a very nice touch after a long day of traveling.  A Pocket WIFI and laptop are also provided for guest use.   Pretty much everything you might need for a very comfortable stay was thought of and provided.  We highly recommend staying at Yoshi's place and will come back in a heartbeat.
Yoshi's place was perfect! Spotlessly clean, very comfortable, and perfectly located. Yoshi's communication was great, and we felt very welcome.

The  house has great location yet very quite. And it  is equipted very well, we  found everything we need during the stay. Yoshi's instruction was clear. In all, we enjoyed  our stay and will sure to recommend Yoshi and her family to other travellers.

Our family of five had a fabulous stay at Yoshi's home in Asakusa. Communication was prompt and super helpful, confirming details such as door code, directions, and arrival time. We had no difficulty finding the house and letting ourselves in. Yoshi has thought of every detail, including amenities such as loaner cards for the subway/train system and even charging cords for various electronic devices. The entire house is automated, with motion-detecting toilet lids that raise and lower; remote controls for everything; touchless faucets, and more! There is extra shampoo, conditioner, body wash, and toothbrushes for those who travel extra light.
The neighborhood was so charming with tourist attractions (temple, shops, restaurants) alongside everyday Japanese life. It was easy to travel from Asakusa to various Tokyo neighborhoods via subway, train and even boat. We found that the Suica transit cards even worked on the water bus, which can be boarded at the Asakusa pier.
For this American family accustomed to memory foam mattresses, the futon beds were plenty comfy and we didn't miss a sofa. Yoshi even has a Fujimax instant camera for guests to leave pictures of themselves with notes in a guestbook.
We highly recommend Yoshi's house and the whole Asakusa experience.

My family and I lived in Yoshi's house for two nights, all of us, including my 70-year-old parents and my 8-year-old daughter enjoyed our stay very much. The location is good, with walking distance to asakusa station and convenient stores and good dining places. The best thing was the multiple function Japanese style bathroom, I wished I could have one too! 😊

Yoshi's house was perfect for our family of 5 in so many ways.
First of all, the location. Trains can get you to wherever you want to go in Tokyo, but Asakusa is a great place to stay. Busy, yet not overly crowded. Many choices for food and shopping. The Senso-ji Temple, attracts many visitors to Asakusa, so when you ask a question, it's probably been asked before.
The house itself is good-looking, both inside and out. It has a lot of space for us to spread out, which is important for a family on vacation. These is a comfortable mixture of old style and high-tech. Sleeping accommodations are futons, which fit right in with the traditional style of the bed rooms. At the same time, everything is automated/remote controlled/touch-less. Yoshi provides videos that show how to use everything.
We were impressed with the thoughtful, careful, and thorough preparations made by Yoshi. Just living in this house was another great experience for our family. It felt like home, and we would definitely want to stay here again when we come back to Tokyo!!
Thx for the help from householder, and we r very enjoy to stay in this house, if I will go to Tokyo next time, I will absolutely book this house again. :)

Yoshi est un propriétaire particulièrement attentionné et respectueux de ses hôtes. Le logement est parfaitement situé, tout est propre, rangé, soigné! Idéal pour une famille complète comme nous l'étions.

Yoshi’s home is right next to Senso-ji temple and walking distance to tons of shops and restaurants. The house is big and clean. I highly recommend this home and will be sure to book again.

一个字 超级赞！来日本得第一家民宿 当天下飞机很晚了 房东半夜来接机 超级良心价 安排我们一行入住后离开 第二天起来发现真的一尘不染 而且各种现代化便利设施一应俱全 一楼的客厅里包含一个浴室和厕所 全部现代化 厨房很小但是很方便 我们给三个宝宝烧了辅食 基本工具都有 二楼榻榻米房间干净舒适 寝具都非常舒服 以至于我们后面一家跟这家比造成了很大的心理落差 非常想退了再住回来（真心的） 住了两晚后我们换地方 还是用的房东安排的车子送我们去 更加良心价！在日本打车很贵 但是他们的包车接送服务简直是打车的一个零头 总之各种好 下次来浅草还是会入住这家！

The location is great, we enjoyed our daily walks to and from the station. It is just beside Sensoji temple but in the hidden/uncrowded part.
The house is traditional yet very high tech. I never though I would love to sleep in traditional japanese bed but it was comfortable. The portable heater helped us survived the nights.
The stairs going up the rooms is a bit steep but my 3.5 yr old daughter managed to go up and down.
Free snacks and water in dispenser was provided.
Will definitely go back.

旁边就是浅水寺，晚上出来看夜景很美；早上起来参观最好，避免看到人挤人的现象。
周围很多吃的可以选择，有很多日本特色的商店，街道可以转。
很有特色的老建筑，里面翻新装修啦，设施非常完善，用起来很方便，房东还送免费的小吃、饮料和啤酒。

房東回覆非常的快速，房間也很乾淨漂亮，設備齊全，讓人覺得很貼心，價格又合理，溫馨又有像家的感覺。
東西掉了，房東也很快的聯絡並幫我寄過來，真的非常謝謝。

とても清潔で設備が充実した素敵な空間でした。
普段の生活を忘れて、ゆったりとリラックスして過ごすことができました！
ロケーションも駅からすぐで分かりやすく、観光エリアにも近くて便利でした。
またぜひ利用したいです(^-^)
ロケーションも建物もアメニティも最高に良いです！

Super comfy & well equiped house, you've got laptop, printer, suica card, monopod, snacks, fujifilm instax, bicycle, kotatsu, bathtub, and many more. Near station & sensoji temple. Very recommended to stay more than 1 night

Great space in a superb location, right by the Sensoji temple and near Asakusa station. Feel like a local yet close by train to the madness and quaintness of Tokyo. Yoshi San was helpful and ensured we had everything we needed and beyond.
I can highly recommend his place, thank you Yoshi San!
民宿很好找，地铁出来后走大概10分钟左右，离浅草寺超级近出行方便，一整栋小别墅感觉很棒哦，一楼是会客厅和㕏房，浴室，很干净，里面是应有尽有，二楼有二间睡房都是榻榻米，我们这次家人6位住里面很舒服，而且很有曰本当地的特色，但也不失现代化软装，这家民宿很值得推荐哦！下次去日本还会是第一选择。
Great spot. Very clean. As described

Yoshi’s place is fantastic! If you are in Tokyo and need a place to stay I️ highly recommend this place! You get the feel of authentic Japanese living. Yoshi is very responsive and hospitable. I️ definitely enjoyed my stay there, it’s also really close to the temple and a lot of food places.
地點位置好！走路2分鐘有便利超商！屋內物品應有盡有！非常推薦家庭旅遊入住！

Asakusa is a great part of Tokyo to stay in. There is so much to do nearby (the temple and markets, the Skytree) and it is a short trip to Akihabara for electronics. Yoshi’s house is very comfortable. There was plenty of room for our family of 5. We really enjoyed the kotatsu, all of the impressive gadgets and delicious snacks Yoshi provided.
I want to give Yoshi six stars if possible. Hands down, the best host I’ve ever met in my three-year Airbnb experience. Choose him and you won’t regret!
房子位置很好，紧邻浅草寺，周边的便利店餐厅也很方便。房子闹中取静，周围很安静。房间设施现代化，使用很方便舒适，物品一应俱全，做饭也很方便。房子卫生也很好，细节的地方也打扫的很认真。值得入住

Centrally located with lovely added touches like snacks and drinks, water cooler, magazines and guest books and a very well stocked kitchen. Yoshi was very helpful particularly with lost property. Thanks Yoshi!
保留很好日本文化的房子，离浅草寺很近，附近环境安静。吃饭的选择很多，购物也很方便！很适合一家人出行入住！

Yoshi’s place is amazing and in such a perfect location. Communication was fast and the easy. He helped me with any questions.
Thank you for being an amazing host.
非常非常推薦住在這裡 除了價錢非常棒地點環境房子整潔程度跟房東細心準備全部用品的程度都很值得讓人一住再住。
ดีทุกอย่าง ถ้ามาพักแถวนี้อีกเลือกที่นี่แน่นอนครับ
Stayed here with 7 mates, perfect for going out! Close too temples and stores to grab anything you need! Very nice location during the day but quiet at night! Walkable distance to train stations
房子非常好，非常干净卫生，Yoshi也很好，在冰箱和桌面上提供了许多小零食，非常贴心。应有的设备都很齐全。
Ubicaciion increible, la casa muy comoda. El lugar para estar en este en tokio
我們一家人都非常喜歡Yoshi的房子，入住的這兩天剛好是東京最寒冷的時候，原本擔心木造房子不能禦寒，但Yoshi的房子除了有很棒的科技設備，木造屋的保暖度也很足夠，客廳及兩個房間均有空調暖氣，另加3個電暖爐，非常的讚，這個房子給我們很大的驚喜，住得也舒適，我們有很棒的溫馨回憶，下回拜訪東京還是會優先選擇Yoshi的房子。
性價比非常高！高端設備！房東貼心之餘亦很快回覆。地理位置方便！旺中帶靜。
Yoshi 的房子非常棒，这是我到目前为止住过的最棒的民宿。无论生活、交通、房屋设施都是一流的，而且就在东京著名景点浅草寺旁。Yoshi两兄弟热情好客，赞。希望下次还有机会入住。
prima plaats om te verblijven, vlak achter de Sensoji tempel
住得非常舒適 房內科技也很棒
位置很方便很好找 空间很大 设施完善 东西齐全 适合家庭或者和好友出游入住
就在浅草寺附近，位置便利，设施完备先进，里面小细节贴心，值得入住。

The house has traditional Japanese touch in it combine with modern toilet and kitchen. i love it. besides than affordable, most important thing is the location of the house. it is 2 minutes walk to Sensoji temple and Nakamise Street. At the end of nakamise street there is subway train. Definitely going to stay here again if i'm visiting Asakusa.

Yoshi's place is very near Sensoji Temple. Train station is about 5-10 minutes. We enjoyed staying at Yoshi's place. Very family-friendly! When you book his place, Yoshi will give you a detailed instruction of things :) He is also very accommodating and easily reachable. We'll definetly come back to his place again.

this is really excellent！very convenience～very near the Metro station，the senso-ji temple is just walkby～we all like the house and thank Yoshi for his kindness～地理位置非常好，离浅草地铁站、浅草寺非常近，出行便利，周边美味的餐厅也很多～还有超市～房子全智能化，用起来很舒心，房东提供了很多便利的东西，非常注重细节，赞！
A great place to stay 😊

地理位置好
性价比高
推荐入住

there’s some miscommunication on the address. As I didn’t know the parking address and the house we stay is different.
Good that Yoshi is quick to response and we are able to locate the house. Other than that, the house is perfect. Location, cleanliness everything was good. Highly recommended! Would stay again if we were to visit Japan again! Thank you!
第二次入住，谢谢yoshi.非常好的人，入住体验依旧很完美，期待下次

I tilläg till vad andra har skrivit (vi instämmer i hyllningskören) uppskattade vi det oväntade lugnet i området. Kvällar, nätter och morgnar då endast fågelkvitter hördes. Otroligt, mitt i en storstad!
地點相當好，鄰近淺草寺，但是晚上不會受到干擾。活動空間足夠，我們六大兩小都算充裕。房東還貼心準備零食飲料及各種實用小物。房間設備也很新穎，使用上相當舒適。
传统外观却有超现代的家居设计和体验！特别喜欢现代实用的厨房，还有各种精美的茶具餐具。

Nous avons passé 12 jours chez Yoshi, en couple avec une adolescente, dans l'idée surtout de vivre au rythme du quartier d'Asakusa dont nous avions eu un aperçu lors d'un précédent voyage à Tokyo. Dans cette optique, l'appartement de Yoshi est idéalement situé, au coeur d'un quartier vivant et populaire, quasiment dans la zone du temple Senso-ji et en même temps, à proximité immédiate d'une artère animée et pleine de ressources. On ne s'est pas lassés du quartier, même en douze jours.
L'appartement est très grand par rapport aux normes japonaises. Chaque espace est confortable, chaleureux et fonctionnel: la cuisine, en particulier, est high-tech et passé les premiers moments d'apprivoisement guidé par le monitoring de Yoshi, vous y serez très à l'aise.
Yoshi est un hôte attentionné, réactif et discret en même temps.
Bref, nous recommandons complètement l'endroit.
非常贴心的房东，东西特别齐全可惜时间太赶不然是很想开火做饭了，期待下次旅行。
跟評價一樣好 無可挑剔
ที่พักดีมาก ใกล้แหล่งกินเที่ยว  เป็นกันเอง บริการยอดเยี่ยม
Strategic location, smart house system, comfortable airport pick up. It is perfect for family
The house is Well placed, near of everything (temples,shopping- street,park...) in a very quiet street. The host is  very reactiv and think about everything we could need. We felt lucky being here.
房东很贴心，房子设施特别好，住的环境很安静，性价比高
一行六人，四大两小，住得非常舒适，离浅草寺非常非常近，去其他地方地铁也很方便，下次来东京还选他家！
非常棒的住宿! 步行到淺草寺只要1分鐘，可以在不同時間看到不同樣貌的淺草寺，真的是非常美好的經驗。環境機能良好，附近有7-11、超市、各種餐廳、24小時藥妝店。房子內的設備也超齊全，有很多意外的驚喜，絕對不會讓你後悔。

Yoshi's place is a gem in the listing. Location is great, like 1 minute from the temple. Plenty of food and supermarket available around the location. Close to subway station as well.
As for the place itself, clean, modern, and everything is available (we were trying to find electric socket converter, only found in here. We couldn't find it even in big supermarket/department store). It looks new, and yet it managed to feel cozy and comfortable.
Definitely a must stay in Tokyo.
房东很热情，很耐心解答问题，而且还有接机服务，超棒!地理位置优越，房子整洁，楼上两个房间一个卫生间，楼下还有卫生间，挺适合家庭居住!离浅草寺超近，出入很方便

Excellent place to stay while visiting Japan. Yoshi was very helpful and answered my questions very quickly. We had a ride from the airport as well as our next destination in the large van he offered. This was very helpful. The home is very clean, and well maintained. The futons were also comfortable and we had good rest on them. We stayed in a few homes and his was definitely a favorite! We would definitely choose to stay there again. Thank you.
非常满意的住宿，下次去日本肯定还住这！
just a small house
首先我犯了个很二逼的错误，明明浅草寺就在旁边。我却绕了一大圈，退房后才发现，第二就是18号浅草大祭，而我却要回家了，T_T，离浅草寺真的很近很近。房主还精心准备了饮料和零食，还有电脑，因为带娃实在没时间写日记，真想在日记里和大家分享旅游的趣事。来年再来，希望自己能运气好还能订得到。
아사쿠사역과 가까운 점, 도보약8~10분정도로 좋았어요^^첫날 도착해서 짐만 풀고 바로 관광모드 가능해요 가미나라몬, 스카이트리야경~~식사는 인근슈퍼 마루에츠 걸어서 3~4분 혹은 인근 맛집이용가능!!!가족,어린이동반 최고 숙소^^
东京之行的最后一站，下次我要从第一天j开始就住你家！^_^^_^^_^^_^
房间干净整洁精致，位置优越

Excellent Airbnb home. The best I’ve stayed at! Yoshi and his family are perfect hosts. Everything was clean and well maintained. The location was wonderful. Close to everything, shopping, station, bus etc. The futon beds were comfortable and it was nice to have two bathrooms. The kitchen had all we needed and a drinking water tank was also supplied. The airport pickup was a great plus also. Thank you for a great stay!
非常满意，就在浅草寺旁边，吃好晚饭还能看看夜景，房子非常日式，设施又很现代化，主人热情又好客，准备的零食基本上被小朋友吃光了，下次来东京还会选择这里。

地理位置很好，离浅草寺特别近。
房间很干净，设施也很全，房东还给准备了零食和水。
去之前，房东会给发很详细的地址，有配图哦。
总之，很好很好啦。
2階の寝室も、1階のリビングも広々としてすごしやすかったです。布団も敷いてあり、お菓子のご用意もあり、大変快適でした。また、利用したいです。

位置方便、房間舒適、適合家庭入住！
房東人很好～
一間非常棒的民宿，房子舒適乾淨，設備科技現代化，房子距離車站很近，而且週邊不管是觀光飲食採購都可以步行在10分鐘內到達，這是一間CP值非常高的名宿
Great location by the temple! Quiet street, great hospitality, easy and quick communication at all times. Recommended!

We enjoyed staying at Yoshi’s Place.  Just steps from Sensoji temple . We used the airport pickup service that they offer for the 6 of us (very convenient with large suitcases). The house was very clean and it was so handy having 2 toilets instead of the standard 1 bathroom in many places in Japan. I would definitely stay here again! In fact on this last trip to Tokyo we actually stayed in 3 different AIRBNB and Yoshi’s was our favorite out of the 3.
超棒的民宿!!有一流的設施及很棒的住宿空間~廚房的廚具餐具應有盡有，寢室空間寬敞，我們2家一共3個大人與4個小孩，住的很舒適，自己下廚也很方便!很適合帶小孩來住喔~
Yoshi house is clean, complete amenities. But house too small for 6 people. Bedroom is on second floor with small lather so difficult for my child and my parents go to bedroom.

A great house with spacious living room and bed rooms. Quite suit for the family. The location is also convenient and good, not far from main station. Particularly Yoshi's response is quite fast with providing proper advice. It is a pleasant stay at Yoshi's house.
地理位置房间，环境整洁，优雅。下次来还会考虑。感谢房东提供的饮料，小零食。
浅草寺旁很幽静，距离地铁步行也不远，房内设施齐全，很现代化，房东准备了好多零食给我们。还把房间各类使用指南拍成视频放在电脑桌面，让我们第一次在外住宿有家的感觉，体验很棒，房东提供的锅碗餐具都很别致，看的出房东对生活的品质很高
位置非常好，干净，服务热情。为我们提供了超级贴心的服务。周边交通发达，购物方便。有一点，由于房子是两层，楼梯很陡，不太适合老年人上下楼。如果是年轻的家庭，推荐！

Had a great stay and wish we could have stayed longer. Lots of room and really useful information provided about the place itself and what is available close by for restaurants.
Thanks Yoshi!
和房东沟通，回复很及时。房子就在浅草寺旁边，地理位置还算不错，距离地铁站略有些路，10分钟左右。周围餐厅、药妆店都很多，生活购物比较方便的。通过房东定的包车服务，价格很实在。但是入住第一晚在一楼房间看到一只大蟑螂，略微有些影响心情。
房子寬敞舒適，設備齊全，地點佳，非常值得。
非常满意的民宿！地理位置好，出门2分钟就是浅草寺。房间内的设施一应俱全，布置得特别周到！推荐大家住！

外見は少し古いけど内装はキチンとできています。住みやすくて、省エネ化自動化設置されて、非常に便利です。
翌朝気がついて、浅草寺のすぐ隣でした。
バスの方が便利だと思います。
チャンスがあればまた利用したいです。
ありがとうございました。
From China Dalian
银座线浅草站出来后一直沿着小路走就到了，Yoshi还准备了零食和饮料，就在浅草寺旁边，五分钟可以走到Rox，我们买了毛豆，大米，鸡蛋煮了吃，很开心。原本预定的时候是5个人，后来临时加了两位朋友，房东也很好的帮我们增加了床铺，在我们入住前调好了空调，我们住的很舒适。
非常nice的房东！房子里的设施也很新很全

The host was very helpful and responsive before our arrival in Japan. Detailed instructions provided made checking-in a breeze.
The house is of exceptionally great location, where both the supermarket/convenience store are within 4 minutes on foot. The famous tourist spot Sensō-ji is literally right next to the house, but the neighborhood in which it's located is very quiet after dark, so no worries about the hustle and bustle from the crowds. The place is also spacious enough to make the stay of our group of 8 comfortable.
There isn't anything you need that can possibly not be found in the house. From the basics (towels, mattresses...) to the details (water dispenser, luggage scale...), the host has provided everything that made our stay even more wonderful. In fact, you'll be greeted by a lovely surprise when you first enter the house :)
I'll definitely stay here if I get the chance to visit Asakusa again!
設備乾淨且齊全，很棒的住宿體驗，以後有機會再來淺草也會想再住ㄓㄜㄅ這邊！
很好的房子，离浅草寺很近。房东准备了免费的零食和饮料，很贴心。强烈推荐。
从浅草地铁站8号口出来，跟着谷歌地图走，两旁是高楼大厦，正嘀咕哪有两层小楼，然后一个左拐，竟然就看到了几个小楼，按房东发的照片指示，认出了黑墙红门的家，这个位置真是好，动中带静。附近吃饭很方便，也有两家便利店，家一出来就是自助饮料机，超方便。家里的各种设备很齐全，又很现代化，干净整洁，我们6个人住得很开心，很满意！问孩子在日本4处民宿最喜欢哪个，都说最喜欢这家，因为有零食和饮料，哈哈。
這是一間適合家庭和朋友一起入住的房間，裡面可以自己煮飯、洗衣服，設備應有盡有，很像自己的家，交通也很便利，要轉什麼地鐵線皆能到達，晚上回家還能ㄒㄧ欣賞到晴空塔的美景！非常棒喔
四大四小住很剛好 浴室設施先進 推薦大家來淺草時體驗哦

家の中の設備が最新でとてもびっくりビックリしました！
アメニティーも全て揃っていて、しゅく宿泊した全員が「また泊まりたい！」と喜んでいました。
不明な点を問い合わせするとじんそく迅速に対応していただきとてもたす助かりました。ありがとうございました。
房屋位置好，离浅草寺很近，可以晚上去逛，吃饭也很方便。房间布局合理，设施齐全，干净整洁。

Yoshi's house is very convenient and so lovely. it is very close to the asakusa temple,and easy to walking around for shopping and some senic viewing. more importantly, this house is really clean, functional and attractive. my family and me have a very impressive night at here. we will revisit here next time for longer durarion.

Excelent location. 2 mins from a major temple, 5 mins from a local shoping district with lots of great food options and accces to the tokyo metro system.
He lent us subway cards which meant all we had to do was recharge them to get around tokyo.
The house seems small but has all you need after a day of touring tokyo.
Best Airbnb so far

Yoshi’s place was clean and tidy. He’s was very responsive thru Airbnb and helped organise shuttles -which made it easier especially when travelling in big groups.
Thanks Yoshi!

An excellent location that is close to many places for food and groceries and easy access to the Ginza line for touring tokyo. He even let us borrow his Suica cards over the 7 days we went to other places in japan which made our travel much easier.  An excellent for option for families or small groups.
房子很乾淨,床很舒服躺下一下子就入睡了,可以去拍淺草寺的夜景,真是一個很好的地點跟房子,下次有機會去東京一定會再去入住.
非常棒，是我住过日本最棒的一次民宿体验
The place very strategic, clean and fast respond. Unique, automation house. Very recommended.
立地条件もよく、キッチンやお風呂、トイレは最新の設備で、インターネット環境もあり、家族でゆっくり過ごせました。ありがとうございました。
地理位置很好，就在浅草寺附近，房租装修也很好，房东很贴心，强烈推荐。
We had an AWESOME stay at Yoshi’s. My group couldn’t stop raving about our Airbnb! Yoshi provided drinks and snacks, and a cozy welcoming home. Steps away from Sensoji Temple, this spot is a must!

Yoshi's thoughtfully renovated house very close to Senso-ji had hands-down the best facilities of any airbnb I've stayed at before. We were two families with children ranging from 3 to 15 years and were blown away by the useful things like the computer, printer, handheld vacuums, robot vacuum cleaner, mechanised drop down cabinets, washing machine, bicycle, and washlets (on both floors!). The snacks and drinks were most welcome, and the ample supply of towels was fantastic. Communication was excellent and Yoshi provided a spreadsheet on where to eat and shop. Recommended for a comfortable, well situated stay in old Tokyo. The nearest subway was Asakusa (Ginza line) 7 minutes walk and Asakusa (Asakusa line) 10 minutes walk. Lots of convenience stores, drug stores, cafes, shops and restaurants around. Ekimise department store is above the subway station and there are a few laundromats (for quick clothes drying - 5 minutes walk away).
The house was clean, comfortable and high tech. Only took 2 mins walk to Asakusa Temple, definitely this will be my 1st choice when I visit to Japan

I strongly recommend staying at Yoshi's house in Asakusa when you come to Tokyo. He is the best host I ever experienced - attentive in respinse, thoughtful and invisible - and his house is conveniently located near sight seeing area, metro and train station and many good restaurants - I would like you to experience such good trip I had with my hubby and teen-age daughter.

Yoshi is the perfect host and his home is just as amazing!
He’s thought of everything to make your stay as comfortable as possible. Snacks and drinks on arrival, toiletries, pocket wifi, rail cards etc
Communication was excellent and the home is in the perfect location.
We’re really sad we didn’t stay longer.
Thanks Yoshi!
ステキなお家でした。家がとてもハイテクで使いやすかったです！
Yoshi's place is perfectly located near Asakusa in close proximity to many other attractions as well. Place is big and clean. We really enjoyed our stay. Thank you!

去东京多人旅游，这栋房子真的可以作为首选，理由如下:
1.独栋别墅保证你的休息质量
2.地理位置不错，在浅草寺周围，去浅草站步行几分钟就到，711隔着一个路口就到
3.房间卫生很好，很好，很好，理科生辞穷不知道如何形容，但真的让你住的很舒服放心
4.价格对比同区域其他家简直良心
除了这些基本的，还要说说房东对待民宿的态度
yoshi对待民宿的认真态度即使见不到本人你也能感受到。进门后桌上是小零食，冰箱里有饮料，surface电脑里有房间的各种指南视频，墙上有多语告示。为了房客出行方便甚至有西瓜卡，免去了办理的费用。桌上还有四本手帐，架子上挂着拍立得，你能看到来自各地的房客在手帐上留下的照片和好评。当时我们一堆邋遢的学生都觉得，要尽力在走之前整理好房子😂(虽然还是留下了几个垃圾袋，对不起yoshi)
总之这家民宿很值得入住，很值得，我下次去c98肯定还住这赶首班车😂

非常满意的一次住宿体验
从浅草站出来走几分钟就可以抵达Yoshi 的房子，入住非常方便
入住体验方面，Yoshi 提供的住宿服务非常棒，这是一间结合了传统日式榻榻米卧室和其他现代化设施的优秀民宿，厨房，洗手间设备都很现代化，完美满足了我们所有预期，此外Yoshi在服务细节上为客人考虑得非常周到，我们很晚才抵达民宿，一进房间就看到他准备的免费零食饮料，看到在冰箱白板上写给我们的欢迎词，令我们旅途的疲惫一扫而空，而且当我晚上准备为电子设备充电时，发现他在书桌上准备了满满一盒各式充电线，Yoshi还准备了一些旅行相关的杂志，感觉他提前为客人考虑好了所有的一切。
位置方面，这间民宿距离浅草寺非常近，走路1分钟就到了，如果你的旅途中包括浅草寺，那么住在这里的话，选择任何一个早晨或是晚上的碎片时间就足够了，去其他地方的话，主要在浅草站坐地铁，此外东京水上观光巴士的码头就在浅草站旁边，坐游船去台场也很方便。
购物方面，民宿边上有便利店和药妆店，以及浅草寺门口的仲见世商店街，但我们把购物活动安排在旅途最后，因此没有在此购物。
唯一一处不足的地方，是我在入住的第一天夜里被消防车警笛吵醒了，原来附近有个消防局，睡眠浅的人或许需要注意
总之，这间民宿设施便利，服务贴心，位置方便，因此强烈推荐。

Yoshi家的房子位置超级好！紧邻浅草寺，步行一两百米就可以到达主寺庙，犹如住在核心景区内一样。安静又便利，周围有便利店，“仲见世”商业街，24小时营业的筑地市场浅草分店，三餐夜宵都可以很方便的找到选项。房间是现代风格，两层楼，上层两间卧室，可以铺很多榻榻米，下层是干湿分离的洗浴和厨房、饭厅客厅。第一次睡日本榻榻米，睡的竟然很好，不觉得很硬，干净舒服。楼梯有点陡峭窄，有扶手，年轻人没有问题，较大年纪的老年人慎选，可能不太方便。留下的浴室很舒服，就是热水控制器不熟悉，原来是在墙上的白色控制板，用以调节温度，花洒上也有控制小开关，和国内操作不同，第一晚研究了老半天；）浅草这一片很有意思，保留着日本江户时代以前的感觉，平民美食和景色都很棒，推荐。对了，Yoshi回复非常迅速，赞！
房子位置非常好，几步就到浅草寺，到地铁站也非常近，浅草站边上就是游轮码头。周边饭店林立，有很多特色店，值得逛逛。周边也有西友超市，里面东西又全又便宜。内部设施也非常好，全自动马桶，智能水龙头，有纯净水，还有免费移动WiFi，出门随身带着，也准备了八张SUICA卡，到地铁站直接充值就可以用了。唯一不足就是推拉门声音有点大，睡眠不好的人容易被吵醒

寝室やお風呂場やキッチンなど全てがきれいで使いやすかったです。布団がセットされてあったり、コタツが暖かくてとても快適でした。なにより、冷蔵庫の中に人数分のペットボトルが入っていたり、無料の飲料水があったりと、なにも不自由なく生活できました。立地も、目の前に浅草寺があるほど近くて観光に便利でした。なにより、チェキが置いてあったり、宿泊者のメッセージが書いてあるアルバムがあるなど、とても暖かくて優しい雰囲気のお家でとても幸せでした。Yoshiさんの返信も早く、スムーズに連絡を取り合ったり、不明点などを解決することもできました。とても素敵で最高の宿泊でした！
清潔感抜群で素晴らしいです！

昔ながらの日本家屋を改装してある趣きのある一軒家でした。

I stayed for one month with my wife and one-year-old-daughter. This is an excellent place which would make your Tokyo stay much comfortable. I'd like to recommend this place especially for families as it has a sufficient space even for 4-5 people. Also you can easily connect to some popular places in Asakusa area by foot.
備品は洗剤やシャンプーなどは全て揃っております食器や調理器具も揃っていました。部屋も綺麗で、布団も清潔でした。お風呂も大きくてレストランも近くにあり、長期滞在に向いています。
Clean space in a convenient location. :)

Perfect location right behind Senso-ji temple at the heart of historic Asakusa area where traditional friendly, cozy old Tokyo spirit and atmosphere resides. Amenity of the house is more than perfect. You can enjoy the Japanese style bath tub, Futon style bed and a comfortable "Kotatsu" table which keeps you warm during winter times. Needless to say, equipped with the High-tech bathrooms and washing machines. The 2 floor space is probably much larger than most of the hotels or Minshuku in the similar price range. The house is within 10 minute reach by walk to any corner of the town,  20 minute walk to Tokyo Skytree tower which you can see from anywhere in the town. Within the range,  almost any kind of Japanese cuisine are available at the highest level. And there is a convenience store in a one minute walking distance, a "must have" for Japanese city life. For those who like running, I would recommend to jog down the Sumida river with the view of both old and modern Tokyo.  I strongly recommend this place.

Well equipped house with lots of choice in nearby eating places. A convenience store, a super market, and a pharmacy in a few minutes' walk. Only thing you could miss is a view from windows, but you can enjoy the lighted up view of Sensoji temple in a minute's walk instead!

2週間お世話になりました。
リフォームされておりお部屋はとても綺麗で、最新家電がそろっています。
キッチンもとても使いやすかったです。
あと子供用にベビーチェアを用意してくださりとても助かりました。
夫はデスクワークする用の椅子が座り心地が良く気に入ったようです。
オーナーさんはいつもレスポンスがとても早く、迅速に対応してくれます。
2週間とても快適に過ごすことができました。

とても快適でした。チェックアウト後別の宿泊施設を予約していましたが、居心地が良すぎて、予定を変更してこちらに延泊してしまいました。
リピート利用です。チェックアウトまでとてもスムーズに対応していただきました。
リピート利用です。急なリクエストにも迅速かつ柔軟に対応していただき、今回も非常に快適な滞在でした。
超出想象的惊喜，无论是位置还是设施都不是一般的便利

完美。本来是为了三天隔离租的这里，结果来日本前隔离政策取消了，但还是很馋浅草大别墅，就没退租。只能说很高兴没退且完全没住够。倒时差每天五点起床，出门去隔壁空无一人的浅草寺遛个弯，回来在巨大的厨房给自己做个早餐，上楼睡个回笼觉，再起床去附近琳琅满目的网红甜品店挑个果子回家边看电视边吃。晚上去隔壁街找个酒馆喝两杯。
室内设施，但凡你能想到的房子都有，而且都是最好的。不得不说的几样：
微波炉和电灶台：过于给力，奶放进微波炉加热不到一分钟就沸腾了…电灶台焯个菜结果不到半分钟水就沸腾了…你敢信。
洗衣机：不用自己放洗衣液柔顺剂，直接衣服放进去按两个按钮，洗衣烘干一条龙。而且烘干得太给力，我在英国一直洗不好的羽绒服到这里直接洗回了刚买时蓬松的状态(´▽｀)
洗发水和护发素：真的很好用。本来专门从英国带了一直用的卡诗的洗发水护发素，结果第一天行李出问题了没到，就用了房东准备的，结果洗完超柔顺，后来卡诗到了还是在用房东的(≧∇≦)
餐具：数量庞大种类丰富且颜值极高，一瞬间以为房东是做瓷器生意的
太多了写不动了_(´ཀ`」 ∠)_还有就是超级干净，不知道这么大的房子是怎么能收拾成这样的，然后也不知道这么好的设施这么好的位置租这个价钱房东是怎么挣钱的…
最后最重要的是房东回信速度真的很快，有什么问题随时联络不用担心

ほんとうに細部までよく行き届いているお宿で、立地も完璧でした。ぜひまたあそこに泊まりたい！と思える内容で大満足です。数年の間一時帰国できていなかった我が家にとっては感動の連続でした。ホストさんの心遣いに感謝です。
ありがとうございました！
Super excellent service as always!

Maison à 2 pas du temple d'Asakusa.
Localisation super, et Yoshi est un hôte aux petit soins. Tout l'équipement nécessaire est là, rien ne manque! Un grand merci Yoshi san!
滞在に必要な食器のみならず、冷水器、ポケットWIFI、各種ケーブルもろもろ、細かい心遣いが素晴らしかったです。部屋も一軒家で広くて清潔で居心地がとてもよかったです。
ありがとうございました
Amazing place, and location. I recommend this to anyone looking to have an amazing vacation.

First of all I would like to thank the host who was so very helpful when I had a medical emergency, it was my first solo trip and I think I really would've struggled without their help. On this note, they are very quick with resonses on the airbnb app but no one ever came to the apartment to check on me or do anything in the apartment. They are not involved at all with you during your stay. For some people this might be a plus but it might bother some so I thought I would include it.
This airbnb is in such an amazing location, being so close to Sensoji temple, Skytree and having very easy access to the Ginza line which I used daily. There is a 7/11 2 mins walk away from the apartment and a couple good supermarkets close by, Life for example was less than 10 mins walk away. I would say the only downside to the location is being by quite a busy main road so you hear a lot of sirens and sometimes at weekends you can hear some cars driving very fast along these roads. However it's not that bad that it prevented me from sleeping.
The apartment was very clean on arrival, plenty of fresh towels in the bathroom and extra toilet roll. There was also a vaccum cleaner and a floor swiffer so cleaning up after yourself is very easy if you're staying long term. There were plent of glasses in the kitchen, coffee/tea mugs, plates and bowls, pans to cook with, chopsticks and forks and spoons. There was however only one knife to eat with. Also in the kitchen there were ziplock bags and clingfilm plastic for convience while cooking. I found the induction stove top easy enough to use. The other big plus for me was the water cooler in the kitchen however no one ever came to replace the water inside. Also there were no snacks or drinks provided for me when I arrived.
The bathroom was spotless and the water always came out hot and at a good pressure. The bath was amazing to soak in after a long day of wandering around. There are some free bath salts in the bathroom for you to try. The hairdryers provided work very well, with one having a turbo speed option. The washing machine was also a dryer so be careful when washing delicate things or things that could shrink, you might be better off washing them by hand.
The bedrooms were fine, nothing amazing to say but the futons were very comfortable. I was staying here alone so was able to sleep with as many quilts as I wanted but it did get quite cold at night in late october. I'm unsure if the host had provided extra blankets in the cupboards.
Please be aware that the stairs are very steep, I almost fell a handful of times. If you have heavy suitcases I would recommend unpacking downstairs.
Overall I would recommend this apartment. It was clean and comfortable and in a fantastic location. There were only a few negatives and they didn't come close to outweighing the positives.
Thank you Yoshi!
非常棒的一次入住体验。民宿位置极佳，交通便利。房东很热情。有求必应。民宿内装修硬件佷现代化。科技感很强。非常适合年轻人使用。值得大力推荐。下次来东京还会选择这家民宿。
Double storey house near Asakusa Senso-ji, just few minute walk to there, old house but with modern house equiment impressed me.
Great experience
Quiet neighbourhood, convenient, and clean. Great place to stay in!

My family loved Yoshi’s Airbnb. It was exactly as described, in a fantastic location close to the sights, cafes and shopping of Asakusa. The house was big enough for our family of 6, and was very high tech (we loved the contactless kitchen faucet). The house was spotless and the bedding was comfortable. We would have liked having a few more pillows, and also some instant coffee and teabags. But those are minor suggestions - we had an excellent stay and would stay here again very happily.
位置很好，最喜欢房子包括入住和离开两次用车，一家7口感觉很方便，可能是不习惯走路，孩子觉得出入地铁有点累，其他各方面都很好，很多提供的物品都是我没想到但需要的，有拎包入住的感觉！太棒了！
快適に滞在できました。

Great place to stay! The location was fabulous and allowed for early morning and late evening strolls through the temple grounds. Enjoyed the kontatsu table and the large bathtub. Free transfer to the airport was much appreciated.

我们一行五人是兔年春节的初三入住，住了四晚。感觉良好，度过了温暖愉快的春节。
民宿的二楼榻榻米房间，宽敞名亮，卧具非常的整洁，除了空调机外，还配有红外电热器，房间温暖舒适。一、二楼各有一个厕所，均有自动感应冲洗功能。

民宿主人，有问题及时回复，谢谢为我们房客所作的一切。

Yoshi’s apartment is very well furnished. He is also very responsive and helpful. Especially when I needed transportation, he tried his best to arrange it for us. The apartment is very close to Sensoji Temple and we could enjoy a peaceful walk in the morning/ evening when the crowd is down. Walk to Sumida Park is also nearby and pleasant. Great location, place and hospitality overall!
十分推荐这家民宿。地理位置得天独厚，离浅草寺一墙之隔。周围吃喝玩乐都很齐全。房子很干净，房东很细心，细节都照顾的很好。回复消息的速度也非常快。下次会再来。

My family and I had a wonderful stay at Yoshi's. The house was clean, great proximity to the temple and restaurants. We had an issue with the water heater and Yoshi responded and resolved our issue right away.
Thank you so much for letting us stay at your beautiful home.
Loved the place. Would stay there again in a heartbeat. Was nice to be in a traditional Japanese home rather than a hotel.
Great location. Everything was very comfortable.
A beautiful location next to Senso-ji temple. The space is clean and functional. Yoshi was the most responsive and hospitable host we’ve experienced. Would definitely stay again.

ขอบคุณโยชิที่เตรียมที่พักที่ดีมากๆสำหรับคณะเรา บ้านพักอยู่ข้างวัดเซ็นโซจิเลย เดินเพียงไม่กี่ก้าว ใกล้กับแหล่ง shopping และแหล่งท่องเที่ยวมาก  ห่างจากสถานีรถไฟอาซาคุสะประมาณ600เมตร บ้านสะอาดมากและมีอุปกรณ์อำนวยความสะดวกครบครัน ชอบมากที่มีอ่างอาบน้ำ เดินกลับมาเหนื่อยๆสามารถแช่น้ำร้อน ลดอาการเมื่อยล้าได้ดี โยชิตอบคำถามอย่างรวดเร็ว โดยเฉพาะวันกลับมีบริการรถตู้ส่งที่สนามบินด้วย สุดยอดมาก

Location next to Asakusa Sensoji is just amazing. The area quiets down in the evening, so it is easy to get rest. The host has given a lot of thought to what a traveler might need, the house is extremely well equipped. Everything is so clean. Will try to book this place on my next trip.

Yoshi is a great host. He was helpful with his recommendations and setting up transportation to the airport. Location was great, everything we needed was in short walking distance. It was nice to experience staying in a traditional Japanese home.

The futons were very clean, and there was lots of extra bedding, which we appreciated as our American spines had a difficult time adjusting to sleeping on the floor! Our family of 5 active adults loved staying here and we thank you Yoshi for being such a responsive and helpful host.

Great place to stay. Everything is as described and beyond our expectations. As a family, we feel like home in the place. Convenient location as well. Yoshi is great host indeed, always responsive and helpful. Will definitely stay here again in the future.

I love staying at Yoshi’s location - as he’s easily my favorite host on Airbnb. Not only are his listing pristine, and close to so many things to do, his communication is incredible.

yoshi's place is very near to sensoji temple, it is around 3 minutes walk
yoshi is very helpful and humble person also kind
i hope i can come back again later when i visit tokyo
excellent place with a good amount of space. Yoshi and his wife were super responsive and easy to talk to. area is next to senso-ji but without the noise. walkable to everything.
The best Airbnb in Tokyo - hands down.
Comfortable and an extremely good location!

Yoshi was a fantastic host, always very responsive and answered all of my questions in a timely manner. The accommodation had everything our family of 8 needed and more. Would definitely come back again!
4명 가족이 지내기에 좋은 숙소입니다. 도보로 10분 걸리는 지하철이 있습니다. 근처 24시간 돈키호테가 있어 편리했으며 늦게까지 영업하는 식당이 있어 좋았습니다. 센소지 바로 옆이지만 매우 조용한 숙소입니다.

extremely great find. place is very central next to sensoji temple. Yoshi is very helpful, respond within minutes. the house is extremely lovely. very functional with everything you need and clean!
thanks for hosting us Yoshi. all the best!

Family of 5. This is located right behind Sensoji temple and so close to restaurants, market, shops. The house is a little older in style but the amenities are new and great. Yoshi was great and also made use of the airport transfer which was fast and hassle free.

What a find! Yoshi’s place is right next to Sensō-ji Temple. We love Asakusa and the location couldn’t be better. There is a 7-11 around the corner, and we loaded up on all sorts of goodies. Great overall experience. どうもありがとうございます！

A lot has been said about Yoshi's wonderful place so I would just like to thank Yoshi for his fast response and flexibility as well as helping to arrange our transportation needs.
1 thing about staying in a vintage house like this in Japan is that the stairs can be a challenge if you have big luggage so we left them in the 1st floor instead.
The Asakusa area is busy in the day and peaceful at night. If you are planning to visit Sensoji Temple early, you probably can't stay any nearer! Would highly recommend for people who are looking for an authentic experience and not seeking the night life.
The location is fantastic - literally next to Asakusa shrine, which is one of the hot places in Tokyo. The place is exactly as described by Yoshi, and Yoshi is very responsive. Highly recommended.

This was my family’s second time staying at this Airbnb and we loved it even more. I love the location - the proximity to Sensoji Temple and the shopping around Asakusa, as well as the subway stations. The house is exactly as described and the bedding was comfortable and warm. The kitchen was pristine and squeaky clean and very well appointed. We also loved the large washing machine-cum-dryer, which washed and dried our clothes in 5+ hours. We also liked the small touches such as the Instax camera, the Suica cards, the wifi dongle, and the charging cables. I look forward to coming back soon!
Great!

Fantastic location, lots of good restaurants, shopping, and sightseeing in walking distance. Senso-ji temple is SO close, it was great to be here to experience the New Year and so many people visiting the temple at that time.
It easily accommodated our family of 6.
I would definitely return to this location on future trips to Tokyo.
Great Location and awesome host. Highly recommend.

We loved staying at Yoshi’s place with our family of 5 (with one infant). It was the perfect location, with plenty of space. Thoughtful amenities with everything you’d need. The location was peaceful and quiet yet very walkable to all the restaurants and popular spots. Yoshi was a super responsive host, and we also used the airport transfer service he referred us to. Really helpful all around and would definitely come back!
We had a great stay at Yoshi’s place!Highly recommended!

Yoshi一家的民宿位于东京最具江户风情的浅草区，如果你想体验传统与现代的交融，那么就选这个区吧。他们的民宿非常干净整洁，各项设施齐全，家电都非常的高科技。民宿距离东京的标志之一浅草寺很近，浅草寺附近有很长的商店街（最好不要去那边的药妆店买东西，容易被乱推销）。民宿距离非旅游的商业区也很近。
Yoshi先生提供的包车接送服务非常方便，我临时提前一天询问他能否提供包车到火车站的服务，他也帮我们迅速联系了车，让我们能带着大量行李轻松乘车。我真的很喜欢地热和暖炉，房子的浴室和厕所在冬天最冷的月份很暖和。期待将来能再次入住！
如果可以的话，我想稍微提点小意见：1.我没有找到适合给幼儿用的塑料或硅胶碗碟，因为我怕孩子打碎他们的瓷器碗碟。2.高科技的洗衣、洗浴用具没有提供说明书，年轻人比较容易明白怎么操作，但是对于老年人来说，就比较难。

屋主友善，回應迅速，像回到家一樣的住宿體驗，一應俱全，全淺草第一的住所！
在這裡對屋主說一聲 對不起，給了太多麻煩給你，你是最好的！
特别卫生，设施也非常方便
距離淺草寺相當近，物品很齊全應有盡有，總是能滿足我們的需求，服務好
非常好的地段，设施和服务，房东人也很好，房屋有家的温馨，会推荐给朋友。
Logement très propre et bien placé

生活機能便利、步行就能玩完淺草寺周圍景點，是個很棒的住宿體驗。

The house was clean and nice. Yoshi was very friendly and helped to arrange transport for us to pick us up from Disneyland hotel to the apartment and later on sent us to Narita airport at a reasonable rate. House was fully equipped with enough towels and amenities. Yoshi also provided Suica cards which we could use. Ground floor had floor heater which was nice when the weather turned cold. Yoshi was also very responsive.
The place is also next to asakusa sharing with lots of places to eat and shop. Train station was about 10mins walk away.
Thanks for the great stay!
Yoshis home was literally 50 steps from Sensōji. Great location in Asakusa. His home was clean and had all the things needed for a comfortable stay.

great location, close to Asakusa station, efficient communication, very clean, comfy beds, kotasu was a gem, all amenities you will need and more.

Nice place

I have to say that Yoshi's Taito City property was one of the best properties I've stayed in. Yoshi thought of EVERY possible need or accommodation we might need, and his thoughtfulness really came in handy. From the portable WiFi, to the water dispenser, to the portable heaters and heated floors for chillier nights, to the disposable masks for public transit, and the local taxi recommendation to Narita Airport - I was so incredibly impressed. He even had extra charging cables/ports for us to borrow. The level of detail, thoughtfulness, and care to ensure that we had a comfortable and pleasant stay was so impressive. It was also a spacious property that comfortably fit our family of 5 adults. The location was an ideal combination of close by bus/metro stops but tucked away so that we had quiet evenings. I can't wait to return to Tokyo and stay at Yoshi's place again!
Great place. very walkable and 8 min to subway.  The only thing is the stairs are steep and narrow.  I would stay here again

It's an old 2-story house, fully renovated in modern style.  Two bedrooms upstairs, and kitchen/dining/living downstairs.  Wonderful location, literally across the street from Asakusa Shrine.  We had to transfer to another Tokyo location at the end of our stay, and were able to leave our luggage with the host who transferred it to our next location for us!  Very convenient and much obliged!

Lately, I have been reading some questionable Airbnb feedback on different media sites, where the client has been disappointed in their accommodation because it didn't match the photos or description of the advertised place. You can add us to the +500 of FIVE STARS because it was the best place! I loved the temples nearby and centrality of the home. Easy to find. Easy to operate. Easy to keep clean. Thank you, Yoshi! We are already saving to return to Japan.

Charming traditional house with all the modern conveniences. Love the washer/dryer, dishwasher, etc. It really felt like home away from home.
Yoshi was super responsive and helpful.
Was the best airbnb stay out of 5, during my 1 month stay in Japan. So definitely deserved 5 stars or more!
Thank you, Yoshi for keeping our luggage before check in too. Appreciate your value-added service.

this place is amazing and very fancy.Every thing that you need is there already. we wish we could've stay longer. alot of things to do. Yoshi's was so nice and very patient with me. I'm really grateful.
a very quiet house just a few meters away from the hustle and bustle of Asakusa. incredibly well located and comfortable.
This was a beautiful home in a perfect location and Yoshi was super helpful throughout our trip.
我和朋友六个人入住，房子很有家的感觉，厨房有房东收藏的餐盘杯子都非常好看！整个房屋都非常干净，且提供的用品都非常好，可惜我就住了两天因为要赶回上海，但也很庆幸我抢到了两日入住机会（毕竟五一节假日）. 如果有机会还会继续入住的！

Yoshi’s place in Asakusa is unique and excellent option for a quiet and private stay. The neighborhood is amazing and there a lots to do. Easy access to to both Narita and Haneda airports and other attractions by transit.

This is an excellent spot! It is close to the shrine and there is so much to do. If you do not want to stay by all of the craziness of Shibuya and Shinjuku but want to still have lots of restaurants and shops to go to, Asakusa is a great location.

Thank you, Yoshi!
Excellent stay!  Perfect location, super clean, attentive host.

Yoshi was a fantastic host! He was very responsive and friendly. The location was great—very quiet and peaceful, but also within walking distance to fun, bustling areas. The beds were very comfortable, too!

Wow! Yoshi went above and beyond to make our stay amazing! First, we did not realize how prime this location was, literally down the street from one of the must see temples in Tokyo! Second, Yoshi’s place had little amenities no other place had provided for us in Japan, including pocket wifi! Finally, Yoshi was extremely responsive and allowed us to keep our bags at the house both before and after our stay! Also, place was extremely clean and comfortable! Highly recommend!
Great place for exploring Asakusa. Many shops and restaurants nearby, and the train station is not far at all. Cozy place - traditional feel but modern appliances.

Yoshi's place was a delightful find for our Tokyo adventure. It's incredibly close to Sensoji Temple, which allowed us to visit this iconic spot with ease. Yoshi was super responsive, answering all our questions quickly and even offering a much-appreciated airport pick-up service. The only minor inconvenience was the 15-20 minute walk from Asakusa Station, but it was a small trade-off for the quality of our stay.
On our departure, we had the pleasure of meeting Yoshi in person. Despite checking out a bit late, Yoshi was incredibly friendly and understanding.
Overall, our experience was fantastic, and I'd recommend Yoshi's place to anyone looking for a comfortable and convenient stay in Tokyo.

Wow! What a nice house. Very cozy and fully equipped. In the pleasant Asakusa district, around the corner from Sensõ-Ji. Fast subway connections to all other sights in Tokyo. Yoshi is very helpful. We highly recommend a stay.

房间宽敞，卫生。遗漏了水杯房东帮我寄给日本的朋友，谢谢！

Our stay at Yoshi’s home is exactly what Airbnb is about! Cannot recommend Yoshi’s and his home enough - book it before someone else does!

Best Airbnb I have ever stayed at. Close to Asakusa temples. Yoshi is very responsive and the shuttle service was amazing. I will definitely be staying here again.
感觉还不错，挺方便的，就在浅草寺后面，就是卧室就只有两间房，浴室只有一间，就感觉不太方便

The house is only 8 min from subway. Restaurants, shops and famous sights are in short walking distance. Good to be reached from Haneda and Tokio Train Station. I would highly recommend this place and  yoshi.  Yoshi was extremely friendly and always responsive.  We had issue with our flight and yoshi immediately helped us to change the reservation to start from the next day.  yoshi was also providing two free strollers for my kids. Yoshi’s place was exactly as described. Very next to Sensoji temple. Viewing temple early morning and night (with no crowd) was pretty easy. place was very clean. Place is a bit of walk from Asakusa station but was not a problem for us. I would definitely stay at this place for my next visit.
How great the house condition was! Yoshi was also very responsive and provided clear guide. Will definitely recommmend.

전형적인 일본 도시형 소형 주택같습니다.

Great location, a stone's throw away from the famous Senso-ji temple. Very walkable to Skytree and the Tokyo metro. Convenience stores and a smaller supermarket within 2 blocks. Very clean inside and with a well stocked kitchen, which we appreciated as we had to cook most of our meals. Plenty of linens and 2 bathrooms were helpful for our family of 6. The host was very responsive to our questions and helped us arrange transport from the airport and to the Shinkansen station. Overall fantastic place to stay and a lovely central home to come home to (and enjoy a nice soak in the tub) at the end of a day out sightseeing.
谢谢Yoshi给我们提供了这么完美的房子！

Great little Airbnb. Fantastic location - and spotlessly clean. We loved staying here! Yoshi was an excellent host. We’d recommend this option highly.

1 min walk to Senso-ji temple, 2 min walk to 7-eleven, 6 min walk to Tokyo metro Asakusa station, and 30-min walk to Tokyo Skytree.

Excellent location and a fantastic place. Highly recommend

Yoshi’s place was in such an amazing location right next to Senso-ji. Being able to walk to the temple at anytime especially night time really made the trip magical. Yoshi's place was so amazing we ended up booking it again. With our little toddler having the space and full kitchen was a must for us. She even had high chair that we were able to borrow. The place was super clean and the location was amazing right next to Senso-ji Temple. I would come back here in a heart beat.
Really enjoyed our stay here and would recommend to anyone traveling to Japan with 3 or more guests. We had a rental car so had to rely on paid parking but there was plenty near by.
clean house and responsive host. great !!!

Amazing, near Senji - loved it. One thing, taxis cannot find the place.

Yoshi is helpful and responsive. He helps us with airport transfer and kept our luggage when we travelled out of tokyo. His house is convenient to shopping area,food and convenient store. Yoshi’s place was perfect for our family of seven. Its location, just steps from Sensoji, made it convenient to access everything we needed in Asakusa. Yoshi's place was excellent for our group of 8 pax. We really love Yoshi’s place. Sensoji temple is right by the backyard and it was always a beautiful walk going home. Yoshi san is very responsive and help us alot in arranging our private rental car for our trip to Mt Fuji and Shirakawago. His place is very cozy and only in front of the door already Sensoji Temple, we can go everyday. Its very recommended location.

This is my 2nd visit for Yoshi-san listed house. As usual, it gives me surprises with so many amenities, facilities, tools which basically ease and facilite our 8-person trip so well. First choice for me next year Japan trip

What a gem - so glad that we chose Yoshi-san’s house for our stay in Asakusa. The house is quite big for Japan, plenty of room to stretch. On top of the house itself, Yoshi-San provides many services that are SO useful. He organised transport for us from the airport to the house directly, and organised for our luggage to be transferred to our next location as well. He is very responsive and helpful.

Excellent accommodation, close to restaurants, dessert , tourist attractions such as Sensoji, Matsuchiyama Shoden .Host has shuttle bus, tours, tourist attractions services ,easy to contact.
It was a pity that I had only one night stay at Yoshi-san's beautiful house. It was well stocked of all essential items and very welcoming. It was close to the metro station as well.

Yoshi's place was perfection! We were travelling with 2 babies and we felt right at home. Its Well equipped with everything you need especially for babies which made our travel more stress free. Yoshi was always very responsive and a fantastic host. 10/10 we will be back for sure

The location of Yoshi’s place is amazing. Senso-ji is steps away. We accidentally booked during the Sanja festival and it was amazing. Somehow with all the crowds it was still quiet and peaceful. I prefer Asakusa area of Tokyo. Lots to see and eat. I would absolutely recommend staying if you have the opportunity.

We had an amazing stay! The host was super responsive, helpful, polite, and accommodating.

The location is unbeatable, right next to Sensoji Temple, so we could visit during off-hours without the crowds. The temple and surrounding area were absolutely beautiful and peaceful, making it easy to explore. The home was clean, well-priced, and matched the listing perfectly.

A couple of things to note: the indoor staircase is narrow and steep, so be cautious if you’re traveling with kids, seniors, or heavy luggage. Also, more electrical outlets would be helpful for charging devices.
