so close to Sensoji Temple and accessible to most of the restaurants
Amazing place right next to Zenjoji Temple.

This AirBnB is a hidden gem! There's so many pros and honestly no cons!
Location: This place is located literally right next to the famous Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street! You can't any closer than this AirBnB- like literally 3 minute walk. It's about an 8 minute walk to Asakusa Station and the nearest 7-11 is a 3 minute walk.
The home: it is your own private 2 story home w/ an industrial kitchen. Yoshi provides ALL the amenities: from H20 (there's a dispenser!), to electronics you can rent/borrow for free, to having coffee for your morning brew. This was the best amenity AirBnB we've been in. The home was very clean when we arrived & we loved there were 2 bedrooms for our family of 5.
Host: Yoshi was SUPER responsive and answered all my questions. He also has a taxi business so we used his services for airport pick up to the AirBnB and to drive us to Mt. Fuji. His rates are competitive & we love that his drivers took CC for easy payment. TY Yoshi for a wonderful stay!
宾至如归的地方，替客人想到所有的细节，地理位置太好了，住在这里每天早晚去浅草寺散步

We had a wonderful stay! Great place to come home to after a long day of sightseeing. Great food, drink, convenient stores and sights nearby. This home has everything you will need! Even extra padding for the beds :)

Great spot in a great location. Tucked in a quiet alley, it’s hard to believe you are footsteps away from Asakusa temple area. It’s a fun neighborhood. The house is clean and very functional. There are two nice bedrooms upstairs with very comfy futons. The AC works great. The kitchen is well stocked. The place is worked well for us. One warning for anyone with mobility issues, the stairs to the second floor are very steep. Overall, a lovely place.

Yoshi’s place is really close to all the shops and sightseeing.  The house is clean and filled with amenities. He is very responsive and helpful before and during our stay.  We had great experience with the car services he coordinated to go to DisneySea and airport.  We will considering staying with Yoshi again if we come back to Japan.

I loved the floor plan, the plentiful towels, access to a washing machine, and the amazing pillows. 2 toilets was very nice. We all perceived the futons to be very comfortable. One complaint would be that there are so few surfaces on the upper level. No where to set a makeup bag, or a hair brush, or a book. Your options are on the floor or in your suitcase. Any kind of shelf, table, dresser would have been nice. But this issue is minor.
The location is phenomenal. Asakusa is def the neighborhood to stay in as a tourist. So much that’s walkable, and plenty of subway access.
We also used Yoshi’s van service. His associate picked us up from the airport and delivered us to the apartment. On day of checkout, they stored our luggage all day, and then drove us to our next destination (Disney). It’s an extra charge but so worth it!
sehr ruhig, gut zum Ausschlafen geeignet, tolle Lage direkt am großen Tempel.

Wonderful location, so close to the temple and some wonderful ramen restaurants close by.
House was clean, and the transport transfer from the airport is well worth it.

This is one of the most well-equipped Airbnbs I’ve ever stayed in—and I’ve been using Airbnb for over 10 years. There’s even an office desk stocked with everything you might need, plus thoughtful extras like plastic bags and cling wrap. The space has a very Japanese feel, and I really appreciated the small touches—like having a bathroom upstairs, which made things much more convenient.
While the stairs are a bit narrow, they’re still manageable. Upstairs, you can open the window and enjoy a lovely garden view. The house is incredibly close to Kiyomizu-dera, and honestly, it’s rare to find such a spacious place in Tokyo.
On top of that, the host was very responsive, and both check-in and check-out went smoothly with minimal instructions. It’s clear they trust their guests, which made the whole experience feel relaxed and welcoming. If you’re traveling with a group, I highly recommend staying here!
房间十分干净整洁，电器十分智能化，出门走一百米左右就是浅草寺，周围吃的也很多，房东解决问题很有耐心，很棒的一次入住。
居住環境舒適，備用日用品齊全，管家安排周到貼心，很適合兩個家庭入住
房子离浅草寺非常近，出行也比较方便。浅草寺周围餐馆，小吃，纪念品商店很多，从酒店步行过去3-5分钟。对于第一次去东京的我们来说，这是很好的选择。
位置很棒 就在浅草寺的旁边
价格再美丽点就更好啦
房屋坐落在浅草寺的旁边，闹中取静，非常不错。房东的服务真的很好，提供了寄存行李的服务，回复信息及时。房屋虽然有点老，但是干净整洁，布局合理。同时，周边出行、饮食非常便捷，推荐入住。
地理位置优越 闹中取静 虽然离浅草寺3分钟步行 但晚上周围还是很安静的 如果愿意起早的话 可以看到没那么嘈杂的浅草寺 家电设施齐全 虽然房子有点老旧 但是干净整洁 周围购物和餐饮都很便利 地铁直达羽田机场 我们一家人住的很安心 Yoshi先生作为房东友好细心 沟通有效 入住和退房都很方便 退房时遇到了大雨 和Yoshi先生商量能否延迟一些时间退房 先生很爽快的答应 为我们提供方便 感谢
房東人非常好，有什麼問題都很快就回答，然後還可以提供寄放行李，以及我們臨時需要借嬰兒車，非常熱心提供幫助，房間也很乾淨，床很舒適，離淺草非常方便，真心大推薦
離淺草雷門很近，逛街餐廳都能徒步底搭，用品齊全，房間很大舒適，房東很友善，很願意提供幫忙，謝謝他讓我們借放行李，像家一樣舒服

This was our second stay at Yoshi's house, 10 years after the first.
Our two children have grown up, but the house itself hasn't changed (or almost), still as spacious, comfortable, and practical; the neighborhood is still as lively; the Senso-Ji temple is still as beautiful in the evening when we come home; and Yoshi—even though we didn't see him this time—is still as welcoming and helpful as ever; once again, he took excellent care of us! A huge thank you, Yoshi, from the whole family! I hope we'll have the opportunity to come back again!
高性价比，设施完善，地址很方便，用车也好，我们两大一小住的，其实还能住好多人。与房东沟通顺畅，服务周到！非常便利的设施，期待下次还能入住！

浅草寺に近くロケーションが最高でした。
水回りも清潔で、布団も綺麗で安心して過ごすことができました。
传统的日本房间。面积不大，上楼的楼梯比较陡峭。我们两个大人带两个小孩子，还比较合适。房间就在浅草寺旁边。附近饮食，购物，都很方便。房间内提供充电宝，随身WIFI，打印机和平板电脑。很贴心。
Yoshi的房子非常漂亮，卫生环境很好，让人有回家的感觉，十分可爱温馨。下次来东京，依然是我们入住首选，开心^_^
Really great place to stay in Tokyo. Was there with family of four and we all enjoyed it very much!
Great location with easy access to everything. The place was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained. Yoshi was very responsive and helpful. We’d love to stay here again.
很貼心細心的房東，地理位置很好，該有的都有，讓人有回到家的感覺，來東京首選，大推！

Ryo is a good host and this is my 1st experience with Airbnb. He have suggest us where to go during our visit at Tokyo, and it was Spring. He is a very kind person and he have charming smile. We have rent a portable wifi with him, and we does over limit, he is very understanding and add an extra data for us. I really recommend this place and we use to stay in Tatami room, and Ryo have told me this is new and they just change it. So happy with the environment and the neighbour is very convenience, there is lots of shop around with walking distance.

Ryo's Kindly explain with a map when i was arrived lately at night!
I want to come again next visit time!
Thank Ryo!

Old Folk House is an oasis in Tokyo, perfect for a family and was our best accommodation in Japan on our 20 day trip. Beautifully decorated, comfortable and the warmth of Akane and Mitsu will make you wish you could stay longer. We highly recommend this property.

Perfectly located in a quiet residential street with easy access to the Subway and buses and two supermarkets. Close to Sumo stadium and Museum/Gallery district and Zoo (our family loved these attractions and most are free for children under 12).

The house is spacious and self-contained, with kitchen and separate toilet and bathroom (and brilliant shower!). Akane has gone out of her way to welcome guests into a relaxing and comfortable space. The house is freshly decorated and very clean and has large sliding doors that open to a small garden area. The house can easily accommodate a family of 4-6 or two couples. The upstairs bedroom can sleep 4, but my husband and I took advantage of having some private space and slept downstairs in the main living area. Cooking basics such as oil, salt and sugar, as well as bathroom toiletries are provided.

For us, travel is about understanding the place and the people. Akane and Mitsu are welcoming and attentive hosts who are also respectful of your privacy. They alerted us to the approaching Typhoon and ensured we were safe and prepared. As we were in Tokyo between Sumo tournaments, Akane and Mitsu assisted us to attend a Sumo training session. What a highlight! It was an intimate space with just us, four others and the Sumo coaches. We learnt a lot about the Japanese in our 4 days with Akane and Mitsu and will definitely return to our new friends and Old Folk House whenever in Tokyo.

If you are new to overseas travel or looking to stay longer term in Tokyo, Old Folk House is an excellent place to relax, feel secure and at home. Being able to open the doors and enjoy the outside is great after nights in hotel rooms. Please note, there is a fairly steep staircase to the upstairs bedroom that will be a challenge if you have mobility difficulties or small children (crawler to 3 years).

We had the BEST stay we could ever had in Japan! Akane and Mitsu are the kindest person we ever met!
The house is so pretty and very comfortable for 4 people! Also very closed from the city center (like shibuya)

What a nice place in Tokyo! You would not expect it because its a little bit outside of the main spots. But with the Metro you are in 25min in the main areas like Shibuya. Enjoyed very much the traditionell atmosphere of the charming little house. Akane & Mitsu are really nice, helpful and trustful. Sorry that i cannot speak Japanese! See you next year!

The hosts were the best we could have hoped for. The house was as described and more: cute and comfortable, super clean, a very nice shower and the Japanese dining table with the heater was the icing on the cake :)

We were welcomed and taken care of the whole time by Akane and Mitsu. They helped us with directions, offered us coffee, gave us tips about Tokyo in general and were just extremely kind and polite. Next time I'm going to Tokyo I know where I will stay that's for sure.

Wholeheartedly recommend!!!

Akane & Mitsu's house is amazing! The old house it's actually an detached home in the back. The house is 2 floors, with the kitsch, living room (tatami style), toilet, shower room in the bottom floor, then bedroom on the top floor. Lots of privacy for your group. I think the house can fit 4 people comfortably. With the only 2 of us staying it's such a luxury. Everything in the house was very clean, kitchen has a stove, a toaster, a sink, everything u need to make a small meal. Also tokyo gets a bit cold at night and there is a heater and another space heater underneath their living room table (Japanese style) for the feet. The house is only 8-10 minutes walk to the Sumiyoshi 住吉 metro stop off from the hazomon line.   On the last day after we checked out we've toured the near by Skytree and it was so convenient to get to. The pictures don't do enough justice for how amazing this place is, and hosts Akane & Mitsu are so helpful and wonderful. We will come back to tokyo because of them. This place is truly an oasis from the busy central tokyo and really felt like going home after a hard long day of sightseeing in tokyo.
Ryo's house is nice and it is a well-eqiupped one. Also, it is convenient as it takes only about 10 minutes to the Metro station.

It is my first time to book a room by Airbnb ,actually,my friend and I very enjoy the time stayed here few days ago.because we felt here just as we are at home when we stayed here, thank you very much ,the host always help me to solve my questions,I think I will come back to live here again if I have a chance .

The house was accomodating, it is close to 2 train stations. The neighborhood is quiet since it is not around the city area. There are a lot of nearby establishments on the area. Our overall stay is awesome. Thank you Mr Ryo

Everything looked the same as the ones in the picture, so we saw what we expected. We like how Ryo was very warm, accommodating and very helpful with everything. It made our trip to Tokyo so much easier.

Nous avons passé un bon séjour chez Ryo. Sa maison est propre et ses habitants conviviaux (merci à Akira pour son aide!). Le logement est bien situé, dans un quartier agréable, il est à une vingtaine de minutes de la Yamanote (Shinjuku). Nous avons rencontré Ryo au check-in et au check out. Il se préoccupe du bon déroulement du séjour de ses locataires et répond vite aux mails !!
很舒适的房子，距离地铁站很近，周围的便利店也很方便，房东人很好，总的来说，能住这样的房子对于这段旅程来说，是很赞的一部分。
It’s a nice room. The house-owner is very hospitality.Thank you very much.

I had an amazing trip in Tokyo this time with Ryo. He is such a nice person I have ever seen in all the hosts. Thanks for helping me and I am highly recommend you guys book with Ryo when you come to Japan. Very convenient place and well equipment.
Everything is good, however the location is a little far from Narita airport and from the heart of Tokyo.... But over all, everything is safe, clean and accurate.

The apartment locates at a quiet residential area. However, the transportation is very convenient, especially for Ikebukuro. There is a onsen called 庭の湯 with only 2 stops away from this place and I highly recommend it!

We had a very nice stay in this typical japanese bedroom. Ryo was again very nice with us, providing everything we need and responding quickly to our requirements. The room is very clean and well located in a quiet neighborhood. Station is a few minutes away. Would definitly recommand this place ! Thanks again Ryo for everything
Ryo is a kind host and helped me a lot, the room is clean and traditional. It was really a nice experience:)

there is a strong green tea smell that at least we europeans need to get used to but other then that, a clean and comfortable accomodation for two.
it is a traditional tatami room so it gives the japanese vibe straight away.
the wifi does not have the best strength all the time.
the bathroom and kitchen are very clean.
the neighbourhood is very quiet and calm, good for a goodnight sleep.
the shi-egota station is a two minute walk so very convenient location of public transport. about 30min from shibuya.
the room is very easy to find.
a couple of convenient stores 5min walk from the room.
thanks ryo :)

Ryo 为人很友善。交通便利，就在大江户线上，到东京各景点和热门购物点便于到达及换乘。房子很干净，精致，物品齐全，只是刚进房时有一股竹席的味道，很快会适应。周边不远有商场，商铺，小食店，吉野家，挺方便，我每晚都去逛逛，买第二早上的早餐☺。价格相对来说都很实惠，地方肯定没有在中国住宿的大，但很实用，应有的都有，厨房厨具/洗水机/晾衣服都有，就像自家的感觉。
Ryo and his wife are really very nice,grad to know them.convenient transportation~easy to access to all famous scenery and shipping mall.it's a clean,delicated house with all kinds of self-help equipment for cooking,washing…you smell the green mat taste once get into the room,but will get used to it after all.There are seven-eleven shop,supermarket,restaurants nearby.Ryo's price are reasonable,though it's not big enough as i am in China,but you have all you need in the house such as cooking equipment/washing machine…just like living in own home.

在到达之前房东提供了非常非常详细的到达指导。我们抵达的时候才来得及通知房东多加一名访客，房东也非常好的马上完成了相关准备。房东对房子有非常细致的要求和入住规则，这个规则保证了整栋房子干净、整洁、有序的状态，所以住在这里的感觉非常舒适，同时间其他房间的房客也很安静，完全没有任何打扰。公共空间非常整洁，设施齐全，而且空间很大（我第一次见这么大的洗碗池！）。榻榻米很舒服！地铺睡着感觉很好！位置离车站非常近，附近有超市、便利店、药妆店，周边也非常安静。房间和公共空间给人的感觉都很好，很新，空间也比较充足，总而言之是性价比非常非常高的住处！这是我第一次住民宿，体验真心非常非常的好，非常感谢房东！ps.临走的时候见到了房东的儿子，比图片上画的还要可爱！！

Ryo's place was readily accessible as it is very close to 2 train stations and it is also really close to Ikebukuro a main shopping district in Tokyo.

The room was exactly what you expect in the pictures. It was clean and the room space was huge for a Japanese apartment. The toilet was also clean.

Will definitely recommend staying over.
很乾淨舒適，廚房很讚、交通便利!
特别好，离地铁近很方便，屋子干净整洁！
great place!

Ryo is a great host. Always responsive to all my queries. He even let us check in few hours early than the usual check in time. The direction and instruction going to his house was precise.
The area was quiet and peaceful. A lot of restaurants and shops nearby. The house is just a short walk to 2 train stations.
The room itself was very clean and comfortable. Amazing value for the price.
Good place.
It's a convenience location and quit tatami house. Very enjoy it.
房子里住的其他房客都很友好，完全不会不方便，房子很大很干净！离新宿涉谷很近！可以体验日本的住宅区🏠
体验当地人的生活，传统日式风格，房屋干净，5分钟到地铁站，附近有饭馆、超市等，距附近的一个商圈也仅7分钟左右路程，房东严谨、热情！
a convenience location and quit tatami house. near to shin egota station,near to shibuya and shinjuku.nice palce.榻榻米很干净，两层楼有上下两个卫生间，洗漱间也很干净方便，厨房尤其大，很是方便。
居住体验很好，有浴缸，但是木有电视无法看日本当地的小节目，因此略有遗憾

Nous avons passé un excellent moment chez Ryo. La chambre est conforme à la proposition. Elle est dans un ensemble ou chacun dispose de son espace. C'est vrai pour la salle de bain et pour la cuisine.
La chambre est une pièce traditionnelle Japonaise avec matelas type futon epais et confortable. Une table permet de prendre le repas préparé dans la cuisine équipée. Si cela est souhaité, ce repas peut aussi être pris en cuisine dont une partie est aménagée en petit réfectoire.
La situation géographique de l'appartement permet très facilement de se rendre en centre ville. Cela peut se faire par le train (Ekoda-Ikebukuro) ou par le métro (Shin-Egota)
Les commerces sont proches, nombreux et ouverts toute la journée. Les restaurants traditionnels ou autres sont très proches et simples à trouver.
En résumé Un séjour parfait que nous recommandons vivement à toutes personnes qui souhaitent visiter cette superbe et vivante ville de Tokyo.
Cleanliness

The room is quite clean, and similar to pictures, location is near Subway, but there may be other guests in the same hostel which means you may need to wait in line to take shower, that's the only thing to complain.

Rio's house was very clean and close to transit. Ryo was a wonderful host, he sent a lot of information on how to find his house before we got there. Would recommend this place to anyone looking for a value room in Tokyo!
第二次入住了，一如既往的好！
very nice and comfort

The location is good because many resterants here and the enviroment is quiet.It's my first time to stay in tatami.It's good experience.The host'son is so lovely .离池袋站只有几个站，靠近市中心可是这边吃东西便宜好多而且味道超级好！！晚上在附近的超市买了牛肉自己煮，也很好吃！！

Cozy and well decorated Tatami room, we had a wonderful stay in Tokyo.
Convenient to access, 10min walk to metro station. Akane dropped us off at the station when we checked out.
Hope to see you again Akane and Mitsu:)
本当にステキな家でした！掘りごたつもあって、友だちと一緒にホッコリできました。古民家の良い部分を残しつつ、内装はとてもキレイで、快適でした。機会があれば、また利用させていただきたいです。あかねさんもみつさんも、スゴく柔らかいかんじの人で、説明も丁寧で、親しみやすい方でした！

Akane san and Mitsu san are very kind and helpful! They accepted our offer. The house is so cute and clean but also we can feel the old Japanese style. Very comfortable. We had a nice time with our friends!! We can see Akane's art everywhere in the house, beautiful art.
We couldn't have much time to talk with Akane san and Mitsu san, but We're sure to go there and talk more!

突然の変更にもAkaneさん、Mitsuさんは快く対応してくださいました。滞在させていただいたおうちはとても可愛らしく、清潔で、それでいながら日本の昔の建物を感じさせるすてきな場所でした。夜も全く寒くなく、快適に過ごせました。Akaneさんの作品が家中にたくさんあって、家の雰囲気がすごく良かったです。今回はお互いに時間が合わずあまりお話できませんでしたが、次回はもっとたくさんお話できたらうれしいです。

We got warm welcome from Akane & Mitsu, They explained to us about every thing near apartment. Their apartment is very clean, they provide also towel n toiletries. The apartment is 10 mins walk from metro station, and from the station takes 5 mins to Skytree tower, 10 mins to Asakusa, and 20 mins to Shibuya. Very nice experience to stay in typical Japanese house, and sleep in futon. The apartment is cosy and quite, I will definitely recommend to my friends who need accommodation in Tokyo!!

A very nice and typical japanese house. Akane & Mitsu are one of the the loveliest ppl I have ever met. The beautiful rooms are decorated with Akane's art which is wonderful to see.
Even though we arrived at 2 o clock in the morning it was not a problem to enter the accommodation. Mitsu the lovely person was waiting for us...
During our our stay they were very helpful and very very friendly.
And Mitsu once again thank you for the delicious Pizza at 1am ;)

Akane-san & Mitsu-san are great host. They gave us a warm welcome and willing to help about your question, travelling info, etc. The place is so comfortable.

Thanks Akane-san & Mitsu-san. We'll go back again. ^^

Akane and Mitsu are the sweetest most helpful people on the planet.  They made our experience in Tokyo a breeze.  I stayed at the Old Folk House with my five month old baby and husband.  We loved staying in their home.  It had everything that we needed.  Akane even provided a diaper pail.  The location was very convenient, close to a supermarket, a convenience store and a laundromat.  I was surprised and delighted to be able to experience a slower, quiet side of Tokyo.  Akane and Mitsu made us feel like we were close friends or family.  I will certainly recommend the Old Folk House to anyone I know that will be traveling to Tokyo.

Having to stay at Akane and Mitsu's place on the first day in Japan is more than amazing. Both Akane and Mitsu are very welcoming, they make you feel right at home. The place is easy to find, 10 minutes walk from the station and believe me, its worth it. The place looks exactly like its shown with wifi and amenities included. Clean and comfortable.

A convenience store is right around the corner and so is a good restaurant run by a married couple. The Katsu Don and Cha soba there is a must try! Ask Mitsu about it!

Best place I've stayed in Japan

非常非常喜欢这个老房子。房间很干净，环境很清静，房子外还有一个小院子，有一棵挂着柚子的果树，感觉就像自己的家一样。
主人非常好，不仅开车到地铁口接我们，送我们，还热情帮助我们制定在东京的旅游线路、联系出租车。更让我们感动的是：当我们到达房子时，在院子的进门出和房间的入口处，主人各放着一块小牌子，上面写着“Welcome Dorothy",看到这样的话，我的心里充满了感动！谢谢Akane&Mitsu，让我们的东京之行充满了温馨！有机会再来东京，我们还想住在这里！

The house is as beautiful as the pictures show. cozy, clean and well equipped while keeping the old Japaneses style in a very good condition. A house you cannot miss if you are going to stay in Tokyo.

Akane and Mitsu are excellent, showed me the real Japaneses life and were being very helpful during the whole trip.

To me, the experience is very unique and special, it is an unforgettable time with Akane and Mitsu, together with good music and laughter. It is my honor to meet this young couple, which are not hosts only, are my treasure memories for this Tokyo trip.

Thank you so much to Akane and Mitsu.

Akane's house was traditional but modern. At first sight I was suprised at the pictures painted by Akane. It was impressed.
In the house there was a large living room, bed room upstairs, and clean kitchen. It was very kind of her putting plenty of dishes and cups. I&my friend could take a rest at there. Thank you very much Akane;)

Akane and Mitsu are just wonderful and there little guesthouse is pleasant!
Whenever we will come back this guesthouse will be our first choice.
Thank you so much and take care!
Bernd & family

Akane and Mitsu were very welcoming without being overwhelming and were very attentive - a very charming couple.
The traditional Japanese home is spacier than regular apartment units and cozy to even chill at home. It provides everything on the listing and beyond to ensure comfort, as if you were visiting a friend's home.
The neighborhood is a vibrant old Edo district, presenting a different side of Tokyo than your usual tourist traps. The Sumiyoshi subway stop is not too far, connecting to both the Toei and Hanzomon lines. Japan railway pass holders could take the hike to JR Kinshicho, I suppose.
Highly recommended for the culturally sensitive traveller.

Lovely traditional house in the backyard of a modern house. Two floors, sleeping on tatami. Everything a bit small for tall europeans but that's part of the experience. Not so easy to find in calm residential neighborhood about 10minutes walk from subway station. I would go again.

This lovely house is the best choice for traveling in Tokyo! Akane-san and Mitsu-san are super nice and the place is amazingly comfortable! Our family trip in Japan was really awesome! Sincerely thank you and feel so lucky to get a chance living in the traditional sweet home!

Akane and Mitsu's place was exactly as pictured. My family fell in love with this warm couple, who went above and beyond to welcome us and did everything possible to make us feel at home., including driving us to a local restaurant to eat on our first night there, and driving us to a hotel nearby to catch a bus to Narita airport on our last day there. We definitely recommend anyone wanting an authentic stay in a traditional Japanese home to consider Akane and Mitsu's Old Folk Home.

We were greeted at the gate with a sign reading "Welcome Ness!" and immediately knew this was a good one. A little walk through a garden path and then into the fantastic and cozy house. Out of the places we stayed in Japan, this felt the most traditional, authentic, and comfortable. A wonderful Kotatsu, full kitchen (minus oven), and a full size shower. The space was perfect for the three of us but i can imagine 6 fitting perfectly to utilize more room. We all fit in a warm and cozy room upstairs and slept marvelously. Akane and Mitsu were perfect hosts. They greeted us with fruit and a restaurant recommendation that ended up being our favorite meal in Japan (Ajikyu restaurant web: http://www.yelp.com/biz/味久-江東区 ).

They even made us breakfast in the morning consisting of grilled rice cakes and miso soup that was more like a rich and rustic chicken soup.

What more can I say? Wonderful people and kind souls hosting a beautiful space in a more local and traditional area of Tokyo!

We absolutely loved staying in this very cosy real old style japanese house! Akane and Mitsu were very welcoming and helpful even introducing our 16 year old to the local cento (he loved it). It is very easy to get the local transport into the tourist spots but also lovely to get away from the hustle and bustle. The Kotatsu was wonderful on the cold nights, we would have loved more time just to stay in that lovely house.

We enjoyed a very warm and happy time with Akane and Mitsu at Old Folks Home in Tokyo. Their arrival instructions were detailed and easy to follow. The place has been recently been refurbished to look rustic and original. While being warm and comfortable. Thank you for a delightful time.
Our family really enjoyed the experience and we are already planning to return

Staying with Akane and Mitsu has been a wonderful experience in Tokyo. They actually sent us pictures and directions on how to get to their place, complete with arrows and what to look for before turning. When we saw a sign saying "Welcome Matthias! :)" we knew we had chosen to stay with wonderful hosts. The place itself was superb, complete with a nice and chill living room, a great kitchen and a cozy bedroom amongst other pretty cool stuff. Basically, we were so comfortable in the house we didn't really feel like leaving to explore Tokyo at all! Akane and Mitsu also helped us to book a restaurant and museum tickets, in addition to giving us a lift to the train station, all done without any fuss. We really appreciated everything that they have done to make our stay in Tokyo a wonderful one. Looking forward to staying with them again the next time we head back to Tokyo! :)

It was a great time staying at the old folk house during my trip,
Akane and Mitsu are very friendly that they provided pick up service for us from the station late at night and introduce us some great restaurant nearby due to we were craving for some yummy food first night in Tokyo. The place itself is very awesome, we love the tatami decoration and the kotatsu which keep us warm at this snowing season. The host also let us borrow their bicycle to do some local grocery food shopping. If you need to reserve any museum visit, they are willing to purchase them in advance for you, i had a great time staying at the old folk house and would definitely come back again for my next visit :)

房子就跟照片一樣，裝飾非常可愛且乾淨，是一間很有特色的老房子。除了冬天晚上廁所和浴室比較冷一點之外，起居室和房間有暖氣、床和被子睡起來很舒適，廚房配備也都很齊全。
距離地鐵站不遠(如果沒有大行李的話)，附近有大型超市非常方便。
Akane和Mitsu很熱情也很貼心，很幸運能在這裡留宿，希望下次還有機會再來!!
아카네와 미추는 매우 친절하였고 필요한 부분을 잘 챙겨주었다. 숙소는 매우 조용하고, 지하철에서 비교적 가까운 지역에 위치해있으며, 도쿄시민들의 생활을 잘 볼 수가 있었다.
It's a quite nice house. And Mistu is a nice man.   We like this house and travel.

This charming old house in Koto was the perfect place to stay for our recent trip to Tokyo. It's not far from a Tokyo Metro station and it's super easy to navigate anywhere from there. The apartment is clean, maintained well and although it has traditional Japanese whimsy, it's fully equipped with modern luxuries like wi-fi, a microwave, fridge and heaters/air-con. While the house does appear bigger in the photos, it's actually a rather small apartment. Don't let that deter you! During our trip, there were 4 of us adults sharing the apartment and it was the perfect size, with room for us to store our massive Winter luggage as well. Akane and Mitsu were wonderful hosts who gave explicit directions to the house, as well as helpful information and device instructions upon arrival, all printed out on easy-to-read sheets of laminated paper. We practically lived off the food from the local Family Mart and Life supermarket, so it's great that they were just around the corner. This apartment is wonderful for short and long term stays. We were there for two weeks with no hassle. We especially loved the sign at the front gate, welcoming us in on the first night.

Akane and Mitsu are very nice couple! Their house was last stop of our Tokyo trip and we were really enjoyed and relaxed in the house. It was comfort and clean, and we love the kotatsu most! The well-equipped kitchen also helped a lot! Akane is a very talented artist, we love the way they decorate the house and the fabric works like art pieces and painting on the wall, especially the vivid curtain, cushions and futon for kotatsu. If you want to try a suburban life in Tokyo, it's the best choice for you!

Il n'y a pas de plus belle expérience d'une maison traditionnelle japonaise que la maison de Akane et Mitsu ! Sols tatamisés, table basse, portes coulissantes vous y attendent pour un séjour des plus typiques.  Mention spéciale pour les hôtes dont je ne connais pas de plus gentils et de plus accueillants. Le quartier présente toutes les commodités ainsi qu'un accès aisé aux transports en commun. Proche du quartier historique et incontournable d'Asakusa. Je recommande ! :)

Akane&Mitsu提供了很清楚的路線圖，讓我們很容易也很安心地到達。這是我一眼看到就愛上的房子，很日式，很乾淨，很舒服。
暖桌，讓我和家人每晚都很開心地坐在一起聊天。
謝謝Akane&Mitsu。

Staying at Akane and Mitsu place was a great experience. The house is beautiful, typical Japanese house clean and very comfortable, close to the city center and very easy to commute.
Akane and Mitsu hospitality was perfect, friendly and careful. We really enjoyed their company and we hope to see you in Rome soon.

It was a wonderful experience and Ryo was very friendly! The room was so clean, we enjoyed a wonderful trip there.
房东特别热情，有什么问题都处理的特别及时，房间也很干净整洁，东西很全什么都有，插座也挺多的够两个人插手机和wifi，厨房和冰箱也很整洁，离两个车站都很近，坐电车7分钟就能到池袋很方便，说是和房东一起住其实是share house那种，怕尴尬的朋友完全不用介意 丝毫不会

The room was clean and comfortable. Ryo was an excellent host and provided very good instructions on how to navigate the Tokyo transit system to his house. The only downfall of this room was the Wi-Fi, which had a very poor connection. Other than that my stay was excellent. Thank you Ryo.

Ryo’s place is close to two public metro stations (~5 mins walk), and can easily access to 新宿 and 池袋 from these two stations.
The japan style living room is definitely worth to experience. The whole place is quiet and the facilities are great!
Overall, I highly recommend Ryo’s place and give a 5 star.

Ryo provides detailed information for me to arrive easily and live at his place comfortably. I should mention that not many house owners would do such service for visitors. It is really not easy to find a location (even with an address) in Japan. His house is located in a very safe and quiet area and especially close to two train stations and grocery stores. That helps me live with ease.
If you want to visit Tokyo, Ryo's place is certainly the first place to choose!
房东先生人很好，做的地图也很仔细，和室也挺不错，性价比很高，虽然是合住的，但各个房间的人也不会干扰，追求性价比的推荐

非常乾淨整潔，
機能方便，鄰近兩個地鐵站，附近有超市、一些小吃等，不怕深夜嘴饞。
房東非常親切，雙方溝通順暢完整
非常推薦給預算有限又想體驗日本街景文化的人！
房间真是太棒了！远超出我们的想象！房间非常的干净，有淡淡的木香、竹香，出门走几分钟就是地铁站，去东京的哪里都很方便，很安静，但是出门就有超市、全家和餐馆，强烈推荐，希望下次还能来住！
不錯
The room is clean. If you want to experience the local life, it is your good choice.
房東超好，屋子附近有超市和車站，非常方便。房間空間適合2人居住，3人入住較為狹窄。洗衣機略為骯髒，不太建議使用。
Great place, shared spaces cleaned every day and friendly host

Be quiet between 9pm to 9am, which means no music and no movies. Be prepared to share toilet and bathroom with others, especially wait in line. The house is convenient which nears the subway station, however it is a little far from Shinjuku!

Ryo is a great host. He is thoughtful and his booklet tells everything about the room. His room is very clean and not far from the city centre. It's very quiet at night and gives me a sense of safety. Convenience stores are easy to find nearby. Amazing experience!
位置很好找，出行方便，房间里干净整洁，房东回复迅速，卫生间和淋浴房的卫生再提高一点就更好了
房间非常干净整洁，地铁站附近，也非常方便，很不错的体验
房东Ryo热情严谨，半夜12点多骑着自行车🚲接了找不到路的我们一家三口，不介意共用洗手间和浴室的房客可以大胆预订！好评！半夜如邻居高声谈笑可跟Ryo沟通他会协助提醒！

Ryo's place is lovely and very conveniently located for getting around Tokyo! Ryo provided detailed instructions for arriving at the guest house and was always prompt and accommodating for check in times and communications.
Definitely a recommended place to staybif you are visiting Tokyo.
Pretty good
房子设施很齐全，房东会告诉你要保持房子的干净整洁。住的是榻榻米，生活非常方便。地理位置也很不错，旁边就是地铁站，可以直接到新宿。来东京玩的话可以考虑这家哟～
这个房东非常亲切，虽然是合住的房子，邻里之间不会相互打扰，离池袋也很近，坐地铁很方便。

Ryo's place was right by a subway and within an hour of nearly all tourist attractions in Tokyo. The room was comfortable and clean when we arrived, and the other guests were polite and respectful!
Would recommend!
房间很干净，每位客人都很安静，互不打扰，有厨房可以做饭，房东也很好，离地铁站很近，值得入住。
整體性優良，離兩個車站距離適中，新江古田車站一出來就有超市，早上六點開到凌晨一點，購買必需品方便。搭乘此站地鐵16分鐘就到達新宿相當方便，如果您是早出晚歸可以體驗跟日本上班族擠沙丁魚的感覺！

Ryo was amazing. His place is only a minute walk to the subway, a minute walk to the grocery store, and convenience stores. He gave us amazing directions with pictures on how to get from the Airport to his house. We would stay there again if we visit Tokyo. We ended up not even getting pocket wifi and just used wifi at Ryo's place before we went anywhere. I highly recommend his place. Happy Travels :) and thank you Ryo for an amazing experience.
깔끔한 숙소였다. 규칙이 약간 있음.

Excelente location, clean and all that we need was available.
We received very good hospitality and attention during our stay!
Tks Mr.Ryo!!
很高兴可以入住Ryo家，位置离机场有点儿远，但是附近就有地铁站和便利店，出行还是很方便的。Ryo家在比较安静的住宅区，邻居家的小孩很可爱，早上出门的时候还跟我打招呼。Ryo很贴心，出行前就给予各种指南。期待下次出行！
Logement très bien placé, proche du métro.
还可以
喜欢这家民宿 我们住宿的是可以有3人的榻榻米的房间，很干净；房东本人很可爱，沟通无障碍，回应很及时；下次还会来的
Great place to stay for the value! Two very convenient train stations near by.
The place is really clean and convenient to get to! Ryo is also very friendly and helpful :)
周围有很多便利店、超市、餐厅，离地下铁也很近交通十分方便。住宿环境非常干净，十分推荐！
とても満足です。ありがとうございました！

Excellent rapport qualité prix. Quartier calme.
Super communication avec Ryo, à recommander !

日本很多民宿都是下午三点入住，早上十点前离开。我们两个人一大早到机场，8点到民宿，房东也让我们先寄存行李，很感谢Ryo.
房间是日式榻榻米，不算大，我们住10平方的，两人足够。房间干净，床铺也舒适。公共厨房和卫浴设施齐全，细节做得很不错。
去新宿也比较方便，我们用地铁通票，所以没多花多少钱。
总之，这是一次愉快的旅程。

출장때문에 도쿄를 방문하였는데 좋은 호스트 덕에 잘 쉬었다 갑니다. 덕분에 태풍도 잘 피했습니다. 도심과 조금 멀다고 생각할 수도 있는데 저에게는 적당한 위치였습니다. 조금은 한산한 동네가 휴식하기 좋아요. 근처에 큰 슈퍼 두개와 편의점 두개 라맨집 등등 여러 가게가 있습니다. 숙소에 무료 세탁기도 있으니 장기 투숙하시는 분들은 좋으실 겁니다. 다만 칫솔과 치약은 가져오세요. 바디샴푸도요. 잠자리는 좋았습니다. 나가기 싫었어요 굿. 우산도 있어요 여기!

An adorable house with very nice and very clean rooms.
Everything is close to Tokyo (Shinjuku, Ikebukuro, Shibuya ...), even with the JR Pass.
Convenient stores are nearby (2 minutes walk). The subway is also very close. The street is very calm.
Ryo-san is a very attentive and very friendly host. He does not speak much English but it makes you want to learn Japanese to discuss with him!
I will come back without hesitation.

it's a close walk from both JR and subway stations, so it's quite convenient. The area is nice and quiet, but yet may be 10~15min from Shinjuku.  The host is very helpful and response quite quickly.  The place is at a typical Japanese residence, so it does have a "home" feel.  Even though the common area are shared, but everyone keeps the place tidy and clean!
It’s very near to public transportation and a lot of restaurants nearby. Strongly recommend.
Ryo was very responsive and I really enjoyed the minimalistic style of the room. Real tatami room, experience that I was looking for!

We even stayed for one more night because we loved the place so much!
The room is in a shared house. Even so, you wouldn't see much of the other guests, so it's still very private. It is Japanese inspired which is very beautiful. I recommend living in these type of house for experience.
You may expect limited space in the room as the beds are on the floor and has no chairs. The room was clean when we arrived, as so are the shared kitchen and toilet & bath. The house is always quiet.
It has the best location with 2 train stations nearby which is very convenient. Many stores and restaurants are right outside. We loved the Mo's Burger just across the house.
The host is very responsive. On our first night, we arrived late at 1:30 am but he waited for us to arrive and made sure we are safe, which I think is very sweet. Although, we didn't meet him at all. Thank you Ryo/Madoka. Until next time!
值得推介
sagat menyenangkan. dapet kamar tatami berasa banget jepangnya. walau udara agak panas karena memang summer. Lokasi jg deket banget dari stasiun hanya 1 kali naik train ke shinjuku. pokoknya asik.

Great stay for many reasons (fast communication, simple but great room, effortless check-in etc.) but the location was maybe the highlight. On a map Nerima City looks far away, but Ryo's guesthouse is very close to two metro lines which meant getting nearly everywhere we wanted to go was super easy. Thanks for the great stay!

The perfect stay. Will come back again if there's a change. Clean place, trustworthy and a very helpful family. Great Mo's cafe nearby, easy to find from Shin-Egota Station. Peaceful neighborhood. 5/5

Ryo and Madoka were very welcoming and responsive from the get go.
However the location is not very centered close to Tokyo city, it is approximately 2 train stops away, that being said, there are two train stations 2 mins and 5 mins of a walk away.
The train lines and buses are frequent throughout the day which lets you travel at any time.
Ryo and Madoka sent clear cut visual instructions to help get to the accomodation on the check in day and they also made sure to get in touch with our airport transfer due to language barrier, and be present at the time (3am) to help us get back to the airport.
Highly recommend this Tatami place for an authentic Japanese home stay experience!
Ryo was very responsive and I really enjoyed the minimalistic style of the room. Real traditional Japanese room, experience! Place is clean and well organised 😊
这次连住了八天导致自己都忘了退房时间，直到清洁奶奶准时来敲门，才知道到时间了，最终半小时内整理好退房，非常抱歉！很好很安静，出门也很便捷，这次带着小朋友希望没有吵到其余房客，下次有机会还会再来住！
The space was clean and comfortable, and Ryo and Madoka were very accommodating during our stay. It was steps from the station and easy to get around. I’d recommend!
เป็นที่พักที่เงียบสงบมาก ที่พักสะอาด มีร้านสะดวกซื้อใกล้ๆ เจ้าของที่พักตอบแชทไว และแนะนำสถานที่ดีมาก

Chambre très authentique propre, hôte très réactif à nos demandes (chauffage d’appoint apporté immédiatement après lui avoir signalé qu’on avait un peu froid ) il nous a amené à l’aéroport alors qu’on la prévenu au dernier moment ( il a du louer une voiture pour cela, il nous a donc logiquement facturé le trajet ).

Two of the main stations moving in and out of the area are very close by (about 5 minute to 10 minute walk). The area was very peaceful and residential. Enough shops and convenience stores nearby for quick bites. Appreciated the heater on the colder nights (End of March 2024). The room was more than enough space as a solo traveler.
Two small struggles. First was using a sink for getting ready. Mainly used the kitchen sink like many other guests because there was more space to place items like toothpaste, contacts, etc. Secondly was hauling my suitcase to the second floor. I brought quite a large suitcase and it was difficult to carry up and down. I brought a large suitcase since I was moving to Japan for a long period, shouldn't be a problem if you have a normal carry on.
Appreciated the cozy atmosphere, the ease of check in/check out, and the location. Was always happy to arrive after long walks during the day! I have slept on tatami mats and was slept comfortably!

The room was very tidy and the entirety of the space available was very clean. Overall, the space provided is everything one would need to explore and enjoy Tokyo to the fullest limit, especially considering the convenient location close to Shinjuku and Shibuya, and it never felt that far away from the other Tokyo cities.
Place very clean and accessible just a bit strict and too many instructions to follow
het was een geweldige kamer op een toplocatie!

Ryo is a super responsive and helpful host! I am super grateful for all her help and explanation getting to the house. The house is a lovely Japanese shared house, not too close to the centre but in a very quiet residential area. We were also able to leave our luggage longer in the house after checking out! Thank you~
Appreciated the stay
地點很方便 走路兩分鐘 到達新江古田站 ， 附近有超市 乾洗店 拉麵店 生活機能很好
交通很方便，很干净。
房间很好找，离新江古田站很近。我们房间在2楼，搬箱子不太容易。环境很好，房子干净整洁，房客也都很友善。感谢房东的招待，入住感受很好～

Die Unterkunft lag gut angebunden und in einer ruhigen Umgebung. Alles sah aus wie auf den Fotos und die Wegbeschreibung war sehr gut.
Nicht so schön war, dass andere Gäste nach dem Benutzen der Toilette oder Dusche ihre Rückstände nicht gereinigt haben, wofür die Gastgeber aber nichts können.
Die Kommunikation war nett und schnell, aber viel zu viel!
Es gab zu viele Regeln und sie haben so viele Nachrichten gesendet, sodass manche Informationen durch die Fülle an Nachrichten untergegangen sind. Sie haben z. Bsp. in einem Nebensatz bei der Beschreibung der Unterkunft erwähnt, dass man eigene Handtücher braucht. Das haben wir überlesen, weil es einfach zu viele sehr lange Nachrichten waren.
Dennoch eine zu empfehlende Unterkunft, wenn man eine eigene Küche und gute Lage will.

Mitsui ต้อนรับเป็นอย่างดี เป็นเจ้าของบ้านที่ดูแลดีมากตั้งแต่วันแรกที่เดินทางไปถึงและวันที่เดินทางกลับ Mitsu คอยถามตลอดว่า "วันนี้จะเดินทางไปไหน และถ้ามีอะไรให้Mitsuช่วยเหลือก็สามารถไปเรียกได้"
ที่พักที่นี่สะอาดมากมี2ชั้น ตกแต่งแบบสไตล์ญี่ปุ่นจริงๆ และคุณไม่ต้องกังวลว่าคุณจะหนาวเพราะบ้านของMitsuมีheaterให้ เท่านั้นไม่พอที่พักของMitsuก็หาง่ายและมีร้านสะดวกซื้ออยู่ใกล้ๆ ไม่ว่าจะเป็น Lawson, Familymart, 7/11 หรือแม้แต่ห้างสรรพสินค้าLifeที่เปิด24ชมด้วยเช่นกัน ดิฉันขอพูดอย่างมั่นใจเลยว่าคุณจะประทับใจอย่างมากหากคุณเข้าพักที่นี่ และถ้าฉันมีโอกาสได้ไปเที่ยวโตเกียวอีก ฉันจะกลับไปพักที่บ้านMitsuแน่นอน^^

Hakane et Mitsu sont deux hôtes charmants, disponibles et très gentils. Leur maison japonaise est typique, accueillante et bien équipée. Nous y avons passé en famille (deux adultes et deux enfants) trois jours très agréables. La table chauffante en surprendra plus d'un. La maison se trouve dans un quartier tranquille. Le métro est à 10 minutes à pied et il faut en ajouter 15 pour joindre la station centrale otemachi. Un supermarché se trouve sur le chemin du métro ainsi qu'une laverie. Un très bon choix pour ceux qui cherchent autre chose qu'un hôtel de style occidental.

If you are looking for a traditional-style Japanese experience, this is it; the value is unbeatable. We loved this house tucked away in a quiet residential neighbourhood in the middle of Tokyo. Our host's lovely greeting was appreciated after walking in the rain, and their attention to detail -read fluffy blankets- was great. I especially loved the quiet nights (we slept with the windows open) after weeks of city noise, and there is still good access to public transportation. Note: there is no washing machine if you plan to stay awhile. Would stay there again anytime.

Akane and Mitsu were very helpful with providing much detail on finding their place as well as making sure the stay was enjoyable. This house is very charming and was a great place to stay while in Tokyo. There is a lot of room and is quite comfortable to stay in. Definitely recommend!

I highly reccomend this stay in Tokyo. I felt so welcomed to the city after meeting Akane and Mitsu who are such kind people. There is a reason why they have been voted super hosts. The house provides a  great base to explore Tokyo. There is such attention to detail from a heated toilet seat to floor heating under tables. A beautiful experience of japanese style living.
We loved staying at Akane and Mitsu's beautiful little house. A welcome oasis in Tokyo. Our hosts were very kind and friendly, we highly recommend them.

Akane and Mitsu are amazing hosts. We had a very late check-in and Mitsu waited for us, showed us around the house and explained things to us. The place is fantastic: extremely clean, comfortable and, the best thing, it is an old house that has been completely refurbished. Thus, you get the true experience of a traditional Japanese place. I would definitely return here if I came back to Tokyo.

Stayed here with three of my friends. A wonderful experience in Tokyo. We really enjoyed our stay there. A truly homely, private, quiet house in a safe neighbourhood. Even safer since it is located near to the hosts' own house for added assurance and security. Quick access to food and convenience stores nearby, as well as walking distance from the subway station. Very pleasant and kind hosts. They would always be respectful of our privacy yet be proactively offer their help. I do not regret renting this place, and I would absolutely book here again if I were given another opportunity to return to Tokyo.

We were made welcome from the moment we reached the front gate, with a chalk-board sign which put a smile on our faces.
Everything was easy and comfortable; the facilities were exemplary, above standard, and everything worked.
Akane and Mitsu checked with us daily incase we needed anything.
Laminated instruction sheets were helpful, even too detailed...
We would stay here again.

Mitsu and Akane are very helpful and kindness, they help us solved a lot of problems. The house is lovely, full of Akane's crafts, I felt comfortable to stay in here.

房東很友善，房子亦打理得很好，很舒服，環境寧靜，很值得入住。

My good friend highly recommend this house, so we booked Old Folk House 2 days but separate. Mitsu and Akane are very hospitality. We have a good time in the first day, we drink tea, eat oranges and chat in the lovely little courtyard.

The house is clean, everything needed is there, guests can use electric radiator when weather is cold. convenience store and supermarket are near Old Folk House.

If you need a place in Tokyo is quiet and clean, you should stay in Old Folk House. Mitsu and Akane are the best hosts!

The house was beautiful and it was very easy to get to the train station and easy access to food! Our hosts were very very nice and very generous, offering us shoe dryers when our shoes were wet and also delivering our luggages to the train station when it was raining. Had a really great time in that house! (:
Nice and authentic old folk house and nice couple host! We had great time there! Very clean and tidy too!

Notre séjour dans la maison d Akané et Mitsu fut en tous points formidable ! L emplacement ( 20 minutes du super centre) le lieu , la maison est décorée avec goût et elle est très cosy et ensuite l accueil , nos hôtes nous ont gâtés et bichonnés . Je recommande très chaleureusement cette location . Pour finir se loger à Tokyo est coûteux et petit , nous étions en famille et la maison était parfaite pour ça pour un prix plus que raisonnable .
Bref nous sommes ravis!
Akané , Mitsu vous êtes invités à venir nous voir en France ou nous tenterons d être aussi accueillants que vous l avez été pour nous.
J espère que la traduction français japonais se fera correctement afin que vous compreniez bien ce message ! Encore merci
Emilie Tamio Mathis et Tom

Die zwei Wochen im Haus von Akane und Mitsu haben wir in vollen Zügen genossen. Wir haben den Ort dank der sehr guten bebilderten Beschreibung gleich gut gefunden, die Bahnstation ist in Laufnähe.
Akane hat uns gleich nach der Ankunft mit grünem Tee und japanischem Gebäck willkommen geheißen, das wir gleich auf der Bank vor dem kleinen Garten genießen konnten. Wir haben uns vom ersten Tag an diesem Ort zuhause gefühlt. Es war für uns eine wunderbare Gelegenheit, in einem im traditionell japanischen Stil errichteten Haus leben zu können. Akane und Mitsu haben es behutsam renoviert und die Kombination von Traditionellem und Modernem und den textilen Arbeiten von Akane hat uns gut gefallen.
Wir mochten auch Koto, das Stadtviertel sehr gerne, es ist gleichzeitig ruhig und doch lebendig. Wir hatten nette Begegnungen in der Nachbarschaft.
Akane und Mitsu sind wunderbare Gastgeber, die uns in jeder Hinsicht behilflich waren und uns verwöhnt haben. Wir haben die Begegnungen mit ihnen sehr genossen und hoffen, sie wieder zu sehen.
Gerne wäre wir noch länger geblieben und hoffen, dass wir an diesen schönen Ort wieder zurück kommen können. Auch wir, wie so viele Gäste vor uns, empfehlen diese Unterkunft aus voller Überzeugung weiter.

Lovely oJapanese style house in a nice quiet spot. Easy access to the subway as well as many restaurants and a good sized supermarket. Our hosts were lovely and really welcoming. Would recommend this place it's great!

Akane and Mitsu were very great hosts. The instructions to get to the house were very accurate and easy to follow. They welcomed us the day we arrived with green tea and gave us suggestions on what to do around the neighborhood. The House is AMAZING. Everything is prepared and supplied. Everything was very clean and super cozy. The main feature of the house is its traditional style which gave us a more intense  japanese experience. Very recommended and definitely will come back for my next trip to Tokyo.

Mitsu and Akane are really nice people. They help us alot. No matter the equipment that we need or the way which we could choose to arrive the destination, they'll always try their best to help us. The house is really nice and cozy. It let us experience the real life style in Japan. We love this place really much. We are really pleasure to live here, and hope to come and visit again.

We had a lovely time at The Old Folks house. Akane and Mitsu are incredibly welcoming and generous and the house is convenient for site seeing and has everything that you need. This was the last place we stayed on our tour of Japan and probably our favourite.

ได้ความรู้สึกเหมือนอยู่บ้านที่เพรียมพร้อมไปด้วยสิ่งอำนวยความสะดวกครบถ้วนระดับโรงแรม ทั้งน้ำอุ่นส้วมแยกกับห้องอาบน้ำ ผ้าเช็ดตัว, แอร์, อินเตอร์เน็ต, ตู้เย็น แถมยังมีห้องครัวไมโครเวฟและเตาแก๊สรวมทั้งเครื่องปรุง(น้ำมัน,ซีอิ๊ว ฯลฯ) ให้ทำอาหารอีกด้วย และมีเพื่อนบ้านที่น่ารัก ทั้ง Akanene และ Mitsu ให้การต้อนรับอย่างดี วันที่เราไปเกิดแผ่่นดินไหว ด้วยความเป็นห่วงทั้งคู่เลยส่งรถมารับจากหน้าสถานีถึงบ้านเลย ไม่ต้องเดิน :) แถมได้จิบน้ำชาต้นตำรับอีกด้วย

บ้านสะอาดมากหาง่าย แม้อาจเดินไกลไปหน่อยถ้าเทียบกับความเคยชินของคนไทย แต่อากาศไม่ร้อนมากเดิน 10-15 นาทีก็ถึง ทางผ่านมีร้านซุปเปอร์มาร์เก็ตยักษ์ ประมาณแม็กแวลูบ้านเรา มีของสดและอาหารเครื่องใช้มากมายซื้อของขนมเบียร์กลับบ้านได้จากห้างนี้เลยราคาไม่แพง แถมหลังสี่ทุ่มมีซูซิอาหารปรุงเสร็จลดราคาเพียบ อิอิ ปิดตีหนึ่งดึกแค่ไหนก็ไม่หิว หรือถ้าไม่อยากเดินไกลมีทั้ง 7-11 และแฟมิลี่มาร์ทในรัศมี 200 เมตร ให้คุณไม่ต้องเดินไกล 3 นาทีก็ถึงแหล่งอาหาร 24 ชม. ส่วนตัวบ้านมี 2 ชั่น แบ่งนอนได้ 4คนบนละล่าง ข้อดีถ้ามาเป็นกลุ่มคือห้องส้วมแยกแบ่งทำธุระได้สบายๆ ใกล้ๆกันมีสวนสาธารณะตื่นไปวิ่งรอบแม่น้ำที่เชื่อมกับสวนได้ผมไปมาแล้วอากาศสดชื่น ข้อดีของย่านนี้คือไม่วุ่นวายเป็นที่อยู่อาศัยจริงๆ เงียบสงบ แถมยังมีร้านอาหารสไตล์บ้านๆ ทั้งบาร์และเน้นกิน จะลำบากหน่อยคือร้านพวกนี้มีเมนูญี่ปุ่นล้วนแถมคนญี่ปุ่นละแวกนี้พูดอังกฤษไม่ได้เลย(ฮา) แต่เราก็สามารถใช้ภาษามือสื่อสารจนได้ของอร่อยมากินตั้งแต่ดึกคืนแรก

สรุปแล้วแนะนำสำหรับคนที่มาด้วยกันเป็นกลุ่ม 3-5 คน ถ้าซื้ออาหารหรือแพ็คมาม่ามาทำเองมีตู้เย็นแช่ของสดก็จะลดค่าใช้จ่ายได้มากโข แม้ระยะทางอาจไกลไปหน่อยแต่จุดเชื่อมต่อรถไฟฟ้าใต้ดินสามารถไปได้ 2 สายเลย ต่อเดียวก็ไปชินจูกุได้ อีกสายก็สามารถตรงกลับนาริตะสะดวก รวมแล้วเป็นอีกที่ๆผมมาโตเกียวหนหน้าต้องกลับมาพักครับ

Why stay in a small hotel in Tokyo when you can stay in a large house? Akane and Mitsu's place was our first air b and b experience, and undoubtedly the most memorable. Their house is clean, comfortable, quiet and elegant.

The neighbourhood is very interesting. We ended up eating and drinking locally for two out of the three nights - randomly selecting restaurants and bars. The food was affordable and delicious. The locals were also very welcoming and friendly sharing fish they had caught the same day and bottles of premium sake.

At Soul Music Bar 2 1/2 we enjoyed music on the vinyl record juke box and made friends for life.

This air b an b house is highly recommended. Next time we're in Tokyo we will definitely stay at Akane and Mitsu's.

Staying at the Old Folk House made our trip perfect!  It was a great little place, tucked in a quite corner of Tokyo!  We felt more like locals than like travelers.  If I ever make it back to Tokyo, I would stay here again.  Akane and Mitsu were perfect hosts and were attentive to our needs.  They made our stay memorable.  Thanks for letting us experience Japan in a traditional way.

This is my first Airbnb experience. Old Folk House is in a traditional Nippon style, I love this place at the first glance. And the hosts, Akane and Mitsu are warmhearted. Everything is awesome and fantastic!

I think I will choose this place again next time when I visit Tokyo. And I will introduce this house to my friends.

P.S: The tea is nice in the pottery cup which is made by Akane.

we loved staying here! the hosts are adorable, kind and helpful and their house is just wonderful! it's a really beautiful and unique place, equipped with everything you need. when we stayed here we preferred staying at
home in the evenings- it was just that nice. really felt at home. The kitchen was well equipped to prepare dinner there.

The hosts were very gracious and welcoming. We came in really late from the airport and they had left the lights on just for us. Afterwards, they came in to greet us and brought us hot tea.
The place itself was great, definitely felt like an authentic Japanese experience. The house was very spacious for just the two of us, complete with all the kitchen amenities you need, and also very clean. We just wishes we were able to stay longer.

L'Akane i en Mitsu es van preocupar en tot moment de nosaltres, donant-nos indicacions molt detallades de com arribar a la casa abans d'arribar, i un cop allà, ajudant-nos en tot moment. Ells viuen al costat de la casa, i l'Akane té el seu estudi-taller allà mateix, així que la comunicació va ser molt fàcil, respectant en tot moment la nostra intimitat.
La casa és perfecta per a 4 persones, fins i tot per a 6, i la descripció a la web es correspon totalment a la realitat. Està totalment equipada, i tot estava molt net i endreçat. El barri és molt tranquil, residencial i gens turístic, amb diferents supermercats, bugaderia, restaurants i bars i ben comunicat (l'estació de JR Kinshicho està a uns 20 minuts a peu, i el metro encara et deixa més a prop).

A wonderful, traditional Japanese house in a quiet suburb of Tokyo. Really get a feel of life as a Tokyoite.

Mitsu and Akanene are as welcoming and friendly as you could ever hope. Akanene even gave me a lift to the station to avoid the rain!

A perfect place to adjust to the time difference and get over the jet lag.

Cannot recommend it enough.

Thank you guys.
Tim
(London)

由於英文不太好
我就用中文作評價丫~~(請見諒
這間房子
是我目前一生人中
見過最美麗
最舒適的
不論設計和造型
你會看不出這間是老房子
反而會認為是新房一樣
而房主亦非常親切
不斷提供不同的旅遊資訊
還親自接送我們去他的房子
說實話
這間房子更成為我的旅程中
不可或缺的回憶
如果各位想旅程有個難以遺忘的經歷
我十分推薦住上這間房子

Akanene and Mitsu兩位不僅親切， 更是氣質優越的房屋主人。入住Old Folk House的經驗很特別，每天在東京到處看到處玩， 累了，走路回Old Folk House彷彿是回自己家，我們也彷彿成了在地人而非旅客。

"晨間 木製和式老屋震動著 鼻息間嗅聞著塌塌米特有的草香味 耳畔傳來嘎嘎啼叫的烏鴉聲~~東京的第一個早晨近似台東鄉間~只消將烏鴉聲換成麻雀" ~~我在臉書這麼寫著。謝謝親愛的Akanene and Mitsu，你們的笑容與Old Folk House已成為我對東京難忘的記憶之一

Akane y Mitsu tienen una casita típica japonesa muy acogedora en la cual se está estupendamente. Las indicaciones que nos dieron para llegar a ella fueron perfectas. Son una pareja muy acogedora, agradable y simpática. A cualquiera de mis amigos que fueran a Tokio les aconsejaría de ir allí.

We feel really lucky to have found the Old Folk House. Mitsu and Akane are lovely people. We felt at home there and it made the trip to Tokyo a real experience to feel part of life in Koto-ku. Mitsu helped us by calling the embassy for us chasing an international drivers license. His photographic directions to the house were impeccable! The house had everything we needed and was beautifully decorated. Looking forward to coming back!! Jude and David, Brisbane, Australia
好可爱的日式小房子，房东人很好，一直给我们提供帮助，给我们发的路线图也非常实用。

Easily one of the best places I've ever stayed at. A very charming rustic home. Most comfortable, spacious as far as old japanese homes go and definitely one of the friendliest hosts. The walk from the station was most pleasant with a amazing view of the koto area. And there's great food options near by too.
On my day of departure, it was raining, and Akanene offered me a ride to the train station. Bidding me a very warm farewell. Big ups and I definitely recommend staying here. I'll be back for sure.

Parfait! Notre séjour à Old Folk House était parfait!
Akanene et Mitsu sont des hôtes extraordinaires, d'une très grande gentillesse, très disponibles, attachants et drôles.
La maison est très agréable avec sa petite cour.
Salon spacieux, le contact des tatamis est très plaisant.
Cuisine fonctionnelle et parfaitement équipée, on trouve même des sauces, de l'huile, du sucre, du sel...
Salle de bain agréable, draps de bain géants (je n'en avais jamais vu d'aussi grands!).
Chambre en tatamis à l'étage, couchage confortable (futons).
Le quartier est calme et sympathique, idéal après une grosse journée dans Tokyo.

Nous recommandons très très vivement!!

Gaëlle & Rémy
Best private lodge I had ever been, especially with the traditional inner style. It was a pity that we couldn't chat for longer time, I wish I could come to Tokyo again and live in this same place.

The house is very traditional Japanese style,but you can also feel fashionable and design.The host make the house very comfortable,easy to use every thing.The environment around is very quiet ,when u come back ,u can have a really good rest.The host is very kind and friend to talk,give us the pictures of the address from the exit of the train ,then we can find the house so easy,and they always take of us ,when we stay in Tokyo.Thank u for they hosting us here.

Akane&Mitsu's house is A-M-A-Z-I-N-G!!!!! It's unbelievably clean, the kitchen fully equipped. You will immediately feel at home! The beds are super comfortable and even though your in Tokyo, it's so quiet and calm, we slept so good every night on the futons! Bus n22 goes directly to central station or metro station 10min walk.
We only saw our hosts briefly the day we arrived, really sweet people. The communication before arriving to Japan was outstanding, helping us with all our questions. Great internet provided!
Arigato gosaimas, we hope to come to stay here again, we were very happy :)
非常棒的房子！虽然离地铁站不是很近，但是周边都好喜欢～坐车去火车站也很方便

It was just a 2 day short stay, but we got a lot  of helpful information in advance. The house is really a mix of old structure with modern deco and facilities. It is a very quiet place and we enjoyed the stay very much.

The old folk house was absolutely amazing. It is really spacious and peaceful (very appreciable in Tokyo). It was extremely clean and well organized. Akane and Mitsu are wonderful hosts. We had ramen together when we arrived (late), it was a good moment. I strongly recommend the old folk house for a bunch of days in the real Tokyo .

We very much enjoyed our stay at Old Folk House.  The traditional house is spacious, well-equipped and nicely decorated.  The pocket wifi was very handy for navigating Tokyo.  Akane and Mitsu are lovely people and gracious hosts.  We would highly recommend a stay here!

Getting the chance to stay a few nights at this house made our trip to Japan feel more complete.  The guest house has a style that casually captures the distinct architecture of the country.  It created a unique experience that we hope to have again.  The hosts also went above and beyond helping us put together ideas for things to do in Tokyo, as well as put aside a night to cook and have a meal together.  Highly recommended.

The old folk house was very clean and spacious.  It's well equipped with everything we needed. We had a good stay in Tokyo.  The little ramen place nearby was very nice too.  Hosts are very friendly and communicated efficiently.
The description is exactly as described. The hosts are super super nice and made us feel really welcome. I would recommend this to anyone visiting Tokyo and will definitely come here again.

Thank you so much for everything!
The house is purely lovely, so nice to live in and very beautiful. It really is a unique experience to live in a traditional house with tatamis and all the charm it can have (the futons were so comfy! Ive had the best sleep in months !), the little garden adds some more privacy and nature to the place. We had everything we needed and more , and the hosts offered to help us with the laundry, the rain and all little troubles we could have had. Even though it's in the quieter part of Tokyo, it's really easy to go everywhere from the closest metro so I would definitely recommend this house to everyone planning to visit Tokyo!

We had a wonderful stay at the Old Folk House. It was a great experience having this oasis of calm in Tokyo. The apartment is very nicely furnished and decorated and it lets you explore a traditional Japanese house. Akane and Mitsu were the nicest hosts. They gave us a ride from and to the station. Akane welcomed us with hot tea when we arrived.

国庆假期去日本旅行，在东京的时候入住这套1968年建的老房子。当时在airbnb上看到喜欢得不行，日式推拉门，榻榻米，铺着厚棉被可以伸进脚的矮桌，和式床褥，跟小丸子和大雄的家好像。除了房子构造，也被屋主的细致惊喜到了，先是写了欢迎的小黑板，晾脏衣服的架子，各种杯具茶具都应有竟有，马桶水箱改造水龙头的设计更是值得借鉴。遗憾的是在这房子只待一个晚上，所以为了它放弃了筑地市场的行程 乖乖留在房间里吃早餐写明信片
it is a very nice experience to stay in this house., which is the best experience in Tokyo.The house is exactly same as the photos shown. But only when you stay inside, you can see many detail which even surprise you. The landlady is very nice. The only thing which is not good is the house is a little far away from subway station and the sightseeing place.

We had a lovely stay at the Old Folk House. The house is charming, spacious and very cosy. It gave us a wonderful experience of living in a traditional Japanese home. It is located in an interesting neighbourhood with lots of good places to eat within walking distance. There is also fantastic supermarket nearby. Akane and Mitsu are fantastic hosts. They were really helpful and accommodating. We really appreciate all the thoughtful touches that made our stay super comfortable. We highly recommend this house.
房子比照片还好，很有日本风味，之前是在台湾也体验过这样的古朴的日式住宅，但觉得这个更现代更适宜人居住，房东人也超级好，满足我们一系列的无理要求，下一次我来日本还要住这家。

We loved to stay at Akane's old folk house. The neighborhood was quiet and well communicated by metro with some other parts of the city like Shibuya or Shinjuku. Everything was very confortable and clean. We really recommend the experience

Dear Akanene & Mitsu

Thank you both of you very much for completing our trip in Tokyo.
Your place is very comfy. Convenient in every way. A lot of relaxing corner. A little too far from a station but it's worth it.

We are really missing Tokyo right now. And look forward to staying at your place again.

It's not only the place but also your kindness which made us feel thankful.

Always,
Taam

We spent two wonderful nights at the Old Folk House at the end of our trip. It was a perfect spot to round out a great but busy trip to Japan. It really is an oasis in Tokyo. Extremely quiet and peaceful, it is very easy to quickly forget that you are in the middle of one of the biggest and busiest cities on earth. It is also striking in that it is a very large property - extremely easy to spread out and relax in. A great spot to unwind after a day of touring.

The neighborhood is very easy to navigate, and Sumiyoshi Station is just 15 or so minutes to walk to. From there, you an reach anywhere in Tokyo pretty quickly. There is also a great grocery store between the house and the station. We did not do any cooking, but for those who want to, the house has all the supplies you need.

Akenene and Mitsu were extremely friendly hosts who were very helpful and communicative at all stages of our visit. They put a lot of personal touches into the house, which make it feel like a real home. You can tell by reading the many entries in the guestbook that previous visitors enjoyed their time at the Old Folk House as much as we did.

Thanks Akanene and Mitsu for very enjoyable stay at charming and quirky Old Folk Home. We three were very pleased with how spacious and well appointed the accommodation was. Thanks for your warm hospitality.

What a great place and a sweet couple! We were welcomed with green tea and a tour and a gift pear for our dessert. The house is very comfortable, sweet, quiet, and well-equipped as described. We really enjoyed cooking our meals in the little kitchen and slept soundly in the room that smelled like straw (tatami mats). There was lots of warm bedding for us and extra blankets, clean towels etc. Mitsu drove us to the metro on our departure day too. Wish we could have stayed longer here.

Mistu and Akanene were so nice and friendly, impressied by their super hostpitaly. I will stay at their house again if some day I back to Tokyo.

Alice

We only got to stay at Akane and Mitsu's place for one night at the end of trip through the Japan, but we still got to feel the comfort and charm of Old Folk House, and we wished we could've stayed another night! It was pretty amazing we had as much space as we did (Old Folk House is a free standing two-storey structure that you have all to yourself) and we really appreciated reliable portable wifi and the little charming details like the art sprinkled throughout the house, the coffee and tea, and the traditional tatami mats and rice paper doors. The place might be a little farther than other Airbnbs in Tokyo from its train station, especially if you're dealing with luggage, but since it was our last day we didn't really mind. We would stay again!

Nice and helpful host. House exactly same as pictures. Location is convenient near train station. House with heater make me feel warm at night.
Again thanks for dinner.

We had intended on getting some experience with living in a traditional Japanese setting, and Akanene's place certainly provided us with not only a one-of-a-kind experience, but also offered a clean and quiet, peaceful house to go home to after a long day of sightseeing. The garden walkway leading up the house also provided a tranquil experience and mornings there were quiet and peaceful.

As we travelled everywhere using public transportation, we decided on commuting to the house by foot from the closest station (Sumiyoshi station) - it was a 15-20 minute walk for us (we walked slower with luggage etc), and this gave us a lovely opportunity to see and experience a more suburban/less bustling side of Tokyo and interact with locals, which was what we aimed for on this leg of the trip.

The place was kept very clean and Akanene and her husband Mitsu had thought of everything in their supplied house manual (with detailed but easy to follow instructions on how to use utilities in the house as well as recommendations for restaurants!). Prior to the trip, they also provided us with very clear and detailed instructions on how to get to the house which helped us navigate the streets despite our limited Japanese skills.

The only thing that was unfortunate for us was that we had to leave a day earlier than anticipated - and this entirely because of a sudden emergency back at home in Sydney and that we had to fly back a day early! Akanene's husband Mitsu was incredibly understanding during this time, and remained their kind, helpful selves even though I phoned them early in the morning to inform them of my early departure.

Thanks Akanene and Mitsu for your generosity, kindness and personal touches in providing a unique stay in Japan.
非常好的日式民俗，空间宽敞，设施齐全。房东也非常热情好客。个人认为如果您想体验日式民宿，这个地方不送错过。

Special thanks to Mitsu who took the trouble to drive me and my friend to the station so we could catch our flight back to Singapore.

We had a fantastic experience at the Old Folk House. Communication before and during the visit was great. Directions were clear (including the cab direction sheet in Japanese). Our hosts were very friendly and made sure we felt welcome.

The house itself was just what we were looking for- tons of character, a nice residential location with easy access to transit, groceries, and even Blue Bottle coffee not far away (and a 7-11 only a short block away). The heated kotatsu table was nearly enough to make us give up sightseeing and just snuggle at the cozy table all day! But getting out was well worth it- be sure to walk over to the Kiyosumi gardens a gorgeous traditional Japanese garden. It wasn't on our list of things to do, but we stumbled across it after getting coffee at Blue Bottle one morning, and it was a highlight of the trip.

Akanene and Mitsu's Old Folk House was absolutely lovely. We only wish we could have stayed longer at their cozy home. The house had plenty of space to spread out comfortably and enjoy the amenities, like the Kotatsu (heated table) in the living room, the warmlet (warmed toilet seat), and the spacious bedroom upstairs. 这是一间“强大”的日本老房子
首先我们要感谢Airbnb，让我们有机会遇见那么好的民宿，更重要的是能认识那么好的房东，星级房东果然当之不愧！
这间屋子是我提前两三个月在airbnb定的，是间日本很传统的老房子，内部应该是纯木质结构，外层的金属制结构应该是后期为了抵御台风或地震而加固的，屋子外面是房东种养的花草，有定期浇花的花洒，门外木架上放着不少多肉植物，屋檐下放有晾衣架，门边放置着欢迎我们入住的欢迎小黑板，由此可以看出房东应该是一个很有生活情趣的人。
屋子一共分为上下两层，一楼进门是换鞋区，左手边放着两把雨伞一蓝一橘，左手位上侧挂有衣架，正前方是卫生间（ps：马桶的冲水采用日本传统冲水自带洗手的节水设计），洗水间门口放这瓶瓶罐罐的垃圾桶，后面有吸尘器。右手边上来就是一楼是客厅榻榻米空间，灯也是节电式可控光源，窗帘后面的木窗貌似可以开，本人没时间试验，空调可能会老一点，但不妨碍使用，开一会就好了，客厅的桌上放着贴心的零食和免费的WIFI蛋，WIFI蛋是7G的两个人用十天也够用，只要不看电影和大流量的都没问题。客厅往里走是一个小厅边上有日本旅游的指南，碗碟杯勺等工具放在后面的铁架子，旁边是冰箱，带有冷冻，厨房里基本的厨具一应俱全，做个早餐玉子烧也没问题，浴室洗澡的时候需要注意手动排风，浴室出来右手边就是上二楼的楼梯略陡，高的人要慢上慢下。房间里会有老旧的味道，当空调开一会就好了，不要过度吹毛求疵。
楼上空间在这就不细细说明了，也是传统的榻榻米，值得一提的是房子虽然略有老旧，但绝不会影响使用，我们在东京的时候不巧遇上台风，由于语言还是存在交流障碍，所以帅气的房东亲子上来给我们演示这老房子强大的抵御台风的设施，入住当天晚上来敲门，告诉我们：他就住在隔壁，有任何事就敲门找他。告诉我们家里的电器设施如何使用，我们事先准备的插座转换头不能使用，还将自己家里的借给我们。几乎可以说满足我们所有的要求，很贴心很负责，也会推荐我们附近好吃的地方。
作为一名美食家，我可以很负责的推荐住吉站B1出口对面的拉面店“肉肉肉肉”在tabelog的评分不低，你在那可吃到很传统的日本肉汤拉面；B1口出来左转50米左右，是日本老牌居酒屋“山城屋”味道一流，晚上十点就关门了，别去太晚；住吉站往北走的锦系町站，有一家名字叫“麵鱼”的拉面店是东京一绝，可惜我没时间去吃；往南走的木场和东阳町一带也有不少好吃的，五天东京行程结束后，房东还开车送我们去地铁站！⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
下次来还住这！

We literally had everything needed in this amazing house; all the essential things including toiletries, fast internet access, and cooking equipments! :) Things were organised yet the old Japanese style well remained, it was such a cozy stay! We felt so much like home!!

The house is very nice, clean and amazing. Japanese traditional style expressed us deeply. Akanene and Mitsu are very responsible, polite and perfect host, and we had a very happy stay in their house.

This place was fantastic - really gives you a genuine, old-style, Japanese experience. Sleeping on the futon's on the floor was really authentic. Lovely neighbourhood with supermarket close by.  Instructions provided were very clear and extremely helpful. Only wish we could have stayed another couple of nights.

The hoster is very nice and request my message so quickly，The house guide map is clearly for us to find his house easily。the house is old but it is very cleanning and comfortble。房东很和善，回复信息也很快，给我们的路线向导很清楚，我们很快能找到他的房子，虽然是老房子，但是里面布置很Local的日式风格，整个房子上下楼层都可以睡觉。。。不过好像房东不接受带小孩子家庭，预定时候最好确认一下哦。

The store and the subway station were close, so I was comfortable to travel. The host is very kind and I can use Japanese tatami room and goatsu for reasonable price.

The house is very clean and safe. Specially there are many fruit trees in front of the house, my husband likes it very much. Well surroundings and thoughtful host, I stayed here for 2 nights, the great impression is that the documents for how to get the old house are much more detailed, and the bedding made me more comfortable so that I did not want to get up!

Akanene and Mitsu are sweet, they reminder me that night was cold in Tokyo and tought me how to use heating equipments.Thanks for everyg

We were pleased to find this accommodation for our first nights in Japan and Tokyo. Akanene and Mitsu are excellent hosts who made ever effort at making our stay easy. The area is full of interesting and delightful micro restaurants and bars that are friendly and provide excellent food. We particularly enjoyed the Soul Bar on the main road to Sumiyoshi Station. Once we learnt the ways of the Tokyo train system, it was very easy getting to wherever we wanted to go.
非常棒的住宿体验，房主人特别特别好！让我深深的喜欢上了日本东京，如果下次还有机会来，我一定还会选择这里。

This house was one of the best experience in Tokyo.
I was really good to stay in Japanese traditional house. Very cozy & comfortable, easy to access many kinds of convenience stores so I want to stay here again in future.

The Old Folk House is a super cute and unique 70-year old Tokyo home complete with kotatsu (warming table), sliding wooden panel doors, and heated toilet seat (which was very important during our super cold late November stay). The house, being as old as it is, is drafty, but the downstairs heater and kotatsu both worked perfectly, and the shower room is way steamy. Mitsu even checked on us on the snowiest day and explained how to use the shoe dryer. The kitchen was clean and useful, the futons were crazy warm, Akanene's handmade ceramics were amazing, and the garden separating the main house from our house was beautiful (they have a crazy huge persimmon tree covered in fat shiny persimmons right now).
The house is located behind Akanene and Mitsu's home, in a quiet residential neighborhood, close to plenty of convenience stores, the LIFE supermarket, and a handful of interesting and tiny bars/restaurants. The Sumiyoshi Station was just a fifteen minute walk away.
Akanene and Mitsu were very kind; Mitsu checked in on us a couple times, to explain use of the heater, circuit breaker, etc, and he even rolled up with a sweet van to drive us and our bags to the Sumiyoshi Station the day we left.
Koto-ku is a little bit far out from the city center (including walking, waiting and transferring, getting from say, Akihabara, to the house took between 45 min to an hour each way) but my boyfriend and I agreed that staying here was completely worth it. It is literally the cutest AirBnB I have ever stayed at; in fact, it was so cute that it killed us, and I am writing this review from beyond the grave <3

The house was same as picture what they show. The weather we visited, not too cold but when night time were so many windy in the house. However they tried to let us know how to stay warm and cozy.
I was really satisfied with this house look so cozy and calm. Near the house, there are some nice restaurants such as the skewers, the bistro and traditional ramen. If I have plan to visit Japan next time, definitely come again. Thank you Akanene family.

Akane & Mitsu were lovely hosts and their home very wonderful and cozy. They checked in with us at every stage which was wonderful, and helped us find a place to eat for dinner and help us get to the station. I've never had such accommodating hosts before. The kotatsu was also amazing during the chilly early December weather. My friends and I spent all our evenings in it relaxing. Wifi was good, close to convenience stores and markets and restaurants and the closest station still is accessible to the bigger stations of Tokyo.

This house is full of art. Cups, dishes, curtains, are all designed and made by the hosts themselves, very lovely. The house is clean, quiet, and well equipped. We cook every breakfasts in the house, and whole family get-together to act as a native one:). The hosts are very kind and thoughtful, and taught us everything. My whole family love the time we spent there.
The house was wonderful, just as the listing described. It is hard to find, but the host provided great photo directions. The neighborhood felt really safe, and there are good restaurants around.

A home away from home.
Akane & Mitsu's Old Folks House has helped created wonderful memories of Tokyo during 3 nights that we stayed there.
Location wise is brilliant because it's located in a quiet residential area, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. Perfect for a quiet rest after a long day of walking. It is a short stroll away from the station, with 2 huge supermarket, a hardware store, FamilyMart & 7Eleven, a local public bath all within walking distance. There is also a local shopping mall within the area. Also located nearby is "Sunamachi Ginza" a local shopping street with lots of food, fresh groceries. There have sale on every 10th 20th 30th day of the month. We had a wonderful experience there shopping with all the locals aunties. You get to actually experience living like a local.
Mitsu and Akane were amazing hosts with wonderful personalities. We were served warm tea upon checking in. Mitsu happened to have a day off and walked us to Sunamachi Ginza. He also drove us to the Hotel East21 to take a shuttle bus to the airport after we checked out. The whole house is decorated with Akane's work of art. We eat and drank in her handmade bowls and cups which made a really unique experience. We bought some fresh ingredients from the supermarkets and made our own dinner and breakfast. To top it all, eating in the Kotatsu is wonderful experience, especially during the cold winter!
We had a really comfortable stay and slept like logs in the warm futon beds for the 3 nights that we were there.
Do not look any further. Book this place before it gets booked out!
Really good experience in old folk house, it's a very  nice house and Akanene was very welcoming.

Akane and Mitsu were perfect hosts. Making sure we got settled in nicely after sending us accurate directions to the house. The house itself is cosy and lovely and almost like a hidden gem in that quiet neighbourhood. It's got a good location being 15 minutes away from the metro station and tons of convenience stores and a supermarket on the way to the house. Thank you Akane and Mitsu!

We really enjoyed our stay. Super authentic home. The check in/out process was seamless. The house is about a fifteen minute walk from the nearest subway station, which isn't super close but definitely not too far to walk. Highly recommend
All you need for a stay in Tokyo is in Akanene's house, and they are the most charming hosts I've met, very generous and accommodating. I will come back a third time!

This is the best Airbnb I've ever had!the host was very very nice person. We had so many Airbnb experience in different countries.  But this was the best one! We arrived very late Akanene was waiting for us and introduced house to us very clear. Since we had a 4 luggages, on the last day he even drove us to the station. The house is very nice, transitional Japanese style ' very comfortable and clean. 10 mins work to subway station 15 mins to downtown. 因为这次入住体验太好了，所以要写中英文的评价。这是我和我先生住过的最好的airbnb。 我们住过好多AirBnb但是这次真的是最好的。房东人非常非常好。房子也非常舒服。空间很大，楼上楼下。很日式的老房子但是很干净很舒服。房东等到我们很晚然后还帮我们介绍房间的设施，很仔细。因为我们是晚上10点的飞机。走的那天还让我们把行李先寄存在他家附近。 因为我们有四个行李箱，房东还送我们到地铁站，太感动了。下次来东京还要住这里！
