Stay here. Just stay here. Stop reading this and book it already. The only downside of Akane's place is that it is a little farther from the station than other accommodations may be. The house is a lovingly maintained and only slightly modernized post-war traditional style house that has been in the family since it was built. Not only is it a beautiful house, it is decorated by Akane herself with her artwork, including the handmade plates. The rooms are bright and stayed warm, something that Japanese houses don't always do well. Coming home to a "kotatsu" (Japanese heated table) and the cozy living room made me want to stay here forever. There family is great as well and incredibly sweet. I honestly could not imagine a better place to stay anywhere in the world and cannot wait until I have an excuse to come to Tokyo again.

This house is fantastic, and the hosts are so kind and respectful. You get a real japanese experience from the moment you get to the front door. The subway station is a few minutes walk away, even if you come back really tired it doesn't matter when you arrive and relax in the living room. Stay here!

Wonderful traditional duplex house with a cute garden. Living room, bathroom and kitchen downstairs, tatami style bedroom upstairs and comfy beddings. Quiet spacious. Host is very easy to work with and welcoming. He provided detailed guidance to the place and made the process easy.

Ein sehr schönes Haus mit sehr freundlichen Vermietern, welche nebenan wohnen. Sie haben uns mit unseren Koffern sogar zum Bahnhof gefahren, weil es geregnet hat. Proche d'une station qui vous enmene rapidement à n'importe quel endroit touristique de la ville, combini     à proximité, lavomatic très simple à utiliser (comme en France). We are a Family of three on our first travel to Japan. Akanene and Mitsu  where very responsive and friendly. Beautiful traditional home a short walk from the metro. spacious with all the anenities you'll need. Felt like we had taken a step back in time and felt really homely. Would recommend to anyone visiting Tokyo!
Very good experience in traditional japanese style house!

If you want the experience of living in traditional authentic Japanese residential architecture, then I highly recommend Old Folk House. This style architecture mastered the art of incorporating efficiency minimalism and practicality in a unique Style that Frank Lloyd Wright used throughout his life. Old Folk House includes these basic stylistic elements such as tatami mat flooring sliding partitions and recessed built in furniture. It also includes everything you would expect in a modern residence.  the home includes a second floor bedroom, with separate air conditioning for the first and second floors. It is located in a very quiet residential neighborhood where you are with local folks including parents children grandparents teens children in school uniforms and working adults of all ages. The host provides excellent instructions on how to find the home. In our experience we were able to reach all of the major attractions in the Tokyo area within 20 to 40 minutes. We stayed for 9 days and and had a wonderful time.

かわいい和風のお家です。
快適にすごせました。
地下鉄の駅からはちょっと歩くので、バスの利用が便利です。
舒適，美麗，有特色的屋子，可以感受到傳統日式屋子的氛圍

Akane & Mitsu's Old Folks House was as described. A beautiful Japanese traditional house was what we received.
We arrived in the evening late and Mitsu still came to say hello and to explain the house to us, which was really appreciated. Both Mitsu and Akane even though we had limited contact were both lovely. Mitsu even gave us a lift to the train station in his car on our last morning as there was a huge down pouring. Was so nice of him and it stopped us from a soaking.
The area has lots to offer. The Museum of Contemporary Art, Tokyo is only a short walk away. Sumiyoshi Station has lots of places to eat and really cute/cool little bars if you fancy a few drinks on your way back after a big day sightseeing in the city. A great supermarket is also close by and countless convenience stores to choose from. There a re also a few coffee shops 15-20 mins walk away if you crave a good coffee. Getting into the city is very strait forward also.
We arrived during a really hot spell with high humidity and the 2nd floor tatami room was pretty hot on arrival. Once the air con was on low for a while it was more than enough to sleep comfortably. I loved hanging out downstairs during the early mornings and even did some morning yoga as well. Such a peaceful setting from the general hustle and bustle of Tokyo.
We had a great stay and the only thing I can really mention is the lack of a chopping board in the kitchen. The kitchen has all you need to create any meal and we loved drinking from their handmade ceramics.
Hopefully I will be back again.
Cheers Steve and Luna

Superbe petite maison traditionnelle tout confort et un propriétaire absolument charmant, toujours prêt à rendre service.
Une adresse en or

A artists' place. I really like that colourful works made by Akanene. It s creative and comfortable to live. Highly recommended to people who seek the staying with combination of Japanese lifestyle and Modern art culture.

周囲にコンビニ、スーパーもあり、大変過ごしやすく、オーナーさんの対応もとても丁寧で助かりました。
建物までのアプローチもワクワクし、中庭がとても良かったです。外のベンチに腰をかけて中庭を眺めながらお酒を片手に仲間とゆっくりさせていただきました‼︎
低廉的价格，却有高质量的回报，整栋楼属于你，干净，安静，门口还有一个小小花园。房东是个大好人，最后一天路上偶遇他，见我们行李多，就送了我们一程，感动。

We had a really awesome stay at the Old Folk House! Akanene and Mitsu were really helpful and they even went the extra mile to help us book our tickets for the museum. They always ensured that we were able to get to the places we want to go, by giving really clear instructions on how to get there on the local subway. I'd definitely recommend the Old Folk House to anyone who wants to visit Tokyo! :)

우선 스미요시 역에서는 걸어서 15분정도 걸렸습니다. 날이 너무 더운거때문에 조금 힘들긴 하였지만 그거빼곤 다 좋았습니다. 편의점도 3분거리에 위치하고있었고 호스트분이 너무 친절하셨어요!
3시체크인이였는데 일찍 도착해서 미리 짐도 맡겨주셨고 체크인도 한시간 일찍 할 수 있었어요.
집은 사진 그대로이고 일본의 전통집을 느끼시고 싶으시다면 강력추천!
동네도 조용하고 뭔가 여유로운 분위기였구요
신주쿠까지는 신주쿠라인으로 한번에 가기때문에 편했어요. 체크아웃 하고선 호스트분께서 역까지 데려다주시고 정말 친절하셨습니다^-^
Tall people don't bump your head! : ) It's a really cool old house that has been fixed up nicely. No TV, but that shouldn't matter! Enjoy!
在東京都住到日式老屋很難得，Akanene和 Mitsu親切的招待讓我們印象深刻，感謝他們讓我們有一個難忘的旅程。

(1)it's bigger than most of the house and hotel;(2)the living room is nice, we can get together to chat and eat some food;(3)it's very quiet;(4)on the way to the station, there are many food stores  ;(5)when you are tired, you may thought the way is so long even it only takes 10min.

호스트 분이 너무나 친절합니다.
호스트분 와이프께서 가방,텍스타일등을 제작하는 공방도 함께운영하셔서 재미있었습니다.
역에서 10분정도 걸어가지만 가는길이 예뻐서 지루하게 느껴지진 않았습니다.
편의점,음식점등은 가깝게위치하고 있네요
집의 청결도 또한 매우높습니다.
전체적으로 강추입니다!!

Awesome little place, feels like a little peice of old Japan tucked away in modern bustling Tokyo. Mitsu and Akane are great hosts, gave us everything we could want. Give this place a try and you will be impressed!
其实并不偏僻，周边配套设施很全面，可以说是闹中取静。房子非常具有日本特色，以后去日本还会选择这里。
很好～很有调调的屋子，榻榻米很舒服，是来日本睡的最安稳的几天
Local shops we're great to patronise , Life supermarket had a massive variety of ready food, all within easy walking distance. Close to station to get to other areas, we were delighted.
我们很幸运的定到了Akanene家的住宿，一切都很完美。循着房主给的指示能很容易得找到家。第一次住在传统的日式房间里，感觉很兴奋。房子并没有因为上了年代而不方便，所有的生活设施都一应俱全。向所有人推荐这家民宿，想体验日式风情的最佳选择~

近くの米粉パンを買って掘りごたつで、まったりと朝ごはんを食べたりと満喫出来ました。気の利いた備品たちに、宿主さんのあたたかい心遣いを感じました。
本当にありがとうございました！
It was great during my stay, i like it. Easy to access super market, skytree and haneda airport.

Great place for a comfortable stay! Such great hospitality from Akanene and her husband. It's a nice comfortable walk from public transportation. The place is spacious and offers a great experience for those interested in living in a traditional Japanese house.
Great hosts,interesting tradional house, easy access to subway system
We loved staying here. Akanene and Mitsu were great hosts and the house was a lovely Japanese experience.
喜欢自己煮吃的的人或者吃不惯日本食物的同学可以去旁边超市采购食材，自己加工。在那里煮东西很方便。

Akanene桑真的是个非常好非常热情非常礼貌的一个房东！没出发之前就详细发来住址的具体位置，而且还有图片指导，非常清晰，一目了然！地铁站离房子走路大约十分钟，可以路过7-11，全家，罗森这三个便利店，还可以路过一个超市，而且地铁站去银座和新宿非常方便！房间里房东放着款待我们的小点心小饼干超级好吃，问房东哪里买的，房东立马来我们房间告诉我们详细地址，超级棒！我们回程的时候下超级大雨，房东二话没说开车把我们送到机场大巴，而且还进去教我们怎么买票，超级感谢Akanene桑的热情帮忙，简直快感动哭了，下次来东京一定要再住这！

Aka and Mitsu are dedicated hosts, really concerned about their guests' well-being, going way out of their way to be helpful, at the same time not being at all obtrusive.
My first experience with a traditional Japanese house, with modern amenities. The relationship between house and outdoors gave me insight into the culture.
A peaceful neighborhood.
Six delightful days and nights.

A lovely remnant of an older Tokyo, tucked away in a quiet neighbourhood. The hosts are lovely and very helpful, and the house is simple and unpretentious, but comfortable and charming, with artistic touches from the host’s own creative practice. Only a short walk to tap into the extensive Tokyo rail system, and some very good little local noodle bars and izakayas if you don’t want to venture further afield. Handy to supermarket, coin laundry, and convenience stores as well. Tall people you need to be wary of bumping your head, but otherwise we can’t fault it.

L'hébergement est dans un îlot de calme au milieu de la ville.
Il est très bien équipée. Bien situé! Je le recommande.

Sehr nettes, ein wenig alternativ eingerichtetes Häuschen. Heizungssystem etc. ein wenig alt, aber man hat alles was man braucht. Insbesondere das Schlafzimmer hat mir sehr gut gefallen, ein spartanisch eingerichteter Raum, der Klarheit und Einfachheit ausstrahlt. Ich habe mich sehr wohl gefühlt und wurde warmherzig empfangen und betreut.
Die U-Bahn nächste Metro Station ist bequem in 10 Minuten Fußweg erreichbar und die Anbindung an das übrige Netz sehr gut.
Ich würde diese Unterkunft jederzeit wieder buchen.
房东是个非常仔细的人提前发了非常详尽的自制地图，很好找。很有特色的房子的，寝具超棒，被子和枕头睡着超级舒服，好想知道哪里可以买到～～
역과는 조금 거리가 있지만 사장님 사모님 모두 친절하고 좋았어요❤️

Had a great stay at Akanene’s place. The house features authentic Japanese architecture with modern touch of renovation brought by the owner. If you are interested in how average Japanese life style was back in those days, this is the right place. (If you have members of disabled, elderly or extremely tall, be aware of the steps, stairways and overheads at some parts of the house)
The house may be old, but equipped with fully functioning A/C, heaters, air purifier and kitchen as well as mobile wifi arranged by the owner, etc. So, you can expect a very comfortable accommodation during your stay.
The house locates in a residential neighborhood in Tokyo, and you can naturally observe how average people’s life look like. It’s more or less, about 10 minutes away from the nearest train station, depends on how fast you walk. It’s pretty busy at the station and at the grocery stores, but very quiet around the house.
Hope you experience this lovely place soon!

Akanene's house is very clean and it is the traditional Japanese house.
The plates on the shelf in the living room were made by herself , very beautiful.
Thanks for giving me a great experience!
We arrived at 1:30AM and the owner waited them. The house is very quiet and very confortable.
Akanene's husband, Mitsu really tried to help us on directions in Tokyo.

It's a great experience to stay in this kind of old traditional Japanese wooden house with tatami. The details makes you feel in a time-travel 45 years backwards: old lights, light switches, sliding windows and doors. I love it.

Akanene's house is where you want to be. Located just a train ride away from most of the best places in Tokyo, this traditional house is impeccable and elegant. We had a great time here and were sad to leave.
整棟房屋風格清新獨特，房東還貼心的畫了我和朋友的照片貼在進門處，準備的小零食也很好吃～交通很方便，步行五分鐘就有公車站，可以直接換乘JR。（住吉站或錦系町站）去迪士尼或是天空樹都很快。下次有機會還想來住～
The hosts are super kind and helpful! The house is clean and comfortable and I would recommend everyone to stay here.
Very lovely house, big house with lots of space. Amazing hosts, highly recommend.

很有特色的日式房子，很大，住得很舒服，唯洗水間在樓下，有點不方便。想體驗日式風格的絕對推薦。
屋主及她丈夫都很好人，有一晚氣溫特別低，還特地過黎提醒我們，又怕我們單靠暖氣不足夠，教我們如何用「工具」(屋內有提供的，但不懂形容)增加溫度。
Great place to stay and close to public transport.
It is a traditional Japanese house. We just simply love it! We can feel the kind and beautiful heart of the owner. It provided everything we needed. A wonderful experience!!!

If you want to get a great sense of what a traditional Japanese home is like, look no further! Akanene has done a wonderful job remodeling this little bungalow. We appreciated the WiFi provided and the fact that there was no TV. Don't fret about the 15 minute walk to the metro, it is quick and makes a quick stop at the Life supermarket for groceries really convenient. Don't bring umbrellas, Akanene has those on hand. We made use of the coin laundry around the corner, which was clean and safe.
A charming place.
This is the perfect Japanese old house，Akanene is very thoughtful，we have a such great time here，hope we can live here again in the summer！

I have always wanted to try old Japanese style houses - like the ones you see on Hayao Miyazaki's movies. Old Folk Housen was perfect. (We even experienced our first earthquake lol) I haven't slept that well for a long time. It's fairly close to a lot of things: supermarkets, drug stores, restaurants and more. I didn't enjoy the small hotel rooms in Ginza, so getting out from the busy city was wonderful for me. This place is not only affordable, but also very spacious. Mitzu was an awesome host. He was able to help us a lot since our stay was right around the holidays. He's also very funny. I highly recommend anyone who's thinking about visiting Tokyo to live in this house.

非常愉快的居住体验！很遗憾我们只有最后一晚上有机会在Akanene的Airbnb住，但是能够在离开日本前体验一下日式房屋也是非常圆满了~房子非常的干净，需要用到的生活用品也一应俱全，房东很贴心。希望下次有机会可以多住几天。
It's a very pleasant experience at Akanene's place. The house is clean and cozy, with every thing you need. Thank the host for his hosting, and definitely recommend this place for those who want to experience a very local Japanese life.
This is a wonderful little house and perfect if you want to stay in a typical Tokyo neighbourhood. We really enjoyed the house. Akanene and Mitsu were very friendly and welcoming. Highly recommended.
This is a traditional house which we enjoyed for two weeks. It was comfortable, the shower is great and the hosts are really friendly and helpful.
非常好的房子。
정말 좋았어요! 뭔가 관광할 곳들의 중간 지점이라서 딱히 가까운곳도 없었지만 먼곳도 없어서 여행하기에 부담없고 좋았습니다! 그리고 주택가라서 일본의 현지느낌을 많이 받을 수 있어서 좋았습니다! 정말 추천해요!!

築70年の古民家ということですが、改装され、暖房設備もしっかりしていて、暖かかったです。掃除も行き届いていて快適でした。カーテンや壁の絵、こたつ布団などオーナーさんご自身で作られたものが使われていて、明るくかわいい雰囲気です。
駅まではすこし歩きますが、散歩にちょうどいいくらいでした。周囲を民家に囲まれているので、騒音には気をつけたほうがいいと思います。
オーナーさんがお優しい方で、安心しました。
また利用させていただきたいです！
非常特别的日式房子，房子所在江东区的住宅区，很安静。一层有通透的客厅和厨房，二层是地板床垫的卧室，干净通风、采光充分。房东Akane就住在前面一栋房子里，非常贴心，入住时有详细讲解，期间有任何问题都可以及时找到他们。入住期间正值狗年春节，在这里度过了非常特别的除夕夜。推荐两到三名出行、喜欢安静的旅行者入住。
房子很适合三口之家或和朋友同行，不行十分钟的大超市有所有生活用品、蔬菜水果、海鲜、肉、药品等等一应俱全非常方便！周边不是很繁华，但是古香古色的老房子和榻榻米体验不错👍
The hosts were great and very helpful.

前半程住六本木 跟繁华热闹的六本木形成鲜明的对比 这里很安静 居民也都是普通的日本人 住处离最近的地铁住吉站步行大概15分钟 住吉站有两条地铁线半藏门和新宿线 可以到达涩谷表参道和新宿 去其他景点换成也都很方便 离这里最近的商业区锦系町 半藏门线一站到达 那里有一家商场里面有很大的母婴商店阿卡佳 住吉站到住处的路上有很多便利店 地铁出口对面的拉面店和过桥后的烤肉店 居酒屋味道都不错 值得一试 主人很周到 提前把路线发给我 到了之后还特意一一介绍了家里的环境设施 总之是很满意的一次入住 冬天屋里略冷 春夏会更舒服

Pour une authentique expérience de maison traditionnelle japonaise en plein cœur de Tokyo, vous ne trouverez pas mieux. Le logis d.Akanene est un appartement complet, chambre tatamis futons à l’étage, petite cuisine, salle de douche, grande pièce à vivre, petit jardin, dans une rue très calme. Akanene est un hôte parfait qui donne toutes les indications nécessaires sous forme de photos ainsi que des appli pratiques pour un voyage au Japon.
Nous recommandons tout particulièrement
距离成田机场1个多小时的地铁行程 住的地方交通比较方便 周边买东西也方便 跟当地交流也基本能理解  房主也热情  平常基本都是在外面走动 屋内的时间不长 总的来说挺好  浴室算是很不错的洗起来很带劲 老房子防风保暖性能差些  3月去还是很冷 好在是有壁炉和空调

This is by far one of the coolest places to stay! The house is old and has traditional touches to it and has everything you will need.  The hosts were kind and supplied us with thorough instructions on how to get to the house as well as using the amenities. I highly recommend staying here!

we are very happy to have stayed at the old folk house. the place is very comfortable and is beautifully decorated by akanene, who has her atelier right next door. koto-ku is a calm residential area close to the centre with a big park and good local restaurants. thank you so much!
Akanene's place was fantastic. If you want to enjoy the Japanese lifestyle and atmosphere, you can't go past here! A very helpful host with alot of local knowledge.
周围有大型生活超市和N多便利店。典型日本民居，安静，离地铁站不远。唯一缺点就是房子容易透风，由于是传统日式建筑，晚上睡觉时风会把窗户吹得有点响，睡眠浅的人可能会受影响。
不错的当地生活体验 房间很大 两个人住足够了 房东第一天就来教使用各种设施 附近也有大的超市 挺方便的

This has been our best Airbnb experience to date!
Old Folk House is a beautiful 70-year old Japanese home, it is utterly charming and we felt immediately at home.
The hosts, Akanene and Mitso, were brilliant and provided everything we could have asked for - a warm welcome, great directions and lots of thoughtful touches throughout.
It was a perfect end to our honeymoon and we would stay at Old Folk House again in a heartbeat - in fact, we didn’t really want to leave! Thank you.
非常完美的入住体验，房子是很特色的日式房屋，位于江东区一个安静的街道上。房子很温馨舒适，也很好找到，离住吉地铁站大概15分钟的路程，房子里设备很齐全，可以自己下厨，最最重要的是，房子的主人很热情，推荐入住，不会后悔哦

Beautiful traditional Japanese house in a very quiet neighbourhood. Akanene gave us plenty of info on how to reach the house. The place was clean and very comfortable. I'd definitely go back there next time I'm in Tokyo and I'd recommend the place to my friends.

31개월 아이 두명과 엄마들만 함께한 여행이었습니다. 숙소로 들어가는 파란문은 작고 아담하며 문을 통과해 좁은 마당을 지나야 집으로 들어갈수 있는데 그길은 흙과 돌이 깔려있는 유모차를 끌어야 하는 우리에게는 조금 불편했습니다. 하지만 오갈때 마다 마당에 있는 이름모를 꽃향기가 너무 향기롭게 느껴졌습니다. 무슨꽃인지 물어보고 싶었지만 언어가 되지않아 패스했구요. 지하철역에서 숙소까지는 걸어서 10분정도 , 오는길에 로손편의점 2개와 패밀리마트, 세븐일레븐이 있어요. 아참 네잎클로버 모양의 대형마트도 들려보세요! 식제품이나 맥주같은것들이 돈키호테나 편의점보다 쌉니다. 그리고 근처에 맛있어 보이는 꼬치집이 두군데나 있는데 저녁에 그곳에서 맥주한잔 하고싶었지만, 10시 이후에는 아이들과 입장 금지라고 하네요. 아쉬웠습니다ㅠㅠ
그리고 룸컨디션은 대체적으로 집이 조명이며 다 어두워서 먼지가 있어도 보이지 않을것 같구요. 바닥에 깔려있는 연두색 카페트는 조금 지저분해 보여 앉기가 꺼려졌으며 코타츠에 덮혀있는 이불과 방석도 습해서인지 축축했답니다. 그냥 테이블로만 이용했구요 테이블 위에 준비해주신 과자 간식은 의외로 맛있었어요 ㅋㅋ 아침에 일어났을때 창문을 열면 진짜 감동이에요. 나무가 바람에 살랑살랑 , 새 울음소리. 진짜 힐링됩니다. 번화가에서 위치적으로는 멀어서 조금 불편했지만 숙소는 낭만적이었어요.

Akanene is a very enthusiastic host, he offered a very detailed access route in advance so that it did not take us long to find the place. I and my girlfriend stayed 3 days there and the house is really Japanese traditional style. Sitting at the lounge with a cup of tea, listening to the rain surrounded by greens, what a wonderful day! What's more, the house is decorated with Akanene's art work. From this I can tell that he must be a good artist. It's a little pity that we and the host did not have much time to have a chat due to the tight schedule. Akanene, wishing you all the bests!
此度は ありがとうございました！
From Wu & Enri
very nice
すごく素早く対応していただいて、お家も清潔ですごく助かりました。ありがとうございました。
第一天晚上到民宿已经是凌晨了，房东还一直等我们，到了之后告诉我们各种东西的用法，非常感谢！我们两个人住整栋楼，空间很大，晚上睡的是榻榻米，很日式，周边是居民区，很安静，离地铁站10多分钟的路程，喜欢安静，想体验当地生活的朋友，推荐这家民宿。

It's a quaint little house that is pretty easy to locate once you get a hang of the area. It's an old house, so every door you open, every step you take, there's a little squeak or creak that came along with it, but we didn't mind at all. The hosts were really nice, helpful, and even came out to greet us when we checked in. Responses through AirBnB were usually within 2 hours or less. The house was really clean and wonderful. Overall, the experience was wonderful, especially being our first experience in Japan. Just one thing to be careful of is the mosquitoes, haha.

距离地铁口12分钟。
走出街口有餐厅和便利店。
距离雷门浅草寺6公里，打车2000日元。
房间干净，睡觉的地方也干净。
很有日本feel的一个地方。
很local.
場所は駅からちょっと歩きますが結構いろんな所に30分ぐらいで行けますし、周囲コンビニやスーパーがあって便利です。部屋はきれいで古きながら住み心地がいい部屋でした！大家さんも返事がすごく早くて親切でいい感じでした。初めての民宿体験ですが、大変満足しました。

感谢Akanene家的房子，我和小伙伴在这里住了3晚，预定后的各种问题都能迅速得到回复，尤其感谢帮我们预定了“备长”的鳗鱼饭，好好吃😋
江东是住宅区，Akanene-san的房子离住吉地铁站差不多步行10分钟，附近有个大超市，营业到夜里1点，很方便，周围居酒屋也不少，但是有英文菜单的不多，我们找到一家，味道也很不错
距新宿、银座地铁大概25mins左右，也很方便，有机会还会再次入住：谢谢
일부러 전통가옥 느낌으로 예약한 건데 가성비는 잘 모르겠어요 저는!.. 이런 느낌을 좋아하시는 분이라면 잘 맞으실 거 같지만 저는 호텔이나 신축 숙소와 더 잘 맞는 성향이라 좀 아쉬운 부분이 있었습니다.. 그래도 일본 숙소들 치고 넓어서 그 점은 편했어요! 호스트 분은 너무 친절하십니다 :)
A warm and kind guy … I think I  will come the folk house again for the next time : P
Decoboco’s place was excellent. Great location out of the more touristy areas, but easy access to the center through public transportation. The place is very clean, with everything needed and clean.
极度推荐在东京长期住宿的朋友们选择decoboco，这家旅店就像是在东京城市森林里面的一颗深海明珠，复古的风格和传统的风格十分适合你去感受日本快节奏中那加杂着的惬意的生活风格。十分推荐大家能抽出一天的时间就坐在这家老房子中感受他。最后，希望您不要忽略在客厅桌子上的那本日记本，那是房东十分珍惜的珍宝，也希望您能为此添加上属于你的一笔无价之宝。

It was an amazing trip!
I have a lot wonderful memories in this house and Mr Docoboco and I ride bicycle around Tokyo for an hour...it was crazy but I love it!
Thx for everything again!

到达那天因为在机场不见了一个行李箱，来回折腾，比预计时间晚了许多。房东听说后主动提出去T-CAT接我们。到房东家里晚上十一点了，房东过来告知空调等如何使用。
在机场忘记取WiFi,到达后幸亏房东有一个便携式的借给我们用。中间几天去日光，房东依然借给我们用，真是特别感谢。
去日光那天，房东早上七点多开车送我们去浅草坐车，特别暖心。还给画了地图，介绍周边好吃的。孩子把卫生间门反锁了，他一大早过来修，真是不好意思了。
房东的妻子还会做盘子，入住期间一直使用handmade碗和盘子，走得时候还买了几个，都很漂亮。
在这里住的十天，我们度过了美好的时光。我们全家都特别喜欢东京的这个特别的日式的家，希望下次再去住一段时间。

Very nice, traditional-styled place in Tokyo. Everything is well-reachable and the place is still very quite. It is like a little oasis in the city, with wodden floor, self-made ceramics and plants in front of the house. Even the typhoon could not harm this idyllic place during our stay. The hosts are very friendly and the communication is very quick and so detailed that it is easy to find even for newcomers to Japan.
very nice spot, if you are looking for quiet and chill and that is it! also nice household, recommend.

My friend and I loved staying here. It was clean and well organised and was  quiet which we appreciated. The instructions and directions for check-in were really helpful and clear and communication was great throughout.
是一栋很具有特色的传统日式榻榻米房子。房东很好，我们第一天到了很晚，他还一直等着。最后一天走，因为赶去买东西，居然忘记退房时间了，房东很客气的让我们在那里休息。很推荐来日本自由行的游客来哦！
Nice apartment with very kind and communicative hosts. The house is very private, without noises and has everything you need.

The hosts were really special; we had a lovely connection. Communication was outstanding with guidance to find the classical Japanese two floor flat. Whatever you need us there and the location is very nice for Tokyo visits - both very quite and classical, yet near to where ever you want to visit by subways-:) Highly recommended!

I was pleasantly surprised when I arrived here. I was unsure if I would enjoy the experience of staying in a more traditional space and I loved it. It is unique and unlike any of the other homes I stayed in during my time in Japan. Mitsu is very responsive and one of my most favorite parts of staying here was learning about his family history. The space itself is large comparative to the two other places I have stayed in Tokyo in the past and it truly feels like a home. I definitely recommend.
古民家式ではありますが、非常に手入れの行き届いた清潔な空間で満足でした。暖房に関しても十分な設備が整っており、冬でも快適に過ごせました。

説明もとても丁寧で良かったです！
また機会があれば泊まりたいです！
A cozy place to stay and to have experience to feel japan house.
是一間很有風格的日式房子，暖氣設備充足。房東先生人很親切！有機會還會選擇唷！
코타츠를 경험할 수 있어 좋았습니다.
房子非常漂亮，非常干净，房东准备了口罩！房东非常热情，来的时候教我们怎么坐车，到了以后在沟通不是非常顺畅(房东会点中文，会点英文，中英文混合沟通)的情况下把房子仔细介绍了一遍，还告诉我们附近什么好吃，什么店比较出名，看我们绕来绕去没找到，索性带我们去，走的时候帮我们叫车！非常非常赞！绝对是日本好房东！唯一不足的就是浴室和洗手间比较冷，哈哈哈，可以克服！
とても良かったです。ありがとうございました！

とても素敵なところでした！
また利用したいと思っています！

Decoboco was the perfect place to end our long trip in Japan.
It is so quaint and spacious that I immediately wanted to move in!
And all the little thoughtful touches made it very welcoming and comfortable.
There is not a lot around in the immediate neighborhood, but we walked to some good cafes and restaurants (Allpress coffee and Makin Thai). And it was nice to be in a very non-touristy area.
Akane and Mitsuhiko were such sweet and generous hosts that they made our stay so easy and low stress. We really enjoyed chatting with them and it was so nice to leave with the sense of true Japanese hospitality.
I don’t think you can find a better deal in Tokyo for the amount of space and character that decoboco provides!

도쿄에서 갑자기 아픈 일이 있었는데, 본인 일처럼 정말 따듯하게 그리고 진심으로 대해주셨습니다 너무너무 감사하게 생각합니다! :)
숙소도 깨끗하고 분위기 좋아요 일본 가옥 체험해보고 싶으신 분들께 꼭 추천합니다 !!! 🤍
Decoboco is one of the best place i lived in Japan! The spacious and clean rooms enable me to rest very well. I will definitely book again next time i come to Tokyo.
静かで落ち着いて過ごせました。

The accommodations was homey and unique. We slept sooo well on the fluffy floor mattresses. The shower was also big and easy to use. The space is well decorated and we really enjoyed our stay here. There was also a festival in the neighborhood that we got to participate it, which made it more special. This place gave us the peace and rest away from the center city. The host was proactive with his instructions and everything was easy to access. There’s a also a huge Life market nearby and the subway station was about 10 minutes away by foot. Even a Gold gym 20 minutes away.
In a very artsy environment within a traditional Japanese home. Really liked the smell of the rush ground 🌱
숙소가 일단 너무너무 귀엽고 마당에 정원과 집이 정말 예뻐요. 호스트분도 친절하셨어요. 다만 정원이 있고 옛건물이라는 점은 감안하셔야하고 깔끔하다고 할 순 없을 것 같아요. 역에서 조금 멀긴 하지만 묵어볼법한 숙소에요

전체적으로 일본갬성을 느끼싶다면 추천!
집이 좀 오래되어서 그런 부분도 괜찮으시다면 추천!
동네가 조용하고 일본 감성을 느낄수 있어 좋았고 호스트분 너무 친절하세요🤗
너무 좋았음! 다음에 도쿄에 또 온다먄 또 들르겠삼
We really loved our stay! The house is extremely beautiful and it shows the love and care they have put in the renovation and the decoration.
A warm, cozy, and relaxing place to stay!

일정이 길다면 정말 다시 한 번 묵고싶을 정도로 편안한 숙소였습니다.
대문을 지나 걸어가야만 집이 나오기때문에 프라이빗해서 더 불안하지도 않고 편안했어요
사장님이 굉장히 친절하셔서 너무 감사했습니다
The house is very lovely and thoughtfully designed. The owner is very nice and responsive. Appreciate your help in calling us a taxi

今回は2回目の宿泊でした。

全てのゲストにおすすめの宿泊先です。

숙소 위치는 도심과 살짝 떨어져있어서 조용하고 한적한 곳에 있습니다 숙소에 물은 온천수와 비슷하게 따뜻하게 잘나왔어요!! 2층은 난방이없어서 살짝 추웠는데, 이불 속에서 조금 누워있으면 보온이 잘되서 땀날 정도로 잘 수 있어요 저희가 늦은 시간에 체크인을 하러왔는데도 호스트님이 엄청 친절하게 맞아주시고, 설명도 최대한 알아들을 수 있게 얘기해주셔서 정말 감사했어요,,,! 숙소 청결해서 걱정하나도 안하셔도 되구 다다미가 있어서 따뜻하게  몸 녹일수있어요 덕분에 편히 쉬었다가 갑니다 ~~
나중에 또 들르고싶어요! 잘 머물었어요. 친구의 첫 일본여행이 데코보코 숙소로 인해 좀 더 특별해졌어요. 숙소가 넓어서 많은 인원을 수용할 수 있을 거 같아요.

Staying here was a highlight of our trip. We felt so welcomed and at home. The house is filled with the hosts beautiful pottery and was lovely to stay in. We look forward to staying here next time we are in Tokyo!

너무나 만족했어요
이 숙소가 제 여행을 완벽하게 만들어주었습니다
감겅이 너무 좋고 주인분도 너무 친절하셨어요
집 근처 세븐일레븐도 있고 코타츠 복층 정말 뭐 하나 빼놓을거 없이 좋았습니다 다음 여행에 또 만나요!
They are a great host who goes above and beyond and very responsive . They allow us to leave our luggage so we can go to fish market ,would love to stay again if time allows .

This home is so beautiful, it feels so cozy & homely, there was beautiful art work all around the home, and was very spacious! It is in a very quiet location with a very accessible train station to get to other parts of Tokyo. The host was very kind and a great communicator! We will definitely stay again when we come back to Tokyo!
Amazing experience, excellent location, excellent host, beautiful house. Highly recommended to anyone who want a Home when travelling in Tokyo.
This place is so special and a great place to come back to after a long day of exploring! Will absolutely stay again the next time I'm in Tokyo. Thank you so much for the lovely stay!

Our favorite AirBnb ever! The photos do not do it justice. Very cute inside with personalized touches. It was our first time sleeping on Japanese style beds and we were nervous it would be uncomfortable, but it was wonderful. Peaceful, private, close to public transport, and our host was so kind. We will make a point to stay here again next time we’re in Tokyo!

We had a spectacular stay at a beautiful, peaceful home! After spending busy days in Tokyo, it was lovely to walk back to a calm, quiet place at the end of the day. The hosts were incredibly responsive and kind, one of my favorite AirBnB experiences to date!
thank you so much for letting us stay at your cozy home, it was a very unique experience
Ce logement est une perle rare, tout super propreté et aussi les céramiques. Merci beaucoup
내집처럼 편하고 깨끗하고 너무너무 귀여운 숙소입니다.
Thank you for letting us stay in a lovely place!
친절하시고 숙소상태도 매우 좋습니다. 동네는 번화가와 멀지만 매우 조용합니다. 일본 가정집을 체험하고싶다면 추천합니다.
We had a great stay in a lovely place, with a friendly host! If visiting in the Winter though, do wrap up warm as it gets very cold!
Great experience!

What a beautiful place to stay! I would definitely recommend to everyone. The hosts were also very helpful and kind. :)
일본 가서 호텔에만 묵다가 매체에서 보는 옛날 집에 머물 수 있어서 좋았습니다! 코타츠도 있고 히터도 있어서 2월이었지만 괜찮았어요! 무엇보다 호스트가 친절하고 식사에도 초대해주어서 즐거웠습니다. 일본에 와서 일본인과 대화할 수 있는 기회까지!!! 걸어가는 게 조금 힘들순 있지만 일본 사회에 녹아들어보고 싶다는 분께는 강력 추천합니다!!
房子非常非常漂亮～乾淨又整潔，環境維護得很好，推薦大家可以訂這個住宿，會有很美好的體驗！
예약하기ㅡ어려운 곳 같은데 일정이 맞아서 갈 수 있어서 정말 다행이었어요!! 코타츠도 엄청 따뜻하고 2층 침실 잠 진짜 잘 와요! 행복하게 머무르다 갑니당 😍

Decoboco’s property is truly incredible. Like others have mentioned, the photos do not do it justice. It’s so cozy, colorful (and fun), while providing the traditional Japanese home experience. I loved the personal touch at the front door, super cozy bedding, and honestly the whole place. Location is a bit further out from the metro than in other places I’ve stayed, but it’s a lovely residential area, with 7-11 and Yamato right around the corner. I would love to stay here again during my next trip.

도쿄 물가가있어서 그런지 가성비는 아니네요.

Felt like at home and booked this place again for a whole week. Lovely area, house, garden and lovely owners.
We could definitely live here. It has character and a lot of live put into it.
귀엽고 좋은 향기가 나는 숙소였습니다

일단 숙소가 너무 예뻤고.. 다다미 있는 숙소를 눈에 불을 켜고 찾아다녔는데 이 집이 일본 감성 대박이었어요.

A nice accommodation. House is for people who would like a feeling of old traditional Japanese housing. Very quiet neighbourhood, owner was friendly. The bathroom and kitchen although original could benefit from some facelift. It was a nice stay.
终于住上了哆啦A梦里的房间，孩子爬上爬下的很开心。本想租一间房，没想到租了一栋楼。楼上楼下睡五六个人都没问题。东京的房间都是又贵又小，这个房间性价比超高。

숙소가 매우 아늑하고 좋았습니다.
코타츠, 다다미, 그리고 하오리도 있어서 일본 가정을 그대로 느낄수 있었습니다.
지하철에서는 좀 떨어져 있지만, 그 때문에 번잡하지 않은 일본 가정집에서 사는 느낌 그대로를 느낄 수 있었던것 같습니다.
그리고 무엇보다 중요한. 에어콘도 빵빵해서 덥지 않아요 ^^
Very special experience in a traditional Japanese house.
非常漂亮且有传统风格的屋子！设施齐全且温馨，非常喜欢 推荐！

Nice place and the host is very kind
The location is abit far from the centrer
너무 완벽하고 예쁜 숙소예요

Boede i Decobocos dejlige baggårdshus. Dejligt privat og stille. Boligen var som beskrevet. En virkelig lækker bolig hvor man nemt føler sig hjemme. Ligger perfekt i forhold til offentlig transport så man nemt kan komme ind til det mere centrale Tokyo. Hvis vi kommer tilbage til Tokyo en anden gang vil vi med sikkerhed tjekke om denne bolig er ledig.
非常好的日式风格房间 性价比很高 地段也很不错 宁静祥和 想体验和风的不要错过
Das Haus war sehr sehr schön, es gab viel Platz und alles war sehr gemütlich. Zum ankommen in Tokio war es genau gut, wir konnten ruhige Momente im Garten genießen und fühlten uns wie zuhause.

일본을 잔뜩 느낄 수 있는 너무 아름다운 숙소였습니다. 호스트분도 연락 너무 잘 받아주시고, 체크인 시 설명도 꼼꼼하게 해주셨습니다.
도쿄에 간다면 또 머무르고싶어요. 감사합니다.
Fantastic host very friendly and helpful, nice place to stay. Cozy and warm in a quiet suburb. It is a wee way to central Tokyo but the reasonable lodging rates makes uo for it.  Highly recommend!

Perfect!
In spite of we take contact late (one week before we come), Ayu was very helpfull and accomodating. We spent a great time in their housse with 2 very discreet roomate.
The housse is a perfect japon housse, and the room with a tatami is what we were looking for a japonesse housse!

ホストの方がとても親切で話しやすい、尋ねやすい人でした。
家は旅館のようで、哀愁がありました。

My family arrived at Kokubunji station which was close to Aya's house at midnight, but Aya was waiting for us as she had already told us. Since it was raining, we took a taxi, and it only took 5 minutes. The next morning, my husband and I took a walk around the house, and it was cozy and peaceful area.

Nice old little house in quiet neighbourhood.
The guest room has a beautiful tatami floor and is very neat and clean.
Aya the host is very helpful and her english is very good.

Aya est une hôte parfaite. Elle m'attendait à la gare de Kokubunji à mon arrivée de Narita, pour m'accompagner jusqu'à la maison, qui est à 5 minutes en bus et 15-20 minutes à pied de la gare. Kokubunji est un quartier tokyoite très typique et assez plaisant. La maison est une charmante maison japonaise traditionnelle et la chambre est très spacieuse et très agréable. Une excellente expérience.

Aya was very kind and met us walking up from the train station. The house was very clean and tidy. The room was a beautiful traditional Japanese room with a futon.

We had an excellent experience staying here. Aya was very good at keeping in touch with us through out our trip, with very good english, and made sure settled in well.

Would 100% recommend staying here :)

房東非常的輕切，有什麼需要房東就會盡可能幫忙處理。
長、短期居住都適合，有廚房也可以自炊，但雖然房東會英文，畢竟其他房客都是日本人，建議需要有基本的日語溝通能力會比較好，有交流也會住的比較開心。
因為是舊式建築，隔音不是很好，晚上請注意音量。
非常感謝房東盡心盡力的接待。

3週間ほど宿を利用しました。
最寄り駅までホストの方が迎えていただき、宿まで案内されなが近辺情報を教えていただき大変助かりました。
最寄り駅のJR国分寺駅にはマルイやラーメン店などの飲食店もあり、長期滞在生活で不便をほとんど感じませんでした！
都心などへも30〜40分程度で行けるため、交通の便が良かったです。
また、大学や高校も近くにあるためか学生へのサービスのある飲食店もありました^^
宿と駅付近が充実していたためかとても充実した滞在ができました。
ありがとうございますm(_ _)m

Arriving at Aya's house was like coming into the home of old friends, or friends-of-friends.  It was such a warm welcome and she and her mother did their best to prepare the room perfectly for me.  Aya was very helpful in making sure I had everything that I needed and was easy to contact if I ever had a question.  The house is outside of Tokyo centre and therefore very quiet.  I wasn't in town for touristic reasons, so was perfect for me.  I spent much time in the room quietly working and preparing my next trips, enjoying comfort of tatami floor and wooden cupboards.  The first walk to the house could be difficult without their guidance or good map, so just prepare yourself, it's not right around the corner from the train station.  Highly recommend staying with Aya!!
아야상은 정말로 친절한 호스트입니다. 언제나 최선을 다하는 모습이 인상적이었습니다. 다만, 아쉬운 점이 있다면 지하철역에서 마을 버스를 타거나 30분 정도 걸어야 합니다.  주택가 1층에 위치한 개인실은 커튼이 있으면 더욱 좋을 것입니다. 부엌은 앞으로 더욱 청결에 신경써야할 부분입니다. 주변에 예쁜 집들이 많이 있어서 좋았습니다.

Aya씨는 정말 정말 친절한 호스트입니다.
Aya씨의 섬세한 배려와 친절 덕분에 일본에서의 여행이 더더욱 즐거웠습니다!
다음 일본여행때도 이 숙소에서 꼭 머물고 싶습니다^▽^
다다미식 방이 참 좋았고,
역에서 집까지의 거리는 조금 멀긴했지만,주변에 예쁜 집도 많아서 아름다운 풍경을 보며 걷다보면 금방이라고 느껴집니다.
일본의 문화를 느낄 수 있는 집이었습니다.정말 정말 추천합니다⊙▽⊙!
Ayaさんは本当に本当に親切なホストです。
Ayaさんの繊細な配慮と親切のおかげで日本での旅行がもっと楽しかったです!
次の日本旅行の時もこの宿所で必ず滞在したいです^▽。
畳式部屋が本当によかったし,
駅から家までの距離はちょっと遠いんしたが、周辺にきれいな家も多くて美しい風景を見ながら歩いてみると、すぐだと感じられます。
日本の文化を感じることができる家でした。本当に本当に推薦します⊙▽⊙!

武蔵美入試で3泊しました。
もう一回、入試でくるとしたら、同じよう、ここにします。
무사비 입시로 3박4일 지냈는데 혹 다시 입시를하게 된다면 이곳을 또 예약하고 싶습니다.

AYA和YOKO人非常的親切
房間位於安靜住宅區
離國分寺站乘公車10分鐘 票價相當便宜
附近有巨大的超市
想自己下廚也沒有問題
想體驗日本民家生活的人務必去玩玩!
首先，房东很热情，房间是榻榻米的，可以很好的体验当地民俗风情，还邀请我们吃寿喜烧，房子距离车站不远，出行很方便，房东还把自行车借我们，总的来说非常满意！
I was impressed in the friendship and place. Like home and comfortable to stay.
Aya is such a warmhearted person. She is here to ask your questions all the time and tries her best to help you. It's definitely a great time to talk with her:)))

일본식 2층 일반 가정집 스타일이었고 저희는 그 중 1층집의 방을 이용했습니다 넓이는 성인 남자 3명이 여유롭게 잘 수 있는 큰 방이었고 수납장 ,포트 ,충전 케이블이 기본적으로 있었습니다
우리가 생각할 수 있는 전형적인 일본식 스타일의 방이었고 깔끔했습니다 모녀 두 분이 에어비엔비를 운영하시는데 제가 더 죄송할 정도로 잘해주셔서 너무나도 기분이 좋았습니다
처음에 저는 집주인 분들과 같이 지낸다는게 조금 불편하지 않을까 걱정했는데 같이 차 한잔 마시거나 잠깐씩 얘기했던 그 시간이 저의 일본여행 중에서 가장 소중한 시간 중 하나가 되었습니다 그리고 무엇보다 이렇게 싸고 넓고 멋진 곳을 이용할 수 있었다는게 행운이었다고 생각합니다

よこさんとあやさんがとても親切だし、部屋も可愛いです！
オススメですよ！

在这里住了一个月， 非常感谢彩さん&陽子さん的照顾。我很喜欢Yoko的笑容，希望Yoko每天都能笑得很开心。一开始害怕我住不习惯真的是帮助了很多， 谢谢Yoko！ 后期和Aya一起去吃了美食，还聊了很多，Aya和传统的日本女生不一样，个性，很有自己的想法，也谢谢Aya！  ここで一ヶ月ぐらい泊まっていたんで、彩さんと陽子さんのお世話になり、ありがとうございます。 陽子さんの笑顔が最高で、毎日良い気持ちでこういうお笑顔してほしいです^_^。最初私1人で慣れないことを心配してくれて、いろんなところで助けてくれました。(日本語会話の練習も^_^) 、ありがとうございます！ その後、彩さんと一緒に1人で入りにくいお店に行って、美味しいフードを試して、色々話しました。彩さんは個性的で普通の日本女性と違って、素晴らしいと思って、これからも自分が望んでいるライフスタイルに向かって頑張ってください！

We are very pleased to stayed at Aya & Yoko's house. First, a very flexible check in & check out time. We can check in the morning or late night.
At the first night we were stay, Yoko was waiting until midnight to welcoming a new guest.
Yoko is a very friendly & kind host, she explained us everything we need at her house with her smile at her face all the time. Her english was exellent.
Aya & Yoko's House is a traditional house. We slept in Futon and tatami for real.
The room was very tidy, clean, and well organized and they put some message to help us to use some ammenities.
Aya & Yoko provide everything we need. even they put sanitary napkins in the toilet. Very apreciate it.
About Aya's uncle, he is very quite person, we met him once, and Yoko said actually he is a good person but not really know how to talk to a new person.
The location is in the middle of quite settlement and also Aya home is soo quite. Even we can hear another people from another room talking. And out foot step feel so sounded but no problem at all with the quite situation.
We stayed at Kokubunji to visit our related and if we coming again to Kokubunji we'll stay at Aya & Yoko's House again.

I don't know where to begin ... currently I'm having homesickness as both Yoko and Aya were really nice to me. I felt I got my mom back again! When I arrived, Yoko welcomed me with a nice snack and a cup of hot tea. She came all the way to meet with me by taking a train. I was going out that night and coming back late, so Yoko kindly walked with me to Kokubunji station to make sure that I can find my way home after a city bus stops running. A few days later, Aya came to visit to meet with me despite her busy schedule. She is a young energetic lady who has a big dream. Not only I got my private nice tatami room, but also I got nice housemates and really enjoyed doing things with them. It was kinda like I went back to college days. Next time, I would like to bring my whole family from the U.S. I'm sure they will enjoy meeting with my new Japanese family.　只今ホームシック中です。お母さんの陽子さんとお嬢さんの彩さん、お２人ともそれはそれはよくしてくださいました。母の一周忌での里帰りでしたが、私にはもう泊まれる実家がありません。母は亡くなる数年前から認知症を患っていたので私の頭の中ではずっと前から母はいなくなっていました。日本行きも気が重くできれば避けたい思いでした。が、国分寺のおうちに泊めていただいて本当によくリラックスでき初めて旅先で熟睡することができました。同じ時にステイしていたハウスメートとも仲良くなり今度はアメリカに戻りたくない気持ちでいっぱいになりました。家の周りの環境はとてもよく、夜遅くに帰ってきても安全でした。国分寺駅周辺には以前からあるお店と新しく開発された駅ビルがうまく共存していて、買い物にも食事にも困りませんでした。ぶんバスという北口の地域をつなぐバスが１００円で一時間に２本出ておりスーツケース等重いものを持っているときはとても重宝しました。近くに神社とお寺もあり、ドイツ風のパン屋さんもあり、一気にこの町が大好きになりました。またお邪魔させていただきます、いやまた帰省しますね💛
In a word, you can enjoy the peaceful and overall awesome stay.

I love being in Japan and this stay is one great reason. The time in conversation with Yoko was amazing, warm and inspiring.
Thank you!

We really liked this place,
stylish japanese house! Very noiseless and comfortable!
Aya and Yoko are very nice person! Highly recommended! Thank you!
Good and friendly host , will return here if visiting tokyo
Id recommend it to all my friends and acquaintances.
没有洗漱用具，距离车站比较远，房子有些老旧，可以听得到楼上下声音，距离超市也不是很近，附近没有便利店，没有早餐，这些都麻烦自带。但是房东很热情，楼下的饮水机可以随便喝水，可以泡浴也可以洗衣服。
国分寺駅北口から30分ごとにバス(100円)があったので便利でした。

ห้องพักราคาถูกมาก ประหยัด ห้องพักสไตล์ญี่ปุ่นที่พักสะอาด และการต้อนรับอย่างดีเหมือนเพื่อน ทำให้รู้สึกอุ่นใจมากที่ไปพักที่นี้ มีอะไรก็สามารถปรึกษาคนในบ้านได้ ทำให้รู้สึกเหมือนอยู่บ้านเราเอง ดีมากคะ จะกลับไปพักอีกเมื่อกลับมาญี่ปุ่นแน่นอนคะ :)
公園綠地愜意的生活

没想到能在东京住到性价比这么高的地方！
国分寺站离三鹰、吉祥寺几个站，去新宿也就大概半小时，地铁站楼上就是大商场，有muji和优衣库之类的，周边各种店应有尽有~虽然屋子离国分寺站稍微有点点远，走路要16、7分钟，但是一路上有很多便利店和商店，每天都会顺路进去买很多吃的~
Aya，Yoko和Anna都十分热情贴心~入住当天挺晚才到达，但Aya还是很详细地给我们介绍屋子的各种使用方法，还给我们推荐了很多餐厅~房间里各种设备都很齐全，周边也很安静，住的很舒服~
ありがとうございます！お世話になりました！(^_^)

the room was very spacious and anna was quick to respond to inquiries. kokubunji station is the closest JR station to the house and is also a stop on the narita express, making it very convenient for travellers.
Beautiful people,I had a wonderful time at Kokubunji Yooko and Aya 's place !
お世話になりました。オーナーの彩さん、陽子さんとも素晴らしい方でした。細やかなお心遣いに感謝しています。またお会いできる日を楽しみにしています。本当にありがとうございました。

Really enjoyed my stay here. Before we even checked in, Aya and Yoko have been in touch with us and they were all eager to answer all of our questions about the place. Aya also met with us at the train station to pick us up which was definitely helpful and much appreciated. The house was really nice and i loved our traditional japanese room. They also have bikes which you use for free so it’s really convenient to go around the city using it. Their kitchen is also free of use and everything in there can also be used. Yoko also gave us fruits on our last night at their place. I love how quiet and refreshing their neighbourhood is. Definitely recommend!

Отлично отдохнула! Очень радушные и гостеприимные хозяева. Айя встретила меня у станции и лично проводила до дома. Крайне предусмотрительно так как дом найти довольно сложно! Комната в японском стиле, позволяет погрузится в культуру (хотя матрас на полу с непривычки может показаться жестковатым). Так же Айя очень помогла мне в поиске конкретных мест и магазинов в Токио, за что ей большое спасибо. Следует заметить, что ни Айя, ни ее бабушка Йоко в этом доме не живут - дом полностью сдается, но жильцы очень милые и радушные - дона девушка из Европы, одна из Японии. К кухне общим помещениям претензий нет, но кондиционер работает только в комнате и немного в кухне, так что в жаркую пору немного душно. Также стоит сказать, что стоит рассматривать данный вариант при хотя бы минимальном знании английского языка, так как ни Айя, ни ее бабушка не говорят по-русски. В целом рассматриваю опыт проживания как хороший с учётом всех достоинств и недостатков могу поставить 4+.
Aya和Yoko的房子很爽，住這裡也沒有什麼問題。他們很熱情，鄰近非常放鬆安全和安靜。房間和廁所都很乾淨。這裡會很舒服，當然推薦住這家！

Halo Aya & Yoko,
Kami berdua sudah sampai di Indonesia! Perjalanan pulang sangat panjang dan melelahkan tapi masih terbayang betapa menyenangkannya berlibur di Jepang :)
Kami berdua sangat senang menginap di rumah Aya & Yoko, selain bisa merasakan tidur di kamar tradisional Jepang, memakai futon di atas tatami dengan pintu geser menghadap ke taman ! Kamarnya terbilang luas & bersih, dilengkapi fasilitas tambahan yang menambah kenyamanan seperti pendingin ruangan juga mesin cuci, lemari es, dispenser yang dipergunakan bersama.
Lingkungannya juga sangat aman & tenang. Ada bus mungil tapi bisa diandalkan dalam membawa kami pergi dan dari stasiun setiap harinya (perhatikan jadwalnya, ada jam malam ;)) 20 menit berjalan kaki, 5 menit dengan bus.
Belum keramah tamahan si empunya rumah yang senantiasa berusaha membantu kami baik usulan maupun referensi yang baik.
Semoga kami bisa segera berlibur kembali ke Jepang & menginap di rumah Aya & Yoko kembali !
Velmi příjemné bydlení v klidné oblasti, Aya i Yoko byly s čímkoliv nápomocné, naprosto toho nelitujeme!
Hat uns super gefallen, sehr nette kleine Unterkunft mit super lieben Gastgebern.

Аутентичный японский дом, было очень интересно побывать там и немного прикоснуться к японскому быту. Отдельный интерес - окружающие дома, я много ходил пешком, и каждый дом по-своему интересен. Неподалёку (в пешей доступности) расположено кладбище, на котором похоронен Рихард Зорге.
В общем, я доволен, что выбрал этот дом, а не гостиницу или квартиру в многоэтажке.

Maraming salamat Yoko and Aya sa pag papaunlak samin na tumuloy sa inyong tahanan!
Rayne and I really enjoyed our stay at Kokubunji. The traditional room is a nice touch and the bikes too! Yoko even picked us up at the station and Aya helped call us a cab on the day of our departure. The neighborhood is also very nice and quiet, out stay at Japan has been a great and memorable one 😊

Хозяева просят писать отзывы на своем родном языке, поэтому приступаю.
Всё было замечательно, провел здесь две недели с большим удовольствием!
Хозяева отзывчивые, общительные, добрые люди! Помогали советами, старались отвечать на мои дурацкие вопросы о устройстве жизни в Японии ))
Хозяева организовали быструю и грамотную эвакуацию во время тайфуна с землетрясением, через 20 минут после предупреждения мы были уже в убежище с одеялами, водой и онигири на первое время. Йоко-сан, Айа-сан низкий Вам поклон за заботу!!!
Комната мне показалась лучше чем на фото, татами, футоны, сдвижные бумажные перегородки-аутентичность зашкаливает. Прямо из комнаты можно выйти в маленький садик и просто посидеть чай попить на воздухе!
Дом в очень тихом, спокойном, жилом районе. В 10-15 минутах разнообразные круглосуточные магазины со всем базово необходимым и различные ресторанчики. Автобус к JR-станции Kokubunji отходит метрах в 50-70 от дома, оплатить тоже можно Suica. До самой станции минут 20 пешком.
До Токио минут 30-40 на JR. Wi-fi шустрый. В доме кроме вашей еще две комнаты под сдачу, так что скорее всего вы будете не одни. Розетки японские-берите переходники(напряжение в сети 110В,но все заряжается и работает без проблем).
Что еще...Ах да! Спать вы будете как полагается на тонком матрасе и изогнутой ортопедической подушке, так что не обессудьте! ))
Вроде всё рассказал, одним словом строго Рекомендую!
誠にありがとうございます！彩さんと陽子さんがほんどり親しい、優しいですね、僕に手伝った夜間バスが予約した！最後が三人と一緒にことが弾く、日本茶道のことと中国の茶が話していて、中国の小青柑が飲む、幸せだ！走过路过不要错过，住他们家一定不会后悔哟！

Дом превзошел все наши ожидания. Очень классный, чистый, уютный. Самый главный плюс -- полотно с подогревом футонов. Чуть далековато от центра города, зато район тихий и спокойный.
Ездила вместе с подругой, одним все понравилось. В восторге и от хозяев! Виделись только с Айей и Йоко, обе крайне дружелюбные и добрые. Всегда готовы с тобой пообщаться и помочь, если ты что-то не понимаешь. Их английский на высоте, проблем не возникло. На сообщения отвечают быстро, есть возможность зачекаться самим, Айа приедет и все покажет-расскажет. Крайне рекомендуем.

這裡很棒
唯一缺點是離捷運站要走20分鐘
但如果是好天氣，慢慢走挺不賴的

滞在期間快適に過ごせました。
出入りできる時間が自由で便利でした。
ありがとうございました。
迅速でフレキシブルな対応で滞在中、快適に過ごせました。閑静な住宅街の中なので旅行気分というよりは住民のような感覚で滞在できるのが良かったです。キッチンも使わせてもらえ、自炊もできますし、歩いて5分くらいのところにドイツ仕込みの美味しいパン屋さんがあったり、駅まで散策しながら地元のお店巡りができます。100円バスで駅にも行けるし、別のバスで玉川上水(津田塾大学)などのお散歩にも行けます。

ホストの彩さん、陽子さん共に気さくでお話ししやすく、本当に楽しい時間を過ごすことができました。また、上京して間もない自分を暖かく迎えてくださり、本当に感謝しております。
滞在中に足を捻ってしまい、3日ほど家で寝たきり状態になってしまったのですが、親身に生活をサポートしてくださり本当に助かりました‥笑
Comoさんのリスティングを選択して本当によかった。また機会があれば利用します^ ^

大学通学のために利用させていただきました！
とても寝泊まりしやすい空間で、ホテルに泊まるよりも全然いいです！
清潔感あり、ホストも親切で、自信を持ってオススメします。

今回仕事の出張で1週間お世話になりました。時間の融通もしてくれたり、近隣の説明や滞在中の細かな心遣いととにかく凄く親切で毎日安心して快適に過ごせました。本当にお世話になりました。
また次回国分寺に出張の際はよろしくお願いいたします。

J’ai passé un très bon séjour. La chambre et salle de bains/sanitaires étaient propres et accueillants. Aya est par ailleurs une hôtesse très sympathique et aux petits soins, et elle parle un peu français, ce qui a facilité la communication.
Le quartier est calme et reposant mais assez proche des commerces et de la gare/arrêt de bus.
Je recommande!

Awesome room in a nice area, very "WA\和" which I liked.
Aya and the other guests were all very nice and helpful.
Will stay again if given the chance!
もう1年間住みますーㅋㅋㅋ
一生の思い出、日本感いっぱい

You'll definitely feel at home here. The host is very down-to-earth and welcoming.
I wasn't expecting much other than just a room to stay in and the listed utilities, but the relaxed social atmosphere made it feel like I was staying at a relative's place.
The house itself has pretty much all you need for daily necessities, and the rooms are comfortably equipped with air conditioning. I stayed in the Japanese style room on the 1st floor, which connects to the backyard where you can hang your laundry to dry.
Neighborhood cats like to wander through the backyard, which is a plus in my book.
If you're a bit tall like me and need to get lotsa work done on your laptop, the Japanese style room might put some strain on your back.
However, partway through my stay I realized the oshiire closet was just about the right height to use like a desk, and they were kind enough to let me use one of their chairs to set up in front of it when I asked about it.
You could stay here comfortably for a pretty long time, and the location is fine with various grocery shops and other shopping in the area, and kokubunji station not too far off. They have bikes for guests too which really came in handy.
Overall I'd really recommend staying here!
AYAさんは、優しくてトラブルにも丁寧に対応してくださる素晴らしいホストでした♪お世話になり、ありがとうございました☺️また機会があればよろしくお願いいたします！

I had a great stay at the Como-House. Aya is a great host, giving you all the privacy you need and all the help you want. She is very welcoming, so it felt more like staying in a guest house than an Airbnb.
She had warned me about the distance from the Station to the Airbnb, but I underestimated it a little bit. If you have heavy luggage, I advise you to take the bus or a taxi from the station.
The house is an older Japanese model, so it becomes rather cold in Winter, but it is well kept and cared for. The Japanese room I stayed in was beautiful; I am already missing staying there.
So if you don't mind the distance to central Tokyo, I highly recommend staying at the Como-House for a real every-day-japanese experience.

I am happy with Aya accompany to shopping and show me how to bought something in shop area. I feel like family like sister at my home. That is my unexpected.  I can cooking and shopping alot like home.

Aya-san was a great host! The room was clean and really comfortable to stay in. The other guests were also friendly, which is a bonus as you would not be alone most evenings.
She also woke up early to send me off on my last day in Japan, which I'm really greatful for 🙏🏼
I had a great time there, please consider Aya-san's home to rest during your holidays/trips :)

Le séjour s’est très bien déroulé. Aya est très à l’écoute, et parle bien le français et l’anglais.
La chambre est comfortable et l’emplacement est bon, juste un peu loin de la gare.
静かでとてもよかったです。部屋も予想より広くて満足でした。可愛い猫ちゃんもいました。

Vooraf aan het semester was mijn studentenwoning nog niet beschikbaar, dus ik heb eerst even in een Airbnb moeten verblijven. Geluk bij een ongeluk, ik stuitte last minute op deze accomodatie waar ik het ontzettend naar mijn zin heb gehad! Het huis is inderdaad ietwat ouderwets, met lage Japanse schuifdeuren en een houten interieur, maar het is allemaal prima bewoonbaar. De kamer waarin ik verbleef zag er naar mijn mening zelfs beter uit dan op de foto's. Aya, de host, is erg vriendelijk en, zowel in het Japans als in het Engels, is zij altijd behulpzaam. Er werden veel spullen beschikbaar gesteld voor gezamenlijk gebruik, wat ontzettend fijn was. In het huis hangt bovendien een erg aangename en gezellige sfeer dus je voelt je er gelijk op je gemak. Er worden kamers verhuurd voor zowel de korte termijn als de lange termijn. En met goede reden ook: ik verbleef er maar vijf dagen, maar ik zou het geen probleem hebben gevonden als ik er langer zou blijven.

Очень приятно провел время в пригороде. Домашняя атмосфера, и Айя-сан была приятна в общении. Она дала много хороших рекомендаций. Так как место находится на западе от Токио, примерно на пол пути от Такао, я советую воспользоваться этим и исследовать окрестность— Такао, Кодайра, Коганей, Кичиджоджи. Там много всего интересного. А дом уютен и тихий.

Aya ist ein äußerst freundlicher und hilfsbereiter Host. Sie gab uns viele hilfreiche Typs. Wir haben uns sofort wohl gefühlt. Es ist alles vorhanden, was man für einen Urlaubsaufenthalt braucht. Gute Lage, wenn man nicht nur Tokyo, sondern auch das Umland anfahren möchte. Unterkunft knappe 20 min. Von der Zugstation Kokubunji entfernt. Es fährt 2x stündlich ein Bus hin. Wir durften Ayas Fahrräder leihen, was äußert zeitsparend war.
Insgesamt eine sehr empfehlenswerte Unterkunft!

Sachiko is a fantastic host and was super-helpful during my stay. She is passionate about helping non-Japanese to understand and learn about Japan, and about helping Japanese to interact with westerners and western culture. After previously living in the US she has perfect English.
The Kumegawa neighbourhood is in a mellow residential part of west Tokyo. If you want to be out of the downtown hustle and bustle this is a great base. I was surprised to see local urban farmers selling vegetables along the river in front of their houses / allotment complexes.
During my stay Sachiko was happy to help me visit a local temple which is one of Japan's national architectural treasures. In general she was a constant source of knowledge and advice. She was also able to connect me with one of her friends for some quick lessons in business Japanese.
Highly recommended!

I and my wife stayed at Sachiko-san's House "Guestroom Kurara" in western area of Tokyo. IT was very cold the day we stayed but "Guestroom Kurara" was warm, tidy and comfortable. Everything we tourists need is there. Sachiko-san, thank you for your hospitality.

Un séjour très agréable ! Par rapport au centre de Tokyo, j’ai resté plus calme et je me reposais bien pendant cinq nuits. Le quartier est sympa, pas mal de choses à découvrir surtout il y a deux lacs magnifiques pas très loin de la maison. Avec Sachiko, j’ai eu des conversations intéressants. Les petits-déjeuners qu’elle m’a servi étaient délicieux même pour végétarien. Vivement conseillé
I had amazing time there :) definitely recommend for everybody visiting Higashimurayama! It's really cool place and awesome people! Thank You soo much! :)

I had the most wonderful time staying with Sachiko-san, Kurara and June. Sachiko-san was extremely welcoming and accommodating during my whole stay. She helped me to find a good local place to get my haircut, arranging the appointment for me as I speak little Japanese. She also helped me find other local activities such as going to the gym and for a swim. I couldn't recommend staying with her enough.
The room was comfortable and tidy, all that I expected and required. The aircon really helped cool the room down from the summer heat. The whole house was tidy and provided everything a guest would need for their stay. 5 stars. Thank you.

If you're looking for a nice place, clean and with all facilities you're in the right place. The breakfast was fabulous. Sachiko and her son Kurara are so lovely persons than you feel to be part of the family😊. Absolutely recommended
Sachiko & Kurara were Amazing Hosters! They have helped me every time I needed something. Really helpful and communicative. For sure they will be my First Option in my return to Tokyo!

Host very nice and helpful
The place was clean and tidy
I highly recommend this place !
Thank you very much !
i really recommend this place, I stayed here for almost a month and really enjoyed it. Sachiko Is a great host, so if you don't mind staying a bit far from central Tokyo this is the place to stay.

Sachiko is absolutely wonderful! I loved my stay here. I  didn't mind that the accommodation was far from Tokyo by transit.  It was very quiet and the meals were balanced and filling. The facilities were clean and comfortable. I felt cared for. I was helped every time I asked. Sachiko was patient as I learned a new culture. I made many friends. I would definitely stay here again if I returned to Japan.

Sachiko & Kurara are both very very nice and open people. I lived in their home for about 6 weeks, and had many conversations. They are very interested in learning about culture and society in other countries, and are always helpful when I needed something. They took me the Onsen place close to their house in their car, and when I explained I needed to buy a dress to attend a friend's wedding, they took me to a nice local second-hand shop with lots of new-looking, pretty dresses going for less than $20 USD or even less than $10. Kurara even took me to the city ward office to get my Japan residence card registered. They have a very nice family vibe. Sachiko also makes great breakfasts and dinner for 300 yen and 500 yen each. They definitely go above and beyond to interact with their guests and ensure that everyone is well taken care of. I highly recommend this place whether you are just visiting or staying for long term!
The only thing that anyone choosing their place need to know is that there the place is a 20min leisure walk to the station (I could make it in 10 min if I ran, but it averages 15-17min), and another about 30 min to Shinjuku but 55 min to Shibuya or Tokyo station. For arrival and departure, Sachiko would pick you up and drop you off the station, so no worries about luggages. The total time to Tokyo station area is around 1 hour 20min. If you work long hours or is on a tight schedule, do take it into consideration. However, I would have no problem living here if you work normal 9-5 or 6pm hours. If you are just traveling, I think it is a great escape from the Tokyo rush at the end of the day. :)

Great space to stay, very spacious for a japanese room, very friendly family would highly recommend to anyone who wants to experience life outside the city. There many things to do around and was given a great choice by the host, a great selection of trips and local restaurants. The hospitality shown was amazing they were always willing to help. The room was very nice and clean a perfect size even for a tall guy like me🙂

This is a very cozy place where you will be met with all the hospitality. It's clean here. Inside the house is made in a unique style. It is located near the station. And the house itself is located in a very picturesque place. If you are lucky enough to visit this place in the spring, then there are a lot of places where you can admire sakura.
This was by far the best airbnb experience I’ve had. Sachiko was so warm and welcoming I felt right at home. Would highly recommend to anyone wanting to get away from the busyness of central tokyo
Extraordinaire "home away from home"! Sachiko est une hôte idéale. Tout est parfait!
Great place in a nice, quiet neighborhood! Not hard to reach Tokyo center by metro. Also Sachiko was very friendly and great host!

Sachiko San is a wonderful person. A very kind host and communicative- she has a wonderful English and recommendations- I felt immediately comfortable.
The room is bright, specious, very equipped and very clean.
It’s a 12-15 min walk to the train station and a 27 min train to Shinjuku. Good supermarket near by and lots of 7/11 stores.
It’s a great location to explore Tokyo and Saitama( old town kawagoe Mt Takao and more)
I would love to stay here again in the future.
Highly recommend also for a long stay.

I've been to a handful of Airbnb's, but Sachiko might honestly be my favorite host. She was always polite, answered any question, encouraged friendships with the other guests staying there, one of whom I still regularly talk with, she occasionally made us brunch, and she even called her dad to help me find how to get to my next Airbnb in a different prefecture in Japan. (Her dad knows everything. lol)
I remember telling some of my friends (not Sachiko) that I wanted to eat "Osechi Ryōri" to celebrate the New Year in Japan, and even asked some locals where I could buy some, only to be told that you had to reserve it in advance. Turns out, however, Sachiko had made some for us three days after the New Year.
I would absolutely recommend this house for anyone considering staying here! 5 out of 5!

I had a great 2 months stay in Sachiko's place. Location-wise it is not central Tokyo but it allows me to experience authentic Japanese life and there are great restaurants of all cuisine around the nearby station with very reasonable pricing, many local hidden gems even. If you want to explore central Tokyo it is one direct train away from Shinjuku from which you can transit to anywhere in Tokyo. There are also easy connections to Mt. Takao, Chichibu and Fuji's mountain areas.
I like Sachiko's attention to guests and she is like a friend to us, she speaks good English also which to me is a rare thing in Japan. Highly recommended place to stay!

The host is really kind and nice person, I love there so much, don't really want to leave there. I love there.
Below information are for Chinese tourist, strongly recommend this host!
强烈推荐这位住家，让我感受到的日本普通民众的生活，他们真的很热心，房东一家都是很好的人，我很喜欢这里。有机会一定会再来。

I had a wonderful stay with Sachiko and her family. Foreign tourists not accustomed to Japan may not understand the value of being in the west suburbs, but if willing to navigate available busses and trains, you have relatively easy access to various train lines to get you into the city or wherever you want to go. And there are also the relatively less known sites available locally as well as experiencing/observing every day life in greater Tokyo. Sachiko and family are available to engage, but also very open to guests independently doing what they need to do. I experienced both--and this was perfect for my purposes, and I'm very grateful to Sachiko and her family for a wonderful stay.

The entire house was very clean, the neighbourhood had some great places to go to and everything I needed was there. What really made this place something to remember for me, however, was the hospitality. All family members were so kind and helpful and it really helped make my vacation to be as great as it was.
Many thanks to host Sachiko for the accommodation, hospitality, time spared from work and class,  and the mountain water.

Sachiko-san is one of the best host that I’ve ever met on Airbnb. Her house is a typical Japanese building in a quiet but combinent suburban area. The house is located near a beautiful river,  it is quite and calm and each day I can breath the fresh air outside. There are many wooden decoration in the room that were made by Sachiko-san herself and all of them were very beautiful and exquisite. Sachiko-San was very kind to help me do the check in and check out and prepared daily necessities as well as travelling guides in the room. She is also very open minded and love to exchange cultural background with foreign guests. I’m really grateful to her for the organization of various activities for us in her home. I enjoyed the quality time with Sachiko San as well as all the people I’ve met in this house. I sincerely recommend this house and I wish I can stay here again if I have another chance to visit Japan.

I can't tell any better place than Min's sharehouse to stay in Tokyo.

First of all, the traffic was great. It is located about 5 minutes walk from Shinjuku Station and Shin -Okubo station. Of course you can view fabulous night scenery of Shinjuku at the balcony.

Second, people were very nice. Min, the owner of this sharehouse, is very friendly to the guest and he is a humane man. Moreover, knowing new people from all over the world was a lot of fun. Talking, drinking and playing games with new friends from different culture and countries were very memerable.

Lastly, facilities were pretty good. Actually I didn't expect much about the facilities since this place was a bargain, but the facilities were quite nice. Eventhough, most of Japanese houses are pretty much cold, here it had a heater which makes your room even hot, and the shower place, and toilet etc were quite good. Above all, bright sunlight coming through big windows were the best.
I am sure you can make memorable experiences while staying here!!!
여기 6일 정도 머물면서 정말 좋았어요. 추억도 많이 쌓고, 방도 좋고, 사장님도 정이 많으시고, 무엇보다 각국에서 온 사람들이랑 지내는 것도 재미있었구요. 배낭여행객들에겐 최고의 효율이 아닌가 싶네요
Min wasn't here actually. Bad timing. But the place was fine, really fine. My roomates explain to me how everything works and there you go! Warm place. Really cool. Good spot.
I really liked it here. The share-house is clean and nice, and Min is an awesome guy. I had fun going out for drinks with him and his friends. Will definitely be back!
Realy good time in here, the room is perfect, close to everthing. i'd like to go again if i came back

My host Min is a great guy! Pleasure speaking with, and very hospitable! He even shared Korean drinks with me when I moved in! The neighbourhood was was nice, and central enough. I even got my own room with a view!
Great host! Great location and a nice way to start a journey! Simple but comfortable and safe accommodation with everything you need nearby! Would recommend!

Min is an unbelievable awesome guy. He was very service oriented, was really interested in us, took us out for an awesome night for Korean BBQ and made sure we had everything we needed. The room we had was nice, the heating worked like a charm and there even was free coffee. It's a great place to meet other travelers because it's a sharehouse and there are a lot of other guests who, in our case, loved to do some stuff together. A highly recommended place. We will most definitely go again if we visit Tokyo :-)

The place is within the central area. You will never regret staying with Min's shared house. The host is very accommodating and helpful. You can walk Shinjuku-gyoen park from his area. It's a must esp with cherry blossoms season. The place is big and reasonably furnished as what you can expect from what you paid for. Note: for JRPass users the jrline is bit of a walk from the area so if you don't want to walk, the oedo subway line is much nearer but you have to pay for it since it's not covered by the pass.
I will definitely recommend this place for it's locarion and convenience. You can walk to shinjuku and shin-okubo (korean town) from his place.

Friendly host.  Answered questions fast and gave advice for our trip planning easier.  Min was in constant contact to make sure we arrived at the apartment safely.  Apartment is in a good location within walking distance to the subway and restaurants.  Great place to meet other travelers and hear their stories.

Min is great and generous host. He helped us when we were in need to find place to stay. Responded very quickly and send guide and map through whatsapp. Place is nice and comfy. Other guys in the room were very friendly and we chatted a lot on the kitchen.
Min has a table with national money bills. Filled a gap with belarussian roubles that hi missed. )
Next time will bring some souvenir from Belarus.
P.S. Consider using earplugs if you sleep in shared room cause there might be somebody who snores loudly.
Min's a very cool guy! His place was very nice and convenient :)

I had a great time at Min's place! I met lots of new people, and got valuable knowledge about the area around me. Not only was Min a great guy, but I felt very at home very quickly! Not to mention he was always a message away if I needed any help. I fully recommend staying here :]

Min Min was a perfect host. Thank you very much for the great time. Also the location and the appartement itself was really superbe. I would definitely recommend it to all my friends visiting Tokyo. Very memorable stay!!!

Perfectly located in shinjuku! Min the host provided detailed info on how to find his place! Great host and knows lots of great places to see whether drinking places, shopping, food aand tourist sites. Very helpful and replies to emails almost instantly. Really enjoyed our stay we extended it by an extra day!

Mr.Min is very nice and friendly, the house location is very good, near the Metro, Toei Oedo East Shinjuku Station, near Kabukicho, Isetan. the room is 6 mixed dom, but sleep 9 people inside, luckily just one night, in general, pretty good here, the price is affordable！

Min was a great host in a great location.  He was extremely helpful and friendly from as soon as we booked and this continued throughout our visit. We saw him most days and he'd sort out any problems straight away, for example, an earthquake struck while we were visiting and stopped the lift working but Min had this fixed within a couple of hours. Alongside his friendliness he provides great facilities. I would stay with Min again and recommend him to others.

Min真的是非常棒的hostel 主人，很細心的準備。住宿環境也很棒！在這邊認識了義大利，加拿大和韓國的朋友，Min人很隨和也很健談，大家很容易就成爲朋友:D
非常推薦喜歡交朋友的背包客來住這邊！

Min was an awesome and friendly host, very helpful in explaining how everything worked. Recommended restaurants and offered drinks upon arrival. Located less than ten minute walk from the center of Shinjuku and Kabukicho.
Great place for backpackers! Will definitely come again.

Min est là pour accueillir les voyageurs, toujours disponible par whatsapp ou Facebook ou téléphone à n'importe quel moment s'il y a un problème, ou une question, ou un service à demander. Il arrive que nous fassions tous ensemble des fêtes dans la salle commune, Min est avec nous pour partager les bières, l'ambiance est chaleureuse !

Thx for providing a comfortable, clean, and convenience place, it's much better than I thought! Min is really nice and kind, thx for everything. 睡得很好，比自己的家還睡得好，浴室比想像中大，環境都很乾淨，很舒適，有一個小陽台，一個大家都會坐一下說個幾句話打個招呼的小客廳。 交通還算方便，推薦大家！
Min is very friendly and provides great instructions to get to the sharehouse. The sharehouse is very clean, modern and was a pleasure to stay in. Thank you so much!
Great place and great host ! L'endroit est très bien situé, très facile d'accès. Min est très sympa ! À conseiller !
A nice central place in Tokyo allows you to go where you wish without too much travelling time. Min's a great host and very kind! The rooms are clean and facilities are well provided.
It was realy nice! Always clean! Nice people!  Min-san its a great man!
Amazing experience, Amazing house and position, Amazing guests, Amazing Min. No doubt I ll be back there next time in Tokyo

nice place near center of shinjyuku, met some funny guys, Min sent me directions guide in multiple language once after my confirmation is done, super great host!

This F Guy. Love this Min guy. He is amazing. This is my second time to Japan and here at Shinjuku Sharehouse. I go back because Min is so cool and is now my good friend. 신주쿠에 위치한 숙소는 정말 깔끔하고 아늑했습니다. 호스트 분께서도 정말 친절 하셨구요. 덕분에 첫 일본여행 무사히 다녀올 수 있었습니다. 감사합니다.
This place was amazing. Great location and  a friendly atmosphere.

Min was a great host and very welcoming! The place as seen and described in the pictures. Stayed in one of the tatami rooms and was very comfortable! My stay was very pleasant and kept quite clean. I even went and had a few drinks with the host and his friend and we did karaoke too, absolute blast! I would recommend his place to anyone and i would return if staying in tokyo, thanks for everything Min!
Min! What an awesome host! Place was always in great shape thanks to the host. Clean and has everything you need. I would highly recommend you to stay here if you wanna be around Tokyo!

Nice hostel, very well located near Shinjuku station (walking distance). Would have deserved a second shower for our floor but the good ambiance between is prevented any conflict :) Thanks for everything!

First time staying at Airbnb. Great thanks to Min for giving us an awesome experience. Min is friendly, attentive and talkative. Min was a great host! The place was actually more spacious than I had anticipated, which was nice. What I appreciated most about the guesthouse is its location. It is super close to a subway stop (<5 min), and there is a good number of convenience stores around. It was easy to get around to different places like Shinjuku and Shibuya. Min is a very knowledgeable and accommodating host. When I had questions about transportation (taxis, subways) he always had answers. Overall, I really enjoyed my stay and would recommend this place to anyone!

This place is awesome. Great spot for solo traveller. Min is so cool to answer all the questions. I stayed here for 2 nights and went to Osaka and Kyoto and booked again for another night before going back home. It's like home away from home. Definitely I'll be back here in the future. Everything you need is there! A big  clap for the host!

Host is a geunine to know people from all over the world. You will know once you step in. Location is perfect, walking distance from shinjuku and you can party till late and still walk home. Also has many lines to access many places in Tokyo. Room is clean with good view. Will try to book if i come to Japan again. Btw It's a bonus if you are Korean!

I like the house, actually I always said that I love the home. Min is very nice, funny and friendly. I enjoyed at his house so much. I made new friends there and it makes me have a very good trip.
For my next time visit in Tokyo I will go back to stay at Mins's house again!
Awesome location! I just have the regret of not getting there sooner! Min is Funny and nice... Love the party on the rooftop

Min's place was the perfect start for my trip to Tokyo. It's located in the centre of Shinjuku right next to the metro station Higashi Shinjuku and the JR station Shin-Okubo (walking distance 6-10 min). So you have easy access to all things you want to visit in Tokyo. It's close to Golden Gai, Kabukicho and also Shinjuku main station with a lot of restaurants and bars around.
The dorm is clean and cosy, with good Wifi and a rooftop. If you want a cheap, central and fun place to meet nice people it's worth staying. Min's a great host and super kind person. I enjoyed my time here so much and will defenetly come back at the end of my trip.

One of the best airbnb i have ever done.
Great location and accommodation. If you want to go out a lot of bar are very close and to move around tokyo 3 train stations are close
Min is a very nice host.
I would definitly go back there if I come to Tokyo again.
It was so wonderful, the owner really made my day. I gave him 100, he was so friendly.

Perfect airbnb listing. Min was a fun host. I normally spend as little time as possible in my accommodations but Min would always invite the guests (staying in the house) for a drink on the balcony when he wasn't busy, so I ended up sightseeing less and had way more fun meeting other people. Min was very communicative during the check in process to make sure I wasn't lost and even called out for me during my check in process when he saw me down the street. The balcony is definitely a plus as it has a good view of Shinjuku. Facilities provided were great such as the fast wifi, towels to use for showering, washing machine, kitchen, etc. I will definitely be coming back here for my next Tokyo trip. 10/10

I would recommend this place to anyone who wants to see Shinjuku in particular, and Tokyo in general. Min is extremely helpful with his directions and always keeps in touch, he also speaks English which can be a help. Considering this place is a hostel I was surprised by just how clean it was. I had a top bunk which had an electric socket (as all the beds there seem to)as well which was very useful. His place is walkable in a straight direction to Shinjuku station in about 10 minutes, and Higashi-Shinjuku subway in around 3-4m so you can access pretty much any part of Tokyo. This place was also secure, because both the bedroom and the common room had coded locks on the doors. Of course being a hostel, it is not always the quietest but it is exactly what I expected in that regard. The noise generally depends on the people you stay with and in my case it wasn't bad at all, plus they were all lovely! Thanks very much Min!

it was very good trip. min is great host.

if people who reading this article go to tokyo, i recommend going to the min's house in shinjuku. you will be have a valuable experience and meet many gooooooood people.
Fantastic place, balcony, roof top access, super clean, fantastic guests, fantastic location, fun times. Min is cool and hip. Ignore all the negative reviews (if any).
地點算很方便，這次是住大概六人一間的房子，環境是整潔的，床被也相當舒服，不過因為在同一屋簷下，作息會彼此干擾，我住了兩晚，算是剛剛好，也和不同國家的人對話，友善且有趣。睡眠品質我認為不是太好，入睡跟起床時間大家不一，不過整體而言是滿不錯的旅行經驗，環境是和照片上的差不多，就是頂樓的平臺好像不太常有人會活動聚會，當初有部分被頂樓的社交場合吸引，但其實並沒有。這間我還是推薦的。
屋上のテントで酒を飲みながら、鍋を食べながら時間を過ごしました。旅行者同士のコミュニケーションが促進されて、とても気持ちよく過ごせました。場所がドン・キホーテのそばで最高です。東京に住んでいるのに行きたくなる素晴らしい宿とオーナーのミンさんでした。

I was a bit unsure of this place before arriving as the building didn't look that impressive from the outside. But inside the rooms are so clean and Cosy! Really nicely decorated. The people I shared with were super friendly and considerate. So turned out to be an excellent place to stay for the location, price and the good company. And finally Min, the host, was just great, he's a lot of fun and was really helpful with suggesting places around Shinjuku!
Mins's place is a great place to meet other people from all around the world,especially if youre alone. Thanks for the fun min ✌

Min was a wonderful host, he greeted me when I arrived and stayed in touch through out, sorry I never made it for drinks!! The place was well equipped, clean and comfortable and in a really good location for accessing the rest of Tokyo (literally a ten minute walk to Shinjuku station and another JR station or 2 mins to the subway)
Overall I had a really good stay and would definitely come back again!

Nothing but good things to say about the host, and the place. Min is great, I was able to stay through the weekend we had a home cooked meal with drinks on his rooftop along with all the other travelers. I like how everything was close relatively close. There are bars and restaurants within a walking distance so you do not have to worry about transportation. I definitely recommend staying here, I know I will be back the next time I am in Japan.
Min is an awesome host! Recommend any traveler to stay here. Location is in shinjuku surrounded by cafes and bars. Easy to connect to any of the major areas in Tokyo.

Min's place is fantastic. Clean, spacious   And convenient. There's plenty of restaurants nearby. Night life are also nearby in walking distance. I've met a lot of travellers here and had some drink with them. You will not go wrong with this sharehouse.

The place has a great location near Shin Okubo and Higashi Shinjuku stations. It's easy to find the place, the host gave good instructions but if you have pocket wifi like I did it's easier. Inside the shared bedroom there was a recording camera which I didn't noticed the first day and the host didn't told anything, not in person, not in the airbnb announcement. I was sharing the room only with another girl and I made an honest mistake by changing my clothes in the bedroom. Once I noticed the camera I told the host what was happening and he refused to take off the camera because of security reasons and he also said that guest have had sex in the past on the bedroom and he wouldn't risk his place.. I was very unpleasant with his policy and decisions, we tried to talk about it but either way he wouldn't refund my money back if I decided to leave..
The bedroom was big and clean but the beds were hard and uncomfortable .. beds were made of wood, so if you moved while sleeping, it will all cringe. Kitchen, bathroom and toilet are shared.
The kitchen and the toilet were always clean but the shower was disgusting.. it had mold on the floor and doors, and also I saw pubic hairs when I tried to use it, so definitely flip flops are a must if you want to use this shower.
The host provided with a password to unlock the doors so you are free to come in and out as much as you wanted to, at any hour.
Overall, is not a bad place but you should keep in mind that you get what you pay for.

House locates in shinjuku. it was a perfect location to travel around the city.
