This is my second stay here at the Shinjuku Sharehouse!
Once again I highly recommend it!
The location is sensational, down the road to a convenient subway or a 10 minute walk to Shinjuku Station. This place is on the edge of Kabukicho (Red Light District) and fairly close to the infamous Golden Gai so you won't ever have to worry about missing the last train or how you'll get home, it's just around the corner.
The place itself still holds itself as the best place I've ever stayed at in Japan!
Living room and Bedrooms are clean and quite spacious, toilets on every floor and a rooftop with a nice view of the Shinjuku towers and a great place to drink.
The Hosts Min and Haru are amazing people!
They really give it their all to give you the best experience possible from cleaning to giving directions and recommendations on places to see and food to try. Every so often I found myself having a BBQ on the rooftop with these guys and the other guests, drinking and sharing stories.
Thanks for another unforgettable experience!
Min and Haru were amazing hosts. I highly recommend their place if you're a first-time hostel user.

Min and Haru are very welcoming and their space is very comfortable. They were my last sharehouse of my trip and by far the best one if you're travelling alone and wanting to meet new people. The added touch of anime figures/manga make it feel like home (to me personally hahah).

Min and Haru are great hosts and their guesthouse is just great! Min was very communicative from the first moment and helpful any day I had questions. Perfect place, perfect localisation and hosts ... super perfect :)  Haru and Min are friends for everyone, their place is friendly and warm.  I was second time staying here and I believe and dream about more :)

My stay at Kika home was the BEST travel experience of my life! Sayoko is the most generous, knowledgeable, hospitable and kind host I have ever had the pleasure to stay with. Her extensive local knowledge and joy in sharing the secrets and specialties of the Japan she knows and loves (food, art, fashion and Shiba inu!) gave me such a rich, rewarding and personal experience in Tokyo, my favourite city in the world. Sayoko goes above and beyond to make sure her guests feel comfortable, welcome and ready to take on Tokyo, one excellent recommendation at a time. She is responsive, prompt, professional, friendly and generous with her time and advice. Kika home was a little sanctuary for me - comfortable, clean, warm, super close to the city, but quiet enough to feel thoroughly rejuvenating. The walk to the station takes a brisk 5 minutes through a sweet net of backstreets peppered with cute apartment blocks- you may spot a local cat sunning itself or some early dog walkers with their adorable manicured puppies if you head out at the right time. The local food street (Ginza street) is delightful too with fresh food, specialised boutiques, gourmet offerings & dog salons! A great supermarket that is open late and a convenient Lawson's only a stones throw from the front door also makes late night snack attacks and home made meals very easy to conjure. The weekends are especially good for tasting local favourites and freshly made Japanese sweets on Ginza - with some additional dog spotting thrown in. I headed out to busier areas like Shinjuku, Omotesando, Roppongi and such on most days and found it incredibly easy (and quick) to navigate the trains and connections needed. Osaki is ideally located for getting anywhere in Tokyo as most connections are only a stop or two away. Osaki is also on the Yamanote line which is a godsend for getting to and from all the major areas, and Shinagawa station is on the Narita Express line (which made the long track back to the airport practically stress free). I can say with conviction, after experiencing Osaki I will not be staying in Shinjuku ever again! This was my fifth time in Japan and it has eclipsed all my previous stays. It was also my first air BnB experience and I couldn't be more impressed. I will be strongly recommending Kika home to all friends and family wishing to experience Tokyo! I feel so lucky to have chosen Sayoko's apartment to call home for 3 weeks and it's an experience that I will treasure for life. I highly recommend Kika home for all travellers, but found it especially excellent as a young female creative traveling alone. I felt secure and comfortable and empowered to explore. Sayoko is incredibly in touch with Japanese fashion, art, design and architecture too, and had an endless supply of great recommendations and inside knowledge. Even as a vegetarian traveler I found Sayoko had some fantastic food...

I would recommend the apartment to my friends.
Thanks sayoko
sayako非常友好，中途遇到一点小问题，也赶紧帮我们解决了。还贴心的准备了饮料小点心。位置不难找，不过离jr大崎站走路还是要十来分钟。但是附近都是居民区感觉非常棒！来日本住民宿又便宜又美好！房间床很小，但有一个沙发可以平放。总体觉得很棒！很满意的一次入住体验！
Helpful directions to apartment

Dear Sayoko,
thanks for everything! We had a wonderful time in Tokyo!

Sayoko was a great host! We really enjoyed the stay in her apartment. Her place was super clean and she made sure that we had all the things we needed to make our stay a pleasant one! Once there, she had many maps and guide books for us to use and recommended us good locations around the city and some restaurants in the area. The location was convenient - around seven walking- minutes to the next JR station and many Combini and great authentic Japanese restaurants close by - absolutely calm but close to the city.
We had an awesome time and will definitely stay with Sayoko again when we come back to Tokyo!
Thank you Sayoko!

If we were to come back to Tokyo, we would definitely go and book Sayoko's place without second thoughts. The location is very good. Near Osaki station and with very nice neighborhood. Every morning you will see students walking to a nearby school. You can really feel the Japanese vibe! Sayoko's instructions to the house was very accurate. She welcomed us with snacks too! The house was clean and comfy. Would definitely recommend! :)

Sayoko's flat is small but clean, and she's a great, communicative host. It's located in a fairly quiet and residential neighbourhood, which is nice to come back to after a day in the busier parts of Tokyo.

Sayoko is fast to respond to questions you may have, she is a lovely lady that provided wonderful hospitality during my stay in Tokyo.  The apartment is about a 10 minute walk from the JR Osaki station, and 10-15 minute walk from the Subway Asakusa line at Togoshi station.  Sayoko provided clear instructions on how to get to the apartment, and even had snacks ready for us when we got there.  The flat is a modern flat, very spacious and clean.  It is exactly what you see in the photo.  There are a lot of local restaurant and businesses closeby, and a convenient store is located right next door to help satisfy any late night snack runs.  Sayoko is professional, and a wonderful host. I would definitely recommend staying at her place for others visiting Tokyo as I sure will return again next time I am in Tokyo.  Thank you so much Sayoko!

This experience truly made me a believer in AirBnb. Sayoko has a wonderful flat that is very reasonable considering the limited space in Tokyo. The area is also wonderful - definitely a local feel to it, we stayed while the local Matsuri festival was going on, and were able to enjoy some nice festival food. It is also very accessible to downtown Tokyo from the Osaki station. I would definitely recommend touring the street (from the door turn left and keep walking for 10-15 minutes) to see the number of local restaurants and shops it has. Of course the best part is Sayoko herself - she was a very, very gracious host, provided amenities and snacks for us, very accessible by e-mail/phone, and she also has a folder with a lot of recommended restaurants around the area. Would stay there if we visited Tokyo again.

Sayoko is a wonderful and thoughtful host. We arrived early and she invited us to her place to rest while she prepared the apartment for us and even helped us made reservations for events. The house is spacious enough for 2 and it was a very comfortable stay. The neighbourhood was quaint, quiet and most importantly it felt safe because there was a police post station a stone's throw away. Overall, I really enjoyed Tokyo and my stay with Sayoko and I would definitely recommend this listing to my friends.
駅から少し遠かったと思いますが、すごい暮らしやすいところでした。戸越銀座は部屋のすぐ近くにあります。商店街が好きなので、とても嬉しかったです(^ ^) 大崎駅の近くにモール、薬局、コンビニなどありますし、すごい便利でした。小夜子さん、親切にしてくれてありがとうございました。

Sayoko was an excellent host! After booking our stay we got a welcoming message along with a PDF file with pictures on how to get to the apartment, all very clear and easy to use. During our whole stay at her apartment we felt welcomed and at ease. When we first arrived we were offered Japanese iced tea and some cakes to help us get over the jet lag. We are going back to Tokyo in a few days and really wish that we could stay there again but the apartment is already booked! I'm not surprised ;)
Very nice host and warm welcome. Nice and clean flat. Close to everything you need.

Sayoko's flat is great for someone staying a few days in Tokyo. It is relatively close to train station and the apartment has everything you will need with simole checkin/checkout process.
Sayoko has also been very helpful with any information you may need.
Thanks for the great time.
Eduardo Rocha

Sayoko's place is really clean and comfortable. She provides facilities for us, also welcome us with snacks and noodle cups. The place is not too far from the train station and the neighbourhood is lovely. Will defenitely recommend this place to friends. :)

Sayokoさんは素晴らしいホストです。滞在中の質問にもすぐに答えて下さり、不安なく過ごせました。
場所はとてもよく、戸越銀座商店街が近いため飲食に困ることはありませんでした。
JR大崎駅からは歩いて10分程度でしたが坂がありました。
JR品川駅からタクシーで10分程度でしたので、荷物が多い時はタクシーをお勧めします。
また機会があればぜひ滞在したいです。
本当にありがとうございました。
Sayoko is great host!
She gave me quick response anytime.
This room is fantastic location.
The long shopping street, "Togoshiginza" is close to the room, so I enjoyed breakfast, lunch and dinner!
This room is about 10min by walk from JR Osaki station but go some uphills.
There is about 10min by taxi from JR Shinagawa station so if you have big luggage, I recommend to use taxi.
I want to stay the room again, thanks Sayoko !!

Thanks for everything,
it was a really great welcome to Japan! We enjoyed the stay at the nice appartment in a very friendly neighborhood. Sayoko was very supportive in providing infos about the way to the appartment and it's surroundings. Communication with her was very uncomplicated.

Sayoko was the best! She was easy to communicate with and was flexible with our check in time.  Her house handbook was one of the best I read, because she had instructions for the air conditioner, for the electric range, and other Japanese appliances in English, as well as recommendations for nearby restaurants and super markets. We absolutely loved staying here and I would stay here again in a heartbeat. The neighborhood is friendly and active with lots of shops and restaurants. Sayoko's business and home are next door, so she's very available. And then, when we left, she gave us a ride to the train station! So nice, she didn't have to do that, and on the hot day with our luggage, we really appreciated it.

Nous remercions sayoko pour sa gentillesse et son amabilité. Logement très bien situé et une hôte a votre ecoute mais aussi attentionnée.
Merci encore pour tout et pour le conseil du bon restaurant.
Cool place!  A bit hard to find from pictures, I recommend using gps

Great first experience for us at Airbnb. Sayoko went out of her way to help and advise.
One small glitch in directions, traffic light crossing (needed to say turn right and then left), but it was late when we arrived.
So convenient to everything.
Very picturesque and a quiet area.
Loved it. Thanks Sayoko. Will recommend to others.
房子位置很好，离地铁10分钟左右，紧邻户越银座步行街，比较繁华，晚上灯火通明，不用担心。周边便利店药妆店很近，还有不少餐馆。房主很细心，留下了详细的说明和攻略推荐。房屋设施简约时尚，一应俱全，电磁炉，热水壶，冰箱，微波炉，洗衣机，洗浴设备，带加热冲洗的马桶盖，衣架，闹钟，移动WiFi。很舒适的一次体验，可惜只约到两个晚上。期待下次旅行。

오사키는 정말 아무것도 없어요....! 조용하고 좋긴 한데 JR오사키역에서 숙소가 조금 멀어요 ㅠ 걸어서 10-15분? 심지어 언덕이...... 그래도 마지막에 가는 날 사요코짱이 시나가와까지 데려다 주셨어요 ! 너무 기뻤어요 ~ ♡ ^^ 숙소 바로 옆에는 로손도 있어요 ! 다 좋은데... 스키야나 우동집 .. ㅜㅜ 이런게 없는 정말 집들밖에 없는.. 곳이여요 . 집은 깨끗하고 너무 이뻐요 근데 방음이 살짝 안되는 것 같아요! ㅜㅜ ㅎㅎㅎ

The apartment was really close to the next train station which serves several lines to the main attractions of Tokyo and Yokohama !
Our stay was nice , the host very welcoming . We would recommend this location

Sayoko's apartment was really great! It was really spacious compared to the other apartments I stayed in while in Japan. The location was also pretty convenient. It was close to Osaki station, which was perfect because Osaki is only a few stops away from Shibuya and other large stations such as Tokyo station.
Sayoko was a really wonderful host. She was always available and responded quickly to any messages. The last day she even took us in the car to the train station which was great since we had pretty heavy luggage.
The amenities of the apartment were excellent. She had everything you could want. A pocket wifi, a clothes iron, a washing machine, great little kitchen to cook, and others.
Overall it was probably the best place we stayed in during our trip to Japan. I highly recommend it!

Sayoko is a gracious host, easy and prompt communication throughout the stay. The flat is modern and conveniently located to experience a typical downtown Tokyo neighborhood. Great food vendors and restaurants on the same street. 15 minutes by foot to the nearest train station.

Sayoko was a great host. We felt very welcomed and she even dropped us off at the train station upon check out as we had quite a bit of luggage with us. The only downside was the pillow cases smelled a bit and the washroom area was shared so we had to keep all our stuff inside the room.

sayoko-san war überaus hilfsbereit, stets erreichbar und in allen bereichen einfach nur ein toller gastgeber!
das apartment selbst ist ca 10min von osaki station entfernt, der weg ist zwar etwas hügelig, aber eigentlich gar nicht so weit wie man glaubt. von dort ist alles sehr gut zu erreichen.
gleich neben dem apartment befindet sich ein convenience store - man muss also nie hungern :)
wir haben uns dank sayoko-san's beschreibungen sehr gut zurecht gefunden. am letzten tag hat sie uns sogar angeboten, uns zum bahnhof zu begleiten.
es war definitiv eine schöne erste airbnb erfahrung und wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!
本当にありがとうございました！

For the low price, we get our own mini apartment fully equipped with kitchen corner, bathroom, bathtub and a separated bedroom.
Right outside the apartment is Lawson convenience store and a very nice looking fruits and vegetables store.
3-5mins walk away will bring you to the togoshi-ginza shopping district. Lots of nice restaurants, sushi-ya, bakeries and even a supermarket all within that area. Totally love this place.
It is also walking distance from Osaki (JR Yamanote line) and togoshi/togoshi-ginza subway. Might be a little further than expected but we felt very safe even late into the night.
Our host even allowed us to check in early and offered to send us to the nearest station. Thank you for your kind hospitality Sayoko!
Highly recommended!

Sayoko's home was exactly as per photos, comfortable and clean! The home is near Lawson convenience store, which was very helpful for late night snacks purchase. Plus, down the street... there are plenty of shops/restaurants along Ginza Street if you walk along the road about 10-15 mins. Sayoko lives nearby the home and is always checking in to make sure we're doing fine, feels more secure knowing your host is very attentive!
The only note to travellers with large luggages, it is about 10 mins walk from the Osaki St with some small hills to walk up... you may want to ensure that your luggage is convenient to pull/move around with.

instruction to the place of stay is not that clear, we had a hard time looking for it, thank God there is someone who accompanied us to Kika's Dress Shop. Police box is far from the entrance you need to go down to the road then you will see the police box on your left and fruit stand then turn right your landmark will be Kika's Dress Shop.

Spacious place with everything that you need!  Very friendly owner, who gave us a lift with our luggage back to the train station. It is well placed, close by to the Yamanote line, which provides easy access to all of Tokyo.  There is a bus direct to Narita airport from JR Osaki station. We will stay here again if we return!

We stayed 2 nights at the end of our trip in Japan. The studio is good for a couple 2 people Max.
Check in is easy as the owner lives and works next door. They also have pocket wifi very useful. There is a metro and a JR station close by. 10 min walk. The neighborhood is not the most touristy but has all you need a mall and convenient store just a few steps away. The host also left some cookies and tea for us that we appreciated for breakfast

Sayoko's apartment was cozy and located in a lovely neighbourhood. It was clean and modern, and about 10minutes walk away from the Osaki Station. There's also a Lawson couple of steps away. We enjoyed our stay there! Pity we didn't get a chance to visit her shop just next to the house!

Sayoko's place is truly value for money, centrally located and highly assessable. A place with great amenities, house internet and free portable wifi. 2 seven eleven and 1 Lawson located within vicinity. There is even one police post 200 metre away. I will certainly look for the same place if revisit Tokyo again.

Sayokosan is very kind and friendly. The apartment is nice, tidy and the picture shown is accurate. The location quite difficult to find but very good and convenient(near Family mart, not far from JR Yamanote and Asakusa line) You can take a bus from Osaki to Narita Airport only 1,200 Yen. I will choose here if I go to Tokyo again.
Great location, place not too hard to get to.
Sayoko非常的貼心，有任何需要幫助的地方，他都會很熱情的幫助我們
Lovely room, convenient, walkable!
There is big space and convenient! Lawson is near her house!

I loved this place. The best Airbnb spot I have ever stayed in. Sayoko was wonderful and she always was willing to communicate. The area is very pleasant, with all you could ever need. It has a supermarket, restaurants, dry cleaning and more. The people are friendly and the area is beautiful.  I definitely recommend staying here and I will be coming back if I ever have the chance.

アクセスとても便利です。
近くにもコンビニありますし、住宅地なのでとても静かです。
最後もサヨコさんに駅まで送っていただいて本当にいい部屋でした(^^)
とても使いやすい部屋でした。水・お菓子もご用意して頂いて嬉しかったです。

Sayoko's room is perfect for a couple. The house localization is a little bit far from the JR Osaki Station if you have a big luggage, mas Osaki is really close to everything. Just using Yamanote Line you can go to almost everywhere.
Clean house, ready for the cold weather and Sayoko makes the experience even better, cause she always cares about her guests.

Everything was great, I think the only inconvenient was the corner between bed room and bathroom, in winter it was so cold and the cleaning in the kitchen and shower, everything else was great, good neighborhood and the 7eleven is near the house ^^
Very nice, Highly recommended

Sayoko's house was very nice and very clean. But the house location is a bit far from JR Osaki Station (10-15 min. walking distance).
JR Osaki Station is really good location , just 15 min. to Shibuya , 20 min. to Shinjuku or 30-40 min. to Yokohama. And you can take a bus to Narita Airport at Osaki Bus Terminal by Willer Express. Also you can take a subway line at Togoshi Station.
The house close to Togoshi Ginza , there're local shop more than 200 shops , there're everything you need.
Highly recommend.
Great place and near to public transit
Thank you to Sayoko san for a very flexible check in time and your offer to drop me off at the station on my check out date. Room are well equipped with necessary things. The neighbour is quiet.
Very nice and quiet neighborhood! Everyhting I need was well-provided, even free snacks! Thank you very much Miss Sayoko!
とても快適でした！
It is a wonderful place and the host is very considerate. It has a long business street that you can visit and eat great food. Thanks for Sayoko!
We really liked the location of your place, the daily walk to Togoshi Station was beautiful everyday. Thanks for letting us stay at Kika's Home and the ride you gave us the last day.
房东人超级好，来之前反复跟我们确认行程以及入住时间，并且给我们提供了路线图。房子位置很好，附近就是JR山手线的大崎站以及地铁户越站，紧邻房子不远就有一家LAWSON便利店十分方便。回国的时候房东还非常好心送我们到大崎站的机场巴士站，特别贴心。下次来还会选择这一家！

It was great to stay in a residential area away from the busy heart of Tokyo, and yet it was very central and on the JR line, which is great if you have purchased a railcard. Sayoko was very helpful in welcoming us and preparing the directions for our arrival. The rooms were spacious and included all amenities. It was conveniently located near Harada Airport, which we need to access early in the morning, and yet was also close to everything we needed to see in Tokyo. We enjoyed our stay.

The apartment was clean and is in a fantastic location. 10 minute walk from Osaki Station and the road is full of convenience stores and restaurants, but not so close that it's loud. Incredibly safe area. Sayoko was a great host and made sure we were OK. I recommend staying here if you get the chance to.

Sayoko is a wonderful host and her apartment is everything you need. The location is great - in the calm but beatiful neighborhood and close to the Osaki station, which when you use Yamanote line is just perfectly located between both Shibua and Tokyo station. We loved the apartment, Sayoko was wonderful. And Tokyo... ...if I didn't have to I would have never left...

Sayoko's place was very cosy and situated in a very quiet, relaxed neighbourhood. It is a short distance walk from Osaki station surrounded by restaurants and convenience stores.
Sayoko was a very accommodating host, would definitely recommend and visit again.

Sayoko's apartment is really conveniently located and had everything you probably need.There are alot of place to eat and hang out around. It is also near 2 subway station (easy to go around Tokyo). Sayoko is also a great host, she helped us with laundry and even lifted us to the station on the day we left. Highly recommend Sayoko's place if you come to Tokyo!!!!
Very good
Very nice and comfortable place

Lovely clean flat right near Osaki station. Great location for exploring Tokyo, as well as all the lovely local shops. Sayoko is a great host and very communicative, which really helped make our trip go so smoothly.

Shinagawa is a very convenient base for getting around Tokyo and taking the Narita Express. The place was located in a lovely neighborhood full of children and pets, 1 station down from Shinagawa. The amenities provided were functional and convenient. The bed was more firm than I'm used to, and though not luxurious, our stay was functional and convenient. We appreciate Sayoko's instructions and would recommend others to stay here.

Sayoko is a wonderful host - she gave us the feeling of being very welcome right from the beginning. Her apartment is very clean and lovely and is situated in a central but not touristic part of the city. Nevertheless, if you should choose to spend your time and money at the usual touristic traps rather than at the beautiful suburb and street full of small shops, all public transportation you need is really close by. When we come back to Tokyo, we would surely love to stay here again.

ᵀᴴᴱ ᴴᴼᵁˢᴱᴳᵁᴱˢᵀ ᴬᴿᴱ ᵛᴱᴿᵞ ᶜᴸᴱᴬᴺ ᴬᴺᴰ ᴺᴱᴬᴿ ᴬ ˢᴹᴬᴸᴸ ˢᵁᴾᴱᴿᴹᴬᴿᴷᴱᵀ.
