Sayoko's house was lovely to live in, the neighborhood had lots to offer being situated near a shopping arcade. there is a little soba place just 5 minutes away from the home that sells really good soba

Sayoko's place is great! The apartment is small but comfortable enough for two people. It's just 10min walk from Osaki station. The directions given were clear. The only tricky part is walking with your luggage because there's a bit of a hill going to Sayoko's place. If you have big or heavy luggage, it is probably better to catch a cab to the apartment. Sayoko is a great host. She's very helpful and even invited us to a few events. She also took us back to the station on our departure day which was a great blessing. We would definitely come back and stay at her place again. Sincerely, Vallery & Sherly
Petit studio pratique et bien situé. Le quartier est charmant et bien situé pour rayonner dans Tokyo.

Le logement est bien situé dans un quartier traditionnel et reposant. Vous trouverez à proximité supérettes et restaurants.
L'appartement manque toutefois de confort, en particulier la literie et les coussins. L'appartement est mal isolé, aussi il fait très chaud sans la clim et on entend absolument tout ce qui se passe dans la rue et dans les appartements mitoyens.
Le prix reste attractif pour Tokyo.
Sayoko was a great host! She drove us to Shinjuku, that was very kind. The place was clean and cosy. We really enjoyed. We will recommend this stay if you want to visit Japan for a few days!
房东人很好，附近的就是户越银座步行街，吃的挺多，也很便利。不过离地铁站有点远，得走10分钟。

Sayoko's place is really practical and comédie table, in a very nice and quiet area, very interesting because it is well desserved in trains, subways and buses to go everywhere ! Sayoko is a very nice host!

C était notre 2 eme séjour chez Sayoko mais cette fois ci nous avions l appartement du bas ...comme déjà dit c est vraiment un endroit typique loin dès grands buildings et vous avez tout dans la même rue ...restaurants boutiques ..et un lawson ouvert 24 h sur 24. L appartement est facile d accès de Narita vous prenez le narita express puis vous descendez a Shinagawa et la vous prenez le jr yamanote et juste un arrêt vous descendez a Osaki ..de la vous suivez les indications de Sayoko et c est à 10 minutes à pieds. C est simple ...l appartement est petit mais bien equipė avec une machine à laver le linge très pratique quand on reste une semaine ...on espère bien revenir un jour ....thank you Sayoko for all and for your great welcome ...we love your place we love tokyo...we love Japanese people ...we hope come back again ...best regards Didier and Cathy

Facile accesso alla stazione JR e anche alla metropolitana. Il quartiere è molto carino, pieno di negozi e ottimi ristorantini. Sayoko è un host eccezionale, è sempre pronta ad aiutare e a dare consigli. La casa è lontana dal casino metropolitano ma comunque offre tutte le possibilità di spostarsi facilmente o rimanere la sera nel quartiere e avere una grande scelta.
La casa è molto pulita e abbastanza grande per gli standard giapponesi, c'è tutto quello che serve dalla cucina al bagno e anche la lavatrice con stendibiancheria. Consiglierei questa casa a chiunque! Quando torneremo a Tokyo staremo sicuramente di nuovo nella casa di Sayoko

Sayoko's flat is in an extremely nice neighborhood close to all forms of transportation. The apartment is very convenient, clean and silent, there is everything one might need even for a longer stay. Sayoko herself is incredibly helpful and accomodating - we could check in early and she helped tremendously with our broken suitcase! We would love to return.

Excelente relación calidad-precio.
El piso tiene todo lo que puedas necesitar.
Wifi pocket funciona bien y ADSL en casa.
Buen recibimiento.
Barrio tranquilo.
Cerca de tren JR.
Supermercado Seven Eleven cerca.
Seconda volta da Sayoko come sempre impeccabile. Siamo stati benissimo e rinnovo quello che ho scritto nell'altra recensione.
コストパフォーマンスが圧倒的に高いところでした。これ以上の滞在場所を他に都内で探すのは難しいのではと思うほどでした。滞在前、滞在中のフォローもあり困ったことはありませんでした。お勧めできるところです。
A bit far from JR station. Apart from that, everything is great. The host is very nice. I especially like the supermarket which is near the house. You can find lots of local food there.
Sayoko was a great host, her home is in a perfect location to access central Tokyo and has everything you need for a comfortable stay.

Sayoko's place was great, very clean and the directions and instructions were all really useful. The pocket WIFI that was avaiilable to use was fantastic for helping us get round the city and Sayoko was very kind in giving us a lift to the station when we left.

Sayokos flat was the ideal hub for all activities in and around Tokyo. The Yamanote Line is near by and you can find stores like seven eleven or lawson in your close neighborhood. Sayoko was always helpful and gave us wonderful tips and hints. We can highly recommend her Apartment!

If you ever want to go to Tokyo this is the place to stay!
Sayoko is a super host, very tougthfull and helpfull!
The place has everything you need for longer stay, and is located in the nicest neigbourhood!
If we ever come to Tokyo again we would without a doubt stay here again!
Nothing bad to say about our stay!

从车站走去Sayoko的家，大概一个15分钟，当时的季节是秋季但是遇上了雨天，天气大概13度，冷的天气走在路上其实是个很不错的体验。房东还因此向我们道歉，因为天气不大好，我们觉得房东恨得太可爱了。
房东是非常细心的出来接待我们，我们要离开到大琦车站的时候，还载了我们一程并且介绍了我们著名的六厘舍拉面餐馆，非常温馨。
最让我喜欢的是家里有洗衣机，因为我们在日本逗留十天，我们不需要带那么多衣服过去而且遇上下雨的季节，可以烘干衣服真的帮助了我们解决衣服湿透的问题。
房东准备了很多咖啡茶包和饼干给我们，真的很好吃。从Sayoko的家沿路走下去，很多餐馆和便利商店，很方便。
房东准备了portable wifi，这个又省了一笔买simcard的费用。

The place is neat. The neighborhood is very residential, quiet, and very safe to walk around late at night. Lawson is your neighbor so you dont have to worry about getting something late at night. The Shinagawa area is a perfect balance for the busy areas like Shibuya etc. The Osaki Station is a good 10 to 20-minute walk from the place (depends on how fast you walk). Think of it as exercise haha MY TIP: always take the South Exit from the Osaki Station going back to the place. :) The Osaki Station has the JR Yamanote -green- line which basically can take you anywhere in Tokyo! Main JR stations, Tokyo Metro, etc.
As for the host, Sayoko-さん is very reliable! She’s like a Mom who’s always ready to help :) She also suggested and drove me to Daikanyama :)
I love Tokyo! <3
房間便宜、整潔及寧靜，附近就是户越銀座通，有便利店、食店、藥妝、溫泉等，步行往JR大崎或戶越地下鉄只要十幾分鐘，非常便利。屋主非常主動熱心協助。

This place is around 15 mins walk from the Osaki JR line. Along the street of where we stayed ; they have a long stretch of shops for food and some shopping, convenient shops are also very close by.
Owner is very friendly and nice. Even prepared some snacks and drinks for us in the kitchen. Also offered to send us off.
Sayoko san place is not very hard to find once you get the direction. We only got confuse for a couple minute before we figure it out after we arrive by the airport bus at Osaki station.

Sayoko is a very good host.  Lives next door and willing to help with anything.  The place was a tad small for two.  Best for 1 person and for vacation travel, not business travel. There are 3 train stations close by.  Shimo-Shimmei was a bit less walking and less crowded than main JR Osaki Station.
Sayoko is a very kind and lovely host!! Very welcoming and replies quickly to any concerns!! Will definitely return to her airbnb the next time I visit Tokyo :)

Sayoko's place was in a terrific location; within close walking distance to Osaki Station, convenience stores, cafes etc. yet still retained peace and quiet. Was easy to get to all parts of Tokyo, but was separate enough to have some downtime from the hustle and bustle of the city.
The apartment was small, but still very comfortable, and well stocked with everything you would need! Including pocket wifi and an adapter plug, which was a very thoughtful touch.
Overall, the value for money was exceptional! Would definitely recommend Sayoko's place as a decently priced, conveniently located, and comfortable place to stay.

Really comfortable place close to Osaki Station. Bigger than other airbnb’s I’ve stayed at in Japan.
Sayoko is also a really good host and responds quickly! She has a booklet of recommendations for places to go and has everything prepared for you in the room
Clean and cute appartment in Tokyo ! Soyoko is a great host and you will feel good at her place ;) We spend 1 week in the studio and it was easy to discover the city from the appartment.

Sayoko's studio was such a lovely place to stay at Tokyo. Good location as you can access this place from both JR station and Metro station. The facilities was great and make you feel like living at your own home. It was nearby with Lawson, 7E  and Family Mart make it easier to get your day/night snacks.My husband and I have a wonderful trip by staying here and hopefully will come back again soon! 😉
This place is great for a short stay. It is close to the Osaki station which makes it very convenient for comuting around Tokyo.

【居住心得】
小小的房子，外觀時尚，內居相當舒適、溫馨，住起來真的就像自己的家一樣，應有盡有，房東Sayoko人也非常親切，第一天入住就出來和我們打招呼、跟我們說明附近的車站、店家等等資訊，非常推薦來這邊住，如果下次有機會，我們還是會選擇這邊作為旅遊的落腳處。
【食衣住行】
從JR大崎車站步行約10分鐘，沿途會經過許多商辦、店家，若要買生活用品或藥物，可以在沿途的TOMOS購買，沿途也會經過兩家7-11，大崎車站也可以坐電車直達台場，到其他旅遊景點也相當方便！
從都營地下鐵戶越站步行約10分鐘，沿途是戶越銀座商店街，吃的喝的用的穿的都可以在這邊購買，住宿地點旁邊也有一家LAWSON裡面也是應有盡有，從戶越站搭車也可以直接到淺草玩，或是在大門站轉車也可以到熱門的築地市場！
整體而言，Sayoko的家相當方便，溫馨、舒適。廚具、盥洗用具、微波爐、冰箱、洗衣機、應有盡有。真的就像自己家一樣喔!!!

Sayoko's apartment is very clean and comfortable. She was also kind enough to leave us snacks upon our arrival! The best thing about the apartment is its location; it's a local, residential area with a really lovely shopping street literally seconds away from the front door. However, you also have Shibuya, Harajuku and other places you'd want to see all easily accessible via the Yamanote line. The walk to and from the station is super easy once you know where you're going. Also, if you're thinking about getting a JR pass and plan to travel to other parts of Japan for day trips- Shinagawa station is only one stop away and you can get the shinkansen from there!) I would definitely recommend Sayoko's place to anyone thinking about staying in Tokyo.
Sayoko’s apartment is clean and all instructions were clear and thorough.

Good place for two. Would not recommend sharing if you are two men or large women I am pretty small (5ft2, 120lbs)  and we didn't have enough duvet to share! Very clean and as described, 10/12 min walk from osaki which has good links. Not close to nightlife areas but very peaceful.

すごく素敵な部屋です。
交通も便利です。
房间很棒，交通便利。东西多的话房主可以帮忙送到车站。

My husband & I stayed at Sayoko's place for 7 nights in February. This is the perfect place to stay in Tokyo in a local quiet place and also close to local market place, convenience store, supermarket and many delicious restaurants which take good care of me even though they can't speak English but we find the way to communicate.
The place is close to subway station which brings you to any places in Tokyo. Another way from the house is go for JR station which is quite convenience for a trip out of Tokyo, too.
The place is exactly what we saw in the picture, clean and full of what we want. Towel, hair-dryer, cup, glass, knife, tea & coffee. I love the washing machine as it leave my luggage more space from tons of clothes. We wash our clothes almost everyday. The heater in the room works well. The house wifi signal is good. I never use pocket wifi as I bought sim from my country to use in Japan.
Sayoko san welcome us with a great & warm hospitality. She allow us for early check-in and help us for luggage delivery service.
I will definitely stay at this place again!
Lovely place!
從大崎車站徒步到這間房源大概12分鐘，大崎車站有山手線，湘南新宿線，臨海線和崎京線確實很方便，房東很親切可用英語溝通，退房當天如果房東得空的話就會開車送到大崎車站 。

What a lovely peaceful and quite area to stay.When you leave the property to the left there is a little town(village) That has everything that you need(groceries, restaurants, chemist, fruit&veggies, dry cleaning, ect)our accommodation was just what we needed a place to sleep with a shower(in a bath) fridge , stove and desk.(no TV) but free wifi.Thank you again Sayoko for your offer to take us to the train stain and our late checkout.

Great stay and awesome hospitality at Sayoko’s place!
Direction was very clear and with swift response.
The place is very clean and has almost everything one need.
Location is walking distance to JR Osaki station, but arriving with luggage better with taxi, cost around JPY 500-600.
The best part was Sayoko’s hospitality, she is very responsive and go beyond extra mile to answer whatever questions you have about locals.
Will def come back to this place when in town.

Sayoko was such a wonderful host to us and made our stay one to remember. She invited us to see some of her artwork and son’s artwork which was a nice touch. The apartment is very spacious and cool. We would definitely be coming back to stay here - we really enjoyed the visit!

Sayoko's place was clean and tidy, where the size of the apartment was just appropriate for two person. The neighbourhood seemed quiet and peaceful (at least in the morning and late night when we're back from exploring around Tokyo) There's two 7-Eleven stores facing each other on the way back from the station which was very convenient for a late snack. Also there's a Lawson just less than 5 minutes walk away. Overall a great place to stay in!

La casa queda ubicada en un lugar increíble, residencial, cerca de un maravilloso bar de sake y a 15 minutos caminando a jr osaki. Es un barrio muy tranquilo.
La casa estaba muy limpia, salvo que las toallas olían a humedad. Tenía aire acondicionado y todo lo básico para una estadía agradable.
La anfitriona nos dejó bolsas de te y café y unas galletas, lindo detalle.
Volveria sin duda a este lugar.

It was a perfect little place to stay in. It was walking distance from train and subway stations, restaurants,  and shopping places. It was quiet and a nice place to be at the end of the day of exploring Tokyo.
Een geweldig verblijf om als rustige uitvalsbasis te gebruiken in Tokyo.  Je kan daar helemaal tot rust komen en merkt maar weinig van het drukke Tokyo en toch is alles uitstekend te bereizen.

Sayokos place was amazing! Just the perfect size for my husband and I. Loved how she had all the amenities in the apartment you would need. The bed was comfortable. And her place was not far at all from the nearest station. Shes quick to respond to messages. Will definitely be coming back again!! Thankyou so much!

Emplacement idéal au calme très pratique équipement au top
que dire on rebiendrat

Sayokos place is approximately 10 mins brisk walk from Osakii station , very convenient for the transport system into Tokyo and anywhere else you would wish to go to.
There are family marts and Lawson supermarkets very close by and a few little restaurants nearby .
All the amenities one could wish for are at your disposal in Sayokos place , the washing machine was very useful to us after travelling for 4 weeks.
For ease of travelling and for convenience and a fair price I would recommend a stay here ,
Thank you Sayoko.
地點位置周圍生活機能不錯~有便宜的藥妝（有兩家間第一間人多比較便宜）及超市，往户越方向有超市及許多餐廳，大崎站有巴士可直達機場
Comfortable and clean. About a 10-13 minute walk from Osaki station. The location turned out to be perfect for traveling around. I used the JY Yamanote Line to get everywhere.

Sayako's place is incredibly conveniently located (close to Shibuya) but still in a cute neighborhood that I ended up loving. She's a great host that gives you good tips without being overbearing. By the end of my two week stay, I was wishing that I could stay forever. Totally recommend!

Modern flat was great for us.
About 15min from Osaki station.
Well furnished room!
Great host!

Been first time in Japan, and i can say i enjoy staying at Sayoko apartment.
It is a really strategic place between shinagawa and tokyo. If you want to wondering around the city, i would recommend this place. It is located in osaki and the neighborhood is quite nice. But i would recommend to bring medium luggage to make your life easier here. Not to mention Sayoko is a lovely host, with amazing hospitality and respect your privacy.
I would recommend sayoko to other people :)

Lovely host, great location. Pocket WiFi was too slow to use unfortunately and the kitchen tap water was a bit off. But the place was clean and Sayoko is very helpful with local knowledge. Would stay again!
Very good

Sayoko is very good at response time. The living space was very spacious. The living was medium-sized compared with other Japanese homes, but had the essential necessities for traveler (washer was a plus!). The location is in a residential area, so you will see a lot of children, adults, and even cute dogs. The area is very cute, I always enjoyed walking to the station everyday of our stay. Literally two buildings away is a Lawson for your convenience store stops. Further down is a lot of small shops, restaurants, and even my favorite coco ichibanya. The distance from the station to the home is great, it’s about literally 10 mins. Even on your way to the station, there are literally two 7-11s next to each other. They are about less than 2 mins walk from the station. And also a great dipping ramen place that is worth trying.
I would definitely recommend this place to stay 👍🏻

Me and my wife had a wonderful stay at Sayoko’s home.
The home is located about 12 minuets walking from the JR Osaki station. The home is located on a street with many restaurants and shops. The Osaki station is also convenient, being that it is on the Yamanote line route, which connects to the majority of Tokoyo’s main areas.
The home has all the amenities that I needed, such as, washer, kitchen utensils and good AC.
Sayoko is fluent in English and was very helpful with questions, she even drove us to the station at the end of our stay! Thanks again Sayoko!

What about Sayoko’s place isn’t great? Her apartment is just 15 minutes from Osaki station (which is on the Yamanote line that covers all of central Tokyo like Shibuya, Harajuku, Shinjuku, Akihabara etc.). There are a lot of shops and restaurants in the same street and the Lawson (one of the many combini supermarkets) is literally 2 houses down the road. The neighborhood is nice and quiet and you don’t have the feeling that you’re in a big city like Tokyo even though Shibuya is only 11 minutes away. Sayoko is a great host as well. Responded very quick to my messages, we could check in earlier than expected, she gave us tips on where to eat and even brought us to the station with all of our luggage on our last day.
There was a minor problem with the upstairs neighbors, as they were making a lot of noise, but after sending Sayoko a message the noise stopped right away.
The only little thing I can think of is that we found the mattress of the bed a bit hard but that’s a matter of “taste” so I wouldn’t let that stop you from booking this apartment!
It’s also very easy to access the apartment from Narita since there is a bus from there directly to Osaki.
I would definitely come back here!
Very hospitable and  accommodating host.

This is a small ground level apartment. It was clean and had everything we needed and nothing we didn’t. There was very little natural light, but we did not spend a lot of time there during the day so it was not a big deal. The AC took us a bit to figure out but once we did it worked well. Same with the washer.
The best let about this place is the location. It’s on a really nice street with lots of small local restaurants and shops, and not many tourists. The neighborhood is mostly residential and very quiet, so it was a welcome space to return to after a loud and busy day in Tokyo.

Saubere, einfache Unterkunft für zwei Personen, tolle Gastgeberin, immer bereit für Hilfe. Unterkunft hatte alles, was man brauchte. 10-15 min Fußweg bis Osaki Station, sehr gute Lage, mit Yamanote kann man schnell andere Orte in Tokio besichtigen.  Wir würden wieder diese Wohnung wählen. Danke Sayoko!

First of all : this apartment is ok with the new Japanese law (problems are still happening in Japan because of that so...)
It takes about 10-15mns by walk to go to Osaki station (JR lines, including the Yamanote) + other convenient lines (you can go to Odaiba and Yokohama)
Shinagawa is at only one station so it is convenient if you need to use the shinkansen
The bus for the airport at Osaki station is at only 1.000¥ (the cheapest I have ever seen)
There is a Lawson next door, and also there is a supermarket close to Osaki station so you can buy good and cheap food (promotions every night at the supermarket) and also cook by yourself since the apartment is well furnished
Also, you can keep in mind that this apartment is spacious for a Japanese one, and the price is definitely not expensive (close to JR lines + wi-fi + pocket wi-fi)
I really need to add that Sayoko was the nicest airbnb host I ever had until now : we were able to check-in earlier, and drove us to the bus station with our luggages on the last day. She also lent me a thermometer and ice packs because I was sick, and went with me to the clinic and the pharmacy, so she really helped me when I needed it.
Nice place to stay.

The place is really great and convenience. Just a minute to the station and you can find many restaurants, shops and convenience stores. So, it’s very easy to find something to eat although in the late night.
In Sayako’ place also very comfortable. You have everything you need. We are very enjoy staying at her place.
Accessible to the train station. Easy to find food along the apartment. Room is clean.

Great stay, really lovely neighbourhood close enough to the train (7 min walk) but the walk there is lovely and you get distracted looking at everything. The place is a little bit smaller than the first picture suggests, the picture is widened a bit. But the place was very stylish, and it has the biggest bath we've ever seen in Japan (aside from onsen obviously), take advantage of the bath!
Thanks for hosting us, we got a quick reply for each questions.
Lovely host and accomodating, but apartment needs updating.

From all my airbnb experiences, I think  Sayoko is the best host so far. She was so helpful and she even took us to the bus terminal by her car. Never had this experience before. I love her place because it located near JR station and also office areas with nice and modern buildings. You can take a walk to the nearest convenience store and you can find various restaurants nearby. I do recommend this place for you.

This bnb is located in an interesting neighbourhood with quaint lanes and allywaysand very convenient to the Osaki train station and Sayoko's instructions to get to her place were excellent. We had no trouble getting from Narita.

Sayoko place at Osaki is very excellent place to stay. We got very much beyond our expectation. The host is very kind , helpful, and friendly. We would recommend Sayoko place to anyone looking for space in Tokyo.

Overall, the apartment was clean and sufficient for 2 ppl. The kitchen and bathroom supplies were complete. Sayoko was also very quick to respond and helpful! While it’s a 10-15 min walk to the train station, would recommend as the neighborhood is also clean and peaceful.

Sayoko's place is in an awesome location, far enough away from the main roads to be quiet, but close enough to give guests easy access to a number of great local sights and restaurants. Another huge plus is the 24 hour convenience store less than a minute from the house. If you're looking for a very cute and affordable base in Tokyo, I highly recommend Sayoko's place.

Great stylish space - clean and light and quiet. Washing machine was a huge bonus! Very easy to get into central Tokyo. Sayoko was super kind and gave us a lift to the station with our luggage. Highly recommended!

Sayako was a great host. She anticipated all FAQs, as she has a manual of all the “How to’s” in her home, since instructions are in Japanese. (ie: washing machine, heater and Food stalls near her area)
Definetely recommending this place. Best part is its just about 10min walk towards osaki station.

Sayoko’s home is very convenient. Just outside of osaki station which is just a short JR ride away from all the major cities. The amenities are great and the space is plenty for two. Sayoko is also very responsive.

Sayoko had fast responses and was quick to resolve any issues that we had.
The airbnb was easy to get too and not too far from the station. It is in a lovely neighbourhood.
The check in of this location was so smooth. A quiet place with all the necessary amenities. Although a bit far from the subway, the neighbourhood provided alot of things to look around.

Sayokos Wohnung ist sehr gut gelegen. Gemütlich braucht man 15 min zu Fuß zur nächsten Bahnstation Osaki. Auf der Strecke sind sogar zwei 7Elevens für alles nötige. Die Kommunikation mit Sayoko verlief immer schnell und unkompliziert. Sehr hilfreich war ihr mobiles Wifi, dass man für unterwegs desöfteren benötigt hatte. Das ist ein super Service von ihr! Auch bot sie uns an sich um ein Taxi für die Rückfahrt zu kümmern. Da sie im Geschäft Kika Style direkt an der Wohnung arbeitet, war sie für uns immer erreichbar. Es ist etwas sehr hellhörig in der Wohnung, wir konnten die Gäste über uns bei allen Sachen hören. Alles in allem kann ich die Wohnung von Sayoko empfehlen.

La calle es una pasada, tienes todos los comercios que quieras, restaurantes, puestos callejeros, dos templos, lawson a diez metros, a 7min de la estación de Osaki en la yamanote line. La casa es perfecta para dos, plancha, lavadora, arrocera, microondas, nevera, utensilios de cocina, un perchero, tendal, aire acondicionado,etc. Tenía de todo, recomendable 100%, si volvemos a tokyo intentaremos volver a alojarnos aquí.

역이랑 연결된 구름다리를 통해서 걸어가면 (버스 터미널에서 역으로 올라가는 엘레베이터로 올라가서) 세븐 일레븐까지 편하게 이동 할 수 있어요~! 바로 옆에 로손도 있고 도고시 긴자 상점가의 식당도 다양해서 숙소 근처에서 식사를 하기도 괜찮았구요! 오사키 역 자체도 JR야마노테선이나 오다이바 가는 노선이랑 있어서 놀러가기도 괜찮았어요! 다음에 도쿄에 갈 일이 있으면 또 갈 수 있을 것 같습니다~!
nettes kleines Appartement in guter Lage. Zur Metro bzw zum Bahnhof in 10 minuten.
Great place to stay, access to public transportation, great and fast responding host!

We love Sayoko's apartment! The bed is comfy and warm, the air con makes the bedroom toasty and the location is convenient and in the middle of a neighbourhood of families. Togoshi Ginza is at your footstep for yummy street food. Fantastic cultural experience.

1.房間乾淨溫暖，傢俱及烹調設備碗盤都有（我們可以在家裡弄早餐），浴室也很乾淨，床鋪柔軟。
2.從大崎車站走過去有點崎嶇，我們喜歡從戸越走去，車站出來直走就到了，住宿旁邊就有Lawson，非常方便。
我們很喜歡這次的住宿經驗 :)
the place is a convenient in transportation and quite. the room is also great. Sayoko is a warm hearted and considerate host!
Nice staying in Sayoko‘s house. Very clean and convenience.

Sayoko’s place was clean and homely. I felt very comfortable upon arrival and appreciated the extra lengths sayoko went to to make sure we were safe and enjoying ourselves. Would definitely recommend for those looking for a nice quiet place to unwind and feel as if you were at home.

Good place to stay in while exploring Tokyo! Beautiful neighborhood, 10min to the big Osaki Station which gets you everywhere super quickly. Sayoko was really nice and a very helpful host. The apartment had all the amenities you could need!
大崎駅から歩きます。坂道もありますが充分徒歩圏内です。近くにコンビニもあります。歯ブラシは自分のものを使いましたが、他のものは持っていかなくても、ほぼ用意してくださってます！

We absolutely loved our stay at Sayoko's adorable apartment! This cute space has everything you need, and we loved the location. The bath, kitchen, and laundry facilities were greatly appreciated. The walk to Osaki station is lovely: through a very nice neighborhood, and then you can get anywhere in the city. There are multiple 7-11s nearby, and many shops and restaurants at the station.
Sayoko was incredibly responsive and helpful. We highly recommend this apartment!

Great location, close to three major stations including JR Osaki, with plenty of options for food. The space is behind the owner's beautiful boutique (Kika Style) and is very quiet. Sayoko is super responsive. Will definitely stay here again if I get the chance.

Sayoko is an amazing host!! She responds very fast and always provides very useful suggestions! We enjoyed our stay! We walked around at late night a lot and the area is SUPER safe and convenient. This place is in the residential area with nice business district around it. The only down side is that it is a little bit far from everything but subway is  convenient.

Great host Sayoko, english fluent and very nice. The place is cozy and has good room, everithing in it to stay for more days, including pocket wi-fi, very useful for travel in Tokyo. The area is very nice, not touristic and load of bars, restaurants, shops and supermarkets, not many cars around and perfect to visit the city with JR line and Tokyo Subway both very close to the flat.
Again and again.
It was a nice little unit on a street with plenty of local little restaurant to try. An easy walk to the train station and Sayoko was super helpful with any help or questions we had.
Sayoko’s place is wonderful! It’s a 10 minutes walk to the subway station that can take you everywhere. The place is very cozy and has everything you need. We definitely recommend it!

Great place to stay.. easy access.. Sayoko very helpful.. the room not so big but everything you need almost exist. Sayoko was also very fast response of everything I asked for. We also could check in earlier because there is no guest before us. very flexible check in and check out. Very recommend place to stay.

A clean and tidy apartment that has everything you need. In fact, it is exactly as it's listed. Conveniently located in a quiet residential area (within walking distance from JR Osaki Station) that has 3 convenience stores nearby (2 7-11 along the way from JR Osaki Station and 1 Lawson that is down the road from the apartment). Sayoko-san is a great host who is very flexible with check-in and check-out timings. If we are heading back to Tokyo again, will definitely check into Sayoko-san's apartment!
Loved our stay! An excellent base to start your Tokyo adventure
The apartment is rather small but cozy and hass everything you need. The location was very convenient with the Yamanote line. We‘d be happy to stay here again!
Sayoko was an amazing host her room was of the best quality i have seen in airbnbs so far in japan. We really look foward to rebooking at her location in the near future.

Sayoko’s place was nice and cozy. It is located in a nice area of Tokyo with many local shops and restaurants, and has great transport links. When we had issues, Sayoko was quick to respond and sorted the issues that day. We will be staying again.

Sayoko's place is nice and clean. It is located near JR and Asakusa Line. It is not as big as I imagine, but it is big enough for 2 people.
I am looking forward to stay at sayoko's place again when I visit Japan.
Sayoko’s place is in a nice neighborhood and just the right size for 2 people. It was about a 10min walk from her place to public transportation. Sayoko is very responsive, which is very helpful
Great place, enough space for two people to stay comfortably. Sayoko was very flexible as well. Would definitely love to come back.
We enjoyed staying here. It’s in a great location and very clean. Sayoko was really friendly and a good host.
Thank you so much!

Sayoko is a great host! She was there to tend to our needs and was very responsive. The apartment is located at a quiet area, which we loved! Amenities were great and the place is so clean. We had a great stay!
Nice and very clean place. Easily accessible to JR Yamanote Line (Osaki Station) about 5 - 10 mins walking.
Sayoko is very responsive. there are many local stores and restaurants nearby.

It's located in a great and quiet residential area  and easy access to JR line and Asakusa subway line. Sayoko was very helpful with very easy understand directions; had no trouble at all to find the place. The room was spacious, clean and included all amenities. Very convenient the heart of Tokyo, including Omotesando, Ginza, Asakusa. We enjoyed our stay and definitely will recommend to our friends.

We stayed at Sayoko's place for just over three weeks, and for two people it is the perfect size. The bedroom has a sliding door which means that you can separate it from the kitchen area when you cook which is great! The washing machine was very helpful, and there are a few coin laundry places nearby that you can dry your laundry at. Local amenities were also very good - there is a Lawson about 20 seconds walk from the apartment, and the bustling street of Togoshi Ginza is also well worth a visit for food, shopping and entertainment. Osaki station is very close, about 10-12 minutes walk, with JR Yamanote line access as well as Haneda Airport Bus access.
The only cons of our stay was that we unfortunately experienced some noise issues from the upstairs neighbours whilst staying, which kept us from sleeping, however Sayoko was able to mediate this for us. I did also find that the apartment was not entirely sparkling clean, but both of us hoovered and tidied the apartment on a daily basis to ensure we kept our living spaces clean and tidy. Sayoko is a great host and very responsive and kind, and we would like to stay with her again in the future!
Great place to stay while in Tokyo!
Sayoko’s place was in a great location. It was stylish and had amazing amenities. Sayoko was very kind and offered us suggestions - will definitely stay here again when we come back to Tokyo
Great space for 2 travellers and Sayoko is very responsive and helpful. The apartment is clean and spacious. Would highly recommend

Staying with Sayoko was a very pleasant experience. The room is in a very quiet area, and about a 10min walk from the next station. Sayoko was an amazing host and really went out of her way to help me with my travel arrangements such as getting to the airport, I was very impressed.

A very good location for first time visitors with a very easy to access bus service from Haneda Airport to Osaki Railway Station, followed by a 10 minute walk to the B&B or a ~Y400 taxi ride. Sayoko’s Kika Style shop is immediately in front of the unit we enjoyed and there is a 2nd unit above.
The unit offered all we needed and the washing machine was a bonus. There is a Lawson’s convenience store less than 100mtrs and a two Seven-Eleven store on the pleasant 10 minute was to Osaki Stn.
Our 2-night stay at this B&B was an excellent choice to commence our 3-week visit of Japan.

We had a really nice stay with Sayoko. The flat was very clean and very convenient. The Togoshi Ginza Shopping Street starts in front of the house and Osaki Station which is at the Yamanote line is about 10 Minutes away by foot.
Amazing place . It is in the center of everything and very easy to get to places
Un apartamento con todos los servicios, muy cerca de la estación y en una zona con muchos servicios. Estancia muy agradable y tranquila. Muy recomendable para conocer Tokio.

Sayoko's place is small, but not cramped and has everything. I also really appreciated the helpful notes around the apartment. We stayed here towards the end of our trip and it would have been nice to stay here at the beginning since we would have learned how to use Japanese appliances by her notes!

Convenient location & nice place. Host was easily contactable & gave clear instructions for check-in. The space was more than sufficient for 2 of us & actually bigger than your typical tokyo apartment. We enjoyed our stay here, thanks!

If you are planning to visit Tokyo, Sayoko’s apartment is only about 10 mins walk to Osaki station. She provides details of the route and all communications with her are rapid and very clear. Sayoko has also taken care to make sure that guests aren’t confused when using Japanese electrical appliances: clear instructions are given in English & also illustrated with photographs. Thank you Sayoko for making our stay with you so easy.

Thank you for a great time. We thoroughly enjoyed ourselves!
Your home aloud us to be close to the big sights in Tokyo, but in a location that allowed us to have an authentic experience which really made our first experience in Tokyo memorable.
Great spot to land, close to Haneda airport and train station. So stoked to have stayed here.

Sayoko’s place is very clean and the location is perfect for exploring Tokyo. The flat has everything you need. It’s very close to the local shopping arcade which has a various choice of shops and restaurants. We would recommend anybody who is looking for a place to stay in Tokyo. Looking forward to going back there again.

Sparkling clean and perfectly located. Its next to an interesting shopping street with lots of dining places. Very close to train station that connects you to the Shinkansen.
The check in process was very good.
Sayoko is a good host!
Highly recommended!
Place is located 10 minutes walk from Osaki station, very convenient to get around Tokyo.

Beautiful place only about a 10-15 minute walk to the nearest station (depending how fast you walk). The space was beautiful with plenty of amenities - she even had little snacks for us! Food places were also nearby, which was quite convenient for us. No complaints - would definitely stay again!

Sayoko's place was amazing and so perfect for me and my fiance! Sayoko is a great host and was so sweet, and checked up on us to make sure we were doing okay! She also took our trash out when we forgot about it!! The place is very cute and feels very home-y and is perfect for 2 people. It is a 10 minute walk from JR Osaki, but the area is very nice and I felt very safe. It's maybe a 10-15 minute train ride from Shinjuku/Shibuya area, so it's close to the tourist destinations. If you're looking to stay in a quiet residential area in Tokyo, book this place!!

Flat was very clean and all comforts supplied. Very convenient to grocery stores, restaurants and especially public transport (trains,buses). There is a direct bus service from Narita airport to Osaki west terminal right next to train station. It was only $34 AUD for two adults and very comfy and convenient. Plenty of helpful tips and instructions at flat too from Sayoko and emails.
Highly recommend staying here if visiting Japan and great value. We crammed so much in to our 10 day stay from this location.
The studio flat was extremely comfortable and cosy. It is situated in a great neighbourhood and has easy access to convenience stores and JR Station.

Sayoko's place is in the perfect location to explore Tokyo, about a 10min walk to Osaki Station. The neighbourhood was quite and paceful. The place was clean and check-in was very simple! Highly recommend staying here.

This is second time we stayed at this place. Love the location, quite but close to local restaurants, lawson, family mart, 7-eleven and local supermarket. Very convenience to travel as it located near JR station and also Tokyo metro station. Sayoko is very kind and helpful. Room is very clean and comfortable for us.
Check in is very easy. If you have any inquiry, Sayoko just live next door! and she reply your messages very quickly.
Strongly recommended!

Accurate description of the place, including distance. Place is such a steal for its price! Sayoko’s warm, accommodating and ready to provide assistance - going above and beyond the listing. Thank you, Sayoko!
Cosy place near to Osaki Sation. Place juat nice for two person stay.
大崎駅から近く、とにかく便利。戸越銀座がレトロで楽しく散策しました。大人3人にはスペース的にはほぼ寝るだけですが、私達は特に不便さは感じませんでした。1人、2人での滞在なら充分ですね。お値段的にも大変ありがたかったです。sayokoさんがとても気のつく方で、いろいろ助けて頂きました。感謝です。
素早く丁寧な対応に、綺麗で広い部屋で、細やかな気配りが見られました。大変よいホストさんです。また機会がありましたらよろしくお願いします。

Sayoko's apartment is cosy and equipped with all the necessary  amenities which has made our stay a really pleasant one. It is located in a peaceful neighbourhood and walkable from Osaki JR station. The terminal for the airport bus is located at the train station as well which makes travelling to both airports really convenient. Sayoko has been amazingly responsive and helpful during our stay!
Great apartment right on the main strip of Ginza. Sayoko was easy to communicate with, we enjoyed our stay!

Sayokos place is very central, Osaki station is just a short walk away. There are also convenience stores nearby and laudromats. It was very quiet on her street and the place was really easy to find and check into. Even at 3am in the dark with no sleep!
Wonderful space with a wonderful host.

My husband and I stayed at Sayoko’s place last year and we loved it so much that we decided to stay there again this year. Nothing was different and everything there was still as exceptional as last year. Place was clean, Sayoko responded quickly and it’s a nice quite location and ten minutes or so away from the stations. Highly highly recommend!
Good value for money especially in a busy city like Tokyo!

Our location was great as we were located near a convinient store and a long street market. The street market was an absolute experience, we were able to try authentic street food and explore other streets. I would say the location is a bit far from the JR station (approximately 10-12 minutes walk) with slopes and heels, not ideal for large/heavy suitcases. But it was close to a subway station (approximately 6-8 minutes walk). Our stay was cozy, and basic amenities were provided, along with a little gift basket. However, their portable wifi stopped working on the second day of using it and there were not enough heating appliances. All in all, great stay.
This is second time stay here for Tokyo tour , great environment , clean room , from here walk to Osaki station around 12 minute , strong recommendation .

We had a great experience in Sayoko's place. A warm and comfortable bed is waiting for you once you get home so we're kinda excited to be home. The place is near a convenience store and restaurants. They have everything you need. She also gave us free coffee and chip. We will definitely come back. ✨13/10 stars✨
戸越銀座に近く、夜は静かで良いところです。

Sayoko made our stay in Tokyo super easy. The place is well located with Osaki being on the JR Yamanote line and in a cute neighbourhood with plenty of restaurants (Ramen Enishi was a great recommendation) and convenience stores. The Place is well maintained and provided everything we needed for our stay in Tokyo. You might even be lucky enough to meet her cute dog Miki 🐶
We would definitely stay here again!

We loved staying at Sayoko's place.  The apartment had everything we needed for the two nights we were there.  Sayoko is very responsive and lives nearby.  We even got to meet her sweet Shiba Inu dog!
Good place, good communication and good location

Suprisingly spacious and well appointed. The bathroom especially, with auto-flush heated bidet toilet. The bath was big enough for me to use, despite being 195cm tall. No complaints and would happily stay there again.

Sayoko is one of the best air b&bs I have stayed at. Her hospitality is amazing: super easy check in, checked in to see how we were, gave us local tips, super fast in responses & just all round lovely.
The apartment is close to a JR line so easy to get around Tokyo, it is much bigger than a lot of spaces in japan.
I would really recommend this apartment and will visit again next time I am in the country!
新型コロナ騒動の中でも安心かつ快適に過ごすことができました。Sayokoさんは最高のホストですよ！超おすすめです！
ありがとうございました。またどうぞよろしくお願いいたします。
アメニティや調味料など細かいところにも気を使ってあり、ゴミ出しの件などの質問にもすぐに返答をいただき、安心して滞在ができました。何より戸越銀座が近く買い物や食事にも便利でした。大崎駅のモダンな感じと商店街の雰囲気が同時に楽しめるところです。

This is a hidden gem. If you want a taste of local Tokyo in one of the best shopping streets in the city while having great access to all the tourist sites, look no further. Sayoko is a wonderful host, responsive and helpful. She will be there to make your stay comfortable. The room is clean, simple, and all the amenities you will need are provided in full. It will be your home away from home. I can’t wait to come back.
とても快適なお部屋で、ホストのSayokoさんには大変お世話になりました。歩けばすぐ戸越銀座商店街、交通アクセスも良く、アメニティも揃っていて申し分ありません。オススメです。
Wonderful host, location, and apartment.
駅や店に近く便利な場所にあり、中はとてもきれく、過ごしやすかったです。親切にしていただき安心して過ごせました。ありがとうございました。
1Fで空間も広々していて、滞在中は寒さを感じたこともありましたが、暖房設備がしっかりしていてよかったです。駅近ではないけれど、商店街を歩いたり、大崎駅も程よい距離でとても快適でした。
ビジネス目的で数日間泊まりました。快適に過ごさせていただきました。

The room has everything you need, clean, and the location is awesome. You have access to 3 train stations and the shopping street has literally everything you can think of. Sayoko is a great host, super nice and responsible.
昨年の夏に続き、一時帰国の東京での自主隔離期間を過ごさせていただきました。チェックインやチェックインの時間など色々と便宜を図っていただき感謝しております。大崎駅や戸越銀座の雰囲気がとても気に入っていて、日本に帰ってきたという感じを受けます。スーパーホストのSayokoさん、また機会があったらよろしくお願いします！

Sayoko is a lovely host! She provided us with a toaster when we asked, and even gave us fresh bread as a treat! Very responsive and pleasent. The location is good, 10 minute walk to Osaki station with a main train line, as well as at the end of a major shopping street. Would highly reccomend this appartment, it has everything you need!

戸越銀座商店街の中にあり、
近くには美味しいお店がたくさんあります。
夜は静かで快適に過ごせました。
必要なものはなんでも揃っていました。
とても快適なお部屋です。自炊をしたい方には最適です。水回りも清潔で、交通の便も良く、オススメです。
とても快適でした！

1ヶ月の長期で滞在しました。
海外からの帰国でしたが、
生活に必要なものが全て揃っていて
滞在に困ることはありませんでした。
オーナーさんもとても親切で、
マメに連絡をくれ、
こちらからの質問にも
迅速に対応してくださいました。
また機会があったらぜひ利用したいです！
立地○

リモートワーク目的で1ヵ月ほど長期滞在させていただきました。
机や椅子、ベッドなど備品類はしっかりしていて生活がしやすかったです。
お風呂には室内乾燥で洗濯物もサッと乾かせて便利でした。
キッチン周りも調理器具、カトラリー、グラスやコップも一通り揃っていたので不自由なく、近くの商店街も充実していたので食べることには困りませんでした。
オーナーの小夜子さんは親切丁寧な対応でした。付かず離れずのちょうど良い距離感でこちらも気を使わず気持ちよく過ごさせていただきました。
また機会があれば利用したいです。
We had a lovely time at Sayoko's place. The location is great - right next to Togoshi Ginza where we got lots of nice Japanese takeaways from! We highly recommend her place.

戸越銀座商店街のすぐ近くで、買い物や食事には大変便利です。
家電一式揃っているので、少ない荷物でも問題なく過ごせます。
オーナーさんは細やかに対応してくださり、安心して利用出来ました。

１ヶ月お世話になりました:)
素敵なお部屋にホスピタリティもしっかりしており快適に１ヶ月過ごさせていただきました ！
1階の部屋だった為2階にいる方によりますが階段の音と足音や騒音が気になり相談させて頂いた際もスムーズに対応頂きありがとうございました。
場所もよく戸越銀座商店街を楽しむことも出来ました！快適な生活をありがとうございました❤︎

不便を感じることもなく、必要なものが全て揃っている、そんな旅人の心をわかってくれる宿です！！
商店街に近く、食品の調達も簡単です！
次回は長期滞在したい宿でした^ ^
ありがとうございました

立地、設備、清潔感、全て理想どおりでした。
この条件にしてはかなりお手頃価格だと思います。
また機会があればお邪魔したいです。
長期滞在に必要なものが全て揃っていました。とても快適に過ごせました。ありがとうございました。

La Señora muy amable. Estamos muy encantada de estar su alojamiento. El vario me encanta. Esta cerca de estación de Osaki. Hay muchos restaurante en el vario.
Volveremos. Gracias.
10 min walk to Osaki station which has a lit of connection, and a combini just next, convenient place to stay to explore Tokyo.

Die Wohnung liegt in einer ruhigen Gegend und hat uns gut gefallen. Shibuya, Shinjuku und Harajuku sind mit der Bahn (ca. 10 min. Fußweg) schnell zu erreichen. In der Wohnung gibt es eine Mappe mit verschiedenen Hinweisen (auch auf englisch) zu den Geräten in der Wohnung, was uns sehr geholfen hat. Außerdem war die Wohnung insgesamt sehr gut ausgestattet. Es wurde sogar Pocket-Wifi und ein Handy zur Verfügung gestellt. Der Host war freundlich und hat unsere Fragen schnell beantwortet.

The check-in process was very smooth -  a key is left a special area with easy instructions.  The place has everything you need to cook, clean and storage.  Sayoko-san was helpful, I had a package delivered and she was able to help accept it and got in contact with me to pick it up at your shop.
Sayoko and KIKASTYLE: the best.

Easy and flexible check-in, and Sayoko is super responsive and helpful! It's not the most lavish space, but it will provide you with everything you need, especially if you just need a spot to store your stuff and spend the night. It is located 10-15 minutes from Osaki Station, which is convenient. I also loved that there's a kombini a few steps away for my early morning onigiri cravings. The pocket wifi was a nice touch as well. I think it's perfect for one person, but can accommodate two if needed.
Good place to stay. Close to the local shopping street has super markets, bakery, 100yen shops restaurants and convenient store etc. Osaki station is very convenient one to access majour stations.
Great location
Convenient location, reasonably priced and very kind host.

Her instructions on how to get to her place was very thorough and her responses were timely and friendly. Very accommodating. The area still has the feel of old Tokyo which was nice. Her place is adjacent to Togoshi Ginza, a street lined with traditional stores and restaurants. Very convenient to have a 7/11 type market nearby as well.
Osaki station is very good for getting around Tokyo. There are about 3 different station you can walk to from her place.
The apartment felt a bit dark, being on the first floor, but had all the amenities. Good size for solo traveler. It was peaceful and I had very restful sleep. The pocket wifi was really useful for me as I went about town. Thank you, Sayoko san.
This place was amazing!  Great value and location.

The host was very responsive. Answered all my questions. Thank you so much for letting me check in early. There are good restaurants around the area. The portable Wi-Fi was very handy to have. Thank you.
Great place to stay in a quiet area in Shinagawa city not far from the station and good food around
大崎駅からも戸越銀座駅からもアクセスがよく、周りにお店もたくさんあったので、滞在を満喫できました。
Sayoko is a very helpful host, She helped me book taxis with her local ride hailing app. The room is also pleasant for staying. Thanks so much Sayoko🙏
너무 좋은 숙박이였습니다!!
thank you. see you next time
Convenient location. Easy access to train stations. Strongly recommend for those who want to explore Tokyo.
unfortunately we couldn't go to Japan, but the host was kind enough to refund. I hope we can stay there in the future.

Our host was very kind and welcoming. She even left some snacks for us to enjoy and kept contact throughout our stay. And the location was ideal! Shinagawa became home for us during our 4 week stay 😁.
Great, near from jr station n subway station, strategic, cozy and comfort place, will be back soon

Sayoko was super kind and accommodating; she even booked a taxi to take us to the airport when we left! She left English instructions for all the appliances in the home, instructions for wifi, and recommendations for local restaurants and other businesses! If you’re coming to Japan, whether it be your 1st time or your 24th, I highly recommend staying at the Kika house!

The house is a nice stay for those looking for a cheap place while in Tokyo. Most hotels and other stays in the area are very expensive, so the deal alone is a great plus.
Please keep in mind is that the nearest train station is a bit of a walk, which is why I gave the place 4 stars, if it was closer the place would be perfect. The area by the house is very remote and quiet.

Sayoko war super freundlich und immer erreichbar sowie sehr hilfsbereit. Sie gab uns Empfehlungen für Unternehmungen und wie wir bestimmte Orte am besten erreichen können.
Sie hat uns am Tag der Abreise mit ihrem Auto zum Bahnhof gebracht, da es sehr stark regnete.
Insgesamt hat es uns sehr gut gefallen.
가격생각하면 만족스럽습니다

Stayed for 11 days and felt right at home! 10 minute walk to both train stations. Right on a shopping street with tons of shops and restaurants. The Lawson is right next door. The room was comfortable and we had everything we needed. The pocket wifi  was really useful. Our host was very responsive and helpful. The only minor issue is that you can hear people walking up the stairs and upstairs pretty loudly, and it can be a little disruptive when you're trying to sleep. Otherwise it was a wonderful stay and I would definitely stay here again!
Awesome accommodation, very close to Osaki station which allows you to quickly reach the best neighborhoods in Tokyo. Mrs. Sayako is also always very responsive in answering our questions.

L’appartement de Sayoko est parfait pour une personne ou un couple. Il est proche de plusieurs transports en communs et près d’une rue commerçante où il y a absolument tout ce qu’il faut, tout en étant au calme. Il dispose de tout le nécessaire pour passer un agréable séjour.
Sayoko est absolument charmante , réactive, arrangeante et aidante.
Je recommande +++
Great stay and very communicative host. Also fast wifi and good location. Highly recommend
Super buena localización para ir al centro, lavanderías y supermercados a 1 minuto del alojamiento. La estancia tenia de todo. Sayoko fue muy amable y nos ayudó a buscarnos un taxi a la vuelta.

Nous avons  séjourné chez Sayoko 12 jours, en septembre 2023, au rez-de-chaussée. l'appartement est idéalement placé à  8 mn à  pied de la gare d'Osaki. il est confortable, calme et très bien équipé.  Une longue rue très animée,  pleine de restaurants se trouve en bas de l'appartement.  Sayoko nous a donné  du thé  et un petit bouquet de fleurs naturelles à notre arrivée .Elle a toujours été disponible pour nous et nous a même emmenés  en voiture à  la gare le jour du départ. Je recommande  chaudement l'appartement  de Sayoko. MERCI SAYOKO
This was a cute stay in a great neighborhood! Sayoko was very great to communicate with, and the booklet with local hotspots was very helpful!

Great apartment. Is bigger than it looked on the pictures and it is in a quiet neighborhood. Just down the street are a couple of restaurants and convenience stores. It's not too far away from the next station. The apartment itself was clean and everything in it as promised. We only stayed a short time, but it was comfortable for the time we spend there.

Bilder geben nicht die Realität wieder. wir mussten feststellen, dass die Wohnung nur behelfsmäßig ist, Urlaub kann man das dann nicht nennen. Die Räumlichkeiten bestehen aus unverputzten Rigipswänden, das Bad ist alt und abgewohnt, allgemein ist die Unterkunft nicht sauber (nur oberflächlich). Das Bett war durchgelegen bis zum geht nicht mehr.  Allgemein ist die Ausstattung eher Sperrmüll - wir würden es nicht Vintage nennen. Leider unser erster und einziger Ausflug in ein Airbnb. Sayoko war als Gastgeberin zuvorkommend und immer zu erreichen, hier können wir nichts beanstanden.

近くに商店街やコンビニ、コインランドリーがあったり、いくつかの駅が近くにあって便利だった。
銭湯も近くにあってうれしかった。

Unfortunately we had a bad experience due to the fact that there were other guests staying on the floor above us. This kept us up all night. The place is very noisy and the sound from the stairs carries right into the bedroom. The smoking area outside is also right in front of the room.
We were glad Sayoko is such a great host. She instantly responded and offered to help. Also, the apartment is in a quiet neighborhood and is very conveniently located. We would have loved to stay longer.

Super Unterkunft in schöner ruhiger Nachbarschaft, Läden auch in der Nähe, zwei verschiedene Bahnhöfe in je 10 Minuten Laufdistanz, man ist von der Unterkunft aus in Shibuya und Shinjiku in 30 Minuten. Sehr bequemes Bett, Küche hat alles was man braucht. Sayoko war immer schnell erreichbar, wir konnten flexibel einchecken und sie hat uns für den Heimweg sogar mit dem Taxi bestellen geholfen. Würden jederzeit wiederkommen.

Es un apartamento con todo. Pensaba que sería más una habitación, pero tiene todo lo que necesitas para pasar unos días. Cierto que el baño es un poco viejo y la cocina pequeña, pero cumple muy bien su cometido.

Great location with shopping and restaurants nearby. Very walkable to and from Osaki station. The Yamanote line was convenient and stopped at all the popular areas (Shibuya, shinjuku and etc.) Sayoko has been one of the best Airbnb hosts I’ve communicated with! She was very responsive and was so kind to call us a taxi on check out day. We had some heavy luggage to carry and she even provided us with the best and easiest route to the airport so that we had no difficulties with transferring with our luggage. Sayoko had a very comfortable airbnb and was a great host.

Le logement spacieux et proposant un équipement très large et utile pour un séjour à Tokyo.
La rue est très calme ce qui permet de pouvoir se reposer après une longue journée de marche.
La salle de bain est très grande et permet une bonne installation.

Sayoko-san's place was in a really cute area in Shinagawa City, there were lots to do and walk around to see! The stay itself was great! 100% recommend. 100% Would stay again!
INSIDE
4 fresh towels, CLEAN, very cozy bed, great AC unit, hot water, clothes rack, kitchenette, fridge, washing machine, complimentary slippers, free umbrellas, complimentary teas/coffee/chocolate
LOCATION
Sayoko’s is a 14 min. walk from OSAKI STATION (but it felt quicker). A Lawson is right outside for food/snacks/anything. The Ginza St. starts right at your door with access to tons of shops, cafes, restaurants, etc. It is so peaceful. Sayoko suggested 2 parks for us to visit which were gorgeous on sunny days.
EASY COMMUTE
You can very easily commute to anywhere in tokyo from this location. We visited Shibuya, Shimokitazawa, Harajuku, and Tsukiji Market all from this destination very easily.
AMAZING HOST
