This was a wonderful place to stay! Slightly off the beaten path so you get a different perspective of Tokyo. The AC was great as it was very hot out, and the laundry machine helped so much. Thanks!!

到东京不用怕迷路哒~阿姨会来车站接我们回去~阿姨家其实离公交车站比较近，奈何我们忘记问了，天天傻呵呵地走老远到地铁站……一共玩5天，第四天晚上才发现出门一分钟有公交车站……阿姨很热情哒~给我们介绍了值得去的景点以及很多日本的文化、习俗等，还请我们吃西瓜啦~话说如果在东京有什么想采购的阿姨也会陪着去帮忙翻译的，不过请各位不要坍中国人的台啊，日本的东西不还价的，不要折腾着还价最后又不买啊。阿姨家附近药妆超市居酒屋一应俱全，我们回来得早还借了阿姨的自行车出去吃夜宵~对了，地铁站门口的章鱼烧要比其他地方的便宜。一蘭拉面并没有特别好吃，只是环境很别致如果要吃汤底选淡一点，因为选普通就觉得偏咸了，不过抹茶杏仁豆腐很好吃！

ミーティングルームや宿泊部屋などいろいろ融通していただき、ありがとうございました。
サービスや清潔さも高く、とても満足度の高いホストでした。
今後とも、宜しくお願い致します。
第一次住民宿，明天就回家了，今晚吃的饱饱的！晚上我跟房东阿姨说嘴巴馋，阿姨就拿了橘子给我吃，好感动，十天都没怎么吃水果了

非常高兴预订了文娟阿姨的房屋，还没出发前就收到阿姨非常详尽的路线指引，给我这个日语丁点儿不会的人来讲踏实了很多。阿姨的民宿在上板桥，离池袋、新宿等非常近，非常典型的日本居民区，干净且安静，周围全是小别墅，房屋里床品都是很香的洗衣粉味道，清新舒服，有任何问题阿姨都会第一时间帮忙解决，并等你回来给你道晚安后她才去休息，就像家里的长辈一样很窝心！经常看到客人一旦离开，不管住一天还是几天，她都会把床品仔细的洗干净而且晒被子，可以放心舒服的享受她的房屋。我几乎每3个月都去东京一次，下次依旧选择阿姨的民俗，也希望阿姨的服务越来越好 入住率越来越高！

第一次民宿体验如此完美而又具有启发意义. 由于东京出差结束后，临时决定在东京再留一晚…恰巧赶上了樱花季东京的酒店一房难求的状况，民宿竟然还有些房间。出于安全考虑，选择了留宿文娟阿姨的客房…微信里阿姨的迅速答复和满满爱心的叮嘱，自己仿佛是在回家的路上，而不是远行。阿姨家在别墅区…一栋栋别致的小别墅门前都有可爱的花草，充满了闲情雅致。和阿姨唠唠家常，自己逛逛周围的集市，去城北中央公园赏赏樱花，看看球场上奔跑的少年…让自己的旅行增了几分恬静，少了几分匆忙。晚上和房间里的其他新朋友们像兄弟姐妹一样叽叽喳喳聊到半夜才睡…文娟阿姨也是很晚才睡，直到一对小夫妻把行李打包好，她收了垃圾才去睡觉。阿姨给我们讲的那些她在日本生活的故事，是这次旅行的亮点…也许旅行中永远都会有更精彩的美景和美食，却难遇这样的温暖。买走的是商品和服务，买不走的是态度、文化和精神… 最感动的是阿姨对服务品质的追求，希望我们这些后辈能做得像文娟阿姨一样到位。
马来西亚的朋友可以看这里，三月独自旅行在日本住的是阿姨家，5月到日本住的还是阿姨家。基本没规划行程就去了，阿姨都会建议一些旅游路线，只需follow 就OK了。建议给独自旅行的游客，不用担心迷路语言不通。基本都是中文沟通-店家都有中文解说员。阿姨家附近靠近地铁站有一家大排长龙的蛋糕店，好好吃哦
回国了，脑海里依然浮现的是文娟姐姐温暖的笑容、回味着在东京“家”的感觉，真好！想特别提一下床的舒适度非常好，日本行睡得最甜美的一站。期待下次的相逢，谢谢文娟姐姐热情的接待，给我留下美好的记忆。
阿姨人很好。房间整洁，洗手间清洁。在池袋购物很方便
大姐人很热情，房间也很干净，就是位置有点远 出行不是太方便。

Wen juan's house is a convenience place going to a tourist attractions, subway station in a walking distant (7-9 min) , u also can take a bus( 2 min walking distant to bus station) . Most importantly , room and toilet is CLEAN! There are 1 bakery shop when u walk along to subway station , the cake is Delicious , you can try it!
If u craving a supper at a midnight (like me ) , 2 min walking distance to convenience store .

房间就和照片上看到的一样，整洁，干净
这已经是我第N次入住阿姨家了，每次到日本都入住阿姨家。物有所值

阿姨家非常好找，可是阿姨还是每个客人都过去车站接，告诉我们哪里好玩，哪里东西便宜！
这次过去的时候文娟阿姨生病了，阿姨的妹妹亲自接了我，给我指导，过去的时候就感冒了，还特地给我送药～异国他乡特别亲呀！！！临走了看我行李太重，还帮我叫车送机～这次旅行太开心了！

阿姨人很好，很好沟通，飞机延误了最后一天也还能便宜收留我，而且给我们吃荞麦面，给很多相关信息。东京价格普遍都有点贵，我们为了节约钱，就把住的克扣了。看到阿姨的妹妹每天都会来做清洁，然后垃圾放到客厅都会帮忙扔掉。每天都要有很多路坐车到池袋。到池袋半小时，涉谷新宿大概40分钟，来回池袋就是340的路费，所以务必考虑花的时间和精力和交通费。池袋坐过去一定要坐普通！！！3.4站台！元旦来的，爆满，于是厕所拥挤，有时候要等一阵。然后，wifi速度目前一般，房间很小，拉开床就很难走动了。被子目前有点小，枕头有点矮，我要折叠起来，但是晚上有时候会掉下去。
和文娟阿姨沟通非常有效方便 房子很干净 大家一起聊天非常开心 真的像是家一样的感觉
Nice place to stay
阿姨人很好，有问题问阿姨都会帮你settle
房间非常干净，周围安静，阿姨人很棒！

非常享受这次东京之旅，非常感谢文娟阿姨热情周到的服务。民宿位于日本本地人的居住区内，环境非常安静。从地铁到驻地的路上可以顺带体验当地人的日常生活，每每早上坐地铁出去，都能感受到满满的生活气息，这也是体验这个城市的重要的一环。文娟阿姨很热情真诚，为我们提供很多关于购物、游览等方面的建议，阿姨也很乐于和我们沟通，也让我们更多的了解东当地人的风土人情。还有很有意思的一点，你可以在这个民宿认识到国内的一些有意思的人，大家可以一起讨论分享日本与国内的不同，也是一种很好的体验。再次感谢阿姨的接待，也欢迎大家入住小屋，充分享受自己的旅行。
阿姨非常热情好客，我很晚才到也到车站来接我，交通还算方便，从车站走到住处的路上能感受到日本住宅区真正的街景，住处环境干净卫生，旁边就是便利店，出去找吃的也很方便，虽然在东京玩过几天了但是阿姨还是热情的帮我看还有哪里好玩的地方没有去，真的人很不错

开始东京之行的最好住宿地之一。
1. 位于当地人居住区，非常安静，方便了解当地文化。
2. 房东大姐乐于助人，熟悉东京的公共交通、美食、热门景点和购物场所等。
3. 交通便利。距东武东上线的上板桥站步行十分钟；距光02公交站100米。均可以到池袋转地铁或JR线。
4. 生活便利。距FAMILY MART（24小时营业）100米，回转寿司练马店150米，私家烤鳗饭店150米。还有唐吉可德折扣店（200米）和药妆店（150米）。
Wanjuan is full of lovely attention to you, she care you and your comfort, respect her and her place and her other guest and you will be welcome with a warm smile and heart.
文娟姐對房客很熱忱，詳細解說並推薦旅遊景點、美食與交通問題，對旅客而言獲益良多。

This is a very nice place to stay when you travel to Tokyo, the house is clean, and Wenjuan would help you if you have any question, and the neighborhood is quiet, and very local, you can try some tasty foods there, and it’s convenient to take the train to Ikebukuro station where you can take most train to anywhere you want to visit.
阿姨人很好，对我们在日本的行程都很关心，向阿姨请教了许多问题，阿姨也都耐心的解答。叔叔虽然只会说英文，但也在和我们努力地沟通。可爱的一家人！

Amazing and cute house. I definitely recommend coming here. The station is like 10 min from here and the lady is very helpful. I suggest having a translator just in case! It was worth the amount because there more rooms you can rent which leaves always one spot open usually!
Very nice and quiet place. Owner is also very helpful and nice
很好，住的很舒服，离车站特别近。房东阿姨人也很热情。

文娟 is a wonderful and help person. 文娟 truly makes you feel at home. When I needed help with a few things she was always willing to provide assistance, she even helped me find ingredients for a picnic I was planning and let me use some containers for the food. 文娟 introduced me to many new friends and sat and talked with us for a couple hours one day. 文娟 really cares about her guests and wants you to be happy. There are many amenities and toiletries provided for you so you don't need to bring a lot. The washing machine can also do a heated dry cycle and works perfectly. This is very rare to find in Japan. 文娟 always makes me smile. I am so happy that I got to meet 文娟 and make a new friend while visiting Japan. I would definitely recommend her and look forward to staying with 文娟 again in the future.

J’ai passé un très bon séjour !
L’hôte est très gentille et serviable. Elle fait tout pour nous mettre à l’aise malgré la barrière de la langue.
Je recommande à 100%.

文娟阿姨人真的超级好，从下飞机后就一直联系帮我看路线，上板桥站下车后不仅语音联系还专程过来接，听阿姨说周围住的都是教师医生，确实很安静环境很好，街道很符合我对日本的想象。住宅区还贴着十点以后有噪音违法，所以每次逛到十一点多回来时走夜路安静到不行。我住一楼，房间里有空调和可以调节的灯（常亮小夜灯好评），床很舒服，阿姨还专门搬了桌子过来。虽然写的入住时间是下午，但和阿姨沟通后可以先放行李，走的那天也可以暂时放行李。有两个卫生间，都是自动的，高级，好评。房间都是木质结构，隔音不太好，好在其他人也很安静，基本没被吵到。
出行的地铁口离屋子有些距离，步行十分钟左右，好在很好走，基本没有岔道，出门走到头左拐（熟食店，炸猪排一般）就行，不会迷路。
房间wifi速度很🉑，住的很舒服，下次来日本绝对还远这里！！
文娟姐人特别好，帮我们解决了很多问题，真是有求必应！房子也特别干净漂亮，很安静，下次来一定还会住文娟姐这里！
房东阿姨太热情善良了，整个房子一尘不染，下次一定还来住！
这次来文娟阿姨家简直是意外的惊喜，阿姨人非常热情友好，给我们准备了水果，还主动帮我们洗衣服，听说我们之后要去富士山，还送了我们两套雨衣，虽然最后因为台风原因行程被取消了，但是还是非常感动阿姨的热情和关心，非常推荐大家入住文娟阿姨的家，下次来还来住！

阿姨待人非常親切，第一天怕我找不到地方還來車站接我，廚房跟衛浴總是打掃得非常乾淨。
四周的環境非常安靜，走路不到五分鐘的地方有一間全家。房間非常有家的感覺，每天回到家就非常放鬆。
如果考慮長期在東京市區晃晃的人可以來阿姨這裡，不管有沒有出門的日子都很輕鬆便利，應有盡有。

Really good!! Close to the metro (10 min), host picked me up there and helped get my bags there. Was also attentive at check out. Helped me with recommendations nearby, flexible check-in and check-out. There's like 5 rooms in an apartment but had no problem sharing the two bathrooms, one shower and big kitchen. Really good!!
文娟姐姐人真的太好了, 特别特别热心，还想去日本很大原因是因为热心的文娟姐姐，非常有气质的姐姐！！民宿也非常的干净，房间里什么都有，闹中取静，每天晚上都睡得特别好。下次还来。
阿姨非常热情，大半夜一定要来车站接我，太不好意思了。民宿的位置便利，到池袋坐急行只需一站，15分钟左右，去涩谷之类的地方都非常方便。房间非常温馨，厕所干净整洁，不需要带额外转换插头，基本上日常需要的，都会提供。由于自己马虎，东西落在了民宿，阿姨主动提出帮我快递回来，非常感谢阿姨。如果下次再来日本，还会选择这里。
阿姨人非常好 房间干净 入住非常满意
阿姨真的太好了！！！
文娟阿姨真的很好很热心，亲自来车站接我回去，晚上我回得太晚她还来路口等我，回国早上也来送我出门，给我指路，在异国他乡真的很感动，下次来东京还会来找阿姨的🥰🥰🥰
阿姨非常热情负责，让人有宾至如归的感觉，听阿姨说她的经历和故事也非常吸引人，强烈推荐第一次来东京的朋友前来居住，阿姨能够提供相当有效的帮助，同时阿姨创造了一个非常友好交流的氛围，作为平时话不多的我当初还在担心住民宿的私密性以及社交，但实际进入这个环境大家都自然而然的有交流的动力。离开的时候阿姨还送了一份精心打包的巧克力，我本人受宠若惊，总之来这里居住肯定比住酒店更有性价比更有故事，强烈推荐。

玉川学園前駅至近の閑静な住宅街に佇む素敵なお家。
気さくでとても品の良い怜子さん。
キレイでこだわりのある間取りと内装。
たっぷりの朝陽を浴びながら、手入れの行き届いたお庭を眺めつつ頂いた朝食。
ホテルや旅館では決して体験出来ないほっこり感。
長男と二人でお世話になり、とても印象に残る宿泊でした。
町田近隣の宿泊の際は、一押しの宿泊先です。

先月に続き、今回は長男と妻と3人でお世話になりました。
長男の編入試験の為の3連泊でしたが、怜子さんにサポートして頂いて本当に良かったです。
駅近でありながら駐車場が無料で使用でき、出し入れも自由自在。
2LDKのゆったりした空間。
美味しい朝食。
駅前商店街が至近。
そして、今回受験した学校まで徒歩10分と、全てにおいて全てに良かったです。
町田、横浜、川崎、相模原へ来られる方にはオススメです。
静かで過ごしやすい立地の素敵なお家でゆっくりと快適に過ごすことが出来ました。怜子さんがとても親切にしてくださり、暖かく迎えた頂いた事がとても嬉しかったです。また遊びに行きたいと思います、よろしくお願いいたします。
とても暖かく歓迎していただきました。今回は仕事での利用だったのでほとんど外出でしたが、今度はゆっくりお話したいです。快適で、清潔な環境でステイできたことで仕事もはかどりました。早起きをすれば美しい朝日が部屋に差し込みます。ありがとうございました！

리코씨의 집은 정말 쾌적하고 안전합니다.
세계의 수 많은 에어비앤비를 이용했지만 리코씨 처럼 친절하게 챙겨주는 호스트는 본적이 없을 정도입니다.
정말 추천합니다.
很好的一次入住体验！房子离车站七八分钟的路程，周边环境安静、优美，屋内干净、整洁，生活设施一应俱全，房主美丽、优雅，并且周到、细心！很抱歉每天晚归给房主造成了不便，很感谢每次都帮我们把晾晒的衣服收好叠放整齐，很遗憾没能好好聊聊天更没口福尝到房主亲手做的饭菜……总之，非常感谢怜子这几天的照顾，期待下次日本之行还能见面：）
怜子的房子在玉川学园前站附近的住宅区，周围非常有日本生活气息，带给我们与东京市中心不一样的感受。怜子非常温柔细心，为我们准备了很多饮料与水果，提前为我们查好了去看花火大会的路线，出门的时候也为我们准备了伞。很喜欢二楼的和式房间，干净整洁。虽然只住了一晚，但是感觉很棒！离开的时候怜子站在路口目送我们离开，真是很不舍啊。下次来日本一定会再次住到怜子家的。期待下一次见面～ありがとう！

温かみのあるインテリアで、とってもリラックスできます。
とても居心地がよく、何度もお世話になりたくなる空間です！
ホスピタリティが高く、住空間も広く、落ち着けます。近隣も静かです。オススメです。

何度もリピートしています。
家のようにリラックスできます。
旅の疲れも癒やされます。
ホストの怜子さんの細かな心遣いに感謝しています。
大変快適な滞在をさせていただきました。お風呂もお布団も気持ち良かったです！子供も初めての場所にも関わらずぐっすり寝てくれました。ありがとうございました！

おもてなしもしていただき、２日間快適に過ごすことができました！
子どもの国へ車で約10分ロケーションも満足です！　家族連れは近くのおふろの王様もいいですよ。

I can’t say enough about how much we enjoyed staying at Reiko’s cozy flat. The flat is lovely—the pictures are good representations but the space is even nicer and more enjoyable. This is partly due to the great layout and design of the flat and partly due to Reiko’s kindness and hospitality. The flat is an easy walk from the station along a street lined with shops and a few restaurants. It was well appointed and perfect for a long stay. The flat had everything I needed to cook and make myself at home. My two daughters loved seeing Reiko every morning and evening when she greeted us on our way in and out. The flat is quiet and homey and a great place to write. I’d recommend this space for a single, couple, family and think it’s perfect for academics to write.

怜子 is a very nice host. She was very kind and enthusiastic. She prepared breakfast and drinks for us, and very nicely looked up the transportation options for us. It's a really unforgettable trip in Tokyo.
ありがとうございます！！

お勧めです。家族４人でお世話になりましたが充分なスペースで、何不自由無く滞在する事ができました。洗濯もできたので助かりました。
玉川学園前駅から徒歩で約１０分、その間にスーパーマーケット、レストラン等もあるのでとても便利な地域です。
ホストの怜子さんも良い方でお勧めの場所等教えて頂きました。
また機会があればぜひお世話になりたい場所です。

Reiko is a fantastic host and wonderful person. I have never had a better experience! Her place is amazing! You will feel like royalty, because of her incredible hospitality and kind heart. I would stay there every day if I could--such a beautiful house.

駅からも遠くなく、帰り道にスーパーとコンビニがあり便利です。
とても立派なお住まいで、その二階をすべて利用でき二人子連れでも広々過ごせました。

We stayed 3 weeks at Reiko-san’s place and felt us 100% at home. Reiko-san and her husband speak good english, they are very open minded and international.
Their place is super clean and is installed with everything you need for your daily life. We felt very welcomed and enjoyed warm hospitality. The next time we will stay in Japan, we would live to go back to Reiko-san‘s place.

１泊２日宿泊しました。車で訪ねて家の前に駐車させていただきました。玉川学園駅から徒歩10~15分の閑静な住宅街にあります。玉川学園商店街がすぐ近くなので、買い物、外食にも便利です。今回は、遅いチェックインの上、突然の宿泊人数の変更にも対応していただき、メッセージのお返事も早く大変有難かったです。またお部屋等もピカピカにされていて、チェックイン（前）からチェックアウトまで、快適に過ごさせていただきました。オーナーさんはお話し好き、お出掛け好きな方で、短い時間でしたが滞在を楽しむことができました。大感謝です。機会があればまた滞在したいです。
很不错的房子，周围环境很好，距离车站不远，很适合放松慢节奏的旅行！房东很和蔼可亲，准备了咖啡、饼干等零食，还会免费提供应季的水果（不止一次）和很多饮料，感觉就像回到自己家一样！
閑静な住宅街の中にあり、二階部分を貸切で使わせていただきました。
위치는 역에서 좀 걸어야 하지만 숙소가 생각했던것보다 깨끗하고 주인분도  친절하시구 너무 좋았어요
it was great staying with reiko. she he very open and know some great places. its a bit far from tokyo but worth it for the home you stay at.

今回二回目の滞在です。
前回同様、快適に過ごすことが出来ました。駅から家までの道にスーパー、コンビニがあり本当に便利です。
家も綺麗で広く、過ごしやすいです。東京、神奈川に滞在予定のかたには本当にお勧めです！

The apartment is very clean and spacious and everything was as described. Specially the futons in the tatami room were very comfortable. Reiko is a great host and easy to talk to. We had a wonderful stay for 5 nights.

Her flat is a kind of our “dream house”. Ms. Reiko is the best host out of my every AirBnB experience. Flat is sophisticated, super clean, but extremely cosy. Even we had crazy active 2 kids over 40days, they never complained us. If they allow us, we will definitely come back.
Reiki-San, thank you so much.

Reiko-san's place is clean, spacious and in a great location. It's about seven minutes from the train station and about a ten minute drive from Kodomo no Kuni. Reiko-san made sure we had everything we needed and even provided snacks and breakfast items. We will definitely stay here again in the future!

This is a wonderful home - it is clean, spacious and with all the amenities a family could want. Although the location may initially seem a tad 'remote' (if you can ever be 'remote' in Tokyo), there is a direct bus service from Haneda airport to Machida which is only one stop from Tamagawaekimae station, where this apartment is. In addition, from Machida you can take the rapid express train to Shinjuku which will have you in the heart of Tokyo in 35 minutes. Finally, there is Reiko, the host. She is a wonderfully helpful and charming woman who made our stay here such a pleasure. She is full of information about the area, transport, sightseeing, etc.; and provides many thoughtful touches for guests like tea, coffee, juice and some very tasty snacks. Highly recommended.

Reikoさんのお宅は、閑静な住宅街にあります。小田急線の玉川学園前駅は、東京方面へも出られ、横浜や鎌倉などにも遊びに行ける、長期滞在してゆっくり関東全域を楽しむのに非常に便利な場所です。お宅も、駅から徒歩でそう遠くありませんし、途中に、小さな個人店なども多いです。ですが、大きな主要駅ほどにはごみごみと混雑していないので、リラックスして生活を楽しめる、そんな場所でした。さて、Reikoさんのお宅ですが、基本的には、写真の通りの素敵なお宅です。写真では伝えきれていないと思われる特筆した点は、バスルームのバスタブの大きさ（大きくて、リッチな気分になります！！）、天井や窓のつくりなど、わかる人にはわかるようなこだわった家のつくり（決して華美ではない。素朴さと上品さが兼ね備わっていて、安らぎます。）、Reikoさんご自身がお持ちになる人に対する思いやりの気持ちや、Reikoさんの大切にしているちょっとした飾り物などがもつ、やさしいエネルギーが家全体に流れていることです。今回の滞在は、1泊であり、わたし自身が選びましたが、「君の宿選びは間違いないね」と、夫にほめられました。この宿の予約者は、おそらく、同行のご友人やご家族、恋人に、「あなたに宿を選んでもらって良かった！！」と、感謝されると思います。次回は、ぜひ数日滞在し、また小さな小鳥のさえずりがきこえる光あふれたリビングで、紅茶を飲みながら静かな朝を何回か過ごしたいと思います。朝の時間ってこんなに素敵だったんだっけ？？と、「時間」のすばらしさを認識させてくれるような場所でした。

全てにおいて、とても親切でまるで自分の自宅かと思うほどキッチンやお風呂、全てにおいて必要なものを揃えて頂きました。
また、是非お願いしたいと思います。
I cannot recommend Reiko's house high enough. Reiko is a truly outstanding host and her warm, thoughtful and caring hospitality is the very epitome of 'Omotenashi'.
Fabulous place and Reiko is amazing. Lots of room and very quiet. Close to train station, local resturants and shops. Easy to get to Tokyo central.

This is an exceptional place, made even more so by a most charming, gracious and helpful host. From the complimentary fully-stocked fridge, to the helpful tips on local shops and restaurants and the assistance in getting around and sightseeing, Reiko and her lovely apartment make for a delightful stay. Most highly recommended.

Nice house.  Its kind a hommy house.  Good amenities like in the hotel. Provided breakfast, coffee,  tea, drinks and some food ingredient.  Very Clean room with tatami room. 30 minutes with rapid train going to shinjuku. We got all the whole upstair include kitchen, living room,  bathtub.  We can cook and do laundry if you want.  Surely will come back again someday.
Incredibly thoughtful and amazing communication.

清潔感抜群で、とてもオシャレなお家てした。冬でしたが、お部屋はあたたかく、夜も暖房がいらない程でした。
また、子供の分まで、簡単な朝食を用意して下さり、とても助かりました。
そして何より、Reikoさんのお人柄がとても素敵で、小さな子供がいても安心して宿泊することができました。
また機会があれば是非おじゃまさせていただきたいと思います♪
ありがとうございました！

3度目の長期滞在です。
とても居心地が良いお部屋です。れいこさんもいつも気にかけてくれます。
玉川学園も素敵な街です。
2階全て、何の不足もなく、安心感と優しさ(怜子さんのお人柄ですね)そして細やかな配慮の行き届いた空間を提供していただきました。バランスのとれたおいしい朝食も、泊数分用意していてくださっていて、とても嬉しかったです。リビングからは開けた空と玉川学園らしい丘が見渡せ、ゆったりとした幸せな気持ちになります。お世話になり、心より御礼申し上げます。

The place was very clean, quiet, spacious, and airy with high sealings.  The house is located in a safe suburban beighhood.  Reiko-san was so kind and attentive to our needs during our whole stay.  We found assorted fruits, yogurt, orange juice, milk, salad greens, bread, and other items in the fridge.  I highly recommend “Reiko’s Place” for couples and for families.

もう４回目の滞在です。
里帰りの際はこれからもお世話になりたいと思います。

This was an exceptional stay from start to finish. Reiko was very welcoming and tolerant of our changes of arrival time due to other plans changing. The accommodation was delightful, traditionally Japanese, extremely clean and comfortable and Reiko had thoughtfully left us a range of treats and cooking materials which meant we didn’t have to worry about going shopping straight away. The location of the apartment was perfect for us with plenty of shopping and eating opportunities in Tamagawagakuenmae and good transport links to central Tokyo and Yokohama, connecting with the Shinkansen routes at Shin Yokohama to other destinations further afield. Reiko is the perfect host and nothing is too much trouble. For example she provided us with timetables for local buses and even accompanied us to the bus stop to make sure we went to the right one. We are already looking forward to our next stay.
とても静かで広々として快適でした。駅からも歩いて約10分で便利です。スーツケースを預かって下さったり　チェックアウト時間をフライトに合わせて調整して頂いたりフレキシブルにご対応頂いて本当に助かりました。到着した翌日に困らない様にと美味しいパンや飲み物など沢山ご用意して頂いていて心あたたまるおもてなしでした｡また是非宿泊したいと思います｡
My family really enjoyed the stay in Reiko's beautiful and quiet place. We also appreciate so much for Reiko's hospitality. Thank you!

もう何度目の滞在になるのでしょうか。毎回騒がしい私たちを温かく迎えてくださいます。子どもたちも大好きな滞在先で、日本の第二の家族のように思っています。
玉川学園前は便利で、静かで変わらず過ごしやすかったです。ありがとうございました。
乳児、幼児を連れての滞在だったが、温かく迎えてくださり、こどもたちも安心しリラックスして過ごすことができた。距離感が丁度よく、怜子さんのお人柄の良さをたくさん感じられた。また次回もぜひ利用させていただきたい。
2度目の利用ですが　静かで居心地がよく　自分の実家の様に安心してくつろげます。チェックイン　アウトもフレキシブルにご対応頂き　本当に有難いです。心のこもった沢山のウエルカムパツクも嬉しかったです。駅からも歩いて10分ちょっとで便利です。とてもお勧めな宿です。
美しい家で４泊の素晴らしい滞在になりました。また滞在したいです！

We had a fantastic stay at Reiko’s place in Machida! The apartment was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with everything we needed. The location was super convenient, with a grocery store and a 7-11 just a short walk away, making it easy to grab essentials.
The nearest train station is about a 12-15 minute walk, and from there, you can reach most parts of Tokyo in about an hour, making this a great spot for those who want a peaceful stay with easy city access.
Reiko was an absolutely wonderful host! She lives downstairs, but the apartment is completely private on the upper floor. She was incredibly kind and thoughtful, even leaving us some delicious food and snacks upon check-in, which was such a warm welcome after a long journey. Communication was smooth, and she was always available for any questions.
If you’re looking for a cozy, well-located stay with a truly exceptional host, this is the perfect place. We would love to stay here again!
3度目の利用です。とても静かで広々としており、必要なものは全て揃っているので実家にいる様にくつろげます。帰国の際はここしか泊まりたくないくらい気に入っております。そして何よりも怜子さんのあたたかな気配り、おもてなしが素晴らしいです！

立地はとてもよいです。お部屋はきれいです。ちゃぶ台や草履・懐かしい雰囲気のテレビなどあり、おばあちゃんの家に泊まっているような懐かしい感覚になりました。
外国の方はとても喜ばれると思います。日本人でもホテルに泊まるのとはまた違ったよさを味わえると思います。

We had a great time staying at Rengeso!!! The house is so cozy and clean with a nostalgic aroma of the tatami mats throughout the house. The location is excellent as it’s a close walk to the Shinbanba station and only 2 stops from Shinagawa station where you can switch trains to go to places like Shibuya and Harajuku as well as the Haneda airport. The surroundings were very fun too as there’re many temples and shrines and old fashioned stores as well as modern cafes and convenience stores. The house and the whole neighbor is a great mixture of old fashioned traditional Japanese culture and modern convenience.
I highly recommend this place for those who want to experience the true Japanese culture!!!
Location good for  all facilities.
房间住五个人有点小了。不过干净整洁，设施齐全。唯一仅临墓地。中国人会有一点点忌讳
Great accommodation. The kitchen is well sized and there is plenty of space.
This place is so lovely! Right behind a Buddhist temple with a centuries old cemetery next store and tons of restaurants nearby. Close to train stations.

There are so much wonderful things to say but honestly if you want to know the real Tokyo Japan then please stay there otherwise you will be really missing a huge japanese experience.
My stay was so AMAZING from the host to the home to the little streets to the wonderful restaurants, I think I needed 5 months not five days just to feel and explore the area, trust me this is the best deal in town, please look no further, if you manage to get the booking for your dates then just go with your eyes close.
My very honest advice to you individually and groups of friends..!!
Everything was provided and you can tell they put in some thoughts on how to make sure guests are comfortable. Great experience with a cool visit to the temple

駅からも近い、一軒家です。和モダンにリフォームされた、清潔感のある素敵な家でした。
今回はひとりでの滞在でしたが、ベッド3布団2まで可能とのことで、次回は家族で使わせていただきたいです。
お寺の方の運営ですので、安心感もあります。チェックインの受付もスムーズに済みましたし、近くの温泉の情報など、教えてもらえました。
商店街には飲食店も多く、コンビニもあるので、便利です。

Highly recommended!! The house has a big shower and the best beds we have slept in for a while, the neighbourhood is quiet and nice and shinagawa station is great to get to almost anywhere in and outside of tokyo. Everything was very clean and we would come again anytime!

ホスピタリティーが最高でした。
また、ご住職に様々なお願いをしたところ、快く対応していただき、このご縁、ご恩は一生忘れることは無いと思います。
一階のテレビのある部屋。
とーっても落ち着きました。

Lovely and warm place to get together with friends, we cook for dinner and talk in the living room!
Hope we can visit there again!
非常乾淨的一戶獨立建築民宿，是給同學定的，同學非常滿意。因為沒有注意看入住時間，和同學吃喝完後，晚了幾個小時才辦理入住手續，硬是讓屋主一直等到晚上八點半才辦理了入住，感到非常抱歉呢。

We loved staying at Rengeso. It was extremely comfortable and felt like we were in a Japanese home.
We were surprised to find the shin bambo area so interesting and full of great cafes, restaurants, shrines and onsens.
It was a quick journey to odaiba by walking to the station 10 min over the river and there was so much do to there for all of us. Team lab borderless was incredible.
We will definitely return to spend more time in this part of Tokyo, especially since it’s so handy for Haneda too
The hosts were extremely helpful - drying our washing, providing information, taking photos in the beautiful temple and storing our luggage

Wonderful home managed by warm hearted and helpful people. Well equipped. Having an upstairs bedroom was excellent. The beds are by far the most comfortable we have experienced in Japan. Also the towels were good quality and new - much better than the usual offering. Yakatas were a nice extra.

Ce logement est une maison entière avec aucun autre invités. Il est proche de la gare de Shimbamba et de deux 7 Eleven. Hôte très gentil. La maison est très jolie et parfaitement propre. Réception atypique puisqu'elle se fait à l'entrée du temple qui se situe dernier la maison.
很赞的独立住房， 有上下两层，布置的很日式。接待的人也是棒棒哒👍，位置超级便利，旁边就是7-11。离地铁站2分钟左右走路。我家一家四口入住。非常满意！
Beatiful Place

Danki has provided everything you will need, and even some things you won't have thought about (like Japanese gowns). The location is extremely convenient for access to the Tokyo subway and is very close to Shinjuku.

We really enjoyed our stay.  The beds were very comfortable and it’s the best I slept our entire trip!  The location is ideal and very close to the subway.  The staff is kind and made sure we had everything we needed for our stay and went out of their way to be helpful.  I’d definitely stay here again.

JR 야마노테선이 지나가는 시나가와 역 근처에 있는 숙소입니다. 호스트분이 친절하시고 숙소도 깨끗하고 조용합니다. 주변에 민가가 있기때문에 거리가 시끄럽지 않은게 좋았습니다. (대신 전철 지나가는 소리는 잘 들림) 일본 주택 특성상 집이 추운 경우가 많은데 복도나 계단을 제외하곤 난방도 잘되어서 따뜻한 편입니다. 신주쿠, 시부야, 아사쿠사 등 번화가와는 거리가 좀 있긴하지만 대부분 30분 정도라 크게 신경쓰이진 않았습니다. (신주쿠는 50분정도)
단점은...도쿄 메트로 패스권으로는 커버가 안되는 곳이라 이것만 주의하시면 될 듯 합니다.

Une belle petite maison typique japonaise , bien située, au calme, et à 2 pas du train, on a pu bouger partout, j'ai adoré. On y dort très bien, s'il vous manque quelque chose, Danki répond vite, il est juste à côté. Je recommande cette belle maison . Merci Danki
말도 안되게 저렴함 . 신주쿠 시부야 등의 관광명소와는 거리가 있지만 역근처. 친절하고 넘. 좋음

Le logement est géré par le temple et tout le monde est au petit soin. Super acceuil. Le logement est très propre et fonctionnel. On entend un peu le train mais cela ne nous a pas gêné.
Je recommande.

A very nice house in a really cosy neighbourhood where you can enjoy some not so crowded streets compared to othee areas in Tokyo a lot of good cafés and restaurants near by. And some really nice people who are when you check-in and out 😊
Great location with station couple of minutes away. Very responsive host.

I had a delightful stay at Danki’s apartment . It is described as a hut but in reality it’s a full sized self contained apartment .
Right next door to the local subway station Shimbamba which is only two stops from Shinagawa, it’s in a great location .
Would definitely come back and stay again .
Michael

such a lovely cottage that made you feel right at home, a minute walk from a station with easy access to the mainline just two stops away. great value and so close to the main attractions of Tokyo and just far enough so that you're out of the bustling life of the city. a no brainer, we will be coming back to this cottage on our return! thank you!!

This was our first experience in Japan and we really enjoyed our stay and Danki's place. It was a bit tough to find, possibly because it was dark out, we were exhausted from a 12 hour trip, and it is in what North Americans would consider a "back alley" (it's not...it is a very traditional house), but once we got in we loved it.
It is about a 30 minute train ride to downtown, but there is a station within 1 minute from the house which was great. Like others said, that did lead to some noise from the trains, but honestly it was totally fine.
We did have a somewhat urgent question that we asked while we were there, then re-asked, and finally was responded to 24 hours later which was a bit disappointing, but other things he responded to right away, from the booking to the checkout.
Thank you Danki for letting us stay in your beautiful home.

Très bon quartier a Tokyo, proche du métro et des grandes lignes. Situé derrière le temple c est une petite maison parfaite pour 3/4 personnes. La rue est typique avec tous les commerces nécessaires. Parfait pour passer quelques jours dans la capitale.

Denki-san est un Hôte très accueillant et souriant avec une âme noble, le logement etait parfait et parfaitement situé, je le recommande à toutes personnes qui voudra séjourné à Tokyo, je n'y vois que des avantages  du coup ne manquer pas cette occasion😉
适合一家人入住，一整栋楼都是你的，非常日式的民居～出行很方便，走路几分钟可以到新马场站。
Beautiful little Japanese house nearby the station. Everything was clean and we had a wonderful stay!

This has to be one of the best air bnbs I have stayed at. Danki was very responsive and helpful. He and the temple staff were so kind and so helpful. We did laundry for two days and they dried and folded it for us! We had a whole house to ourselves and it was quiet, clean and had two toilets which was really great.
The air bnb was so close to the Shimbamba station that it was very easy to navigate around Tokyo.
Would absolutely, 100% stay at this air bnb again and would recommend this listing to my family and friends. Thank you Danki and team!!
Great stay! Good location! Would stay again next trip to Tokyo!

It should be noted that this place is an individual whole house you will be staying. It is not a shared property! We loved our stay. It is in a very quiet neighborhood and you can walk around to grocery store nearby and lots of good restaurants as well. The Shimbamba station which is 2 mins walk from the house conveniently located two stops away from the big transit station shinagawa which is a great plus. We enjoyed walking there everyday. And we had four suit cases it didn’t bother us at all.
House host Danki and his stuff are beyond friendly. They are so nice and kind. We enjoyed our interaction with them. The temple is beautiful. Whole property is sparkling clean. Shower water pressure is adjustable which is very nice.

We loved our stay at Rengeso, a sweet Japanese-style house, thoughtfully appointed and quite comfortable.  The old Tokyo neighborhood is a delight, so much to explore that we hardly did any other sightseeing.  Danki and his team at nearby temple Honshoji couldnt have been nicer.  We look forward to staying again!

Je recommande fortement. Très grand logement sur 2 étages. Propre et tranquille.
2 toilettes.
Accueillant et chaleureux.
Le quartier est vraiment agréable. Plein de restos et boutiques pour les locaux.
Il y avait même une fête dans le quartier avec de la musique et de la nourriture dans la rue. WoW!

Amazing place to stay, wish we could’ve stayed longer. Everything was comfortable and perfect. Only thing I’d warn people is that it’s a little hard to find if you are doing self check in after hours, it’s through a little alleyway in the back of the shrine. Overall great host and great location. Close to the train station and a 24 hour 7-elevens for maximum convenience.

Best AirBnb experience we’ve ever had. The home is centrally located in the Shinagawa City area. Very local and neighborhoody feel with lots of great bars, cafes and restaurants near by. Quieter side of Tokyo.
駅から近く、コンビニも近いのでとても便利でした。お部屋も清潔で過ごしやすかったです。

Absolutely a lovely traditionnal place to rest in shinagawa.
Well placed near to some restaurant and 5 min from a station, the stay was a great experience in the trip.

Super!
Very convenient location, close to station (2 minutes walking), close to 7-11 store where you can buy drinks and snacks, and 5 minutes to a supermarket.
Very clean, enough room for three of us.
All good but one which might not be convenient for old people and young kids, the stairs is a little bit deep. it will be nice if there is a handrail.

Das Haus ist ruhig gelegen und bietet alles, was man für den täglichen Gebrauch benötigt. Minimarkt ist in der Nähe,  ebenso die Bahnstation. Ein Wäscheständer wäre gut gewesen, da wir täglichen waschen mussten. Sonst war alles super und wir wurden freundlich empfangen und auch verabschiedet.
역에서 가깝고 조용하고 제가 원하던 모든것을 만족해주던 숙소였습니다.
Logement très propre et fonctionnel, hôte réactif et avenant. Le logement est bien situé et proche des commodités, c'est parfait.
Nice owner
Really unique spot. Easy check in process and unit was very clean! Also very close to train station as well
非常舒服

Danki’s place was a great stay for a few days in downtown Tokyo.  The place was very spacious for the two of us and was furnished in a beautiful way. The location was great as it was just outside of busy Tokyo but close enough that transport into the centre was easy and close. The apartment was not apart of the temple but located behind it in a very quiet and safe alley. The highlight was the electorate blanket you put over your knees as you sat down to eat breakfast to help warm you up in those cold winter mornings.
A wonderful experience
舒适可爱的小房子，虽然在白天时段能听到一些铁路的声音，但晚上睡觉比较安静。距离地铁站步行距离比较近，旁边有7-11，整体感觉方便。最后一早去羽田机场赶飞机，20多分钟就可以到机场，省事。
A lovely home with lots to love. Hosts were super accomodating for an earlier check out!

Danki’s house was outstanding. Quite possibly, it was the best Airbnb experience we have had. Danki’s apartment house gave us excellent space and a great location. It was clean and sufficient for our needs. We also utilized the free parking in busy Tokyo.
It is stand-alone apartment house in a neighborhood in Tokyo and is affiliated with a Buddhist shrine. Will check in can be tricky if it’s at night time or if you need to park a vehicle. Fortunately, Danki was there to help us check in and park our vehicle. The place was outstanding.

Dankis air bnb was so cozy and welcoming we highly recommend booking here. It was spotless and very quiet at night. Easy walk to the train station. 7 Eleven next door made it really convenient for quick bites. The rooms were cozy, there were 3 of us, and there was a separation for privacy. Bathroom necessities were provided which is always very appreciated. We keep saying we really miss the place and plan to visit again soon. Wish we could’ve stayed longer! Thank you again Danki & company.
Interesting experience since we never seen a traditional Japanese house. But it was comfortable to stay in for a few days

This place is a hidden gem.  Very good value for the price paid. My daughter and I had a very comfortable stay and we loved wearing the yukata. Very close to the train station. If you’re sensitive to noise bring white noise or ear plugs as you can hear the trains.
乾淨

Hübsches, kleines Haus, das sich über zwei Geschosse erstreckt. Ideale Unterkunft für eine 4-köpfige Familie. Alles war sehr sauber und ordentlich. Die Lage ist optimal unmittelbar in der Nähe der Station Shimbamba mit Verbindungen ins Zentrum. Haben es sehr genossen und hatten eine sehr angenehme Kommunikation mit Danki. Kommen sehr gerne wieder !

Très bon séjour, le train et restaurant sont à proximité.
Nous avons été très bien accueilli et le logement est superbe!
Merci encore
깨끗합니다. 문의에 응답이 신속합니다. 지하철역 가깝습니다.
good location to stay, specially close to airport, good for family.
Special request about two pillows per person was just fulfilled. Very customer-friendly

Nous avons apprécié notre séjour dans ce logement. Très facile d'accès, très pratique (proximité du train pour aller à l'aéroport, du konbini), très authentique :-). La communication avec le propriétaire était fluide et agréable. Attention tout de même au sommeil léger, prévoyez des bouchons d'oreille, les passages du train sont plutôt proches.

Ottimo appartamento, comodo, stazione metro a pochi minuti.
Comunicazioni con host facilissime
Consigliato

Logement mignon situé dans un coin calme, à proximité d’une ligne de métro, ce qui simplifie les déplacements. Il y a d’ailleurs plein de petits cafés et commerce à proximité.
Le logement en soi était très propre, bien rangé et joliment décoré. Nous sommes heureux d’avoir séjourné ici !
Very good home. Feels like a local. 1min walk to station
It’s a great place to stay 1-2 nights before your flight. Very close to the subway station.
Lovely place to stay! Great location and the hosts were really nice.
unos dias muy tranquilos en tokio en un alojamient muy comodo
Our stay was quite amazing. We loved having the space to ourselves and being able to call it home for a couple weeks. We can't wait for our next visit to Japan!

Thank you very much for the wonderful stay in Shinagawa. We really liked the AirBnb for our first stay in Japan and it had everything we needed. The contact with Danki was also very uncomplicated and helpful.
Thank you very much!
Sehr freundlicher Gastgeber! Ich und meine Familie haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt:) zudem liegt sie in der Nähe von vielen Einkaufsmöglichkeiten und in der Nähe von der Bahn. Wir waren sehr zufrieden!
Die Unterkunft war super und die Betreuung rundherum perfekt.
Wonderful house for our family, just one minute from the train station, so easy to explore the city
Excellent accueil, les hôtes étaient très chaleureux et toujours disponible pour la moindre demande. Je recommande

We were welcomed and greeted in a very friendly manner and had a wonderful stay. The accommodation is absolutely cozy, very clean and everything you need is available. We felt comfortable from the first second and can highly recommend it. Hopefully we can come back soon.
Thank you very much for everything and for the friendly service.

Wir hatten einen großartigen Aufenthalt in Tokio! Die Unterkunft liegt nur eine Minute von der Bahn entfernt und war für uns perfekt. Danki war ein super freundlicher Host, der sofort auf Nachrichten reagiert hat. Am Ende haben wir sogar noch eine kleine handgemachte Überraschung bekommen, über die wir uns sehr gefreut haben und die wir gerne mit nach Deutschland nehmen. Wir empfehlen die Unterkunft auf jeden Fall weiter –  5 Sterne!

We were close to both a train station & bus stops. The house was located down a quaint alley, back off the main road.  While we could hear the trains running, the noise was not excessive. There were a number of convience stores close by that provided a good range of food, drinks, cash and general items. Danki recommended a couple of restaurants and while we only tried one, it was excellent and within walking distance. The neighbourhood was quiet and the neighbours that we saw were very friendly. We could hear people out sweeping the alley way in the morning.

Very adorable, cozy, tidy, clean, comfortable and well equipped room. It's around 4 min walk from Ryogoku subway station and 7 min walk from the Ryogoku JR station, my friend and I saw some sumo wrestlers walking around, warming up in the morning which was awesome. We really loved staying at Yoshi's place while in Tokyo.
非常棒的房间，到达东京是下雨天很冷，但是一走进房间就感觉到了温馨。房间是新装修的，所有家具和电器都很新，细节设计也很贴心，住起来很舒适，需要帮助时房东也很耐心和快速的解决了。周围有几家便利店和小餐馆，走几分钟就可以到江户线两国站，总之，下次来东京还会预定。
10 dias y todo fue perfecto, comunicacion rapida y fluida aunque tampoco fue necesaria

As a review, Yoshi's place is very accessible and well-maintained. Her concern to provide very simple instructions in videos and powerpoint presentations is really outstanding. Yoshi is quick to respond to any of our queries and checks if we need anything. Our stay in Japan was really made wonderful by staying at her place. We would definitely refer to our friends and we'd love to book her place again 😀
Fantastic location, very cute studio. Definitely recommend as it is great value for a low cost :)

This place is very nice, just as described and seen on the pictures. Clean, cozy and comfortable. All appliances are in perfect condition and new, everything works smooth.
The location is also very convenient - close to the metro and JR stations and lots of nice cafes and restaurants around.

Hôte réactif , communication rapide et attentionné car nous avons pu quitter avec un parapluie vue la pluie :)
Je recommande!

Really wonderful place in Ryogoku in a peaceful residential area but close to the Oedo/JR line, and convenience stores/a supermarket in walking distance. Easy access to the Kokugikan. The place has very complete facilities like kitchen and laundry. The house manual was very clear in describing the features of the house and the surrounding area. Yoshi was very friendly and communicative. There was a typhoon the day I had to check in that delayed my arrival until past midnight and we communicated to make sure that I could arrive there safely. If I ever return to visit Ryogoku, I will definitely seek out this place again.
這是我住過最好的日本旅居！乾淨整齊，家具，廚房，洗衣機等用品一應俱全；床亦夠大，適合2-3人居住；謝謝旅居主人主動和清晰的資訊及信息；推薦給所有人！
Yoshi was very kind and was accommodating to anything we needed or might need. If we get the chance to come to Japan again we would definitely stay here again. :)
Check-in was smooth. The place is clean and has everything you need!
Yoshi's place is a great finding. We could get around popular spots in Tokyo in a clean and cozy place.

excelente lugar para alojarse, metros cerca.
El airbnb cuenta con todo para poder vivir, tiene cocina y sus equipamientos.
la comunicación con yoshi fue bastante buena, sepreocupa por sus huéspedes
Great location and good communication from host. 10/10

Yoshi's place was clean and comfortable and just as advertised. It's right near a large number of restaurants (including English speaking ones) and convenience stores, and extremely close to major train lines (e.g, the Oedo line) and bus routes that will take you directly to popular locations such as Tokyo Skytree.
Yoshi was also a very responsive and exceptional host. I actually had a few health problems come up during my trip, and she took the time to call up various clinics to confirm which ones spoke English and took walk-ins. She definitely showed a level of care that went above and beyond many Airbnb hosts.
If you're ever seeking to visit Tokyo and want a clean, comfortable, and accessible place to stay that's a little removed from the crazy crowded tourist areas, I would definitely recommend this spot.

Yoshi was extremely helpful and responsive throughout our stay. All kinds of amenities were provided, and the location was very convenient. We went to the Katsu restaurant Yoshi recommended, and it was honestly the best katsu we’ve ever had. Highly recommend!

Mi estancia en casa de Yoshi ha sido la mejor de las que he estado en mi viaje de 15 días en Japón durante mis vacaciones. Es un pequeño apartamento que dispone de todo lo necesario para no preocuparte de comprar nada. Sólo necesitas tu maleta con ropa y poco más . El apartamento está totalmente equipado, con sábanas, toallas,  cocina con todo tipo de utensilios, productos de limpieza para la casa para limpiar ropa, jabón champú, suavizante...lo tiene todo. Además de la tranquilidad del vecindario. Yoshi respondió rápidamente a todas mis dudas y peticiones con amabilidad y cortesía. Cuando vuelva a viajar a Japón, no dudaré de contactar con Yoshi para pasar nuevamente unos días en su casa. 100% recomendable. Calidad/Precio PERFECTO!!! GRACIAS YOSHI.
Appartement très bien situé dans le quartier Sumo, très propre, très pratique et hôte très réactif et à l’écoute ! Je recommande !

Very nice place in Sumida, close to the metro line! The apartment has everything you might need!
Yoshi is a great host!
Easy ti check-in and extremely clean place!
Recommended!
Great location, quiet neighborhood. Comfortable space for two people.

Loved staying at this neat, well equipped flat for two weeks. It is really well connected to both the subway and JR lines, with some cool stuff nearby in walkable distance. Really helpful to have Yoshi's clear instructions, including a video of how to get to the flat. Thanks so much for having us!
The place is compact yet highly functional. Has everything needed for us to comfortably stay for a couple of days. Very close to train station is a great plus. Highly recommended!
Comfortable quiet stay with a great location close to both JR and Metro stations, supermarkets and restaurants. Able to easily navigate to all the sights  of Tokyo.

Beautiful home, this place was comfortable and cozy, my husband and I found our stay here quit pleasurable. Spacing is small so I would caution how much luggages you bring. Its location is very close to both JR and Metro lines so it was easy to get around. Yoshi was also very helpful from the very beginning of booking to the end. His instructions for getting to the place and getting in we’re very clear. All in all, a great place to stay, especially during our first time trip to Japan.
Super Host, klasse Unterkunft
Great place and Yoshi is the most accommodating host.
Excellent place. Highly recommend!

료쿄구 지하철역과 가깝고 JR선도 주변엔 있어서 이동이 용이하고 편리해요~근처에 편의점도 많은편입니다. 입지적으로 추천합니다. 여행일정이 내내 아침부터 밤까지여서 거의 잠만 잤지만 침구부터 욕조등 모든 편의시설이 구비되어 있어서 만족했어요~
온수욕조가 여행의 피곤함을 없애 주어서 여행기간동안 좀더 수월했습니다.
조용하며 고요한 동네의 숙소입니다.

Yoshi is a superb host. This was my second stay at his apartments. Early check in was available on request just like last time, the place looked exactly like in the pictured and was described accurately. Very close to metro (2. minutes) and train (5 minutes), although the trains tend to get packed. Would recommend this apartment to anyone who wants to enjoy their stay in Tokyo. 10/10

The room is clean , tidy but very comfortable, Yoshi provide everything you need daily in the room, The location is superb. It surrounded by  to 5-6 convenient stores , only 2-3 minutes walk to the nearest subway station. Ryukoku is a quiet and safe area. Yoshi is so friendly and helpful. I enjoy everyday staying in the place.
Thanks Yoshi, for a great home away from home. we had a wonderful time in Tokyo
とてもご丁寧に対応してくださいました。
地理位置好，有两条线路，都很近，交通便利安静的住所。周围购买物品很方便。房间舒适温馨，物品齐全洁净卫生，所用之物都齐全。房东友善回复及时细致周到。在这里很舒心的居住了两周，度过美好的时光！

Beyond impressed with Yoshi’s place.Felt like he took pride in his Airbnb and was detailed. If I ever stay in Tokyo , I will rebook again. Well worth it if you plan to visit for Sumo Tournament as well. Is a short 8 min walk

这里住了七个晚上，整体非常满意，值得推荐。
1.洗手间，厕所，洗衣机单独隔离开的。洗衣机没有烘干的。
2.地理位置特别方便，每天都是坐JR出行。
3.房间较小，不过干净。
很溫暖的房間，房東也都會很細心的回覆問題，很棒的體驗
房间小而精致，虽然房间内空间不大，但房东将房客的需求考虑的样样俱全，物品整齐而丰富。房间离两国站很近，离闹市区较远，在便于抵达的同时可以很好的体会东京居民区的安静氛围。在这儿我们度过了很棒的4天，推荐入住！

Yoshi was an amazing host! he was accommodating and helpful. He offered alot of amenities, way more than other Airbnb I have been to. The place is clean and easy to find. A very short walk to train station. Strongly recommended. Will def stay again when we visit Japan again.
El lugar muy tranquilo, está cerca del transporte y lugares turísticos, nos gustaría mucho poder volver. Gracias por tu amabilidad
很棒的住宿體驗

the apartment is very functional and very near the station !
Yoshi has prepared everything we need in the apartment.
We stayed 5 nights, everything went well ! We recommend it !!!!
Amazing stay and great host!

Séjour parfait! Je confirme les nombreux commentaires déjà rédigés. La gestion de l espace de l appartement est très bien pensé et le logement est très bien équipé!
Tout est mis en place pour que l on passe un magnifique séjour …

Yoshi San has prepared a super clean room with everything we need. Cook set, eating utensils, rain gear, tea and coffee, cleaning supplies, hangers... Location is close to restaurants, Metro, convenience stores...convenient but quiet as well. We stayed there  comfortably for 6 nights and had already thought of coming back when we visit Tokyo again in the future.
Wir hatten eine tolle Zeit bei Yoshi. Die Wohnung ist genau wie beschrieben, die Nähe zur Metro genial.

Yoshi was very helpful with my questions even before the checkin. Ikuro came to get us when we were stuck at the front door.
The space is perfect for 2 adults. We figured a way to open two of our 24 inch luggage and still had walking room.
We appreciate the thoughtful ameneties like the kitchen utensils and tools, tub, laundry line, toaster oven and washer! The coin laundry was very nearby as well.
Conveniently near the metro station, supermarket and eateries.
One thing to note is that there are no chairs or table, so older folks may find it a bit uncomfortable with just a floor sofabed.
Overall, this space and location was perfect for our trip. Thank you so much, Yoshi and team!

Cet appartement est bien situé.Il est à proximité de restaurants et supermarchés et à distance de marche du métro.
Yoshi et sa famille sont discrets et accueillants.
Le logement est bien pensé et douillet.

This was my fourth stay at Yoshi's place and I still rate it 10/10. Perfect location: very peaceful and quiet neighborhood, easy access to multiple means of transportation. Everything was just as described and Yoshi was very quick to answer. The apartment is the perfect size for a solo traveler.

This is the best airbnb I have experienced in my life !
The apartment is very clean, welcoming, spacious and smells good.
Yoshi is a kind, respectful person and answers your questions when needed. His place provides everything you need.
There is laundry, clean towels, umbrellas...
The neighborhood is silent, respectful. Located in Ryogoku, metro and shops are nearby and you are closed to everything.
I really recommend this place, surely the best airbnb in Tokyo !👍
thanks for everything, I would come back for sure

The hosts were very responsive and helpful (I asked to borrow a sewing needle and Yoshi dropped off an entire sewing kit).  I stayed 4 nights with my 20 yr old son - I took the bed and left him the futon on the floor.  It was a bit tight with the futon folded out as a bed and you lose the sitting/eating area.  But we loved the location, cleanliness, amenities, and neighbourhood.

The apartment is conveniently located near two train stations and close to major tourist attractions in Tokyo. Yoshi provides a helpful manual for any questions on the apartment, and there's a washing machine with detergent and softener provided. I would highly recommend this place if you're a solo traveler, and I would stay here again on my next trip.

It was another amazing stay in Tokyo! The location was perfect, just a short walk to the subway, making it incredibly convenient to explore the city. The flat was beautiful, clean, and well-equipped with everything we needed. The host was very helpful and responsive, providing great tips and ensuring we had a comfortable stay. Highly recommend!
Very comfortable and convenient

Toujours parfait !
Je suis fan de cette endroit!
Bien placé, silencieux, propre… parfait

Literally worth the money. Nice cozy little airbnb, small, but located in a very nice neighborhood with literally 2min access to the metro line connecting to so many different locations within 15-30min metro ride.
Yoshi was very proactive and was kind enough to let me check in early. Would definitely stay here again.

This place was very clean and had everything we needed, including USB charger plug and plug converter. The  room was at the end of a cul-de-sac alley and was very quite which made it easy to sleep at nights. I highly recommend this place.

Can only agree with all other reviews - a fantastic stay. Immaculately clean, perfect location, totally quiet at night for sleeping and very comfortable beds. My son used the futon on the floor and I had the bed. It required a bit of table/chair moving, but this was no problem. The host was extremely good at communicating. Our bags were delayed until the next day at the airport and he took the call from them and then received the bags the next day while we were out exploring Tokyo. Highly recommended
It’s my second time at this place and I love it. The stay’s always perfect and I love the neighborhood.

Definitely one of my best stay in Japan. The place is lovely and clean. Yoshi is always responsive and they also prepare everything, more than what we can ask for - which is really helpful for us especially dealing with the heat in Japan during summer. The place is close to the station but still in a quiet neighborhood so you dont have to worry about the train noise at night. Highly recommended for anyone traveling to Japan! Thanks Yoshi for making our stay so memorable!
Excellent stay. I recommend strongly !

This place was amazing! We stayed in six different places while we were in Japan and this was the best by far. It was very clean, right around the corner from the train (which was the best cause we had a lot of luggage), it had a great bathroom, it was in a very safe place, there was a 7/11 right around the corner, and the host was very responsive. At the end of the trip, I wished that we had stayed here for longer. Book the place, it was worth the money and an enjoyable experience.

A super-nice quiet apt. at the end of a short alley in a sweet real neighborhood.  And quiet means real quiet...even during the day .. caught up on my jet lag fast.  it's a compact space but the door jambs were fine for a 6'3" man .. only issue was the stove hood I kept bumping into when cooking.  everything was spotless and near new.  Yoshi is as good as everyone says...flexible as possible and helpful advice during typhoon 10.  the only nit-picky thing I can say is the setup for the appliances in the kitchen is not optimal - electric cords stretch across to other side of the galley.  Anyway, I feel very lucky I ended up there and yes, I'd come back.
I dont know how to explain this placw is very good very happy it has everything you want for travel as fan, umbrella, amenities etc

As a first trip to Tokyo, I couldn't have asked for better accommodations. It was a great location, with easy train access, so I could get around Tokyo smoothly. It was also very close to many great restaurants, which made it easy in the evening when I was looking for somewhere to eat. Yoshi & Iku were very friendly and made sure I had everything I needed, even sharing where the closest grocery and convenience stores were so I could find them if needed. I will definitely try to stay here again for my next trip to Tokyo!

My stay at Yoshi’s apartment was better than expected. I read all the reviews on Airbnb so I knew it was going to be good. Seeing it in person is better than the pictures indicate. Lots of amenities in the apartment. Extremely clean, good bed, grocery stores and convenience stores very close by. Good restaurants in the area, and the surrounding community was very peaceful, clean and quiet. Very close to the Ryoguku train station and Ryoguku subway station. Also very close to great walking paths and running paths by Sumida park and along Sumida River. Yoshi was an excellent host. Always responded to messages quickly. This is a five star Airbnb, with everything you need for a great stay. If I come back to Tokyo this is where I will stay! Thank you Yoshi!

Le logement est parfaitement situé: quartier résidentiel tranquille,  près du métro et des trains, bons petits restaurants autour et un beau supermarché à 8 minutes de marche.  Yoshi demeure dans l'immeuble, donc facilement rejoignable.

This unit was great - it was clean and had all the accommodations listed in the posting. The neighborhood surrounding it was quiet, clean, and easy to get around, and we were in close proximity to a bus stop and train station. Tokyo SKYTREE is walking distance or a short bus ride away.
The unit itself is a bit cramped (expected for Tokyo), but clean and well maintained. Note to any travelers coming from Narita airport - transportation requires a few transfers and a bit of a walk. All in all, a great and affordable place to stay on your visit.

I was super satisfied with this accommodation in terms of its cleanliness, amenities, and overall comfort. I stayed 5 nights with my mom. The only thing I’d say was a fault on my part- since this is the first time I’ve ever planned a trip to Japan (we’ve only been here for a flight layover),  I found that a bunch of the places I wanted to go to were a bit further than they seemed from here, but I’m well-informed for the next time I visit, and we still had fun! Anyways, the host was friendly, helpful, and responsive whenever I was confused about something. The area is very quiet as well. I’ll make sure to recommend this Airbnb to anyone planning to visit the area!

This place is perfect, close by two train stations to travel across Tokyo with restaurants nearby. Uses codes to get in/out so no stressing about keys to get in. The automatic filling bathtub is awesome. Yoshi was an incredibly responsive host for anything that came up during our stay.

Fantastic location just a short walk from the subway. Quiet street, comfortable bed and great kitchen + bathroom. We arrived a little later than expected due to our train being delayed and our host allowed us the check in remotely. We would definitely stay again.

L’appartement est parfait pour un voyage à Tokyo. Extrêmement propre, situé dans un quartier plutôt calme et résidentiel, mais situé à proximité du musée Hokusai, du temple Senso-Ji, et à 2 minutes d’une station de métro (la ligne Oedo dessert très bien Tokyo), il est parfaitement situé.
Le lit est ultra confortable, c’est la première fois que je vois ça dans un airbnb.
Deux supermarchés à prix raisonnables, et plusieurs convenient stores sont situés proches de l’airbnb.
Le seul point négatif est que l’appartement est un peu sombre, mais pour visiter Tokyo, c’est parfaitement suffisant (excellent rapport qualité prix)
Je recommande à 100% !

We had a wonderful stay! The apartment was clean and tidy, very close to the subway, and the neighbourhood had plenty of great places to eat. Yoshi was always responsive and helpful. We highly recommend this place!

We had a great stay at Yoshi's place.
He responds quickly to every questions or requests we had.
The place is super clean, smells good and is exactly like the pictures.
The bed is comfy, but it's two twin beds put together to make a queen bed. So my partner was too tall (6'-4") for it, and his feet were hanging off the bed.
The appartment is very well located. 3 minutes walk from Oedo line, and 9 minutes walk from Chūō-Sōbu line.
We would definitely stay again, thank you for having us! :D

About 5 mins walk from Ryogoku station. Yoshi’s place was easily accessible even with big luggages. Space was clean, tidy and very well-equipped (you just have to search). When the hairdryer was not working, Yoshi replaced it for us in a matter of minutes even at a late hour.
Only downside was our unit (102) was generally narrow and there was limited space to open big luggages wide. But otherwise the place was comfy and cosy, and we highly recommended this place to all who are staying over in Tokyo!

Good, has everything you need
Great host

Fantastic place! We really enjoyed our stay here. The flat has everything you could possibly need and the neighbourhood is nice and peaceful. It is also a very quick walk to Ryogoku station which connects you to many parts of Tokyo :)
Would definitely stay again! Spacious, great amenities, quiet location, comfy bed, very friendly and responsive host. Thank you for a wonderful stay in Tokyo.
The owner is very good and give clear instruction to everything.

Yoshi's listing was at a very peaceful location so it ensured restful sleep after a long day exploring Tokyo. It is a bit small but we'll equipped for everything you need whilst travelling. Thanks Yoshi!
beautiful space. extremely clean and very convenient with ryogoku station a short 2/3 min walk.

This place was selected as Guest’s Favorite for good reasons! After a long sightseeing day around Tokyo, coming back to this house feels peaceful & relaxing. Not so many places to eat at night in the neighborhood, but it’s very close to the Oedo & JR station, AEON supermarket, and a public bath/spa. The place has no stairs, hence making it more accessible and homey. You can feel that the host wants you to feel as comfortable as possible. The amenities are complete and they even provided hair dryer, hair straighteners, oven toaster and microwave. AC & portable heater are available for use.
Thanks for having me, Yoshi and family!
This is the best Airbnb I have stayed in Tokyo.   Everything exceeded my expectations - great location, nice host, very comfortable rooms.   I look forward to staying here again.

Our stay was easy with helpful guides on how to dispose our trash and recyclables, everything was detailed and had everything we needed from toothbrush to drying rack. Location was great, a two minute walk to the train station and same distance to a 7/11.
住宿設備與介紹一致，若有烘衣機會更完美，下次有機會再入住。
指示十分清晰，亦很好快解決問題，地理位置方便！

Our stay here was really nice. The flat is big enough for two people and very clean. We had all the necessary items we needed for our stay, such as hairdryer and kitchenware. Additionally, the communication with the owner was smooth. We asked him some questioned and became the answers very fast. Definitely recommend staying here if you are visiting Tokyo.

It was the perfect base for our travels in Tokyo. The place was great - very comfortable bed, nice shower and good size fridge. The location felt awesome as it was very convenient to travel around Tokyo with short distances to the underground stops and bus, plus it was very quiet so made for good night sleeps. Also there is an awesome spa super close which was perfect after a long flight! There’s also a supermarket and restaurants very close. Host was also super friendly and helpful. Everything was super smooth and easy. Highly recommend! :)

兩國站出站只需5-10分鐘，十分方便，價錢亦相宜
溝通及回覆亦10分滿意，而且會盡量滿足我們要求
幾乎找不到任何瑕疵，十分貼心，如下次到訪日本會再次租用，謝謝
Great stay! Very near to the station, well equipped, super responsive hosts :)
I had an amazing experience staying at Yoshi's house. It was really near to the Ryogoky station! The place was clean and beautiful!

Getting this Airbnb was the best decision we made when holidaying in Tokyo. A great location that is free of the overly tourist places to go. This is where you go to experience to real day to day Tokyo.

Our accommodation had everything you would need, was clean and very affordable. Yoshi was very responsive to messages as well.

We loved Yoshi’s apartment! The bed was super comfortable, very clear instructions/manual, washer, strong water, well thought out arrangement, and nice amenities. Also Yoshi was incredibly helpful, warm, and very responsive. As an airbnb host myself, I appreciated that Yoshi asked for any suggestions to improve his guest’s experiences.  It’s a sign of a superhost..…and I had nothing to suggest! It was a perfect stay.  Domo arigato Yoshi san!
Really great apartment. Very easy to travel around from the metro station nearby and a close walk to a lot of nice restaurants and bars!! Thank you!
Perfect place to stay! Very close to a train station making it extremely convenient to explore Tokyo. The hosts were always responsive and gave clear instructions. The place was also very clean.
The apartment has everything we need and it’s very clean. The location is good (2 mins from the metro station and 8 mins from the JR). We would recommend this place in Tokyo.
It was indeed a home away from home! Super clean, spotless in fact and had everything you needed for a short stay.
Clean, comfortable and had all the amenities we needed :) lovely area with good food around and a close train station. Would stay again!

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour à Tokyo! Appartement extrêmement fonctionnel et propre. Tout est très bien pensé. Équipements au top! Lit confortable, clim réversible, bouilloire, lave-linge, table à repasser et même un lisseur! Emplacement idéal au calme dans une résidence privée avec métros très proches pour aller visiter les différents quartiers de Tokyo. Nous reviendrons avec plaisir! Merci!
This was our first Air B&B in Japan.  I hope all of our upcoming Air B&Bs  are as spotless and comfortable as Yoshi's.

We stayed 10 nights at Yoshi’s place and loved it.
The apartment was super clean, cozy, and had everything we needed—AC, a washing machine, and all the little essentials (shampoo, conditioner, body wash, toothbrush and paste) and a few other convenient things like umbrellas. Check-in was super easy with digital access, which made everything smooth from the start.
The location was also great—really well connected to public transport and with several convenience stores just around the corner.
Would definitely stay here again!
Perfect for a stay in Tokyo.

The best cute little Airbnb for your stay in Tokyo! The host was soooo friendly and welcoming! Quick walk to major station! 7-11 nearby as well! The house was SUPER clean and the neighborhood was charming and quiet! Highly recommend!
Wir waren rundum zufrieden und haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt. Vielen Dank für die tolle Erfahrung.
Notre séjour dans ce logement était parfait et nous a permis de visiter Tokyo très facilement. Je recommande !
This place was by far one of our favorites. It was super clean and super convenient short walk to the subway about four minutes area caters to sumo wrestling, which was awesome. Highly recommend.

Melhor Airbnb que já fiquei.
Localização excelente, limpeza impecável e cuidado em cada detalhe.
Recomendo fortemente para amigos e qualquer pessoa que precise de uma base em Tokyo.

I had a wonderful experience at this Airbnb! The location was absolutely perfect — tucked away enough to be quiet and calm, but still super convenient for exploring the city.
The apartment itself was spotless, comfortable, and had everything I needed for a relaxing stay.
What really stood out were the hosts — they were incredibly kind and responsive, making check-in smooth and communication easy throughout. I really appreciated the attention to detail and the peaceful atmosphere.
Would definitely stay here again! :)
房东回复消息非常及时，周边也十分安静，离地铁站也很近，就是房子有些小，晾衣服的地方不足

We feel so lucky to have stayed at Yoshi’s place. It’s a cute little apartment with everything you need. Great location, the station is literally around the corner with great options for dining and the host was nothing less than amazingly responsive and helpful. He even helped us to get our taxi back to the station. Thank you so much Yoshi for making our stay in Tokyo so enjoyable and hassle free.
Yoshi was an amazing host, we an amazing time in Tokyo and the space was very clean.
Clean, cozy, convenient place to stay in Tokyo. I am very happy we chose this over a hotel, we felt right at home.
We loved our stay at Yoshi’s place. It was a perfect place to stay to explore Tokyo on foot or by train. Everything was comfortable. Thank you!

This a great place to stay because its close to two train stations, and speacially if you are into anime and videogames, because Akihabara is like a 20 minute train away.
The apartament is also very close to the Edo-Tokyo museum, which I heard is very good but sadly it was closed due to renovations during my stay.
Apart from the location the apartment itself is nice, just as advertised.

Nous avons passé un agréable séjour dans l'appartement qui est fonctionnel et joliment décoré. Le quartier est calme et Yoshi et son compagnon ont toujours été réactifs, que ce soit par messages ou sur place.
Very clean and serviceable place to stay. Close to the metro and a fun area with restaurants and bars. Host was very nice. I recommend.
房東親切且總是即時回覆，讓我們在旅途中非常安心
Excelente en todo, ubicacion, comodidad, limpieza, me encanto, gracias.
Das Appartement ist schön ruhig gelegen und ist ausreichend für zwei Personen und einen kurzen Aufenthalt in Tokio. Man ist von dort gut angebunden mit der Bahn in alle Richtungen.

JR高円寺駅北口から高円寺商店街を抜けると直ぐの場所で、アクセスしやすく、近くにコンビニ、飲食店があり利便性の高い場所でした。
清潔感、安心感があり とても居心地良く滞在出来ました。
何よりオーナーさんのフレンドリーな雰囲気に安心して過ごすことができ大満足。またぜひ利用したいと思います！
I had a wonderful stay at Grapehouse Koenji. The host was very welcoming and accommodating.
とってもフレンドリーな雰囲気と清潔感のある設備がとっても気に入ってます。高円寺商店街のすぐ近くでとても便利なのでまた利用させて頂きたいと思っています！
People are really nice and friendly, the host is also very nice and considerate. The place is very clean and have a modern design. Highly recommend
Its convenient and accessible for food, shopping and train. I really like it.

The hostel is very nice and clean, I met some really nice people, we had fun in the common room ! :)
Koenji is a wonderful neighborhood, super hip, loads of kawaii places to go, really great, the only issue is it is a bit far from Tokyo city centre (Shibuya, Shinjuku) so if you want to go out and catch up the last subway ... you will certainly miss a part of the party !
Very nice place to stay, the hosts are very kind and the home very friendly and peacefull. And it is just next to Koenji shopping streets and market sur, which is an awsome place to see !
因為是通鋪，所以難免需要時時注意音量，但是整個環境非常溫馨，睡覺時也能夠非常安心的入睡，房客的品質也都很好，覺得是個很棒的經驗。
高円寺で仕事があり利用させていただきました。チェックインの時間に柔軟に対応いただいて感謝してます。設備はとっても清潔で気持ちよく過ごさせていただきました。駅から繁華街を抜けた住宅地なので、歩けば直ぐに買い物に行け、銭湯「小杉湯」が近くてゆったり寛げました。とにかく高円寺は飲む方には楽しそうな場所だなぁと思います。また利用したいと思います。

신주쿠역까지 지하철로 금방갈수 있긴하지만 숙소바로앞에 번화가가 있는건 아니에요!
그치만 주거지구다 보니까 조용합니다~!
조용한 마을에서 묵고 싶은 분께 추천드려요ㅎㅎㅎ
그리고 깨끗하고 호스트분도 친절하시고 좋습니다

I had the best stay here. Sanae runs a wonderfully comfortable and homey guesthouse in a fantastic neighborhood. I met many lovely people and was able to get around Tokyo with ease since the JR is so close. The space may seem small at first but after 11 days I found it efficient and all you really need if you are there to explore. Sanae is very kind and tried to help with any questions I had. I was invited to a sushi making night which was so much fun and Sanae organized veggie fillings for me which was very thoughtful.  Communication while booking and with directions was fantastic. The guesthouse is kept very clean even with all the guests she has, it's a very popular place. I have nothing negative to say and would highly recommend. I'm very glad I chose Grapehouse for my accommodation this trip.

Such a great guesthouse! All the needed facilities were nice and clean. The location is also goood. You can see so many unique & lovely shops when you go to the house from koenji station. The host also very kind and friendly with smile :) I am sure you can enjoy Tokyo with this wonderful guesthouse! I wish I could have stayed longer in Tokyo. Hope to see you all (リンちゃん, noriko , shoko(hahaha) , mami and sanae again!!!:) Thank youuuu
5일간 머물면서, 아주 행복했습니다. 필요한 것들을 전부 갖추고 있고, 부엌과 공용공간, 침대와 샤워시설 전부 깨끗했어요! 다양한 곳에서 온 여행자들이 만나 이야기하고, 웃으며 여유를 즐길 수 있는 아늑하고 사랑스러운 곳이었습니다. 위치도 신주쿠에서 아주 가깝고 어딜 가든 괜찮았어요. 고엔지 상점가를 지나면 바로 찾을 수 있답니다! 조금 더 오래 머물면서 동네 구경도 하고, 여기서 만난 친구들(쇼코와 노리코 그리고 마미, 귀여운 강아지 린짱)과 더 이야기하며 같이 시간을 보냈으면 좋았을거예요! 여자 혼자 혹은 여럿이 여행하기 매우 추천합니다 :) 맑은 하늘의 봄 도쿄에서 즐거운 추억을 만들고 갑니다! 호스트 사나에도 고마워요 ٩(๑❛ᴗ❛๑)۶ 다음에 또 만나요!
This is the 2nd time I live in Grapehouse. It was a amazing ! I highly recommed to other guests.

I was very grateful to spent a night at Grapehouse. They are extremely nice people, and I was very glad to be able to talk with Shoko (and hope I will meet her again !)
The guest house is very clean, well equiped and with a very nice situation - Koenji is one of my favorite area of Tokyo, I recommanded if you're looking for record shops and thrift shops ;)
I recommanded this adress ! Thank you ladies !

Great place  in a very good position and nice neighborhood, close to the station of Koenji. Fully equipped kitchen/living room with many facilities, comfortable beds and clean and modern bathrooms. Even the check in at 7 a.m. was allowed. I had a very good stay and would totally recommed it to girls and women who want to explore Tokyo and feel like home in this cute apartment-hostel. Will come back next time!

Grapehouse was the best decision I made planning my first solo international trip. It was comfortable, spotless and Sanae and the other guests were warm and helpful. I will not hesitate to visit here again some day. Thank you!
很好
駅からのアクセスも良く、安心できる場所でした。
I recommend this place for everyone who love to travel this a great place to stay
The spaces are larger than expected so that’s a plus! Hostess was very polite and sweet. The place is cute and is a good place to meet other fellow travelers.

Super clean and confortable place!
Also, I personally recommend the location, Koenji. Koenji is not so famous tourist area, but there is nice neighbourhood with lots of local shops and restaurants. I am sure I will choose Grapehouse again!

What a lovely little guesthouse in Koenji!
Everything you need in a very peaceful place in Tokyo - yet close to the charming neighborhood Koenji!
And the host was so incredibly sweet and helpful! Absolutely a great place to stay ❤️ Thank you

I had a really great time at grapehouse. The rooms are really cozy, very clean and there is everything you need.
I met some really nice girls, slept well and had a great time in Koenji which is a cool location.
I can totally recommend to stay there!
A beautiful dormitory experience if you're looking to connect with others or find a new temporary home in quaint, beautiful Koenji (that comes to life at night)!

步行不到五分钟就是JR线，交通非常便利。附近是日本很有生活特色的商店街，很多小点非常有趣，适合挑一天慢慢探索而且吃的逛的一应俱全。
房主人真的非常好，住所也很干净。独自一人出游的话非常推荐！

I loved the area! It’s cozy yet you’ll find many small cafés, restaurants and shops in diffetent styles. On top,  Koenji is close to Shinjuku station, one of the main hubs in Tokyo. Grapehouse was nice and clean and quiet. The staff was very accomodating. It can be a bit crowded if fully booked but still a peaceful atmosphere.
大家さんはとても優しい方です。この度はありがとうございました。
very clean place and hospitable host!!
Very neat and tidy place. Safe for women. Super helpful and cooperative host. Much recommended.

Grapehouse is a warm place with a home feel to it, I love this feeling when I travel as it prevents you from feeling homesick sometimes! The owner was so lovely and her doggie! There was a lot of help from staff, we wanted to find a gig and they helped to search for places!
I would really recommend the guesthouse for travellers, its in a great, buzzy location also, if you like to see music, go to izakaya and sento!

This location is amazing. This was the first time I have traveled alone and I felt extremely comfortable staying here. The host was unbelievably kind and helpful. I didn't make any concrete plans beforehand but there were many pamphlets on suggested places to visit and she even took my to a public bath the first night. I will definitely stay again the next time I visit Tokyo.

it was great staying at grapehouse. I absolutely loved the hospitality and the host was very nice and kind to me.
It was a very beautifully decorated space and I loved their travel spirit. The place was clean and the description was accurate.
thanks ! I would surely come and stay again! :)

Really nice place and lovely host. I was sick during my stay and didn’t get to see that much of the neighbourhood, but what I saw seemed nice. The host was really helpful when I get sick and made sure I was ok.

I had a wonderful stay at Grapehouse Koenji, the staff was very welcoming and the space itself was very clean and well set up ! It’s very close to a JR line station which makes it easy to get all around Tokyo, and the surrounding neighborhood has a lot of great shops restaurants and cafes to check out !

駅から、活気のある商店街を抜けたところにあり、夜間でも安心して出歩くことができました。
共用スペースには、東京近郊の観光情報誌やパンフレットなどがたくさん置かれており、ホストの方の心遣いを感じました。
また機会があれば、ぜひお邪魔したいです。

위치가 코엔지 역과 매우 가까워서 관광 다니기 편했고
침대 시트의 청결이나 샤워룸의 청결 또한 깨끗해서 좋았습니다!
다인실을 이용 했지만 다음에는 개인실도 이용해 보고 싶다는 생각을 합니다.
너무 좋았고 또 방문 의사가 있습니다.
喜欢这样很干净的地方，很放心，很便利

位置：从高丹寺车站走过去10分钟左右，周围都是商店和餐饮店很好逛
房间：很干净，尤其是浴室（有两间所以不会出现排队等待的情况）
房东：很温柔，我第一天入住迟到了2小时，她也一直等我。
其他房客：都很友好，聊天愉快。有日本人，中国人，西班牙人等等

5日間滞在しましたが、とても快適に過ごすことができました。
女性専用ドミということで、女性にとってうれしいきめ細かい配慮が行き届いておりました。例えば、ゲストが使えるトイレが3つ、シャワールームが2つ、洗面台が二つ、ミニドレッサーや手鏡の備え付けがあることで、週末込み合うときでも快適な環境となりました。消灯時間も管理いただけるので、滞在者が複数となっても、誰かに邪魔になることなく居住者全員が十分休息を取れたと思います。さらに、おしゃれなリビング空間で、コーヒー好きにはうれしいドリップコーヒーも提供いただいており、室内でもゆったりと過ごさせていただきました。
立地も駅から近くアクセスがよく、商店街と銭湯が充実しており、また次回も滞在したいと思う宿です。上京の際には、また利用させていただきます。

This Guesthouse is worth the price! You get to meet new people in a warm environment. Beds were so cozy and soft. I was able to sleep well. Of course, it's a shared room but the other guests were very considerate about the noise. No problems for chexk-in and check-out and done quickly.

짧은 기간 동안 있었던 게 너무 아쉬울 정도로 너무 좋았어요. 사람들과 지내는 게 서툴러서, 특히 영어문화권 분들이 왔을 때 같이 어울리기가 힘들었는데 일본어는 어느정도할 수 있기 때문에 일본 분이랑 한 대화는 정말 유익하고 즐거웠어요. 다만 샤워시간, 소등시간이 정해져있으니(불은 부분부분만 키고 사용하실 순 있어요) 그것만 신경쓰시면 될 것 같아요. 그리고 계단이 가파르니 눈이 안좋으시거나 다리가 불편한 분들은 조금 이용에 불편을 겪으실 수 있어요. 역과도 뛰어가면 3분 정도 걸릴 정도의 거리?, 보통걸음?으로 10분 정도에 다닐 수 있어서 역 이용하기에도 편리해요! 다시 갈 수 있다면 이번엔 길게 있고 싶어요... 나카노 브로드웨이랑 지브리 박물관을 못간게 너무 아쉬워요...
とてもきれいで快適でした！美味しいご飯屋さんなど、丁寧に教えてくれました。また、ぜひ利用したいです。
I had a great stay at grapehouse. The location is perfect. They were very welcoming and I felt comfortable my entire trip.
이박했는데 숙소가 사진이랑 똑같고 깨끗하고 조용하고 물품도 잘 구비되어 있습니다. 숙소가 시내에서도 가깝고 기치조지쪽 가기도 좋아서 위치가 아주 딱이었어요! 큰 호스텔만 가보고 이렇게 열명정도만 잘 수 있는 아담한 호스텔은 처음이었는데 정말 좋았습니다~~

I had a great stay at Grapehouse Koenji. Sanae-san is very kind to accommodate me and my friend even though we came to Tokyo past 12. The dormitory is very well maintained and Sanae and Minami-san offered help whenever I have questions on how to get to certain places. They even have a sweet dog named Ling. I am inspired to host my own airbnb dorm because of Grapehouse. Great job and would love to come back!
compare to the price, the place is sooo good. it is clean, you can meet fun people, the place it located is so cool. everyting is way beeter than i expect.

Hands down one of my fav Airbnb’s I’ve stayed at! More than anything, the host was the best. She was so caring and hospitable. The place is clean and it has many cute little decorations. It’s close to the subway station so the location was great (only a few stops away from central Tokyo so that was very convenient). Overall, as a solo female traveler, I enjoyed my stay at Grapehouse and would def book this place again if I ever visit Tokyo in the future :)

My favorite hostel in Japan! Sannae is a wonderful host and everyone who stays here is polite and kind as a result. We even had soba noodles for New Year’s as good luck, which I’d never done before. Would stay here again and again.
とても快適でした！おしゃれな空間で清掃も行き届いており、何より立地が素晴らしかったです。ワンちゃんもフレンドリーで可愛かったです。すぐ近くに銭湯もありとてもリラックスできました。また東京に行くときは必ず利用します。

급하게 잡은 숙소였는데 생각보다 너무 좋았다. 구비되어있을것들 다 잘 구비되어있고
티비도 있어서 아침에 일어나서 티비도 봤다ㅋㅋㅋ 코엔지 역에서 부터 숙소까지 가는길이 너무 예뻤고 한 십분? 걸어가면 숙소 나온다. 나는 숙소 앞 버스 정류장에서 나카노역까지 버스타고 도쿄메트로 이용했다.
도쿄메트로패스 이용하실 분들 참고하세요
그 무엇보다 너무 친절하게 맞아주셔서 편하게 지낼수 있었고 다음에 또 도쿄 온다면 다시 묵을 생각이다.
The host is warm and friendly. A nice and clean place.
高円寺はお店が多く、宿は女子だけで共有スペースもあり、とても楽しく過ごせました。オーナーもとても気さくでいい方でした。

10일동안 숙소 사용했는데,
진짜 친절하시고 좋았어요:)
여자들끼리만 사용하기 때문에
더 편하게 쉴 수 있었습니다!
코엔지역이랑 가까워서 코엔지 빈티지거리나, 나카노역 브로드웨이 구경하시는 것
추천드려요!
긴 여행이라 피임약을 먹었음에도
불구하고 생리가 갑자기 터져서
이불에 다 새서 걱정했는데
정말 마음 편하게 괜찮다고 해주셨어요
ㅠㅠ
사장님 짱!!!!!!!!!!
강아지가 있으니 알레르기 있으신 분이나
싫어하시는 분은 참고 하시구여!
수건 하나밖에 안주니까 챙겨가세용
다음에도 꼭 이용할 생각입니다❤️

This location suits anyone who is traveling solo. It took me a good day or so to navigate the surrounding area. About a 5-10 min (depending on your pace) walk to the nearest JR station which is Koenji station. Plenty of restaurants and shops nearby. There is a Family Mart and Pizza Hut down the street. You share a common area (kitchen, living room) with the other guests. The bed is comfortable. The host is quick to respond. Neighborhood is safe and peaceful. No disturbances. There is also a cute dog :) thank you for a great stay!
My friend and I stayed for 6 days and we had an amazing time! Grapehouse Koenji was very cozy and the host was so kind.
Lovely place, easy to get with good links to go around, nice neighbourhood and very safe, friendly host, my daughter and me really  love our stay, thank you.
Grapehouse Koenji doesn't only offer amazing accommodations, the hosts are amazing. They even offered my friend to use their address for getting concert tickets. Highly recommended!

This hostel was an absolute joy to stay in. The host was above accommodating, even going as far as to ask me if I had eaten and providing me with some fresh onigiri and miso soup one night. Getting around was easy with the train station only a few minutes away. The area was also super cute and quaint with tons to do if you like to just walk around and explore. If I come back to Japan I'd definitely stay here again!
Very nice place to stay. Everyone is kind and polite and the place and rooms themselves are very comfortable.

We loved our time at the Grapehouse. It is located in an adorable neighborhood just situated outside of the hustle and bustle of Tokyo. It is accessible by train/subway and little bit of a walk from there. But we enjoyed our walks through cozy side streets. Our host was very accommodating and communicates well. Our beds were comfy. The room got a little stuffy in the middle of the night (we were there in mid-late May) but the windows could be opened. There was a nice common space and small kitchen. A great place to socialize with other travelers. Lots of resource guides can be found there too. The showers and toilets were very clean. We loved our stay and would come back for another visit!
Grapehouse has a very comfortable atmosphere. The space is very clean and quaint. The location is great. Amazing value for this accommodating, friendly hostel.

Grapehouse feels like a place from a tv-show.
All the people were lovely and really helpfull.
The place is nice and clean and feels really safe. You will have a bed with a curtain, little storage space with a lock (for your passport) and some space for your luggage.
Koenji is a triftstore place, so a lot of cheap secondhand clothes. Also places to eat.
Easy to get to shinjuku by train. I also walked, but wouldn't recommend.
I think I will come back to grapehouse one day. Would recommend to anyone!

I had a wonderful stay at Grapehouse Koenji ! It's very cozy, extremely clean, and perfect for female solo travelers who might feel lonely or unsafe at times. Here, there's always someone to welcome you with a big smile ! It's also well located since it's approx 10 minutes  by train to Shinjuku station, and the neighborhood is really cool (a paradise for thrift shops' lovers). I recommand this place at 100% !

너무너무 좋았습니다!
게스트 분들도 다 좋으셨고 주인분도 너무너무 친절하셨습니다 :)
청소도 매일 하셔서 깔끔했고, 강아지 두마리도 너무 귀여웠습니다 🙆🏻‍♀️❤️
잊지 못할 생활을 하다 온 것 같습니다 !
그 정도로 최고이고 강추입니다 !!

매번 코엔지근처 숙소이용할 때마다 이곳 이용해요~
사람 몰리는 기간만 아니면 쾌적하고 가성비 좋은 숙소 이곳만큼인 곳 못찾은 것 같아요!

I had the most pleasant and peaceful stay Grapehouse Koenji. Everything was sparkling clean, the beds were comfortable and it had such a homely vibe! I would definitely recommend it to anyone visiting Tokyo, Koenji is the coolest neighbourhood too!
清潔でほどよくアットホームでリラックス、安心できる場所でした。

This hostel is possibly the best place I've stayed in Tokyo and I've been coming every fall for 6 years, now. It was easy to find, a very short walk from the train, connected to bus lines, surrounded by cool shops and every amenity you would need, and totally cozy and safe. I like coming to Tokyo so often because I feel very safe traveling alone here as a woman, but sometimes it can be lonely and finding a private Airbnb can be expensive and nerve wracking.
