I needed a one night stay so I decided to stay in a hostel for the first time, I was nervous but everything was so perfect. I was greeted by Sanae who showed me how everything worked and even helped me with my bag. I took a hot shower as soon as I got in and then met with some other guests. We ended up talking and exchanging travel suggestions for a long time and then Sanae brought her dog up to play! The other workers there were also very nice to chat with and everyone was extremely welcoming. Sleeping was very comfortable and there is a fan so it doesn't get stuffy at all. I slept very well and the space was very quiet. The next morning I woke up to fresh grapes on the kitchen table that had come from the actual grape vine on the house! Check out was easy and getting back to the station with my bags was quick. I would highly recommend staying here!!

We stayed here for 5 nights and loved coming back to the place after discovering Tokyo during the day. The neighborhood is lively, there are nice cafés and restaurants, many vintage shops and sweet alleys. It's a very cozy place where you can feel at home, because of the kitchen/living area next to the 8 bed-dorm. We would definitely stay there again when going back to Tokyo one day.
I had a great time in Grapehouse. The place is so clean, staff so friendly. Located in a very nice environment. Recommended!

Nice place to stay!
Thank you!
This is my second time staying here and I will definitely come back next time I'm in Tokyo. I felt so comfortable and everyone was lovely. The place is very clean and the location is perfect.
Grapehouse is beautiful and clean, with many thoughtful touches around the area. I would definitely visit again 😊

Grapehouse Koenji is conveniently across the street from a Family Mary convenience store. It’s also located by a lot of different local shops and maybe 8-10 minutes (depending on how quickly you walk) from the closest train station.
The dormitory is fairly cozy, and during cold nights Sanae-san gives you a hot water bottle to put in bed to keep you extra toasty. The common area is clean and spacious. Occasionally, fellow dormitory mates will bring and share snacks in the common space.
There’s a farmhouse style sink with 2 water spouts. 3 toilets, one downstairs and 2 upstairs. There are 2 separate showers and a dual washer and dryer (you can pay an extra small fee to use the washer/dryer).
Overall, even though there was a small language barrier, Sanae-san explains everything to her best of her ability and tries to make your stay feel as warm and welcoming as possible. If I ever come back to Tokyo and am traveling on a budget, I would stay here again!

I loved the place, very clean and cozy, the location is great and convenient, also Koenji is a really fun neighborhood.
Sanae-san is an amazing owner of this place, her hospitality is wonderful.
I would come back to stay here again!

Grapehouse is located around 5-10 mins walk from JR Koenji Station. It's not too far from some crowded area like Shinjuku or Tokyo, since you can go there via Chuo Sobu Line or Chuo Line. The area is quiet during the night, which is great if you're a light sleeper.
Sanae-san (the host) shown great hospitality during check in and stay. She'll greet you at the door, sometimes with her dog, and show you around the place. Amenities are great, everything is super clean, and she'll provide a warm water bottle during winter to put near your pillow so you'll be warmer during the night. Lots of up-to-date brochure around her place that you could use for guidance on places you want to visit.
If you are hungry during the night, the place is close to plenty of convenience store (several store of Family Mart, Lawson, 7-11, and 1 supermarket), as well as several restaurant around (McDonald, sushi, bars, yakiniku, pizza hut, rice bowl, etc).
Overall a really great stay, would definitely recommend, especially for solo female traveller.
Wonderful stay with great hospitality!

東京で用事があり、目的地に近く値段も手頃なこちらのゲストハウスを利用しましたが、1泊だけなのがもったいないくらい、素敵な時間を過ごせました。今度はゆっくり泊まって高円寺散策もしたいし、オーナーさんの発酵玄米のお料理を食べたり、ご一緒した方との関わりを楽しみたいなと思います。女性専用ということで安心して泊まれるし、ベッドや水回りはとても綺麗にされてて快適、共有リビングではゆったり寛げました。東京へ足を運ぶ際にはまたお邪魔したいと思います^ ^ありがとうございました！

高円寺は美味しいご飯屋さんが沢山たり、とても楽しい場所で、また東京駅からのアクセスも良いです。
また、宿は毎日掃除がされていて、ホストさんの心遣いが行き届いた良い宿だと思います。
駅から近く、近くに美味しいお店もたくさんあって便利です。商店街を抜けたすぐの住宅街に位置しているので静かです。清潔感があり、ホストさんの雰囲気もよく、リラックスして過ごせました。事前に頼めば朝食も用意してもらえて、とても美味しかったです！
Clean & comfortable place to stay! Owner is really nice and friendly. Also close from Koenji station.
Thank you for this wonderful stay as always! Definitely one of the best guest houses in Tokyo!
とっても素敵なハウスでした。お世話になりました！また東京旅行の機会があれば利用します(^^)

首先，位置很好，高円寺周围有很多好吃好玩好逛的店，以后肯定还会回去逛。第二，房东人很好，所有人都说房东像妈妈一样，为客人提供的餐食便宜又好吃。其次，住在这里的女性都非常非常不错，交流起来很开心，如果你想交到来自世界各地的有趣的朋友、请一定住在这里吧！最后，我想要特别感谢房东，因为我的行李很多很重，所以房东主动提出要开车送我去新家（为了感谢我帮她审核中文版葡萄屋介绍视频），真的太感谢了！！在这里度过了非常美好的时间。

猫と一緒に泊まらせていただきました。
部屋も清潔、アメニティも充実していました。
ホストさんはとても親切で猫も私も快適に過ごすことができました。
次回もまたお世話になりたいと思います。

予約時に、性別の確認があり、本名が必要です。
宿は、静かな住宅街にあり、清潔です。
女性専用なので、安心して過ごす事ができます。
スタッフさんも、女性で優しいお姉さんです。
皆さまに、オススメします。

There's no better place to stay in Tokyo than Grapehouse Koenji! Not only is Koenji a very cool place to check out (lots of restaurants, bars, music venues, and shopping!), but Grapehouse is also conveniently located near the Chuo Line so it's easy to get to just about anywhere in Tokyo.
Grapehouse Koenji has a sweet, clean, natural style--the tatami mats and wooden bedframes fragrance the common spaces with a wonderful woodsy scent, and the minimalist decor is sprinkled with mementos from other happy customers.
Sanae-san's cooking is top-notch, so I also highly recommend trying breakfast at least once!

很安靜的住所
或許適合日本女孩
위치 좋고(키치죠지 좋아하시는 분들은 특히나 더 강추입니다) 깨끗하고 다른 숙박객들과 적당히 어울림이 있고 안락한 개별 침대에 여유있는 화장실/샤워공간, 근처에 아주 좋은 대중목욕탕과 이자카야까지..! 너무 좋은 게스트하우스였습니다. 또 갈거에요,, 무조건,,,
고엔지에서의 좋은 추억
初めて利用しましたが、とても満足できました。2段ベッドも寝返り打っても軋まず、布団も心地よくてとても快眠できました！清潔感もバッチリです。また朝食も頂きましたが、酵素玄米のおにぎり、手作りのお味噌を使ったお味噌汁、とても美味しかったです。またぜひお世話になりたいです。

여자 전용이라는게 일단 아주 만족스러웠어요. 체크인 전에 짐을 일찍 맡기고 이동해야하는 스케쥴이여서 미리 연락드렸는데 아주 친절히 맡아주셨어요. 덕분에 편하게 잘 놀다가 숙소 복귀 했습니다. 제 짐 무거웠을텐데 2층까지 옮겨주셔서ㅠㅠ 죄송하고 감사했습니다.
2층이 게스트들이 이용하는 곳이에요. 거실, 주방, 화장실 2개, 샤워실 2개, 세탁기, 숙박하는 방이 있어요. 사람이 꽤 있었는데도 소란없이 평화롭고 서로 배려하는 분위기였습니다. 침대도 안락하니 좋아서 숙면했습니다! 다만, 숙박방은 다다미니 캐리어 끌면 안되고 들고 이동하셔야해요!
코인세탁소에 건조 돌릴려고 위치 여쭤봤는데 직접 데려다주시고 참 친절하셨어요 :) 신주쿠 근처 조용한 마을에서 지내고 싶으시면 강추합니다 ! 깔끔 그 자체 😊

Super !
Tout était impeccable
Une hôte très amicale et environnement très convivial !
Merci pour ce court séjour
역에서 걸어가기엔 죠큼 먼감이 있었지만 숙소 청결 및 퀄리티 친절함은 최고였으며 숙소까지 가는 길이 로컬길이라 구경하는 재미도있어서 좋았어요

事前の連絡のやり取りも迅速で、滞在中もうちの犬のことも含めて親切に対応してくださり、とても感謝しています。外国人のゲストが多いので、色んな交流ができて楽しく過ごせました。自分だけの空間であるベッドが狭いかなと思いましたが、快適に眠れましたし、誰でも過ごせる広い空間もあるので、不便はありませんでした。シャワーしかありませんが、すぐ近くに銭湯があるので、そこでゆっくりお風呂に浸かれます。また東京滞在の際にはお世話になりたいと思いました。ありがとうございました。
Excellent stay, as the last time :)

Grapehouse Koenji 상당히 깨끗하고 호스트 엄청 친절 합니다.
늦은시간에 일본 도착해서 체크인 늦어져서 미안했는데, 목적지(숙소) 근처에서 길 잃었는데 픽업하러 왔습니다… (감동)
(호스트는 영어/일본어 가능.. 아쉽게도 한국어는 힘듭니다. 참고하세요~)
＊목욕타올 1장만 주니까 필요하시면 챙겨오세요.
(수건 추가하면 유료임)
＊치약/칫솔/샤워타올 미제공 하니 챙겨오세요.
(샴푸,린스,바디샴푸 있음)
＊세탁기는 근처 코인세탁실 이용하세요.
(게스트 하우스 안에 있으나 유료. 코인세탁실이랑 가격이 같아서 여기가 더 나음)
*조식 직접 만들어 주심. 한번은 추천.
여성 전용이여서 게스트하우스 전반적으로 자유로운 분위기.
아무튼 나중에 도쿄 올 일 있으면 여기 선택 할 정도로 만족도 좋습니다.
Grapehouse Koenjiのホストはとても親切です。
宿までの道を迷った時、ホストさんが直接迎えに来てくだって感動しました。
(駅から少し距離はあるがこのくらいは問題なし)
コンディション最高。(部屋、シャワールーム、脱衣室、洗面所、キッチンなど)
＊タオルは基本1枚提供なので、自分のを持っていくか有料で追加可能。
＊歯磨き粉、歯ブラシは基本提供なし(有料サービス可)
ゲストが好きな可愛い犬も印象的。
ホストさんが作ってくださった朝食も美味しかったです。
チェックアウトは少し遅くなってすみませんでした。(寝坊でごめなさい)
私が日本語や英語が上手じゃなかったから
皆んな(他ゲストさん&ホスト)とコミュニケーションがうまくできなかったのが心に残る。
最高の日本旅行を作ってくださったGrapehouse Koenjiに心から感謝します。
またお会いしましょう。
깔끔하고 좋았어요! 혼자 여행할 때 캡슐호텔도 이용해봤었는데 캡슐호텔보다 편했어요. 다음에도 혼자 도쿄 간다면 캡슐호텔 대신 여기 이용하고 싶어용 ㅎ 여성 전용이라 안심되고 숙박하고 계신 분들도 친절하셔서 마주칠 때 인사해주시는 게 좋았어요. 그리고 강아지가 너무 귀여웠어요..🥹🥰
즐거운 숙박이었습니다. 게스트하우스여서 걱정했지만, 아주 조용하고 프라이빗한 분위기에서 묵다 갈 수 있었습니다. 집에 실수로 물건을 두고 왔는데 잘 맡아 전해 주셨습니다. 친절하게 응대해 주신 호스트 분께 감사해요!

楽しいstayになりました♪
気さくに話しかけてくださり楽しかったです！清潔で過ごしやすくまた利用したいです！ありがとうございました！

J’ai beaucoup apprécié mon séjour à Grapehouse, merci beaucoup pour l’accueil, le repas que j’ai partagé avec les autres guest. Le quartier est très mignon et joli. L’hôte est très gentille et accueillante. La propreté et impeccable. Merci.

Koenji's Grapehouse was a lovely stay, it's extremely walkable and many shops and restaurants near as well as a 7/11 and Family Mart open 24/7 for late night snacks. The area is quiet and perfect for someone who wants a more relaxed stay. As a solo female traveler I felt very safe walking in the area as well as the hostel. It was incredibly clean and the bed were very soft! I appreciate all the small touches as well! I highly reccommend!

It was a great stay!
It was my first guest house stay and everything are as explained, bed was comfortable and the wow factor for me was the little hot water pack (?) that Sanae san prepared every night!
There’s limited space for storages so bringing big suitcases might be impractical but the location and everything else was nice!

I like the atmosphere of Koenji so much!
And the guesthouse is very comfy, nice place!

Grapehouse Koenju was just what we needed after a long flight. The host was very responsive to my messages and was waiting when we arrived. She even helped me with SIM card when I was having trouble opening the slot. The other guests were quiet and respectful. Also, I was delighted to see that there was a hair straightener available for guests — an unexpected perk that made my morning that much easier. I would come here again!
very nice
Great place to stay with friendly host and comfortable beds. You have everything you need and the neighborhood is quaint and nice.

第一次入住多人青年旅館
葡萄屋給了我非常好的體驗
裡面的人和善友好，聊天很輕鬆
不時會有人揪團晚上小活動
老闆人很親切，狗狗很可愛(？)
從車站到旅館的一路上會經過商店街
什麼都有什麼都可以買
非常推薦各位入住
Amazing I loved my stay here so much! The most cozy and friendly hostel ever ☺️
第一次来日本就遇到了很好的房子和房东，房间的其他住户也会很注意音量和不打扰他人。房东帮我搬了行李，真的非常感激！！！！！小狗也特别特别可爱！！！！如果我的朋友来东京我会极力推荐这个房子！

I had a really wonderful stay here.
The area is a really great one, the walk to Grapehouse from the station is through a cool area with lots of good food, izakaya, combini and other essentials.
The shared spaces were nicely decorated, clean and a good place to chat and socialise with other travellers.
Host and their pup were very welcoming, friendly and accomodating.
Wish I had another opportunity this trip to stay again.
wow the owner here went above and beyond and was super helpful and kind. everything about my stay was super convenient and easy and I felt so safe and at home! Would definitely recommend.
民宿設備非常齊全，由衣架毛巾，到風筒電發棒，一應俱全，像家一樣舒適。

호스트님께서 정말 친절하시고, 제가 해외 게스트하우스 이용 경험은 처음이라 많이 부족한 점이 많았음에도 편안하게 응대해주셨어요. 정말 감사드립니다!
코엔지역에서 도보로 10분 정도 거리고, 거리가 정말 예쁘게 조성되어 있어서 참 좋았어요!
위생도 편의 시설도 아주 훌륭했습니다💕
덕분에 잘 쉬다 갑니다! 다음에 또 뵐 수 있기를 바라요!

I stayed here during my solo trip and really enjoyed it. It’s in a quiet neighborhood with lots of small shops around so I had fun exploring. The place was extremely clean and host was very accommodating

GrapeHouse is a good place to stay for its cheap price and meeting other travelers. The host Sanae san is very kind and her dog is so cute. The hostel is in Koenji which is known for the thrift stores. Location is convenient, only 2 stops to Shinjuku by Chuo line. Recommend to solo female travelers but if you have a lot of stuff or large suitcases this might not be your best choice as your designated storage place is quite limited.
Good place to meet new people.

가성비가 좋고 jr노선의 고엔지 역이 도보로 10분 정도이고 신고엔지 역으로 한 17~20분 정도라 좋습니다.
고엔지에서 지내기에도 좋고 신주쿠 가기도 편합니다.
호스트도 친절하고 같이 지내는 분들의 매너가 좋고, 지내는 것에 불편함이 없습니다.
혹시 몰라 팁을 드리자면
수건은 1일 1장이 제공되며 12시까지 샤워실을 이용할 수 있습니다.
근처 대중목욕탕을 이용할 수 있는데 1시 반까지 영업하니깐 참고하세요~!
きれいで、静かでした！
清掃が行き届いていてとても快適でした。チェックインまでにこちらの要領が悪く連絡をお待たせしてしまいましたが、親切ご丁寧に応答してくださいました。また利用させていただきたいと思っています。
너무 친절하세요. 숙소는 저렴한 가격에 혼자 묶기에 딱 좋습니다. 동네도 조용해서 좋아요

Absolutely loved my stay here! Sleeping the first night was a bit rough, but once I got comfortable it was an absolutely amazing stay. I loved Rin-chan, the people I met and the feel. Great experience for my firs hostel!

Grapehouse is really a special place. There are only 10(?) I believe dorm beds and 1 private room so it is a small guesthouse where you get to know all of the people staying there. Everything is so clean and comfortable. Our host was so wonderful and sweet, always there for us. The location is in Koenji, a cool neighborhood full of young people. It is not so touristy and a bit more quiet, but easy access to the city center, especially Shinjuku/Shibuya area. I stayed one week and I could’ve stayed much longer.

첫 게하였는데 정말 가족같았어요
따스한 주인분과 직원분들, 또 다른 손님들과도 또래고 다들 여자라서 대화하기 편하고, 서로 편해질 수 있게 소개도 시켜주시구요.
정말 잊지못할 소중한 추억이에요
도쿄에 온다면 몇박은 꼭 하고 갈 거 같아요
추천해요
침구류도 다 깨끗하고 화장실 샤워실도 깨끗해요
超级多来自世界各地的女性，大家都聊得很开心。喜欢认识新朋友的人适合住这里。host人也很好哦，我和法国女生看みこし，想和天狗拍照，host帮我们去问工作人员，最后拍到了很帅的天狗。

For me the biggest selling point of Grapehouse is the location. I absolutely adored Koenji. The atmosphere there is perfect. There’s always somebody busking outside the station in the evening, there are people wandering through the streets until late, all feels really safe and just a great vibe. I have to say when I first arrived at Grapehouse I was worried there was very little atmosphere, it’s very quiet, not really the place to stay if you want party/backpacker vibes, a lot of the girls staying there were working/studying/looking for work rather than travelling for fun but once I got chatting to them they were all friendly and the atmosphere was nice. All clean and has all facilities you’d want. Although you’re not meant to use the showers between 10am and 4pm which can be a problem when you come in from a few hours of sightseeing in the middle of Japanese summer!

Great introduction to Tokyo! Hosts are friendly and do their best to be helpful in finding local recommendations for food, events etc.
The space itself is very clean and well-organized and so it encourages the other guests to maintain it’s good condition. Would definitely recommend as a great, friendly spot to explore Tokyo by
ケスハは皆は優しくて、時々一緒におしゃべりして、楽しかったです。近くいい店が多めにあって、銭湯もありまして、とてもいい場所です。この三日は楽しかったです。

商店街を抜けてすぐのところだったので、周辺はとても静かでした。
ベッドが狭いかと心配がありましたが、身長165cmの私でも手を伸ばして伸びが出来るくらいの長さがありました。
共有部も宿場者同士でそれぞれお互いの配慮があり、使用することができました。
三日間の滞在は、とても満足しています。
また高円寺に遊びに行った際には、泊まらせていただけたら嬉しいです。
よろしくお願い致します♡

高円寺が大好きになりました！
また、よろしくお願いします( ＾ω＾ )
高円寺站北出口出来后可以选择穿过纯情商店街，也可以走边上的大路。商店街这边有个汤屋，很舒服！房东人挺好的，沟通也很顺畅，房子卫生不错，床也挺舒服的，总之一个人来旅游的时候是可以选择这边住的，性价比不错～
Enjoyable stay in this nice guesthouse! Good and quiet location :)
너무 좋았어요!!
Great trip! Thank you
Im really love this homestay. The host was very friendly and kind. I met many friends come from many countries and they were so good. Highly recommended for your future stay.
Nice house with a enjoyable living area, I had a great stay!

Highly recommended. The host is very nice. I loved the food that she cooked. The place is clean. Peaceful surroundings. A perfect accommodation for solo travelers. Meeting and having a new friend after staying there is a bonus. Everyone is nice. I’m gonna go back again. どうもありがとうございます。ホストの努力を高く評価しました。
주거지역이라 조용했고 근처에 강변 조깅 스팟이 있어 좋았습니다.

게스트 하우스는 나이 들면서 이용을 잘 하지 않게 되었는데 여성 전용이고, 공용공간이 아늑해보여서 선택했습니다. 공용 공간에서 편하게 지내다가 잘 때 침실로 들어가면 되고 또 신발 신고 다니는 다른 게스트 하우스에 비해 훨씬 집같다는 느낌도 들고요. 실제로 단독 주택이기도 하지만요 ㅎㅎ 강아지가 있는데 하루밖에 못봐서 그건 아쉬웠어요 너무 귀여운 애교쟁이 린쨩.. 또 만나러 가고싶습니다. 코엔지가 잘 알려진 관광지는 아닌데 신주쿠와 매우 가깝고 바로 옆 역인 나카노에서 하네다 공항 리무진도 있고, 바로 앞에 상점가가 있어서 관광하시고 돌아오셔서 가볍게 한잔 하러 나가시기에도 좋겠습니다.
전체적으로 청결하고 매일 10시에 청소하러 오시는 분도 굉장히 친절하셔요. 제가 만난 직원분들 다 친절하셨음.
무엇보다 여성 전용이라 모두들 편안하게 지내는 느낌. 옷갈아입는 건 물론이고 처음 보지만 서로서로 배려하고 도우면서 지냈어요!
소리에 예민하신 분은 귀마개만 하나 챙기시면 될 거 같습니다. 저는 또 갈 거 같아요!
주방을 쓸 수 있어서 너무 좋았습니다 위치도 좋고 또 가고싶어요

숙소 규칙이 잘 잡혀있고, 사소한 부분까지 서셈하게 준비되어 있어요. 춥게 잘까 걱정했는데 침구가 숙면을 취하기 좋았고 깔끔했습니다.
호스트님이 너무나 친절하셨고
숙소 위치도 신주쿠,시부야와 그리 멀지 않아 이동이 불편하지 않았어요 !
다음에 도쿄 방문할 때 또 이용할 생각입니당😀😀

It was a very welcoming and calm hostel. The hostel was clean and all the guests very respectful. Lovely location with plenty of food and vintage shopping. Easy to get around :) I really enjoyed my stay

Sanae-san the host was great, she spoke some english and was very accommodating. watch out for when the cafe opens at the front of the house, the lunch was cheap, healthy and tasty.
Rin-chan the poodle was very very cute.
Nicole was the volunteer and she was great too, we became friends! she helped me a lot, we went drinking at an Okinawa restaurant and even walked me to the station when I left.
좋았어요

숙소도 깨끗하고 사장밈도 엄청 친절하시고 너무 좋아요
코엔지주변에 소품샵이랑 빈티지샵 못 간게 좀 아쉽지만 동네도 너무 좋은거같아요!!!

This is my 2nd time staying at Grapehouse Koenji and its truely one of the best womens hostels there is in Tokyo. It is clean, friendly, and most important to me safe. I highly reccommend for solo travelers. Grapehouse Koenji does have 1 twin private room for those looking for a little more personal space that is separate from the shared sleeping area.

너무 좋았어요~
사나에상도 쵸상도 너무 친절하고 따뜻하신 분들이에요!
강아지 린쨩도 엄청 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ
깨끗하고 편하고 코엔지역도 가깝고…
체크아웃 후에 짐 보관도 가능하고 너무너무 좋았습니다

Fantastic stay, super clean! This was my first time staying in a hostel and it was great. Felt really safe and grateful for a female only space while travelling solo. All the ladies were nice and the place is suuuper clean! Lots of nice amenities and the bedroom is soundproof from the living room. Easy check in. I was very impressed overall. The baby poodle is so cute too 🥹
There are also electric scooters for hire right outside the hostel which is super handy.
Perfect location in Koenji, I would definitely stay again.
Very welcoming host. Kind. Responsive and friendly.
非常溫馨的住處，在這裏可以和來自不同地方的人交談。周圍有一些好吃的餐廳，還有vintage店可以逛。房東太太非常的親切！一切都很好，不過建議入睡困難的人最好要配戴一下耳塞。
그레이프하우스에서 3박을 보냈는데 전체적으로 게스트 분들이 다 친절하셨고! 특히 호스트 분은 정말로 친절하셨습니다 ..

Host was really nice and polite. She also has a dog who is really cute but barks at times.
Shower area is locked from 12-5am.
The area also has lots of food to explore.
Great choice.
What a wonderful stay! I had the best experience at this hostel! Made friends, enjoyed the neighborhood, it's just the best and can't recommend it enough!

Adorei o ambiente por ser uma casa somente para garotas, me senti muito confortável. Caminha uns 10 minutos da estação até a casa, mas é uma boa oportunidade de conhecer o bairro e de observar a comunidade japonesa. Tem muitos restaurantes e mercadinhos, é seguro e tranquilo. A Host é uma querida muito simpática e adorei o cachorrinho fofo dela. Voltarei com toda certeza! 🇯🇵🥹
도미토리 중에서 최고였습니다

Comfortable and clean. Public spaces were very inviting and I enjoyed talking with the other guests until late in the evening. Kitchen and fridge available to use. Was able to keep luggage after check out.
혼자 묵기에 좋은 도미토리였습니다. 조용한 주택가에 위치해있기 때문에 편안하게 쉴 수 있습니다. 23시 이후에는 소등 및 샤워가 불가하니 밤 늦게 활동하실 분들은 주의하세요. 즐겁게 지내다 갑니다^^
The landlord was very nice and the place was very clean, mattress felt so comfortable and people were respectful. Planning to stay there again when i visit Tokyo next. Highly recommend!

除了公共空間不太適合大行李箱以外，其他都很棒～可以遇到各式各樣國家的人
老闆娘人很溫柔，狗狗也很可愛喔！！
附近的小杉湯也很舒服～
great house
Really great stay! I recommend getting the homemade breakfast! The train isn’t too far away and takes you to Shinjuku so it’s a pretty good location. Local festivals and quiet at night :)
今回は2泊3日させて頂きました。朝食も美味しく、近くに銭湯♨️もあり、仕事の疲れも取れて良かったです。コーヒーやお茶もサービスで飲めたのは嬉しかったです。また9月も行きます。ありがとうございました♪

Es difícil subir las maletas al segundo piso y no hay espacio para poner tus maletas. Pero todo lo demás como limpieza, atención y ubicación muy bien! La dueña es muy amable e intenta ayudarte con todo lo posible. Es una zona muy bonita con michos restaurantes y cafeterías. Hay una tienda de conveniencia en la esquina y el metro esta a 10 minutos caminando. Shinjuku esta a 15 minutos en metro. El baño y las regaderas eran muy cómodas y limpias.
清潔で快適でした！

とても居心地良いハウスです。
泊まってる方々もみんなフレンドリーで、
穏やかでした。
ありがとうございました。
女生Solo trip推薦的住宿~ 房東員工都很友善，お世話になりました~

とても清潔で静かでした。
他のゲストの方も皆さんお互いに配慮しながら滞在されているようで居心地よく過ごせました。
リクエストにも柔軟に対応してくださり、できない事はできないと伝えてくださるのもよかったです。
(滞在されているゲストの方に配慮して夜遅い時間のシャワーや洗濯はできませんが、近くに遅くまでやっている銭湯やコインランドリーを利用できます。)
チェックアウト後の荷物の預かりにも対応いただきありがたかったです。
とても可愛らしくてフレンドリーですが、ワンちゃんがいるので動物が全く苦手な方はご留意された方がいいかもしれません。
朝ごはんがとてもおいしかったです。
また機会があれば是非お世話になりたいと思います。
ありがとうございました。

A wonderful place to stay, esp for women who love solo travel l. Upon arrival, I was welcomed by an adorable little white poodle, and all my fatigue disappeared. ^^ The host helped me carry my luggage to the 2nd floor and she  provided all the essential information I needed to know to about the place ~ the dorm room, kitchen, laundry, shower, and common areas. She addressed my concerns swiftly~  very accommodating! ^^ The location is just perfect ~ lots of local restaurants, boutiques, vintage shops, cafes, and shopping streets. I was able to do outside Tokyo trips with few transfers and no hassle such as Yokohama, Kawagoe, and Mt. Takao.  I highly recommend this place and will stay here again.^^
I loved it. For sure will come back if im ever again in Tokyo. Everything is super clean and they make your stay very easy. ありがとうございました🙏🏼
좋아요조

I had the perfect stay for my first visit to Japan! Koenji is a less touristy area that’s full of vibrant local life! Well connected to the city centre. Lots of vintage shops and izakayas and abundant convenience stores. Evening you need and so much to explore! There are also a few sentos in the neighborhood and I enjoyed the local public bathing experience twice during my visit. The hostel is a perfect place to rest at the end of a busy day, and I met so many friendly people there during my stay. Would absolutely stay here again!
숙소에서 편하게 잘 쉬다가 갑니다. 주인께서 너무 친절하셨고 많이 배려해주셨습니다. 강아지도 너무 귀엽습니다☺️

Sehr sehr nette Gastgeberin. Schöner gemeinschaftsbereich, gemütliche Betten, sehr kommunikative Atmosphäre
Werde die Unterkunft jederzeit weiterempfehlen!
머무는 동안 너무 편안하고 좋았어요! 숙소 근처도 조용합니다. 호스트분이 정말 친절하셨고 강아지가 아주 귀여워요 ♡♡
The best place I stayed during my Japan-trip. So kind hearted people, I always feeled at home and hope to be back soon! I can highly recommend with all my heart!

I am so happy I stayed at Grapehouse Koenji my first trip to Tokyo (nine days)! Sanae has created an amazing place where you feel at home instantely. It's rather a guesthouse than a hostel, meaning that you feel like you are staying in a houseshare where anytime you want to chat, you can talk to someone, but there is also enough privacy and calm to take time for yourself. Everything is furnished cozely and Sanae and her team make sure that the place is always clean. You can also order a tasty Japanese breakfast. The only minor criticism I have would be that the air in the dormitory sometimes gets really stuffy at night, so you might have to talk to the other women there and figure out if the last one to go to bed can leave the door or a window open. Other than that, it's perfect :)
Finally, Koenji is an amazing area! Clean, cozy, authentic, many (vintage) shops and restaurants. I highly recommend Rect Sand Café if you're vegan :) Wander around and fall in love with Koenji :)

Hi girls ! I stayed in Grapehouse for two weeks in November 2024.
I really felt at home there, though I was concerned that I was going to stay in a dormitory having to share the room with other ladies.
The place is safe, clean, warm & cosy, with all the facilities and the location is very convenient. It is within a 10 minute walk from the train station.
The dormitory is located in the Koenji district. It is a very quiet and welcoming place with a lot of residential streets. Once you are on the train from Koenji in 8 minutes you are at Shinjuku, a huge station, with a lot of underground shops and restaurants .
The public bath experience is another story, it was the best one I have ever tried in my life. Everyone should try it.
The convenience stores such as 7-Eleven and Family Mart always have a wide selection of snacks and ready-made food that is all very fresh and delicious. Thank you Sanae-san, who is always there to help. I highly recommend Grapehouse for solo travellers.

宿舍整洁且温馨。
位置距离jr站步行11分钟，距离都营Metro（？）线的最近站台上野站需步行25分钟。所以对于购买了东京xx小时地铁通券的旅客来说会有点小亏。
在这里认识了很多可爱的人！感谢相遇🥹
Excellent location, responsive host, intimate space, and friendly co-guests-- I really enjoyed my stay here and would absolutely consider coming back next time I'm in Tokyo!

大変満足です。
心温まる滞在でした。
お茶の用意や洗濯機など
細かいところに気が配られていました。
ゲスト同士の交流も楽しかったです。
冬には湯たんぽのサービスがあり、
知らずに布団に入ったら
足元が暖かく、感動しました。
予約制ですが朝食も
美味しく、おすすめします。
味わいのある商店街も近く
都心にも便利。
暮らすように旅ができる
また行きたくなる場所でした。
ありがとうございました。
Merci beaucoup pour ce long séjour. Ce fut un plaisir de rester à Grapehouse. J’ai beaucoup aimé l’emplacement du Airbnb ! Koenji est super quartier 😊!

Felt very comfortable and safe in the house, felt like i was being taken care of. Its perfect for solo women traveling, you can meet incredible new people and feel like you are amongst friends.
the host is lovely and super helpful, she makes everything perfect. She would even put warm water bottles at each bed at night, and made the best breakfast. I would come back here any time.

무엇보다 교통이 편리합니다. 숙소를 찾아가기 쉽고 숙소가는 길이 상점, 음식점이 있어서 걸어갈때 심심하지 않아요.가까운 곳에 슈퍼마켓이 있어서 편의점 음식보다는 슈퍼마켓 음식을 사서 먹었습니다. 주변에 먹거리도 많고 특히 저는 목욕탕체험이 재미있었습니다. 4곳중 3곳만 들른것이 좀 아쉅지만 다음 여행의 도쿄숙소도  여기서 머물고 싶습니다. 단점을 꼽자면 아래층이 파티룸이라 머무는 날에 따라 좀 시끄러울수 있다는것, 그리고 2층이 숙소여서 무거운 짐을 올리시는 분은 좀 힘드실수 있어요. 숙소 특성상 여행기간 머무르는 분들이 어떤 분들이냐에 따라 호불호가 갈릴 수 있으며 저는 아주 편하게 지내다 갑니다.
건물이 예뻤어요 여러 나라 사람들이 오시는듯. 다들 친절하셨어요 동네도 예쁘니까 산책하기 좋아요 도보로 나름 ㄱㅊ은 거리에 역 있으니까 나쁘지 않습니다 린쨩이 애교쟁이니 강얼쥐 조아하시는분들은 꼭 가보세용 가까운 거리에 신기한 욕탕도 잇던데 탕을 좋아하시면 거기도 추천합니다
位置很方便，就在高円寺附近，坐电车到新宿只需要6分钟。附近也有很多店，吃饭买衣服也很方便。房间很干净，有足够的空间放行李，因为是冬天，房东还提供了毯子和热水袋，下次来东京还要住这里！
너무 편안하게 잘 지내다 갑니다. 호스트는 친절하고 숙소도 정말 깔끔해요. 루프도 바로 옆에 있어서 자전거 타기도 편했습니다! 다시 도쿄에 온다면 재방문 할게요.
Amazing! I would stay again it was so perfect

I loved my stay at Grapehouse! I really felt like I was joining a family. It was such a homey feeling. The area is great. There are many restaurants and cool vintage shops. It’s close to the train station as well. I would stay there again happily.
很棒的住宿體驗
I agree with all the great reviews. My only complaint was a couple of inconsiderate occupents but that happens and has nothing to do with the bnb.
Amazing 💖

It was fun staying in my old neighbourhood within walking distance of familiar places and new places to explore. I arrived early and was greeted by my host and her friendly dog. The hostel is cozy, comfortable and in a quiet residential area. I looked forward to coming ‘home’ each evening snd meeting other hostellers. My bunk in the dorm was very comfortable. I really enjoyed the traditional Japanese breakfast that I preordered from my host. Highly recommend Grapehouse to visitors.

C’était un peu plus petit que ce qu’il m’apparaissait en photos. Il faut être à l’aise avec la proximité et l’intimité d’un hébergement en dortoir mais pour le reste tout était très bien, propre et comfortable.
附近有超市 但距離旅遊景點有些距離 但附近有很多居酒屋及日常家品超市，屋主亦十分友善。以這個價錢來說，絕對超值

I had a wonderful time here. The dorm is comfy, clean and fully equipped. My roommates are very nice and friendly, and we hang out and chat every day. I’m really glad to stay here and meet my new friends.

El personal amable, disfruté mi estancia.
Cerca hay muchos lugares para comer, estación del Metro a 11 min caminando. Lugar seguro y tranquilo ☺️
Beautiful place and responsive host. It was great meeting the other girls who were also travelling. And the the dog is so cute.🥰

Very nice people, good for finding friends around the world :) Beautiful area in koenji, young people, cute stores and bars, also good for thrifting. Only around 20 minutes to Shinjuku station and peaceful at the same time.

i had such an awesome time at this place. i met the sweetest people, and the host did a lovely job at making me feel at home! very clean space with kind, patient host :) this stay made the start of my solo trip to japan fantastic. also, koenji was beautiful and definitely an underrated part of tokyo!!
房子在热闹的高元寺！周边很多小店！地铁也方便。房子里有榻榻米，大家有时候会在客厅一起办公或者学习。很喜欢榻榻米！房东也很nice！！！
I enjoyed my stay, really cool area as well! Thank you <3
Such a cute stay! And I made a friend living here - great for female solo travelers. The dog was also very cute and the host was very kind!!!

Sanae-san was a delightful host and the accomodation was so amazing I was honestly a bit sad I only spent two days here! The atmosphere was very cheerful and laid-back, the spaces were all kept clean and stocked with anything you may need. I was a bit nervous to sleep in a dorm since I had never done it before but the beds were all very private and had everything i might have needed.
I will surely be back!

I loved staying at Grapehouse. Such a lovely environment, extremely clean and cozy. The neighborhood is also super nice. A bit far from loud Tokyo, but super cool and authentic.
I highly recommend this place.
Thank you very much for the lovely stay! <3
我把这里当成了自己在海外的第二个家。通过这里认识了张阿姨和房东阿姨，还认识了很多其他朋友。在这里我看到了真正的东京生活，也因此喜欢上了东京，期待下次见
非常温暖的一次经历！房东人很好！另外我是来东京看billie的演唱会的，遇到了两位外国的姐姐也是来看她的演唱会的哈哈哈哈超神奇！

Staying at this Airbnb was really great because I got to meet so many people. The girls I stayed with were all so friendly and respectful of the night and early morning quiet hours. The Airbnb was easy to find and the host is friendly! The host and her team clean the Airbnb everyday which I think is really kind and not something you would find in other airbnbs. Only thing to keep in mind is since it’s shared, you have to be conscious of noise you make during the quiet hours but that’s not a negative. My luggage was heavy so it was hard to get things out as the luggage needs to be stored. I recommend this place to someone travelling with light luggage because it will just make things easier for you since the rooms are on the second floor and you have to be able to lift your luggage in and out of the storage area every time you need something (some of the luggage spaces are a little high). Overall great place!

It’s a wonderful stay!
Host is really sweet and caring all of guests.

I really loved my stay at this hostel! It’s clean, the beds where spacious and nice. And the staff is really friendly. The building is pretty old and was restored, which gives it a historic vibe and it even has a cute little garden. The location is also nice. It’s super well connected with a lot of different busses going to everywhere you wanna go. It’s in a quieter part of town, but there are still many restaurants near it.
When I come to Kyoto again, I’m definitely gonna book here again.
性价比超高的民宿！！🥰🥰交通比较便利，出地铁口之后沿着走十分钟左右的路程就能找到，而且高元寺那边一路上也有很多东西逛😀我是来看演唱会顺带玩几天的所以待在里面的时间不多，但是只要我在的时候都能感觉到幸福的氛围..！里面的姐姐和姨姨都十分热情耐心🥰🥰🥰🥰还会给我推荐附近的一些景点等等。希望下次还会再来！！！！！😋
This is a very spacious home that is immaculate. The beds were very comfortable. The host is a joy. We were 10 minutes from the subway. I can't wait to come back. Love LOVE LOVE This house
按房东给的路线，很顺利就找到了。房东的姐姐就住隔壁，很周到。房子很干净。离地铁10分钟。很方便。

Really great host who is extremely helpful and responsive. It was a very relaxing and worry-free stay. The location is great for larger groups or families since there are multiple rooms. It is a more traditional house, but it has the same amenities as many airbnb locations. The JR/train and subway stations are both within a 10-15 minute walk away. Would stay again :)

It' a pleasure, joyfull to stay at takeshi's home. Located at roadside being easy to find, both from navigation map, pass crossing beatiful park with many kind of birds, trees etc. With 2 stories and traditional style tatami room, i feel like being japanese. All we need to stay, washing, cooking, bath, heating devices just like at our own home. My wife n boys like it. Takeshi is very open minded, fast response n trusted person who always assist us anytime. Thanks for being my host, nice to visit again.. recommended place
和朋友一起来日本游玩 第一次租民宿 日本传统小楼 干净整洁 周边环境安静 很方便下 非常推荐的住宿地点 地铁很方便

We loved this house. Everything you will need is there and it's beautiful, clean and very comfortable. It's in a nice quiet area that's about 15 mins (at most) walk to the JR station.
Takeshi is a great host and his communication was excellent. His sister even drove us to the train station the day we left!
Would definitely recommend to anyone who wants a nice, spacious place near Tokyo.

Large, clean house on the east side of Tokyo with plenty of space for the family of 4 we had. Subway was very close (5 min walking) and train station with Shinkansen and direct route to Narita and also walking distance or a very short taxi ride.  Included Pocket WiFi was very helpful in getting around.
おばあちゃんの家に泊まったような感覚でどこか懐かしい雰囲気です。友人と複数名で利用しましたが、すごく快適でした。食器も充実していて料理も楽しめました。ありがとうございました。

If you want a traditional Japanese home, you have found the right place. Takeshi's home is beautiful, clean and everything you need. In a city where you may find yourself in cramped washrooms and bedrooms, it's a relief to find your own 2 floor home.
Takeshi communicated fast and easily to me, which was very helpful in times of need. The home is close to multiple metro stations that are in walking distance. Easy check in and check out
Definitely recommend!!

Takeshi and his family were perfect host.
Helpful and really nice.
We even had the chance to spend a day with Takeshi and dinner with his family.
His sister even offered to drop us off at the metro station after the check-out !
The house is a typical japanese house. We loved our stay.
The weather was good but pretty cold, with the heater it was no problem at all in the main rooms.
2 toilets (a hight tech one and a simple one) were very convenient.
Kitchen has everything you need (but we didn't use it a lot, beside the microwave).
Bathroom is one of the best thing in those japanese house. You press the automatic button and 5-10min later you will have your perfect hot bath to chill (sometimes too hot ^^ we often added a little cold water). Good to know that you need to shower on the little wood stool to enter the bath clean. (everyone is supposed to be able to bath in it on the same day).
And it can feel pretty cold in the bathroom but once you enter the bath it's paradise. And after it, thanks to the hot temperature, I garantee you won't feel cold for some time.
About localisation : it's very close to kinshicho station and nishi-ojima (10min walk) you can reach every part of tokyo easily.
About the price : it will be very difficult to find something of this quality at a cheaper price. So far this is the best we've had.
Thanks again for everything.
ベットが沢山あって良い

很好的房东！
正好是樱花季去的，房子走出去步行5分钟就有公园，是日本人带孩子玩的公园，里面的樱花开得超级美，绝对不亚于热门景点，带着娃在这里看樱花，舒适！
很适合慢生活的房子！
房子很好，纯日式，房间也多，不过2楼的房间建议装窗帘，好亮～
明年来，绝对入住！

The traditional house was good, my 5 year old had great fun with the dividing doors to the rooms.
The beds were comfortable, the wifi worked, the water was hot.
The area was as busy as most in Tokyo, and we used this as an in between place from Disney to Tokyo station. It does feel a little farther out than the other places we stayed at, its about 15 minutes from a station, but we enjoyed our time here and the host was quick to respond and friendly.
很安静的住宅区，离地铁站还是有点距离
Go to this place! This is a cool place in a great location.
房子很乾淨，獨棟兩層樓住起來很有生活感。房東非常貼心很多東西都準備了，設施也非常齊全。交通蠻方便的，有機會想再去住一次！

這幾天，就像是住在多啦a夢的家一樣，非常乾淨舒適與方便自在
附近有超市、百元商店(超市上方)、與車站(西大島最近)、餐館、古本市場(很多便宜的動漫周邊商品的店)，也有好吃的印度料理店(在超市斜對面)
ps超市開到十點，在九點以後，食物會開始打折
退房時，屋主的姐姐還特別送我們到車站，非常貼心，感謝
下次在造訪東京時，這屋子將是我們的首選
真的是一個很棒的住宿經驗~

Amazing house located in the residential area. Takeshi was an amazing host and took us out when we first got there to show us around and give local tips. House was really cool traditional style house with two floors, plenty of space. I stayed both upstairs and downstairs (plenty of bedding provided to sleep comfortably on the floor). I did notice when not using my ear plugs that there was some late night / early activity from location next door as I believe this was some kinda of business. About a 5-10 min walk from a few train lines and two stops from akihabara which was nice. Overall, great experience staying here and Japan is amazing! Would return to
This Airbnb... thanks takeshi !
Takeshi is such a nice guest, the house is just perfect, clean, well furnished and located. Highly recommended

Nos encontramos una muy linda casa, tal cual describe el sitio. Tiene todo lo necesario para estar varios dias y tener una verdadera experiencia japonesa. Agua caliente siempre ok, los aires acondiconados ok,  secador de pelo ok, cocina completa con TODO los utensilios. La amabilidad de Takeshi y su hermana que nos llevaron en una oportunidad hasta Asakusa y luego al finalizar la estadia hasta la estacion de JR. Lo recomendamos totalmente para familia o grupo de personas.

Takeshi was organized and a great communicator. There were three of us staying at the house. The house was ready and waiting for us at checkin. It had a nice traditional feel, but with lots of space. Takeshi stopped by to say hi and check on us. We had plenty of space upstairs, we barely used the downstairs other than showering and getting ready in the morning, but there were two extra rooms. It's an easy 12-15 min walk to the JR station and a couple convenience stores on the way that were helpful for picking up snacks, water and a rain jacket when you realize you didn't pack well enough. 😉
大変お世話になりました。凄く楽しく過ごせました！夜は少しうるさくしてしまい申し訳ありません！最後も送っていただきありがとうございました！
ホストの方の対応も素早く優しく、急なお願いにも応じていただき、本当に楽しい時間を過ごすことができました！ 感謝しています。

Takeshi's place is a lovely traditional Japanese home. The house is co-hosted by Takeshi's sister-in-law Reiko and her husband Yuki, who live next door and provide a warm welcome. The house is two-story with 3 bedrooms upstairs and 2 living rooms, a kitchen, and a bathroom downstairs. There are two toilets also. The bathroom has a deep square stainless steel bath, which is daunting to look at, but lovely to relax in. The living areas are tatami rooms with plenty of room to relax.
The house is about 10-15 mins walk from Kinshicho Station on the JR Sobu line. There are plenty of restaurants and shops around the station area. The house itself is in mixed residential and commercial district. It can be quite noisy, especially at night. If you are used to noise, this will be fine, but if not, be prepared.
The house has all you need to enjoy a few days exploring Tokyo.
The Hanzomon subway line also runs from Kinshicho station and it is one stop to Oshiage Station - The Tokyo Skytree. This is well worth visiting. If you enjoy walking, you could walk there in under an hour. On the JR Sobu line it is 3 stops to Akihabara, the technology hub of Tokyo and from where you can travel elsewhere

This is a great traditional-feel house, with some lovely decorative touches. We were originally a bit concerned with the location but there are 4 stations within 5-15 minutes walk, making access to the centre extremely quick, but staying in a quieter district. There was also plenty in the area to entertain us.
Takeshi is very hospitable. We’re happy during the stay. Have a great memory there;) Everywhere’s clean.Recommend.
非常乾淨整潔的私人房屋，物品齊全
房东非常热情，房间非常干净
Clean, spacious and comfortable house. Choice of metro stations. Close to large park for the kids.
房东热情好客，房间很宽敞，特别干净、舒适。适合一大家子人住宿。
房东很热情，非常好的房子，就是比较偏僻，房子比较难找，离铁路远

호스트분들이 정말 많이 친절하셔요.
그리고 방이 많아서 대가족이신분들이 오시면 좋겠더라구요.
1층에 방2개(하나는 티비보는 거실겸용)2층에 침대방3개 화장실도 2개더라구요. 그외에 뭐 필요한물품도 에어비앤비에 설명되어있는대로 다 구비되어있구요. 게스트들 편의를 많이 신경쓴 티가 나더라구요.
추천해요~

An amazing home and not too far from the subway stations. It was great being able to take a break every night away from the crowds and in a roomy home with plenty of space. The hosts were extremely kind and helpful, going over the appliances and rules during check in to make sure you're comfortable operating everything ahead of time.
There are convenient stores right down the road as well so it's not too remote. The beds are comfy and bathroom was spacious. Just keep in mind that hot water is only for the kitchen sink and bathroom. The other sinks are cold water only which might be off putting in the cold weather. That being said, there are 3 sinks in the house so hard to complain about that.
I would highly recommend staying here if you want to experience a more traditional, suburban style of living.
언어가 통하지 않아도 번역기 어플이나 영어로 대화하려고 노력해주십니다. 지속적으로 신경써주시고 시설도 매우 좋습니다.
Big thanks to Takeshi and his family for the great experience and meeting such nice people.

A great place for a group of people staying in Tokyo for a couple days. Hosts were very welcoming and were quick to respond to requests.
10/10 would do tatami again.

We stayed at Takeshi’s place on the tail end of our trip to Japan. We had a wonderful stay. The house was well tended to, the heaters work well to keep the upstairs and downstairs warm during the cold months, and the hosts were very helpful and attentive. They made sure when we were checking out that we were headed to the right train station to get back to Narita airport, and even gave us a ride to the train. A note for those traveling with children: the house is in between two train stations so it’s a bit of a trek to get there if you’re walking with suitcases after a long day of travel. Definitely hail a cab if you can, and grab groceries or food on your way there. There aren’t a lot of restaurants directly around the house, but we found a really good yakiniku restaurant serving marinated grilled meats south east a couple blocks tucked into an alleyway past Sotu restaurant, and if you walk east towards Kameido station there are more food options.
真的是很棒的房子，房東真的很熱情，跟一般的住宿不一樣，感受到十足人情味！
A very nice traditional home, quite central and easy to get to. Comfortable and roomy. Snacks when you arrive and we got a ride to the train station when we left. Highly recommended

Spacious and conveniently located near the centre of Tokyo. Lots of restaurants and shops near Kinshicho station.
Nice touches included welcome snacks, tea/coffee, Wi-Fi dongle and a lift to the station at the end of the trip.
Spacious house and near kinshicho station.  Host also left some snacks and tea for us to have. Toothbrushes and basic amenities also provided. A nice stay!

Takeshi的房源CP值很高，此次我們三人入住，覺得空間相當大，若行李不多，住5、6個人完全沒問題。房源離都心較遠，不過從最近的西大島車站（步行約10分鐘）搭乘新宿線，可以直達千鳥之淵、神保町、新宿等大點，相當方便。房東本人不住日本，但他的家人就住隔壁，幾乎隨傳隨到，我們對洗衣機操作有疑問，發了訊息給房東，請他家人有空過來幫我們看看，結果房東的姐夫（妹婿？）在我們傳出訊息的下一刻就來敲門了，當時是深夜12:00，真的很感動！他們甚至配合我們飛機的時間，分兩批送我們到車站。
廚房設備堪稱完善，但熱水管線似乎有問題，只有浴室有熱水，在寒冷的季節，廚房沒有熱水，感覺稍微不便。此外沒有西式餐桌椅，只有和室中的長桌，對於老人家或膝蓋不好、不耐盤腿的人來說是個挑戰。但房東人非常好，在我們提出要求後，就提供了三個摺疊椅以及一個簡式小餐桌。總之，是個很值得推薦的房源！
Takeshi, Yuki & Reika are amazing! The house is spacious and very cosy to stay in. Hospitality is also 10/10. Highly recommended.

This is a fantastic, basic, traditional house in a great area. The house had everything we needed and was well supplied with towels, toiletries etc. The shower looked basic but was particularly good!
The area turned out to be ideal for us. The nearby park was beautiful with cherry blossom and, if you have kids, it has a great play area. Kinshicho is very well connected too - we were able to get a direct bus to Odaiba, a direct train to Kamakura and to most other places in the city very easily.
The hosts were lovely and couldn't do enough for us. Would happily recommend.
地理位置很方便，10分钟步行到地铁站，房内很整洁，传统日式客厅让我感到很温馨，房东很热情，离房时还有送车服务。住宿很棒，下次有机会还会来。

We really had a great time here! The hosts were extremely friendly people and even offered to drive us to the nearest station at 6:30 in the morning so we could get to the airport. The appartment was very spacious, clean and nice. There where welcome snacks and drinks and information material about the neighbourhood. There is a nice park a few hundred meters away, you can see the cherry blossoms from outside the appartment. Convenience store, restaurants and the next station are a few minutes by foot. Tokyo SkyTree is also not far away. Communication with the hosts was great and quick. We had a wonderful time in Tokyo! Thank you :)

Great traditional Japanese home within a 15-20 minute walk of a number of stations . We caught a direct train from Narita at 2000pm to Kinschiko Station and walked to Takeshis’ home and found it fairly easy using his sent instructions and google maps. House had everything you needed for a comfortable stay . Yuki was a great caring host and Takeshis communication excellent . Only downside as mentioned in other reviews is when the seafood supplier next door gets a delivery/pick up in the early morning hours which happened 3 times in our 9 night stay .
Definitely great value for money and would recommend this home to all .

Takeshi's house is located in a residential, quiet and authentic area.
The house is clean, nice and you feel at home immediately. Also Takeshi and her sister are very sympathetic and helpful. We strongly recommend!

It was such a great place to stay! The house looked nice in the pictures and it was even more beautiful in person! The area was nice and quiet and easy to navigate, the subway was a ten minute walk past a park full of flowers, and there was a convenience store close by for easy snacks! We wanted to be close enough to Shibuya and other key locations while also staying in a quieter residential area, and this place totally fit the bill.
We loved the house, and we were also blown away by the hospitality of our host. The house was stocked with coffee and little snacks, and we were even offered a ride to the station after check out which was especially nice since it was raining all that morning!
It was an overall fantastic experience, and I cannot recommend this home enough!

My family and I enjoyed staying at Takeshi’s home. Just 3 stops away from Tokyo station but a world away in a quiet residential area, a brisk 10 minute walk from the JR Kinshichō Station. There is also a direct train to Narita airport from this station. The house was clean, spacious and amenities were great, especially the laundry and cooking facilities. What made our stay extra special were the little added touches such as bathroom toiletries including hair ties, cotton wipes etc, a stash of coffee and snacks to get us started, and the drop off to the station by Yuki on our departure. Thank you Takeshi and Yuki for making our Tokyo stay so comfortable.
Great host, went above and beyond.
Great choice to spend your day in Japan!

Takeshi was an amazing host that was very accommodating. They were able to greet us at the door and show us how all the amenities worked. Kokoro house was very spacious and more than enough for a party of 5. I would highly recommend this space for those who would not mind the extra bit of walking to a nearby subway station (7-12 mins). On the day we left, the host was kind enough to make two separate trips to drive us to a nearby subway station due to the rainy weather. Would stay here again!
Amazing hospitality and a wonderful home!! We had a great time staying here and will absolutely be back if we are ever in the area again! Thank you!
Family trip can stay this kind of Japanese style house. It’s very nice

It was a pleasure staying at Takeshi-san’s place. My family of 3 really enjoyed the cozy, traditional Japanese house. The hosts were very kind and prepared free snacks and drinks, tips for the local area, and even drove us to the nearest station, which was great for us since we had three pieces of luggage. Thank you very much— we will definitely stay again!

가장 가까운 니시오지마(신주쿠선)역에서 도보로 5분정도 떨어져 있습니다. 3분거리에 편의점도 있고, 조용한 동네입니다. 일본식 가정집이라 더 특색 있었고,  1,2층에 각각 화장실도 있어서 더 편했습니다. 2층으로 올라가는 계단이 조금 가파르니 참고하세요. 부모님 모시고 간거라 집에서 밥을 해먹었는데 식기도 넉넉했구요. 기본적인 샤워용품 뿐만 아니라, 클렌징 오일, 폼클렌징,머리고무줄, 면봉, 가글, 면도기 등등 호스트의 세심한 준비가 인상적인 숙소였습니다.  아! 휴대용 포켓와이파이도 있어요^^ 호스트분이 바로 옆에 사시는거 같았는데 엄청 친절하셨어요. 마지막 날에는 저희 짐이 많다고 긴시쵸역까지 차로 데려다 주시기도 했어요^^ 참고로 긴시쵸역 근처가 작은 코리아타운이라고 하네요~ 기회가 되면 또 가고 싶은 숙소입니다~

Cozy Japanese style house though slightly far to walk from the nearest station, especially with luggage. One of the rooms does not have air conditioning though but the weather was quite ok which we stayed there so it's not so bad. The stairs to the second floor are rather steep so will have to be careful with the luggage, and for travelers with very young children or older folks.

What you see is what you get. The space is nice and open, and very traditional. Thin sliding doors separate the rooms, but they are more than enough for privacy. The property is a bit far from the train station, but is quiet, and perfect for slowing down in Tokyo. The hosts were very accommodating of us arriving late, and had a positive attitude throughout.
Takeshi and Yuki were kind and thoughtful hosts and their home was comfortable and beautiful.  We really enjoyed our time here...highly recommend a stay here!
Takeshi è un host gentile disponibile e super accorto , la casa è in un quartiere residenziale non lontano dalla metro.. grazie per averci accompagnato alla stazione con i bagagli . Consiglio

Kokoro House is a rare find in a rapidly changing pocket of eastern Tokyo, where a few blocks of single-family homes persist amid the condos and gleaming office buildings. A good choice for travelers who want to experience tatami living and who could enjoy exploring residential alleyways where neighborhood life is thriving. The hosts are super helpful, friendly, and responsive.
It was a nice place. It had enough space for 5 people

This is a wonderful place to stay in Tokyo.  The house is within walking distance from a train station, the neighborhood is great (near a large park and river), and the host is very prompt with communication and helpful with any additional questions or needs.  The complimentary coffee and snacks provided to guest was a nice touch!  The ride to the train station on the last day was unexpected and very, very appreciated.

Takeshi and his sister were very friendly and help us to plan our visit in Tokyo and gave us usefull information to see 2 amazing fireworks in Tokyo. The house is in a quite area a little bit far from the train station but well connected to main Tokyo's area.
We highly recommend their traditionnal japanese house that is perfect for a family of 5/6 person

House is  very clean, spacious especially if traveling with larger group, kitchen fully equipped so could cook at home, washing machine, AC in main rooms which was nice after exploring in the humid Tokyo summer, easy communication with owner. Walking distance (10 min) to subways, stores and shopping. Co-host was friendly, but didn’t speak a lot of English so it took a little while to communicate. She drove us to get a taxi on our last day which was very thoughtful.
Nice location and Takeshi is very helpful for anything you need to know in house and personally meets you for check-in.

Really enjoyed the stay with our 4 kids. Great house, traditional Japanese style, quit neighbourhood, great hospitality from the landlord.
Would always come back again. Public transport with many options, yet always a 10 min walk - we enjoyed it.
If you want to get to know Tokyo from a more traditional perspective, yet close to the city - perfect match!
Christian

Great facilities and a wonderful location with a very good array of transport options and local amenities. A very comfortable place to stay in a great neighbourhood. The pocket wi-fi was a real (and unexpected) bonus!
Great location with easy access to Disneyland and central train lines making travel with our JR pass easy.
离地铁站有10分钟的路程，还算方便。房东人很好，同行的阿姨一直夸他帅，哈哈哈哈哈，就是沟通稍微有点障碍，毕竟日本宝宝好像英文口音有点重，也不太说英文。
This is one of the best places I've stayed at! Beautiful house in a great location for exploring Tokyo. Very spacious with a great shower and large living areas. Fabulous and helpful host too!

Takeshi's house is a lovely traditional style home, close to train stations which will get you into Tokyo. Takeshi was aslo very kind to give our group and luggage a ride to the station when we checked out. Thanks so much for lettings us stay.
A large house, very nice, plenty of space for a large group. A short walk to 2 useful JR stations, with a lot of local food options. Nice walk up the river pretty much directly to sky tree.

A lovely traditional Japanese styled property which is spacious, clean and conveniently located for trips around the city. Co-hosts were welcoming and communicated well during our stay. Thanks Takeshi for letting us stay in your home.

The Kokoro house was spacious and perfect for our stay in Tokyo - a little further out of the centre gave us a quiet few days, but still easy to travel around with a trains station near by. During our stay typhoon hagibis hit Tokyo, Takeshi and his family made sure the house was safe and that we were prepared for the typhoon.

This is a great facility for guests needing space which is rare in Tokyo. Four separate bedrooms three with beds and one a futon. Takeyesu found three chairs as we are a bit rusty in the joints to sit on the floor.. It's a traditional style house with thin walls and sliding doors.. Kitchen is reasonably supplied with microwave and two burner cooker toaster and kettle. Adequate for cooking bacon and eggs but not a three course meal. Traditional bathroom and toilets upstairs and downstairs. Takeyesu lives in Canada but responds promptly. 15 minutes wa

The house is located close to multiple food places, multiple stations, multiple shops, it's basically in almost the perfect location.
In the house, everything important that's in Japanese is labeled in English, the hosts explained everything and demonstrated everything.
We can't fault the place for anything as basically it was everything we wanted and as advertised. We stayed there for 2 weeks and didn't have a need to contact the hosts, since everything was good.
If we go to Tokyo again again (3 people, we wanted individual rooms), we'll likely try to book the place again.

Our stay at Takeshi's home was wonderful. Our checkin was easy as was our check out. Her sister and brother offered to drive us to the local subway station to make our departure easier. Thank you all for your hospitality!
Great hosts ! We enjoyed our stay.
Good house with a great location, easy to get into the city from the train and lots of food places nearby
Easy check in and great house. Close to public transport, short hop into the main city.
Exactly as told on the listing, great choice if you want a space just for your group and yourself.
Everything was great! Communicating with Takeshi and the co-hosts was easy and they showed us a variety of places that we could eat at during our stay.

This is a nice house with lots of space. The kitchen is a little lacking in bench space for cooking. There was some neighbourhood noise but we all slept OK. The front upstairs bedroom could do with some darker window coverings to exclude light from outside at night-time
超级漂亮又舒适的房子，在安静的居民区，适合大家庭出行。传统的日式房间，煮饭的餐具充足，距离便利店很近。离地铁锦系町站大约1.2km，如果冬天步行稍微有点远。周边也有很多餐厅，锦系町站有好几个商场。交通便利，离东京站，浅草寺，晴空塔，秋叶原都是几站地铁的距离，去新宿原宿也很方便。
非常棒的民宿，两层楼，二楼有三个房间，一楼有一个房间，两个厕所，一个浴室，设施齐备。我家两个小朋友楼上楼下，榻榻米房间里玩得开心极了！周围都是民居，非常安静，也有小居酒屋，便利店很多，很方便。Yuki非常好，最后一天还开车送我们到JR锦丝町站，太贴心了！

Great place to have a more traditional experience in Tokyo. It's close to three stations (JR and Metro), including the big centre of Kinshicho, and we were able to get around Tokyo easily. Just allow 10-15 mins to walk to a station.
I was most impressed with the hospitality of the owner and family. They even took us to the station, to get to the airport on our last day with a tonne of luggage. They responded quickly to questions, in English, both before we arrived and once we were there.
It was very comfortable for 3 people (two adults and teenager) and had everything we needed. Sure, we're missing our pillows and beds but, in comparison to other places we've stayed in Japan, they were the best so far.

とても清潔な空間で、心地よく快適に泊まらせていただきました。
昔、祖父母宅に泊まったような懐かしい気持ちになりました。
こちらの融通にも親切に対応していただき感謝しております。
ホスピタリティに溢れるホストの方々で、とても快適に過ごすことができました。帰省できなかった実家を彷彿させる温かみのある家で満足です！
気持ちよく宿泊できました。

This house was ideal for our stay in Tokyo, and the hosts really went above and beyond in helping us enjoy our stay (lift to the train station, minding our luggage on the last day, English instructions for using things in the house, snacks, etc.)
About an 11 minute walk from a main subway station, from which you can get anywhere. The house is near a park in a quiet and safe neighborhood. Plenty of food options nearby + convenience stores. The house itself is lovely.
Would highly recommend!
The hosts were both amazing, out of all the BnBs I’ve stayed in. This is at the top of my list! Super nice and amazing hospitality.
Great location! Suki and Takeshi were very sweet, picked us up from station and dropped us off. Always answering on time. Would stay there again in a heart beat!!
역과 가까워 도보로 이동하기 편리하였고 호스트가 친절합니다 일본식 가정집에서의 여행 경험을 원하는 분들께 추천드려요!

I can feel real japan residence life.
Next to this house there is river which you can exercise morning time.
Quite and fun to stay.
A bit far away from subway station but good to exercise.
Mr yuki and takeshi communicate well all the time.
Mr yuki drive us to station when we do check out.
Thank you again and hope to see you again.

We absolutely loved this home! It was great to get a more laid-back experience here and we were within a 10 min walk from a few subway stations. Our host, Yuuki, was incredibly friendly and showed great hospitality during our stay!

일본식 전통 가옥느낌의 숙소입니다. 2층 주택을 모두 빌려 묵을 수 있어 좋았습니다.
무엇보다 호스트가 친절하시고 호스트와의 소통이 아주 좋았습니다. 가족단위의 여행에서 아주 좋은 선택이 될 것 같습니다.
這是一個很好的旅程，房屋是全幢日式風格，讓我們好好體會這一趟日本之旅，屋主Takeshi非常友善及回覆快速，幫我解決了很多問題，謝謝Takeshi，有機會一定會再回來，誠意推介大家非常適合一班朋友或家庭居住，享受一下日本和式風格的房屋，謝謝

The place was cozy and calm.
We enjoyed our family time.
And Takeshi was so kind.
I will stay here again if I visit tokyo in the future.

Thank you Yuuki-san for the great hospitality. The amenities and treats found in the house are plentiful, everything is well thought through by our host. I would certainlystrongly recommend this place to my friends if they were to head over to Tokyo and wanted to try out a traditional Japanese home stay.
숙소는 난방시설이 잘 갖춰져 있어 금방 따뜻해졌고 생각지도 못한 용품들이 구비가 되어있어서 놀랐습니다:).늦은 시간에 체크인을 했지만 정말 친절하게 숙소에 대한 설명과 안내를 해주시고 마지막 날에도 가까운 역까지 차로 배웅해주셨습니다.다음에 일본에 온다면 다시한번 방문할 생각입니다:)

호스트님 께서 너무너무 친절하게 설명해주셨다. 숙소가 너무 깨끗하고 예뻤다!!
감사합니다

An absolutely lovely staying experience. The home was very tidy and full of very handy amenities, even going above and beyond; providing us with maps and english translations of instructions to use the appliances. The location was a very peaceful one, and very walkable for the train stations and convenience stores. Major compliments to the hosts as well! They were very quick to respond to any questions we had and even offered to help our group with transportation solutions and even helped us move our luggage. Would absolutely stay here again if I ever came back to Japan(fingers crossed)!
호스트가 매우 친절하고 편하게 휴식을 취할 수 있는 공간이었습니다

I had one of the best airbnb experiences at this place. The brothers-host Takeshi and Yuuki San are super friendly and down to earth.
Our flight arrived HND airport at 1am. By the time we got to kokoro house it was about 2:30am, but both Takeshi San and Yuuki San still gave us a super warming welcome.
This place is historical, beautiful, super clean, cozy, and well-taken care. It’s not a high-end, modern hotel, but it’s something beyond that. (Actually all the appliances are really new and functioning really well)
Commute is great too. It’s about 10 mins walk to subway station. Not super close but not bad, considering how much Japanese walk daily. And you get to explore the lovely neighborhoods. It’s quiet, peaceful and full of surprises.
On the last day the host gave us (5ppl) a lift to the closest station, saving us a lot of time.
If you want to experience traditional Japanese culture and dive into what Japanese lifestyle really is. This is the place you should stay.

조금 이른시간에 도착했는데 이른 체크인을 도와주셨습니다. 숙소 앞에 나와서 기다리고 계셨고 영어를 너무 유창하게 잘 하셔서 의사소통에 문제가 없었습니다. 모든 가전의 사용법을 자세히 알려 주셨고 근처 이자카야, 맛집, 편의점, 마트에 관한 정보도 알려주셨습니다. 그리고 체크아웃날엔 근처 역까지 차로 데려다 주셨습니다. 에어비앤비를 여러번 사용해 봤지만 이정도로 친절하고 의사소통도 잘 되는 호스트는 처음이었습니다. 물론 숙소 자체도 아주 이쁘고 안락했습니다. 방마다 히터가 있어 춥지않았고 건조하면 젖은 수건을 걸어두면 될 듯 합니다. 다음에 또 오고싶은 숙소네요 호스트분의 친절함에 감사합니다.
항상 신속하게 답변해주셨고 체크인 때도 너무 친절하게 자세히 잘 설명해주셨어요! 마지막 체크아웃 때도 역까지 직접 차로 데려다주시고 길도 잘 알려주셔서 너무너무 좋았습니다. 덕분에 도쿄에서 재밌는 시간 보내고왔어요!☺️
정말 친절하시고 넓고 흠 잡을곳 없는 숙소였습니다 체크인 시간도 조정 부탁드리니 흔쾌히 조절해주시고 체크아웃시에도 가까운 역까지 짐과 함께 편하게 이동할 수 있도록 차로 이동해주셨습니다 그리고 동네가 정말 한적하고 깔끔해서 여유로운 분위기를 좋아하시는 분들에게 정말 추천드리는 숙소입니다

We had a comfortable stay and truly appreciate all the amenities from washer/dryer, toiletries and snacks. Also appreciate all the local recommendations and allowing us to store our luggage since our flight was in the evening.

This was a wonderful place to stay. spacious, clean, and well organized, it is within easy walking distance of several train stations.  Takeshi was a wonderful host and even gave us a ride to the station with our luggage after we checked out! I hope we can stay here again.

１歳児連れ x ２家族の計６名でお泊まり会の宿として利用させていただきました。２家族が余裕を持って寝られて且つ周辺が静かで安全であるという我々が望むすべてのニーズを満たしていました。お散歩できる距離に大きな公園があってそれもよかったです。オーナーさんは気さくで優しく、帰りは駅まで送ってくださり助かりました。
ありがとうございました。
Takeshi’s place was amazing and exactly as described! Yuki and Takeshi were super helpful, they even dropped us to the station. Highly recommend a stay in their lovely home!

This place was great! My sister and I were there for just under a week and it was nice to be able to come back to a house that was equipped with everything we needed. It’s a 15 min walk from the station that goes to Haneda, which is a little bit of a trek after a long day of traveling but it’s not too bad. It’s in a more suburban area so it’s removed from the worst of the hustle and bustle of Tokyo.

El alojamiento está genial. Combina estilo tradicional japones con electrodomesticos modernos. Yuuki fue muy amable al enseñarnos la casa y al ofrecerse a llevarnos a la estación en su coche el día de salida. La casa era algo fria pero se han instalado aires acondicionados y calentadores para mejorar este aspecto. En resumen, una experiencia muy recomendable

We were 2 couples staying in the accommodation for 5 nights, so we really got to experience all the amenities that the house had to offer.
It is the right mix in between traditional and modern.
It looks like in the pictures and while in the pictures the bathtub looks weird as it's not what people are used to, in reality, it was such a nice treat.
The house doesn't have central heating, but the AC worked very well, it was at times even too hot. The main bedroom has a balcony too, but it's very well insulated.
Also, the washer&drier is probably the best I've tried, in 2.5 hours we had our clothes ready, which was a dream.
The host was very welcoming, he even gave us a ride with our luggage to the nearest train station, we really appreciated that.
delightful spot and wonderful helpful people. 10/10

Yuki was a patient, kind, thoughtful, and generous host. He waited at the house to greet us and helped us check in when our estimated arrival time was delayed by 3 hours. He was attentive to the fact that we had a toddler with us and reminded us that the staircase might be unsafe for him to navigate without help. Yuki was also helpful when I had to purchase something from a drug mart but didn’t know which one to go to. Finally he offered us a free ride to the train station without us asking. He’s hands down one of the best hosts we had on Airbnb.
Now about the house: if you want 3 bedrooms and a location that even though is a bit out of the way but is very convenient with public transportations, you can’t go wrong with this place. We are very pleased with our choice. The only thing we wish we had while staying at the house is hooks. Hope the host can install some hooks so we can hang out towels after every use. Other than that you’ll find everything you need for a comfortable stay

My stay at this Airbnb was absolutely fantastic! The host was one of the kindest people I have ever met, and went out of their way to make sure that my stay was comfortable and enjoyable. The apartment was beautifully furnished and had all the amenities I needed. I would highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone looking for a kind and attentive host and a lovely place to stay!
Loved staying at this house! It's gorgeous and has nice amenities. They were also very responsive and willing to work with our schedule. They even gave us a ride to the bus stop on our last day!

A fantastic place in a quiet neighbourhood with an incredibly helpful host. Yuki-san’s comms were excellent. He picked us up at the station and took time to explain how everything worked. The house has everything you need for a great stay in Tokyo. He also sent me top restaurant recommendations. When we’re back, we’ll be back!

Hands down, this has been my family’s favorite Air BnB. Yuki greeted us at check-in, and was so welcoming. The condo is absolutely stunning inside, and it is very large compared to the other places we stayed in Japan. The pictures online do not do this place justice! It is superbly designed and decorated. The shower/hot tub was amazing, the kitchen was quite large with plenty of cooking utensils, pots, pans, plates etc..The area was very quiet, safe and peaceful, and within walking distance to train stations and grocery. Yuki was very communicative, and even drove us + made two trips with our bags to the train station at check-out. We would definitely book again when we come back to Tokyo!
Great place with amazing hosts

Me and my family had a great stay at this Airbnb. Communication with Takeshi and Yuki was great! They were fast in responding and are very helpful with all our questions and inquiries. They will welcome you upon arrival and show you around the house and how to use appliances, doors etc. We love also, that the appliances (washer/dryer, burner) has english labels for easy use. The house is spacious and had all the amenities one might need during a trip. Location is great if you want a quieter part of the town and away from the hustle and bustle of the city. But, it is also a little bit of a walk 10-15 mins away from the trains/bus stations. Great for some exercise! Also, they offer to drive you to the nearest train or bus station at your checkout which is so helpful for us since we have so many luggages! Overall, would really recommend this Airbnb!

We has a fabulous time. The house was very comfort for my husband and I and your 2 sons. For being in the city the neighborhood was very quiet. Convenient to stores, restaurants, and public transportation. The house was supplied with everything you could need. Yuki was very kind and took us to the bus stop to the airport. We will be back if in Tokyo again.

We enjoyed out stay here for 5 days. Host is so warm and welcoming. Takeshi went out of his way to make our stay comfortable and run smoothly.  He was very responsive to all my questions and was very helpful. We appreciate  how this was a traditional Japanese house but roomy for 3 people and lots of luggage. The 2 bathrooms and 3 bedrooms were so nice. Beds were very comfortable. Place is accessible to many stations by foot and is in more residential area. Overall very comfortable spot to stay in Tokyo.

Takeshi’s house is in a safe and pleasant neighborhood, a short distance from central Tokyo by subway. The house has three separate bedrooms upstairs and two rooms downstairs, there is a kitchenette, a large refrigerator, washer and dryer, all the necessities that a traveler needs. All three of us felt very comfortable there. Takeshi was also patient (we arrived late due to delays at the airport) and helpful (he brought us to the subway station on the way out of Tokyo). Much recommended!Thank you, Takeshi!
This was the best experience I’ve ever had. The check in was easy it was such a beautiful home. If I come back to Japan I will stay here! Amazing 💖

I’m so glad Kokoro house was my first stay in Japan. It was beautiful and cozy with many amenities.
The place is close to a few subway stations so it was easy to get around. The neighborhood was beautiful and very peaceful to walk around in. There are also a lot of convenient stores around.
The host was lovely, super accommodating—especially since we had a lot of delays upon arrival. It was overall one of my best air bnb stays, ever.

Everything was wonderful and the host was incredible! We had all of our amenities plus more! Very quiet neighborhood so it was easy to sleep and only about a 15 minute walk to two different train stations and lots of restaurants! Wonderful stay!
This host was very helpful in every way. I highly recommend this Airbnb. Great neighbourhood location. Very quiet and affordable.
Extremely helpful and responsive hosts. We travelled as a family of 4 with 2 young children. House was clean and well equipped for our needs. Thank you so much!
Our stay was amazing, the hosts were so helpful and nice, even drove us to the station! The house is beautiful !
We had a blast here! It had everything we needed and the host even drove our luggage to the local train station when we were leaving.
매우좋았습니다

A traditional Japanese house and two householders with great hospitality. The house is clean and well prepared. The fridge is huge. The kitchen tools are plenty. There’s a YouTube video to instruct you to get to the house from JR station or subway. Very helpful. The household even gave us a lift to the station when we checkout. Great experience.

We were quite tired from our long flight and we were very happy to experience this non touristy neighborhood in Tokyo
We stayed 4 days and the property, comfortable beds, host, location were excellent in every way!
Thank you!!

Takeshi's Kokoro House was exactly as described; clean, quiet and Kokoro t s Takeshi provided everything we could hope for and more. He arranged an earlier check-in to accommodate our arrival and on check-out, he gave us a ride to the train station with our luggage.
Home was as described and near local subway. Would definitely recommend to others and return to this Airbnb.
Thank you for your hospitality.

If I could rate Kokoro House 6 stars, I would. Phenomenal hosts, beautiful house and location, extremely clean and accomodating. Takeshi and Yuki went above and beyond to make sure we had the most comfortable experience in Japan. This was the best airbnb house I've ever stayed at.

このたびはありがとうございました。友人も、施設もきれいで、風情もあり、非常に快適に宿泊できたとのことでした。
またぜひ利用したいです！

We had the most wonderful stay at Kokoro house. The house itself has all amenities you need, with a complete kitchen, bathroom, and two separate toilets. A/C was very welcome in those hot Tokyo summers. The house is located within 10-min walk of several subway and bus stations, putting it 20 mins away from e.g. Asakusa or Akihabara.
Our hosts Takeshi and Yuki were always proactive and very responsive, going above and beyond, we felt right at home! Yuki even drove us back to the station with our luggage on our last day, I cannot thank him enough for helping us. I can heartily recommend Kokoro house to all travelers and would be delighted to visit again.

Great place if you wish to get to know a true Tokyo residential neighborhood.
They are great host who take care of their place with pride. Wish we could stay longer than 3 days as we did.

This was a lovely little home to stay in to experience Japan for the first time. Our hosts were friendly, easy going, and went above and beyond to help us feel welcome.
Thank you guys for everything!

This is a beautiful home in an quiet neighborhood convient to 24 hour konbini and the JR line. It is equipped with an absolutely charming mix of traditional finishes and art, but still has the modern conveniences of a washlet, programmable bath, refrigerator with an ice maker and a state of the art washer/dryer unit. Takeshi was exceedingly kind and welcoming. I would happily book with him again.
Beautiful house and a great host!
숙소 깔끔하고 아늑하고 너무 좋았습니다. 호스트분도 친절하시고 메시지 응답도 빠르셨구요. 동네는 한적하고 평화로운 분위기였고 근처에 편의점이나 역도 가까워서 좋았습니다. 추천드리는 숙소입니다!!

Takashi was very hospitable and he responded promptly to all questions. The location was a walkable distance to the train station. The accommodation was great and we would recommend others to stay at Kokoro House.
Great house in a very nice area. Lots of good, local restaurants, very few tourists. Super nice host, and very spacious house for a great price. I would stay again.

Das Haus war sehr gemütlich eingerichtet und man fühlte sich sehr willkommen. Die Gastgeber waren sehr lieb und freundlich. Auf Fragen wurde sehr schnell geantwortet und wir wurden bei der Rückreise zum Bahnhof mit dem Auto gefahren. Insgesamt toller Service und ein unvergesslicher Aufenthalt. Wir kommen gerne wieder.

Yuki was very kind. Loved meeting him and the home was lovely. He brought us a gift on Wednesday and drove us to the nearby station with our luggage when we left. We used G- translate to communicate since we do not speak any Japanese and that seemed to work well. It was an easy walk from the nearby JR station. Thank you for the great stay, we really enjoyed Japan!

We really enjoyed our stay at Takeshi and Yuki’s lovely home. This was our first visit to Tokyo and we really felt at home and at ease here.
The house was spotlessly clean with all amenities we could need, and our host thoughtfully provided us with water and traditional snacks upon check-in, as well as showing us some local spots to visit in the area and where the nearest subway stations were.
We had lots of room in the house between three people, and could sleep peacefully at night as the area was quiet.
Our hosts went out of their way to ensure we had everything we needed throughout our stay, and even dropped us to the train station when we checked out, which we really appreciated.
Overall we really enjoyed meeting our host and staying at their wonderful AirBnB, and I would definitely stay here again if I return to visit Tokyo :)

Yuki and Takeshi's place was nothing short of amazing! Easy to find and very comfortable to live in. Yuki was an amazing host. He will take care of you as if you were his own family. He even gave us snacks and also dropped us off at the JR station at the end of our stay! Would definitely stay here again in the future.

Superbe logement, spacieux et très bien équipé. Yuki a pensé aux moindres détails, produits d’entretiens, produits d’hygiènes, gâteaux, café, serviettes en nombre …
Le logement n’est pas au cœur du Tokyo touristique mais il est extrêmement bien connecté car il a 4 stations à une dizaine de minute de pieds (2 métro et 2 JR). De plus, Yuki est un hôte très attentionné et disponible.
Je ne peux que recommander ce logement et nous reviendrons avec grand plaisir !

It is an experience to stay in a traditional Japanese home! You will find everything you need in the house for a family. Yuki was very responsive and gave as a warm welcome. He even dropped us off to a nearby train station when we checked out. Thank you!
너무 만족스러운 숙소였습니다. 너무 아름다운 집과 동네였습니다! Host 님도 너무 친절하고 좋으신 분이었습니다. 체크아웃 후, 인근 역까지 차로 픽업도 해주시고, 저희 일행에게 선물도 주셨습니다. 감사합니다 :)

Takeshi and yuki are very helpful. Reply is always prompt. Place is clean with all the amenities that u need. They even provide you with toothbrush, listerine, cuttonbuds, cuttonpad and bobby pins and these are small things which i dont even find in other airbnb! We didnt get the chance to cook but they get all the utensils and pots u need. I will recommend the place for 4-5 pax max anything more maybe too squeezy considering japanese traditional home is small. Shower water pressure is good. Beds are comfortable. Location wise, it needs a bit of walking to the nearest subway like what everyone says but we had this in mind when booking so we dont mind.
Thank you takeshi and yuki for the great hospitality!
房屋管家相应很及时，提供了一次完美的入住体验~我们三个人入住，空间非常宽敞舒适，两层楼，楼上三个房间。房屋很日式，也特别干净，推荐给想要入住一次比较传统日式房屋的住客们，绝不会失望。第二天离开时管家将我们送到附近的地铁站，再次感谢！

Our stay at Kokoro house was perfect. There is plenty of space for many people, comfortable for sleeping, air-conditioners, nice bathroom, well equipped kitchen and washer/dryer. The area is quiet and an easy access to different parts of Tokyo. Yuki replied to messages very fast and was there to greet us for check-in and check-out. I can highly recommend this Airbnb! I wish I can stay here again at some point.

This was such an awesome space. I felt right at home and it was very easy to get to anywhere in the city. Takeshi & Yuki were responsible, caring, and readily available to assist with anything if needed. 10/10 experience. Would 100% rebook.

It was a great stay, the house was very roomy and cosy - nice to experience a modern Japanese styled house. Yuki was very helpful even with his limited English and even gave us cake during our stay.  In terms of location, there were many train stations around within wakable distance. Thank you for hosting us!

Takeshi and Yuki’s place is exactly as described and shown in the photos, and they have carefully made sure to have all the amenities a traveler may need while on holiday - from basic spices to cook a simple meal, to toiletries essentials such as shaving cream, mouthwash and even band-aids.  Everything in the house is labeled in both Japanese and English, which makes the property very easy to navigate and operate.  The space was ample enough for our family of 5 (3 adults kids and us), and beds were really comfortable for a great night of sleep.  Yuki-san was very responsive and attentive. He helped us with clear directions on where to find our bus out of Tokyo station to Kawaguchiko, and even took us to the nearest subway station the day we checked out - saving us of 15-min walking with our luggage.  Location-wise it is close to several convenience stores (7-11, Lawson, Family Mart), and good restaurants.  Subway stations are 10-15 min walk, depending of the line. Excellent stay!

In terms of being made to feel really welcome by our Japanese hosts, this was by far the best Airbnb we stayed at in Japan. Takeshi and Yuki met us at the front door, helped us with our luggage, and gave us a useful tour of the house. They also left snacks for us as well as everything we could possibly need in the kitchen and bathroom. When they found out I had just had a birthday, Yuki even popped around with a delicious cake for us to enjoy! He kindly gave us a lift to the station when we left and was so friendly and helpful in every way.
如果想體驗寧靜的東京，非常推薦住在這裡！
対応が親切で良かった
호스트분이 친절하시고 집이 쾌적하고 훌륭했습니다. 다음에 또 이용할 예정입니다.

This was an amazing experience and we can’t recommend it highly enough. Yuki and his family were so helpful and could not do enough to make us feel at home.
Their house is a lovely mix of modern and traditional, it is spotless, with every care and consideration accounted for. It is located in a fantastic area within walking distance of stores, resturant’s, parks and trains. It is amazingly quiet given its proximity to the heart of the city.
We would have no hesitation in returning to Yuki’s home the next time we pass thru Tokyo. And we have no doubt we would be treated as long know returning friends.
Craig & Family
The stay is very comfort
다시 머무르고 싶을 만큼 넓고 깨끗하고 편안했어요! 지하철역까지 아주 가까운 건 아니었지만 충분히 걷기 좋은 거리였고 체크아웃할 때 역까지 짐을 옮겨주셔서 너무 감사했어요 호스트분이 친절하시고 숙소가 좋아 고된 여행도 매일 기분 좋게 마무리할 수 있었습니다 세 명이 4박 5일 정도 렌트하기에 아주 적합한 숙소였던 것 같아요, 추천합니다 :)

Loved this place! Yuki was super responsive and left very detailed, helpful instructions about their place! The home was amazing, felt like I was living in my own place. I loved the recommendations and the walkable neighbourhood, would definitely stay here again!
We have a very nice stay 🙂 thank you Yuki for your delicate attention
