Takeshi had a beautiful home with all the amenities in a peaceful location. He was very gracious and helpful throughout the visit, and even dropped us off at the station when we checked out. Highly recommend this stay for anyone visiting Tokyo.

The best host we had in all of Japan! We very much enjoyed the home.  It was clean, well explained, very English friendly, and overall a great experience.  It is a 25min trip by train to Shinjuku too!  I can not recommend this place enough.

숙소 정말 좋았어요!
체크인도 빠르게 해주셔서 덕분에 첫날 편하게 여행 했어요!
설명도 잘 해주시고 수건도 넉넉하게 주시고 필요한 물건은 숙소에 다 있었어요!!^^
침대도 푹신하고 따로 주신 침구류도 좋았어요!!
마지막에 주신 케이크 맛있게 잘 먹었습니다. 세심하게 챙겨쥬셔서 감사합니다!
A short stroll from train stations, convenience stores, peaceful surroundings, very responsive and helpful host. Highly recommended this kokoro house
Great place and friendly host. Very cozy stay
The place was exactly what we needed for a single night stay. Comfortable beds, access to the station and a quiet neighborhood.
非常棒的入住体验，这次行程太短了，下次来东京还会选择这里的！每天外出很累之后，回到这里能睡到舒适的床，是非常幸福的一件事！另外洗衣机也非常好用，烘干功能正是我们很需要的。
Great stay, nice to be outside tokyo but have access when  you need it. Worked really well for a family with 2 kids.   Host was super nice.

Yuki was the most amazing host. Good communication from the start. Met us at the airbnb and explained everything in detail. Was super helpful. Got us a nice gift and took us to the train station on the last day. The airbnb was perfect. Very clean and comfortable. The location was great. Very close to the sky tree. Overall a great experience! Thanks Yuki!
호스트가 매우매우 친절하셨습니다!
A great place to stay to feel at home in Japan! Convenient stores close by. Takushi is an exceptional host! He is taking great care of his guests
Friendly and accommodating host! House is comfortable in a quiet neighborhood, it worked well for our family of 4.

Très mignonne maison traditionnelle japonaise ! Très bien équipée, tout est traduit en anglais, très facile d'accès, très facile d'utilisation, bien rangée et bien décorée.
Nous avons passé un agréable séjour, merci beaucoup, c'était très bien.
Les lits sont confortables, nous avons bien dormi.

This was an absolutely lovely place to stay!! Our host was kind, welcoming, and responsive and not only drove us to our train station upon check out but also presented us with some snacks and gifts for the road. We will definitely be back!

일단 호스트분이 너무나도 친절하셔서
지내는 동안 1의 불편함도 없었습니다.
폼클렌징부터, 면도기, 면도크림, 치실, 머리띠 등등 정말 세심한 물품들이 많아서 행복했습니다.
방도 4개라 4명이서 정말 편안히 지내다 갑니다.
지하철 역에서 10분 정도 걸려서 먼 느낌은 있는데
주변 풍경도 이뻐서 멀게 느껴지진 않아요.
도쿄 메트로 티켓으로 못가는 곳이 없어서 위치도 아주 좋습니다

Excellent stay! We were a family of three generations staying for two nights in Tokyo. The house is located in a quiet neighborhood within easy walking distance of convenience stores and restaurants and a main metro line. The only downside is that the stairs are narrow and steep for older folks and the living space does not have western chairs. My parents (74) managed okay in the downstairs bedroom with traditional futon beds but they did find it a bit difficult to sit comfortably. Other than that, the house is perfect for groups.
Our host Yuki was phenomenal. He met our taxi at check in and gave us a thorough tour of the house. He was available to help with shipped luggages and quick to answer questions via Google translator. He had even prepared an array of snacks and drinks in advance.
The upstairs bedrooms are roomy. The beds are decent and the bedding cloudlike. The upstairs rooms share a toilet, another toilet and shower/bath room downstairs. Bonus: laundry!!!

ประทับใจในการดูแลของ Yuki มากๆ เขาน่ารักและมีมนุษย์สัมพันธ์ที่ยอดเยี่ยม  รู้สึกเป็นส่วนตัวเมื่อได้กลับเข้าที่พัก และยังมีพื้นที่มากมายสำหรับลูกๆของเรา  สิ่งอำนวยความสะดวกมีครบ ตรงตามที่แจ้งไว้  ฉันจะกลับมาที่นี่อีกครั้งแน่นอน ขอบคุณสำหรับความทรงจำดีๆค่ะ

Yuki was the best host I’ve ever had in my long list of Airbnb stays. He went way above and beyond from snacks to a car ride to train station. Highly recommend everyone to stay with them. Really set a good tone for our First Japan experience.
Great place to stay while in Tokyo!

if I could give size stars I would.
I would come back in a heartbeat.
Our hosts Takeshi and Yuki were gracious and welcoming.
We loved our morning breakfasts in the living room sitting on the Tatami Mats while watching TV.
We took lovely photos at Sarue Park which was less than a ten minute walk from the home. Bonus was that it was Cherry Blossoms present that were in full bloom at the time!
Yuki and Takeshi were by far the highlight of the place. They were both friendly and informative at our orientation at check in to discuss the house, amenities, and sites to see around Tokyo. Whenever I had a question in regards to train tickets, things to do, etc. Yuki was very quick to respond!
Will recommend my friends to stay here for sure 🙃

This is a great Japanese experience to stay in an authentic Japanese home environment. We had 4 rooms for 5 people and there was plenty of space. There is a room to sleep on futons otherwise upstairs had western style beds.
If you have trouble with stairs best to stay on the bottom floor as its quite narrow and steep. Shower and bath was very Japanese style.
Yuki was a fantastic host - always helpful and responsive to our questions. He drove us back to the station on our last day which was helpful with our bags.
Home is close to both JR train & subway, close to convenience stores and small restaurants. Great value and quiet location. You feel like you are living amongst locals.
Thank you Yuki for hosting us.

Incredibly accommodating host. Responds quickly to questions. Clear instructions for the house. Everything matched the description. Enough space for 4 people to stay comfortably. About a 15 minute walk to the nearest station. On check out day, they graciously drove us to the station with our luggage. Would definitely stay here again on my next visit to Tokyo! Thank you
I had a lovely stay in Takeshi and Yuki’s place. It’s a very nice, traditional home. The hosts were warm and communicative. This will be a place i look to return to when I’m next in Tokyo.
This traditional Airbnb was incredible would definitely come back. Close to the trains and lots of local restaurant as well as convenience stores.
我们是比较晚的时间到Takeshi的屋子。他和他的哥哥非常辛苦 等我们大概凌晨0点到了之后帮助我们进房屋并非常详细的介绍了房屋里面各种物品，电器怎么使用。房屋的配套物品非常齐全，甚至小到牙线都有准备。在我们退房的时候 Yuki还送了小礼物给我们！ 也载我们到了地铁站！真的很贴心！下次来东京我还会住在这里！大好评！

What amazing hosts! We could not have been greeted and treated better than we did here. We were met by the hosts and given a tour of the home and how to use things like AC, water heaters, laundry etc. They were both kind and personable gentlemen.
The house itself was traditional Japanese, spacious and inviting. Linens and towels provided were clean, option to do laundry was nice and having AC was a definite plus. Also, if you have several people staying, two toilets in the house are a great find!
The area is quiet and private but still a close walk to subway stations (10-15 min walk depending on which station). Also, there were convenience stores close enough that snacks were always an option if you got hungry.
When we checked out, Yuki was kind enough to bring by snacks/treats for us (even going out of his way for my vegetarian daughter) and dropped us off at the closest subway so we could get all our luggage to the airport.
I would stay here again in a heartbeat!!

This was by far the best place we stayed at in all of Japan. Everyone was very kind and showed nothing but hospitality. When I come back to Japan in the future I will not hesitate to stay at this place again.
As a european traveling for the first time to Japan the place was excelent. Toilet and bathroom are separate and that helps. We enjoyed our stay vary mutch!

What a great place to stay! The hosts met us and made us feel welcomed and at home. We enjoyed the traditional home, quiet neighborhood, and comfortable accommodations. One of the best stays I have had!

What a great house to live in! Has all the supplies you need, subway and convenient stores is near you by walking. Hosts Yuki and Takeshi were very kind and generous with us by explaining everything in the house, also recommended a restaurant near the house. One of the best experiences in Tokyo, definitely worth the visit!

일본 호텔방은 매우 좁은 편인데 코코로 하우스는 1층에 마루와 다다미방 부엌, 화장실이 있으며 2층에 방3개가와 화장실이 있어서 크고 좋았습니다.
3개 역이 집 근처에 있는데 10~15분정도 걸립니다.
또한 집주인분이 처음부터 끝까지 너무너무 친절하셔서 더 즐겁게 머물다 올 수 있었습니다.

Very nice people and lovely place with lots of amenities as well as a selection of tees, matcha and coffee and cookies. Communication was easy and we even got a lift to the subway. Its in a quiet area, with convenience stores and subway stations in walking distance. Not far from the river and view to the sky tree tower.

We loved staying at Takeshi and Yuki's place. The neighbourhood was tranquil but close enough to stations to be downtown in an instant. The home is a gorgeous, historical space, with everything you could need and much more room than we needed. Highly recommend this home and generous hosts!

Takeshi and Yuki were so accommodating and helpful throughout our entire stay. They met us at the door as soon as we arrived and helped us every step of the journey. Would highly recommend to stay at Kokoro house if you are staying in Tokyo for a week! It is located in a really peaceful area and is a short distance from a train station.

Yuki is an amazing co-host and we had most of our interaction with him. He is the kindest and best host. He brought us a sweet treat during our stay and he even drove us to our next train station after our check out and picked up our friends for us that were staying at a different place. Amazing!

Takeshi and Yuki were there for the check in. They made us feel right home in their home! They are both wonderful hosts!
The traditional Japanese style of the house is very nice.
We would definitely stay here again!

Takeshis Place was a very nice spot.
The Airbnb was even better than on the pictures and we felt like home.
The host was a very nice perosn, and after a brief introduction to the house we even got a small present from him.
Evey Spot you wanted to go in Tokyo was very easy to reacht, thanks to the good location.

Our stay at Takeshi's was perfect: the house is spacious, comfortable, beautifully decorated and well equipped. Our hosts were the most kind, friendly, responsive and attentive.  I can't recommend enough  staying at Takeshi's place in Tokyo. Thank you!!

Vertene møtte oss ved innsjekk, de viste oss rundt i huset og ga lokale anbefalinger. De tilbød også å kjøre oss til togstasjonen da vi skulle reise. Svært hyggelige og imøtekommende brødre!
Selve huset ligger i den gamle delen av Tokyo, noen kvartal med små bygninger mellom høyhusene. For oss var det perfekt, å bo i et fredelig nabolag samtidig som vi enkelt kom til alle attraksjoner vi skulle se.
Huset svarte til forventningene. Veldig fin andre etasje med soverom. Vi voksne tok også i bruk det fjerde soverommet (i første etasje), vi lå da på madrasser på gulvet. Disse var kanskje litt harde for våre europeiske kropper, men det gikk greit.
Kjøkkenet var godt utstyrt, men er litt mindre enn det ser ut som på bildet. Gruppen vår på fem måtte spise frokost i to omganger. God muligheter for å vaske og tørke klær. Flott med instruksjoner på engelsk til å bruke vaskemaskinen!
Våre verter hadde virkelig tenkt igjennom alt. Vi kunne gjerne blitt litt lengre i Kokoro House.
I would give it six stars if I could. Thank you for hosting my family’s trip to Japan.

We had an incredible stay at Kokoro house! The home itself was spacious, clean, well equipped, in a great location and very easy to stay in. Many details made living in the house a breeze, such as English language labels on all appliances and switches, an abundance of towels and more. It's very clear that the hosts have really put so much thought into the experience of staying in this beautiful home.
Our hosts met us at the property on check-in, gave us a tour and some guidance, and helped us plan our best route to the airport for the end of our trip. They even offered drove us to the airport bus for Haneda on our check-out date. Takeshi and Yuki are two of the warmest, most pleasant people anyone could wish to meet. My family and I are so grateful to have stayed in their beautiful property. They truly made this a magical AirBnB stay worthy of more than 5 stars.

Beautiful home with the kindest and most thoughtful host. The host was helpful with local recommendations and even helping us navigate the area. We felt comfortable and safe during our stay here. Everything was perfect and I highly recommend staying here!

Un hôte très avenant qui met de l’importance sur l’hospitalité et les petit détails pour que ces convives soit à l’aise.
Je recommande vivement cet airbnb, le personnel est adorable et très gentil.
Nous espérons pouvoir y revenir un jour !

If I could give this listing more than 5 stars I absolutely would. Takeshi was such a generous and friendly host, and we loved being able to stay in Kokoro House.
The house was incredibly clean, welcoming, and comfortable. It’s in a quiet residential area near some beautiful parks and great restaurants, and very walkable to the metro. Takeshi and Yuki were incredibly responsive, and provided great recommendations for the area and things to do for our first time in Tokyo.
I highly recommend this listing to anyone looking for a place to stay in Tokyo. We absolutely would stay here again. Thank you so much, Takeshi and Yuki!
Super séjour ! je recommande
Super logement ! je recommande :)
Super hôte qui nous a emmené à la gare la plus proche pour que nous prenions notre avion ! Au top ! je recommande :)

When I entered the house on the first day of the trip, I felt very comfortable and clean.  The owner is very nice and introduced me to many authentic restaurants. He also taught me how to get to the subway and other attractions.  On the last day of the trip, he even sent me to the station and gave me a souvenir. It was a very enjoyable and unforgettable trip.
Such a lovely stay for a family of four. Squeaky clean, comfortable, and the hosts were so sweet.
Great host and great location. Near multiple metro stations

The experience of staying in Kokoro House was very good. The house was clean and well-equipped. Yuki Sang also gave us a lot of help. There are several subway lines near the house, which can be reached by walking. And the house is very quiet, which is very important to us! The trip to Tokyo was very enjoyable and one of the important reasons we chose Kokoro House.

Nestled in a Tokyo residential area, we were able to experience local Japanese lifestyle.
Loved the traditional Japanese interior of the two-storey airbnb. Beds are extremely comfortable.
Location is great, with convenient stores, restaurants and train stations nearby.
Yuki and Takeshi are friendly and fantastic hosts, providing us with lots of information to get around Tokyo, very helpful.
We’ll definitely stay here again during our next trip to Tokyo.
本当にありがとうございます😊

Wir wurden superfreundlich begrüßt und die Kommunikation war toll - Unser Gastgeber war bemüht unseren Aufenthalt sehr angenehm zu machen! Das Haus ist ruhig gelegen und war perfekt für unsere kleine Reisegruppe. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt und hatten eine super Zeit in Tokio. VIELEN DANK !!
Great place in a quiet neighborhood, and Takeshi and co were all so nice and responsive!

本次的入住非常完美。
房子在很安静的区域，稍微往外走也有很多的饭店和便利店。
屋子内部很宽敞，日常生活用品非常非常齐全，也非常干净！
管家的接待服务非常亲切和周到，离开时候还送我们去了机场巴士站。
总之，是非常完美的体验，极度推荐大家选择！
感谢热情周到的服务，期待下次再来！
Takeshi and Yuki are incredible hosts. we loved their Airbnb and our stay was the phenomenal. we would absolutely stay here again.

Probablement le meilleur AirBnB de Tokyo. La maison est incroyable, elle est très grande, très pratique, très propre. L'emplacement à quelques minutes à pied de plusieurs gares est idéal. Notre hôte, Yuki, s'est montré extrêmement gentil, serviable et arrangeant. Nous n'en attendions pas tant lorsque nous avions réservé mais nous avons été loin d'être déçus, c'était un gros coup de cœur !
Most wonderful human beings. We were super happy. Can‘t get much better than this. Thank you so much!!!

The Kokoro House team did a wonderful job in helping to make our Tokyo trip easy and enjoyable! The team was very accommodating and helpful in terms of providing us with directions, local restaurants, and places of interest in the area. They were also very patient with some of the timing snafus we ran into when arriving. I would highly recommend staying here.

Takeshi is a great host and delivered just what we were after, the house was very clean and up to standard and also in a good location with plenty of restaurants nearby.Would definitely recommend to anyone visiting Tokyo. Arigato gozaimasu!

This Airbnb was amazing and yuki-san was awesome very welcoming and helped whenever we needed. Felt right at home and the area is beautiful with everything you need nearby. I would highly recommend this Airbnb to anyone visiting Japan. Beautiful home and phenomenal hosts. 10/10 highly recommend!!!

Our stay with Yuki and Takeshi was absolutely amazing! They went above and beyond to make us feel welcome, demonstrating such warmth and generosity throughout our visit. The space was spotless, cozy, and thoughtfully equipped with everything we needed, making it a true home away from home. Their attention to detail and genuine hospitality made our experience unforgettable. We can’t recommend them highly enough and would love to stay again in the future. Thank you, Yuki and Takeshi, for such a wonderful stay!

Yuki-san & Takeshi-san’s Airbnb is absolutely amazing.
The home was so cozy, traditional and just far away enough from the busiest parts of Tokyo.
Yuki-san was extremely kind and helpful. His recommended amazing local restaurant & sights.
Can’t wait to come back.
Takeshi is a wonderful host. An accommodating host that made us feel at home.

Yuki greeted us at check in and showed us around the house. The house was thoughtfully stocked with water and snacks, as well as many toiletries. They obviously pay close attention to small details which creates a warm environment after a long day of travel.
The bedrooms were comfortable and easy to keep warm.. and it was nice for our tween daughter to be able to have a door to close to get some alone time!
The house was close to many stations and convenience stores, making it easy to get snacks, breakfasts and get to attractions around Tokyo.
My husband's birthday was the day we checked in, and Yuki brought him a beautiful set of chopsticks. It made his day!
thank you!

We felt right at home and Yuki-San was extremely attentive. His place was exactly what we were looking for: a more traditional Japanese style setting. The location was great: a quiet and peaceful neighborhood where locals live. From there, we were able to walk to restaurants, convenience stores, pharmacies, etc. and also take a taxi to other nearby attractions when needed. There’s a train station nearby but we didn’t use it, however it’s good to know it’s available. The host went above and beyond to make us feel at home and welcomed. We will definitely come back again.
Not only an excellent place to stay, but also an amazing host! Possibly the best Airbnb experience I've ever had

I had an amazing experience staying at Kokoro House in Tokyo. The space was not only clean and cozy but also thoughtfully Japanese style designed, making me and my friends feels right at home. Its convenient location made exploring the city incredibly easy.
A special thank you to Yuki for being such a kind and attentive host. Your prompt communication and helpful recommendations truly made my trip memorable. I’m so grateful for your hospitality and would gladly stay here again on my next visit to Tokyo!
Highly recommended to anyone looking for a warm and welcoming stay in Tokyo.

What a perfect Airbnb! Yuki was wonderful throughout our stay and always happy and joyful. The house was perfect for our family, very relaxing and cosy with the heating on!
It was spotlessly clean when we checked in and had all the facilities we needed.
We wouldn’t hesitate to return if we come back to Tokyo!
Thank you, Yuki for a perfect stay!

여러분은 숙소에서 가장 귀찮은 것이 무엇입니까? 당연히 숙소 메뉴얼을 읽는 것입니다. 하지만 코코로하우스는 다릅니다! 친절한 호스트가 숙소의 기능들을 모두 알려줍니다. 장점이 아주 많습니다. 청결한 세탁기, 욕실, 화장실, 침실입니다. 아침에 춥다는 것이(12월 입니다) 유일한 단점이지만 히터의 기능이 좋습니다! 나는 다음에도 도쿄에 머무르게 된다면 코코로 하우스에 올 것이고, 다른 여행객들에게도 추천합니다 XD. 혼자보다는 친구들이나 가족 여행이면 더욱 좋습니다.

Yuki was the best host. He was always exceedingly fast in responding and was so attentive. He greeted us and checked us in on arrival, answered a few questions during our stay very quickly and also had a going away gift for us. The house was spotlessly clean. We enjoyed our time.
Yuki and Takeshi were very nice hosts. I would highly recommend this place.
We loved our stay. Very traditional Japanese family home. Extremely friendly and accommodating host. Comfortable beds.

We had a wonderful stay at Kokoro House! The hospitality was exceptional, and every detail was thoughtfully taken care of. Takeshi were warm and welcoming, making us feel right at home.
The accommodation was clean, comfortable, and in a great location. We truly appreciated the effort they put into ensuring a memorable experience. Highly recommend Kokoro House, and we would love to return in the future!
The stay was very comfortable and easy to get in, host is very kind, helpful, and overall a great person. The time me and my friends were there we had a blast and would definitely come back.
非常喜欢的民宿，干净整洁。房东Yuki十分热情，临走时送我们到附近的地铁站。住在这里，周边步行10分钟内可以到多个地铁站，去市区哪里都很方便，且整体居住环境安静，设施便利，下次来东京还会选择住在这里。
thank you Yuki you were amazing, we felt right at home
Fantastic stay and great host

Amazing home and wonderful host! My mom and I loved staying here and we would again in a heartbeat! The host is so so sweet and super considerate of foreigners that do not speak the language. I loved staying in the house and can't wait to do it again one day.

Yuki was extremely helpful and a great host to us during our stay. He was always nearby any time we had problems and showed up in minutes without a question. Not only did they give us a list of recommendations they even had a binder full of them with directions to each location. We will definitely be booking this location again and will recommend this to any friends traveling in the area. We love Kokoro House!

진짜 만족!! 이번이 두번째 이용인데 진짜 현지 주택을 빌릴 수 있어서 너무 편안하고 내 집같은 기분이 느껴져서 좋았습니다!
호스트도 항상 친절하시고 좋은분이셔서 다음에도 다시 이용하고 싶어요!!

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour chez Yuki. La maison est charmante, propre et parfaitement adaptée pour une famille de quatre. Au-delà de ce nombre, cela pourrait être un peu à l’étroit, du moins selon des standards nord-américains.
L’emplacement est très agréable : à environ 15 minutes de marche d’une station de métro. Nous avons particulièrement apprécié le calme du quartier. Après une journée dans l’effervescence de la ville, c’est un vrai plaisir de rentrer dans un environnement paisible.Yuki est un hôte exceptionnel. Très attentionné, il nous a même raccompagnés au métro à notre départ. On sent qu’il a à cœur d’offrir une véritable hospitalité à ses invités. Tout était parfaitement organisé à notre arrivée. Le seul point à considérer est que la maison se trouve à l’est de Tokyo, ce qui signifie que les déplacements vers les zones centrales prennent un minimum de 45 minutes en transport en commun. Cela dit le quartier est agréable et bien connecté. On recommande !

This stay was the best experience I have ever had at an Airbnb, I have had many experiences at airbnbs and this host was by far the most outgoing and understanding. The host went out of his way to meet us when we arrived and also made sure to explain how everything worked in the home to make sure we had the best experience possible. He also gave us a pocket wifi and took us to the nearest train station when it was time for us to go to the airport. This Airbnb is also in the most perfect location if you want more of a local Tokyo experience but also are just a train right away from the big cities. This host also gave us gifts before we departed, I wish I could say enough about this place but I am limited on letters! If you want an amazing place to stay in Tokyo please stay here!!!!

Wonderful stay. I would highly recommend this place if staying in Tokyo. The hosts were always available to answer questions and provide suggestions. The house is filled with lots of consideration for the guests.
Yuki drove us to the station the day we checked out. This added gesture was beyond kind of generous.
THANK YOU SO MUCH!

Kokoro House is a beautiful old home. Yuki was an amazing host that offered many recommendations and very accommodating. They were so kind and helpful. The neighborhood was quiet and peaceful, easy to get around by bus or train. Will definitely be back again in the future.

We had a great stay at Kokoro House and Yuki was a great host!
The area is very quiet with several stations close by so it's easy to get around. The house had a lot of space and we didn't miss on anything. We got lucky with the weather so the temperature in the house was good for most of our trip, but even if it got really cold there were Kerosene heaters available if needed.
Yuki was very friendly, providing us with some snacks and giving us a lift to the train station at the end of our trip so we had a bit more time to catch our next train ;)
Une très belle maison traditionnelle et très confortable...propre, bien placée, bref, je recommande vivement cette location. Merci pour tout 💖
Great ‘hut’ in a quieter part of Tokyo. Nice old school vibes and traditional. Very comfortable for a family of 5 like ourselves. Thank you for a special stay

Is there a sixth star? Mind blowing hosting. Allowed us to drop our bags off before checkin, came back again for checkin and gave us a lift to the station on checkout!
Great place that’s in an area with few tourists so lets you live “authentic Tokyo” in a traditional house.
Should’ve spent the whole Tokyo stay here! Amazing hosting and value.
Make your booking today!

Amazing! Our favourite place we stayed in Tokyo. The house is large and well kept and the host was super friendly 😊
Thanks for having us!

We loved staying here. We had been moving around Japan for days and Kokoro house was a very much needed spacious stay -compared to the hotels. The house had our needs fully covered and it was clean and comfortable. Yuki was very very kind to us and made us feel at home.

Takashi was an incredible host! He went above and beyond to make the place feel welcoming, while also housing Us in his beautiful home.
Our group has never had a host as hospitable as this one, we appreciate all the kindness!
Would gladly love to stay at this place again ⭐

Kokoro house is a beautiful home. When we arrived it was clean and had everything we needed for a stay. Yuki is an amazing host. He was very kind, helpful and thoughtful throughout our stay. We would love to stay here in the future and would definitely recommend it to any considering staying here.

Yuki was the BEST host! He greeted us when we arrived and helped us get our luggage inside. He showed us how everything worked and was so kind. He had also stocked the fridge with waters and provided some snacks. The house also had everything we could need from laundry detergent to toothpaste. It was really nice to have 3 bedrooms so we each had our own space. The neighborhood is also pretty quiet and peaceful and it was just so lovely to hang out in the home at the end of a long day. Yuki also gave us a gift to take home with us, AND drove us (and our copious amounts of luggage) to the train station upon checkout and made sure we were able to find the luggage lockers. Yuki’s hospitality really sets this AirBnb apart from any other we’ve ever stayed at and we cannot recommend it enough. Thank you Yuki!

Amazing stay in Japan made better with an amazing host! We were taken care of and felt welcomed at Kokoro House. There is a huge park about 5 minutes from the Airbnb that is both scenic and tranquil. The house is very spacious which you can’t get in most Japanese hotels and the host was very responsive and kind to us our entire stay even with our broken Japanese😭. Loved it and can’t wait to come back. 🙏🏻❤️
Yuki was very friendly. We really enjoyed staying here.
내집처럼 편안하고 호스트가 굉장히 친절하였습니다. 가족단위 방문객에게 좋을 것 같습니다.
Fantastic Host and Beautiful home!

I’ve been using Airbnb since 2012 and in all that time, this has been the best stay I’ve ever had. Yuki is the kindest, most thoughtful and generous host I’ve come across. From the moment we arrived, every detail had been carefully considered.
Yuki met us at the property and showed us how everything worked, which made us feel instantly at home. The instructions provided were incredibly helpful and clear. I especially appreciated the videos showing how to get there. Everything was easy.
The house was just as pictured, beautifully maintained and very comfortable. We especially loved the bath. The location was fantastic too. The neighbourhood felt safe and local, with plenty of great restaurants nearby and easy access to multiple train stations.
Thank you, Yuki, for being so kind, thoughtful and generous. I can’t wait to return with the rest of my family.

Yuki was extremely welcoming and helpful. He even helped take us to the train station upon departure. The place was well maintained and close to train stations. Overall great place to stay while in Tokyo!
This property is honestly a bargain for it's location, and amenities.  Yuki's help and personality honestly made everything even better.
An extremely friendly host! The house is exactly like described and reflected upon in the pictures.
If we could leave six stars we would. One of the best hosts we have ever encountered. Would recommend to any guests.

Loved our stay at Kokoro House, the host Yuki was wonderful, very helpful and informative as well as just a pleasure to be around. The location is very convenient for exploring around the Tokyo SKYTREE and the train stations are a quick walk away to get around the rest of Tokyo. The house itself is lovely and was perfect for our group, a great place to come back to at the end of a day spent exploring, full of amenities and anything you could need. Highly Recommend!

Nous avons beaucoup apprécié notre séjour à la Kokoro House. Nous avons été accueilli chaleureusement par Yuki. La maison est chaleureuse, authentique et très bien équipée. Le métro est accessible facilement à partir de la maison. Nous garderons un très bon souvenir de notre séjour.

Kokoro house is in a quiet and residential area with mixture of houses. Subway station are 15 - 25 min walk and good connections. Convenience stores and various restaurants are in walking distance as well. Takeshi, Yuki and team are great hosts and support you where possible. I came the second year and looking forward to the next stay.

We loved staying at Kokoro house! It was a lovely experience living in a traditional Japanese home in a lowkey neighborhood. Yuki was very helpful and communicative. He also offered a portable wifi and gave us a ride to the station! I’d definitely recommend the place!
The only downside was that the whole house is covered in tatami mats, which my mom had an allergic reaction to. It wasn’t serious and we have no idea how common this is, but somethingng to check if you’re not used to it!

My friends and I had a lovely time at the house. It was clean and had an air of Japanese traditional living. The was nothing lacking. The street is quiet and local and close to stations.
The host could not be nicer. He was friendly and polite and very helpful.
Highly recommend

This comfortable space is so much full of thousand smiles and happiness. The 2 hosts are warm-hearted people that they sometimes invite me thier lunch or yoga class. The home appliances are nrand new ones 'cause This Grape House has just opened.Every morning we could say hello and good morning to dearest dog, Phoo zzang.

個室もありますが、カーテンで仕切れるので、私はドミトリーで十分でした！清潔でキレイなのはもちろん、木造りのお洒落な空間で、畳は琉球畳！ すごく過ごしやすい雰囲気です。週末は人気のようで満室だったため、当初は2泊の予定でしたが、ラッキーにもキャンセルが出て、思いがけず3泊できました！確実に週末に泊まりたい人は早めの予約をオススメします。気になる共同スペースですが、トイレ、シャワールームが2つずつあって、洗面台は同時に2人で使えるスタイル。個室は最大11人ということでしたが、特にストレスを感じませんでした。ボディソープ、シャンプー、リンスも常備。インスタントじゃないコーヒーが無料で準備されていたり、お湯も自由に沸かせます。私は使いませんでしたが炊飯器なんかもありました！宿泊した日はお雛様が飾られていて、、、何よりもオーナー姉妹さんの気遣いが気持ち良かったです。すごくお客さん同士が仲良くなりやすい雰囲気で、面白い出会いもありました！ かなり賑やかな感じだったので他のお客さんにご迷惑にならなかったかがチョット心配でした><。外出についても自由度が高くて、暗証番号の控えカードをもらって、キー入力で開錠ができます。女性専用ゲストハウスならではの最新セキュリティで、おかげさまで夜の高円寺を堪能できました！またお世話になりたいと思います！どうもありがとうございました！

Koenji Grapehouse is the best hostel I have ever been.
The sisters who host the place are kind and welcoming. They have created a cosy and friendly atmosphere to relax after an exciting day in Tokyo. One night they invited me to make sushi together. Thank you so much for the good talk and great night we spend together! The place is clean and neat. They provide everything you need for a long or short stay - free coffee, tea, washing and drying, breakfast and very good showering goods. The neighboorhood is calm but having a lot of great very japanese restaurants and bars with fair prices. Koenji became one of my most favourite districts in Tokyo. It has a subculture with many second hand shops and local temples. Taking the train to the main spots is easy and fast.
As only woman are allowed to stay it felt very comfortable travelling alone. Thank you so much for making my stay in Tokyo extraoridinary. <3

とても暖かいゲストハウスでした！築浅できれいな間取りですし、古い化粧箱（鏡台？）やテーブルなど、家具にこだわりを感じとても癒される空間です。

女性専用ということで、雰囲気はとてもフレンドリーです。気が合うゲスト同士で飲みに行ったり、一人でゆっくり過ごすこともできる自由さもあります。

地図で見ると駅から離れているように感じますが、商店街を抜けてすぐなので距離を感じません。高円寺名物「純情商店街」はいろいろなお店があり、そこを探検するだけでも楽しく過ごせますよ！

私自身、こちらでとても素敵な方々と出会えて、大事な友達ができ、充実した滞在になりました。
本当にお世話になりました！また東京に行くときには伺いますね！

I couldn't have found a better place to stay my first night in Japan: it is located in a quiet and cute neighborhood very close to the center or Tokyo and Sanae and Kazuko were really lovely with me. Thank you so much!! If I go back to Japan I will go to this house.

I had a wonderful stay at Grapehouse Koenji! Kasuko and her sister were very friendly and welcoming. The space is cute, cozy, and well maintained. The hostel is a short walk away from a train station and Koenji is a great place to get away from the madness of Tokyo. There are several cafes in the area that are great places to stop by in the morning on the way to Koenji station too!
Very nice place at Tokyo! Really like the wood style and will live again when I bk to Tokyo!!!;)

What a nice room to stay! A very welcoming and helpful host. The room, bed, toilet, bathroom, kitchen was so clean and it was exactly shown in the picture... Clear direction and a 10 to 15 minutes walk to the train station. A lot of convenient store and restaurants nearby so I would highly recommend to anyone.
A great place to stay in Tokyo,cosy and clean.I met friendly women and a cute old dog.
The house is very clean and warm. Very suitable for girls! Totally the same as it is in the pictures.

Grapehouse Koenji is a really lovely place! The owner and her sister are really nice people :) The location is good and there's a public bath near by which I really recommend! And that's because there's for example a milk bath which is good for your skin! We also made sushi together with all the people and it was fun! I also became friends with some of the people staying there so I got nothing to complain!
I really appreciate your kindness, lida san. Your guesthouse is very comfortable, clean and convenience. Though I live in Nakano, I want to stay at there again.

this was a nice place to stay; koenji is my favourite place in tokyo, super central and lots of character. it was easy getting around and there are heaps of great cafes and shops. grapehouse is so clean and the host was lovely. i would stay here again.
A beautifully clean hostel in an ideal location, very close to the station. Wonderful, kind, friendly hosts who made the whole experience very comfortable and easy. Thank you very much!
Great place to stay! The hosts are really friendly and helpful. I love staying there! I will definitely come back!

My stay at Grapehouse Koenji was above and beyond all expectations. It was nothing short of excellent in all areas. The facilities are brand new, kitchen and bathrooms are spotless and modern. The complimentary coffee was delicious. Everything was extremely clean. The location itself was better than I could have imagined. Koenji is an ideal neighborhood to explore real Japan in an urban oasis. Within a short walk are countless small stores, delis and restaurants which offer all of the best of Japanese culture and culinary tastings. It is very convenient to public transportation and Shinjuku for easy access to airports.
By far, the owners of Grapehouse are the kindest and most hospitable people I have ever met. They are truly committed to providing a warm and comfortable environment from which to visit Japan. I took a cooking class there in traditional Japanese home cooking - what a treat! I highly recommend this guest house and will definitely be back!
今回
I enjoy staying at Grapehouse.
Owners were very friendly and nice. Thank you for inviting me to the Halloween party.:) I had a great time there!
美味しい食べ物屋もあり、お風呂やもあり、高円寺駅からもわりと近くとても便利。家も綺麗で他の客との出会いも楽しいです。
室内すべてがきれいで、女性専用と安心感もあり、居心地がとてもよかったです！本当におすすめです！

離JR高圓寺車站不遠，商店街裡有各式餐廳、小酒館、菜市場、二手書＆CD店和便利商地等，居住一段時間也很方便，能夠體驗到當地人的生活。
老闆娘人很親切，公共區域和睡房都整理得很乾淨舒適。起居室常會有多國住客，很適合喜歡國際交流的旅人。
因為住客都是女性，住起來也很放心。
清潔でオシャレ！過ごしやすいゲストハウスです。
交通がとっても便利でした。中央線、総武線、東西線が使えますから自由自在でした。

The guesthouse was nice and clean, in a nice neighbourhood where you can experince real japanese life. It is good to stay here for relaxing. Not a lot of socializing going on even if there is a living room for it, but depends on the people I guess.
とても便利です。近所に食べ物屋さんもたくさんありますし、台所も使えます。泊まってる方もフレンドリーでした。

My stay was amazing, the guest house has everything you need and is very close to the Koenji station. This was super helpful for me as I was using the Japan Rail Pass. Great experience! The hostesses are really friendly and helpful, I can't wait to go back!
Second stay at the guest house was just as amazing as before! Love the location!
Sweet atmosphere, beautiful town! and also clean and cozy guesthouse. Hope to visit again soon.

Grapehouse Koenji is a lovely place to stay! It's very convenient in terms of public transport, and there are a lot of really nice shops nearby! The space is also really nice and clean, and managed very well!
Thank you for everything
直前のリクエストにも関わらず大変丁寧に対応いただき、快適に滞在できました。周りにもレストランやコンビニがたくさんあり便利でした。東京に来るときは、是非また利用させていただきたいと思います！
思ったより駅から遠くなかったです。清潔感があり快適に過ごせました。スリッパがないので、気になる方は持参するといいと思います。また利用させていただきたく思います。ありがとうございました。

Clean and cozy. Fully AC on. Kind and warm hospitality. Locationally great to go to travel sites for me. Local foods are great. Really close to convenient store. Next time, I will definitely book here again without hesitation!
This place is super clean and nice!!! The host is also very friendly!!
Comfortable and clean bed.nice toilet

코엔지 상점가를 약 6분~7분정도 걸으면 상점가 끝나는 곳에 바로 안쪽 골목에 있습니다. 처음 오는 사람도 쉽게 찾아 올 수 있을 거라고 생각하구요.
도미토리라서 처음엔 좀 걱정했는데 제가 있는 동안은 다들 친절하고 조심스럽게 사용했기 때문에 딱히 불편한 일은 없었습니다.
매일 낮에는 청소가 되어있었고 청결했습니다.
또한 호스트인 사나에상은 정말 친절하시고 근처 가게들도 소개받아서 방문했었는데 정말 좋은 경험이었습니다.
高円寺の商店街を6～7分くらい歩くと商店街の最後のところにあります。
初めて来た人もすぐ見るかると思います。
ドミトリーで最初はちょっと心配でしたけど泊まってる時は全然問題なくみんなやさしかったです。
毎日掃除ができていてきれいでした。
またホストの早苗さんはとてもやさしくて早苗さんから周りの店などを紹介してもらって行ってみましたが本当にいい経験でした。

Really well located, clean, and a very cosy ambiance. The place is really cute and the host is the nicest person on earth <3
I loved my stay and I definitely recommand the place

Me pareció un lugar muy bueno para pasar unas noches, efectivamente esta caminando a 8 min de la estación Koenji y en este transcurso te encuentras con varias tiendas, restaurantes y bares. La habitación tiene lo necesario, nunca tuve problemas con algo que faltara dentro de la casa, los baños muy limpios y también puedes hacer uso de la cocina, refrigeradora, etc. Era mi primera experiencia de tener una estadía en dormitorios con otras personas y ha sido perfecto. Repetiría de nuevo sin duda.

I had such a wonderful time in Grapehouse. Everyone was so kind and the owner of the house is sooo kind. She is a perfect host. Koenji is also a wonderful district, with wonderful public bath and very near to Shinjuku etc.
連絡をしたら、返事が早くて助かりました。またお世話になりたいです。
정말 깨끗하고 좋았습니다. 여성 전용이라 불편함도 없었고 호스트분도 친절하셨어요. 숙소로 가는 길에 동네상점가를 지나가는데 곳곳에 맛집이 있어서 좋았어요! 다음에도 또 묵고싶네요!

Grapehouse Koenji is the perfect stay- you couldn’t ask for any more. The hosts are lovely, the space is clean, organised, beautiful and cosy. The Koenji location is retro and full of thrift shops and a very short walk to the station. I will return here next time I am in Tokyo- thank you Grapehouse!! Xx
Wonderful space for women and a lovely area of Tokyo.

Grapehouse Koenji is a really lovely place to stay. It’s a dormitory, but still really private, cozy and cool. You get to meet really great ladies from all over the world and Japan. Sanae is an amazing host, and goes out of her way to keep the place clean and rally comfortable. It’s really close to everything that is great about Koenji - one of the best places to stay in Tokyo for music, food, live music and cool fashion.
I loved my stay! The guesthouse was in the most amazing neighborhood in all of Tokyo (in my opinion) and if satay there again if I return. Mellow vibe and felt like home. Thanks for everything!

My first time in a dorm situation, so I was a little apprehensive going in, but everyone was very welcoming and sweet, plenty of space to store my things, very clean and homey atmosphere! Will definitely be back!
호스트도 친절하고 시설도 깨끗하고 좋았습니다 ! 특히 코엔지 거리가 너무 이뻤고 주변에 음식점이나 카페도 많아 편리했습니다
Sanae was wonderful and provided a clean, simple place to stay while you’re in Tokyo. A short 10 min walk to the train and you’re in the central area in no time. She answered any questions I had!

Absolutely wonderful!! The host is very kind and helpful whenever you're in need of help, and the location is good. It's a 5 minute walk from the station, but along the way you encounter many restaurants and drugstores. The home is clean and very cosy too. I will definitely be recommending this to all my female friends.

It’s a great place to stay. Since it’s a dormitory, you could make new friends by just a simple “hi!” Just a walking distance there are many stores and restaurants. There are also several convenience stores as you are walking from the station to the accommodation.

Grapehouse is in a great location, only a 7-10 min walk from the closest train station. You walk through a bunch of restaurants, cafes and other stores. Quiet and safe area. Definitely check out the neighbourhood! Sanae and Minami (hosts) were very helpful and friendly, their dog is so cute! I appreciated the amenities and clean bathrooms/bunks, I would definitely stay here again! Thank you!

Hosts are friendly and welcoming. It is a decent walk (10-15 min) from Koenji station to the airbnb, however i didn't mind because it is an interesting and pretty walk through the neighbourhood. Trains from koenji station go straight to shinjuku which is very convenient. The bed was comfortable and all the amenities were clean and functional. I enjoyed my stay here and would recommend.

ホストの方がとても親切で、子連れでの宿泊でしたが、快適に過ごせました。
コーヒーとお茶がフリーでありますが、コーヒーはちゃんと豆を挽いたものでした。
商店街が近いので、色々と便利です。また東京に来た時は、泊まりたいです。
Had a wonderful stay here! Loved the neighborhood of Koenji and very clean/stylish space. Great introduction to Tokyo!
位置很好， 房間也很乾淨而且房東超級好人❤️，我們會再來的＾＾

Beautiful hostel tucked away in one of Tokyo’s most vibrant neighborhoods. Clean, homey, and great value for money. I’ll definitely come back.
ありがとうございます😊😊😊
女性専用で、気兼ねなく過ごしました。

Si vous recherchez un dortoir pour femme, n'hésitez pas ! Sanae est très agréable (elle a aussi deux petits chiens adorables) Et son dortoir très propre, avec tout ce qu'il faut !
I highly recommend it ! :)
This hostel is super cute. The walk from the subway is nice both at day and night and the hosts were lovely. I would come again!

Absolutely lovely, comfortable "at home" feeling, and so well-kept! I stayed briefly but wish I could return for a couple more weeks. The walk to the train station is also delightful—"bustling," as they say, with many small shops and food/drink establishments. I'd only hesitate to recommend for someone who is perpetually nocturnal and/or jetlagged because I had to be careful about making too much noise getting ready for bed in the middle of the night. Wow, everyone I met here was so kind and gracious; I will remember the warm feeling of this space for sure.

This place is beautiful, cozy and in a perfect location! Probably the cutest neighborhood I got to see in Tokyo :) the host was absolutely wonderful, and stayed up late for my arrival which I greatly appreciate! She also has precious dogs we got to meet :) 10/10 would recommend this place to anyone coming through Tokyo and looking for a warm, comfortable, and clean place to stay!

Great place to stay if you are trying to save money! Shibuya was 30 minutes away by train. Host was extremely nice and accommodating. Rented the bikes for a day and had a great time exploring the neighborhood!
很好的一次住宿體驗 環境非常整潔舒服 室友也很友好  有機會會再來的！
位置很方便，很好找到。放进非常整洁，公共区域的设施也很全。非常棒的一次住宿体验🤗

旁邊有一區商店街
高圓寺站離新宿很近很方便
房間空間有點小
講話容易打擾別人 拿行李不方便
設備完全 乾淨
新年老闆娘還煮年菜給大家吃 很熱情

This place was abusolutely comfortable to stay with convenient location. Though the facility is not very spacious, but I can understand that it's well modifiled from average size of the house located normal residential area, but close to central area of Tokyo. I was really impressed with the way how they maintain and organize this hostel.
좋아요

The hosts and most of guests are Japanese. Staying there was pretty good.
The dorm room has AC, there is a thick fuzzy blanket on each bed so that even though it's cold day, you can feel warm enough. The house might be a bit far from the nearest station, I think.

Thank You Grapehouse Koenji for providing a comfortable and warm space to stay for this backpacker, with an artful interior, tatami mat, and a fusion of modern and traditional Japanese Homestyle stay combined. I'm grateful for the patience and understanding of Sanae-san when arriving late from the airport was inevitable. I appreciate the affection of little Foo, the kawaii inu, who slept on my lap and kept me company while working at the common area, and I'm happy for the hospitality and openness of Minami-san, an employee of the space, despite my not so good nihongo skills. All in all, it's a space with memories I can keep.  本当にありがとうございました。

高円寺駅から商店街を通りぬけ閑静な住宅街にあります。立地抜群です。
お布団がとっても寝やすかったです。ドミトリーは10人部屋ですが、みなさん静かで問題ありませんでした。アメニティも揃っていて不便なかったです！
女将さんがとても親切で安心感があります。
おススメです！
very comfortable and clean,introduce to girls travel alone.

Oh my, I’m still dreaming of my little cubbyhole bed at Grape house, I’ve never slept so well in a new country like I did...
Koenji is a fantastic area, I recommend the area and this hostel to anyone looking for something a little different. x
Cozy and clean place!

ご利用者の方々のレビューを拝見して、こちらにお世話になることを決めました。期待通りの過ごしやすさで快適な滞在でした。チェックインの対応も多くの方々が利用するにふさわしい心遣いに満ちていて好感が持てました。例えば、靴を脱ぐ前にオートロックの説明をしてくださる。とか、チェックインの書類記入の間にスーツケースのコロを玄関先で丁寧に拭いてくださったり。とか、、、
ホストの配慮がゲストにも伝わるのでしょう、ゲスト同士も程よい距離感を保ちつつも気持ちよく挨拶できる方々ばかりでした。
Perfect place where I start my trip in Japan, clean Space, Nice people, and the Koenji district is lovely. The Grapehouse is easy to find From the train station .

Nice and cost place to stay. Near to station (7min) and the street along to station is full of street food and local shops.
Room is clean and quiet during nighttime, no worries on early sleep and getting up early in the morning.
A great experience and place to stay. Highly recommend.
Grapehouse is a fantastic little home away from home in a great neighborhood! I really enjoyed my stay here and met other women traveling as well :)
This place was too meaningful for me. I was able to build great memories with warm people in warm spaces. If I come back to Tokyo, it was such a great accommodation that I really want to come back.

Grapehouse Koenji is located in an excellent area for exploring Tokyo. It is right by Koenji station, which is about a 20-minute subway ride to Shinjuku and Shibuya. The house itself was easy to find (especially with the hosts' thorough directions), even for a first-timer to Japan like myself arriving late at night. I was also very impressed with the cleanliness of the space! The wonderful hosts clean the common areas on a daily basis, and I always felt comfortable coming back to the dormroom after a day of sightseeing. All in all, this was an amazing place to spend my week in Tokyo and I would come back again. Thank you, Grapehouse Koenji!
I really liked how the hostel was in a quite area. The staff was really nice and helpful. There was a nice atmosphere in the hostel and really clean.
This is my 3rd time staying at grapehouse and I always feel so comfortable there. The host is wonderful and I love the location.
clean，quite and friendly

ホストの方の心配りが随所に感じられ、とても快適に過ごすことができました。また東京に行く時はゆっくり滞在できたらなぁ と願っています。ありがとうございました。
Grapehouse Koenji is really wonderful place. I highly recommend this accommodation. Thank you.
코엔지역에서 조금 거리가 있지만 상점가 구경하면서 가면 금방입니다! 호스트 분이 정말 친절하셨고 숙소도 청결했어요.

grapehouse koenji is located in a really nice district that has many different kinds of shops and services. it's very easy to get to major areas in tokyo through the nearest station - koenji station. the house itself is cosy and well kept at all times!
ホストの方が丁寧で、とても親切でした。綺麗な銭湯も近く、とても寛ぐことが出来ました。

10/10 guest house in lovely Koenji. Senae made me feel right at home. Hosting a sushi dinner, and giving me a hot water bottle at night time. Wonderful homely place, with kitchen and living space. Will come back 3000%
Probably the best hostel I have ever stayed in. Very friendly host and the space is very clean. Very convenient location. Would definitely recommend.

アメニティの充実やお洒落な空間で落ち着いたひと時を過ごせます！
オフィスとしても使用させていただき、とても捗りました！

普段は女性専用のゲストハウスですが、コロナ禍ということで特別に滞在させて頂きました。
ワーケーションのための施設を探していた僕にとって、安定した回線と快適な空間だったのでついつい連泊申込するほどくつろがせてもらいました。ありがとうございます！

一週間前に作業場利用のために滞在してみたところ、とっても気に入ってしまったので間を空けずに再予約させて頂きました。
今回もゆったりとした、素晴らしい時間を過ごさせて頂きました。ありがとうございます！

ホストさんとホスト🐶が温かく迎えてくださいます。施設は、感染予防対策をされていて、安心して滞在する事ができました。
酵素玄米、美味しい朝食を出して頂きました。とても美味しく、朝から幸せな気分になります。
高円寺の商店街から程近く、懐かしい昭和な街並みの中に、キラリと光るお店が多くて散策する事が楽しかったです。
ありがとうございました😊

ホストの方が良く配慮してくださり、安心して過ごせる、清潔で快適な宿です。
気に入って頻繁に利用している宿泊客や、ホストと長い関係が続いているお客やスタッフもいて、ホストの方の人の良さを実感しました。
外国の方がいらっしゃる場面もあり、みんな英語で会話していて楽しかったです。
寒い時期だったので、毎日ゆたんぽを布団に入れてくださり、寒がりの私でも安心して眠ることができました。
人懐こい犬に毎日会えて、癒されました。
宿はシャワーしかないですが、近くに小杉湯という有名な銭湯があるので、湯船に浸かりたい人も安心です。
門限がなく何時でも出入りできるのも便利で、高円寺や近辺の街に行き放題でした。
通う距離を短縮するための、10日間ほどの宿泊でしたが、大満足な時間を過ごすことができました。
ありがとうございました。

清潔で気持ちよく過ごせました。
気配りが随所に見られて、迷う事なく、とても過ごしやすかったです。
酵素玄米やランチもとっても健康的で美味しいのでオススメです！お子さん用椅子などあり、ベビーカーでも安心してランチできそうでした。
また遊びに行きたいと思います！
すぐ近くに商店街があって、ぶらぶらしながら、小杉湯などの銭湯にも行けたり、美味しいお店もたくさんあって、楽しくてリピートしました！
オーナーの気遣いもあたたかくて、ドミトリーに長期滞在してる方も良い人ばかりでした。とても清潔で、キッチンを自由に使えます。フリードリンクも豊富で美味しいコーヒーを毎朝いただきました。手作りの酵素玄米を使用した食事も美味しかったです。高円寺の商店街もすぐで、街の探索も楽しめました。オススメのドミトリーです！

Perfect place to stay in Tokyo! Koenji is a very cute neighborhood, and Grapehouse is a short walk from the train station. There are many great cafes and restaurants nearby. The space is very clean, simple, and comfortable. I felt very well taken care of and very safe. I also got to meet many very interesting and kind women. Would stay again!
Very clean and a great place to meet people. If you have a cat, there are two dogs which the owner will bring around.

在这里住了一个月真的很开心，和很多不同的朋友一起聊天一起吃饭，还在这结交到了一个很要好的日本朋友
早苗さん人很温柔，还举行了章鱼烧和寿司派对，帮忙把我一堆行李送到新租的房子里
高园寺这个位置也很好，附近步行就有一堆饭店/杂货店/便利店/银行/邮局/什么的都有，真的很便利
能够在这个民宿住真的很开心！下次还会来玩的
オーナーの方も気さくに話しかけて下さり、かわいいわんちゃんとも触れ合えたし、居心地がよかったです。もう少しゆっくり過ごしたいくらいでした。

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Grapehouse Koenji is a wonderful place to stay. I quickly felt at home. The hostess is very nice and always helps. I made a lot of great friends during my time there. All rooms are clean and very well maintained. From time to time we also cooked together – for example the hostess showed us how sushi and takoyaki are prepared. It's nice that there is a quiet time from 11pm, so a good night's sleep is assured.
Near the accommodation there is everything you need (supermarkets, restaurants, bars, cafes ...). It has great train connections to Shinjuku, Nakano and other popular areas. Grapheouse is 100 percent recommended. When I'm back in Tokyo, I will definitely book Grapehouse Koenji again.
Other benefits: free WiFi, breakfast on request, free coffee & tea, kitchen with all necessary utensils, fridge for groceries and much more.
Thank you Sanae-san for this perfect stay. 💜

6일 동안 즐거운 시간을 보내고 왔습니다.
호스트 분이(사나에 상) 친절할 뿐만 아니라 함께 묵은 사람들 모두 좋은 분들이었습니다.
그레이프 하우스 코엔지는 역에서 가깝고, 그곳으로 가는 길에 수많은 가게, 상점들 그리고 음식점들을 볼 수 있습니다. 근처에 코스기유도 있어서 대중 목욕탕을 경험할 수도 있구요. 다만 겨울이라 그런지 조금은 추웠기에 숙소 안에서 입을 긴팔이 필요했습니다!
도쿄를 처음 여행하면서 가장 잘한 선택은 이곳에 머물기로 결정한 일이었습니다. 괜찮은 가격으로 깔끔한 숙소를 찾으시는 분들께 추천드립니다:)
It’s close to the station but also very peaceful at night, the host is super friendly and flexible during check in and out. The kitchen and bathrooms are very clean as well.

1日前に予約したのに、全てスムーズに。
とても快適で安心なところです。
ホストさんがとてもご親切に色々してくれて感謝です。場所もとても便利。
またぜひ行きたいと思います!

I stayed at Grapehouse for 1 month- initially I was worried about staying so long in a dorm but it was an extremely positive experience. All the others in the hostel were so nice, I felt very safe and comfortable, and the beds feel spacious and private. Sanae-san is an incredibly kind host, always willing to give recommendations and she also organised a takoyaki party, and sushi making party for when I left. All the communal areas are kept very clean and overall it feels like a very cosy and homely space. The location is also really great- Koenji is an absolute gem of an area with so many things to check out, and is also very convenient to go to Shinjuku. I would definitely stay here again.
É um local calmo, limpo, bem localizado e próximo do metrô. Perto há muitos restaurantes e padarias. Recomendo bastante.

Great place. Great location (only twenty minutes from Shinjuku on train). The place is nice. The host has a super sweet dog. Such a pity I couldnt stay longer. Will come back here! Thanks for being a great host!

This hostel is amazingly comfortable and has a warm atmosphere! The kitchen and lounge area are cozy, with pamphlets on the shelves that give information about the area. It also helps to encourage conversations with the other guests if you want to chat. Moreover, the hostel has almost everything you could need for both short and longer term stays. The amenities are also easy to use as well.
Meanwhile, the host is very friendly and welcoming. I would love to stay here again!

とても落ち着いた雰囲気で、共有スペースではゆっくりとくつろぐことができました。
りんちゃんもすごく可愛くて、旅の疲れが癒されました。
ありがとうございました。

手荷物の預かりに柔軟に対応していただきありがたかったです。
ドミトリーのお客さんとの会話も楽しめました。
また、わんちゃんが非常に愛想良く懐いてくれて可愛かったです。
高円寺に用事の際は、また利用したいです。
Thoroughly enjoyed staying at Grapehouse Koenji and would not hesitate to stay there again!
Cosy and clean accommodation, with a super lovely host!
First time staying at a hostel and it was great! The host was very kind and helpful.
朝食の酵素玄米おにぎりや手作りの味噌汁、卵焼き、全てが大変、美味しかったです。ありがとうございました。
호스트님이 친절하시고 숙소 분위기가 따뜩하고 편안해서 잘 묵고 가요 ~~~ ^,^

I think there is no better ad for this guesthouse than the number of people I met there who have stayed there repeatedly and keep coming back. I stayed for 5 nights and I really felt at home from the first night, thanks to the cozy space (well-equipped kitchen, common space where you can chat with others, everything you need for a good stay is available) but also thanks to a very kind and helpful attitude of Minami, who was in charge while I was there. Absolutely recommend it, I think all the positive reviews on here are justified and I will also be coming back.

Amazing guest house with the sweetest host <3 I think the shower was a bit weird for me as the water would turn hot and then cold after a while but maybe that was just me 😅 Great place, great value, very cozy and comfortable! I would definitely recommend.
I had a great stay! House was very clean and welcoming! The host was also very attentive and responsive! Would love to stay here again!

Such a safe haven, very chill, authentic local vibes. Minami was a stellar host and the other guests were also super friendly, it’s really nice to come home to such a warm atmosphere after a tiring day out + friendly community when traveling solo! The place is quite a distance from koenji station but you’ll pass so many shops and cafes you won’t mind the walk. The home itself is in a quiet, residential area and feels calm and restful. Thank you Minami + co for a great stay ♥️

Merci beaucoup pour l’accueil très sympathique .
La communication a été parfaite .
Super quartier .
Je recommande !

首先，必须推荐所有想要单身或者结伴出行日本的女性朋友来这里居住。主理人和一起居住的朋友们都是很亲切热情的，在这里居住会感觉非常开心。因为居住在这里的人来自世界各地，最常用的语言是英语，虽然我的English非常poor，但大家都很有耐心和我交流解释聊天。
很遗憾的是，因为我的旅游行程非常紧张，基本和其他居住人没有很多交流，也没有坐在榻榻米上看电视，下次如果有机会再来的话，我会放慢节奏，感受这间房子的氛围，和大家一起聊天，去附近的店里买菜做饭，去感受商业街上夜晚的快乐。
🌸关于位置：
grapehouse的位置在高円寺，离新宿站只有两站距离，下站稍微走点路就到了。
🌸关于入住：
主理人也会很详细地告诉你注意事项。
如果是中国人朋友来这里，会有之前住过的中国人朋友写下的中文版。
最后我想道歉，很不好意思在楼下收拾行李到凌晨，发出了很多声音打扰到了楼下的主理人和家人们，垃圾分类也没有做到位，实在是不好意思，虽然各位并没有对此说什么，但是打扰到了各位的休息实在很抱歉😭
it's great grateful and lucky that i can find such a wonderful place when traveling alone. All of the people here are very very nice. The time to live together is not that long, but I am totally impressed by everyone's warm heart. Thank to all the people i meet here. I'm sorry to make the noise when someone's sleeping. You are so nice!!!
感谢能有这次的入住机会，虽然时间很短，但是很开心🙏🏻
This was my second stay at grapehouse and again was a great place to stay. Koenji is a wonderful area - the location is great and convenient and the hostel is so lovely. Highly recommend.
It was really nice af Grapehouse Koenji, very friendly and open minded people and a cosy welcoming atmosphere :)
Felt right at home, love the vibe and will visit again!

It was already my second time staying in Grapehouse Koenji. It is a lovely place to stay at whenever you are in Tokyo. The communication is easy with the host. She relpies really fast and helps you out if you have a question. The room and common area is really lovely and cozy. Would book it again when going to Tokyo.
非常に居心地の良い宿泊地でした。居間、台所、トイレお風呂洗面所などの共同スペースも毎日掃除してくださっていて清潔感があり、快適に過ごせました。気分に合わせて、ホストさん、他の宿泊者さんとコミュニケーションをとったり、自分の時間を過ごしたりできました。近くに泊まる際はまたお世話になりたいと思います。ありがとうございました。

J'ai passé un mois incroyable à GrapeHouse Koenji, une expérience vraiment magnifique. La guesthouse est parfaitement située, au calme, juste à côté du cœur animé de Koenji avec ses bars et ses restaurants. L'ambiance à GrapeHouse est très conviviale, et l'intérieur est agréable et d'une propreté impeccable, grâce au passage quotidien d'une personne pour le ménage.
Sanae-san est une hôte attentionnée et discrète, toujours aux petits soins pour les invités. Elle est réactive et à l'écoute de toutes vos demandes. Elle s'assure que l'ambiance reste chaleureuse entre les invités en organisant parfois des repas en commun, une excellente occasion de découvrir la cuisine japonaise !
Préparez-vous à recevoir la visite de Rin-chan, le petit chien de l'hôte, véritable mascotte des lieux.
En un mois, j'ai rencontré de nombreuses personnes différentes, et tout le monde était très respectueux . GrapeHouse va me manquer ! ❤️❤️❤️

Segunda vez que me hospedo en Grape House. Volveré. Tienes ganas de estar ahí... Sentirte cómoda en un viaje es importante,y en los hostels no  es algo común Éste lugar te ofrece descanso. Las duchas me encantan.
非常好，会推荐给所有人！
真的特别特别喜欢grape house ，但是这次行程太赶了，只住了两天就走了，非常非常遗憾，房东阿姨人超好，室友也都超好！很爱她们很爱grape house！希望马上又能来玩😭来的第一晚就特别幸运的碰上了party！吃到了很正宗很好吃的日本食物！！！特别喜欢！！
很好，很乾淨，休憩的好地方。

Everything was perfect
But she MUST tell this dorm has dog before I check in.
I have dog forbia.
Anyway, sleeping place was sperated with dog, but sometimes the dog came up. And this made me panic.
숙소에 개있음 개무서워하는 입장에서는 패닉왔었습니다. 참고하세요

不好意思来评价晚了！
非常可爱的民宿，大家都很可爱温馨，下次来日本还想住在这里☺️

Amazing guesthouse! I felt really safe and at home. The atmosphere is warm and welcoming. Everything is super clean. The little dog Rin is adorable and the hostess really nice. I recommend to anyone visiting Tokyo alone or with a friend !
Harika konaklama için tekrar teşekkür ederim 🙏
I had a wonderful stay and the host and her pup were so kind. I recommend for any solo female traveler. Incredibly clean, safe and easy to get to anywhere in Tokyo. Thank you and hope to stay again!
It was so convenient! Thank you for your kindness:)
Grapehouse Koenji is a lovely place to stay at, it has a warm and welcoming atmosphere! You can have nice chats with roommates and can take walks around Koenji to shop, eat and meet nice people:)

This is a great spot to land, especially if it’s your first time in Japan (like it was for me). It’s close to the train station, and Koenji is a lovely neighbourhood with endless yummy places, plus two tattoo-friendly onsens within walking distance. In terms of accessibility, the place is super tiny with a very steep staircase (compared to North American building standards). Aside from that, I liked it so much, I booked again for my last week!! Host and staff are so kind. Book now :)
너무 친절하시고 숙소도 너무 깔끔했어요!! 다만 아무래도 다 같이 생활하다는 거다 보니 발소리 때문에 침대가 울렸어요 예민하시면 귀마개 챙기는 거 추천합니다!! 잘 쉬다 왔습니다 ㅎㅎㅎ
位置很好～距离地铁站大概7-8分钟的路程，而且路上也非常多有趣的小店！房东很热情，之前在住宿有看到清洁卫生的阿姨是怎么工作的，真的非常干净。最最最重要的是在这里遇到了很多有趣、可爱的女孩子，特别特别好…交了一些朋友，完全意想不到！所以真的非常推荐～
숙소 주변에 빈티지샵과 카페, 식당이 많고 전철과의 거리도 10분 정도되나 걸을만 합니다. 숙소가 많이 깨끗하진 않지만 가격대비 훌륭합니다
とてもいい体験でした！みんな全部優しくて、友達もできました。リンちゃんはめっちゃかわいいです！今度は本当にありがとうございました！
I loved my stay at Grapehouse Kōenji!! I met so many interesting people from around the world. It is definitely an experience I will cherish, and I will be back :)

滞在先が2階なので、大きい荷物をお持ちの方は、ちょっと大変です。
オーナーさんは、とても気遣いさんで、頼もしかったです。コンビニも近くにあって便利。
⭐︎-1の理由は、バスタオルが一滞在に一枚だけだったのと、さすが都内のせいか料金お高め。フェイスタオルは付いていません。
とても静かな滞在先でした。

게스트 하우스는 처음이라, 어색했고 적응하는 것에 주의를 기울여야 했습니다. 그러나 호스트 분께서 친절하게 안내해주시고 제 편의도 고려해주셔서 다행히 적응에 어려움을 느끼지 않았고 여행 내내 편하게 머물 수 있었습니다. 다양한 국적의 사람들과 반갑게 인사하는 것으로 하루를 시작하는 것이 기분이 좋았습니다. 코엔지라는 지역 또한 평화롭고 여유로운 느낌이 드는 매력적인 곳이었습니다. 다음에 코엔지에 머무르게 된다면 또 이용하고 싶습니다. 머무르는 동안의 친절에 감사했습니다.ᐟ
Very Good!!

This was the cutest hostel I’ve ever stayed in! The host has created a homey and cosy space, I felt so relaxed here. The communal space was very clean and I loved all the little details from all the souvenirs from past guests on display to the free coffee and super cute kitchen space. Because it’s super small it’s really easy to meet and chat with other guests, I met some lovely people here! Loved the area, it felt very hip and not super touristy either. Great local restaurants and bars and well as amazing thrift/vintage stores! Thank you so much
房东太太非常好！住宿环境非常好！
周りの方とのコミュニケーションを含めて、楽しくのんびりと過ごせました。すべて清潔感がありました。ワンちゃんもとても可愛かったです！
Great stay experience, very warm.The girls who live together are very friendly and have made many good friends. I hope I can have a chance to live here next time I go to Tokyo.
非常舒适的两日借宿，也认识了很多热心善良的人。

여성 전용 게스트하우스라는 점이 마음에 들어 묵게 되었습니다.
깨끗하고 아늑한 곳에서 새로운 사람들과 만날 수 있어서 좋았습니다.
무엇보다 호스트님이 엄청 친절하십니다. 감사했습니다 !!
다음에 고엔지에 또 간다면 다시 묵고 싶습니다.

제 첫 도쿄 여행 추억의 큰 지분을 차지한 숙소입니다. 주인 아주머니가 너무 친절하시고, 강아지도 정말 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 마침 근처에서 본오도리 행사가 있었는데 아주머니께서 알려주셔서 직접 같이 데려다 구경도 시켜주시고 맛있는 타코야끼도 사주셨답니다 :> 룸메이트들도 정말 좋은 사람들만 걸려서 좋은 기억 쌓다 갑니다! 또 참고로 코엔지에 맛집이나 구경할 옷 가게가 정말 많아요. 이 주변만 돌아보다가 하루를 다 썼답니다. 개인적으로 일본의 이런 조용한 골목 동네느낌을 좋아하는데 그거에 걸맞은 최고의 동네와 숙소였어요!
깨끗하고 JR노선 지하철이 근처에 있어요 메트로 패스권 못 써요 근처 시장?이 힙해요
快適に過ごせした!　またお世話になります。
2度目の滞在でしたが、他のゲストさんも皆さんルールを守って、気持ちよく過ごせました。夜ぐっすり眠れます。女性がひとりでも安心して滞在できる場所だと思います
很不错的体验！房东很热情很友好，住宿离高原寺站大概有10分钟左右步行时间，路上有很多很多好吃的店铺。明年有时间还会来这里住！房东还有一只超级超级可爱的小狗！🌹

Vraiment très contente d’avoir pu passer mes premiers jours au Japon dans cette auberge !!
Je repasserais dans doute pour un proche séjour si je retourne sur Tokyo !!
Definitely bringing my friends to stay here the next time I come back to Koenji.

I enjoyed staying here! The host and employees have been kind, friendly, attentive, and responsive. It felt just like coming home in the time that I have been here. It's definitely a pleasant place to stay at, especially as a solo traveler. Other guests have been mindful and respectful of each others' spaces and time as well. It takes about 10 minutes to walk to the nearest station, and a coin laundromat is close by the residence for your convenience. You can see a cute dog there too. Highly recommend (お勧めします)!

日本人ですが、一人の時間を楽しみたく滞在させて頂きました。たくさんの外国人旅行者との出会いがあり、まるで留学しているようでした。
ベットルームが共同なので寝られるか少し不安でしたが、全く気にならず快適でした。
ホストの方もとても優しく、高円寺の町がとても好きになりました。機会があればまた滞在したいです。

中野セントラルパークでのイベントのために宿泊しました。高円寺駅前の商店街を抜けた住宅地にあり、静かで落ち着いたところです。商店街にはもちろん各種のお店が揃ってとても便利。宿にも洗濯機がありますが、近くにコインランドリーも。肝心の公園にはバスで10分以内に着くので、たいへん助かりました。施設はこぢんまりしていますが、清潔でくつろげる雰囲気です。女性専用なので無防備で過ごせます。ホストさんも親切で丁寧で、可愛らしい小型犬が歓迎してくれたのが嬉しかったです。女性の一人旅におすすめです。

I strongly recommend this place for solo women traveling in Tokyo. It’s a short walk to the train station to get wherever you need to go, but in koenji there are lots of shops, restaurants, cafes, anything you need you can get close to home. I bought coats at the nearby thrift store mode-off. You can order breakfast the night before, or find a cafe nearby. It’s a lively neighborhood with so many things I wasn’t able to discover even a small fraction of its wonders. 2 bathrooms and showers all very clean. The common area is small but cozy so you can meet other travelers or you can keep to yourself. The host Sanae-san is very helpful and welcoming. She helped me ship my luggage to my next stay in Kyoto. Her puppy Rin is a very cute and sweet boy. I loved my time here so much I cannot express enough how great it was.

I really enjoyed my stay (5 nights dorm) at Grapehouse Koenji. Sanae is a very nice and sweet lady who makes a wonderful breakfast if you want.
Everyone is very quiet and considerate to others. It is nice to talk with others from all over the world.
I can definitely recommend Koenji grapehouse. There is a shopping street nearby with very nice izakayas.
Enjoy and stay at grapehouse koenji!
Thank you Sanae!

Location is good, the owner is friendly. There are rules in place to ensure peace and quiet in the dorm room. However, some people may not follow this and leave the door open at 2 am :) Or a snorer one may keep you up until the morning. Apart from that, if your suitcase is large, it will be difficult to carry it upstairs. However, Sanae-san helps you store it in the office at the entrance. You can even weigh it with a hand scale before going to the airport. You can cook comfortably in the kitchen and relax in the common area.
第一次住民宿，超级棒的体验，交到了不同地方的朋友，超级开心~阿姨们人都很好~下次来东京玩会再来住，好好逛逛高圆寺❤️
特别适合一个人来旅行短暂住几天！房东人特别好！下次来东京还会再来的！
非常好的住宿体验！地理位置便利，到达高円寺駅只需走几分钟；房间、床铺、公共空间都打理得很干净整洁，室内温度很舒适；房东与住客都很友善，也很好地尊重着界限，即使是内向的人也会觉得很舒适。我希望能在这里住更久。向所有人推荐。小狗Rin很可爱！

Sanae's warm welcome to Grapehouse Koenji was so appreciated. Her dog Rin is also so cute!
Sanae treated her guests with great care, even providing hot water bottles at night to keep our feet warm. The hostel was cosy and the other girls were friendly too, I really enjoyed my stay!

I had a very pleasant stay! Very clean and tidy. Also very close to the shopping areas and the Koenji station. The host was very helpful with my check in and luggage. I had a nice time talking to other travellers and playing with the pup! 🐾
很干净整洁，很适合一个人的旅程，很舒服，下次再一个人去肯定要再次入住。
훌륭한  숙소 였습니다~  호스트님, 게스트님 모두 친절하였고 처음 일본여행에 좋은 기억이 되었습니다!  외국어를 잘하면 더 많은  기억을 남길 수 있었을텐데 하고 아쉽기는 하지만 미숙한 언어로도 마음이 전해지는 게 새삼 감사했습니다.
짧게 머물다 갔는데, 다음에 도쿄에 온다면 한달정도 머무르고 싶을 정도로 좋았어요 호스트분들께서 정말 친절하셨고 숙소도 좋았습니다 주변에 먹을 거리도 많고 동네가 엄청 예뻤어요 ㅎㅎ 감사합니다!!

I am very happy to stay in grapehouse for two nights. The room is very clean and everything is very convenient! They are all cute girls from all over the world! I also made an Australian friend and a Filipino friend! I‘m very happy! Thanks again to Grape Mom for providing such a great guesthouse! When I come to Tokyo, I will definitely come here first! In addition! The dog is so cute!
좋았더용
已经在这里住过很多次了，入住便捷，非常温馨可爱的小屋！🥹以后还会再来入住、非常感谢！

This place is amazing!! I loved the location, so many cute things to do around the area, onsen & vintage shops.
The place is super clean, and she has thought about every detail. Would highly recommend staying here to make your stay in Tokyo special :)
A nice place to stay somewhat away from the hustle and bustle. The host is wonderful and kind. Chatting with other guests in the common area is also really nice. Great atmosphere.
It felt like home. Such a a warm and cosy place. The owner is very helpful and friendly 💕🍇 definitely coming back

I only stayed here for 1-2nights, i cant wait to come back again! There is even hair straightener!! It is very clean, everyone is respectful, the host is very kind as well. Thanks a lot for this :) 100% recommend!!

I had an amazing stay at Grapehouse! The staff are very friendly and helpful and give local recommendations. I loved the local area, Koenji was my favourite part of Tokyo. Coming back to the hostel at the end of the day felt like coming home. I will definitely return to grapehouse!
Seamless experience, friendly team, everyone respected the rules, 100% recommend it.
蛮不错的，很安静，可以睡个好觉。租户都非常文明

J’ai passé deux semaines incroyables, l’hostel était impeccable, j’ai adoré Koenji c’était vraiment super sympa de séjourner dans ce quartier. Et les dames de l’hostel sont adorables. Je n’hésiterais pas à revenir si je dois repasser à Tokyo ! 🍓
I only stayed for a short time but the owner is really nice. Everything is very clean and looks nice. I also enjoyed the neighbourhood. I would love to come back.
这是我第二次来Grapehouse Koenji，这里一如既往地整洁、令人安心。房东热情地接待了我，小狗狗Rin也非常可爱。我在这里结识了很好的朋友🤍
非常温馨干净的青旅🥹因为是全女所以香香的，七夕节还写了自己的愿望，地理位置也很好 在高円寺附近逛街超方便 希望下次去东京也能住这里
Good house and good stuff! And I really love going through the market street before getting to the house!! Want to stay there again
坐两站地铁能到达新宿 很方便 房东主人的狗狗很可爱！
房东十分热心，入住之后要求讲解细致☺️小狗也非常可爱
고데기, 체중계 있는거 너무 좋아요! (이거 유지해주세요~!) 영어 잘하셔서 소통하기도 편했어요! 다인실 침실이지만 커튼으로 프라이빗하고 샤워실/화장실도 깨끗하게 2개씩 있었어요! 또 도쿄에 가면 묵을게요🖤
很幸福的几天！！

Me encantó alojarme aquí, buscaba un lugar seguro para mujeres y este fue el ideal. El tocador del baño cuenta con plancha y secadora, eso me gustó mucho! Todo pensado por la dueña del hostal, que claramente esta consciente de albergar a muchas mujeres y por lo tanto sus detalles en el bañoy en las habitaciones son lindas.
Solo debes cuidar no ser muy ruidosa ya que compartes el cuarto con más chicas, considera que los españos son pequeños pero considerando que si estás fuera todo el día visitando lugares, al llegar a dormir es tan cómodo que rara vez te despiertas por el ruido de alguien entrando a la habitación.
Volvería a quedar aquí sin dudarlo.
很好的房东，沟通没有太大问题。来来往往的室友也非常友善。适合爱交朋友的旅客居住。
Loved staying here. The host is so lovely and the place is so beautiful :)
This was the perfect place to stay. Everything about the accommodation was amazing. I let so many kind people and the location was wonderful! Full of character. Thank you very much!
C’est un bon bâtiment.Cozy et confortable
いつでもありがとうございます。良い場所です。

고엔지에 관심이 있다면 가성비 있게 묵을수있는 숙소입니다!
화장실이나 숙소는 전체적으로 깔끔하고, 아쉬운점은 4박 3일이었는데 큰 타월 한장만 제공 된다는 점이었어요(추가 수건과 빨래는 100엔으로 이용가능)
그래도 가성비가 너무 좋아서 괜찮았습니다:)
다른 워시 제품은 기본적으로 구비가 되어 있지만 치약은 따로 구비되어있지않아 챙겨가시는게 좋을듯해요!
걱정 많았는데 방도 넓고 깨끗하고 침구류나 수건도 깨끗해서 좋았어요! 위치도 신바시역까지 도보로 이동 가능해서 좋았구요, 호스트분도 너무 친절하시고 무엇보다 한국분이시라 말이 통해서 더 좋았습니다:) 담번에 친구들이랑 또 한번 가고싶네요!! 잘 지내다가 갑니당☺️
我们来日本8次了，这是我们最满意的一次住宿体验。房间又大又干净，有两个卫生间及洗澡间都是干湿分离。民宿地处银座商区，地理位置极佳，步行可到新桥及汐溜地铁站。房东人超级热情，来民宿那天飞机晚点房东一直等我们到夜里11点。和房东短暂的相处我们已经成为朋友。总之是一次非常开心的住宿体验，下次来东京一定好选择住在这里！

먼저 친절하고 세심하게 배려해주신 호스트께 감사드립니다.
그에 걸맞게 룸 상태는 최상이었습니다.
침구류,주방,샤워실,화장실 등등
모든 곳이 청결하고 정돈 상태가 아주 좋았습니다.
특히 룸이 상당히 넓고 두개의 샤워실과 화장실은 다인 가족이 숙박해도
불편하지 않게 이용할 수 있겠더군요.
JR신바시 역과의 접근성도 좋고 2층 계단이라 걱정했었는데
층고가 높지 않아 쉽게 오르내릴수 있어 좋았습니다.
5~6명이 이용해도 전혀 답답하지 않을 정도로 넓은 곳이라
다음에는 가족들과 함께 이용하고 싶습니다.

Good place. nice host.
Thank you for rent me a nice place.
The best choice for a tokyo city tour.
우선 반갑맞아주신 호스트님도 너무 좋고
하네다공항에서 하마마츠초로 들어가시는 분들에게는 위치도 너무 좋습니다.
그간 도쿄에가면 항상 호텔을 이용하다가 이번에는 호텔스케줄이 여의치않아서 비앤비를 이용하게 되었습니다. 다른 외국에서는 호스트분들과 영어로 소통해야해서 항상 불편했었는대.. 호스트분이 한국분이라 너무 편하고 좋았습니다. 신바시에 진짜 아무도 모르는 맛있는 곳도 많이 알려주시고~ 또 일본에 가게되면 꼭 다시 숙박하고 싶은 장소에요! 진짜 호텔안가고 꼭 여기갈려구요.. 마지막날 정신없어서 와이프 귀걸이도 놓고왔는대 서울이 오시는길에 택배도 보내주시고.. 진짜 너무감사하고 감사합니다. 시간날때 한국오시면 꼭 식사라도 한끼 대접하고 싶습니다. 덕분에 좋은 추억 만들고왔습니다~ 감사합니다

Excellent accueil d'Insik. Hôte très prévenant et attentionné. Les sanitzires en double (douche ET wc) ainsi sue la localisation sont vraiment les + de ce logement très bien situé à 10min de la gare de Shimbashi. A recommander !

Insik has been amazing, hospitable and kind. We enjoyed our stay not just because of the room, but also because he took the time to show us around and help us with our shopping. We couldn’t have had that much fun without him

チェックインからチェックアウトまで、とても丁寧に対応いただきました。とても優しい方で、安心して過ごす事が出来ました。
お部屋は清潔で快適でしたし、近くにコンビニもあり便利でした。少し歩けばバーやごはん屋さんもあって、良い立地です。羽田空港からのアクセスも便利でした。また機会があれば利用したいと思います。ありがとうございました！
房间非常大，干净、舒适，床好舒服，是法国进口的。我和朋友一共住了三天，还意犹未尽。感谢帅哥房东的款待，最后还帮我们把行李拖到车站，真的非常感谢🙏🙏

I've been to Japan for many times, the rooms is the cleanest and tidy place I lived in, and the location is very good. It's very convenient to walk to Ginza. The handsome owner will guide you nearby supermarkets and restaurants. It's very convenient. I will make a reservation again!(^з^)

I cannot stress enough how great Insik is as a host and how amazing this place is.
The place: Spotless, in a safe quiet neighbourhood, across the main road from a bustling site of hundreds of small hole in the wall eateries and close to the train station. There are convenience stores a stone's throw away as well as a mini supermarket. The best part is the apartment has 2 toilets and 2 showers. It also has everything you may need to cook a simple meal if you feel so inclined. We also walked to Tsukiji Market in about 20 mins.
The host: Insik is amazing. He met my mum and aunt and helped them carry their luggage up the stairs. He also worried about them when it rained - checking if they had umbrellas and offering to meet them at the station with umbrellas. He also was instantly contactable for any queries relating to the apartment or for anything else. He is very friendly, kind and a nice person. I would not hesitate to stay here again.
I can't think of a single downside to our stay in Insik's place. Really great place, person and experience.

The best place I've ever visited!!!!!
1. Host is very friendly, helpful and thoughtful. Host explained us about room facilities one by one, felt like we become real guest, received a kind hospitality! We made few plan so he helped us, giving us good suggestions. And we were actually satisfied so much for them, could feel local Tokyo :)
2. 'Rooms' is superrrrrrrrrr clean, quite and the room is very spacious also! Whatever you need at that moment is located on the right place. To be honest, I never felt any discomforts here. My favorite thing was black window by the way XD What a nice place for taking a rest!
3. The place was close to Shinbashi station, where Ginza line, Tokyo Toei line, Yurikamome Line are passing by, was a really good transportation spot! There are many convenience stores, restaurants, cafe, izakaya, supermarkets etc. As a business park area, atmosphere was neat and tidy.
In a word, strongly recommend 'Rooms' for your Tokyo trip :')

One of the best Airbnb’s I’ve ever stayed in. It’s extremely spacious by Tokyo standards. Has a big full size bed plus two doubles. Can easily fit four people in there. Maybe one more. And there is a nice bathroom area where there are two separate showers and two separate toilets. And a little living room area that really makes it feel spacious. Additionally, it’s very clean and well decorated and feels very cozy!
A 5-10 minute walk from the Shimbashi Station which can get you anywhere you need to go (a few stops away from both Shibuya and Ginza). There are also a lot of little izakaya and restaurants along that walk so you can definitely grab a bite to eat there one night. It’s a bit secluded, so it’s very quiet which is nice after a long busy day in Tokyo.

Insik truly went out of his way to be helpful so don’t be afraid to ask him questions about your stay. Extremely thoughtful guy, and he’s also very intelligent and well-spoken! One of the best, if not the best, hosts I’ve ever had. All around extremely happy with this Airbnb and would absolutely stay here again if I return. Thanks, Insik!

这里真的是我住过最干净的民宿了，特别特别干净，而且客厅很大，有两个卫生间，房东很热情，告诉我们很多信息，还亲自去地铁站接我们。刷新了我对民宿的看法。交通很方便，新桥站是个大站，所以去那里都很方便，省去了很多换乘的麻烦。从成田机场有直达的地铁，不用换乘，很方便，大概1300日元。到了新桥从A2出口出来就可以了。民宿到地铁站之间有太多太多的吃饭的地方了，路上还有全家的超市。房东会每天都问我们需要什么帮助没有。我觉着一切都特别的顺利，但最让我感到满意的是，房间真的太太太干净了。我下次来东京一定会再住这里。

휴가철에 호텔이 다 너무 비싸서 에어비앤비로 알아보다 우연히 예약을 하게 되었습니다. 솔직히 처음에 후기가 다 좋은 말 밖에 없어서 걱정했었습니다만, 직접 묵어보니 왜 다들 좋다는 이야기만 했는지 알 것 같아요. 체크인 전 부터 신경써 주시더니, 체크아웃 할 때까지 꼼꼼히 신경써 주셔서 감사했습니다:)
사진으로 봤을때는 솔직히 일본 집이 넓어봤자지,라 생각했는데 생각보다 넓은 집에 놀랐습니다.
숙소 안에 숙소근처 맛집리스트도 뽑아놓으셨고, 숙소 안에 가이드북도 꽤 많이 비치되어있었습니다. 아무런 계획을 세우지 않고 갔더라도 충분히 놀 수 있을 정도였습니다. 저희가 태풍올 때 묵게되어 여러곳을 둘러보지 못해 아쉬울 정도였어요.
다들 다음에 또 도쿄에 오게된다면 다시 이 곳에서 묵고싶다 할 정도로 마음에 드셔하셨습니다:)
다음에 기회가 된다면 또 뵙고 싶어요. 2박3일 짧은 기간 동안 감사했습니다! 편하게 잘 놀았습니다!!

Sik was a wonderful host. Very clean, convenient location in the Shimbashi Station area. Easy to get to all locations around Tokyo. Sik was very friendly and spoke good English. He even bought us breakfast one morning. Great recommendations for restaurants and interesting sites to visit. I would go back!!
这是我住过最棒的民宿！房间非常干净整洁，非常舒服。房东人很热情，人很好，入住这个房间是我在东京的旅程中最满意的部分。强烈推荐给所有人！如果有机会再来东京，我一定要来这里住～

Moon是我旅途中遇到最贴心的房东之一，因为飞机比较早，到达时候离check-in时间还有两小时，房东推荐当地人去的美食店帮我们点单，还请我们咖啡，我们都有些不好意思（。民宿位置靠近新桥，距离羽田半小时车程很方便，也可以选择去汐留站路过繁忙的NTV. 房间适合3-5人的朋友出游，两个卫生间洗漱不会拥挤：) 今次在东京还是太匆忙了没空和房东多聊聊，如果想悠闲得在东京度过一段时间了解当地生活，房东可以给不错的建议哦。Thanks for the warm and sweet host, we all had a wonderful  trip.
Excellent stay with the host. We were welcomed by Insik upon our arrival. He took us around and showed us the amenities of the room. The room is sparkling clean, roomy and looks as advertised.

We were a party of two staying here, so it was extremely spacious (extra beds, 2 toilets and 2 showers!) compared to other places. Insik's place is very clean and offered all the amenities that we needed including a hot water kettle, cups, basic toiletries, mini fridge and washing machine. This is our first time here in Japan, and it was the start of our honeymoon Tokyo trip. The host Insik is very friendly and hospitable, we're so used to Airbnb hosts being very hands-off, some hosts we never meet face to face. Insik made a point to  meet us guests, and we truly appreciate that, he made our stay more enjoyable with his tips and recommendation. The location is good, it's a short walk to the subway and there are plenty of recommended places nearby. This was by far the best Airbnb experience we've had! Would highly recommend.

Fantastic place， very clean，very convenient。
Sik is sososo nice，he also provides some food recommend and tips for us！
Highly recommend place！
방 정말 좋아요 !! 특히 화장실이 두개여서 아침 준비시간에 친구와 기다림없이 일정 맞춰 여행할수 있었어요 ! 물론 방도 깨끗하고 세심한 부분까지 다 챙겨주셔서 좋은 추억 여기서도 만들고 갈수 있었네요 ~ 감사합니다 ^^

Sik is an absolutely wonderful host, really goes above and beyond to help you and make sure you are comfortable. I cannot recommend Rooms enough. the service you receive here is incomparable.
