The place is very spacious with everything you would need. Very clean and in a nice quiet locations. It has western style showers as well!
Thank you so much for everything you did for us, Sik, we had the best time staying with you.
Fantastic hands-on customer service. Nicely furnished apartment. The best AirBnB experience my family and I have ever had in our many trips to Tokyo.
Sik是一个很好客并且友善的人，在楼下等我们还帮我们搬行李，由于我的膝盖受伤了。sik还给了我止痛贴，为我们介绍如何使用家里的设备，给我们推荐附近的美食，可惜时间紧张没能去吃成。早上4点半左右很早就送我们离开他的公寓，期待下次再见！

Sik is really a wonderful host. He makes sure that you are comfortable during your stay. Rooms was really spacious that what we've expected and all the useful amenities were provided. A booklet of Sik's personal food recommendations was provided as well. This shows the extra length he was willing to go, to ensure that his guests are able to have an enjoyable experience in Japan. I can't recommend Rooms enough! Definitely the best place to stay in this area!
Sik is very helpful. The apartment is clean spacious and very suitable for a family. We'll be back.

Great accommodation for family of four. Large space and room comes with 2 showers and toilets and place is clean and neat. Lawson is just within 2 mins walk away. Host Insik is very friendly and accommodating to our late check in. Highly recommended!

Sik really is a wonderful Super host! He really makes you feel very comfortable with his caring, friendly and thoughtful personality. For his room, everything was well thought of from the layout to the electrical appliances provided (even woman hair curler/straighter!) and also the Christmas decoration to make the house warm and cozy! And most of all, the place was larger than a typical Tokyo accommodation so it was really comfortable staying and resting here. Also the place is near to shimbashi station and walking distance to Ginza! This is really a great place to stay if coming to Tokyo!

Insik's place is awesome! I have stayed at many AirBnB locations around the world for both work and family trips and this is the best experience I have ever had. The location is an easy 10min walk from the Shinbashi Station, from which it's quite easy to take JR train or the metro subway lines to explore rest of the city. The biggest train hub of Tokyo Station is only 2-stops away.
Insik was incredibly diligent and made us felt like welcomed guests throughout our whole stay. Starting with the check-in, he let us stored our luggage in the apartment even though we were early and the place still needed to be cleaned. When we returned later for the check-in, he provided a detailed description of all of the amenities. For our family of 4, the most unbelievable feature was the 2x bathroom and 2x showers. For such a studio apartment, I do not believe it is likely to find this anywhere else. The rest of the place had many small, thoughtful details which made the experience much more enjoyable than simply sleeping for a few nights.
I highly recommend this place if you want a great base from which to explore Tokyo! I would certainly consider coming back again next time.

Sik was an amazing host and his room was perfect - spacious, had everything we needed and the location was perfect (just a short walk to Shimbashi station and a choice of convenience stores just around the corner). The room was spotless and clean - Sik has a high attention to detail. Communication with Sik was very prompt and he provided loads of information and helped with making a restaurant booking. I would highly recommend staying and we would happily book again. Thanks for everything Sik!
사장님이 매우 친절하셔서 여행전부터 여행 마치는 순간까지 편하게 여행 할 수 있었습니다. 한국인분들께 매우추천 드리구요 뿐만아니라 어느분이 가시든 추천!!

Insik was a great host who was very helpful. The property was very clean and very spacious.
Thanks for making our stay very enjoyable.
房间非常干净，空间也很大，设施一应俱全，地理位置优越，闹中取静，离地铁站也不远，30分钟就可以从羽田机场到达，步行就可以到达东京铁塔，周围很多吃饭的地方，房主热情大方，给我们介绍周围的环境，吃的，玩的，还帮忙拎行李，推荐去机场路线，下次如果有机会再来东京，我们还会住这家！

这么说吧，我真的没有遇到过这么好的房东。我觉得可能Airbnb在创办最开始就是从这样一种带着情怀的方式出发的。sik就是这样的人。他非常热情，体贴并且温柔，等我们到深夜，和我们聊聊，请我们吃早饭，目送我们离开。sik太好了，他值得一切对于男性的赞美。搞得我都想问问他是不是单身了。
再说说房子，来这里的前一晚住了富士山4000一晚的温泉酒店，按理说由奢入俭难，但到了之后并没有很大落差。
首先，房子位置很好，那一片就像是挺好的居民区。安静。
其次，房子内空间非常大，我是说在东京来讲，我们之前的民宿同样的价格面积只有一半，箱子都要严格排列组合才可以打开，但这里非常宽敞，可以跳舞。
再次，房子的设施合理到流泪，两个厕所，两个浴室，女孩子多的出行首选，再也不用催人家洗快点了，大学住过宿舍的都懂。还给配了卷发棒和直发棒，两个吹风，one more time,这是什么神仙房东？
最后，最大的优点是干净，房间干净的我们三个不好意思丢垃圾，床品柔软舒服，赶上我自己家了。本人严重洁癖，出门必须戴隔离床单，这次没有铺，全身心享受sik给的干净舒服的四件套。
以上，看起来全是彩虹屁，但我必须要说，绝对字字发自肺腑，如果有一句谎话我这辈子谈不上恋爱。
接下来我写个简短的English version for people who dont know Chinese but should never miss sik's house.
Sik is such an amazing host and the room is perfect, had everything we needed and 15min walk to ginza. I highly highly highly recommend this room!
Thank you sooooo much for everything you did for us. sik, we really had the most wonderful time stay with you and your house. Looking for you come to China,We really really really like you!

The place is exactly as per the photos - sparkling clean, spacious, 2 bathrooms + 2 toilets are superd for our group of 4 ladies so lesser time is wasted on getting ready every morning! Insik is such a great host, we really appreciate his hospitality! on the 1st day we were lost and cant really locate the airbnb, he walked some distance out to meet us at the convenience store and allowed us to leave our luggage as we reached much earlier than the check-in time (he helped us to carry our luggages up to our room on #2 and did the same when we checked out too!). he has good recommendations on food choices near the airbnb and we tried a ramen store near our place for lunch on day2 and it's indeed tastier than ichiran that he claimed! We had complimentary breakfast for a day at a cafe nearby which is a pleasant surprise and we got to change our towels 3x for our 4nights stay which is most welcomed too. he was also very responsive to our queries during the stay too via whatsapp.
all in all, for the awesome hospitality from the host and the clean pretty space, i highly recommended Insik's place to future travellers. it really feels like home when we came back to his place after a long day outside. :)

Spacious and clean room equipped with everything. Insik was very welcoming host and gave us great local informations:) Nice location too! highly recommended
밤비행기라 숙소에 늦게 도착했는데도 친절히 맞아주시고, 방이 넓고 깨끗하고 너무 좋았어요! 주변 맛집도 추천해주셨는데 다 맛있고 현지맛집 느낌이라 좋았어요. 도쿄 다시 오면 또 오고싶어요! 강력추천합니다ㅎㅎ

Sik is a very polite and very nice guy. He picked us up, gave us a lot of tipps and took care about all our needs. We had  a really nice chat‘n‘breakfast and in general a great communication. It‘s nearly impossible to expect more from a Host. The Room is super clean and very cozy :) 101 of 100 possible points from Germany :)

在日本的最后2晚住在了这里，房东Insik人超级好，入住时非常认真细心的介绍房间的设施及周边的餐饮便利，非常体贴，也跟绅士，帮我们提了沉重的行李，真的非常感谢。
房子离银座非常近，离三越百货步行20分钟即可，旁边有免税店也有超市，晚上房间很安静。
Insik帮我们准备的床品很舒适，也很干净，房间布局合理，空间很大，有2个淋浴间和独立洗漱台，干湿分离。还贴心的准备了2个吹风机与卷发棒，对于我们四个女生使用非常便利。
再次感谢Insik,下次如果有机会再来东京，还是选择这家。
推荐～

별다섯개도 모자랄만큼 훌륭한 숙소였습니다.
주로 이용한 신바시역까지는 10분 이내로 걸렸고 근처 우치사이와이초역이나 시오도메도 걸어서 다니기 나쁘지않았습니다. 복잡한 번화가와는 좀 떨어져있어서 조용한점이 마음에 들었고 숙소바로옆 편의점도 있어서 간식같은것도 사먹기 편했습니다. 숙소안은 사진에서 보는것과 똑같이 깔끔하고 넓직해서 4인이 함께 쓰기 너무 좋았습니다.
무엇보다도 호스트분이 모든부분에서 세심하게 신경써주시고 친절하게 응대해주셔서 기대했던것보다도 더욱더 편하게 지낼수 있어서 좋았습니다. 언어적으로도 한국인 분이시라 의사소통에 어려움이 없어서 부담도 없었고 일본어나 그 밖의 정보가 필요할때 큰도움 받았고 특히 오자마자 핸드폰 잃어버렸을때 사방팔방으로 알아봐주시고 결국 찾을수있게 해주셔서 얼마나 감사한지 모르겠습니다ㅡ 가는날까지도 따뜻하게 대해주시고 호스트로서 정말 너무 좋은 분 만나 두배로 더 즐거웠던 여행으로 기억될것같습니다. 다음에 도쿄에 방문할 일 있으면 우선적으로 이곳으로 예약할거고 주변 지인들한테도 강력추천합니다~
It was the best place to stay in my entire trip. The location was perfect which was very close to Shimbashi station and other metro lines nearby. It took less than 10 minutes by walk. He place was neat and cute. I liked the interior. Normally it's hard to find a big room in Tokyo but this place had plenty of space for 4 people. The room included 3 beds 1 sofa 2 showers 2 toilets. Kitchenware and bathroom kits were all there.
The host welcomed us with the warmest heart. He helped me to find my lost belongings and no one could've done like him. It was lucky to meet him as a host. I strongly recommend this place to anyone I know who is planning a trip to Tokyo.

Thank you Insik! My family of four stayed for 2 nights in April at the end of a 2 week trip. The apartment was better than expected. Comfortable beds with suitable kitchenette as well as 2 toilets and showers! Everything was super clean and an abundance of tourist resources were on display in the room to use.
Location was perfect for us - 10min walk from Shimbashi and 15min to Ginza. If we visit Tokyo again we’ll book again!

The apartment is of good size for 5 of us, with 2 shower & 2 toilet.
Very clean & quiet.
Easy walk to Shinbashi area where food is aplenty.
Many convenience stores nearby
Ginza area is reachable by foot if not pressed for time, or even Tsukiji market.
Insik is extremely approachable & attentive. He is very passionate on being a very good host.
Enjoyed my stay very much.

Staying at Sik’s place is a very great experience! He genuinely cared for us and made sure we had an amazing time. He took time to personally meet us and effectively communicated with us. The room is spacious we absolutely loved the amenities and decors too! Hoping to see you again Sik! Highly recommended! :)
저는 도쿄 다시가도 여기 갈거에요!! 위치 청결 크기 사장님 친절도 어느거 하나 빠질게 없는곳입니다!!!!

Insik is an amazing host. He met us for check-in and gave us the tour of his place. By Tokyo standards, it is very roomy and perfect for a small family / group of friends. It’s close to the station and with his guidebook, you’ll be able to find tasty eats within walking distance. The room is extremely clean and exactly as you see in the pictures. Towels are changed each day and he is easy to reach via text whenever you need him.
If you are considering staying here, consider no more and book straight away. You will not regret it!

Sik is an absolute treasure - he takes this place above and beyond anything you could ask for out of a place in Tokyo. The flat itself is wonderful and has everything you could possible need, perfectly suited to medium sized groups. Sik is the pinnacle of an AirBnb host, meeting us in person and putting the extra effort in so that our stay could be as comfortable as possible. He even took us for breakfast and a chat to get to know us a little better. If you're stopping in Tokyo for a few days then you should definitely stay here!
Insik was a great host. Fast to respond, thoughtful touches in the place, great location.

Insik' s place is very modern and clean. Everything we need is catered for. Close to lots of eateries, close to Shinbashi station and 15 mins walk to Hamamatsucho station for an easy access to airport
Sik even greeted and said good bye to us. Thanks him for the free drink and breakfast.
His apartment is spacious, very comfortable for 4 even 5 as it has 2 toilets and 2 showers.
We do not hesitate to stay at his place again.

This place is so spacious and clean. It had two bathrooms and showers which is so convenient. The location is so close to the station so it is easy to get around. Insik was so wonderful to us. He was such a great host and it was my pleasure to be his guest. He was very helpful and communicative. I would definitely rebook if I’m in Tokyo again!

Insik’s apartment was my best choice of Tokyo. It ‘s 46square meters and has 1 twin bed and 2singles beds. You can hardly find such big room in Tokyo. And location is very central. We got assistant from Insik for reserve fishing service and we really appreciated it. My husband and my little kid had good time during our staying. Room is very clean and we got clean towels every day. We highly recommend it to our friends.

To begin with, we would like to write how amicable the host is. Insik is the most caring host we’ve ever met. We believe that everybody will be impressed and charmed with his warm hearted hospitality.
The whole room has been kept very clean and tidy. The furniture and facilities are simple but nicely chosen and all well functioned. So we were able to enjoy the huge space.
It’s nice that towels have been changed everyday. There are one kingsized and two single-sized bed, which 4 persons are able to sleep comfortably enough. Two toilets and two shower rooms are also attractive.
The location is about 7 min on foot from the Shinbashi Station. As it was the outside of the busy noisy bar district near the station, we were able to enjoy rather high end good bistros and quiet bars. Also there are 24 hours open convenience stores around the corner, which were very useful.
Only our regret was that we didn't have time to visit the Sake specialist shop under the floor. Apparently they stock many Sake from all over Japan mostly hard to come by. Tasting is also available.
We definitely would like to check the vacancy here when we back to Tokyo next time.
Highly recommended!
A wonderful apartment in the heart of it all, and Insik was like having a personal concierge. A truly wonderful experience, and I cannot wait to return.
Insik’s place was a pleasure to stay in! Very clean and easy to get around the city from. Insik is a kind and caring host!

Insik was probably the best Airbnb host we have ever had. The apartment was immaculate, stylish and really spacious. It was so clean and close to tourist spots and had amazing places to eat really close by. Insik is so kind and friendly, and we had a great discussion with him over breakfast about cultural exchange—if you want a host that truly excels in hospitality, come to Insik’s place! Truly our best Airbnb experience yet.
Insik is a perfect host ! The accommodation is wonderful. I recommend Insik and his flat.
Room was clean. The host was very friendly and responds us very quickly . Highly recommend:)

Sik’s Rooms was perfect! The room had ample space for 4 of us and the amenities were wonderful to have. Sik was a gracious and hospitable host and even took the time to share personal recommendations for restaurants and food in the area due to some allergies we had in our group. Sik spent time to show us how to use the appliances and was so easy to communicate with both before and during our stay. The beds were very comfortable and the location was very close to the train station. The room was very clean and had everything we needed to make a simple meal, although we ate out most of the time. It was wonderful to have AC and having two showers and toilets was a life saver. We would definitely return to Sik’s place in the future!

Insik是個非常棒的主人，從訂房前的資詢、入住後的貼心提醒、退房的小禮物，讓我們ㄧ行人ㄧ致認為是這趟東京旅遊住的最好的，下ㄧ次來東京還會選擇這裡，我們會很想念Insik的。
從羽田機場來新橋站方便，大約半小時就到了，走路只要5-6分鐘就到Rooms了，附近很多上班族，所以餐廳非常多，超市和美妝店也很多，愛買的人是個很好的選擇，銀座就是旁邊，走路大約20分鐘，不想走路就花錢坐地鐵ㄧ站到銀座喔！地理位置很好，又不會太貴，是旅人很棒的選擇。
This was the best Airbnb experience we had in Japan. Close to many things we wanted to see.

从新桥站乌森口出来走路大概10分钟 入住当天小哥哥一直跟我们保持联系 找不到路也没关系 超贴心在楼下等我们。入住时给我们介绍了住宿周边的好吃的店 介绍房间用品等等。还送给我们一袋橘子 很好吃哦 全吃光了。小哥哥很能聊 无奈我英语水平有限 磕磕巴巴说不了两句。房间真的超级干净宽敞 日常用品基本上是够用了 如果有需要还可以每天都给更换毛巾什么的。卫生间和浴室各有两个，人多的话洗澡上厕所也不会打架。临走的时候 还请我们吃了一顿早餐。总之就是超级好 会推荐给其他朋友 另外说下 小哥颜值很高哦哈哈哈哈
Very clean and stylish and located in a great area. We are a couple with a baby and had a great time here and Sik was very welcoming and helpful.

非常好的房子，房东人也很好，什么事情都可以问他，他也很热心帮忙。房子面积很大，很舒适。位置离新桥站地铁不远，如果去成田机场坐飞机的，还有直达地铁（当然得看时刻表）这里离银座只有一站，逛街也很方便。
总之很推荐这里，以后有机会来东京还会选择这里，性价比很高。
Great host. Great place.
Great place to stay with plenty of room and a fantastic host.

We were welcomed by Insik. He is a very friendly and helpful host. We stayed 2 days in this studio, although we wished we had booked longer. The studio was big enough for our family of 4. It had all the necessary amenities. It is located at a quite neighborhood and we slept very well in this studio. My kids never sleep in and here they slept till 9AM. There are local restaurants around and several supermarkets within a short walking distance.
We will definitely stay here again when we are back in Tokyo.

By far the most pleasant experience I’ve had in Airbnbs! I have travelled to a lot of different places and stayed in many Airbnb places but what made our stay at Insik’s place the best experience out of all was this outstanding host who was so hospitable and friendly. He gave us useful tips for nearby restaurants and explained in detail how to use the amenities and the house was impeccably clean which we appreciated a lot. It was not too far away from Shimbashi station and we never had to transfer lines to get to popular spots. All in all, I cannot recommend this place enough and I will definitely come back with my family when I’ll be coming to Tokyo in the future.

We had such a wonderful stay at Rooms guest house. Each night returning after full days exploring the city to a kitchen and cozy seating and beds. Such a stylish and roomy space for our family of 4 and having two showers and toilets. Very cool neighborhood and easy access to entire city via Shimbashi station and walking distance to Tokyo Tower and Imperial Palace.

Sik是非常nice的房东，有问必答，回应非常及时，沟通很顺畅，寒冷的冬夜站在路口等待我们的到来，还帮我们把行李提到二楼。
房子非常整洁，该有的东西一应俱全，有两个洗手间和淋浴房，起居空间也很大，我们一家三口入住非常宽松舒适，床上用品也很干净舒服，我们睡得很好。
交通也很便利，离新桥站大概7-8分钟的步行距离，从羽田可以直接坐JR到达，不需要换线，对于夜机到达的我们，能够尽快到达入住很重要。而且这里还有两条地铁线，白天出行也很方便，去东京塔也只是步行20分钟左右。
我们在日本玩了8天，虽然只在这里住了两晚，但是孩子最喜欢的还是Sik的房子。下次再来我们还会选择这里。
Highly recommend this  super host to any future guest. Sik really takes care of us with his sincerity.

Insik is a great host, friendly and communicative. The apartment was spacious, very clean and well appointed with everything we needed for our stay. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay and will stay again next time we visit Tokyo.

It is great. Especially good facilities ,it has two bathrooms and toilets,the house location and environment are pretty good ,
We were heartily welcomed by the host. He is a nice person, I think we will come back again .recommend!

Superb place in the center of Shinbashi, tucked away in a quiet alley. Apt has everything you need. Insik was very communicative and help us with luggages, will def return.
Note that pocket wifi is not provided, get it at airport or other locations in advance.

Insik’s place was really lovely and quiet. It was very convenient to get to from Haneda airport. It is also very close to the subway station and many restaurants and convenience stores. The check-in process was really easy. Insik even helped us with our suitcases. He also gave a lot of great recommendations for restaurants in the area. I would highly recommend his place for any travelers interested in visiting Tokyo area, especially if you’re arriving from Haneda airport.

We enjoyed our stay at Insik's lovely place and had the pleasure of staying there not once but twice in our two-week long trip in japan (when we first landed and right before we departed from Japan). We had the opportunity to try another accommodation but loved it so much the first time that we were decided we wanted to stay once more at Insik's place before we left Japan. One thing that really stood out in addition to a lovely, well-furnished, and impeccably clean place was Insik's hospitality and generosity with both taking his time to make sure that we knew all there was to know about things to do and see in the surrounding areas, as well as going above and beyond with making our stay a memorable one by taking us to breakfast on our last morning and seeing us off with a thoughtful gift given it was our honeymoon trip. Highly highly recommend staying here and will definitely come back on our next trip.

Really hands down one of the best places I’ve ever stayed in, Sik was such a gracious host and made it simple and fuss free for my family and I. Location is so convenient and I definitely would recommend this to all travelers

The Rooms is an excellent and spacious place to stay. Not only is it immaculately clean, it has a great personal touch to make it feel really special. On top of that you will meet Insik who is a one of a kind host. Insik is very responsive, helpful and personable host.

立地、価格、部屋、ホスピタリティ　全てにおいて素晴らしかったです。
例えば、雨の日にはさりげなく傘が玄関前に置いてあったり、プールに行くのでたくさんタオルを快く貸していただいたり、最終日にスーツケースを運ぶのを手伝ってくださったり　たくさんの心遣いありがとうございました。
またこの次の機会にもお願いします。

The appartment is spacious, clean and functionnal. We stayed there two weeks without problem. Location is perfect, calm, with Shinbashi station and many restaurants close by.
Sik is a wonderfull and friendly host that will help you every step of the way.

Sik was incredibly helpful and even met us a few streets away to show us to the Airbnb. The listing was very spacious and comfortable and had more amenities than expected for our stay. Sik stopped by personally to deliver fresh towels and even came by when we were checking out to give all 3 of us umbrellas since it was raining outside. The area was in a great spot to travel anywhere in Tokyo and had plenty of restaurants to visit nearby. I will definitely be looking forward to booking again during my next visit.
The place was clean and spacious, and I appreciated how the host was very accommodative and attentive!

Wow - what is there to say. First, Sik was an incredible host and extremely generous and caring. He was extremely communicative and helpful and went out of his way to ensure we had a good experience. Truly a notch host that exemplifies the best of what Airbnb can be.
The space was absolutely fantastic and had everything you could possibly need for a comfortable stay. Shimbashi is a perfect location for anyone traveling to Tokyo. While the unit is located on a quiet street, you are an easy walking distance to a lot of attractions and just a few minutes walk from several subway stations that can take you anywhere you need to go quickly and easily. The apartment was beautiful, clean and spacious. Having a washer and dryer was a great luxury, as was having two bathrooms in the unit. Really can’t speak highly enough about the space. I would absolutely recommend it to anyone visiting Tokyo and would stay here again in a heartbeat.
Thank you for making our time in Tokyo so special, Sik! We will always remember you and are so grateful to you for hosting us.
性價比很高的房間，房東非常的熱心助人。附近有一條街有餐廳跟居酒屋很方便、房東還熱情的買小點心給我們吃很nice～廁所也有兩間非常方便

Insik is the best Airbnb host and the place was amazing. One of the best we have stayed it and we travel often all over the world using Airbnb. Shimbashi is a company man neighborhood so as a tourist it was very interesting to walk around on the weeknights. Lots of yummy restaurants and cool bars nearby. Would stay again and recommend to any friends visiting Tokyo.

The host was very friendly, responsive and accommodating. Amenities were great - even provided hair heat tools (straightener and curler) which came in very handy. Spacious space for 3-4 pax considering how Tokyo accommodations are always small.

The host was friendly and helpful. He picked us up from the JR station and walk us to his place and helped us to take the luggages. The house was spacious and tidy. There were lots of charging places. There were 2 hair dryers, hair curler and straightener. There were also many cooking utensils. The place was well-equipped with everything you need. It was also within walking distance to Ginza. The host also gave us souvenirs after we check-out. The overall experience there was very nice. We were very happy that we chose this place. Highly recommend. For sure will visit again when we visit Japan next time!

정말 기대 완전 그 이상이었습니다..
여자 셋이서 가는 해외여행이라 걱정 정말 많이 하고, 최대한 숙소에서는 잠만자고 돌아다니는 여행을 하기로 했었습니다. 그런데 도착하자마자 너무 친절하게 응대해주시고 숙소도 너무 깨끗하고 아늑하고.. 전체적으로 좋아서 결국 외출하고 들어와서 새벽까지 친구들이랑 마음 편히 숙소에서 재밌게 놀았습니다😊
그리고 호스트분이 매우 친절하시고 손님응대를 잘하셔서 놀러간 친구들끼리 완전 감동 받았었습니다..
다음에도 도쿄를 오게된다면 또 묶고 싶은 숙소일것 같아요☺️ 신바시역까지 걸어가는데 10분정도 소요되지만 가면서 편의점도 있고, 거리도 너무 예뻐서 구경하면서 가는 것도 좋았어서 저는 너무 추천합니다.🙌

Insik is a superb host, and is much more like a friend than an Airbnb host. Not only is he very friendly, he took extra trouble to ensure that my family was well taken care of. Coupled with the great location, I would not hesitate to recommend anyone to stay with Insik when in Tokyo.
Good location and friendly service, strong recommend it when you want come and enjoy your Tokyo time .

we've been using airbnb for years but this is the first time a host took care of us personally. Sik met us at the door and helped us carry our luggage. He periodically checked what we needed and promptly responded to our messages. I appreciate his patience so much. we made a mistake in our booking; he was really understanding and he helped us resolve our concern. Sik, I'm so happy that we found a new friend in you. thank you so much for making our stay in Tokyo memorable!

숙소 때문에 도쿄에 다시 오고 싶을 정도로 훌륭했어요! 호스트분이 매우 친절하시고 센스 있으신데다가 따뜻한 마음씨까지 지니셔서 감동 받았습니다. 화장실과 샤워실이 2개씩 있어서 편리하고 온수도 잘 나옵니다. 위치도 도쿄 중간에 위치해서 도쿄 전역을 돌아다니기 편리하고 인근에 마트와 편의점이 있어요. 숙소도 엄청 깔끔하고 배려가 묻어나오는 곳이라 내 집처럼 잘 휴식하면서 즐겁게 잘 여행했어요! 우연히 여길 보신분이라면 행운이시네요 예약하셔도 후회는 없으실거에요! 추천드려요^^
We had a great time here! Host was super friendly and very accomodating! Super clean and tidy. Would definitely reccomend.

Excellent logement pour découvrir Tokyo en famille ou entre amis.
Insik est très gentil et sympathique.
Je recommande fortement !
우선 사장님께서 한국분이시라 소통이 너무너무 편했어요! 거기다가 완전 친절하시고 세세한 것까지 알아서 척척 배려해주시는 모습에 정말 도움 많이 받았습니다 ㅜㅜ 숙소도 기대했던 것 이상으로 훨씬 예뻤고, 위치도 너무 좋은 덕분에 여행 내내 좋은 추억 많이 쌓았습니다! 정말 좋았어요:)
숙소에서 지내는 동안 친절하게 잘 챙겨주셔서 편하게 쉬다 올 수 있었어요!!! 숙소도 너무 깨끗하고 다음에 일본 또 오게되면 다시 방문할게요!!! 간식까지 챙겨주셔서 너무 감사했어요!!!^^

큰길가 안쪽에 조용하고 안전한 곳에 위치해 있습니다. 한두블럭 안에 편의점도 가까웠고, 또 한두블럭 나가면 식당가와 술집들 전철역이 있어 돌아오늘길에 편의점에 들러오기도 좋았어요. 첫날 추천해주신 식당도 좋았고 가까운 맛집소개도 해주셨어요.
세명이 함께 머물렀는데, 샤워실과 화장실이 두개씩 있는 점이 역시 매우 만족스러웠고, 호텔보다 훨씬 넓게 사용할 수 있어서 좋았어요!
호스트분도 매우 친절하시고 세세한부분들 설명도 잘 해주셨습니다.

非常友善好客的房東，提早協助我們預約餐廳
交通方便，地鐵可直達NRT 及HND 機場
附近有很多餐廳
如果一定要找到缺點
1）沒有衣櫃存放衣物，但有掛大衣外套的位置
2）我不太懂得調較其冷暖氣機，以至室內溫度不太穩定
3）須要行一層樓梯，但房東會協助搬運行李

1. 위치
- 신바시역에서 도보 12-15분 정도로 충분히 걸을만 하며 캐리어 끌고도 문제 없었습니다.
- 긴자도 다 걸어서 갈 수 있습니다.
- 주변에 도보 1분거리 편의점 3군데와 조금 큰 슈퍼마켓도 도보로 5분 거리에 있습니다.
- 신바시역에도 지하철 뿐만 아니라 버스도 다 거쳐가는 구간이라 교통이 아주 좋았습니다.
- 주변에 스타벅스나 까페도 식당도 무척 많습니다.
- 주변이 오피스이다 보니 상시 조용합니다.
2. 숙소 시설
- 2인용 침대(3인이 누워도 될 정도로 넓습니다), 1인용 침대 2개 다 매트리스가 너무 편하고 침구도 너무 깨끗합니다
- 화장실, 부엌도 너무 너무 깨끗합니다.
- 고데기도 종류별로 있고 드라이기도 두개나 있습니다. 수건도 말씀드리면 다음날 또 바꿔주십니다.
- 가습기가 있어 난방기를 틀어도 하나도 건조하지 않습니다.
- 저희는 사용하지 않았지만 주방도구도 다 준비되어 있습니다.
- 침대 모서리까지도 다 안전방지폼으로 붙여져있습니다.
- 4명이 바로 바로 샤워해도 온수도 잘 나오고 물도 잘 나옵니다.
- 샤워실도 2개이며, 한국 성인 남자에게도 전혀 작지 않았습니다. 너무 너무 깨끗합니다.
전반적으로 가격까지 다 너무 완벽했습니다.
수많은 에어비앤비를 다녀봤으나 이렇게 깨끗하고 센스있는 집은 처음이었습니다. 한국분이 호스트라 한국 사람인 저는 굉장히 편했습니다. 혹시라도 필요한 부분을 말씀드리면 거의 5 분안에 답장해주시고 해결해주시어 너무 너무 편하게 지냈습니다!
여자까리 와도 위치적으로 밤에도 전혀 위험하지 않고 동네도 조용하여 너무 너무 추천합니다!
덕분에 3박 4일 너무 잘 지내다가 갑니다 :)
감사합니다 :)

Insik’s place was amazing from start to finish. Conveniently located about 7 minutes walking from Shimbashi station, it had everything we needed. Conscience stores, bars, and restaurants are all close by. Insik as an amazing host and very helpful and friendly. Space is huge with 3 beds and 2 bathrooms/showers. Everything was great. I would decently recommend staying here.

Was a lively host. The place was nice and quite and close to the trains. Lots of local eats near by but was tucked away from the loud sounds of the night life but was only a short walk away. Would stay again!!

房東熱情主動
下次去東京還會想要住這裡~
Amazing host. Great place.

Insik was very friendly and responsive. No hassle at all when we checked in. The location is easy to find and located in a very quiet small road near a train station. The room is well equipped: Three beds, two toilets and two showers, a small kitchen, a washer, various amenities, and fast wifi. It is convenient if you have four people to stay in. One small drawback is that there is no wardrobes to put our clothes in.
Definitely we will stay in Insik's room when we are back in Tokyo!

진심으로 다시 오고싶은 숙소였습니다
모든것이 훌륭할정도로 좋았고 깨끗하고 깔끔하고 좋았어요 무엇보다 호스트님의 넘치는 친절이 세계최고 였습니다 너무 감사합니다 도쿄 여행시 꼭 이용해보셔요~~^^

Insik's place in Shambashi was absolutely excellent-- not only because of it's location, a 7 minute walk to Shimbashi station and a hub of great food and city, but because of his incredible communication and kindness. He always greeted us with a warm smile and checked in on us to see how our trip was going! When we got a bit lost trying to get to the Airbnb, he went out in his car to search for us and ensured that we arrived safely. The last day he told us many of his thoughts on Japanese culture and just life in Japan in general and we talked for a long time-- learning about why Japan is the way it is was an amazing way to end the trip. We had a wonderful time and are definitely endeared to our host who was more than amicable-- he has become a friend to us!
Thank you for opening this wonderful, peaceful, simple, and convenient place to stay to us,
the Kumar family

The place is really nice and comfy. The apartment is within walking distance from shimbashi station. And also sik welcomed us personally during the check in and send us off during check out. He also make sure that we had a comfortable stay. Will come again next time.
Wish sik and his family to stay healthy and happy always!

All I can say is wow!  I’ve been lucky to always find great places but Insik’s was actually better than I expected. Once you find the place for the first time (which he sends you very specific directions) it is just so easy to get around. The train station connects you everywhere. His place was very spacious and welcoming and he thinks of everything. I read all the positive reviews before I booked and have to say everyone is correct. It’s a great find and I would highly recommend staying here. I will definitely stay again. Thanks Insik for all your hospitality!!!

Un endroit calme, proche des transports pour rejoindre d'autres quartiers de Tokyo, avec de nombreuses possibilités pour se restaurer.
Et Insik est un hôte formidable, accueillant, prêt à aider pour votre séjour.
Nous recommandons fortement et espérons bien revenir.

또 오고싶은 숙소입니다.
체크인할때도 나와서 기다리고 계셨고
숙솓 너무 넓고 깨끗해서 감탄했습니다. 이틀밤 밖에 못 있는 것이 아쉬웠어요ㅜ
호스트님도 너무 친절하시고 친구 4명과 여행하는 데 너무나 적합한 숙소였습니다. 화장실과 샤워실이 2개씩인 것도 너무 좋고 세면대도 넓어서 한국에도 설치하고 싶었네요 ㅎㅎ 헤어드라이어도 2개, 판고데기 1개, 봉고데기 2개 있었습니다.
체크아웃 하는 날까지 너무 친절하셨던 호스트님 덕분에 여행이 더 행복했답니다.!
다음에 도쿄에 오게된다면 무조건 이 숙소입니다. 잘 묵었습니다.^^
Insik’s place is near a train station and it’s very quiet. We were able to walk to different places. Insik is the best airbnb host: communicative, friendly, and kind. Thank you!

The host Insik was very friendly and responsive. He helped us to keep two pieces of luggages prior check in for one night while we had a short trip nearby.
Insik greeted us downstairs and brought us to the apartment when we checked in. The apartment was modern, well decorated and clean. The kitchen has everything you need. There were 2 toilets and 2 bathrooms which were handy.
The location of Shinbashi is exceptionally convenient with many local restaurants nearby. We enjoyed every moment of stay there and do not hesitate to recommend to everyone going to Tokyo.

도쿄에 4명이서 여행을 가는 것이라서 4명이 함께 있을 숙소 찾으려고 하니 많지는 않았지만 이 숙소를 선택한 가장 큰 이유는 방이 엄청 큽니다. 4명이서 케리어를 모두 풀고 있어도 전혀 좁지 않았습니다. 다른 호텔 후기들을 보면 많이 작다고 하던데 그런 걱정을 1도 할 필요가 없었습니다.
그리고 숙소 주인분이 한국 분이셔서 소통하는데도 전혀 문제 없어서 매우 좋았습니다. 화장실이 2개인데 작은데 괜찮으겠냐고 처음 물어오셨는데 막상 가보니 전혀 작지 않았습니다. 욕조만 없을 뿐 샤워에는 아무런 문제가 되지 않았습니다.
숙소 위치는 도보로 한 신바시역에서 넉넉하게 10분 정도 잡으면 되는데 사실 그것도 적응되면 10분도 안걸립니다.
5일 동안 도쿄 여행을 하면서 숙소 위치가 처음 예약할 때는 안 좋은가 했었는데 막상 경험해보니 신바시역이 도쿄 어디를 가더라도 매우 교통이 좋은 역이어서 디즈니, 롯폰기, 신주쿠, 신바시, 아사쿠사, 긴자 등등 어디든지 갈 수 있는 지역이라 매우 좋았습니다. 그리고 긴자는 도보로 2~30분정도 밖에 안걸려서 다니기에도 매우 편했습니다.
숙소 근처에는 3대 편의점이 다 있고, 일본마트도 있어서 매우 편했습니다.
가족끼리 오시거나 3~4명이 오신다면 여기 꼭 이용해 보세요.
저도 다음에 또 이용할 계획입니다.
첫날부터 마지막날까지 꼼꼼히 잘 챙겨주셔서 덕분에 좋은 여행을 즐겼습니다. 다음에 도쿄가면 또 이용하도록하겠습니다.
아주 아주 좋았습니다. very good

We got to Tokyo pretty early and Insik was super flexible and let us drop off our luggage so we had more time to explore Tokyo! Loved that it was located on a quiet street so you don’t hear traffic or really any noise at night. It was in such a great location as there were many restaurants just around the airbnb (family mart was just at the end of the street). The airbnb was pretty spacious as there were 2 showers and bathrooms (which helped a lot as you’re not waiting for someone to be done). The beds were pretty comfy as well! Insik answered any questions that we had and was super responsive when I msged him. Super friendly and such a sweet host as he gifted us some Japanese sweets on our last day (we were really touched as we did not expect that)! Would book this airbnb again in the future when we are back in Tokyo and highly recommend this place to anyone looking for an amazing place to stay! 😊

Insik was an amazing host! Checking in was smooth and informative--he shared how to use the unit's appliances, as well as shared recommendations of places to dine and sightsee. (His karaage recommendation became an instant favorite of ours!) He was friendly and attentive throughout our stay.
The place was clean, comfortable, highly functional, and well-supplied with consumables (soaps and detergents, paper towels, etc). Extremely comfortable bed, good water pressure, and so on.
The neighborhood is so impeccably tranquil in the evenings--despite a plethora of restaurants within a couple minutes walk, and the nearest station about a 10 minute walk away. The fact that you can get a great night's sleep while being so central to Tokyo's various other neighborhoods really made our trip. Exploring the many corners of Tokyo was delightfully easy.
I'd highly recommend the place and neighborhood--a wonderful host and a wonderful place for our first long-term stay in Tokyo.

Great host, friendly and very helpful in getting us situated.
Clean room

첫 일본여행에 아이들과 함께여서 설레임 보다 걱정이 앞섰는데 그런걱정은 숙소도착 전에 이미 다 날아갔습니다.
길치인 저희를 위해 직접 찾아오셔서 안내해 주셨고 어떤 사소한 또는 중복된 질문에도 두번 세번 기꺼이 즉시 답해주시고 케리어도 다 운반해주시고.. 넘치는 배려에 너무 편하고 즐거운 여행을 할수 있었습니다. 지나칠수 있는 질문조차 그냥 넘기지 않고 섬세하게 챙겨주셔서 감동이 었습니다. 너무 감사합니다. 아이들이 계속 일본에 그 집에 또 가고 싶다고 해서 조만간 새 여행 계획을 만들어 다시 뵙고자 합니다.
여러분 두번 세번 가세요. 후회하지 않으실거에요. 근처 라멘집이 인생 맛집이 될만큼 만큼 찾아헤메지 않아도 주변이 로컬맛집 핫플이었습니다.
다시 한번 감사드립니다. 덕분에 행복한 여행이었습니다.

the accommodation was perfect for what we needed, travelling with a 2 year old we wanted a little space for him to run around which was difficult to find in japan. not only that but Insik was the most attentative host we could have asked for, even before we arrived he had organised a baby carrier for our toddler to use while in japan. the location is great, a short walk from shimbashi station with plenty of places to eat within 5 minutes. a convenience store on the same street, the property had everything we needed.
overall fantastic place with a host that went above and beyond to make us feel welcome and make our stay as easy and memorable as possible.

Insink's Airbnb is one of the favorites I've stayed at. The apartment is extremely spacious - more than enough for our party of two. Showers had plenty of room and two toilets (one regular, one toto).
The air conditioner was really effective but quiet - a good escape at the end of the day during the humid days of late summer in Tokyo.
Easy walk from Shimbashi station - we were able to easy walk to sites in Ginza and other areas.
Insik, our host was very helpful in making sure we were comfortable, showing us around the airbnb and how to use the appliances, as well as giving recommendations in the neighborhood. When we had to check out, he was able to help us hold the bags for a few hours so we could travel around and grab a bite freely.
There were a few days of drizzle and umbrellas were available with the room, extremely convenient.
One of the beds had a new mattress that was firm, which was perfect too.

This was the best airbnb we have ever stayed at. Insik is a generous wonderful host who is so friendly and prompt with communication. Perfect location to walk to two train stations, so many food options in Shimbashi- sometimes we had to pinch ourselves we were so lucky to stay in a quiet beautiful clean big room in Tokyo. We will always stay here when we come thank you Insik for making our trip so wonderful

We had a really great stay!
Insik was responsive to our messages from the time of booking. He is a very friendly and approachable person.
It was very nice of him to prepare a toaster oven upon our request.
When we arrived, he was personally waiting for us and welcomed us in person. It was nice of him to help us with our luggages as there are no lifts.
The apartment was very clean, spacious with great amenities. It is big enough for a whole family to stay.
At the end of the stay, he even gifted us with some delicious monaka from his family’s business. Thank you! We will definitely come to stay again the next time we visit Tokyo:)

Recommended!
The place is really nice for 4-5 people. Easy to find (about 400m from Shimbashi Station)
Good location that you can find convenient store (Lawson, 7-Eleven and Family Mart) and have so many parking lot around here.
Home Internet is fast enough for your work. I guarantee. 😆
Facilities are so useful, have almost everything that you want (Space, Bed , Living Room , Kitchen , Bathroom , Toilet) more than enough.
The host is really nice! Responsive and friendly. Just ask him what you want.

Really enjoyed our stay at Insik’s place. Insik is a warm and considerate host, pays attention to details. When we told him that we were traveling with young kids, he went out of his way to ensure that the space is safe for kids. Thanks a lot for all the kind gestures extended to us throughout our stay, making it really enjoyable for us all. We hope to stay here again when we are in Tokyo again

호스트님.. 정말 너무나도 친절하시고 룸 상태 또한 완벽 그 자체였습니다.
아기새 같이 다 떠먹여줘야 하는 친구놈들 데리고 4박5일 도쿄여행 다녀왔는데, 저보고 ‘이 숙소 잡은게 너가 제일 잘한 일이다’라고 하더군요. 저뿐만 아니라 친구들까지 만족해하니 매우 뿌듯했습니다.
이 숙소가 위치한 신바시는 도쿄 내 주요 관광지인 시부야,신주쿠,긴자,오다이바,롯폰기와 거리가 가깝기 때문에 적극 추천드리고, 2박 이상 이용하는 것을 추천드립니다.
제가 언제 다시 도쿄 여행을 갈지 모르겠지만, 만약 다시 도쿄를 가게 된다면 저의 도쿄 숙소 원픽은 여기입니다.
호스트님 항상 건강하시고 다음에는 꼭 맥주 한 잔 같이 해요!!!!
매번 여행 다닐때 호텔만 이용하다가 처음으로 에어비엔비를 이용했는데 너무나도 완벽한 경험이였습니다. 게스트를위한 맞춤 준비도 완벽했고 소통과 안내또한 완벽했습니다. 한국인 호스트 분의 친절함이 여행을 완성시켜준거 같네요. 다음 일정 때문에 더머무를수 없는게 아쉬웠습니다. 좋은 경험 할수 있게 해주셔서 감사합니다.

The best airbnb in Tokyo, and we've been to few ! the best is because Inshik, the host is really helpful and thoughtful.. he came by with his cute baby at our last day to bring us treats...  also space is quite big for 2 adults and kids, it also got everything we need...  the area for us also great with only 8 mins walk to shimbashi station. Highly Recommended

너무 편하고 즐겁기 여행하고 왔어요!!
정말 깔끔하고 방도 넓고 호스트분이 너무 친절하게 안내해주셔서 너무 좋았습니다bbb

기본적으로 매우 친절하시고 빠르게 소통해주셔서 불편함이 없었습니다.
일본에서 어디를 가기도 좋은 신바시역이 도보로 이동할 수 있어서 편리힙니다.
주변에 번화가인 신바시역 상권이 있고, 작지만 도심내 이탈리안 거리도 가까이 있으며, 10분 정도 거리에 긴자 상권(돈키호테 포함)이 있어서 쇼핑 및 먹거리도 충분히 경험할 수 있습니다.
이 모든 걸 친절히 안내해 주신답니다.
방 칸디션도 4인 가족이 아늑하게 머물기에 충분히 넉넉했습니다.
도쿄 여행을 준비하신다면 적극 추천합니다!!!

숙소가 엄청 깨끗하고 넓어서 사용하기 좋았습니다!
역이랑 10분 거리고 지하철 노선도 다양해서 이동하기 편했습니다.
무엇보다 사장님이 너무 친절하셔서 도쿄 여행팁이나 여행하기 좋은 곳들을 추천해주셔서 2박3일동안 가족들과 더 좋은 추억 만들 수 있었던 거 같아요:)
주변 사람들이 도쿄에서 여행한다고 하면 꼭 추천합니다!
다음에 또 도쿄 온다면 이용하고 싶어요:)

Insik was an absolutely fantastic host. We arrived on a particularly rainy evening, and he was incredibly nice enough to meet us at our train station with umbrellas. He was very responsive to all of our needs and was able to be flexible with our luggage as well. His place was perfectly clean with so many thoughtful touches. We would absolutely stay here again and would recommend this to anyone!
The apartment is lovely and the host is beyond amazing! Will definitely stay here if I come back to Japan!

Good location and good size unit. Walkable to Shimbashi station and Ginza. Shimbashi is very well connected to various metro lines. Host is very responsive and helpful. As the unit is first floor, host Insik helped us to carry the luggage up. He also met us on the last day with a small token souvenir. The host stays nearby and responds within a few minutes.  All in all , great stay and would definitely recommend.
Insik was a wonderful host and went the extra mile to make us feel welcome. The apartment was spacious (for Tokyo) with plenty of room to move around. Very clean and well equipped. Great value.

The apartment had everything we could possibly need for a comfortable stay - two toilets, two bathrooms, a washing machine and a kitchen stocked with all the amenities we required. As a delightful surprise, we even found a hair curler and hair straightener, adding a thoughtful touch to the already well-equipped space. It is also very spacious for a group of 3 of us.
I love how this place is strategic, just a few minutes' walk from train stations and surrounded by several convenience stores. The abundance of eateries in the area, including the hidden gem Matoi which we discovered, made our culinary adventures in Tokyo unforgettable. (Trust me, you don't want to miss out on Matoi!)
Insik's hospitality went above and beyond when, upon check-out, he took the time to walk with us and see us off at the station. In retrospect, Insik's place wasn't just accommodation; it was a home away from home in Tokyo. また戻って行くのを楽しみにしています。 ありがとう, Insik :)
이렇게 친절한 호스트는 처음인 것 같습니다. 이번엔 친구들과 왔지만 다음에 가족들과 와도 괜찮을 것 같아요. 저희가 서비스를 이용하는 입장이지만 감사한 마음으로 이용할 수 있을 정도로 좋았습니다.
최고의 숙소였스니다. 친절한 호스트분 덕에 3박 4일동안 즐거운 여행을 했어요. 숙박비가 비싼 도쿄에서 이만한 숙소 찾기 정말 쉽지 않을 것 같아요. 내부도 청결하고 없는게 없는 최고의 숙소였습니다~ 신바시역이 직장인들이 많은 곳이라 맛집도 많아서 좋았어요. 강력 추천합니다 !!

Insik was a generous and helpful host. The apartment had all we needed and space to spare. It was convenient to two train stations and I walked to the Imperial Palace. Highly recommend as a place to stay.

Insik was the perfect host, so friendly and responsive, and his place was great for our family of 3. It was comfortable, clean, had all required amenities and in a great location close to train stations and many restaurants. Just as described and would definitely recommend staying here.
Sik是個非常溫暖的房東，讓我們覺那裡就像在自己的家，房間空間很大，有2套衛浴，住起來非常舒服。地點方便，可以步行到一些景點（銀座，麻布台之丘，築地…），附近餐廳很多，是個會讓我們再回訪的民宿

El alojamiento es lindo, cómodo, con 2 sanitarios y 2 duchas, camas y espacio suficiente. Cercano a la estación de tren. El anfitrión es muy atento, servicial y amigable. Nuestra estadía en Tokyo fue excelente en este apartamento.

A big thank you to SIK for such an amazing stay in Tokyo. The apartment was perfect, exactly as described and it had everything you could possibly need with lots of thoughtful extras. The location was great and only a short walk from the station. The host could not have been more helpful. We would highly recommend staying here and we hope to come back again one day.

My boyfriend & I stayed at Insik’s wonderful home in Tokyo for 3 nights and had such a pleasurable experience. Insik is a one of a kind host who goes above and beyond for his guests & genuinely cares about them. When we first arrived at the train station it was raining hard and Insik offered to meet w/ us & personally pick us up. He arrived with umbrellas for us & even helped roll our luggages to his AirBnB. At that point, we already knew how down to earth Insik was as a person. He even took the time to have a pleasant chat w/ us to learn about ourselves as well as sharing his stories about traveling. We learned Insik is not only our host, but that he is a kind, open-minded, and genuine individual who cares a lot about his guests & traveling. His home was clean, had more amenities than listed, comfortable, and welcoming. Not only was it our peaceful refuge to rest in after a long day of exploring, but w/ Insik being our host, it felt like our home away from home ❤️ ありがとうございます, Insik! :)

Insik’s flat was very comfortable, spacious, and perfectly clean. It’s an easy walk to Shimbashi station which links to the super convenient JR Yamamoto circle line and other JR trains and subway routes.
Insik was so helpful and friendly, and went above and beyond to welcome us. The apartment has two bathrooms and two showers, plus a washer/dryer, and extra amenities like hair dryer, flat iron, shampoo, etc which were all a plus. 100% perfect stay!

좋은 호텔 이상이라 말할순 없습니다만 전혀 불편함이 없습니다.
어떤면에서는 그 어떤 호텔보다 훌륭합니다.
어느곳으로 이동을 하던 접근성면에서는 최고라 생각 합니다.
또한 호스트가 매우 친절함 한국분이라 소통에도 문제 없음.
그래도 후기니까
단점을 적어볼까 합니다.
1. 원룸형 숙소라 침실과 거실 구분이 격실로 되어 있지 않아 불편한 점이 있을수 있음.
2.사실 단점이라 말하긴 어렵지만
주변에 관광지는 없음 대중교통을 이용 이동해야 함.

We stayed at Insik's apartment for 3 nights and absolute loved every single moment. The location is really good, only a short stroll from Shinbashi JR/metro station. There are tons of eateries outside the apartment and along the way from the station. We didn't have to worry about where to find food or bar to chill out. The property was exactly how it presented on the Airbnb listing, it's got all the amenities we need. The best part was there were 2 bathrooms and 2 showers! It's so handy when you travel with a group. The place was really clean and incredibly well presented. We felt like coming home with comfort and safety. Insik is an amazing host. He's always very responsive on messages and super nice. Insik greeted us when we check-in and check-out, it's such a pleasure to spend a few days at this Airbnb and we highly recommend!

도쿄에서 가족들과 함께 머물렀는데 제 집마냥 너무 편하게 잘 지냈어요.
짐도 2층까지 다 옮겨주시고, 식당추천부터 이것저것 하나하나 꼼꼼히 신경써주셔서 너무 감사했어요. 가족들 다 떨어져 지낸다고 선물까지 준비해주시고 너무 감사히 맛있게 잘 먹었습니다 :)
방이 크진 않지만 샤워실과 화장실도 두 개씩 있어서 너무 편했고, 모든게 너무 깔끔해서 머무는동안 너무 좋았어요. 사장님께서 하나하나 신경쓰신게 느껴집니다! 이제 도쿄에 간다면 숙소 걱정없이 무조건 다시 방문 할 것 같아요. 감사합니다 :)

這次的入住經驗非常優良, 我們是四位同性友人共同出遊,能有這個機會居住在如此舒適的旅店對我們來說是一次非常難得的經驗.
屋內的設施及備品非常的齊全, 乾淨 , 整齊 , 對我們來說是很便利很棒的.尤其是房東的服務非常的好, 一但我們使用完畢而需補充備品, 通知後, 房東都會以最快的方式補充給我們.
非常推薦 , 下次再造訪港區, 也一定會再來入住.

Insik is a great host.  He is very kind, responsive, and caring.  His place is as described.  Very clean and comfortable.  The two showers and toilets were great for our family of four.  Location is great as it is close to Shimbashi and Shiodome stations.  Quiet area.  Plenty of places to eat around the area.  I would 110% recommend staying at Insik’s place.
这件名宿非常值得推荐给大家, 交通便利，房间干净整洁，房内的物品使用都非常便捷满意，房东非常儒雅帅气，等待在门口迎接我们入住，并帮我们搬运行李至房间，之后非常耐心的介绍了屋内电器的使用方法，并且还准备了一本附近美食攻略，对于此次的住宿非常满意，感谢房东。我下次还会再来预定。

Insik was waiting for us and explained everything  in detail. His place was spotless and very comfortable. Close to the metro station with plenty of restaurants around. Very central to many great sites, but far enough to have a good night rest. He even bought us some desert as a present which was delicious and came in a beautiful box. We would recommend to anyone.

A wonderful host in a very central location in Tokyo. Comfortable, clean and quiet room with two toilets and two showers! Easy walk to transport and restaurants. Insik is one of the most helpful and kind hosts we have ever met through Airbnb. Would definitely recommend.

Our family of four were very comfortable in Insik’s place and it is perfectly located walking distance from Shimbashi station. From there, you can get just about anywhere in Tokyo via the rail system. Insik was very helpful and friendly. Highly recommend this place.
Insik is a great host.Always responsive and very friendly.His place is neat and tidy and smell fresh.This place is highly recommended.

숙소 호스트분이 너무 친절하시고 정말 좋았어요! 이것저것 챙겨주시고 마지막까지 너무 편하게 이용하다 갑니다! 문의드리는 것마다 피드백이 정말 빠르시고 매일매일 저희 편의 챙겨주신게 너무 감사했습니다!ㅠㅠ 숙소 위치도 역 근처에 편의 시설 근처라 정말 너무 좋아서 다들 정말 편하게 이용했어요! 숙소도 넓고 깨끗해서 5명이서 생활하는데 문제 없이 쾌적하게 숙소 이용했습니다! 다음에 일본 도쿄 방문하면 또 이용하고 싶어요! 감사했습니당!!

From booking until the time we checked out, our experience with Insik and his home was outstanding. There truly isn’t one thing we would change.
We visited with our 6 month old baby and 3.5yo child and this place was very comfortable for us. It’s a short walk from two different stations and although there is a real hum around the station, the home is located in very quiet and calm residential streets. It was the perfect place to retreat to at the end of a busy day.
Insik is by far the most thoughtful and kind Airbnb host we have ever dealt with, and he made sure we had everything we needed to make our stay comfortable. He even brought us a special dessert when we were checking out.
I could go on and on about the home and the host, but I will simply say they are both outstanding and I would urge anyone to stay here. Thank you Insik.
Great place, 5-star cleanliness. Friendly and helpful landlord. Do recommend this place.

Insik is a fabulous and super responsive host. When our Shinkansen was delayed due to derailment of maintenance train, which caused the full day suspension of services between Nagoya and Hamamatsu (to Tokyo), Insik was very patient and waited for us the whole time. He helped us with the luggages up the stairs and even gifted us deserts from his family business on our day of departure. The Tokyo accommodation was a fantastic stay, thanks to him. would love to go back whenever we have a chance.

1. 신바시역과 시오도메역으로 도보 이동 가능한 지역이라 교통이 매우 편리함.
2.주변에 맛있는 식당들이 많음. 조금만 나가면 신바시 번화가와 연결되어 간단하게 술 마시기도 좋음.
3. 숙소가 넓고 쾌적함. 4인가족 지내기에 부족함이 없음. 세탁, 건조, 넉넉한 수건, 드라이기, 고데기, 식기류, 물, 청소상태 등 매우 만족함.
4. 호스트분의 응답이 빠르고 매우 친절하심. 여러번의 에어비앤비 경험 중 가장 정성스럽고 진심을 다해 응대해주심.
5. 다시 도쿄에 온다면 다시 오고싶은 곳!

Insik was so helpful.  We needed to drop off our bags at 9:30 and he was there to meet us. Later our luggage was in the room and he met us to go over everything.  He was super helpful when we had trouble turning on the A/C after being out for the day. In fact he even came to the apartment by taxi to help us. Guest host.

This was a very pleasant stay.
The location is excellent, just a 10-minute walk from Shinbashi Station, which provides convenient access to anywhere. The condition of the house matches the description on the app perfectly—it was clean, tidy, and fully equipped. It's worth mentioning that the ventilation system of the house is particularly good.
The host, Insik, is a very kind and thoughtful person. The room is on the second floor, and Insik helped us carry our luggage up to the room. During check-in, he gave a detailed introduction to the facilities in the house and did his best to offer any assistance we needed. Before we left, he even gave us lovely farewell gifts and continued to enthusiastically help with our luggage.
The only part for improvement is the room's internet connection. If multiple people are staying and there are many devices connected, the internet can become very slow.
Overall, this was a very satisfying stay, and we are very grateful for Insik's help!

Insik es una persona muy amable, nos dio personalmente las instrucciones del departamento, nos guio y respondió muy bien a preguntas que teniamos. El departamento esta muy bien equipado hay todo lo que necesitas muy comodo y acogedor para dormir, la zona muy tranquila y cerca de lugares turísticos. Recomendado tambien si vas con niños!

We had a great stay here for our first time to Tokyo. I find airbnbs to be more “bang for your buck” and I love meeting new people. Hotels in Tokyo seemed very expensive.
This room had ample space for our family of five. The big bed was not quite a king but bigger than a queen. The two next to it were traditional twin size. And we had a mattress on the floor as well. All beds were very firm as is customary in Japan and personally I love it. Room was also very clean with a sitting area, small kitchen with plates and cutlery and two showers and toilets. We especially appreciated the washer/dryer combo. The unit was in a great area near shimbashi train station, very quiet. It was late September and still warm and humid but also liked that we could open the windows for some fresh air if we wanted. Also, Insik brought us a remote to dim the lights in the unit.
The only thing I didn’t like was the smell of air freshener in the unit. I’m really sensitive to smells.

Lovely experience! The host was super friendly and helpful, all their recommended restaurants were delicious.
Room was also more than I expected, clean and spacious. Walkable distance to Ginza but also in a quiet part of town.
I couldn’t wish for more. Thank you very much for all you did for me and my friends☺️

We really enjoyed our stay! The host was so accommodating and made sure everything was perfect, even going out of his way to make our trip more pleasant. The location is super convenient—lots of great places to eat nearby and easy access to public transit, which made getting around really simple. The room was also fantastic, with all the amenities we could need. Overall, it was a great experience, and we’d definitely stay here again!”

super emplacement et magnifique accueil de l'hôte qui a été merveilleux. il nous a attendu jusqu'à tard pour nous accueillir, nous a offert des cadeaux et des gâteaux et s'est levée a 6h pour nous dire au revoir. bref, je recommande 1000%.
The host was perfect, responded always quickly and was very helpful, and the apartment was very nice and quiet. I recommend!

Friendly host and local recommendations for food. It's a walk to the nearest train station. Place was very clean, with 2 baths and 2 toilets. Good for families or groups. The building is private and very secure.

호스트분이 너무 친절하고 잘 챙겨주십니다.
숙소 위치도 좋고 시설도 좋아서 도쿄 재방문하게 되면 또 가고 싶습니다.

This is a great place for families, our kids loved it and there is ample space for them (+ 2 bathrooms and 2 showers) :)... It has all the amenities necessary. Insik is a tremendous host and always very attentive and responsive. We are a family of 4 (6yo & 3 yo) it has a washer and the dryer actually dries the cloths compared to other places where we stayed. There are plenty of option for food nearby as well as the proximity to multiple subway lines. There are parks nearby and the Tokyo Tower is on a walking distance. Its great value for the price, and Insik is an amazing host!
Everything is perfect! We will definitely come back!

숙소가 매우 좋았습니다
1. 숙소가 깨끗하고, 친절하게
대해주셔서 우리가족 모두가
만족한 여행이었고, 영원히 기억에 남을거 같습니다
2. 숙소 위치도 신바시 역에서
가까운 편이라 여행하는데 편리했습니다(안전한 숙소 시스템)
3. 다음에 도쿄 여행할때 또 가려고 합니다
4. Insik 님도 건강하시고
새해 복 많이 받으세요
고맙습니다 :)
5. 에어비앤비도 계속 발전하기를 기원드립니다 !!
Thank you !!

Insik was very friendly also he responded always, he was well prepared and showed me and my family a very good restaurant. Everything was clean in the apartment and no noises at all. I would highly recommend :)

Incredibly attentive host, immaculate presentation. Perfect for those who prefer personal touch over a key code! Short walk to trains, however we covered an extensive area of central Tokyo on foot from this fantastic location. Oodles of food options nearby. Two showers and toilets a bonus for busy periods before and after sightseeing! Couldn’t have been more impressed.

다음에 도쿄 여행 오면 또 오고싶은 숙소
호스트님도 정말 친절하시고 숙소도 캐리어 넉넉히 피고도 남을 공간이라 너무 좋았어요. 긴자나 도쿄타워도 도보로 갈 수 있고 저녁에 근처가 조용해서 쉬기 편했습니다!
Best host ever!
Insik is a wonderful host! Extremely accommodating, friendly, and knowledgeable. We had a great stay here and would highly recommend anyone to book a stay with him. I know we will again.

Insik is the perfect host.
We stayed for ten days and everything was perfect. The apartment is super clean, spacious and Insik has thought thru every detail of what is needed and not needed. All the linens, dishes, tv, furniture are of high quality.
We hope to return for another visit soon.
Insik is a true gentleman. He is very thoughtful, generous and kind. You can not hope for a better host.👏👏

와보니 후기가 좋은 이유를 잘알겠더라구요
친절하고 빠른응대
게스트가 불편할까 이것저것 챙겨주셔서 편히 잘머물렀어요
공항가기도편리하고 도코역도
2정거장 오늘 요즘뜨는 아부자다이힐즈갔다가 지하철과 도보가 5분차이라 거리구경하며 숙소까지 걸어 25분만에도착
요코하마도 30몇분만에갈수있고
신바시역까지8분정도~
여기저기 다니기 좋았어요
도쿄갈일있음 들리고싶은슉소에요
강추해요

We had a fantastic stay! The apartment was perfect for our group of five female friends, with two bathrooms and two toilets making everything so convenient. The location near Shimbashi Station was ideal for exploring Tokyo, and the area felt very safe and quiet at night. Communication with the host was smooth, and they were very welcoming. Overall, a great experience—highly recommend!

This is definitely a place we would love to stay and visit again! Accommodations are spacious and clean. The neighborhood is peaceful yet convenient to a number of terrific amenities. The walk from the train station was only about 10 minutes.
As listed, the unit has 1 queen and 2 single beds. It also has 2 full bathrooms which would be convenient for a family. The washer/dryer is a plus to such a great place.
One of the most outstanding things about staying here is the hospitality of Sik. He welcomes you personally when you arrive and when you depart. He is friendly and interesting to talk to and can give you a lot of advice and suggestions of where to visit and eat.
This is one of the best air bnb places we’ve stayed at! Thank you Sik for a wonderful stay on our very first trip to Japan. We hope to one day bring our family to visit as we were just traveling as a couple this time.
Arigato gozaimasu!

Our stay at Sik's place was fantastic! The apartment was very clean and well stocked with everything we needed. Sik was very accommodating and provided great local tips, even tried to help us as muslim travellers. We got home with amazing gift from Sik. We absolutely recommended the place to others!

Sik is a fantastic host. We needed somewhere big with a kitchen for our 9mth baby ands this was prefect. Right by Shimbashi station where you can get to anywhere relatively quickly and walking distance to Ginza and Tsukiji. Sik is super friendly and was always on hand to answer any questions.

J’ai passé un excellent séjour dans ce logement. Il est très bien situé, ce qui facilite les déplacements et permet de profiter pleinement de la région. Le propriétaire, Sik, est extrêmement gentil et accueillant. Merci pour son hospitalité ! Je recommande vivement ce logement et je n’hésiterai pas à revenir lors de mon prochain voyage au Japon.

One of the best experiences we have had with a vacation rental. All the reviews mentioned are accurate and true. The host was exceptional! We felt like special guests and were treated with a sincere and friendly welcome. Sik would check in with us to make sure everything was to our satisfaction and helped us with information and recommendations. He always followed through with questions we had and was a delight to sit down with for conversations. We will absolutely stay here again when traveling to Tokyo. Sik made our first experience in Tokyo memorable and special!

Staying at Sik's place was a highlight of our trip. From the moment we arrived, Sik was incredibly friendly and accommodating, going above and beyond to ensure we had a comfortable and memorable experience. His warmth and willingness to assist with any questions or needs made us feel right at home, a genuine hospitality that can be hard to find.
One thoughtful inclusion was the various reading materials about Japan. These books and guides were an excellent supplement to our understanding of the local culture, history, and customs, providing valuable insights that helped our understanding.
The space itself is also remarkably well-suited for larger groups. Hosts like Sik are a rarity nowadays, truely deserving of the utmost praise, a real gem.
숙소위치가 좋고 넓으며 쾌적함.다시 올 생각있음.
Inviting host with quick communication. Clean house and in a great area. The host was nice, talked with us personally and was accommodating.
Highly recommend. Excellent overall and very friendly host. Will most definitely book again!

One of the best Airbnb stays we’ve ever had – hands down! And also our most favourite in Japan!
For the price we paid, we were amazed by how spacious and well-equipped the apartment was. We had an extremely comfortable stay. Everything was as advertised, with a great variety of amenities that made our stay feel just like home – from the washing machine with a dryer function (a huge plus!) to the smart TV with Netflix.
What truly made this stay exceptional was Insik. He was the nicest and most thoughtful host we’ve ever encountered on Airbnb – incredibly responsive, warm, and genuinely kind. He kindly allowed us to drop off our luggage early and even accommodated an early check-in at 12pm. When we arrived, he greeted us warmly, helped direct traffic so we could park our car on a narrow street, carried our luggage, and patiently showed us how to use the amenities. He also shared great food recommendations nearby!
Do note that there is no elevator in the building.

Sik is a great host. He was waiting for us, explained everything and solved any questions in seconds. The place has everything you may need. Coffee, tea, tooth paste, soap and softener for the washing machine. The dryer worked well. All super clean. Super recommended!!

Sik is a wonderful host who goes above and beyond for his guests. He was kind and attentive and his home is beautiful. We felt very comfortable and safe. As first time visitors to Japan we would recommend this place to anyone coming from far away as a place to feel at home. Sik will welcome you and make you feel at ease.
Sik was a great host and even brought us desserts from his family’s shop for us to enjoy. We enjoyed our stay!
Sik was such a caring host! We appreciated his welcome especially when we were so jet lagged and needed some extra help finding food. We highly recommend Sik’s place for those new to Tokyo.

일본에서 숙소만 6번을 옮기는 여행중 마지막 일정이라 몸도 마음도 지친 상태였는데 친절한 호스트님을 만난 순간 다시 처음부터 여행하는 듯한 설레임으로 마지막 일정을 소화할 수 있었습니다.
공항에 분실물을 두고 온 일을 말씀드리니 본일일처럼 몇번씩 공항에 전화해서 확인해주시고 추천해주신 식당에 저희가 원하는 메뉴가 있는지도 직접 전화해주시며 마치 편한 친척집에 온 느낌이었습니다.
아이들 먹으라며 특별한 간식도 챙겨주시고 체크인부터 체크아웃까지 직접 다 챙겨주시며 공항에 잘 도착했는지까지 안부까지 물어주시니 처음만난 호스트분이지만 오랜 친구를 만나고 온 느낌에 마음까지 풍성한 여행을 할 수 있었는습니다.
숙소 또한 아주 청결하고 욕실과 화장실이 별도로 2개씩 있는점은 단체여행에 최고의 컨디션이었습니다.
도쿄로 여행가시는 3~5인 여행객 분들에게 강력히 추천하는 숙소입니다.

Sik's apartment was just as shown in the listing. It was a comfortable space for 3 - 4 guests (we were a group of 3) and the 2 toilets & showers were definitely a huge plus. We arrived on an early morning flight and deeply appreciated being able to check in early. Sik gave us a house tour and also prepared a folder of food recommendations in the nearby vicinity. The location of the apartment is less than a 10 mins walk to Shimbashi Station and Shiodome Station so getting to most attractions would be easy. We were especially surprised when Sik came by personally at check-out to wish us farewell with a small gift. We really enjoyed the stay and loved the personal touch added by Sik's warm hospitality.

We had a wonderful experience staying at this apartment in Tokyo! The location was fantastic - close to public transportation, shops, and great local restaurants. The apartment was sparkling clean, beautifully maintained, and had everything we needed for a comfortable and relaxing stay. The bedding was especially comfortable - we slept so well every night.
What really made our stay exceptional was the host. From the moment we booked, Insik was incredibly responsive and thoughtful. He provided detailed instructions, local tips, and even checked in during our stay to make sure everything was going smoothly. You can tell he truly cares about his guests to make the experience as smooth and enjoyable as possible. We felt more like staying with a friend than a stranger.
We highly recommend this place - especially thanks to such a caring and professional host!
We had a great stay! Sik was a wonderful host and made our stay in Tokyo so much more memorable.
人很热情，位置也很好。非常棒的一次住宿体验！
Very clean and comfortable apartment. Sik was an amazing host as mentioned in many reviews… Went above and beyond to ensure we had an excellent experience staying here.

Wow, what an amazing stay! The room was spotless and felt truly special — so spacious and everything was top-notch quality. The neighborhood is full of great food and super convenient for getting anywhere. The host was incredibly nice; even though not on-site, communication was fast and smooth. Honestly, this might be the best Airbnb you can find! I absolutely loved it here and will be telling all my friends to stay!

This was our favorite stay during our two weeks in Tokyo! The layout worked perfectly for us and our 1 year old son. We loved being able to come back after a long day and have a comfortable place to relax while our son had space to play. There were also two parks nearby for him.
The best part of our stay was the host. Sik was responsive to all of our questions, and even walked my husband around to help us find diapers. We could tell he truly cared about us during our stay and he was great with our son! Before checkout he presented us with a delicious gift and helped us drag our luggage to the train station. Unprecedented hospitality!
とても良かったです
Give an actual homelike feeling.

Very very very excellent house ! three floor, very clean! And location near sub-way station (walk 300meters, will arrive 2 subway station)

the kitchen had many tools, and you can easy cook food at there. If you don't want to cook by self, out of house 200 meter, you can find thousands of delicious food.

talk about the conformable, first floor have 2 bed room, each room has electrical lock with code. very comfortable. second floor with kitchen and also can eat at the place. you also can watching TV at second floor.

Third floor is a Tatami, I super love third floor, you can have small drinking with your friend or lover at the floor, surprisedly, there is a small garden at third floor.

We love this house, my wife said she don't want to leave this house, because it is stay really like home!

The last and most important is our house Owner Ms.Cao and her wife. They pick up us from subway station, and teach us how to use every things of the house. House owner prepare for the map for us, and give us many suggestion to Mt. Fuji. without these suggestion, our Tokyo trip should not prefect like this.

thanks you, from bottom of my heart !

Eagle
房子位置很好，离大久保车站五分钟，在一个安静的社区。楼下是家很好吃的拉面。房东是个台湾帅哥，热情、周到、彬彬有礼。还冒雨到车站接我们。房间干净温馨，家居用品一应俱全，而且都很新。很适合一家人来。附近还有华人服务社，有各种中餐用品。总之很好很好，强烈推荐。

This journey cannot be this fabulous without the nice house for our two nights stay. The location is excellent which is just 1 station away from Shinjuku. There are also many nice restaurants in the Main Street which is 2minutes walk from the house. The environment is brilliant as it's quiet and peaceful. The room are very secured with locks. The whole house are well decorated and cleaned. Even both the western and Japanese style of the room can be found. All the daily necessities and equipment are very sufficient. The house is pretty awesome.
房东很热情，房子也很好

We arrived a little early but Hiromi-san manage to meet us and take us to the house. The beds, duvet were long enough for the 6-footer adults. The house was well maintained and clean. Everything worked.
The house is conveniently located. About 300m from the house to the street between Shin-Okubo and Okubo stations, plenty of food places and groceries stores. Plus nearest to the house is a FamilyMart and a ramen shop.
房东一家都很热情，来车站接的我们，细心的给我交代各种事宜，房间很温馨很舒服，也很干净，地理位置也很好，离新大久保站很近，但是也很安静周围吃饭也很方便，总之是很好的一次体验！

乾淨
舒服
東西準備周全
很溫馨的感覺
晚上也很安靜
附近也很方便

很乾淨溫馨的小公寓
地點離新大久保站也不遠
巷口左轉就有一間Lawson
車站附近吃的用的都很方便買
三個房間六個大人差不多剛好
重點是房東(or管家?)會說中文
溝通完全沒問題，還替我們解答了很多問題真的很棒
如果有機會還是會想住的地方！
好沟通的房东，阿姨会到新大久保站接，地理位置好找，周围很多吃的。干净舒服。
很不错的民宿，5个男生住得很开心
Great location. Beautiful home. Best value for money. Excellent hosts.

Great place to stay! 3 minutes walk to main street where the shops and restaurants are, also Shin Okubo and Okubo stations. Just next to the place is a very good ramen noodle shop. Electronic locks on doors. I was staying during winter and it was cold, the air conditioning/ heater could be better in one of the rooms. Everything else was very good. Hiromi and family were very helpful. Will definitely stay again.

The house is very cute and located in a quiet neighborhood, yet only 5 minutes walk to stores, and restaurants. Lawson(convenient store) is just around the corner. We arrived at Shin-okubo at 11am, Hiromi met us there brought us to the house, and let us leave our luggage there, although the house was not ready to check in.
During our stay, we talked to Hiromi via Line.
The place is sparkling clean! We had a great stay with my family. Very near the train station, Don Quiote and restaurants. The host is very kind and considerate! どうもありがとうございました！
Very conveniently located. Great space in the middle of tokyo!

We enjoyed the place and location. It was great for our whole group of 4 adults and 3 kids. Host made us feel at home. I do like the tatami floor on the 3rd floor because we have a 8 month crawling machine and it’s pretty safe space for him to cruise around. Only problem we had was the expectation of a parking space because we rented a minivan. The space they have is for storage/bicycle or a small Japanese car. We ended up paying for a outside parking around the corner. Would stay again!
这次是带父母去的东京，一行6人，选择这家民宿是非常正确的选择，房东人太好了，房屋位置也非常好，房屋设施俱全，干净整洁漂亮，给我们家的温馨。尤其是房东为了我们吃火锅，特意冒雨为我们买了电磁炉，还给我们买西瓜避暑，让我们太感动了。下次去东京，一定还要选择这家，感谢给我们如此美好的东京回忆，感谢🙏
阿姨热情好客，从地铁站把我们接到房子，房子非常干净，设施齐全，地理位置好!

Place was very spacious for our family of 5. Home was in between Okubo and Shin-Okubo stations (around 5-7min walk from home). Both stations are one stop away from Shinjuku, very convenient. There is also a nearby small Don Quijote just around the corner from the narrow road where the house is. Also, many convenient stores and restos around.
The home is complete with amenities needed- comfortable bedrooms with A/C, kitchen with stove & ref, dining area, hot & cold shower). We surely had a comfortable stay for 8 days.
Hosts were very friendly and hospitable. I really appreciated that they were responsive and even helped me translate a photo.
房东真的很贴心。第一时间来车站接我们。位置很好。就在大久保站和新大久保站中间。去新宿就一站地，走路不过15分钟。附近吃饭的，买东西的一应俱全。特别好！房间更别提了，非常好！一层三层是住的地方，二层是客厅和厨房。东西一应俱全，还有很多可爱的玩偶~孩子非常开心！十分感谢房东的帮助，回复都非常及时！赞！

Location is quite central. Place is very spacious for Tokyo. It is 3 levels bottoms floor has 2 bedrooms with 2 singles and a single sofa bed each. There is a 2nd bathroom here which is handy. Those of you with small kids need to be aware that the doors are self locking. So make note of the codes to open the door if you are booking the whole place. Middle level is the living space and upstairs is the loft tatami room. Not big and very hot but both sections have A/C.
Overall perfect for what we needed for our extended family of 6. Would stay again as space and larger house/accommodation is not common in central Tokyo. They didn’t take copies of our passports, and every other accommodation including Airbnb have. But the accommodation was legitimate so we didn’t mind.

位置：
位于新大久保站及大久保站附近，从地铁站出来大约走10分钟的路程，在一条安静的小巷子里，去哪里坐地铁都非常方便，更是利于在新宿买买买。
环境：
三层独立房子，屋子非常干净，一楼是两个双床间，二楼是厨房及洗漱区，三楼是榻榻米区，我们6个住的很舒服，目测8个人住是没问题的。
从房间的小小摆件可以看得出房主费用用心，餐具也非常干净，这是非常难得的。
可惜上不了图，我和我的小伙伴们都很喜欢，住的很舒服
周边：
周边美食很多，堪称美食一条街，走到新宿站世纪也就是十五分钟，更不用说那边的好吃的啦！然后生活超市也有两个，可以采购蔬菜肉类自己煮饭，还有堂吉柯德跟松本清，价钱正常，适合补货
房东：
当天是房东的父亲来接的，老人家很好，虽然语言不是很通哈哈，但是把房间给我们介绍了一轮！房东很热心，有问必答
总之！便宜好住够大环境好交通方便！请放心入住吧！

The house is very near to the station and there are many shops around. The rooms are very spacious, good for big family with 2 separate toilet and a bathroom.
Only thing is that the highest floor bedroom is facing the road and it can be abit noisy when there are cars/trucks passing by in the morning, it might disturb light sleepers.
The host is very responsive and helpful to guide us through the amenities usage.
住宿体验很好，设施齐全交通便利

非常非常棒的一次民宿体验，六个大人抱着试试看的心理入住，没想到非常适合我们。从房子来说，一楼两个房间，一个卫生间。二楼是客厅、餐厅以及厨房，虽然不是太大，但足够六个人活动，特别值得夸赞的是厨房，设备齐全，应有尽有，就连各种调料都准备齐全……同时还有卫生间和浴室各一个……三楼是一间榻榻米房（其实是两个小开间），也很温馨。三个房间完全独立，互不干扰，两个卫生间交替使用，足够放松。在环境上也非常不错，是个闹中取静的地方，走出来不到两百米就是热闹非凡的大久保大街，再走几分钟便是新宿车站（和新大久保车站），这中间还有“堂吉柯德”免税店，购物、用餐都及其方便，有机会下次还会入住此地。房东小伙儿非常随和，到车站来接我们，包括各种介绍，到最后还免费让我们存放行李半天……当然我们也是非常自觉的按照要求，尽量不给房东增添麻烦，特别是分类丟垃圾等，尽其所能，这也是体现国人文明素质的一种表现。总之，对一个多次往返于东京的人来说，这是一次非常轻松愉快的民宿体验，谢谢房东！
房东人很好，可以中文交流。非常感谢半夜12点还来车站接我们。房子的地理位置都蛮好的，离大久保和新大久保车站都很近。房间很多，设备很齐全，住的比较舒服！
Decent place. Good location.
位置还是很不错，好近新大久保站和大久保站。附近吃的也多。
很好的房东，亲自到站台来接。房间很干净整洁，生活设施一应俱全，交通也很方便。适合5，6人以上的团队或者家庭。便利店小超市很多，但如果去中高端超市的话，需要步行15分钟。

I will like to express my heartfelt thanks to the couple host. Wife was able to communicate in mandarin which made a lot of things easier for first timers like us. Our flight was changed and host was flexible to let us check in early. Multiple questions prior to the trip were answered patiently and we were even given gifts when we left. Homestay was less than 10mins walk to the metro with many good food around. Japanese are well known for their politeness and kindness and i can fully agree with that. We will definitely love to stay in their homestay when we visit tokyo again.

This airbnb was by far the most comfortable and welcoming airbnb I have stayed in. Our host made us feel right at home, always offering help and responding quickly. She was extremely thoughtful and was always there when we needed help. We were even allowed early check-in because one of the guests wasn’t feeling well. The amenities were outstanding and the house overall was well decorated. Shoutout to the amazing shampoo and conditioner—my hair has never felt so soft. I strongly recommend this airbnb to anyone looking for someplace to stay in Tokyo!
Location is very solid and price is fair
房東小松太太非常親切，聯絡請教時也很迅速回復，到日本當天房東太太還親自到新大久保車站帶我們到民宿，住宿這些天還送我們日本當地水果，時時提醒我們天氣炎熱多補充水分。房間空間很大適合我們一家6人(4大2小)居住使用。下次來東京時還希望能入住。

We loved this house! It was the perfect fit for our family of 5, with lots of space and all the amenities we needed. Strong wifi and easy access to our US streaming accounts on TV. It’s a short walk to Shin-Okubo (on the JR green line), so it was easy to get anywhere in Tokyo. The main street has lots of vending machines, convenience stores, grocery stores, and restaurants.
屋主待人有禮，屋內外乾淨，環境清靜，很好的居住體驗。十分推介的一個地方。
非常友善的人。住宿乾淨整潔
Tout était parfait : logement plus grand que nous le pensions (famille de 2 adultes et 3 enfants), très facile d’accès, très bien situé, hôte très réactif et flexible. Hautement recommandé !!!

Great place to stay! Plenty of restaurants, cafes, shopping, etc all near by. Very close station for quick access to everything Tokyo has. Very clean house with plenty of room for our group of six. Host was very kind and communicated quickly with us! They greeted us on our arrival and that was very nice. Would definitely stay again! Thank you
屋主將自己家中的用品毫不保留的讓房客使用，應有盡有。贈送美味的葡萄、大瓶礦泉水，很感謝。

Location is great near Shin Okubo, Okubo stations and Kabukicho district There are shops, restaurants, convenient stores and small Don Quixote around.
Ms. Komatsu immediately replies to requests and inquiries. Thanks to Ms. Komatsu and husband for being nice and kind hosts.
Very good location, near everything in 5-10 minutes walk

Komatsu-san was very kind and easy to communicate with. They are responsive to any question or request and are very accommodating. The home is a short walk to either Shin-Okubo or Okubo station, which made it very easy to get around Tokyo on the Yamanote and Chuo-Sobu lines. It is also relatively spacious making it easy to settle into with a group of 4. Myself and my friends all enjoyed our stay here!
Place was fine, don't expect "nice".  The location was noisy.

Excellent place within walking distance of Shinjuku but not too busy, Shibuya was also close! We stayed with six friends and it was perfect for that though it could also fit 8 people. Two toilets were excellent, shower was hot with great pressure and everything was clean and comfortable, the host also provided us apples and water which we were grateful for! Location is excellent, place is brilliant - the only small thing is that the upstairs room and kitchen doesn't have a lift so you will need to take your suitcase up which is a bit unavoidable. Would definitely stay again and recommend it!

Host was super responsive and able to communicate in English. Very kind, welcomed us with all water and generous servings of fruit. Rooms had plenty of beds and space. Large living room area (for Japan) to hang out and cook. Washer, large TV, hot water, and all amenities were great. Location is in Ktown of Tokyo with a bunch of good eats and close to JR line. Highly recommend staying here.
good!

Mrs Komatsu is a great host, she is very kind and warm. The house is very near to the train station. There are also have groceries shop and many restaurants. Thank you Mam for all your kindness, and all the compliments, i really appreciate it 🙏🏼 We really enjoy stay at your house, hope next time if we comeback to Tokyo, definitely want to stay at this house again 😊 Thank you for everything.

My family and I (group of 8 people) all had enjoyed the most wonderful time staying here during our stay in Tokyo. Both hosts were so friendly and made all efforts to assist us especially when we had a hard time with the language barriers in a foreign country.
Location is just spot on, bring in closed proximity to all the nearby restaurants and shops. Trains are all accessible and the area was very safe to walk at night.
The home was so quaint and filled with so much charm and personal touch. Hosts really had personally saw to it that we all felt welcomed upon our arrival. She even went to the market and bought us such yummy extra extra large crispy gala apple and lots of water too. And to top that she even left us a wonderful Christmas gift- absolutely delicious. We felt so right at home.
Amenities of this home were just perfect. Best bedrooms as the comfort of the bed and couches were perfect. Showers perfect! Definitely a must stay here!!!!!

What great hosts and a fabulous place. It was clean and the heat in each room worked very well. The hallways could be a bit cold but we slept wonderfully. The shower was excellent.
The kitchen was fine for cooking and we appreciated the huge apples left for us.
The location is great. It is right between two stations so you can get anywhere. The house is just far enough away from the Main Street to be quiet and peaceful. If you are fine with stairs, you should stay here !

Komatsu's homestay comes highly recommended for larger groups. During our 5-night stay with 7 people, we found the accommodation to be both quaint and cozy, offering all essential amenities such as water heating and heaters. The thoughtful host welcomed us with a delightful gift of fresh fruit and water, surprising us with Japanese treats for Christmas and even presenting a cake on New Year's day – a true superhost! Conveniently located just a few minutes' walk from Shin-Okubo, a single stop away from Shinjuku station, the homestay provides easy access to the vibrant Shinjuku area. Numerous dining options are within reach, including a revolving sushi restaurant, Coco Curry House, Yoshinoya, Sukiya, McDonald's, Starbucks and more. Additionally, nearby convenience stores and a Don Quijote store add to the overall convenience. The homestay's cleanliness and the host's warm hospitality make it a place you'll want to treat as your own home. Many thanks for a wonderful stay!

It was superb for our stay with another family. She provided very clear instructions on how to get there. It was close to 2 different train stations, a stop away from Shinjuku meaning we could pop back for a late arvo reset, has kombinis, supermarkets, eateries, a karaoke joint and a Ta-Q-Bin outlet on the doorstep, making for a very convenient stay. She was warm and hospitable, welcoming us with bottles of water, apples and then later a box of cookies for the little ones. Shower was hot and powerful, toilet seat was warm and one has the Japanese bidet, and heaters powerful enough to make us feel very comfortable for our mid Jan stay. We used the washing machine everyday and hung our clothes outside and it’d be dry by the time we got home. Wifi worked well for all 7 of us. We were very comfortable and were very happy making that our home for 5 nights.

신오쿠에서 도보로 이동 가능하지만 정확히보면 오쿠보역과 신오쿠보 중간적 위치임.
도보이동 가능하지만 아이가 어릴경우 다소 먼거리임. 현관을 열자마자 2층 겨단이 있어서 현관은 좁음.
소소한 불편이 있지만 워낙 친절하시고 배려해주셔서 소소한건 잊혀짐
다음에 가면 다시 갈거같음
퇴실일자에 손님이 없다면서 천천히 퇴실해도 배려도 해주심
