I and family would like to sicerely thank you the host(Yuri) for support during our stay in Tokyo as it is our first time. We are very happy and satisfied with her service and support. We will recommend othet friends who wish to visit Tokyo
Best
Phonexay
The house was spacious for us 6 adults. The host was nice, hospitable and very accommodating. We had a fun time staying there during the Tokyo marathon time!

Really lovely home, and close to two stations, a combini, and coin laundry if you need to wash clothes faster. Host was super sweet and was flexible with accommodations. We recommend the ramen place around the corner! They are also very responsive with communication, and seem genuinely interested in ensuring you have a nice stay. Thank you so much for the generosity!

We had a wonderful time staying at this place.  We arrived by taxi and the the taxi driver had no issue finding the place.  The house was clean when we arrived, and the owner met with us to walk us through the house in detail to make sure we understood everything.  There are two decent sized bedrooms on the first floor with a half bath.  Each bedroom has its own AC unit and two twin sized beds.  On the second floor there is a kitchen, a small dining area, and a small living room with a big TV.  There is a full bath on the second floor as well.  The third floor has some tatami beds for extra guests.  We had a party of four and found the place extremely accommodating.  It was quiet at night, with very occasional noise from the street nearby.  It is about 7-8 minutes walk to the JR station and 19 minutes walk to a metro station.  There are plenty of supplies the owner provided that we found everything we needed in the house, which we appreciated very much.

We stayed at this house for 5 nights while in Tokyo as a group of 4 adults and two toddlers. The house is very spacious and had everything we needed to make our stay comfortable. It's close to shops, restaurants and two train stations and very centrally located. The house is homely and we loved out time in it
Tout a été parfait. L’accueil, le calme du quartier et à la fois animé avec de nombreux restaurants délicieux. À 5min du métro. Très grand.
The host provided all the amenities for a comfortable stay.

We had total 5 adults, first time in Tokyo, convenient location, near transit stations, various types of restaurants and markets, comfortable for 5 of us, we even prepared two beautiful dinners right at the fully equipped kitchen, would definitely recommend the place for families and friends who desire to have more home style travel rather than staying at the hotels
Nice location. Nice house.

Excellent place.  Easy walk to train station, food and drink. Basketball court and park nearby. Very nice and quiet neighborhood. Small ramen restaurant next door. Our host was very responsive. Her father helped let us in, and he returned the next day with a gift of strawberries for our family. Highly recommend this place, you won’t be disappointed.
Hosts were very friendly and engaged to make it an enjoyable stay. The whole place was super clean and well equipped. Would decide for this place again next time.

We had a great stay with plenty of room for 5 adults and a very peaceful place in Shinjuku. Walkable to the train station and to the rowdier parts of Shinjuku. The host was friendly, responsive and left fresh fruit and water for our enjoyment. We stayed for 11 days and is was fantastic 🌸

Our stay was so great
Spacious place and great location
Walkable to so many placed
在我們來東京旅遊的八天七夜中，小松的家給我們家的感覺，非常乾淨，值得推薦！
交通便利，设施也很齐全，房东太太很热情，还送了水果。由于天气炎热，还特意送来的电扇，帮助通风，好评！

Der Kontakt mit Komatsu hat gut funktioniert und war sehr freundlich. Sie hat uns persönlich begrüßt und das Haus gezeigt. Sie hat auch schnell auf Anfragen reagiert. Das Haus ist in der Nähe von zwei Bahnhöfen. Wir konnten sogar einige Orte zu Fuss erreichen. Die Zimmer sind einfach eingerichtet und sauber. Die Betten sind bequem und man kann sogar auf Tatamis schlafen. Die Klimaanlagen haben gut funktioniert. Wir können das Haus also gut empfehlen.

Wish I could give 6 stars!
Place was exactly what we wanted: clean, cool and nearby great food and two train stations.
Our host was unbelievably gracious and accommodating, we would love to book with them again in the future!

Komatsu’s home is welcoming and has everything you need. Komatsu is a thoughtful host who met us at check-in and was very responsive. The location is within a 10 minute walk to 2 different train stations.
La maison est idéalement située ce qui a facilité notre séjour, l’hôte a été réactif, accueillant et très arrangeant. Nous recommandons cette maison pour passer un agréable séjour à Tokyo!

We are two couples travelling around Japan and  loved our stay in  Bungalow  Shinjuki. There are two western style rooms with two single beds in each which where  very comfortable with air conditioning and fan . Plus Japanese style room on the top level.Two bathrooms ( one separate) and a shower plus washing machine The kitchen was well equipped with what we needed and the house overall is very roomy. Location is perfect close to Shin-Okubo station and plenty of restaurants close by to walk to.The host is especially lovely  and accomodating. She gave us water and fruit on arrival. Definitely recommend this house.

Komatsu was so accomodating. He let us check in early and met us at the Airbnb to explain everything to us. He was very responsive when I messaged him regarding any questions. The location is great and very walkable to the train station. Located 1 block away from Shinjuku station. Close enough to get to the hustle and bustle easily but far enough away from the craziness of a major station. The home had everything we needed! 5 stars!!

Beautiful place, excellent location, quiet street, very friendly and responsive host -- probably the most perfect airbnb!! Me and my friends loved staying here, and I don't think it would be possible to find a nicer home. Thank you!!

此次一家人7位入住一週以上，房間非常舒適，客廳及廚房也非常乾淨，讓人放鬆，有家的感覺，非常棒；附近距離車站5分鐘，餐廳、便利商店、生活機能完善，適合到東京時來此下榻！
房東回覆快速，有問題能夠即使解答，讚！推薦給大家~

Fantastic 3-storey house near Shin-Okubo station. Lots of sleeping areas, we ended up using the upstairs futon/tatami space with our kids.
Very responsive hosts who took great care of us. Highly recommend to all visitors

Great house in Shinjuku, conveniently located near metro station, convenience stores and restaurants. Very easy to find and very spacious for a group of six. Everyone had their private space and yet we were all able to get together in the living/dining room with ample space. Will definitely stay here again when returning to Tokyo.

Wonderful place to stay! A lot of space for myself and my three friends -- which was our primary concern when finding a place. The host immediately greeted us and explained the property in great detail, while also giving us plenty of room to ask questions and was always responsive if I messaged them anything later! The location itself was great -- not too out of the way, but close enough to the main street that we were able to comfortably walk to whatever we needed in a moment while still having plenty of peace at night. I would honestly love to stay at this property again if I return to Japan! Could not recommend enough :)
Ideal location. The accommodation was spacious and clean. The host was flexible and responsive. Highly recommend staying here.

Location is excellent! 2 stations to choose from within a 5 min walk. Shin Okubo, Yamonote line. Surrounded by Restaurants galore, 7/11, family Mart, Lawson once you walk to the main road.
Nice and quiet at night. House was clean and kitchen had utensils and crockery to use.
2 flights of stairs if you’re using the top floor otherwise 2 bedrooms and a toilet are on the ground floor. Kitchen and bathroom are one flight up, steep stairs but commonplace in Tokyo. Bedrooms are roomy but I found the beds to be very firm, so not comfortable for us.
Overall, great stay. Great host and lovely landlord.
Thank you
The host was responsive and helpful. We were allowed late check out which was amazing.
최고의 호스트와 훌륭한 숙소

I loved staying at Komatsu house with my 4 sisters! we loved walking to K-town. Shinjuku is very busy and crowded but this house was on a side street and was private and lovely. Great location, walk 8min to shinokubo and okubo. the house was very cute and definitely had a woman's touch. If you're looking for a quirky, comfy, spacious house in a convenient location this is it! She even gave us water bottles and apples. I would come back. Two toilets and separate shower is convenient for a group. Very spacious, didn't feel like we were on top of each other. Really feels like being in a 2000s movie. its great ! thank you komatsu house <3
Great place. we enjoyed stay. super helpful and responsive hosts - we asked for an iron and they got it within no time. Place is walkable to metro station and has good food options around.
This was perfect for our family of six. It had everything we needed. Very clean. Great, quiet location. Very responsive hosts.

Our host was there to greet us when we arrived and accommodated our delayed arrival. She left us water bottles and apples for our stay. We had a couple times that we needed help (locked ourselves out of a room, blew a fuse with a hair dryer) and her husband came to help us right away! They also let us check out late to accommodate our afternoon flight.
The pillows were very firm if you are like me and like a softer one. Also keep in mind that the air conditioning turns off during the day if you take the key card out of its slot but mostly it wasn’t an issue because the house stayed reasonably cool while we were gone. The air is also not central air so the hallway and bathrooms are a little warm.
I definitely recommend this house for a big group and our hosts were super responsive and thoughtful!

Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans cette maison.
La superficie pour notre famille de 5 personnes était parfaitement adaptée et nous avions tout le confort nécessaire durant notre semaine à Tokyo.
Accueil de qualité avec toutes les explications et bien sûr le wifi, la climatisation, un pack d’eau pour notre arrivée et tout le nécessaire : lessive, parapluies, adaptateurs etc … !
L’emplacement est très pratique car il y a tout à proximité : kombinis, restaurants et le métro tout en étant au bout d’une rue calme.
Je recommande vivement ce logement !
Un Grand merci à notre hôte pour sa gentillesse durement tout notre séjour.
Great place for the price.

All the rooms and decor were super clean and very beautiful as displayed in the photographs. I was able to spend a very pleasant 10 days there.
The daily minimum necessities are also provided, so you should not have any trouble if you stay for a short period without packing your own.
There were also some cooking supplies for making basic meals.
It was advertised as a 5 minutes walk to the nearest station (Morimoto Station), but it only took me 3 minutes door to door (I do walk fast probably). There is a decent walk from the station entrance to the platform though.
If you use the Morimoto Station entrance/exit closest to this building there is no elevator or escalator. So, if you have particularly heavy luggage I would suggest using a different exit.
It is also very close to Ryogoku Station and you can easily use either.
The surroundings are also very nice and welcoming. I highly recommend Jian’s rooms!
すべての設備が写真の通り新しく綺麗で、また清潔にお掃除も行き届いており、とても快適な10日間を過ごす事ができました。
日用品も必要最低限は用意されているので、短期滞在であれば全く困る事はないと思います。
ラーメンやプチ鍋と言った簡単な調理も出来ました。
最寄りの森下駅まで徒歩5分とありましたが、アパート出口から最寄りの駅入口まで、私の足では3分でした。(私は歩くのが早い)
ただ、駅構内はホームまで少し歩きます。また、その最寄出入口も長めの階段のみなので、重いスーツケース等の方は面倒ですが他のエレベーターやエスカレーターのある出入口がオススメです。
両国駅までも遠くはなく、2駅利用可能です。
アパート周辺は穏やかな環境で、大変オススメです！

とても清潔感があり、過ごしやすかったです！
ありがとうございました！
お部屋もきれいで、快適でした。ありがとうございました。

感谢房东耐心的回复和建议，房子里的配置全新，设施整洁干净，是我这次日本自由行住过的民宿中最新最干净的一套公寓。交通也算是方便，森下地铁A2出口步行约5分钟就能到，不过没有电梯到达地面，拖着大箱子有些不便。房子所在的公寓楼有很明显的标识牌挂着路边的灯杆上，方便寻找到，入住便利。房子不远有一家7–11，可以买些便当和点心，只是周边没有景点和大商场，不过因为东京的商店关门比较早，基本是在8点就关了，所以并不影响逛街购物。

都営地下鉄の森下駅、総武線の両国駅の2駅からアクセスが可能で、また、部屋もすごく綺麗で、非常に快適なステイになりました。
しかし、壁が薄いせいか少しだけうるさく感じました。
2日間ありがとうございました。
Quiet town, clean room, and all the stuff you need that would make a great vacation. Would love to stay again sometime later. :)
非常舒适的住宅，有机会还会选择
下次來還會選這間

Jian's place was about a 10 min walk from the subway. Travel lightly if you want to walk. It was quiet at night but near a school/playground so you can hear kids playing during the day. The place was really clean and the bed was comfortable and we enjoyed our stay.
房屋坐落在一个安静的街区，离地铁站大约十分钟，去市区还算方便，就是晚上特别寂静，有点慌。房东是个热情的中国小姐姐，全程中文交流，回复及时。有一天我不幸钥匙丢了，房东打车过来给我送了钥匙。她还帮我订了去富士山的车票，给了我一些旅行建议。房间虽然很小，但整洁有序，各种设施一应俱全，离开的时候有点舍不得。

Jian's place is in a newly renovated apartment building in a very modern and quiet district East of Tokyo. It is very close to transit, INCREDIBLY CLEAN, and the surrounding area provided a peaceful respite from the crowded streets and noise of Tokyo. The apartment had everything we needed. It is an incredible deal if you're traveling alone or with one other person.
房子新，位置离地铁口有小小远

지하철역과 가까우며, 특히나 료코쿠역
방향으로 가면 휼륭한 식당과
이자카야 등이 있는 번화가가 나타난다.

Overall Clean!! Lovely hi-tech toilet and shower room.
Very compact - tiny house living style. We used the washing machine and dried our laundry on the balcony “just like real locals”.
Clear directions to find the apartment provided. The address is so new that Google maps couldn’t find it. So make sure you check your messages for the street map and photos from Jian.
So clean! It was lovely. At first I was wary of the cleaning fee (a previous place had not been very clean) but when we arrived, we were delighted to stay in a place that is so well looked after.
Was a nice touch to be able to take portable wifi out with us.

Jian’s place was very clean and new. Close to both the JR line and general metro (no more than 10 min walk). We did find the beds on the firm side and the kitchen very sparsely but overall it was a great place! Jian was also very kind to let us check in a few hours early with our bags. Also a 7 Eleven right around the other side of the building. Enjoy!
非常棒的房间，干净整洁，外部环境清净，离地铁2分钟，离江户东京博物馆也超级近，绝对的好公寓
房間打掃挺乾淨的，環境也很安靜，不過隔音設備不是很好，有時晚上會傳來隔壁房的聲響和說話聲
Great location nearby train station, very quiet and cozy
Great place and location. Very highly recommended

위치도 여기저기 다니기 괜찮고 좋았어요!
주방에 커피포트, 종이컵, 큰 냉장고도 있어서 잘 썼네용 화장실도 냄새 안나고 깨끗!!
살짝 아쉬웠던건 이불에 원인 모를 얼룩과
지린내..?가 났던것? 코박고 맡지 않는 이상
딱히 신경은 안쓰였어요ㅋㅋㅋ 그리고 방이 너무 건조했어용 ㅠㅠ 가습기 작은거라도 하나 있었으면 했네요 그래도 가격대비 정말 괜찮은 숙소라고 생각합니당
Very clean and easy to find location. 711 right downstairs is a great touch.
괜찮아요
总体挺好

We've been 9 nights at Jians place.
Everything was clean and tidy.
When i will come back to Tokyo, i will First try to get the same room.
The room is about 5 min. walk to the next Station with an Lawson on your way. So the breakfast is absolutely no Problem :).
很不错 以后来的话还会选择这家
Really clean and calm, easy to access and close to Subway station. Highly recommended !
很不错，交通方便，生活便利
Great residential location near the bigger cities. Nice night life locally as well
很好

とても清潔な部屋で、必要な物が出て来た時にJianさんに連絡をしたら、とても迅速に対応してくださいました。
ありがとうございました。
그냥 그랬어요
Good value. Everything was just as described.
Le logement était très bien. L'accessibilité au sein du bâtiment avec de grosses valises n'est pas forcement simple. Mais le lieu est calme, proche d'une station et dispose de tout le nécessaire.
房子干净整洁，设施齐全，是个蛮不错的选择，只是拖大件行李到这里稍稍有点远
地铁离森下站很近，去各个景点比较方便，不远处也有很多便利店，吃饭的话有食其家。屋子还算可以，总体来说性价比还是很高的。

A great Airbnb for a really great price. This room is sparkling clean, has a great location with two 24/hr mini convenience stores for snacks or drinks that are super close. It is walking distance to the Tokyo subway lines and the JR lines (which you can use a JR rail pass for). The laundry works perfectly and the air conditioning was impressive and fought the Tokyo heat/humidity extremely well. Stay here!!!

有WiFi但是信号比较弱。
森下站a2下来，5分钟到民宿。周围便利店超市需要走一会儿到大马路上才有。总体还可以。
浴室地板有點髒汙，其餘都很棒
nice loft, good choice if stay in Tokyo
Jian's place is great value for money and sparkling clean. It's all you need for your Tokyo stay. Highly recommended!
房子很好 明亮 干净 不会太小 位于住宅区较为安静
とても清潔で、過ごしやすかったです。
Great little place to stay. Easy access to two stations and the restaurants were lovely. Great little bar nearby where we could watch the rugby!
It was my first time in Japan so not really sure what to expect. Place was roomy and clean, with great amenities. Best toilet too

Very nice clean place. No nonsense and close walk to some stations. Jian was very helpful and her guide was very thorough.
Perfect place for what we needed!
很棒的住宿體驗！這棟樓很安全也很新，房內設施也很棒～交通位置很方便，我和朋友就算都慢慢走，走到森下7分鐘、兩國的話12分鐘，都很方便！

十分推荐入住，我觉得非常适合我，虽然离地铁站有点远，但是还可以接受。周围环境很好很安静，晚上机会没有车辆通过，可以舒服的睡一觉。房间在日本来说算是比较大的了，比我想象中要大，浴室干湿分开，有个小阳台。走十分钟左右很多吃喝的地方，早餐就不是那么方便了，不知道日本人都不怎么在外面吃早餐的，大概走十分钟左右有家吃西式早餐的，三明治跟咖啡都非常赞！天天早上都在那吃早餐的。房间十分干净，周围的环境也十分干净，全程自助入住，自助退房。
The place is nice and clean and very quite. The nearest station is around 5 mins walk.

We had a amazing stay at Jian's place. The location is verry good in a couple of minutes walk you have two differnt train stations  and conbinis in range. Everything went fast and was clear. Jian explained us how to find the apartment and gave us a map of some  restraunts in the neighbourhood. In general its a verry quiet neighbourhood.
The check in instructions were clear and simple. The place is clean. The location is close to the subway. Overall, I would recommend
Very nice and clean place, easy to get in and out of and in a quiet area! 7 eleven was conveniently on the next street and a short walk to the nearest train station. Would recommend!
The place was pretty good. Thanks for letting us stay at your place.
Jian’s place is very clean and comfortable. A little walk from the subway station but overall a great experience.
Really nice place with a good connection to the public transport. Was very clean and quite. Would stay there again if possible

房間很舒適！我和朋友可以各睡一張床。（這是我第二次入住這個房源）

很划算！

十分不推荐中国同胞入住，房东服务态度很差（可能要是他的洋爸爸，房东态度会好一点），第一次去日本，应该谷歌地图定位不准找了好久，问房东得到就是很不耐烦的回复：你有没有下谷歌？没做攻略也来？诸如此类，进海关要地址和联系方式等了快20分钟才有回复，打微信语音各种被拒接。
真的很推荐  两个人住  非常Nice  森下站旁边 交通也很方便  里面设施干净又齐全  另外也很安静  总之如果来我一定会选择这个
가격 대비 너무 좋았어요!!!
모리시타역까지 10분 정도 걸은 것 같아요. 거리는 좀 있지만 숙소가 매우 청결하고 가전제품이나 드라이기 샴푸 등등 전부 구비되어 있었습니다. 만족도가 매우 높았습니다!
バス停が近くてアクセスしやすかったです。また利用させてください。

Very spacious BnB with a good location in Tokyo. Conbinis and metro station 5min walks. Wide range of household appliances that offer great flexibility for cooking and doing laundry. Overall had a very comfortable stay at Jian's BnB. Highly recommendable.
很好沟通
あたりが居住区なので静かの一方、少し歩いたところに駅があるので、交通も便利です。
とても快適なスペースでした！また機会があれば利用させて貰いたいです。
老板人特别好，很热情，房间干净舒适，位置也超级棒，能在这个价位住到这个水准性价比真的非常高了！

マスターは心良さそうな方でチェックイン手続きスムーズです。
トイレやお風呂は新しめなのに、お安く宿泊できたので良かったです。
ゴミ出しは最後に自分達で行います。
とても良かったです。
キレイで必要なものも揃っており、良い滞在でした。

突然の予約だったにも関わらず、チェックイン時間など気を利かせてくださり大変助かりました。
また機会があれば是非宜しくお願い致します。
Wi-Fiが繋がらなかったです
ホストからの連絡も早く、予約からチェックアウトまで非常にスムーズに行えました。
宿の主人が人柄もよくとても親切で快適に過ごすことができました。従業員の方の対応もしっかりしていて安心して利用できる宿でした！
Good stay

I enjoyed my 7-days stay a lot. The apartments are located in a quite residential area which is well connected to public services (5-10 min walk). The host was kind and responsive. Excellent value for money!
Host was responsive and gave clear Instructions. Place was clean and has everything necessary for a short-term stay. Very quiet neighborhood and conveniently close to the subway and a konbini.
Great spot to stay a few days.
Host was very responsive and helpful! The location was about 10 minutes walk from each station so it was fairly convenient, amenities and room was as described!

깨끗하고 좋았어요

위치가 완전 도시는 아니지만 지하철 충분히 이용하기 좋았고 도쿄메트로선 도에이선 자주 이용했어서 편했습니다 !

호스트분께서 질문에 답도 잘해주시고

Apartment with generously spacious room. Grateful that the heater reached the entire room (which doesn't happen too often).
It's a great spot when I go back to Tokyo I'd definitely stay there again.
숙소에서 지하철까지의 위치도 좋았고 내부나 외부 전부 깔끔해서 너무 좋았습니다 솔직히 6일 머무르면서 불편한 점은 없었어요 ㅎㅎ 👍👍
호스트분이 친절하시고 체크인 전에 짐도 맡겨주셨습니다. 히터를 틀면 집이 많이 건조해짐ㅜ 다른 숙소보다 샤워실이 큰 편인데 침실은 좁아서 큰 캐리어 펼쳐놓기 어렵슴다 가격대비 굿굿
Good location with good connections to the rest of Tokyo. Jian was helpful and responsive whenever we needed anything, room was clean and as advertised.

Appartement impeccable et spacieux , 5 min a pied du métro qui vous emmènera partout ! pour les bon marcheur 30 min a pied de Asakusa et Akihabara ! logement silencieux avec tout le matériel nécessaire pour un long séjour ! je recommande et je regarde déjà quand je pourrais revenir pour mes prochaines vacances !
très bon logement , je recommande . accessible à pied il y a deux station de métro à proximité , quartier calme ! en espérant pouvoir revenir en octobre . 😁
Very helpful and responsive host. Walkable from the Shinjuku line, and a few restaurants around the area. Somewhat cramped for 2 people but overall the place was clean and accessible.
Great stay!
Easy to find and comfortable. Very responsive.
Great place, very clean, really enjoyed the place also the metro station is like 3 mins away so its really easy to visit the entire Tokyo from there
房东回复很及时，附近很安静，距离超市，地铁站都不远，住在这出行很方便

조금 무리하면 걸어서 아사쿠사까지 갈 수 있어요
스미다강을 따라 산책도 즐기고 여기저기 도보로 둘러보았습니다

离地铁口很近，整体体验很不错。
房子非常干净，需要的东西全都一应俱全。房东非常热情，帮了我们大忙。周边有便利店，离公共交通也都很近。非常好的体验：）

Great location! Lots of train stations/bus stops within a walkable distance. I was able to commute via train into Tokyo every day. The space was also very large and clean, and the staff was polite and helpful! A 10/10 stay.
Lägenheten hade precis allt vi behövde. Sköna sängar. Tydliga instruktioner för att ta sig dit. Hjälpsam och trevlig värd. Tyst och lugnt område. Nära till buss och tunnelbana.
A pretty big space and perfect for getting between train stations.  Also the ramen shop next door is amazing!
깔끔하고 조용했어요. 필요한 도움도 항상 빠르게 제공해주셨습니다! 덕분에 잘 있다갑니다
很棒
位置非常好，离森下和两国地铁站都只需要步行十分钟以内，房间内很干净，设施应有尽有，房东也非常好沟通，总的来说是很愉快的住宿体验！
일본 첫 여행이었는데, 역 부근하고 가까워서 아키하바라나 신주쿠같은 번화가 접근성이 너무나 좋았습니다. 바로 앞에 편의점도 있었구요. 숙소도 너무 청결하고 되려 이 가격에 이 컨디션이라고? 라는 생각이 들 정도였습니다. 다음에 또 도쿄 방문하게 된다면 동일한 숙소로 잡을 것 같습니다 :)
Das Zimmer und die Lagw waren super. Kleines aber feines Appartment, mit einem netten Host, der umgehend antwortet. Kann es weiter empfehlen.
完美的住宿体验 干净也卫生 而且步行去搭地铁也超方便. 下次还有来日本一定住这里..赞👍🏻
kudos .. great value for money. I personally suggest morishita garden for the future tourists.

Gospodarz bardzo kontaktowy i pomocny.
Podczas zameldowania oraz pobytu nie wystąpiły najmniejsze problemy. Samo mieszkanie jest bardzo dobrze wyposażone i czyste.
Bliskość sklepów, restauracji i stacji metra to kolejne plusy lokalizacji.
Z czystym sumieniem mogę polecić ten pokój.
Przy następnej wizycie w Tokio postaram się wrócić.
Small but comfortable and well connected to transport and restaurants. A great place to stay in Tokyo. Search on Morishita Gardens to find the location on Maps
Nice little room, close to central tokyo. Definitly recommend it!
Quiet neighbourhood and close to stations and convenient stores. Host was very responsive and accommodating.
Great place to stay…
房東親切友善，房間乾淨衛生，室內空間非常足夠，我們可以在室內打開兩個29吋的大型行李箱。房間地點離地鐵森下站步行約5分鐘，交通往來非常方便。推薦周邊的中華料理Chūka-ya 中華や
Place was clean and as described. I reached out to the host for help at one point and he did his best to assist me once he got back to me. Most nearby stations are within a 15 minute walk.
整潔，方便

We wished that we stayed here longer. We used this as our last stop for the last 1-2 days in Tokyo and we loved it! Everything was clean! It even had a kitchen and washer which came in so handy. The owner Joan was very responsive and considerate of our situation of wanting to check-in early and holding our luggages while we go explore. Near Asakusa where we could shop and try out many food. I would definitely stay here longer next time! Love it!
素敵なサービスをありがとうございました。また利用させて頂きたいと想います♪

My partner and I booked Jians place as part of our 3 wk trip in Japan. We just stayed the first half at this place and have already rebooked for the last week of our Japan trip.
Communication was absolutely wonderful, Jian was clear with directions to her place and was prompt with any questions I had. She also provided recommendations to places when I asked. One of the recommendations was an udon place up the road and it is 10/10.
The self check in was great as well, again instructions were so clear and straight forward and didn’t overwhelm me at all.
If I was to come to Japan again and look at places to stay, Jian’s would be first on my list since it was pretty close to everything I wanted to do.

Habitación en un edificio de apartamentos turísticos en una zona tranquila y bien situada, cerca del metro y a dos paradas de Akihabara. La localización de Maps no coincide exactamente con el alojamiento y tuvimos que buscar, resultó estar en el edificio de detrás. El apartamento está bien equipado, las camas son cómodas y el barrio es muy tranquilo, no se oye nada por las noches. Jian contestó rápido a nuestras preguntas, recomendable.
Great location, close walk to convenience stores. Place looked like the photos. Very clean and great amenities.
Overall had a good stay
The place was very clean and presentable. The amenities we needed were available. The location was very accessible to Morishita Station, which was all we needed to get around Tokyo!

Just like our first stay at Jian's, the place was really clean and presentable. The amenities provided are really all you need! My most favorite part is that the place is close to Morishita Station! We will definitely stay at Jian's again when we visit Tokyo!

I had a very nice stay here. The room offers many conveniences. It is easily reachable by public transport and by foot. The room is very quiet, because it is in a quite neighborhood.
Definitely would recommend.

This is a great spot for anyone looking to immerse themselves in the culture. This isn't a touristy area, but is a very close walk to the Morshita station with close proximity to all the good spots (Akihabara, Shinjuku, Shibuya, Rippongi). The Airbnb is small but normal for Tokyo, it's quiet and offers everything you'd need for a Tokyo vacation. Jian the host was extremely responsive and helpful. It was a pleasure staying here and would recommend for any two people travelling.
Comfortable stay, big thanks to Jian for helping us out and calling up hotels after we mixed up our check in dates. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a comfortable and convenient place to stay!
This airbnb is in a great location, easy to walk or use the train systems to see the sights of Tokyo and the outskirts. Quiet neighbourhood we really enjoyed our 1 week stay.
Appartement très bien situé. Les explications de Jian nous à permis de trouver facilement le logement. Métro à proximité moins d’un kilomètre.
Clean functional room close to station. Typically main City is two train stops away. Not much to do in this city itself. Seven-level close to this place is ok. Bigger ones are few blocks away.
Amazing place. It has all you need for a perfect stay. I totally recommend it 👌
位于两条线路的位置 换乘比较方便，周边比较安静，性价比较高

Jian's place immediately felt like home to us. It was really comfortable, it had a great bathroom, and it was within easy walking distance from the train station. The host, Jian, was very responsive, but I didn't need to reach out to him much, because his instructions were very clear, and all of the stuff in his space worked really well. If I come to Tokyo again, I will absolutely be staying here again.
环境不错

Perfect! Everything we could have asked for during our short 3 day stay in Tokyo. It was a quaint little apartment fully equipped with everything we needed. It was ideally located just 6 mins walk from the closest metro station which made travelling around Tokyo very easy. Thank you for having us, I would definitely stay again in a heart beat!
Great and simple stay! Very efficient experience, highly recommend especially for the great price point!

We had a comfortable stay in Jian place for 2 nights. Jian location is about 10 mins walk, you may need google map. Closest station is Morishita Station ( subway). Very quiet neighbourhood, especially at night, Apartment is nice, clean and comfortable bed. There is a washing machine, fridge, microwave, kitchen utensils..etc. Family marts and Lawson nearby. Host Jian is easy to contact and even helped us where to have our meals. We would definitely recommend this place to you. We will be back to stay for another 8 days after our Gunma Prefecture trip back to Tokyo.
We have a wonderful quiet room for rest. The place is easy to find and the checkin instructions were very clear. Room is clean and comfortable. Thank you Jian for the good experience in Tokyo!
Jian was a wonderful host, and was very great with communication. I will definitely look into booking here again the next time I decide to come back to Tokyo! Thank you!
Tolle Lage mit tollen Anbindungen und trotzdem sehr ruhig.
Very clean and organised place with sufficient space for luggage
Great stay for 14 days, great location, wonderful host and place, would recommend highly and would stay again next time I am in Japan!
모리시타역 인근으로 조용한 동네분위기 현지인이 많이사는 동네
Fantastic homely location in a quiet part of Tokyo that is still close to everything.
Had everything we needed for a good price, in a quiet area and walking distance from train stations !

깨끗하고 조용한 거주지역에 있어서 아주 만족함
지하철역이랑도 가까워서 편했음

This place was amazing, the location was next to so many great sites. I really couldn't believe the value for what you get. I would stay here again if I ever come back and I would highly recommend it to anyone else who wants a place to stay that's centrally located and has access to all sorts of attractions.
Nice place, easy to access public transport.
가격대비 숙소도 좋고 응대도 친절했습니다
Die Wohnung war sehr gut. Alles war sauber der Vermieter schnell und hat alles klar erklärt. Nur dass der Balkon aufgrund der Klimaanlage unter Wasser stand war schade
房子挺好找的，离森下地铁站挺近的，我走路快，4、5分钟就到了。冰箱、微波炉、炉具、碗筷、小沙发、餐桌该有的都有，还有一个小电梯。房东特别贴心，因为第二天东京台风，有其他客人的飞机被取消了，房东主动和我们联系询问行程情况，这种服务在酒店是享受不到的。房子进门和洗手间有点小，但是东京寸土寸金，应该是普遍现象。总体来讲，交通方便，性价比高，非常干净，而且还安静，下次再来，还会入住的。

Very clean and easy to access. Jian was very kind and allowed us early check in when we made it to the area early. He even offered to hold our luggage if early check in wasn't possible so we wouldn't have to pay for storage. I would definitely stay again.
tutto come in foto, stanza pulita e molto vicino alla metro
概ね満足できました。
Die Unterkunft war wie beschrieben alles vorhanden und sauber. Leicht zu finden.
Love my stay at Joan’s place. Extremely clean and always felt safe even wondering around at night time.  Would definitely stay again.

Die Unterkunft liegt in ruhiger Umgebung und ist nahe der U-Bahn gelegen. In der Nähe befindet sich ein kleiner Park und ein seven eleven. Die Zimmer sind geräumig und man findet alles, was man für einen Städtetrip braucht. Küche ist ausgestattet mit Wasserkocher, Herd und Geschirr. Eine Waschmaschine ist ebenfalls vorhanden. Auf dem Balkon kann die Wäsche problemlos getrocknet werden. Betten waren bequem und nachts konnte man gut schlafen. Ich kann die Unterkunft wärmstens empfehlen.
If you're looking for a place with many shops and food walkable, this isn't the place. But if you want to be away from the hustle and bustle of nightlife this is an excellent place to stay!

Always pleasure to stay at Jisns place.
Very clean and prompt response.
Clean and neat room to stay, friendly host and nice price.

Great place to stay for the price! It's essentially a small apartment. Check-in is easy and the location of the apartment is good, being in a quieter neighbourhood but close to two metro stations that can bring you to various locations in the city center easily. Notably, the Ryogoku station is only two stops away from the Akihabara station. One thing to note is that although there is a stove in the apartment, the cooking equipment is not complete and I would say insufficient to cook a real meal, so you might need a spatula and a pan handle if you plan to do that.

The accommodation is located in a quiet area of Tokyo and is a short train ride to museums and galleries in Ueno Park. It was the perfect size for two guests and provided all necessary amenities. The host was responsive and helpful. We enjoyed our stay!

It is located in the outskirts of Tokyo, so it is somewhat far from the downtown area.
It is a quiet and peaceful neighborhood even in the morning and evening.
It's sunny and convenient to check-in. There is a custodian on the first floor, so you can get help right away. It takes about 5 minutes on foot to the station.
It is not too far away. There are subways that can be accessed directly from Akihabara, Shinjuku, and Shibuya. It would be a good sightseeing experience to take a light look at the neighborhood and see local restaurants and shops. The interior of the accommodation is clean and odorless.
The water pressure in the bathroom is good, the warm water comes out well, and there are washing machines and detergent.
There are simple cooking facilities such as induction, pot, spoon, chopsticks, cups, and electric pots. It is a very nice accommodation. It was a very nice travel accommodation for 4 nights and 5 days. Don't hesitate to make a reservation.
Place was clean and quiet, area was easy to navigate and close to stations. Would go again.
Clean and well located near public transport and a nice quiet neighborhood!! Comfortable beds and room!
Cosy.
とても快適に過ごせました。
great place in a quiet but we'll located area, close to the center of Tokyo

Très bon séjour, le quartier est calme, le logement est propre et pratique.
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour.
環境清幽很安靜，雖然附近商店或餐廳很少，但可能因為是純屬住宅區吧，這應該算正常的狀態。還好離地鐵站走路只要10分鐘，不算遠還尚可接受。建議住這裡吃飽飯或準備食物再回來，廚房是完全無法烹飪的，電磁爐完全不能煮東西，因為有溫度限制。但有微波爐可以加熱食物，以性價比來說算是還不錯的選擇

位於住宅區，晚上可以安靜休息
附近有許多便利店，交通也相當方便
入住的這幾天住得舒適自在

We enjoyed our stay as amenities were well provided. Location was great with the train station and many food options within 10mins walking distance. Jian was always very responsive, making our trip much easier.
Nice place, very clean and convenient!
Chambre confortable avec tout le confort dans un quartier calme, à 10min à pied entre 2 stations de métro.
駅から徒歩で5分、マンションを曲がるとコンビニが近くにあってとても便利でした！お部屋も綺麗で快適に過ごすことが出来ました
離森下站A2出口蠻近的，附近還有多家便利商店可以選擇，房東溝通相相當良好，推薦大家可以選擇這裡住宿

Apartment was tiny but clean and had everything we needed. We had no issues with check-in/check-out and were pretty close to the metro so it was fairly convenient. The stairs were pretty steep but there was an elevator (albeit a bit small). Overall a great stay!
right near the station and a cozy place to stay

Very clean and affordable. There is a 7-11 right around the corner which was convenient. It was about a 5-10 min walk from the station which was a little difficult to coordinate. But it was really good!! They have everything you need here.
Great spot in Tokyo, close to the subway. Some good food spots within walking distance.
Very easy to find and very easy check in. Very clean and well described. Perfect location just 5 mins from station. Great place to stay will definitely stay again. Mahalo. 🤙
Very nice
设施非常齐全

I liked this place. Clean and quiet. The neighborhood is quiet, you are not in a busy part of town. You feel safe and comfortable. Washing machine works well, nice hot water. About 10 Japanese tv stations. No internet issues while I worked. Nice bathroom. Semi- hard beds, but maybe I’m getting old.
Other than using the microwave trying to cook is frustrating. The gas stove, which has been disconnected, is just in the way, with its burners sticking up. You are given an induction stove which works well but it’s hard to find the right spot to set it on. There is a kettle but the plug is so short you have to use it in the other room. We just used the microwave to heat water. The cookware is very minimal. We were able to make scrambled eggs easily. If you make meals that are a combination microwave and stove it works. There is a 7/11 around the corner and a Life grocery store a 10 minute walk away with a good selection.
很棒的房間而且還有電梯，兩張床也不會跟朋友互相干擾，下次還會來
整体不错，但是房间确实太小了，性价比很高，附近很安静，也有一个便利店。
房间很干净，交通便利
非常舒适顺利的入住体验，设施齐全，交通便利，距离我们想要去的景点都很近，步行1分钟就有个便利店，民宿楼下就有贩卖机，是我们入住东京的温馨小窝
it's nice
We loved staying here for a couple nights! Quick walk away for nice restaurants and lots to do. Peaceful quiet location for good sleeps.

매우 만족하는 숙소였습니다~
처음가는 동네라 뭐가 없음 어쩌지 걱정했는데 아주 코앞은 아니지만 10분내에 life미트와 편의점이 있고 아늑한 동네라 편하게 지냈어요~
다음에도 묵는다면 이곳에서 지내려 합니다!
근처 자전거 loof 정거장이 있어 가고싶은곳은 자전거로 슉슉 다녔어요~
볶음밥 맛집과 라멘 맛집이 가까이 있으니 가보세요!
Second time staying here. Love the quietness of Sumida! Will be back again hopefully
房间非常干净整洁，离森下站很近，而且还能在森下站办理交通卡非常方便，附近也有很多便利店和饮食店
房东非常热情，回复很快 ，唯一地铁有一丢丢远，大概7-10分钟吧，A3出口是直达电梯（拖行李箱必备）
入住超级舒适，性价比也非常高！
非常安静的居民区 可以休息好！
it was very good
非常满意的体验

During our stay at Maki's and Yuichiro's appartment we had the best time we could ever imagine. Everything was perfect: The neighbourhood is great as Kagurazaka (many authentic restaurants) is only 5 minutes away. And Iidabashi station is very close as well.
The appartment is very nice and clean and the room is very cozy. But most importantly: Maki and Yuichiro are the nicest and friendliest hosts you will find. Will help you with everything! We loved talking and laughing with them. Highly recommended!

Accommodation was beyond our expectations – the hosts, Maki and Chiro, can both speak good English and were very polite and accommodating. We love this couple. Everything was provided – towels, toiletries, slippers, umbrellas, even breakfast and unlimited coffee! Details on what has been advertised were all present including the bikes. The venue is very accessible from the train station and quite easy to find (since instructions were accurate, complete with illustrations) and is situated in a very quiet neighborhood. The couple even extends help in giving directions and pointers. There were various grocery stores, restaurants, and malls nearby. We were even allowed to laundry our clothes at no additional cost. Iidabashi Cozy House truly lives out to their name.
My hubby and I will definitely go back to this place and even recommend this to others.
Thanks Maki and Chiro. God bless you.

This was my first airbnb experience and it seriously could not have been better! I wanted to attend a concert at the Tokyo Dome and Maki's place was perfect for that. Her place is right between the Dome and Iidabashi Station from where you can get anywhere in Tokyo easily (for example, you don't even have to change trains to get to the Ghibli Museum). The home has everything you could ask for and is super nice and clean. Your room is conveniently right by the entrance and the shower is literally just a few steps down the hall. Upstairs is the dining area and a huge TV that you can use pretty much as you please.

But that doesn't even begin to describe what a great person Maki is. For example, my airline lost my luggage and I was worried about not being able to change and freshen up after my flight. But, without even knowing this, Maki had a welcoming package prepared that included everything I needed. She is always interested in your day. And if you need to know anything, like how to get tickets to something, the best places to buy things or any other information, she and her husband will always help you out. Not to mention what interesting and fun people they are (ask Maki about the famous people she's met--it's impressive!). And finally, although she is pretty humble about it, Maki makes THE BEST miso soup in the world. Trust me!

感謝Maki 倆夫婦一個星期以來的招待，令我倆有一個愉快圓滿的假期。Maki 的房子坐落在新宿附近的一個寧靜小區，屋內設施齊備，而且只有兩年樓齡，十分新淨。房子離都心一帶例如澀谷、池袋、新宿、原宿，都只是幾個地鐵站的距離，即使購物夜歸都十分方便。每天Maki都預先為我們準備早餐，令我們一早出遊前不用再費時去尋找。Maki夫婦又為我們的行程表安排提供意見，特別享受一起在晚上邊喝酒邊談天説地。如果你打算到東京旅行，絕對為你推薦Maki的房子！

Staying with Maki and Yuichiro for 9 nights was so comfortable. The night I arrived, I appreciated that Maki took me to the train station and showed my how to buy a Suica pass and load it with money, something I could have done on my own but is so much better and more fun with a little help. They continued to help me in small ways like this a lot, like at the nearby post office or helping me find ATMs that work. I came to Tokyo for work, so every day I did the 10 minute walk to the Iidabashi station, which has lots of convenience stores, a grocery store, and a post office on the way. A great space to work from home some days too, I felt welcome not only in their home but felt very comfortable with them, laughing and sharing stories most evenings after we all got home from work. I really enjoyed hanging out with them over the weekend; they aren't just people that I met, they are now new friends. Come stay here and challenge them to a game of poker.

I spent one week at Maki and Yuichiro's house in a wonderful area of Tokyo. The area is nice and the location very central and close to public transport.
The room is nice and has everything you need, the bathroom is just opposite the room and you have your own toilet.
Maki and Yuichiro are the best hosts you could ask for - especially when arriving in Japan for the first time (like me). I felt really at home at their place, loved the chats with them and could even taste nattō (and even liked it!).
From beginning (with the early check-in) to the end (when it felt like leaving friends) everything was absolutely perfect. Highly recommended!

If you're looking for a perfect host to start your japan adventure, here you go! Maki and Youichiro are not only helping with information, a nice accomodation and serving the first coffee of the day, but also they are such great characters, who you'll love to have around you.
Apart from this, the room is nice and everything is really clean. Our highlight was the possibility to explore Tokyo by bike.
I would really recommend this place!

Maki and Youichiro are the best hosts you can ever meet, not only the nice and clean room you can have, they are really a nice couple and made me feel welcomed like home.

Apart from it, the location is convenience to access everywhere in Tokyo with Metro and JR Line. If you want to have a wonderful Tokyo trip, this is the place you cannot miss.
第一次自助旅行！給我很棒的住宿經驗，房間乾淨且居家用品非常有質感！
歓迎されてると思ったところは、チャイムを鳴らした瞬間からでした。マキさんと旦那さんが二人で出迎えてくれて、率直にうれしかったです。部屋は写真通りでベットと布団がふかふかで個人的には気持ちよく眠れました。朝ごはんはパン、ヨーグルトとコヒー(または紅茶、オレンジジュース)。用意してもらうかは自分で選べて、すごくやりやすかったです。

十分热情的夫妇二人，房间浴室干净整洁。
与图片相符，五星推荐！
Maki会准备早餐，饮料有咖啡、果汁、茶、酸奶可以自选。
Maki and Yuichiro were great hosts, very thoughtful and welcoming. Enjoyed the time chatting with them. The place was quiet, clean, and convenient. Recommend to anyone!

I knew I would come back to Maki's place if I came to Tokyo again. And my second stay was even better than my first! Seriously, no matter what difficulties you may have, Maki and Yuichiro can fix anything.
JRやMetroまで近いです。とても便利で静かなところです。Makiさんも悠太郎さんが優しくて寒いところカギの使い方を教えてくれました。チャンスがありましたら、またお泊りしたいです。

Maki and her husband's place was recommended by my friend. They said that were part of great memories in JP and this is 100% truth after I stayed 8 nights.
They are so friendly and really thoughtful.. the best hosts ever!
The house is so clean and made us felt so comfortable. Also a quiet environment nearby and just walk 5-10 mins to Metro and JR..
I surely will recommend to my friends if they travel to Tokyo.

As a first time Airbnber, the bar has been set very high! Words cannot describe how phenomenal of an experience we had at Maki's home. Our stay in Japan would not have been the same had we stayed else where. Maki provided us with detailed instructions on check-in as well as suggestions for places to eat etc. Maki's house is conveniently located close to public transit which made exploring Tokyo during the day a breeze. She had a nice welcome basket waiting for us when we arrived which was filled with the necessities. Pocket wifi was also given to us which is life for someone from the US trying to get around in Japan for the first time ever.
Maki was such a kind individual and prepared us breakfast in the mornings while we were there. Each day was different which was amazing because we tried so many new things. After long days taking day trips she also offered us snacks and even made us ramen!
We are eternally grateful for the warmth and hospitality Maki and her husband showed us and we hope to visit them again soon!

After a long flight to Tokio we found Maki's place with the very good description provided by our hosts. As we arrived, we felt heartly welcomed.The flat is new, clean and the bed is very cozy so we slept very well. Although it is located in the middle of Tokyo it is very quite at night. The morning starts with a very good coffee and breakfast in Maki's kitchen. The train station Iiadabashi is close, wherefrom every part of Tokyo is reachable. Maki also helped us with restaurant reservation and recommended places to go. But the best thing was to have the opportunity to spend time together and got to know each other. We really enjoyed and found friends. We are very grateful!!!!

They are a wonderful couple and are so helpful and warm towards us. They have such a lovely house and took care of us and gave us priority over themselves. What more can i say, it is close ish to the station but many convenient stores and also the eating street, they can tell you all about it!  You guys are well worth it!

Maki has a beautiful house that she shared with us. However the space and area are comfortably arranged to us to have our privacy. She kindly served us breakfast and provided us snack during our stay. Maki was also very warm and helpful all along the way, right from she greeted us at the train station, walk us to her place, informed us of the nearby places of interest and on each of our conversation about our days and ourselves. Enjoying so much our stay at Maki's place. Thanks again Maki...

Wir waren zum ersten mal in Tokyo. Der Aufenthalt bei Maki und ihrem Mann hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Die beiden haben uns freundlich aufgenommen und uns gute Tipps zum erkunden der Stadt gegeben. Bei Fragen hatten Sie stets ein offenes Ohr.
Das Apartment war sehr sauber, gepflegt und modern eingerichtet. Maki hat uns sogar jeden Tag Frühstück zubereitet.
Die Lage ist perfekt um die Stadt zu entdecken. Man benötigt nur wenige Minuten, um zu den wichtigen Sehenswürdigkeiten zu gelangen.
Wir würden Makis Apartment jederzeit wieder buchen!
The house is very artistic and confortable

Maki's place is very comfortable and clean, and she and her husband are very kind and helpful. They speak excellent English. Maki is also very thoughtful; she provided nice breakfasts and coffee as well as some little gifts to welcome us to Japan. We were also able to borrow a pocket wifi, which was very handy for getting around Tokyo!  The location is convenient to public transportation and they provided very detailed directions to get there from Iidabashi station, including pictures which are extremely useful especially if you don't read Japanese. All in all it was a great experience and worked out perfectly for us, since we wanted to stay close to Kagurazaka where some other family members were. Thank you Maki and Yuichiro!

This was my first time using Airbnb.
We couldn't have hoped for a better experience.
Perfect hosts and so helpful.
Arigato guys, for everything!
X
The location is great only about 7 mins walk to station, thank you Maki to prepare breakfast for me, she is nice and hospitality.

C'était parfait. Maki et son mari son des hôtes accueillants avec qui nous avons partagé de bons moments.
Je recommande cet appartement qui est idéalement situé.

The perfect stay in Tokyo! Loved everything about the apartment, location and especially the hosts! Maki and Yuchiro were both amazingly friendly, helpful, warm and funny. They really made my time in Tokyo amazing!
My first stay with Maki and Yuichiro was so great I came back for my last day in Tokyo. Felt like staying with friends and not an Airbnb. Will miss them.
家主のお2人とも気さくな方で、とても楽しくお話しできました！家はとても綺麗で清潔感があります。自転車を借りることができたり、朝にパンとコーヒーを頂いたりと、おもてなしも素晴らしかったです！また機会があれば利用したいと思います！

仕事が忙しくてゆっくりできず
誠に申し訳ありませんでした
今度はゆっくり過ごしたいと思います
I spent grate night there.I can recommend confidently

I chose Maki's Airbnb based on the stellar reviews and I can say with confidence that they are not exaggerated. Maki and Yuichiro were the best hosts anyone could ask for. Their home is very clean with all the amenities you'd need, and with so many train lines going through Iidabashi Station, the location was incredibly convenient. (Tons of restaurants on the Kagurazaka side too!) Both hosts were wonderful to chat with and give you privacy when needed. While it's not advertised, breakfast was provided during my entire stay. Maki and Yuichiro have become great friends and their cozy home is now my to-go place to stay when traveling to Tokyo.
Thank you so much, Maki & Yuichiro!! Hope to see you again soon!!

The location is very outstanding,  room is clean and tidy.  landlords are also very friendly,  just like your friends. They even helped me to check my admission procedure.  There are tutorials in the room for check-in and use, and you can also ask the landlords.  An unforgettable stay experience.
清潔感溢れた各部屋や過ごしやすい間取りなどなど非日常ならではの宿泊をさせていただきました。感謝の気持と再泊したい気持ちでいっぱいになりました。ありがとうございました。
清潔な場所で、オーナーさんも気さくな方で、快適に過ごせました

The best stay I’ve had on Airbnb. I used this stay last after my local rental contract got pushed back two days and Maki and Yuichiro are the nicest people I have met in a very very long time. They went above and beyond to make the stay as comfortable as possible and convenient. I wish I had stayed from when I arrived in Tokyo. Their house is very nice and in a quiet location not far from iidabashi station.

방과 침대, 화장실 등 모두 깔끔하고 좋습니다.
방은 평범하게 좁은 일본 숙소를 생각했다가 꽤 여유공간이 있어서 놀랐어요.
주변 동네도 조용하고 좋은 분위기입니다.
교통은 도쿄 23구면 웬만하면 40분 내로 갈 수 있고요. 도쿄돔 쪽 방문하기에 특히 좋았습니다. (도보20분)
호스트 내외분들도 여유로운 분위기에 정말 친절하십니다. 또 근처 방문할 일이 있다면 다시 뵙고 싶을 정도로..
특히 혼자 여행하는 분들께 좋은 숙소같아요~ 추천합니다

Hands down the best Airbnb experience ever! Beautiful apartment in a very good location and quick walk to the metro. Maki went out of her way to make sure  we were comfortable and felt at home. like most of the reviews say, it really feels like home and not an Airbnb. We didn’t want to leave and can’t wait to visit again!

Having the first floor bedroom and entrance to it at the front door makes this stay feel private even though there is a shared bathroom and shower/tub. The place is very clean and comfortable. Access to the kitchen and laundry is definitely a plus.
The location is perfect. Maki will help you find the easist route to the main shopping, restaurant locations and train stations.
The host is an excellent communicator that also speaks English and very helpful. It truly was our "home" away from home. A super host!!!

I had a great stay at Maki's home in Shinjuku! The room was so clean and comfortable. Maki also made amazing breakfasts for me and provided such great hospitality. She also let me try a kimono on which was fun! Her and her husband are such kind and friendly people I felt right at home. The area is also very convenient and close to the train and a 7-11. I highly recommend Maki's home to people visiting!! Thank you so much for everything.

Do yourself a favor and choose to stay here, you’ll thank me later. The house is beautiful and clean, plus the room and bed are great. There are so many restaurants, bars, and convenience stores nearby as well. Iidabashi station is only a short walk away, so all of Tokyo is practically at your doorstep. More importantly, Maki-san and Yuichiro-san made my stay above and beyond my wildest expectations. Everything from making breakfast daily, to helping me with my Japanese, to even inviting me out for dinner, card games, and watching the World Cup together. I literally cannot say enough good things about my experience. Leaving was so hard, I can’t wait to stay here again.

매우 친절하셨으며 숙소도 깔끔했습니다.
호스트와 같이 지내는 숙소였지만 1층 침실과 화장실을 따로 사용할 수 있어서 불편함이 없었습니다.
아침에 따로 조식을 항상 챙겨주셔서
즐거운 여행을 할 수 있었습니다! 너무 감사합니다.
영어로 소통가능하며, 메세지는 한국어로 보내주셔서 좋았습니다!
도쿄돔이 가까워서 근처에 먹을 곳도 많고
교통도 편리했습니다!
일찍 도착했는데 이른 체크인도 도와주시고
체크아웃도 오후 1시라 늦게까지 잘 수 있어서
너무 좋았습니다!👍

너무 좋았습니다
친절하시고 재밌으셔요.. 두 부부 처럼 살고싶습니다 다음에 또 만나요 🥹♥️
좋은 추억 만들어주셔서 감사 합니다🥹

I loved staying with Maki so much! The area is great, the room is nice, bed is comfortable, bike rental was a big plus... but above all Maki and her husband were the perfect hosts! I can't recommend them enough.

Maki and Yuichiro are the best hosts anyone can ask for. They went above and beyond in making sure we felt like we belonged and had a home while we were in Japan. They helped us practice speaking Japanese, they gave us recommendations about our plans, and made sure we had breakfast each day. The space was welcoming, safe, and comfortable, providing a sense of ease at the end of each long day of walking and exploring the city. We are truly grateful to have met them and to have had them as our hosts for our first visit to Japan and Tokyo. We can not recommend staying with them enough. 10/10 stay

Id rate 1000/10 for this accommodation.
Maki and Husband were very friendly and communicative, ensuring a joyful stay experience there.
Had great chats with the host almost every morning, It felt more like staying with a host family experience rather than regular airbnb.
Don't be surprised with the superb amenities provided by Maki, even, you will get more than what it mentioned on the listing (snacks, tea, etc).
The room is quite spacious and private for solo or couple traveler.
The area is residential, yet you can easily find convenience stores, supermarket, restaurants by distance walking.
Iidabashi station is reachable 6-8 minutes by walk.
Tried also around the city by bicycle for free, which is a plus!
Definitely gonna stay there again if i come to Tokyo!
Host was great and even made breakfast! Nice place and room big enough for 2 people. Thank you for accommodating 😊
Bien située et au calme ; très pratique de pouvoir échanger avec MAKI aux petits soins
I love the experience during the stay, host and hostess are very friendly and always ready to help, will definitely come again on my next trip!

Maki and her husband are very friendly and easy going.
The place is tidy and has got everything we needed.
With ten minutes of walk from the accommodation, you can find an interesting area full of stylish restaurants.

We had a hard time finding her house but that was because we didn’t bring pocket wifi, so that was on us. But other than that it was great. Maki and her husband were amazing and helpful and so so nice. I definitely recommend staying with them if you were wanting to try a home-stay style accommodation.
역에서 한 15분정도? 걸리는데 금방 걸어갑니다. 동네가 조용하고 JR선쪽에 술집이 많고 숙소랑 가까워서 좋아요! 도쿄역이나 시부야 신주쿠도 역이랑 몇정거장밖에 안걸리네요. 마키씨도 항상 친절하시고 남편분도 인상이 너무 좋아요! 다음에 또 이용하고 싶네요ㅎㅎ
受験生です。私たちの国家試験会場近くだったので利用しました。試験の前日から当日の朝にかけて泊まりました。前日は緊張で眠れないのではと不安でしたが、暖かく清潔なベッドのおかげか2人ともぐっすりでした😂試験日の朝、料金に含まれてないはずの朝食と応援メッセージがあり感動。人の優しさとエネルギーを貰い何事もなく出発することができました！とても良いホストさんです。短い間ですが、ありがとうございました。

Well located and friendly host. I love the way she welcome us and her coffee.
Highly recommend!

Better than we imagined an AirBnB to ever be. We spend a month there and did not want to leave! It felt more like living with friends than being in an AirBnB.
Maki and Chiro were extremely kind and helpful. Maki offered to make us breakfast, when she was at home and let us use all ingredients and snacks in the kitchen, when we wanted to cook. She dressed us (and even my parents who visited) in her Kimonos and took pictures with us at a Temple. We did Karaoke together and were invited to eat Sushi. For us there is just no other place to stay whenever we will be in Tokyo <3 Thank you Maki and Chiro for the great time! 20/10 :D

Maki is a very friendly host.  She provided helpful info about local restaurants, and we really enjoyed it. The room is comfortable and cozy.  Even provided complimentery breakfast and coffee.  Will stay here again in the future.

Maki and her husband were both very kind and accommodating. They offered us free breakfast and tea which was very sweet and delicious. I also loved the kimono experience! Great location just an 8 minute walk from the station. Overall, amazing host and location. It was a pleasure talking and getting to know them - I highly recommend staying here!

Maki’s place has all the amenities you need and more! She even prepared breakfast for us everyday which shows how she values all her guests. She is also very responsive and easy to reach. Maki and her husband are very kind and generous people. We felt at home in Maki’s place which made our stay in Tokyo fun and memorable. One of the best airbnb’s we’ve stayed if not the best! We’ll definitely be back!!!😊

Spacious room for Tokyo standards. Location is close to famous sights and big stations. We were sharing the bathroom with Maki and her husband. We felt very welcome and Maki also offered to make us breakfast. We loved their hospitality and could use anything we asked for. Definitely great value for money. Location is a 10 min walk from the station. Communication was also great!
Maki est incroyablement gentille. Elle nous a préparé le petit déjeuner et nous a fait essayé des kimonos. C’était vraiment une super expérience. Le logement est tranquille et propre.
지금까지 도쿄에서 묵은 홈스테이 중 가장 최고. 친절함과 청결함 그리고 정겨움이 묻어나는 곳입니다. 한번 더 다시가서 꼭 자전거와 기모노를 입어보고싶어요!

Maki-san and her husband are the most gracious and generous hosts I’ve had the luck to encounter on Airbnb! Truly superstars. Their home in Kagurazaka is a peaceful haven just steps away from the buzz of Shinjuku, and I couldn’t recommend a stay with them enough (even if this means it’ll be harder for me to book my next visit in the future!).
Maki was freat and everything was the best!

Wir sind vollkommen zufrieden mit unserem Aufenthalt bei Maki und ihrem Mann. Es war fantastisch. Wir kamen erst mitten in der Nacht bei den beiden an nach einem langen Flug. Dank gogle Maps haben wir das Haus, welches sehr viel Platz geboten hat, direkt gefunden. Angekommen wurden wir Herzlich von den beiden empfangen trotz der späten Uhrzeit. Wir konnten sogar noch Nachts duschen gehen und es hat niemanden gestört. Uns wurde direkt erzählt, dass Maki morgens Frühstück für uns machen wird, welches wir jeden Tag genossen haben. An einem Tag wurden wir gefragt ob wir traditionelle Japanische Kleidung tragen möchten, welche Maki uns mit viel Freude Präsentierte und uns anzog. Außerdem hat sie uns gezeigt wie man Matcha zubereitet und hat uns eine japanische Süßigkeit zubereitet, welche vorzüglich geschmeckt hat. Wir können die Unterkunft jedem empfehlen und werden unseren nächsten Tokio Trip sicher wieder dort verbringen. Wir hatten noch nie einen so tollen Gastgeber.

One of the best Airbnb experiences we ever had!
We arrived around 1 AM from the airport and Maki greeted us, she went above and beyond to make us feel comfortable.
Maki and Chiro are amazing hosts, we loved chatting with them. Maki dressed us up in Kimonos and made us breakfast ❤️
I definitely recommend staying at Maki's home.
Can't wait for our next visit 😊
Probably the best host you'll ever find.

Maki was a wonderful host, and her place was perfect. It was a bit hard to find at first simply due to the maps app being off, but she gave instructions with photos for how to arrive. She welcomed us very kindly and showed us around the house, offered things to make our stay even better, and was very flexible. She communicated very well. The Airbnb is about a 7-minute walk to a main street with many restaurants and shops and a short walk to subway stations.

Maki’s place was lovely  for my husband and I. The bed was comfy and the shower had awesome water pressure! Maki went above and beyond to make us feel at home and welcomed. The breakfast in the morning was a wonderful unexpected surprise! Each morning was a different breakfast. Also - she dressed us up in kimonos, which was a fantastic experience! She is a perfect host and we would love to stay with her again!
Maki and her husband are such lovely people, we felt like home and had a great time. I hope we can visit Tokyo soon and would love to stay again at Maki’s.

LOVED our experience here. Would definitely come back and recommend to others. Maki went above and beyond to make sure we had everything we needed and then some. We also loved our kimono experience! The breakfast was extremely good, too! The hosts were very proactive in their communication and made us feel so welcomed in their home.

If you're visiting Japan for the first time and want a homely experience, I highly recommend staying with Maki. She provided exceptional care during our stay. Her place is beautifully maintained with top-notch amenities, offering a sense of warmth and safety. Maki went the extra mile by preparing breakfast for us and giving us a lesson on kimonos. She's truly a gem. My girlfriend and I are certain we'll return to her place in the future.
This is the quintessential Airbnb experience. Maki and Chiro are incredibly kind hosts. 100% recommend to anyone.

We had a great stay at Maki's Place, very accommodating.. easy access to Train Station, quiet neighborhood, The room is comfortable for 2 pax and cozy, we had an amazing experience on Kimonos and Matcha Tea..
Definitely a place to stay in Tokyo.. Highly recommended..

We completely recommend Maki’s place.  She is a wonderful, kind and loving host.  We enjoyed our stay immensely because she made us very comfortable at her place.  Her house is in a great location and close to the metro.  We highly recommend it.
Maki was a great host, so far the best Airbnb that I have used, I would totally use it again, staying with them is like staying with family or good friends, im going to miss them

Awesome! Best of the best. Maki and Chiro are very good people. They are kind and generous and made us feel very welcome. They taught us many things about Japanese culture and we had a lot of fun with them. Their home is lovely and very comfortable. Very much recommend!

방과 화장실, 욕실은 깨끗했고
2층의 공용공간도 넓고 쾌적했어요
특히 마키와 치로의 친절함과,
숙소가 위치한 지역의 단란함이 기억에 남네요!
