도쿄 자전거 도로가 잘되있어서
도쿄 자전거 한바퀴 돌아도 넘 즐거울 것 같네요!

Staying with Maki made my Tokyo trip extra special. Maki is a very kind person and offered great hospitality. The house had everything you could ever dream of for a holiday stay. Maki is also very generous, she offered many things in the house and it really makes you feel at home. 👘👘

Maki and Chiro are SO kind and generous! It was such a pleasure and honor to meet and stay with such genuinely kind and fun people! Truly a special experience, one which we will remember and cherish forever! Maki & Chiro, ありがとうございました！どぞよろしくお願いします

Maki is very friendly and willing to offer help.
It’s the best experience of all Airbnb stay.

La semaine chez Maki a clôturé la fin d’un séjour de 5 semaines sur l’archipel.
Cette semaine passée avec Maki et Shirô était un bonheur. Ils sont très accueillants et d’une gentillesse incroyable 🥰
Maki nous a aidé dans bien des cas ! Comme lorsque mon conjoint a perdu son sac dans Tokyo et qu’elle nous a aidé pour les démarches auprès de la police. Elle a ensuite pris le temps d’appeler avec nous la personne qui l’avait retrouvé afin qu’on puisse la remercier.
Maki nous a offert de son temps pour nous apprendre la calligraphie et la cérémonie du thé. Elle nous a appris des recettes de cuisine japonaises et nous a donné l’opportunité d’essayer des kimonos.
Elle nous a aussi fait de délicieux petits déjeuners ! Quel service 🤩😋
Merci encore pour ces jours passés chez vous, pour votre accueil et ces échanges très enrichissants !
A une prochaine fois, nous espérons !
げんきでね
Chloé et Clément

Maki’s the best Airbnb host we have had. She is a warm and lively person. Always responsive and helpful. We had a great kimono and calligraphy experience with her. She made us feel at home.
PS.: she’s a great chef.

이 숙소의 제일 매력적인건 마키와 시로의 자전거를 빌려 탈 수 있다는 점! 일본에서 자전거를 탈일이 있다니,, 너무 행복했습니다.
자전거를 타고 시노바즈노이케공원-우에노동물원-캔널커피숍 이 루트로 다녔는데 너무 여유롭고 재밌었어요~~ ㅎㅎ
게스트와 호스트 공간이 분리되어 생활하는데 불편함은 없었구 호스트분들이 친절하고 조식을 너무 정성스럽게 챙겨주셔서 넘 좋았어요..🥹 추울까봐 히터도 챙겨주시고🥹도쿄 또 가고싶네요.. 숙소 완전 강추!!!

This is a really amazing experience. I was not expected that Maki prepared a lot for us. You guys will definitely enjoy the time with Maki and her husband!! For more compliment, you guys can find in my next comment.
Maki人非常好，我们这次旅行分成了东京➡️名古屋➡️东京，两次东京的行程我们都住在了Maki家。她非常贴心。更多的话我将留在下条留言中。

We were back at Maki’s home after we traveled to Nagoya. As we have stayed for 2 nights before, this time it’s much more familiar to us. I’ll say that everything about the house is totally great, the location, the privacy, the environment, the facilities, etc. And I have to say that Maki and her husband are truly enthusiastic and accommodating. Maki prepared breakfast for us every single day. We communicated a lot when we went back home, from food to celebrities to culture. We’re not only host-guest, but also friends. And the place is more than an Airbnb, it just like a second home to us. We are really enjoy our time spending with Maki and her family. You can choose here with no doubt and hesitate.
这次旅程中我们先后两次入住Maki家。Maki家无可挑剔，无论是地理位置、私密性、周围环境、内部空间的使用家具等等。可以毫无顾忌地选择这里。但我更想说，Maki和她的家人非常的好。他们很乐意和我们交流，为我们推荐美食也好，谈论不同文化背景差异也好，聊一些娱乐话题也好，相比于顾客，反而更像和好朋友相处，非常自在舒适。由于我使用airbnb的经验很少，更没有这种homestay式民宿的入住经验，所以在入住之前我稍有顾虑，但入驻第一天后所有顾虑都被打消。Maki和她的家人真的非常非常棒，已经给身边朋友都强烈安利。

처음 갔던 도쿄에서 처음으로 머무른 숙소.
콘서트를 위해 도쿄돔 근처의 숙소를 찾다가 알게 됐는데, 너무 좋은 시간을 보내서 다른 분들에게 추천하고 싶어요!!
손님용 숙소와 샤워공간은 1층, 2층은 공용공간이자 부엌과 화장실이 있고, 3층은 호스트님의 주거공간입니다!
모든 게 다 좋았지만 가장 좋았던 점 세 가지는
1. 마키가 계신 것
2. 편안하고 따뜻한 방 : 호텔에서 자면 건조해서 호흡기가 막히는데, 마키의 집은 따뜻하고 포근하게 잠에서 깰 수 있어서 너무 좋았어요
3. 샤워 시설 : 이 부분에 대해 걱정하고 갔었는데, 샴푸, 린스, 바디워시, 폼클렌징이 모두 다 구비되어있었고 편하게 사용하라고 말씀주셨어요 무엇보다 독립된 샤워 공간이 참 편안하고 따뜻했고, 문을 이중으로 잠글 수 있게 되어있어요
이틀 머물면서 아침 식사도 챙겨주셨는데, 정말 감동이었고 맛있었어요 기모노 체험도 해주시고 말차도 타 주시고 시간과 추억을 아낌없이 내어 주셨어요
함께 지내는 공간이기 때문에 서로 배려한다면 정말 최고의 기억으로 남게될 것 같습니다!!!!
지내면서 불편한 게 단 한가지도 없었고, 상상했던 것보다도 훨씬 좋았어요!!!! 도쿄에 또 가게 되면 또 머무를거예요!!!! 가족이랑도 가고 싶어요

Maki helped to make my first time in Tokyo a lovely experience! She went above and beyond to create a memorable experience and her place is perfect. She made us breakfast each morning, including a to-go option for our day of travel, it was such a relief to feel so well taken care of. Would strongly recommend!

Maki was a wonderful host, really caring and flexible. Her instructions for check in are good, make sure you follow them exactly rather than following online maps (I struggled a bit in the dark). The bike was  game changer, really appreciated that.

Very comfortable and cozy house in the local people’s living area, so it’s very quiet. About 7-8 minutes walk to the train station, very convenient to any place I wanted to go. Maki is super nice and sweet, she made such lovely breakfast for me although that was her work day. And it was fun to chat with her . Highly recommend her house!

Our trip has been made so special thanks to Makis care and generous hospitality - making us feel so welcomed and at ease in her beautiful home. She was so open with her communication, and was genuinely interested in getting to know us both and make us feel at home.
The best part of staying with Maki is all the thoughtful touches- from her home cooked breakfast each morning, excellent restaurant recommendations and heartwarming honeymoon decorations for us. We cherish the time we spent together with Maki experiencing a Japanese tea ceremony, kimono dress and learning calligraphy, and we proudly display our art as memories of our time with Maki.
Don’t hesitate to book with Maki for a unforgettable stay, where you feel like family and experience much more than just a place to stay.

My best Airbnb experience in Japan. Maki and her husband made us feel welcome right away, friendly and laid back, sharing their home with us and still guarantee privacy as the house got three floors.
Maki helped us to practice calligraphy and dress up in kimonos, in a way that felt more relaxed and authentic than if done at some touristy spot outside. She also offered us breakfast, and we used their road bikes to explore the surroundings.
The neighbourhood is great - private and calm, just next to a couple of charming streets with numerous restaurants and many shops. Just a short walk away from a subway station served by several lines. Will definitely stay again!

Hands down one of the best Airbnb experience I’ve had. Maki-san was a wonderful host, she communicated clearly in providing instructions to her house, and was so warm and helpful throughout our stay— she provided kimono and Japanese calligraphy experience, and even made breakfast for us everyday that we were there!
The location of her apartment was very accessible to public transport, with lots of restaurants and shops within walking distance to explore. I would highly recommend staying with Maki-san if you’re in Tokyo!

Maki is an amazing host. I have booked many AirBnBs, and Maki has been easily my favorite host that I have ever encountered. She is incredibly welcoming, accommodating, super helpful, and considerate. She provides amazing advice for your trip if you ask and provides breakfast when she can, and she is an awesome cook!! It was amazing having her homemade breakfasts. I would book Maki again (and already have) when I stay in Tokyo!
The closest train station is about 11 minutes away walking , but the location of her place is perfect walking distances to areas in Shinjuku that I wanted to visit (ie: 10 mins from Tokyo Dome). For Japan, the size of the room is also spacious! For context, we had a duffle bag, 2 carry on bags, two backpacks, and a checked bag that fit in the room. You share a wash room (where you shower), but you have your own toilet room that you use.
Maki is an amazing host, and the area is calm and comforting. Can’t wait to return to Tokyo to Maki’s!!

Maki is the sweetest host!! We normally stay in our own spaces (without host) but staying with Maki was truly such a nice experience. She made breakfast for us both days (second day as a surprise) and even taught us how to do Japanese Calligraphy. There were a ton of drink options between tea and coffee and really cute little snacks. At the end of our stay we did a small tea ceremony and Maki even taught us about that as well.
The space was really close to the train station so getting around was super easy. Especially since the location was centrally located around everything we wanted to do.
Maki also gave us a ton of recommendations on things to do and where to eat.
Would absolutely love to stay with Maki at her place again!

This is one of our favourite Air BnB’s that we’ve stayed in. Maki and her husband were very welcoming, and really went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable. Maki’s Japanese breakfasts were a standout - highly recommend!

Maki is the best hostess seriously. She made us great breakfasts and gave us restaurant recommendations (one that was in the shape of a Pikachu that was really cool). Its a shame we didnt have time to take up the offer of wearing a kimono and calligraphy lessons. Maki and her husband are really friendly and sociable people so it was great to stay in their house.

Maki and Chiro were amazing hosts and made us feel so welcome in their place. We had a great time with the kimono and calligraphy experience that was so thoughtfully offered to us and Maki was always helpful and friendly. We also enjoyed the amazing breakfasts prepared by her every morning which was such a treat. We would recommend her place to anyone wanting to stay in Japan as we had the best time ☺️

Maki is a very nice and hospitable person, she recommended nearby restaurants and even took us to experience kimono. Her accommodation is very cosy and delicate, everything is well-organized and this is definitely the best and surprising airbnb experiences I've ever had, 10 out of 10

This was the best airbnb stay ever! Maki and her husband were so warm and accommodating. The location is only 10 min away from the subway station and close to a great supermarket. Maki made us home made Japanese breakfast every morning which was delicious. She even let us wear kimonos (she went to kimono school for 10 months!) which was super special. 10/10 would stay here again!

Maki was an amazing host and helped us navigate Tokyo better than I had planned.  Even when I had questions of getting around town, she took time and explained everything in detail.  As a host, she went above and beyond and our room was nice and cozy.  I will definitely reach out to her again whenever I am in Tokyo again.

Hands down Maki is the best Airbnb host there is!
She's incredibly attentive, always helpful and really cares about her guests and their experience. She inspired our joy for calligraphy (which we will continue back home), made us feel comfortable in kimono and taught us how to properly prepare (and drink) matcha.
But also for the "smaller" things she had us covered. For example when we were looking for an elegant bar she went into a deep research for us and we couldn't have been happier with her choice! And if we had questions about anything (destinations, culture etc.) she was always there for us. Last but not least she's a very accomplished cook and made us look forward with joy and excitement to the next morning with her creative, well-balanced breakfasts.
Thank you for an incredibly enjoyable stay, we can't wait to be back :)

We had the best Airbnb experience ever with our host, Maki! It was our first time trying a homestay, and it couldn't have been better. Maki's breakfasts were a highlight, inspiring us to pick up some local recipes. We loved diving into activities like calligraphy, trying natto for the first time, enjoying a mini matcha ceremony, and even learning a bit about Japanese cooking. The room was a pleasant surprise, much bigger than our other stays in Japan and super comfy—definitely the best bed we've had here! More than anything, it was great to connect with Maki, who shared her culture and gave us some great local tips. The neighborhood itself was a breath of fresh air, far from the crowded tourist spots and just so beautiful. We wish we could've stayed longer and can't wait to come back!

This was a fantastic stay. Maki was so friendly and made everything super easy. She made the best breakfast every morning, and  dressed us in kimono while teaching us traditional calligraphy. Such a great end to our trip!

Maki is the best host. If you're doubting about staying here, don't. She will always go above and beyond with breakfasts daily, extremely friendly and makes you feel like you're at home! The room is really nice and amenities are all here, also the kimono experience was awesome. The best airbnb experience I've ever had! Thank you Maki 🫶🏼
如果你想更好的体验日本生活，我建议你选择maki。附近有一条街非常好逛的街道 ，它叫神乐坂。走路几分钟就能到。我每天中午都会在那边吃东西。而且maki做的早餐都很好吃！还给我体验了和服，非常谢谢maki❤️
Makiさん真的是一位特别温柔可亲的房东姐姐！每天都会给我们准备不一样的早餐，问候我们的行程并给出建议，还带我们体验了和服和日式抹茶🥹🥹如果你想体验东京当地的生活，请毫不犹豫选择这里！

Maki was an amazing host who went above and beyond! She greeted us on arrival and made us feel welcome right away. Our room was private and comfortable and the traditional seated Japanese shower was fun to try.  We ended up doing laundry twice during our 3 day stay as our clothes were drenched with sweat due to the 36 degree C heat! 😅 so that was super helpful! Also Maki made us the most kawaii & healthy Japanese breakfasts every morning & even a bento in the shape of Totoro after she learned of our love for Studio Ghibli!  We had a kimono experience with Maki as she studied at kimono school and we learned what a process it is to put them on! Maki also gave us recommendations for her favourite maccha as we are big fans.  Would definitely consider staying here again next time we visit Tokyo as Maki and her husband were so friendly and kind!  Thank you once again! 🙏🏽 😊
It was few wonderful days we spent there and I recommend the place to everyone. Super! 💖
感谢Maki提供了丰盛的早餐，热情友好，街区安静，一次美好的体验

If a perfect Air BnB place would have a name, then Maki's place would be it! A wonderful host, a perfect house and a location from which it is easy to get into the hassle and bustle of Tokyo.
Both Maki and Chiro are going above and beyond to make the stay comfortable, relaxed and happy. The kindness of Maki is second to none. I was a solo traveller, but not for a second I felt alone in the city. I loved the Japanese breakfast and I am proud of Maki to have taken up the tradition of her family to wear a kimono. What a wonderful experience!
I cannot thank them both enough, I will be back!

Maki was an incredible and gracious host! She was extremely communicative and provided detailed information for easy access to the Airbnb. Her place is so cozy and clean, and the room had a private bathroom and shower, and was a perfect size with an awesome A/C unit!
She is very knowledgeable of the area and provided so many great recommendations as well as went as far as to help us book a massage and a taxi when we checked out! She is so kind, respectful, and easy to talk to! We would happily book with her again the next time we visit Tokyo!

Kim and I were very fortunate to stay with Maki and her husband. Maki is a professional and welcoming host who went over the top providing us with some truly memorable experiences. It was a stay for the books and one we won’t soon forget. If we find ourselves in Tokyo again we’ll be sure to bring you tim bits :)
Thanks and bunch Maki!

I highly recommend staying here. My mom and I had a wonderful time. Maki and her husband, Yuichiro, were so friendly and welcoming that we felt right at home. We truly appreciated the many thoughtful touches. Maki prepared a delicious Japanese breakfast for us each morning. On the day we visited the Ghibli Museum, she even made a Totoro breakfast, which was a special surprise. The kimono experience and matcha ceremony while wearing our kimonos were unforgettable. The house is well located, close to great shops and restaurants, and they provided excellent local recommendations. Their warmth, attention to detail, and sincere hospitality made our stay incredibly memorable and fun. Looking forward to visiting again!
Maki and her husband are very kind people and helped us with every question we had on our trip. We would gladly stay again if the opportunity arises :)

Maki was such an amazing and generous host. She helped us with anything we needed and gave us so many wonderful suggestions and information. Her breakfasts are just amazing- so beautiful and delicious! We had fun chatting with her and her husband over breakfast! Her house is stylish and clean and comfortable - about a 10-15 minute walk to the JR train station. Our private room was cute and comfortable with two bikes if you need them. The shared shower and sink were just across the hall from our room and our private toilet was just up one flight of stairs from our room. Thanks again for everything Maki, we had a wonderful time!

Super Aufenthalt, wärmstens zu empfehlen. Die Unterkunft besticht mit einigen super Extras: tolles Kimono Dressing mit Maki, inbegriffenes liebevoll und abwechslungsreiches Frühstück, kostenlose Nutzung von Gravelbikes zur Erkundung Tokios. Generell hat die Unterkunft eine tolle Anbindung um Tokio zu erkunden. Maki ist darüber hinaus eine sehr freundliche und immer hilfsbereite Gastgeberin, ihre Gastfreundschaft hat man sehr gespürt. 6 von 5 Sternen!

What a great place to stay! Maki is such a great host and made our stay an unforgettable experience. We received a lovingly prepared breakfast every morning. Maki also provided us with lots of tips and took the time to dress us in kimonos and give us a little tea ceremony.
The accommodation is very centrally located. It usually took us no longer than half an hour to get to the most famous sights. The surrounding area is very quiet, with a few restaurants, bars and shopping facilities - just as described.
Thanks to Maki and her husband! You have truly earned the status of Superhost! :)

The best AirBnB stay we’ve ever had and the perfect way to ease into Japan/Tokyo. Maki and Chiro were so friendly and helpful throughout our stay, nothing was too much trouble - from making us beautiful breakfasts every morning to booking a massage.
Staying with Maki and Chiro is like staying with friends - and this is evident from reading all the reviews, they are the best!!
Thank you much for having us, we will be back! 🥰🥰

Welcoming and friendly hosts and excellent communication. Maki gave brilliant recommendations on current events, and things to do in different areas of Tokyo. Delicious and Kawaii Japanese Breakfast on days where we had time. Maki provided an amazing Kimono and tea experience on our last night and we had a fun photoshoot.
Maki and Chiro were friendly and funny and we would love to see them again sometime.
Good location - instructions made it easy to find, look for A3 or East exit coming out Iidabashi station you can go up the stairs to avoid traffic lights.
Shops nearby and lots of small restaurants and cafes tucked away. Overall clean, quiet and comfortable, with exceptional hosts and a great comfy bed.
Was also funny to realise they had spent time in my Town in England for our shoe making industry.

Would recommend highly, the best airbnb stay i’ve ever had. Maki is super responsive and wants to make your stay as comfortable and welcoming as possible. Breakfast each morning was delicious and the kimono dressing, Japanese calligraphy, and Japanese tea ceremony topped everything off. Hope to see you guys again!

Staying with Maki and Chiro really felt like staying with old friends; they are so funny and friendly. They made us feel at home and often gave us the best travel tips and recommendations. We always looked forward to Maki's wonderful breakfasts, and we were so honoured to do a tea ceremony and kimono experience with her. Truly a memorable experience and highlight of our trip. If we are ever back in Tokyo, we will definitely stay with them again. Thank you again!

We had a wonderful stay with Maki and Chiro in Tokyo. Maki was very attentive and provided helpful local recommendations, even assisting us with reservations.
One of the highlights of our stay was the cultural experience she organized—dressing us in kimonos, hosting a mini photo shoot, and teaching us Japanese tea ceremony. It was such a fun way to learn about Japanese culture.
Every morning, we were treated to a healthy homemade Japanese breakfast, and it was such a lovely way to start the day. On our last day, despite our early flight, Maki woke up early to prepare breakfast for us, which we truly appreciated.
She also shared great suggestions for future travel in Japan, giving us plenty of inspiration for our next trip.
Thank you Maki, for your hospitality! 😊

We loved staying at Maki’s place. The location is great, close to train station and many great restaurants and bars. The room is quiet with the a very comfortable bed. However, what makes this place special is Maki. She is an excellent host, knowledgeable and fun to talk to. We really appreciated the opportunity to wear Kimonos and learn about them from Maki. We also looked forward to the lovely breakfasts every morning. We already penciled in dates to stay here next year :)

Maki was an amazing host who went above and beyond to make us feel welcome and comfortable. The location is close to a station with lots of lines, and the local area has a great mix of cafes and restaurants.
My first overseas airb&b experience! Maki’s cozy home makes our stay in Tokyo more comfortable and enjoyable! Thanks for all the help and advice! See you!

My wife and I had an incredible month-long stay in Maki’s home.
Maki and her husband were extremely warm and welcoming. Though it wasn’t expected, she often treated us to wonderful breakfasts. She taught us calligraphy and offered to dress us in kimonos. Also, we had some questions regarding skincare, art stores, cooking classes, etc., and Maki went out of her way to do research to help us. I’m also learning Japanese, so it was a nice opportunity to practice! (Though they also speak English, so it was easy to communicate).
The home was very clean throughout. Our private room and bed were very comfortable. We were able to make the space work well for 2 people. It's well connected via train and near a lively street (Kagurazaka), so there’s plenty to do within walking distance.
In short: Maki is the quintessential AirBNB host. She loves hosting, helping out, and meeting new people. I'm 100% sure she'll make you feel at home, just as she did for us. We'd love to stay again someday!

Maki is an extremely gracious and friendly host. She provided a free kimono experience, breakfast, and treats throughout the stay. The location is in a quiet neighborhood with great proximity to Lidabashi station which made traveling the metro very easy and quick any direction. We will definitely be back for future tokyo trips

Maki est une hôte très agréable, qui discute bien, prend le temps pour nous et nous fait découvrir de très belles expériences avec les kimonos et la calligraphie.
je recommande vivement pour passer un bon séjour.

The best place to stay in Tokyo! Maki was a very welcoming and friendly host for us during our stay at her beautiful home in Tokyo. Close to the metro and great dining experiences, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Maki’s place! We were even treated to a Kimono experience and tea ceremony from Maki which was a true highlight for our trip to beautiful Japan! We will definitely be back to stay in Maki’s beautiful home ☺️

This was hands down the best AirBnB experience we have ever had! Maki’s space is not only quiet and in the most beautiful neighborhood, but Maki and her husband are the most kind and gracious hosts. They truly blew us away with how thoughtful they were- they even made us breakfast and dinner! The stay here felt like we were staying with old friends. Her AirBnB deserves every 5 star review and more. Should you come to visit Tokyo, you MUST stay with Maki! We can’t wait to come back!

Ce fut la meilleure expérience Airbnb que nous avons vécue.
L'appartement correspond parfaitement à la description, il est bien situé , proche d'une gare JR et de nombreux commerces.
Maki est une hôte incroyable. Elle est accueillante et tellement gentille. Elle a été aux petits soins tout au long du séjour : elle nous a préparé des petits déjeuners aussi beaux que bons, elle nous a recommandé certaines visites et nous a même permis de revêtir des kimonos et d'apprendre les principes de la cérémonie du thé. Nous avons adoré discuter avec Maki. Le début de notre séjour n'aurait pu être plus merveilleux. Maki est un véritable rayon de soleil !

My husband and I really enjoyed and highly recommend staying at Maki’s Airbnb near to Iidabashi station. The location was good for us as it was near where my husband worked and to shops / restaurants and it was quiet. The best thing about our stay was Maki. She prepared beautiful and tasty breakfasts for us every morning, recommended sites and places to visit in Tokyo, helped us with travel, dressed us in kimonos, described the Japanese culture to us, demonstrated the tea ceremony and gave us an introduction into Japanese calligraphy. She really opened her home to us! She responded quickly to all our questions and was extremely accommodating with check in / out times. The bedroom on the ground floor had a comfortable double bed and we shared a shower with Maki and her husband across from our bedroom. We had a private toilet on the second floor near the living /dining room and kitchen. I worked during the day at the dining table using the internet, which worked perfectly. Thanks Maki!

Maki and her husband's home was nothing less than a cozy space with amazing hosts. She ensures that you are made comfortable and has some great recommendations. The place has great connectivity and is just ten minutes walk to Lidabashi station. If you find this place on Airbnb. without hesitation you must go for it. If I am to come back to Tokyo, I will definitely choose Maki 's home❣️.

Staying with Maki was truly one of the highlights of my trip. From the moment I arrived, she went above and beyond in every possible way. She dressed me in a beautiful kimono—such a special and memorable experience—and even prepared a delicious breakfast, which was completely unexpected and incredibly generous.
Her warmth and hospitality made me feel right at home. She had plenty of thoughtful recommendations for things to do and places to eat, and was just an absolutely lovely person to be around.
The location couldn’t be better—super convenient and close to everything I needed. The bed was incredibly comfortable and the room cozy, peaceful, and spotless. I honestly can’t recommend this stay enough. Thank you, Maki, for everything! I’d come back in a heartbeat.

This was without any doubt the best Airbnb experience I have had so far.
Everything is well thought of - from the breakfast, over the bikes (they were a real game changer), to the Kimono experience. Maki and her husband are so nice, on top of all.
Thanks a lot for making these days in Tokyo so special!

This is exactly what you'd call a HOME 🏠. Hosted by two gem of a human, makes you feel safe and cared for immediately. My husband and I had such a wonderful stay here. 10 minutes walk to the nearest train station and very close to a pretty happening street - Karugaza. Do make sure to ask Maki for some great recommendations when it comes to food. She even gave us a Kimono experience along with tea ceremony which was so much FUN 😊. Wishing you all the best and may you have a lot more guests always 💜💜

We have had many lovely hosts during our AirBnB stays but Maki was really the best.  She is so kind and helpful, and our stay with her and her husband was a real highlight of our trip in Japan.  The bedroom is clean and comfortable, with air con and several added provisions.  The private loo was convenient and the shared bathroom was spotless and available at our convenience.  Breakfast in the morning was great - as were our interesting conversations then and at the end of our days' sightseeing.  We were given excellent recommendations for local restaurants.  The location is really good - quiet and a bit off the tourist trail but a quick walk to a well connected metro station and a lively neighbourhood just up the road.  And Maki's kimono and tea experience was really something special that should not be missed.  Finally, there were two bikes available for use - though we didn't have time to take advantage of that. We would definitely return when next back in Tokyo.

We had a perfect Tokyo experience at Maki's home!
It's a really nice, clean modern house with a warm, welcoming and engaged host. Me and my partner enjoyed the kimono experience, loved those cute rice bears under omelette blankets for breakfast and chat about life😄
Thank you very much, Maki and Chiro, for your hospitality!🗻🤗

非常有爱的一对夫妇，也能用英语流畅沟通，给我们提供了好的餐厅选择。房主夫妇去过很多国家，我和我男朋友也是留学生，感觉有很多共同话题，比较多元化和包容
Maki每天会准备早饭，有家的感觉，如果不下雨天，他们会提供免费自行车，这两天下雨太可惜了
一天走累了，也会给我们提供按摩足贴，非常细心和贴心了，下次我们还会再来的

Maki’s home has such a warm and inviting atmosphere. She and her husband are genuinely kind, thoughtful, and incredibly friendly. Each morning, they served us beautifully prepared breakfasts, made with care and attention to detail. They also generously shared elements of Japanese culture with us — including a kimono experience and a traditional matcha tea ceremony — which made our stay truly unforgettable. We also met their adorable little dog, Dona, and took lots of lovely photos with her — she made the experience even more delightful. The location is perfect too, just a short walk from the charming Kagurazaka neighborhood. I wholeheartedly recommend staying here to anyone looking for an authentic and heartwarming experience in Tokyo.

Maki è un host splendido. È sempre stata molto gentile, e ci ha riservato un’accoglienza unica! Ci ha addirittura preparato una colazione tipoca giapponese, e ogni giorno ci preparava piccole sorprese che hanno migliorato la nostra esperienza! Un giorno ci ha fatto anche provare i suoi kimono! Non so come ringraziarla, è una host presente e disponibile, ed anche una persona gentilissima!

Maki and Chiro are the absolute best! They are very social and their home is wonderful. Maki answered all of my questions and even helped me plan my trip in Tokyo. Especially if this is your first trip, I HIGHLY recommend staying here- as they took out all of the stress involved with being in a foreign country. Maki and Chiro are like having a family in another part of the world!

Maki et son mari sont des hôtes formidables, d'une grande gentillesse et très accueillants. En cas de besoin, Maki fait toujours de son mieux pour vous aider. Nous avons eu la chance de profiter de délicieux petits déjeuners chaque matin et également à une soirée kimono traditionnel qui était incroyable, Maki étant une experte en la matière. Un grand merci à eux, en espérant avoir le plaisir de les revoir 😊

Every Maki made breakfast was delicious and different- she and Chiro went out of their way to make me feel at home. One of (if not the best) AirBnB experience I’ve ever had - if I come back to Tokyo I’m staying with Maki & Chiro - they are amazing

Maki was a fantastic host! She was so helpful and friendly with us. She gave us nice recommendations for restaurants in the area (which were excellent), and we even had a calligraphy lesson as well as a kimono trying session! It was the perfect experience and we would definitely recommend this accomodation to anyone interested by Japanese culture.

Maki was absolutely incredible! She was attentive, helpful, and welcoming — she went above and beyond! Could not imagine a better stay. She truly outdid herself! If I were to rank her hospitality on a scale of 1 to 5; I would rank her 5,000! It’s truly an honor to have stayed here, Maki made our first ever live-in host experience so special. When we come back we’re definitely going to book here.

Mi anfitrión me recibió muy bien, incluso fue a buscarnos a la estación de metro y nos llevó junto con él. La zona es buena, tiene vida y además... ¡El ramen de la zona es delicioso!
En todo momento fueron amables con nosotras y definitivamente volvería a quedarme en este lugar.
I'm enjoy to stay in here. It's pretty nice. Close to 大塚 station. Room mates are pretty nice.
駅から徒歩2分で立地が最高に良いですよ。
住了三个月，非常有家的感觉，娜娜桑很热情也很照顾人，是个非常可爱开朗的人，附近就是大塚駅，交通也十分方便，是一次非常不错的住房体验了～
很开心入住小屋，房子位置极佳，食住行都很方便，室友也很友善，总之是个不错的体验！
まるで自分の家にいるかのようでした。常に家に誰かいて安心できるし、NANAさんには困ったことを相談させてもらったり、色々なものを快く貸して頂いたりしてとても助かりました(例えば台車)。立地も駅の発車メロディが聞こえるほど近くて便利なのでおススメです。
Es war ein unkomplizierter und schöner Aufenthalt :) Alle sind freundlich und hilfsbereit!

Nana pick up me with another member in this share house and she give me very good response for answer any question.This female share room was good. Best location and many kinds of member in this house.Very like this house too much. Will come back again on next April :D
このゲストハウスの一番良い点はやはり駅からとても近い位置であることです！そしてハウスの周りに生活に便利な所がたくさん揃っており、本当に暮らしやすい所だと思います！

Séjour sans problèmes ! Nana a été arrangeante avant et pendant le séjour. L'appartement est beaucoup plus grand que ce que j'imaginais et les autres filles sont toutes très sympa.
De plus, c'est super près de la gare !
是女生宿舍。不在觀光區內，可以感受到日本人的日常生活。價格便宜，房東細心。交通十分方便。周圍就有超市和許多小餐廳可外食。

Amazing location right on the main circle line.
Wonderful and friendly people that live in the share house as well as visit!
Had access to my own cupboard space and fridge space. Feels like a family. Thank you everyone :)

Thank you for all to Nana, it was a great moment in this share house. All the womans there are really nice, you have everything you need to be confortable, and Nana spend time with you if you have some problems or questions...! I really recommande this adress.

Since this is girls only dormitory, there is other women living there, but very clean and nice, and room is warm enough. You need to bring your own towels, but there is hair dryer on 1st floor. Is was all nice, and a station near by was JR yamanotē line. <-was very good. Ppl are nice too. Slightly cold in winter, but heater was okay. Warm water, hot shower!
Also Nana, she was nice too. Thank you a lot!

Really affordable housing for anyone looking to stay near Tokyo. The dormitory itself is two floors with a shared bathroom on each floor. Even though here are other female residents living in the dormitory, I never really had to wait long to use the bathroom. I even got a chance to talk to some of them, and they were friendly and helpful. There is a washing machine on each floor to do your laundry for 100 yen (with detergent and fabric softener provided), which is really convenient. You can also use the kitchen to cook, but I rarely used it other than to boil water. The location is also 3 mins. from the train station and surrounded by lots of stores and restaurants (FamilyMart and AEON were my go-to places). Overall, I would recommend this place to anyone who just needs a place to sleep at night. Can't beat the accommodations provided at this price!

The best thing about this place is the location and safety. It's very close to Otsuka station yamanote line. It's very convenient to move around Tokyo and there are supermarket, pharmacy, conbini and even donki and coffee shops. It's safe here and Nana-san is very accommodating and a nice host. You get to meet different kinds of interesting people.

It was a great time spent here and mostly a place that feels like home
Nana is a great host and if I have the chance to come back I would !

The sharehouse community felt like a little family but still everyone had the space and freedom to do their own things. I immediately felt at home because Nana was so friendly and accommodating. She even organised little events in the house around the area to bring the people together. The facilities itself were clean and convenient and the sharehouse is situated so close to the station and nearby restaurants and shops, where you could find anything you'd need. Otsuka is also very convenient since it is on Yamanote line which quickly takes you wherever you might need to go. I really enjoyed my stay with Nana and would definitely come back anytime I stay in Tokyo. Strongly recommend! Thank you for everything, Nana!
在这里度过的每一天都很愉快和舒适！所有的女孩子都很亲切友好，也非常感谢ななさん的帮助，这将成为珍贵的记忆❤️
Nana is very kind and accommodating, the place is comfortable and well located: I recommend this RBnB 100%!
Feel at home in Japan, nice house and nice people as usual! Grateful ☺️

Nana’s place was exactly what I needed: a safe place close to the Yamanote line. The room and the whole apartment matched the description and despite being with many people, everyone is busy with own life so it doesn’t feel clustered at all. Nana is su h a good host and she gives many recommendations in terms of area and tips for things to do.
I would definitely recommend the place to anyone who is looking to stay long term (or just slow traveling) in Tokyo. Definitely coming back.
a nice place to stay!

Nana Took great care of my mother
Highly recommended!!!

Host pick up us at Nezu station nearby the place. That is the first impression, added with other arrangement and complimentary
From Kunchan and Tuktik make us would like
To stay in Japan forever. They are both nice and friendly to anyone especially Khunchan laugh make verything lively and joyed. We definitely will be back to this place soonest.

房东很友善，房子干净安静、又宽大。这个地区是寺庙区可以很好的体验寺庙文化……
房东说来居住的多数是泰国人、他夫人是泰国人.
二楼是他们宗教活动场所、我们参观了的.
作为基督徒我们也非常尊重他们的信仰与文化。
另外有两个厕所、一个淋浴间。厨房也非常干净、自己使用微波炉热米饭、煮鸡蛋…
超市与便利店5分钟距离。

เจ้าของที่พักให้การต้อนรับอย่างดี เป็นกันเอง อัธยาศัยดีมาก ที่พักสะอาด. เหมือนอยู่บ้าน หาอาหารรับประทานง่าย มีทั้ง7-11และร้านอาหารหลายร้านใกล้สถานีรถไฟใต้ดิน nezu station มีรถbus. วิ่งผ่าน สามารถเดินจากสวนueno. และตลาดameyoko มาที่พักได้ ประมาณ 1.5 km

Kanchan is an amazing host - very kind, friendly and helpful. He came to pick us up at the train station in his car and offered to drop us off as well. He has a really nice place. The neighbourhood is very peaceful, safe and easy access to public transport and convenient stores. We would highly recommend staying here.

완전 친절하고 좋았습니다.
Great!
房屋與描述完全不正確，根本就不是獨棟房，只是一間不能上鎖的細少房間， 放置床褥及行李後 根本上就沒有空間了 ，房內沒有任何設施，連浴屋及廁所都要在公共空間,  房屋大門也是沒有鎖的， 唯一方便就是不用帶鑰匙，因為任何人都可輕易進到你的房間當然也包括你自己吧！ 睡覺時都不能上鎖完全沒有安全感可言， 一萬句絕對不會再入住！

宿泊施設もお寺の和室ですがき綺麗で周辺も静かで過ごしや易かったです。
東京観光としてはコスパもよく良くまた次回も利用したいと思います。
特に家族連れにはとてもゆっくできていいとおもい思います。
また次回もよろしくお願いします。
店家非常热情，退房后我们寄存的行李还帮忙送到上野站，解决了我们的后顾之忧，非常感谢！

ที่พักสไตล์เรียวกัง ทำเลดีมากๆ อยู่ไม่ไกลจากสถานี Ueno เจ้าของคันจังมีแฟนเป็นคนไทยครับ (คุณติ๊ก) แนะนำสำหรับชาวไทยทุกท่าน คุณติ๊กให้การต้อนรับและดูแลเป็นอย่างดี มีบริการรับส่งที่สถานี Ueno ที่พักสะดวก เงียบสงบ หลับสบาย มีห้องอาบน้ำ 1 ห้อง แยกกับสุขา 2 ห้อง มีตู้น้ำดื่มให้ / ใกล้ๆ ที่พัก มี 7-11 และร้าน Denny's (Family Restaurant) อยู่ สามารถเดินผ่าน Uenokoen ไปยังสถานี Ueno ได้ (2 กม.) และไปยัง Don Quijote Ueno (์Yushima Station) ได้แค่ 1 สถานี เท่านั้น

Kanchan was an excellent host. He responded quick, picked us up at the station and was happy to answer any questions we had. Not being able to speak Japanese was no problem as we used a translator to talk to each other. The apartment is neat, simple, and clean. Having the little kitchen was a plus to bring back leftovers from all the restaurants. the neighborhood is quite and we spent a lot of time just walking around. Everything felt just as I hoped spending my week in japan.
Great find in a convenient location to Ueno. The host is great and even picked us up from Ueno-Keisei station so it makes checking in a breeze. We had a nice time.

très bon accueil. Chambre très propre. le quartier est tranquille et très typique avec des petites ruelles et des temples anciens en bois. Pratique, pas loin du parc et de la gare Ueno. Une bonne adresse pour se reposer après une journée passée dans les quartiers bouillonnants de Tokyo

Our stay at Kanchan's place was wonderful. The bedroom was spacious. We were a group of four and we all had space to pack our bags. There were four comfy futons for each of us. The bathroom and toilet were sparking clean. The towels were changed everyday during our stay.
Kanchan were also communicative and kind. He responded our questions very quickly. He also picked up our luggage when we arrived the station so that we had more time to travel (no need to go back and forth). In the last night (31st Dec), Kanchan also gave us some oranges and coca-cola as New year gifts. (Thanks again, Kanchan)
The place was not so far from the station (15 min walk from JR Ueno station and 10 min walk from Nezu subway station). If you come from JR Ueno station, you can walk pass Ueno park. It's a very nice walk in the sunny day.

เป็นที่พักที่ประทับใจที่สุดเท่าที่เราเคยพักในairbnb มาเลยค่ะ โดยปกติเราจะพักกับเจ้าของที่เป็นคนญี่ปุ่น ซึ่งจะไม่ค่อยได้รับความเอาใจใส่ ความสะดวกต่างๆเท่าที่ควร แต่รอบนี้พักที่บ้านของคุณติ้กซึ่งเป็นคนไทยด้วยกันนั้น ได้รับการต้อนรับ และดูแล ให้ความสะดวกสบายทุกอย่างตั้งแต่มาถึง จนวันกลับ ซึ่งทำให้เราติดใจเป็นอย่างมาก จนต้องจองที่พักในทริปต่อไปเลยทีเดียว ขอขอบคุณติ้กมากๆเลยนะคะ เราโชคดีมาก ที่ได้เจอเจ้าของบ้านที่น่ารักแบบนี้

入院している父のお見舞いで利用させて頂きました。短い滞在でしたが行きも帰りも駅まで車で送迎して頂き赤ちゃん連れだったので非常に助かりました。
丁寧な対応で部屋も清潔でした。
ありがとうございました。

Nice place and host
Hope to be there again

We had a great time at Kachan's.
Very good location!
Good, Clean and Sincere.

If you want to stay in an authentic Japanese style tatami house. You’ll love it here. The Airbnb host was really lovely and picked us up and dropped us off at Ueno station. Just to note he collects 2,000 Yen as a deposit which we got back but I’ve never had that happen before. Normally it’s collected on the Airbnb platform.
Pros:
The house is kept very clean which was a huge plus. It’s well stocked with filtered water, soap, clean towels. The kitchen has a fridge, hot water, toaster, dishes, fridge and you can use the microwave. We are super close to Nezu subway and close to Nippori station and Ueno station. There’s great food near Nezu station. Also the internet is very fast! There’s a room that you can eat in between two rooms.
Cons: It’s a room with paper doors which means that when there are other guests you can hear each other and or have to be super quiet. We were with a VERY jet lagged 3 year old and as we came from the US so you can imagine this type of space was quite tough for 5 days. The bathroom and sink are shared with the other guests. The post says private bathroom but it’s not private. The shower is small (typical for japan), but the water wasn’t very hot and there are two shared toilet stalls. While the back windows make the room pitch black since the doors are made of paper the light from the house comes inside. Also, the ceiling is very thin when people are upstairs it’s super loud, I don’t recommend this location for a family with children. It’s incredibly hard to be quiet, but being near Ueno park was wonderful. Also, you can’t lock the door when you’re sleeping at night. The first night they opened the door when we were fast asleep, I’m not sure why- luckily it didn’t happen again but it would be better if the doors locked at night.
Overall, it’s a bang for your buck if you’re with 4 adults and there just to sleep and explore.
Lieu dans un environnement de temple , très calme, et pratique pas très loin de la gare de Ueno

This is a Japanese transitional style room in a local temple. It locates in a quiet neighborhood, with convenient stores and restaurants. The room is neat and clean. Space is large for 2, especially in Ueno area. The shower works well, too.
Kanchan is a great host! During our stay, he prepared bedding for us, as well as towels and toothbrush. After checking-out, he also drove us to the train station in early morning.
能住在寺庙里是很独特的体验！房间是日式风格的，非常干净整洁。2个人住的话面积充裕。淋浴间非常好用。
房东非常好，给我们准备了被褥，还每天都帮忙替换了毛巾牙刷。离开时还开车送我们去了车站，提供了很多便利！
附近很安静，不远有便利店和餐厅。
Great host, great location, and great accommodation.

上野動物園後に10.8.4歳ととても楽しく過ごさせていただきました。レビュー通り、清潔に保たれています！当日の各種確認も迅速に返信いただいたり、子供達にもとても優しく接しいただきました。布団もふかふかで子供もこの布団買ってー！と言ってました。湯船が無いのでシャワーになってしまいますが、冬では無いので一泊ならいいかな！と思いました。
上野駅までに送っていただき、最後まで本当にありがとうございました！
호스트님은 매우 친절하셨고, 짐이 많아 걱정했는데 역까지 왔다갔다 태워주십니다. 일본 분위기를 느끼기 좋은 숙소입니다.

ホストの方の対応がとても素早くかつ親切でした。
部屋も清潔で居心地が良く、高評価です！
機会があればまた宿泊したいです。
Nice experience staying in temple. The host is also friendly and kindly pick-up us in Ueno-station. Near the house, there is also nice local restaurants.

Kanchan san was very kind to pick us up from Ueno station on a late arrival and drop us off again for an early train. The place was very clean. There were 2 shared restrooms. With the late arrival, we decided to UberEat and Kanchan san helped us with making sure the address is correct.
During our stay, the outside temperature was very cold (single digit Celsius). The common areas could be a little bit chill but our room was toasty warm. We had a really good sleep.
A very friendly experience overall. Would be a repeat if I am in the area.

먼저 부모님 모시고 여행하는 계시다면 정말 추천드리고 싶어요! 저희는 일본에서 첫날 도착했을 때 이용했고 공항에서 스카이라이너를 이용하면 한번에 쉽게 올 수 있었습니다. 심지어 호스트 Kann님이 저희를 역 앞에 데리러 와주셔서 정말 감동받았습니다.
우에노와 가까워 아사쿠사를 즐기기에도 좋고 긴자와도 가까워 쇼핑을 즐기기에도 좋은 위치입니다. 숙소가 위치해있는 네즈역 자체도 일본에서 3개월 가까이 지내며 여러 곳을 방문한 제가 보기에도 가장 일본스러우면서도 동시에 귀엽고 사랑스러운 곳이었습니다. 일본 드라마에서 보던 길거리들과 맛집들이 많았습니다.
숙소 자체도 정말 크고 쾌적하고 좋았습니다. 이불이나 수건 모든 것들이 깨끗이 준비되었으며 단정함이 느껴집니다. 일본 전통 가옥 구조의 타다미와 좌식 스타일의 룸인데 나중에 찾아보니 여기가 사찰이었습니다. 그래서 더 특별했고 부모님도 너무 좋아하셨습니다. 약간 템플 스테이라고 보셔도 좋을 것 같습니다.
퇴실 후에도 짐을 보관해주셨으며 짐을 가지러 오려고했는데 혼자서 역으로 직접 가져다주셨습니다. 가장 놀랐고 감동스러운 부분입니다. 지금까지 여러 에어비앤비를 이용했지만 가장 특별한 곳 중 하나입니다. 정말 일본스러운 멋진 공간과 정말 일본스러운 상냥한 주인분까지 모든 분께 추천드리고 싶습니다.
다음에도 또 오겠습니다. 또 만나요 Kann님!:)

Our family of four recently stayed in this traditional Japanese dwelling in Tokyo, and it was a fantastic experience! The place is not only charmingly traditional but also well-equipped, perfect for families. The host was very welcoming and responsive to our needs. Pick us up and drop us off at the Ueno Station.
We had a wonderful time here and highly recommend it to those planning a Tokyo visit. Looking forward to staying here again next time!
il luogo è magico, il Monaco gentilissimo. ci ha persino accompagnato in auto alla stazione di Ueno

非常愉快的住宿体验，房东很友善，会提前联系我们，开自己的车在jr上野站接送。我们是第一次来日本旅游，早上从大阪到东京，所以寻找正确的路线花了一些时间，感谢房东的耐心等待。虽然我们不懂日语，但是房东有准备不同语言的字条，了解基本的信息没有什么问题。
房子距离千代田线步行便利，乘坐公共交通去浅草寺和秋叶原都很方便。步行就能到达上野公园，有博物馆和美术馆。房子的名称是一座寺，周边也有很多寺，很喜欢这里的氛围。出门很近的距离就有一家711，可以在那里使用ATM。
我们入住的两天没有其他客人。房子很漂亮。床垫和被子很柔软、很舒服，我们睡得很好。毛巾香香的。香波很好用。白天我们出门的时候，会有客房服务，更换毛巾等用品。
房东很用心地经营这间民宿，我们的日本之旅有很好的体验。非常推荐给大家。

Kanchan picked us up in his van at Ueno Keisei station despite our flight being 2 hours late. He drove us straight to the place, showed us around, and explained everything. When we checked out, he immediately responded and offered to drive us back to the station. (We decided to walk since it was such a peaceful area and allowed us to walk through Ueno park). Our family enjoys sleeping on traditional futon, so we slept extremely well. An excellent stay with the most responsive host I've ever encountered on Airbnb!

Kanchan’s place was very pleasant and the most space one could probably find near central Tokyo! His complementary pick up and drop off to Ueno station was extremely helpful, especially considering we had kids and luggage.
Location is very good - just a short walk to the museum district of Ueno park, across from the JR, Shinkansen and Skyliner stations at Ueno station.
Perfect for a family, although voices need to be kept down for noisy kids as the walls are traditional Japanese style, meaning that they aren’t very sound-proof.
This accommodation has shared bathroom facilities, but if you don’t mind not having ensuite then it’s a really good choice!

We had an INCREDIBLE stay at Kanchan’s place. It was so nice to be in a quiet part of town and be able to relax at the end of each day. Kanchan went above and beyond for us. We sent our luggage ahead which he accepted, and then picked us up at the station. When we needed to leave for the airport several hours after checkout, he met us at the station for the Skyliner with our bags so we didn’t have to find a place for them for the whole day. He was friendly and warm and truly made us feel like we had the local Japanese experience.
호스트께서 매우 친절하셨습니다. 일주일 전부터 숙소로 오는 법, 유의사항 등을 미리 알려주셨고 체크인 이후에도 지속적으로 방을 관리해 주셨습니다. 가격 대비 위치도 훌륭하고 동네도 조용하여 휴식을 취하기에 좋았습니다.

The room is in a tempi. The host is very friendly and warm. Every morning , I walked around the temple, I like the surrounding that is beautiful and peaceful. The host could pick up and drop off our at the station for free. Thank you, see you next time.
老板是个很细心的人，不仅来回接送，而且细节也非常到位。3孔排插都有，房间也恨大很安逸舒适，谢谢。

A very comfortable accommodation nearly Keisei Ueno Station and JR Ueno station. And the subway station is also near and easy to find.
The room will tidy up everyday, towels, toothbrushes are well prepared. Owner is a very nice guy, he will pick you up at station when checkin and drive you to station when checkout. You can contact him by text messages anytime when you have questions.
in summary: very good place
매우 아름다운 사원이 숙소에 있으며 주변은 조용합니다. 칸찬은 매우 친절한 호스트입니다. 우에노와 가깝고 위치도 좋습니다

It's a wonderful stay and I wish I had booked longer. Everything was perfect, spacious, clean, convenient, beautiful neighborhood, etc. Kanchan was super helpful and friendly, even though he was not fluent in English so we kept our communication in basic. He drove us from/to the station and his place, which I can't thank enough. Overall, highly recommended if you are in Tokyo!

Kanchan was an incredible host! He went above and beyond to help us with transportarion and getting settled in. And the neighbourhood surround the airbnb is beautiful to walk around.
Thank you so much Kanchan :D
居然是住在寺里，太牛了
마지막 날에 묵었는데 따듯한 물도 잘나오고 깔끔하고 좋았습니다. 편의점도 가깝고 주변에 환경이 고즈넉하여 평화로운 느낌이었습니다. 호스트도 매우 친절했습니다.

Wonderful stay! Kanchan was very responsive and picked us up from the airport and drove us back. The area is very peaceful and safe as well. It’s a very traditional home so I recommend staying here if you want to be close to all the stations! 😊

Best stay in Tokyo!
1. Convenient location: only 20-minute walk to Nippori/Ueno Station. The owner can drive us to the station when check in/out.
2. Peaceful traditional neighborhood with many nice small temples. A stroll is highly recommended to enjoy the atmosphere! Totally different from the CBD.
3. Spacious room for 2 persons with spotless toilets. You can smell the soft scent of the tatami. Mattresses are comfortable. Pretty quiet during the night. The only problem might be the tiny bathroom. Watch your head!
And the accommodation is actually part of a temple.
房东会到地铁口接我们，入住很方便。榻榻米房间宽敞舒适，让我们一家四口休息得很舒服。房东回应非常及时。周围步行可达各美术馆 博物馆。离地铁站不远。走在上野公园 非常放松

Here is one of the best host ever. They provided such a great service with comfy traditional Japanese room and very clean environment. They also picked up our stuff at train station, so we could hang around before checking in. On checkout date, they sent us to JR station. Very good hospitality indeed!! I highly recommended this place to everyone who wants to stay at Ueno area.

J'ai séjourné trois nuits avec mes deux enfants. J'avais choisi cet hébergement en raison de son emplacement mais l'hébergement est allé au-delà de mes attentes ! La chambre était très belle (une chambre traditionnelle avec tatami), et très grande (en plus des trois futons, il y avait un très grand placard dans laquelle j'ai pu laisser notre grande valise ouverte, une table basse, une coiffeuse, un portant). Pendant tout notre séjour, j'ai eu le sentiment d'être seule avec mes enfants : nous avons été les seuls à utiliser la salle de douche et les toilettes. Nous avons pu profiter du réfrigérateur. C'était un séjour idéal, d'autant plus que la communication avec notre hôte était très fluide et amicale. Quand un de mes enfants a eu un accident, il a tout de suite changé la literie et pris en charge le nettoyage du futon (cela m'a seulement coûté 1500 yen). Je recommande chaleureusement cette adresse pour profiter du quartier pittoresque de Yanaka avec ses échoppes du Tokyo d'autrefois.

부모님과 함께 작년에 이어 올해 두번째 방문입니다. 그만큼 좋았다는 거 겠지요?:)
마치 템플스테이처럼 사찰에 마련된 방입니다. 그래서 타다미 방의 이색적인 느낌도 재밌고, 방 크기가 엄청 널찍해서 부모님이 지내시기 편해하셨어요. 화장실이 공용인데 매번 한 팀밖에 안받으셔서 결국엔 개인이나 마찬가지입니다.
또 네즈역 자체도 맛집도 많고 볼거리 많고 우에노 아사쿠사 다 가까워 좋아요.
무엇보다 이 에어비앤비의 최고는 주인분께서 매번 편한 곳에서 짐을 픽업해주시고 또 역 앞까지 드롭해주신다는 점입니다. 여행 마지막날 편하게 놀고 짐 가지고 공항가기 참 좋아요.
너무 착하고 좋으신 주인분 늘 감사합니다, 또 올게요:)
호스트가 직접 차로 픽업해주시고 체크아웃 후에도 짐을 맡겨주셔서 마지막 날까지 편했습니다.
上野谷中エリアの観光に最適な場所です。部屋は清潔で広々として快適でした。ホストの方にも丁寧に対応いただき、とても安心して滞在ができました。ありがとうございました。
位置位于台东区，如果你去浅草寺，上野动物园，国立美术馆.这个位置非常方便，房东会提供免费接送服务，很热情.每天还会打扫卫生.而且你有需要就可以联系房东，他就住在对面，这是一次不错的日式榻榻米之旅.如果你喜欢热闹逛街，这边可能不适合你.感谢kanchan

Even though we arrived late, the landlord was very kind enough to pick us up at the subway station and help us deliver our luggage to our rooms. The room is located in a quiet street, clean and tidy, making it feel like home. Thank you very much for the landlord's help, I hope to have the opportunity to stay again, thank you 🙏😄
Excelente anfitrión, sin duda volveremos

Aan alle beloften is voldaan:
Een prachtige, grote kamer, rustige omgeving met veel tempels in de buurt. Een perfecte gastheer die ons haalde en bracht naar het station. Een beter verblijf in Tokyo hadden wij ons niet kunnen wensen!
Heel veel dank, Kanchan ❤️

Un accueil vraiment exceptionnel de gentillesse et un super plan à Tokyo!
Merci à vous.

Le logement était extrêmement calme, pour nous tous seuls. La chambre était grande et nous avions les toilette et la salle de bain juste pour nous.
Le quartier est super tranquille avec tout ce qu’il faut à proximité du logement.
Kanchan a été super serviable en venant chercher nos bagages à Ueno pour que nous continuions nos visites le jour de l’arrivée.
Il nous a raccompagnés le jour du départ à keisei ueno pour notre départ de Narita.

Un piacevolissimo soggiorno. La casa di Kanchan era esattamente come descritta e come si presentava nelle foto. Tutto impeccabile e pulitissimo. La zona dove si trova l'appartamento è un quartiere dove si respira l'antica tokyo (vari templi nella zona), è molto comoda e ben collegata. Un ulteriore punto in più: Kanchan ci è venuto a prendere alla stazione di Ueno, rendendo il nostro check-in e check-out ancora più facili. consigliatissimo!!!! ci tornerei!

Staying with Kanchan has been very pleasant. He picked us up at the train station and helped us with the luggage. The room was quiet and spacious (great for two people or more), the shower and washroom were very clean, and there's a water dispenser to quench the thirst.
The neighborhood is quiet and beautiful, with many temples, small cafés, shops and restaurants. Nezu Shrine and Ueno Park are not far (around 15 Minutes walk), and there's a good connection to the other big spots in Tokyo, like Shibuya or Tokyo Station.
Kanchan has always been very polite and friendly – a wonderful host! He answers quickly to messages and he even brought us back to the station to continue our journey.
I definitely recommend this Air BnB.
房东热情助人，离上野公园挺近。
非常特别的一次体验，来到后才发现这个寺庙是为动物供养，我也为咱家小猫咪买了寺庙御守，愿天下动物有栖息之地有快乐一生。房间很干净，我们很喜欢，祝房东新年快乐！很喜欢您的房子所在的社区，很漂亮很值得：）
도쿄에서 이틀 동안 지낸 숙소입니다. 일본 전통 가옥 분위기로 지내기 좋습니다. 특별히 불편하다고 느낀 점 없이 편히 이틀을 보냈습니다. 호스트분께서 픽업을 직접 해 주셔서 편했습니다.

GOOD
숙소가 깔끔하고 겨울에도 따뜻해요. 시설도 만족스럽습니다.
BAD
주차 가능하지만, 골목이 좁아 출입이 어려울 수 있어요.

The place was very clean and accommodating. The room was larger than expected and the futons were highly comfortable. If you are looking for a place with an authentic Japanese style, affordability, and within walking distance of major shopping areas and subways, Kanchan is your man.
He also picked us up and dropped us off from/to the subway.
Kanchan was always extremely prompt responding, and the space was very clean! It was really nice to get out of the city at nights, his place was very peaceful. I hope to come again someday!!!
Sehr angenehm in super schöner Umgebung!
地段优越，如果有独立浴室就更完美

Une expérience unique de séjourner dans un temple ! Nous avons été très bien accueillis par un hôte charmant et attentionné. Le fait d'être les seuls occupants a rendu notre séjour particulièrement paisible et agréable. Le seul petit bémol concerne la taille des espaces communs qui pourraient être un peu justes pour un plus grand nombre de personnes.

Joli logement conforme aux photos, lits japonais type futons, salle de bain et toilettes communes. Kanchan nous a récupéré et déposé gentiment à la gare JR de Ueno et a ajouté un matelas à mon papa pour soulager son dos.
Le quartier est très agréable, paisible et proche de nombreux transports
Merci pour ce séjour !
Bra boende i ett väldigt fint område!

A quiet place within a neighbourhood full of temples. Walking distance to 7 eleven, Dennys and laundromat. A bit more of a walk to nearest subway station, Nezu or Nippori. Kanchan is very responsive, offers pick up and drop off at Ueno station, making it easy to check in and check out to your next destination.

Kanchan picked us up from the train station at Ueno Park coming from Narita Airport. His communication was excellent and clear. The room was spacious, very clean and we loved the traditional futons on the Tatami mats. The location is perfect. Such a chilled and charming neighbourhood with beautiful local temples surrounding the accommodation, 10-15 mins walk to Ueno Park, which is a great place to hang for the day…people watching.
We found some great coffee places within 5 mins of the guest house. We went into Shibuya for one evening and were relieved to return to the calm and serene peace of Tanaka district. We had a couple of special late night walks home from Nippori station through an atmospheric cemetery with a view of Tokyo tower.
We would definitely stay here again.
Thank you 🙏🏼
사장님이 너무 친절하고 픽업도해주고 정말 좋은 숙소였어요 다음에 도쿄에 오면 또갈거에요 감사합니다!!!!
Kanchan was a great host and very hospitable. The place is exactly as described. I stayed with my 2 kids and my mom. Accommodations were great for the family!

ﾈｺちゃんのお出迎えから始まり

寒い時期だったので部屋を温めておいてくださり､ｳｴﾙｶﾑｺｰﾋｰと音楽で優雅なひとときから始まりました｡
