ｵｽｽﾒします‼︎

初Airbnbでした。
緊張していたのですが、清潔感のある無垢フローリングのおしゃれな空間で、とても楽しく過ごすことができました。
猫ちゃんもとてもかわいかったです！
Kauhiroさんも親切で、次の訪問時は料理を食べてみたいです。
ありがとうございました。

インテリアが白で統一されていてお洒落で洗練された明るいお部屋でした。まず、感激したのが、部屋に入ると、その日聴きに行ったコンサートで演奏された曲をかけてお出迎えしてくださったことです。夜遅かったにも関わらず、色々と親切に対応して下さり有難かったです。お風呂もすぐ準備して頂き、お布団もふかふかで寝心地が良く、ぐっすり眠れました。また、本格的なオーディオでジャズやクラシックを聴けたり、ホテルとは全く違う雰囲気で、ゆったりとした気持ちでくつろげました。朝のコーヒーも、とても美味しかったです。
猫ちゃんたちは、ちょっと警戒していましたが、可愛い姿を見られただけでも嬉しかったです。ありがとうございました！

二回目という事で手書きのウエルカムボードに感動しました！
二回目という事でまるちゃん(猫)、フロちゃん(猫)が触らせてくれました(=^x^=)嬉しい。
二回目という事で念願の麻婆や美味しい手料理をいただきました。
夜はDVDを見て楽しみましたよ！
ホストさんは、いつもお部屋を綺麗にしててくれておもてなしも最高です(=^x^=)オススメします。

初めてのAirbnbですが、9泊にしました。笑
長時間にお邪魔しましてすみませんでした~！(*^^*)
学生で、またネコが大好きなので、そちに選んで良かったと思います。オーナーさんがとても熱心で、初日から色々な話しが盛り上がっていました~有意義な時間過ごしてありがとうございました~
またいつか東京に行ってそこに泊まれたらいいなぁと思いますねー
今度専用カレーに料理作りましょう！笑

We found this house nearby Metro by using the website called Airbnb. The house was almost as same as those photos on the websites. The landlord was really considerate since he not only let us put our luggage in the early morning when we arrived as Tokyo but also put a welcome sign in front of the door. We had lived there for a week, and the landlord cooked us both breakfast and dinner with a marvelous cooking skills. Drinking together with he was also an unforgettable times, and taught each other Chinese and English. It was really fantastic and wonderful to have lived in this lovely, sweet, and warm house.

역에서 가까워 찾아가기 쉽고 굉장히 좋은 집이었지만 거실 쉐어인 부분이 조금 아쉽습니다.
만약 당신에게 프라이버시가 중요하다면 별로 좋지 않을 수도 있습니다.
고양이 냄새는 없었지만 털이 날려서 조금 불편했습니다.
ヨミさんはとってもいい人です。情熱、優しい人だと思います。泊まる時間が短いけど、非常に楽しかったです。私たちのため、可愛いwelcome boardを用意した。見ると心も暖かくなりましたね。ところで、目黒川の隣なので、花見に一番いいところだと思います。また、渋谷と六本木からも遠くない、なかなか便利です。

今回は16日間と長い間お世話になりませた。
とてもリラックスが出来、まるで自分の家に居るようでした。
インテリアもセンス良く揃えてあり、綺麗でした。
また来年も日本に帰国した際、宿泊させてください。

Staying with Kazuhiro was the perfect choice for us. he's a great host and makes sure you feel comfotable all of the time. the house is in a quiet area and everything is very clean. we went out with Kauuhiro too and he cooked us delicious Soba. Thanks a lot!!!
Kazuhiro is a very nice and friendly host. A good stay in Tokyo, i will be back to the house. Lovely home, clean, tidy....Excellent
当日夜遅くなってしまったのですが、快くお出迎えして頂きありがとうございました！綺麗なお部屋でとても寛げました。オーディオの音も綺麗！陽の光が爽やかでお部屋が明るく、朝気持ち良く起きられました。また、猫ちゃんがとても大人しいので全く気になりませんでした。また、リピートしたいお部屋です！

First thing we noticed was the lovely sign Kazuhiro placed outside to show us where to go. The place is very nice and tidy. Made us feel comfortable right away. Sleeping in the living room was also very comfortable. I can totally recommend staying in his house.

The house location is great, not far from the station and easily to reach. Kazuhiro is great host! He always keep the house clean and take care of everything you need. Thank you so much for the lovely welcome board and interesting story! As the description said, He has one lovely cat. If you are no problem with cat/or love cat. I think you will be enjoy to stay here. Fro (The cat) is very calm. Fro didn't make any trouble at all. All around the house is very quiet place and easily to relax. Thank you so much for your kind. I am sure that I will go back again ! :)

お世話になりました！色々ありがとうございます！ゆっくり過ごせました。また日本に行く予定があったらまたよろしくお願いします！

Kazuhiro is an amazing host. He gave us a lot of help since we came. We really want to give him a thousand thanks. If you are looking for a nice host who loves to drink and talk with you at night, this hostel is surely a best choice:P Very convenient, just 4mins walk from the train station. 7-11, 24-hr restaurant and supermarket that opens til late night are around.

I could not have asked for a better host. Kazuhiro is extremely welcoming and kind, and staying here has made my experience in Tokyo so much greater than I have anticipated. His place is extremely clean and modern, the walk to the station is short, and the neighborhood is nice and quiet. Nevertheless I was very comfortable throughout my entire stay. Kazuhiro is the best. You will not regret staying here. :)
It is a very nice and friendly host.  We arrived at the middle of night ,but the host still have a short welcome meeting for us. The room is very clean. We enjoy it

三天的体验实在让人难忘。房东kazuhiro是个热情，健谈，友善，极负生活情趣的人，他做过厨师，做的一手好菜，现在经营一家IT公司，喜爱品酒，还养了一只灰色蓝瞳的猫咪FRO。他为我们洗衣服，折衣服，为我们铺床，为我们做早餐做晚餐，还拿出自己珍藏的好酒分享。这三天我们无话不谈，感觉已经成为一家人。真心向大家推荐这间民宿，距离佑天寺车站步行十分，房间特别干净，柔和的灯光，美好的音乐，就像住在自己家一样舒适方便。

A Cozy Home Stay with cute Fro-chan at Kazuhiro san’s place was such a wonderful experience that unbelievably exceeded my already high anticipation in every aspect. Kazuhiro san’s place was only a 5-min walks from Yutenji station, very nice and quiet neighborhood. This fitted me perfectly because I enjoyed somewhere off the busy city centre yet accessible. The house is over 2 levels with Kazuhiro san’s studio and bathroom on the ground floor, spacious living (with huge TV and stereo set) kitchen and Fro-chan’s private castle (yes it was actually a castle) on the second .
Everything in his house was in good condition and of high quality that you may have actually thought that you’ve stayed in a luxurious hotel. The mattress that I slept on was so comfortable that felt so relaxed that I had no troubles in sleeping even in a new environment.
The entire houses the best, with clean and cozy decorations - the kind of place I would love to live in myself!
Would definitely stay here again.

事前にKazuhiroさんのお家の写真を見ておしゃれな感じだったので泊まってみたいと思い予約しました。女一人旅でしたので行ってみると思ったよりすごくおしゃれなだけではなく、お部屋も無駄がなく本当にシンプルで木の素材感あふれるナチュラルな雰囲気が好まれ、心地よく滞在できました。何よりもかわいいネコとのふれあいが楽しめる点は個人的には満足でした。最終日深夜までKazuhiroさんとおしゃべりしてしまい(笑)、変親切にしてくださって本当にお世話になりました。最高にコストパフォーマンスの良くて、次はいつ来ようかなと思える宿泊でした。
今回で2度目の滞在でしたが、部屋はいつも道理に綺麗でリラックスが出来る空間でとても良かったです。ホストKazuhiroさんはとても優しく料理が上手です。長期の滞在を希望でしたが、ほかの方が予約があり短い宿泊になり残念でした。次回予約をする際は早目にリクエストします。その際は宜しくお願いします。

kazuhiroさんの家は信じられないほど全ての面で思ったよりはるかにそれ以上でした。
kazuhiroさんの家を選択すると、良い理由
1.kazuhiro氏は、(ホスト)とても親切だ。 黒板に書いてある'welcome 기석さん(私の名前)'を見て感動した。 kazuhiroさんはいつもゲストを配慮して楽な旅行を感じることができる。
2.祐天寺駅(一弘さんの家)と中目黒駅と一駅通り步いて15分)にしかならないこと、中目黒からtokyo metro pass 72hを使用することができて交通費の面で負担がない。 私は3日間パスとともに、六本木、浅草、上野、秋葉原東京大学の渋谷など安く旅行をした。 渋谷でフクト新線を乗れば祐天寺にまっすぐ行くことができる。
3.防音が最高だ。 横に列車が通過するが、防音が完璧で外の声は何も聞いていないのでこぢんまりと寝た。
4.kazuhiroさんは毎日掃除をするために家がすごくきれいで快適だ。
5. コンビニと歩いて2分
6.猫が非常におとなしくてんで問題にならない。
東京でこれ以上長所がある宿はない。
毎朝kazuhiroさんがやってくれたコーヒーのおかげに清い精神で旅行を通うことができました。 airbnbを4度使ったの中で最高の家だと言えます。 東京旅行にまた行くなら、この家を選択することです。

reviewer_name: ผู้หญิงคิดบวก
comments: ที่นี่สงบ เงียบมากๆคะ บ้านสวย สะอสด ที่สำคัญเราสามารถทำอาหารเองได้ด้วย เจ้าของบ้านเป็นกันเองมากๆคะ ชอบที่สุดและจะแนะนำเพื่อนๆมาเพิ่มด้วยคะ

It's really a good and beautiful building.The location is very nice and convenient .l love the owner's sense. He makes me have a wonderful time here. So relax ! Feel like it's another home of mine in Tokyo. Unbelievable, he offers most parts of the house for the guest. He is very kind and generous. I hope I can go back asap . It's a really awesome experience.

Une superbe étape au Japon. Un hôte magnifique...accueillant, ouvert et disponible, Kazuhiro nous a fait découvrir le Japon par ces conseils. Le lieu est fonctionnel, propre et très agréable. Je recommande sans hésiter ;-)

This is the second time i rent the apartment building to live. I like the room so much. It give us a modern and warm feeling when living at home. Also the room location is near to the station and it is the same with the photos. House-owner is very nice to answer all my questions and talk to us. We have a time to drink and talk, exchange our culture like food. And i hope i can be friend with Mr. Kazuhiro from now on!!! I must rent your room next time if i go to Tokyo again!!!

I got experienced so many exciting things that I would never expected if I didn’t stay with Kazuhiro and his lovely family member - FRO. Kazuhiro went out to pick me up when I almost got lost and late for the check-in hour due to the flight delay, what a giant relief when it’s even raining during my arrival time!
 
Kazuhiro is more than just a nice host introducing the home appliance, advising the transportation route, etc.  he cooks!!!! scrumptious dishes that I tasted for the first time in my life such as French Perigord Truffle with cream pasta, traditional Japanese style roasted eggplant…I love every single one of them, really!!! and he also sharing the tasty wine and tea with me. It’s such a fun to talk with Kazuhiro after dinner on the culture, music and food, etc. I have to say FRO is pretty quiet and sometimes just pass by to say “hello” mannerly(*^__^*) BUT to me she’s sooooo cute that I have to disturb FRO sometime, ha~ha~ha---sorry about that FRO.
 
The house is super clean and spacious, Kazuhiro prepares everything that you may need such as toothbrush, tooth paste, towel for both face and body, the house location is 5mins walk to Yutenji Station with 24hrs convenient store and Supermarket (7:00-25:00) right next to, you’ll feel much more comfortable and luxurious than staying in a hotel room.
 
Thank you so much for your accommodation and all the thoughtful things you have done really make your house feel like a sweet home and I will definitely stay with you when I visit Tokyo again.
突然の予約でしたが、とても親切に対応して頂きました。お部屋も清潔でぐっすり眠れました。いつもありがとうございます。また機会がありましたら、よろしくお願いします。

とてもフレンドリーなオーナーで、良い意味で普通じゃないステイが出来ました。
到着すると猫とゲストの名前が入った看板があって、玄関にはいるとフロちゃんがヒョコっと顔を出して迎えてくれました。
あまり家にいることはなかったのですが、帰った後はKazuさんと話したり、一緒にビールを飲んだり、とても楽しく過ごせました。
祐天寺駅から近くで、スーパーも近くにあるので便利です。今回は横浜や都心中心に移動したのですが、どこに行くにも便利です。
お部屋はホテルかと思うくらいクリーンで、清潔なタオルや歯ブラシもあり気持ち良く過ごすことが出来ました。
今度日本に帰って来たときは、またKazuさんとフロちゃんに会いに来ようと思います！
素敵な所を見つけられて本当によかったです。お忙しいのにもかかわらず、ホスピタリティの気持ちいっぱいで迎えてくださいました。素晴らしいホストさんです。

今回初めてのairbnb利用でしたが、素敵な素敵な思い出になりました！
宿泊日数や宿泊人数の変更などご迷惑をおかけしましたが、早急な対応に感謝しています。丁寧なおうちの説明、オレンジ色で統一されたかわいらしい室内、フロさんに受け入れられたときにはとっても感激しました。洗面台やお風呂、キッチンもとっても綺麗にされていて気持ちがよかったです。夜にはホストさんと語りながらのお酒と、手作りのお料理も美味しかったです。タオルはふわふわで、アメニティも多く、フロさんの毛など全く気にならなかったです。
ぜひまた利用させていただきたいです！
大変お世話になりました(^ω^)

This is the first time for me using Airbnb in Japan, I would say it's beyond my expectation a lot. Kazuhiro deserved to be a super host of Airbnb!
such a nice Japanese host, we have talked about many things together, he's also cooked a meal for me and offer me drinks :) Thank you very much!
What I can say is don't hesitate to book his place for your trip to Tokyo.

F.Y.I. - his cat, Fro chan is so cute even she is 18 years old. She is a kind and quiet cat so don't worry about this.

I will definitely book his place again if I have a trip to Japan.

•最寄り駅から近く、コンビニやスーパヘもすぐ行けます。
•部屋は大きくて清潔でした！
•猫ちゃんはとてもお利口で可愛かったです^ ^
•ホストさんにはとても親切にして頂き、滞在中とても仲良くなれました。
•次東京に来た時はまた必ず利用させて頂きたいと思います^ ^
•The room is very close to the station. Also convenience store and super marker!
•The room is so big and clean.
•The cat was so cute and tame.
• The host always cared about us. He has good personality and very kind.
•l'll surely use this room when I visit Tokyo next time!
Thank you sooooo much:)!!

We stayed with Kazuhiro for 7 nights and it was very pleasant! We arrived late at night on a weekday (almost 1am), and we felt terrible for keeping Kazuhiro up, but he was thrilled to welcome us. Like many other reviews have mentioned, he put a sign out front and it was very helpful. His place is very, very clean. The space we were given was adequate in size, and felt like our own space within his place. You might get a visit every now and then from his cat Fro, but she's usually only interested in chilling by the sink. She was very well behaved. Kazuhiro was very considerate in giving us our privacy, but he was always down to hang out with us if we wanted to. The shower and bathroom were both very accommodating. We really appreciated the care that Kazuhiro took in making sure we were comfortable and communicating with us.

We stayed with Kazuhiro for 7 nights and it was very pleasant! We arrived late at night on a weekday (almost 1am), and we felt terrible for keeping Kazuhiro up, but he was thrilled to welcome us. Like many other reviews have mentioned, he put a sign out front and it was very helpful. His place is very, very clean. The space we were given was adequate in size, and felt like our own space within his place. You might get a visit every now and then from his cat Fro, but she's usually only interested in chilling by the sink. She was very well behaved. Kazuhiro was very considerate in giving us our privacy, but he was always down to hang out with us if we wanted to. The shower and bathroom were both very accommodating. We really appreciated the care that Kazuhiro took in making sure we were comfortable and communicating with us.

The house is same with pictures on the web. Near Yutenji station. East 2 exit,5 minutes walk to house. Near Shibuya and Shinjuku station. It is far to Narita station. It is near Haneda station.The landlord is nice and warmhearted. We had dumplings dinner with host owner. And good advices to visit the city. It is good experience in Tokyo to live here.

We had the best time in Tokyo! Kazuhiro gave us a great experience. His house was amazing and he provided us with everything we needed including toothbrushes. His house is located just a few minutes walk from the metro which was really good! He gave us food and drinks and was a great host! We would highly recommend him!

it was my first time to Tokyo, i was so lucky to spend days here!
i like the room so much, it is so cute.
the host Kazuhiro is very kind & passionate. we had great talking and he gave me all the help. and Fro is also a good company in the house! i really like her.
hope i would have chance to visit again!
thank you for everything.

I had a great time staying at Kazuhiro's place. His place is closed to Yutenji station. Fro (his cat) is very adorable and well-behaved cat. Although he has a pet at home, his place is clean and very organised. Kazu is very funny and kind host. We enjoyed talking to him. I would recommend people who wanted to visit Tokyo to stay at his place.

kazuhiroさんのお部屋は、日当たりが良く心地良さを追求したとても趣味が良い、洗練されたお宅でした。
フンワリとしたバスタオルとシーツも白で統一して、トイレもお掃除が行き届いていて、とても清潔でした。
オシャレで美味しいレストランも近くにありますし、スーパーや駅にもアクセスが良い立地です。
なによりkazuhiroさんの笑顔と優しくフレンドリーなおもてなしに、とても感激いたしました。
他のゲストさんたちの高評価に納得の素晴らしいホスト＆お部屋です。
Mr. Kazuhiro is  very nice and kind.And the house is very nice too,we very enjoy it.

短い滞在でしたが、お世話になりました✨タオルやシーツなどとても清潔で、お部屋もおしゃれで感動しました！！
スピーカーも利用させて頂き、朝から優雅にクラシックを聞いておりました♫
またゆっくりできる機会に利用させて頂きたいです(^ ^)

完全推荐Kazuhiro的房子！位于非常宁静的住宅区域，同时去往东京和周边的任何地方都非常方便。房子很干净，厕所卫浴用起来也很自在。房东非常有sence，爱好也很广泛，在家里有好的音乐、好的酒，还会邀请他的朋友吃晚餐，我认为这是非常好的接触更多朋友的机会。总之，我非常享受在Kazuhiro先生家的一周！
The community is quilt and lovely at the same time is conveniently connected to everywhere you want to go. The house is clean and just feel free using the public area such as the toilet and the bathroom. Most importantly, Mr. Kazuhiro is so nice and have a really good sense. I totally enjoyed the music, the alcohol and the party! Thanks to him and his friends, I had a really good time staying Tokyo. I would definitely choose this place again the next time!

The house is 3-minute walk from Yutenji Station, a small station on the Toyoko line. It's about 1 hour from Haneda Airport via public transport.

We didn't have difficulties to find the house as Kazuhiro set up a nice small blackboard with our names on it in the front of the house. The house is quite despite next to the railways.

Kazuhiro is very nice person. He gave us good advice about Tokyo. He walked us to Naka Meguro station and introduced to us what each restaurant/store nearby is.

The cat, Fro, was sick and was in the pet hospital until the last day we stayed there, so we didn't have too much interactions with her. She is a quite and friendly. Sometimes she sneaked into our room without being noticed :)

The overall experience is fantastic!

Mr. Kazuhiro's place was really pleasant.. he is a really great host, there's a really homely feel to his place.. flo the cat is really cute too.. close to the train station only 4 to 5 mins walk.. highly recommend.. I will definitely be back when I get back to Tokyo!! Again thank you for your hospitality Mr. Kazuhiro!!

何回もまた行きたくなるところです
次もお邪魔させてください！

Kazuhiro-san deserves the superhost title 110%. If you're willing to spend some time to get to know him, you will find a very interesting (and smart!) individual whom you'd want to keep in touch with :) he's very generous with sharing food and stories. The location of this place is prime (Shibuya/Harajuku at your fingertips) but also has a great neighborhood feel. The house itself is great in design and also kept clean. Everything is easy and you'll be glad you chose this place!

Mr.Kazuhiro He is a Japanese who loves to laugh.He will go to work on Monday to Friday.
He will stay at home Saturday and Sunday.
His cooking is excellent.
He will do Japanese and Western cuisine.
I have eaten his cheese cake, pasta, Buckwheat Noodles , Hand-Pressed sushi , and Japanese stew.
All are delicious.
Restaurant level.
We sometimes have dinner together on Friday and Saturday nights.

Kazuhiro is an excellent host. He, his cat Fro, and his home were very welcoming. His home is clean and spacious (he also has a great toilet and bath!). Kazuhiro's place is a 30 minute drive from Haneda Airport, but is also easily accessible via public transport. His home is tucked away in a quiet residential neighbourhood. I would absolutely stay again.

房东是一个很棒的人。
养了只安静可爱的猫。
做的一手好菜。
会邀请你一起品尝他的好酒。

今回は2回目の滞在でした。
4日間、本当に心地よく過ごす事ができました。
ホストの優しいお人柄とあたたかいおもてなしに、一緒に滞在した友人共々感激いたしました。
清潔でセンス良い空間で、かなりオススメです。

Kazuhiro is a great host, he has a really really nice house, and it's so clean that we couldn't imagine it's a house with a cat. And the first day we arrived, there was a wine party in Kazuhiro's house as he told a month before. I believe it was my nearest time to the artists. They all really kind, interesting and sincere, they tried hard to understand my poor English. Kazuhiro cooked a lot kind of food, we tasted Japanese, French, Chinese and American food that night. We feelt really pity that we miss the Indian food.
The cat Fro is quiet and trained. The next morning we got up late and took turns to bathe, Fro wanted to drink water and just stand outside the door quietly waiting.
It's really easy to arrive at Kazuhiro's house from Yutenji station(祐天寺）,about 5 minutes work.
Hope we can live in Kazuhiro's house again next time we come to Tokyo.
He was a awesome host. Cats are very cute! Clean and nice house with a great location!!!!!!

今回2回目の宿泊でした、大変お世話になりました！
前回初めてこちらに宿泊したとき、居心地が良すぎて出かけるよりずっとおうちにいたいなという気持ちになったので、今回は一泊と短い時間ではありましたが、ほぼおうちにいました。相変わらずお部屋もインテリアもすてきで、水回りもとーっても綺麗で、使うたび気持ちがいいし、洗いたてのシーツはきれいに畳まれていてゲストを迎えるホストさんの心意気がみてとれます。連れとの宿泊でおうちでグダグダしていたわけですが、初日は夕方から夜0時までお喋りに花が咲いていました。お相手ありがとうございました！
あと、フロさんと新しいお友達ルーさんもとても愛らしかったです。またお邪魔させてください＼(^o^)／

Modern house with new
Tech n cute cat!

It was so nice staying with Kazuhiro-san.  I arrived early in the morning but he was very kind and allow me to check in early. The house is well designed, equipped with cool appliances. The Yutenji train station is within walking distance (note, this station is not run by the Tokyo metro or TOEI so the one day pass is not accepted). Plus, if you love cats, Loo is a good playmate.

Wonderful and memorable! This is the type of stay that makes your travels in Japan even more exciting and special. First, Kazuhiro-san is awesome! He is friendly, hospitable, and loves to have conversation. But he also gives you a lot of privacy. Yutenji is also a really great location. You can walk to Shibuya and Naka-Meguro. The neighborhood has great grocery stores, coffee shops, and restaurants. Even though it's not as busy or expensive as Shimokitazawa or Shibuya, it still feels centrally located. The house itself is really cool. It's very modern and super clean. Even though the listing is a shared space, it still felt very private and comfortable. I highly recommend a stay. One of my favorite AirBnB experiences!
快適なマットレスでぐっすり眠れます☆

It was so lucky to book this house and the host is very friendly and treated us very generously and kindly. The location is easy to find and the house is very comfortable. We love Kazuhiro's cooking and he looked much younger than his exact age. We highly recommend his place and will come back next time.
It was great and Kazuhiro is a fantastic host
Nice and cozy house. Host is willing to help in planning your trip in Japan. Recommended!
Very friendly owner

Kazuhiro was a great host. He was very friendly and the place was like he described. His directions were easy to follow and the location is about 5 mins train ride from Shibuya. On the first day Kazuhiro showed me one of the local parks where the cherry blossoms and invited me to join him and his friends for a picnic there. Other days we had a few drinks with him during dinner and he was very helpful, answering our questions and helping us plan our days in Tokyo. I would highly recommend staying with him!!
It is an experience to make friends more than to get a house to stay .We eat,drink,talk and watch video together! It is really a wonderful night we spent together!

今回は3回目の滞在です。
今まで使っていたお布団のフンワリ感がなくなってきたということで、イタリア製のすごく寝心地が良いマットレスを用意してありました。ますます寛げる空間になっていました。いつもゲストの気持ちになって考えてくれるホストさんです。
本当にオススメのお部屋です。

Kazuhiro宅は最高です！美味しいワインにサラミ、すてきなスピーカーでいつもの音楽をいつも以上に楽しめて、おしゃべりは尽きません
AppTVでそれぞれのお気に入りの映像を検索して、みて、また飲む、しゃべる。いつまでも寛いでいたくなりました。Thank you for your fantastic hosting!!

Kazuhiro's house is quiet and clean! About 6mins walk to 中目黑 train station! He also is a nice host and good cook, always shares his beer and cook delicious food for you. If you have any questions about Japan can ask help for him, he can help you patiently and quickly.

Its really a good experience to live at Hiro san's house!
It's a coney,comfortable and convenient place.And Hiro san is very nice, he told us where to find delicious Restaurant and how to go!
By the way, he cooks very well,we had a wonderful night-snacks that day!
We are starting to miss Hiro san,Nuby and Roux~
Definitely we would live there again next time!
Recommend to everyone who want to do traveling in Tokyo.

This was my 2nd time staying at kazuhiro san's place. So I'm not gonna go into details as much on how awesome his place was, the spotless cleanliness, the superb location, the convenience you could hardly find with such reasonable price.
Kazuhiro san will sure provide anything you need for your stay.
And yes ..Kazuhiro san's place has become my number one choice of stay whenever I visit Tokyo.
.
.
2度目の利用でした。便利かつ安心感のある旅行先の滞在ではなく、友人の家に泊まりに行ったようで快適に過ごすことができました。
今回4泊しましたが、のんびりできるもんですからまだ居られるなあ・・と思いながらのチェックアウト（涙）😿という。今までの旅行では考えられないゆっくりとした時間を過ごせました。是非またお世話になりたいと思います。

Kazuhiro is an *amazing* host!  He went above and beyond to make sure that we were consistently comfortable and well-fed, despite our complete inability to speak Japanese and his struggling a little with English.  His house is in a nice, safe area, and it was a very pleasant place to stay.  Highly recommended!

Kazuhiro is een fantastische man. Heel aardig en grappig. Zijn huis is schoon, het bed is prima, hij houdt van zijn kat en hij houdt ervan om een drankje met je te doen, of om diner met je te hebben als hij daar tijd voor heeft.
Zijn Engels is niet goed, maar hij doet zijn best om het beste gezelschap te zijn voor je en om leuke avonden te hebben. Roux is zijn alles, en dat is mooi om te zien.
Yutenji is overigens een rustige 'historisch' buurt. Een ontsnapping van het drukke Tokyo centrum. Vanaf Shibuya 3 haltes met de Toyoko line. Makkelijk te vinden vanaf het station. 7-Eleven is op de hoek van het station, dus daar kan he Wi-Fi gebruiken om te zien waar je heen moet lopen.
Kortom: super host, energieke schattige kat, en een schoon fijn huis.

今回は4回目滞在です。
新しく飼われた可愛い猫ちゃんがお出迎えしてくれて癒されました。
ホストさんは多忙の中、相変わらずのおもてなしで心地よく過ごすことができました。
毎回こちらでステイできて良かったと思います。

"Fro Restaurant" is a five star restaurant in Tokyo (★★★★★) that you must not miss. Its location is very convenient that you can get there from everywhere in Tokyo. The chief of the restaurant Mr. Kazuhiro is a professional cook, even he study cooking by himself (XDDD). And there is only one waitress named Roux. She is a cute, sweet, beautiful girl. She is always friendly, you can play with her every time. Nobody knows the menu of the restaurant , it's only in the chief's mind,you will never know what's next, but an unchangeable thing is they are all very delicious. Mr.Kazuhiro's menu includes the worldwide dishes, he likes French food best (maybe) . Isn't it the sufficient reason for you to choose "Fro Restaurant"?
XDDDD
Just kidding ,Kazuhiro is a gentle, nice, thoughtful man who like to share delicious food that he cooked with you. His cat Roux, just as I said, is cute and energetic. She is very interesting, you will like her.
I'm happy to be with them these two days , next time maybe I should make some Chinese food to be an exchange. XDDD
Thank you for everything.

Super Host
Super Location
Super House
Highly recommend!!!!!!

Kazu is such a great host, my friend and I we stayed 4 nights at his apartment,
we are so happy to have met him, he is so kind, we did a sushi/temaki night at his place with his Japanese friends that could talk a bit of french ! We even drank wine, champagne (and ate cheese!) with him. He taught us a few words in Japanese haha. His place is very clean, tidy and comfortable, you really feel like home, and the apartment is very well located in a peaceful neighborhood, only 3 stations from Shibuya. Also, he has a super cute cat, Roux ! The perfect Airbnb experience. I definitely recommend to stay at Kazuhiro's !

Great host and apartment!  Kazuhiro is super friendly and respectful host. There is a friendly, cute and very playful kitten.  The futon is on a tatami in the living room but Kazuhiro works so much that he's often not there or downstairs so it has a private feel.  And if he is around he's either cooking or drinking which he always generously offered to share.  The location is close to the metro which is one or two stops from shibuya and shinjuku without a transfer.  With a transfer it's easy to get to more central Tokyo as well.

It is my fist time to visit Japan. Can't imagine how lucky am I that I could pick the ideal place during my stay. ;)
The place is quiet, cozy and tidy. Kazuhiro-San is very thoughtful and considerate man. He will share his suggestions when I got the problem for catering and site seeing. And his lovely cat, Roux, she is a lovely and active cat. You won't feel bored with her accompany in the house.
I would highly recommend the place of Kazuhiro-san, especially who are looking for the shared room with warm and friendly atmosphere.
Kazuhiro est quelqu'un de très gentil ! Il cuisine très bien. Nous avons eu un bon accueil, aimable et chaleureux.
また行きます！！

いつも、親切にしていただき、ありがとうございます。
毎回、ステキな滞在ができて、友人共々感謝しています。
Best airbnb host ever. Very beautiful and clean house with cute cats. Located close to the train station!

Kazuhiro is an excellent host and cook. He's really friendly and would often sit with you for a meal , a snack or a drink and talk to you. He cooks really good food and is so willing to share it.
Kazuhiro's place is about 5 minutes walk from Yutenji station and its in a quiet residential area with a supermarket just right below the station. The place is clean and he has 3 cats living there, 2 of which were kittens. Highly recommend this place.
As always, Kazu is one of the coolest, kindest, and most wonderful Tokyo hosts around. I highly recommend a stay at his wonderful apartment. It's always clean, comfortable, and a joy to stay.
２泊だけの滞在でしたが、とても居心地がよく充実した時間を過ごせました。改めて、かずひろさんありがとうございました。

出張者用に予約させていただきました！
丁寧な対応ありがとうございました。

I would highly recommend Kazuhiro's place, he was extremely kind and understanding. The location was great and the place was really neat and tidy. It made my trip 10 times better and made it much harder to leave Japan! I would definitely stay here again. Roux (his cat) was especially cute!

Kazuhiro has been a great host and we had a wonderful stay at his house. :)
He was always friendly and helped us, when we had questions about anything. his house is also very nice and offers you everything you need. It did not take long for us to feel at home. :)
He even made a japanese dinner for us, which was totally delicious. ^.^
His cats are wonderful and cute and we had a ton of fun playing with them. :)
All in all we can absolutely recommend his accommodation to anyone who wants to expierience a wonderful stay in Tokyo!
Thanks a lot and hopefully see you again soon! :)

Kazuhiro-san’s place is as modern as it gets for a Japanese home! It was extremely lovely to stay here along with his 2 cats, Roux and Kuro. I had a lot of fun interacting with himself and his friends who he invited over for a Curry Party when I was here :) The facilities here are splendid and Kazuhiro-san really does love his wine! If you happen to like drinking, you can join him for a drink and have a nice chat with him! I would definitely want to return on my next trip to Japan as it was just an overall really fantastic experience!
房子到地铁站步行3分钟左右，但是注意地铁要坐(各站停车)，急行的会坐过站。房东是一个很有生活情趣的IT 业从事者。你们可以一起看宫崎骏，听音乐，撸猫，讨论PHP😂。想体验东京都市生活的小伙伴们，请不要错过这个房源。

美味しいワインと楽しいお会話で、今回もすごく満足いたしました。
ネコちゃんも人懐こくてとってもかわいいです。
また、よろしくお願いいたします。

Kazuhiro-san’s place is at a convenient location: a close walk from a local metro that is only a few stops away from Shibuya. And by the metro are convenience stores like 7 Eleven and Family Mart. His place is clean and well-prepared for guests. You will be greeted by him and his two adorable cats when you check in. His English isn’t the best, but communication was manageable. He is kind and thoughtful- he always asked what I did and how my day was and offered a home cooked meal. The sleeping space is what I wanted in Japan: a futon with nice cozy blankets. The bathroom with toilet is clean, as well as the bathroom with sink/shower room, all stacked with towels for you to use. I mostly was out during the day during my stay so I really only used the place for showers and sleeping, occasionally just to chill. In the spare moments indoors, I was able to use AppleTV to mirror my iPhone screen (with his permission) and watch some dramas or listen to music. Overall, I enjoyed my stay and would love to come back if I return to Tokyo.
Het was erg leuk om bij Kazuhiro te verblijven. Hij heeft een erg mooi appartement, twee metrostops van Shibuya af. Hij is erg vriendelijk en flexibel!

またまた、素晴らしいおもてなしをしていただきました。
良い思い出になりました。
ありがとうございます^ ^

Kazuhiro is so hospitable and wonderful!  Our flight was extremely delayed and we ended up getting to kazuhiro’s place at 11pm, 5 hours later than originally planned.  There was a hand drawn sign outside that welcomed us in and even though we were so late, Kazuhiro had waited to have dinner so that we could all eat together.  He has two adorable cats that are very friendly and cuddly and a beautiful home.  Highly recommend ◡̈

Beautiful house close to Yutenji station in a residential area with grocery stores nearby.  Two playful cats roam freely during the day but sleep in their own space at night.  Kazuhiro was a great host and my friend and I had a blast having snacks and drinks (he's a big fan of French reds) with him the night before we left.  We look forward to staying there again.
日本への始めの旅なんですが、とてもいい思い出が残りました。目黒の景色が綺麗で、交通も便利だし、ここでの宿泊はおすすめです。

It’s a quiet and local area where the house located, the living is fine and so with the host do me the kindness. The only thing you need to take care is about the transportation, it’s 4 minutes walk from the nearest station, but remember don’t miss it.
房东是一个特别有生活情调的人，他的房子有很多酒，很多调料，很多音乐和两只可爱的猫咪，会做各式料理，虽然语言不同，但美食美酒与音乐让沟通非常愉快。
房子地點離祐天寺站很近,車站旁邊有2家超市,生活機能方便,寢室在2樓,廚房旁邊,かずひろさん是個很享受生活的人,有很多聚會,所以不常在家,水槽會堆一堆待洗的碗,而且2樓沒有微波爐,但有兩隻可愛的貓咪陪伴,一點都不寂寞,主人之前是個廚師,對料理拿手,會招待吃一頓美味的晚餐,有需要在亞馬遜馬東西的時候,也可以請他幫忙

Kazuhiro San is a nice guys,and there cats is pretty cute,when you get up in the morning ,they will behind you in your bed and call you wake up XD .
Is very cool experience live with cats.
So when you like cats,you must come here to live,and you will like it.
Kazuhiro San is more passion ,he will tell you ,how should you go to his accommodation,and he cooks well .
Take a rest in here ,you will feel home sweet home. Very support Kazuhiro San house. I give five stars you must to go here to live .😉
离开佑天寺站很近，但屋里很安静；Kazuhiro先生和助理小姐都很有趣，提供了很多东京风土人情的信息；Kazuhiro先生有专业的灶台和烹饪技术，性格也十分可爱！两只猫咪也随主人太可爱了！
非常感谢Kazuhiro 这些天的关照，给我分享他的酒，还有我最爱看的AKIRA ，两只猫非常可爱 ，很愉快的度过了在东京的最后一个星期。
Kazuhiro san is one of the most amazing host I've met. Nice and friendly. His cats are also very friendly and playful. Thank you so much Kazuhiro! Hope to be back someday! Have a curry day :)

いつもお世話になってますっ！
今回の滞在も大変いい時間になりました。
ありがとうございました(^ω^)
最初の方は観光目的として利用させていただいていましたが、こちらのリピーターになっていくにつれておうちに泊まってのんびり猫のルゥさんとクロさんと戯れたり、ホストさんとの会話や食事を楽しむことが目的になっていきました☆
お部屋はいつも快適な温度だし、洗面台もいつもピカピカだし、聞いたことのない新鮮な会話で刺激を受けています。
ほぼおうちに引きこもっていた今回の滞在ですが、たくさん相手をしてもらって嬉しかったです。
「おかえり」「ただいま」が嬉しい場所です。

체크인이 조금 늦어 불편했지만
집에 도착한 순간부터 반갑게 맞아주신 두분과 예쁜 고양이들 때문에 불편한 기억은 잊혀졌습니다. 머무는 공간과 쉐어하는 주방이 함께 있어 불편할 것 같았지만 게스트를 정말 많이 배려해주셔서 함께 식탁에 앉아 이야기를 나눌때 빼고는 거의 혼자 지냈던 것 같아요.
유텐지 역에서 걸어서 6분정도 이며 찾아가기 정말 쉽고, 다이칸야마까지는 조용한 동네 산책하는 기분으로 걸을 수 있어 정말 좋았습니다
친척 집에 놀러온 것 처럼 정말 편안했던 공간입니다. 도쿄에 매년 방문하는데 앞으론 두분의 공간에서 머물 예정입니다
Very nice experience! Totally recommend!
Kazuhiro and his cats are nice it was a short stay but i enjoyed it. I will come back again! He is very friendly and the place is clean and easy to get.
카즈히로상이 무척 친절하시고 고양이도 너무 귀엽습니다. 역으로부터 그렇게 멀지 않은 거리에 무척 시설이 좋아서 편하게 보낼 수 있었습니다

This is my second time to stay in Kazuhiro's house.Kazuhiro san is still very friendly as last time. Even though the cat roux escape from the house by big mistake, because I forget to lock the door inside,Kazuhiro show his magnanimous personality. Sorry for my mistake!
We have a wonderful "Jazz club" night in Kazuhiro san's house.Drink some white wine and eat delicious cheese.Thanks for all!
The traffic there is very convenient, with the station 天佑寺 beside, you can go to every hit place in tokyo such as 六本木,涉谷 in less than 30 minutes.If you need, Kazuhiro will recommend you good restaurant.
So highly recommend this place, it's cozy,convenient,adorable.You will have great memories here!
Thanks for everything Kazuhiro san and his beautiful friendly assistant did for us. See you next time.
Came here for the second time on our trip. We call it our „Tokyo home“ because it feels like it. Still totally recommend to everyone.

Super clean and the bed/futon is wicked comfortable.  2 cats/kittens are friendly too.  Yutenji definitely got a local feel while being walking distance to Nakameguro & Gakugeidaigaku.  Definitely coming back!

Kazuhiro’s place was so wonderful, and the perfect spot if you want to be close to Shibuya and central Tokyo but in a quiet neighbourhood street. It’s just a short walk from the train station and the architecture on the walk is just beautiful. The cats were so adorable and friendly, and we were absolutely blown away by how hospitable the space was. There’s also an amazing vintage clothing store and bar on the way to the station! Next time we’re in Shibuya we will definitely stay at Kazuhiros place!

今回、初めてのエアビーでしたが、とても、よかったです☺️
色々と勉強になった部分も多く、また、暖かく迎えいれてくれ、すごく楽しく過ごさせていただきました！
友だちとまた、必ず泊まりに行こうねと約束をして帰路についたぐらい、良い宿でした(°▽°)
最高のおもてなしと楽しい時間、ニャンコちゃん、色々とありがとうございました🎀
Kazuhiroさんはとても親切な人です。猫もかわいいです。ご飯をつくくれて、ありがとうございます。今度の泊めることはとてもいい経験です。また機会があったら、絶対に行きますよ。(猫もすごくかわいいです)

Kazuhiro's home in Yutenji is a lovely hidden gem.
My partner and I stayed for 3 nights and on our last night he had a dinner party with us where he cooked the most divine vegetarian french style food. A total suprise and very muchly appreciated.
His home is easy to find and in a really charming area.
Close to the train station and grocery stores. An easy walk to naka megro and some very trendy shops. Onibus coffee is excellent.
Roux the cat is beautiful and very playful.
Heated toilet seat was heaven.
We arrived rather late after our flight and Kazuhiros friend waited up for us.
We highly recommend Kazuhiros home.

Kazuhiro san is a super friendly host. He helps me a lot during my stay and even invited me to join the party and have dinner together. I am really appreciate to Kazuhiro sam and what he did for me as a guest during my stay. Besides, his house is cozy and I feel comfortable during my stay. His cats are so cute and also friendly to guests. I will definitely stay in Kazuhiro san’s house again when I travel Tokyo next time.

호스트와 같이 지내지만 층이 분리되어 있어서 크게 불편하지 않았습니다. 또 제가 지낼 때는 주말에 파티도 있어서 kazuhiro의 멋진 요리와 맛있는 와인도 먹었었어요ㅠㅠ 그 때 먹은 요리가 진짜 도쿄1주일 동안의 인생 음식.
한 번 지내보니까 왜 슈퍼호스트인지 알겠더라구요. 만약에 체크인을 빨리해야 한다거나, 혼자만의 조용한 공간을 원하거나, 시부야나 신주쿠에 가까운 숙소를 원한다면 좀 불편할 수도 있을 거예요. 그렇지만 유텐지는 유텐지만의 도쿄스러운 감성이 녹아 있어서 완전 추천해요. 근처에 맛있는 레스토랑도 많고, 편의점이나 마트도 있어서 정말 좋더라구요.
추천쓰—-!!

Kazuhiro is a great host.
Very available to answer questions before and during our stay.
The bath (like a private onsen) was ready for us when we arrived at his place:)
His two cats love playing but are very nice. (If you like cats:))
The house is close to metro (5min by walk) and in a very calm neighborhood. You could reach Shibuya in less than 10min by metro!
We highly recommend this place to visit Tokyo!

Great hospitality and really enjoyed my stay at Kazuhiro San's place.
Highly recommended!

Kazuhiro is an awesome host. He s very respectful of your privacy (also very busy!) but at the same time he's always there to welcome you and help and offer you amazing food. We even had a dinner party with a friend of mine!! He is so very kind and warm, and his house is absolutely amazing, design in every corner, amazing amenities, and awesome all around. The neighborhood is also beautifully quiet and the 3 min walk to Yutenji station is priceless. Can't miss it! Thanks so so much.

It was a great pleasure staying at Kazuhiro’s place.
Kazuhiro and Nobue were amazing hosts and both the apartment and the location were ideal for our stay.
Many thanks for your warm welcome and for the wonderful evening/dinner with your awesome friends.
We had a really memorable stay here and would absolutely recommend it to anyone!
非常有趣的房屋，有非常可爱的猫，很棒的体验
This Airbnb was in a nice quiet little city that offered convenient access to the local train station. Kazuhiro was quick to reply and gave excellent directions.

I am very happy that I can live in his home for four days! Every night I received warm welcome from the hosts. Their food was really good! They also have many wine, although I can not drink, but if you like to drink, you will be very surprised. We had dinner and a wonderful movie night together. The host is very good in English. Please don't worry about language problems. I'm very happy to chat with them! I live in an upstairs while host living in downstairs, which gives me a very large private space. Also approximately 4 minutes walk from the subway station, direct access to Shibuya and Daikanyama made my shopping very convenient. Soooooo wonderful, I have already started looking forward to meeting you guys next time!

My stay at Kazuhiro san’s place was extraordinary. It was even better than I expected. He showed great hospitality through out my stay and even treated me to a nice home-made sushi dinner the first night I arrived. Kazuhiro san sincerely up hold to his title as a super host. His two cats, Kuro and Ru, are really cute and mischievous. If you are a cat lover, his place is a plus. Free unlimited Wi-Fi at the place. Washing and drying machine for guests to do laundry. Kitchen stove, pots and pans for guests to use. Separate toilet and shower room. Nice TV in the living room for guests to watch movies and listen to music from Amazon Prime and Apple TV. The house is in a nice and quiet neighborhood with two supermarkets within a five-minute walking distance. Also, tons of nice fancy cafes and restaurants near the JR station from Kazuhiro san’s house, which is also five-minute walk away. I had a great stay and would reserve at Kazuhiro san’s place again next time I am in Tokyo.
屋主人很親切，有可愛的兩隻小貓咪，住起來很舒適，推薦喜歡貓的人來住住

Kazuhiro tiene una vivienda espectacular! muy cómoda y confortable. Tiene dos bonitos y dulces gatos. Muy recomendable!! Es muy hospitalario y atento. Mi amiga y yo estamos muy contentas de haberlo conocido.

Write a public review
Tell future travelers about what they can expect at Kazuhiro’s place.
房主很热情，猫猫很可爱，很适合爱猫人士入住。和房主一起吃饭、喝啤酒乐趣很多。下次来东京会选择再次入住！
主人kazuhiro真的超级棒，助手小姐姐声音好温柔，住的地方交通吃东西很棒，下次去东京还会来的，猫猫会叫汪汪的叫超级萌，有很多东西弄错了，很感谢主人的原谅，推荐推荐大家吼

Es una casa estupenda, en un barrio muy tranquilo, acogedor, y bien conectado. Ellos son estupendos, muy atentos y divertidos; cenamos juntos varios días y pasamos buenos ratos. Los gatos también son estupendos. Muy recomendable

Kazuhiro and Nobue are truly delightful and generous hosts. They offer an authentic and cosy place near the heart of Tokyo, and made us feel at home. They are also very interested in interacting and having conversations with guests over drinks and home-cooked food. Their 2 beloved cats are also very people-friendly and curious.
They made our stay in Tokyo very memorable. We hope to be back again someday!
K & G.
祐天寺の閑静な住宅地。猫ちゃんと共に過ごせる豊かな時間。広々して清潔な室内にはハイレベルなオーディオとビジュアルも。ホストの方の懇切丁寧なご説明と現地でのおもてなしには感動する他ありません。単なる滞在体験を超えた時間を楽しませて頂きました。

もうすっかり第二のおうちになっております、お世話になりました！
クロさんとルゥさんが覚えててくれて、前より近寄ってきてくれて嬉しかったです(^ω^)
ノビーさんと一緒に人生相談にものってもらいました。良い刺激をたくさん受けてわくわくして帰りました＼(^o^)／
怪しいパーティに行ったり、何時間もかけてホストさんが作ったカレーを食べたり、今回もとってもいい時間を過ごせました。
またお邪魔させてくださいね(^ω^)
いつもながら快適なチェックイン、ステキなおもてなし、心地よい住空間、そして可愛いネコちゃん。東京滞在のオアシスですね、またお邪魔させて頂きます。

Our stay at Kazuhiro’s place was an exceptional first-time-in-Japan experience for me and my fiancé.
1. LOCATION: The house is in a great neighborhood... Meguro is just a few train stops away from all the action Tokyo has to offer (Shibuya, Shinjuku, Harajuku, etc). Even though there is a great train station within a 7 minute walk, out of enjoyment we often took the walk to the second nearest spot (Naka-Meguro). Such great restaraunts, cafes and shops are walkable from this Airbnb!
2. SPACE: As for the house, it has great amenities and is very well kept. Privacy was never an issue, despite sharing the kitchen with the hosts (they always knock!).
3: HOSTS: As for the hosts, we couldn’t have had a more pleasant experience. We agreed to a dinner party Saturday with the hosts and their friends and had a rad time. We enjoyed great food and company. Throughout our entire stay the hosts were attentive to our needs, gave us plenty of privacy, and were available to answer any questions.
4. AMENITIES: comfortable beds and shower/bath, hairdryer, and laundry machine were available!
BONUS: two adorable and friendly cats.

We had an excellent experience staying at Kazuhiro’s place. It is in a lovely and quiet area with lots of good coffee shops and small restaurants nearby.  It is easy to access other areas of Tokyo from nearby Yutenji station. Kazuhiro made us a delicious dinner while there and we had some drinks together on another night - a fantastic host. The beds are comfortable and the space is private. And the cats are great fun! We recommend Kazuhiro’s to all.
Great place to stay at. Hosts are very thoughtful and friendly.  We will stay in touch a friends
暖かいおもてなしをうけました。第2の我が家ができたようです。

The place is cozy and clean, with a caring, sociable host and two precious cats which are pretty curious but tidy and polite. Everything you need will promptly provided. Totally comfortable bed! Perfect for cat lovers.

This is my second time to stay in Kazuhiro san’s house. He and Nobue san are so friendly like last time I stayed. We have hotpot for dinner together and have nice chats. I feel so happy to stay in Kazuhiro san’s house and hope to stay in the house again in the future.

la casa è su due piani in un tranquillo quartiere, a pochi minuti a piedi dalla stazione metro che porta in tre fermate a Shibuya. Il vostro letto si trova al piano superiore, nel soggiorno. I padroni di casa sono estremamente riservati e rispettosi, per cui il fatto di stare nel soggiorno non costituisce mai un problema. Loro sono persone estremamente ospitali, molto gentili e faranno di tutto per rendere il vostro soggiorno a Tokyo, un'esperienza da ricordare

Un logement atypique et très propre, surtout Kazuhiro et Noby sont exceptionnellement gentils, j'ai passé un séjour très agréable !
カズヒロさんとノビーさんのおかけで、今回の滞在がとても特別なものになりました。美味しいゴハンとお酒もありがとうございました。清潔さ、快適さ、コストパフォーマンスなどなどいうことナシです。またの機会にも是非お世話になりたいです。

My partner and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Kazuhiro's place. The location was great, close to public transport and near everywhere we wanted to visit in Tokyo. Kazuhiro was a amazing host and on our last night he invited us to have a dinner party with his friends and he cooked us up the best meal of the trip!
Nice location, lovely cats, love it!

I had an excellent time at Kazuhiro's place! It is very close to the station and there are lots of little diners and convenience stores nearby. The upstairs living space is quite big and the bed is really comfortable. On my last day, Kazuhiro and Novii treated me to a traditional Japanese meal at their friend's restaurant. Super grateful for their kindness and hospitality! Not to mention the cats were so cute as well!! Would definitely stay with them again.

Kazuhiro and Novii warmly welcome me. They shared their dinner, so I could have enjoyed various home-made Japanese foods.
If you want to interact with hosts, they will warmly open their mind.
万分感谢Kazuhiro san 和 Novii san近日对我的照顾，因为是一个女生单独来日本旅游，半夜抵达机场Kazuhiro san 和 Novii san亲自开车来机场接到我😘因为是假期，大家每晚在家一起享受美食，美酒，猫咪非常安静，在东京拥有了很多和房东的美好回忆～I will miss u so much！See u in Spring～

Kazuhiro's place is the best Airbnb experience I have ever had. He is very funny and friendly and enjoys cooking delicious meals for guests. The house is very nice and comfortable, and the 2 cats "Roux" and "Kuro" are really cute and hilarious. I would say you NEED to stay here while in Tokyo.

- Very good location near Yutenji station. There're a supermarket which opens until 1 s.m. and convenient stores e.g. 7/11,Family Mart,and Lawson nearby.
- Amenities are good. We can use the kitchen,microwave and washing machine. Towel has changed and washed every day.
- Hosts are very kind and lovely. They're very attentive. The cats, Roux and Kuro also are the lovely hosts also. They are approachable, but not disturbing people. This house is fulfilled with love...suits people who are cat addicted!!!
I literally recommended to stay here. Thank you so much for such a happy moment in Tokyo.

Honestly this is the nicest Airbnb I've ever stayed at. The hosts are quick to respond, kind and very thoughtful. They're happy to talk with you in English or Japanese if you're feeling brave. I cannot recommend staying here enough.
Also the cats are so cute that I want to take them home with me ♥
Kazuhiro and Nobi are the perfect hosts! So nice and welcoming. A perfect example of incredible Japanese hospitality!
좋아유

Our stay with Kazuhiro and Nobue was absolutely amazing. The house is big and spacious, perfectly located in the center of Tokyo. Going to Shibuya only takes 15-20 mins by subway. Kazuhiro and Nobue were helpful and friendly. They even prepared a meal for us and we had so much fun together enjoying some local wine and beer :) their cats are playful and added a special bonus to the hole experience. We highly recommend to stay with Kazuhiro San and Nobue san and we will definitely come back again!!! thanks for the amazing journey!! <3 we miss you two already

Kazuhiro was a great host, and the cats were very friendly, tho I saw them less than I had hoped to. They had a party while we were there and we got to talk to the guests (he made sure it was ok when we booked, of course). They also cooked us breakfast and it was delicious.
I had a great time at Kazuhiro’s place. They were very helpful and showed great hospitalities. The place is exactly what is mentioned.  Highly recommended!!

A beautiful home with 2 adorable cats , welcome by a wonderful host. Will go the extra mile to pick you up. It's nothing but good memories the moment I entered till I checked out.  Recommended to all.

I have stayed at Kazuhiro San home for a week,
and it is a wonderful moment with him and Nobu San and their super lovely cats.
We talk and we share the foods every night in the dining room, Kazuhiro San made delicious meal for me and they always provide me some useful adivce during my stay.
We have party with their friends twice, and their friends are also friendly to me,
we share our life and drink different types of wine on the party,
playing with Roux and Kuro (their lovely cats).
Besides, Kazuhiro San and Nobu San bring me to a "Tonkazu" restaurant,
and thank you for treating me a dinner and next time is my turn to pay.
Thank you for giving me a memorable journey, I definitely will stay at Kazuhiro San home
again when I visit to Tokyo next time.

Kazuhiro's house is so wonderful！
The position of Kazuhiro's house is about 3 mins walk form yutenji metro station, convenient to go to any other places in Tokyo. The house is clean and comfortable.
Kazuhiro & Nobue is so friendly, they invite me to have breakfast together, hang out together at dinner time with fantastic food made by Kazuhiro, great music and also, the yamazaki whisky. It's so nice to meet Kazuhiro & Nobue in this trip.
P.S. kuro & Roux (two cats in the house) are soooooooooo cute!
---
Kazuhiro 桑的房间实在是太棒了！
离地铁祐天寺站 3 分钟路程，三个站就可以到涉谷换乘 JR，去东京任何一个地方都很方便。Kazuhiro 桑和 Nobue 桑都很注重卫生，因此房间收拾得很干净整洁，住着很舒服。
Kazuhiro 桑非常喜欢做饭，手艺超棒！还邀请了我一起吃早餐和晚饭。Kazuhiro 桑家里藏酒很多，看出来是个很喜欢品酒的人，还问我要不要一起尝点，然后我非常不客气地点了最贵的山崎 wwwwwww 然后我们就一边品尝着 Kazuhiro 桑亲手做的美味料理，一边享受着音乐和美酒，一边用混杂着英语和日语的对话谈天说地
P.S. 家里的两只猫 kuro 酱和 ru 酱实在是太太太太太太萌了！在家里的时候一直陪它们玩耍 wwwwwww
