kuzuhiro さんの部屋は素晴らしい！
祐天寺駅から歩いて３分くらい、とても便利な場所。部屋はきれいて快適、泊めるのはすごく気持ちがいい！Kazuhiro さん料理上手！手つくり料理がめちゃ美味い！
クロちゃんとルウちゃんかわいいいいいいい！
超有爱的一个家，两只猫猫很可爱，主人家很健谈，热情好客，晚上会拉上你一起喝酒聊天，家里厨房是个宝藏，如果可以，会亲自下厨招待客人，太喜欢这里了。

Kazuhiro-san and Nobue-san were REALLY amazing hosts. They made us feel so welcomed at home. :D They even cooked soba for us on the first night and held a sashimi party on the last! During dinner, we mentioned that we liked Ghibli movies, they showed us their collection of ghilbli movies and even let us watch some of them!
The house was cozy and had a really good location (just a short walk to the station)! We will really miss all of it, especially the cats!
We had a great time. So friendly and helpful. Their cats are so cute. Highly recommend.
Kazuhiro was an amazing host!! Him and his wife were so kind to us and even cooked us a traditional breakfast our first morning there. He was the best Airbnb host I have ever had!
第一次使用airbnb出行的日本东京之行，房子离地铁很近，房主Kazuhiro和Novii San非常非常热情，第一天到了还做饭给我们吃，帮我们铺床，真的是深刻的感受到了一个国家人民的素质和文化是多么的重要，家里还有两只可爱的小猫哈哈~期待下次可以再见面~

The BEST airbnb we have ever booked! It’s convenient to so many districts like Shinjuku, Meguro. And the cats are cute! If you want to have a wonderful experience in a local house, this is a great choice. Yomi San is an interesting cook. He would do the delicious food for you. And Nobue San is a nice sister~ They even prepared a birthday party for me. Unforgettable time living here.

前回の快適さが忘れられずリピートさせていただきました！
この度も楽しい滞在になりとても感謝しています。
次の機会にもよろしくお願いいたします。

Very nice place good located near to Train station in Meguro. The house is very clean with a modern western style. The hospitality is great and I enjoyed the Japanese breakfast. I can recommend the place and would come here again!
Top stay in Tokyo! Helpful, kind hosts and a great location. We felt at home and hope to return someday!

Kaz&Novie are great hosts.
This place is a living room share but at a good location and also they have lovable two cats!

Kazuhiro went out of his way to make this a wonderful, welcoming experience! The space was spacious, clean, stylish, and exactly as advertised. The location was convenient and close to both a train station and many neat establishments. The host was kind and approachable, and he made sure I felt at home in the space. He taught me a bit about Japanese whiskey, cuisine, and culture, which was a nice bonus. I highly recommend this experience to others!
The house is clear and the hosts are friendly and thoughtful. They can give you good advices to the trips. Also, they have two sweet cats, LuLu and Kuro. You should stay there if you are cat person!

고양이가 귀여워요. 모든 후기에서 고양이가 귀엽다길래 아니 대체 뭐지? 싶었는데 고양이가 귀엽습니다. 쿠로와 루루 ..... 너무 귀여워요
숙소는 사진에서보다 청결하고 호스트와 공간이 확실히 분리되어있습니다.
2층에 침대와 주방이 있어요. (그곳이 머무는 공간)
호스트분께서 주방을 사용하시기 때문에 완전 독립된 숙소는 아니지만 그래도 맛난거 해주시려고 하고 신경써주셔서 좋았습니다.
하루는 아예 제대로 요리를 해주신다고까지 해주셔서 감사히 얻어먹으려고요... ☺️🌷💫

I had great time at kazuhiro's home for three days. Kazuhiro san and novii san are the most friendly and responsible hosts I have ever seen. Novii received me at home early in the afternoon on weekdays, explain to me the use of appliances and door lock. The bathroom is spacious and has everything you need. We communicated smoothly in Japanese and English. They invited me to have dinner with their friends, and everyone was talkative. We talked about travel, food, music, social problems, even political topics. The two cats are not sticky and can play happily together. The location is easy to access and convenient to goto Shibuya or Shinjuku. I would stay here again at next time!
第一次来东京，因为距离我看演唱会的场馆很近选了这家民宿，房东和他的女朋友都是特别好客的人，很喜欢邀请人喝酒吃饭，去的当晚还给我准备了蛋糕作为礼物，和他们聊天特别开心，家里面的两只猫很乖巧，可以随便撸，要是有中国游客来东京可以来这家体验一下

I Had a really good time staying over there, Really good hosts and kind, They showed great hospitality and did more than I thought, I had a good time getting to eat with them and talk, their cats were super adorable, I most definitely recommend staying here. If I have opportunity I would definitely like to stay there again if granted the opportunity. 😊

Kazuhiro & Nobue are extremely sweet and fun hosts! They were conveniently located in a less than five minute walk to the train station which got me everywhere! (Google maps is amazing for helping you navigate the trains FYI).
The place was very clean, and the cats are sooo adorable and friendly! It felt like staying with friends at Kauhiro’s & Nobue’s.
I came back early two nights during my seven day stay and they welcomed me to dinner with friends. Great experience, traveling solo to Tokyo!
非常非常非常好的民宿
房东真的非常热情好客，他会邀请我们一起共享晚餐，也会拿出他的美酒招待我们，最重要的是他们家的猫真的很可爱！

Very clean and conveniently located. Despite being located next to the railway track, it wasn’t that noisy. Lots of convenience stores around the station. The owners live in the same premise with their friendly cats.
非常值得体验的一家民宿，房间很干净整洁，空间很大，老板和老板娘很热情，请我一起和他的朋友共进晚餐，老板的厨艺很棒！做的奶油烤火腿和咖喱猪肉都很好吃！我们一起聊天，龙珠，宫崎骏，一起看天空之城，我度过了最难忘的一个夜晚，明年去东京的话一定还要去这家

Kazuhiro and Novii are very warm and nice people, we had a great time sharing dinner with them. Their cats are so cute, and the house is just what we needed. Very clean and convenient, also the mattresses are really confortable. We recommend
Simply, the best. Makes you feel at home and even shares their life with you by having Breakfasts and dinner with you. They even introduce you to their friends. I couldn’t ask for a better host.
Everything was great, hosts are friendly, had dinner with their friends. Cats are beautiful. Place are clean and the train stop is nearby! I wish them success! Will come back in future

This place is very convenient and easy to go by metro. Kazuhiro-san is a great host with a sparkling clean home and comfy place to live. The cats are super adorable and cat-lovers should not pass up this amazing Airbnb.

レビューが遅くなりすみません。
素晴らしい滞在体験になりました。
お二人の人柄も素晴らしく、猫ちゃんもかわいくて❤️必ずまた泊まりに伺いたいです。
ありがとうございました(^^)

If I could give Kazuhiro and Novii 10 out of 5 I would. This was by far my best Airbnb experience! Way better than I expected. They went out of their way to help me, from when I landed to when I left. They even came with me to shinjuku station to see me off and make sure I am ok. The sweetest, friendliest people I have met. We had a few dinners with delicious food that Kazuhiro and Novii cooked up and socialized with their friends. Of course it is also wonderful to have their cute cats to play with too. They were just so much fun. I will miss them. Will definitely come back to Japan and stay with them again! :)
Super happy staying at Kazuhiro’s place. Adorable cats and yum food kept my stay so heart-warming. Arigato!

Kazuhiro and Novii have an amazing living space for any type of traveler! They made me feel extremely welcome with home cooked meals and even took me out one night when I was tired from exploring and running around Tokyo! I can’t say enough about how convenient the location is to major spots like Shibuta, Shinjuku and Central Tokyo.  Also they have 2 amazing cats, who are playful and very friendly! Very clean, very welcoming and would stay again!

Thank you so much for Kazuhiro san and Nobue san's amazing hospitality. Kazuhiro san's  place is central to all the amenities which makes it so convenient, and his two cats are lovely. Kazuhiro san and Nobue san make my stay feel like home, and I am very delighted to have opportunities to meet and mingle with their friends. What a great way to experience the culture and life of Japanese people. I also really appreciate that Kazuhiro san treated me a delicious sushi dinner and more. Finally, I am grateful that Kazuhiro san drove me to the airport, and Nobue san gave me all the tips I need. My experience of staying with them is so fantastic that I would highly recommend Kazuhiro's place to anyone.

Kazuhiro is a very special person ; he really cares about his quests. We were stuck in the apartment because of the typhoon; he cooked us a big meal with wine & said don’t worry! And that was exactly what we did. I can recommend this place for a 100% : we just had a wonderful time

My stay was comfortable and Kazuhiro and Novii were gracious hosts. My flight was delayed and Kazuhiro and Novii stayed up late to welcome me into their home. Kazuhiro and Novii stayed up to get to know me and to make sure I have everything I need. They even drew me a hot bath which melted away all the stress effects from the long flight. The bath tub is full sized too! What else can I say? The area has lots of food options and it's a short walk to the beautiful Meguro river.
Something that makes this listing stand out are the two lovely and cute cats. They're friendly and like to play. Truly a unique listing for cat lovers.
Leading up to my trip and during my stay Kazuhiro and Novii communicated very well and made themselves available if I needed help. Outstanding hospitality! I will definitely be back.

Kazuhiro is a brilliant host! It was a flying visit but he made me feel very welcome and at home. A quiet area that's no too far from either Tokyo and Yokohama. Would recommend if you want to get away from the busy centres and need somewhere quieter to relax. The house itself was very clean and had everything you could want.
Two cute cats makes me feel great.

My sister and I stayed here for five days, and had a wonderful time! The house is close to the train station, but in a quiet neighborhood— you’d never know you were so close to Shibuya. Kazuhiro was a wonderful host and we had a great dinner together— he even found me allergen-friendly soy sauce! And the cats are super cute :)

Staying at Kazuhiro's place is perfect for anyone wanting a quieter place in Tokyo.  The train station is very close to major shopping areas making travel very convenient, all with the benefit of staying in a quiet neighborhood.  Both Kazuhiro and Nobue went out of their way to make sure I was comfortable and well-fed!  Also, their two cats are adorable!  If you want a comfortable and relaxing stay with awesome hosts, pick this place!

Had the loveliest stay at Kazuhiro and Nobue’s home! They were communicative, sent clear instructions to get to their place, and were extremely hospitable. They cooked us a great dinner one evening and even took us to a jazz club to meet their friends and hear live music. Their home is near the train and in a great location. Added bonus: their cats are so freakin’ cute!!! Would highly recommend staying with them on your next trip to Tokyo.
Very nice people and place and kitties!

This place is in a fantastic location. It is close to a train station and trendy Nakameguro. A walk to Nakameguro means you are close to the best breakfasts in Tokyo.. Tractor and Blue Jam.
The owner is very kind and hospitable. He goes the extra mile.
For us the only issue was that we go to bed very very early.. By early we mean 8pm. In this house your room is big but it includes the kitchen and dinning room. The owner sometimes returns after 8 and cooks. He is keen to share, which is great for those who go to bed later. Having said this the owner recognised this and tried hard to be considerate.
Overall this place, the friendliness of the owner. And its location makes it a great place for those who want to experience a real Japanese home
Kazuhiro is a very kind host. He is so easy to talk and very responsive to any questions. If you are looking for experiencing a local lifestyle, look no further than this!

Kazuhiro san is a great host! He is really nice and friendly and gave us tips about traveling in Tokyo thats really helpful. The room is very clean and comfortable with all the necessary amenities. We really enjoyed our stay!

Great place to stay! Good location, located in a rather quiet neighbourhood in Tokyo. The hosts are very hospitable and warm, and they even cooked us a wholesome dinner on our first night :) Their 2 cats are just adorable, they will pop in and keep you company! Great place for cat lovers :)

Kazuhiro and Novii’s house is easily the best experience that I have had through Airbnb. It is within very easy distance from everything you’d want to see in Tokyo, and only a short 5 minute walk from the local station. More importantly than that, Kazuhiro and Novii were wonderful hosts. Their cats were lovely, and their home is comfortable and stylish. On our first night in, Novii made us tea, shared some snacks that Kazuhiro’s mother had mailed from a different part of Japan, and even cooked us curry. We stayed up late chatting with her and Kazuhiro, and had the best time.

在这里住了旅行的最后4天，也是旅行过程最疲惫、最美妙的4天，这里是个安静的独栋小屋，有一只大方的黑猫和一只比较有脾气的灰猫。房东Kazuhiro邀请我们参加了新年party，介绍日本新年传统习俗，一起给我过了生日。离别时对东京的记忆在买买买之外都是这些生活点滴的美好记忆。谢谢房东的美好～
谢谢阿桂每天和我闹脾气

Mr. Kazuhiro and his three cats is a lovely family. Mr. Kazuhiro is super warm, friendly, and generous. He is always there to help and give you useful advice. He was kind enough to spend extra time and effort to make sukiyaki at midnight the day before I left, because I told him I really wanted to try wagyu beef.
The space is very big compared to previous Airbnbs I've booked in Japan. The room is warm and cozy. Mr. Kazuhiro has prepared everything you might need, from deodorant to hair blower. The showering space is surprisingly big. Traffic is convenient: the house is very close to Yutenji station, where you can get to Shinjuku and Ginza directly. There's a very affordable supermarket near the house that closes at 1am. Although the house is right under the railway, it's surprisingly quiet at night. Kazuhiro's cats are cute and friendly. There's nothing you can complain about. You really can't regret staying at Mr. Kazuhiro' house.

Kazuhiro-san's place is extraordinary! Tucked away in a quiet neighbourhood which is roughly 3 mins away from the train station, me and my partner had an enjoyable yet peaceful stay at Kazuhiro-san's place. Kazuhiro and Novii even whipped up a very delicious Sukiyaki meal one night that all of us really appreciated. Not forgetting about their lovely and beautiful cats, Kuro and Roux, who accompanied us 24/7! Would definitely recommend this place to everyone!

Kazuhiro San and Nobue San are incredible people who love cats and company. Expect a lot of warmth and hospitality. The toilet and bath is squeaky clean and the cats, Roux and Kuro are cute, curious and generally the sweetest cats ever. The house is also located in an insanely convenient location 5 minutes and 10 minutes away from Nakameguro/Daikanyama and Shibuya by train. This was a wonderful experience from start to finish and I'm eager to stay with them once more. ありがとございました!
The place is great & comfortable, easy access to main areas, nice & quiet neighbourhood

最高に楽しく幸せな時間を過ごせました。
猫たちが人懐こく、可愛く、遊べたのも良かったです。
更に、元シェフのホストに作って頂いたご飯は非常にお洒落で、レストランのような見た目と味を毎日楽しみました。ワインも美味しかったです。
それから、家が最高です。
自然素材でできており、玄関を開けた瞬間から良い香りがし、更に音の反響を考えて建てられたそうでとても静かです。
ずっと一人暮らしをしてきたので、暖かいおもてなしに心も満たされています。
Я рекомендую вам этот дом.
Очень добрые люди с милыми котами.
Дом построили специально, чтобы жить тихо и уютно.
Они говорят и по-английски, и по-китайски.
Они готовят вкусные блюды, потому что он раньше был шеф-поваром.
Всё здесь хорошо!!
こういうスタイルの宿泊は、比較的少ないと思うのですが、人の触れ合いを感じることのできるとても貴重な経験になりました。オーナーのお人柄がその対応によく現れていて、居心地満点でした。また，次回も是非，お願いしたいです。

初めての利用でしたが、とても快適に過ごせました。場所も駅から近く、ネコも可愛いかったです。
また利用したいと思います。
I had a very comfortable and wonderful day
The cat was also very cute
I will make a reservation again I am looking forward to the day

渋谷まで電車で20分、最寄りの祐天寺駅まで5分、コンビニまで3分、美味しいお店が沢山ある学芸大学駅や中目黒まで歩いて行けますし、UberEatsも選び放題、お家は線路が近いものの静かでとても利便性の高い立地です。ホストの家族である猫ちゃんのKuroとRouxは元気で愛らしく見ているだけで癒されます。毎日ゴロンと横になったKuroちゃんのお腹をなでなでしたり、Rouxちゃんの繰り出す猫パンチを受けたりして遊んでました。補助ホストのNoviiさんには私がゆっくり過ごせているかなど細やかな気配りをしていただき嬉しかったです。お家にいるときはホストで元シェフでもあるKazuhiroさんの作る美味しいお料理やおすすめのワインをご馳走になったり、料理のコツを教えてもらったり、一緒にお料理したり、皆でレストランに行ったりしてめちゃ楽しく幸せな時間を過ごしました！ホストや猫ちゃんとの交流を楽しみたい方、グルメなゲストに大変おすすめのお家です！
20 minutes by train to Shibuya, 5 minutes to the Yutenji (nearest station),3 minutes to a convenience store. you can walk to Gakugei-daigaku and Nakameguro where there are many delicious restaurants, so you can pick all of you want in UberEats. the house is close to a rail line but It’s quiet and very convenient location. The host's family, the cats Kuro and Roux, are very energetic and adorable. I played with Kuro and Roux every day. I'm glad that the auxiliary host, Novii took great care of me, so I could spend a relax time. When I’m at home, I sometimes enjoyed a wines and delicious dishes made by host and former chef Kazuhiro, I got some tips on cooking, cooked together, went to restaurants with Kazuhiro and Novii. I had a really fun and happy time! This house is highly recommended for those who want to enjoy interacting with lovely hosts and cats, and for gourmet guests!

すごくおすすめです。
家は駅から近くとても綺麗でホストさんもとても良い方達で快適です。
あとホストさんが元シェフでご飯がとても美味しいです。マジで上手いです。本当にうまいです。
また、たまにホストさんのお友達や以前泊まってた人と一緒にご飯を食べる機会もあり、本当に楽しかったです。約3週間ありがとうございました！

とても清潔で気配りのされたお家でした。
気配りがありつつも、気兼ねなく過ごせる雰囲気があり、ホストの方々との夕食はとても楽しかったです。
ねこ好きの私たちには、フレンドリーな猫ちゃん達との時間もとても嬉しかったです。
ご利用を考えている方には、ぜひおすすめできる場所です。

親しみ深い、とてもゆっくりできるお家でした。
今回は様々な体験もさせて頂き毎日がとても楽しかったです。
また、宜しくお願い致します。
最高でした！また来ます！

今回もお世話になりました。
とてもゆっくり出来るお家です♪
猫ちゃんたちも可愛すぎます！
また、利用したいと思います。
部屋は綺麗です、猫たち可愛かった、かずひろさん色々な料理作って一緒に食べたり、酒を飲んだり、アニメも一緒に見たので、本当にお世話になりました、ありがとうございました^ ^

娘と2人でお世話になりました。
駅から程近く、スーパーもコンビニも近いロケーションで過ごしやすかったです。
そして、清潔に手入れされたお家とホストさん、フレンドリーな猫ちゃんたちに会えて、とてもゆったりした時間を過ごしました。
自信を持ってお勧めできるホストさんです。
また機会があれば、是非伺いたいです♪

目黒川の桜を楽しみたくて、せっかくなら猫のいるこちらを予約しました。
なにより元シェフのKazuhiroさんのお料理がとっても美味しく、胃袋をわしづかみにされます！
ホストのお2人のホスピタリティ、いろんなお話ができてとても刺激になりました。
タオルも毎日洗いたてのものを出していただきました。
祐天寺〜学芸大学はカフェやおしゃれな飲食店が多く、ロケーション抜群。
渋谷、原宿、新宿に乗り換えなしで行けるのも便利ですね。
もちろん猫ちゃん達にも癒されました〜。

とても優しくて話しやすかったです。
ネコたちも可愛くてとてもいい時間を過ごせました！

Highly recommended!(especially to cat lover!)  
Kazuhiro and Novii are great hosts! House is very close to Metro station(5mins walk), and room I stay was quiet. Cats are cute and well-behaved. Internet is fast. 
I will definitely consider coming back in the future!

祐天寺駅から歩いてすぐです。ホスト在宅型宿泊先で猫が3匹います。家は綺麗でモダンなお宅でこだわりのある感じ。初日から食卓を囲んで楽しく快適に過ごさせて頂きました。お二人とも気さくな方で私達が快適に過ごせる様色々声をかけてくれました。ダイニングキッチンにある畳のオープンスペースに布団。常時エアコン管理で猫がいるため窓が開けられません。窓を暗くさせるシャッターやカーテン等がないので暗くしなくても寝れる方、大丈夫な方向けです。バスルームもとても新しく清潔極まりなく、洗濯機は乾燥まで可能で便利でした。湯船にも何度か入らせて頂きました。一回ホームパーティーも企画してくれてホストの友人方と楽しいひとときを過ごさせて頂きました。宿泊のみならずホストとの交流等が好きな方におすすめです。息子も猫ちゃんたちに癒されてとても気に入っておりました。
It's always a wonderful time! I love staying in this cozy, warm, and delightful home. Great hosts, a lot of fun, and very comfortable.

大変綺麗なお家でアクセスもよく、過ごしやすかったです。
猫ちゃんたちも可愛く癒されました🐱
美味しいお料理も振舞って頂けるので充実した旅行を送れました。また利用させていただきたです。
とても素敵な方々で親切にしてもらいました。

Kazuhiro san and Nobue san were great hosts! Prepared dinner for us, helped us a lot with getting settled in and were super accommodating. The three cats were lovely too. Convenient location near yutenji station with supermarkets and convenience stores. All around a pleasant stay! :)
The house is just nearby the station, really quiet and elegant place. Mr. Kazuhiro and Mrs. Nobue are very friendly and hospitable,  Mr. Kazuhiro is sooooo good at cooking, he made amazing meal.

Kazuhiro san and Novii san were very welcoming hosts! I was invited to have dinner with their family and it was an interesting experience. Kazuhiro san even taught me how to make dashi tamagoyaki😂
Location is convenient too, there is a supermarket just right at Yutenji station.
The entrance of the home is a little narrow so you may struggle a bit if you have a lot of baggage, but otherwise its a cozy house!
If you like cats and enjoy meeting new people this is a great place! (-^〇^-)
Great space, friendly and helpful host

You will absolutely never regret staying here. Mr. Kazuhiro and Ms. Nobue are wonderful. When i arrived, they helped me bring in all of my bags and later even took the time to prepare and have dinner with me! Their cooking is phenomenal! Their cats are also loving, friendly, and sweet. They are also conviently located just down the road from a major train station.
The house itself is clean, well kept, and comfortable.
Please don’t miss your opportunity to expeience Tokyo here!

Kazuhiro and Nobue were such great hosts. They were very warm and accommodating and their cats are so cute! We shared a couple of meals together and they definitely made the extra effort to make me feel like home. Would recommend staying with them and would love to stay there again when I go back to Tokyo.

덕분에 잘 쉬다갑니다~!
일본어가 서툴었는데도 재촉하지 않고 끝까지 말할 수 있게 기다려주셔서 늘 고마웠습니다
고양이도 수다 고양이라서 아침마다 깨워줍니다

Kazuhiro et son épouse Nobuei m'ont reçu à midi et m'ont invité à déjeuner et comme il est un excellent cuisinier qui a travaillé dans un restaurant (français), les plats étaient excellents. Le soir, au retour de ma ballade, ils m'ont proposé de rester dîner également et à préparé plein de petits-enfants typiques des izakayas.  On a discuté et mangé pendant 2h, c'était vraiment super. Ils ont 4 chats adorables dont un est resté coucher avec moi ;)

이케부쿠로, 요코하마 등 가고싶은 지역을 다니기에 좋고 만족하는 위치였습니다. 역과 거리도 가깝고, 숙소에 가는 길에 편의점도 많고 마트나 드럭스토어도 있었습니다. 저와 친구는 2층에서 머물렀고 개별 침구와 싱크대가 있어서 매우 편안했습니다. 아주 친절하고 구비품이 늘 전부 채워져 있으며 숙소를 꼼꼼히 신경쓰고 계시는 게 느껴졌습니다. 아침 커피도 챙겨주시고, 저녁에 요리도 해주시는 등 매우 다정한 분들이었습니다. 커피와 요리 모두 너무 맛있었습니다!! 2층에 아주 귀엽고 착한 고양이 키쨩과 함께 할 수 있었습니다. 그리고 동네가 예쁘고 조용합니다. 다음에 도쿄에서 숙박할 기회가 생긴다면 또 방문하고 싶은 곳입니다! 정말 감사했습니다😀
Thank you so much for the great food and wine！I will come back with my alcoholic friend LOL. Ki chan the cat is soooooo kawaii
时隔4年再次有机会来到Kazuhiro家里居住，度过了愉快的周末。我们共进晚餐（和猫咪一起），虽然不能喝酒，但是聊得很愉快。我们用英语和日语交流，Kazuhiro的厨艺每次都让我叹为观止，用英语交流的时候Nobu会帮忙翻译。Rou和Kuro比上次见到更胖了（笑），Ki看上去有点凶，但熟悉了也会让人摸。因为一些限制只能居住很短的时间，下次有机会一定再来。

Mr. Kazuhiro and Ms. Nobue are great people. Very hospitable, friendly, and fun to be around. I learned a lot and experienced life in Japan thanks to them.
Their cats are very cute. Kiko likes telling you where and when she likes to be pet, and Roux is very soft and likes rolling on the bathroom mat. I didn't see much of Kuro, but I did get to pet him a few times.
The location is very convenient. It's very near the station, and it takes very few turns to reach the house. The station itself is just 3 stops away from Shibuya station, which you can then use to go to other popular destinations along the Yamanote circle. That said, if you use a JR pass, it does not cover the Toyoko line, which links Shibuya station to Mr. Kazuhiro's place. A suica card or a coin purse of 100 yen coins helps here.
The place also feels more like a small quiet neighborhood than a big city. There's a lot of varying cafes and bakeries to try out during your stay. Just walking around the neighborhood is great.
一次非常美好的回忆，房子位置很好找。三只猫也很友好尤其是kiko一直陪着我们~kazu先生的酒相当的棒~我们边喝边相谈到深夜~早饭也相当的好吃，厨艺真的惊艳到我们~希望下次还能来相见

Nobue And Kazuhiro are the hosts ever! I had such a good time at their place and I felt so comfortable and welcomed. Can’t wait to come back to Tokyo and stay with them again. I’m so grateful I got the chance so stay with them in their beautiful home.

一晩の気分転換になればとリスティングを探しており、せっかくならかわいい猫ちゃんたちが迎えてくれると評判の、こちらのお部屋におじゃましました。
ホストのKazuhiroさんは、元シェフとのことでお料理楽しみにしておりましたが、そこらのお店じゃかなわないくらいの素晴らしいお料理ばかりで、胃袋をわしづかみにされました！
補助ホストの素敵な奥様の、気配りあふれる暖かなおもてなしにも癒やされました。
お2人のホスピタリティは、まさにプライスレスです。
設備面も、清掃が隅々まで行き届き、かつおしゃれな内装で、ホテルにひけをとらない雰囲気です。
最寄り駅の祐天寺には徒歩わずか5分。近隣にカフェやおしゃれな飲食店が多く、電車に乗ってしまえば渋谷、原宿、新宿方面にも直通と、立地も最高です。
もちろん、猫のルークちゃん、キーちゃん、クロちゃんもかわいくフレンドリーで、ホスピタリティ抜群です!!
皆様にお勧めしたい、でもほんとは独り占めしたいくらいの(笑)とっておきのリスティングです💖

kazuhiro and Nobue are some of the kindest people you will come across. They made me feel at home throughout my stay, and it was great to have a conversation with them.
Their place is very beautiful and only an 8 minute walk to the nearest station. Making it easy to get to where you need to go. The streets are quiet and feel safe.
Their place is beautiful and gets lots of sun in the morning. The cats are loving and will want to cuddle up with you. I'm glad to have stayed here. This experience has made my trip to Japan that much more special.
とても綺麗なおうちでゆっくり快適に過ごすことができました。子供二人連れでしたが、子供達が過ごしやすいように工夫してくださったり、困り事がないか聞いてくださったりと心強く感じました。みんなで美味しいお酒を飲みながら手作りのおつまみを楽しみました。手作りの梅酒がとても美味しかったです。柚子胡椒の面白い食べ方も教えていただきました。ホストとの交流も楽しみたい方には最適だと思います。

听完Coldplay演唱会回家以及很晚了，温柔的Nobue也为我们留了门。第二天Kazuhiro请我们吃晚餐，红酒超棒！还一起看了乐队纪录片，十八岁的Chris对着镜头说：Coldplay一定会成为世界第一的乐队！
虽然二楼是开放式空间，对于情侣旅行或者家庭旅行者多少会有些不方便，“卧室”没有门，隐私感会缺乏，但也是种新奇的体验。

È stato un piacere assoluto condividere una notte con Kazuhiro-san e Nobue-san. Gentilissimi e molto disponibili. Assolutamente consigliato, spero di ritornarci.
Grazie mille!

This Airbnb is an incredibly wholesome and cozy place to stay. Kazuhiro and Nobue are wonderfully welcoming hosts who made our short stay truly unforgettable. Their home is so inviting and it feels like being part of a loving family every day. On top of that, they have three absolutely adorable cats that make their home even more perfect. Kazuhiro and Nobue graciously invited us to one of the best home-cooked meals we've ever had! The amenities are excellent, the beds are comfortable, and the location near the station is ideal. If you're a cat lover, this is a must-stay place! We will definitely be booking our future stays here.

Easily the best Air BnB experience I've ever had! Kazuhiro and Nobue treat you like family - they cooked me dinner and breakfast, gave me local recommendations, and were incredibly sweet and kind. Their cats and baby are so cute! And the neighborhood is quiet and so cool (incredible thrift stores). If you're looking for an Air BnB that feels like home and want to get to know two wonderful humans, this is the place for you.

這是我在日本住過最棒的地方。
兩位主人Kazuhiro和Novi用心接待我，我體驗到道地的日本美食（Kazuhiro 大廚精心準備）、周邊的美麗的風景、感受日本的文化。
對於一個外國人來說，如此深度的互動才能真正認識不同的國家，我非常滿足！
另外我的起居作息也都很滿意，雖然共用同一個房子，但還是保有自己的空間（和可愛的貓咪同居也很棒），房間的格局設計的很棒。
未來一定會再次造訪！
猫咪太可爱了。第一次见到那么黏人的猫。房东对我的照顾也非常周到，而且房东的厨艺实在是太棒了。第一天晚上房东邀请了我吃饭，菜都是他亲手做的，还喝了好多红酒。这应该是我住过最好的airbnb了。

An absolutely wonderful experience. Kaz and Nobue were great hosts who were incredibly welcoming and hospitable. In a very nice touch, when I arrived, they invited me to have dinner with them and share their food and drink.
This airbnb is great value for your money. Their home is in a perfect location, an easy walk to the metro station and the action but quite and removed. I would recommend to anyone looking to experience life in Tokyo.

사랑스러운 집입니다. 주인 부부께서 친절하게 맞아주시고, 사람을 좋아하는 고양이와 행복한 시간을 보내고 왔습니다! 저녁에는 호스트분들과 근사한 저녁식사를 했고 아침을 먹고 가겠다고 말씀드리니 산도와 라떼를 준비해주시며 편하게 준비하고 체크아웃 할 수 있도록 배려해주셨습니다.
침실 자체는 오픈형으로 완전히 사생활을 보장받을 수 있는 것은 아니지만, 그것을 감안해도 너무너무 훌륭한 시간을 보낼 수 있습니다! 다음에도 또 방문하려고 합니다!!!
Kazuhiro and Novii are wonderful, kind, and caring hosts! Their home is comfortable and their cats are friendly :). I would definitely stay here again!

Highly recommended, worth every penny.
Firstly, it is exactly as pictured, right down to the furniture, and is as squeaky clean as the pictures show. There is zero animal smell if that's what anyone was worried about, and their animals are all well taken care of.
As a solo female traveller, I felt extremely safe walking back at night, the area is well lit and easy to navigate.
Kazuhiro and Nobue are wonderfully gracious hosts. I arrived late from the airport so they had a meal ready for me and I felt so at home.
If being out of the way is a worry, the station is super convenient. One station away is Naka-Meguro, and from there the Hibiya line passes through Tsukiji, Ginza and Akihabara to name a few. Buses are also really convenient.
10/10, will love to come again

Such a great stay! Kazuhiro and Nobue were such amazing hosts. They have the cutest baby I have ever seen and three adorable cats. Really sweet place. They cooked me an incredible meal and made me feel so welcome. They also provided very clear instructions on how to get to the house and very helpful in offering recommendations! The bed was incredibly comfortable and everything was so clean and cozy. Will definitely recommend to anyone traveling to Tokyo as it’s in a great location and would stay again myself! Thank you!!!!! 💓💓💓💓
친절한 부부와 사랑스러운 아기 그리고 귀여운 고양이들까지! 맛있는 저녁과 함께한 최고의 에어비엔비입니다! 꼭! 다시 만나길🙏
일단 역과 매우 가까워서 좋았고, 주변으로 시부야 나카메구로 등등 관광지와도 매우 접근성이 좋습니다. 호스트분들도 매우매우 친절하시고, 저녁식사도 매우 좋았어요! 그리고 아주귀여운 아기와 고양이가 있답니다! 저는 기회가 된다면 또 머물고싶어요.
Awesome homestay! great experience for my first homestay! Wonderful food was cooked and served to be eaten by me :)

The place is well located and has a great design making it a great place to stay for us. What makes the space extra special are the two hosts and the way they see the world and others.
I am most grateful for the stay, the flexibility of the hosts, their willlingness to communicate and make our stay go well. We were able to do everything our tight schedule wished us to do and more thanks to their flexibility and kindness.
With Gratitude

혼자 여행 온 만큼 관광지보다 일반적인 일본의 분위기 같은 걸 느껴보고 싶어서 간 곳인데 너무나 좋았습니다. 조용한 주택가 사이에 있는 숙소였고 주변 분위기나 편의 시설도 좋습니다. 중심지인 시부야나 신주쿠도 엄청 가깝구요. 게다가 호스트 분들의 친절함과 배려 등은 기본에, 같이 식사하거나 이야기 하는 시간은 너무나 즐거운 시간이였어요. 추천해주시는 장소나 가는 길 등에 대해서도 잘 알려주시고 고양이들과 아기가 너무나 귀여웠습니다. 저에게 해주셨던 음식들이 기억에서 잊혀지지가 않아요 너무 좋았습니다 도쿄에 또 오게된다면 꼭 다시 방문하고 싶은 곳 이에요
Kazuhiro and Nobue are fantastic hosts! They are incredibly kind and helpful if you have any questions about what to do in the area.

I had a wonderful stay with Kazuhiro and Nobue — they provided me a meal when I arrived and made shabu shabu (しゃぶしゃぶ) and nabeyaki udon (鍋焼きうどん) during my stay.  They also have two friendly and adorable kitties. I hope to come again when visiting Japan in the future. ありがとうございました！😊

Kazuhiro San and Novii San are such lovely wonderful hosts. My wife and I had never stayed in an airbnb that shared a living space with someone and didn’t know what exactly to expect. We were both blown away by the kindness, coziness, and genuine hospitality that they provided us. If I could rate more than 5 stars I would.
Communication was incredibly clear and quick at seemingly all hours of the day.
They made us a truly incredible dinner and set up a warm bath promptly afterwards. Their three cats are all adorable and quite friendly, which made us both feel right at home. There couldn’t have been a better way to start our visit. The worst part of the entire experience was having to leave.

호스트 님이 너무 친절하셨고 잘 지낼 수 있도록 배려 해 주셔서 너무 좋았습니다.
일본 가정집을 체험할 수 있는 새로운 경험이 되었고 마지막 날 직접 해 주신 요리가 최고 였습니다.

Kazuhiro & Nobue were very accommodating hosts and invited me to dinner! They are great and help you with a lot of things.
The space was very clean and the cats were super friendly.
The location is great because it's in a quiet area of Tokyo but not far from the station.

다이칸야마, 나카메구로와 가까우며 조용한 주택가에 위치해있어 도심에 지친 여행자에게 추천하고 싶습니다. 호스트인 카즈히로상과 노비상께서 편안하게 머물 수 있도록 저녁식사와 목욕물을 준비 해주셨습니다. 그리고 같이 좋아하는 만화에 대해 이야기했던 시간이 즐거웠습니다.
고양이 3마리도 정말 착하고 귀여웠어요.
다음에 도쿄에 갈때 또 머물예정입니다🥰🥰🥰

KazuhiroさんとNoviiさんと過ごした時間は、本当に忘れられない素晴らしい体験でした。急なスケジュール変更で新しい宿泊先を探していたところ、幸運にもKazuhiroさんの家を選ぶことができました。滞在中、彼らはとても親切に対応してくれました。チェックインの時間も柔軟で、Noviiさんに連絡するだけで済みました。
宿泊体験も素晴らしく、「こはる」ちゃんはとても可愛くて、目を見て笑ってくれるのがとても印象的でした。三匹の猫たちもとても可愛かったです。特に二階に宿泊すると、キーちゃんと多く触れ合えます。キーちゃんは元野良猫ですが、とても人懐っこく、特に頭を撫でられるのが好きです。KazuhiroさんとNoviiさんの温かいおもてなしに心から感謝しています。ルウとクロも非常に良い性格で、お風呂の後に触れ合うことができました。
夜には、Kazuhiroさん（元フレンチ料理人）が友人を招いて一緒に食事をしました。食卓の雰囲気はとても良く、言葉の壁を感じることなく楽しい時間を過ごせました。料理も期待通りの素晴らしさでした！
また、急な行程変更で翌日は特に予定がなかったのですが、Noviiさんが多くの観光スポットや地元のラーメン店を教えてくれました。残念ながら時間の都合でラーメンは食べられなかったので、次回は必ず行きたいと思います。
今、新幹線で大阪に向かっていますが、次回東京に来る時もぜひまた皆さんにお会いしたいです！
Great place, friendly cats and a great dinner that they made for me.

A great place to stay in Tokyo if you’re looking for a more personal experience. Kazuhiro, Nobue, Koharu, and the cats made for great company during my time with them. I can’t recommend their place enough and hope to connect with them again in the future!
房东特别热情体贴，有问必答，猫猫和小朋友也超乖超可爱☺️到达的晚上还邀请我一起进餐，贴心地准备我爱吃的食物，还有好喝的酒！让身在异国的我感受到了家的温暖！
兩位房東都非常溫暖及貼心、煮的咖啡非常好喝之外煮飯也很好吃！家裡、浴室維持的很乾淨，離地鐵站近，到澀谷、中目黑等地都很近，三隻貓咪都很親人可愛！！！真的是一個很棒的房源！適合一個人來東京玩的住宿～

숙소도 깨끗하고 노비상과 키즈히로상 너무 친절하고 내집같은 마음으로 지낼수있게 해주셔서 감사했습니다. 집외에는 원래 잠 잘 못자는 편인데 엄청 숙면했어요!
만들어주신 요리도 맛있었습니다.
물론 아가도 고양이도 모두 귀여웠어요!

I had sa short stay this time at Kazuhiro's place, and it was another wonderful experience, as it was my second time there. I was very happy to see him and his lovely family again. I highly recommend this home for a unique experience in Tokyo. It truly felt like home, and I was warmly welcomed like a friend. Kazuhiro and Nobue are incredibly kind, and Kazuhiro is an amazing cook!
It was great to reconnect after a few years with this wonderful family, their beautiful baby girl, and their amazing cats. I will definitely come back again! Arigato gozaimashita!

Kazuhiro was an amazing host, he is really responsive and provided clear instructions. He's also friendly and a great cook. He cooked a great dinner and I truly enjoyed that while having a nice chat. The space is per advertised and it was nice having a cat greet you good morning. Location is in a quiet and private neighbourhood.

This was such an enjoyable stay! We were welcomed by the whole family - a wonderfully kind couple, their adorable baby, and three beautiful friendly cats.
The hosts are very communicative, helpful, and fed us so well. Kazuhiro is a great chef and bakes his own fresh bread!
The two beds were very comfortable, and the room had great air conditioning. There is a sweet little cat named Kiko that meows occasionally and checked in on us here and there. The shower had perfect water pressure and heat.
The location was perfect for us - about 45min taxi drive from Haneda airport, less than 10min walk to a subway station, and a very quiet safe neighborhood. We would definitely stay here again if we come back to Japan! Wish this stay were longer 💛

Kazuhiro and his wife absolutely went above and beyond for my short stay, it set the tone first thing when I checked in late on a rainy night, and they asked if I have eaten yet & wiped dry my suitcases. Even though it was late, they prepped food & drinks for us to dine and chat to get to know each other. Their openness and hospitality was next level, and I felt right at home even though I was only there for a short bit. The bed was comfy too & kee chan the rescue cat is a great companion!
It’s not just accommodation, it’s an experience!

정말 친절하셨습니다.
어느정도의 영어나 일본어를 할 줄 알면 의사소통도 문제 없구요.
아이와 고양이들이 다 너무 귀여워서 머무르는 동안 행복했습니다^^
처음 들렀을 때, 저희를 위해 타코야끼 재료를 준비해주셔서 만들어 먹었는데, 그 경험이 잊혀지지 않을 것 같네요 =) 머무른 날이 전혀 아쉽지 않은, 매우 의미있는 날이었습니다.
정말 감사합니다 ^^

This place is everything you can think of for a place to stay. The location is just beside the train station with multiple convenience stops opening 7-24. The host is clear in communicating the expectations and in general these rules are really reasonable. It's clean to the last corner and I even scare that I may mess up the cleanliness. The cat that stays in the second floor is also super friendly. You can save a visit to the cat cafe. I will definitely come back for my next visit.

Wonderful stay! Kazuhiro and Novii do a great job making you feel welcome and at home.
If the purpose of Airbnb is to get a more local experience in a foreign country, this does the job perfectly. Everything was great.

Novii and Kazuhiro were amazing hosts!!! They went above and beyond to make sure things moved smoothly for my trip, such as picking me up from the train station since it had been raining, offered to drive me again when I left at 4:40AM because rain was in the forecast 😅 the bed was comfortable, home was very clean! Kazuhiro cooked dinner upon my arrival (late) and again he shared sake and wine with me and we had homemade sushi hand rolls! Very very sweet people.

Had a lovely stay at Kazu and Nobi’s place. They were very warm and welcoming hosts and we felt like fast friends. We shared some great meals together lovingly crafted by Kazu-san, and the cats were very friendly and cute. The location is great with easy access to the train in a cool neighborhood. If you want a home-like atmosphere and are open to sharing the space, this is a great option to get a real homestay feel in Tokyo!
